Genesis1:1 Xoossi koyro salonne sa7a medhdhides.
Genesis1:2 He wode sa7ay lo7i giigibeennanne aykkoyka baynda mela dees; ciimmasohota dhumay goozi oykkides; Xoossa Ayanay haaththafe bollara may7i uttides.
Genesis1:3 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:4 Poo7oy lo7o gididayssa Xoossi be7idi poo7o dhumappe shaakkides.
Genesis1:5 Xoossi poo7oza
Genesis1:6 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:7 
Genesis1:8 Xoossi he gufanththoza
Genesis1:9 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:10 Xoossi he mela sohoza
Genesis1:11 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi
Genesis1:12 Hessa gishshas biittay miththinne maata dumma dumma qommon mokisiin Xoossi hessi lo7o gididayssa be7ides.
Genesis1:13 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika heedzdzanththo gallassa.
Genesis1:14 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:15 biitta bollan poo7isana mala istti salo gufanththon poo7etto» giin hanides.
Genesis1:16 Xoossi nam7u gita poo7ota
Genesis1:17 Xoossi istta ha biitta bollan poo7isana mala
Genesis1:18 
Genesis1:19 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika oydanththo gallassa.
Genesis1:20 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:21 Histtidi Xoossi abban diza gita do7ata
Genesis1:22 Xoossi isttas
Genesis1:23 Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika ichchashanththo gallassa.
Genesis1:24 Hessafe guye Xoossi
Genesis1:25 Xoossi do7ata istta qommon qommon
Genesis1:26 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi
Genesis1:27 Hessaththo Xoossi as ba leemison bana misatissidi medhdhides; izi istta addenne macca ooththi medhdhides.
Genesis1:28 Xoossi isttas
Genesis1:29 Hessafe simmiin Xoossi
Genesis1:30 Qasseka ha biittaa bolla diza mehenne do7a ubbaas
Genesis1:31 Xoossi ba medhdhidayssa ubbaaka xeellidi daro lo7o gididayssa be7ides. Gadey qammidessinne wontides; hessika usuppunththa gallassa.
Genesis2:1 Salo bollanne sa7a bolla dizay wuri hayssaththo oosetti polettides.
Genesis2:2 Xoossi ba ooththida ooso usuppunththa gallas polidi ba ooththida ooso ubbaafe laappunththa gallas shempides.
Genesis2:3 Qasse Xoossi laappunththa gallassaa anjjidessinne dumma gallas ooththides; ays giikko Xoossi ba ooththiza ooso wursidi shempiday he gallassanna.
Genesis2:4 Saloynne sa7ay medhettiday hessa malanna. GODAY sa7anne salo medhdhida wode
Genesis2:5 sa7a bollan maatay
Genesis2:6 Gidikkoka haaththi biittafe pude maacotti kezidi biitta ubbaa irxxisees.
Genesis2:7 Hessafe guye GODAY biittafe issi as medhdhidi iza siidhen de7o shemppo punnin addezi shemppora dizaade gidides.
Genesis2:8 Kase GODAY arshey mokkiza baggara Edene geetettizason lo7oso giigsidi ba medhdhida addeza heen woththides.
Genesis2:9 GODAY xeellanaas lo7iza
Genesis2:10 Gannate ushshiza shaafa haaththi Edeneppe goggees. Edeneppe kezidaappe guye
Genesis2:11 Koyro shaafaa sunththi Pisoone; Pisooney worqqay diza Hawila geetettiza biittaa yuusho ubbaan goggees.
Genesis2:12 He biittaa worqqay geeshsha worqqa; qasse al7o shittoynne keehi lo7iza shuchchi heen dees.
Genesis2:13 Nam7anththo shaafaa sunththi Giyoone; Giyooney Tophphiya biitta yuusho ubbaan goggees.
Genesis2:14 Heedzdzanththo shaafaa sunththi Xegroose; Xegroosey Asooreppe arshey mokkiza baggara goggees; qasse oydanththo shaafay Efiraaxise geetettees.
Genesis2:15 Addezi Edenen ooththana malanne naagana mala GODAA Xoossay iza efi woththides.
Genesis2:16 Histtidi GODAA Xoossay addeza
Genesis2:17 gido attiin lo7onne iita erisiza miththay teerappe mooppa; ays giikko neni izippe mida gallas tumu hayqqana» gi azazides.
Genesis2:18 Hessafe guye GODAA Xoossay
Genesis2:19 GODAA Xoossay kase meheta do7ata salo kafota ubbaa biittafe medhdhides; qasse addezi istta ay giidi sunththanakko siyanaas izakko ehiin addezi shemppora diza medheteththata ubbaa sunththida sunththay isttas sunth gidi attides.
Genesis2:20 Hessaththo addezi meheta
Genesis2:21 Hessa gishshas GODAA Xoossay addeza dhisko dhiskisidi
Genesis2:22 GODAA Xoossay addezappe ekkida meqeththaa maccas medhdhidi izo addezakko ehides.
Genesis2:23 Ehiin addezi
Genesis2:24 Hessa gishshas asi ba aawaanne ba aayo aggees; ba machcheyra issife dees; istti nam7ay issi asho.
Genesis2:25 Addezinne iza machcheya nam7ayka paxa kallo deettes; gido attiin issay issaas yeellati erettenna.

Genesis3:3 
Genesis3:4 Shooshshay maccassayo
Genesis3:5 Xoossi hessa giday he miththay ayfe intte miikko intte ayfey doyettiin
Genesis3:6 Maccassaya he miththaa ayfey maanaas mal7izayssa
Genesis3:7 Mida wode istta nam7aa ayfeykka doyettiin istti baas paxa kallo dizayssa eridi balase geetettiza miththa hayth sikkidi ba xeessan gixxida.
Genesis3:8 Omarsa wode
Genesis3:9 Gido attiin GODAA Xoossay addeza xeygidi
Genesis3:10 Addezikka
Genesis3:11 GODAA Xoossay iza

Genesis3:17 Addaamekka GODAA Xoossay
Genesis3:18 Biittay nees agunththinne kindichcho mokisana; neni biittafe mokkidayssa maana.
Genesis3:19 Neni biittan simmana gakkanaas daaburan ne cawa gussa ooththada maana; neni biittafe medhettida gishshas biittan simmandasa» gides.
Genesis3:20 Addaamey ba machchiyo Hewaano gi sunththides; ays giikko iza asa ubbaas aayo.

Genesis4:1 Addaamey ba machcho Hewaanira aqiin iza shaarada attuma naa yeladus; «GODAY tana maaddiin attuma naa demmadis» gashe iza Qayeele ga sunththadus.
Genesis4:2 Qasse iza isha Aabeelekka yeladus. Aabeeli dorsa heenththanchcha; Qayeeley biitta goshshanchcha.
Genesis4:3 Undenna wodeppe guye Qayeeley ba gaden mokkida kaththaafe Godaas yarsho shiishshides.
Genesis4:4 Gido attiin Aabeeli ba dorsata giddon koyro yelettida laaqqatappe issaa ekki shukkidi ashozappe handaza yarshides; GODAY Aabeelenne iza yarshoza ekkides.
Genesis4:5 Qayeelenne iza yarsho ekkibeenna; hessa gishshas Qayeeley keehi yiillotides; ba ayfesokka iissides.
Genesis4:6 Histtiin GODAY Qayeele
Genesis4:7 Ne lo7o ooththidaa gididaakko Xoossi ne yarsho ekkenneeshin? Neni lo7o ooththontta ixxiko nagaray ne karen nena naagees; nagaray nena haarana koyees; neni iza xoonana bessees» gides.
Genesis4:8 Hessafe guye Qayeeley ba isha Aabeele
Genesis4:9 GODAY Qayeele
Genesis4:10 GODAY Qayeele
Genesis4:11 Ne kusheppe ne ishaa suuththaa ekkidi mittanaas doona doyda biittaa bolla ha7i neni qanggettadasa.
Genesis4:12 Neni ooththiinkka biittay nees kath immenna; bete asa mala neni biitta bollan toylattana» gides.
Genesis4:13 Qayeeley GODAA
Genesis4:14 Hekko neni tana hach ha biittafe yedeththaasa; tani ne sinththafe qotettana; bete asa mala tani biitta bolla toylattana; tana demmiday oonikka wodhana» gides.
Genesis4:15 GODAY iza
Genesis4:16 Qayeeley GODAA sinththafe kezidi Edene baggafe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Noode geetettiza biittan de7ides.
Genesis4:17 Qayeeley ba machcheyra aqiin iza shaarada Heenooke yeladus; he wode Qayeeley katama giigsidi he katamaa ba naaza sunththan
Genesis4:18 Heenookey Iraade yelides; Iraadey Mahuyaa7eele yelides; Mahuyaa7eeley Matusa7eele yelides; Matusa7eeley Laameeke yelides.
Genesis4:19 Laameekey Aadonne Xiilo geetettiza nam7u machcheta dawuth ekkides.
Genesis4:20 Aaday Yaabaale yeladus; Yaabaaley mehe haarishe yuuyi yuuyi dunkaanen diza asata aawa.
Genesis4:21 Iza ishaa sunththi Yuubaale; Yuubaaley qasse diith diixxizanne susul7e punniza asata ubbata aawa;
Genesis4:22 Xiilay qasse Tubaaliqayne geetettiza naa yeladus; Tubaaliqayney xarqimalappenne biratappe dumma dumma miishshata qoxxizaadde. Tubaaliqayne michcheya Naa7imo geetettawus.
Genesis4:23 Issi gallas Laameekey ba machcheta
Genesis4:24 Qayeele halo kessanaas laappun kushe koshshiko Laameeke halo kessanaas laappun tammanne laappun kushe koshshees» gides.
Genesis4:25 Addaamey ba machcheyra aqiin hara naa yeladus. Yelada «Qayeeley wodhida Aabeele gishshas Xoossi taas hara naa immides» gashe iza Seete gaada sunththadus.
Genesis4:26 Seeteykka attuma naa yelidi iza
Genesis5:1 Addaame zereththi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettides; Xoossi as medhdhida gallas bana misatissidi medhdhides.
Genesis5:2 Addenne maccas ooththi medhdhidi istta anjjides. Istta medhdhidi as gi sunththides.
Genesis5:3 Addaamey 130 layth de7idi bana misatiza attuma naa yelidi iza
Genesis5:4 Addaamey Seete yelidaappe guye 800 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:5 Addaamey mulera 930 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:6 Seetey 105 layth de7idi Heenoose yelides;
Genesis5:7 Seetey Heenoose yelidaappe guye 807 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:8 Seetey mulera 912 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:9 Heenoosey 90 layth de7idi Qaynaane yelides;
Genesis5:10 Heenoosey Qaynaane yelidaappe guye 815 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:11 Heenoosey mulera 905 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:12 Qaynaaney 70 layth de7idi Malal7eele yelides;
Genesis5:13 Qaynaaney Malal7eele yelidaappe guye 840 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:14 Qaynaaney mulera 910 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:15 Malal7eeley 65 layth de7idi Yaareede yelides;
Genesis5:16 Malal7eeley Yaareede yelidaappe guye 830 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:17 Malal7eeley mulera 895 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:18 Yaareedey 162 layth de7idi Heenooke yelides;
Genesis5:19 Yaareedey Heenooke yelidaappe guye 800 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:20 Yaareedey mulera 962 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:21 Heenookey 65 layth de7idi Maatusaala yelides;
Genesis5:22 Maatusaala yelidaappe guye Heenookey 300 layth Xoossa ufayssishe de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:23 Heenookey mulera 365 layth de7ides;
Genesis5:24 Izi Xoossa ufayssishe diin Xoossi iza ekkida gishshas beettontta dhaydes.
Genesis5:25 Maatusaalay 187 layth de7idi Laameeke yelides;
Genesis5:26 Maatusaalay Laameeke yelidaappe guye
Genesis5:27 Maatusaalay mulera 969 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:28 Laameekey 182 layth de7idi attuma naa yelidi
Genesis5:29 «Ha naazi GODAY qanggida biitta bollan nuna nu daaburappe shempisana» giidi Nohe gi sunththides.
Genesis5:30 Laameekey Nohe yelidaappe guye 595 layth de7ides; hara attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
Genesis5:31 Laameekey mulera 777 layth de7idi hayqqides.
Genesis5:32 Nohey 500 layth de7idi Seeme
Genesis6:1 Asi biitta bolla darida wode asas macca nayti yelettida;
Genesis6:2 «Xoossa nayta» geetettiza medheteththati asa macca nayti medho lo7o gididayssa be7idi isttafe ba dooridayta machcho ekkida.
Genesis6:3 GODAY
Genesis6:4 He wodenne hessafe guye Xoossa nayti asa macca nayta machcho ekkiin nayti yelettida wode wogga wolqqama asati biitta bollan deettes. Isttika beni wode olas minonne erettida asa.
Genesis6:5 GODAY he wode biitta bollan diza asaa iitateththi daridayssanne istti ba wozinan qoppizayssi wuri ubba wodekka iita xalala gididayssa be7ides;
Genesis6:6 GODAY as ha biitta bollan medhdhida gishshas modhettides; ba wozinan keehi seelettides.
Genesis6:7 Hessa gishshas GODAY
Genesis6:8 Gido attiin Nohey GODAA sinththan sabettides.
Genesis6:9 Nohey hanidayssi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettides. Nohey xillo asa; izi ba woden diza asaa giddon suure asa; Nohey Xoossara giiga duus de7ides.
Genesis6:10 Nohey Seeme
Genesis6:11 He wode biitta bolla diza asi wuri Xoossa sinththan tunides; biittay wuri makkallan kumides.
Genesis6:12 Xoossi duge biitta xeellishin biitta bolla diza asay wuri tunidayssa be7ides.
Genesis6:13 Hessa gishshas Xoossi Nohe
Genesis6:14 Hessa gishshas mino miththafe nees markabe keexxa; he markabeza giddon kifile ooththa; histtada soo baggaranne kare baggara shidan meesha.
Genesis6:15 Markabeza keexxashe iza adussateththi 300 wadha
Genesis6:16 Markabezas kaara medhdha; kaaraappenne godaappe giddon issi wadha gidizaso doya agga; pengeza markabezas millera kessa; markabeza heedzdzu pooqe kessa keexxa.
Genesis6:17 «Tani saloppe garsan shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaa dhayssanaas ha biitta bollan dhayssa haath yeddiko biittan dizayssi wuri dhayana.
Genesis6:18 Gido attiin tani nenara caaqettana. Neni
Genesis6:19 Istti nenara paxa daana mala shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaafe qommon qommon addenne macca nam7u nam7u histtada markabeza giddo gelththa.
Genesis6:20 Dumma dumma qommo kafotappe
Genesis6:21 Qasse neninne nenara dizayti maana mala dumma dumma qommo kath efada markabeza giddo gelththa» gi azazides.
Genesis6:22 Nohey ubbaaka Xoossi azazida mala ooththides.
Genesis7:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Nohe
Genesis7:2 Neni geesh gidida mehenne do7a ubbaafe iza qommofe qommofe addenne macca laappun laappun
Genesis7:3 
Genesis7:4 Ays giikko laappun gallassafe guye tani oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma biitta bollan ira bukisana; histtada tani medhdhida medheta ubbaa biitta bollafe dhayssana» gides.
Genesis7:5 Nohey GODAY iza azazidayssa ubbaa ooththides.
Genesis7:6 Dhaysa haaththi biitta bolla yiza wode Nohes layththay usuppun xeeta.
Genesis7:7 Nohe
Genesis7:8 Geeshsha meheppenne do7appe
Genesis7:9 Xoossi Nohe azazida malakka addenne macca nam7u nam7u gididi Nohekko markabeza giddo geliin
Genesis7:10 laappun gallassafe guye dhayssa haaththi biitta bolla yides.
Genesis7:11 Nohes usuppun xeetu layth gidishin nam7anththo aginan tammanne laappunththa gallassan he gallassankka biitta giddon diza gita ciimma pulttoy wuri dhuuqqides; salon diza haaththa maskootetikka doyetti wodhdhida.
Genesis7:12 Iray biitta bollan oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu omars bukkides.
Genesis7:13 He gallassan Noheynne iza attuma nayti
Genesis7:14 Isttanne do7a ubbaafe ba qommon qommon
Genesis7:15 Shemppora paxa dizayti wuri nam7u nam7u gididi Nohekko markabezan gelida;
Genesis7:16 Xoossay Nohe azazida mala medheta ubbaafe addenne macca gididi markabeza giddo geliin Nohey giddon dishin GODAY markabeza penge gordides.
Genesis7:17 Dhayssa haaththi oyddu tammu gallas biitta bolla bukkishe gam7ides; haaththi daridi
Genesis7:18 Haaththay biitta bollan keehi dariin markabezi haaththaa bollan tookettides.
Genesis7:19 Saloppe garsara diza dhoqqa zumati wuri mitettana gakkanaas haaththay biitta bollan keehi wolqqafe darides.
Genesis7:20 Haaththay zumata xeerappe aadhdhidi 15 wadha gakkanaas dhoqqu gides.
Genesis7:21 Histtiin biitta bollan shemppora paxa qaaxxiza medheteththati wuri
Genesis7:22 Biitta bollan diza siidhera shempizay wurikka hayqqides.
Genesis7:23 Ha biittan paxa dizay wuri asi
Genesis7:24 Haaththayka 150 gallas gakkanaas biitta bollan gam7ides.
Genesis8:1 Gido attiin Xoossi Nohe
Genesis8:2 Qasse biitta giddon diza ciimma pulttoynne salon diza haaththa maskooteti gordettida; iraykka salon teqettides.
Genesis8:3 Histtiin haaththay wodhdhi wodhdhi bides; he 150 gallassafe guye haaththay wodhdhides.
Genesis8:4 Haaththay wodhdhiin markabezi laappunththa aginan tammanne laappunththa gallassan Araraate geetettiza zuma bolla shempides.
Genesis8:5 Haaththay tammanththo agina gakkanaaska wodhdhi wodhdhi bides; tammanththo aginan koyro gallas zumatas hu7ey beettides.
Genesis8:6 Oyddu tammu gallassafe guye Nohey ba keexxida markabeza maskooteza doydi
Genesis8:7 issi quuro kare kessi yeddiin quurozi haaththi biitta bollafe melana gakkanaas yaanne haa piradhdhishe gam7ides.
Genesis8:8 Qasse Nohey haaththi biitta bollafe wodhdhi wuridaakko beyanaas issi haraphphe kare yeddides.
Genesis8:9 Gido attiin he haraphpheya haaththi biitta ubbaa bollan ha7ikka diza gishshas shempizaso demmabeekku; hessa gishshas simmada markabeza giddon diza Nohekko yiin izi ba kushe yeddidi baakko markabeza giddo ekkides.
Genesis8:10 Qasseka hara laappun gallas gam7idi ha7ikka haraphpheyo markabeza giddofe kessi yeddides.
Genesis8:11 He haraphpheya gadey qammishin izakko simma yashe wogara xeerappe cilila hayth duuththada doonan saxxa ekka yida gishshas haaththi biitta bollafe wodhdhidayssa Nohey erides.
Genesis8:12 Qasse Nohey hara laappun gallas gam7idi he haraphpheyo zaari yeddides; gido attiin he haraphpheya izakko simma yabeekku.
Genesis8:13 Nohey 601 layth de7iin koyro aginan koyro gallas haaththi biitta bollafe xoskides; Nohey markabeza kaaraa qaari xeellidi gadey xoskidayssa be7ides.
Genesis8:14 Nam7anththo aginan nam7u tammanne laappunththa gallassan biittay mulera melides.
Genesis8:15 He wode Xoossi Nohe hizgi azazides
Genesis8:16 «Neni ne machcho
Genesis8:17 Istti yeletti daridi corattana mala shemppora diza medheteththa ubbaafe nenara dizayta
Genesis8:18 Nohey ba naytara
Genesis8:19 Mehey
Genesis8:20 Hessafe guye Nohey GODAAS yarshizaso keelidi geeshsha mehe ubbaafenne geeshsha kafo ubbaafe ekkidi yarshizason xuuggidi yarshides.
Genesis8:21 Histtiin GODAY yarshoza peeno sawizayssa singidi ba wozinan
Genesis8:22 Ha biittay diza wode ubbaan zereththa wodeynne maxa wodey mooceynne hombey
Genesis9:1 Xoossi Nohenne iza nayta
Genesis9:2 Biitta do7ati
Genesis9:3 Ta inttes biittafe mokkiza dumma dumma kaththata immida malakka shemppora paxa diza medheteththati wuri inttes quma gidana.
Genesis9:4 Shemppoy suuththa giddon diza gishshas suuththi izappe gukkontta asho moopite.
Genesis9:5 Tani intte shemppoy izan diza intte suuth meheppenne do7a ubbaafe tumu ta oychchana; qasse asa ubbaafekka iza mala asa suuth oychchana.
Genesis9:6 Xoossi as bana misatissidi medhdhida gishshas asa suuth gussiza oonakka gidikko iza suuththika asa kushen gukkana.
Genesis9:7 Intte yelettite; corattitenne; biitta bolla keehi darite» gi anjjides.
Genesis9:8 Hessafe guye Xoossi Nohenne izara diza iza nayta hizgides;
Genesis9:9 «Histtiin ha7i tani ta caaqo inttenara
Genesis9:10 
Genesis9:11 Tani inttenara caaqettadis; hayssafe sinththan paxa dizay wuri dhayssiza haaththan mulekka dhayenna; ha biittaa dhayssiza haaththi hayssafe guye mulekka deenna» gides.
Genesis9:12 Qasseka Xoossi
Genesis9:13 tani ta zuulla salo bolla essana; izi taappenne ha biitta bolla diza medheteththafe giddon diza caaqozas malata gidana.
Genesis9:14 Tani biittafe bollan shaara ehida wodenne shaara bollan zuullay beettida wode
Genesis9:15 ‹Paxa diza medheteth ubbaa dhayssanaas hayssafe sinththan mulekka dhayssa haaththi yeenna› gaada taappenne inttefe paxa diza dumma dumma qommo medheteththata ubbaafe giddon caaqqida ta qaalaa ta qoppana.
Genesis9:16 Zuullay shaara bolla beettida wode aydekka tani iza beyada taappe Xoossaafenne ha biittaa bollan paxa diza dumma dumma qommo medheteththa ubbaafe giddon caaqo gelida mernaa caaqo qaalaa ta hassa7ana» gides.
Genesis9:17 Xoossi Nohe
Genesis9:18 Markabezappe kezida Nohe nayti Seeme
Genesis9:19 Hayti heedzdzayka Nohe nayta; biitta ubbaan diza asay isttafe yelettides.
Genesis9:20 Nohey goshshanchcha; izi woyne mith toketh oykkides.
Genesis9:21 Issi gallas izi woyneppe oosettida cajje uyi maththottidi ba Dunkaaneza giddon paxa kallo ichchides.
Genesis9:22 Kanaane aawa Kaamey ba aawaa kalloteth be7idi kare kezidi ba ishata nam7atas yootides.

Genesis9:24 Nohey maththoy aadhdhiin beeggidi ubbaafe kaalo naazi ba bolla ooththidayssa eridi
Genesis9:25 «Kanaaney qanggettidaaz gido! Izi ba ishata aylletas aylle gido!» gides.

Genesis9:27 Xoossi Yaafeete biitta aasso! Yaafeete zereththati Seeme zereththatara detto! Kanaaney Yaafeete aylle gido!» gides.

Genesis18:33 GODAY Abrahaamera haasaya wursidaappe guye bides; Abrahaameykka baso simmides.
Genesis19:1 He nam7u kiitanchchati omars Sodoome katama gakkiza wode Looxey he katamaa pengen uttides. Looxey istta be7idi isttara gaagganaas dendi biidi ba hu7e duge biitta gaththi ziggidi
Genesis19:2 «Ta godatoo! Intte aylle taso haa yerketi; intte toho meecetti aqidi wonto maaladora dendidi intte bizaso beeta» gides. Isttika
Genesis19:3 Gido attiin izi istta keehi shoobbida gishshas izara biidi iza soo gelida; izikka isttas uketh uukkidi kawo aaththiin istti mida.
Genesis19:4 Istti ichchontta dishin Sodoome katamaa attumasay wuri naytappe cima gakkanaas issaadeyka attontta yiidi keeththaa yuuyi aadhdhida.
Genesis19:5 Isttika Looxe xeygidi
Genesis19:6 Looxey isttara gaagganaas kare kezidi sohon diza asata bolla kareza guye zaari gordidi
Genesis19:7 isttas
Genesis19:8 Taas adde gelontta nam7u geela7o macca nayti deettes; tani istta inttes kare kessiko intte istta inttena lo7ida mala ooththana dandayeeta; gido attiin hayta asata bolla aykkoka ooththofte; ays giikko istti ta keeth gelidi ta imath gidida» gides.
Genesis19:9 Asati iza
Genesis19:10 Gido attiin he nam7u asati ba kushe kare yeddidi Looxe soo goochchi gelththidi kareza zaari gordida.
Genesis19:11 Hessafe guye istti keeththaa pengen diza asaa guuththafe gita gakkanaas qooqisiin istti pengeza demmanaas koyishe daaburda.
Genesis19:12 He nam7u asati Looxe
Genesis19:13 Ays giikko nuni hayssa katamaa dhayssana goos; ha deraa nagaray keehi daro gididayssa GODAY be7ida gishshas hayssa katamaa dhayssanaas nuna kiittides» gida.
Genesis19:14 Hessa gishshas Looxey ba macca nayta ekkanaas giigsidaytakko biidi isttas
Genesis19:15 Gadey wonttana gishin he kiitanchchati Looxe
Genesis19:16 Gido attiin Looxey shinniin GODAY isttas qadhettida gishshas kiitanchchati iza kushe
Genesis19:17 Kiitanchchati istta katamaappe kessida malakka kiitanchchatappe issay
Genesis19:18 Gido attiin Looxey isttas
Genesis19:19 Tani intte aylley intte sinththan sabettida gishshas tana ashshanaas taas daro qadhettideta; gidikkoka hayssi bashshay tana gakkidi dhayssiko hayqqana gishshas tani pude zumaakko baqatanaas dandaykke.
Genesis19:20 Be7ite! Baqati biidi attanaas matan issi guuththa katamay dawus; ta shemppo ashshanaas hee baqatoo? Iza qeeri katama deekkee?» gides.
Genesis19:21 Gido attiin kiitanchchay
Genesis19:22 Hessa gishshas gede eeson baqata; neni gede gakkanaas tani aykkoka ooththanaas dandaykke» gides; histtiin he katamay sunththi Zo7aare geetettides.
Genesis19:23 Looxey Zo7aare gakkishin buro xalqqey caarides.
Genesis19:24 He wode GODAY tamanne xuuggiza diine Sodoome bollanne Gamoora bolla saloppe bukisides.
Genesis19:25 Hessaththo ooththidi GODAY he zullen diza katamatanne zullen dizaaz ubbaa he katamata giddon diza asaa ubbaanne he biittan diza miththinne maata ubbaa xuuggi dhayssides.
Genesis19:26 Gido attiin Looxe machchiya guye xeellada maxine shuch gidadus.
Genesis19:27 Wonteththa gallas Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi GODAA sinththan kase izi eqqidaso simmi bides.
Genesis19:28 Izi Sodoomenne Gamoora he shoobbaan diza biitta ubbaa duge xeelliza wode wolqqama cuway xuussa tama mala he biittaafe tullu gizayssa be7ides.
Genesis19:29 Xoossi he shoobban diza katamata dhayssida wode
Genesis19:30 Looxey Zo7aaren de7anaas babbida gishshas ba macca nayta nam7atara zuma bolla kezidi gongolo giddon de7ides.
Genesis19:31 Issi gallas bayra naya kaaloyo
Genesis19:32 Hessa gishshas haa ya; woyne ushshu nu aawa ushshi maththosoos; histtidi izara aqidi ane nu aawappe nuus zereth essoos» gadus.
Genesis19:33 He gallassa omarsika ba aawaa woyne ushshu ushshidaappe guye bayraya gelada izara zin7adus; iza izara zin7iza wodekka dendiza wodekka izi eribeenna.
Genesis19:34 Wonteththa gallas bayraya kaaloyo
Genesis19:35 He gallas qamma qasseka woyne ushshu iza ushshidaappe guye kaaloya gelada izara aqadus; iza izara aqada denda biza wode izi eribeenna.
Genesis19:36 Histtidi Looxe macca nayti nam7atikka ba aawaas qanththatida.
Genesis19:37 Bayraya attuma naa yeladus; sunththaaka Mo7aabe gaada sunththadus; izikka hach gakkanaas Mo7aabetas aawa.
Genesis19:38 Qasse kaaloyakka attuma naa yeladus; sunththaaka Beeni-Aame gaada sunththadus; izikka hach gakkanaas Amoonetas aawa.
Genesis20:1 Abrahaamey Mamireppe dendidi Negebe geetettiza biitta biidi Qaadeesenne Shuura geetettiza katamatappe giddon de7ides; Geraare biittan guuththa wode gam7ides.
Genesis20:2 Heen Abrahaamey ba machchiyo Saara
Genesis20:3 Gido attiin Xoossi issi gallassa omars agumon Abimelekkeko yiidi
Genesis20:4 Gido attiin Abimelekkey izira aqibeenna; hessa gishshas
Genesis20:5 Izi
Genesis20:6 Hessafe guye Xoossi agumon izas
Genesis20:7 Ha7i hanno maccassayo izi azinaas zaara; gaasoykka izi nabe gidida gishshas izi nees Xoossaa woossiko neni paxana; gido attiin ne izo zaarontta ixxiko neninne nees dizaazi wuri hayqqanayssa tumappe ne era» gides.
Genesis20:8 Abimelekkey wonteththa gallas maalado ba kawoteththan diza shuumeta ubbaa xeygidi ha yo7oza ubbaa isttas yootiin istti keehi babbida.

Genesis20:11 Abrahaamey

Genesis21:1 GODAY Saara qoppides; kase izis yootida malakka ooththides.
Genesis21:2 Saaray shaarada cimateththan Abrahaames Xoossi gida wodey gakkiin attuma naa yeladus.
Genesis21:3 Saaray izas yelida naaza sunththaa Abrahaamey
Genesis21:4 Abrahaamey naaza Yisaaqa Xoossi bana azazida mala yelettidaappe osppunththa gallas qaxxarides.
Genesis21:5 Iza naa Yisaaqi izas yelettida wode Abrahaames layththay xeeta.
Genesis21:6 Saaray
Genesis21:7 Qasseka Saaray
Genesis21:8 Guuththa naazi diccidi dhanth duuxxides; Yisaaqi dhanththafe duuxxida gallas Abrahaamey gita diggisa diggisides.
Genesis21:9 Gibxeppe yida Aggaara Abrahaames yelida naazi Isma7eeley Yisaaqa leqqizayssa Saaray be7ada
Genesis21:10 Abrahaame
Genesis21:11 Ha yo7ozi ba naaza bochchiza gishshas Abrahaamey daroppe metotettides.
Genesis21:12 Gido attiin Xoossi Abrahaame
Genesis21:13 Qasse tani izi ne zereth gidida gishshas aylley naaza kawoteth histtana» gides.
Genesis21:14 Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi guuththa kaththinne koddan haath ekkidi Aggaaro hashen toossidi izi naazakka izis immidi kessi yeddides; iza baada Bersaabehe geetettiza bazzon toylattadus.
Genesis21:15 Haaththayka koddaafe wuriin iza
Genesis21:16 
Genesis21:17 Xoossi naaza waaso siyides; saloppe Xoossa kiitanchchay Aggaaro xeygidi
Genesis21:18 denda eqqa; naaza denththada ne kushen oykka; tani iza gita kawoteth histtana» gides.
Genesis21:19 Xoossi izis haaththa olla bessiin baada koddan haath kunththadus; naazakka ushshadus.
Genesis21:20 Xoossi naazara dees; naazikka diccidi bazzo biittan wondafe dukkiza as gidides.
Genesis21:21 Izi Paaraane bazzon de7ishin iza aaya izas machcho Gibxeppe ekkadus.
Genesis21:22 He wode Abimelekkey ba wottadarata halaqa Pikoolera Abrahaamekko biidi
Genesis21:23 Neni ta bolla woykko ta nayta bolla woykko ta zereththa bolla baleththon gene ooththontta mala ha7i hayssan Xoossa sinththan taas caaqqa; tani nees ne kiyidayssaththo nenikka taassinne neni imaththateththan diza hayssa biittazas lo7o ooththa» gides.
Genesis21:24 Abrahaamey
Genesis21:25 He wode Abrahaamey Abimelekke aylleti ekkida haaththa olla gishshas Abimelekkes magannides.
Genesis21:26 Gido attiin Abimelekkey
Genesis21:27 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey dorsatanne miizata ehidi Abimelekkes immiin istti nam7ay caaqettida.
Genesis21:28 Abrahaamey meheta giddofe laappun uzzi dorsata shaakkides.
Genesis21:29 Abimelekkey Abrahaame
Genesis21:30 Abrahaamey
Genesis21:31 Heen he nam7u asati caaqettida gishshas he sohoy Bersaabehe geetettides.
Genesis21:32 Bersaabehen caaqo caaqettidayssafe guye Abimelekkeynne iza wottadarata halaqa Pikooley dendidi Filisxeeme biitta simmida.
Genesis21:33 Abrahaamey Bersaabehen Tamarssike geetettiza mith tokkidi heen GODAA Mernaa Xoossa xeygidi goynnides.
Genesis21:34 Abrahaamey Filisxeeme biittan daro wode imaththateththan de7ides.
Genesis22:1 Hessafe guye Xoossi Abrahaame paaccides; Xoossi
Genesis22:2 Xoossi
Genesis22:3 Wonteththa gallas Abrahaamey maalado wonttara dendidi hare caanides; ba aylletappe nam7atanne ba naa Yisaaqa banara ekkidi xuuggiza yarshos gidiza mith qeri ekkidi Xoossi izas yootidaso baanaas dendides.
Genesis22:4 Bishe heedzdzanththa gallas Abrahaamey dhoqqu giidi yarsho yarshanasoza haahon be7ides.
Genesis22:5 Abrahaamey ba aylleta
Genesis22:6 Abrahaamey yarsho miththaa denththidi naaza Yisaaqa toossidi baas tamanne shuka mashsha oykkides; istti nam7ay issife bishin
Genesis22:7 Yisaaqi ba aawa Abrahaame
Genesis22:8 Abrahaameykka
Genesis22:9 Istti Xoossi izas yootidaso gakkida wode Abrahaamey yarsho yarshizaso heen giigsidi miththaa korides; ba naa Yisaaqa qachchidi he miththaa bollan shukkanaas ishisides.
Genesis22:10 Abrahaamey ba naaza shukkanaas kushe yeddidi mashsha ekkides.
Genesis22:11 Gido attiin GODAA kiitanchchay saloppe iza
Genesis22:12 «Naaza bolla ne kushe woththofa; iza aykkoka ooththofa; neni ne mexi issi naazakka tana diggontta gishshas neni Xoossas yayyiza as gididayssa tani ha7i eradis» gides.
Genesis22:13 Abrahaamey dhoqqu giidi xeellishin kacey turan oykettida dharsho be7ides; Abrahaamey biidi he dharshoza ekkidi xuugettiza yarsho yarshides.
Genesis22:14 Hessa gishshas Abrahaamey he sohoza
Genesis22:15 GODAA kiitanchchay saloppe nam7anththo Abrahaame xeygidi
Genesis22:16 «Tani nees tanan caaqqays; neni hayssa ooththida gishshas ne mexi issi naazakka tana diggontta gishshas
Genesis22:17 tani nena tumu anjjana; ne zereththaaka tani salo xoolintte malanne abba doonan diza ace mala ooththada darsana; ne zereththati ba morkketa katamata laattana.
Genesis22:18 Neni taas azazettida gishshas ha kawoteththay wuri ne zereththa baggara anjjettana» gides.
Genesis22:19 Hessafe guye Abrahaamey ba aylletakko simmiin istti wuri issife Bersaabehe dendi bida. Abrahaamey Bersaabehen de7ides.
Genesis22:20 Hessafe simmiin Abrahaames
Genesis22:21 Isttika
Genesis22:22 Aaraame aawa Qamu7eele

Genesis22:24 Erehimo geetettiza iza garadeya qasse Xebaahe
Genesis23:1 Saaray 127 layth de7idaappe guye
Genesis23:2 iza Kanaane biittan diza (Kebroone geetettiza) Qiriyaate-Arba7e katamaan hayqqiin Abrahaamey Saaras yeekkidessinne kayottides.
Genesis23:3 Abrahaamey ba machchey aha achchafe Hiitetakko biidi
Genesis23:4 «Tani intte giddon imaththa; ta machcheyo mooganaas taas intte gadeppe moogoso bayzerketii!» gides.
Genesis23:5 Hiiteti izas
Genesis23:6 
Genesis23:7 Abrahaamey dendi eqqidi Hiiteta halaqata sinththan ziggides.
Genesis23:8 Izi isttas
Genesis23:9 
Genesis23:10 He wode Efrooney katama pengen shiiqida ba asaa Hiiteta giddon dees; hessa gishshas Hiiteti wuri siyishin Abrahaames
Genesis23:11 «Hessa mala gidenna; ta godoo! Ta yootizayssa siya; tani gadezakka iza giddon diza gongolozakka ta nees hayssa asaa sinththan immadis; nekka ne machchey ahaa mooga» gides.
Genesis23:12 Abrahaamey halaqata sinththan qasseka ziggidi
Genesis23:13 asay siyishin Efroone
Genesis23:14 Efrooney Abrahaames zaaridi
Genesis23:15 
Genesis23:16 Abrahaamey Hiite asay siyishin Efrooney gida waaga 400 saqile bira Efroones immides.
Genesis23:17 Mamire katamaa achchan Makipheelen diza Efroone gaden diza gongoloynne he gaden diza miththay wuri
Genesis23:18 katamaa pengen shiiqida Hiite asaa ubbaa sinththan wogan Abrahaame gade gidides.

Genesis24:1 Abrahaamey daro cimmides; GODAY iza ubbaankka anjjides.
Genesis24:2 Abrahaamey baso as ubbaas halaqatizayssanne izappe garsara iza aqota ubbaa ayssiza aylleza
Genesis24:3 Tani istta giddon diza Kanaane macca naytappe ne ta naas machcho oychchontta mala salo sa7a medhdhida Xoossaan ta nees caaqqays;
Genesis24:4 gido attiin ta yelettida biitta ta dabbotakko baada
Genesis24:5 Iza oosanchchazi
Genesis24:6 Abrahaamey
Genesis24:7 GODAA salo Xoossay tana ta aawa sohoppenne ta yelettida biittaafe kessidayssi taas
Genesis24:8 Maccassaya nenara guye yaanaas dosontta ixxiko hayssi tani nena caaqeththida caaqoy nees gometoppo; naaza guye mulekka efoppa» gides.
Genesis24:9 Hessa gishshas oosanchchazi ba godaa Abrahaame wodira bolla ba kushe woththi caaqqides.
Genesis24:10 Hessafe guye oosanchchazi ba godaa gaamellatappe tammata ekkidi ba godaa miishshafekka muuruta muuruta ekkidi bides; Mesphexoomiya geetettiza biittan diza Naakoore katama gakkides.
Genesis24:11 Omarsa wode maccassi haath duuqqanaas yishin katamaappe gaxan haaththa olla achchan ba gaamellata gulbatissidi
Genesis24:12 «GODAWU! Ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossoo! Hach tani qoppada yidayssa taas injjesa; qasse ta godaa Abrahaames kiya ooththa.
Genesis24:13 Beya! Tani hayssa pultto haaththa achchan eqqadis; ha katama asaa macca nayti haath duuqqanaas haa yeettes.
Genesis24:14 Tani
Genesis24:15 Buro izi woosa wursontta dishin Irbiqay haaththa oto tookka ekkada puttu gadus; izo Baatu7eeli yelides; Baatu7eeli Milka naa; Milkay Abrahaame isha Naakoore machcho.
Genesis24:16 Irbiqay daro mala lo7onne gelontta geela7o. Duge wodhdhada pulttozappe ba oto haath kunththada kezadus.
Genesis24:17 He aylley izikko woxxi biidi izo
Genesis24:18 Iza
Genesis24:19 Iza ushshidayssafe guye
Genesis24:20 Attida haaththe eeson haaththa gonggen tigada duuqqanaas haaththa ollay dizaso woxxadus; gaamellati wuri alana gakkanaas haaththaa ollafe duuqqa duuqqa ehada haaththa gonggen tigada ushshadus.
Genesis24:21 Izi qoppidi yida qofaa GODAY injjesidaakko erana mala addezi co7u giidi izo xeellees.
Genesis24:22 Gaamellati haath uyi simmiin addezi ichchash giraame bagga gidiza worqqa sagayotanne 100 giraame gidiza nam7u worqqa sagayota
Genesis24:23 kessidi izo
Genesis24:24 Iza
Genesis24:25 Nuson gidiza happaynne bassoy dees; qasse intteska aqizasoy dees» gadus.
Genesis24:26 Addezi gulbatidi GODAAS goynnishe
Genesis24:27 «Ba kiyateththaanne ba tumaa ta godaappe haassontta ta godaa Abrahaame GODAA Xoossay galatetto! Tani yishin GODAA Xoossay tana ta godaa dabbotaso kaaleththides» gides.
Genesis24:28 Naya woxxa baada
Genesis24:29 Irbiqas Laaba geetettiza ishay dees; Laabay kare kezidi haaththa pultto achchan diza addezakko woxxides.
Genesis24:30 Qalabatenne ba michchey kushen diza sagayota be7ida malanne Irbiqay addezi bana gidayssa yootiin siyida mala kezi biidi addezi gaamellatara pulttoza achchan eqqidayssa demmides.
Genesis24:31 Iza
Genesis24:32 Hessa gishshas addezi soo gelides; Laabay gaamellata caanaa birshidi happanne basso gaamellatas yeggides. Izassinne izara diza asatas toho haath ehides.
Genesis24:33 Qumakka iza sinth aaththides; izi
Genesis24:34 Hessa gishshas izi
Genesis24:35 GODAY ta godaa Abrahaame keehi anjjiin izi duretides; dors
Genesis24:36 Ta godaa machchiya Saaray ba cimateththa layththan izas attuma naa yeliin izi baas dizaaz ubbaa izas immides.
Genesis24:37 Ta goday tana hayssaththo caaqisides; ‹Tani diza Kanaane biitta macca naytappe ta naazas machcho oychchofa;
Genesis24:38 ta aawa asaakko ta zereththaako baada ta naazas machcho oychcha› gides.
Genesis24:39 Tanikka ta godawu
Genesis24:40 Izi
Genesis24:41 Neni ta zaretakko biin istti nees izo immontta ixxiko he wode nees caaqoy gomettenna› gides.
Genesis24:42 «Tani hach hayssa pulttozaakko yida wode GODAWU! Ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossoo! Ne shene gidikko tani biza qofaza injjesa.
Genesis24:43 Be7a; tani ha pulttoza achchan eqqadis; geela7o issiniya haaththe duuqqanaas yiikko tani izo
Genesis24:44 Histtiko iza tana
Genesis24:45 «Tani ta wozinan woossizayssa wursontta dishin Irbiqay ba oto hashen tookka ekkada puttu gadus; duge pulttaako wodhdhada haath duuqqadus; tani izo
Genesis24:46 «Iza eeson ba hasheppe otoza woththada
Genesis24:47 «Tani izo
Genesis24:48 Hessafe guye tani gulbatada GODAAS goynnadis; tani GODAA ta godaa Abrahaame Xoossa
Genesis24:49 Ha7ikka intte ta godaas kiyana malanne ammanettanaa gidikko taas yootite; hessi hanenna giikkoka taas yootite; hessafe guye tani hananayssa ta erays» gides.
Genesis24:50 Laabaynne Baatu7eeli
Genesis24:51 Irbiqa hanno beya; ekkada ba! GODAY gida mala ne godaa naazas machcho gidu» gida.
Genesis24:52 Abrahaame aylley istti gizayssa siyida mala biittan gulbatidi Xoossas goynnides.
Genesis24:53 Ashkarazi bira alleqonne worqqaa alleqo
Genesis24:54 Hessafe guye izikka izara dizayti midanne uyida; histtidi heen aqida; istti maalado wonttara dendiin
Genesis24:55 Gido attiin izi ishaynne izi aaya
Genesis24:56 Izi gidikko
Genesis24:57 Isttika
Genesis24:58 Hessa gishshas Irbiqa xeygidi
Genesis24:59 Histtiin istti ba michcheyo Irbiqa izo dichchizaarira
Genesis24:60 Istti Irbiqa
Genesis24:61 Hessafe guye Irbiqaynne izi garadeti dendidi gaamellata toggidi addezara bida; histtiin ayllezi Irbiqa ekkidi bides.
Genesis24:62 He wode Yisaaqi
Genesis24:63 Issi gallassa omars Yisaaqi ba wozinan qoppidi demba kezidi yuuyishe izi dhoqqu gi xeelliza wode gaamellati yizayta be7ides.
Genesis24:64 Irbiqaykka dhoqqu histta xeellada Yisaaqa beyada gaamellaa bollafe wodhdhadus.
Genesis24:65 Wodhdhada aylleza
Genesis24:66 Qasse ayllezi ba ooththidayssa ubbaa Yisaaqas yootides.
Genesis24:67 Yisaaqi Irbiqa ba aayey Saara dunkaanen efidi izo machcho ekkides; izakka izas machcho gidadus; histtiin izi izo siiqidessinne ba aayey hayqon kayottizayssafe minettides.
Genesis25:1 Qasse Abrahaamey Keexura geetettiza hara machcho ekkides.
Genesis25:2 Iza Zimiraane
Genesis25:3 Yoqishaaney Saabanne Dadaane yelides; Dadaaney Asooreta
Genesis25:4 Midiyaane nayti Eefa
Genesis25:5 Abrahaamey ba haaro ubbaa Yisaaqa laatissides.
Genesis25:6 Gido attiin izi buro paxa dishe ba garadetappe yelida naytas baas dizayssafe woytides. Woytidi ba naa Yisaaqappe istta shaakkidi arshey mokkiza baggara diza dere yeddides.
Genesis25:7 Abrahaamey mulera 175 layth de7ides.
Genesis25:8 Abrahaamey daro wode de7idi lo7o cima cimmidi hayqqides.
Genesis25:9 Iza nayti Yisaaqinne Isma7eeley iza Makipheele geetettiza gongolo duufon moogida; he gongolozi Mamire achchan Hiite Xoohaare naa Efroone gaden dees.
Genesis25:10 Hessika Abrahaamey Hiitetappe shammida gade. Abrahaamey ba machchiya Saaray moogettidason moogettides.
Genesis25:11 Abrahaamey hayqqidaappe guye Xoossi iza naa Yisaaqa anjjides. He wode Yisaaqi
Genesis25:12 Saara aylleya Gibxeppe yida Aggaara Abrahaames yelida naaza Isma7eele yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa.
Genesis25:13 Isma7eele nayti ba sunththaninne ba yeleta maaran haytantta; heytanttika Nebayoote
Genesis25:14 Mishima7e
Genesis25:15 Hadaade
Genesis25:16 Isma7eele nayti haytantta; istta sunththi istta mooththaaninne dizason dizason hayssa; isttas 12 zarkke halaqati deettes.
Genesis25:17 Isma7eeley mulera 137 layth de7idi hayqqides; hayqqidi ba aawatan gaaggides.
Genesis25:18 Isma7eele zereththi Gibxeppe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Hawilappenne Shuurappe giddon Asoore efiza oge achchan de7ida. Istti ba ishata ubbatara morkketeththan de7ida.
Genesis25:19 Abrahaame naa Yisaaqa yeletay hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelides.
Genesis25:20 Yisaaqas layththay 40 gidida wode Irbiqa ekkides; iza Mesphexoomiyan diza Aaraame Baatu7eele nayonne Aaraame dere as Laaba michcho.
Genesis25:21 Yisaaqi ba machchiya maynne gidida gishshas izis GODAA woossiin GODAY iza woosaa siyides; histtiin iza machchiya Irbiqaykka qanththatadus.
Genesis25:22 Gido attiin izi ulo giddon diza nayti mentte gidida gishshas issoy issaara sugettida; histtiin iza
Genesis25:23 GODAY izis
Genesis25:24 Izis yelo wodey gakkiin iza 2 attuma nayta mentte yeladus.
Genesis25:25 Koyro yelettidayssi aarissa; iza bollayka wuri iske xalla; hessa gishshas istti iza Eesawe gi sunththida.
Genesis25:26 Hessafe guye
Genesis25:27 Nayti diccida; Eesawey shankka eriza bazzo as gidides; gido attiin Yaaqoobey dunkaanen diza ashke as gidides.
Genesis25:28 Yisaaqi Eesawe siiqides; ays giikko izi shankkatidayssafe maanaas dosides; gido attiin Irbiqay Yaaqoobe siiqadus.
Genesis25:29 Issi wode Yaaqoobey woxe kaththishin Eesawe gafay wodhishin
Genesis25:30 Eesawey Yaaqoobe
Genesis25:31 Yaaqoobey iza
Genesis25:32 Histtiin Eesawey
Genesis25:33 Yaaqoobey zaaridi
Genesis25:34 Hessafe simmiin Yaaqoobey Eesawes buddenanne misira woxe immiin izi midessinne uyides; hessafe guye dendidi bides; Eesawey ba bayrateththaa kadhides.
Genesis26:1 He biittan kase Abrahaame woden diza koshaappe hara koshay dendides; histtiin Yisaaqi Filisxeeme kawo Abimelekkeko Geraare bides.
Genesis26:2 GODAY Yisaaqas qonccidi
Genesis26:3 Ha biittan guuththa wode uttaashsha; tani nenara gidana; nena anjjana; ays giikko hayssa biittaa ubbaa tani neessinne ne zereththaas immana; tani ne aawa Abrahaames caaqo gelida ufayssa qaalaa minththana.
Genesis26:4 Ne zereththaa tani salo xoolintte mala darsana; hayssa biitta ubbaa ta isttas immana; biitta asay ubbay ne zereththaa baggara anjjettana.
Genesis26:5 Gaasoykka Abrahaamey ta qaalaa siyidi azazettides; ta izas yootidayssa izi ubbaa naagida gishshassa» gides.
Genesis26:6 Hessa gishshas Yisaaqi Geraaren de7ides.
Genesis26:7 He biitta asay Irbiqa gishshas denththidi Yisaaqa
Genesis26:8 Yisaaqi heen daro wode didaappe guye Filisxeeme kawo Abimelekkey maskootera duge xeellidi Yisaaqi ba machcho Irbiqara idimettishe kaa7ishin be7ides.
Genesis26:9 Hessa gishshas Abimelekkey Yisaaqa xeygisidi
Genesis26:10 Histtiin Abimelekkey
Genesis26:11 Hessa gishshas Abimelekkey ba asaa ubbaa
Genesis26:12 Yisaaqi he biittan kath zeriin GODAY iza anjjida gishshas he layththan xeetu kushe shiishshides.
Genesis26:13 Izas aqotay dari dari bida gishshas keehi duretides.
Genesis26:14 Yisaaqas dorsi
Genesis26:15 Hessa gishshas iza aawa Abrahaame woden iza aawaa aylleti bookkida haaththa olla ubbaa Filisxeeme asay biitta zaaridi kunththides.
Genesis26:16 He wode Abimelekkey Yisaaqa
Genesis26:17 Hizgiin Yisaaqi heeppe dendidi Geraare shoobbaa biidi dunkaane tokkidi heen de7ides.
Genesis26:18 Abrahaamey paxa dishe bookissida haaththa ollata Abrahaamey hayqqidaappe guye Filisxeeme asay tuccida haaththa ollata Yisaaqi qasseka bookkana mala ooththidi kase iza aaway sunththida sunththaan xeygides.
Genesis26:19 Yisaaqa aylleti shoobban haaththa olla bookkishe bookkiza ollaafe pulttiza haath demmida.
Genesis26:20 Gido attiin Geraaren mehe heemmizayti Yisaaqa mehe heemmizaytara
Genesis26:21 Hessafe guye istti hara haaththa ollaka bookkida; gido attiin istti he haaththa ollaa geedonkka ooyettida; hessa gishshas izi he haaththa ollaa
Genesis26:22 Hessafe guuth haraso aadhdhi hara haaththa olla bookissides; iza gaason oonikka ooyettibeenna; «Xoossi ha7i nuus aassides; nuni ha biittan darana» giidi iza
Genesis26:23 Hessafe guye Yisaaqi pude Bersaabehe geetettizaso kezides.
Genesis26:24 Hee bida gallas qammara GODAY izas qonccidi
Genesis26:25 Yisaaqi heen yarshizaso keexxidi GODAA sunth xeygides; heen izi ba dunkaaneza tokkides; qasse heen iza aylleti haaththa olla bookkida.
Genesis26:26 Hessafe guye Abimelekkey bana zoriza Ahuzaatanne ba wottadarata halaqa Pikoole ekkidi Geraareppe Yisaaqakko yides.
Genesis26:27 Yisaaqi isttas
Genesis26:28 Istti iza
Genesis26:29 Gido attiin nuni nees kiyateth xalla ooththidi nena saroteththan moyzidos; hessaththoka neni nu bolla iita miish ooththontta mala ane nenara caaqo caaqettoos; ha7i nena GODAY anjjidayssi qonccides» gida.
Genesis26:30 He wode Yisaaqi isttas gibira giigsiin midanne uyida.
Genesis26:31 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi istti issoy issaara caaqettida. Yisaaqi istta moyziin istti izappe saron shaakettidi bida.
Genesis26:32 He gallas Yisaaqa aylleti yiidi ba bookkida haaththa ollaa gishshas
Genesis26:33 Izi he haaththa ollaa
Genesis26:34 Eesawe layththi 40 gidida wode Bi7eere naa Yooditonne Eeloone naa Baasemaato machcho ekkides; istti nam7ayka Hiite biitta asa.
Genesis26:35 Isttika Yisaaqanne Irbiqa mishisishe de7ida.
Genesis27:1 Yisaaqi cimmiin iza ayfey xeelo ixxida wode baas bayra naaza Eesawe xeygidi iza
Genesis27:2 Izikka
Genesis27:3 Hessa gishshas ha7i ne izara shankkatiza toora ekkada bazzo baada do7a shankkatada taas asho ekkada ya.
Genesis27:4 Ta dosiza mal7o quma kaththada taas aaththa; hessika tani hayqqanaappe kase nena anjjanaassa» gides.
Genesis27:5 Irbiqay Yisaaqi ba naa Eesawes yootizayssa he wode siyadus; Eesawey do7a shankkatidi ehanaas bazzo biin
Genesis27:6 Irbiqay ba naaza Yaaqoobe
Genesis27:7 ‹Do7a shankkata ehada ta maana mala taas mal7o quma kaththa; histtiko ta hayqqontta dashe GODAA sinththan nena anjjana› gishin tani siyadis.
Genesis27:8 Ta naazoo! Ha7i tani nena azazizayssa lo7eththada siya.
Genesis27:9 Wudeza gars baada nam7u anqara deysha laaqqata taas ekkada ya; ne ehikko tani ne aawaas mal7o quma izi dosiza mala kaththana.
Genesis27:10 Ne aaway miidi hayqqontta dishe miidi nena anjjana mala ehada miza» gadus.
Genesis27:11 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey ba aayo Irbiqas
Genesis27:12 Ta aaway tana oykki beykkochii? Tani iza cimmizaa izas misatikko tani anjjo aggada qanggeththa ta bolla ehanaakko» gides.
Genesis27:13 Iza aayeya iza
Genesis27:14 Izi ehidi ba aayeys immiin aayeya mal7o quma iza aaway dosida mala mal7eththa kaththadus.
Genesis27:15 Hessafe guye Irbiqay soon ba achchan diza ba bayra naa Eesawe lo7o may7o ehada kaalo naaza Yaaqoobe mayzadus.
Genesis27:16 Qasse he deyshata ite iza kusheninne iza qoodhen mayzadus.
Genesis27:17 Histtada ba kaththida mal7o qumaanne ukeththaa ba naa Yaaqoobe kushen woththadus.
Genesis27:18 Histtiin izi ba aawaakko bi gelidi
Genesis27:19 Yaaqoobey ba aawaas
Genesis27:20 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe
Genesis27:21 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe
Genesis27:22 Yaaqoobey ba aawa Yisaaqakko shiiqiin oykki be7idi
Genesis27:23 Iza kushey iza ishaa Eesawe kusheththo iskera diza gishshas erontta iza anjjides.
Genesis27:24 Iza
Genesis27:25 Izikka
Genesis27:26 Hessafe guye iza aawa Yisaaqi
Genesis27:27 Yaaqoobey shiiqidi iza yeerides; Yisaaqi iza may7o singi siyidi
Genesis27:28 Xoossi salo iranne sa7a anjjo
Genesis27:29 Kawoteththati nees haarettetto; asi wuri nees gulbato; neni ne ishatas godaa gida; ne aayey zereththi nees gulbato; nena qanggizay qanggettidaaz gido; nena anjjizay anjjettidayssa gido» gides.
Genesis27:30 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe anjji wursidaappe guye Yaaqoobey ba aawa Yisaaqa sinththafe kezida mala Eesawey shankkafe puttu gides.
Genesis27:31 Izikka qasse mal7o qumaa kaththidi ba aawaas aaththides; aaththidi iza
Genesis27:32 Histtiin aaway Yisaaqi iza
Genesis27:33 Yisaaqi dagammidi kokkorishe
Genesis27:34 Eesawey ba aawaa qaala siyida mala ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtadi daro camo yeeho yeekkidi ba aawaa
Genesis27:35 Gido attiin izi
Genesis27:36 Eesawey
Genesis27:37 Yisaaqi Eesawes
Genesis27:38 Eesawey ba aawaa
Genesis27:39 Iza aawa Yisaaqi zaaridi
Genesis27:40 Neni ne giththa mashshan aqana; neni ne ishaas haarettana; gido attiin neni izara eqettiko iza qambara ne morgefe diggana» gides.
Genesis27:41 Aaway Yaaqoobe anjjida gishshas Eesawey Yaaqoobe keehi ixxides; izi ba wozinara
Genesis27:42 Giddotiin Irbiqay hayssa ba bayra naaza Eesawe qaala siyida gishshas ba kaalo naa Yaaqoobe xeygisa ehada
Genesis27:43 Ha7ikka ta naazoo
Genesis27:44 Histtada ne ishaa hanqoy dochchana gakkanaas imaththateththan izara daashsha.
Genesis27:45 Ne ishay nees hanqettizayssa izi aggiza wodenne ne iza bolla ooththidayssa izi baliza wode tani kiittada nena heeppe ehisana; tani issi gallas inttefe nam7atappe mela attana mala koykke» gadus.
Genesis27:46 Hessafe guye Irbiqay Yisaaqa
Genesis28:1 Hessa gishshas Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe xeygidi
Genesis28:2 Dendada ne aayey aawa Baatu7eelekko
Genesis28:3 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossi nena anjjo; izi nees daro nayta immo; nena daro deres aawa histto.
Genesis28:4 Abrahaame anjjida mala nenanne ne zereth Xoossi anjjo; hayssa Abrahaamey immida biittanne nekka imaththateththan de7ida biittaa nees immo» azazides.
Genesis28:5 Histtiin Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe yeddiin Yaaqoobey Mesphexoomiya biitta Laabakko bides. Laabay Yaaqoobenne Eesawe yelida Irbiqas ishanne Aaraame biitta as Baatu7eele naa.
Genesis28:6 Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe anjjidayssa heeppe machcho ekkanaas Mesphexoomiya biitta iza yeddidayssa qasseka izi Yaaqoobe anjjida wode
Genesis28:7 Yaaqoobeykka ba aawassinne ba aayeys azazettidi Mesphexoomiya biitta bidayssa Eesawey erides.
Genesis28:8 Eesawey iza aawa Yisaaqay Kanaane macca nayta ay mala ixxizaakkonne hessan erides.
Genesis28:9 Hessa gishshas Eesawey Abrahaame naa Isma7eelekko biidi iza nayo Mahilaato ba machchey bolla gujji ekkides. Izakka Nebayoote michcho.
Genesis28:10 Yaaqoobey Bersaabeheppe Kaaraane baanaas dendides.
Genesis28:11 Izi issi soo gakkishin arshey wulliin heen aqides; he soon diza shuchchatappe issi shuch ekki borkotidi heen dhiskides.
Genesis28:12 Agumozan biittan eqqidi xeeray pude salo gakkiza yangare be7ides; yangareza bolla Xoossa kiitanchchati duge wodhdhishininne pude kezishin be7ides.
Genesis28:13 Yangarezas bolla xeeran GODAY eqqidi iza
Genesis28:14 Ne zereththay biitta ace mala darana; isttika oyddu bagga gakkana; biitta bollan diza asi wuri ne baggaranne ne zereththa baggara anjjettana.
Genesis28:15 Tani nenara days; neni bizaso ubbaan tani nena naagana; qasse tani nena ha biitta guye zaarada ehana; tani nees ooththana gidayssa ooththana; nenakka yeggike» gides.
Genesis28:16 Yaaqoobey dhiskofe beeggidi
Genesis28:17 Izi babbidi
Genesis28:18 Yaaqoobey wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi ba borkotida shuchchaa ekkidi tuussa mala essidi Xoossas dummasanaas iza bolla zayte gussides.
Genesis28:19 Yaaqoobey he sohoza Beetele gi sunththides; he katamaya hessafe kase Looza geetettawus.
Genesis28:20 Yaaqoobey
Genesis28:21 
Genesis28:22 Tani tuussa mala essida ha shuchchay Xoossa keeth gidana; neni taas immiza ubbaafe tammaafe issi kushe tani nees immana» gi adinettides.
Genesis29:1 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey dendi biidi arshey mokkiza baggara diza asata dere gakkides.
Genesis29:2 Histtidi issi demban haaththa ollay dizayssa be7ides; heedzdzu cuga dorsi qasse he haaththa olla achchan ichchides; ays giikko wudey wuri haath uyizay he ollazappe; he haaththa ollaa doona tuchcha shuchchayka gita.
Genesis29:3 Dorsa wudey wuri heen shiiqida wode wudeza heemmizayti haaththa olla doonappe he shuchchaa genderisidi dorsaa ushsheettes. Ushshidi he shuchchaa haaththa ollaan zaaridi tucceettes.
Genesis29:4 Yaaqoobey isttas
Genesis29:5 izi
Genesis29:6 Yaaqoobey isttas
Genesis29:7 Histtiin Yaaqoobey isttas
Genesis29:8 Gido attiin isttas
Genesis29:9 Izi buro haasayan dishin dorsata heemmizay izo gidida gishshas Laaba naya Eraheela ba aawaa dorsata laagga ekkada gakka wodhadus.
Genesis29:10 Yaaqoobey ba aayey isha Laaba naa Eraheeli dorsata be7ida wode biidi ollaa doonappe shuchchaa genderisidi ba aayey ishaa dorsata haath ushshides.
Genesis29:11 Yaaqoobey Eraheelo yeeridi ufayssafe dendidayssan ba qaala dhoqqisidi yeekkides.
Genesis29:12 Yaaqoobey izis aawa dabbonne Irbiqa naa gididayssa Eraheelis yootiin iza woxxa baada ba aawaas yootadus.
Genesis29:13 Laabay ba michchey naa Yaaqoobe wore siyida mala izara gaagganaas woxxides; woxxi gakkidi iza idimmi yeeri ekkidi ba soo efides; heen Yaaqoobey ba hanidayssa ubbaa Laabas yootides.
Genesis29:14 Laabay iza
Genesis29:15 Hessafe guye Laabay iza
Genesis29:16 Laabas nam7u macca nayti deettes; bayray sunththi Liya
Genesis29:17 Liya ayfey shola; Eraheeli ayfey gidikko lo7o.
Genesis29:18 Yaaqoobey Eraheelo siiqida gishshas
Genesis29:19 Laabay
Genesis29:20 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey Eraheelo ekkanaas laappun layth ooththides; gido attiin izi izo siiqiza gishshas izas wodezi keehi qaanth misatides.
Genesis29:21 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Laaba
Genesis29:22 Hessa gishshas Laabay heen diza ubba asaa xeygi shiishshidi
Genesis29:23 Gido attiin gadey qammiin izi ba naa Liya efidi Yaaqoobes immides; Yaaqoobeykka izo ekkides.
Genesis29:24 Qasse Laabay ba aylleyo Zilfo ba naa Liyas aylle gidana mala immides.
Genesis29:25 Gadey wontiin xeelliza wode hekko Liya gidadus! Histtiin Yaaqoobey Laaba
Genesis29:26 Laabay iza
Genesis29:27 He mishirateththa saamintta ubbaa wursa; qasse kaalotizaarokka nuni nees immana; hessafe guye hara laappun layth taas ooththaasa» gides.
Genesis29:28 Yaaqoobey hessaththo hanidi he saaminttaa wursides; hessafe guye Laabay ba nayo Eraheelo izas immides.
Genesis29:29 Qasse Laabay ba aylleyo Biliha ba naa Eraheelis aylle gidana mala immides.
Genesis29:30 Yaaqoobey Eraheelokka ekkides; Eraheelo Liyappe aaththi siiqides; hara laappun layth Laabas ooththides.
Genesis29:31 Yaaqoobey Liya Eraheeli mala siiqonttayssa be7idi GODAY izis yeliza uloza doydes; gido attiin Eraheelis nay baa.
Genesis29:32 Liyay shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza sunththaaka Oroobeele ga sunththadus; ays giikko iza
Genesis29:33 Iza qasseka shaarada ha7ikka attuma naa yeladus; iza
Genesis29:34 Iza qasseka shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza
Genesis29:35 Iza qasseka qanththatada attuma naa yelada iza
Genesis30:1 Eraheela Yaaqoobes nay izippe yelettonttayssa erada ba michchey bolla qanaatadus; hessa gishshas iza Yaaqoobe
Genesis30:2 Yaaqoobey Eraheeli bolla hanqettidi
Genesis30:3 Izakka
Genesis30:4 Eraheela ba aylleyo Biliha machcho histti ekkana mala izas immiin Yaaqoobey izo ekkides.
Genesis30:5 Biliha shaarada attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus.
Genesis30:6 Histtiin Eraheela
Genesis30:7 Eraheeli aylleya Biliha qasseka shaarada Yaaqoobes nam7anththo attuma naa yeladus.
Genesis30:8 Eraheelakka
Genesis30:9 Liyay baas yeloy eqqidayssa beyada ba aylleyo Zilfo efada Yaaqoobes machcho histta immadus.
Genesis30:10 Liya aylle Zilfa Yaaqoobes attuma naa yeladus.
Genesis30:11 Liyaykka
Genesis30:12 Liya aylleya Zilfay Yaaqoobes nam7anththo attuma naa yeladus.
Genesis30:13 Liyaykka
Genesis30:14 Gistte maxa aginan Oroobeeley gade giddo biidi inkoye teera demmidi ba aayo Liyas ehides; Eraheela Liya
Genesis30:15 Gido attiin
Genesis30:16 He gallassa omars Yaaqoobey oososoppe simmishin Liyay iza mokkanaas kezada
Genesis30:17 Xoossi Liya woosa siyides; hessa gishshas iza qanththatada ichchashanththo attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus.
Genesis30:18 Liyaykka
Genesis30:19 Liyay qasseka shaarada usuppunththa attuma naa Yaaqoobes yeladus.
Genesis30:20 Liyay
Genesis30:21 Hessafe guye issi macca naa yelada izo Diina ga sunththadus.
Genesis30:22 Xoossi Eraheelo qoppides; izi woosaakka siyidi izis yeliza ulo doydes.
Genesis30:23 Izakka shaarada attuma naa yeladus; «Xoossi ta yeella taappe denththides;
Genesis30:24 GODAY taas hara attuma naakka gujjerennee!» gashe naaza Yooseefe ga sunththadus.
Genesis30:25 Eraheela Yooseefe yelidaappe guye Yaaqoobey Laaba
Genesis30:26 Tani istta gishshas nees ooththida ta machchetanne ta nayta taas imma; tani baana; ays giikko tani nees ay mala ooththidaakko ne eraasa» gides.
Genesis30:27 Qasse Laabay izas
Genesis30:28 Ne ekkana damoza taas yoota; tani nees iza qanxxana» gides.
Genesis30:29 Yaaqoobey
Genesis30:30 Tani yaanaappe kase nees diza guuththay ha7i keehi darides; ta aadhdhida ubbason GODAY nena anjjides; gido attiin ha7i tani taso asaas ayde ooththoo?» gides.
Genesis30:31 Laabay
Genesis30:32 Tani hach ne mehe ubbaa giddora aadhdhana; heen ne dorsaafe masara woykko puncara ubbaa
Genesis30:33 Hessa gishshas ta xilloteththi neni taas qanxxida damozaa taybanaas sinththafe ne yiza wode erettana; ta deyshaafe xalaqa gidonttay woykko kareth gidontta issi laaqqay ta achchan beettiko kaysotida mala qoodetto» gides.
Genesis30:34 Laabay
Genesis30:35 He gallassika Laabay xalaqa gidida orgeta ubbaa
Genesis30:36 Histtidi he mehezara heedzdzu gallassa oge Yaaqoobeppe haakki bides; gido attiin Yaaqoobey attida Laaba meheta heenth gelides.
Genesis30:37 Yaaqoobey miththafe qaye guufe kessidi baggaa poqqidi baggaa poqqontta aggidi guufeza baggaa kareth
Genesis30:38 Mehey haaththe uyana yiza ubba wode meheti haath uyiza gongge giddon guufeta woththides; meheteth kezida meheti haath uyanaas yiza wode
Genesis30:39 he guufeta sinththan mehettida; isttika masara
Genesis30:40 Yaaqoobey laaqqata mehetappe shaakkidi dumma woththides; attida meheta masaranne xalaqa gididayta Laaba mehe sinth zaarides; hessaththo Yaaqoobey ba mehe Laaba mehera walakettontta mala dumma shaakki woththides.
Genesis30:41 Gooba mino macca dorsatinne deyshati meheteth keziza wode ayde gidiinkka istti he guufeta achchan mehettana mala Yaaqoobey he guufeta haaththa gongge giddon meheta sinththan woththides.
Genesis30:42 Guufeza laafa meheta sinththan woththenna; hessa gishshas laafa laafa meheti Laabas gidiin goobizayti Yaaqoobes gidida.
Genesis30:43 Hessaththo hanidi Yaaqoobey keehi duretidi
Genesis31:1 Laaba attuma nayti ba giddon
Genesis31:2 Yaaqoobey Laaba ayfesoy izas kase mala gidonttayssa be7ides.
Genesis31:3 He wode GODAY Yaaqoobe
Genesis31:4 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey Eraheelonne Liya ba mehey dizaso yaana mala kiittidi xeygisides.
Genesis31:5 Izi isttas
Genesis31:6 Tani ta kumeththa wolqqafe intte aawaas ooththidayssa intte ereeta.
Genesis31:7 Gido attiin intte aaway tana cimmidi ta damoza tammuto laammi laammi yeggides; gidikkoka izi tana qohontta mala Xoossi iza diggides.
Genesis31:8 Izi
Genesis31:9 Xoossi hayssaththo intte aawappe woththi ekkidi intte aawa mehe taas immides.
Genesis31:10 «Meheti meheteth keziza aginan agumora meheta mehessiza deysha orgeti masara
Genesis31:11 Xoossa kiitanchchay agumon tana
Genesis31:12 Izikka tana
Genesis31:13 Neni shuch essada zayte iza bolla tigada adinida Beetele Xoossi tana; ha7i dendada ha biittafe kezada elelada guye ne yelettida biitta simma› » gides.
Genesis31:14 Hessafe guye Eraheelanne Liyay izas
Genesis31:15 Izi nuna allaga mala xeellees deennee? Izi nuna bayzi ekkides; bayzidi ekkida mishakka baas mi dhayssides.
Genesis31:16 Xoossi nu aawappe woththi ekkidi nees immida mehey wuri tumukka nuussanne nu naytayssa; hessa gishshas Xoossi nees yootidayssa ubbaa ooththa» gida.
Genesis31:17 Histtiin Yaaqoobey Kanaane biittan diza ba aawa Yisaaqakko baanaas dendides; izi ba naytanne ba machcheta gaamella togisides; baas diza mehe ubbaa sinththe aaththi laaggidi Mesphexoomiyan dishe izi shiishshida haaro ubbaa ekki bides.
Genesis31:18 
Genesis31:19 Laabay ba dorsata iskeza qanxxanaas bichchidaashe Eraheela ba aawa eeqa misleta kaysadus.
Genesis31:20 Yaaqoobeykka ba baqatizayssa Aaraame dere asi gidida Laabas yootontta baleththi bides.
Genesis31:21 Izi baas dizaaz ubbaa shiishshi ekki baqatidi Efiraaxise Shaafaa pinnidi Gala7aade geetettiza gezze biitta bides.
Genesis31:22 Yaaqoobey baqati bidayssa Laabay heedzdzanththo gallas siyides.
Genesis31:23 Ba dabbota banara ekkidi laappun gallassa oge Yaaqoobe guye kaallidi kaallidi Gala7aade geetettiza gezze biittan iza gakki oykkides.
Genesis31:24 He gallassa omars Xoossi Aaraame Laabakko agumora yiidi
Genesis31:25 Laabay gakkiza wode Yaaqoobey Gala7aade gezzen dunkaani uttides; qasse Laabaynne iza dabboti heen dunkaane tokkida.
Genesis31:26 Hessafe guye Laabay Yaaqoobe
Genesis31:27 Neni ays qotan taappe kessa ekkada tana cimmadii? Tani karabeninne diiththan ufayssa yeththan nena moyzana mala taas ays yootabeekkii?
Genesis31:28 Neni haray atto ta nayta naytanne ta macca nayta tani yeera ekkontta mala diggadasa; neni balla ooso ooththadasa.
Genesis31:29 Tani nena qohanaas taas wolqqay dees; gido attiin ne aawa Xoossi qamma omars tana
Genesis31:30 Ha7i gidikkoka neni ne aawa soo baanaas keeha laamotida gishshas ke7adasa; gido attiin taso eeqa misleta aazas kaysadii?» gides.
Genesis31:31 Yaaqoobey Laaba
Genesis31:32 Gido attiin ne misleta oykkida as oonakka neni demmiko he uray hayqqo! Nees gidida miishshi ta achchan beettiko nu dabboti beyishin koyada demmiko nees ekka» gides; gaasoykka Yaaqoobey Eraheela eeqa misleta kaysidayssa eribeenna.
Genesis31:33 Hessa gishshas Laabay Yaaqoobe dunkaane giddo
Genesis31:34 Eraheela ba aawa eeqa misleta ekkada gaamella koora garsan qottada
Genesis31:35 Eraheela ba aawa
Genesis31:36 Yaaqoobey Laaba bolla hanqettidi
Genesis31:37 Ha7i neni ta miishshaa ubbaa pilggada koyadasashin ay demmadii? Istti neeppenne taappe ooni wordoko pirdana mala ha yo7oza ta dabbota sinththaninne ne dabbota sinththan woththa.
Genesis31:38 «Tani nenara nam7u tammu layth kumeth de7adis; ne dorsinne deysha gidiin awucaybeenna; woykko ne meheppe galth mabeekke.
Genesis31:39 Do7ay wodhidayssaka ubbaa ta bolla qoodadis attiin nees ehabeekke; gallas gidiin omars kaysoy ekkidayssa tana qanxxisadasa.
Genesis31:40 Gallas awa seelay
Genesis31:41 Tani hayssaththo ne soon nam7u tammu layth de7adis; ne macca naa nam7ata gishshas 14 layth
Genesis31:42 Ta aawati Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi goynnida Xoossi tanara gidonttaakko ne tana mela kushe kessa yeddanakoshin Xoossi ta waayenne ta daabura be7idi qamma omars nena hanqides» gides.
Genesis31:43 Laabay Yaaqoobe
Genesis31:44 Ane ha7i haa ya; neninne tani caaqettoos; hayssi neeppenne taappe giddon markka gido» gides.
Genesis31:45 Hessa gishshas Yaaqoobey issi shuch ekkidi tuussa mala essides.
Genesis31:46 Izi ba dabbotakka
Genesis31:47 Laabay he shuchcha koraa
Genesis31:48 Laabay
Genesis31:49 Qasse izi he shuchcha tuussaa Mixiphpha gi sunththides; ays giikko Laabay
Genesis31:50 Neni ta macca nayta qohiko

Genesis31:53 Abrahaame Xoossi

Genesis35:4 Hessa gishshas istti ba achchan diza hara dere asaa eeqa misleta ubbaanne ba hayththan diza gutichcha ubbaa kessidi Yaaqoobes immiin Yaaqoobey heyta Seekeemen diza wolaa garsan moogides.

Genesis37:1 Yaaqoobey kase ba aaway deyida Kanaane biittan uttides.
Genesis37:2 Yaaqoobe nayti hanidayssi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssa. Yooseefey 17 layththa naa gidida wode ba aawaa aylletappe
Genesis37:3 Isra7eeley Yooseefe cimateththan yelida gishshas hankko attuma nayta ubbaafe aaththi siiqees; izi izas alleqo may7o giigsides.
Genesis37:4 Iza ishati istta aaway iza isttafe aaththi siiqizayssa be7idi istti iza ixxidi lo7o qaalan izara haasayanaas dandaybeettenna.
Genesis37:5 Yooseefey agumo agumettidi ba ishatas yootides; isttika iza gede gujji ixxida.
Genesis37:6 Izi isttas
Genesis37:7 Nuni gade giddon kaththa mirqqe mirqqishin ta mirqqeya dendada sitti ga eqqadus; intte mirqqeti gidikko yuuyi aadhdhidi ta mirqqeysi ziggida» gides.
Genesis37:8 Iza ishati iza
Genesis37:9 Qasseka Yooseefey hara agumo agumettidi ba ishanttas yootides; «Siyite; tani hara agumokka agumettadis; he agumozan arshey
Genesis37:10 He izi be7ida agumoza ba aawassinne ba ishatas yootiin iza aaway iza
Genesis37:11 Iza ishati iza miqqaynida; gido attiin iza aaway ha yo7oza ba wozinan woththidi naagides.
Genesis37:12 Issi gallas iza ishati Seekeeme achchan ba aawaa meheta heemmanaas biin
Genesis37:13 Isra7eeley Yooseefe
Genesis37:14 Yaaqoobeykka
Genesis37:15 Heen demba giddon izi gede haa simerettishin issi asi iza demmidi
Genesis37:16 Izikka
Genesis37:17 Histtiin addezi
Genesis37:18 Gido attiin izi haahon dishin istti iza be7ida; izi isttako gakkontta dishin istti iza wodhanaas maqettida.
Genesis37:19 Issoy issaas
Genesis37:20 Haa yiite! Iza wodhidi ha ollatappe issaa giddo yeggoos. Hessafe guye
Genesis37:21 Oroobeeley hessa siyidi istta kusheppe iza ashshanaas koyidi
Genesis37:22 Suuth gussofte; iza intte bazzon diza ha ollaa giddo yeggite; iza bolla kushe woththofte» gides. Oroobeeley iza istta kusheppe ashshidi guye iza aawaakko yeddanaas qoppides.
Genesis37:23 Yooseefey ba ishataakko gakkida wode izi may7ida alleqo may7o izappe qaari ekkida;
Genesis37:24 iza efidi haaththi baynda mela ollan yeggida.
Genesis37:25 Istti ba qumaa maanaas uttidaashe Isma7eele dere asati Gibxe baanaas Gala7aadeppe yizayta dhoqqu giidi be7ida; istti ba gaamellan sawo
Genesis37:26 Yuhuday ba ishata
Genesis37:27 Haa yiite; iza Isma7eeletas bayzoos; iza bolla nu kushe woththoko; gaasoykka izi nu ishanne nu asho.» Histtiin iza ishati wurikka ero gida.
Genesis37:28 Hessa gishshas Midiyaame biitta zal7anchchati hessara aadhdhishin iza ishati Yooseefe ollaafe kessidi Isma7eele asatas 20 biras bayziin istti Yooseefe Gibxe biitta efida.
Genesis37:29 Oroobeeley ollaako simmidi Yooseefey heen bayndayssa be7ida wode ceecidi ba may7o daakkides
Genesis37:30 Izi guye ba ishataakko biidi
Genesis37:31 Hessafe guye istti issi deysh ekki shukkidi Yooseefe may7o suuththan maadhida.
Genesis37:32 Iza aleqo may7oza aawaakko efidi aawaas
Genesis37:33 Aawaykka may7ozi Yooseefeyssa gididayssa eridi
Genesis37:34 Yaaqoobeykka mishettidi ba may7o peedhi yeggides; maaqa may7idi daro wode gakkanaas ba naazas yeekkides.
Genesis37:35 Iza attuma naytinne macca nayti wuri iza minththeththanaas izakko yida; gido attiin izi minettontta ixxidi
Genesis37:36 He wode Midiyaame biitta asati Yooseefe Gibxe kawo oosanchcha Phixifaaras Gibxen bayzida; Phixifaaraykka zabeta halaqa.
Genesis38:1 He wode Yuhuday ba ishatappe shaakettidi Adulaame geetettiza katamaan diza Hiira geetettiza addezara de7ana bides.
Genesis38:2 Heen Yuhuday Shu7a geetettiza Kanaane dere macca naa be7ides. Izikka izo machcho ekkidi izira de7ides.
Genesis38:3 Iza izas shaarada attuma naa yelada Eera ga sunththadus.
Genesis38:4 Qasseka shaarada attuma naa yelada Oonaane ga sunththadus.
Genesis38:5 Qasse gujjadakka attuma naa yelada iza Seela ga sunththadus. Izakka iza Akizaabe geetettiza biittan yeladus.
Genesis38:6 Yuhuday ba bayra naaza Eera Ti7imaaro machcho ekisides.
Genesis38:7 Yuhuda bayra naa Eeray GODAA sinththan iita as gidida gishshas GODAY iza wodhides.
Genesis38:8 Yuhuday Oonaane
Genesis38:9 Gido attiin Oonaaney yelettiza nayti baas gidonttayssa eridi ba ishaa machcheyra aqiza wode aydekka ba ishaas nay yelettontta mala ba zereththaa biittan gussees.

Genesis38:15 Iza ba ayfeso gulluntta uttida gishshas Yuhuday izo be7idi layma maccas giidi qoppides.

Genesis38:17 Izikka

Genesis39:1 Isma7eele asati Yooseefe Gibxe efiin Gibxe kawo oosanchchatappe Phixifaara geetettiza zabeta halaqay Yooseefe Isma7eeletappe shammides.
Genesis39:2 GODAY Yooseefera diza gishshas izi ooththizayssa ubbaa izas injjesides; izikka ba godaa soon Gibxen de7ides.
Genesis39:3 GODAYKKA izara de7izayssanne GODAY izi ooththidayssa ubbaa izas injjesidayssa Phixifaaray be7idi
Genesis39:4 Yooseefe dosides. Yooseefeykka iza oosanchcha gidides. Phixifaaray iza ba keeththa asaa bolla sunththidi baas dizaaz ubbaa iza kushen woththides.
Genesis39:5 Phixifaaray ba keeththan dizayssa ubbaa bollanne ba aqota ubbaa bolla sunththida wodeppe doommiin GODAY Gibxe addeza keeth Yooseefe geedon anjjides. GODAA anjjoy Phixifaara soon gidiin karen diza miish ubbaa bolla wodhdhides.
Genesis39:6 Hessa gishshas baas diza ubbaa Yooseefes sheedhdhides; izi ba miza kaththaafe attiin hara Yooseefe kushen yeggides. Yooseefey yegalththinne mala lo7o asa.
Genesis39:7 Guuththa wodeppe guye iza goda machcheya Yooseefe cadda xeellada

Genesis39:9 Hason taappe aadhdhizay deenna; neni iza machcho gidida gishshas nena xalla attiin ta goday taas immontta miishshi baawa. Histtiin tani hayssa mala iita miish Xoossa sinththan wostta ooththoo?» gides.
Genesis39:10 Iza ubba wode Yooseefe saleththinkka izi eemo immibeenna; izira ishech attiin izikko shiiqanawukka koyibeenna.
Genesis39:11 Issi gallas izi ba ooso ooththanaas soo gelishin soo aylletappe oonikka soon baawa.
Genesis39:12 Izakka Yooseefe may7o shiishsha oykkada

Genesis39:14 ba soo aylleta xeygada isttas
Genesis39:15 Histtiin izi ba may7o ta achchan yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezides» gadus.
Genesis39:16 Keeththa aaway yaana gakkanaas iza Yooseefe may7oza ba achchan woththadus.
Genesis39:17 Hessafe guye iza izas
Genesis39:18 Gido attiin tani ta qaala dhoqqisada waassiin izi ba may7o ta achchan yeggidi sooppe kare woxxi kezides» gadus.
Genesis39:19 Keeththa aaway machcheyo
Genesis39:20 Izikka Yooseefe efidi kawo qasho asay diza qasho keeththan yeggides.
Genesis39:21 Gido attiin Yooseefey heen qasho keeththan diza wode GODAY izara dees. Xoossi qasho keeththan izara diza ba kiyateth izas darssides. Qasseka qasho keeththa halaqaza sinththan izas bonchcho immides.
Genesis39:22 Histtiin qasho keeththaa halaqay qasho asaa ubbaa Yooseefe kushen woththides; heen oosettizayssa ubbaa bolla aawatizay iza.
Genesis39:23 GODAY Yooseefera gididi izi ooththiza ubbaa polisiza gishshas woyne keeththaa alaafey Yooseefe alaafeteththan diza ay miishshaska waanandeesha giidi hirgi erenna.
Genesis40:1 Guuththa wodeppe guye Gibxe kawo ushshu duuqqizayta alaafeynne quma kaththizayta alaafey ba godaa Gibxe kawo qohida.
Genesis40:2 Kawoy ushshu duuqqizayta halaqanne quma kaththizayta halaqata nam7ata bolla keehi hanqettides.
Genesis40:3 Hessa gishshas zabeta halaqaza keeththan Yooseefey qashettida woyne keeththan yeggides.

Genesis40:11 He wode Paaroone ushshaa xuu7ay ta kushen dees; tanikka woyneza ayfe maxada xuu7aza giddon gum7ada ushshaa Paaroones immadis» gi yootides.
Genesis40:12 Histtiin Yooseefeykka zaaridi
Genesis40:13 Heedzdzu gallassata giddon kawoy nena denththidi izi nena kase ne diza alaafeteththan woththana; kase neni ushshu duuqqiza wode ooththida mala neni kawo wancaa iza kushen woththana.
Genesis40:14 Gido attiin nees wodey lo7ida wode tana baloppa; taaska kiya; ta gishshas kawos yootada ha qasho keeththaafe tana kesisa;
Genesis40:15 gaasoykka tana Ibraaweta biittafe wolqqara shammi ehida; gido attiin hayssaththo tana qashos gaththiza miish aykkoka ooththabeekke» gides.

Genesis40:17 Bolla bagga masooben Gibxe kawos uukettida dumma dumma qumay dees. Gido attiin kafoti hessa ta hu7en diza masoobezappe mida› » gi yootides.
Genesis40:18 Histtiin Yooseefey
Genesis40:19 Heedzdzu gallassata giddon kawoy nena denththidi ne qoodhe muucidi miththa bolla kaqisana; ne ashokka kafoti maana» gides.
Genesis40:20 Heedzdzanththo gallas Gibxe kawoy ba yelettida gallas ba kawoteththan diza shuumeta ubbaas gibira giigsides. Ushshu duuqqizayta halaqanne kath kaththizayta halaqaa qasho keeththaafe kessidi ba shuumeta sinththan essides.
Genesis40:21 Ushshu duuqqizayta halaqaza kase iza shuumeteththan zaariin izi kawo kushen wanca woththides.
Genesis40:22 Gido attiin kawozi kath kaththizayta halaqaa Yooseefey iza agumo birshida mala iza kaqisides.

Genesis41:1 Nam7u layth kumeth aadhdhida wode Gibxe kawoy agumo agumettides; agumora izi Abbaye shaafaa doonan eqqi dishin
Genesis41:2 laappun ordenne modhdho miizati Abbaye shaafappe kezidi shaafaa achchan maata mishin be7ides.
Genesis41:3 Isttafe kaallidi hara laappun mala iitanne gilqa miizati Abbaye shaafappe kezidi shaafaza doonan diza modhdho miizata achchan eqqida.
Genesis41:4 He medho iitanne gilqa miizati laappun ordenne modhdho miizata mittishin be7ides. Hessafe guye kawoy dhiskofe beeggides.
Genesis41:5 Izi qasseka dhiskidi nam7anththo agumettidi laappun lo7onne muuruta tiyati issi maqa bolla diccidayssa be7ides.
Genesis41:6 Isttafe kaallidi ayfe laafanne carkon shullidi melida laappun tiyati kezida.
Genesis41:7 He laafa ayfe tiyati lo7onne muuruta tiyata mittida. Hessafe guye kawozi beeggidi agumo gididayssa erides.
Genesis41:8 Gadey wontishin iza wozinay shirotdes; hessa gishshas Gibxen diza bitanchchatassinne era asata ubbaas kiittidi xeygisides; kawoy isttas ba agumoza yootides; gido attiin izas he agumoza birshanaas dandayza asi beettibeenna.
Genesis41:9 He wode ushshu duuqqizayta halaqay Gibxe kawos

Genesis41:11 Nuni heen dishe nuus nuus agumo agumettidos; agumozaska dumma dumma birsheththi dees.
Genesis41:12 He wode zabeta halaqaza aylle gidida issi Ibraawe panththi nunara qasho keeththan dees. Nuni nu agumo izas yootiin izi nuus hu7en hu7en nu agumo birshides.
Genesis41:13 Histtiin he yo7oti izi nuus birshida mala hanida. Hessi aazee giikko tani kase ta alaafeteththan simmadis; hankkoyssi gidikko kaqettides» gides.
Genesis41:14 Histtiin Gibxe kawoy Yooseefe kiittidi xeygisides. Istti iza qasho keeththafe eeson ekki yiin ba hu7e meedettidi may7o laammidi kawozaakko gelides.

Genesis41:16 Histtiin Yooseefey

Genesis41:20 Medha iitanne laafa miizati koyroyta laappun modhdho miizata mitti aggida.

Genesis41:24 He shulli uttida tiyati laappun lo7o tiyata mittida. Tani ha agumoza marotas yootadis; gido attiin taas agumoza birshiza asi beettibeenna» gides.

Genesis41:30 Gido attiin laappun kosha layththati izappe kaallidi yaana. He wode Gibxe kaloy wuri dogettana; biittay koshan shocettana.

Genesis41:47 He laappun kalo layththatan biittay keehi daro kath immides.
Genesis41:48 Yooseefey Gibxe biittan he laappun kalo layththaa kath ubbaa shiishshidi katamatan minjjides. Issi issi katamata yuushon kaxxida kath ubbaa he kataman kataman minjjides.

Genesis41:55 Gibxe derey wuri koshattida wode asay

Genesis41:57 Sa7a ubbaan koshay suullida gishshas biittan diza asay wuri kath Yooseefeppe shammanaas Gibxe yides.
Genesis42:1 Yaaqoobey Gibxen kaththi dizayssa siyidi ba attuma nayta
Genesis42:2 Be7ite! Gibxen kaththi dizayssa tani siyadis; duge Gibxe biidi nu hayqqontta paxa daana mala heeppe kath nuus shammi ehite» gides.
Genesis42:3 Hessa gishshas Yooseefe ishati tammati kath shammanaas duge Gibxe bida.

Genesis42:14 Yooseefey isttas
