Genesis42:22 Oroobeeley
Genesis42:23 Istti gizayssa Yooseefey erizayssa istti akeekibeettenna; ays giikko izi isttara wokkalen haasayees.
Genesis42:24 Izi isttafe shaaketti guye simmidi yeekkides; gido attiin qasse isttako simmidi istta haasayssides. Izi Simoona isttafe duuththi ashshidi istti be7ishin iza qachchides.
Genesis42:25 Yooseefey ba aylleta
Genesis42:26 Istti izi gida mala ooththidaappe guye Yooseefe ishati kaththaa ba haretan caanidi dendi bida.
Genesis42:27 Istti oge bolla qamma aqanaas shempidason isttafe issay ba harezas kaththaafe yegganaas ba ogoro birshidi
Genesis42:28 Izi ba ishata
Genesis42:29 Istti Kanaane biittan diza ba aawa Yaaqoobekko soo simmi yiidi ba bolla gakkidayssa ubbaa izas yootida.
Genesis42:30 Istti izas
Genesis42:31 Gido attiin nuni izas
Genesis42:32 Nuni tammanne nam7u ishati issi aawa nayta; issoy dhaydes; wurseththa kaaloy Kanaane biittan ha7i nu aawara dees› gi yootidos.
Genesis42:33 Histtiin he biittays godaa gidida addezi nuna
Genesis42:34 Intte dere yuuyi yuuyi xomosizaade gidontta
Genesis42:35 Istti ba ogoroppe ogoroppe kaththaa qolidi ba ogoron ogoron biray qashora uttidayssa demmida. Isttinne istta aaway he qashora diza biraa be7idi babbida.
Genesis42:36 Istta aawa Yaaqoobey isttas
Genesis42:37 Hessafe guye Oroobeeley ba aawaa
Genesis42:38 Gido attiin Yaaqoobey isttas
Genesis43:1 Ha7ikka koshay Kanaane biittan minnides.
Genesis43:2 Histtiin istti Gibxeppe ehida kaththay mulera wuriin istta aaway
Genesis43:3 Gido attiin Yuhuday izas
Genesis43:4 Neni nu ishaa nunara yeddiko nuni duge biidi nees kath shammana.
Genesis43:5 Gido attiin neni iza yeddontta ixxiko nuni duge bookko; ays giikko he addezi nuna
Genesis43:6 Isra7eeleykka
Genesis43:7 Isttika izas
Genesis43:8 Yuhuday ba aawa Isra7eele
Genesis43:9 Naaza nuus ta waaseteththan imma; iza gishshas tana oychcha; tani iza nees lo7ora zaara ehontta aggiko ta diza wode ubbaan ta oyshettana.
Genesis43:10 Nuni haan gam7onttaako hanni wode nam7anththo gede gakkidi ha simmana shin» gides.
Genesis43:11 Hessafe guye istta aawa Isra7eeley isttas
Genesis43:12 Intte ogoro doonan simmida birazi baletan simmidaaz gidana dandayza gishshas biraakka nam7u kushe histti ekki biite.
Genesis43:13 Qasse intte ishaakka ekkidi he addezakko eeson guye biite.
Genesis43:14 Izi hankko intte ishaa yeddana mala Biniyaameykka inttenara simmi yaana mala Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay he addezi inttes qadhettana mala ooththo; tani gidikko ta naytappe mela attikonne attays» gides.
Genesis43:15 Hessa gishshas he asati kushe genththo kase biraas nam7u kushe qasse Biniyaame ekkidi duge Gibxe biidi Yooseefe sinth shiiqida.
Genesis43:16 Yooseefey ba ishatara Biniyaame be7idi ba keeththa halaqaza
Genesis43:17 Histtiin izi Yooseefey izas yootida mala he asata Yooseefeso efides.
Genesis43:18 Asati Yooseefe soo bida gishshas babbida; isttas
Genesis43:19 Hessa gishshas istti Yooseefe keeththaa penge gakkidi keeththaa halaqaza
Genesis43:20 «Nu godoo! Nuni koyro kath shammanaas haa yidos;
Genesis43:21 simmidi bishe nu aqizaason omars nu ogoro ogoro nu birshiin nu biray paccontta nu ogoro ogoro doonan dizayssa demmidos; hessa gishshas ha7i nuni iza guye ekki yidos.
Genesis43:22 Qasse nuni kath shammanaas hara biraakka ekki yidos. Nu biraa nu ogoro ogoro doonan ooni woththidaakko nu erokko» gi haasayssida.
Genesis43:23 Histtiin izi isttas
Genesis43:24 He addezi he asata Yooseefe soo efidi istta tohos haath ehiin ba toho meecettida. Istta haretaska harqqo immides.
Genesis43:25 Yooseefera quma maana mala isttas yootettida gishshas Yooseefey yaana gakkanaas izas immana kushe genththo giigsida.
Genesis43:26 Yooseefey baso gelida mala istti ba giigsida kushe genththoza izas immidi iza sinththan ba hu7e duge biittan gaththi ziggida.
Genesis43:27 Izi istta saroteth oychchi simmidi
Genesis43:28 Histtiin istti
Genesis43:29 Izi ba aayey naa Biniyaame be7idi isttas
Genesis43:30 Yooseefey ba ishaa be7iin izas yeehoy dandayettontta ixxiin yeekkanaas issife issiso pooqqides. Izi ba dumma qol7a gelidi heen yeekkides.
Genesis43:31 Izi ba ayfeso meecetti simmi kezidi barkka bana minththeththidi
Genesis43:32 Histtiin istti izas dumma
Genesis43:33 Istti Yooseefe sinththan bayray ba bayrateththaa mala kaaloy ba kaaloteththa mala maaran uttida. Istti issoy issaa xeellidi istta wostti utissidaakko be7idi malalettida.
Genesis43:34 Yooseefey ba gishaappe isttas qumaa gishiza wode
Genesis44:1 Yooseefey ba keeththaa halaqazas
Genesis44:2 Histtada wurseththa kaaloza ogoro doonan ta bira wancanne iza kaththa biraa woththa» gi azaziin izi Yooseefey gida mala ooththides.
Genesis44:3 Gadey wontishin he asati ba hareta ekkidi baana mala moyzida.
Genesis44:4 Istti he katamappe kezidi haakki biichchontta dishin Yooseefey ba keeththaa halaqaas
Genesis44:5 ‹Ays ta godaa bira wanca kaysidetii? Hayssi ta goday uyizayssanne qasse xuura miish demmiza wanca gidennee? Hayssi intte ooththidayssi gita qoho› ga» gides. He wode Gibxe biitta asati wanca garsan diza ushshaa be7idi sinththafe aazi hananaakko ereettes.
Genesis44:6 Histtiin izi istta guyera gakkidi izi gida malakka isttas yootides.
Genesis44:7 Gido attiin istti
Genesis44:8 Haray attoshin hayssafe kase nu ogoro doonappe demmida biraa Kanaane biittafe guye nees nu zaari ehidayssa ne eraasa. Histtiin ha7i nuni ne godaa sooppe wosttidi bira woykko worqqa kaysizonii?
Genesis44:9 Ne aylleta nu giddofe he wancay izakkon beettidaadey hayqqo; qasse attida nuni nu godaas aylle gidana» gida.
Genesis44:10 Izi isttas
Genesis44:11 Hessafe guye istti eeson ba ogoro ogoro woththi birshida.
Genesis44:12 Halaqazikka ubbaafe bayratizayssa ogoroppe doommidi wurseththa kaalozayssa gakkanaas koyides; he wancazakka Biniyaame ogoro giddofe demmides.
Genesis44:13 Histtiin istti muuzottidi ba may7o daakkida; ba ogoro ogoro ba haretan caanidi guye katamaa simmida.
Genesis44:14 Yuhuday ba ishatara Yooseefekko geliza wode Yooseefey soon dizayssa demmidi istti iza sinththan gufannida.
Genesis44:15 Yooseefey isttas
Genesis44:16 Histtiin Yuhuday
Genesis44:17 Gido attiin Yooseefey
Genesis44:18 Histtiin Yuhuday izakko shiiqidi iza
Genesis44:19 Neni ta goday nuna ne aylleta
Genesis44:20 Nunikka
Genesis44:21 «Nekka ne aylletas nuus
Genesis44:22 Nuni nu godaas nees
Genesis44:23 Gido attiin neni ne aylleta
Genesis44:24 Nuni ne aylleti nu aawaakko simmi bida wode ne nu goday nuus gidayssa izas yootidos.
Genesis44:25 «Nu aaway
Genesis44:26 Nuni izas
Genesis44:27 «Histtiin nu aaway ne aylleta nuna
Genesis44:28 Isttafe issoy taappe shaaketti biin tumu iza do7ay puuzereththi mides; hach gakkanaaska tani iza beyabeekke.
Genesis44:29 Hayssa qasse intte taappe shaakki efiin iita miishshi iza gakkiko intte cimateththan ta bolla ehiza mishay tana wodhana› » gides.
Genesis44:30 «Hessa gishshas ha7i ta ne aylley guye ta aawaakko biza wode ta aaway naaza ba shemppo mala siiqizayssi
Genesis44:31 
Genesis44:32 Tani ne aylley naaza ta waaseteththan ekka yadis; tani iza
Genesis44:33 «Hessa gishshas tani ne aylley ta godaas naaza gishshas aylletada haan attiin naazi ba ishatara guye simmo.
Genesis44:34 Naazi baynda tani waanada guye ta aawaakko simma boo? Hanenna; ta aaway mishettana miishshaa tana bessofa» gides.
Genesis45:1 He wode Yooseefey he asaa ubbaa sinththan genccana dandayontta gishshas
Genesis45:2 Izi ba qaala dhoqqisidi Gibxe asay iza siyana gakkanaas waassi yeekkides. Kawoza soo asaykka he woreza siyides.
Genesis45:3 Yooseefey ba ishatas
Genesis45:4 Histtiin Yooseefey ba ishatas
Genesis45:5 Xoossi tana inttefe sinththe kiittiday asa shemppo ashshanaas gidida gishshas intte tana haa bayzidayssas zil7ettofte.
Genesis45:6 Koshay ha biittaa geliin hayssi nam7anththo layththa; qasse sinththafe yiza ichchashu layththata giddon asay biitta goyidi kath shiishshanaas dandayenna.
Genesis45:7 Gido attiin tani inttes zereth biitta bolla ashshana malanne intte shemppo hayssa mala gita atoteththan ashshana mala
Genesis45:8 Hessa gishshas tana haa kiittiday Xoossaa attiin inttena deekketa. Xoossi tana Gibxe kawos aawa
Genesis45:9 «Ha7i eeson guye ta aawaakko biidi izas ne naa Yooseefey
Genesis45:10 Neni ta matan Geeseme biittan ne naytara
Genesis45:11 Buroppe ichchashu kosha layththati deettes; nena neso asaanne ne mehe koshay gakkontta mala tani nena mizana› gees giite» gides.
Genesis45:12 Qasseka Yooseefey isttas
Genesis45:13 Taas Gibxe biittan diza bonchcho intte be7idayssa ubbaa ta aawaas yootite; eesonkka haa duge ekki yiite» gides.
Genesis45:14 Histtidi ba ishaa Biniyaame idimmi oykkidi yeekkides; Biniyaameykka ba ishaa idimmi oykkidi yeekkides.
Genesis45:15 Yooseefeykka yeekkishe ba ishata ubbaa yeeri yeeri ekkides. Hessafe guye iza ishati izara haasaya oykkida.
Genesis45:16 Yooseefe ishata yuussa worey kawo Paaroone keeth gakkida wode kawoynne iza oosanchchati ufayettida.
Genesis45:17 Kawoy Yooseefe
Genesis45:18 Histtidi intte aawaanne intte soo asaa ekkidi guye taakko haa ehite. Tani inttes Gibxe biittan ubbasoppe lo7izaso immana; isttika ha biittaa modhdho kaachana› ga.
Genesis45:19 Qasseka neni ne ishata
Genesis45:20 Gibxe biittan diza ubbaafe aadhdhi lo7iza miish inttes gidana gishshas inttes diza haaro ekki yaana qoppofte› ga yoota» gides.
Genesis45:21 Histtiin Yaaqoobe nayti gida mala ooththida. Yooseefeykka kawoy azazida mala para-gaaretanne oges gidiza shinqe isttas immides.
Genesis45:22 Isttas ubbaasikka hu7en hu7en ooraththa may7o immides; gido attiin Biniyaames heedzdzu xeetu saqile biranne ichchashu kumeththa may7o immides.
Genesis45:23 Izikka ba aawaas Gibxen diza ubbaafe lo7izayssa tammu haren caanidi
Genesis45:24 Yooseefey ba ishata moyzides. Istti bishin izi isttas
Genesis45:25 Istti Gibxeppe kezidi bida; Kanaane biitta biidi ba aawa Yaaqoobekko gakkida.
Genesis45:26 Istti izas
Genesis45:27 Gido attiin istti Yooseefey baas yootidayssa ubbaa izas yootininne iza ekki ehana mala Yooseefey kiittida para-gaareta izi beyiin
Genesis45:28 Yaaqoobeykka
Genesis46:1 Isra7eeley baas dizayssa ubbaa ekki dendidi Bersaabehe gakkides. Heenkka izi ba aawa Yisaaqa Xoossaas yarsho shiishshides.
Genesis46:2 Xoossi omars agumora iza
Genesis46:3 «Tani Xoossay ne aawa Xoossa; neni duge Gibxe baanaas babbofa; ays giikko tani nena heen gita kawoteth kessana.
Genesis46:4 Tani nenara issife Gibxe baana; qasse tani ne zereththaa heeppe kessana. Yooseefey ba kushera ne hayqqishin nena shiishshana» gides.
Genesis46:5 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey Bersaabeheppe dendides; Yaaqoobe attuma nayti ba aawa Yaaqoobe
Genesis46:6 Istti Kanaane biittan haarida aqonne mehe ubbaa ekki bida. Yaaqoobeynne iza zereththi wuri izara Gibxe bides.
Genesis46:7 Izikka ba zereth ubbaa ba attuma nayta
Genesis46:8 Yaaqoobera Gibxe biitta bida Isra7eele nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayssa. Yaaqoobe bayra nay Oroobeele;
Genesis46:9 Oroobeele attuma nayti Heenooke
Genesis46:10 Simoona attuma nayti Yimu7eele
Genesis46:11 Lewe attuma nayti Gershoone
Genesis46:12 Yuhuda attuma nayti Eera
Genesis46:13 Yisakoore attuma nayti Tola
Genesis46:14 Zaabiloone attuma nayti Sereede
Genesis46:15 Hayti Liyay Mesphexoomiyan Yaaqoobes yelida attuma nayta; izi macca naya Diino. Hayti iza naytinne nayta nayti mulera heedzdzu tammanne heedzdza.
Genesis46:16 Gaade attuma nayti Xafoone
Genesis46:17 Aaseere attuma nayti Yimine
Genesis46:18 Laabay ba naa Liyas immida Zilfay Yaaqoobes yelida nayti nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera tammanne usuppuna.
Genesis46:19 Yaaqoobe machcheyo Eraheeli attuma nayti Yooseefenne Biniyaame.
Genesis46:20 Oona geetettiza katama qeese Phixifaara naya Asinaata Yooseefes Gibxen Minaasenne Efreeme yeladus.
Genesis46:21 Biniyaame nayti Beela
Genesis46:22 Yaaqoobes yelettida Eraheeli attuma naytinne nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera tammanne oydda.
Genesis46:23 Daane attuma nay Hushime.
Genesis46:24 Niftaaleme attuma nayti Yahixele
Genesis46:25 Laabay ba naa Eraheelis immida Bilihay Yaaqoobes yelida naytinne nayta nayti hayta; istti mulera laappuna.
Genesis46:26 Yaaqoobera Gibxe bida naytinne nayta nayti
Genesis46:27 Gibxen Yooseefes yelettida nam7u nayta gujjiin Gibxe bida Yaaqoobe soo asay mulera laappun tamma.
Genesis46:28 Sinththati biidi Geeseme biittan bana mokkana mala Yaaqoobey Yuhuda baappe sinththe Yooseefekko yeddides; istti Geeseme gakkida wode
Genesis46:29 Yooseefey ba para-gaareza giigsidi ba aawaa Yaaqoobera gaagganaas Geeseme bides. Yooseefey ba aawa demmida mala idimmi oykkidi daro saate yeekkides.

Genesis47:1 Yooseefey gelidi Gibxe kawos
Genesis47:2 Izi ba ishatappe ichchashata dooridi kawoza sinth aaththides.

Genesis47:4 Qasse istti izas
Genesis47:5 Kawoy Yooseefe
Genesis47:6 Histtiin Gibxe derey ne kushen dees gidennee; ha biittan ubbaafe aadhdhidi lo7izason ne aawaanne ne ishata woththa; istti Geeseme biittan detto. Istta giddofe dumma erateththi dizayta ne erizaa gidikko heyta ta meheta bolla shuuma» gides.
Genesis47:7 Hessafe guye Yooseefey ba aawaa Yaaqoobe gelththidi kawo sinth aaththides. Yaaqoobey Gibxe kawo anjjides.

Genesis47:15 Gibxe miishshaynne Kanaane miishshay ubbay wuriin Gibxe asay wuri Yooseefekko yiidi iza
Genesis47:16 Histtiin Yooseefey isttas
Genesis47:17 Hessa gishshas istti ba mehe Yooseefes ehiin Yooseefey istta para
Genesis47:18 He layththay wuriin nam7anththo layththan istti izakko yiidi izas

Genesis47:20 Yooseefey Gibxe biitta ubbaa kawos shammides. Gibxeti wuri koshay minnida gishshas ba gadeza bayziin gadezi kawos gidides.
Genesis47:21 Yooseefey Gibxe asa ubbaa ha gaxappe doommidi he gaxa gakkanaas kawos aylle kessides.
Genesis47:22 Gidikkoka kawoy qeesetas kath immiza gishshas qeeseta gade shammibeenna. Hessa gishshas qeeseti ba gade bayzibeettenna.
Genesis47:23 Yooseefey asaa
Genesis47:24 Gido attiin kath maxi gelththiza wode kaththaafe ichchashu kusheppe issi kushe kawos immite. Ichchash kusheppe attida oyddu kushezi intte gades zereth
Genesis47:25 Histtiin istti
Genesis47:26 Hessa gishshas Yooseefey Gibxe biittan kaxxida kaththaas ichchash kusheppe issi kushe kawos immizayssi woga gidana mala ooththides. He wogazikka hach gakkanaas eqqi dees. Kawos gidontta gadey qeeseta gade xalla.
Genesis47:27 Isra7eeleti Gibxe biittan Geeseme geetettizason uttida; istti heen aqota demmida; istti yelettidanne daro corattida.

Genesis49:1 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobey ba attuma nayta xeygidi
Genesis49:2 «Intteno Yaaqoobe naytoo! Issife haa shiiqidi siyite; intte aaway Isra7eeley inttes yootizayssa ezgite.
Genesis49:3 «Oroobeele ta naa bayrazoo
Genesis49:4 Neni bixalay baynda para mala; ne dosidaa hanaasa; neni ne aawa hiith kezadasa; ne aawa hiiththaaka tunisadasa. Hessa gishshas halaqateththi nees bessenna.
Genesis49:5 «Simooninne Lewey ishantta; istti iita ooththanaas mashshanne toora ekkeettes.
Genesis49:6 Tani istta zoreteththan gelikke; tani istta shiiqosonkka uttike. Ays giikko istti ba hanqon as wodhidanne bana ekka ekka giin boorata gildayi qanxxida.
Genesis49:7 Istta iita hanqoynne istta meqeththa iitateththi qanggettidaaz gido! Tani istta Yaaqoobe asaa giddon laallana; Isra7eele biittan dharccana.
Genesis49:8 «Yuhuda ne ishati nena galatana; neni ne morkketa morge naaqqa oykkana; ne aawa nayti nees hokkidi ziggana.
Genesis49:9 Yuhuda neni wodalla gaammo mala; ta naazoo! Neni shankkati oykkidi
Genesis49:10 Dere haarizaadey yaana gakkanaashe
Genesis49:11 Izi ba hare kaththa giddon ba hare gutteka doorettida kaththan qachchana. Izi ba haath woyne ushshan
Genesis49:12 Iza ayfey woyne ushshafe aadhdhi zo7ana; iza achchayka maaththafe aadhdhi boottana.
Genesis49:13 «Zaabilooney abba doonan daana; iza biittay daro markabetas shemposo gidana; iza zaway Sidoona gakkana.
Genesis49:14 «Yisakoorey nam7u goday go7ettiza mino hare mala.
Genesis49:15 Izi ba shempizasoy lo7o gididayssanne ba derey ufayssizaaz gididayssa be7idi
Genesis49:16 «Daaney Isra7eele qommotappe issaas pirdiza daanna gidana.
Genesis49:17 Daaney para toggidaadey guye kundana mala para qirphe dukkiza oge doonan diza haso shooshsha.
Genesis49:18 «Abeet Godoo! Ta ne maado naagays.
Genesis49:19 «Gaadey bonqqizaytan deshettana; gido attiin izikka istta geedo kaallidi istta bonqqana.

Genesis49:21 «Niftaalemey qashettontta yeda diza
Genesis49:22 «Yooseefey melontta pultto haaththa achchan tokettada
Genesis49:23 Wondafeza dukkizayti iza bolla worajjida; ba wondafenkka gooddi gooddi caddeettes.
Genesis49:24 Gido attiin Yaaqoobe Godaa Xoossa wolqqan iza heemmiza Isra7eele zaallan iza wondafey minnides; iza mino qeseykka pilatides.
Genesis49:25 Nena maaddiza ne aawa Xoossan Ubbaa Dandayzayssaninne nena anjjiza Xoossan pude bollafe beettiza maadoninne garsa biittafe beettizan anjjon qasseka aayi uloppenne dhanththafe beettiza anjjon nena anjjana.
Genesis49:26 Ne aawa anjjoy beni wodeppe hanno gakkanaas minni diza zumatappenne mernaa zumata ubbaafe aadhdhees. Hessa gishshas hayssi ha anjjoy wurikka Yooseefe gakko. Ba ishata bolla halaqa gidida Yooseefe bolla wodhdho.
Genesis49:27 «Biniyaamey bonqqiza kana suyte mala. Ba shankkatidayssa maalado mees; ba di7idayssa omars gishereththees» gides.
Genesis49:28 Hayti tammanne nam7u Isra7eele qommota; qasse istta aaway istta issaa issaa istta hano mala isttas bessiza anjjo hessaththo anjjides.

Genesis49:30 Hessika Kanaane biittan

Genesis49:32 He gadezinne izan diza gongoloy Hiitetappe shamettidayssa» gi azazides.
Genesis49:33 Yaaqoobey ba naytas azazo wursidaappe guye ba toho pude ba hiixan shiishshi ekkidi hayqqidi ba aawatan gaaggides.
Genesis50:1 Yooseefey ba aawaa aha bolla kundidi yeekkidessinne iza yeerides.
Genesis50:2 Hessafe guye Yooseefey dhale shiishshiza ba oosanchchata ba aawa Isra7eele aha sawiza shitto tiydi melissana mala azaziin istti tiydi melissida.
Genesis50:3 Shitto tiyoy xalla 40 gallas kumeth wursides; ays giikko hayssi tiyoy wonakka oyddu tammu gallas ekkees. Gibxe asati izas laappun tammu gallas yeekkida.

Exodus8:7 Gido attiin marotikka bantta biittan Gibxen ooqqarsi kezana mala izaththoka ooththida.
Exodus8:8 Kawozi Musenne Aaroone xeygisidi
Exodus8:9 Histtiin Musey kawoza
Exodus8:10 Histtiin kawozi
Exodus8:11 He ooqqarsay neeppe
Exodus8:12 Museynne Aarooney kawaa achchafe kezidi kawoza bolla izi ehida ooqqarsata gishshas Musey GODAAKKO waassides.
Exodus8:13 GODAYKKA Musey oychchida mala ooththides; ooqqarsi soon
Exodus8:14 Gibxe asay ooqqarsaa shiishshi shiishshidi korides; biittayka xinqqon zeeqqides.
Exodus8:15 Gido attiin kawozi guuththa peeqa demmida wode ba wozina minththides; GODAY yootida malakka izi Museynne Aarooney yootida yo7oza siyontta ixxides.
Exodus8:16 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse
Exodus8:17 Histtiin istti hessaththo ooththida; Aarooney ba guufe ekkidi guufezara biitta gudullaa shociin asanne mehe ubbaa bolla cuuchchi kezides. Gibxe biittan ha gaxappe heni gaxa gakkanaas gudullay wuri cuuch gidides.
Exodus8:18 Marotikka ba bitan izaththo ooththanaas paacciin isttas dandayetibeenna. Cuuchchay asa bollanne mehe bolla kumides.
Exodus8:19 Marotikka kawozas
Exodus8:20 GODAY Muses
Exodus8:21 neni ta asaa yeddontta ixxiko
Exodus8:22 Gido attiin tani GODAY ha biittan dizayssa neni erana mala he gallas ta asay diza Geeseme biittan boxey gakkontta mala tani teqqada istta biittaa naagana.
Exodus8:23 Tani ne asaappe ta asaa dumma shaakkana; hayssan malaata wonto ooththana› gides gaada yoota» gides.
Exodus8:24 Hessafe guye GODAY gida mala ooththides; kawoza sooninne iza daannata soon daro wolqqama boxey kumides; kumeththa Gibxe biitta ubbaa iissides.

Exodus12:1 Gibxe biittan GODAY Musenne Aaroone hizgides;
Exodus12:2 «Ha aginay inttes layththas koyro agina gido;

Exodus12:4 He keeththa asaa qooday laaqqaza ubbaa maanaas guuxxizaa gidikko izaadey baas matattiza guta ba soo asaa mala qoodidi issaadey issaadey mi wursanayssa shaakki eretto.
Exodus12:5 Intte doori ekkana laaqqay yelettiin issi layth gididi iza bolla aykko borey baynda adde laaqqa gido. Intte laaqqaza dorsafe woykko deyshafe ekkanaas dandayeeta.
Exodus12:6 Ha aginay tammanne oydanththo gallas gidana gakkanaas istta naagite; he gallas arshey wullishin Isra7eele maabara asay wuri istta shukkanaas koshshees.
Exodus12:7 Shukkidi suuththafe ekkidi istta ashoza miza keeththas qosilaththaanne qoreza bolla tiyetto.
Exodus12:8 Ashoza he gallas qammaka taman xiixidi
Exodus12:9 Ashoza qaye woykko doyssidi moopite; hu7eza; gedata; qanththa ashozakka ubbaa xiixidi miite.
Exodus12:10 He ashozappe gadey wonttana gakkanaas aykkoka ashshofte. Wonttana gakkanaas attidaazi diikko taman xuuggana koshshees.

Exodus12:12 «Tani he gallas qammara Gibxe biittara hemettashe bayra yelettida

Exodus12:14 «He gallassay tani GODAY inttes ooththidayssa qoppi qoppi bonchchiza gallas gido; intte zereththi wuri GODAA ba7aale bonchcho; hayssa inttes woga histtidi mernaas bonchchite.
Exodus12:15 «Laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy gelontta uketh miite; koyro gallas intte sooppe irsho diggite. He koyro gallassafe doommidi laappunththa gallas gakkanaas
Exodus12:16 Koyro gallas geeshsha duulata shiiqite; hara geeshsha duulata qasse laappunththa gallas shiiqite; asay wuri maanaas quma kaththofe attiin he gallassata ubbaan aykkoka ooththofte; intte ooththana miishshi hessa xalla.
Exodus12:17 «Tani inttena Isra7eele nayta Gibxe biittafe kessiday he gallas gidida gishshas Ukeththa ba7aale bonchchite. He gallassa ba7aaleza naa naas attontta woga histti bonchchite.
Exodus12:18 Koyro aginan he aginaas tammanne oydanththa gallassa omarsafe doommidi nam7u tammanne issinththa gallassa omarsa gakkanaas irshoy gelontta uketh miite.
Exodus12:19 Laappun gallas gakkanaas irshoy intte soon beettofo; irshoy gelida kath miza asi bete asi gidiin woykko he dere as oonakka gidiin hessaadey Isra7eele maabara giddofe dhayo.
Exodus12:20 Irshoy gelidaaz aykkoka moopite; intte dizason awanka irshoy gelontta uketh maanaas bessees.»

Exodus14:18 Tani kawoza baggara iza para-gaareta baggaranne iza toga asata baggara taas bonchcho demmida wode tani GODAA gididayssa Gibxe asay erana» gides.
Exodus14:19 Hessafe guye kase Isra7eele asaa sinththara biza Xoossa kiitanchchay asaappe guye aadhdhi eqqides. Tuussa mala shaaraykka istta sinththafe guye bagga yuuyidi
Exodus14:20 Gibxe asaassinne Isra7eele naytas giddon aadhdhi eqqides. He shaaray omars issi baggara dhumisidi hankko baggara poo7isides; histtiin omars kumeth issoy issaakko shiiqana dandaybeettenna.

Exodus14:23 Gibxe asay kawo parati wuri
Exodus14:24 Buro bazzoy zo7anaappe kasetidi GODAY tamaninne tuussa mala shaaran gididi
Exodus14:25 GODAY istta para-gaareta toho qachchi oykkida gishshas laagoy bana waayisiin Gibxe asay
Exodus14:26 GODAY Muse
Exodus14:27 Musey ba kushe abbaa bolla piddisides; gadey wontishin abbay kase ba diza soho guye simmides; Gibxe asay gede iza giddo baqatishin GODAY Gibxe asaa heen abbaa giddon yeggides.
Exodus14:28 Haaththay guye simmidi para-gaareta toga asatanne Isra7eele nayta kaallidi abban gelida kawo olanchchata mule mitti aggides; isttafe issaadeyka attibeenna.
Exodus14:29 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay haaththi isttas ushachcharanne hadirsara goda mala eqqi dishin abbaa giddora mela biitta bollara hemetti bides.
Exodus14:30 GODAY he gallas Isra7eele asaa Gibxe asaa kusheppe hayssaththo ashshides. Qasse Isra7eele asay Gibxe asaa aha abba doonan be7ides.
Exodus14:31 GODAY Gibxe asa bolla bessida gita wolqqaa be7idi Isra7eele asay GODAAS babbidessinne izanne iza aylle Musekka ammanides.
Exodus15:1 He wode Museynne Isra7eele asay hayssa mazamureza GODAAS yexxides; «Bonchchon izi keehi dhoqqu dhoqqu gida gishshas
Exodus15:2 GODAY taas wolqqanne mazamure; izi tana ashshides. Izi ta Xoossa; tani iza sabbana. Izi ta aawa Xoossa; tani iza dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana.
Exodus15:3 GODAY olanchcha; iza sunththika GODAA.
Exodus15:4 Gibxe kawo para-gaaretanne iza olanchchata abban wursides; ubbaafe aadhdhi doorettida Gibxe kawo halaqati
Exodus15:5 Ciimma haaththi istta kammides; istti shuchchaththo ciimman mitettida.
Exodus15:6 «Abeet GODAWU! Ne ushachcha kushey wolqqan goobides; GODAWU ne wolqqama ushachcha kushey morkke menththereththides.

Exodus15:8 Ne peenoy haaththaa pude essi doorides. Goggiza haaththika goda mala minni eqqides; ciimma giddon diza haaththi abbaa giddon irkkides.
Exodus15:9 «Morkkey ceeqettishe
Exodus15:10 Gido attiin neni istta ne peenon punniin
Exodus15:11 «Abeet GODAWU! Eeqa xoossata giddon ne malay oonee? Geeshshateththan bonchchettizay
Exodus15:12 Neni ne ushachcha kushe piddisadasa
Exodus15:13 «Ne wozzida ne asaa wurontta ne siiqon kaaleththadasa. Neni ne wolqqan istta ne aqiza geeshsha soo gelththadasa.
Exodus15:14 Dere asay hessa siyidi kokkorides. Filisxeeme biitta asatakka hirga miixay oykkides.
Exodus15:15 He wode Eedoome biitta halaqati dagammida. Mo7aabe biitta haarizayti hirgan kokkorida. Kanaane dere asay wuri seerides.

Exodus15:17 Neni istta ehada
Exodus15:18 GODAY mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas kawotana.»

Exodus21:1 «Neni Isra7eele naytas immana wogay hayssa.
Exodus21:2 Neni Isra7eele nayta garsafe aylle shammiko izi nees usuppun layth ooththo; gido attiin laappunththa layththan izi aykkoka qanxxontta aylleteththafe coo mela yedetto.
Exodus21:3 Izi barkka yidaa gidikko barkka bo; ba machcheyra yidaa gidikko iza machcheyakka izara bu.
Exodus21:4 Iza goday izas machcho ekkidaa gidikko machcheya izas adde nayta woykko macca nayta yelidaa gidikko
Exodus21:5 Gido attiin he aylley
Exodus21:6 iza goday iza pirdiza asa sinth aaththo; hessafe guye keeththa penge woykko penge qosilaththaako iza efidi iza hayth goonththan lukko. Histtiko izi ba de7o layth ubbaan izas aylle gidana.
Exodus21:7 «Asi ba macca nayo aylleteththas bayzikko adde aylleti aylleteththafe keziza mala iza kezuppu.
Exodus21:8 Iza bana dooridi efida godaa ufayssontta ixxiko izi goday izo wozzisanaas koshshees. Izi izis ammanettontta aggida gishshas izo allagas bayzana bessenna.
Exodus21:9 Izi izo ba naas ekkanaas koykko ba macca naas ooththiza mala izis bessizayssa ooththo.
Exodus21:10 Izi baas hara machcho ekkiko koyro machcheys quma woykko may7o pacisoppo; qasse izira aqo aggofo.
Exodus21:11 Izi hayta heedzdzata izis immontta ixxiko aykko miishsheyka qanxxettontta aylleteththafe kezada bu.
Exodus21:12 «As wodhida asi hayqqanaas bessees.
Exodus21:13 Xoossa shene gidi uttiin qoppontta dishe as wodhidaadey tani giigsidaso bete bo.
Exodus21:14 Gido attiin as wodhana qoppidi erishe hara as wodhikko hessaadey attanaas giidi he ta giigsida taas yarsho shiishshizaso yiikko yarshizasohozappe haraso efada wodha.
Exodus21:15 «Ba aawa woykko ba aayo wadhdhiza asi oonikka hayqqo.
Exodus21:16 «Asa wolqqan oykkidi bayzizaadey woykko wolqqan oykkiin asi iza kushen beettidaadey hayqqanaas bessees.
Exodus21:17 «Ba aawa woykko ba aayo cayizaadey hayqqo.
Exodus21:18 «Nam7u asati ba garsan ooyettiko
Exodus21:19 hessafe dendidi guufera kare giddon hemettiko
Exodus21:20 «Asi ba attuma aylle woykko macca aylleyo guufen shocikko he shochchaa geedon heerakka iza kushen hayqqiko shocidayssi qaxxayettanaas bessees.
Exodus21:21 Gido attiin he qohettidayssi issi gallas woykko nam7u gallas gakkanaas hayqqontta aggiko he ayllezi iza miish gidida gishshas izi qaxxayettenna.
Exodus21:22 «Nam7u asati ba garsan issoy issaara ooyettishe qanththara diza maccassayo boshas gaththiko
Exodus21:23 Gido attiin izis boshay darikko shemppo gishshas shemppo
Exodus21:24 ayfe gishshas ayfe
Exodus21:25 xuussa gishshas xuus
Exodus21:26 «Issi asi attuma woykko macca aylle ayfe shoci toyssiko he ayfeza gishshas aylleteththafe kessi yeddo.
Exodus21:27 Hessaththoka ba aylley woykko ba aylleza ach menththiko he achchaa gishshas aylleteththafe kessi yeddo.
Exodus21:28 «Booray maccas woykko attumas icci wodhikko
Exodus21:29 Gido attiin booray kasekka icciza boora gidikko
Exodus21:30 Gido attiin izi cigo qanxxana mala oyshettiko istti oychchidayssa ay gidikkoka qanxxidi ba shemppo wozzo.
Exodus21:31 Booray attuma naa woykko macca naa icci wodhikko pirday issi mala gido.
Exodus21:32 Booray attuma aylle woykko macca aylleyo icci wodhikko booraa goday aylleza godaas heedzdzu tammu bira ciggo; booraykka shuchchan cadettidi hayqqo.
Exodus21:33 «Issi asi olla kama qaarikko woykko olla bookkidi kammontta aggiko
Exodus21:34 he ollaza goday meheza waaga qanxxo. Izi meheza godaas waaga qanxxidi hayqeththaa baas ekko.
Exodus21:35 «Issi asa booray hara asa boora icci wodhikko
Exodus21:36 Gido attiin he booray icciza boora gididayssi kaseti erettishin
Exodus22:1 «Issi asi boora woykko dorsa kaysoti ekkidi shukkiko
Exodus22:2 «Kaysoy keeth bookkishe oykettidi shocetti hayqqiko shocidayssi suuth gussida gishshas oychchettenna.
Exodus22:3 Gido attiin hessi gadey wonti geyiin hanizaa gidikko izi he gukkida suuththaa acon oyshettees. Kaysozi kaysotidayssa qanxxo; gido attiin izas aykkoyka bayndaa gidikko kaysotidayssa qanxxanaas izi bayzetto.
Exodus22:4 Izi kaysotida mehey paxa dishe iza kushen beettiko
Exodus22:5 «Issi asi ba mehe demban woykko ayfey meetettiza miththa giddon heemmishe
Exodus22:6 «Issi asi buuraa xuuggiko tamay dendidi buuraza wursidi dooren diza kath woykko eqon diza kaththaa mulera mizaa gidikko koyro tama oyththida addezi afilaama qanxxo.
Exodus22:7 «Issi asi bira woykko hara miish naagissanaas ba shooros hadara immiko
Exodus22:8 Gido attiin kaysozi beettontta ixxiko
Exodus22:9 «Asi ay mootonkka boora geedon
Exodus22:10 «Asi ba shooros hare
Exodus22:11 hadaraaddey ba shooro meheza bochchonttayssas GODAA sinththan caaqqiko
Exodus22:12 Gido attiin mehezi hadaraaddefe kaysotettidaa gidikko mehaaddes qanxxo.
Exodus22:13 He meheza do7ay midaa gidikko
Exodus22:14 «Asi ba shooroppe mehe garxxi ekkiko iza goday bayndason he mehey qohettiko woykko hayqqiko he meheza gishshas qanxxo.
Exodus22:15 Gido attiin iza goday izara diikko
Exodus22:16 «Issi asi azinas giigontta geela7oyo baleththidi izira zin7izaa gidikko izo cilooshidi baas machcho ekko.
Exodus22:17 Izi aaway izo izas immontta ixxiko
Exodus22:18 «Bita bitiza maccas paxa woththofa.
Exodus22:19 «Mehera gaaggiza asi oonikka hayqqo.
Exodus22:20 «GODAAS xalalappe attiin hara xoossas shukki yarshiza asi oonikka hayqqi dhayo.
Exodus22:21 «Betidi yida as qohopite
Exodus22:22 Azinay hayqqida am7eyonne aaway woykko aaya hayqqida naa waayisopite.
Exodus22:23 Intte istta waayisiin istti taakko waassiko tani istta waaso tumappe siyana;
Exodus22:24 he wode ta hanqoy intte bolla dendana; tani inttena mashshan wursana; intte machcheti am7eta intte naytikka aaway baynda yi7o nayta gidana.
Exodus22:25 «Intte giddon diza ta asaas issi manqo asas miishshe tal7iko
Exodus22:26 Neni issi miishsha gishshas ne lagge may7o oykkiko arshey wullontta dishin izas zaara.
Exodus22:27 Aazas giikko izi ba kallo kammizay izin xalla; hara ay may7idi aqanaas dandayzee? Izi taas waassiko ta mishettiza gishshas izas siyananne iza maaddana.
Exodus22:28 «Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala haasayoppa
Exodus22:29 «Ne kaththa xeera
Exodus22:30 Boorappe
Exodus22:31 «Intte taas geeshsha as gidanaas koshshees; hessa gishshas do7ay demban wodhida woykko dafi daakkida mehe asho kanas yeggite attiin moopite.
Exodus23:1 «Wordo yo7o laallofa; wordo markkattada iita as maaddofa.
Exodus23:2 «Iita miish ooththanaas daro asa kaallofa; pirda mirqqanaas daro asaara gidada markkattofa.
Exodus23:3 Manqo asi pirdaso shiiqikko iza manqoteth be7ada maadda pirdofa.
Exodus23:4 «Ne morkke booray woykko harey dhaydayssa demmiko izaades zaara imma.
Exodus23:5 Nena ixxiza asas harey caanara kundi dishin be7ikko izara maadettada denththa attiin heen agaagoppa.
Exodus23:6 «Pirdas dubbushan shiiqada
Exodus23:7 Wordo mooto siyoppa; geesh woykko xillo as hayqos aaththa immofa; ays giikko mooro ooththidaade tani mela yeddike.
Exodus23:8 «Matta7e ekkofa; aazas giikko matta7ey xeellizayta ayfe qooqiseessinne xillota qaala mirqqees.
Exodus23:9 «Hara dereppe yida bete as qohoppite; bete as gideththi ay mala deexxizaakko intte ereeta; ays giikko intte intte hu7en bete gididi Gibxe biittan de7ideta.
Exodus23:10 «Usuppun layth gakkanaas ne goyada zerida kaththa maxa shiishsha.
Exodus23:11 Laappunththa layththan gadeza goyontta shaachcha; histtiko ne dere garsan diza manqoti hessafe maana kath demmana; qasse isttafe attizayssa do7ati maana. Neni ne woyne tokkiza gade bollanne zayte immiza wogara miththa gade bollaka hessaththo ooththa.
Exodus23:12 «Usuppun gallas ne ooso ooththa; ne booraynne ne harey shempana malanne neson yelettida aylleynne bete asi
Exodus23:13 «Tani inttena gidayssa ubbaa minththidi ooththite; hara xoossata sunth xeygopitenne istta woossofte.
Exodus23:14 «Layththan heedzdzuto intte taas ba7aale bonchchite.
Exodus23:15 Abibe geetettiza aginan barettida gallassan ukeththa ba7aale bonchchite; ays giikko intte Gibxeppe keziday he aginanna. Tani inttena azazida mala laappun gallas irshoy gelontta uketh miite. «Inttefe issaadeyka ta sinththan mela kushe beettofo.
Exodus23:16 «Qasse intte intte gaden zeriin
Exodus23:17 Addeti wuri ubbaa Haariza GODAA ta sinth layththan heedzdzuto yetto.
Exodus23:18 «Neni yarsho suuth taas shiishshashe irshora uukettida ukeththara shiishshofa. He ba7aaleza bonchchiza gallas yarshettida moodheppe maalados aykkoyka attofo.
Exodus23:19 Ne gaden bayra kaxxida kaththa ubbaafe lo7izayssa GODAA ne Xoossaa soo ekka ya. Deyshsha laaqqa iza aayey maaththan doyssofa.
Exodus23:20 «Ne ogen nena naagana malanne tani nees giigsidaso nena efana mala
Exodus23:21 Izi yootizayssa ero gaada izas azazetta; iza bolla makkallofa; ta iza kiittida gishshas intte nagara ooththiko inttes izi atto geenna.
Exodus23:22 Izi yootizayssa intte lo7eththi siyikko
Exodus23:23 Ta kiitanchchay inttefe sinththe biidi
Exodus23:24 Istta eeqata sinththan hokkofte
Exodus23:25 GODAA intte Xoossaas goynnite; histtiko
Exodus23:26 Intte biittan ay maccasika boshettennanne maynenna. Tani intte daana layth adussana.
Exodus23:27 «Inttenara gaaggiza dereta ubbaa daganththana mala tani ta yashshateth intte sinththara yeddana; intte morkketi wuri inttes zokko zaaridi
Exodus23:28 Tani inttefe sinththara kazhe yeddada Hiiweta
Exodus23:29 Gido attiin biittay kallo attontta malanne do7ay darontta mala
Exodus23:30 Gido attiin intte qoodan daridi
Exodus23:31 Tani intte zawaa Zo7o abbaafe Mediteraane abbaa gakkanaas
Exodus23:32 Isttara woykko istta eeqa xoossatara caaqon gelopite.
Exodus23:33 Istta intte biittan woththofte; intte histtontta aggiko istti inttena ta bolla nagara oosisana; ays giikko istta eeqatas goynnizayssi tumappe inttes narxa gidana» gides.
Exodus24:1 GODAY Muse
Exodus24:2 Gido attiin neni nerkka taakko shiiqa; harati ta mata shiiqopetto. Qasse asaykka nenara pude kezoppo» gides.
Exodus24:3 Musey yiidi GODAA qaalanne iza woga ubbaa asaas yootiin asay wuri issi qaalan
Exodus24:4 Musey GODAY yootidayssa ubbaa xaafides. Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi zumaa garsan yarshizaso giigsidi Isra7eele asaa tammanne nam7u qommota sunththan tammanne nam7u shuch tuussa mala essides.
Exodus24:5 Izi Isra7eele asaappe naateththa attuma nayta kiittiin
Exodus24:6 Musey suuththaafe baggaa ekkidi keretan qolides; attida suuththaa yarsho yarshiza sohozan cacafides.
Exodus24:7 Hessafe guye Caaqo Qaala Maxaafaa ekkidi asaas dhoqqu histtidi nababiin asay
Exodus24:8 Museykka keretan attida suuththaa ekkidi asaa bolla wuxxidi asaa
Exodus24:9 Hessafe guye Musey
Exodus24:10 Isra7eele Xoossaa be7ida; istti be7oyssika iza tohoppe garsara salo mala geeyi uttida simpere geetettiza shuchchafe oosettida miish misatiza wuyge dizayssako.
Exodus24:11 Gido attiin Xoossi Isra7eele asaa halaqata wodhibeenna; istti Xoossaa be7ida; iza sinththan midanne uyida.
Exodus24:12 GODAY Muses
Exodus24:13 Hessafe guye Musey ba aylle Iyaasora baana keziin Musey pude Xoossa zumaa bolla kezides.
Exodus24:14 Isra7eele asaa halaqata izi
Exodus24:15 Musey zumaa bolla pude keziin Xoossa shaaray zumaa kammides.
Exodus24:16 GODAA bonchchoyka Siina zumaa bolla wodhdhi gam7ides; usuppun gallas gakkanaas shaarazi zumaa goozi oykkides; laappunththa gallassan shaaraa giddora GODAY Muse xeygides.
Exodus24:17 Isra7eele naytas GODAA bonchchoy zumaa xeeran eexxiza tama misatidi beettides.
Exodus24:18 Hessafe guye Musey he shaaraa giddo gelidi pude zumaa bolla kezidi heen oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu qamma gam7ides.
Exodus25:1 GODAY Muses hizgides
Exodus25:2 «Taas imota ehana mala neni Isra7eele naytas yoota; taas immanaas iza wozinay iza imma imma giin immiza asa imota ubbaa ne taas ekka.
Exodus25:3 Intte isttafe ekkana imotay haytantta; worqqa
Exodus25:4 salo misatiza qacina
Exodus25:5 dharsho ite zo7o qalamen yeggi kessidayssa
Exodus25:6 xomppes wogara zayte
Exodus25:7 eefudeninne tira bollan diza kiiseta giddon woththiza margide geetettiza shuchchatanne hara al7o shuchchata.
Exodus25:8 «Histtidi tani istta giddon aqana mala istti taas dumma goynniza soo giigsetto.
Exodus25:9 Xoossa Dunkaanezanne iza giddon diza miishshata tani nena bessiza leemisoza mala ooththite.
Exodus25:10 «Istti odoro miththafe adussateththay nam7u wadhanne bagga
Exodus25:11 Soo baggaanne kare baggaa walakay baynda worqqan meesha; iza yuuyi aadhdhanaas bolla bagga xanxaa worqqara yuushsha aaththa ooththa.
Exodus25:12 Taabotaas oyddu worqqa sagayota ooththada oyddu tohotan issi baggara nam7u sagayota
Exodus25:13 Hessafe guye odoro miththafe tooho miththata kessada worqqa tiya.
Exodus25:14 Taabotaa tookkana mala Taabotaza millen diza sagayotan tooho miththata gelththa.
Exodus25:15 Tooho miththati Taabotaa sagayota giddon detto; istti heeppe mulekka kezopetto.
Exodus25:16 Tani nees immiza caaqo qaala markka taabotaa giddon woththa.
Exodus25:17 «Harara walakettontta worqqafe xalala nam7u wadhanne bagga aduqqiza
Exodus25:18 Kamaza xeera nam7u baggara qoxxada nam7u kirubeta worqqafe ooththa.
Exodus25:19 Issi kirubeza issi bagga gaxan
Exodus25:20 Kirubeti ba qefe denththidi maaroteththa kamaa bollara kammetto; qasse issoy issaakko simmi uttidi kamazakko xeelletto.
Exodus25:21 Tani nees immiza caaqo qaala markka Taabotaa giddon woththa; qasse kamaza Taabotaas bolla baggara woththa.
Exodus25:22 Caaqo qaala markkay izan diza Taabotaa kamaa bolla diza nam7u kirubetappe giddon tani nenara gaaggada Isra7eele asaas immiza azazo ubbaa heen ta nees immana.
Exodus25:23 «Odoro miththafe adussateththay nam7u wadha
Exodus25:24 Histtada walakay baynda worqqan tiya; qasse iza yuushon worqqa xanxa yuushsha aaththa.
Exodus25:25 Hessaththoka qasse aahoteththi tadhdhako gidiza xanxa iza bolla yuushsha aaththa. Histtada iza bolla worqqa balxxanth yuushsha aaththa.
Exodus25:26 Xaraphpheezazas oyddu worqqa sagayota medhdhada
Exodus25:27 Xaraphpheeza tookkanaas tooho mith iza giddora aaththiza sagayoti xaraphpheezazas xanxa matan detto.
Exodus25:28 He tookkiza miththata odoro miththafe kessada
Exodus25:29 Hessaththoka qasse saanetanne pil7ota
Exodus25:30 Ta sinth aadhdhiza geeshsha ukeththay ubba wodekka xaraphpheeza bollafe dhayoppo.
Exodus25:31 «Worqqafe xalla qoxxada xomppe istta bolla woththiza ballata kessa; qasseka iza qoxxada xomppezi izan eqqiza toho
Exodus25:32 Issi millera heedzdzu ballati
Exodus25:33 Usuppun ballataska issaas issaas dhemoynne ciishshay izan diza ochcholoone geetettiza miththa ciish misatiza heedzdzu kureti detto.
Exodus25:34 Xomppeza giddo toomay
Exodus25:35 Nam7ay nam7ay issife waaththan diza heedzdzu ballatappe garsara issi issi dhemoy de7o.
Exodus25:36 Dhemotinne ballati wuri giddo toomazappe qoxettidi walakay baynda worqqafe oosettetto.
Exodus25:37 «Hessafe guye Xomppe woththizasozas laappun eexxizaso giigsada xomppeti sinththa bagga poo7ana mala oyththa.
Exodus25:38 Xomppeza bolla eexxishe qaammida shalota kessiza qaphetanne xiixa woththiza saaneta walakay baynda worqqafe ooththa.
Exodus25:39 Xomppezinne iza miishshati wuri heedzdzu tammanne ichchashu kilo giraame gidiza walakay baynda worqqafe oosettetto.
Exodus25:40 Tani nena zumaa bolla bessida leemisoza kaallada akeekan ooththa.
Exodus26:1 «Qasse lo7eththi suqettida booththa laynoppe dadettida tammu magalashata dunkaaneza giddon giigsa. Qasseka salo misatiza
Exodus26:2 Magalashati wuri issi gina gidetto; issaa issaa adussateththay nam7u tammanne osppun wadha; gomppay qasse oyddu wadha gido.
Exodus26:3 Ichchashu magalashata issife gaththa sikka; hankko attida ichchashu magalashatakka isttaththoka ooththa.
Exodus26:4 Issife gaaggi sikettida magalashatappe gaxan diza magalashaas balxxanththa bolla salo misatiza carqqafe siidhe ooththa; qasse issife gaaggidi sikettida hankko magalashaankka hessaththo ooththa.
Exodus26:5 Issife gaaggida issi magalashaa bolla ichchashu tammu siidhe misatiza miish
Exodus26:6 Hessafe guye worqqafe ichchash tammu qapheta medhdhada giddo dunkaanezi issino gidana mala
Exodus26:7 «Giddo Dunkaaneza bollara hara dunkaane ooththanaas tammanne issi magalashata deysha iskefe dadda.
Exodus26:8 Tammanne issi magalashatikka issi gina gidetto; issi issi magalasha adussateththay heedzdzu tammu wadha
Exodus26:9 Ichchashu magalashata issi baggara usuppun magalashata qasse hankko baggaara gaththa sikka. Usuppunththa magalashay sinththara soo bagga simmi qalam7etto.
Exodus26:10 Gaththi sikkida magalashatappe issi magalashaa gaxan ichchash tammu siidhe misatiza miishshata ooththa; qasse gaththi sikkida hankko magalashatappe wurseththa magalashaa balxxanththa bolla ichchash tammu siidhe misatiza miishshata ooththa.
Exodus26:11 Xarqimalappe ichchashu tammu qapheta ooththada
Exodus26:12 Bolla dunkaaneza magalashatappe palahida bagga magalashay giddo dunkaanezas guyera alaletto.
Exodus26:13 Bolla Dunkaaneza magalashati nam7u baggarakka issi issi wadha mala palahidi heera haara alalettidi giddo dunkaaneza kammana mala nam7u bagga millera alaletto.
Exodus26:14 «Bolla bagga dunkaaneza bollara kammanaas zo7o qalamen geli kezida dharsho ite giigsa; qasse iza bollara kammanaas haaththa giddo do7a galbafe hara kama giigsa.
Exodus26:15 «Giddo Dunkaaneza tole miththata odoro miththafe ooththa.
Exodus26:16 Issi issi tole miththas adussateththay tammu wadha
Exodus26:17 Issi tole miththas issi bolla oyketti uttida nam7u tohota ooththa. Giddo Dunkaaneza tole miththata ubbaaka hessaththo ooththa;
Exodus26:18 Giddo Dunkaanezas duge baggara nam7u tammu tole miththata kessada
Exodus26:19 issi issi tole miththas nam7u eqoso
Exodus26:20 Giddo Dunkaanezas pudeha baggara
Exodus26:21 issi issi tole miththas nam7u eqoso
Exodus26:22 Qasse giddo Dunkaanezas guyera arshey wulliza baggara usuppun tole miththata kessada
Exodus26:23 guye baggara diza zoozetas nam7u tole miththata giigsa.
Exodus26:24 Guye baggara diza tole miththati wuri xaphoppe xeeraa gakkanaas issi bolla gaaggi oykettidi
Exodus26:25 Issi issi tole miththas garsara nam7u nam7u tole eqosoy de7o; mulera osppun tole miththatinne birappe oosettida tammanne usuppun eqosoy deyo.
Exodus26:26 «Qasse meega miththata odoro miththafe kessa. Giddo Dunkaanezas issi bagga millen diza tole miththatas ichchashu meega miththata
Exodus26:27 qasse hankko bagga millen diza tole miththatas ha7ikka ichchashu meega miththata giigsa. Hessaththoka giddo Dunkaanezas guyera arshey wulliza baggara diza tole miththatas ichchashu meega miththata giigsa.
Exodus26:28 Giddo meega miththati tole miththatas giddora ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas kanththi kezanaas bessees.
Exodus26:29 «Tole miththata worqqan tiyada meega miththati istta giddora aadhdhiza sagayota worqqafe ooththa; qasse meega miththatakka worqqan tiya.
Exodus26:30 Giddo dunkaaneza tani nena zumaa bollan bessida leemisoza mala tokka.
Exodus26:31 «Salo misatizappe
Exodus26:32 Histtada odoro miththafe oosettidi worqqan tiyettida oyddu eqo miththata bolla diza worqqafe oosettida kaqotan kaqqa. He oyddu eqo miththati birappe oosettida eqosotan geletto.
Exodus26:33 He magalashaza giddo dunkaaneza kaaran diza qaphetappe garsara kaqqada
Exodus26:34 Maaroteththa kama ubbaafe dummatida qol7an diza caaqo qaalaas markka gidida taabotaa bolla woththa.
Exodus26:35 Xaraphpheezaza magalashaappe karera pude baggara woththa; xomppe woththiza ballaa qasse iza ginan duge baggara woththa.
Exodus26:36 «Dunkaanezan geliza pengezas salo misatiza qacinappe
Exodus26:37 Magalashazas ichchashu eqo miththata odoro miththafe kessada
Exodus27:1 «Odoro miththafe yarshizaso ooththa. He yarshizasoza dhoqqateththay heedzdzu wadha; gomppaynne adussateththay issi mala
Exodus27:2 Oyddu zoozeta wurseththa gaxan gaxan issi issi kace medhdha; kaceti yarshosozappe oosettetto. Histtada yarshizasoza xarqimala tiya.
Exodus27:3 Izan go7ettiza miishshata
Exodus27:4 Histtada izas xarqimalappe zayzare mala miishshinne oyddu gulata bollan oyddu sagayota ooththa.
Exodus27:5 Histtada yarshizasozas dabba bolla woththa.
Exodus27:6 Odoro miththafe yarshizasozas tooho miththata kessada xarqimala tiya.
Exodus27:7 Yarshizasoza tookkiza wode maaddana mala he tooho miththatas nam7u millera diza sagayotan aaththa.
Exodus27:8 Tani nena zumaa bollan bessida mala yarshizasoza sanqqafe ooththada giddoza doya agga.
Exodus27:9 «Xoossa Dunkaaneza gibbe lo7i dadettida liiqo laynoppe magalashata giigsa. Duge baggara diza magalashata adussateththay xeetu wadha gido.
Exodus27:10 Izas nam7u tammu eqo miththatinne eqo miththati isttan eqqiza nam7u tammu eqosota xarqimalappe ooththa; istta hu7en qasse kaqotanne tore miththata hu7e bolla gita sagayota birappe ooththa.
Exodus27:11 Hessaththoka pude bagga adussateththay xeetu wadha; qasse nam7u tammu tore miththatinne eqo miththatas nam7u tammu xarqimalappe oosettida eqosoti detto. Histtada birappe oosettida kaqotanne eqo miththatas hu7e bolla gita sagayota woththa.
Exodus27:12 Arshey wulliza baggara aakoteththay ichchashu tammu wadha gido; tammu tore miththatinne tore miththatas tammu eqosoti diza magalashati izas detto.
Exodus27:13 Qasse arshey mokkiza baggara aakoteththay ichchashu tammu wadha gididi
Exodus27:14 pengezappe issi baggara tammanne ichchashu wadha aduqqiza magalashati detto; isttas heedzdzu eqo miththatinne isttan eqqiza heedzdzu eqosoti detto.
Exodus27:15 Hessaththoka hankko baggara tammanne ichchashu wadha aduqqiza magalashati detto; isttas heedzdzu eqo miththatinne isttan eqqiza heedzdzu eqosoti detto.
Exodus27:16 «Pengezas nam7u tammu wadha aduqqiza magalasha salo misatiza
Exodus27:17 «Gibbeza yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza eqo miththata ubbaas birappe oosettida gita sagayoti
Exodus27:18 Gibbeza adussateththay xeetu wadha
Exodus27:19 «Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosos go7ettiza miishshati
Exodus27:20 «Xomppey to7ontta eexxishe daana mala izas koshshiza zayte wogara miththa ayfe caddi gum7idi xillo zayte nees ehana mala Isra7eele nayta azaza.
Exodus27:21 Aarooneynne iza attuma nayti xomppey GODAA sinththan qammida gadey wonttana gakkanaas poo7ana mala
Exodus28:1 «Ne isha Aaroonenne iza attuma nayta Nadaabe
Exodus28:2 Izas bonchchonne lo7oteth immana mala ne isha Aaroones dumma may7o giigsa.
Exodus28:3 Tani dumma dumma erateth immida kushe hiilla eriza as ubbaa xeygada Aaroones may7o giigsana mala yoota; izikka qeese gididi taas ooththanaas dummato.
Exodus28:4 Istti giigsana may7otikka haytanttako; tira kiise
Exodus28:5 Kushe hiillateth erizaytikka he may7ota giigsanaas
Exodus28:6 «Eefude geetettiza may7o worqqafe
Exodus28:7 Izas hashera duge wodhdhiza nam7u kaqoti detto; isttika biidi eefude may7ozara issife hara oyththiza miishshara dabba bolla oykettidi issino gidetto.
Exodus28:8 Hiillay lo7eththidi daddida danccoyka eefudeza mala worqqafe
Exodus28:9 «Margide geetettiza nam7u shuchchata ekkada Isra7eele nayta sunth istta bolla wooca xaafa.
Exodus28:10 Istta yeleta maaraa mala issi shuchchaa bolla usuppun sunth
Exodus28:11 Hiillanchchay maatame bolla sunth wooci xaafiza mala
Exodus28:12 Histtada tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zereththata qofsizaaz gidana mala ha nam7u shuchchata eefudezara oyththada hashe bolla woththa; histtiko GODAA sinththan ubba wode qofettana mala ha sunththata Aarooney ba hashe bolla tookko.
Exodus28:13 Shuchchata woththanaas worqqafe dooqetti giigida macarata ooththa.
Exodus28:14 Qasse walakay baynda worqqafe wodoro mala dooqettida nam7u orde sansalatata giigsada
Exodus28:15 «GODAA sheney aazakkonne iza oychchidi eriza tira kiise kushe hiillanchchan oosisa. He tira kiise eefude daddida mala
Exodus28:16 Izas adussateththaynne aahoteththay dakkoti qalam7ettidi issi tadhdhako gido.
Exodus28:17 Hessafe guye iza bolla oyddu maaran al7o shuchchata woththa; koyro maaran sardiyoone
Exodus28:18 Nam7anththo maaran baluure
Exodus28:19 heedzdzanththo maaran yaakintte
Exodus28:20 oydanththo maaran birille
Exodus28:21 Isra7eele qommota sunththaa qooda mala
Exodus28:22 «Tira kiises walakay baynda worqqafe wodoro mala dooqettida orde sansalatata ooththa.
Exodus28:23 Nam7u yiich worqqafe giigsada tira kiises qommo gaxa xeerara gaththada oyththa woththa.
Exodus28:24 He nam7u worqqa sansalatata tira kiisetas xeeratan diza sagayotara gaththa oyththa.
Exodus28:25 He sansalatatas hankko bagga xeeraa qasse eefudezas sinththa baggara
Exodus28:26 Qasseka nam7u worqqa yiichchata giigsada
Exodus28:27 Hessaththoka worqqafe hara nam7u yiichchata giigsada eefudezas sinththa baggara
Exodus28:28 Tira kiisen diza sagayota eefudezan diza sagayotara gaththidi salo misatiza suqeththan danccozara gaththa qachcha; histtiko tira kiisezi xeessafe bollara diza gishshas qashoy leppenna.
Exodus28:29 «Aarooney ubbaafe dumma qol7aa geliza wode he tira kiisen diza Isra7eele qommota sunththata tookko. Histtiko hayssi GODAA sinththan ubba wode hassa7ettana.
Exodus28:30 Qasse Urimenne Tumime geetettizayta tira kiisetan yegga. Aarooney GODAA sinth aadhdhishe ba tiran woththi ekki gelo. GODAA sheney aazakkonne Isra7eele asaa erisana mala
Exodus28:31 «Eefudezappe bollara may7ettiza adussa may7o salo misatiza carqqafe xalla giigsa.
Exodus28:32 He adussa may7ozas hu7ey gelizaso giigsa. Hu7ey kezizasozi daakettontta mala soo bagga qalam7ada yuushsha aaththa sikka.
Exodus28:33 Adussa may7ozas garsa bagga maccaraa yuushon salo misatiza
Exodus28:34 Worqqa daalatinne oroomaane miththa ayfe misleti he adussa may7o garsa bagga xeeran yuuyi aadhdhanaas walakan detto.
Exodus28:35 Aarooney qeeseteththan ooththiza wode ha adussa may7oza may7o; GODAA sinth ubbaafe dumma qol7a geliza wodenne keziza wode daalay giirana. Izi he may7oza may7iko hayqqenna.
Exodus28:36 Walakay baynda worqqafe issi alleqo giigsada maatame wooci kessiza mala iza bolla woocada
Exodus28:37 Histtada hu7en goossa bolla salo misatiza qacinan goossazas sinththa baggara oyththa kaqqa.
Exodus28:38 Histtidi Aarooney iza ba liiphen woththo; heen Isra7eele asay GODAAS imota immishe moorida miishshi diikkoka he mooroza Aarooney tookko. Asay ehizayssa GODAY ekkana mala izi he xaafettidayssa ubba wodekka ba liiphen woththanaas koshshees.
Exodus28:39 «Aaroone shamize lee7e laynoppe dadda; hu7en xaaxiza goossaka laynoppe giigsa. Qasse danccozakka xilpen alleqissada sikissa.
Exodus28:40 Aaroone naytas bonchchonne alleqo gidana mala
Exodus28:41 Neni ha may7ota ne isha Aaroonenne iza nayta mayzidaappe guye
Exodus28:42 Istta kalloy kamettana mala garsara gixxiza gith
Exodus28:43 Aarooneynne iza nayti Xoossa Dunkaane giddo geliza wode woykko gibbe giddon qeeseteththan ooththanaas yarsho yarshizaso shiiqiza wode hayta may7ota may7etto. Hessaththo hankko istti bantta bolla qohonne hayqo ehettenna. Hayssi Aaroonessinne iza zereththatas mernaas woga gido.
Exodus29:1 «Aarooneynne iza nayti qeese gididi taas ooththana mala neni istta dummasanaas ooththa; wosoy baynda issi mirgonne nam7u dharshota ekka.
Exodus29:2 Lo7o gistte dhiille ekkada irsho yeggontta uketh uukka; qasseka irsho yeggontta zayten guuththa uketh uukka; hessaththoka irsho yeggontta qeeri uketh uukkada zayte tiya.
Exodus29:3 Neni heyta leematen woththada
Exodus29:4 «Histtada Aaroonenne iza nayta Xoossa Dunkaaneza penge ehada haaththan meecca.
Exodus29:5 Hessafe guye may7ota ekkada
Exodus29:6 Goossaza iza hu7en goozisada
Exodus29:7 Tiyiza zaytekka ekkada iza hu7en tigada tiya.
Exodus29:8 Iza naytakka ehada shamizeta mayza.
Exodus29:9 Goossaka istta hu7en goozisa. Hessafe guye Aaroonenne iza nayta dancco danccisa. Qeeseteththay isttas mernaa ooso woga gido; hessaththo histtada Aaroonenne iza nayta qeese histta.
Exodus29:10 «Ne taas mirgo Xoossa Dunkaane sinth ehikko Aarooneynne iza nayti iza hu7e bolla ba kushe woththiko
Exodus29:11 wofanoza heen GODAA sinththan shukka.
Exodus29:12 Wofanoza suuththan ne biradhdhe gelththa kessada
Exodus29:13 Hessafe guye marace kammida moodhe
Exodus29:14 Gido attiin mirgoza asho
Exodus29:15 «Nam7u dharshotappe issaa ne ekkiko Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththetto.
Exodus29:16 Shukkada suuththaa yarshizasoza mille bolla ubba baggara wuxxa.
Exodus29:17 Dharshoza asho qanxxereththada
Exodus29:18 Hessafe guye dharshoza mulera yarshizasohoza bolla xuugga; hessi GODAAS taman xuugettiza sawo tunnu giza yarshoko.
Exodus29:19 «Qasse hankko dharshoza ne ekkiko Aarooneynne iza nayti ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththetto.
Exodus29:20 He dharshoza shukkada iza suuththaafe guuththara ekkada
Exodus29:21 Yarshizason diza suuththaafenne tiyettiza zaytezappe ginara ekkada
Exodus29:22 «Ha dharshozappe goynazanne izan diza tolthoza
Exodus29:23 GODAA sinththan woththida irshoy gelontta ukeththaafe issino
Exodus29:24 Neni ha kaththaa ubbaa Aaroone kusheninne iza nayta kushen woththiko istti yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histtidi GODAA sinththan shiishshetto.
Exodus29:25 Hessafe guye neni istta kusheppe heyta ekkada
Exodus29:26 Aarooney qeese gididi summiza wode shukkida dharshoza angaso ekkada GODAA sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththiza yarsho histta qaaseththa; hayssi inttena gakkiza gisha gidana.
Exodus29:27 «He shukettida dharshoza ashoppe yarsho ooththidi yaanne haa qaaseththida angasozanne GODAA sinth shiiqida gedaa dummasa. Hessika Aaroone gishanne iza nayta gisha gidana.
Exodus29:28 Isra7eele asay GODAAS shiishshiza issifeteththa yarshozappe angasozanne gedaza ubba wodekka Aaroonessinne iza attuma nayta gakkiza gisha gido. Ays giikko hayssi Isra7eele asay GODAAS shiishshiza imota.
Exodus29:29 «Aaroone qeeseteththaa dumma may7oy izappe guye iza zereththaas gido; istti tiyettidi qeese gidiza wode he may7oza may7etto.
Exodus29:30 Iza naytappe izasohon qeese gididi dummatida sohozan ooththanaas Xoossa dunkaane yida attuma nay he may7oza laappun gallas gakkanaas may7o.
Exodus29:31 «Aarooneynne iza nayti qeeseteththan sunththanaas shukettida dharshaa asho ekkada dumma sohozan doyssa.
Exodus29:32 Aarooneynne iza nayti dharshoza ashaa leematen diza ukeththara Xoossa Dunkaane pengen metto.
Exodus29:33 Istti qeese gididi summiza wodenne dummatiza wode istta nagaray atto geetettana mala yarshettida he yarshota metto. Gido attiin he yarshoti geesh gidida gishshas hara asi oonikka mooppo.
Exodus29:34 Qeeseteththan sunththanaas shukkida dharshoza ashoppe woykko ukeththaafe maalado gakkanaas palahidi aqikko dumma gidida gishshas taman xuugetto attiin meetettofo.
Exodus29:35 «Hessaththo histtada Laappun gallas gakkanaas tani nena azazida mala Aaroonenne iza nayta qeese histtada sunththa.
Exodus29:36 «Nagaray atto geetettana mala hach hach nagara gishshas issi mirgo yarsha. Hessankka yarshizasoza geeshsha; histtada yarshizasoza dummaththanaas zayte tiya.
Exodus29:37 Yarshizasoza nagara geesho wogaa laappun gallas gakkanaas wursada iza dummaththa. Histtiko yarshizasozi dumma geeshshasoho gidana. Iza bochchizaadey ubbay geesh gidana bessees.
Exodus29:38 «Yarshizason neni hach hach shiishshana yarshoy hayssa; Yelettiin issi layth kumontta nam7u adde laaqqa yarsha.
Exodus29:39 Adde laaqqatappe issaa maalado
Exodus29:40 Koyro dharsho laaqqa issi kilonne bagga lo7o gistte dhiille issi litiro gum7ettida zayten munuqada yarsha; issi litiro woyne ushshu ushsha yarsho histtada yarsha.
Exodus29:41 Nam7anththo dharsho laaqqaza omarsa wode yarsha. Maaladoyssa gina dhiille
Exodus29:42 «Ha xuugettiza yarshoy yiza yeleta ubbaan Xoossa Dunkaaneza pengen GODAA sinththan pacey baynda yarshettanaas koshshees. Tani inttenara gaagganaynne nees haasayanay heenkko.
Exodus29:43 Qasse heen tani Isra7eele naytara gaaggananne ta bonchchoyka he sohoza dumma soho histtana.
Exodus29:44 «Hessa gishshas tani Xoossa Dunkaanezanne yarshizasoza dummasana; Aarooneynne iza nayti taas qeese gididi ooththana mala tani istta dummasana.
Exodus29:45 Histtada tani Isra7eele nayta giddon de7ana; qasse tani istta Xoossaa gidana.
Exodus29:46 Tani istta giddon de7ana mala Gibxeppe istta kessida GODAA istta Xoossaa gididayssa istti erana. Ee

Exodus34:1 GODAY Muses

Exodus34:3 Nenara oonikka kezoppo; woykko zumaa bolla awanka beettofo; haray attoshin dorsi woykko mehe wudeykka zumaa sinththan heemettofo» gides.

Exodus34:10 Histtiin GODAY

Exodus34:15 «He biittan diza asatara ay caaqokka caaqettofte; ays giikko istti tanan ammanettontta ixxidi ba eeqata kaalliza wodenne isttas yarshiza wode istti inttena xeygikko intte istta yarsho maana.
Exodus34:16 Qasse intte istta macca naytappe dooridi intte attuma naytas ekkana; he wode he macca nayti tanan ammanettontta ixxidi ba eeqa xoossaa kaallidi intte attuma nayti istta kallana mala ooththana.
Exodus34:17 «Inttes goynnana eeqa xoossata aazappeka seerisidi medhdhofte.

Exodus37:1 Basli7eeley odoro miththaafe Taabota giigsides. Taabotaas adussateththay nam7u wadhanne bagga; aahoteththay issi wadhanne baggaa; dhoqqateththay issi wadhanne baggaa.

Exodus37:5 Taabotaa tookkanaas Taabotaa millen diza sagayotan tooho miththata aaththides.

Exodus38:2 Oyddu gulata wurseththa xeeran xeeran issi issi kace medhdhides. He kaceti yarshizasozara issife oykettidi oosettida. Histtidi yarshizasoza xarqimalara meeshides.
Exodus38:3 Izan go7ettiza miishshata

Exodus38:11 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuygezas hu7eso baggaa adussateththay xeetu wadha; qasse nam7u tammu tuussatinne he tuussatas nam7u tammu xarqimala tohoti deettes. Qasseka birappe oosettida istta bolla kaqqizaytinne tuussata hu7en qachchizayti deettes.

Exodus39:2 Qasse istti eefude worqqafe
Exodus39:3 Istti worqqa qoxxi lee7isidi
Exodus39:4 Nam7u baggay gaaggidi issino gidana mala nam7u hashe bolla gaththidi oyththiza carqqa giigsida.
Exodus39:5 GODAY Muse azazida mala hiillay alleqissidi daddida danccoyka eefudera issife gididi
Exodus39:6 Istti margide geetettiza nam7u shuchchata giigsidi worqqafe medhdhida shuchchu oykkizayssa bolla maarara woththida. Maatafa bolla sunth wooci xaafiza mala he shuchchata bolla Isra7eele nayta sunth woocidi xaafida.

Exodus39:12 heedzdzanththo maaran yaakintte
Exodus39:13 oydanththo maaran birille
Exodus39:14 Isra7eele nayta sunththaa qooda mala
Exodus39:15 Tiran diza kiisezas wodoro mala dooqettida sansalataa walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhida.
Exodus39:16 Nam7u worqqafe medhdhida shuchchu oykkizaytanne nam7u worqqa migidota medhdhidi tiran woththiza kiisezas qommo gaxa xeerata gaththi oyththida.
Exodus39:17 He nam7u worqqa sansalatata tiran woththiza kiisezas xeeran diza migidotara gaththi oyseththida.
Exodus39:18 He sansalatatas hankko bagga xeeraa qasse eefudezas sinththa baggara
Exodus39:19 Qasseka nam7u worqqa midigata medhdhidi eefudeppe kaalli diza tira kiisezas soo baggara diza nam7u xeeratan aaththida.
Exodus39:20 Hessaththoka worqqafe hara nam7u migidota medhdhidi
Exodus39:21 GODAY Muse azazida mala tira kiisen diza migidota eefudezan diza migidotara gaththidi
Exodus39:22 Eefudezappe bollara may7iza qamisa istti mulera salo misatiza carqqafe giigsida; hessika shemmaane oosokko.
Exodus39:23 He qamisazas qoodhe aaththizaso medhdhida; qoodhesoy daakettontta mala
Exodus39:24 Istta qamisazas duge bagga maccara yuushon salo misatiza
Exodus39:25 Qasseka worqqafe daalata medhdhidi qamisatas duge bagga xeera yuushshi aaththidi oroomaane misleta giddon aaththi aaththi walakkida.
Exodus39:26 GODAY Muses azazida mala istti Xoossa Dunkaane ooso ooththishe may7ana mala qamisazas duge bagga maccara yuushshi aaththidi daalanne oroomaane teera misle walakki aaththida.
Exodus39:27 GODAY Muse azazida mala istti Aaroonessinne iza naytas shemmaaney daddida liiqo laynoppe qolleta giigsida.
Exodus39:28 Qasse hu7en xaaxiza shaasheta
Exodus39:29 Hessaththoka qasse istti salo misatiza
Exodus39:30 Istti akilile misle walakay baynda worqqafe medhdhidi maatame bolla woociza mala iza bolla
Exodus39:31 Hessafe guye hu7e goossa bolla kaqqana mala
Exodus39:32 Xoossa Dunkaaneza oosoy wuri mulera polettides. Isra7eele asay ubbaa GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththides.
Exodus39:33 Hessafe guye istti Xoossa Dunkaaneza mulera ekkidi Musekko ehida; hessika dunkaanezanne iza miishshaza ubbaa
Exodus39:34 bollara kammanaas dharshoza ite zo7o qalamen yeggi kessidayssa
Exodus39:35 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa
Exodus39:36 xaraphpheezanne iza miishshe ubbaa GODAA sinththan woththiza geeshsha ukeththaa
Exodus39:37 walakay baynda worqqafe oosettida xomppe woththizasozanne izan maaran diza xomppeta
Exodus39:38 worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasizasoza
Exodus39:39 xarqimalappe ooththida yarshizasoza
Exodus39:40 Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge godaa genththiza magalashata
Exodus39:41 Qeeseti Geeshsha soon ooththidi may7anaas dadettida may7ota
Exodus39:42 Isra7eele asay oosoza ubbaa GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththides.
Exodus39:43 Musey oosoza xomosi xeellidi istta GODAY azazida mala ooththidayssa be7ides. Hessa gishshas Musey istta anjjides.
Exodus40:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Muse
Exodus40:2 «Koyro aginan koyro gallas
Exodus40:3 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa iza giddon woththada Taabotaza magalashan genththa.
Exodus40:4 Xaraphpheezaa gelththada iza bolla wodhdhanaas koshshiza miishshata ubbaa iza bolla woththa. Histtada xomppeta iza bolla woththiza miishshaza soo gelththada iza bolla xomppeta woththa.
Exodus40:5 Worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasizasoza Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan woththada
Exodus40:6 «Xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoza Xoossa Dunkaanezi geliza penge sinththan woththa.
Exodus40:7 Izan meecettiza kereza Xoossa Dunkaanezappenne yarshizasozappe giddon woththada haaththe izan tiga.
Exodus40:8 Xoossa Dunkaanezappe karera yuushsha aaththada Dunkaanezas kare bagga wuyge giigsada dubbushaa gelizason magalasha kaqqa.
Exodus40:9 «Tiyettiza zayteza ekkada Xoossa Dunkaanezanne iza giddon dizayssa ubbaa tiya; izanne iza giddon go7ettiza miishshata ubbaa dummasa; histtiko izi geesh gidana.
Exodus40:10 Hessafe guye xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasonne izas go7ettiza miishshaa ubbaa tiya; yarshizasoza dummasa; histtiko izi ubbaafe aadhdhida geesh gidana.
Exodus40:11 Meechcha kerezanne kereza iza bolla woththiza miishshata tiyada istta dummasa.
Exodus40:12 «Neni Aaroonenne iza nayta Xoossa Dunkaanezi geliza penge ehada haaththan meecca.
Exodus40:13 Hessafe guye qeeseteththa may7oza Aaroone mayzada izi taas qeeseteththan ooththana mala iza tiyada dummasa.
Exodus40:14 Iza attuma naytakka ehada qolle mayza.
Exodus40:15 Istti taas qeeseteththan ooththana mala
Exodus40:16 Musey ubbaaka GODAY bana azazida mala ooththides.
Exodus40:17 Hessa gishshas Gibxeppe istti kezida nam7anththo layththan
Exodus40:18 Musey Xoossa Dunkaaneza essiza wode Dunkaaneza toho istta sohon sohon woththides; tole miththatanne tuussaa aaththides; gordiza miththatakka gelththides.
Exodus40:19 Hessafe guye Musey GODAY azazida mala dunkaaneza tolidi iza bollara kama kammides.
Exodus40:20 Histtidi tammu azazoti xaafettida masettida shuchchata efidi Taabotaza giddon woththides; tookkiza tooho miththata Taabotaan aaththides; maaroteththa kamaakka Taabotaa bolla woththides.
Exodus40:21 Hessafe guye Taabotaza Xoossa Dunkaaneza giddo gelththides; genththiza magalashaa kaqqidi
Exodus40:22 GODAY Muse azazida mala
Exodus40:23 iza bolla GODAA sinththan woththiza geeshsha uketh giigsides.
Exodus40:24 GODAY Muse azazida mala
Exodus40:25 qasse xomppeta GODAA sinththan oyththides.
Exodus40:26 GODAY azazida mala
Exodus40:27 iza bolla sawiza exaane cuwasides.
Exodus40:28 Hessafe guye Xoossa Dunkaaneza pengen magalashaa kaqqides.
Exodus40:29 Xuugettiza yarsho yarshizasoza Xoossa Dunkaane gelizaso penge achchan woththides; iza bolla xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarsho GODAY azazida mala yarshides.
Exodus40:30 Meechcha kereza Xoossa Dunkaanezappenne yarshizasozappe giddon woththides. Histtidi meecettanaas haaththe izan tigides.
Exodus40:31 Musey
Exodus40:32 GODAY Muse azazida mala
Exodus40:33 Xoossa Dunkaanen yarshizaso yuushshi aaththidi dubbusha giigsides; he dubbushaa pengen magalasha kaqqides. Hessaththo histtidi Musey oosoza polides.
Exodus40:34 Hessafe guye shaaray Xoossa Dunkaaneza kammides; GODAA bonchchoyka iza kumides.
Exodus40:35 Shaaray Xoossa Dunkaaneza bolla uttida gishshassinne GODAA bonchchoy iza giddon kumida gishshas Musey iza giddo gelanaas dandaybeenna.
Exodus40:36 Isra7eele asay ba oge ubbaan
Exodus40:37 Gido attiin he shaaray dendontta ixxiko izi dendana gallassay gakkanaas isttika qaaxxettenna.
Exodus40:38 Istta oge ubbaan GODAA shaaray Isra7eele asay wuri be7ishin
Leviticus1:1 GODAY Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon dishe Muse xeygidi hizgi azazides
Leviticus1:2 «Isra7eele asay GODAAS yarsho shiishshiza wode istti naagana wogay hayssafe kaallizayssa; issi issi asi miizappe gidiin dorsafe woykko deyshafe gidiin ay qommo yarshoka shiishshiza wode
Leviticus1:3 hessika miizappe issaa xuugettiza yarshos shiishshanaas koykko issi boreykka iza bolla baynda mirgo boora dooridi eho; histtiko izi GODAA ufayssiza yarsho gidana mala Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengen shiishsho.
Leviticus1:4 Xuugettiza yarsho shiishshizaadey ba shiishshiza booraa hu7e bolla ba kushe woththo; he yarshozikka iza nagaraa wursanaas GODAY ekkiza lo7o yarsho gidana.
Leviticus1:5 Hessaadey mirgoza heen GODAA sinththan shukko; histtiko Aaroone zereththatappe gidida qeeseti booraza suuththaa GODAAS shiishshetto; Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen geliza penge baggara diza yarsho yarshizasoza bolla lanqera yuuyi aadhdhanaas suuththaa wuxxetto.
Leviticus1:6 Hessafe guye he yarshoza shiishshizayssi he shukettida meheza galbaa shooqidi kesso; ashoza qommon qommon qanxxereththo.
Leviticus1:7 Qeese Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti yarsho yarshizasoza bolla mith gophidi tama eeththetto.
Leviticus1:8 Qeeseza Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti he meheza ashoza qommon qommon shaakkidi hu7ezanne handaza gujjidi yarsho shiishshizason korettida miththaa bolla woththetto.
Leviticus1:9 He yarshoza shiishshizayssi he meheza qanththa ashozanne guye gedata haaththan meecco; qeesezi yarshoza ubbaa yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hayssa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees.
Leviticus1:10 «Izaadey ba dorsafe woykko ba deyshafe issaa xuugettiza yarshos shiishshana koykko issi borey iza bolla baynda dharsho woykko orge gido.
Leviticus1:11 Hessaka yarsho shiishshizasozappe pudeha baggara Xoossa sinththan shukko; Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti suuththaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto.
Leviticus1:12 He yarshaa shiishshizaadey he shukkida ashoza qommon qommon qanxxi kessidaappe guye he oosozas doorettida qeesey he kessida ashoza ubbaa hu7ezanne handazakka issife yarsho yarshizason gophettidi taman eexxiza miththaa bolla woththo;
Leviticus1:13 Addezi he mehezas qanththa ashozanne nam7u gedata haaththan meecco; qeesezikka hessa ubbaa GODAAS yarsho ooththi shiishshidi yarsho shiishshizasoza bolla ubbaa xuuggo; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy Xoossaa ufayssees.
Leviticus1:14 «Issaadey GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho kafoppe shiishshana koykko haraphphe ciye woykko waanose geetettiza kafoppe gidanaas dandayees.
Leviticus1:15 Qeesezikka he kafoza ekkidi gede yarshozaso shiishshidi kafoza qoodhe mirqqo; yarshoza shiishshida tamaan iza xuuggo; suuththika yarshoy iza bolla shiiqizayssa millera duge xoketto.
Leviticus1:16 Baallezanne qanththa ashoza dumma shaakkidi yarsho iza bolla shiishshizasozappe arshey mokkiza baggara bidinththi qolettizason yegetto.
Leviticus1:17 Qefeta oykkidi nam7u kessi phalqidi ashoza mulera shaakki yeggontta dishe yarsho shiishshizasoza bolla diza tamaan mulera xuuggo; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees.
Leviticus2:1 «Ay asikka Xoossas kaththa yarsho shiishshiza wode liiqo dhiille shiishshana bessees; he dhiilleza bolla wogara zaytenne exaane gujjo;
Leviticus2:2 Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetakko ekki yo; he wode iza ooso taray gakkida qeesey he dhiillezappe ba kuphpha kumeththa zaytezanne exaaneza ekkidi wurikka Xoossas shiiqidayssa erisanaas yarsho shiishshizayssa bolla taman xuuggo; hessa mala kaththa yarsho sawoy Xoossaa ufayssees.
Leviticus2:3 Kaththa yarshofe attida dhiilley Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetas imetto; hessika Xoossas shiiqida yarshofe shaaketti ekettida gishshas haratappe keehi dummatees.
Leviticus2:4 «Yarshozi ukeththi uukettiza bashen uukettidaa gidikkoka irshoy bochchonttaaz gido; izikka wogara miththa zaytera walakettidi liiqo dhiillera uukettida qeeri uketh woykko zayten gindetti uukettida uketh gidanaas bessees.
Leviticus2:5 «Yarshozi tama coocen kompettidaaz gidikko irshoy bochchontta wogara miththa zaytey gujettidi liiqo dhiillefe giigettidaaz gido.
Leviticus2:6 Ne ukeththaza basereththada iza bolla wogara miththa zayte gussada kaththa yarsho shiishsha.
Leviticus2:7 «Yarshozi qeeri bashen uukettida ukeththa mala gidikko wogara miththa zaytey izan gujetti munuqettida liiqo dhiillefe giigidaaz gido.
Leviticus2:8 Kaththa Yarsho Xoossas imettiza yarsho histta qeesezas imma; qeesezikka yarsho yarshizason yarsho.
Leviticus2:9 Qeesezi hessa he yarshozappe baggaa ekkidi ubbaa GODAY izi shiishshidayssa yuushshi qoppana mala yarsho yarshizason diza tamaan xuuggo; hayssa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees.
Leviticus2:10 Yarshishin attidayssi qasse qeesetas imetto; hessika GODAAS shiiqida yarshofe shaaketti ekettida gishshas haratappe keehi dummatees.
Leviticus2:11 «GODAAS xuugetti yarshettiza kaththa yarshora shiiqiza irsho gidiin woykko ees gidikkoka ne taman xuugganaas bessontta gishshas ne GODAAS shiishshiza kaththa yarshon ubbaan aykko irshoyka izan geloppo.
Leviticus2:12 Layththan layththan kath shiishshiza wode koyro maxettida kaththaafe xeera yarsho ooththidi GODAAS ekki yiite; he yarshozi yarsho yarshizasozan taman xuugettofo.
Leviticus2:13 Ay qommo kaththa yarshonkka maxiney dhayoppo; hessi neni ne Xoossaara caaqettida caaqo qaalaas malata; hessa gishshas ne shiishshiza kaththa yarsho ubbaa maxinera mal7inththa ooththa.
Leviticus2:14 Kath shiishshiza koyro aginan kaththa xeera ne shiishshiza wode caacettidi shigechchettida tiya gido.
Leviticus2:15 Hayssi kaththa yarsho gidida gishshas iza bolla wogara miththa zaytenne exaane gujja.
Leviticus2:16 Qeesezikka he yarshozappe bagga ekkidi izi GODAAS shiiqidaaz gididayssa akeekissana mala zaytezakka
Leviticus3:1 «Ay asikka saroteththa gishshas ba meheppe GODAAS issifeteththa yarsho shiishshiza wode iza bolla wosoy baynda mirgo woykko macca miiz dooridi eho.
Leviticus3:2 Yarsho ehizaadey yarshos izi shiishshiza meheza bolla ba kushe woththidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge matan shukko; Aaroone zereth gidida qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarshoy yarshettizasoza milleza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto.
Leviticus3:3 Issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza yarshozappe GODAAS taman xuugettiza yarsho gidi shiiqanayti qanththa ashota goozi oykkida handaa kumeth
Leviticus3:4 kilahotanne istta bolla diza handaa hessaththoka tire goozi oykkida handatappe doorettidayta.
Leviticus3:5 Qeeseti hessa ubbaa hara xuugettiza yarshora gaththi yarsho yarshizason xuugetto; hessa mala taman xuugettiza yarsho sawoy GODAA ufayssees.
Leviticus3:6 «Issifeteththas shiiqiza yarshoy dorsafe woykko deyshafe gidikko adde woykko macca gididi istta bolla wosoy bayndayta gidetto.
Leviticus3:7 Issi asi GODAAS shiishshiza yarshoy dorsa laaqqa gidikko
Leviticus3:8 ba kusheza laaqqaa hu7e bolla woththidi Dunkaaneza penge bolla shukko; qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla milleza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto.
Leviticus3:9 Issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza yarshozappe GODAAS taman xuugettiza yarsho gidi shiiqanayti handazanne zokko meqeththa garsafe qanxxettida goyna ubbaa
Leviticus3:10 kilahotanne istta goozi oykkida handa ubbaa qasse tire kammi oykkida lo7o handa ubbaa
Leviticus3:11 qeesezikka hessa ubbaa GODAAS kaththa yarsho histti shiishshidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo.
Leviticus3:12 «Issi asi GODAAS yarsho deyshe shiishshizaa gidikko
Leviticus3:13 ba kushe deyshaza hu7e bolla woththidi Dunkaaneza sinththan shukko; qeeseti suuththaa izappe ekkidi yarshoy yarshettizasoza bolla milleza yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxetto.
Leviticus3:14 He shukettida ashozappe hayssafe kaalliza asho qommota kaththa yarsho ooththidi GODAAS shiishshetto; heytikka qanththa asho kammiza handa ubbaa
Leviticus3:15 kilahotanne istta goozi oykkida handaa
Leviticus3:16 Qeesezikka hessa taman xuugetti sawiza yarsho ooththidi yarsho yarshizason xuuggo; handay wuri GODAAS shaakettidi dummato.
Leviticus3:17 Isra7eele naytappe handa mizaadey woykko mehe suuth uyizaadey dooppo; hessi wuri Isra7eele nayti dizasoninne istti diza wode ubbaan mernaas eqqi diza woga gido.»
Leviticus4:1 Xoossi Muse hizgi azazides;
Leviticus4:2 «Neni Isra7eele naytas yootanayssi hayssa; oonikka erontta baleteththan nagara ooththiko woykko erontta GODAA azazotappe issaa moorikko hayssafe kaalliza wogaa naago!
Leviticus4:3 «He wode tiyettida qeesey nagara ooththidi derezi nagara ooththidaa misatissi beettiko iza bolla issi wosoykka baynda issi mirgo boora ehidi ba nagaraa gishshas GODAAS yarsho shiishsho.
Leviticus4:4 Kormaza dunkaaneza penge ehidi ba kushe iza hu7e bolla woththidi GODAA sinththan shukko.
Leviticus4:5 Hessafe guye qeeseta halaqay he booraza suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi gede dunkaaneza giddo gelo;
Leviticus4:6 GODAA Keeththa magalashaas sinththa baggara eqqidi ba biradhdhe suuththaan gelththi gelththi kessidi laappunto gakkanaas wuxxo.
Leviticus4:7 Izappe guuththa suuth ekkidi Dunkaaneza giddon exaane yarshizasozan oyddu baggara diza dhemota bolla woththo; hankko attida suuththaa dunkaanezan geliza penge baggara xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizaso garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:8 He mirgoza handaza ubbaa
Leviticus4:9 kilahotakka istta goozi oykkida handazanne hessaththoka tire kammi oykkida moodhezappe doorettidayssa ekko.
Leviticus4:10 Qeeseta halaqay hessa ubbaa ekkidi xuugettiza yarshoy shiiqiza yarshosoza bolla xuuggo; oosozikka issifeteththas yarshoy shiiqiza meheza handafe ekkidi xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza mala hano.
Leviticus4:11 Gido attiin galbaza
Leviticus4:12 heeraappe gede kare kesso; gede bidinth kessi qolizaaso
Leviticus4:13 «Isra7eele asay erontta bala ooththiko woykko erontta GODAA azazoppe issino mooridaa gidikko he nagaraykka asaappe geemmiko
Leviticus4:14 he oosettida nagaray erettida mala heerakka derezi he nagaraa gishshas yarshos issi mirgo eho; izakka asay Gaytoteththa Dunkaane sinththe shiishsho.
Leviticus4:15 Deraa halaqati bantta kushe mirgoza hu7e bolla woththiin heen boorazi GODAA sinththan shuketto.
Leviticus4:16 Tiyettida qeesey he mirgoza suuththafe guuththara ekkidi gede Dunkaanezan gelo;
Leviticus4:17 GODAA Keeththa magalashaas sinththa baggara gididi ba kushe biradhdheta laappunto suuththan gelththi gelththi kessidi Xoossa sinththan wuxxo.
Leviticus4:18 Qasseka guuththa suuth ekkidi Dunkaane giddon diza exaane iza bolla yarshizasozas oyddu baggara diza dhemota bolla woththo; attida suuththaa qasse gede Dunkaanen gelizason xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:19 Hessafe qasse he mirgo moodheza ubbaa ekkidi yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo.
Leviticus4:20 Oosozi wurikka nagara gishshas shiiqiza mirgo yarshizayssaththo ooththetto; tiyettida Qeesezi deraappe nagara diggana; deraasikka atto geetettana.
Leviticus4:21 Hessafe guye mirgoza asay dizasoppe gede kare kessidi ba nagaraa gishshas shiishshida mirgoza kase xuuggoyssaththo xuuggo; hessika dereza nagarappe geeshshiza yarsho gidana.
Leviticus4:22 «Nagara ooththidaadeynne erontta dishe baleteththan GODAA ba Xoossaa azazotappe issiniyo mooridaadey izi dere kaaleththizaade gidikko
Leviticus4:23 ba ooththida nagara izi erida mala heerakka issi borey iza bolla baynda deysha orge ba nagarappe maarettanaas yarsho shiishsho.
Leviticus4:24 Ba kushe deyshaa hu7e bolla woththidi yarsho yarshizasozappe pudeha baggara xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason GODAA sinththan shukko. Hessika nagara diggiza yarsho gidana.
Leviticus4:25 Qeesezi he shukettida meheza suuththan ba biradhdheta gelththi gelththi kessidi oyddu baggara diza dhemota tiyo; izappe attida suuththa yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:26 Handaza ubbaa yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; he oosoy kase issifeteththa yarshos shiishshida meheta handa xuuggoyssaththo ooththetto; hessaththo qeesezi dereza kaaleththizaade nagara wursanaas yarsho shiishsho; izaskka atto geetettana.
Leviticus4:27 «Nagara ooththidaadeynne erontta dishe baleteththan GODAA azazotappe issiniyo mooridaadey hankko deraa giddofe gidikko
Leviticus4:28 ba ooththida nagara izi erida mala heerakka izi bolla issi boreykka baynda macca deysh ba nagaraa gishshas shiishsho.
Leviticus4:29 Ba kushe he deyshay hu7e bolla woththo; yarsho yarshizasoppe pudeha baggara xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason shukko.
Leviticus4:30 Qeesezikka he shukettida deyshay suuththan ba biradhdheta gelththi gelththi kessidi oyddu baggara diza dhemota tiyo; izappe attida suuththaa yarshoy yarshettizasoza garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:31 Issifeteththas shiiqiza yarshos shiiqiza meheta moodhe bollara shooqi kessizayssaththo hayssa ha meheza moodheka ubbaa bollara shooqi digo; sawozi GODAA ufayssiza yarsho ooththidi yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessaththo qeesezi he addeza nagara izappe digganaas yarsho shiishsho; izaadeska atto geetettana.
Leviticus4:32 «He addezi ba nagarappe maarettanaas yarshos dors shiishshana koykko izi bolla aykko borey baynda macca dors shiishsho.
Leviticus4:33 Izaadeyka dorsay hu7e bolla ba kushe woththo; yarsho yarshizasoppe pudeha baggan xuugettiza yarshos shiiqiza meheti shukettizason shukko.
Leviticus4:34 Qeesezi qasse dorsay suuththan ba biradhdhe gelththi gelththi kessidi yarsho yarshizasozas oyddu baggara diza dhemota suuththara tiyo; izappe attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizaso garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:35 Hessafe kaallidi issifeteththa yarshos shiiqiza meheta moodhe shooqi ekkizayssa mala ha dorsay moodheka ubbaa shooqi digo; hessaka GODAAS shiiqiza kaththa yarshos shiishshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessaththo qeesezi he addeza nagara izappe digganaas yarsho shiishsho; izaadeska atto geetettana.
Leviticus5:1 «Issaadey ba be7ida miishshe markkattana mala pirda pirdizaso xeygettidi ba be7idayssa woykko ba erizayssa markkattontta ixxiko hessi izas nagara gidana; hessa gishshas izaadey oyshettana.
Leviticus5:2 «Ay asikka erontta dishe wogan digettida do7ata bawuta
Leviticus5:3 «Ay asikka erontta dishin asappe goggi kezidi tunisiza miish bochchiko izaadey hessa erida gallassafe doommidi izas nagara gidees.
Leviticus5:4 «Ay asikka iitas gidiin kiyas gidiin yuushshi qoppontta coo mela adina adinettiko izaadey ooththida mooroza zaari akeekida wodeppe doommidi izaades nagara gidana.
Leviticus5:5 «Ay asikka hayta ha miishshatappe issaan qohi beettiko ba nagara qonccisi paaxanaas bessees.
Leviticus5:6 Izaadey ba nagaraa gishshas macca dors woykko macca deysh yarshanaas eho; qeeseykka izappe ekkidi izaade nagara wursanaas GODAA sinththan yarsho.
Leviticus5:7 «Ay asikka ba ooththida nagara gishshas dors woykko deyshe shiishshanaas dandayonttaaz gidikko nam7u haraphpheta woykko haraphphe ciyeta ehidi issiniyo nagara yarshos nam7anththayokka xuugettiza yarshos Xoossa sinth shiishsho.
Leviticus5:8 Ehidi qeesezas immo; qeesezikka qoho yarshos shiiqiza kafoy qoodhe qanxxontta mirqqidi qoho yarshos shiishsho.
Leviticus5:9 Suuththaafe guuththara ekkidi yarsho yarshozasoza bolla yuuyi aadhdhanaas wuxxo; attida suuththaa yarsho yarshizaso garsan wuxxo; hessika nagara wurso yarsho gidana.
Leviticus5:10 Hankko attida kafoyo diza wogaa mala xuugettiza yarsho histti shiishsho; hessaththo ooththidi qeesezi izaade nagaraa wursanaas yarsho; iita ooththidaades iza nagaray atto geetettana.
Leviticus5:11 Izaadey nam7u haraphpheta shiishshanaas dandayonttayssa gidikko ba nagaraa gishshas issi kilo liiqo dhiille eho; hessika nagara yarshos gidiza gishshas wogara zaytey woykko exaaney izan gujettofo.
Leviticus5:12 Izakka ehidi qeesezas immo; qeesezikka he dhiillezappe ba kushen kuphphati ekkidi GODAAS shiiqiza kaththa yarshora issife gaththi hassa7issanaas yarsho yarshizasoza bolla xuuggo; hessika nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarsho.
Leviticus5:13 Ay asikka haytantta mala nagaratappe issaa ooththiko qeesezi hessa mala ooththidi izaadey ooththida nagaraa wursanaas yarsho shiishsho; hessaadeska atto geetettana; hankko attida dhiilley kaththa yarshoy qeesezas attiza mala izas gido.»
Leviticus5:14 GODAY Muses hizgides
