Numbers18:1 GODAY Aaroones
Numbers18:2 Neninne ne nayti Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan ooththiza wode inttena ooson maaddanaas Lewe qommo gidida ne baggata ekka.
Numbers18:3 Istti ne alaafeteththa garsan dishe Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza ooso ooththetto; gido attiin geeshshasozan go7ettiza miishshatakko yarsho yarshizaso shiiqopetto; hee shiiqizaa gidikko neninne isttika issi bolla hayqqana.
Numbers18:4 Istti ubba wode inttenara issife oosonne Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon isttas imettida ooso ubbaa ba alaafeteththan polanaas bessees; gido attiin Lewe qommo gidontta ay asikka ooththanaas intteko shiiqoppo.
Numbers18:5 «Ta hanqoy qasseka Isra7eele asaa bolla qonccontta mala geeshshasozaninne yarsho yarshizasozan oosettiza oosoza alaafeteth polanayti inttenanne intte nayta xalla.
Numbers18:6 Intte bagga gidida Lewe zarkketa Isra7eele asaa garsafe inttes doorida imota histta immiday tana; isttika Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon baas imettida ooso ooththana mala taas dummatidayta.
Numbers18:7 Gido attiin yarsho yarshizasozaninne magalashaappe guye baggara ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan oosettiza qeeseteththa oosoy neessinne ne naytas xalla bessees; qeeseteththa oosozakka ta inttes imota histta immadis; qeese gidontta ay asikka hee shiiqikko hayqqana» gides.
Numbers18:8 Hayssafe guye GODAY Aaroones
Numbers18:9 Taas daro dummati shiiqiza imotatappe taman xuugettontta yarshoy neessinne ne naytas gisha gidana; hessika kaththa yarsho ubbay
Numbers18:10 Intte hessa geeshshasozan dishe miite; hessaka attumasay ubbay mo; izikka keehi dummatidaaza.
Numbers18:11 «Qasseka Isra7eele asay ta sinththan yaanne haa qaaseththi yarshiza yarshoy ubbay inttes gido; haytantta tani nees
Numbers18:12 «Isra7eele asay taas immiza oorath gakkiza kaththa xeerappe wogara zayte
Numbers18:13 Istti ba gadeppe taas GODAAS immiza kaththa xeeray inttessa; hessa intteso asaan geesh gidida asi oonikka maanaas dandayees.
Numbers18:14 «Isra7eele asaappe taas imettida miishshi ubbay inttessa.
Numbers18:15 Isra7eele asay taas shiishshiza meheppe woykko asappe bayra gidi yelettiday inttessa; gido attiin asaappe bayra gidi yelettidayssa gidikko istta miishshan wozzana bessees; hessaththoka geesh gidontta mehetappe koyro yelettidayssa miishshan wozzanaas dandayeeta.
Numbers18:16 Issi agina nayta wozzanaas geeshshasozan erettida meezaane likken ichchashu saqile bira wozzo miish ciggidi wozzanaas dandayeettes.
Numbers18:17 «Miizappe woykko dorsafe woykko deyshafe bayra gidi yelettidayssa wozzofte; heyti mulekka geesh gidida gishshas taas yarsho gidi shiiqanaas bessees; istta suuththa yarsho yarshizasoza bolla aracite; handazakka tana lo7o sawo sawana mala taman xuuggite.
Numbers18:18 Yaanne haa qaaseththi shiishshiza yarsho gididi shiiqiza angaso malanne ushachcha misse mala istta ashozi nees gido.
Numbers18:19 Isra7eele asay taas shiishshiza dumma dumma imotata wursaka ta inttes

Numbers18:23 Hayssafe guye Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon alaafeteth ekki ooththanaas bessizay Lewe zarkketa xalla gidana; heen oosettiza mooroska istti oyshettana; hessika isttas naa naa gakkanaas laamettontta woga gidana; Lewetas xinxxoy Isra7eele deren deenna.
Numbers18:24 Isra7eele asay taas dumma yarsho ehiza asraataa tani isttas gisha histta immadis; hessa gishshas isttas Isra7eele asaa giddon xinxxoy dontta mala yootadis» gides.

Numbers18:28 Hessa malan intteka Isra7eele asaappe ekkiza asraata ubbaafe GODAAS dumma yarsho histti shiishshite; intte GODAAS shiishshiza yarshoza qeese Aaroones immite.
Numbers18:29 Intte ha ekkiza miish ubbaafe doorettidayssanne lo7o gididayssa GODAAS gisha histti immite.
Numbers18:30 « ‹Goshshanchchay kaththa ayfeppenne woyne ushshafe doorettidayssa taas immidi attidayssa baas ekkiza mala intteka doorettidayssa taas immidi attidayssa inttes ekkite.
Numbers18:31 Hessika intte Gaytoteththa Dunkaane giddon ooththiza oosozas waaga gidida gishshas attidayssa intte intteso asaara awanka diidi maanaas dandayeeta.
Numbers18:32 Doorettidaaz intte GODAAS shiishshidaappe guye attidayssa intte miikko inttes nagara gidenna; gido attiin doorettidayssa izappe shaakkontta miidi dumma gidida Isra7eele asaa imota tunisontta mala naagettite; tunisizaa gidikko intte hayqqana› ga» gides.
Numbers19:1 GODAY Musessinne Aaroones hizgides
Numbers19:2 «Hayssi ta azazidayssi wogaas diza maara; Isra7eele asay izi morge bolla qambaray wodhdhi erontta borey baynda issi zo7o miiza us Isra7eele asay ehana mala asaas yoota.
Numbers19:3 He ussayo qeese El7ezeeres immite; he ussayo asi dizasoppe gede kare kessiko heen iza sinththan shukettu.
Numbers19:4 Qeese El7ezeerey izi suuththafe guuththara ekkidi ba biradhdhe xeeran laappunto gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezas sinththa baggara pistto.
Numbers19:5 He ussay galbay
Numbers19:6 Qeesezi Libaanoose ziga
Numbers19:7 Hessafe guye ba may7o meecco; ba bollaka haaththen meecettidi kase ba dizaso simmo; gido attiin omars gakkanaas wogay giza mala tuna gidi gam7o.
Numbers19:8 He ussayo xuuggidaadeyka ba may7o meecco; ba bollaka haaththan meecetto; izikka omars gakkanaas tuna gidi gam7o.
Numbers19:9 «Hessafe guye geesh gidida hara asi he bidinththaa shiishshi efidi asay dizasoppe gede kessidi geeshshasohon woththo; heenkka Isra7eele asay meecettidi geeyanaas go7iza haath giigsanaassa; hayssi wogazi oosettizay asa nagara wursanaassa.
Numbers19:10 Bidinththaa shiishshidaadey ba may7o meecco; gido attiin izi omarsa wode gakkanaas tuna gidi gam7o; hayssi wogazi Isra7eele asaassinne bete yiidi istta giddon diza asaas buroppe yaana yeleta ubbaas laamettontta woga gidana.
Numbers19:11 «Hayqqida asa aha bochchida asi laappun gallas gakkanaas tuna gidi gam7o.
Numbers19:12 Heedzdzanththo gallassaninne laappunththa gallassan geeyanaas giigetti diza haaththan bana geeshsho; hessafe guye izi geesh gidana; heedzdzanththo gallassinne laappunththa gallas bana geeshshontta aggiko izi geeyanaas dandayenna.
Numbers19:13 Geeshshanaas diza haaththi iza bolla gukkontta aggida gishshas aha bochchidi bana geeshshontta asi tunida mala gam7o; hessa mala asi Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza tunisees; hessa gishshas izi Isra7eele asaa giddofe shaaketti kichcho.
Numbers19:14 «Issaadey Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon hayqqiko polettana wogay hayssa. Izi hayqqida wode he wode heen Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon dizaadey woykko hee gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezan gelizaadey laappun gallas gakkanaas tuna gidi gam7o.
Numbers19:15 He Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza giddon tuchchi baynda diza otoy wurikka xaaroykka tuna gido.
Numbers19:16 Asi wodhida asa aha gidiin woykko hargi hayqqida asa aha gidiin Karen kundi diza aha bochchidaadey woykko asa meqeth bochchidaadey laappun gallas gakkanaas tuna gido.
Numbers19:17 «Tunida as nagarappe geeshshanaas xuugettiza ussay bidinththafe guuththara oton yegetto; xilli uttida pultto haaththi iza bolla gujjetto.
Numbers19:18 Kaallidi geesh gidida hara asi hisophphe miththa hagga ekkidi haaththan gelththi gelththi kessidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza bolla
Numbers19:19 Heedzdzanththa gallassinne laappunththa gallas geeyidaadey hankko geeyonttaade bolla haaththe araco; laappunththa gallas iza geeshsho; he geeyzaadeyka ba may7o meeccidaappenne ba bolla meecettidaappe guye arshey wullishin izaadey geesh gidana.
Numbers19:20 «Tunidaadeynne bana geeshshonttaadey geesho haaththaa ba bolla gussontta aggida gishshas izi tunida mala gam7o; hessa mala asi geeshshasoza tunisiza gishshas maabaraa giddofe shaaketti kichcho.
Numbers19:21 Hayssa ha wogaa buroppe yaana yeletaas intte naaganaas bessees; geeshos go7iza haaththaa ba bolla araciza asi ba may7ozakka meeccanaas bessees; he haaththaa bochchidaadey omars gakkanaas tuna gidi gam7o.
Numbers19:22 Geeyontta asi bochchida miishshi ubbay tuna gido; he tuna miishshaa bochchida asikka omars gakkanaas tuna gido.»
Numbers20:1 Koyro aginan Isra7eele asay kumeth Xiine bazzon Qaadeese geetettizason dunkaani uttides; Maarama hayqqiin heen moogida.
Numbers20:2 Asay dunkaani uttidasohon haaththi baynda gishshas Muse bollanne Aaroone bolla dendides.
Numbers20:3 Derezi
Numbers20:4 intte GODAA maabaraa hayssa ha bazzo biitta ehiday nuninne nu mehey hayssan wurana mala ooththanaassee?
Numbers20:5 Intte nuna Gibxeppe kessidi hayssa aykkoy mokkontta iita bazzo nuna aazas ehidetii? Hayssan kaththi
Numbers20:6 Museynne Aarooney asaappe shaakettidi gede Gaytoteththa Dunkaane penge bida; istti duge biittan gufanni dishin GODAA bonchchoy isttas qonccides.
Numbers20:7 GODAY Muses hizgides
Numbers20:8 «Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan diza guufeza ekkida neninne Aarooney kumeththa maabara issi bolla shiishshite; neni heen kumeththa deraa sinththan diza zaallazi haaththe immana mala yoota; neni hessaththo ooththada zaallazappe isttas haaththe kessa; histtiko isttinne istta mehey haath uyidi alana.»
Numbers20:9 Musey GODAY iza azazida mala biidi Gaytoteththa Dunkaanezappe ba guufeza ekki yides.
Numbers20:10 Izinne Aarooney kumeththa maabaraa zaallaza sinththan shiishshidaappe guye Musey dereza
Numbers20:11 Hessafe guye Musey ba guufezan zaallaza nam7aa zaari shocides; wolqqama haaththi zaallafe pulttides; derezinne mehey haaththaa uyides.
Numbers20:12 Gido attiin GODAY Muse bollanne Aaroone bolla
Numbers20:13 Isra7eele asay GODAARA ooyettidasoynne izi ba dummateththaa qonccisidasoy Mariiba geetettida gishshas haaththayka Mariiba haath geetetti summides.
Numbers20:14 Musey Eedoome kawos kiita gaththana mala qasttanne as Qaadeeseppe yeddides; «Ne isha Isra7eeley
Numbers20:15 Beni nu aawati waani duge Gibxe wodhdhidaakkonne nunikka Gibxen daro layththata waani waani didaakko ne eraasa; Gibxe asay kase nu aawata gidiin nunakka daro waayisides.
Numbers20:16 Nunikka izi nuna maaddana mala GODAAKKO waassidos; izikka nu waasoza siyidi Gibxeppe nuna kessanaas ba kiitanchcha nuus kiittides; hekko nuni ha7i nees dhassan diza Qaadeesen doos.
Numbers20:17 Hessa gishshas nuni ne biittaara aadhdhi baana mala nuus ero garkkii! Nuna gidiin nu meheykka ogeppe kare kezokko; kaththa giddo gidiin woykko woyne miththa giddo nu gelokko; ne haaththa ollafekka uyokko; ne dereppe aadhdhana gakkanaas ogeppe kare kezokko› gees» gi kiittides.
Numbers20:18 Eedoome asay gidikko
Numbers20:19 Isra7eele asaykka
Numbers20:20 Eedoome asay gidikko
Numbers20:21 Eedoome dere asay ba biittara aaththi yeddonttayssa eridi Isra7eele asay ba biza ogeza laammidi harasora bides.
Numbers20:22 Kumeththa Isra7eele maabaray Qaadeeseppe dendi Hoore zumaakko gakkides.
Numbers20:23 He zumazi Eedoome dhassan dees; GODAY heen Musessinne Aaroones
Numbers20:24 «Tani Isra7eele asaas immana gaada kase caaqqida dereyo Aarooney gelenna; intte wurikka Mariiba haaththaa achchan ta azazoza bolla makkallida gishshas Aarooney hayqqana.
Numbers20:25 Aaroonenne iza naaza El7ezeere nenara ekkada pude Hoore zumaa bolla keza.
Numbers20:26 Aarooney qeeseteththas may7ida may7oza qaara ekkada El7ezeere mayza; Aarooney heen hayqqana» gides.
Numbers20:27 Museykka GODAY izas gidayssa ubbaaka ooththides; kumeththa maabaray istta xeellishin istti pude Hoore zumaa bolla kezida.
Numbers20:28 Museykka Aaroone qeeseteththa may7oza qaari ekkidi El7ezeere mayzides; Aarooney heen zumaa hu7en hayqqides; Museynne El7ezeerey zumaa bollafe duge simmi wodhdhida.
Numbers20:29 Aarooney hayqqidayssa kumeththa derezi siyidi 30 gallas gakkanaas izas mishettidi yeekkides.
Numbers21:1 Izas duussasoy Negebe gidida Kanaane dere kawo Araadey Isra7eele asay Ataraame baggara yizayssa siyidi istta bolla ola denththidi isttafe amardayta di7ides.
Numbers21:2 He wode Isra7eele asay
Numbers21:3 GODAY istta woosa siyidi maaddida gishshas istti Kanaane asaa xooni oykkida; hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay isttanne istta katama mulera dippi histti dhayssida; istti wuri wuridayssa eranaas hessa he gadeza
Numbers21:4 Isra7eele asay Eedoome dere yuuyi aadhdhidi baanaas qoppida Hoore zumaappe dendidi gede Zo7o abbaako efiza ogezara bida; gido attiin istti buro ogen dishin derezappe dandayay wurides.
Numbers21:5 GODAA bollanne Muse bolla iita qaala kessidi
Numbers21:6 Hessafe guye GODAY iita marzera diza shoosh dereza giddo yeddides; he shooshshay dukkiin Isra7eele asaappe daroy hayqqides.
Numbers21:7 Derezikka Musekko biidi
Numbers21:8 He wode GODAY Muses
Numbers21:9 Museykka xarqimalappe shoosh medhdhidi tuussa mala adussa miththa bolla qaaphides; shooshshi saxxida asi ubbay he xarqimala shooshshaa dhoqqu gi xeelliday xeelliday paxides.
Numbers21:10 Isra7eele asay ba dizasoppe dendi biidi Obooten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers21:11 Heeppe dendidi Mo7aabeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Iye-Abaarime bazzon dunkaani uttides.
Numbers21:12 Heeppe dendi biidi Zaraade shoobban uttides.
Numbers21:13 Heeppeka dendi biidi Amooreta derera kanththi biza bazzo Arnoone shaafappe he pinththan diza biittan dunkaani uttida; Arnoone shaafazi Mo7aabe deresinne Amoore derezas giddo dhassan dees.
Numbers21:14 Hessa gaason GODAY kaaleththiin olettida ola gishshas yootiza taarike maxaafazan
Numbers21:15 biidi Eere katamanne Mo7aabe dhas gakkanaas kanththi biza zoozeta» geetettides.
Numbers21:16 Heeppe dendidi Bi7eere bida; hessika GODAY Muses
Numbers21:17 He wode Isra7eele asay hayssa
Numbers21:18 Kawoti ba kawoteththa guufen bookkida; daannati ba guufen ziqqisida; haaththa ollaas yexxite» gida. He bazzozappe dendidi gede Mataane bida.
Numbers21:19 Mataaneppeka gede Nahal7eelera kanththidi gede Bamoote bida.
Numbers21:20 Bamooteppe dendidi Amoone deren diza shoobbaa bida; he shoobbayka Pizga zumaappe dan7e baggara bazzoza ginan dees.
Numbers21:21 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Amoore dere kawo Sihoones qasttanne yeddidi
Numbers21:22 «Nuni ne biittara aadhdhi baana mala nuna aaththa yeddarkkii! Nuninne nu mehey ogeppe kare kezokko; gede ne kaththa giddo gidiin woykko ne woyne miththa gars nu gelokko; ne haaththa ollafe ekki uyokko; nuni ne derera aadhdhi baana gakkanaas ogeppe sher7i gookko» gides.
Numbers21:23 Sihooney gidikko Isra7eele asay iza biittara aadhdhi baana mala koyibeenna; harappeka izi baas diza ola asaa shiishshi ekkidi Yahaaxe bazzo wodhdhides; Isra7eele asaraakka ola oykettides.
Numbers21:24 Isra7eele asay gidikko istta xoonides; Arnoone shaafappe doommidi Amoone dere dhas gidida Yaabooqe shaafa gakkanaas dizasoza oykkida; gido attiin Amoone asay ba zawa minni naagiza gishshas hee gelibeettenna.
Numbers21:25 Isra7eele asay histtidi Amoore dere biittan diza katamata Haseboonenne he heeran diza guuththa katamatakka oykkidi dunkaani uttida.
Numbers21:26 Hasebooney Amooreta kawo Sihooney kawotida katama; izikka kase Mo7aaben kawotida kawozara olettidi Arnoone shaafaa gakkanaas diza biitta ubbaa isttafe woththi ekkides.
Numbers21:27 Ginxo giigsidi yexxizayti hessa gishshas yexxishe «Haseboonekko haa yiite! Hanna katamaya gimbettu! Sihoone katamaya ooso doomettu.
Numbers21:28 Hasebooneppe tamay kezides; Lacoykka Sihoone katamappe kezides; Mo7aabe deren Eere geetettizasoza dhayssides; Arnoonen bolla gezze biittan diza halaqatakka dippi histtides.
Numbers21:29 Hanne Mo7aabe nees aayye ana! Intteno Kamooshes goynnizaytoo! Intte dippi gi dhayana; intte attuma nayta betes
Numbers21:30 Hessa gishshas istta zereththay mulera dhaydes; Hasebooneppe biidi Diboone gakkanaas Nofappe biidi Medeba gakkanaas diza ubbaa piski histti laallidos» gida.
Numbers21:31 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Amoore deren dunkaani uttides.
Numbers21:32 Museykka Iyaazeere biidi xomosana as yeddides; Isra7eele asaykka he katamayonne izi heeran diza qeeri katamata oli oykkida; kase heen diza Amoore asata gooddida.
Numbers21:33 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay guye simmidi gede Baasaane efiza ogezara bida; Baasaane kawo Aagey Edira7en isttara ola oykettanaas ba olanchchata ubbaa ekki kezides.

Numbers21:35 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Aage
Numbers22:1 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay dendidi Iyarkko ginara Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Mo7aabe demban dunkaani uttides.

Numbers22:4 Mo7aabeti Midiyaame cimatas
Numbers22:5 Amaawa biittan Efiraaxise shaafa matan Patoore katamaan diza Bi7oore naa Balaamekko qasttanne kiittidi
Numbers22:6 Istti nuuppe keehi wolqqama gidida gishshas woze nena huu! Haa yaada taas istta qanggarkkii! Ne qanggizaa gidikko ta istta xoonada biittafe kessanakko oonee erizay? Ays giikko neni anjjidaadey anjjettizayssa
Numbers22:7 Histtiin Mo7aabe cimatinne Midiyaame cimati qanggisanaas ekki bida miishsha Balaames immidi Baalaaqe kiitaa yootida.

Numbers22:12 Xoossi qasse Balaame

Numbers22:17 Ta nees iza kushe zaarana; ne tana oychchida ubbaa ta nees immana; hessa gishshas ha dereza yaada ne taas qanggana mala ta nena shoobbays!› gides» gi yootida.
Numbers22:18 Gido attiin Balaamey isttas
Numbers22:19 GODAY taas yootiza hara miishshi diikko ta eranaashe gakkanaas intteka kaseytaththo hachcha omars haan aqite» gides.

Numbers22:22 Balaamey ba hare toggi ekkidinne ba aylletappe nam7ata kaaleththidi bishin GODAA hanqoy iza bolla tama mala eexxi kezides; histtiin GODAA kiitanchchay iza teqqanaas oge bolla aadhdhi eqqides.
Numbers22:23 Hareya GODAA kiitanchchay giththa mashsha oykkidi eqqidayssa beyada ogeppe haraso kezadus. Balaamey hareyo ogen zaaranaas iita shoch shocides.
Numbers22:24 Histtiin GODAA kiitanchchay nam7u baggara woyney tokettizasohoppe giddon ya baggaranne ha baggara gimbey gimbetti uttida un7oson eqqides.
Numbers22:25 Hareya GODAA kiitanchchaza be7ida mala gimbezaakko shiiqada Balaame tohoza gimbezara daraxadus; histtiin Balaamey hareyo nam7anththo buka oykkides.
Numbers22:26 Hessafe guye GODAA kiitanchchay gede sinththe aadhdhi biidi nam7u baggara aadhdhizasoy baynda xunththa ogen eqqides.
Numbers22:27 Hareya GODAA kiitanchchaza be7ada Balaamey toggi dishin biittan ichchadus; hessa gishshas Balaamey ba guufera izo bukkides.

Numbers22:30 Hareyakka Balaames

Numbers24:1 Balaameykka GODAY Isra7eele asaa anjjanaas dosidayssa erida wode kase izi ooththizayssa mala muurenno ooso ooththanaas koyibeenna; ba sinththaaka duge bazzo zaarides.
Numbers24:2 Isra7eele asay ba qommon qommon maarara dunkaani uttidayssa be7ides; Xoossa Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhides;
Numbers24:3 histtiin izi tinbite haasaya doommidi
Numbers24:4 Xoossa qaala siyizaadey izi kundi dishin iza ayfeti doyettiin Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa ajjuuta be7izaade kiitay hayssa.
Numbers24:5 Yaaqoobe ne dunkaaneti Isra7eele ne dizasoti ay mala lo7oo?
Numbers24:6 Isttika micettida zulleta mala; qasseka shaafa doonan diza atakiltesohota mala; GODAY tokkida godare uuththa mala; woykko shaafa doonan diza Libaanoose ziga mala.
Numbers24:7 Iray ubba wode isttas bukkiza gishshas istta haaththi kumi palahees; zereththa wode isttas gidiza haaththi dees; istta kawoy Agaageppe aadheth gidana; istta kawoteththi dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana.
Numbers24:8 Istta Gibxeppe kessida Xoossi isttas menththa mala olettana; istta morkke gidida kawoteththata izi puuzereththi yeggana; izi istta meqeththata liiqisana; istta wondafetakka menththereththi yeggana.
Numbers24:9 Hayssi kawoteththay gaammo mala zamadi uttides; macca gaammo malakka zuggi uttides; istti zamadi uttidasohoppe istta denththana dandayzay oonee? Nena anjjizaadey anjjetto; nena qanggizaadeyka qanggetto» gides.
Numbers24:10 Balaaqey hanqon ba kushe baqqidi Balaames
Numbers24:11 Ha7i gidikko eeson gede neso ba! Ta nees daro miish immana ga qaala geladis; gido attiin ne he miishshaa demmontta mala Xoossi gordides» gides.
Numbers24:12 Balaamey Balaaqes zaaridi
Numbers24:13 ‹Balaaqey baas diza biranne worqqa ubbaa izi taas immizaakkoka tani ta shenen iita gidiin woykko lo7o ooththanaas GODAA qaalappe aadhdhanaas dandaykke; tani yootanay GODAY taas yootooro xalla› gaada kase ta isttas yootabeekkinaa?» gides.
Numbers24:14 Wurseththan Balaamey Balaaqes
Numbers24:15 Hessafe guye izas tinbite yooto doommidi
Numbers24:16 Xoossa qaala siyizaade
Numbers24:17 Tani iza be7ays; gido attiin ha7i gidenna; ta iza xeellays; gidikkoka ha7i matan gidenna; Xoolinttey Yaaqoobeppe beettana; Kawoteththa guufey Isra7eeleppe kezana; Mo7aabe zereththaanne Seete zereththata ubbaa dippi histti dhayssana.
Numbers24:18 Eedoomey xoonettana; iza morkke Seyreykka izas haarettana; Isra7eele derey xoonoy xoonoshin daana.
Numbers24:19 Yaaqoobeppe dere ayssizaadey kezana; izi katama giddon attidayta pitti dhayssana» gides.

Numbers24:21 Gede Qenaawe dere asaakko simmi xeellidi
Numbers24:22 Intteno Qenaawe deretoo! Asoorey inttena xoonidi di7i efiza wode intte wuri wurana» gi tinbite yootides.

Numbers27:1 Yooseefey Minaase yelides; Minaasey Maakire yelides; Maakirey Gala7aade yelides; Gala7aadey Hefeere yelides; Hefeerey Xilofaade yelides; Xilofaades mahilo
Numbers27:2 Isttika Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneza pengeeko biidi kumeththa maabaranne dereza kaaleththizayti dizason Musenne El7ezeere sinththan aadhdhi eqqidi
Numbers27:3 «Nu aaway issi attuma naakka yelontta bazzo biittan hayqqides; izi GODAA bolla makkallida Qoore kaallizaytara issife zuppetibeenna; gido attiin izi ba nagara gaason hayqqides.
Numbers27:4 Histtiin izi attuma naa yelontta aggida gaason xalla nu aawa sunththi Isra7eele asaa giddofe qucetti dhayanaas bessizee? Hessa gishshas nuus bessiza xinxxo gade nu aawa dabbota giddon immite» gida.
Numbers27:5 Musey istta oyshaa GODAA sinth shiishshides.
Numbers27:6 GODAYKKA izas hizgides
Numbers27:7 «Xilofaade macca nayti oychchida oyshay likke; hessa gishshas ne istta aawa dabbota giddon isttas xinxxo gade imma; kase istta aawa gadey gede isttas imetto.
Numbers27:8 Attuma naa yelontta hayqqidaadey diikko iza macca nay he izas dizaaz laattanaas dandayzayssa Isra7eele asaa erisa.
Numbers27:9 Izas macca naykka bayndaaz gidikko izas dizaaz iza ishati laattetto.
Numbers27:10 Ishaykka dontta aggiko iza aawa ishati laattetto.
Numbers27:11 Izas aawa ishay dontta aggiko izas matattiza dabboy iza aqota laattidi go7ettanaas dandayees; tani GODAY nena azazida mala Isra7eele dere asay hayssa ha wogaza baas eqqi diza woga histti naago.»
Numbers27:12 GODAY Muses
Numbers27:13 Neni iza beydaappe guye ne isha Aarooney hayqqoyssaththo nekka hayqqana;
Numbers27:14 Intte nam7atikka Xiine geetettiza bazzon ta azazo bolla makkallideta; kumeththa maabaray Mariiba haaththaa achchan dishe ta bolla makkallida wode intte Isra7eele asaa sinththan ta dummateththaa mala tana bonchchanaas ammanettibeekketa» gides; [Mariibay Xiine bazzon Qaadeesen diza pultto haaththa.]
Numbers27:15 Museykka GODAAKKO hizgi woossides
Numbers27:16 «As ubbaas de7o immida GODAWU! Hayssa deraa heemmiza as neni doora;
Numbers27:17 gaasoykka hayssa ne derezi heemmizay baynda wude mala gidontta mala izi deraa kessizaadenne gelththizaade
Numbers27:18 GODAYKKA Muses
Numbers27:19 Qeeseza El7ezeere sinththaninne kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sinththan ne iza essada izi ne olla doorettidayssa asaa erisa.
Numbers27:20 Kumeththa Isra7eele maabaray izas azazettana mala nees diza maatappe izas shaakka imma.
Numbers27:21 Qeese El7ezeerey Urimen GODAA shene shaakki eriza gishshas izi Iyaaso maaddana; hessa gishshas Iyaasoynne kumeththa Isra7eele maabaray El7ezeere azazon kezananne gelana» gides.
Numbers27:22 Museykka GODAY iza azazida mala ooththides; Iyaasokka efidi qeese El7ezeere sinththaninne kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sinththan essides.
Numbers27:23 GODAY iza azazida mala Musey ba kushe Iyaaso bolla woththidi iza basohozan doorides.
Numbers28:1 GODAY Muses
Numbers28:2 «Neni Isra7eele asaas
Numbers28:3 Qasseka isttas
Numbers28:4 Issi laaqqa maalado nam7anththoza omarsa wode shiishshite.
Numbers28:5 Issi issi laaqqara issi kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille issi litiro gidiza wogara zayten munuqettidi kaththa yarsho gidi shiiqo.
Numbers28:6 Hessika gallas gallas shiiqiza xuugettiza yarsho; hessa mala yarsho sawoy tana GODAA ufayssiza yarsho gididi koyro Siina zumaa bolla shiiqana mala wogay wodhdhides.
Numbers28:7 Koyro laaqqazara shiiqiza ushsha yarshoy issi litiro gidiza mino ushshu geeshshasozan GODAAS gussite.
Numbers28:8 Omarsa wode nam7anththo laaqqaza koyroyssaththoka ushsha yarshoza gujjidi shiishshite; hessa sawoykka GODAA ufayssiza kaththa yarsho gidana.
Numbers28:9 « ‹Sambata gallas
Numbers28:10 Hayssi ha yarshozi ushsha yarshozappenne gallas gallas xuugettiza yarshozappe Sambata gallas gallas shiiqiza hara xuugettiza yarsho.
Numbers28:11 « ‹Aginan aginan koyro gallas gallas istta bolla wosoy baynda nam7u mirgota
Numbers28:12 Issi issi mirgora kaththa yarshos heedzdzu kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqidi shiishshite; qasse dharshozara kaththa yarshos nam7u kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqi shiishshite;
Numbers28:13 issi issi dharsho laaqqara kaththa yarshos issi kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqi shiishshite; he xuugettiza yarshota ubbaa sawoy GODAA ufayssiza kaththa yarsho gidi shiiqo.
Numbers28:14 Issi issi mirgora nam7u litiro gidiza woyne ushshu
Numbers28:15 Gallas gallas xuugettiza yarshonne izara shiiqiza ushsha yarshoza bolla deysha orge nagara gishshas yarsho gidana mala GODAA sinth shiishshite.
Numbers28:16 « ‹GODAAS Paaziga ba7aale koyro aginay gelida tammanne oydanththo gallas bonchchite.
Numbers28:17 Ha aginay gelida tammanne ichchashanththo gallassafe doommidi ukeththa ba7aale bonchchite; he gallassafe biidi laappun gallas gakkanaas uketh miite.
Numbers28:18 Ba7aalezas koyro gallas goynnanaas shiiqite; he gallas ay oosokka ooththofte.
Numbers28:19 Istta bolla wosoy baynda 2 mirgota
Numbers28:20 Issi issi mirgora kaththa yarshos heedzdzu kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqidi shiishshite; qasse dharshozara kaththa yarshos nam7u kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqi shiishshite.
Numbers28:21 Issi issi dharsho laaqqara kaththa yarshos issi kilo gidiza liiqo dhiille wogara zayten munuqi shiishshite.
Numbers28:22 Qasseka nagara wursanaas deysha orge nagara yarshos shiishshite.
Numbers28:23 Heyti wurikka shiiqanay ubba wode maalado maalado xuugetti shiiqiza yarshora issife shiiqetto.
Numbers28:24 GODAA sawo tunnu giidi ufayssiza kaththa yarsho laappun gallas kumeth issi malan shiishshite; hessaka gallas gallas shiiqiza xuugettiza yarsho bollanne ushsha yarsho bolla gujjidi shiishshite.
Numbers28:25 Laappunththo gallas goynnanaas shiiqite; he gallas ay oosokka ooththofte.

Numbers28:31 Hessa he yarshoza ubbaa ushsha yarshora

Numbers29:39 « ‹Inttes wodhdhida ba7aale gallassatan GODAAS shiishshite; hessika intte adinettidi shiishshiza yarshofenne intte intte dosan shiishshiza yarshofe xuugettiza hara yarsho

Numbers30:1 Musey Isra7eele asaa kaaleththiza korapinnetas
Numbers30:2 Issi asi GODAAS issi miish ooththanaas adinettiko woykko issaadey caaqqi geppidi bana barkka ba qaalan qachchiko izi ba gelida qaala ubbaa polana bessees attiin ba gidayssa agganaas bessenna.
Numbers30:3 «Issi geela7oya ba aawa soon dashe GODAAS issi miish ooththanaas adinettiko woykko caaqqa geppada bana barkka ba qaalan qachchizaa gidikko
Numbers30:4 izi aaway hessa siyidi izo diggontta aggiko iza ba adinettidayssa woykko ba caaqqa geppida qaalaza polanaas bessees.
Numbers30:5 Izi aaway he yo7oza siyidi izo diggizaa gidikko iza adinettida adinay woykko iza caaqqa geppida qaalay izis gome gidenna; gaasoykka izi aaway izo diggida gishshas GODAY izo maarana.
Numbers30:6 «Azina gelontta maccassi akeekada woykko akeekontta adina adinetta uttada woykko caaqqa geppada bana barkka ba qaalan qachcha woththada azina gelikko
Numbers30:7 iza gelida azinazi he yo7oza siyidi izo diggontta aggiko iza ba gidayssa ubbaa polanaas bessees.
Numbers30:8 Izi azinay he yo7oza siyidi izo diggizaa gidikko iza adinettida adinay woykko iza caaqqa geppida qaalay izis gome gidenna; gaasoykka izi azinay izo diggida gishshas GODAY izo maarana.
Numbers30:9 «Azinay hayqqida maccassi woykko azinay anjji yeddida maccassi issi miish ooththanaas adinettiko woykko caaqqa geppada bana barkka ba qaalan qachchidaa gidikko iza ba gelida qaalaa polanaas bessees.
Numbers30:10 «Azina gelida maccassi issi miish ooththanaas adinettiko woykko caaqqa geppada bana barkka ba qaalan qachchidaa gidikko
Numbers30:11 iza gelida azinazi he yo7oza siyidi izo diggontta aggiko iza ba gidayssa ubbaa polanaas bessees.
Numbers30:12 Izi azinay he yo7oza siyidi izo diggizaa gidikko iza adinettida adinay woykko iza caaqqa geppida qaalay izis gome gidenna; gaasoykka izi azinay izo diggida gishshas GODAY izo maarana.
Numbers30:13 Izi azinay ay adina woykko caaqqa geppada bana barkka qachchida qaalaa digganaas woykko polisanaas izas maatay dees.
Numbers30:14 Izi azinay he yo7oza siyida mala wonteththa gallas aykkoka qaattontta co7u giikko iza ba gidayssa ubbaa polanaas bessees; he yo7oza siyida mala aykkoka qaattontta co7u giikko hessi izi ero gidayssa qonccisees.
Numbers30:15 Gido attiin izi azinay gam7idi he izi adinaza diggizaa gidikko alaafeteththan oyshettanay iza» gides.
Numbers30:16 Geela7oynne gelida maccassi adina adinettiko woykko caaqqa geppada barkka bana ba qaalan qachchidaa gidikko izi aawaas woykko izi azinaas diza alaafeteththanne maataa gishshas GODAY Muses immida wogay hayssa.

Numbers31:4 Isra7eele asaa zarkkefe zarkkefe issi issi shii attumas dooridi gede olas yeddite» gides.

Numbers31:24 Intte intte may7o laappunththa gallas meeccite; hessafe guye intte geesh gidiza gishshas simmidi kase intte dunkaani dizaso gelanaas dandayeeta» gides.

Numbers31:26 «Neni qeese El7ezeereynne deraa kaaleththiza korapinnetara gididi di7etti yida asaanne mehaa qoodite.

Numbers31:34 Usuppun tammanne issi shii hareta

Numbers32:5 Intte nuus lo7o qoppiko hayssa ha dereza nuus intte oosanchchatas daanaso histti immite attiin nuni Yordaanoose pinnana mala ooththofte» gida.
Numbers32:6 Museykka isttas
Numbers32:7 Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose pinnidi GODAY isttas immida dereza gelontta mala intte asaa hidota aazas qanxxiseetii?
Numbers32:8 Hanno biittayo xomosana mala Qaadeese Barineppe tani kase intte aawata yeddiin hayssaththoka ooththida.
Numbers32:9 Istti Eshkoole shoobbaa gakkanaas biidi he biittayo xomosi xeellida; gido attiin heeppe simmidi Isra7eele asay GODAY isttas immida dereza gelontta mala hidota qanxxisida.
Numbers32:10 He gallas GODAY keehi hanqettidi
Numbers32:11 
Numbers32:12 Hayssi GODAY caaqqi qachchida qaalazi GODAA kumeththa wozinappe kaallida Qenaaze dere as Yoofine naa Kaalebeppenne Nawe naa Iyaasoppe attiin hankko asaa ubbaaka bochchees.
Numbers32:13 GODAY Isra7eele dereza bolla hanqettida gishshas he iza hanqeththida yeletati ubbay wurana gakkanaas istti bazzo biittan oyddu tammu layth toylattana mala ooththides.
Numbers32:14 Intteno nagaranchcha yeletatoo! GODAY Isra7eele dere bolla gujji hanqettana mala ha7ikka intte intte aawataththo ooththeeta.
Numbers32:15 Intte Oroobeele zarkketinne Gaade zarkketi GODAA kaallontta ixxiko izi ha deraa ubbaa bazzon aggaagana; istta bolla gakkiza meto ubbaan intte oyshettana» gides.
Numbers32:16 Isttika Musekko shiiqidi
Numbers32:17 Gido attiin nu bagga Isra7eele asay baas duussaso gidida biittayo gelidi uttana gakkanaas nu ubbaafe sinththati olas kezanaas giigetti uttidos; nuni hessa polidi simmana gakkanaas nu naytinne nu machcheti hayssa ha derezan diza asaappe istta bolla qohoy gakkontta mala gimbettida katamaan hirgay baynda diishshetto.
Numbers32:18 Isra7eele asay ubbay baas baas giigettida biittaa ekkana gakkanaas nuni nuso simmoko.
Numbers32:19 Nuni nu gisha Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara ekkida gishshas pinththafe istta gakkiza gishaappe nu aykkoka ekkoko» gida.
Numbers32:20 Museykka isttas
Numbers32:21 qasseka GODAY ba morkketa ba sinththafe yedeththi kessana gakkanaas intte ubbatikka GODAA sinththan olas giigettidayta gididi Yordaanoose shaafaa pinniko
Numbers32:22 biittayakka GODAAS haarettidaappe guye intte simmana dandayeeta; he wode intte GODAASSINNE Isra7eele asaas ooththanaas bessiza alaafeteth polidaappe guye hara aykkoka oyshetteketa; hessafe guye ha biittaya inttes xinxxo gidana.
Numbers32:23 «Intte intte gida qaalaa naagontta aggiko intte GODAA qoheeta; intte nagara gishshas qixaatey intte bolla gakkanayssa erite.
Numbers32:24 Hessa gishshas intte machchetassinne intte naytas duussaso
Numbers32:25 Gaade zarkketinne Oroobeele zarkketi Muses
Numbers32:26 Nu machcheti
Numbers32:27 Gido attiin nuni ne oosanchchati ola olettanaas gixettidayti wurikka GODAA sinththan olettanaas nu goday neni nuna azaziza mala gede he pinth nu pinnana» gida.
Numbers32:28 Hessa gishshas Musey qeese El7ezeeres
Numbers32:29 «Gaade zarkketinne Oroobeele zarkketi Yordaanoose pinnidi GODAA sinththan olas giigettidi istti inttena maaddiin biittaya intte kushen geliza wode Gala7aade intte isttas xinxxo histti immite.
Numbers32:30 Istti inttenara Yordaanoose shaafa pinni biidi olettontta aggiko isttika inttenara issife Kanaaneppe gishetti ekketto» gides.
Numbers32:31 Gaade zarkketinne Oroobeele zarkketi
Numbers32:32 Nu olas GODAA sinth gede Kanaane pinnana; nu laattana biittay gidikko Yordaanoose shaafappe ha pinththan arshey mokkiza baggana» gi zaarida.
Numbers32:33 Hessa gishshas Musey Amoore dere kawo Sihooney haariza deretanne Baasaane dere kawo Aagey haariza deren diza katamata
Numbers32:34 Gaade qommoti
Numbers32:35 Axaroote-Sofaane
Numbers32:36 Beeti-Niimirenenne Beeti-Haaraane yuuyi aadhdhanaas gimbe gimbida; ba mehetaska aqoso keexxida.
Numbers32:37 Oroobeele zarkketi Haseboone
Numbers32:38 Hessaththoka guyeppe isttas sunththay laamettida Nebo
Numbers32:39 Minaase naa Maakire zereththati Gala7aade oli oykkidi kase heen diza Amoore asata yedeththi kessida.
Numbers32:40 Hessa gishshas Musey Gala7aade dere Minaase naa Maakire zereththatas immides; isttika banttas heen duussaso ooththida.
Numbers32:41 Minaase zarkkefe gidida Ya7irey issi issi gutatan meto gaththidi baas ekkides; isttika
Numbers32:42 Nobahey qasse Qenaatenne iza yuushon diza gutata oli oykkidi ba sunththan
Numbers33:1 Isra7eele asay ba zarkken zarkken shaaketti shaaketti Museynne Aarooney kaaleththiin Gibxeppe kezidaappe guye dumma dumma wode istti dunkaani uttidasohoti hayssafe kaallizayta;
Numbers33:2 istti dumma dumma wode dunkaani uttidasohota sunththaa GODAY azazida mala Musey xaafides.
Numbers33:3 Isra7eele asay koyro aginay gelida 15 gallas Paaziga ba7aaleppe wonteth Gibxe asay ubbay istti xeellishin yayyontta Eraamise katama yeggi kezides.
Numbers33:4 He wode Gibxe asay istta giddofe GODAA boshan hayqqida bayrata bayrata moogon deettes; he wode GODAY istta eeqa xoossata bollaka pirdides.
Numbers33:5 Isra7eele asay Eraamiseppe dendi biidi Sukooten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:6 Sukooteppe dendidi bazzo gaxa bolla diza Etaamen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:7 Etaameppe dendidi Ba7aali-Xafooneppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Pihaahiroote simmidi Migidoole heeran dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:8 Pihaahirooteppe dendidi Zo7o abba pinnidi Etaame bazzo bides; Etaame bazzon heedzdzu gallas gakkanaas biidi Maara gakki dunkaanides;
Numbers33:9 Maarappe dendidi tammanne nam7u haaththa pulttotinne laappun tammu tamire miththati dizaso Eelaame gakki dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:10 Eelaameppe dendidi Zo7o abbaa matan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:11 Zo7o abbaa matappe dendidi Siina bazzon dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:12 Siina bazzofe dendidi Dufiqan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:13 Dufiqappe dendidi Alushen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:14 Alusheppe dendidi ushsha haaththi bayndason Erafidimen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:15 Erafidimeppe dendidi Siina bazzon dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:16 Siina bazzofe dendidi Kibroote-Hatta7aaben dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:17 Kibroote-Hatta7aabeppe dendidi Haxirooten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:18 Haxirooteppe dendidi Eretiman dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:19 Eretimappe dendidi Eremon-Perezen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:20 Eremon-Perezeppe dendidi Libinan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:21 Libinappe dendidi Erisan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:22 Ersappe dendidi Qahalaaten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:23 Qahalaateppe dendidi Shefere zuman dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:24 Shefere Zumaappe dendidi Haradan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:25 Haradappe dendidi Maqihaloten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:26 Mahalooteppe dendidi Tahaaten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:27 Tahaateppe dendidi Taaran dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:28 Taarappe dendidi Mitiqan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:29 Mitiqappe dendidi Hashemoonen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:30 Hashemooneppe dendidi Moserooten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:31 Moserooteppe dendidi Beeni Yaqinen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:32 Beeni Yaqineppe dendidi Hori-Haggidigan dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:33 Hori-Haggidigappe dendidi Yoxbaaten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:34 Yoxbaateppe dendidi Abroonen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:35 Abrooneppe dendidi Eexiyoon-Gaabiren dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:36 Eexiyoon-Gaabireppe dendidi Xiine bazzon diza Qaadeesen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:37 Qaadeeseppe dendidi Eedoome dere dhassan diza Hoore zuman dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:38 Qeese Aarooney GODAA azazon pude Hoore zumaa bolla kezides; heen Isra7eele asay Gibxeppe kezida oyddu tammanththa layththan ichchashanththo aginay xeerida koyro gallas hayqqides.
Numbers33:39 Aarooney Hoore zumaa bolla hayqqiza wode iza layththay xeetanne nam7u tammanne heedzdza.
Numbers33:40 Kanaane biittan Negeben diza Kanaane as Araade kawoy Isra7eele asay yizayssa siyides.
Numbers33:41 Derezikka Hoore zumaappe dendidi Xelimonan dunkaani uttida.
Numbers33:42 Xelimonappe dendidi Panoonen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:43 Panooneppe dendidi Obooten dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:44 Obooteppe dendidi Mo7aabe dhassan diza Iye-Abaarimen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:45 Iye-Abaarimeppe dendidi Diboon-Gaaden dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:46 Diboon-Gaadeppe dendidi Almmoon-Dibilatayen dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:47 Almmoon-Dibilatayeppe dendi Nebo matan diza Abaarime zumata bolla dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:48 Abaarime zumatappe dendidi Iyarkkofe Yordaanoose pinththan diza Mo7aabe demban dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:49 Heen Yordaanoose matan Mo7aabe demban Beeti-Yashimooteppe biidi Aabeeli-Shuutime gakkanaas dunkaani uttides.
Numbers33:50 Iyarkko ginara Yordaanoose pinththan Mo7aabe demban istti dishin Isra7eele derezas yootana mala GODAY Muses hayssafe kaalliza wogaa immides.
Numbers33:51 Neni Isra7eele asaas
Numbers33:52 he biittaan diza asaa ubbaa intte sinththafe gooddi kessite; shuchchafenne biratappe oosettida istta eeqa xoossata menththereththi yeggite; hessaththoka dhoqqasohotan diza istti goynnizasotakka laallite.
Numbers33:53 Tani he biittayo inttes immida gishshas laattidi intte izin diite.
Numbers33:54 Biittayo intte zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkite; qoodan dariza zarkkes dalga gade immite; qoodan guuxxiza zarkketas xunththa gade immite; issoy issoy ba zarkken zarkken biittayo ay gidiinkka saamay gaththida mala baas laata gade histti ekko.
Numbers33:55 «Kase he biittan diza asata ubbaa gooddi kessontta isttafe shaakki ashshiko istti intte ayfe caddi toyssiza pilqe mala gidana; mille caddiza agunththa mala gididi istti inttena waayisana; intte diza derezan istti ubba wode ola denththi denththi inttena metoththana.
Numbers33:56 Intte hessaththo ooththontta aggiko tani istta dhayssana ga qoppoyssa intte bolla zaara polana» gides.
Numbers34:1 GODAY Muses hizgides
Numbers34:2 «Isra7eele asaa
Numbers34:3 dugeha baggara Xiine bazzofe dendidi Eedoome bazzo achchara kanththi biidi arshey mokkiza baggara Hayqo abbaafe dugeha bagga xeera bollara doommidi
Numbers34:4 Aqraabime purdera kanththi aadhdhidi Xiine gakkidi dugeha baggara Qaadeese Barine gakkees; hessafe Haxaare-Adaare kanththidi Aximoone gakkees.
Numbers34:5 Aximooneppe doommidi haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafatara yuuyi aadhdhidi Mediteraane abbaan eqqees.
Numbers34:6 « ‹Arshey wulliza baggara Mediteraane abbay zawa gidana.
Numbers34:7 « ‹Pudeha baggara diza zaway Mediteraane abbafe biidi Uure zuma gakkees.
Numbers34:8 Uure zumaappe biidi Hamaatera aadhdhi biidi Xedaade gakkees.
Numbers34:9 Gede Zipiroone pinnidi Haxaare-Enaane gakki eqqees; hayssi ubbay inttes pudeha baggara diza zawa gidana.
Numbers34:10 « ‹Arshey mokkiza baggara Haxaare-Eenaneppe biidi Shafaame gakkanaas malata woththite.
Numbers34:11 Zawazi Shafaameppe doommidi Ayineppe arshey mokkiza baggara Erebila kanththi aadhdhidi Galila abbaafe arshey mokkiza baggara diza zoozetara kanththidi
Numbers34:12 Yordaanoose shaafa wodhdhees; heera biidi wurseththazi Hayqo Abba gidana; hayti intte biittayo yuuyi aadhdhiza zawata gidana› gaada azaza.»
Numbers34:13 Musey Isra7eele asaa
Numbers34:14 Oroobeele zarkketi Gaade zarkketinne Minaases bagga zarkketi baas imettida biittaa laattida.
Numbers34:15 Isttika Yordaanooseppe he pinththan Iyarkko ginara arshey mokkiza baggara bana gakkiza xinxxoza ekkida» gi yootides.
Numbers34:16 GODAY Muses hizgides
Numbers34:17 «Qeese El7ezeereynne Nawe naa Iyaasoy gadeza derezas gishetto.
Numbers34:18 Istti biittaa gishiza wode istta maaddanaas zarkkefe zarkkefe korapinne ekka.
Numbers34:19 He ne ekkana asata sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Yuhuda zarkkefe Yoofine naa Kaalebe
Numbers34:20 Simoona zarkkefe Amihuude naa Sameela
Numbers34:21 Biniyaame zarkkefe Kisaloone naa Eldaade
Numbers34:22 Daane zarkkefe Yogile naa Buuqa
Numbers34:23 Yooseefe zarkkefe Minaase bagga Sufide naa Han7eele
Numbers34:24 Yooseefe zarkkefe Efreeme bagga Shifixe naa Qamu7eele
Numbers34:25 Zaabiloone zarkkefe Perinaake naa Elxafaane
Numbers34:26 Yisakoore zarkkefe Hooza naa Palti7eele
Numbers34:27 Aaseere zarkkefe Seleeme naa Ahude
Numbers34:28 Niftaaleme zarkkefe Amihuude naa Pedaheele.»
Numbers34:29 Haytanti Isra7eele asaas Kanaanen biittaa gishi immana mala GODAY doorida asata.
Numbers35:1 Iyarkko ginara Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan diza Mo7aabe dembaa bolla GODAY Muses hizgides
Numbers35:2 «Isra7eele asay ba gishaappe gishaappe Lewe zarkketi daana katamatanne he katamata yuushon istti ba mehe izan heemmana gade immana mala yoota.
Numbers35:3 He katamatikka Lewe zarkketas duussaso gidana gides; mehe heemmizasohoti istta mehey pe7izaso gidana.
Numbers35:4 Katamata yuushon intte Lewe zarkketas immana mehe heenththa gadeza aakoteththay katamaa gimbezappe doommidi oyddu baggarakka 1
Numbers35:5 Hessa malan katamaza giddo aaththidi oyddu baggarakka gulappe biidi gula gakkanaas 2
Numbers35:6 «Lewe qommotas intte immiza katamatappe usuppunati as wodhida asi baqati attiza katamata gidetto; heytappe hara 42 katamata gujji immite.
Numbers35:7 Istti mehe heemmizasohotara gujjiin 48 katamati imettetto.
Numbers35:8 Isra7eele zarkketi laattida gadeppe istta gade gade dalgateththaa mala dalga gade oykkidaytappe dalga
Numbers35:9 GODAY Muses hizgi yootides
Numbers35:10 «Neni Isra7eele asaas
Numbers35:11 issi asi erontta dishe as wodhikko hessaadey baqati biidi attana katamata ne doora.
Numbers35:12 He katamati shemppo wodhidaadey pirdas shiiqontta dishin hayqqidaade dabboy iza wodhontta mala izi baqati attiza katamata gidetto.
Numbers35:13 Hayti intte Lewetas immida usuppun katamati erontta shemppo wodhida asi baqati attiza katamata gidana.
Numbers35:14 He katamatappe heedzdzati Yordaanoose shaafaappe he pinththan arshey mokkiza baggara hankko heedzdzati qasse Kanaane biittan gidetto.
Numbers35:15 Ha usuppun katamati erontta dishe as wodhida Isra7eele asi
Numbers35:16 « ‹Issi asi biratappe oosettidaazan as wodhidaa gidikko he shemppo wodhidaadey izikka asa kushen hayqqo.
Numbers35:17 Issi asi shuchchan caddidi as wodhidaa gidikko he shemppo wodhidaadey izikka asa kushen hayqqo.
Numbers35:18 Issi asi miththan caddi as wodhidaa gidikko he shemppo wodhidaadeyka asa kushen hayqqo.
Numbers35:19 He hayqqidayssas mata dabboy suuth azaranaas dandayza gishshas awanka demmiko wodhanaas dandayees.
Numbers35:20 « ‹Issi asi odidi as sugi yeggi wodhikko woykko geemason uttidi issi miishshan caddi
Numbers35:21 wodhikko morkketeththan dendidi icci wodhikko izi shemppo wodhida gishshas izikka asa kushen hayqqanaas bessees; he hayqqidayssas mata dabboy suuth accanaas dandayza gishshas awanka demmiko wodhanaas dandayees.
Numbers35:22 « ‹Gido attiin issi asi erontta dishe as sugi wodhikko woykko qoppontta dishe issi miishshan caddi wodhikko
Numbers35:23 woykko erontta dishe shuch iza bolla yeggi wodhizaa gidikko hessaadey iza qohanaas odi ooththontta gishshas
Numbers35:24 derezi he wodhidayssa giddoninne hayqqidayssa dabbota giddon imettana pirday hayssafe kaallizayssa gido.
Numbers35:25 Erontta dishe as wodhidaadey suuth acciza asa kusheppe derezi ashshidi izi baqati attida katama zaaro; zayten tiyettida qeeseta halaqay hayqqana gakkanaas izi heen gam7o.
Numbers35:26 « ‹As wodhidi kasasetidayssi baqati attiza katamaappe kare kezizaa gidikko
Numbers35:27 suuththa accizaadey demmidi iza wodhikko suuththa acon oyshettenna.
Numbers35:28 As wodhidi kasasetidayssi qeeseta halaqay hayqqana gakkanaas baqati attiza katamaan gam7o; qeeseta halaqazi hayqqidaappe guye izi baso simmana dandayees.
Numbers35:29 « ‹Hayssi ha wogazi intte diza dere ubbaan inttessinne intte zereththatas eqqi diza woga gido.
Numbers35:30 « ‹Shempo wodhida ay asikka hayqo pirda pirdettanaas dandayzay iza bolla nam7u markkay woykko izappe bollara markkattiko attiin issi markkan xalla hayqo qixaate ekkenna.
Numbers35:31 Shemppo wodhiin hayqo pirday iza bolla pirdettida asi hayqqana bessees attiin ba wodhida shemppo gishshas miishshe qanxxi attanaas dandayenna.
Numbers35:32 Izan baqati attiza katama baqatida oonappeka qeeseta halaqay hayqqanaappe kase izi guye simmidi ba biittan de7ana mala giidi suuththa qanxxo ekkofte.
Numbers35:33 Intte hessaththo ooththizaa gidikko intte biittaa tuniseeta; gaasoykka asa suuth gussizayssi biitta tunisees; he biittay geeyanay asa suuth gussidaade suuththay gukkiin attiin haran geeyenna.
Numbers35:34 Tani intte GODAA gidida gishshassinne inttenara Isra7eele dereza giddon diza gishshas tani izan diza biittaa tunisopite› ga yoota.»
Numbers36:1 Yooseefe naa Minaasey yelida Maakire naa Gala7aade zarkketa kaaleththiza halaqati Musekkonne Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizaytakko shiiqidi
Numbers36:2 «Neni hanno biittayo Isra7eele derezas saaman gishana mala GODAY nena nu godaza azazides; hessaththoka nu isha Xilofaade gisha iza macca naytas immana mala nena azazides.
Numbers36:3 Gido attiin istti geliza azinati hara qommofe gidikko istta gisha gadey nu zarkketa xinxxofe qanxxettidi he istti gelida azinata zarkketas gujettiza gishshas nu zarkketa xinxxozi kase ekettoyssafe pace gidees.
Numbers36:4 Wozzo layththay gakkiza wode istta gishazi istti gelida zarkkes gujettees; hessa gishshas istta xinxxoy nu zarkketa xinxxo pacinchchees» gida.
Numbers36:5 Hessafe guye Musey GODAY izas yootida mala Isra7eele asaas
Numbers36:6 Hessa gishshas GODAY Xilofaade macca nayti ba zarkketa giddofe ba dosidaade gelanaas dandayeettes.
Numbers36:7 Hessa malan Isra7eele asaa xinxxoy issi zarkkefe hara zarkken aadhdhofo; Isra7eele asay kase ba aawatappe laattida biitta minththi oykko.
Numbers36:8 Isra7eele asaa zarkketa giddon ba aawa gade laattida maccassi oonikka ba qommo gelanaas bessees; hessa malan Isra7eele asay ubbay ba aawata xinxxo naaganaas dandayees.
Numbers36:9 Hessa gishshas gadezi issi zarkke kusheppe hara zarkke kushen aadhdhanaas dandayenna; wurikka ba zarkken zarkken ba biitta oykki naago» gides.
Numbers36:10 Xilofaade macca nayti GODAY Muse azazida mala ooththida.
Numbers36:11 Xilofaade macca nayti Mahilo
Numbers36:12 Yooseefe naa Minaase zarkketa giddon azina gelida; he istta biittay istta aawata zarkke sunththan minni attides.
Numbers36:13 Isra7eele asay Iyarkko ginara Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan Mo7aabe demban dishin GODAY Muse baggara isttas immida wogatinne azazoti haytantta.
Deuteronomy1:1 Hayssa ha maxaafan diza qaalay wurikka Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey mokkiza baggara diza bazzon istti dishin Musey Isra7eele naytas yootida qaala. Museykka ha qaalaa yootiza wode istti Suufe geetettizaso ginara Paaraane katamaappe qasseka hara baggara Topeele
Deuteronomy1:2 Siina zumaappe dendidi Qaadeese Barine gakkanaas Eedoome zumata bollara efiza toho ogera biikko tammanne issi gallas ekkees.
Deuteronomy1:3 Gibxeppe istti kezidaappe oyddu tammanththo layththan tammanne issinththa aginay gelida koyro gallas Musey derezas erisana mala GODAY izas yootida qaala ubbaa isttas yootides.
Deuteronomy1:4 Hessika haniday Haseboone katamaan kawoti haariza Amoore dere kawo Sihoonenne Astarooten
Deuteronomy1:5 Asay Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara Mo7aabe deren dishin Musey hayssafe kaalli diza GODAA woga qoncciseth doommides;
Deuteronomy1:6 «Nuni Siina zumaa bolla diza wode GODAA nu Xoossay nuus
Deuteronomy1:7 hayssafe guye intte dizasoppe dendi gede gezzettiza Amooreta dere
Deuteronomy1:8 Hekko tani ha biittayo inttes immadis; intteka biidi intte aawatas Abrahaames
Deuteronomy1:9 Musey derezas
Deuteronomy1:10 Intte GODAY intte qooda Salo xoolintte mala darssides.
Deuteronomy1:11 Ha7ikka intte aawata Xoossay kase inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala shii dakko gujjidi inttena anjjo.
Deuteronomy1:12 Gido attiin ha7i intte garsan diza palamaa
Deuteronomy1:13 Intte intte qommofe qommofe akeekay
Deuteronomy1:14 «Intteka
Deuteronomy1:15 Hessa gishshas issi issi qommofe intte dooridayta ooso losidayta
Deuteronomy1:16 «Ta he wode isttas
Deuteronomy1:17 Intte gela pirda pirdofte; guuth gidiin gita gidiin maado pirda pirdofte; pirday Xoossas gidida gishshas ay asaska babofte; inttefe bolla gididayssa ubbaa taakko ehite; hessa tani pirdana› gadis.
Deuteronomy1:18 Intte ooththanaas bessizayssa ta inttes he wode lo7eththa yootadis.
Deuteronomy1:19 «Hessafe guye nu GODAY nuna azazida mala Siina zumaappe dendidi intte be7ida iita bazzozara kanththidi Amoore deren shaara menththora aadhdhi biidi Qaadeese Barine gakkidos.
Deuteronomy1:20 Tani inttes
Deuteronomy1:21 He dereyo hanno be7ite! GODAY nu aawata Xoossay beni azazida mala intte gelidi izo laattite; baboftenne hidota qanxxofte› ga yootadis.
Deuteronomy1:22 «Intte ubbatikka taakko yiidi
Deuteronomy1:23 «Hessa histtanayssi taas lo7o misati beettiin intte garsafe qommaafe qommaafe issi issi as doorada tammanne nam7u asata yeddadis.
Deuteronomy1:24 Isttika shaara menththo deraara kanththi biidi Eshkoole shoobba gakkanaas yuuyi xomosi xeellida.
Deuteronomy1:25 Isttika heen ba be7ida miththaa ayfeppe amardayssa ekki yiidi GODAA nu Xoossay nuus immana qoppida biittaya keeha lo7o biitta gididayssa nuus qonccisi yootida.
Deuteronomy1:26 «Gido attiin GODAA intte Xoossaa azazo bolla makkallida gishshas he biittayo gelanaas koyibeekketa.
Deuteronomy1:27 Intte intte dunkaanen
Deuteronomy1:28 histtiin nu hee aazas bizonii? Nuni babboos; nuni kiittida asati heen diza asay wurikka minonne keehi adussata gididayssa qasseka istti diza katamata gimbey salo gakkidayssa nuus yootida; keehi adus gidida Enaaqe nayta be7ida› giidi zuuzumideta.
Deuteronomy1:29 «Gido attiin tani inttes
Deuteronomy1:30 Inttefe sinththara biza GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte ayfen be7ishin Gibxeta bolla ooththoyssa mala ha7ikka izi intte gishshas olettana.
Deuteronomy1:31 Aaway ba naa al7isiza mala intte biza bazzo biitta ubbaan izi inttena kaaleththishe inttena saron hayssa wostti gaththidaakko intte beyideta.›
Deuteronomy1:32 Ha ubbaa ta yootiinkka intte dunkkaanana sohoza bessanaassinne intte baana oge bessanaas omars tuussa taman
Deuteronomy1:33 
Deuteronomy1:34 «Intte zuuzumida zuuzunththaa Xoossi siyidi hanqettides;
Deuteronomy1:35 hessa gishshas
Deuteronomy1:36 Yoofine naa Kaalebey xalla he biittayo gelana; izikka kumeththa wozinappe ammanetti beettida gishshas he izi be7ida biittayo izassinne iza zereththatas ta immana› gi caaqqides.
Deuteronomy1:37 «Intte gaason GODAY tana hanqettidi
Deuteronomy1:38 Gido attiin nena maaddiza Nawe naa Iyaasoy he biittayo gelana; he biittayokka laattana mala Isra7eele nayta kaaleththanay iza gidida gishshas ne iza menththeththa› gides.
Deuteronomy1:39 «Qasseka GODAY inttes
Deuteronomy1:40 Intte gidikko simmidi Zo7o abbaako efiza ogezara duge bazzo biite» gides.

Deuteronomy1:42 GODAY gidikko
Deuteronomy1:43 Tanikka GODAY taas yootoyssa inttes yootadis shin intte ixxideta. Iza bollaka makkallideta; otoro daroppe dendidayssan intte he shaara menththo biittayo olanaas bideta.
Deuteronomy1:44 He zumbullata bolla diza Amoore dere asati inttenara ola oykettida; istta olanchchati maththa mala intte bolla yiidi Horma gakkanaas inttena yedeththida; zumbullati dari uttida Eedoome deren inttena xoonida.

Deuteronomy2:1 Hessafe guye Xoossi azazida mala gede Zo7o abbaako efiza ogezara guye simmi duge bazzo biitta bidos; nuni heen toylattishe shaara menththo Eedoome deren daro wode gam7idos.
Deuteronomy2:2 Hessafe guye GODAY taas hizgi yootides.
Deuteronomy2:3 «Intte ha shaara menththo deretan daro wode toylattideta; ha7i pudeha bagga simmi biite.
Deuteronomy2:4 Deraa
Deuteronomy2:5 Shaara menththon diza Eedoome biittaa ta Eesawes xinxxo histta immida gishshas istta biittafe tohoy yedhdhizasokka ta inttes immida istta bolla ola denththofte.
Deuteronomy2:6 Inttes koshshiza kath gidiin haath miishshan shammi ekkite› ga azaza» gides.
Deuteronomy2:7 GODAA intte Xoossay intte ooththida ubbaa inttes keehi anjjides; intte hayssa wolqqama bazzozara kanththi biza wode ishalsi oykkides; ha oyddu tammu layth kumeththaan GODAA intte Xoossay inttenara diza gishshas aykkoyka inttes paccibeenna.
Deuteronomy2:8 Hessa gishshas nuni nu isha Eesawe zereththati diza Eedoome biittara kanththi bidos; qasse Eelaatepenne Eexiyoon-Gaabire katamaappe yiza ogezara Arabe ogezara Mo7aabe bazzo simmi bidos.
Deuteronomy2:9 Xoossayka taas
Deuteronomy2:10 [Eemime geetettiza wolqqama daro derey Eeren dees; heytikka Enaaqe zereththa mala gubbaninne geesan gitata.
Deuteronomy2:11 Istti Enaaqe asata mala Erafaymeta geetetti xeygetteettes; Mo7aabe asay qasse istta Eemimeta gi xeygees; hankko Mo7aabe asay qasse istti Imaameta gi xeygeettes.
Deuteronomy2:12 Hoore asay kase Eedoome biittaan dees; gido attiin Isra7eele asay laattana mala GODAY isttas immida biittan istti ooththoyssaththo Eesawe zereththati Uure asaa gooddi dhayssidi istta biittan keexxi uttida.]
Deuteronomy2:13 Hessafe guye GODAY nuus yootida mala Zaraade geetettiza shaafaa pinnidos.
Deuteronomy2:14 Nuni Qaadeese Barineppe biidi Zaraade shaafa pinnanaas heedzdzu tammanne osppun layththi aadhdhides; he wode GODAY istta gishshas kase caaqqida mala he yeletaappe olas gakkida attuma asay ubbay wurides.
Deuteronomy2:15 Istti ubbay wurana gakkanaas GODAA kushey istta bolla deexxides.
Deuteronomy2:16 Olas gakkida attuma asay ubbay wuridaappe guye
Deuteronomy2:17 GODAY hizgides
Deuteronomy2:18 «Mo7aabe deres tiixa bolla diza Eere biittara intte hach kanththi baanaas bessees.
Deuteronomy2:19 Hessafe kaallidi Looxe zereth gidida Amoone asata waayisopite; isttara olettanaas istta denththeththofte; tani Amoone biittaa isttas duussaso histta immida gishshas istta xinxxofe aykkoka inttes immike.»
Deuteronomy2:20 [He biittay kase heen diza asay xeygiza sunththan Erafaymeta biitta geetettidi xeygettees; qasse Amoone asay Zamizumeta gi xeygees.

Deuteronomy2:23 Gaaza gakkanaas de7iza heeratan diza Awe dere asata Kaftoore geetettiza biittafe yida Kaftoore asati istta dhayssidi istta biittan keexxi uttida.]

Deuteronomy2:25 Hachchafe guye awankka diza dere asay inttes babbana mala ta ooththana; oonikka intte gishshas siyidi wurikka hirgan kokkorana» gides.
Deuteronomy2:26 Hessafe guye saroka kiita asa bolla Qidimoote bazzofe gede Haseboone kawo Sihoonekko kiittadis.
Deuteronomy2:27 «Nu intte derera aadhdhi baana mala nuna diggofa; nu ogeppe kare kezontta sitti gi baana.
Deuteronomy2:28 Nuni maana kaththinne haath nu miishshan shammi ekkana; nuni ne biittara kanththi bishin ne nuna diggontta mala xalla koyoos.
Deuteronomy2:29 Eedoomen diza Eesawe zereththatinne Eeren diza Mo7aabe zereththati nu istta derera aadhdhana mala nuus ero gida malakka Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi Xoossay nuna laatissana biittayo nuni gakkanaashe gakkanaas nuni ogera xalla aadhdhi baana mala nuus ero garkkii!»
Deuteronomy2:30 Kawo Sihooney qasse nuni iza derera aadhdhi baana mala koyibeenna; gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay hach intte be7izayssa mala iza intte kushen aaththi immanaas iza wozina muumisidi otoranchcha kessides.

Deuteronomy3:1 Hessafe guye nuni simmidi Baasaane efiza ogezara kezidos; kawo Aagey ba olanchchata ubbaa ekkidi nunara olettanaas Edira7e katama kezides.

Deuteronomy3:3 Hessa gishshas GODAA nu Xoossay kawo Aagenne iza olanchchata ubbaa nu kushen aaththi immides; nunikka isttafe issi asikka ashshontta ubbaa dhayssidos.
Deuteronomy3:4 He wode iza katamata ubbaa oykkidos; nu oykkontta attida issi katamaykka deenna; hessaththoka Baasaane kawo Aagey Argoba deren ayssiza usuppun tammu katamatakka oykkidos.
Deuteronomy3:5 He katamati wuri gimben gimbettida; pengetikka kolatatan gordeteettes; istta yuushon dirsay baynda cora mandarati deettes.

Deuteronomy3:7 Meheta ubbaa di7idos; katamatan diza miish ubbaa lim7i histtidos.
Deuteronomy3:8 He wode nuni Yordaanoose shaafaappe biidi arshey mokkiza baggara
Deuteronomy3:9 [Hermoone zumaza Sidoona asay
Deuteronomy3:10 Nuni gezze biittan diza katamata ubbaa
Deuteronomy3:11 [Erafaymeta baggafe kawo Aagey wurseththa kawo; izi ichchiza algay mino biratappe oosettides; algaas adussateththay osppun wadha gidishin gomppay oyddu wadha; he algazi Eraaba geetettiza Amooneta katamaan ha7i gakkanaas beettees.]
Deuteronomy3:12 He biittayo nuni laattidaappe Arnoone shaafaa achchan diza Aaro7eere katamaappe doommidi pudeha baggan diza derezanne gezze biittan diza Gala7aade deraappe baggaa heen diza katamatara Oroobeele zereththatassinne Gaade zereththatas immadis.
Deuteronomy3:13 Gala7aade dereppe attida biittanne Aagey haariza Baasaane biitta ubbaa
Deuteronomy3:14 Minaase qommo gidida Ya7irey Argoba dere kumeththaa laattides; hessika Geeshuretanne Ma7ikate zawa gakkanaas diza Baasaane; he biittayakka iza sunththan xeygettadus; hessa gaason ha7i gakkanaas istti Ya7ire katamata geetetteetes.)
Deuteronomy3:15 Qasse Gala7aade biittaaka Minaase qommo Maakire zereththatas immadis.
Deuteronomy3:16 Oroobeele qommotassinne Gaade qommotas Gala7aadeppe biidi Arnoone shaafaa achchi gakkanaas diza dereza immadis; dugeha baggara istta zaway Arnoone shaafa; pudeha bagga zaway qasse Amooneta deren zawa bolla diza Yaabooqe shaafaza.
Deuteronomy3:17 Arshey wulliza baggara istta zaway Araben de7iza Yordaanoose shaafa gakkees; hessika Kinereete abbaafe doommidi Pizga zuma garsan diza Maxine abba gakkanaassa.
Deuteronomy3:18 He wode istta kaaleththana mala hayssafe kaalliza wogata ta inttes immadis; GODAA nu Xoossay Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza biitta intte laattana mala inttes immides; hessa gishshas intte intte olanchchata gixisidi hankko Isra7eele asay bantta xinxxo laattana gakkanaas isttafe sinththati olettanaas aadhdhite.
Deuteronomy3:19 Inttes daro mehey dizayssa ta erays; hessa gishshas intte machcheti
Deuteronomy3:20 Intte GODAY hayssan inttena shempisoyssaththo intte ishanttaka Yordaanooseppe arshey wulliza baggara GODAY isttas immiza biittayo gelidi saroteththan shempana gakkanaas intte istta maaddite; hessafe guye tani inttes immida biittayo haa simmanaas dandayeeta.
Deuteronomy3:21 Hayssafe guye tani Iyaaso
Deuteronomy3:22 Inttes olettanay GODAA intte Xoossaa gidida gishshas intte isttas babbofte» ga zoradis.
Deuteronomy3:23 He wode tani keeha woossashe
Deuteronomy3:24 «Ubbaafe dhoqqa GODAWU! Ne gitateththaanne ne mino qeseza taas ne ayllezas beso doommadasa; neni ooththiza gitanne wolqqama oosota ooththiza hara GODAY Salonkka Sa7ankka deenna.
Deuteronomy3:25 Godoo! Tani Yordaanoose shaafa pinnada he pinththan diza lo7onne shaara menththoson diza cilila biittayonne Libaanoose zuma ta be7anayssa tana diggofarkkii!» gadis.

Deuteronomy4:1 Hessafe guye Musey asaas
Deuteronomy4:2 Ta inttes immiza wogaa bolla aykkoka gujjofte; aykkoka izappe pacinchchofte; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes ta baggara immida wogaas azazettizayta gidite.
Deuteronomy4:3 GODAY Ba7aali-Pe7oore zuma bolla ooththoyssa ubbaaka intte intte ayfera be7ideta; izi he zumaa bolla Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossaas goynnizayta ubbaa intte giddofe dhayssides.
Deuteronomy4:4 Intte gidikko GODAA intte Xoossaas ammanetti eqqidayta gidida gishshas hach gakkanaas shemppora paxa deeta.
Deuteronomy4:5 «GODAA ta Xoossay ta inttes yootana mala tana azazida wogaanne maara ubbaa inttena tamaarsadis; intte gelidi laattana biittayn he azazota naagite.
Deuteronomy4:6 Intte istta naagitenne polite; intte hessaththo ooththizaa gidikko intte ay keena aadho eranchchatanne akeekizayta hara dere asay inttena be7ana; istti ha azazota siyiza wode
Deuteronomy4:7 GODAA nu Xoossay nu woossishin mata gidida mala iza GODAY izas mata gidida hara gita kawoteththi oonee?
Deuteronomy4:8 Tani hach intte sinththan woththiza ha azazoza mala suurenne likke gidida wogaynne maaray diza hara ay gita kawoteththi dizee?
Deuteronomy4:9 «Histtiko intte diza wode ubbaan hayssa intte intte ayfera be7idayssa ubbaa balontta malanne intte wozinappe dhayontta mala naagettite; intte naytanne intte nayta naytakka tamaarsite.
Deuteronomy4:10 Siina zumaa bolla GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan intte eqqida wode izi tana
Deuteronomy4:11 «Salo gakkiza tama lacoynne dhippi gida cuwaynne shaaray iza goozi oykkida zumaa garsan shiiqi eqqideta.
Deuteronomy4:12 Hessaththoka GODAY tama laco giddon dishe inttes haasaydes; histtiin izi haasayza qaalaa siyideta attiin iza medha mulekka be7ibeekketa.
Deuteronomy4:13 Intte ooththanaas bessiza ba caaqo qaalaa inttes qonccisides; hessika masettida nam7u shuchchata bolla xaafettida tammu azazota.
Deuteronomy4:14 Intte geli laattana biittayn dishe intte ooththanaas bessiza wogatanne maarata ta inttena tamaarsana mala GODAY tana azazides.
Deuteronomy4:15 «GODAY Siina zumaa bollan tama laco giddofe inttes haasayza gallas ay medhakka be7ontta gishshas keehippe naagettite.
Deuteronomy4:16 Hessika adde woykko macca misatissi eeqa misle medhdhidi izan intte tunontta malassa.
Deuteronomy4:17 Biitta bolla de7iza mehenne do7a leemiso woykko salo gufanththon piradhdhiza kafo gidiin
Deuteronomy4:18 woykko biitta bollara tiran gooshettiza medheteththatanne mole misleta inttes ooththidi goynnofte.
Deuteronomy4:19 Qasse salo pude xeellidi intte GODAY asa ubbaas immida arshe
Deuteronomy4:20 Intte gidikko tamay izan eexxiza birata cooce misatiza Gibxeppe inttena GODAY shoddi kessiday intte izas dumma dere gidana malassa.
Deuteronomy4:21 «GODAY ne gaason ta bolla hanqettidi Yordaanoose shaafa ta pinna bontta malanne izi inttena laatissiza he cilila biittayo ta be7ontta mala taas caaqqi yootides.
Deuteronomy4:22 Hessa gishshas tani Yordaanoose shaafa pinnontta hannin hayqqana days; intte gidikko pinnidi he biittayo laattana.
Deuteronomy4:23 Hessa gishshas Xoossay inttenara gelida caaqo qaalaa intte balontta mala shaakki erite; GODAA intte Xoossay inttena ooththofte giidi azazida eeqa misleta ay medhankka misatissi ooththi kessofte.
Deuteronomy4:24 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay xuuggiza tamanne qanaatiza Xoossa.
Deuteronomy4:25 «Intte he biittayn naytanne nayta nayta yelidi ufayssan de7iza layth ubbaan inttenateththaa tunisidi ay medhan gidikkoka misle misatissi medhdhidi GODAA intte Xoossaa sinththan hessa mala iitaa ooththidi iza hanqeththofte.
Deuteronomy4:26 Intte hessa ooththiko Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi laattana biittayn daro layth gam7onttayssanne intte mulera dhayanayssa tani hach intte bolla salonne sa7a markka woththa yootays.
Deuteronomy4:27 GODAY inttena hara kawoteththata giddon laallana; intte bi laalettidason inttefe amardayti xalla attana.
Deuteronomy4:28 Heen intte miththafenne shuchchafe asa kushen oosettidi xeellontta
Deuteronomy4:29 Gido attiin intte heen dishe GODAA intte Xoossaa kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe koykko intte iza demmana.
Deuteronomy4:30 Ha ubbaa metoy inttena gakkiin intte metotishe wurseththan GODAA intte Xoossaako simmidi qasseka izas azazettana.
Deuteronomy4:31 GODAA intte Xoossay maariza Xoossa gidida gishshas inttena mulera aggenna; inttena ubbaaka dhayssenna; kase intte aawatara gelida caaqo qaalaa mulekka balenna.
Deuteronomy4:32 «Xoossay ase biitta bolla medhdhoosofe doommidi intte yelettanaappe kase aadhdhida wodeta xomosite; biitta gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas pilggi xeellite; hayssafe kase hayssa mala gita miishshi mulekka hani erizee? Woykko siyetti erizee?
Deuteronomy4:33 Tama laco giddora Xoossay haasayiin siyidi intte dhayontta shemppora paxa de7on diza mala Xoossay haasayiin siyidi shemppora paxa de7on diza hara asi dizee?
Deuteronomy4:34 Woykko GODAA intte Xoossay intte xeellishin Gibxe biittan inttes ooththizayssaththo paacen
Deuteronomy4:35 GODAY iza xalla gididayssa intte erana mala hayssa izi inttena bessides; izappe attiin hara Xoossi deenna.
Deuteronomy4:36 Izi inttena tamaarsanaas koyida gishshas ba cenggurssaa saloppe sissides; qasseka sa7a bolla yashshiza gita tamaa inttena bessides; he tamaza giddofe iza cenggurssaa siyideta.
Deuteronomy4:37 Izi hessaththo ooththiday intte aawata dosida gishshassinne istta zereththata doorida gishshas ba gita wolqqaan inttena Gibxeppe kessides.
Deuteronomy4:38 Hach intte be7iza mala inttena gelththanaassinne istta biittaa xinxxo ooththi inttes immanaas inttefe darizaytanne wolqqatiza kawoteththata intte sinththafe gooddi kessides.
Deuteronomy4:39 «Hessa gishshas salonkka sa7ankka GODAY izi xalla Xoos gididayssanne izappe hara Xoossi bayndayssa erite; intte wozinan woththite.
Deuteronomy4:40 Inttessinne inttefe guyen yaana intte zereththaas lo7o gidana mala qasse GODAA intte Xoossay mernaas inttes immiza xinxxoyn intte layththi aduqqana mala tani hach inttena azaziza wogaanne maaraa naagite» gides.
Deuteronomy4:41 Hessafe guye Musey Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey mokkiza baggara heedzdzu katamata shaakki woththides.
Deuteronomy4:42 Izi hessaththo ooththiday kase morkketeththi baynda erontta dishe as wodhida ay asikka he katamatappe issineyn baqati biidi ba shemppo ashshana malassa.
Deuteronomy4:43 Hessa gishshas Oroobeele qommotas zumbullati uttida bazzon diza Baxira
Deuteronomy4:44 Musey Isra7eele deraas immida GODAA wogay hayssa.
Deuteronomy4:45 Gibxeppe kezida wode Musey deraas yootida azazoy
Deuteronomy4:46 Heytantta izi awajjiday Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggara Beeti-Pe7oore zulles sinththa baggara diza Amooreta kawoy diza Haseboone deren
Deuteronomy4:47 He wode istti iza biittanne hessaththoka Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Baasaane dere haariza Amoore kawo Aage biitta laattida.
Deuteronomy4:48 He biittay Arnoone Shaafa doonan diza Aaro7eere katamaappe biidi Siriyoone zumaa gakkees; Siriyoone geetettiza zumazi Hermoone zuma.
Deuteronomy4:49 He biittayka Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Arabe dere ubbaa ekkidi Pizga zumaa garsan diza hayqo abba gakkees.
Deuteronomy5:1 Museykka Isra7eele asaa ubbaa issi bolla xeygidi
Deuteronomy5:2 GODAA nu Xoossay Siina zumaa bolla nunara caaqo qaala gelides.
Deuteronomy5:3 Izi caaqqidaykka nu aawatara xalla gidontta ha7i shemppora paxa diza nunarakka caaqettides.
Deuteronomy5:4 Heen he zumaa bolla eexxiza tama giddon dishe GODAY inttena qonccera haasayssides.
Deuteronomy5:5 Intte tamazas babbidi pude zumaa bolla kezanaas yayyida gishshas tanikka he wode GODAY gizayssa ubbaa inttes yootanaas inttessinne GODAAS giddon eqqadis. «Izikka taas
Deuteronomy5:6 ‹Neni kase aylleteththan haaretta diza Gibxe dereppe nena wozza ekkiday tana GODAA ne Xoossaa.
Deuteronomy5:7 « ‹Taappe attiin hara Xoossi nees dooppo.
Deuteronomy5:8 « ‹Salon gidiin sa7an
Deuteronomy5:9 Tani GODAA ne Xoossay keeha qanaatiza Xoossa; hessa gishshas masetti oosettida ay eeqa xoossataska goynnofanne ziggofa; tani tana ixxizayta wursa qaxxayays; istta zereththatakka heedzdzanththonne oydanththo yeleta gakkanaas tani qaxxayana.
Deuteronomy5:10 Tana dosizaytassinne ta azazota naagizaytas gidikko shii yeleta gakkanaas ta kiyateththaanne ta siiqo ta istta bessana.
Deuteronomy5:11 « ‹Tana ne GODAA sunththaa hadan xeygoppa; ta sunththaa hadan xeygizayta ta qaxxayontta aggike.
Deuteronomy5:12 « ‹Tani GODAY ne Xoossay nena azazida mala sambata gallassa dummasada bonchcha.
Deuteronomy5:13 Neni ooththiza ooso ubbaa usuppun gallassatan ooththa.
Deuteronomy5:14 Laappunththo gallassay gidikko taas ne GODAAS dumma shemppo gallassa; he gallas ay oosokka ooththofa; nena gidiin woykko ne nayta gidiin nees ooththizaytikka
Deuteronomy5:15 Neni Gibxe biittan de7iza wode aylle gidada de7idayssa akeeka; qasseka GODAA ne Xoossay ba mino qeseninne ba micettida kushen nena heeppe kessidayssa dogoppa; sambata gallassa ne bonchchana mala GODAA ne Xoossay azaziday hessassa.
Deuteronomy5:16 « ‹Tani GODAA ne Xoossay nena azazida mala ne aawaanne ne aayo bonchcha; ne hessaththo ooththiko GODAA ne Xoossay nees immiza biittayn ne layththi aduqqananne nees injjetana.
Deuteronomy5:17 « ‹As wodhoppa;
Deuteronomy5:18 « ‹Laymatoppa;
Deuteronomy5:19 « ‹Kaysotoppa;
Deuteronomy5:20 « ‹Oona bollaka wordo markkattofa;
Deuteronomy5:21 « ‹Asa machcho
Deuteronomy5:22 «Intte issi bolla shiiqidason GODAY zumaa bolla dishe inttes ubbaas immida azazoti hayta; taman
Deuteronomy5:23 «Zumazi taman xuugettiza wodenne dhuma giddofe cenggurssa intte siyida wode inttena kaaleththizaytinne intte korapinneti taakko yiidi
Deuteronomy5:24 ‹GODAA nuni Xoossa cenggurssaa tama giddofe siyida wode GODAA nu Xoossay ba gitateththinne ba bonchcho nuna qonccen bessides; Xoossi asara haasaydaappe guyen asi hayqqontta shemppora paxa de7ana dandayzayssa nu hach beydos.
Deuteronomy5:25 Hayssafe guye GODAA nu Xoossaa cenggurssaa nu siyizaa gidikko nu hayqqana; he wolqqama tamay nuna dhayssana dandayees; histtiin nuni ays hayqqizonii?
Deuteronomy5:26 De7o Xoossay tama giddon dishe yootiin nu siyida mala iza cenggurssa siyidi hayqqontta shemppora paxa attida asi daanee?
Deuteronomy5:27 Hessa gishshas neni izakko shiiqada GODAA nu Xoossay gizayssa ubbaa siya; hessafe guye ne siyidayssa ubbaa nuus yaada yoota; nunikka iza siyidi azazettana› gideta.
Deuteronomy5:28 «Xoossayka intte hessa gishin siyidi taas
Deuteronomy5:29 Isttassinne istta zereththatas mernaas ubbaa miishshi lo7o gidana mala istti taas yayyanaassinne ta azazota ubba wode naaganaas hayssa mala wozinay dizaakko ay mala lo7ooshaa!
Deuteronomy5:30 Ha7ikka neni baada istti ba dunkaanen dunkaanen simmana mala isttas yoota.
Deuteronomy5:31 Neni gidikko haan ta achchan eqqa; tani ta wogata
Deuteronomy5:32 «Isra7eele asawu! GODAA intte Xoossay inttena azazidayssa ubbaa polanaas giigettite; isttafe issinoyokka menththofte.
Deuteronomy5:33 Ubba miishshi inttes lo7o gidana malanne intte laattana biittayn inttes layththay aduqqana mala Xoossi inttena azazidayssa ubbaa polite» gides.
Deuteronomy6:1 Intte pinni biidi laattanaas biza biittaan intte ooththana malanne tani inttena tamaarsana mala GODAA intte Xoossay tana azazida azazoti
Deuteronomy6:2 Intte he biittayn adussa layth daana mala intte
Deuteronomy6:3 Intteno Isra7eele asawu! Ubba miishshi inttes lo7o gidana mala
Deuteronomy6:4 Isra7eele asatoo! Intte hayssa akeekite! GODAA nu Xoossay izi xalla Xoossa.
Deuteronomy6:5 GODAA ne Xoossaa ne kumeththa wozinappe
Deuteronomy6:6 Hach ta nena azazida azazota wozinan woththa.
Deuteronomy6:7 Hayta azazota ne nayta tamaarsa; neni neson uttiza wode gidiin oge bashekka
Deuteronomy6:8 Nees malata gidana mala ne kushe bolla qachcha qasseka ne piidhe bolla woththa.
Deuteronomy6:9 Ne keeththa qosilaththa bollanne gibbe penge bolla xaafa.
Deuteronomy6:10 GODAA intte Xoossay kase intte aawatas Abrahaames
Deuteronomy6:11 Intte laattanay intte keexxontta lo7o miishshan kumida keeththata
Deuteronomy6:12 kase intte aylleteththan deyida Gibxe dereppe inttena wozzi kessida GODAA intte balontta mala naagettite.
Deuteronomy6:13 Intte GODA Xoossaas yayyite; izas xalla goynnitenne iza sunththan xalla caaqqite.
Deuteronomy6:14 Intte yuushon diza hara dere asay goynniza eeqa xoossatas goynnofte;
Deuteronomy6:15 Gaasoykka intte giddon de7iza GODAA intte Xoossay qanaatiza Xoossa; hessa gishshas iza hanqoy intte bollan tama mala eexxi kezana; izikka inttena biitta bollafekka mulera dippi histti dhayssana.
Deuteronomy6:16 Kase intte Maasan ooththidayssaththo GODAA intte Xoossaa paaccofte.
Deuteronomy6:17 Izi inttena azazida azazota
Deuteronomy6:18 Inttes ubba miishshi lo7o gidana mala GODAA sinththan intte suurenne lo7o ooththite; histtiko inttes immanaas GODAY intte aawatas qaala gelida he lo7o biittayo intte laattana.
Deuteronomy6:19 Izi inttes hidota qaala gelida mala intte intte morkketa gooddi dhayssana.
Deuteronomy6:20 Guyeppe yaana wodetan intte nayti
Deuteronomy6:21 He wode intte qasse isttas
Deuteronomy6:22 Gibxe asaa
Deuteronomy6:23 Kase nu aawata laatissanaas immida hidota qaalaa mala nuna ha biittayo laatissanaas Gibxeppe wozzi kessidi haa ehides.
Deuteronomy6:24 Hessafe guye hach hanidayssaththo nuus ubba wodekka lo7o gidana malanne nuni shemppora paxa de7ana mala
Deuteronomy6:25 GODAA nu Xoossay nuna azazida mala iza azazota ubbaa nu naagikko hessi nuus xilloteth gidana» giite.
Deuteronomy7:1 GODAA intte Xoossay intte laattanaas biza biittayo inttena gelththiza wode qasseka inttefe wolqqamizanne minniza laappun kawoteththata heytikka Hiiteta
Deuteronomy7:2 GODAA intte Xoossay he dereta intte kushen aaththi immiin intte istta xooniza wode istta kumeth suppu histti dhayssite attiin isttara ay qaalakka gelopitenne isttas qadhettofte.
Deuteronomy7:3 Isttara ekettoftenne gelettofte; intte macca nayta istta attuma naytas immofte; istta macca naytakka intte attuma naytas ekkofte.
Deuteronomy7:4 Gaasoykka intte hessaththo ooththontta aggiko istti intte nayta GODAA kaallizasoppe betissidi eeqa xoossata kaallana mala ooththana; he wode GODAA hanqoy eexxi kezananne izi inttena heerakka eeson dhayssana.
Deuteronomy7:5 Hessa gishshas intte istti yarsho yarshizasoza laallite; istti goynniza tuussa malata shuchchata kinchchereththi yeggite; Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossay misleza tinchchereththi yeggite; masetti giigida eeqa xoossata misletakka taman xuuggite.
Deuteronomy7:6 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena baas gidana mala doorida dumma dere; biitta bolla diza dere ubbaafe intte izas dumma dere gidana mala doorettideta.
Deuteronomy7:7 GODAY inttena siiqidaynne dooriday intte hara asaappe qoodan dariza gishshas gidenna; intte hara deraappe qoodan keehi guuththata.
Deuteronomy7:8 Gido attiin GODAY inttena siiqida gishshassinne kase intte aawatas gelida hidota qaala naaganaas koyida gishshas izi inttena Gibxe kawos aylleteththan diza Gibxe biittafe ba gita wolqqan wozzidi kessides.
Deuteronomy7:9 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossay mulera ammanettida Xoossaa gididayssa intte yuushshi qopite; izi ba caaqqida qaalaa naagees; iza dosizaytassinne iza azazo polizaytas ubbaas shii yeleta gakkanaas izi ba mernaa siiqo bessana.
Deuteronomy7:10 Gido attiin bana ixxizayta ba halo kessana; istta bolla ba halo kessanaas gam7enna.
Deuteronomy7:11 Hessa gishshas ta hach inttena azaziza azazota
Deuteronomy7:12 Intte ha azazota
Deuteronomy7:13 Izi inttena siiqana; anjjananne qoodan darsana; qasseka izi intte aawatas caaqqida biittayn intte yelota
Deuteronomy7:14 Intte mala anjjettida derey alame bolla mulekka deenna; intte giddofe macca gidiin woykko attumas gidiin hessaththoka intte meheta giddon maynney beettenna.
Deuteronomy7:15 GODAY harge ubbaafe inttena naagana; intte kase Gibxen dishe be7ida iita hargetappe awoyssaka intte bolla ehenna; gido attiin izi bana ixxizayta bolla he hargeta ehana.
Deuteronomy7:16 GODAA intte Xoossay intte kushen aaththi immida dereta ubbaasikka qadhettontta dhayssite; inttes woximade gidontta mala istta eeqa xoossatas goynnofte.
Deuteronomy7:17 Intte intte wozinan
Deuteronomy7:18 Gido attiin intte isttas yayyofte; GODAA intte Xoossay Gibxe kawo bollanne he dere asaa ubbaa bolla ooththidayssa yuushshi qopite.
Deuteronomy7:19 GODAA intte Xoossay inttena Gibxeppe kessiza wode ooththida gita boshata
Deuteronomy7:20 GODAA intte Xoossay istta giddon shiro denththana; inttefe baqatidi qotettidaytikka heera dhayana.
Deuteronomy7:21 Hessa gishshas he deretas babofte; GODAA intte Xoossay inttenara dees; izi gitanne yashissiza Xoossa.
Deuteronomy7:22 GODAA intte Xoossay hayta kawoteththata guuththara guuththara shoddi kessana; intte istta ubbaa issito dhayssofte; intte issito dhayssiko biitta bolla do7ay daridi inttena waayisana.
Deuteronomy7:23 GODAA intte Xoossay intte morkketa intte kushen aaththi immana; istti ubbay wurana gakkanaas izi istta garsan shiro denththana.
Deuteronomy7:24 Qasseka istta kawota izi intte kushen aaththi immana; intte istta sunththaa mulera biittafe dhayssana; intte istta dhayssana gakkanaas inttenara eqetti dandayana ay asikka deenna.
Deuteronomy7:25 Istta eeqa xoossata ubbaa taman xuuggite; he eeqa xoossata bolla diza worqqanne bira amottidi inttes ekkofte; GODAA intte Xoossay eeqa xoossatas goyno ixxiza gishshas intte ekkiko izi inttes woximade gidana.
Deuteronomy7:26 Ha tunida eeqa xoossata intteso gelththofte; intte intteso gelththiko istti dhayzayssaththo intteka dhayana; istti dhayanaas bessiza gishshas intte istta ixxitenne harasettite.
Deuteronomy8:1 Intte shemppora paxa daana mala
Deuteronomy8:2 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida azazota intte naagizaakkonne naagonttaakko intte wozinan diza qofa eranaas
Deuteronomy8:3 Asi Xoossa doonappe keziza qaalan attiin kaththan xalla shemppora paxa daanaas dandayonttayssa tamaarsanaas inttena gafisides; intteninne intte aawati erontta manna mizides.
Deuteronomy8:4 He oyddu tammu layththata garsan intte may7ida may7oy wuribeenna; hemeththa daron intte tohoy kixxibeenna.
Deuteronomy8:5 Aaway ba naa seerizayssaththo GODAA intte Xoossay inttena seerizayssa yuushshi qopite.
Deuteronomy8:6 Iza kaallishenne izas yayyishe GODAA intte Xoossaa azazota naagite.
Deuteronomy8:7 Gaasoykka GODAA intte Xoossay inttena shoobbafenne zumbullatappe pultti goggiza qeeri shaafatinne pulttiza pulttoti diza lo7o biittaa gelththanaas ehides.
Deuteronomy8:8 He biittaya gistteynne banggay
Deuteronomy8:9 He biittayakka intte pacey baynda kath miza biittanne inttes aykkoyka paccontta biitta; he biittayn diza shuchchatappe biratay
Deuteronomy8:10 Intte miidi kallana; histtidi izi inttes immida lo7o biittay gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa intte galatana.
Deuteronomy8:11 Intte GODAA intte Xoossaa dogidi tani hach inttes immiza azazota
Deuteronomy8:12 Intte miidi kalliza wodenne lo7o keeth keexxi uttiza wode
Deuteronomy8:13 miizinne dorsay
Deuteronomy8:14 intte wozinay otorettontta malanne intte Gibxeppe aylleteththa biittafe inttena wozzi kessida GODAA intte Xoossaa balontta mala naagettite.
Deuteronomy8:15 Marze shooshshaynne masimasoy kumida keehi hirgisiza bazzora inttena kaaleththides; izi inttes mela bazzon mino zaallafe haaththe pulttisides.
Deuteronomy8:16 Inttena ashkesanaasinne paaccanaas wurseththankka lo7o gidana mala kase intte aawati mi erontta manna bazzo biittan inttes immides.
Deuteronomy8:17 Hessa gishshas
Deuteronomy8:18 Intte durettana mala inttes wolqqanne minoteth immiday GODAA intte Xoossaa gididayssa yuushshi qopite; izi hessaththo ooththiday kase intte aawatas gelida caaqo qaala minththanaassa.
Deuteronomy8:19 GODAA intte Xoossaa intte dogidi eeqa xoossatas goynniko
Deuteronomy8:20 GODAA intte Xoossaas intte azazettontta ixxiko intte gede sinththe sinththe bishin intte sinththan diza kawoteththata dhayssizayssa mala inttenakka dhoqalli dhayssana.
Deuteronomy9:1 Intteno Isra7eele dere asawu! Siyite; intte inttefe gitatizanne wolqqamiza kawoteththata qasse isttas dirsa gimbey salo gakkida gita katamatakka laattanaas hach Yordaanoose pinneeta.
Deuteronomy9:2 He biittaan diza asay geesanne gubba gitatanne keehi minota; isttas
Deuteronomy9:3 Gido attiin tama mala xuuggiza GODAA intte Xoossay izi inttefe sinththara bishin intte hach be7ana; intte gede sinththe sinththe gujjishin izi istta xooni xooni baana; hessa gishshas izi inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala intte istta dhoqallidi eeson gooddi dhayssana.
Deuteronomy9:4 GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte sinththafe gooddidaappe guye intte
Deuteronomy9:5 Intte istta biittaa laattana mala GODAA intte Xoossay isttas aaththi immizay intte xillonne suure ooththida gishshas gidenna; istti iitata gidida gishshassinne Xoossay kase intte aawatas Abrahaames
Deuteronomy9:6 GODAA intte Xoossay ha lo7o biittaa inttena laatissizay intte xilloteththaa gishshas gidenna; gaasoykka intte wozinay muume.
Deuteronomy9:7 GODAA intte Xoossaa bazzon intte wostti hanqeththidaakko balopite; intte Gibxeppe kezida gallassafe doommidi hanno gakkanaas intte GODAA intte Xoossaa bolla makkallideta.
Deuteronomy9:8 Siina bazzon izi inttena dhayssanaas dendana gakkanaas GODAA keehi hanqeththideta.
