Deuteronomy31:26 «GODAA wogay izan xaafettida maxaafaa ekkidi GODAA intte Xoossaa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza achchan woththite; heen izi ba dizason dishe dereza bolla markka gidana.
Deuteronomy31:27 Isra7eele asay ay mala makkallanchchakonne wozina muumekko ta erays; tani shemppora paxa isttara dishin istti GODAA bolla makkallizayti tani hayqqidaappe guye keehi makkallanchchata gidana.
Deuteronomy31:28 Hessa gishshas ta isttas hayssa ubbaa yootana mala korapinnetanne dere halaqata taas shiishshite; tani istta bolla salonne sa7a markka gidana mala xeygana.
Deuteronomy31:29 Tani hayqqidaappe guye ta inttena azazida azazoppe kare kezidi tuna ooso intte ooththanayssa ta erays; GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththidi intte iza hanqeththiko izi intte bolla bosha yeddana.»
Deuteronomy31:30 Hessafe guye Musey kumeththa Isra7eele asaa sinththan hayta mazamure qaalata koyroppe biidi wurseth gakkanaas yootides.
Deuteronomy32:1 Salotoo! Tani yootizayssa ezgi siyite; Sa7azoo ta doonappe keziza qaala siya.
Deuteronomy32:2 Ta immiza timirtey ira mala bukko; ta haasayaykka xaaza mala xoketto; maata bolla loddi gi bukkiza ira mala bukko; kaththa caarechcha bolla puuse mala wodhdho.
Deuteronomy32:3 Tani GODAA sunth awajjays; nu Xoossaa gitateth intte yootite.
Deuteronomy32:4 «Izi nuus miixa; iza oosotikka kumeththa; Iza ogeti wurikka suure; izi balettontta ammanettida Xoossa; izi suurenne xillo Xoossa.
Deuteronomy32:5 «Istti iza sinththan iita ooththida; istti bantta iitateththaafe dendidayssan hayssafe guye iza nayta gidettenna; istti bokkanne geella yeletata.
Deuteronomy32:6 «Intteno eeyatoo! Qasseka wozinay bayndaytoo! Intte GODAAS immiza zaaroy hayssee? Inttena medhdhida intte aaway iza gidennee? Inttena medhdhidi hayssas gaththiday iza gidennee?
Deuteronomy32:7 «Kase beni wodeza yuushshi qoppite; daro yeletata layththaaka akeekite; Intte aawata oychchite; istti inttes yootana; kase cimatakka oychchite; istti inttes qonccisi yootana.
Deuteronomy32:8 «Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kawoteththatas biitta gishechchida wode
Deuteronomy32:9 «Isra7eeley GODAAS gisha; Yaaqoobeykka izas buzo miishsha.
Deuteronomy32:10 «Aykkoyka baynda bazzon carkoy punniza biittaan iza demmides; izas gondalle gidides; ba ayfe ciro mala iza naagides.
Deuteronomy32:11 Golle kafoy ba ciyeta piradho tamaarsiza mala
Deuteronomy32:12 Hara eeqa xoossati izara baynda GODAY iza barkka kaaleththides.
Deuteronomy32:13 «Dhoqqa sohon iza woththides; biittafe mokkida kaththa ayfe iza mizides; zaallafe beettida ees ushshides; shuchcha biittan mokkida wogara zayte mizides.
Deuteronomy32:14 Miizappe dorsafenne deysha wudeppe beettiza maaththaninne oys Baasaane dereppe beettiza ohala laaqqata
Deuteronomy32:15 «Isra7eele asay ordidessinne makkallides. Daro miidi modhdhidessinne moollattides; bana medhdhida Xoossaa aggides; bana ashshidayssaka kawushshides.
Deuteronomy32:16 Istti eeqa xoossatas goynnidi Xoossaa mishisida; bantta iita oosonkka iza hanqeththida.
Deuteronomy32:17 Hayssafe kase ba eronttaytas
Deuteronomy32:18 Istti baas de7o immida zaallaa dogida; bana medhdhida Xoossaaka balida.
Deuteronomy32:19 «GODAY hessa be7idi istta bolla hanqettides; istta macca naytanne istta attuma nayta diggides.
Deuteronomy32:20 ‹Tani ta ayfeso isttafe genththana; istti geellanne ammanettontta dere gidida gishshas istta wurseththi ay gidanaakko ta co7u ga beyana.›
Deuteronomy32:21 Tumu gidontta xoossatan tana mishisida; go7ay baynda ba eeqa xoossatan tana hanqeththida. Tanikka istta kadhettida kawoteththata istti miigettana mala ooththana. Ta istta akeekontta deretan hanqeththana.
Deuteronomy32:22 Ta hanqoy tama mala eexxana; biittanne biitta bolla diza ubbaa xuuggana; he tamay si7oole ciimmaa gakkanaas eexxana; tamazi zumaas yoch gakkanaas maana.
Deuteronomy32:23 Tani istta bolla zaareththa zaareththa bosha ehana; Taas diza wondafe ta istta bolla wursana.
Deuteronomy32:24 Ta ubbaa wursiza kosha istta bolla yeddana; issaafe issaan aadhdhiza iita hargeninne boshan istti wurana; meto gaththiza iita do7atanne dukkiza marzera diza shooshshata ta istta bolla yeddana.
Deuteronomy32:25 Oge ubbaan istta nayta olay wursana; keeththa giddonkka hirgay kumana; panththatinne geela7oti
Deuteronomy32:26 Tani istta ubbaa laallana; Hessafe guye istta hassa7ana asi deenna.
Deuteronomy32:27 Gido attiin istta morkketi
Deuteronomy32:28 Isra7eele asay yuushshi qoppontta kawoteth; isttas akeekay deenna.
Deuteronomy32:29 Istti erata gididaakko hayssa istti kasetidi qoppana; bantta wurseththankka hananayssa yuushshi qoppanashin!
Deuteronomy32:30 Istta medhdhidayssi istta aaththi immonttaako
Deuteronomy32:31 Haray attoshin nu morkketi istta xoossay laafa gididayssanne Isra7eele Xoossaa mala gidonttayssa ereettes.
Deuteronomy32:32 Nu morkketi Sodoomenne Gamoora dere asaa mala tuna; isttika camonne marzera diza ayfe ayfiza woyne miththa mala.
Deuteronomy32:33 Istta woyne ushshay shooshsha marze mala; qasseka haso shooshsha marze mala.
Deuteronomy32:34 «Hayssa tani dogadinaa? Ta mazgaban xaafetti uttides.
Deuteronomy32:35 Istta morkketa bolla halo kessanay tana; ubbaasikka ta istta ooso ooso mala immana; isttas dhayo gallassi gakkida gishshas istti dhuphettana; eesonkka dhayana.»
Deuteronomy32:36 Isttas wolqqay daaburdayssanne isttaka maaddizay bayndayssa be7idi
Deuteronomy32:37 GODAY ba asaa
Deuteronomy32:38 Istti yarshos shiishshiza tolthoza midayti
Deuteronomy32:39 «Tani xalla Xoos gididayssa erite; taappe hara Xoossi deenna; wodhizaykka paxa woththizaykka tana; tani madunththayssinne paththays; ta kusheppe oonikka inttena ashshenna.
Deuteronomy32:40 Tani ta kushe pude salo denththada
Deuteronomy32:41 Wawaci giza ta giththa mashshaa leefana; ta kushey pirdas oykkana; ta morkketa bolla halo kessana; tana ixxizaytas ta istta ooso mala isttas immana.
Deuteronomy32:42 Morkketa halaqata
Deuteronomy32:43 «Intteno kawoteththatoo! GODAY ba oosanchchata suuth accana; morkketa bolla halo kessana; bana ixxizayta qaxxayana; ba dereza nagara wursana; biittayokka tunateththafe geeshshana; hessa gishshas intte iza asaara issife ufayettite» giidi
Deuteronomy32:44 Museynne Nawe naa Iyaasoy derezi siyishin ha mazamureza yootida.

Deuteronomy32:46 izi
Deuteronomy32:47 Ha qaalay inttes de7oppe attiin coo mela qaalaa gidenna; ha qaala naagikko intte Yordaanoose pinnidi laattana biittankka adussa layth intte de7ana» gides.
Deuteronomy32:48 He gallas GODAY Muses hizgides
Deuteronomy32:49 «Mo7aabe deren Iyarkko katama ginara diza Abaarime zumata giddofe Nebo zuma bolla keza; histtada tani Isra7eele asaas immana gida Kanaane biitta he pinththan xeella.
Deuteronomy32:50 Ne isha Aarooney Hoore zumaa bolla hayqqidi kase hayqqida ba asatan gayttida mala nekka he zumaa bolla hayqqada ne asatan gayttana.

Deuteronomy34:3 Negebenne zambay diza Iyarkko shoobbafe biidi Zo7aare gakkanaas dizaso ubbaa bessides.
Deuteronomy34:4 GODAY Muses
Deuteronomy34:5 Hessa gishshas GODAA oosanchcha Musey Mo7aabe biittan dishe GODAY izas yootida mala heen hayqqides.
Deuteronomy34:6 GODAY Muse ahaa Mo7aabe deren diza Beeti-Pe7oore katamappe sinththan diza shoobbaan moogides; gido attiin izi moogettidaso shaakki eriza asi hach gakkanaas beettibeenna.
Deuteronomy34:7 Musey hayqqishin izas layththay 120; gido attiin iza ayfey doljumibeenna; iza wolqqayka daaburbeenna.
Deuteronomy34:8 Isra7eele asay Muses michay aadhdhana gakkanaas heedzdzu tammu gallas gakkanaas Mo7aabe demban kayottishe yeekkides.
Deuteronomy34:9 Ba ollan izi ooththana mala Musey Nawe naa Iyaaso bolla ba kushe woththidi shuumida gishshas Iyaasoy aadho erateththaninne ayanan kumides; Isra7eele asay Iyaasos azazettides; GODAY Muse baggara isttas immida azazozakka naagida.
Deuteronomy34:10 Asi asara haasayza mala GODAARA haasayda Muse mala nabey Isra7eele biittan dendibeenna.
Deuteronomy34:11 GODAY Gibxe kawozaakko
Deuteronomy34:12 Musey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa sinththan ooththidayssa mala wolqqamanne babisiza malaatata ooththida hara nabey mulekka deenna.
Joshua1:1 GODAA aylle Musey hayqqidaappe guye GODAY Muse maaddiza Nawe naa Iyaasos
Joshua1:2 «Hekko ta aylle Musey hayqqides; ha7i neninne hayssi derezi dendite; tani kase Isra7eele asaas immana gida biittaa gelanaas Yordaanoose shaafa pinnite.
Joshua1:3 Tani kase Muses immida hidota mala intte tohoy yedhdhiza biitta ubbaa ta inttes immana.
Joshua1:4 Intte biittaa zaway bazzofe doommidi Libaanoose
Joshua1:5 Neni diza wode ubbaan nenara oonikka eqettana dandayenna; tani kase Musera gidida mala nenarakka gidana; mulekka ta nena yeggikenne aggike.
Joshua1:6 «Minna! Xala gida; tani kase istta aawatas immana gaada caaqqida biittaa ha dereza kaaleththada laatisanay nena gidida gishshas minna.
Joshua1:7 Aykkoy baa; neni mino xalla minna; ta aylle Musey nees immida wogaza ubbaa lo7eththa azazetta; ne bidaso ubbaan giiga gidana mala hadirs ushach gooppa.
Joshua1:8 Hayssi woga Maxaafay ne doonappe shaakettofo; iza giddon dizayssa ne lo7eththa naagettada polana mala gallas gidiin omars zaara zaara qoppa; ne hessaththo ooththiko ne qoppida ubbay nees suurananne hanana.
Joshua1:9 Neni bizason ubbaan GODAA ne Xoossay nenara diza gishshas aykkoy baa
Joshua1:10 Hessafe kaallidi Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa
Joshua1:11 «Intte gede asay dizaso biidi
Joshua1:12 Iyaasoy Oroobeele qommotas
Joshua1:13 «GODAA aylle Musey
Joshua1:14 Intte machcheti
Joshua1:15 Hessika GODAY istta shempisana gakkanaassinne inttes izi ooththoyssaththo isttika GODAA intte Xoossay isttas immida biittaa gakki laattana gakkanaassa; hessafe guye intte simmi yiidi arshey mokkiza baggara Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan GODAA aylle Musey inttes immida biittaa intte laattana» gides.
Joshua1:16 Isttika Iyaasos
Joshua1:17 Nuni Muses ubba wode azazettida mala neeskka azazettana; GODAA ne Xoossay kase Musera gidida mala nenarakka izi gido!
Joshua1:18 Nenara eqettizaadeynne nees azazettonttaade ubbay hayqqo; ne minna; aykkoy baa
Joshua2:1 Nawe naa Iyaasoy biittaa wochchiza nam7u asata Shiixime geetettizasoppe qotan kiittides; kiittishe isttas
Joshua2:2 Histtiin Iyarkko kawoy
Joshua2:3 Iyarkko kawoy Era7aabikko
Joshua2:4 Gido attiin mishireya he nam7u asata qotta woththada
Joshua2:5 Omars katama penge gordana giza wode istti kezi bida; istti awa bidaakko ta erikke; eesotidi kaallizaa gidikko intte istta oykkana» gadus.
Joshua2:6 Gido attiin Era7aaba asata pooqe mala oosettidaso kessada micettida talbba buuxa giddon istta qotta woththadus.
Joshua2:7 Asati xomosizayta koyanaas kezidi Yordaanoose shaafa pinth efiza oge oykkidi bida; koyzayti katamaappe kezida mala katamaa pengey gordettides.
Joshua2:8 Wochchizayti dhiskanaappe kasetada iza isttako pude kezada isttas
Joshua2:9 «GODAY ha biittaa inttes immidayssa
Joshua2:10 Gibxe biittafe intte kezida wode intte sinththan Zo7o abbaa GODAY wostti melissidaakko nuni siyidos; qasse Yordaanoose shaafappe arshe kessaso baggara diza Amoore biitta kawota nam7ata
Joshua2:11 Nu hessa siyida mala nu wozinay seerides; inttes yashshateththafe dendidayssan shirotontta asi deenna; GODAA intte Xoossay bolla salonkka garsa biittankka izi Xoossa.
Joshua2:12 Hessa gishshas tani inttes kiyida mala intteka ta aawa keeththa asaas kiyana mala taas GODAAN caaqqite; hessaska ammanththiza malata taas immite.
Joshua2:13 Ta aawaanne ta aayiyo
Joshua2:14 He asati
Joshua2:15 Era7aaba diza keeththay katamaa dirsaara oyketti keexetti uttida gishshas asata wodoron qachchada maskootera duge woththadus.
Joshua2:16 Era7aaba isttas
Joshua2:17 Asatikka izis
Joshua2:18

Joshua2:20 Nu ooththizayssa ne haras yootizaa gidikko neni nuna caaqeththida caaqoy nuus gomettenna» gida.
Joshua2:21 Izakka
Joshua2:22 Istti pude zumbullatakko bida; goodeththizayti Iyarkko simmana gakkanaas heen heedzdzu gallas qotettida. Goodeththizayti oge ubbaan koyida shin istti demmibeettenna.

Joshua3:1 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay maalado wonttara dendida; istti Shiixime geetettizasoppe dendidi Yordaanoose shaafaakko biidi pinnontta heen takkida.

Joshua3:3 asaas
Joshua3:4 Intte kase he ogera bi erontta gishshas intte baana oge istti inttena bessana; gido attiin Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotaakko shiiqopite; Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe 2
Joshua3:5 Iyaasoy asaa
Joshua3:6 Qasseka Iyaasoy qeesetas
Joshua3:7 GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua3:8 Neni Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkiza qeeseta
Joshua3:9 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa
Joshua3:10 De7o Xoossi intte giddon dizayssanne izi tumappe Kanaaneta
Joshua3:11 Sa7a ubbaa GODAA Caaqo Qaalaa Taabotay inttefe sinththatidi Yordaanoose shaafaa gelana.
Joshua3:12 Ha7i Isra7eele zaretappe 12 asata doorite; issi issi zareppe issi issi as gido.
Joshua3:13 Sa7a ubbaa GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseta tohoy Yordaanoose haaththaa bochchida mala pudehappe duge goggiza Yordaanoose haaththi heerakka gogeththaa aggaagana; doore mala gidi eqqaa gaana» gides.
Joshua3:14 Asay Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnanaas ba dunkaaneppe kezida wode Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti asaappe sinththati bida.
Joshua3:15 Kaththa shiisho woden ubbaan Yordaanoose shaafay kixxees; gidikkoka Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafa gakkidi istta tohoy haaththaa gaxa yedhdhida mala
Joshua3:16 goggiza haaththay eqqides; heen daro haahoson Phartaane matan diza Addaame geetettiza katamaa gakkanaas issiso shiiqidi doorettides; duge Arabe gadhan diza Maxine abban goggiza haaththi ubbay duuxxi attides; histtiin asay Iyarkko katamaa ginara pinnides.
Joshua3:17 Isra7eele asay mela biitta yedhdhi pinniza wode asay wuri pinnana gakkanaas GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafaa giddon mela biittan eqqaa gida.
Joshua4:1 Kawoteththay wuri Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidaappe guye GODAY Iyaaso
Joshua4:2 «Isra7eele asaappe 12 asata doora; issi issi qommofe issi issi as gido.
Joshua4:3 Histtada isttas
Joshua4:4 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy Isra7eele qommotappe issi issi as ekkidi tammanne nam7u doorettidayta xeygides.
Joshua4:5 Histtidi isttas
Joshua4:6 Ha shuchchati GODAY hach ooththidayssa inttena hassa7issiza malata gidana; wodeppe intte nayti inttena
Joshua4:7 intte
Joshua4:8 Isra7eele asay Iyaasoy azazida mala ooththides; GODAY Iyaasos yootida mala Isra7eele qommota qoodan 12 shuchchata Yordaanoose shaafaa giddofe ekkida; tookki ehidi ba aqida sohon woththida.
Joshua4:9 Iyaasoy Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseta tohoy Yordaanoose shaafa giddon eqqidaason 12 shuchchata essides; he shuchchati hach gakkanaas heen deettes.
Joshua4:10 GODAY Iyaaso azazidayssa ubbaa asay polana gakkanaas Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafaa giddon eqqi gam7ida; Musey Iyaaso azazida azazoykka hessa; asay eesotidi shaafaa pinnides.
Joshua4:11 Asay wuri pinnidaappe guye GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaynne qeeseti asay istta xeellishin pinnida.
Joshua4:12 Musey azazida mala Oroobeele zareti
Joshua4:13 Qoodan 40
Joshua4:14 He gallas GODAY Iyaaso Isra7eele asaa ubbaa sinththan dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides; asay Muse bonchchida mala Iyaasokka izi dida layth ubbaan bonchchides.

Joshua4:17 Iyaasoy qeeseta
Joshua4:18 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida qeeseti Yordaanoose shaafa giddofe kezidi mela biitta istti yedhdhida mala heerakka Yordaanoose haaththay kase mala shaafaa kumidi gogeth oykkides.
Joshua4:19 Asay koyro aginan tammanththa gallassan Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi Iyarkkon arshey mokkizaso baggara zawatiza Gelgelan dunkaanides.
Joshua4:20 Iyaasoy Yordaanoose shaafappe ehida 12 shuchchata Gelgelan essides.
Joshua4:21 Isra7eele asaas
Joshua4:22 ‹Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafaa mela biitta yedhdhidi pinnidayssa hassa7issizayssa› giidi yootite.
Joshua4:23 Nuni pinnana gakkanaas GODAA nu Xoossay Zo7o abbaa kase nu sinththan melissida mala intteka pinnana gakkanaas GODAA intte Xoossay Yordaanoose shaafaa intte sinththan melissides.
Joshua4:24 Hessaththo izi ooththiday sa7an diza asay wuri GODAA wolqqay ay mala gitakko eranaassinne intteka GODAAS intte Xoossaas mernaas yayyanaassa» gides.
Joshua5:1 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara diza Amooreta kawotinne Mediteraane Abba lanqe lanqe oykkidi diza Kanaaneta kawoti wuri Isra7eele asay pinnana gakkanaas GODAY Yordaanoose shaafa haaththaa melissidayssa siyida wode istta wozinay babon seerides. Histtiin istti Isra7eele asaara eqettanaas xalibeettenna.
Joshua5:2 He wode GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua5:3 Histtiin Iyaasoy salo shuch qarasidi Gibi7aaze Eloote geetettizason Isra7eele attumasaa qaxxarides.
Joshua5:4 Izi hessa ooththida gaasoykka Gibxeppe kezida asan layththay olas gakkida attuma asay wuri Gibxeppe kezidaappe guye bazzon oge bolla hayqqides.
Joshua5:5 Gibxeppe kezida attuma asay wuri qaxxarettides; gido attiin bazzon yuuyiza wode yelettida attuma naytappe issoyka qaxxarettibeenna.
Joshua5:6 Isra7eele kawoteththay GODAAS azazettontta ixxida gishshas Gibxeppe keziza wode layththay olas gakkida attuma asay wuri hayqqidi wurana gakkanaas bazzon 40 layth yuuyides; hessan GODAY isttas
Joshua5:7 Hessa gishshas GODAY istta nayta isttasohon denththides; Iyaasoy qaxxara gelththidayti heytantta; istti oge bolla hemettishe diza gishshas qaxxarettibeettenna.
Joshua5:8 Kawoteththay wuri qaxxarettidaappe guye madunththay paxana gakkanaas ba dunkaani dizason takkides.
Joshua5:9 GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua5:10 Isra7eele asay Iyarkko demban Gelgelan dunkaani dishe aginay geliin tammanne oydanththa gallassa omars Paaziga ba7aale bonchchides.
Joshua5:11 Paazigappe guye wonteththa gallas biittan mokkida kaththa ayfeppe irshoy gelontta uukettidayssanne caacettida tiya mides.
Joshua5:12 He biittaan mokkida kaththa ayfe mida gallas mannay yuus aggides; hessafe guye Isra7eele asaas mannay yibeenna; gido attiin he wodeppe doommidi istti Kanaanen mokkida kath mishe de7ida.
Joshua5:13 Iyaasoy Iyarkko matan dishe dhoqqu gi xeellidi giththa mashsha shoddi oykkida issi asi iza sinththan eqqidayssa be7ides; Iyaasoy izakko shiiqidi

Joshua5:15 GODAA olanchchata gadaway
Joshua6:1 Isra7eele asaas yayyida gaason Iyarkko katama dirsa pengeti gordettida; katamaa gelanaassinne katamaappe kezanaas dandayzay oonikka deenna.
Joshua6:2 GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua6:3 Neninne ne olanchchati cifridi usuppun gallas gakkanaas hach hach katamaa dirsaa issito yuuyi aadhdhite.
Joshua6:4 Qasse laappun qeeseti laappun zayeta oykkidi GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinth aadhdhetto; laappunththa gallas qeeseti zayeta punnishin olanchchati cifridi issife katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhetto.
Joshua6:5 Hessafe guye zayey qanxxoy baynda punettizayssa siyida mala asay wuri ba qaala dhoqqu histti waasso; histtida mala katamay gimbey laalettana; asay wuri lawuhu gi ke7idi katamay giddo sitti gi gelana» gides.
Joshua6:6 Nawe naa Iyaasoy qeeseta xeygidi
Joshua6:7 Derezakka
Joshua6:8 Iyaasoy asaas haasayda mala laappun qeeseti laappun zayeta GODAA sinththan oykkidi punnishe sinththati bida; qasse GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay istta kaallides.
Joshua6:9 Olas giigettidayti zayeta punniza qeesetappe sinththara bishin guyera naagiza olanchchati Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa kaallida; he wode zayey qanxxoy baynda punettides.
Joshua6:10 Gido attiin Iyaasoy asaa
Joshua6:11 Hessa gishshas GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay tookettidi he katamaa issito yuuyi aadhdhana mala ooththides; hessafe guye asay ba dunkaanidaso simmidi omars heen aqides.
Joshua6:12 Wonteththa gallas Iyaasoy wonttatti dendides; qeesetikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida.
Joshua6:13 Laappun zayeta oykkida laappun qeeseti sinththe aadhdhidi zayishe GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaappe sinththe sinththe bishe zayeza qanxxoy baynda punnida; olas giigidayti isttafe sinththara bishin guyera naagiza olanchchatikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa kaalli beettes; he wode qeeseti qanxxoy baynda zaye zayeettes.
Joshua6:14 Nam7anththo gallas katamaa issito yuuyi aadhdhidi ba dunkaanidaso simmida; usuppun gallas gakkanaas hessaththoka ooththida.
Joshua6:15 Laappunththa gallas bazzoy zo7ishin dendidi kaseyssaththoka katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhida; he gallas xalla katamayo laappunto yuuyi aadhdhida.
Joshua6:16 Laappunththo yuuyishe qeeseti zayeta punnishin Iyaasoy deraa
Joshua6:17 Katamayanne katamay giddon diza ubbay GODAAS dumma gidida gishshas izo mulera dhayssite; nuni biittayo wochchanaas kiittida asata qotta ashshida gishshas layma maccas Era7aabanne izi soon izira issife diza asi xalla attana.
Joshua6:18 Gido attiin intte GODAAS dummatidayssafe aykkoka ekkontta mala intte hu7es naagettite; intte histtontta aggiko Isra7eeleti dunkaanidaso iitas aaththi immana; histtidi he sohoza bolla meto gaththana.
Joshua6:19 Biraynne worqqay wuri qasse xarqimalappenne biratappe oosettida miishshati ubbay GODAAS dumma gidida gishshas GODAA minjja keeth gelo» gides.
Joshua6:20 Hessa gishshas zayey punettiin asay waassides; zayezi punettishin derezi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi waassiin katamaa dirsay laalettides; hessafe guye asay wuri sitti giidi gede katamayo gelides.
Joshua6:21 Katamaan shemppora paxa dizayta ubbaa oykkidi macca
Joshua6:22 Iyaasoy biittaa wochchanaas kiitettida nam7u asata
Joshua6:23 Hessa gishshas biittaa wochchida asati biidi Era7aabo
Joshua6:24 Hessafe guye katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa taman xuuggida; gido attiin biranne worqqa
Joshua6:25 Qasse Iyaasoy layma maccas Era7aabo izi aawa soo asaanne izira diza dabbota ubbaa ashshides; gaasoykka Iyaasoy Iyarkko katamayo wochchanaas kiitettida asata iza kase qottada ashshida gishshassa; izi zareti hach gakkanaas Isra7eele biittan deettes.
Joshua6:26 He wode Iyaasoy
Joshua6:27 Ha ubbaan GODAY Iyaasora gidides; Iyaaso goobateththa worey biitta ubbaa gakkides.
Joshua7:1 Isra7eele asay GODAAS ammanettontta ixxidi piila miish ekkides; hessa ekkiday Akaane; Akaaney Karme naa; Karmey Zimire naa; Zimirey Yuhuda qommofe Zaraahe naa; histtiin GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides.

Joshua7:4 Histtiin 3

Joshua7:6 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy ba may7o daakkides; histtidi GODAA Taabotaa sinththan omars gakkanaas gufannides. Isra7eele cimatikka hessa mala hanida; ba hu7enkka gudulla makkida.
Joshua7:7 Histtiin Iyaasoy
Joshua7:8 Abeet Godawu! Isra7eele asay xoonettidi ba morkketa sinththafe baqatidayssa tani ay goo?
Joshua7:9 Kanaane asaynne ha biittan diza hara asay wuri ha yo7oza siyidi nuna dooddana; biitta bollafe nu sunth dhayssana; histtiin ne gita sunththaa gishshas gaada ne ay ooththanee?» gides.
Joshua7:10 GODAY Iyaaso
Joshua7:11 Isra7eele asay nagara ooththides; tani isttara caaqettida ta caaqoza menththides; istti piila miishshatappe ekkida; kaysotida; wordotida; qasse bantti ekkidayssa bantta miishshara walakkida.
Joshua7:12 Isra7eele asay bantta morkketara eqettanaas dandayonttay hessa gaasonna; istti dhayos aadhdhi imettida gishshas bantta morkketa sinththafe guye simmi baqatida; piila miish intte giddofe intte dhayssontta aggiko hayssafe guye tani inttenara gidikke.
Joshua7:13 «Denda! Asaa geeshsha; isttas
Joshua7:14 Wonto mallado intte qommon qommon shiiqite; GODAY shaakkidayssi
Joshua7:15 Hessafe guye piila miishshi iza achchan beettidaadeynne izas diza ubbay taman xuugettana. Gaasoykka GODAA Caaqo Qaalaa laallidi Isra7eele giddon yeellachchiza ooso ooththida gishshassa› ga» gides.
Joshua7:16 Iyaasoy wonteththa gallas wonttara dendidi Isra7eele asay ba qommon qommon shiiqana mala ooththides; hessafe guye Yuhuda qommoy shaakettides.
Joshua7:17 Yuhuda qommoy shiiqiin
Joshua7:18 Zimire soo asay shiiqiin
Joshua7:19 Histtiin Iyaasoy Akaane
Joshua7:20 Akaaneykka Iyaasos
Joshua7:21 Di7etti yida miishshaa giddofe tani issi lo7iza Sana7oore kaabba
Joshua7:22 Histtiin Iyaasoy as kiittides; istti iza dunkaanekko woxxi biidi birazi garsara hiixetti hankko miishshatara moogettidayssa demmida.
Joshua7:23 Kiitetti bida asati miishshaa dunkaaneza giddofe ekkidi
Joshua7:24 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay issife Zaraahes naaza naa Karme naa Akaane
Joshua7:25 Iyaasoy Akaane
Joshua7:26 Istti Akaane bollan hach gakkanaas diza daro shuch korida. Hessafe guye GODAY yashissiza ba hanqoza zaarides; hessa gishshas hach gakkanaas he sohoy Akoore zulle geetettees.
Joshua8:1 GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua8:2 Neni Iyarkko katamaanne iza kawoza dhayssida mala Aye katamaanne iza kawozakka dhayssana. Gido attiin bonqqida haarozanne di7ida meheza inttes ekkite. Katamaappe guye baggara zamadi naagiza olanchchata woththa» gides.
Joshua8:3 Histtiin Iyaasoynne olanchchati ubbay Aye olanaas dendida. Iyaasoy ba olanchchata giddofe 30
Joshua8:4 Iyaasoy isttas
Joshua8:5 Taninne tanara diza asa ubbay katamaykko shiiqana; he wode Aye katama asay kaseyssaththoka nunara olettana giidi nuukko kezishin nuni isttafe baqatana.
Joshua8:6 Katamaappe istti ubbay kezana gakkanaas nuni istta sinththafe baqatana; histtida mala isttas
Joshua8:7 He wode intte qotettidasoppe kezidi katamayo oykkandeta; GODAA intte Xoossay katamayo inttes aaththi immana.
Joshua8:8 Katamayo oykkidaappe guye GODAY azazida mala taman xuuggite; be7ite tani inttena azazadis» gides.
Joshua8:9 Histtidi Iyaasoy olanchchata yeddides; istti biidi Aye katamappe arshey wullizaso baggara diza Beetelessinne Ayes giddon zamadi naagida; gido attiin Iyaasoy he gallassa omars asaara issife aqides.
Joshua8:10 Iyaasoy wonteththa gallas wonttara dendidi olanchchata ubbaa shiishshides; izinne Isra7eele gadawati ola asaa kaaleththidi Aye bida.
Joshua8:11 Izara diza olanchchati ubbay katamays sinth bi matida; hessafe guye qasse Aye katamaappe pudeha baggara diza shoobbaafe he pinththan dunkaanida.
Joshua8:12 Iyaasoy 5
Joshua8:13 Katamayppe pudeha baggara diza olanchchatanne katamayppe arshey wulliza baggara zamadi uttida olanchchata ubbaa soho soho oyththides. He gallassa omars Iyaasoy duge shoobbaa wodhdhides.
Joshua8:14 Aye dere kawoy hessa be7idi izinne iza olanchchati ubbay Isra7eele asaa olanaas Arabeppe sinththa baggara dizasoho yida. Gido attiin kawozi katamayppe guye baggara zamadi naagizayti dizayssa eribeenna.
Joshua8:15 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay xoonettidaa misatidi bazzo simmi baqatida.
Joshua8:16 Aye asay ubbay istta yedeththanaas xeygettida; Iyaasokka yedeththida; hessaththo ooththidi Aye asay katamaappe haakkana mala ooththida.
Joshua8:17 Isra7eele asaa yedeththanaas Ayeppenne Beeteleppe kezontta attida attumasi deenna; katamayo doya yeggidi Isra7eele yedeththida.
Joshua8:18 Hessafe guye GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua8:19 Iyaasoy tooraa hee zaari mallida mala kase zamadi uttida olanchchati bantti qotettidasoppe eeson kezida. Woxxi gelidi oykkida; heerakka izo taman xuuggida.
Joshua8:20 Aye asay guye simmidi xeellishin katamayppe cuway salo kezizayssa be7ida. Bazzo baqatida Isra7eele asay istta bolla haa simmi wodhdhida gishshas isttas bizasoy dhaydes.
Joshua8:21 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay zamadi uttida olanchchati katamaa oykkidayssanne cuway salo kezidayssa be7ida mala guye simmidi Aye asaa bolla meto yeggida.
Joshua8:22 Zamadi uttida olanchchatikka katamayppe istta bolla kezida. Hessa gishshas Isra7eele olanchchati istta yaara haara giddoththidi dippi histtida; issi asikka attibeenna.
Joshua8:23 Gido attiin Aye kawo xalla shemppora paxa oykkidi Iyaasokko ehida.
Joshua8:24 Isra7eele asay Aye attuma asaa ubbaa yedeththida dembaninne bazzon issaa issaa qara mashshan wodhi wursidaappe guye simmidi katamayo biidi heen beettida as ubbaa wodhida.
Joshua8:25 He gallas Aye asay ubbay hayqqides; hayqqida asa ubbaa qooday 12
Joshua8:26 Iyaasoy Aye katamayn diza asaa mulera dhayssana gakkanaas katamaakko malli woththida tooraa duge woththibeenna.
Joshua8:27 Gido attiin GODAY Iyaaso azazida mala Isra7eele asay he katamayn diza medosatanne di7ida miishshata baas ekkida.
Joshua8:28 Iyaasoy Aye katamaa xuuggides; hach gakkanaas beettiza mala mernaas bidinththa doorenne bula kessides.
Joshua8:29 Aye dere kawo miththa bolla kaqqides; iza ahaza omars gakkanaas he miththaa bolla aggaagides; arshey wullishin Iyaasoy iza ahaa katamaa penge bolla yeggana mala azazides; iza bolla daro shuch korida; shuchchay hach gakkanaas he sohon dees.
Joshua8:30 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Eebaale zuma bolla GODAAS Isra7eele Xoossaas yarsho yarshizasoho giigsides.
Joshua8:31 GODAA aylle Musey Isra7eele asaa azazida malanne Muse Woga Maxaafaan xaafettida mala yarshizasohozi masettonttanne biratay bochchontta shuchchafe keelettides. Izan GODAAS xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshida.
Joshua8:32 Iyaasoy Musey xaafida Woga Maxaafaa Isra7eele asay xeellishin shuchcha bolla wooci xaafides.
Joshua8:33 Isra7eele asay ubbay
Joshua8:34 Hessafe guye Woga Maxaafaan xaafettida mala Iyaasoy Woga qaalaa anjjonne qanggeth ubbaa nababides.
Joshua8:35 Musey azazida ubbaafe Iyaasoy nababontta aggida issi qaalaykka deenna. Kumeththa Isra7eele deraas
Joshua9:1 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara pude gezzen diza derey
Joshua9:2 Histtidi Iyaasonne Isra7eele asaa olanaas issi bolla dendi yida.
Joshua9:3 Geba7oone asay gidikko Iyaasoy Iyarkko katamaninne Aye kataman ooththidayssa siyida wode
Joshua9:4 baleththanaas koyidi gal7a ogoronne woyne ushshu izan woththiza sikettida lukkamo haren caanida.
Joshua9:5 Asati gal7anne sikettida caamma aaththida; gal7a may7oka may7ida; melidi buuqqida shinqe oykkida.
Joshua9:6 Hessafe guye istti Iyaasoy dunkaanidaso Gelgela biidi Iyaasossinne Isra7eele asaas
Joshua9:7 Isra7eele asay Hiiwetas
Joshua9:8 Istti Iyaasos
Joshua9:9 Isttika
Joshua9:10 Qasse Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan diza Amoore kawota nam7ata
Joshua9:11 Nu dere cimatinne nu biittan diza asay ubbay nuna
Joshua9:12 «Nuni intteko yaanaas nu sooppe hayssa shinqezi ho7o dishin ekki yidos; gido attiin melidayssanne buuqqidayssa hayssa be7ite!
Joshua9:13 Hayti eessa lukkamoti nuni kunththiza wode ooraththa; gido attiin ha7i istti waani daakettidaakko be7ite! Nu haaho oge hemettida gishshas nu may7oynne caammay wurides» gida.
Joshua9:14 GODAA oychchontta Isra7eele asay istta shinqefe guuththara ekkides.
Joshua9:15 Iyaasoy istti saron de7ana mala isttara caaqettides; deraa kaaleththizaytikka he caaqoza minththanaas qaala gelida.
Joshua9:16 Isttara caaqettida heedzdzanththo gallassafe guye he asati istta dooth gididayssa Isra7eeleti siyida.
Joshua9:17 Isra7eele asay heedzdzu gallas hemettidi Geba7oone
Joshua9:18 Gidikkoka deraa kaaleththizayti GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththan caaqqida gishshas Isra7eeleti istta olibeettenna; kumeththa maabaraykka istta bolla zuuzumides.
Joshua9:19 Gido attiin deraa kaaleththizayti
Joshua9:20 Nuni isttas ooththana dandayzay isttas gelida caaqo qaalaa menththiin hanqoy nu bolla gakkontta mala istta wodhopite.
Joshua9:21 Gido attiin istti kumeththa maabaraas mith mixishenne haath duuqqishe detto» gi zaarida. Hessa gishshas maabaraa kaaleththizayti gelida qaalay naagettides.
Joshua9:22 Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata xeygidi
Joshua9:23 Hessa gishshas ha7i intte qanggettidayta; guuththati ta GODAA Keeththan mith mixizanne haath duuqqiza aylleta gidana» gides.
Joshua9:24 Istti Iyaasos
Joshua9:25 Hekko ha7i nuni ne kushen doos; nees lo7onne suure misati beettida mala nu bolla ooththa» gi zaarida.
Joshua9:26 Histtiin Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata Isra7eeleta kusheppe ashshides; isttika wodhibeettenna.
Joshua9:27 He gallas Iyaasoy Geba7oone asata Isra7eele maabaraassinne GODAY dooridasohon eqqida yarshosozas istti hach gakkanaas mith mixanaassinne haath duuqqana mala ooththides.
Joshua10:1 Iyaasoy kase Iyarkko katamaa oli dhayssidinne istta kawoza wodhida mala
Joshua10:2 Hessan izinne derezi dagammida; gaasoykka Geba7ooney kawota katama mala katamata ubbaafe gita katama; gomppay Aye katamayppe darees; izin diza asaykka mino olanchcha.
Joshua10:3 Hessa gishshas Yerusalaame kawoy Adooni-Xeedeqey
Joshua10:4 «Geba7oone katamaa asay Iyaasoranne Isra7eele asaara saro deyanaas caaqettida gishshas isttara olettanaas yiidi tana maadderketii!» gides.
Joshua10:5 Hessafe guye Amooreta kawoti ichchashati Yerusalaame kawoy
Joshua10:6 Geba7oone asay Gelgelan dunkaanida Iyaasokko kiittidi
Joshua10:7 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy ba olanchchatanne mino asata ubbaa shiishshi ekkidi Gelgelappe kezides.
Joshua10:8 GODAY Iyaaso
Joshua10:9 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Gelgelappe omarsara hemettishe aqidi istti akeekontta dishin istta bolla worajjides.
Joshua10:10 GODAY Isra7eele asaa sinththan Amooreta bolla shiro yeddides; Isra7eele asay isttafe daro asaa Geba7oonen wodhides. Isra7eele asay istta Beeti-Horoone efiza oge pudunththan kaallides; Azeeqeppe biidi Maqeeda gakkanaas yedeththi wodhida.
Joshua10:11 Beeti-Horooneppe duge Azeeqe efiza oge oykkidi istti Isra7eele asaa sinththafe baqatishin GODAY wolqqama shach saloppe istta bolla bukisides. Histtiin Isra7eele asay mashshan wodhida asaappe
Joshua10:12 GODAY Amooreta Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immida gallas Isra7eele asaa sinththan Iyaasoy GODAAS
Joshua10:13 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawoteththay ba morkketa bolla halo kessana gakkanaas arshey eqqides. Aginaykka qaaxxabeekku. Hessika Yashaare Maxaafan xaafettides; arshey salos giddo addan eqqides; issi gallas kumeth arshey wullontta pe7ides.
Joshua10:14 GODAY asa qaala siyida hessa mala gallassi hessafe kasekka guyekka hanibeenna. Tumukka GODAY Isra7eele gishshas olettides.
Joshua10:15 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele olanchchati ubbay ba dunkaanidaso Gelgela simmida.
Joshua10:16 He wode Amooreta kawoti ichchashati baqati biidi Maqeedan gongolo giddon qotettida.
Joshua10:17 Iyaasoykka ichchash kawoti Maqeedan gongolo giddon qotetti dizayssa siyides.
Joshua10:18 Iyaasoy
Joshua10:19 Intte morkketa yedeththite attiin azallofte; istta kaalli kaalli meto gaththite; istti ba katamaa bi gelontta mala diggite; hekko GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte kushen aaththi immides» gides.
Joshua10:20 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay istta mulera dippi histtida; isttafe attida guuththati kase ba diza gimbettida katamata simmi gelida.
Joshua10:21 Hessafe guye asay ubbay saron simmidi Iyaasoy dunkaani dizaso Maqeeda yides; Isra7eele asaa bolla issi qaalakka haasayda asi deenna.
Joshua10:22 Iyaasoy isttas
Joshua10:23 Isttika he ichchash kawota Yerusalaame kawo
Joshua10:24 Istti he kawota Iyaasokko ehiin Iyaasoy Isra7eele attuma asaa ubbaa baakko xeygidi banara diza ola gadawata
Joshua10:25 Iyaasoykka isttas
Joshua10:26 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy ichchash kawota wodhidi ichchash miththa bolla istta ahaa kaqqides; omarsi gakkanaas istta ahay miththa bollafe wodhdhibeenna.
Joshua10:27 Arshey wullana hanishin Iyaasoy azaziin miththaa bollafe kawota ahaa woththidi kase istti qotettida gongolozan efi yeggida. Histtidi gongoloza gita shuchchatan tuccida; he shuchchati hach gakkanaaska heen deettes.
Joshua10:28 He gallas Iyaasoy Maqeeda katama oykkides; katamayonne izi kawoza giththa mashshan siifides; izi giddon diza asaappe issinokka ashshontta dishe dippi histtides; Iyarkko kawo bolla ooththidayssaththoka Maqeeda kawo bollaka ooththides.
Joshua10:29 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Maqeedafe Libina biidi olida.
Joshua10:30 GODAY he katamayonne izi kawoza Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immides; Iyaasoy katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa issinokka ashshontta giththa mashshan dippi histtides; Iyarkko kawo bolla ooththoyssaththoka Libina kawo bollaka ooththides.
Joshua10:31 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Libinappe Laakishe bi dooddi olida.
Joshua10:32 GODAY Laakishe Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immides; Iyaasoy he katamayo nam7anththo gallassan oykkides; izi Libinan ooththoyssaththoka hanno ha katamayonne izi giddon diza ubbaa giththa mashshan siifides.
Joshua10:33 He wode Gezeere kawo Horaamey Laakishe kawo maaddanaas yides; gido attiin Iyaasoy izakka iza asaakka issino ashshontta ubbaa dippi histtides.
Joshua10:34 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Laakisheppe Egiloone biidi he katamaa dooddi oykki olida.
Joshua10:35 He gallas Egiloone oli oykkidi giththa mashshan dhayssida; kase Laakishen ooththida mala Egiloone katamaan diza asaa mulera dhayssida.
Joshua10:36 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asa ubbay Egilooneppe kezi biidi Kebroone olida.
Joshua10:37 He katamayonne katamay giddon diza miish ubbaa issinokka ashshontta giththa mashshan dippi histtida; kase Egiloonen ooththida mala hanno katamay giddon diza ubbaa mulera dippi histtida.
Joshua10:38 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay guye simmidi Dabire olida.
Joshua10:39 Katamayonne izi kawoza
Joshua10:40 Hessaththoka Iyaasoy zumbullati dariza biittaa
Joshua10:41 Iyaasoy istta Qaadeese Barineppe biidi Gaaza gakkanaas
Joshua10:42 Iyaasoy issito ola kezidi he kawotanne istta biitta ubbaa xoonides. Hessika haniday GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay ba deraas olettida gishshassa.
Joshua10:43 Hessafe guye Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay ubbay ba dunkaanidaso Gelgela simmides.
Joshua11:1 Haxoore kawo Yaabiney Isra7eele asay xoonidayssa siyida wode
Joshua11:2 Hessaththoka pudeha baggara shaara menththon diza kawotas
Joshua11:3 Qasse arshey keziza baggaranne wulliza baggara diza Kanaanetas
Joshua11:4 Histtiin istti ba olanchchata ubbaa denththidi daro paratanne para-gaareta issife Isra7eele olanaas ekki yida. Isttas qooday abba doonan diza ancco mala cora.
Joshua11:5 He kawoti wuri issife ba wolqqa minththidi Isra7eele olanaas Meroome haaththaa matan dunkaanida.
Joshua11:6 GODAY Iyaasos
Joshua11:7 Histtiin Iyaasoynne iza olanchchati ubbay istti qoppontta dishin Meroome haaththaa matan istta bolla puttu giidi istta olida.
Joshua11:8 GODAY istta Isra7eeleta kushen aaththi immides; histtiin Isra7eeleti istta xoonidi gita Sidoona biitta efiza ogera
Joshua11:9 Iyaasoy GODAY iza azazidayssa ubbaa istta bolla polides; istta paratakka gildaydes; istta para-gaaretakka taman xuuggides.
Joshua11:10 He wode Iyaasoy guye simmidi Haxoore katamaa oykkides; he katamaa kawozakka giththa mashshan siifides; Haxoore katamaas he wode diza kawoteththata ubbaa bolla alaafeteththi dees.
Joshua11:11 He katamaan diza asaa ubbaa giththa mashshan siifida; shemppora paxa diza ubbaa issinokka ashshontta wodhida; katamayokka taman xuuggida.
Joshua11:12 GODAA aylle Musey azazida mala Iyaasoy he katamatanne istta kawota ubbaa dhayssides; giththa mashshankka siifides.
Joshua11:13 Gidikkoka Iyaasoy Haxoore katamaa xuuggoyssafe attiin Isra7eele asay zumata bolla keexettida katamata xuuggibeenna.
Joshua11:14 Isra7eele asay he katamatappe bonqqida miish ubbaanne mehe ubbaa banttas ekkida; gido attiin asaa giththa mashshan dhayssida; shemppora paxa dizaa issinokka ashshibeettenna.
Joshua11:15 GODAY ba aylle Muse azazida mala Museykka Iyaaso azazides. Histtiin Iyaasoykka azazoza polides; GODAY Muses azazida ubbaafe izi ooththontta aggida ay miishshika deenna.
Joshua11:16 Hessaththo histtidi Iyaasoy he biitta ubbaa gezze biitta
Joshua11:17 Hessika Seyre gakkanaas diza Halaaqe zumaappe biidi Hermoone zumaappe dan7e baggara Libaanoose zullen Ba7aali-Gaade gakkanaas diza biitta ubbaa gakkides. Istta kawotakka ubbaa oykkidi wodhides.
Joshua11:18 Iyaasoy daro wode he kawota ubbaara olettishe gam7ides.
Joshua11:19 Geba7oonen diza Hiiwetappe attiin hara katamay issoynne Isra7eeletara saroteththan de7ana caaqettibeenna; Isra7eeleti ubbatakka oli oykkida.
Joshua11:20 GODAY Muse azazida mala Iyaasoy isttas qadhettontta ubbaa wodhides. Gaasoykka istti Isra7eeletara olettana mala GODAY istta wozina dammisides.
Joshua11:21 He wode Iyaasoy biidi
Joshua11:22 Isttafe guuththati xalla Gaazan
Joshua11:23 GODAY Muse azazida mala Iyaasoy biitta ubbaa oykkides; histtidi Isra7eele asaas istta qommon qommon shaakki immides; hessafe guye biittay olappe shempides.
Joshua12:1 Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafaappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Arabe biitta ubbaa oykkidi Arnoone zullera biidi Hermoone zumaa gakkanaas diza he dere kawota xoonidi woththi ekkides. He xoonettida kawoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta.
Joshua12:2 Haseboone katamaan uttidi ayssiza Amooreta kawoy Sihoone. Izi Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere zullera kanththi biidi Amooneta zawaa Yaabooqe shaafaa gakkanaas haarides; hessi Gala7aade biittaafe baggaa gujji ekkees.
Joshua12:3 Qasseka arshey mokkiza baggara Yordaanoose shoobbafe biidi Galila abbaa gakkanaas
Joshua12:4 Astarooteninne Edira7en uttidi haariza Erafayme zereththatappe wurseththa bolla kawotidayta Baasaane kawo Aage.
Joshua12:5 Izi Hermoone zumaa
Joshua12:6 GODAA ashkara Museynne Isra7eele asay ha kawota xoonida; histtidi GODAA aylle Musey istta biittaa Oroobeele qommotas
Joshua12:7 Iyaasoynne Isra7eele asay Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggan diza kawota ubbaa xoonida. Heyti haariza zaway Libaanoose shoobban diza Ba7aali-Gaadeppe doommidi Seyren Halaaqe zumaa gakkees; Iyaasoy he biittata shaakkidi Isra7eele qommotas xinxxo histti immides.
Joshua12:8 He biittati
Joshua12:9 Isra7eele asay xoonida kawoti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Iyarkko kawo
Joshua12:10 Yerusalaame kawo
Joshua12:11 Yarmuute kawo
Joshua12:12 Egiloone kawo
Joshua12:13 Dabire kawo
Joshua12:14 Horma kawo
Joshua12:15 Libina kawo
Joshua12:16 Maqeeda kawo
Joshua12:17 Taaphphuhe kawo
Joshua12:18 Afeeqe kawo
Joshua12:19 Meedoone kawo
Joshua12:20 Shimiroone-Miroone kawo
Joshua12:21 Ta7inaake kawo
Joshua12:22 Qaadeese kawo
Joshua12:23 Zumbullata bolla diza Doore kawo
Joshua12:24 Tirxxa kawo. Heyti issi bolla 31 kawota.
Joshua13:1 Iyaasoy cimmiin izas layththay keehi bida wode GODAY
Joshua13:2 Buro oykettibeenna biittati hayta; Filisxeemeta biittanne Geeshureta biitta ubbata
Joshua13:3 Gibxeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Shihoore shaafaappe doommidi
Joshua13:4 Dugeha baggara Kanaaneta biittay wuri
Joshua13:5 Gebaaleta biitta
Joshua13:6 «Libaanooseppe biidi Masirafoote-Mayman diza gezze deren Sidoonata biittayka oykettibeenna. Tani ta hu7es Isra7eele asaa sinththafe istta goodda kessana. Tani nena azazida mala neni ha biittata Isra7eele asaas xinxxo histta shaakka.
Joshua13:7 Neni ha biittaa uddufun qommotassinne Minaase qommotappe baggaytas gisha» gides.
Joshua13:8 Minaase qommotappe baggati
Joshua13:9 Istta biittay Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere katamappe doommidi he shoobbaa giddon diza katamaa oykkidi Medeba geetettiza gezze dere kanththi biidi Diboone gakkees.
Joshua13:10 Qasse Haseboonen uttidi Amooneta zawa gakkanaas haarida Amooreta kawo Sihoone katamata ubbaa gaththi oykkees.
Joshua13:11 Hessaththoka Gala7aade biitta
Joshua13:12 Hessika Astaroote katamaninne Edira7e katamaan dishe haarida Aage kawoteththaa ubbaa oykkees; Aagey wurshe attida Erafayme zaretappe issaa. Musey he asaa xooni gooddidi istta biittaa oykkides.
Joshua13:13 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay Geeshure asaanne Ma7ikate asaa kessi gooddontta aggida gishshas istti hach gakkanaas Isra7eele asaa giddon deettes.
Joshua13:14 Musey Lewe qommotas xinxxo immibeenna; GODAY Muses gida mala
Joshua13:15 Musey Oroobeele qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa.
Joshua13:16 Istta zaway Arnoone shoobbaa lanqen diza Aaro7eere katamaappenne he shoobbaa giddon diza katamaa oykkidi
Joshua13:17 Haseboonenne gezze deren diza katamata ubbaa
Joshua13:18 Yahaaxe
Joshua13:19 Qiriyaatayme
Joshua13:20 Beeti-Pe7oore
Joshua13:21 Hessika gezze biittan diza katamata ubbaanne Haseboone katamaan uttidi haarida Amooreta kawo Sihoone biitta ubbaa oykkees. Musey kawo Sihoonenne he biittan diza daannata
Joshua13:22 Isra7eele asay olan wodhida asaappe hara
Joshua13:23 Oroobeele qommota zaway Yordaanoose shaafa. Oroobeele qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida katamatinne gutati heyta.
Joshua13:24 Musey Gaade qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa.
Joshua13:25 Istta zaway Iyaazeere
Joshua13:26 Hasebooneppe biidi Eramoote-Mixiphphanne Bexoniime
Joshua13:27 arshey mokkiza baggara diza Yordaanoose shoobbaas giddon Haseboone kawo Sihoone kawoteththafe attidayta
Joshua13:28 Gaade qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida katamatinne gutati heyta.
Joshua13:29 Musey Minaase qommotappe baggaytas istta zarkken zarkken gishereththi immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa.
Joshua13:30 Istta zaway Mahanaymeppe doommidi Baasaane biitta ubbaa gujjidi Baasaanen diza 60 Ya7ire katamata ubbaa ekkidi Baasaane kawo Aagey haarizaso ubbaa gidishin
Joshua13:31 Gala7aadeppe baggaanne Baasaanen Aage kawoteththaas waanna katamata Astarootenne Edira7e gakkees. Heyti Minaase naa Maakire zaretas imettidayta gidishin heytikka Maakire naytappe baggaytas istta zarkken zarkken imettidayta.
Joshua13:32 Yordaanooseppe he pinththan
Joshua13:33 Gido attiin Musey Lewe qommotas xinxxo immibeenna; kase GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay isttas yootida mala izi istta xinxxo.
Joshua14:1 Qeese El7ezeerey
Joshua14:2 GODAY Muse baggara azazida mala istti gishetti ekkida biittay uddufun qommotassinne baggaytas saaman gakkides.
Joshua14:3 Musey nam7u qommotassinne baggatas Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan arshey mokkiza baggara diza gadeza isttas xinxxo histti immides; gido attiin Lewe qommotas istta giddon xinxxo immibeenna.
Joshua14:4 Yooseefe nayti Minaasenne Efreeme geetettidi nam7u zarkke gidida. Musey Lewe qommotas laata biitta immibeenna; gido attiin Lewe qommotas istti diza katamatanne istti ba mehenne dorsa heemmizasoho xalla attiin hara gadey isttas imettibeenna.
Joshua14:5 Hessa gishshas GODAY Muse azazida mala Isra7eele asay biittaa gishetti ekkida.
Joshua14:6 Issi gallas Yuhuda asay Iyaasokko Gelgela shiiqides; isttafe Qenaaze dere as Yoofine naa Kaalebey Iyaasos
Joshua14:7 GODAA aylle Musey biittayo wochchada yaana mala Qaadeese Barineppe tana kiittiza wode taas layththay 40. He wode tani izas ammanththiza yo7o ekka yadis.
Joshua14:8 Tanara bida asati deraa wozina hirgan kunththida; tani gidikko GODAA ta Xoossaa kumeththa wozinappe kaalladis.
Joshua14:9 He gallas Musey
Joshua14:10 «GODAY ha yo7oza Muses yootoosoppe doommidi Isra7eele asay bazzo biittan toylattishin tana 45 layth naagidi shemppora paxa woththides; ha7i ta layththay 85 gidides.
Joshua14:11 Gidikkoka ha7i taas diza minoteththay beni Musey tana kiittiza wode diza minoteththaa mala. Taas ha7ikka olettana baanaas beni wolqqaynne minoteththi dees.
Joshua14:12 Hessa gishshas GODAY taas immana gida ha gezze biittaa ha7i taas imma. He wode Enaaqeti he biittaan dizayssanne istta katamatikka gitanne gimbettidayta gididayssa ne siyadasa; gido attiin GODAY tanara gidikko izi gida mala tani istta he biittafe yedeththana» gides.
Joshua14:13 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Yoofine naa Kaalebe anjjidi Kebroone izas xinxxo histti immides.
Joshua14:14 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa izi kumeththa wozinappe kaallida gishshas he gallassafe doommidi Kebrooney Qenaaze dere as Yoofine naa Kaalebes xinxxo gidides.
Joshua14:15 Kebrooney kase Enaaqeta ubbaafe bayra gidida Arba7e sunththan Qiriyaate-Arba7e geetetta xeygettadus. Hessafe guye he biittaya olappe shempadus.
Joshua15:1 Yuhuda qommotas istta zarkken zarkken saama yeggiin gakkida gadey biidi Eedoomera zawatidi
Joshua15:2 Dugeha baggara istta zaway Maxine abbaas dugeha bagga xeerappe doommees.
Joshua15:3 Akirabime purdera kanththidi
Joshua15:4 Aximoonera kanththi biidi haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafan gakkidi Mediteraane abban zawatees. Dugeha baggara diza Yuhuda zaway hayssa.
Joshua15:5 Arshey mokkizaso baggara diza zaway Maxine abba gidishin hessika Yordaanoose shaafay izan bi gelizaso gakkees. Pudeha baggara diza zaway Yordaanoose shaafay Maxine abban gelizasoppe doommidi
Joshua15:6 pude Beeti-Hoogile kezidi Yordaanoose shoobbafe ganna baggara kanththidi Oroobeele naa Bohaane shuchchaan zawatees.
Joshua15:7 Histtidi zawazi Akoore shoobbafe Dabire katama pude kezidi
Joshua15:8 Hessafe Henoome naa shoobbara kanththi biidi Yaabuseta katama Yerusalaamey dizaso dugeha baggara kanththidi Erafayme shoobbaas pudeha bagga xeerara kanththi biidi Henoome shoobbaas arshey wulliza baggara diza zumbulla xeera gakkees.
Joshua15:9 Heeppeka zumbullaa xeerappe doommidi Nefto pulttotara kanththidi Efroone deren diza katamatakko gakkees. Hessafe qasse duge Ba7aala woykko Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettiza katamaakko wodhdhees;
Joshua15:10 Ba7aalappe arshey wulliza baggara diza Seyre zumaakko mirqqettidi Kisaloone geetetti xeygettiza Yi7aarime zumbullas pudeha baggara diza dugunththaara duge Beeti-Shemishe wodhdhidi Temina pinnees.
Joshua15:11 Qasse Aqaroones pudeha baggara diza dugunththaara kanththidi Shikaroonekko mirqqettidi Ba7aala zuma bollara aadhdhi biidi Yaabin7eele gakkees; hessafe guye zaway biidi abbaan eqqees.
Joshua15:12 Arshey wulliza baggara diza zaway Mediteraane abbaa gaxa gakkees. Yuhuda qommoti ba zarkken zarkken ekkida zawati haytantta.
Joshua15:13 GODAY iza azazida mala Iyaasoy Yuhuda gishaappe shaakkidi Kebroone geetettizaaro Qiriyaate-Arba7e Yoofine naa Kaalebes immides; Arba7ey Enaaqe Aawa.
Joshua15:14 Kaalebeykka Enaaqe zare heedzdzata
Joshua15:15 Hessafe guye Dabire dere bolla olas dendides; Dabire katamay kase Qiriyaate-Sefere geetettawus.
Joshua15:16 Kaalebey
Joshua15:17 Hessa gishshas Kaalebe isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley he katamaa olidi oykkides; histtiin Kaalebey ba nayo izas machcho immides.
Joshua15:18 Akisay Otin7eele gelidaappe guye izi aaway izis gade immana mala ba aawaa woossana mala ba azinaas minththa yootadus; iza hareza bollafe wodhdhiin Kaalebey izo
Joshua15:19 Izakka zaarada
Joshua15:20 Yuhuda qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gishshas immida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa.
Joshua15:21 Negebe heeran Eedoome zawa xeeran diza dugeha baggara diza Yuhuda qommota katamati Qabxi7eele
Joshua15:22 Qiina
Joshua15:23 Qaadeese
Joshua15:24 Ziife
Joshua15:25 Haxoore-Hadaata
Joshua15:26 Amaame
Joshua15:27 Haxaare-Gaada
Joshua15:28 Haxaare-Shu7aale
Joshua15:29 Ba7aala
Joshua15:30 Elttolaade
Joshua15:31 Xigilaage
Joshua15:32 Lebawoote
Joshua15:33 Arshey wulliza baggara zumbullata tohosora dizayti Eshtta7oole
Joshua15:34 Zaanohe
Joshua15:35 Yarmuute
Joshua15:36 Shaa7irayme
Joshua15:37 Qasse Xinaane
Joshua15:38 Dil7aane
Joshua15:39 Laakishe
Joshua15:40 Kaboone
Joshua15:41 Gaderoote
Joshua15:42 Qasse Libina
Joshua15:43 Yoftahe
Joshua15:44 Qi7ila
Joshua15:45 Aqarooney ba heeran diza gutatara
Joshua15:46 hessaththoka Aqarooneppe arshey wulliza baggara diza Ashdoode gakkanaas
Joshua15:47 qasse Ashdoodey ba heeran diza gutataranne Gaazappe biidi haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafa gakkanaassinne Mediteraane gaxappe haa simmiin diza katamatanne gutata.
Joshua15:48 Zumbullata bolla diza katamatikka Shamire
Joshua15:49 Daanna
Joshua15:50 Anaabe
Joshua15:51 Gooshene
Joshua15:52 Qasse Arabe
Joshua15:53 Yaanime
Joshua15:54 Humixa

Joshua15:56 Izra7eele
Joshua15:57 Qayne
Joshua15:58 Qasse Halihuule
Joshua15:59 Maarate
Joshua15:60 Hessaththoka Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettidaara Qiriyaate-Ba7aalenne Eraaba; heyti nam7ati istta katamatanne istta gutata.
Joshua15:61 Bazzon dizayti hayssafe kaallizayta; Beeti-Arabe
Joshua15:62 Nibishaane
Joshua15:63 Gido attiin Yuhuda asay Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuseta istti dizasoppe kessi gooddana dandaybeettenna; hessa gishshas Yaabuseti hach gakkanaaska Yuhuda asaara issife Yerusalaamen deettes.
Joshua16:1 Yooseefe zareta gakkida biittay Iyarkko matan Yordaanoose shaafappe doommidi Iyarkko pulttotappe arshey mokkiza baggara bazzo kanththidi gezzetiza biittara aadhdhidi Beetele gakkees.
Joshua16:2 Looza geetettiza Beeteleppe dendidi Axaroote geetettiza Arkketa biitta gakkees.
Joshua16:3 Hessafe arshey wulliza baggara diza Yaafaleexeta biitta dugunththaa duge Beeti-Horoone wodhdhidi Gezeerera kanththi biidi gita Abban gelees.
Joshua16:4 Yooseefe qommo Minaase zaretinne Efreeme zareti banttana gakkiza biittaa laattida.
Joshua16:5 Efreeme zareta istta zarkken zarkken gakkida biittay hayssafe kaallizayssa; istta zaway arshey mokkiza baggara diza Axaroote-Adaareppe biidi ganna Beeti-Horoone gakkees.
Joshua16:6 Heeppe biidi wogga abbaan gelees. Qasse pudeha baggara diza zaway Mikimaataateppe arshey mokkizaso bagga Taanate-Shiilora mirqqetti simmidi
Joshua16:7 Yaanookeppe duge Axarootenne Naarate dugunththaa wodhdhidi Iyarkkora kanththi biidi Yordaanoose shaafaan gelees.
Joshua16:8 Zawazi Taaphphuheppe arshey wulliza baggara biidi Qaana shaafara wodhdhi biidi Mediteraane abban gelees. Efreeme zareti ba zarkken zarkken laattida biittay hayssa.
Joshua16:9 Hessi Minaase zareta biittafe Efreeme zaretas immida katamatanne istta gutata ubbaa gaththi oykkides.
Joshua16:10 Hayssi ubbay haniinkka Efreeme zareti Gezeere katamaan diza Kanaane asata kessi gooddibeettenna. Kanaane asati hach gakkanaas Efreeme zaretara issife deettes. Gido attiin Efreeme zareti istta wolqqara oosiseettes.
Joshua17:1 Minaasey Yooseefes bayra naa gidida gishshas iza zareta saaman gakkida biittay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; Minaases bayra naazi Maakirey Gala7aadeta aaway mino olanchcha gidida gishshas Gala7aadeynne Baasaaney izas gisha gidides.
Joshua17:2 Hessa gishshas he biittazi hankko attida Minaase zaretas Abi7eezeres
Joshua17:3 Xilofaadey Hefeere naa; Hefeerey Gala7aade naa; Gala7aadey Maakire naa; Maakirey Minaase naa. Xilofaades macca naytappe attiin attuma nay deenna; iza macca nayti Mahilo
Joshua17:4 Istta qeese El7ezeerekko
Joshua17:5 Minaases Gala7aadeppenne Baasaaneppe harason tammu kezi gishettiza biittay Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara dees.
Joshua17:6 Minaase zaretappe macca naytikka attuma naytara issife biittaa gishetti ekkida gishshas Gala7aade biittay attida Minaase zaretas gidides.
Joshua17:7 Minaase zareta biittaa zaway Aaseere biittafe doommidi
Joshua17:8 Taaphphuhe biittay Minaasessa; gido attiin Minaase zawan diza Taaphphuhe katamaya kase Efreeme zaretassa.
Joshua17:9 Hessafe kaallidi iza zaway biidi Qaana shaafaan gelees. Minaase katamata giddon Efreeme katamatikka deettes; Gido attiin Minaase zaway Qaana shaafappe pudeha baggara biidi Mediteraane abban gelees.
Joshua17:10 Dugeha baggara diza biittay Efreemessa; pudeha baggara diza biittay qasse Minaasessa. Minaase biitta zaway biidi Mediteraane abbaa gakkees; pudeha bagga zaway Aaseere gakkees; arshey mokkiza baggara diza zaway Yisakoore gakkees.
Joshua17:11 Yisakoore biittaninne Aaseere biittan Beeti-Sha7aaney
Joshua17:12 Gido attiin Minaase zareti he katamata xooni oykkana dandaybeettenna. Gaasoykka Kanaane asay ba oykkida biittaa yeddoko gi murttida gishshassa.
Joshua17:13 Isra7eele asay minnida wode Kanaane asata banttas haggazissida attiin biittaafe istta ubbaa kessi gooddibeettenna.
Joshua17:14 Yooseefe zareti Iyaaso
Joshua17:15 Iyaasoykka isttas
Joshua17:16 Yooseefe zareti
Joshua17:17 Iyaasoy zaaridi Yooseefe zaretas Efreeme qommotassinne Minaase qommotas
Joshua17:18 Hessa gishshas gezze biittayka inttessa; biidi qeexite; wurseththa gaxa gakkanaas dizayssi inttes gidana; Kanaanetas birata para-gaareti diikkoka
Joshua18:1 Isra7eele maabaray wuri Seelon shiiqida; Gaytoteththa Dunkaane heen tokkida; biittayakka co7u gaada isttas haarettadus.
Joshua18:2 Gido attiin Isra7eele asaappe gade gishay gakkontta attida laappun qommoti deettes.
Joshua18:3 Hessa gishshas Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa
Joshua18:4 Issi issi qommofe heedzdzu heedzdzu asata doorite. Biittaa yuuyi xeellidi issi issi qommo gakkanayssa taas xaafi immanayta ta kiittana; isttika taakko haa simmi yaana.
Joshua18:5 Istti he biittayo laappun kessi shaakkana. Dugeha baggara Yuhuday
Joshua18:6 Ha laappun kezi shaakettida biittaa hanota xaafidaappe guye taakko ekki yiikko tani GODAA nu Xoossaa sinththan inttes saama yeggana.
Joshua18:7 Lewe zareti Xoossas ooththiza oosoy isttas xinxxo gidida gishshas inttenara istti biitta gishettettenna. Gaade zareti
Joshua18:8 Asay biittaa hanota pilggi xeellanaassinne xaafanaas buus doommishin Iyaasoy
Joshua18:9 Hessa gishshas asay biittaa yuuyi xeellides; katamatara issife laappun kessi shaakkidi xaaththa waraqatan xaafida; hessafe gede Iyaasokko Seelo simmi bida.
Joshua18:10 Iyaasoy GODAA sinththan Seelon isttas saama yeggides; biittayo Isra7eele asaas istta qommo keena gishechchi immides.
Joshua18:11 Koyro gishay Biniyaame qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Saaman istta gakkida biittay dizasoy Yuhuda zareta biittafenne Yooseefe zareta biittafe giddon gidishin hayssafe kaallizayssa;
Joshua18:12 Pudeha baggara istta zaway Yordaanoose shaafappe doommidi
Joshua18:13 Hessafe dugeha baggara Looza geetettiza Beetele pudunththaara kanththidi duge baggara diza Beeti-Horooneppe dugeha baggara diza zumaa achchara kanththi biidi duge Axaroote-Adaare gakkees.
Joshua18:14 Dugeha baggara diza zaway Beeti-Horoones sinththa baggara diza zumbullaafe doommidi
Joshua18:15 Dugeha baggara zaway Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimeppe doommidi Nefto pultto haaththara kanththees.
Joshua18:16 He zawazi Erafayme shoobbaafe pudeha baggara diza Henoome naa shoobbaa ginara diza zumbullaa tohoso wodhdhees; heeppe Yaabuseta katamappe dugeha baggara diza dugunththaara Henoome zulle wodhdhidi En-Roogeelera kanththees.
Joshua18:17 Qasse pudeha bagga mirqqettidi En-Shemishera biidi Gelilootera kanththees; hessafe Adumime purde ginara diza Oroobeele naa Bohaane shuchchaako duge wodhdhees.
Joshua18:18 Hessafe Beeti-Arabe pudunththaara kanththidi duge Arabe wodhdhees.
Joshua18:19 Hessafe qasse Beeti-Hoogile pudunththaafe pudeha baggara kanththidi
Joshua18:20 Arshey mokkizaso baggara Yordaanoose shaafay zawa. Biniyaame zareti laattida biitta ubbaasikka zawati heytantta.
Joshua18:21 Biniyaame zareti ba zarkken zarkken ekkida katamati Iyarkko
Joshua18:22 Beeti-Arabe
Joshua18:23 Awime
Joshua18:24 Kafer-Amonaye
Joshua18:25 Qasse Geba7oone
Joshua18:26 Mixiphpha
Joshua18:27 Ereqeeme
Joshua18:28 Xela
Joshua19:1 Nam7anththo saamay Simoona qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Istta gakkida biittay Yuhuda qommoti laattida biittay istti laattida biitta giddoththi uttides.
Joshua19:2 Istti laattida katamati Bersaabehe
Joshua19:3 Haxaare-Shu7aale
Joshua19:4 Elttolaade
Joshua19:5 Xigilaage
Joshua19:6 Beeti-Laba7ootenne Sharuheene. Heyti ubbay 13 katamatanne istta yuushon diza gutata.
Joshua19:7 Qasse Ayine
Joshua19:8 Ba7alaate-Ba7eere woykko Negeben diza Aramaateeme gakkanaas diza katamata yuushon diza gutata ubbaa laattida. Simoona qommoti ba zarkken zarkken gishetti ekkida biittati heytantta.
Joshua19:9 Yuhuda qommoti oykkida xinxxoy keehi aako gidida gishshas Simoona qommotas xinxxo gidi imettides; hessa gishshas Simoona qommoti Yuhuda qommota gishaappe gishetti ekkana dandayda.
Joshua19:10 Heedzdzanththo saamay Zaabiloone qommotas istta zarkken zarkken gakkides. Istti laattida biittaa zaway Sariide gakkees.
Joshua19:11 Qasse hessafe biidi arshey wullizasora Maraala baggara kanththi bees; Dabasheete matara Yoqina7aame achchan diza shaafaan bi gelees.
Joshua19:12 Hara baggara qasse Sariide katamappe arshey mokkizaso bagga simmidi Kisiloote-Taaboorera kanththi biidi Dabiraatera gede Yaafi7a bees.
Joshua19:13 Heera gede arshey mokkiza baggara Geet-Hefeerenne Eti-Qaxine kanththi bees; heeppeka gede Armoone gakkidi Ni7a bagga mirqqettees.
Joshua19:14 Pudeha baggara Hanatoone simmidi Yiftaahi7eele shoobbaan gakki eqqees.
Joshua19:15 Qasseka Qaxaate
Joshua19:16 Hayti Zaabiloone qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata.
Joshua19:17 Oydanththo saamay Yisakoore qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides.
Joshua19:18 Istta biittati hayssafe kaallizayta; Izra7eele

Joshua19:20 Erabite
Joshua19:21 Eremeete
Joshua19:22 He biittata zaway Taaboore
Joshua19:23 Hayti Yisakoore qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata.
Joshua19:24 Ichchashanththo saamay Aaseere qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides.
Joshua19:25 Istta biittati hayssafe kaallizayta Helqaate
Joshua19:26 Alameleke
Joshua19:27 Qasse arshe kessaso bagga simmi Beeti-Daagonekko mirqqettidi
Joshua19:28 Hessafe qasse Ebiroone
Joshua19:29 Zaway Eraama simmidaappe gimbettida Xiroose katamaakko mirqqetti gede Hoosa simmidi Akiziibe baggaranne Mahileebe gede Mediteraane abbaan gakki gelees.
Joshua19:30 Heen Uma
Joshua19:31 Hayti Aaseere qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata.
Joshua19:32 Usuppunththa saamay Niftaaleme qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides.
Joshua19:33 Istta zaway Heleefeppenne Zanaanimen diza gita wolappe doommidi Adaame-Neqeebe
Joshua19:34 Zawazikka arshey wulliza baggara Azinoote-Taaboorekko mirqqettees; hessafe qasse Huqooqe simmidi dugeha baggara Zaabiloone biittaninne arshey geliza baggara Aaseere biittan zawatidi arshey keziza baggara Yordaanoose shaafan gelees.
Joshua19:35 Gimbettida katamatikka Xiidime
Joshua19:36 Adaama
Joshua19:37 Qaadeese
Joshua19:38 Yiroone
Joshua19:39 Hayti Niftaaleme qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne istta yuushon diza gutata.
Joshua19:40 Laappunththo saamay Daane qommota istta zarkken zarkken gakkides.
Joshua19:41 Istti laattida biittati Xora7a
Joshua19:42 Sha7albine
Joshua19:43 Eeloone
Joshua19:44 Elteqe
Joshua19:45 Yuhuda
Joshua19:46 Meyarqqoone
Joshua19:47 Gido attiin Daane qommotas imettida xinxxoy isttas gidontta aggida gishshas Laysha katamaa oli oykkida; he katamaan diza asaa giththa mashshan siifi wursidi katamaa baas ekkidi heen uttida. He katamaa sunththaaka laammidi ba aawaa Daane sunththan xeygida.
Joshua19:48 Hayti Daane qommotas xinxxo gididi istta zarkken zarkken gishan gakkida katamatanne gutata.
Joshua19:49 Isra7eele asay banttana gakkida biitta ekkidaappe guye Nawe naa Iyaasos bantta biittafe xinxxo gade immida;
Joshua19:50 GODAY azazida malanne Iyaasoy koyza mala Efreeme gezze deren diza Teminaate-Seraaha geetettiza katama izas immida. Izikka katamayo lo7eththidi baas duussaso ooththides.
Joshua19:51 Qeese El7ezeerey
Joshua20:1 Hessafe guye GODAY Iyaaso
Joshua20:2 «Tani Muse baggara yootida mala asi baqati attiza katamata shaakkana mala Isra7eele asaas yoota;
Joshua20:3 Ay asikka eronttanne akeekontta as wodhikko hee baqati biidi suuththa acoppe attana.
Joshua20:4 As wodhiday he katamatappe issaakko baqati biidi katama geliza pengen eqqidi
Joshua20:5 Suuth azarana koyzay iza kaallidi yiikko he katama cimati iza aaththi immofetto. Gaasoykka ba shooroza izi odi morkketeththa gishshas wodhibeenna.
Joshua20:6 Deraa sinththan pirdas izi eqqana gakkanaassinne he woden diza qeeseta halaqay hayqqana gakkanaas he katamaan de7o. Hessafe guye baqatidi kezida katama guye simmidi ba soo gelo» gides.
Joshua20:7 Histtiin Isra7eele asay Niftaaleme gezze dere
Joshua20:8 Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan
Joshua20:9 Isra7eele as ubbaassinne istta giddon diza betetas dummasida katamati hayta; erontta dishe as wodhida ay asikka deraa sinththan eqqana gakkanaas suuth azarana koyzaade kushen hayqqontta mala he katamatappe issaakko baqatanaas dandayees.
Joshua21:1 Lewe zarkketa kaaleththizayti qeese El7ezeerekko
Joshua21:2 Kanaane biittan diza Seelon isttas
Joshua21:3 Histtiin GODAY azazida mala Isra7eele asay Lewe qommotas ba laattida xinxxotappe ha katamatanne mehe heenththasohota qanxxi immida.
Joshua21:4 Koyro saamay Qa7aate zereththatas istta zarkken zarkken kezides. Qeese Aaroone zare gidida Lewetas Yuhudappe
Joshua21:5 Hankko attida Qa7aate zereththatas Efreemeppe
Joshua21:6 Gershoone zereththatas Yisakooreppe
Joshua21:7 Meraare zereththatas istta zarkken zarkken Oroobeeleppe
Joshua21:8 GODAY Muse baggara azazida mala
Joshua21:9 Yuhudappenne Simoona qommotappe hayssafe kaalli diza katamata saaman gaththida.
Joshua21:10 Koyro saamay Lewe qommo Qa7aateppe yelettida Aaroone zaretas keziin isttas imettida katamati hayssafe kaallizayta.
Joshua21:11 Heytikka Yuhuda biittan gezzetizason diza Kebroone geetettiza Qiriyaate-Arba7enne iza yuushon diza mehe heenththasohota isttas immida. (Arba7ey Enaaqe Aawaa.)
Joshua21:12 Gido attiin he katama yuushon diza mehe heenththasohotanne mooththata Yoofine naa Kaalebes xinxxo histti immida.
Joshua21:13 Qeese Aaroone zaretas as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza Kebroonenne
Joshua21:14 Yetirenne Eshttamo7a
Joshua21:15 Holoonenne Dabire
Joshua21:16 Ayine
Joshua21:17 Biniyaame qommotappe Geba7oone
Joshua21:18 Anatoote
Joshua21:19 Qeese Aaroone zereththatas mehe heenththasohora issife gaththidi 13 katamata immida.
Joshua21:20 Hankko attida Lewe naa Qa7aate zaretas Efreeme qommotappe hayssafe kaalli dizayssi saaman gakkides.
Joshua21:21 Efreeme gezze deren diza as wodhida asi baqati biidi attizaso Seekeemenne Gezeere
Joshua21:22 Qibixayme
Joshua21:23 Daane qommotappe Elteqe
Joshua21:24 Ayaaloone
Joshua21:25 Minaase qommotas baggatappe Ta7inaake
Joshua21:26 Hayti 10 katamati ubbay mehe heenththasohotara issife hankko attida Qa7aate zaretas imettides.
Joshua21:27 Minaase zareta baggatappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza
Joshua21:28 Yisakoore zaretappe Qisoone mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:29 Yarmuute mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:30 Aaseere zaretappe Mishaale mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:31 Helqaate mehe heenththasohoranne Erahoobe mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:32 Hessaththoka Niftaaleme zaretappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza Galilan diza Qaadeese mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:33 Gershoone zareta katamatinne istta meheta heenththasohoti ubbay tammanne heedzdza.
Joshua21:34 Attida Meraare zare gidida Lewetas imettida biittati Zaabiloone zaretappe Yoqina7aame mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:35 Diimina mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:36 Oroobeele zaretappe Baxiranne izi mehe heenththasohota
Joshua21:37 Qidimootenne izi mehe heenththasohota
Joshua21:38 Qasse Gaade zaretappe as wodhida asi baqati biidi attiza
Joshua21:39 Haseboone mehe heenththasohora
Joshua21:40 Meraarey zare gidida hara Lewetas gishan gakkida katamati ubbay tammanne nam7a.
Joshua21:41 Isra7eele asay laattida biittan diza Lewetas imettida katamati istta mehe heenththasohora ubbay issi bolla oyddu tammanne osppuna.
Joshua21:42 He katamata ubbaa yuushon mehe heemmizasohoti deettes. Mehe heemmizasohoy baynda katamay deenna.
Joshua21:43 Hessaththo ooththidi GODAY istta aawatas immanaas caaqqida biitta ubbaa Isra7eele asaas immides; histtiin istti laattidi heen de7ida.
Joshua21:44 GODAY istta aawatas caaqqida mala istta yuushon diza ubbatappe istta shempisides. GODAY istta morkketa ubbaa isttas aaththi immida gishshas istta morkketappe issoyka isttara eqettanaas dandaybeenna.
Joshua21:45 GODAY Isra7eele asaas immana gida lo7o qaala ubbaa polides attiin issoynne sa7an wodhdhi attibeenna.
Joshua22:1 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Oroobeele qommota
Joshua22:2 Histtidi
Joshua22:3 Daro wodeppe doommidi hach gakkanaas intte intte ishata yeggibeekketa; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hadaraa polideta.
Joshua22:4 Hekko GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaalaa mala intte ishata shempisides. Hessa gishshas GODAA ashkara Musey inttes Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan immida laata biittan diza intte soo soo simmite.
Joshua22:5 GODAA aylle Musey inttena azazida azazozanne wogaa intte naagite. GODAA intte Xoossa siiqite; iza ogeta ubbaan simerettite; iza azazota polite; izakka minththi oykkite; intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe izas ooththana mala izi immida azazotanne wogata minththi naagite» gides.
Joshua22:6 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy istta anjji yeddiin isttika bantta soo soo simmi bida.
Joshua22:7 Musey Minaase qommofe baggatas Baasaane biittan xinxxo immides; hankko attida baggatas Iyaasoy Yordaanooseppe arshey wulliza baggafe istta ishata giddon isttas xinxxo immides. Iyaasoy istta bantta soo soo simmana mala moyziza wode istta anjjishe
Joshua22:8 «Be7ite
Joshua22:9 Hessa gishshas Oroobeele qommotinne Gaade qommoti hessaththoka Minaase qommofe baggati Isra7eele asaa Kanaanen diza Seelon aggidi kase Muse baggara GODAA azazon laata ekkida xinxxon Gala7aade simmi bida.
Joshua22:10 Oroobeele qommoti
Joshua22:11 Histtiin istti Isra7eele biittan
Joshua22:12 kumeththa Isra7eele asay istta olana baanaas Seelon issife shiiqides.
Joshua22:13 Histtidi Isra7eele asay qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaase
Joshua22:14 Kumeththa Isra7eele qommota ba qommota halaqatappe issi issi as dooridi
Joshua22:15 Istti Oroobeele qommoti
Joshua22:16 «GODAA asay kumeth inttena
Joshua22:17 Pe7ooren nuni ooththida nagaray nuus gidennee? Isra7eele deraa bolla boshay wodhdhidaa gidikkoka hach gakkanaaska nuni he nagarappe geeyibookko.
Joshua22:18 Intte ha7ikka GODAA kaallizayssa aggidi guye guye geetii? « ‹Intte hach GODAA bolla makkalliko izi wonto kumeththa Isra7eele deraa hanqettana.
Joshua22:19 Intte laattida biittay tunidaa gidikko GODAA Dunkaaney eqqida GODAA biitta haa yiidi
Joshua22:20 Zaraahe naa Akaaney piila gididayssa ekkidi
Joshua22:21 Histtiin Oroobeele qommoti
Joshua22:22 «GODAY Wolqqama Xoossay! GODAY Wolqqama Xoossay! Nuni hayssa ays ooththidaakko izi erees! Nuni ays ooththidaakko intteka erana mala koyoos. Nuni hayssa ooththiday makkallateththaninne GODAAS azazeteththa ixon gidikko
Joshua22:23 Nuni GODAA kaallizayssa aggidi xuugettiza yarsho
Joshua22:24 Nuni hessaththo ooththiday sinththafe yaana intte zereththati nu zereththata
Joshua22:25 Intteno Oroobeelenne Gaade qommotoo
Joshua22:26 «Hessa gishshas
Joshua22:27 Nuni yarshosoho giigsiday xuugettiza yarsho
Joshua22:28 Istti nuna woykko nu zereththata wodeppe hessaththo giikko nuni isttas zaaridi
Joshua22:29 GODAA nu Xoossa Dunkaaneza sinththan eqqida yarsho yarshizasohoppe hara
Joshua22:30 Qeese Finihaasinne izara diza Isra7eele qommota halaqati
Joshua22:31 Qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaasi Oroobeele
Joshua22:32 Hessafe guye qeese El7ezeere naa Finihaasinne deraa kaaleththizayti Gala7aaden diza Oroobeelenne Gaade qommotara haasayettidaappe guye Kanaanen diza Isra7eele asaakko simmida; histtidi hanidayssa isttas yootida.
Joshua22:33 Isra7eele asay hessa siyidi ufayssan Xoossa galatides. Qasse Oroobeele qommotinne Gaade qommoti diza biitta oli dhayssanaas baana gidayssa aggides.
Joshua22:34 Oroobeeleynne Gaade qommoti
Joshua23:1 Daro wodes GODAY Isra7eele asaa istta yuushon diza morkketa ubbaafe shempisides. He wode Iyaasoy cimmidi keehippe wode sugides.
Joshua23:2 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa ubbaa
Joshua23:3 GODAA intte Xoossay intte gishshas ha kawoteththata bolla ooththida ubbaa miish intte intte ayfen beyideta. Intte gishshas olettiday GODAA intte Xoossaa.
Joshua23:4 Be7ite
Joshua23:5 GODAA intte Xoossay istta intte sinththafe istti dizasozappe istta yedeththana; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaala mala intte istta biitta laattana.
Joshua23:6 «Minnite! Hadirsinne ushach goopite; Muse Woga Maxaafan xaafettida ubbaa naaganaassinne ooththanaas keehippe minettite.
Joshua23:7 Hayta intte giddon attida kawoteththatara issifettofte; istta eeqa xoossata sunththa xeygopite; istta sunththan caaqqofte; isttas ooththoftenne goynnofte.
Joshua23:8 Gido attiin hach gakkanaas intte ooththida mala GODAA intte Xoossaa minththi oykkite.
Joshua23:9 «GODAY gitanne mino kawoteththata intte sinththafe gooddi kessides; hach gakkanaas oonikka inttenara eqettanaas dandaybeenna.
Joshua23:10 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida hidota qaala mala izi olettiza gishshas inttefe issi asi shii as yedeththana.
Joshua23:11 Hessa gishshas GODAA intte Xoossaa minni siiqite.
Joshua23:12 Gido attiin intte guye simmidi hankko attida inttenara diza kawoteththatara intte issifettiko
Joshua23:13 GODAA intte Xoossay hayssafe guye intte sinththafe istta kessi gooddonttayssa intte eranaas bessees; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida ha lo7o biittayfe intte dhayana gakkanaas istti inttes woximadenne yarde gidana; intte zokkos lisso
Joshua23:14 «Be7ite taas ha7i hayqo wodey gakkides; GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o hidota ubbaafe issinokka izi ashshonttayssa intte kumeththa wozinappenne kumeththa shemppofe ereeta; izi inttes immana gida hidotay pacey baynda mulera polettides.
Joshua23:15 Gido attiin GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o hidota ubbay mulera polettida mala GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida lo7o biittayfe inttena dhayssana gakkanaas iita miish intte bolla ehana.
Joshua23:16 GODAA intte Xoossay inttes immida caaqo qaala intte laallizaa gidikko
Joshua24:1 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy Isra7eele qommota ubbaa Seekeemen shiishshides. Cimata
Joshua24:2 Iyaasoy deraa ubbaas
Joshua24:3 Tani gidikko intte aawa Abrahaame Efiraaxise shaafas he pinththafe ehadis; Kanaane biittankka kaaleththadis. Iza zereththatakka darsadis; Yisaaqakka izas immadis.
Joshua24:4 Yisaaqaska Yaaqoobenne Eesawe immadis. Eesawes gezzetiza Seyre biitta xinxxo histta immadis; Yaaqoobeynne iza nayti gidikko duge Gibxe bida.
Joshua24:5 « ‹Hessafe guye Musenne Aaroone kiittadis; ta ehida boshan Gibxeta un7eththada inttena heeppe kessadis.
Joshua24:6 Tani intte aawata Gibxeppe kessiin Zo7o abbaako yideta; Gibxeti para-gaaretaninne toga asatan inttena Zo7o abbaa gakkanaas oykkana kaallida.
Joshua24:7 Intte aawati maado demmanaas taakko waassida; tani isttafenne Gibxetappe giddon dhuma yeggadis; histtada abbay istta bolla simmana malanne istta mittana mala ooththadis. Tani Gibxeta bolla ooththidayssa intte intte ayfen be7ideta. Intteka bazzon daro wode de7ideta.
Joshua24:8 « ‹Hessafe guye Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkizaso baggara diza Amooreta biitta tani inttena ehadis. Istti inttenara olettiin tani istta intte kushen aaththa immadis; tani istta intte sinththafe dhayssadis; qasse intte istta biitta laattideta.
Joshua24:9 Hessafe guye Mo7aabe biitta kawo Xipoora naa Balaaqey Isra7eele olanaas dendides; inttena yiidi doqqana mala Bi7oore naa Balaames kiita yeddides.
Joshua24:10 Tani gidikko Balaame siyana koyabeekke; hessa gishshas izi inttena zaari zaari anjjides; tanikka inttena Baalaaqe kusheppe ashshadis.
Joshua24:11 « ‹Heeppe intte Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi Iyarkko yideta; Amooreti
Joshua24:12 Inttefe sinththe kazhe kiittada isttanne Amoore kawo nam7ata intte sinththafe gooddadis. Hayssi ubbay haniday intte mashshaninne intte wondafen gidenna.
Joshua24:13 Intte daaburontta biittanne intte keexxontta katamata tani inttes immadis; hekko intte tokkontta woyne ayfenne wogara ayfe meeta› gides.
Joshua24:14 «Hessa gishshas ha7ikka GODAAS yayyite; kumeththa wozinappe ammaneteththan izas haarettite; kase intte aawati Efiraaxise shaafappe he pinththaninne Gibxe biittan goynnida eeqa xoossata inttefe haassite; GODAAS xalla goynnite.
Joshua24:15 GODAAS goynoy koshshontta miish misati inttes beettiko kase intte aawati shaafappe he pinththan dishe goynnida eeqa xoossata woykko ha7i intte diza Amooreti goynniza xoossata goynnana gidikko intte goynnanayssa hach doorite; taninne ta keeththa asay gidikko GODAAS goynnana» gides.
Joshua24:16 Histtiin asay zaaridi
Joshua24:17 Gibxe aylleteththa biittafe
Joshua24:18 Qasse GODAY he biittan diza Amooretara gujjiin deraa ubbaa nu sinththafe gooddides; hessa gishshas nuni GODAAS goynnana; izi nu Xoossa» gides.
Joshua24:19 Iyaasoykka deraas
Joshua24:20 Intte GODAA aggidi allaga xoossatas goynniko izi inttes lo7o ooththidaappe guye simmi wodhdhidi izi intte bolla iita ooththananne inttena dhayssana» gides.
Joshua24:21 Histtiin derezi Iyaaso
Joshua24:22 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy deraas
Joshua24:23 Iyaasoy
Joshua24:24 Derezikka Iyaasos
Joshua24:25 He gallas Iyaasoy dereza caaqeththides; istti kaallana wogaanne maara heen Seekeemen isttas immides.
Joshua24:26 Iyaasoy he qaalata Xoossa Woga Maxaafan xaafides. Hessafe guye issi gita shuch ekkidi Geesh gidida GODAA Dunkaaneza matan diza wola garsan essides.
Joshua24:27 Iyaasoy kumeththa deraas
Joshua24:28 Hessafe guye Iyaasoy deraa ubbaa ba xinxxon xinxxon simmana mala moyzides.
Joshua24:29 Hessafe guye GODAA aylle
Joshua24:30 Asay Ga7aashe zumaappe pudeha baggan
Joshua24:31 Iyaasoy paxa diza wode ubbaan
Joshua24:32 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe ehida Yooseefe meqeththaa Seekeemen moogida. He sohoza Yaaqoobey Seekeeme aawa Emooreppe 100 saqile biran shammides; histtiin guyeppe Yooseefe zereththatas xinxxo gidides.
Joshua24:33 Qasseka Aaroone naa El7ezeerey hayqqides; izikka shaara menththon diza Efreeme deren iza naaza Finihaase saaman gakkida Gibi7a katamaan moogettides.
Judges1:1 Iyaasoy hayqqidaappe guye Isra7eele asay
Judges1:2 Histtiin GODAY
Judges1:3 Yuhuda asay bantta dabbota gidida Simoona zareta
Judges1:4 Histtiin GODAY Kanaanetanne Paarizeta istta kushen aaththi immides; Beezeqen 10
Judges1:5 Beezeqe geetettizason Adooni-Beezeqe demmidi izara olettida; histtidi Kanaanetanne Paarizeta xoonida.
Judges1:6 Adooni-Beezeqey baqatishin gooddi oykkidi
Judges1:7 Histtiin Adooni-Beezeqey
Judges1:8 Yuhuda asay Yerusalaame oli oykkides; histtidi asaa giththa mashshan busakki wursidi katamaa taman xuuggides.
Judges1:9 Hessafe guye Yuhuda asay gezzen
Judges1:10 Histtidi kase Qiriyaate-Arba7e geetettiza Kebroone katamaan diza Kanaaneta olida; qasse Shashaye
Judges1:11 Hessafe dendidi Yuhuda asay Dabire geetettiza katamaan diza asaa olanaas bides; Dabire katamay kase
Judges1:12 Kaalebey
Judges1:13 Histtiin Kaalebes kaalo isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley he katamaa olidi oykkides; Kaalebeykka ba nayo Akisa izas immides.
Judges1:14 Akisay Otin7eele geliza wode
Judges1:15 Izakka
Judges1:16 Muse bollo Qenaaweza zereththati Yuhuda asaara Zambay dari diza Iyarkko katamappe dendida; histtidi Araade geetettiza katamaappe dugeha baggara
Judges1:17 Yuhuda asay Simoona asaara issife biidi
Judges1:18 Yuhuda asay gujjidi Gaaza
Judges1:19 GODAY Yuhuda asaara diza gishshas
Judges1:20 Musey gida malan Kebroone katamaa Kaalebes immida; histtiin Kaalebey Enaaqe zare gidida heedzdzu qommota deraappe denththi gooddides.
Judges1:21 Gido attiin Biniyaame zareti Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuse asata deraappe denththi gooddontta aggida gishshas hach gakkanaas Yaabuseti Biniyaame zaretara Yerusalaamen issife deettes.
Judges1:22 Yooseefe qommoti Beetele olanaas worajjida; GODAYKKA isttara dees;
Judges1:23 Isttika Beetele katamaa yuuyi xomosiza asata kiittida; kase he katamay sunththi Looza geetettees.
Judges1:24 Kiittiin istti katamaappe kezi biza issi addeza demmidi
Judges1:25 Histtiin izi istta bessides; hessafe guye katamaan diza asaa giththa mashshan busakkida; gido attiin he addezanne izaso asaa ubbaa shemppo ashshida.
Judges1:26 Guyeppe he addezi Hiite geetettiza dere biidi
Judges1:27 Minaase zareti
Judges1:28 Isra7eele asay minnida wode Kanaaneta baas wolqqan oosisida; gido attiin istta mulera biittafe kessi gooddibeettenna.
Judges1:29 Efreeme zaretikka Gezeere geetettiza katamaan diza Kanaaneta kessidi gooddontta aggida gishshas Kanaane asati heen isttara issife duus doommida.
Judges1:30 Zaabiloone zareti Qitiroone katamaninne Nahilaale katamaan diza asata kessi gooddontta aggida gishshas Kanaaneti heen isttara issife de7ida; gido attiin Zaabiloone zareti istta baas wolqqan oosisida.
Judges1:31 Aaseere zaretikka Akkon
Judges1:32 Kanaaneti kezontta aggida gishshas Aaseere zareti isttara heen issife de7ida.
Judges1:33 Niftaaleme zaretikka Beeti-Shemishe katamaninne Beeti-Anaate katamaan diza asata kessidi gooddibeettenna; gido attiin Kanaanetara heen issife de7ishin Beeti-Shemishenne Beeti-Anaate katama asata baas wolqqan oosisida.
Judges1:34 Amooreti Daane zareta pude zumati dizaso gezzefe duge dembaso wodhdhontta mala diggida.
Judges1:35 Amooreti Hari-Hereese deren
Judges1:36 Amooreta dere zaway Akirabime geetettizasora aadhdhi biidi Seelara kanththidi heera aadhdhi bees.
Judges2:1 GODAA kiitanchchay Gelgelappe Bookime biidi Isra7eele asaas
Judges2:2 Intte ha biittan diza asatara caaqo caaqettofte; istti yarshizasota laallite› gadis; gido attiin intte taas azazettibeekketa; ays hessaththo hanidetii?
Judges2:3 Hessa gishshas tani inttena
Judges2:4 GODAA kiitanchchay hessa Isra7eele asaa ubbaas yootida wode asay ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi yeekkides.
Judges2:5 He sohoza Bookime giidi sunththides; histtidi he sozan Xoossas yarsho yarshides.
Judges2:6 Iyaasoy Isra7eele asaa yeddidaappe guye asay issoy issoy shaakkiin bana gakkiza biitta ekkanaas bides.
Judges2:7 Iyaasoy shemppora paxa diza layththa ubbaan asay GODAAS ooththides; izi hayqqidaappe guye GODAY Isra7eele asaas ooththida gita ooso ubbaa be7ida cimata wode ubbaankka GODAAS goynnizayssa aggibeenna.
Judges2:8 GODAA aylle Nawe naa Iyaasos layththay 110 gidiin hayqqides;
Judges2:9 Ga7aashe dereppe pudeha baggan Efreeme deren bolla gezze biittan Teminaate-Seraaha geetettizason diza iza gaden iza moogida.
Judges2:10 He yeleta ubbay hayqqidaappe guye GODAANNE izi Isra7eele asaas ooththida lo7o ooso ubbaa erontta ooraththa yeletay dendides.
Judges2:11 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; Ba7aale geetettiza eeqatas goynnides.
Judges2:12 Gibxe biittafe istta kessida GODAA
Judges2:13 GODAAKKA aggidi Ba7aalessinne Astarootes goynnida.
Judges2:14 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides; worajjizayti bonqqana mala istta morkketa kushen aaththi immides; istta heeran diza morkketas istta aaththi immides; hessafe guye istti bantta morkketara eqettanaas dandaybeettenna.
Judges2:15 Istti olas keziza wode ubbaan GODAY kase isttas caaqqi yootoyssaththo istti xoonettana mala izi istta bolla dendides; hessafe dendoyssan istti keehi waayettida.
