Judges2:16 Hessafe guye GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla worajjizayta kusheppe istta ashshiza daannata isttas denththides;
Judges2:17 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay isttas pirdiza daannatas azazettibeenna; istti GODAAS ammanettontta ixxida; eeqa xoossatakko simmidi isttas goynnida; kase bantta aawata ogeppe kare kezida; istta aawati GODAAS azazettida mala istti azazettibeettenna.
Judges2:18 GODAY isttas pirdiza daannata daannasida wode ubbaan izi he pirdiza daannatara issife diza gishshas he daannati shemppora paxa diza layth ubbaan istta morkketa kusheppe istta ashshides. Waayeynne tuggay istta bolla darida gaason istti waassizayssa siyidi GODAY isttas qadhettides.
Judges2:19 Gido attiin istta kaaleththiza daannati hayqqida wode ubbaan asay guye simmidi
Judges2:20 Hessa gaason GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele kawoteththaa bolla eexxi kezides; GODAY
Judges2:21 hachchife doommiin Iyaasoy hayqqida wode biittaa bollan attida kawoteththatappe issaadeka tani istta sinththafe kessa gooddike.
Judges2:22 Ha Isra7eele asay kase bantta aawata mala ta oge kaallizaakkonne kaallonttaako tani istta paaccanaas hayssa ha dereta taas ola massara ooththada isttan go7ettana» gides.
Judges2:23 Hessa gishshas GODAY he kawoteththa asay kezontta gam7ana mala ooththides. Izi istta eeson yedeththi kessibeenna; Iyaasoska istta aaththi immibeenna.
Judges3:1 He wode Kanaanen ay olakka oletti erontta Isra7eele kawoteththaa paaccana mala GODAY ha asata ashshides.
Judges3:2 Izi hessa ooththiday hayssafe kase ola oletti erontta Isra7eele yeletaa ola tamaarsanaassa.
Judges3:3 He biittan attida asati
Judges3:4 GODAY Muse baggara kase Isra7eele aawatas immida azazo istti azazettizaakkonne azazettonttaako shaakki eranaas isttas paace gidana mala he attida asata heen ashshides.
Judges3:5 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Kanaanetara
Judges3:6 Istta macca nayta baas machcho ekkida; bantta macca naytakka istta attuma naytas immida; istta eeqa xoossataska goynnida.
Judges3:7 Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; istti GODAA bantta Xoossa aggidi Ba7aalenne Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossatas goynnida.
Judges3:8 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele asaa bolla eexxi kezides; GODAY Masophexoomya biitta kawo Kushaan-Arishataye kushen istta aaththi immides; isttika izas osppun layth haarettida.
Judges3:9 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay GODAAS waassida wode GODAY istta ashshanaas ashshizaade kiittides; izikka Kaalebes kaalo isha Qenaaze naa Otin7eele geetettees.
Judges3:10 GODAA Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhiin izi Isra7eele dere ayssiza daanna gidides; izi olas kezida wode GODAY Masophexoomya biitta kawo Kushaan-Arishataye iza kushen aaththi immiin iza xoonides.
Judges3:11 Hessa gishshas Qenaaze naa Otin7eeley hayqqana gakkanaas biittay oyddu tammu layth kumeth woppa demmides.
Judges3:12 Isra7eele asay zaareththidikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; hessa gishshas GODAY Mo7aabe kawo Egilooney Isra7eele bolla wolqqamana mala ooththides.
Judges3:13 Egilooney Amoonetanne Amaaleeqeta banara denththi ekki biidi Isra7eele asaa oli xoonides; Zamba katama geetettiza Iyarkko katamaakka oykkides.
Judges3:14 Isra7eele asaykka Mo7aabe kawo Egiloones tammanne osppun layth haarettides.
Judges3:15 Isra7eele asay GODAAKKO zaari waassida wode
Judges3:16 Ehuudey nam7u baggara qarattida issi wadha gidiza giththa mashsha baas giigsides; ushachcha mille baggara may7o giddon gixxides.
Judges3:17 Hessafe guye Mo7aabe kawo Egiloones giira ekki efidi immides; Egilooney keehi orde asa.
Judges3:18 Ehuudey giiraza kawozas immidaappe guye giiraa tookkidi bida asata moyzides.
Judges3:19 Gido attiin Ehuudey Gelgela matan diza masetti eqqida shuchchata matappe Egiloonekko guye simmi biidi
Judges3:20 He wode kawoy pooqen diza issi carkiza kifilen barkka utti dishin Ehuudey izakko shiiqidi
Judges3:21 Ehuudey hadirsa kushe yeddidi ushachcha bagga millefe giththa mashsha shoddidi kawozas ulon yeddides.
Judges3:22 Histtiin giththa mashshaas tuutey attontta ulo giddo gelidi zokkora kanththi kezides; moodhezikka mashshaa may7ides; Ehuudey mashshaa shoddontta heen aggaagides.
Judges3:23 Hessafe guye Ehuudey kare kezidi keeththa kare iza bolla gordi qulpides.
Judges3:24 Ehuudey bidaappe guye kawaa aylleti yiidi pengey gordettidayssa be7ida; gido attiin kawoy giddo kifilen sheeshshas uttontta aggenna giidi qoppida.
Judges3:25 Salettana gakkanaas karen eqqi naagida; gido attiin kawoy penge doyontta ixxiin qulpe ekkidi pengeza doyda; istta godaa ahay wuyge bolla porccu gi dizayssa be7ida.
Judges3:26 Ashkarati heen penge bolla naagon dishin Ehuudey kessi ekkidi masetti eqqida shuchchasora aadhdhidi Seyre geetettizaso baqatides.
Judges3:27 Izi he gakkida wode Efreeme deren bolla gezzezan Isra7eele asay olas shiiqana mala zaye punnides; asaykka iza kaallidi heeppe duge wodhdhides.
Judges3:28 Izi isttas
Judges3:29 He wode Mo7aabe asaappe tammu shii gidiza doorettida mino olanchchata wodhida; issi asikka kessi ekki attibeenna.
Judges3:30 He gallas Isra7eele asay Mo7aabe asaa oli xoonides; hessa gaason biittay osppun tammu layth gakkanaas woppa demmides.
Judges3:31 Ehuudeppe guye Anaate naa Shamgarey dendides; Filisxeeme dereppe usuppun xeetu as cikka guufen wodhidi Isra7eele asaa ashshides.
Judges4:1 Ehuudey hayqqidaappe guye Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan zaareththidikka iita miish ooththides.
Judges4:2 Hessa gishshas GODAY Haxoore geetettiza katamaan kawotida Kanaane kawo Yaabines istta aaththi immides; iza olanchchata kaaleththiza Sisaari Haroshe-Hagoye geetettiza kataman dees.
Judges4:3 Yaabiney biratappe oosettida uddufun xeetu para-gaareti izas diza gishshassinne izi Isra7eele asaa nam7u tammu layth kumeth keehi un7eththida gishshas istti maado demmanaas GODAAKKO waassida.
Judges4:4 He wode Laapidota machcha nabe Dibooray tinbite yootizaara Isra7eele deraa pirdiza daanna.
Judges4:5 Izakka Efreeme deren bolla gezzen
Judges4:6 Issi gallas Diboora Abino7aame naa Baraaqe Niftaaleme biittan diza Qaadeese katamappe kiittada xeygisadus; «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nena
Judges4:7 Yaabine olanchchata kaaleththiza Sisaara para-gaaretanne olanchchata ekkidi Qisoone shaafan nenara ola gayttanaas yaana mala tani iza denththeththana; tani iza nees aaththa immana› gi azazees» gadus.
Judges4:8 Baraaqeykka izis
Judges4:9 Dibooraykka
Judges4:10 Baraaqey Niftaalemenne Zaabiloone zareta Qaadeese xeygiin tammu shii asay iza kaalli kezides; Dibooraykka izara badus.
Judges4:11 He wode Qenaawe dere as Heebere geetettizayssi Muse bollo Hobaabe nayta Qenaawe dere asappe shaakettides; histtidi Qaadeesekko shiiqidi Zanaanimen gita wola garsan ba dunkaane tokkides.
Judges4:12 Abino7aame naa Baraaqey Taaboore zuma bolla bidayssa Sisaari siyidi
Judges4:13 Sisaarikka biratappe oosettida uddufun xeetu para-gaaretanne banara diza olanchchata ubbaa xeygisidi Haroshe-Hagoyeppe Qisoone shaafa shiishshides.
Judges4:14 Dibooray Baraaqe «Denda! Hekko hach GODAY Sisaara ne kushen aaththi immiza gallassa. Beya! GODAY neeppe sinththati bees» gadus; Baraaqey tammu shii asaa kaaleththidi Taaboore zuma bollafe wodhdhides.
Judges4:15 GODAY Sisaara iza para-gaareta ubbaanne iza olanchchata ubbaa qara giththa mashshan Baraaqe sinththafe baqatissides; hessa gishshas Sisaari ba para-gaareppe wodhdhidi tohora baqatides.
Judges4:16 Baraaqeykka Sisaara para-gaaretanne olanchchata Haroshe-Hagoye gakkanaas yedeththides; Sisaara olanchchatappe issaadeyka attontta ubbayka giththa mashshan wurida.
Judges4:17 He wode Haxoore kawo Yaabinessinne Qenaawe dere as Heebere zereththata giddon lo7o gaytoteththi diza gishshas Sisaari tohon baqatidi Qenaawe dere as Heebere machchiyo Ya7eeli dunkaane giddo woxxi gelides.
Judges4:18 Ya7eela Sisaara mokkanaas kezada
Judges4:19 Sisaari
Judges4:20 Hessafe guye izi izo
Judges4:21 Sisaari keehi daaburda gishshas dhisko seerides; histtiin Heebere machchiya Ya7eela qoyxenne dunkaane dhishke ekkada loddara izakko shiiqadus; dhishkezakka hayththa corcoron essada duge biittara sikka dhishkiin Sisaari hayqqides.
Judges4:22 Baraaqey Sisaara koyishe yiin Ya7eele iza mokkanaas kare kezada
Judges4:23 He gallas Xoossi Isra7eele asay Kanaane kawo Yaabine xoonana mala ooththides.
Judges4:24 Isra7eele asay Kanaane kawo Yaabine bolla minni minni biidi wurseththan iza dhayssides.
Judges5:1 He gallas Dibooraynne Abino7aame naa Baraaqey hayssafe kaalliza yeththaa yexxida.
Judges5:2 «Kaaleththizayti Isra7eele kaaleththishin
Judges5:3 «Intteno kawotoo! Hayssa siyite! Intteno dere haarizaytoo! Ezgite! Tani GODAAS yexxana; Isra7eele GODAAS galata mazamure yexxana.
Judges5:4 «Abeet GODAWU! Neni Seyre dereppe dendida wode
Judges5:5 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sinththaninne Siina GODAA sinththan zumati qaaxxida.
Judges5:6 «Anaate naa Shamgare wodeninne Ya7eele woden ogey samides; zal7anchchatikka he biittara kanththi beettenna. Ogezara bizaytikka ogaa aggidi harasora bida.
Judges5:7 Isra7eele mandarati asi dontta bazzo gidida. Tani Dibooray Isra7eele asaas aayo gidada dendana gakkanaas xoonidi attiday baawa.
Judges5:8 Isra7eele asay allaga xoossata doorida wode
Judges5:9 Ta wozinay Isra7eele daannatara dees; asaa giddon dosan bana aaththi immidaytara dees. GODAY galatetto!
Judges5:10 «Intteno koorettida booththa hare toggizaytoo! Intteno lo7o araatan utti aleqettizaytoo! Intteno tohon hemettizaytoo!
Judges5:11 Haaththa pulttota heeran yexettiza yeththaa siyite; istta GODAY xoonidayssa akeekissees; qasse Isra7eele asay xoonidayssa nashshees. «GODAA asaykka katama geliza pengetakko duge wodhdhides.
Judges5:12 ‹Diboora! Beegga! Beegga! Beegottada mazamure yexxa. Nenoo
Judges5:13 «Hessafe guye attida asati halaqataakko duge wodhdhida. GODAA asati olettanaas giigidi Baraaqekko yida.
Judges5:14 Kase Amaaleeqe zareti dizason diza Efreeme asaappe issi issi asati yida. Qasse harati Biniyaame zereththatappe istta kaallida. Maakire zaretappe daannati
Judges5:15 Yisakoore zereththafe daannati Diboorira yida; ee
Judges5:16 Ne ays dorsa yire giddon uttadii? dors heemmizayta wayqeth siyanaas uttadii? Oroobeele zareti qofan shaaketti wodhdhida; Yaanaakkonne yonttaakko sidhida.
Judges5:17 Gala7aade zareti Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinththan attida; Daane zareti ays markabe giddon gam7idoo? Aaseere zareti ba dizason attida; Mediteraane abbaa lanqenkka de7ida.
Judges5:18 Zaabiloone zareti bantta shemppo hayqos aaththi immida. Niftaaleme zaretikka isttaththoka ola demban ooththida.
Judges5:19 «Kawoti yiidi Magiddo pulttota matan diza Ta7inaaken ola oykettida. Kanaane kawotikka heen olettida; di7i ekkanaas aykko miishshika demmibeettenna.
Judges5:20 Salo xoolintteti izara olettida. Bantta hanotan Sisaarara ola qaqaphu gida.
Judges5:21 Beni Qisoone shaafaa kixay istta denththi efides; isttika haron meecetti dhayda; Ta shemppoyee minna; wolqqankka sinth gujja.
Judges5:22 Hessafe guye toga asati togan adaraasi yida. Toga parata giirissay dada giirissa mala.
Judges5:23 GODAA kiitanchchay
Judges5:24 «Qenaawe dere as Heebere machchiya Ya7eela maccassa ubbaafe anjjettidaaro gidu. Dunkaane giddon diza maccassa ubbaafe iza anjjettidaaro gidu.
Judges5:25 Sisaari izo
Judges5:26 Issi kushen dunkaana dhishke
Judges5:27 Bolqu gi kundides; izi toho garsankka gufannides; he kundida sohon hayqqides.
Judges5:28 «Sisaara aayeya maskootera be7adus; maskoote xoo7erakka tishshi histta xeellashe
Judges5:29 Aadho erateththi diza izi maccassati izi oyshaa zaarida; gido attiin iza ba qofan baas
Judges5:30 ‹Istti di7idi ehidayssa gishetti ekkishin issaade issaade issi issi geela7oy woykko nam7u nam7u geela7oti gakkeettes. Sisaaras istti dumma dumma qalamen oosettida aleqo may7o immana; qasse taaska qoodhen xaaxanaas xilifen alleqidi lo7iza may7ota ehana› gadus.
Judges5:31 «Abeet GODAWU! Ne morkketi ubbay hessaththo hayqqetto! Gido attiin ne siiqoti maalado mokkiza arsheda phoolletto.» Hessafe guye biittay oyddu tammu layth woppa demmides.
Judges6:1 Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan zaareththidi iita miish ooththides; hessa gishshas GODAY istta Midiyaame asas aaththi immides; isttika laappun layth kumeth haarettida.
Judges6:2 Midiyaame asay Isra7eele asaa bolla minnida gishshas Isra7eele asay isttafe qotetti attanaaso gongolonne miixa giigsides.
Judges6:3 Isra7eele asay kath zeriza wode ubbaan Midiyaame asay
Judges6:4 Istti he biittaan dunkaanidi Gaaza katama gakkanaas biitta ubbaa bollan mokkidayssa dhaysseettes; dorsata
Judges6:5 Bantta mehetanne bantta dunkaaneta ekkidi booley yiza mala daridi yeettes; isttanne istta gaamellata qoodanaas dandayettenna; istta yuussayka biitta dhayssanaassa.
Judges6:6 Midiyaame asay Isra7eele asaa bolla meto gaththida gishshas Isra7eele asay maado demmanaas GODAAKKO waassides.
Judges6:7 Midiyaame asay gaththida qohoza gaason Isra7eele asay GODAAKKO waassiin
Judges6:8 GODAY isttako issi nabe kiittides; he nabezi isttas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaafe ehida kiitay
Judges6:9 Tani inttena Gibxe asaa kusheppenne waayisiza asaa ubbaa kusheppe ashshadis; intte sinththafekka istta goodda kessada istta biittaa inttes immadis.
Judges6:10 Tani inttena
Judges6:11 Hessafe guye GODAA kiitanchchay Oofira geetettizason diza Abi7eezere zereththafe Iyo7aasa wolaa garsan yi uttides; he wode Iyo7aasa naa Geedooni Midiyaame asaappe qotettanaas woyne gum7izasohon gistte bukkees.
Judges6:12 Heen GODAA kiitanchchay izas qonccidi
Judges6:13 Geedoonikka iza
Judges6:14 Hessafe guye GODAY izakko simmidi
Judges6:15 Geedooni
Judges6:16 GODAYKKA
Judges6:17 Geedoonikka «Neni tanan ufayettidaa gidikko tanara haasayzay nena gididayssa erisiza malata tana bessa.
Judges6:18 Tani guye simma baada nees yarsho miish ekka yaana gakkanaas hannife haraso booppa» gides. GODAYKKA
Judges6:19 Geedooni baso biidi deysha laaqqa shukkidi kaththides; issi tammu kilo giraame gidiza dhiille ekkidi irshoy izan gelontta uketh uukkides; ashoza leematen woththidi cambaza keren tigides; ubbaaka ekki efidi wola garsan uttida GODAA kiitanchchazas shiishshides.
Judges6:20 Xoossa kiitanchchay iza
Judges6:21 GODAA kiitanchchay ba kushen oykkida guufe xeeran ashozanne ukeththaza bochchides; histtiin tamay shuchchaa giddofe kezidi ashozanne ukeththaza mides; hessafe guye GODAA kiitanchchay iza sinththafe geemmides.
Judges6:22 Geedooni beyday GODAA kiitanchcha gididayssa akeekida wode
Judges6:23 Gido attiin GODAY
Judges6:24 Geedoonikka GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso heen giigsidi he sohoza
Judges6:25 He gallassa omars GODAY Geedoone
Judges6:26 He tiifetti doorettida misleza bolla GODAA ne Xoossaas
Judges6:27 Geedoonikka ba aylletappe tammata ekkidi GODAY izas yootida mala ooththides; gido attiin izi ba aawa soo asaassinne katamaan diza asaas yayyida gishshas hessa gallas ooththanayssa aggidi omars ooththides.
Judges6:28 Maalado wonttan katamaa asay dendida mala Ba7aale geetettiza eeqas yarsho yarshizasoy laalettichchidayssanne iza lanqen diza Asheeri misley meqeretti wodhdhidayssa be7ides; qasse istti yarsho yarshizasoy giigidayssanne iza bolla nam7anththo booray yarshettidayssa beyda.
Judges6:29 Bantta giddon
Judges6:30 Hessafe guye katama asay Iyo7aasa
Judges6:31 Iyo7aasi ba bollan dendida asaa ubbaa
Judges6:32 Hessa gishshas he gallas asay Geedoone sunththaa Yeruba7aale gi sunththida; birsheththay ba7aaley ba gishshas mootetto guussa; gaasoykka laalettoyssi izas yarsho yarshizaso gidida gishshassa.
Judges6:33 Hessafe guye Midiyaame biitta asay
Judges6:34 Hessafe guye GODAA Ayanay Geedoone bolla wodhdhides; Abi7eezere zareti ubbay bana kaallana mala istta shiishshanaas zaye punnides.
Judges6:35 Minaase zare ubbaas as kiittidi bana kaallana mala isttaka xeyssides; hessaththoka Aaseere zaretas
Judges6:36 Hessafe guye Geedooni Xoossaa
Judges6:37 Beya
Judges6:38 Izikka gida mala hanides; wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara dendidi dorsa iske gum7ida wode issi saane gidiza haaththi izappe kezides.
Judges6:39 Geedooni qasseka Xoossaa
Judges6:40 He gallassa omars Xoossi he malataza ooththides; wonteththa gallas maalado dorsa agozay mela gidiin biitta ubbay haaxxides.
Judges7:1 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara Yeruba7aale geetettiza Geedooninne izara diza asay ubbay wontta maaladora dendi biidi Harooda geetettiza pultto haaththa achchan dunkaanida. Midiyaame biitta asatikka isttafe pudeha baggara Moore geetettiza zumaa matan diza zullen dunkaanida.
Judges7:2 GODAY Geedoone
Judges7:3 Hessa gishshas ha7i asaas
Judges7:4 Hessafe guye GODAY Geedoone
Judges7:5 Hessa gishshas Geedooni asaa haaththaako efides; GODAY Geedoone
Judges7:6 Bantta kushen haaththa eqon kuphphati uyizayta qooday heedzdzu xeeta; gido attiin attidayti ubbay haaththaa uyanaas gulbatida.
Judges7:7 GODAY Geedoone
Judges7:8 Hessa gishshas Geedooni guye simmiza Isra7eele asaa shinqenne zaye ekkidi 300 asatas immidi hankko attida asaa ubbaa istta soo istta soo yeddides; ha ubbay haniza wode Midiyaame olanchchati isttafe duge baggara zullen dunkaanidi uttida.
Judges7:9 He gallassa omars GODAY Geedoone
Judges7:10 Neni baada olanaas yayyiko ne aylle Puura nenara ekkada istti dunkaani dizaso duge ba;
Judges7:11 Isttika gizayssa siya; hessafe guye neni istta hirgay baynda olana» gides. Hessa gishshas Geedooni ba aylle Puura kaaleththi ekkidi morkketi dunkaani dizaso heera wodhdhides.
Judges7:12 He wode boole mala corattida Midiyaame asay Amaaleeqe asaynne arshe kessa baggara diza asay ubbay shoobbaa giddon dunkaani uttides. Istta gaamellati abba doonan diza ace mala qoodappe daro.
Judges7:13 Geedooni hee gakkida mala issi bitaney ba agumettida agumo ba laggezas yootishin siyides; he agumozikka
Judges7:14 Iza laggezikka zaaridi
Judges7:15 Geedoonikka he bitaneza agumonne agumozanne birsheththaa siyida wode gulbatidi Xoossas goynnides; hessafe guye Isra7eele asay dunkaanidaso guye simmidi
Judges7:16 Heedzdzu xeetu asaa heedzdzu butten shaakkides; isttaskka hu7en hu7en issi issi zayenne giddon eexxiza xomppe oykkida issi issi xaaro immides.
Judges7:17 Geedoonikka isttas
Judges7:18 Taninne tanara dizayti ubbati zaye punniza wode intteka istti dunkaanidaso yuuyi aadhdhidi intte zaye punnidi
Judges7:19 Giddi giddoth gidana gishin naagiza zabeti laamettidaappe guye Geedooninne izara diza xeetu asati biidi Midiyaameti dunkaanidaso mata gakkidi ba oykkida zaye zaye punnida; ba oykkida xaarotakka ubbaa menththereththida.
Judges7:20 Hara baggara diza nam7u buttetikka ba zaye zaye punnidi ba oykkida xaarotakka menththereththida; hadirsa kushen eexxiza xomppe
Judges7:21 Asay ubbay Midiyaame asati dunkaanidaso yuushon ba naagizason naagizason eqqida; Midiyaame olanchchatikka ubbay waaso xuleththishe baqatida.
Judges7:22 Heedzdzu xeetu Geedoone asay ba zaye zaye punnida wode morkketa olanchchati bantta giththa mashshan issoy issaa wodhana mala GODAY ooththides; hessa gishshas attida olanchchati Zerera baggara gede Beeti-Sixe geetettiza katamara aadhdhi biidi Xabata matan diza Aabeeli-Mahoole gakkanaas baqatida.
Judges7:23 Hessafe guye Geedooni Niftaaleme zareppe
Judges7:24 Efreeme gezzen diza asaa ubbaakko Geedooni as kiittidi
Judges7:25 Oreebenne Za7eebe geetettiza Midiyaame ola asaa kaaleththiza nam7u ola qarata oykkida; Oreebe
Judges8:1 Hessafe guye Efreeme asay Geedoone
Judges8:2 Gido attiin Geedooni zaaridi
Judges8:3 Midiyaame ola asaa kaaleththiza ola qarata Oreebenne Za7eebe Xoossi intte kushen aaththi immides. Histtiin ta hessara ginattiza ooso ay ooththadinaa?» gides; hessafe guye istta hanqoy irxxides.
Judges8:4 Geedooninne izara diza 300 asay Yordaanoose shaafa yiidi pinnida; istti ay daaburkkoka bantta morkketa yedeththo aggibeettenna.
Judges8:5 Geedooni Sukoote katama gakkidi he katama asatas
Judges8:6 Sukoote katamaa ayssizayti
Judges8:7 Geedooni isttas zaaridi
Judges8:8 Hessafe guye Panu7eele geetettizaso bides; Sukoote asaa oychchoyssaththo oychchides; Panu7eele asaykka Sukoote katama asay goyssaththoka gi zaarides.
Judges8:9 Izikka Panu7eele asaas
Judges8:10 Zebahaynne Xalmunay arshe kessa baggafe yida olanchchatappe attida 15
Judges8:11 Geedooni Nobaheppenne Yogibahappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza bazzo gaxa ogera biidi hessan diza olanchchata bolla istti akeekontta dishin ola oykkides.
Judges8:12 Isttika ubbay dagammida; Midiyaame kawoti Zebahaynne Xalmunay nam7ayka baqatida; gido attiin Geedooni istta yedeththi gakkidi oykkides.
Judges8:13 Iyo7aasa naa Geedooni olappe Hereese pinnizasora simmides.
Judges8:14 Sukooteppe issi naateththa as oykkidi pilggi oychchides; izikka Sukoote ayssizaytanne cimata laappun tammanne laappunata sunththaa xaafidi izas immides.
Judges8:15 Hessafe guye Geedooni Sukoote asaakko yiidi
Judges8:16 Hessafe guye bazzo agunththaninne kindichchon wadhdhidi Sukoote katama ayssizayta qaxxaydes.
Judges8:17 Qasse Panu7eelen iza bolla uttidi katama naagiza gimbeza laallidi katamaan diza attumasaa wodhides.
Judges8:18 Histtidi Geedooni Zebahanne Xalmuna
Judges8:19 Geedooni
Judges8:20 Hessafe baas bayra naaza Yetere
Judges8:21 Hessafe guye Zebahaynne Xalmunay Geedoone
Judges8:22 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Geedoone
Judges8:23 Geedoonikka
Judges8:24 Isma7eele asaa mala Midiyaame biitta asatikka hayththan worqqa aaththeettes; hessa gishshas izi isttas
Judges8:25 Isra7eele asay zaaridi
Judges8:26 Hessika hara alleqota
Judges8:27 Geedooni worqqafe eefude misle giigsidi ba diza Oofira kataman woththides; guyeppe Isra7eele asay ubbay GODAA aggidi he eefude mislezas goynnides; Geedoonessinne iza soo asaas hessi istta oykkiza narxa gidides.
Judges8:28 Hessa mala hanidi Midiyaame asay Isra7eele asaas haarettides; istti Isra7eele asaa bolla nam7anththo dendibeettenna. Geedooni shemppora paxa diza oyddu tammu layth kumeth biittay woppa demmides.
Judges8:29 Iyo7aasa naa Yeruba7aale geetettiza Geedooni ba soo guye biidi ba keeththan de7ides.
Judges8:30 Geedooni cora maccassa ekkida gishshas izas 70 attuma nayti deettes.
Judges8:31 Qasse Seekeeme katamaan diza laggeththo maccassaya izas attuma naa yeliin sunththaa Abimelekke gi sunththides.
Judges8:32 Iyo7aasa naa Geedooni keehi cimmidi hayqqides; ba aawa Iyo7aasa duufon moogettides; he duufozi Abi7eezere qommoti diza Oofira kataman dees.
Judges8:33 Geedooni hayqqidaappe guye Isra7eele asay GODAAPPE guye simmidi Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossatas goynnides; Ba7aali-Birita banttas xoos histti goynnida.
Judges8:34 Histtidi Isra7eele asay istta yuushon diza morkketa ubbaafe istta ashshida GODAA bantta Xoossaa dogida.
Judges8:35 Qasse Geedooni Isra7eele asaas ooththida lo7o ooso ubbaa akeekontta aggidi iza keeththa asaas lo7o kushe zaaribeettenna.
Judges9:1 Geedoone naa Abimelekkey Seekeeme katamaan diza ba aayey dabbotakko biidi isttassinne ba aayey qommota ubbaas
Judges9:2 «Ane Seekeeme katamaan diza asaa ubbaa
Judges9:3 Iza aayey dabboti ha qaala ubbaa iza doona gididi Seekeeme katama asaas yootida; Abimelekkeykka isttas dabbo gidida gishshas Seekeeme asay iza kaallanaas qofa qachchides.
Judges9:4 Istti Ba7aali-Birita eeqa keeththaafe 70 saqile bira ekkidi izas immida. Abimelekkey he biraan shufurotanne bonqqizayta oykkidi bana kaallana mala ooththides.
Judges9:5 Oofira geetettizason diza ba aawa soo biidi ba ishata
Judges9:6 Hessafe guye Seekeeme asaynne Beeti-Millo asay issife shiiqidi Seekeemen goynnettiza zaallaa matan diza gita miththaa gars biidi heen Abimelekke kawoththida.
Judges9:7 Iyo7aatamey hessa siyi biidi Garizaane zumaa hu7e kezidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Judges9:8 Issi gallas miththati ubbay shiiqidi bantta bolla kawo kawoththanaas bida; histtidi wogara mith
Judges9:9 «Gido attiin wogara miththay
Judges9:10 «Hessafe guye miththati balase geetettiza miththaa
Judges9:11 Gido attiin balase miththay
Judges9:12 «Hessa gishshas miththati woyne tura
Judges9:13 Gido attiin woyne miththay
Judges9:14 «Hessa gishshas wurseththan miththati ubbay agunth
Judges9:15 Agunththayka
Judges9:16 «Abimelekke intte kawoththizay tumateththaninne suureteththanee? Geedooni inttes ooththidayssa akeekidi izaso asaas izi inttes ooththidayssas lo7o kushe zaaridetii?
Judges9:17 Ta aaway inttes olettidayssa akeekite; Midiyaame asaappe inttena ashshana giidi ba shemppo hayqos aaththi immides.
Judges9:18 Gido attiin intte hach ta aawa soo asaa bolla dendidi 70 iza nayta issi shuchcha bolla shukkideta; Geedooni aylleyfe yelida Abimelekkey inttes dabbo gidida gishshas Seekeemen kawosideta.
Judges9:19 Ha7i simmi Geedoonessinne iza keeththa asatas intte ooththida oosoy tumateththaninne suureteththan gidikko Abimelekkera issife ufayettite; izikka inttenara ufayetto.
Judges9:20 Hessaththo gidontta aggiko Abimelekkefe tamay kezidi Seekeeme asaanne Beeti-Millo asaa mo; hessaththoka Seekeeme asaappenne Beeti-Millo asaappe tamay kezidi Abimelekke mo» gides.
Judges9:21 Iyo7aatameykka ba isha Abimelekkes yayyida gishshas baqatidi Bi7eere geetettizaso biidi heen uttides.
Judges9:22 Abimelekkey Isra7eele biittan 3 layth kawotides.
Judges9:23 Hessafe guye Xoossi Abimelekkessinne Seekeeme asaa giddon iita ayana kiittides; Seekeeme asaykka Abimelekke bolla makkalli dendides.
Judges9:24 Xoossi hessa ooththiday Abimelekkey laappun tammu ba ishata wodhida gishshassinne izi istta suuththaa gussana mala Seekeeme asay iza minththeththida gishshas halo kessanaassa.
Judges9:25 Seekeeme asay amarda asaa dooridi zuma hu7en Abimelekke wodhanaas zamadi uttana mala ooththides; he uttidayti ogera kanththiza asaa ubbaa bonqqida; Abimelekkeykka hessa ubbaa siyides.
Judges9:26 Hessafe guye Ebeede naa Ga7aaley ba ishatara Seekeeme yides; Seekeeme asaykka izan ammanettides.
Judges9:27 Ubbayka ba gade gade biidi woyne teera maxida; woyne ushshaa aggidi gita ba7aale bonchchida; bantta eeqa keeththaa gelidi heen mishenne uyishe Abimelekke cayida.
Judges9:28 Ebeede naa Ga7aaley Seekeeme asaas
Judges9:29 Ha asaa kaaleththizay tana gididaakko tani Abimelekke digganakkoshin. Abimelekke xeygada
Judges9:30 Ebeede naa Ga7aaley gida mala katamaa haariza Zaabuley siyida mala keehi hanqettides.
Judges9:31 Hessafe guye Abimelekkeko as guyera kiittidi
Judges9:32 Hessa gishshas neninne nenara diza asay omarsara dendidi gede kare kezidi geemason zamadi naagite.
Judges9:33 Wonto maalado arshey mokkishin istti akeekontta katamaa worajjite; Ga7aaleynne izara diza asay inttena olanaas keziza wode inttes dandayettida mala minnidi olettite» gides.
Judges9:34 Abimelekkeynne izara diza asay ubbay omars dendidi Seekeemeppe karera 4 butten shaakettidi zamadi uttida.
Judges9:35 Abimelekkeynne izara diza asay Ebeede naa Ga7aaley kezidi katama geliza pengen eqqidayssa be7idi qotettida sohoppe kezida.
Judges9:36 Ga7aaley asaa be7ida wode Zaabule
Judges9:37 Ga7aaley qasseka
Judges9:38 Hessa gishshas Zaabuley Ga7aale
Judges9:39 Ga7aaley Seekeeme asaa kaaleththi kezidi Abimelekkera oleteth oykkides.
Judges9:40 Abimelekkey yedeththiin Ga7aaley baqatides; katama geliza penge gakkanaas daroti cadettidi kundida.
Judges9:41 Abimelekkey Aruman de7ides; Zaabuley gidikko Ga7aalenne iza ishata Seekeemeppe goodereththi kessides.
Judges9:42 Wonteththa gallas Seekeeme asay ba goshshaso goshshaso kezidayssa Abimelekkey siyides.
Judges9:43 Hessafe guye ba asaa kaaleththi kezides; asaakka 3 butten shaakkidi geemason zamadi naagana mala ooththides; Seekeeme asaykka katamaappe kezizayssa be7idi istta wodhanaas qotettidasoppe kezida.
Judges9:44 Abimelekkeynne izara diza buttey sinth woxxi biidi katamaa geliza pengen eqqida; attida nam7u butteti goshshason diza asaa ubbaa wodhida.
Judges9:45 Gallassaa kumeth Abimelekkey katama asaara olettidi katamayo oykkides; heen diza asaa ubbaa wodhi wursides; katamayokka laallidi izin maxine zerides.
Judges9:46 Seekeeme Gimbe giddon diza asay ubbay hessa siyidi Eli-Birita geetettiza eeqa xoossa Keeththay dizaso miixa giddo gelides.
Judges9:47 Istti he sohon shiiqidayssa Abimelekkey siyidi
Judges9:48 izinne izara diza asay ubbay Xalmoone geetettiza zumaa bolla pude kezida; Abimelekkey kaltta ekkidi miththa tashe qanxxidi ba hashen tookkides; banara diza asatakka
Judges9:49 Asay ubbayka miththa tashe qanxxi ekkidi Abimelekke kaallides; he tasheta miixa penge bolla koridi asay iza giddon dishin tama oyththida; hessa gishshas miixaa giddon diza asay ubbay hayqqi wurides; heen hayqqida attuma asaanne maccassaa qooday 1
Judges9:50 Hessafe guye Abimelekkey Teebeese geetettiza katama biidi katamaa giddoththi oykkides.
Judges9:51 He katamaa giddon iza bolla uttidi naagiza issi gita gimbey dees. Katamaa asay ubbay
Judges9:52 Abimelekkey olettishe gimbezaakko gakkidi iza taman xuugganaas gimbeza penge shiiqides.
Judges9:53 Gido attiin issi maccassaya Abimelekke hu7en woxa mayde gendersa olada iza hu7eza ponkku histta phalqa yeggadus.
Judges9:54 Iza gondalle oykki kaalliza naateththaza eeson xeygidi
Judges9:55 Isra7eele asay ubbay Abimelekkey hayqqidayssa be7idi ba soo ba soo bides.
Judges9:56 Abimelekkey ba ishata laappun tammata wodhidi ba aawa bolla ooththida gomeza Xoossi iza bolla zaarides.
Judges9:57 Hessankka Xoossi Seekeeme asaa iitateth ubbaa istta bolla zaarides; hessa malan hanidi Yeruba7aale naa Iyo7aatamey qanggida qanggeththi istta bolla gakkides.
Judges10:1 Abimelekkey hayqqidaappe guye Doode naaza Puuwa naa Tolay Isra7eele ashshanaas dendides. Izi Yisakoore zareppe gidishe Efreemen bolla gezzen Shamire geetettizason de7ides.
Judges10:2 Tolay 23 layth gakkanaas Isra7eele deraa kaaleththides; hessafe guye Tolay hayqqidi Shamiren moogettides.
Judges10:3 Tolappe kaallidi Gala7aade dere as Ya7irey dendides; Isra7eele asaa nam7u tammanne nam7u layth gakkanaas heemmides.
Judges10:4 Izas 30 hareta toggiza 30 attuma nayti deettes; isttas Gala7aade biittan 30 katamati deettes; he katamati hach gakkanaas Ya7ire katamata geetetti xeygetteettes.
Judges10:5 Ya7irey hayqqidi Qaamonen moogettides.
Judges10:6 Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan qasseka iita miish ooththides; istti Ba7aalenne Astaroote geetettiza eeqa xoossatassinne Aaraame xoossatas
Judges10:7 Hessa gishshas GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqettidi istta Filisxeeme asatassinne Amoone asatas aaththi immides.
Judges10:8 He layth Isra7eele asaa istti qohidanne waayechchida. Yordaanoose shaafappe he pinth arshey keziza baggan Amooreti kase de7ida Gala7aade biittan de7ida Isra7eele asaa ubbaa istti 18 layth waayechchida.
Judges10:9 Amoone asay qasseka Yuhuda
Judges10:10 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay
Judges10:11 GODAYKKA isttas
Judges10:12 Sidoonati
Judges10:13 Gido attiin intte tana aggidi hara xoossatas goynnideta; hessa gishshas tani inttena mulekka ashshike.
Judges10:14 Biidi intte doorida xoossatas waassite; intte metotida wode istti inttena ashshetto» giidi zaarides.
Judges10:15 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay zaareththidi Godaa Xoossaa
Judges10:16 Allaga xoossata ba giddofe diggidi GODAAS goynnida; istta waayeza be7idi GODAY co7u gi agganaas dandaybeenna.
Judges10:17 Hessafe guye Amoone dere olanchchati olas giigettidi Gala7aaden dunkaanida; Isra7eele asaykka issife shiiqidi Gala7aaden Mixiphpha geetettizason dunkaanides.
Judges10:18 Gala7aade biitta asaynne halaqati bantta giddon
Judges11:1 Issi layma maccassayfe yelettida Gala7aade dere as Yoftahey mino olanchcha; iza aaway Gala7aade geetettees.
Judges11:2 Gala7aadey koyro ekkida machchiyakka izas attuma nayta yeladus; istti dicci gakkida wode bantta isha Yoftahe
Judges11:3 Hessa gishshas Yoftahey ba ishatappe baqatidi Xoobba geetettiza biittan de7ides; izi heen dishin amarda womale asati izakko shiiqidi iza kaallida.
Judges11:4 Guuththa wodeppe guye Amoone dere asay Isra7eele asaa ola oykkides.
Judges11:5 Amoone dere asay Isra7eele asaara olettida wode Gala7aade biittaa cimati Xoobba biittafe Yoftahe zaari ehanaas bida.
Judges11:6 Istti iza
Judges11:7 Yoftahey Gala7aade cimata
Judges11:8 Gala7aade cimati iza
Judges11:9 Yoftahey
Judges11:10 Gala7aade cimati Yoftahes
Judges11:11 Hessa gishshas Yoftahey Gala7aade cimatara bides; derezikka iza ba bolla halaqanne bana azazizaade histti shuumides; Yoftahey Mixiphphan GODAA sinththan ha yo7o ubbaa ekkoyssa zaari qonccisides.
Judges11:12 Hessafe guye Yoftahey Amoone dere asata kawozaakko as kiittidi
Judges11:13 Yoftahey kiittida asatas Amoone dere kawoy zaaridi
Judges11:14 Yoftahey nam7anththo zaaridi Amoone dere kawookko as kiittides.
Judges11:15 «Isra7eele asay Mo7aabe biitta woykko Amoone biitta ekkibeenna.
Judges11:16 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida wode bazzora kanththi biidi Zo7o abba gakkides; hessafe qasse Qaadeese geetettizaso yides.
Judges11:17 Isra7eele asay Eedoome biitta kawookko as kiittidi
Judges11:18 Hessafe guye bazzora kanththidi istti Eedoomenne Mo7aabe biittata yuuyidi Mo7aabe biittafe arshey mokkiza baggara yida; Arnoone shaafappe he pinththa baggara diza sohon dunkaanida; gido attiin Arnoone shaafay Mo7aabe zawa gidida gishshas he zawaa pinnibeettenna.
Judges11:19 «Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Haseboone geetettiza katamaan diza Amooreta kawo Sihoonekko as kiittides; isttas
Judges11:20 Gido attiin Sihooney Isra7eele asay aadhdhi bontta mala diggides; izi ba ola asaa ubbaa shiishshidi Yahaaxe geetettizason dunkaanidi Isra7eele asaara ola oykettides.
Judges11:21 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay Sihoonenne iza deraa ubbaa Isra7eele asaa kushen aaththi immiin istti xoonida; heen de7ida Amoore dere ubbaa laattida.
Judges11:22 Arnoone shaafappe biidi Yaabooqe shaafa gakkanaassinne bazzofe biidi Yordaanoose shaafa gakkanaas diza Amooreta deraa ubbaa laattida.
Judges11:23 Hessa mala ooththidi GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay Amoore dere asaa ba dere Isra7eele sinththafe yedeththidi dhayssides; histtiin ne zaara ekkanaas nees ay wolqqay dizee?
Judges11:24 Nees ne xoos kamooshey immizayssa ekkada shempa uttikii? Nuni gidikko GODAA nu Xoossay nuus immidayssa ubbaa laattana.
Judges11:25 Histtiin baas neni Xipoora naa Mo7aabe kawo Balaaqeppe minnay? Izi Isra7eele asaara ooyettidee? Woykko olettidee?
Judges11:26 Isra7eele asay Haseboonenne he heera
Judges11:27 Tani ta baggara inttena aykkoka qohabeekke; gido attiin tana ola olada qohanaas dendiday nena; pirdiza GODAY hach Isra7eele asaassinne Amoone asaas giddon pirdo» gides.
Judges11:28 Amoone kawoy gidikko Yoftahey kiittida kiita qoodan yeggibeenna.
Judges11:29 He wode GODAA Ayanay Yoftahe bolla wodhdhiin Gala7aadenne Minaase dere kanththidi Gala7aade biittan diza Mixiphphara aadhdhi biidi Amoone dere bolla worajjides.
Judges11:30 GODAAS
Judges11:31 tani olan xoonada tani soo simmiza wode tasoppe tana mokkanaas koyro keziza ay asikka gidiin iza nees xuugettiza yarsho histta shiishshana» giidi adinettides.
Judges11:32 Hessafe guye Yoftahey Amooneta olanaas zawa pinni bides; histtiin GODAY istta iza kushen aaththi immides.
Judges11:33 Aaro7eereppe doommidi Minnite heeraninne izappe aadhdhidi Aabeeli-Keraamime gakkanaas diza nam7u tammu katamata oli dhayssides; Amoone dere asaykka Isra7eeletas haarettides.
Judges11:34 Yoftahey Mixiphphan diza baso simmi yiza wode koyrottada iza naya karabe baqqa yexxashenne durashe iza mokkanaas kezadus; izippe attiin hara nay izas baawa.
Judges11:35 Izi izo be7ida mala ba may7o daakkidi
Judges11:36 Naya
Judges11:37 Qasseka iza ba aawaas
Judges11:38 Izikka
Judges11:39 Nam7u aginappe guye ba aawaakko simma yadus; izikka GODAAS ba adinettida adinaa gaththides; iza mulekka azina gelontta attadus.
Judges11:40 He wodeppe doommidi Isra7eeleta naateththa macca nayti layththan layththan oyddu gallas bantta sooppe haakki biidi Gala7aade dere Yoftahe nays mishetti yeehoy lose gidides.
Judges12:1 Efreeme dere asay olas baana giigettidi Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidi Xafoone geetettiza katama gakkida wode Yoftahes
Judges12:2 Yoftahey isttas
Judges12:3 Intte tana ashshonttayssa erida gishshas ta shemppos qadhettontta dashe Amooneta olanaas istta zawa pinna badis; GODAY istta ta kushen aaththi immides. Histtiin intte ha7i ays tana olanaas yidetii?» gides.
Judges12:4 Efreeme asay kase isttas
Judges12:5 Efreeme asay baqatontta mala Yordaanoose shaafaa pinniza purde ubbaa Gala7aadeti oykkida; baqatanaas koyza Efreeme dere asi ooninne pinnanaas oychchiza wode Gala7aadeti
Judges12:6 «Ane
Judges12:7 Yoftahey Isra7eele asaa bollan usuppun layth kumeth daannatides; hessafe guye Yoftahey hayqqidi ba dere Gala7aaden diza katamatappe issaan moogettides.
Judges12:8 Yoftaheppe kaallidi Beeteliheeme as Ibxaaney Isra7eele asaa bolla pirdiza daanna gidides.
Judges12:9 Ibxaanes 30 attuma naytinne 30 macca nayti deettes; izi ba macca nayta ba qommo gidontta attuma naytas immides; ba attuma naytaska ba qommo gidontta macca nayta giigsidi ehides. Ibxaaney Isra7eele bolla laappun layth daannatides.
Judges12:10 Ibxaaney hayqqidi Beeteliheemen moogettides.
Judges12:11 Ibxaaneppe kaallidi Zaabiloone dere as Eelooney Isra7eele asaa bolla 10 layth daannatides.
Judges12:12 Hessafe guye hayqqidi Zaabiloone deren diza Eeloone biittan moogettides.
Judges12:13 Eelooneppe kaallidi Piraatoone dere as Hilele naa Abdooney Isra7eele bolla daannatides.
Judges12:14 Abdoones 70 hareta toggiza 40 attuma naytinne 30 nayta nayti deettes; Abdooney Isra7eele asaa bolla 8 layth daannatides.
Judges12:15 Hessafe guye Piraatoone dere as Hilele naa Abdooney hayqqidi Amaaleeqe deren gezze bolla Efreeme biittan diza Piraatoonen moogettides.
Judges13:1 Isra7eele asay GODAA sinththan qasseka iita miish ooththides. Hessa gishshas GODAY istta oyddu tammu layththas Filisxeeme asaa kushen aaththi immides.
Judges13:2 He wode Xora7a geetettiza katamaan Maanuhe geetettiza issaadey dees; izas yeletay Daane baggafe; iza machchiya maynne gidida gishshas naa yelabeekku.
Judges13:3 Issi gallas Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchay he maccassaysi qonccidi
Judges13:4 Hessa gishshas woyne cajje woykko maththosiza ushshu uyontta malanne aykko tuna miishshika montta mala naagetta.
Judges13:5 Gaasoykka ne shaarana; attuma naakka yelana. Naazi ba aayey uloppe doommidi
Judges13:6 Hessafe guye maccassaya baada
Judges13:7 Gido attiin izi tana
Judges13:8 Hessafe guye Maanuhey
Judges13:9 Xoossika Maanuhe woosaa siyides. Xoossa kiitanchchayka Maccassaya gade giddon dishin nam7anththo izis beettides; gido attiin he wode izi azina Maanuhey izira deenna.
Judges13:10 Maccassaya eeson ba azinaakko baada
Judges13:11 Maanuhey uttidasohoppe dendi eqqidi ba machchiyo kaalli biidi addezi dizaso gakkidi
Judges13:12 Maanuhey
Judges13:13 Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchay izas
Judges13:14 Woyne miththafe beettiza ay miishshika muuppu; woyne cajje woykko maththosiza ushshu uyuppu; tunida ay kaththika muuppu; ta izo azazidayssa ubbaa polu» gi yootides.
Judges13:15 Maanuhey qasse Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchaa
Judges13:16 Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchay zaaridi
Judges13:17 Maanuhey Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchazas
Judges13:18 Kiitanchchazikka «Ta sunththay malalsa; neni ta sunththaa ays oychchay?» giidi zaarides.
Judges13:19 Maanuheykka he deysha laaqqaanne kaththa yarsho ekkidi
Judges13:20 Yarsho yarshizasoppe tama lacoy pude popol7u gishin Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchay tama lacoza giddora salo kezides. Maanuheynne iza machcheya hessa be7idi sinththa guth gufannida.
Judges13:21 Godaa Xoossa kiitanchchay Maanuhessinne iza machcheys nam7anththo qonccontta aggida gishshas izi GODAA kiitanchcha gididayssa Maanuhey he wode erides.
Judges13:22 Maanuhey ba machchiyo
Judges13:23 Gido attiin iza zaarada
Judges13:24 Maccassayakka attuma naa yeladus; naaza sunththaaka Samsoone gaada sunththadus. Naazi diccides; GODAYKKA iza anjjides.
Judges13:25 Izi Xora7appenne Eshtta7ooleppe giddon Daane gutan dishin Godaa Xoossa Ayanay iza denththeththo doommides.
Judges14:1 Issi gallas Samsooney Temina geetettizaso wodhdhides; heenkka issi Filisxeeme macca nayo be7ides.
Judges14:2 Soo simmidi ba aawaanne ba aayo
Judges14:3 Iza aawaynne aayeya iza
Judges14:4 Filisxeemeta olanaas GODAY gaaso koyidi hayssa istta bolla ooththizayssa Samsoone aawaynne aayeya eribeettenna; he wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eele asaa haareettes.
Judges14:5 Hessafe guye Samsooney ba aawaranne ba aayeyra duge Temina woyne miththi diza heera gakkishin issi wodalla gaammoy xaaggishe iza bolla kezides.
Judges14:6 GODAA Ayanay Samsoone bolla wodhdhidi izas wolqqa immides; qeeri deysha laaqqa mala ba kushen aykkoka oykkontta gaammoza peedhereththi yeggides. Hessaka ba aawassinne ba aayeys yootibeenna.
Judges14:7 Hessafe guye duge naykko biidi izo haasayssides; keehippe izo dosides.
Judges14:8 Guuththa wodeppe guye izo ekkanaas simmi bides; ba wodhida gaammoza ahaa be7anaas ogeppe sher7i giidi biza wode gaammoza aha giddon maththi ees eessi dizayssa be7ides.
Judges14:9 Eessaafe amardayssa kaashi ekkidi ogen mishe bides. Ba aawakkonne ba aayeykko gakkidi ba oykkida eessaafe amardayssa isttas immiin isttika mida; gido attiin Samsooney he eessaa gaammoza aha giddofe ekkidayssa isttas yootibeenna.
Judges14:10 Iza aaway nayo be7ana iziso biin Samsooney heen diza mishirateththa wogaa mala bullachcha giigsides; hessi kasesofe he deraan lose gidi diza woga.
Judges14:11 He asay iza be7ida wode iza kaassana mala 30 naateththa nayta dooridi yeddida.
Judges14:12 Samsooney isttas
Judges14:13 He maaleththaa birsheththi inttena xoonikko intte taas 30 layno qamisatanne 30 kumeththa may7o immeeta» gides. Istti
Judges14:14 Samsooneykka isttas
Judges14:15 Oydanththo gallas istti Samsoone machchiyo
Judges14:16 Hessa gishshas Samsoone machchiya hiqima yeekkashe izakko shiiqada
Judges14:17 Hessa gaason iza mishireya bullachcha ba7aaley bonchchettiza laappun gallassata ubbaan yeekka yeekkada shemppo diggiin laappunththa gallas maaleththoza birsheththaa izis yootides; izakka baada ba biitta asaas yootadus.
Judges14:18 Laappunththa gallas arshey wullanaappe kase katama asay Samsoones
Judges14:19 Hessafe guye GODAA Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhidi izas wolqqa immides; izikka Asqeloona biitta wodhdhidi 30 as wodhides; isttas diza ubbaanne istta may7oka qaari ekkidi maaleththoza birshida asatas ehidi immides. Hanida ubbaan hanqo suullidi ba aawa soo simmi bides.
Judges14:20 Samsoone machchiya iza laggetappe issaa geladus.
Judges15:1 Guuth takkishin gistte maxa wode Samsooney ba machchiyo be7anaas deysha laaqqa ekkidi bides; izi ba machchey aawaas
Judges15:2 Izi aaway Samsoones
Judges15:3 Samsooney izas
Judges15:4 Heeppe kezi biidi 300 worakanata oykkides; 2 worakanata goyna issife gaththi qachchidi istta goynatappe giddon yiicettida xomppe gelththi qachchidi yeddides.
Judges15:5 Hessafe guye yiicettida xomppezan tama oyththidi buro maxettontta diza Filisxeeme asaa kaththaa giddo worakanata yeddides; maxetti dooretti uttida kaththaa
Judges15:6 Filisxeemeti ba garsan
Judges15:7 Samsooney isttas
Judges15:8 Istta bolla iita meto gaththidi darota wodhides; hessafe guye biidi Exaame geetettizason diza zaalla gongolo giddo geli uttides.
Judges15:9 Hessafe guye Filisxeeme asay yiidi Yuhudan dunkaanides; Leeha geetettiza katama worajji oykkides.
Judges15:10 Yuhuda asay isttas
Judges15:11 Hessa gishshas Yuhudappe 300 asay Exaame geetettizason diza zaalla gongolo giddo biidi Samsoones
Judges15:12 Isttika qasseka
Judges15:13 Istti
Judges15:14 Samsooney Leeha bida wode Filisxeeme asati wocamidi izara gayttanaas yida; GODAA Ayanay iza bolla wodhdhidi izas wolqqa immides; iza kushe qachchi woththida wodorozikka taman gelida shalo mala duuxeretti wodhdhides.
Judges15:15 Histtidi mata wode hayqqida issi hare banqila demmi ekkidi izan 1
Judges15:16 Samsooney
Judges15:17 Hessafe ba oykkida banqilaza kusheppe wora olides; he sohoza
Judges15:18 Hessafe guye Samsooney keehi saamettides; hessa gishshas GODAAS
Judges15:19 Xoossi Leehan diza biittaa phalqiin izappe haaththi kezides. Samsooney he haaththaafe uyidi alida gishshas izas shemppoy simmides. Hessa gishshas he soho
Judges15:20 Filisxeeme asay biittaa haariza wode Samsooney Isra7eele asaa bolla nam7u tammu layth daannatides.
Judges16:1 Issi gallas Samsooney Gaaza giza Filisxeemeta katama bides; heen issi layma maccassiyo be7idi izira aqanaas iziso gelides.
Judges16:2 Gaaza katamaan diza asay Samsooney istta katama yidayssa siyida; histtidi katamaa yuuyi aadhdhidi omars kumeth katamaa penge naagishe aqida; «Sa7ay wonttana gakkanaas naagidi nuni iza wodhana» giidi omars kumeth zamadi aqida.
Judges16:3 Gido attiin Samsooney heen zin7iday giddi giddoth gakkanaas xalla; giddi giddoth dhiskofe dendidi katamaa gimbeza penge sanqqaa
Judges16:4 Hessafe guye Samsooney Soreeqe shoobban diza issi Dalilo geetettiza maccassayo dosides.
Judges16:5 Hessa gishshas Filisxeemeta halaqati izikko yiidi
Judges16:6 Hessa gishshas Dalilay Samsoones
Judges16:7 Samsooney
Judges16:8 Hessafe guye Filisxeemeta halaqati Dalilas laappun irxxa dafota ehida; izankka Samsoone qachchadus.
Judges16:9 Filisxeeme asata ba qol7an qotta woththada
Judges16:10 Hessa gishshas Dalilay Samsoones
Judges16:11 Histtiin izi izo
Judges16:12 Dalilay ooraththa wodoro ekkada Samsoone qachchadus. Izis qol7a giddon naagettiza Filisxeeme asata woththada
Judges16:13 Qasseka
Judges16:14 Hessafe guye Samsooney dhiskiin Dalilay iza hu7e laappun daththata qacinara gaththa dadada dhishken aaththa dhishkadus. Histtada
Judges16:15 Hessa gishshas iza
Judges16:16 Izi hayqo amottana gakkanaas wontiin wontiin oyshon shemppo dhayssadus.
Judges16:17 Hessa gishshas Samsooney izis
Judges16:18 Ba wozinan dizayssa ubbaa izi yootidayssa Dalilay shaakka erada
Judges16:19 Dalilay Samsoone ba wodira bolla dhiskisadus; issi as xeyga ehada iza hu7e laappun daththata meedisadus; iza wolqqayka izappe dhaydes; hessafe guye iza kawushsho oykkadus;
Judges16:20 Hessafe guye
Judges16:21 Filisxeemeti iza oykkidaappe guye nam7u ayfeta wooci kessidi Gaaza katama efida; xarqimala sansalatan iza qachchida; heen qasho keeththan dishe kath gaaccana mala ooththida.
Judges16:22 Istti iza hu7e binanaa meedidaappe guye binanay simmi moko doommides.
Judges16:23 Filisxeemeta halaqati
Judges16:24 Asay ubbay iza beyda wode
Judges16:25 Istti keehi ufayettida gishshas
Judges16:26 Samsooney iza kushe oykkidi kaaleththiza naaza
Judges16:27 Keeththaa giddon addeynne maccay kumi uttides; qasse Filisxeemeta halaqati ubbatikka heen deettes. Samsooney kaa7ishin bolla pooqe bolla utti xeelliza 3
Judges16:28 He wode Samsooney GODAA woossidi
Judges16:29 Samsooney keeththaa tookki oykkida giddo tuussata nam7aakka oykkides; issaa ushachcha kushen
Judges16:30 «Ane ta shemppoy Filisxeemetara issife dhayo!» giidi waassides; baas diza wolqqa ubbaan tuussata sugiin keeththay halaqata bollanne giddon diza asaa ubbaa bolla kundides. Samsooney hayqqishe wodhida asay izi paxa dishe wodhida asaappe darides.
Judges16:31 Hessa gishshas iza ishatinne iza dabboti ubbay yiidi iza ahaa efida; Xora7a katamaappenne Eshtta7oole katamaappe giddon iza aawa Maanuhe duufon moogida. Samsooney nam7u tammu layth kumeth Isra7eele deraa bolla daannatides.
Judges17:1 Efreemen bolla gezzen Mikiyaasa geetettiza issaadey dees.
Judges17:2 Issi gallas Mikiyaasi ba aayo
Judges17:3 Naazi 1
Judges17:4 Naazi ba aayeys miishshaa zaariin iza aayeya he biraappe 200 saqile bira ekkada mith massidi biran tiyi tiydi eeqa misle medhdhiza issi hiillazas immadus; he oosettida eeqa xoossaa mislezi Mikiyaasa soon uttides.
Judges17:5 Mikiyaasikka eeqas goynnizasoy dees; izi eefudenne terafime ooththidi ba naytappe issaa qeese gidi ooththana mala doorides.
Judges17:6 He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baynda gishshas asi bana lo7ida mala hanees.
Judges17:7 He wode Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheeme katamaan diza Lewe baggafe gidida issi naateththa asi dees.
Judges17:8 Izaadeyka baas daanaso koyanaas Beeteliheeme katamappe dendi bides; izikka Efreeme deren bolla zunbullaan diza Mikiyaasa soo gakkides.
Judges17:9 Mikiyaasi izas
Judges17:10 Mikiyaasi izas
Judges17:11 He Lewe naateththazi Mikiyaasara issife de7anaas qofa qachchides; izikka Mikiyaasas yelo mala hanides.
Judges17:12 Mikiyaasi iza ba qeese histtidi sunththiin iza soon de7ides.
Judges17:13 Mikiyaasikka
Judges18:1 Dawiti Sa7oolera haasayetti giigida mala Yoonataaney Dawites shemppo lagge gidides; ba hu7e mala iza siiqides.
Judges18:2 He gallassafe doommidi Sa7ooli Dawite banara woththides attiin gede iza aawa soo iza yeddibeenna. Isttika Efreeme deren shaara menththo bolla diza Mikiyaasa soo gakki aqida.
Judges18:3 Yoonataaney Dawite mala siiqida gishshas izara caaqettides.
Judges18:4 Yoonataaney ba may7ida kaabbaza kessidi ola may7oza
Judges18:5 Sa7ooli kiittidaso awankka Dawiti ba kiitettidayssa bessida mala poliza gishshas ba olanchchata bolla shuumides; hessi deraa ubbaanne Sa7oole ola shuumeta ufayssides.
Judges18:6 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza wodhidaappe guye asay baso baso simmishin maccassati karabenne maasinqo oykkidi yexxishe
Judges18:7 Maccassatikka sorshenne eeddishe
Judges18:8 Hayssi ha hanozi iza ufayssontta gishshas Sa7ooli keehi hanqettides; izikka
Judges18:9 He gallassafe haa simmiin Sa7ooli Dawite miqqayneteththa ayfen xeelo doommides.
Judges18:10 Wonteththa gallas Xoossafe azazettida iita ayana wolqqay Sa7oole bolla wodhdhides; he wode Dawiti kase ooththizayssaththo bagana shocishin Sa7ooli bason uttidi tinbite haasayees; Sa7ooli toora ba kushen oykki uttides;
Judges18:11 Izikka
Judges18:12 Yuhuda biittan diza Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime geetettiza katamaappe arshey wulliza baggara dunkaanida; hessa gishshas he sohoy hach gakkanaas Daane Mooth geetettees.
Judges18:13 Hessafe dendidi Efreeme deren zumbulla bolla diza Mikiyaasa soo yida.
Judges18:14 Laysha biitta xomosanaas bida ichchashu asati bantta ishatas
Judges18:15 Ogeppe simmidi Lewe zare gidida yelaga qeesey diza Mikiyaasa soo biidi iza sarokkida.
Judges18:16 He wode Daane qommofe olas giigetti yida 600 asay gibbe geliza pengen eqqides.
Judges18:17 Qeesezi isttara gibbe pengen eqon dishin biitta xomosida 5 asati Mikiyaasa soo gelidi
Judges18:18 Istti ekki bishin qeesezi isttas
Judges18:19 Istti izas
Judges18:20 Histtiin qeesezi ufayettidi eefude
Judges18:21 Hessafe dendidi bantta nayta
Judges18:22 Istti Mikiyaasa keeththafe haakkidi bidaappe guye Mikiyaasi ba shooron diza asata xeygiin olas kezida; Daane asata kaallidi gakkida.
Judges18:23 Histtidi istti guyera waassida; Daane qommofe yida asati guye simmidi Mikiyaasa
Judges18:24 Mikiyaasi zaaridi
Judges18:25 Daane qommofe yida ola asati
Judges18:26 Hessafe guye Daane qommofe yida asati bantta oge bida. Mikiyaasikka isttara eqettanaas dandayonttayssa eridi ba soo guye simmi bides.
Judges18:27 Daane qommofe yida asati Mikiyaasi medhdhida xoossatanne iza qeeseza ekkidi Laysha kataman oonakka sidhontta saro diza asataakko bida; he katamaan diza ubbaa giththa mashshan suppu histti wodhida; katamayokka taman xuuggida.
Judges18:28 Laysha katamay Sidoona katamaappe haakki diza gishshassinne asay hara asara gaytti erontta gishshas istta ashshiza asi oonikka beettibeenna; Laysha katamay Beeti-Rahoobe matan diza zullen dees. Daane qommoti katamaa zaari ooththidi baas duussaso kessida.
Judges18:29 He katamayssi kase Laysha geetettiza sunththaa laammidi Yaaqoobe naytappe issaa sunththan
Judges18:30 Daane qommoti baas goynnanaas eeqa xoossata essida; Muse naa Gershoomeppe yelettida Yoonataane bantta qeese ooththida. Iza zareti asay di7etti bida wode gakkanaas isttas qeese gidida.
Judges18:31 Hessa malan hanidi Xoossa Dunkaaney Seelon de7ida layththatan ubbaan Mikiyaasi ooththida eeqa xoossa mislezi heen gam7ides.
Judges19:1 Isra7eele biittan kase kawoy kawotontta wode Efreemen zumbulla bolla haahon Lewe qommotappe issaadey dees. He addezi Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheeme katamaappe ba laggeththiza issi maccassayo ekki yides.
Judges19:2 Gido attiin iza izara ooyettada Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheeme katamaan diza ba aawa soo baada heen oyddu agina uttadus.
Judges19:3 Izi laggeththozi izo yooti ammanththidi zaari ekki yaanaas qofa qachchides; bishe ba ayllenne nam7u hareta ekkidi bides; iza mokka ekkada ba aawaa soo gelththadus; izi aaway iza be7idi ufayssan mokki ekkides.
Judges19:4 Nayi aaway izi heen takkana mala woossiin addezi mishenne uyishe 3 gallas heen takkides.
Judges19:5 Oydanththo gallas maalado wonttara dendi baanaas giigettida; gido attiin nay aaway ba nay laggeththozas
Judges19:6 Hessa gishshas nam7u asatikka uttidi issife midanne uyida. Hessafe guye nay aaway iza
Judges19:7 Nay laggeththozi baanaas dendiin nay aaway izi bontta aqana mala woossiin heen aqides.
Judges19:8 Ichchashanththo gallas baanaas maalado wonttara dendiin nay aaway qasseka
Judges19:9 Addezi ba laggeththoyranne ba ayllera baana keziin nay aaway
Judges19:10 Gido attiin izi he gallas heen aqanaas koyontta gishshas
Judges19:11 Istti Yaabuse matishin sa7ay keehi qammida gishshas ayllezi ba godaas
Judges19:12 Godazi izas zaaridi
Judges19:13 Qasse zaareththidi ba ayllezas
Judges19:14 Histtidi sinth buus gujjida; istti biidi Biniyaame biittan diza Gibi7a katama matishin arshey wullides.
Judges19:15 Istti Gibi7a katama gelidi dubbushiza demban uttida; gido attiin heeppe istta baso efidi ayssiza asi beettibeenna.
Judges19:16 He gallassa omars Efreeme dere shaara menththo bollafe yiidi Gibi7an diza issi cima addezi ba gaden ooththi pe7idi soo simmi yishe istti dizaso gakkides; he wode he deren diza asay Biniyaame zareta;
Judges19:17 Cima addezikka he katamaan diza dembaan uttida addeza be7idi
Judges19:18 Imaththazi zaaridi
Judges19:19 Nu haretas uttulaynne harqqoy dees; taas
Judges19:20 Cima addezi
Judges19:21 Hessa gishshas istta ba soo efidi istta haretaska harqqo yeggides. Hessafe guye imaththati bantta tohoza meecettidi kawo mida ushshika uyida.
Judges19:22 Istti ufayettishin katamaappe worballa asati yiidi keeththaa yuushon yuuyi aadhdhidi
Judges19:23 Keeththaa goday kare kezidi isttas
Judges19:24 Be7ite! Taas geela7o nayanne iza laggeththoya hayssan deettes. Tani istta inttes kare kessana; he wode istta intte koyidayssa ooththite; gido attiin ha addeza bolla hessa mala harassiza ooso ooththofte» gides.
Judges19:25 Gido attiin asati izi gizayssa siyontta ixxida. Hessa gishshas Lewe zarezi ba laggeththoyo isttas kare kessi yeddides; sa7ay wonttana gakkanaas laametti laametti izira zin7idi sa7ay wonttana gishin yeddida.
Judges19:26 Izakka wonttanaas bazzoy zo7ishin yaada izi goday aqida cima addeza keeththaa pengen kundadus; xalqqey kezana gakkanaas hessan porccu ga ichchadus.
Judges19:27 He gallas maalado izi godazi dendidi ba oge baanaas keeththaa penge doydi kezishin iza laggeththoya keeththaa pengen ba kushe miccada ichchidaaro be7ides.
Judges19:28 Izi izo
Judges19:29 Soo gakkida mala mashsha ekkidi ba laggeththoy aha 12 kessi qanxxereththides; kumeththa Isra7eele deraa gakkana mala issi issi qanxxo 12 Isra7eele qommotas yeddides.
Judges19:30 Hessa be7ida ubbay
Judges20:1 Daaneppe Bersaabehe geetettiza katama gakkanaas Gala7aadeppe Isra7eele asay ubbay issi asa mala Mixiphpha geetettiza katamaan GODAA sinththan issife shiiqides.
Judges20:2 He shiiqida Xoossa asaara Isra7eele qommota kaaleththiza qommo halaqatikka deettes. Istta giddon olas giigettida 400
Judges20:3 He wode Isra7eele asay Mixiphpha katamaan shiiqidayssa Biniyaame qommoti siyida. Isra7eele asay
Judges20:4 Hessa gishshas hayqqidaari laggeththo Lewe qommozi
Judges20:5 Gibi7a katama asay tana wodhanaas yiidi ta aqana gelida keeththaa omars giddoththides; hessafe guye ta laggeththoyra istti wolqqan zin7iin hayqqadus.
Judges20:6 He izi aha tani ekkada qanxxereththidaappe guye istti hayssa tunanne pala miish Isra7eelen ooththida gishshas Isra7eele asay laattidi dizason issi issi qommos issi issi qanxxo yeddadis.
Judges20:7 Isra7eele asay ubbay intte garsan issoy issaara ane zorettidi intte pirda immite» gides.
Judges20:8 Asay ubbay issi wozina gididi
Judges20:9 Nuni Gibi7a bolla ooththanayssi saama yeggidi saamay nuna gakkoso gakkoso olas worajjana.
Judges20:10 Kumeththa Isra7eele asaappe ola biza asatas shinqe tookkanaas xeetaappe tammata
Judges20:11 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay issi wozinan gididi olas worajjides.
Judges20:12 Isra7eele zareti Biniyaame zareta ubbaas as kiittida; «Intte giddon oosettida ha iita oosozi aazee?
Judges20:13 Nuni istta wodhidi Isra7eeleppe ha iitaa dhayssana mala Gibi7a katamaan diza he worballata kessidi nuus aaththi immite» gida. Gido attiin Biniyaame qommoti ishati Isra7eele nayti yootizayssa siyontta ixxida.
Judges20:14 Istti Isra7eele asaara olettanaas ba diza katamatappe katamappe kezidi issife Gibi7a katama shiiqida.
Judges20:15 He gallassika Gibi7a katamaan diza asaa giddofe dumma doorettida 700 asaappe bollara Biniyaame katamatappe yida giththa mashshan olettiza 26
Judges20:16 He ubbata giddofe 700 asati hadirsa kushen olizayta; ha ubbatikka yanbarshan shuch olidi haray attoshin issi binanakka halettenna.
Judges20:17 Biniyaame qommo gujjontta Isra7eele asay olas giigettida 400
Judges20:18 Isra7eele asay Beetele biidi
Judges20:19 Hessa gishshas wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara Isra7eele asay dendidi Gibi7a katamaa matan dunkaanides.
Judges20:20 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaara olettanaas bides; Gibi7a katamaa matan isttara olettanaas yaachchan yaachchan eqqides.
Judges20:21 Biniyaame qommoti Gibi7a katamappe kezidi he gallas Isra7eele asaappe 22
Judges20:22 Isra7eele asay biidi sa7ay qammana gakkanaas GODAA sinththan yeekkides; «Nu ishatara
Judges20:23 
Judges20:24 Nam7anththo gallas Isra7eele asay Biniyaame qommotara olettanaas shiiqides.
Judges20:25 Nam7anththo gallassika Biniyaame asay Gibi7a katamappe kezidi Isra7eele asaappe giththa mashsha gixxida 18
Judges20:26 Hessafe guye Isra7eeleti ubbay Beetele biidi yeekkida; heen xoomidi sa7ay qammana gakkanaas
Judges20:27 He wode Xoossa caaqo Taabotay Beetele kataman dees; isttika heen Xoossa shene eranaas Xoossaa oychchida;
Judges20:28 He wode heen ooththizay Aarooney yelida El7ezeere naa Finihaase; Isra7eele asay GODAA
Judges20:29 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay amarda olanchchata Gibi7a katamaa yuushon qotetti naagana mala ooththides.
Judges20:30 Heedzdzanththo gallas Isra7eele olanchchati kaseyssaththoka Biniyaame olanchchata olanaas biidi Gibi7a katamappe sinththa baggara yaachchan yaachchan eqqida.
Judges20:31 Biniyaame qommoti isttara olettanaas kezida; he ola asaa kaallishe ba diza katamappe haakoso bida; kaseyssaththoka Beetelenne Gibi7a efiza aaho ogetaninne dembatan Isra7eele asaappe 30 gidiza asata wodhida.
Judges20:32 Biniyaame qommoti
Judges20:33 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay kase ba dizasoppe guye baqatidi Ba7aali-Taamaare geetettizason yaachchan yaachchan eqqida; qotetti utti naagiza Isra7eele asay Gibi7a dembaafe kezides;
Judges20:34 Isra7eele ubbaafe doorettida 10
Judges20:35 Isra7eeleti Biniyaame qommota bolla xoono demmana mala GODAY ooththides. He gallas Isra7eele asay Biniyaame qommotappe giththa mashsha gixxidayta 25
Judges20:36 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay bana xoonidayssa Biniyaame asay erides. Isra7eele asay Gibi7a katama yuushon zamadi uttida olanchchatan ammanettida gishshas Biniyaame asaan xoonettidaa misatidi guye baqatides.
Judges20:37 Zamadi naagiza olanchchati Gibi7a katama eeson woxxi gelidi katamaa giddon demmida ubbaa wodhida.
Judges20:38 Zamadidi naagiza Isra7eele olanchchati katamaa giddon malata gidana mala cuwa shaaraththo pude denththanaas kase haasayi woththida.
Judges20:39 Ola demban diza Isra7eele asay baqatizasoppe guye simmidi istta olida. Biniyaame asati Isra7eele asaappe 30 gidiza asata wodhidi
Judges20:40 Gido attiin malata cuway shaara mala katama giddon tullu gishin Biniyaame qommoti guye simmi xeellida; katamaya mulera taman xuugettishin tama lacoy pude kezizayssa be7ida.
Judges20:41 Hessafe guye kase baqatizaada haniza Isra7eele asay simmi wodhdhidi Biniyaame qommota ola oykkides; Biniyaame qommoti isttas wuro gallas gididayssa eridi keehi dagammida.
Judges20:42 Hessa gishshas istti Isra7eele asaa sinththafe bazzo simmidi baqatida; gido attiin olay istta kaalli gakkides; katamatappe kezida Isra7eele olanchchati giddo aaththi istta wodhi wursida.
Judges20:43 Isra7eele asay Biniyaame qommota giddoththi oykkidi Gibi7a katamappe arshey keziza baggara dizasoho gakkanaas daro dere wodhida.
Judges20:44 Hessan Biniyaame qommotappe 18
Judges20:45 isttafe attidayti guye simmidi bazzo kanththidi Ermoone geetettiza zaallaako baqatida; Isra7eeleti isttafe 5
Judges20:46 He gallas Biniyaame biittafe giththa mashshan olettiza 25
Judges20:47 Gido attiin 600 asati bazzo kanththidi Ermoone zaallaako baqatidi heen 4 agina takkida.
Judges20:48 Isra7eele asay attida Biniyaame asaakko guye simmidi
Judges21:1 Isra7eele asay Mixiphpha geetettizason shiiqida wode
Judges21:2 Isra7eeleti Beetele katamaa biidi heen sa7ay qammana gakkanaas Xoossa sinththan uttida; bantta qaalaakka dhoqqu histtidi camo yeeho yeekkida.
Judges21:3 «Abeet GODAA Isra7eele Xoossawu
Judges21:4 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara istti dendidi
Judges21:5 Histtidi Isra7eeleti
Judges21:6 Isra7eele asay bantta ishatas
Judges21:7 Nuni nu macca nayta isttas immontta mala GODAAN caaqqida gishshas hayqoppe attida Biniyaame qommoti machcho demmana mala nuni ay ooththanee?» gida.
Judges21:8 Qasseka isttas
Judges21:9 Istti asaa qoodida wode Gala7aaden diza Yaabuseppe issi asikka beettibeenna.
Judges21:10 Hessa gishshas maabaray 12
Judges21:11 Histtite addenne adde gelida maccassa ubbaa wodhite» giidi azazida.
Judges21:12 Yaabuse katamaan diza asaa ubbaa 400 geela7ota demmida; isttika Kanaane biittan
Judges21:13 Hessafe guye kumeththa maabaray Ermoone zaalla geetettizason diza Biniyaame qommotakko sigettanaas kiita yeddida.
Judges21:14 Biniyaame qommoti simmidi yida; Isra7eele asay Yaabuse katamappe wodhontta ehida geela7ota isttas immides. Gido attiin geela7ota qooday guuth gidida gishshas attuma asaa gakkibeenna.
Judges21:15 GODAY Isra7eele zereththa giddon diza issifeteththay duuxxana mala ooththida gishshas asay Biniyaame asaas keehippe qadhettides.
Judges21:16 Dere cimati
Judges21:17 Isra7eele asaa giddofe issi qommoy dhoommi dhayontta mala
Judges21:18 Gidikkonne nuni nu macca naytappe isttas immanaas dandayokko; ays giikko Isra7eele asay kase
Judges21:19 Hessafe guye dere kaaleththiza cimati
Judges21:20 He deraa kaaleththiza cimati Biniyaame qommota
Judges21:21 Naagite! Seelo katama macca nayti ba7aale gallas karabe oykkidi yexxishenne durishe yishin intte woyne tura giddofe kezite. Ubbayka Seelo macca naytappe inttes dafidi Biniyaame biitta ekki biite.
Judges21:22 Istta aawati woykko istta ishati nuukko magannanaas yiza wode nuni isttas
Judges21:23 Biniyaame qommotikka Isra7eele cimati gida mala ooththida; ubbayka Seelon yexxiza macca naytappe bantta qooda keena dafi efida. Istti bantta laata biittaa simmidi katamata woththi keexxidi heen de7ida.
Judges21:24 He wode Isra7eele asay heeppe laalettidi ubbayka ba qommoko qommokonne baso asaakko asaakko bides.
Judges21:25 He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa; asi ubbay baas lo7o misati beettoyssa coo ooththees.
Ruth1:1 Isra7eele biittaa daannati haariza wode he biittan koshay dendides. Histtiin issaadey ba machchonne nam7u attuma nayta ekkidi Yuhuda deren diza Beeteliheeme katamappe dendidi Mo7aabe biitta bides.
Ruth1:2 He addeza sunththi Abimelekke; machchey sunththi Nuhaamo; nam7u nayta sunththi Mahaloonenne Keloone geetettees. Istti Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheeme kataman Efraata dere as gidishe Mo7aabe dere biidi heen de7ida.
Ruth1:3 Heen dishin Nuhaami azina Abimelekkey hayqqiin iza ba naa nam7atara xalla attadus.
Ruth1:4 Izi nayti Mo7aabe biitta macca naytappe Orfanne Uruto machcho ekkida. Isttika heen tammu layththa keena de7ida.
Ruth1:5 Mahalooneynne Kelooney nam7atikka hayqqida. Nuhaama izi azinaynne nam7u nayti hayqqiin barkka attadus.
Ruth1:6 Iza Mo7aaben dishin GODAY ba asaa mokki xeellidi isttas kath immidayssa siyada nayta machcheta nam7ata banara ekkada ba dere simma baana kezadus.
Ruth1:7 Kase ba dizaso yeggada nayta machcheta nam7atara issife Yuhuda biitta efiza ogen gelidi buus doommida.
Ruth1:8 Hessafe guye Nuhaama ba nayta machcheta nam7atas
Ruth1:9 Intte issoy issoy gelana azinason GODAY inttes woppa immo» gaada istta yeeradus. Istti ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi yeekkida;
Ruth1:10 qasseka isttika izis
Ruth1:11 Nuhaama isttas
Ruth1:12 Ta naytoo tani hara azina gelontta mala keeha cimadis; tani hach azina gelada attuma naa yelizaakkoka
Ruth1:13 istti dicci gakkanaashe intte istta naaganee? Istta naagishe intte azina gelontta gam7anee? Ta naytoo
Ruth1:14 Hessa gishshas istti ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi qasseka yeekkida. Histtiin Orfay ba bolloteyo yeera ekkada simmadus. Gido attiin Uruta izippe shaakettana koyontta gishshas izo idimma oykkada yeddontta ixxadus.
Ruth1:15 Nuhaama izis zaarada
Ruth1:16 Gido attiin Uruta zaarada
Ruth1:17 Ne hayqqizason ta hayqqana; heenkka tani moogettana; hayqoppe attiin haray tana neeppe shaakkiko GODAY ta bolla pirdo; hessafekka bollara hara iita izi ta bolla ooththo» gadus.
Ruth1:18 Uruta izira baanaas ba qofaa qachchidayssa Nuhaama erida wode ba gizayssa aggada co7u gadus.
Ruth1:19 Hessafe guye nam7atikka Beeteliheeme gakkanaas issife bida. Istti Beeteliheeme gakkiza wode he katama asay wuri istta hanotaan malalettides. Qasse maccassati
Ruth1:20 Iza zaarada isttas
Ruth1:21 Tani kumeth kezadis shin GODAY tana mela kushe zaarides. GODAY tana un7eththides; Ubbaa Dandayza GODAY ta bolla iita miish gaththides. Histtiin tana ays Nuhaamee gi xeygeetii?» gadus.
Ruth1:22 Hessafe guye Nuhaama ba naa machcho Urutira Mo7aabeppe simmadus. Istta banggay maxa doomettishin Beeteliheeme gakkida.
Ruth2:1 Nuhaamis izi azina Abimelekke baggara dabbotiza Boo7eeze geetettiza issi erettida dure asi dees.
Ruth2:2 Issi gallas Mo7aabe dere as Uruta Nuhaamo
Ruth2:3 Histtiin Uruta baada kath maxiza asaa guyeppe piixe shiisho doommadus; iza piixeza shiishshiza gadey Abimelekke dabbo Boo7eeze gade.
Ruth2:4 He wodekka Boo7eezey Beeteliheeme katamappe gakki wodhdhidi kath maxiza asaa
Ruth2:5 Histtiin Boo7eezey kath maxizaytas kaabboza
Ruth2:6 Kaabbozi zaaridi
Ruth2:7 Iza tana
Ruth2:8 Histtiin Boo7eezey Uruto
Ruth2:9 Attuma asati maxizaso xeellada macca nayta kaalla; addeti nena bochchontta mala tani isttas yootadis; nena saamizaa gidikko addeti ehi woththida haaththaafe duuqqa duuqqa uya» gides.
Ruth2:10 Uruta ba hu7e biitta gaththa ziggada
Ruth2:11 Boo7eezey zaaridi
Ruth2:12 Neni ooththidayssa kushe GODAY nees zaaro. Neni iza qefe garsan attanaas yida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nees dakko immo» gides.
Ruth2:13 Uruta
Ruth2:14 Quma mishin Boo7eezey izo
Ruth2:15 Qasseka iza piixeza shiishshanaas dendiza wode Boo7eezey ba oosanchchata
Ruth2:16 Mirqqezappeka shoddidi izis yeggiko iza qoru; izo hanqofte» gides.
Ruth2:17 Heen Uruta omars gakkanaas piixeza zam7iin tammu kilo gidanaazi kezides.
Ruth2:18 Iza he kaththaa ba7a ekkada katama simmadus; ay gina kath shiishshidaakko izi bolloteya be7adus; qasseka Uruta kase mishin tirpi attidayssa izis kessa immadus.
Ruth2:19 Histtiin izi bolloteya izo
Ruth2:20 Nuhaama ba naaza machcheys ba lo7eteththaa
Ruth2:21 Qasseka Mo7aabe dere as Uruta
Ruth2:22 Nuhaama ba naaza machcho Uruto
Ruth2:23 Hessa gishshas Uruta Boo7eeze macca oosanchchatakko shiiqada banggaynne gisttey maxetti wurana gakkanaas piixashe gam7adus. Qasse ba bolloteyra issife de7adus.
Ruth3:1 Issi gallas Nuhaama ba naaza machchiyo Uruto
Ruth3:2 Neni isttara gam7ida macca oosanchchati izas kiitettiza Boo7eezey nuna ashon laattiza dabbo. Haa siya
Ruth3:3 Neni meecettada
Ruth3:4 Izi ichchizaso lo7eththa xeellada izas tohosora afala qaarada iza tohoson ichcha; hessafe guye ne hananayssa izi nees yootana» gadus.
Ruth3:5 Histtiin Uruta
Ruth3:6 Hessa gishshas Uruta duge baleza baada izi bolloteya izis yootidayssa ubbaa ooththadus.
Ruth3:7 Boo7eezey mi uyidi ufayettidaappe guye kaththa doore achchan ichchides; histtiin Uruta loddara izakko shiiqada iza afala tohosora qaarada tohoson ichchadus.
Ruth3:8 Giddi giddoth gidishin issi miishshi addeza daganththiin izi shirettishin issi maccassi iza tohosora ichchidaaro demmides.
Ruth3:9 Izikka izo
Ruth3:10 Boo7eezey zaaridi
Ruth3:11 Ha7ikka ta nayee babbofa; neni oychchidayssa ubbaa ta nees ooththana; gaasoykka ta dere asay wuri neni lo7o haniza maccas gididayssa erees.
Ruth3:12 Tani laata dabbo gidikkoka nena laattanaas taappe matiza hara dabboy dees.
Ruth3:13 Ha7i hayssan aqa; bitanezi nena laattana koykko lo7o; izi nena laattana koyontta aggiko ta nees GODAAN caaqqays ta laata ekkana; gadey wonttana gakkanaas hayssan ichcha» gides.
Ruth3:14 Hessa gishshas Uruta gadey wonttana gakkanaas iza tohoson ichchadus; Boo7eezey
Ruth3:15 Boo7eezey izo
Ruth3:16 Uruta ba bolloteyko biin Nuhaama izo
Ruth3:17 Qasseka
Ruth3:18 Nuhaamakka izo
Ruth4:1 Boo7eezey katamaa penge achchan diza dubbushaa kezidi heen uttides. Izi utti dishin izi kase iza gishshas yootida laata dabboy heera aadhdhizayssa be7idi
Ruth4:2 Boo7eezey he katamaa cimatappe tammu asata xeygidi
Ruth4:3 Hessafe guye Boo7eezey laatas bessiza mata dabbozas
Ruth4:4 Ne hessa erana mala ta qoppida gishshas ha7i hayssan diza asaa sinththaninne ta deraa cimata sinththan gadeza ne shammana mala ta nena qofsana koyadis; ne wozzana koykko wozzanaas dandayaasa; neeppe kasetanaas bessiza hara asi deenna; ne hessa ooththontta aggiko neeppe kaallidi taas bessiza gishshas ta erana mala taas yoota» gides. Addezikka izas
Ruth4:5 Hessafe guye Boo7eezey
Ruth4:6 Histtiin he mata dabbozikka zaaridi
Ruth4:7 Beni wode Isra7eele biittan oonikka ba aqo wozzana koykko woykko haras aaththi immana koykko he yo7ozi minnana dandayzay nam7aafe issoy ba caamma tohoppe shoddidi hankkoyssas immiko hanees. Isra7eele biittan shama gidiin woykko bayzo gidiin yo7oy minnizay hessa malanna.
Ruth4:8 Hessa gishshas laatas bessiza mata dabbozi Boo7eezes
Ruth4:9 Boo7eezey cimatassinne dere ubbaas
Ruth4:10 Qasse hayqqidayssa sunththi isttaso asaa sunththa giddofe woykko katama asaa mazgabaappe dhayontta mala
Ruth4:11 Hessafe guye katamaa penge dubbushan diza cimatinne asay wuri
Ruth4:12 GODAY ne keeththaa ha lo7o yelaga maccassayfe nees immiza zereththan
Ruth4:13 Hessa gishshas Boo7eezey Uruto machcho ekkides; GODAY izis yelo immiin attuma naa yeladus.
Ruth4:14 Maccassatikka Nuhaamo
Ruth4:15 Naazi ne sunththaa ooraxissana! Ne cimmishinkka izi nena heemmana; gaasoykka nena siiqizaara laappun attuma naappeka aadhdhizaara ne naaza machcheya iza yeladus» gida.
Ruth4:16 Hessafe guye Nuhaama qeeri naaza ekka idimmadus; histtada iza lo7aththa dichchadus.
Ruth4:17 Izi gutan diza maccassati
Ruth4:18 Paareese soo asaa yeletay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; Paareesey Hexiroome yelides;
Ruth4:19 Hexiroomey Aaraame yelides; Aaraamey Aminadaabe yelides;
Ruth4:20 Aminadaabey Ne7asoone yelides; Ne7asooney Salmmoone yelides;
Ruth4:21 Salmmooney Boo7eeze yelides; Boo7eezey Iyoobeede yelides;
Ruth4:22 Iyoobeedey Isseye yelides; Isseyey Dawite yelides.
1Samuel1:1 Efreeme deren Eramaate-Zufime geetettiza shaara menththon diza Hilqaana geetettizaadey dees; izikka Efreeme dere asa; izi Yirohaame naa
1Samuel1:2 Izas Haannanne Finaana geetettiza nam7u machcheti deettes; Finaanas nayti deettes; Haannas gidikko aykko naykka deenna.
1Samuel1:3 Hilqaanay Ubbaa Dandayza GODAA goynnanaassinne izas yarsho shiishshanaas layththan layththan ba diza katamappe pude Seelo kezees; heen Eele naa nam7ati Afineynne Finihaasi GODAA qeeseta.
1Samuel1:4 Hilqaanay Seelo biidi yarsho yarshiza wodey gakkida wode ubbaan ba machcho Finaanas
1Samuel1:5 Gido attiin izi Haanna siiqiza gishshas ashozappe izis nam7u kushe immees; gidikkoka GODAY izo maynissi woththides.
1Samuel1:6 GODAY izo maynissi woththida gishshas izi dawuththaya izo hanqeththawussinne yiillochchawus.
1Samuel1:7 Hessika layththan layththan pacey baynda hanees; Haannay GODAA keeth yiza wode ubbaan iza yeekkanaashenne kaththa muussi izo xoonanaashe gakkanaas dawuththaya izo yiillochchawus.
1Samuel1:8 Hessa geedon izi azina Hilqaanay izo
1Samuel1:9 Issi gallas istti Seelon dishe miidinne uyidaappe guye Haannay denda eqqadus. He wode qeese Eeley Xoossa Keeththa pengen qosilaththa achchan oyde bolla uteththan dees.
1Samuel1:10 Haannay izi wozinay meqqida gishshas hiqima yeekkashe GODAA woossadus.
1Samuel1:11 Izakka
1Samuel1:12 Haannay GODAA aggontta woossashe takkiin Eeley izi doona xeellides.
1Samuel1:13 Haannay aykkoka qaala sissontta wozinan woossiza gishshas izis metershay xalla qaaxxees. Hessa gishshas Eeley izo maththottida asa mala qoodides.
1Samuel1:14 Izikka izo
1Samuel1:15 Haannayka izas
1Samuel1:16 Tani hayssa keena adussa woosa woossiday deexo metoynne ceecey tana gakkidayssafe dendidayssan gidida gishshas tana ne oosanchchayo issi go7ay baynda shufuro maccassa mala qoodoppa» gadus.
1Samuel1:17 Eeleykka izo
1Samuel1:18 Izakka izas
1Samuel1:19 Wonteththa gallas Hilqaanaynne izaso asay maalado wonttara dendidi GODAA goynnidaappe guye banttaso gede Eraama bida; Hilqaanay ba machcho Haannara aqides; GODAYKKA izo qoppides.
1Samuel1:20 Histtiin Haannay qanththatadus; izis wodey wuriin attuma naa yeladus; naaza sunththaaka
1Samuel1:21 Hilqaanay GODAAS layththan layththan shiishshiza yarshoza yarshanaassinne ba adinettida adinaa gaththanaas baso asaa ubbaa ekkidi Seelo kezides.
1Samuel1:22 Gido attiin Haannay isttara babeekku; iza ba azinaas
1Samuel1:23 Izi azina Hilqaanaykka izis
1Samuel1:24 Naazi dhanth duuththidaappe guye izara heedzdzu layththa wofano
1Samuel1:25 Kormaza shukkidaappe guye yidhaza ekkidi Eelekko shiishshida.
1Samuel1:26 Haannayka Eele
1Samuel1:27 He wode hayssa ha naaza immana mala woossadis; GODAYKKA ta woossidayssa taas immides.
1Samuel1:28 Hessa gishshas tanikka ha7i zaarada GODAAS iza immays; izi ba de7o layth ubbaan GODAAS imettidayssa gidana» gadus; hessafe guye heen GODAAS goynnida.
1Samuel2:1 Haannay
1Samuel2:2 «GODAA mala geeshshi oonikka deenna; neeppe attiin haray deenna; nu Xoossaa mala Zaallay deenna.
1Samuel2:3 «Hayssa mala otoron haasayopite; hayssa mala ceeqeteththa qaalay intte doonappe kezoppo; gaasoykka GODAY izi era; ooso ubbaa izi geeddarees.
1Samuel2:4 «Wolqqamata tooray meqerettides; daaburanchchati gidikko wolqqa demmida.
1Samuel2:5 Kase kallidayti gafidi ha7i kaththas haarettida; Kase gafidayti ha7i kath kallida; maynneya ha7i laappun naa yeladus; Daro nayta aayeya ha7i yelo dhayadus.
1Samuel2:6 «GODAY wodheessinne paththees; duge duufon gelththeessinne kessees.
1Samuel2:7 GODAY manqeththeessinne duresees; kawushsheessinne gitasees.
1Samuel2:8 Izi manqo gudullafe denththees; aykkoyka baynda manqoza dhoqqu dhoqqu histtees; ba shuumetarakka issife utisees; bonchcho araataakka laatisees. Gaasoykka biitta yochchati GODAASSA; izi alame istta bolla woththides.
1Samuel2:9 «Izi geeshshata toho naagees; iitati gidikko dhuman yegettana; asi ba wolqqan xoonenna.
1Samuel2:10 GODAARA eqettizayti liiqana; izi istta bolla saloppe guummana; GODAY biitta gaxa gakkanaas pirdana; Izi kawozas wolqqa immana; izi tiyettidayssa kace dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana» ga woossadus.
1Samuel2:11 Hessafe guye Hilqaanay baso Eraama bides. Naazi Sameeli qeese Eele sinththan dishe GODAAS haggazees.
1Samuel2:12 Eele nayti shufurota; GODAASKA yayettenna.
1Samuel2:13 He wode qeeseti deraara diza issifeteththan poliza wogati deettes; ay asikka yarsho shiishshiza wode ashoy doysettishin qeeseza oosanchchay heedzdzu achchara diza qaphe ekkidi yees.
1Samuel2:14 Izikka qapheza duge disttezan woykko xaarozan
1Samuel2:15 Gido attiin handazi xuugettanaappe sinththan qeeseza oosanchchay yiidi yarshoza shiishshizaade
1Samuel2:16 Addezi
1Samuel2:17 GODAAS shiiqiza yarshoza hessaththo histti kadhiza gishshas Eele nayta nagaray GODAA sinththan keehi deexo gidides.
1Samuel2:18 Sameeli buro yoogateththan dishe laynoppe dadettida may7o may7idi GODAA sinththan ooththees.
1Samuel2:19 Iza aaya ba azinara layththan layththan shiishshiza yarsho shiishshanaas biza wode ubbaan izas bollara may7anaas qeeri may7o dadisa ekka yawus.
1Samuel2:20 Eeley
1Samuel2:21 GODAY Haanna anjjides; iza qanththatada heedzdzu attuma naytanne nam7u macca nayta yeladus; yelaga Sameelikka GODAA sinththan diccides.
1Samuel2:22 He wode Eeley keehi cimmides; iza nayti kumeththa Isra7eele bolla ooththishe dizayssa
1Samuel2:23 Hessa gishshas izi isttas
1Samuel2:24 Ta naytoo likke gidekketa; GODAA deraa giddon intte gishshas laalettida worey lo7o gidenna.
1Samuel2:25 Issaadey hara as qohikko GODAY istta giddon pirdees; gido attiin asi GODAA qohikko ooni izas gaannatanee?» gi hanqettides. Gidikkoka GODAY istta dhayssana koyida gishshas istti bantta aawa seeraa ekkibeettenna.
1Samuel2:26 Yelaga naa Sameeli geesaninne teeman GODAA sinththaninne asa sinththan dicci dicci bides.
1Samuel2:27 He wode Xoossafe kiitettida issi nabey Eelekko yiidi
1Samuel2:28 Izi taas qeese gidana mala
1Samuel2:29 Ta aqiza keeththaan shiiqana mala ta azazida yarshozanne kaththaza ays kadhidetii? Neninne ne nayti ta dere Isra7eeley shiishshida yarsho ubbaafe muuruta muuruta doori miidi intte moollattideta; nekka taappe aaththada ne nayta ays bonchchadii?› gees.
1Samuel2:30 «Hessa gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
1Samuel2:31 Be7a ne zereththaa giddon cimay beettontta mala ne wolqqanne ne aawa keeththa asaa wolqqa ta menththana wodey yaana.
1Samuel2:32 Neni ta keeththan meto be7ana; Isra7eeles ay lo7oy oosettikokka ne keeththan mulekka cimay beettenna.
1Samuel2:33 Tani taas yarsho yarshizasozappe diggontta ne zereththati
1Samuel2:34 «Ne nayta nam7ata Afine bollanne Finihaase bolla gakkanayssi nees malata gidana; istti nam7ayka issi gallas hayqqana.
1Samuel2:35 Ta wozina malanne ta qofa mala taas haggazana ammanettida qeese tani taas denththana; iza keeththaa ta minththa essana; izikka ta tiydayssa sinththan mernaas haggazana.
1Samuel2:36 Ne zereththatappe attida ay asikka issi saqile birassinne issi barsa kaththas giidi iza sinththan gufannidi goynnana; ‹Hachchis baadhizaaz ta demmana mala zay tana qeeseteththa oosotappe awayssankka gelththarkkii!› giidi nena woossana» gides.
1Samuel3:1 Yelaga naa Sameeli Eeleppe garsara gididi Xoossas ooththishe dees; he wode biittaa bolla GODAA qaalay al7o; ajjuutaykka beetti erenna.
1Samuel3:2 Iza ayfey daaburdi xeellanaas dandayontta ixxides; Eeley issi gallassa omars ba ichchizason ichchi dees.
1Samuel3:3 Sameelikka Xoossa taabotay diza Xoossa Keeththan ichchi dees; heen diza xomppezikka to7ibeenna.
1Samuel3:4 GODAY Sameela xeygides; Sameelikka
1Samuel3:5 Eelekko woxxi biidi
1Samuel3:6 Qasseka GODAY
1Samuel3:7 Hessafe kase GODAY izas haasayi erontta gishshas Sameeli GODAA cenggurs shaakki eribeenna.
1Samuel3:8 GODAY Sameela heedzdzuto xeygides; Sameeli Eelekko dendi biidi
1Samuel3:9 Hessafe guye Eeley Sameela
1Samuel3:10 GODAYKKA yiidi heen eqqides; kase xeygidayssaththoka
1Samuel3:11 GODAYKKA Sameela
1Samuel3:12 He gallas koyroppe wurseth gakkanaas Eele bollanne izaso asaa bolla yootidayssa ubbaa ta polana.
1Samuel3:13 Eeley eriza nagara gaason izaso asata bolla mernaas pirdettanayssa ta izas yoota woththadis; iza nayti para miish ooththida; gido attiin izi istta he oosoza diggibeenna.
1Samuel3:14 Hessa gishshas
1Samuel3:15 Sameeli gadey wonttanaashe gakkanaas ichchides; hessafe dendidi GODAA keeththa pengeta doydes; ba be7ida ajjuutaa Eeles yootana babbides.
1Samuel3:16 Gido attiin Eeley Sameela
1Samuel3:17 Eeleykka
1Samuel3:18 Hessa gishshas Sameeli issi miishshika qottontta ubbaaka izas yootides; Eeleykka izas
1Samuel3:19 Sameeli dicci dicci bides; GODAY izara diza gishshas izi yootiza qaalaappe issinakka sa7an kunda erukku.
1Samuel3:20 Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Sameeli tumappe GODAA nabe gididayssa erides.
1Samuel3:21 GODAY Seelon gujji gujji qonccides; heen ba qaala baggara bana Sameelas qonccisides. Sameela qaalay Isra7eele ubbaa gakkides.
1Samuel4:1 He wode Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme asaa olanaas kezides; Isra7eele asay Aben7eezeren
1Samuel4:2 Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olanaas ba olanchchata salfisides; olazi keehi minniin Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme asaan xoonettides. He olaan 4
1Samuel4:3 Ola asay ba guta guta simmida wode Isra7eele halaqati
1Samuel4:4 Hessa gishshas derezi gede Seelo as kiittidi
1Samuel4:5 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay gede Isra7eele olanchchati dunkaani dizaso bi gelida mala biittay qaaxxanaashe gakkanaas Isra7eele asay ubbay ufayssan wolqqama waaso waassides.
1Samuel4:6 Filisxeeme asay hessa wolqqama waasoza siyidi
1Samuel4:7 Filisxeeme asay babbidi
1Samuel4:8 Nuus aayye ana! Hayta wolqqama eeqa xoossata kusheppe nuna ashshanay oonee? Hayti kase Gibxe asaa bazzo biittan dumma dumma boshan shocida eeqa xoossata.
1Samuel4:9 Filisxeeme asawu
1Samuel4:10 Histtiin Filisxeeme asay olettides; Isra7eele asay xoonettidi issoy issoy baqati ba dunkaanen gelides; daro asay wurides; Isra7eeleppe 30
1Samuel4:11 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaykka di7ettides; Eele naa nam7ati Afineynne Finihaasi hayqqida.
1Samuel4:12 He gallas issi Biniyaame dere asi ba may7o daakkidi ba hu7e bolla gudulla laallidi olasoppe woththan Seelo yides.
