1Samuel4:13 Addezi hee gakkida mala Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa gishshas ba wozinan ceecishe diza Eeley oge achchan ba oyde bolla uttidi naage bolla dees; addezikka gede katamaa gelidi hanida ubbaa yootiin asay siyidi katamaa waason qaaththides.
1Samuel4:14 Eeleykka waasoza siyidi
1Samuel4:15 He wode Eeles layththay 98 gidida gishshas iza ayfeti xeellanaas dandaybeettenna.
1Samuel4:16 Addezi Eeles
1Samuel4:17 Woreza ehida addezi
1Samuel4:18 Addezi Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa gishshas yootida mala
1Samuel4:19 He wode iza naaza Finihaase machcha shaarara dawus; iza yelanaas wodey wurides; iza Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotay di7ettidayssa
1Samuel4:20 Iza shemppo kezana hanishin izi achchan diza maccassati
1Samuel4:21 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotay di7ettida gishshas izi azinaynne azinaza aaway hayqqida gishshas
1Samuel4:22 Qasseka
1Samuel5:1 Filisxeeme asay Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa di7idaappe guye Aben7eezereppe Ashdoode efida.
1Samuel5:2 Heeppeka eeqa xoos Daagonekko gelththidi heen woththida.
1Samuel5:3 Ashdoode dere asay wonteththa gallas maaladora dendidi xeellishin Daagoney Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan gufanni dizayssa be7ida; istti iza denththidi kase izi dizason woththida.
1Samuel5:4 Qasse wonteththa gallas maaladora dendidi xeellishin Daagoney Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan biitta bolla gufanni dees; iza hu7eynne iza kusheti penge bolla meqeretti wodhdhiin hankko attida asateththay xalla dees.
1Samuel5:5 Hach gakkanaas Daagone qeeseta gidiin hara Ashdooden diza Daagone eeqata keeththa geliza ubbata tohoy hemetti aadhdhana mala attiin iza penge yedhdhontta mala oosettiday hessa gaasonna.
1Samuel5:6 GODAA kushey Ashdoode dere bollanne iza gutata bolla deexxides; izikka istta bolla bash ehides; kixan shocides.
1Samuel5:7 Ashdoode asati hessa be7ida wode
1Samuel5:8 Hessafe guye Filisxeeme dere ayssizayta ubbaa xeygisidi «Isra7eele Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa wosttinoo?» gi oychchida. Isttika zaaridi
1Samuel5:9 Gido attiin istti Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa hee efidaappe guye Xoossa kushey katamay bolla deexxidi gita shiro istta bolla ehides; Yidhanne cima gontta deraa kixan shocides.
1Samuel5:10 Hessa gishshas Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa Aqaroone yeddida; Taabotay hee gakki gelishin Aqaroone derey
1Samuel5:11 GODAA kushey istta bolla keehi deexxida gishshas hayqoy katamayo keehi daganththides; histtiin asay Filisxeeme dere ayssizayta ubbaa xeygidi
1Samuel5:12 Hayqqontta paxa attidayta kixa hargey waayisiza gishshas katamay waasoy salo gakkides.
1Samuel6:1 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Filisxeemen laappun agina uttides.
1Samuel6:2 Filisxeemeti qeesetanne marota xeygidi
1Samuel6:3 Isttika
1Samuel6:4 Filisxeemeti
1Samuel6:5 Intte biittaa dhayssanaas kiitettida eceretanne kixa misleta ooththidi Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchchos immite; intte hessaththo ooththiko oonee erizay izi ba kushe intte bollafe
1Samuel6:6 Intte Gibxe dere malanne Gibxe kawo mala intte wozina ays shuchchaseetii? Istti Isra7eele asaa yeddiday Xoossay istta bolla wolqqama hanqo gaththiin gidennee?
1Samuel6:7 Hessa gishshas ooraththa gaarenne qambaray istta morggen wodhdhontta nam7u dhanththiza miizata giigsite; gaareza bolla waaxite; istta marata gidikko soo zaarite.
1Samuel6:8 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa gaareza bolla caanite; Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa millen diza saaxineza giddon intte qoho yarshos yeddiza worqqa misleta woththidi izi ba koyida ogera baana mala yeddaagite.
1Samuel6:9 Gido attiin izi awa baanaakko xeellite; izi Beeti-Shemishe baggara kase ba yida dere bizaa gidikko
1Samuel6:10 Isttika isttas yootettida mala ooththida; nam7u miizata ekkidi istta bolla gaareza waaxida; istti marata keeththaa gordida.
1Samuel6:11 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa
1Samuel6:12 Hessafe guye miizati oge oykki bishe himbaa! Himbaa! gishe sitti giidi Beeti-Shemishe gakkanaas bida; Filisxeeme dere ayssizaytikka Beeti-Shemishe zawa gakkanaas kaalli bida.
1Samuel6:13 He wode Beeti-Shemishe asay zulle giddon bantta gistte cakkishe deettes; istti dhoqqu gi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa be7idi keehi ufayettida.
1Samuel6:14 Gaarezikka yiidi Beeti-Saamisen diza Iyaaso gaden diza issi gita zaalla matan eqqides; derezi gaareza miththaa qeridi nam7u miizata xuugettiza yarsho histti GODAAS shiishshides.
1Samuel6:15 Lewetikka GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa millen worqqa miishshati iza giddon diza saaxinezara gaththi efidi wogga zaallaza bolla woththida; he gallassika Beeti-Shemishe derey GODAAS xuugettiza yarsho shiishshida; yarshotakka yarshida.
1Samuel6:16 Filisxeemeta ayssiza ichchashati hessa ubbaa beydaappe guye he gallas Aqaroone simmida.
1Samuel6:17 Filisxeemeti qoho yarshos giidi GODAAS yeddida kixa mislen oosettida worqqati issoy Ashdoode gishshas
1Samuel6:18 Worqqafe oosettida ecere misleta qooday
1Samuel6:19 Gido attiin Beeti-Shemishe asay GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa qaari be7ida gishshas istta giddofe guuththata shocidi 70 asata wodhides; GODAY istta keehi shocida gishshas derey yeekkides.
1Samuel6:20 Hessa gishshas Beeti-Shemishe asay
1Samuel6:21 Hessafe guye Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime biitta qasttanne kiittidi
1Samuel7:1 Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime asatikka duge wodhdhidi GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa ekkidi pude bantta heera efidi zumbulla hu7en diza Abinadaabeson woththida; GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa naagana mala iza naa El7ezeere dummasida.
1Samuel7:2 Caaqo Qaala Taabotay adussa wode Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimen de7ides; issi bolla 20 layth heen gam7ides; Isra7eele asay ubbay ceecides. GODAAKKA koyides.
1Samuel7:3 Sameeli Isra7eele deraa
1Samuel7:4 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay Ba7aalenne Astaroote eeqa xoossata bantta giddofe diggidi GODAAS xalla goynnida.
1Samuel7:5 Hessafe guye Sameeli
1Samuel7:6 Isra7eele asay Mixiphphan shiiqida wode haath duuqqidi GODAA sinththan gussides; he gallassika xoomida; «Nuni GODAA qohidos» giidi paaxida. Sameeli Mixiphphan pirdishe deraa ayssides.
1Samuel7:7 Isra7eele asay Mixiphphan shiiqidayssa Filisxeeme asay siyida wode
1Samuel7:8 Sameelas
1Samuel7:9 Sameelikka issi dhammiza dorsa laaqqa ekkidi shukkides; mulerakka xuugettiza yarsho histti GODAAS shiishshides; Isra7eele gishshas GODAAKKO woossides; GODAYKKA iza woosaa siyides.
1Samuel7:10 Sameeli xuugettiza yarshoza yarshiza wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta olanaas kezi yida; gido attiin he gallas GODAY Filisxeemeta bolla wolqqama dada giirs dadasida gishshas keehi etti batti gida; xoonettidikka Isra7eeleta sinththafe baqatida.
1Samuel7:11 Isra7eele asay Mixiphphafe kezidi Filisxeeme asaa oge bolla wodhishe wodhishe Beeti-Kaareppe dan7e baggara dizaso gakkanaas yedeththida.
1Samuel7:12 Hessafe guye Sameeli issi shuch ekkidi Mixiphphassinne Sheenes giddon essides; «Hach gakkanaas GODAY nuna maaddides» gishe Aben7eezere gi sunththides.
1Samuel7:13 Hessaththon Filisxeeme asay xoonettida gishshas nam7anththo Isra7eele asaa bolla Filisxeemeti worajjibeettenna; Sameeli shemppora paxa diza layth ubbaan GODAA kushey Filisxeemeta bolla deexxides.
1Samuel7:14 Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta kusheppe woththi ekkida katamati Aqarooneppe biidi Geete gakkanaas Isra7eeletas simmida; istti haariza biittati ubbay Filisxeemeta kusheppe la7a kezida; Isra7eeleta giddoninne Amooreta giddon saroy dees.
1Samuel7:15 Sameeli shemppora paxa diza layth ubbaan Isra7eele asaa ubbaas pirdides.
1Samuel7:16 Layththan layththan Sameeli Beetele
1Samuel7:17 Hessafe guye Eraaman diza baso simmidi heenkka Isra7eele asaas pirdees; heen GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso ooththides.
1Samuel8:1 Sameeli cimmida wode ba nayta nam7ata Isra7eele bolla pirdana mala shuumides.
1Samuel8:2 Izas bayra naazi Iyu7eele geetettees; kaalozi Abiya geetettees; istti Bersaabehen pirdeettes.
1Samuel8:3 Gido attiin nayti bantta aawa oge kaallibeettenna; bessontta go7a demmanaas gishe ogeppe kezida; maganxo ekkidi pirda geellasida.
1Samuel8:4 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele cimati wuri issi bolla shiiqidi Sameeli dizaso Eraama yida.
1Samuel8:5 Isttika Sameelas
1Samuel8:6 Gido attiin
1Samuel8:7 GODAYKKA Sameelas zaaridi
1Samuel8:8 Ta istta Gibxe biittafe kesoosofe hanno gakkanaas tana aggidi hara eeqa xoossatas goynnishe ooththida mala ne bollaka ooththeettes.
1Samuel8:9 Neni gidikko istti nena gizayssa siya; istta bolla kawotidayssi istta bolla ay ooththanaakko istta erisa bessiza mala isttas minththa yoota» gides.
1Samuel8:10 Sameelikka kawo kawoththanaas oychchida deraas GODAA qaala ubbaa yootides.
1Samuel8:11 Isttas
1Samuel8:12 Istta giddofe issota issota shaalaqata
1Samuel8:13 Intte macca nayta ekkidi shitto kessisana; woxe kathisananne sollo uukisana.
1Samuel8:14 Intte gadeppe
1Samuel8:15 Izi intte kaththaafenne intte woyne miththaafe tammaafe issaa ba kawoteththan diza ba oosanchchatassinne ba shuumetas immana.
1Samuel8:16 Attumanne macca intte aylleta
1Samuel8:17 Dorsa wudeppenne deysha wudeppe tammaafe issi kusheza baas ekkana; intte intte hu7era iza aylleta gidana.
1Samuel8:18 Hessi intte bolla gakkida wode intte dosidi doorida kawozappe dendidayssan waassana. Gido attiin GODAY he gallas intte waaso siyenna» gides.
1Samuel8:19 Derey gidikko Sameeli haasayza qaalaza wudan yeggontta ixxidi
1Samuel8:20 Hara dereta mala nunikka nuna kaaleththizaade
1Samuel8:21 Sameelikka derezi gizayssa ubbaa siyides; hessa zaaridi GODAAS yootides.
1Samuel8:22 GODAYKKA
1Samuel9:1 Biniyaame qommotappe Qiise geetettiza issi erettida asi dees; izikka Abi7eele naa
1Samuel9:2 Qiises Sa7oole geetettiza naateththa nay dees; Isra7eele asaa garsafe malaninne suureteththan iza gakkizay deenna; geesan hara asay ubbay izas hasheppe aadhdhenna.
1Samuel9:3 He wode Sa7oole aawa Qiise hareti dhayda; histtiin Qiisey ba naa Sa7oole
1Samuel9:4 Hessa gishshas zumbullati diza Efreeme dereninne Shalisha heeran yuuyi koyida; gidikkoka hareta demmibeettenna. Heeppe dendidi Sha7iliime zawara kanththi bida; hareti gidikko heenkka deettenna; qasseka Biniyaame dhassara kanththi bida; heenkka demmana dandaybeettenna.
1Samuel9:5 Heeppeka dendidi Zuufe zawa gakkida wode Sa7ooli banara diza ashkarazas
1Samuel9:6 Gido attiin ashkarazi iza
1Samuel9:7 Sa7oolikka izas zaaridi
1Samuel9:8 Ashkarazikka
1Samuel9:9 Hayssafe sinththan Isra7eele deren issi asi Xoos oychchana bishe
1Samuel9:10 Sa7oolikka ayllezas
1Samuel9:11 Istti katamayo gelana hanishin diza zumbullay bolla pude kessan dishin haath duuqqanaas biza geela7ota demmidi
1Samuel9:12 Isttika zaaridi
1Samuel9:13 Intte gede katama gelida mala izi kath maanaas pude zumbullaa bolla kezanaappe sinththan intte iza demmana; yarshoza anjjanay iza gidida gishshas izi yaanaashe gakkanaas derezi muus doommenna; hessafe guye hankko xeygettida derezi maana; ha7ira kezite; heerakka intte iza demmana» gida.
1Samuel9:14 Isttika pude katamayo kezida; istti katamayo bi gelishin Sameeli goynnizasoho pude zumbullaa bolla kezanaas bishe istti diza bagga yides.
1Samuel9:15 Sa7ooli yaanaappe issi gallassafe sinththan GODAY Sameelas qonccisi woththides.
1Samuel9:16 GODAY
1Samuel9:17 Sameeli Sa7oole be7ida mala GODAY
1Samuel9:18 Sa7oolikka gimbeza pengen diza Sameelakko shiiqidi
1Samuel9:19 Sameeli izas
1Samuel9:20 Heedzdzu gallassafe sinththan dhayda hareti beettida gishshas ne isttas ceecoppa; Isra7eele asaa ubbaa amoy koyzay nenanne ne aawa keeththa asaa ubbaa gidennee?» gides.
1Samuel9:21 Sa7oolikka
1Samuel9:22 Hessafe guye Sameeli Sa7oolenne iza ashkaraza adaraasha keeth ehides; xeygettida heedzdzu tammu gidiza asaappe bollara bonchchoson utisides.
1Samuel9:23 Sameeli kath kaththizayssa
1Samuel9:24 Kath kaththizayssika geda ashoza kumeth ehidi Sa7oole sinththan woththides; Sameeli iza
1Samuel9:25 He goynniza zumbullaza bollafe duge katamaa wodhdhidaappe guye Sameeli ba keeththan diza pooqeza bolla Sa7oolera haasaydes.
1Samuel9:26 Maalado dendida; Sameeli Sa7oole pooqeza bollafe xeygidi
1Samuel9:27 Istti biidi katamay wurseth matishin Sameeli Sa7ooles
1Samuel10:1 Sameeli zayte birille ekkidi zayteza Sa7oole hu7en gussidaappe guye yeeri ekkides; hessafe guye
1Samuel10:2 Hach ne taappe shaaketta bishin Biniyaame dhassan diza Xelxaho geetettizason diza Eraheeli duufo achchan diza nam7u asatara ne gayttana; isttika
1Samuel10:3 «Nenikka sinth gujja gujja baada Taabooren diza gita zaafezaso gakkanaas baana; heenkka heedzdzu asati issoy heedzdzu deysha laaqqa
1Samuel10:4 Istti nena sarokki simmidi nam7u uketh nees immana; nekka isttafe ekkana.
1Samuel10:5 «Hessafe guye neni Filisxeeme olanchchati dizaso Xoossa zumaa Gibi7a kezana; ne katamayo gakkida mala nabeta duulatay
1Samuel10:6 Ne qoppontta dishin GODAA Ayanay wolqqan kumidi ne bolla wodhdhana; nekka isttara tinbite haasaya doommana; neni hara as misata laamettana.
1Samuel10:7 Hayti malatati ne bolla polettiza wode Xoossi nenara diza gishshas ne kushey ooththana dandayza ubbaa ooththa.
1Samuel10:8 «Taappe sinththatada duge Gelgela wodhdha; tanikka xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho shiishshanaas neekko yaana; gido attiin ta neekko yaada ne ay ooththana bessizaakko ta yootanaashe gakkanaas laappun gallas ne takkana bessees» gides.
1Samuel10:9 Sa7ooli Sameelappe shaaketti baana gishin Xoossi Sa7oole wozina laammides; malatati ubbay he gallas polettida.
1Samuel10:10 Sa7ooli Gibi7a gakkishin nabeta duulatay iza demmides; Xoossa Ayanay wolqqan kumidi iza bolla wodhdhides; izikka isttara tinbite haasaydes.
1Samuel10:11 Kase iza erizayti ubbay izi nabetara tinbite haasayshin be7idi istti bantta giddon
1Samuel10:12 He deren de7iza issi addezi
1Samuel10:13 Sa7ooli tinbite haasayi giigidaappe guye goynnizasoho pude zumbullaa bolla kezides.
1Samuel10:14 He wode Sa7ooles aawaa ishay Sa7oolenne iza ashkaraa
1Samuel10:15 Sa7oole aawaa ishazikka
1Samuel10:16 Sa7oolikka zaaridi izas
1Samuel10:17 Sameeli Isra7eele deraa GODAA sinth Mixiphpha xeygidi
1Samuel10:18 isttas
1Samuel10:19 Hach gidikko intte metoppenne waayeppe inttena ashshida intte Xoossaa kadhidi
1Samuel10:20 Hessafe guye Sameeli Isra7eele qommota ubbaa shiishshiin Biniyaame qommoy doorettides.
1Samuel10:21 Kaallidikka Biniyaame qommota istta zarkken zarkken shiishshides; Maxire zarkkey doorettides; wurseththan Qiise naa Sa7ooli doorettides; gido attiin koyishin izi beettibeenna.
1Samuel10:22 Asatikka
1Samuel10:23 Isttika woxxi biidi izi qotetti dizasoppe ekki yida; izi deraa giddon eqqidaashe geesan izara likkettiza asi dontta gishshas asi ubbay izas hasheppe garsan attees.
1Samuel10:24 Sameelikka kumeththa dereza
1Samuel10:25 Sameelikka kawos bessiza wogaanne maaraa deraas qonccisidaappe guye maxaafan xaafidi GODAA sinththan woththides; hessafe guye Sameeli asaa ubbaa baso baso baana mala yeddides.
1Samuel10:26 Sa7oolikka baso Gibi7a bides; Xoossi istta wozina bochchida gita asati izara issife bida.
1Samuel10:27 Issi issi shufuro asati
1Samuel11:1 Amoone dere as Na7oosey kezidi Yaabuse Gala7aade giddoththides; Yaabuse asay ubbay
1Samuel11:2 Na7oosey isttas
1Samuel11:3 Yaabuse dere cimati
1Samuel11:4 Kiitetti bidayti Sa7ooli dizaso Gibi7a bi gakkidi hessa derezas yootida mala derezi ubbay ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi yeekkides.
1Samuel11:5 He wode Sa7ooli goshshasoppe boorata laaggi yishe
1Samuel11:6 Sa7ooli hessa siyida mala Xoossa Ayana wolqqay iza bolla wodhides; Sa7ooli keehi hanqettides.
1Samuel11:7 Waaxa boorata qanxxereththides; istta ashozakka kiitettiza asata bolla Isra7eele asaa ubbaakko yeddishe
1Samuel11:8 Sa7ooli Beezeqen ba ola asaa shiishshiin asaa qooday Isra7eeleppe 300
1Samuel11:9 Yaabuseppe kiitetti yida asatas
1Samuel11:10 Yaabuse asay Amoone asaas
1Samuel11:11 Wonteththa gallas Sa7ooli ba ola asaa heedzdzu kessi shaakkides; gadey wonttana gishin Amoone guta menththi gelidi xalqqey wodhdhana gakkanaashe dippi histtida; shemppora paxa attidayti gidikko nam7u asi issife de7anaas dandayonttaashe gakkanaas laalettida.
1Samuel11:12 Hessafe guye derezi
1Samuel11:13 Sa7ooli gidikko
1Samuel11:14 Hessafe guye Sameeli deraa
1Samuel11:15 Derezi wuri Gelgela bides; Sa7oole kawoteththaa GODAA sinththan minththides; derezikka heen GODAA sinththan issifeteththa yarsho shiishshides; Sa7oolinne Isra7eele asay ubbay gita ba7aale ooththida.
1Samuel12:1 Sameeli kumeththa Isra7eele deraas
1Samuel12:2 Kawo gidi inttena kaaleththanaade be7ite demmideta; taas wodey bides; taas hu7eykka puulumides; ta naytikka inttenara deettes; naateteththafe doommada ta inttena kaaleththashe gam7adis.
1Samuel12:3 Be7ite
1Samuel12:4 Isttika
1Samuel12:5 Sameelikka
1Samuel12:6 Histtiin Sameeli derezas
1Samuel12:7 Ha7ikka inttessinne intte aawatas ooththida xillo ooso ubbaa gishshas GODAA sinththan ta inttena mootiza gishshas hayssan eqqite.
1Samuel12:8 «Yaaqoobeynne izaso asay Gibxe gelidaappe guye intte aawati maado demmanaas GODAAKKO waassida; GODAYKKA intte aawata Gibxeppe kessidi hayssa ha sohozan daana mala ooththida Musenne Aaroone kiittides.
1Samuel12:9 «Istti gidikko GODAA bantta Xoossaa balida; hessa gishshas izi Haxoore dere ola gadawa Sisaaras
1Samuel12:10 Hessafe guye isttas
1Samuel12:11 Hessafe guye GODAY Yeruba7aale
1Samuel12:12 «Amoone kawo Na7oosey intte bolla dendidayssa intte be7idi GODAA intte Xoossay inttes kawo gidikkoka
1Samuel12:13 «Intte oychchidayssanne doorida kawoza be7ite GODAY intte bolla kawoththides.
1Samuel12:14 Intte GODAAS yayyiko goynniko
1Samuel12:15 Gido attiin intte GODAAS azazettontta ixxidi iza azazo bolla makkalliko
1Samuel12:16 «Hessa gishshas intte minni eqqite; GODAY intte sinththan ooththiza ha gita miishshaa xeellite!
1Samuel12:17 Hayssi ha7i gistte maxa wode gidennee? Dadanne ira yeddana mala tani GODAAKKO waassana; intteka inttes kawoy kawotana mala intte oychchoyssan GODAA sinththan ay keena iita ooso ooththidaakko he wode intte erana» gides.
1Samuel12:18 Hessafe guye Sameeli GODAAKKO waassides; he gallassika GODAY dadanne ira yeddides. Hessa gishshas derezi GODAASSINNE Sameelas keehi yayyides.
1Samuel12:19 Derezi ubbay Sameela
1Samuel12:20 Sameelikka isttas
1Samuel12:21 Inttena go7anaas woykko ashshanaas dandayontta shufuro miishshata kaallofte; istti hada.
1Samuel12:22 GODAY inttena ba dere histtanaas dosida ba gita sunththaa gishshas ba deraa aggenna.
1Samuel12:23 Hessafekka bollara ta inttes woossontta aggada ta GODAA qohanayssi taappe haakko. Tani lo7onne suure oge inttena tamaarsana.
1Samuel12:24 Intte gidikko GODAAS yayyite; kumeththa wozinappe ammaneteththan izas goynnite; izi inttes ooththida gita yo7ota balopite.
1Samuel12:25 Intte nagara ooson minni eqqizaa gidikko intteka
1Samuel13:1 Sa7ooli kawotishin izas layththay heedzdzu tamma. Izi Isra7eele oyddu tammanne nam7u layth haarides.
1Samuel13:2 Sa7ooli Isra7eele asaappe 3
1Samuel13:3 Yoonataaney Geeban diza Filisxeeme ola asay dizaso shocides; Filisxeeme asaykka hessa siyides; Sa7oolikka
1Samuel13:4 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay
1Samuel13:5 Filisxeeme asay 3
1Samuel13:6 Isra7eeleti diza hanotay keehi hirgisizaaz gididayssanne istta ola asaykka daro ceecen dizayssa be7idi gongoloy dizason
1Samuel13:7 Isra7eele asaappe issi issi asati Yordaanoose pinnidi Gaadenne Gala7aade dere bida. Sa7ooli gidikko Gelgelan takkides; izara issife diza ola asay ubbay babbi kokkorides.
1Samuel13:8 Izikka Sameeli izas immida bareza mala laappun gallas gakkanaashe naagides; gido attiin Sameeli Gelgela yibeenna; hessafe guye Sa7oole ola asay laaleteth oykkides.
1Samuel13:9 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli
1Samuel13:10 Izi yarshoza yarshi giigida mala heerakka Sameeli gakki wodhdhides; Sa7ooli iza mokki ekkana kezides.
1Samuel13:11 Sameeli
1Samuel13:12 ‹Hessa gishshas Filisxeeme asay duge Gelgela ta bolla yaana; tani GODAAPPE teemay yaana mala woossabeekke› ga qoppadis; hessa gishshas xuugettiza yarsho shiishshanayssi taas attonttaaz gidides» gi zaarides.
1Samuel13:13 Sameelikka izas
1Samuel13:14 Ha7i gidikko ne kawoteththay minni eqqenna; be7a GODAY ba wozina mala haniza as demmides; neni GODAA azazo naagontta ixxida gishshas izi dereza kaaleththizaade gidana mala doorides» gides.
1Samuel13:15 Hessafe guye Sameeli Gelgelappe dendidi Biniyaamey ayssiza deren diza pude Gibi7a kezides; Sa7oolikka banara issife diza asata qoodides; istta qoodaykka 600 gidides.
1Samuel13:16 Filisxeemeti Makimaasen dunkaani uttida wode Sa7ooli
1Samuel13:17 Worajjizayti heedzdzu cugan shaakettidi Filisxeemeta gutappe kezida; issi cugazi Shu7aaley ayssiza biitta Oofira bides.
1Samuel13:18 Nam7anththo cugazi Beeti-Horoone bides; heedzdzanththo cugazi bazzo biitta ginara Siboye zullera duge bessiza zawa yuuyides.
1Samuel13:19 Filisxeemeti
1Samuel13:20 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay bantta maarashanne xoylle qoxisanaas
1Samuel13:21 Laydanne beyixe qasse boora laaggiza birata leech poshisanaas oyddu giraame gidiza saqile bira ciggeettes; istti bantta maarashanne xoylle qoxisanaas hessas nam7u kushe gidizaaz ciggeettes.
1Samuel13:22 Hessa gishshas olazi dendida gallas Sa7ooleppenne iza naa Yoonataaneppe attiin isttara issife kezida olanchchata giddon mashsha woykko toora oykkida issi asikka deenna.
1Samuel13:23 He wode Filisxeemetappe issi cugazi Makimaase purden aadhdhi uttides.
1Samuel14:1 Issi gallas Sa7oole naa Yoonataaney iza gondalle oykkiza naateththaza
1Samuel14:2 He wode Sa7ooli Gibi7appe matan Migeroone geetettizason oroomaane miththa garsan dunkaani uttides; usuppun xeet gidiza asati izara deettes.
1Samuel14:3 Eefude may7iza qeese Akayay isttara dees; izikka Seelon GODAA qeese gidi diza Eele naa
1Samuel14:4 Yoonataaney Filisxeeme olanchchati dunkaani dizaso pinnana koyida purdeza bolla hadirsaranne ushachchara koyroyssi Booxexe
1Samuel14:5 Issi zaallazi pudeha baggara Makimaase ginara dees; nam7anththozi dugeha baggara Geeba ginara dees.
1Samuel14:6 Yoonataaney izas gondalle oykkiza naateththaza
1Samuel14:7 Izas gondalle oykkiza naateththazi
1Samuel14:8 Yoonataaney izas
1Samuel14:9 Isttika
1Samuel14:10 Gido attiin istti nuna
1Samuel14:11 Istti nam7ati Filisxeeme olanchchatas beettida mala Filisxeemeti
1Samuel14:12 Hessafe guye Filisxeemeta heeran diza ola asay
1Samuel14:13 Yoonataaney zuummidi baas gondalle oykkizayssa kaaleththi ekkidi kezides; Filisxeemeti Yoonataane kushen kundida; izas gondalle oykkizayssi iza guyera kaallishe istta wodhides.
1Samuel14:14 Yoonataaneynne iza gondalle oykkizayssi koyro gallas issi waaxa peyshshiza gaden nam7u tammu gidiza as wodhida.
1Samuel14:15 Guta giddon deraa bollaninne goshshata bollan shiroy dendides; kambe naagizaytinne daafa gaththizayti ubbay kokkorida; biittayka qaaxxides. He shirozikka Xoossafe kiitettides.
1Samuel14:16 Biniyaamey ayssiza Gibi7an diza Sa7oole zabeti
1Samuel14:17 Sa7ooli banara diza asatas
1Samuel14:18 Sa7oolikka Akaya
1Samuel14:19 Sa7ooli qeesezas yooto bolla dishin Filisxeemeta shirozi gujji gujji bides; hessa gishshas
1Samuel14:20 Hessafe guye Sa7oolinne iza olanchchati issi bolla olaas bida; isttika Filisxeemeti bantta mashshan busakettishe gita shiro garsan dizayssa be7ida.
1Samuel14:21 Hayssafe sinththan Filisxeemeta millen eqqidi isttara istta guta bida Ibraaweti Sa7ooleranne Yoonataanera diza Isra7eele asaakko simmi gelida.
1Samuel14:22 Efreeme gezzen qotetti diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Filisxeeme asay baqatishe dizayssa siyidi minththidi kaaletti kaaletti yedeththides.
1Samuel14:23 He wode GODAY Isra7eele ashshides; olazi Beeti-Awenera kanththi bides.
1Samuel14:24 Sa7ooli
1Samuel14:25 Ola asay ubbay wora giddo gelishin eessi biitta bolla beettides.
1Samuel14:26 Derezi woraa giddo geliza wode eessa ililoy xokettizayssa be7ides. Gidikkoka caaqozas yayyida gishshas ba kushe ba doonaakko shiishshida ay asikka deenna.
1Samuel14:27 Gido attiin iza aaway deraa caaqisi woththidayssa Yoonataaney siyibeenna; hessa gishshas izi ba kushen oykkida guufeza xeera eessa ililoza giddo yeddi ekkidi ba kushera baadhiin izas ayfey xeellides.
1Samuel14:28 Hessafe guye issi wottadarazi
1Samuel14:29 Yoonataaneykka
1Samuel14:30 Derezi ba morkketappe di7i ekkidayssafe midaakko hach ay mala lo7oshin attidee! Hayqqida Filisxeemeta qooday ay mala daro gidanashin attidee!» gides.
1Samuel14:31 He gallas Isra7eele asay Makimaaseppe biidi Ayaaloone gakkanaas Filisxeeme asaa shocidaappe guye keehi daaburdes.
1Samuel14:32 Hessa gishshas asay dorsa
1Samuel14:33 Hessafe guye Sa7ooles
1Samuel14:34 Izikka
1Samuel14:35 Sa7oolikka yarsho yarshizaso giigsides; yarsho yarshizaso ooththishin hayssi izas koyro.
1Samuel14:36 Sa7ooli
1Samuel14:37 He wode Sa7oolikka
1Samuel14:38 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli
1Samuel14:39 Isra7eele ashshida de7o GODAY be7iin ta naa Yoonataaney qoho ooththidaa gidikkoka hayqqana bessees» gides. Gido attiin deraa giddofe izas zaaro immiday issaadeyka deenna.
1Samuel14:40 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli Isra7eele asaa ubbaa
1Samuel14:41 Histtiin Sa7ooli
1Samuel14:42 Sa7oolikka
1Samuel14:43 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli Yoonataane
1Samuel14:44 Sa7oolikka
1Samuel14:45 Gido attiin derezi Sa7ooles
1Samuel14:46 Histtiin Sa7ooli Filisxeemeta yedeththizayssa aggi simmides; isttika bantta dere simmida.
1Samuel14:47 Sa7ooli Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotidaappe guye ba yuushon diza ba morkketa Mo7aabeta
1Samuel14:48 Minni olettidi Amaaleeqeta xoonides; Isra7eeleta bonqqizayta kusheppe kessi ekkides.
1Samuel14:49 Sa7oole attuma nayti Yoonataane
1Samuel14:50 Sa7oole machcheya Akimaase biyo Ahinahoomo geetettawus; izas ola gadawazi iza aawa isha Neere naa Abineere geetettees.
1Samuel14:51 Sa7oole aawa Qiiseynne Abineere aawa Neerey Abi7eele nayta.
1Samuel14:52 Sa7oole kawoteththa wode ubbaan Filisxeemetara camo olay dees; hessa gishshas mino as woykko qara as be7ida wode ubbaan izaade baakko ehidi olanchchata giddo gelththees.
1Samuel15:1 Sameeli Sa7oole
1Samuel15:2 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
1Samuel15:3 Ha7ikka ba; Amaaleeqeta ola! Isttas diza miish mulera dhayssa; issi miishshika ashshofa; attumanne macca
1Samuel15:4 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli asaa Xila7ime geetettizason shiishshidi qoodides; isttika Isra7eeleppe 200
1Samuel15:5 Sa7ooli Amaaleeqeta katama biidi issi zulle giddon zamadi uttides.
1Samuel15:6 Izikka Qenaawe dere asaa
1Samuel15:7 Histtiin Sa7ooli Amaaleeqeta Hawilappe denththidi arshey mokkiza baggara Gibxen diza Shuura gakkanaas olides.
1Samuel15:8 Amaaleeqeta kawo Agaage shemppora paxa di7ides; deraa ubbaa qara mashshan siifides.
1Samuel15:9 Gido attiin Sa7oolinne iza ola asati Agaage
1Samuel15:10 Hayssafe guye GODAA qaalay Sameelakko yiidi
1Samuel15:11 «Tani Sa7oole kawoththida gishshas modhettadis; gaasoykka izi tana kaalo aggidi guye simmida gishshassinne ta azazo polontta aggida gishshassa» gides. Sameeli keehi ceecidi omars kumeth GODAAKKO waassides.
1Samuel15:12 Sameeli wontta maaladora dendidi Sa7oolera gayttana bides; gido attiin
1Samuel15:13 Sameeli Sa7oole demmiin Sa7ooli
1Samuel15:14 Sameeli iza
1Samuel15:15 Sa7ooli
1Samuel15:16 Sameeli Sa7ooles
1Samuel15:17 Sameeli izas
1Samuel15:18 GODAY nena
1Samuel15:19 Histtiin ne ays GODAAS azazettabeekkii? Di7oyssa shiishshanaas yorattada ays GODAA sinththan iita ooththadii?» gides.
1Samuel15:20 Sa7ooli izas
1Samuel15:21 Ola asay gidikko di7ettidayssafe GODAAS dummatidayta giddofe lo7o lo7o dorsatanne boorata Gelgelan GODAA ne Xoossaas yarshanaas ekkida» gides.
1Samuel15:22 Sameeli
1Samuel15:23 Makkallay maroththo mala nagara; agga ixxay eeqa xoossas goyno mala iita; neni GODAA qaalaa kadhida gishshas izikka neni kawo gidontta mala nena kadhides» gides.
1Samuel15:24 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli Sameelas
1Samuel15:25 Ha7ikka neni ta nagara atto gaana malanne GODAAS goynnanaas ne tanara issife simma baana mala ta nena woossays» gides.
1Samuel15:26 Gido attiin Sameeli izas
1Samuel15:27 Sameeli baana guye simmishin Sa7ooli iza afala xeera oykkiin afalazi daakettides.
1Samuel15:28 Sameeli
1Samuel15:29 Isra7eele bonchcho gidida GODAY wordotenna; modhettenna; gaasoykka modhettanaas izi ase gidenna» gides.
1Samuel15:30 Sa7ooli
1Samuel15:31 Hessa gishshas Sameeli izara issife simmides; Sa7oolikka GODAAS goynnides.
1Samuel15:32 Hessafe guye Sameeli
1Samuel15:33 Sameelikka
1Samuel15:34 Hessafe guye Sameeli Eraama bides; Sa7ooli gidikko baso pude Gibi7a kezides.
1Samuel15:35 Sameeli Sa7ooles yeekkikokka izi hayqqanaashe gakkanaas nam7anththo iza be7anaas bibeenna; GODAY Sa7oole Isra7eele bolla kawoththida gishshas modhettides.
1Samuel16:1 GODAY Sameelas
1Samuel16:2 Sameeli gidikko
1Samuel16:3 Yarshosoho Isseye xeyga; hessafe guye ne ooththanayssa ta nena bessana; ta nees yootizaade ne tiyana» gides.
1Samuel16:4 Sameeli GODAY gidayssa ooththides; izi Beeteliheeme gakkida wode katamaa cimati kokkorishe izara gayttanaas yida; isttika iza
1Samuel16:5 Sameelikka zaaridi
1Samuel16:6 Istti hee gakkishin Sameeli Elyaabe be7idi
1Samuel16:7 Gido attiin GODAY Sameela
1Samuel16:8 Hessafe guye Isseyey Abinadaabe xeygidi Sameela sinththara aadhdhana mala ooththides; gido attiin Sameeli
1Samuel16:9 Kaallidikka Isseyey Shammaha ehides; Sameeli
1Samuel16:10 Isseyey ba laappun nayta Sameela sinth shiishshides; gido attiin Sameeli
1Samuel16:11 Hessafe guye Sameeli Isseye
1Samuel16:12 Histtiin Isseyey kiittidi ehisides; izi aarissa
1Samuel16:13 Sameelikka kacezan diza zayteza ekkidi iza ishata sinththan iza tiydes. He gallassafe doommidi GODAA Ayanay Dawite bolla keehi wolqqan wodhdhides; Sameeli guye simmi Eraama bides.
1Samuel16:14 GODAA Ayanay Sa7ooleppe haakkida gishshas GODAAPPE azazettida iita ayanay waayisishe dees.
1Samuel16:15 Sa7oole oosanchchati
1Samuel16:16 Hessa gishshas bagana shoci dandayza as koyana mala nu goday ba sinththan eqqiza oosanchchata azazo; histtiko GODAAPPE azazettida iita ayanay ne bolla yiza wode nees izi bagana shocana; neeskka lo7o gidana» gida.
1Samuel16:17 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli ba ashkarata
1Samuel16:18 Iza oosanchchatappe issoy
1Samuel16:19 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli
1Samuel16:20 Isseyey buddena
1Samuel16:21 Dawiti Sa7oolekko yiidi izas haggazo doommides; Sa7oolikka iza keehi dosides; izikka Sa7oole gondalle tookkizaade gidides.
1Samuel16:22 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli
1Samuel16:23 GODAAPPE azazettidi iita ayanay Sa7oole bolla yiza wode Dawiti bagana shocishin Sa7ooles lo7ees; iita ayanaykka iza bollafe haakkees.
1Samuel17:1 Filisxeemeti ba olanchchata olas Yuhuda biittan Sookon shiishshi woththida; isttika Iskooteppenne Azeeqeppe giddon diza Efsi-Deemimen dunkaani uttida.
1Samuel17:2 Sa7oolinne Isra7eeleti shiiqidi Eela zullen dunkaanida; Filisxeemetara olettanaas soho soho oykkida.
1Samuel17:3 Issi bagga zumbullaza Filisxeemeti
1Samuel17:4 Geeteppe yida izas geesay usuppun wadha gidiza Golyaade geetettiza issi ola qarazi Filisxeemeta gutappe kezides.
1Samuel17:5 Izi xarqimalappe oosettida qoobe hu7en woththides; 5
1Samuel17:6 Ba suulezan xarqimalappe oosettida gamballe woththidi ba hashen xarqimalappe oosettida xinqa toora oykkides.
1Samuel17:7 Iza tooraas toomay wondiraashe mala orde; izas tooraa ayfezi laappun kilo keena deexxees; iza ola miish tookkizayssi izappe sinththan sinththan bees.
1Samuel17:8 Golyaadey yaachchan eqqida Isra7eele asaa bolla
1Samuel17:9 Izi tanara olettanaassinne tana wodhanaas dandaykko nuni inttes aylleta gidana; gido attiin tani iza xoonizaa gidikkonne iza wodhizaa gidikko intte nuus aylleta gididi haarettana» gi naacides.
1Samuel17:10 Histtidi Filisxeeme dere addezi
1Samuel17:11 Sa7oolinne Isra7eele asay ubbay ha Filisxeeme addezi haasayda qaalaa siyidi keehi babbidanne dagammida.
1Samuel17:12 Dawiti Yuhuda biittan Beeteliheemen diza Efraata dere as Isseye naa; Isseyes osppun attuma nayti deettes; izi Sa7oole kawoteththa wode cimanne wodey keehi bida asa.
1Samuel17:13 Isseyes bayra naa heedzdzati Sa7oole kaallidi olaas bida; bayrazi Elyaabe
1Samuel17:14 Dawiti istta ubbaafe kaalo; izas bayra ishati heedzdzati Sa7oole kaallidi olaas bida.
1Samuel17:15 Dawiti gidikko ba aawa dors heemmanaas Sa7oole matappe Beeteliheeme simerettishe dees.
1Samuel17:16 He Filisxeeme addezi 40 gallas kumeth omarsinne maalado kezi beetti beetti simmees.
1Samuel17:17 He wode Isseyey ba naaza Dawite
1Samuel17:18 Hayta tammu laaluka pila istta azazizayssas issife ekka ba; ne ishati waani dizaakko be7ada istti lo7o dizayssa erisiza malata taas ekka ya.
1Samuel17:19 Isttika Sa7ooleranne Isra7eele asaa ubbaara gididi Eela zullen Filisxeemetara olettishe deettes» gides.
1Samuel17:20 Dawiti wonteththa gallas maaladora dorsata heemmiza asaas aggidi Isseyey iza azazida mala shinqeza ekki bides. Olanchchati olettanaas ceeqettishe soho soho oykkishin istti dunkaani uttidaso gakkides.
1Samuel17:21 Isra7eeletinne Filisxeemeti soho soho oykkidi tiran gayttanaas zamadi utti naageettes.
1Samuel17:22 Dawiti ba efida shinqeza naagizayssa matan woththidi asay olettizaso woxxides; ba ishata demmidi istta lo7eteth oychchides.
1Samuel17:23 Izi isttara haasayan dishin Geeteppe yida Filisxeeme ola qara Golyaadey ola asaa giddofe kezidi kase ba losida mala balbuqishin Dawiti siyides.
1Samuel17:24 Isra7eele asay ubbay addeza be7ida mala keehi babbidi iza sinththafe baqatides.
1Samuel17:25 Isra7eele asay bantta giddon issoy issaara
1Samuel17:26 Dawiti ba achchan eqqida asata
1Samuel17:27 Isttika izas
1Samuel17:28 Izas bayra isha Elyaabey Dawiti asatara haasayshin siyidi
1Samuel17:29 Dawiti
1Samuel17:30 Hessafe guye hara asaakko simmidi sinththan oychchoo oyshaa oychchides; asatikka sinththa asati zaarida mala izas zaarida.
1Samuel17:31 Dawiti haasayda yo7oy Sa7oole hayththan wodhdhides; Sa7oolikka kiitti xeygides.
1Samuel17:32 Dawitikka Sa7oole
1Samuel17:33 Sa7ooli zaaridi
1Samuel17:34 Gido attiin Dawiti Sa7ooles
1Samuel17:35 tani kaalla baada iza shocada doonappe yegisays; izi ta bolla simmishin iza siixinaththaa cuulla oykkada shoca wodhays.
1Samuel17:36 Tani ne aylley gaammonne zardo wodhadis; hayssi qaxxara qanxxetontta Filisxeemezi de7o Xoossa olanchchatara eqettida gishshas iza wurseththi isttafe issaa mala gidana.
1Samuel17:37 Tana gaammofenne zardo achchafe ashshida GODAY ha7ikka ha Filisxeeme addeza kusheppe ashshana» gides; Sa7oolikka zaaridi
1Samuel17:38 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba ola may7o Dawite mayzides; tiran may7iza xururekka mayzides; xarqimalappe oosettida qoobe iza hu7en woththides.
1Samuel17:39 Dawiti hessa mala ola may7o may7i erontta gishshas giththa mashshaa ola may7oza bolla danccidi hemettanaas paacci xeellides. Izikka Sa7ooles
1Samuel17:40 Hessafe guye ba guufeza oykkidi ichchash mulumuqqe shuchchata kanchchefe doori ekkidi ba heenththa korojon yeggides; histtidi ba yanbarshaa oykkidi Filisxeeme addezakko shiiqides.
1Samuel17:41 Filisxeeme addezi ba gondalle tookkizayssa sinththe aaththidi Dawitekko mati mati bides.
1Samuel17:42 Izi Dawite tishshi histti xeellishin kaysha
1Samuel17:43 Filisxeeme addezi Dawite
1Samuel17:44 Qasseka
1Samuel17:45 Dawiti Filisxeeme addezas
1Samuel17:46 Hach GODAY nena ta kushen aaththi immana; ta nena shoca yeggana; ta ne qoodhe qanxxa yeggana; hach tani Filisxeeme olanchchata aha salo kafotassinne sa7a do7atas aaththa immana; alame ubbay Isra7eelen Xoossi dizayssa erana.
1Samuel17:47 Hayssan shiiqida ubbay GODAY ashshizay mashshan woykko tooran gidonttayssa erana; olizay GODAA gidida gishshas izi inttena ubbatakka nu kushen aaththi immana» gides.
1Samuel17:48 Filisxeeme addezi iza shocanaas shiiqiin Dawiti izara eqettanaas gede ola demba woxxi gelides.
1Samuel17:49 Dawiti ba kushe korojon yeddidi issi shuch ekkidi dhayqides; Filisxeemezas konkken yeggides; shuchchazi iza konkkeza torphi gelides; Filisxeeme addezikka sinththa guth kundides.
1Samuel17:50 Hessaththo histtidi Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza shuchchaninne yanbarshan caddi wodhi xoonides.
1Samuel17:51 Dawiti woxxi biidi addeza bolla kezi eqqides; hessafe guye Filisxeemeza mashshaa kohozappe shoddi ekkidi iza wodhidi iza qoodhekka mashshan qanxxides; Filisxeeme asay istta ola qaray hayqqidayssa be7idi baqatida.
1Samuel17:52 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay dendi magulishe Geete pengefe denththidi Aqaroone penge gakkanaas yedeththida; Filisxeemeta ahay Shaa7iraymeppe biidi Geete gakkanaas
1Samuel17:53 Isra7eele asay Filisxeemeta yedeththi simmidi istta gutan diza miish ubbaa bonqqides.
1Samuel17:54 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza hu7e Yerusalaame ekki yides; gido attiin Filisxeemeta ola miishshata ba dunkaane giddon woththides.
1Samuel17:55 Dawiti Filisxeeme addezara eqettanaas biza wode Sa7ooli be7idi ba olanchchata azaziza Abineere
1Samuel17:56 Kawozi
1Samuel17:57 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza wodhi simmida mala Abineeri iza ekkidi kawoza sinth shiishshides. He wode Dawiti Golyaade hu7eza ba kushen oykki uttides.
1Samuel17:58 Sa7ooli iza
1Samuel18:1 Dawiti Sa7oolera haasayi giigida mala Yoonataaney Dawites shemppo lagge gidides; bana mala iza siiqides.
1Samuel18:2 He gallassafe doommidi Sa7ooli Dawite banara woththides; izi ba aawa soo bontta mala diggides.
1Samuel18:3 Yoonataaney iza wozinappe siiqida gishshas Dawitera caaqettides.
1Samuel18:4 Yoonataaney ba may7ida kaabbaa kessidi ba ola may7ora
1Samuel18:5 Sa7ooli iza kiittizaso awakka gidiin Dawiti ba kiitettidayssa bessiza mala poliza gishshas ba olanchchata bolla iza shuumides; hessi ubbaa deraanne Sa7oole ola shuumeta ufayssides.
1Samuel18:6 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza wodhidaappe guye asay baso baso simmishin maccassati karabenne maasinqo ekkidi yexxishe
1Samuel18:7 Maccassati
1Samuel18:8 Hessi iza ufayssontta aggida gishshas Sa7ooli keehi hanqettides; izikka
1Samuel18:9 Sa7ooli he gallassafe doommidi Dawite iita ayfen xeelo oykkides.
1Samuel18:10 Wonteththa gallas Xoossafe azazettida iita ayanay Sa7oole bolla wodhides; he wode Dawiti kase izi ubba wode ooththizayssa mala bagana shocishin Sa7ooli bason uttidi gooshsha mala haasayshe toora oykki dees.
1Samuel18:11 Izikka
1Samuel18:12 GODAY izappe shaakettidi Dawitera gidida gishshas Sa7ooli Dawites babbides.
1Samuel18:13 Hessa gishshas Dawite ba achchafe haassidi shaalaqateththan shuumides. Dawitikka ola asaa kaaleththidi istta sinththan kezeessinne gelees.
1Samuel18:14 GODAY izara diza gishshas izi ooththiza miishshi ubbay hanees.
1Samuel18:15 Sa7oolikka Dawites ubba miishshi hanizayssa be7idaappe guye izas babbides.
1Samuel18:16 Kumeththa Isra7eeleynne Yuhuday gidikko Dawite dosida; istta sinththan kezidi
1Samuel18:17 Sa7ooli Dawite
1Samuel18:18 Dawiti gidikko Sa7ooles
1Samuel18:19 Gido attiin Sa7oole naa Merooba Dawite gelana wodey gakkishin Maholaate dere as Adir7eeles imettadus.
1Samuel18:20 He wode Sa7oole naa Milkoola Dawite dosadus; Sa7oolikka hessa siyidi ufayettides.
1Samuel18:21 Sa7ooli ba wozinara
1Samuel18:22 Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba shuumetas
1Samuel18:23 Istti hessaka Dawites zaari zaari yootida; Dawiti gidikko
1Samuel18:24 Sa7oole shuumeti Dawiti gidayssa izas yootiin
1Samuel18:25 Sa7ooli
1Samuel18:26 Kawoza shuumeti hessa Dawites yootiin kawora bolloteththi iza ufayssides. Hessa gishshas barida barey aadhdhontta dishin
1Samuel18:27 Dawitinne izara diza asati biidi Filisxeeme asaappe nam7u xeet wodhida; kawozas bollo gidanaas qanxxi ehida attumateththaa istta qooda mala kawozas immides; hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba naa Milkoolo Dawites immides.
1Samuel18:28 Sa7ooli GODAY Dawitera dizayssanne iza naa Milkoola Dawite siiqidayssa eridi
1Samuel18:29 Sa7ooli kaseppe aaththi babbides; hayqqanaashe gakkanaas izas morkke gidides.
1Samuel18:30 Filisxeeme ola gadawati kase keziza mala olas kezeettes; Dawiti attida Sa7oole ola gadawatappe bollara xoono demmides; hessa gishshas iza sunththi keehi erettides.
1Samuel19:1 Sa7ooli Dawite wodhana mala ba naa Yoonataanessinne ba shuumetas yootides; Yoonataaney gidikko Dawite keehi siiqees;
1Samuel19:2 «Ta aawa Sa7ooli nena wodhanaas oge koshshan dees; ne wonto maalado qotetta attanaaso ba; heenkka takkaashsha.
1Samuel19:3 Tanikka kezada neni diza gaden ta aawa achchan eqqana; ne gishshas ta izara haasayana; iza qofaa erada nees yootana» gides.
1Samuel19:4 Yoonataaney ba aawa Sa7ooles
1Samuel19:5 Dawiti Filisxeeme addeza ba shemppo bayzidi wodhides; GODAY kumeththa Isra7eeles gita xoono immides; nekka hessa be7ada ufayettadasa. Histtiin ne iza coo hada wodhanaas Dawite mala geeshsha asa bolla ays qoho ooththay?» giidi Dawite gishshas lo7eteththi yootides.
1Samuel19:6 Sa7ooli Yoonataaney gizayssa ezgi siyidaappe guye
1Samuel19:7 Hessa gishshas Yoonataaney Dawite xeygidi haasayettida yo7ota ubbaa izas yootides; iza Sa7oolekko ehides; Dawiti kaseyssaththo iza sinththan eqqides.
1Samuel19:8 Qasseka hara olay dendides; Dawiti Filisxeeme asaa olides; istti iza sinththafe baqatanaashe gakkanaas keehi shocides.
1Samuel19:9 Gido attiin Sa7ooli toora oykkidi bason dishin GODAAPPE iita ayanay iza bolla wodhides; he wode Dawiti ba diith diixxees;
1Samuel19:10 Sa7ooli iza godaara gaththi oyseththana giidi ba toora iza bolla xongides; gido attiin Dawiti sher7i giin Sa7ooli xongida tooray godan eqqides; he gallassa omars Dawiti izappe kessi ekki attides.
1Samuel19:11 Sa7ooli Dawite keeth yuuyi aadhdhidi iza wodhana asata kiittides; Dawite machcha Milkoola gidikko
1Samuel19:12 Milkoola Dawite maskootera kessa yeddadus; izikka kessi ekki attides.
1Samuel19:13 Hessafe guye Milkoola eeqa misle ekkada iza hiixa bolla ishisadus; hu7esora deysha iske borkoth woththadus; may7orakka kammadus.
1Samuel19:14 Sa7ooli Dawite oykkana asata kiitti yeddiin Milkoola
1Samuel19:15 Sa7ooli asati Dawite biidi be7ana mala zaari yeddides; Sa7ooli
1Samuel19:16 Kiitettida asay izakko bi gelishin eeqa misley iza hiixa bolla ichchiin hu7esora deysha iske borkoththi dees.
1Samuel19:17 Sa7ooli Milikoolo
1Samuel19:18 Dawiti baqati attidaappe guye gede Eraaman diza Sameelakko bides; Sa7ooli iza bolla ooththidayssa ubbaa izas yootides. Hessafe guye izinne Sameeli Newaten uttida.
1Samuel19:19 Sa7ooleska
1Samuel19:20 Hessa gishshas izi Dawite oykkanaas asata kiitti yeddides. Gido attiin nabeti shiiqidi Sameeli kaaleththishin tinbite haasayzayssa be7idi Xoossa Ayanay Sa7oole asaa bolla wodhdhiin isttika tinbite yootida.
1Samuel19:21 Sa7oolikka hessi izas yootettida mala hara asata kiitti yeddides; isttika tinbite yootida. Sa7ooli heedzdzanththoka hara as kiitti yeddides; isttika zaaridi tinbite yootida.
1Samuel19:22 Wurseththan izi ba hu7era Eraama bides; heeppeka Sekkun diza gita haath eelissiza ollaako gakkida mala
1Samuel19:23 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli Eraaman diza Newate bides; Xoossa Ayanay iza bollaka wodhdhides. Izi biidi Newate gakkanaashe tinbite yootishe bides.
1Samuel19:24 Izikka ba may7o kessi yeggidi Sameela sinththan tinbite yootides. Hessaththo izi kumeththa gallassinne kumeththa omars kallo ichchides. Derey iza
1Samuel20:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Eraaman diza Newate zullefe Yoonataanekko baqati biidi
1Samuel20:2 Yoonataaneykka
1Samuel20:3 Dawitikka izas
1Samuel20:4 Yoonataaneykka
1Samuel20:5 Histtiin Dawiti
1Samuel20:6 Ne aaway tana koykko
1Samuel20:7 Izikka
1Samuel20:8 Neni gidikko taas ne ashkaraas kiyateth bessa; Tana ne ashkaraara neni GODAA sinththan caaqettida gishshas ta mooridaa gidikko tana neni wodha attiin ays ne aawaas tana aaththa immay?» gides.
1Samuel20:9 Yoonataaneykka zaaridi
1Samuel20:10 Dawitikka iza
1Samuel20:11 Yoonataaneykka izas
1Samuel20:12 Hessafe guye Yoonataaney Dawites
1Samuel20:13 Gido attiin ta aaway ne bolla iita qoppiin
1Samuel20:14 Nenikka tani shemppora paxa diza wode asa kushen hayqqontta mala ne taas GODAA kiyateth ooththa.
1Samuel20:15 GODAY Dawite morkketa biitta bollafe pitti dhayssiza wodekka ne lo7o oosoy taso asaas mulekka paccofo» gides.
1Samuel20:16 Hessa gishshas Yoonataaney
1Samuel20:17 Yoonataaney Dawite ba shemppo mala siiqiza gishshas
1Samuel20:18 Hessafe qasse Yoonataaney Dawite
1Samuel20:19 Wontoppeyna omarsa wode hayssi metoy medhettida gallas kase qotettidaaso baada Eezele shuchchaa achchan takkaashsha.
1Samuel20:20 Tani qasse issi miishsha bolla malli xeellidi xongiza asa mala heedzdzu yiish shuchchaa achchan dukkana.
1Samuel20:21 Hessafe guye tani
1Samuel20:22 Gido attiin tani naazas
1Samuel20:23 Nuni issoy issaara haasayettida yo7oza gishshas GODAY nu giddon mernaas markka» gides.
1Samuel20:24 Hessa gishshas Dawiti wora giddon qotettides. Agina xeeron xeeron bonchchettiza ba7aale gallas kawo Sa7ooli gibira maanaas uttides.
1Samuel20:25 Kawozi kase ba uttizason godaa achchan uttides; Abineeri izappe kaallidi uttides; Yoonataaneykka kawozappe sinththa baggara uttides; Dawiti uttizasoy gidikko mela dees.
1Samuel20:26 Sa7ooli
1Samuel20:27 Agina xeero ba7aaley aadhdhiin wonteththa gallassika Dawiti uttizasoy mela dees; Histtiin Sa7ooli ba naaza Yoonataane
1Samuel20:28 Yoonataaneykka izas
1Samuel20:29 Izikka
1Samuel20:30 Sa7ooli Yoonataane keehi hanqettidi
1Samuel20:31 Isseye nay shemppora paxa diza woden aydekka neninne ne kawoteththay minneketa. Izi hayqqana bessiza gishshas as yeddada taas haa ekka ya!» gides.
1Samuel20:32 Yoonataaney
1Samuel20:33 Sa7oolikka Yoonataane wodhanaas ba toora iza bolla xongiin Yoonataaney iza aaway Dawite wodhanaas ba wozinan qachchi dendidayssa erides.
1Samuel20:34 Yoonataaneykka keehi hanqettidi kaththaa miza maaddaafe dendides; iza aaway Dawite kawushshida gishshas agina xeero ba7aale bonchchida wonteththa gallas aykko kaththika mibeenna.
1Samuel20:35 Wonteththa gallas maaladora issi qeeri naa kaaleththi ekkidi kase Dawitera barettidaso bides.
1Samuel20:36 Naazakka
1Samuel20:37 Naazikka Yoonataaney yeddida yiishshazi wodhdhidaso gakkishin Yoonataaney xeygidi
1Samuel20:38 Izikka
1Samuel20:39 Hessa he xuura yo7oza erizay Yoonataaneppenne Dawiteppe attiin naazi aykkoka eribeenna.
1Samuel20:40 Hessafe guye Yoonataaneykka ola miishshaa he naazas immidi
1Samuel20:41 Naazikka bidaappe guye Dawiti shuchchafe dugeha baggara qotetti dizasoppe kezidi Yoonataane sinththan heedzdzuto duge biitta bolla gufanni ziggides. Hessafe guye issoy issaara yeerettida; nam7ayka yeekkida; Dawiti keehi yeekkides.
1Samuel20:42 Hessafe guye Yoonataaney Dawites
1Samuel21:1 Dawiti qeese Ahimelekey dizaso Noobe bides; Ahimelekeykka kokkorishe Dawitera gayttanaas yiidi
1Samuel21:2 Dawiti qeese Ahimelekes
1Samuel21:3 Histtiin ha7i ne kushen aazi dizee? Ichchashu uketh woykko diza ay miishshi diikkoka taas imma?» gides.
1Samuel21:4 Qeesezikka
1Samuel21:5 Dawitikka qeesezas zaaridi
1Samuel21:6 Hessa gishshas qeesezi GODAAS dummatida ukeththaa denththidi Dawites immides; GODAA sinththafe dendidi ho7o kaththan laamettida ukeththafe attiin hara kaththi heen deenna.
1Samuel21:7 He gallas Sa7oole oosanchchatappe mehe heemmizayta alaafezi Eedoome as Doyqey heen GODAA sinththan takkana mala woththida.
1Samuel21:8 Dawiti Ahimeleke
1Samuel21:9 Qeese Ahimelekey izas
1Samuel21:10 He gallas Dawiti Sa7ooleppe baqatidi Geete dere kawo Ankusekko bides;
1Samuel21:11 Ankuse oosanchchati
1Samuel21:12 Dawiti yo7oza ba wozinan oykkidi Geete kawo Ankuses keehi babbides.
1Samuel21:13 Hessa gishshas istta sinththan wozinay baqettida asa mala gidides; istti iza oykkida mala katamay penge ibith qaacereththishe buuchcha bollara ba saaso gogissishe gooshsha asa mala gidides.
1Samuel21:14 Ankusey ba oosanchchata
1Samuel21:15 Izi ta achchan gooyana mala intte taakko hayssa ehiday taas hayssa mala gooshshi dhaynee? Hayssa mala asi ta keeth gelanaas bessizee?» gides.
1Samuel22:1 Dawiti Geeteppe Adulaame gongolon bides; iza ishatinne iza aawa soo asay hessa siyidi duge izi dizaso wodhdhida.
1Samuel22:2 Metotidayti
1Samuel22:3 Dawiti heeppe dendidi Mo7aabe deren diza Mixiphpha bides; Mo7aabe kawos
1Samuel22:4 Izikka istta Mo7aabe kawo achchan woththides; Dawiti miixan diza layththata kumeth istti heen gam7ida.
1Samuel22:5 Gido attiin Nabe Gaadey Dawite
1Samuel22:6 Sa7ooli Dawitinne izara diza asay beettidayssa siyidi Gibi7a zumbulla bolla diza tamarssike geetettiza miththaa garsan ba toora kushen oykki utti dishin iza shuumeti ubbay iza yuuyi aadhdhi eqqida.
1Samuel22:7 Sa7ooli isttas
1Samuel22:8 Intte ta bolla duulatiday hayssassee? Ta naazi Isseye naazara caaqettidayssa oonikka taas yootibeenna; izi hach ooththizayssa ubbaa
1Samuel22:9 He wode heen diza Sa7oole shuumetara eqqi diza Eedoome as Doyqey
1Samuel22:10 Ahimelekey iza gishshas GODAA oychchides; histtidi shinqenne Filisxeeme as Golyaade giththa mashsha izas immides» gi yootides.
1Samuel22:11 Hessafe guye kawozi qeese Ahixuube naa qeese Ahimeleke
1Samuel22:12 Sa7ooli
1Samuel22:13 Sa7oolikka
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelekey kawozas
1Samuel22:15 Ta izas Xoos oychchishin he gallassay koyro gallassee? Mulekka gidenna; hayssa ha yo7oza ne oosanchchay ta eriza aykko miishshi baynda gishshas kawoy tana ba oosanchchaza woykko ta aawa soo asaappe oonakka mooranchcha kessofo» gides.
1Samuel22:16 Kawozi zaaridi izas
1Samuel22:17 Hessafe guye kawozi ba achchan eqqida zabeta
1Samuel22:18 Kawozi Doyqe
1Samuel22:19 Qeeseta Noobe katamaan mashshan wursides; heen diza maccassatanne attumata
1Samuel22:20 Gido attiin Ahixuube naa Ahimeleke nay Abiyaataarey kessi ekkidi Dawitekko baqatides.
1Samuel22:21 Izikka Sa7ooli GODAA qeeseta wodhidayssa Dawites yootides.
1Samuel22:22 Dawiti Abiyaataares zaaridi
1Samuel22:23 Ne ha7i tanara daashsha; babbofa; ne shemppo wodhana koyzaadey ta shemppo wodhana koyzaade mala; neni tanara issife saron de7andasa» gides.
1Samuel23:1 Hessafe guye
1Samuel23:2 Dawiti
1Samuel23:3 Dawite asay gidikko
1Samuel23:4 Dawiti qasseka GODAA zaari oychchides; GODAYKKA izas
1Samuel23:5 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne iza kaallizayti Qi7ila biidi Filisxeeme asaa olida; istta mehekka di7ida; Filisxeemeta bolla gita qoho gaththida; Dawiti Qi7ila deraa ashshides.
1Samuel23:6 Ahimeleke naa Abiyaataarey Dawitekko Qi7ila baqatishe ba kushen eefude oykki bides.
1Samuel23:7 Dawiti Qi7ila bidayssa Sa7ooli siyidi
1Samuel23:8 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli ba olanchchata xeygidi duge Qi7ila wodhdhidi Dawitenne iza ola asaa giddoththana mala azazides.
1Samuel23:9 Dawitikka Sa7ooli iza bolla iita qoppidayssa eridi qeese Abiyaataare
1Samuel23:10 Hessafe guye Dawiti
1Samuel23:11 Histtiin Qi7ila asay tana Sa7ooles aaththi immanee? Tani ne aylley siyidayssa mala Sa7ooli haa duge wodhdhanee? GODAA Isra7eele Xoossawu! Taas ne ayllezas ne yootana mala ta nena woossays» gides. GODAYKKA
1Samuel23:12 Dawiti qasseka
1Samuel23:13 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne 600 gidiza asati Qi7ilappe dendidi baanaas dandayza ubbaso bida; Dawiti Qi7ilappe baqatoyssa Sa7ooli siyidi hee buussaa aggaagides.
1Samuel23:14 Dawiti bazzon diza miixataninne Ziife bazzon zumbullata bolla de7ides; Sa7ooli iza ubbaa gallas kaalettees; gido attiin Xoossi Dawite izas aaththi immibeenna.
1Samuel23:15 Dawitikka Ziife bazzon Horeeshe geetettizason dishe Sa7ooli iza wodhanaas yidayssa be7ides.
1Samuel23:16 Sa7oole naa Yoonataaney Dawiti dizaso biidi Xoossa sunththan iza minththeththides.
1Samuel23:17 Izikka
1Samuel23:18 Nam7ayka GODAA sinththan caaqettida; hessafe guye Yoonataaney baso simmi bides; Dawiti gidikko heen Horeeshen uttides.
1Samuel23:19 Ziife asay Sa7oolekko Gibi7a kezidi
1Samuel23:20 Abeet kawo ha7i gidikko nena ufayssida gallas ya attiin kawozas nu iza aaththi immana doos» gida.
1Samuel23:21 Sa7ooli isttas
1Samuel23:22 Ha7i simmi biidi izi awan dizaakko erite; heen iza be7ida as shaakki erite; izi keehi cincca as gididayssa ta siyadis.
1Samuel23:23 Izi qotettizasohota ubbaa be7idaappe guye qonccera bessiza hanota ekki taakko yiite; tanikka inttenara baana; izi deeth do attiin Yuhuda qommota giddon izi gelida ollafe ta gela kessana» gides.
1Samuel23:24 Hessa gishshas asati Sa7ooleppe sinththati dendidi Ziife bida; he wode Dawitinne izara diza asati Yesemooneppe dugeha baggara Araben diza Ma7oone bazzon deettes.
1Samuel23:25 Sa7oolinne iza asati Dawite koyana bida; Dawitikka hessa siyidi duge zaallaako wodhdhidi Ma7oone bazzon uttides. Sa7ooli hessa siyida mala Dawite gooddishe Ma7oone bazzo bi gelides.
1Samuel23:26 Sa7ooli zumaas issi baggara gidi gooddishin Dawitinne izara diza asati zumaas hankko baggara Sa7ooleppe attanaas woxxeettes. Sa7oolinne Sa7oole olanchchati Dawitenne izara diza asata oykkanaas un7eththidashin
1Samuel23:27 issi asi qasttanne Sa7oolekko yiidi
1Samuel23:28 Histtiin Sa7ooli Dawite gooddizayssa aggidi Filisxeemetara olettanaas bides; hessa gishshas he sohoza
1Samuel23:29 Dawiti heeppe pude kezidi En-Gaade miixatan uttides.
1Samuel24:1 Sa7ooli Filisxeemeta oli simmidaappe guye
1Samuel24:2 Hessa gishshas Sa7ooli kumeththa Isra7eeleppe doorettida 3
1Samuel24:3 Sa7ooli oge doonan dorsati aqizaso gakkida wode heen gongolo demmidi sheesh uttana gelides; Dawitinne iza kaallizayti gongolozas giddon qotetti uttida.
1Samuel24:4 Dawite kaallizayti Dawites
1Samuel24:5 Gido attiin Dawiti Sa7oole may7o xeera qanxxidayssan iza wozinay keehi ceecides.
1Samuel24:6 Asataskka
1Samuel24:7 Dawiti asaa ha qaalan seerides; Sa7oole bollaka istti meto gaththanayssa koyibeenna; Sa7oolikka gongoloza giddofe kezi bides.
1Samuel24:8 Hessafe guye Dawiti gongoloza giddofe kezidi Sa7oole
1Samuel24:9 Dawiti Sa7ooles
1Samuel24:10 Hach gongolo giddon nena ta kushen wostti aaththi immidaakko hekko neni ne ayfera be7adasa; issi issi asati ta nena wodhana mala denththeththida; gido attiin tani
1Samuel24:11 Ta aawawu ne may7oza xeerappe qanxxettidayssa hayssa ta kushen be7a! Nees may7o xeerappe qanxxa ekkadis attiin nena wodhabeekke. Ha7ikka tani iitateth woykko makkallateth ooththonttayssa ne era; hessa ne wozinan woththa; ta ne bolla iita ooththabeekke; neni gidikko ta shemppo dhayssanaas gooddaasa.
1Samuel24:12 «GODAY ne giddoninne ta giddon pirdo. Neni iita ooththida gishshas GODAY ne bolla halo kesso attiin ta ne bolla kushe woththike.
1Samuel24:13 Kase wode tossen
1Samuel24:14 «Isra7eele kawoy oona bolla ke7idee? Neni oona goodday? Hayqqida kana woykko kasttolle goodday?
1Samuel24:15 Ha7ikka nu giddon GODAY daanna gidi pirdo. Ta yo7oza xeellidi ta gishshas izi mootetto. Tanakka ne kusheppe kessi ekkidi ta tumateththaa izi qoncciso» gides.
1Samuel24:16 Dawiti hessa haasaydi wursida mala Sa7ooli
1Samuel24:17 Kaaleththidi Sa7ooli Dawites
1Samuel24:18 Ne taas ooththida lo7o miishshi hekko taas yootadasa; GODAY tana ne kushen aaththi immides shin ne tana wodhabeekka.
1Samuel24:19 Ba morkke demmidi iza bolla qoho gaththontta dishe yeddizay oonee? Neni hach taas ooththida kiyateththaa kushe GODAY nees zaaro.
1Samuel24:20 Beya tumappe neni kawotanayssanne Isra7eele kawoteththi ne kushen minnanayssa ta erays.
1Samuel24:21 Neni ta zereththata dhayssontta malanne ta sunth ta aawa keeththafe dhayssontta mala GODAA sunththan caaqqa» gides.
1Samuel24:22 Dawitikka Sa7ooles caaqqides. Hessafe guye Sa7ooli ba soo simmi bides; Dawitinne iza kaallizayti kase ba qotettiza miixan simmi ke7ida.
1Samuel25:1 Sameeli hayqqides; kumeththa Isra7eele asay issi bolla shiiqidi izas yeekkides; hessafe guye Eraaman diza izaso efidi iza heen moogida. Hessafe guye Dawiti duge Ma7oone bazzo bides.
1Samuel25:2 Ma7oone biittan Qarmeloosen aqotara diza issi dure asi dees; izas 1
1Samuel25:3 Addeza sunththi Naabaale
1Samuel25:4 Dawiti bazzon dishe Naabaaley ba dorsata iske qanxxizayssa siyides.
1Samuel25:5 Izikka tammu naateththa nayta
1Samuel25:6 Izas
1Samuel25:7 Ha7i neni dorsata iske qanxxizayssa tani siyadis. Ne meheza heemmizayti kase nunara diza wode ubbaan nu istta bolla aykko iitakka gaththibeekko. Istti Qarmeloosen diza wode ubbaan isttafe dhayda issi miishshika deenna.
1Samuel25:8 Hessa neni ne oosanchchata oychcha; istti nees yootana. Hach nuni lo7o gallas yida gishshas ha naateththa nayti ne sinththan bonchchettetto. Shoobbe nena ne aylletasinne ne naa Dawites nees dandayettiza mala nuus imma› giite» gides.
1Samuel25:9 Dawiti kiittida asati hee gakkida mala Dawite kiitaa Naabaales yootidaappe guye zaaro naago doommida.
1Samuel25:10 Naabaaley Dawite oosanchchatas
1Samuel25:11 Histtiin tani ta kaththinne ta haath
1Samuel25:12 Dawiti kiittida asati guye simmi biidi gakkida mala Naabaaley isttas gidayssa ubbaa Dawites yootida.
1Samuel25:13 Dawitikka asatas
1Samuel25:14 Naabaale aylletappe issoy iza machcho Abigaalis
1Samuel25:15 Ha asati keehi lo7o asa; nu bolla ay qohokka gaththibeettenna. Bazzon nu isttara diza wode nuus aykkoyka dhaybeenna.
1Samuel25:16 Nuni nu meheta heemmishe isttara diza wode ubbaan gallas gidiin omars istti nuus dirsa gidida.
1Samuel25:17 Ha7i nu godaa bollanne izaso asaa bolla metoy aalanththishe diza gishshas neni yuushsha qoppada ooththanaas bessizayssa ooththa. Izi gidikko hessa mala booza as gidida gishshas izas xali yootana issaadeyka deenna» gides.
1Samuel25:18 Abigaala gam7ontta dashe elelada 200 sollo
1Samuel25:19 Hessafe guye ba aylleta
1Samuel25:20 Iza ba hareza toggada duge zulleza wodhdhishin Dawitinne iza kaallizayti izikko duge wodhdhida; izakka istta demmadus.
1Samuel25:21 Dawiti
1Samuel25:22 Wonto maalado iza asaappe issaadeka ta shemppora paxa aggiko Xoossi ta bolla hessa mala ooththo; hessafekka aadhdhiza iita miish ooththo» gides.
1Samuel25:23 Abigaala Dawite demmida mala heerakka hareza bollafe wodhdhada Dawite sinththan gufannada kushe denththadus.
1Samuel25:24 Iza heen Dawite toho bolla kundada
1Samuel25:25 Ta godoo! Hessa booza Naabaale paxa miishshan qoodoppa! Addezas sunththaa birsheththi eeya guus gidida gishshas izikka ba sunththaa mala eeya! Eeyateththika izara gam7ides. Tani ne aylleya gidikko ne ta goday kiittida naateththata beyabeekke.
1Samuel25:26 «Ta godoo! De7o GODAY beyiin! Ne asho. Suuth gussanaappenne nerkka ne halo kessanaappe nena naagiday GODAA. Ha7ikka ne morkketinne ta godaa qohana koyzayti ubbay Naabaale mala gidetto.
1Samuel25:27 Ta ne aylleya ta godaas ehida ha imotay nena kaalliza ha naateththatas imetto.
1Samuel25:28 Ta GODAY ola olettiza gishshas GODAY ta godaa kawoteththaa tumappe izi mernaas izas minththana. Hessa gishshas tana ne aylley qoho taas atto ga. Neni shemppora paxa diza wode ubbaan iitateththi neeppe beettofo.
1Samuel25:29 Ay asikka ne shemppo dhayssanaas gooddikokka ta godaa shemppoy de7on dizayta issifeteththaa giddon GODAA ne Xoossaa matan saron naagettana. Gido attiin ne morkketa shemppo shuch yanbarshan caddiza mala caddana.
1Samuel25:30 GODAY ta godaas immida hidota qaalaa mala lo7o miish ubbaa ooththida wodenne Isra7eele bollaka izi nena kawoththida wode
1Samuel25:31 neni hadan gussida suuththi woykko ne kushen neni halo kessidaazi dontta gishshas ta goday wozinan ceecana hanoynne modhettana miishshi deenna. GODAY nees lo7o ooththida wode tana ne aylleyo baloppa» gadus.
1Samuel25:32 Dawitikka Abigaalis
1Samuel25:33 Tani asa suuth gussontta malanne ta kushen halo kessontta mala hach ne tana naagida gishshassinne ne lo7o qofaa gishshas nenikka anjjetta.
1Samuel25:34 Ta ne bolla meto gaththontta mala tana naagida De7o GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay beyiin! Neni hayssaththo eeson taakko yaada tana demmonttaako gadey wonttanaas Naabaales issi attuma naykka attenna» gides.
1Samuel25:35 Hessafe guye Abgaala Dawites ehida imotaa izi kusheppe ekkidi
1Samuel25:36 Abigaala guye soo simma bishin Naabaaley kawo keeththan giigiza gibira mala gibira giigsidayssa beyadus. Izikka keehi maththottidi ufayssan kumi uttides. Hessa gishshas gadey wonttanaashe gakkanaas izas aykkoka yootabeekku.
1Samuel25:37 Wonteththa gallas ushshaa maththoy iza aggidaappe guye iza hanoza ubbaa izas yootiin
1Samuel25:38 Tammu gallassatappe guye GODAY boshan Naabaale shociin izi hayqqides.
1Samuel25:39 Dawitikka Naabaaley hayqqidayssa siyida wode
1Samuel25:40 Iza aylletikka Qarmeloose biidi Abigaalis
1Samuel25:41 Izakka denda eqqada sinththa guth gufanna kushe denththada
1Samuel25:42 Abigaala heerakka hare toggada ba garade ichchashata kaaleththa ekkada Dawite aylletara baada Dawites machcho gidadus.
1Samuel25:43 Hessaththoka Dawiti Izra7eelen yelettida Ahinahoomo ekkides; nam7atikka iza machcho gidida.
1Samuel25:44 Sa7ooli gidikko Dawite machcho ba naa Milkoolo Gaalime deren yelettida Laysha naa Palixes immides.
1Samuel26:1 Ziife asay Sa7ooli dizaso yiidi

1Samuel26:3 Sa7ooli Yesemoone ginara diza Hakaaliya zumbulla bolla oge doonan dunkaani uttides; Dawiti gidikko bazzon dees. Dawiti Sa7ooli hee gakkanaas iza kaalli yidayssa eridi
1Samuel26:4 xomosizayta yeddidi Sa7oole yuussaa shaakki erides.
1Samuel26:5 Dawiti dendidi Sa7ooli dunkaani dizaso bides; Sa7oolinne iza ola asaa halaqa
1Samuel26:6 Dawiti Hiite dere as Ahimelekenne Xuriya naa Iyo7aabe isha Abisaye
1Samuel26:7 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne Abisayey Sa7oole ola asay dizaso bida; istti bishin Sa7ooli heen dhiskon dees; iza tooray iza hu7eson biittan eqqi dees; Abineerinne iza olanchchati iza yuushon dhiskida.

1Samuel26:13 Hessafe guye Dawiti he pinththi pinnidi zumbullaa xeeran haakki eqqides; istti nam7ay issoy issaafe keehi haakkida.
1Samuel26:14 Dawiti ba ola asaanne Neere naa Abineere
1Samuel26:15 Dawiti izas

1Samuel26:24 Be7a ne shemppoy ta ayfe sinththan bonchchettida mala ta shemppiyakka GODAA sinththan bonchchettidaaro gidu; izi tana meto ubbaafe ashsho» gi zaarides.

1Samuel28:4 Filisxeeme asay issi bolla shiiqetti yiidi Sunemen uttiin Sa7ooli qasse Isra7eele asaa ubbaa shiishshidi Gilbo7a zumaa bolla uttides.

1Samuel29:1 Isra7eele asay Izra7eele shoobbaan diza issi pultto achchan utti dishin Filisxeeme asay bantta olanchchata ubbaa Afeeqe geetettizason shiishshides.

1Samuel30:3 Dawitinne izara diza asati Xiqilaage gakkida mala katamaya xuugettidayssa
1Samuel30:4 He wode Dawitinne izara diza asati isttas qaalay shooriqana gakkanaas bantta qaalaa dhoqqu histti yeekkida.
1Samuel30:5 Izra7eele dere as Ahinahoomanne kase Qarmeloose dere as Naabaale machcho Abigaala hayti Dawite machcho nam7atikka di7ettida.

1Samuel30:7 Hessafe guye Dawiti Ahimeleke naa qeese Abiyaataare
1Samuel30:8 Dawiti GODAA

1Samuel30:10 Nam7u xeetu asati keehi daaburda gishshas shaafaa pinnana dandaybeettenna. Gido attiin Dawitinne izara attida 400 asay kaalli bides.
1Samuel30:11 Isttika bazzo biittan Gibxe dere as issaa demmidi iza Dawitekko ekki yida; izas miza kaththinne uyiza haath immida.
1Samuel30:12 Qasseka balaseppe uukettida qeeri ukeththa menththonne melida nam7u zabibe wurcota izas immida. Heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu omars aykko kaththika montta gishshassinne haaththika uyontta gishshas hayta midaappe guye izas shemppoy simmides.

1Samuel30:18 Dawiti Amaaleeqe asay ekki bidayssa ubbaa yegisides; ba machcheta nam7ata woththi ekkides.

1Samuel30:20 Qasseka Dawiti dorsa wudeta

1Samuel30:23 Dawiti zaaridi
