1Samuel31:1 He wode Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olides; Isra7eele asay istta sinththafe baqatides; daro asay Gilbo7a zumaa bolla cadetti hayqqides.
1Samuel31:2 Filisxeeme asay qasse Sa7oolenne iza nayta kaaletti gakkidi Yoonataane
1Samuel31:3 Olazi Sa7oole bolla minnides; wondafen dukkizayti iza dukkidi keehi madunththida.
1Samuel31:4 Sa7ooli ba gondalle oykkizayssas
1Samuel31:5 Iza gondalleza oykkizayssi Sa7ooli hayqqidayssa be7idi izikka ba giththa mashshaa bolla kundidi izara issife hayqqides.
1Samuel31:6 Sa7oolinne iza naa heedzdzati
1Samuel31:7 Zullezappe he pinththaninne Yordaanoose shaafaappe pinththan diza Isra7eele asay
1Samuel31:8 Wonteththa gallas Filisxeeme asay hayqqida asaa bollafe ola miishshaa qaaratanaas yiza wode Sa7oolinne iza naa heedzdzati Gilbo7a zumaa bolla kundidayta be7ida.
1Samuel31:9 Hessafe guye Sa7oole qoodhe qanxxidi
1Samuel31:10 Iza ola miishshata Astaroote geetettiza eeqa xoossa keeththaan woththida; qasse iza ahaza Beeti-Saane katama gimbe bolla kaqqida.
1Samuel31:11 Gala7aaden diza Yaabuse asay Filisxeeme asay Sa7oole bolla ooththidayssa siyida wode
1Samuel31:12 ola qarati ubbay omarsara Beeti-Saane bida; Sa7oole ahaanne iza nayta ahaa gimbeza bollafe woththida; histtidi Yaabuse katama ehidi tamaan xuuggida.
1Samuel31:13 Hessafe guye istta meqeththata ekkidi Yaabusen katama giddon diza Tamarssike geetettiza miththa garsan moogida; histtidi laappun gallas xoomida.
2Samuel1:1 Sa7ooli hayqqidaappe guye Dawiti Amaaleeqe asaa oli xoonidi simmides; Xigilaagenkka nam7u gallas gam7ides.
2Samuel1:2 Heedzdzanththo gallas daakettida may7o may7idi ba hu7e bolla gudulla laallidi issi naateththa naa dayssi Sa7oole gutappe yides. Dawitekko gakkida mala zaqulth zirxxi giidi bonchchos kushe denththides.
2Samuel1:3 Dawitikka iza
2Samuel1:4 Dawiti qasse iza
2Samuel1:5 Hessafe guye Dawiti woreza izas yootida naaza
2Samuel1:6 Woreza izas yootida naateththa naazi izas zaaridi
2Samuel1:7 Izikka guye simmi xeellidi tana be7idi xeygides; tanikka
2Samuel1:8 «Izikka tana
2Samuel1:9 «Izikka taas
2Samuel1:10 Histtiin tani izi kundichchidaappe guye izi attonttayssa erada ta izakko shiiqada iza wodhadis. Iza hu7e bolla diza kallachchazanne iza qese sagayoza ekkada hekko ta godaas ehadis» gides.
2Samuel1:11 Hessafe guye Dawitinne izara diza asay ubbay bantta may7o daakkida.
2Samuel1:12 Istti mashshan siifettida gishshas Sa7oolessinne iza naa Yoonataanes
2Samuel1:13 Dawiti qasse he woreza izas ehida naateththaza
2Samuel1:14 Dawiti qasse
2Samuel1:15 Hessafe guye Dawiti naateththatappe issaa xeygidi
2Samuel1:16 Dawitikka Amaaleeqeza
2Samuel1:17 Dawiti Sa7oole gishshassinne Yoonataane hayqo gishshas zilalishe yeekkides.
2Samuel1:18 Qasseka
2Samuel1:19 «Haysso Isra7eelee! Ne bonchchoy zumbullata bolla cadetti hayqqides; ola qarati waani hayssaththo kundidoo!
2Samuel1:20 «Filisxeeme macca nayti ufayettontta mala
2Samuel1:21 «Intteno Gilbo7a zumatoo! Intte bolla iray bukkofo; xaazaykka intte bolla dooppo; yarshos gidiza kaththi intte goshsha biittan mokkofo. Heen ola qaraza gondalley tunides; Sa7oole gondalley hayssafe guyen zayten qucettenna.
2Samuel1:22 Yoonataane wondafey wodhontta simmi erenna; Sa7oole mashshayka morkke qanxxereththi yeggees; Wolqqamatakka menththereththi yeggees; iza morkketakka wodhides.
2Samuel1:23 «Sa7oolinne Yoonataaney shemppora paxa dishe siiqettizaytanne qofan gayttizayta. Hayqqisheka shaakettonttayta; golle kafoppe pilatizayta; gaammofekka minnizayta.
2Samuel1:24 «Intteno Isra7eele maccassatoo! Ochcha teera misatiza al7o qamisa inttena mayzida; intte may7oza worqqa xibaben alleqissida; Sa7ooles yeekkite.
2Samuel1:25 «Ola qarati waani hayssa mala olason kundidoo! Yoonataaney ne zumbullata bolla cadetti hayqqides.
2Samuel1:26 Ta isha Yoonataanee! Tani ne gishshas kayottadis; ne taas keeha al7okoshin; ne siiqoy tana malalisizaazakkoshin macca siiqoppeka keehi aadhdheeskoshin.
2Samuel1:27 «Ola qarati waani kundidoo! Ola massaratikka waani hada gidanee!»
2Samuel2:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti
2Samuel2:2 Histtiin Dawiti ba machcheta nam7atara Kebroone bides. Isttika Izra7eelen yelettida Ahinahoomonne Qarmeloose dere as hayqqida Naabaale machcho Abigaalo.
2Samuel2:3 Hessaththoka Dawiti banara diza asaa isttaso asaara issife gaththi ehides. Isttika Kebroone katamatan uttida.
2Samuel2:4 Hessafe guye Yuhuda asay Kebroone yides. Heen Dawite tiydi Yuhuda deraa bolla kawoththida. Gala7aade deren Yaabuse asay Sa7oole ahaa moogidayssa Dawites yootiin
2Samuel2:5 izikka Gala7aaden Yaabuse dere asaas hessa izas yootana mala qasttanne as yeddidi
2Samuel2:6 Ha7ikka GODAY inttes ba mino siiqonne ammaneteth qoncciso; intte ooththida lo7eteththaa gishshas tanikka inttes lo7o miish ooththana.
2Samuel2:7 Hessa gishshas minnite; goobite; intte goday Sa7ooli hayqqida gishshas Yuhuda asay tana tiydi ba bolla kawoththides» gides.
2Samuel2:8 He wode Sa7oole ola asaa azaziza Neere naa Abineeri Sa7oole naa Iyaabuste ekkidi Mahanayme pinththides.
2Samuel2:9 Izakka Gala7aade
2Samuel2:10 Sa7oole naa Iyaabustey Isra7eele bolla kawotishin izas layththay oyddu tammu; izi nam7u layth haarides. Yuhuda asay gidikko Dawite kaallides.
2Samuel2:11 Dawiti Kebroonen uttidi Isra7eele asaa laappun layththinne usuppun agina haarides.
2Samuel2:12 Neere naa Abineeri Sa7oole naa Iyaabuste oosanchchatara issi bolla Mahanaymeppe dendidi Geba7oone bida.
2Samuel2:13 Isttaka Xuriya naa Iyo7aabeynne Dawite asati ke7idi Geba7oone eele haaththa achchan gayttida. Issi baggay haaththaafe he pinththan
2Samuel2:14 Hessafe guye Abineeri Iyo7aabes
2Samuel2:15 Hessa gishshas Biniyaame baggafe Iyaabustes tammanne nam7u asi qoodettides. Dawite baggafekka tammanne nam7u asi qoodettides.
2Samuel2:16 Hessafe guye issoy issoy ba morkke hu7e oykkidi mashshan millera caddishe issife oyketti kundida. Hessa gishshas Geba7oonen diza he biittazi
2Samuel2:17 He gallassa olay keehi deexo; Abineerinne Isra7eele asay Dawite asaan xoonettida.
2Samuel2:18 Xuriya attuma naa heedzdzati Iyo7aabey
2Samuel2:19 Izi Abineere oykkanaas hadirs ushach gontta iza geedora kaallides.
2Samuel2:20 Abineeri guye simmi xeellidi
2Samuel2:21 Histtiin Abineeri iza
2Samuel2:22 Qasseka Abineeri izas
2Samuel2:23 Asaheeley gidikko iza kaaleteth aggibeenna; hessa gishshas Abineeri ba toora xeeran izas ulon caddiin toorazi izas zokkozara kanththi kezides. Asaheeley heen gade bolla kundida mala heerakka hayqqides. Oonikka Asaheeley kundi hayqqidaso gakkishe eqqi ekkees.
2Samuel2:24 Iyo7aabeynne Abisayey gidikko Abineere kaalettida; iza goodereththishe Geba7oone bazzo efiza ogezara Aye matan diza Aama zumbulla heera gakkishin arshey wullides.
2Samuel2:25 Hessafe Biniyaame asay Abineerekko shiiqidi zumbullaza xeeran issino gididi salfides.
2Samuel2:26 Abineeri Iyo7aabe xeygidi
2Samuel2:27 Iyo7aabeykka zaaridi
2Samuel2:28 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey ba zaye punnides; asaykka ubbay Isra7eele gooddizayssa aggides. Olazi hessan eqqides.
2Samuel2:29 Abineerinne iza asay omarsara Arabera kanththi bida; heeppe Yordaanoose shaafaa pinnidi ubbayka Bitiroonera kanththi Mahanayme yida.
2Samuel2:30 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Abineere gooddizayssa aggi simmidi izi dereza shiishshida wode Dawite asaa giddofe Asaheeley attiin haray tammanne uddufun asi dhaydayssi erettides.
2Samuel2:31 Dawite asay gidikko Biniyaame asaappe Abineere kaalliza 330 as wodhides.
2Samuel2:32 Iyo7aabeynne izara diza asay Asaheeley kundidasohoppe iza ahaa denththidi Beeteliheemen iza aawa duufon moogida. Hessafe guye omars kumeth hemettishe aqidi buro gadey wontishin Kebroone gakkida.
2Samuel3:1 Sa7oole keeththaa giddoninne Dawite keeththaa giddon diza olay daro wode gam7ides; Dawite baggay minni minni bishin Sa7oole baggay daaburi daaburi bides.
2Samuel3:2 Dawiti Kebroonen dishin izas usuppun attuma nayti yelettida; izas bayra naazi Izra7eele dere as Ahinahoomppe Aminooney yelettides.
2Samuel3:3 Nam7anththo naazi Qarmeloose dere as Naabaale machcho Abigaalippe Kil7aabey yelettides; heedzdzanththo naazi Geeshure kawo Talimaye biyo Ma7ikippe Abeseloomey yelettides.
2Samuel3:4 Oydanththo naazi Adoniyaasi Hagitippe yelettides; ichchashanththo naazi Shafaaxiyay Abixaalippe yelettides;
2Samuel3:5 Usuppunththo naazi Dawite machcho Eglippe Yitiraamey yelettides; hayti Dawiti Kebroonen dishin izas yelettidayta.
2Samuel3:6 Sa7oole keeththinne Dawite keeththi olettishe diza wode Abineeri Sa7oole keeththan ba wolqqa minththishe dees.
2Samuel3:7 Sa7ooli Aaya biyo Erxifo laggeththo oykkides; Iyaabustey Abineere
2Samuel3:8 Abineeri Iyaabuste haasayan keehi hanqettida gishshas
2Samuel3:9 GODAY Sa7oole keeththafe kawoteththaa woththi ekkidi Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele bollanne Yuhuda bolla Dawite kawoteththaa caaqqi woththida caaqoza ta polontta aggiko Xoossi Abineere bolla iita miish eho» gides.
2Samuel3:10 
2Samuel3:11 Iyaabustey Abineeres keehi babbida gishshas zaaridi issi qaala phoqqanaas dandaybeenna.
2Samuel3:12 Hessafe guye Abineeri Dawites
2Samuel3:13 Dawitikka
2Samuel3:14 Hessafe guye Dawiti
2Samuel3:15 Hessa gishshas Iyaabustey ba qasttanneta kiittidi izi azina Laysha naa Palti7eelesoppe kessi ekkides.
2Samuel3:16 Izi azinay Bahirime gakkanaas yeekkishe izo kaalli bides. Hessafe guye Abineeri
2Samuel3:17 Abineeri Isra7eele cimatara zorettishe isttas
2Samuel3:18 GODAY Dawites
2Samuel3:19 Hessaththoka Abineeri Biniyaame qommotas barkka biidi hayssa yootides; hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Biniyaame keeththa asay ubbay ooththanaas koyida ubbaa Dawites yootanaas Kebroone bides.
2Samuel3:20 Abineeri 20 asatara Dawiti dizaso Kebroone bides; Dawitikka Abineeressinne izara diza as ubbaas gibira giigsides.
2Samuel3:21 Hessafe guye Abineeri Dawites
2Samuel3:22 Iyo7aabeynne Dawite asay he wode daro miish di7i ekkidi olaappe simmida. Abineeri gidikko Dawiti saron iza moyzida gishshas Kebroonen deenna.
2Samuel3:23 Iyo7aabeynne izara issife diza olanchcha ubbay hee gakkida mala Neere naa Abineeri kawozaakko yidayssa
2Samuel3:24 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey kawozaakko gelidi
2Samuel3:25 Neere naa Abineere ne eraasa; izi yiday nena baleththanaas
2Samuel3:26 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Dawite achchafe kezides; Abineere ekki yaana mala as kiittides; kiitettida qasttanneti iza Seyren diza haaththa olla mata gakkishin zaarida; hessi hanishin Dawiti eribeenna.
2Samuel3:27 Abineeri guye Kebroone simmida wode Iyo7aabey iza xalla haasayssana koyza as misatidi issi bagga sher7i histtidi gede gimbeza penge efides; heen ba isha Asaheele suuth azarana koyidi izas ulon caddi wodhides.
2Samuel3:28 Hessafe guye Abineere wodhidayssa Dawiti siyidi
2Samuel3:29 Iza suuththay Iyo7aabe hu7eninne iza aawa keeththa ubbaa bolla gido; asateththafe haaththi gogissiza hargey woykko guufen kal7atiza wobbey woykko mashshan hayqqizay woykko mizaazi dhayiin koshattizay Iyo7aabe keeththafe dhayoppo» gides.
2Samuel3:30 Abineeri Geba7oonen olettida olaan Iyo7aabessinne Abisaye ishaa Asaheele wodhida gishshas isttika Abineere wodhida.
2Samuel3:31 Hessafe guye Dawiti Iyo7aabessinne izara issife diza asa ubbaas
2Samuel3:32 Histtidi Abineere ahaa efidi Kebroonen moogida; kawozi Abineere duufo bolla waassi yeekkides; derezikka hessaththo yeekkides.
2Samuel3:33 Kawozi Abineere gishshas kayo milas milalides; «Abineeree! Shufuro asa mala waana hayqqadii?
2Samuel3:34 Ne kusheti qashettibeettenna; ne tohoti agrimooqen gelibeettenna; asi iita asa sinththan kundiza mala nekka hessaththo kundadasa.» Derezi ubbay qasse zaari yeekkides.
2Samuel3:35 Hessafe guye dere ubbay kath doonan gelththiza wode Dawitekko yiidi izi kath maana mala minththi woossida. Gido attiin Dawiti
2Samuel3:36 Derezi ubbay hessa be7idi ufayettides; addafekka kawoza hanoy dereza ufayssides.
2Samuel3:37 Hessaththoka he gallas derezi ubbaynne kumeththa Isra7eeley kawoza kushey Neere naa Abineere hayqon bayndayssa erides.
2Samuel3:38 Hessafe guye kawozi ba deraas
2Samuel3:39 Ta tiyettida kawo gidikkoka hach ta laafateththi taas erettides; hayti Xuriya nayti taas wolqqatida. GODAY iita ooththidaades iza ooso mala immo» gides.
2Samuel4:1 Abineeri Kebroonen hayqqidayssa Sa7oole naa Iyaabustey siyida mala keehi yayyides; Isra7eele dereykka dagammides.
2Samuel4:2 He wode Sa7oole naa Iyaabustes kaaleththiza nam7u asati deettes; isttika Ba7aananne Erekaabe geetetteettes; istti Biniyaame qommotappe Bi7eroote dere yeleta gidida Armoone nayta; Bi7erootey Biniyaame katamatappe issiney mala qoodettawus.
2Samuel4:3 Bi7eroote asay Geetime baqati biidi hach gakkanaas heen bete as gididi dees.
2Samuel4:4 Sa7oole naa Yoonataanes nam7u tohoti silida issi nay dees; Sa7oole hayqoynne Yoonataane hayqo worey Izra7eeleppe izakko gakkiza wode izas layththay ichchasha. Izikka toho sila gididay he wode iza dichchizaara ekkada eeson baqatishin kundida gishshassa. Iza sunththi Memfeboste geetettees.
2Samuel4:5 He wode Bi7eroote dere as Armoone nayti Erekaabeynne Ba7aanay Iyaabusteko baana dendida; izi gallassa shemppo ekkanaas ba hiixa bolla ishechchan dishin seeta gallas away seellishin izakko gakkida.
2Samuel4:6 Gistte koyza as misatidi keeththa giddo gelidi izas ulon caddida. Hessafe guye Erekaabeynne iza isha Ba7aanay luushu gi kezi bida.
2Samuel4:7 Istti soo geliday Iyaabustey ba alga kifilen ichchi dishina; istti iza caddi wodhidaappe guye iza hu7e qanxxi ekkidi kumeththa omars Arabe ogera bida.
2Samuel4:8 Iyaabuste hu7e Dawitekko Kebroone efidi kawozas
2Samuel4:9 Dawitikka Bi7eroote dere as Armoone nayta Erekaabessinne iza isha Ba7aanas
2Samuel4:10 taas mishiraachcho qaala ehidaa izas misatiin
2Samuel4:11 Histtiin ba keeththan ba alga bolla ichchi shempiza xillo as wodhida iita asatas iita qixaate immana bessennee? Iza suuththaa intte kusheppe accanaassinne inttena biittafe dhayssanaas taas bessennee?» gides.
2Samuel4:12 Hessa gishshas Dawiti ba asata azaziin istti heyta wodhida; istta kushenne toho qanxxidi Kebroonen diza eele haaththa achchan kaqqida; Iyaabuste hu7e qanxxi ekkidi Kebroonen diza Abineere duufoza achchan moogida.
2Samuel5:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay Kebroone Dawitekko biidi
2Samuel5:2 Kase Sa7ooli nu bolla kawoti diza wode Isra7eele ola asaa kaaleththizay nena; GODAY
2Samuel5:3 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asaa kaaleththizayti ubbay Kebroone yida; kawo Dawiti Kebroonen GODAA sinththan isttara caaqo qaala gelides; isttika Dawite tiydi Isra7eele bolla kawoththida.
2Samuel5:4 Dawiti kawotishin izas layththay 30; izi 40 layth deraa ayssides.
2Samuel5:5 Izi Kebroonen uttidi Yuhuda bolla laappun layththinne usuppun agina
2Samuel5:6 Kawozinne iza asay Yerusalaamen diza Yaabuse asaa olanaas hee bida. Yaabuse asaykka Dawite
2Samuel5:7 Gido attiin Dawiti Xiyoone miixa oykkides; hinnaka ha7i Dawite katama geetettizasohoyo.
2Samuel5:8 He gallas Dawiti
2Samuel5:9 Hessafe guye Dawiti miixayo baas duussaso histtides; izo
2Samuel5:10 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay izara diza gishshas Dawiti ubba wode minni minni bides.
2Samuel5:11 He wode Xiroose kawo Kiraamey Dawitekko as kiita yeddides; hessaththoka ziga mith massiza hiillanchchatanne shuch massiza hiillanchchata yeddides; isttika Dawites kawo keeth keexxida.
2Samuel5:12 GODAY Isra7eele bolla iza kawoteththaa minththidayssa
2Samuel5:13 Dawiti Kebrooneppe bidaappe guye kaseyta bolla Yerusalaamen hara laggeththota woththides; machchetakka ekkides; hara attuma naytinne macca nayti izas yelettida.
2Samuel5:14 Izi Yerusalaamen yelida nayti
2Samuel5:15 Iyabeheere
2Samuel5:16 Elshama
2Samuel5:17 Dawiti Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotidayssa Filisxeeme asay siyidi iza koyanaas gixxi dendides; hessa siyidi Dawiti duge ba miixa wodhdhides.
2Samuel5:18 He wode Filisxeeme asay yiidi Erafayme shoobban laaletti dunkaanides.
2Samuel5:19 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA
2Samuel5:20 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Ba7aali-Paraaxime biidi Filisxeeme asaa oli xoonides; izikka
2Samuel5:21 Filisxeeme asay ba eeqa xoossata yeggi aggidi baqatida gishshas Dawitinne iza kaalliza asay di7i ekki bida.
2Samuel5:22 Filisxeeme asay qasseka yiidi Erafayme shoobban laaletti dunkaanides.
2Samuel5:23 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA oychchides; GODAYKKA izas
2Samuel5:24 Balasaane miththa xeera bollara ola giiris siyiza wode GODAY Filisxeeme ola asaa olanaas neeppe kaseti kezides guus gidida gishshas he wode eesotada sinth sitti ga ba» gides.
2Samuel5:25 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAY iza azazida mala ooththides; Filisxeeme asaakka Geebappe biidi Gezeere gakkanaas gooddi gooddi shocides.
2Samuel6:1 Qasseka Dawiti Isra7eele asaappe doorettida 30
2Samuel6:2 Izinne izara diza asay ubbay kirube bolla uttida GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa ehanaas Ba7aali-Yuhuda geetettizaso bida.
2Samuel6:3 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza ooraththa para-gaaren woththida; zumbulla bolla diza Abinadaabe keeththafe kessi ehida; para laaggizayti Aminadaabe naa Oozanne Ahiyo.
2Samuel6:4 Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotazi para-gaareza bolla dishin Ahiyoy izappe sinththara bees.
2Samuel6:5 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay yeththan
2Samuel6:6 Istti Nakoone kaththa bale gakkishin boorati dhuphettida gishshas Oozay ba kushe yeddidi Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza oykkides.
2Samuel6:7 Oozay hessa xalateththan ooththida gishshas GODAA hanqoy iza bolla eexxides; hessa gishshas Xoossay iza wodhides; izikka heen Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa achchan hayqqides.
2Samuel6:8 GODAA hanqoy Ooza wodhida gishshas Dawiti muuzottidessinne ceecides; he sohozi hach gakkanaas
2Samuel6:9 Dawiti he gallas GODAAS babbida gishshas
2Samuel6:10 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa banara daana mala Dawite katama ekki baana koyibeenna; hessa gishshas oge laammidi Geete dere as Abidaare soo efissides.
2Samuel6:11 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Geete dere as Abidaare keeththan heedzdzu agina uttides; GODAY Abidaarenne izaso asaa ubbaa anjjides.
2Samuel6:12 He wode
2Samuel6:13 He GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida asati usuppun tanggo bida qoodan issi booraynne issi modhdho mari yarshettees.
2Samuel6:14 Dawiti laynoppe dadettida eefude ba xeessan gixxidi kumeththa wolqqan GODAA sinththan maggulides.
2Samuel6:15 Hessa malan Dawitinne kumeththa Isra7eele asay ufayssan ililishenne zaye punnishe GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa pude ehida.
2Samuel6:16 GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Dawite katama gelishin Sa7oole naa Milkoola maskootera xeelladus; kawo Dawiti GODAA sinththan guppishininne durishin be7ada ba wozinara iza kadhadus.
2Samuel6:17 Hessafe guye GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa ehidi Dawiti izas tokkida Dunkaaneza giddon izas giigsidasohozan woththida; Dawitikka xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho GODAA sinththan shiishshides.
2Samuel6:18 Dawiti xuugettiza yarshozanne issifeteththa yarshoza shiishshidaappe guye dereza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA sunththan anjjides.
2Samuel6:19 Isra7eele bagga gidida as ubbaas
2Samuel6:20 Dawiti baso asaa anjjanaas baso simmi biin Sa7oole naa Milkoola iza mokkana kezada
2Samuel6:21 Dawitikka izis
2Samuel6:22 Hessafekka bollara kaseppe aaththada tanateththaa kawushshana; hessafe aadhdhada kadhettidaade gidana; gido attiin ne kadhida garadeta sinththan ta bonchchettana» gides.
2Samuel6:23 Sa7oole naa Milkoola hayqqanaashe gakkanaas naa yelabeekku.
2Samuel7:1 Kawozi ba kawoteththa keeththan woppu gi uttidaappenne GODAY iza yuushon diza iza morkketappe shempisidaappe guye
2Samuel7:2 nabe Naataanes
2Samuel7:3 Naataaneykka
2Samuel7:4 He gallassa omars GODAA qaalay Naataanekko yiidi
2Samuel7:5 «Neni baada ta aylle Dawites: Ta izan daana keeth ne keexxaka.
2Samuel7:6 Tani Isra7eele asaa Gibxeppe kesoosofe doommada hach gakkanaas dunkaane taas aqoso histtada issisoppe haraso yuuya yuuya de7adis attiin keeththan de7abeekke.
2Samuel7:7 Tani Isra7eele asaara bidaso ubbaan ta dere Isra7eele naagana mala ta azaziin kaaleththizaytappe issaa
2Samuel7:8 «Ha7ikka ta aylle Dawites Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY: Ta dere Isra7eele ne ayssana mala ta nena denththadis; dors heemmizasohoppe ta nena ekkadis.
2Samuel7:9 Ne bidaso ubbaan ta nenara gidadis; ne morkketa ubbaa ta ne sinththafe dhayssadis; ha7ikka istta sunththay biitta bolla keehi erettida daro gita asatappe issaa sunththa mala ta ne sunththaa dhoqqisana.
2Samuel7:10 Izas buzo duussasoy daana mala hayssafe qaaxxontta mala ta dere Isra7eeles soho immananne minththana. Hayssafe kase hanida mala hayssafe guye iita derey istta un7eththenna.
2Samuel7:11 Ta dere Isra7eele kaaleththizayta ta shuumida wodeppe doommidi istti iza bolla ooththidayssaththo hayssafe guye iza bolla oosettenna; hessaththoka ne morkketa ubbaafe ta nena naagana. GODAY ba hu7era keeth nees keexxanayssa izi yootees.
2Samuel7:12 Ne layththaa wursada kase ne aawatanne gayttiza wode nena laattana zereth ta neeppe kessana; iza kawoteththaaka ta minththana.
2Samuel7:13 Ta sunththaas keeth keexxanay iza; tanikka iza kawoteththaa mernaas minththana.
2Samuel7:14 Ta izas aawa gidana; izikka taas naa gidana; izi mooro ooththiko as muriza guufera ta iza murana; asa nay lisson garafettiza mala ta iza garafana.
2Samuel7:15 Ta maaroteththaa neeppe kase diza Sa7ooleppe haassidayssaththo ta izappe haassike.
2Samuel7:16 Ne keeththaynne ne kawoteththi ta sinththan mernaas minni daana; ne kawoteththa araataykka mernaas minni daana» gides.
2Samuel7:17 Naataaney hayssa ajjuuta qaala kumeth Dawites yootides.
2Samuel7:18 Hayssafe guye kawo Dawiti geli GODAA sinththan uttidi
2Samuel7:19 Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU
2Samuel7:20 «Dawiti nena hayssafe bollara hara ay gaana dandayzee? Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU
2Samuel7:21 Ne qaalaza gishshassinne ne wozina qofa mala ne hayssa gita miish ooththadasa; ne ayllezi erana mala qonccisadasa.
2Samuel7:22 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU
2Samuel7:23 «Ba dere gidana mala iza ashshanaas Xoossi izappe sinththara bida derey
2Samuel7:24 Ne dereza Isra7eele mernaas nees buzo dere ooththada minththadasa; GODAWU
2Samuel7:25 «Ha7ikka GODAA Xoossawu
2Samuel7:26 hessa gishshas ne sunththi mernaas gita gidana; asaykka
2Samuel7:27 «Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU
2Samuel7:28 Abeet Ubbaa Haariza GODAWU! Neni Xoossa; ne qaalaykka ammanettidayssa; hayssa lo7o miish ooththanaas neni ne ayllezas hidota immadasa.
2Samuel7:29 Izi ne sinththan mernaas minni daana mala
2Samuel8:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Filisxeeme asaa xoonides; ba shene garsan ayssides; Metegi-Aama geetettiza katamayo Filisxeemeta kusheppe woththi ekkides.
2Samuel8:2 Hessaththoka Dawiti Mo7aabeta xoonides; istta biitta bolla ishisidi wodoron wadhdhi xeellides; wadhdhi xeellidaytappe nam7u kushe gidizayta izi wodhiin issi kushe gidizayti paxa attida; hessa gishshas Mo7aabe asay Dawites haarettidessinne izas giirides.
2Samuel8:3 Hessafekka hara Dawiti Efiraaxise shaafa matan diza dereza zaari oykkana biidi
2Samuel8:4 Dawiti izappe 1
2Samuel8:5 Damasqo Aaraamen diza Xoobba kawo Hadaadi7eezere maaddanaas yida wode Dawiti isttafe 22
2Samuel8:6 Hessafe guye Damasqon diza Aaraamen ba ola asata kambe giigsides. Aaraame asay izas haarettidessinne giirides; GODAY Dawiti bidaso ubbaan izas xoono immides.
2Samuel8:7 Hadaadi7eezere shuumeti oykkida worqqa gondalleta Dawiti ekkidi Yerusalaame efides.
2Samuel8:8 Kawo Dawiti Bexahenne Berotaye geetettiza Hadaadi7eezere katamatappe keehippe daro xarqimala denththi efides.
2Samuel8:9 Hamaate dere kawo Too7uyi Dawiti kumeththa Hadaadi7eezere ola asaa xoonidayssa siyida wode
2Samuel8:10 Too7uyi Hadaadi7eezerera ubba wode olettishe diza gishshas sarokanne izi Hadaadi7eezere xoonida xoono qonccisanaas ba naa Iyoraame kawo Dawitekko kiitti yeddides; izikka birappe
2Samuel8:11 Kawo Dawiti kase ba giirissida kawotappe gelida biraninne worqqan ooththida mala hayta ha miishshatakka GODAAS dummasides.
2Samuel8:12 Izas giirida kawoti
2Samuel8:13 Maxine shoobba geetettizason Dawiti Eedoome asaappe 18
2Samuel8:14 Kumeththa Eedoomen olanchchata kambe giigsides; Eedoome asay ubbay Dawites haarettides; Dawiti bidaso ubbaan GODAY izas xoono immides.
2Samuel8:15 Dawiti kumeththa Isra7eele bolla kawotides; deraas suure pirdanne woga essides.
2Samuel8:16 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey olanchchata halaqa; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafe.
2Samuel8:17 Qasse Ahixuube naa Saadooqeynne Abiyaataare naa Ahimelekey qeese; Sarayay xaafe.
2Samuel8:18 Yoodahe naa Bannayay Kelite asasinne Pelite asas halaqa; Dawite attuma nayti kawoteththa keeththan zore immizayta.

2Samuel11:1 Kawoti olas keziza ofinththa aginatan Dawiti Iyo7aabe kawo shuumetaranne kumeththa olanchchatara gaththi olas yeddides; isttika Amoone dere asaa dhayssida; Eraaba katamayo giddoththida; gido attiin he wode Dawiti Yerusalaamen attides.
2Samuel11:2 Issi gallas bilahe wode Dawiti dhiskofe beeggidi kawo keeththa pooqe bolla kezidi simerettishe issi maccassaya ba bolla meecettishin be7ides; maccassaya keeha mala lo7o.
2Samuel11:3 Dawiti as kiittidi maccassay gishshas oyshechchides; addezikka
2Samuel11:4 Hessafe guye Dawiti as yeddidi izo baakko ehisiin izi dizaso geladus; histtiin izira zin7ides; he wode iza macca naas yiza agina wogappe geeya uttadus.

2Samuel11:25 Dawiti kiitetti yidayssas
2Samuel11:26 Ooriyo machcheya izi azinay hayqqidayssa siyada keeha mishettada izas yeekkadus.
2Samuel11:27 Kayoteththa wodey aadhdhidaappe guye Dawiti kiitti ehisidi izo baas machcho ekkides; iza Dawites attuma naa yeladus; gido attiin Dawiti ooththida oosoy GODAA ufayssibeenna.
2Samuel12:1 GODAY nabe Naataane Dawitekko kiittides; izikka Dawitekko biidi
2Samuel12:2 Durezas keehi daro dorsatinne miizati deettes.
2Samuel12:3 Gido attiin manqozas izi shammida dorsa laaqqa issineyppe attiin haray deenna; izi izo ba naytara al7isi dichchides; izara issife mawus; issife uyawus; iza ki7on ichchawus; iza izas yelo mala.
2Samuel12:4 «Issi gallas durezaso imaththi yides; dure addezi ba dorsatappe woykko miizatappe ekkidi he imaththazas miza kath giigsana koyibeenna; gido attiin manqoza laaqqayo efidi baso yida imaththazas kaththi giigsides» gides.
2Samuel12:5 Dawiti hessa ooththidayssa bolla keehi hanqettidi Naataanes
2Samuel12:6 Izi hayssa mala ooso ooththida gishshassinne qadhetay baynda gishshas he laaqqay gishshas oyddu kushe qanxxana bessees» gides.
2Samuel12:7 Hessafe guye Naataaney Dawites zaaridi
2Samuel12:8 Ne godaa keeththaa ta nees immadis; ta ne godaa machchetakka ne shophpha gars gelththadis; Isra7eele keeththaanne Yuhuda keeththaa ta nees immadis; hayti ubbay nees guuxxidaakko ta nees heytappe bollara gujjanakkoshin.
2Samuel12:9 Histtiin iza sinththan iita miish ooththada GODAA qaala ays kawushshadii? Hiite dere as Ooriyo mashshan siifadasa; iza machcheyo nees ekkadasa; izakka Amooneta mashshan wodhisadasa.
2Samuel12:10 Neni tana kawushshida gishshassinne Hiite dere as Ooriyo machcho nees ekkida gishshas ne keeththafe mernaas mashshay shaakettenna› gees.
2Samuel12:11 «GODAY nena
2Samuel12:12 Neni kase hayssa geeman ooththadasa; tani gidikko Isra7eele ubbaa sinththan gallas poo7oy dishin qonccisana› gees» gides.
2Samuel12:13 Hessafe guye Dawiti Naataanes
2Samuel12:14 Gido attiin ne hayssa ooththiin morkketi GODAA keehi kawushshana mala ne ooththida gishshas nees yelettida naazi hayqqana» gides.
2Samuel12:15 Naataaney baso simmi bidaappe guye Ooriyo machcheya Dawites yelida naaza bolla GODAY iita harge yeggides.
2Samuel12:16 Dawiti ba naaza gishshas Xoossaa woossidessinne xoomides. Hessafe guye gede ba kifile gelidi omars omars qanxxontta sa7a bolla ichchi aqides.
2Samuel12:17 Iza kawoteththa keeththa cimati iza sa7appe denththanaas iza matan eqqida; izi gidikko dendontta ixxides; istti mishin aykkoka mibeenna.
2Samuel12:18 Laappunththa gallas naazi hayqqides; Dawite oosanchchati
2Samuel12:19 Iza oosanchchati garsara saasuketti haasayzayssa Dawiti be7idi naazi hayqqidayssa erides; hessa gishshas
2Samuel12:20 He wode Dawiti sa7a bollafe dendidi
2Samuel12:21 Iza oosanchchati iza
2Samuel12:22 Dawiti isttas
2Samuel12:23 Ha7i gidikko naazi hayqqiin ta aazas xoomoo? Ta iza haa zaaranaas dandayazinaa? Ta izakko baana attiin izi haa taakko simmenna!» gides.
2Samuel12:24 Hessafe guye Dawiti ba machcheyo Bersaabeho minththeththides; izikko gelidi izira aqides; izakka izas attuma naa yeladus; naaza
2Samuel12:25 GODAY naaza dosida gishshas iza sunththi Yididiya geetetti xeygettana mala nabe Naataane baggara qaala kiittides.
2Samuel12:26 He wode Iyo7aabey Amooneta katama Eraaba olidi kawoteththa keeththaa miixa oykkides.
2Samuel12:27 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Dawitekko as kiitti yeddidi
2Samuel12:28 Ha7i neni attida olanchchata shiishsha ekkada katamayo giddoththa oykka; ne histtontta aggiko katamayo ta oykkiko iza ta sunththan xeygettana» gides.
2Samuel12:29 Hessa gishshas Dawiti kumeththa olanchchata shiishshi ekki biidi Eraaba oli oykkides.

2Samuel13:19 Ti7imaara ba hu7en bidinth laalladus; alleqo may7ozakka daakkadus; hessafe guye ba hu7e baqqa oykkada yeekkashe badus.

2Samuel13:23 Nam7u layththafe guye Abeseloomey Efreeme dhassa matan diza Ba7aali-Haxoore kataman ba dorsata iske qanxxishe heen kawo attuma nayti beettana mala xeygides.

2Samuel13:29 Abeseloome aylleti istta goday istta azazidayssa Aminoone bolla polida; hessafe guye kawoza nayti ubbay ba baqulo baqulo toggidi baqatida.
2Samuel13:30 Istti buro oge bolla dishin
2Samuel13:31 Kawozi dendi eqqidi ba may7o daakkides; biitta bolla gufannides; iza matan eqqi diza iza aylleti ubbay bantta may7o daakkida.

2Samuel13:33 Hayqqiday Aminoone xalla gidida gishshas

2Samuel13:35 Iyoonadaabey Dawites
2Samuel13:36 Izi buro yooti wursontta dishin kawoza nayti waassishenne yeekkishe gelida; hessaththoka kawozinne iza oosanchchati ubbay keehippe yeekkida.
2Samuel13:37 Abeseloomey gangidi Geeshure kawo Amihuude naa Talimayekko bides; gido attiin Dawiti hayqqida naaza gishshas ubba wode yeekkishe gam7ides.

2Samuel13:39 Kawo Dawiti ba naa Aminoone hayqon gakkida kayoteththaafe minettidaappe guye Abeseloomekko baana iza wozinay dendides.
2Samuel14:1 Kawo Dawiti Abeseloome laamotidayssa Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey erides.
2Samuel14:2 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabey issi as Tequhe kiittidi issi wozinama maccas ehisides; izo
2Samuel14:3 Hessafe guye kawozaakko baada ta nees yootizayssa izas yoota» giidi iza yootana qaalata Iyo7aabey izis yootides.
2Samuel14:4 Tequhe dere maccassaya kawozaakko geladus; sinththa guth gufannada bonchcho saroka immidaappe guye
2Samuel14:5 Kawozikka izo
2Samuel14:6 Taas ne aylleys nam7u attuma nayti deettes; nam7ati ba garsan issoy issaara demban ooyettida; istta ashechchizay baynda gishshas issoy hankkoyssa shoci wodhides.
2Samuel14:7 Histtiin dabboti ubbay ne aylley bolla dendidi

2Samuel14:14 Biittan gukkida haaththi simmonttayssaththo nuni ubbayka hayqqoos; Xoossi biittafe goodettida asi iza sinththafe baqati bidason attontta mala simmi yaana oge izas giigssees attiin iza shemppoy dhayana mala koyenna.
2Samuel14:15 «Ha7ikka ta hayssa yiday derezi tana babisida gishshas hessa ta godaas kawos yootanaassa; ta ne aylleya
2Samuel14:16 Xoossi nuus immida xinxxofe tananne ta naaza shoddanaas dendida addeza kusheppe kawozi ba oosanchchayo ashshanaas eeno gaana› ga qoppadis.

2Samuel14:18 Hessafe guye kawozi maccassayo

2Samuel14:21 Kawozikka Iyo7aabes
2Samuel14:22 Iyo7aabeykka bonchcho saroka kawozas qonccisanaas duge biitta bolla gufannidi sarokkides; kawoza anjjides; kaaleththidi Iyo7aabey
2Samuel14:23 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Geeshure biidi Abeseloome Yerusalaame zaari ehides.
2Samuel14:24 Kawoy gidikko
2Samuel14:25 Abeseloome mala
2Samuel14:26 Hu7e iskey iza deexxishin layththan issito cakisees; cakettida binanazi kawo keeththa meezaanen woththishin 200 saqile deexxees.
2Samuel14:27 Abeseloomes Ti7imaaro geetettiza issi macca naynne heedzdzu attuma nayti yelettida. Macca naya keeha mala lo7o.
2Samuel14:28 Abeseloomey kawoza be7ontta Yerusalaamen nam7u layth uttides.
2Samuel14:29 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey kawozaakko baana mala Abeseloomey xeygisides; Iyo7aabey gidikko izakko yaana koyibeenna; nam7anththoka zaaridi xeygisides; Iyo7aabey yaana koyibeenna.
2Samuel14:30 Histtiin Abeseloomey ba aylletas
2Samuel14:31 Hessafe guye Iyo7aabey Abeseloomeso biidi
2Samuel14:32 Abeseloomey Iyo7aabes zaaridi
2Samuel14:33 Iyo7aabey kawozaakko biidi hessa izas yootides; hessafe guye kawozi Abeseloome xeygisides; izikka yiidi kawoza sinththan gufannidi sarokkides; kawozikka Abeseloome yeeri ekkides.
2Samuel15:1 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey para-gaarenne parata
2Samuel15:2 Abeseloomey maalado wonttara dendidi katama penge gelththiza oge gaxan eqqi naagees. Ay asikka ba misha kawos magannidi pirdisana yiza wode ubbaan Abeseloomey izaade baakko xeygi xeygidi
2Samuel15:3 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey izas
2Samuel15:4 Kaaleththidikka
2Samuel15:5 Hessaththoka ay asikka izakko shiiqidi sarokkiza wode Abeseloomey ba kushen idimmi oykkidi yeerees.
2Samuel15:6 Kawozaakko suure pirda demmanaas yiza Isra7eele asa ubbaakko Abeseloomey hessaththo hani hani shiiqiza gishshas Isra7eele asaa wozina ekkides.
2Samuel15:7 Oyddu layththafe guye Abeseloomey kawoza
2Samuel15:8 Tani ne oosanchchay Aaraame deren Geeshuren dashe
2Samuel15:9 Kawozi iza
2Samuel15:10 Hessafe guye Abeseloomey
2Samuel15:11 Yerusalaameppe 200 asati izara issife bida; istti imaththateth xeygettidi ashketeththan bida attiin istti yo7oza gishshas aykkoka eriza miishshi deenna.
2Samuel15:12 Abeseloomey yarshoza shiishshiza wode Dawite zoriza Gilo dere as Akxofeele ba biitta Giloppe izakko yaana mala kiittides; hessa gishshas seerazi minnides; Abeseloome kaallizayta qooday gujetti gujetti bides.
2Samuel15:13 Kiitettizayssi yiidi
2Samuel15:14 Hessafe guye Dawiti ba shuume ubbatas
2Samuel15:15 Kawoza shuumetikka
2Samuel15:16 Kawozi baso asaa kumeththaara kezi bides; kawoteththa keeththaa naagana mala 10 laggeththota woththides.
2Samuel15:17 Hessa gishshas kawoy kumeththa asaara haakki bidaappe guye heen issison eqqida.
2Samuel15:18 Asay ubbay Kelitetinne Peliteti hessaththoka Geeteppe izara yida 600 asata gujjiin salfidi kawoza sinth aadhdhida.
2Samuel15:19 Kawozi Geete dere as Ittayey
2Samuel15:20 Neni ha7i zine yadasa; histtiin ta taas awa bizaakko erontta dashe ne nunara toylattana mala ays ooththoo? Ane ha7i neni ne asata ekkada guye simma; lo7eteththinne ammaneteththay nenara gido» gides.
2Samuel15:21 Gido attiin Ittayey
2Samuel15:22 Dawitikka Ittaye
2Samuel15:23 Derey ubbay aadhdhi biza wode he dere asay waassishe yeekkides; kawozi Qediroone zulleza pinnides; asay ubbay pinnidi bazzo biitta bides.
2Samuel15:24 Saadooqeykka heen dees; izara issife diza Leweti ubbay Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida; isttika zaaridi Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaza woththida; Abiyaataarey asay kumeth katamayo yeddi kezanaashe gakkanaas yarsho shiishshides.
2Samuel15:25 Hessafe guye kawozi Saadooqe
2Samuel15:26 Gido attiin izi
2Samuel15:27 Qasseka kawozi qeese Saadooqe
2Samuel15:28 Taikka neeppe wore siyana gakkanaas bazzon diza shaafaa pinnizason naagana» gides.
2Samuel15:29 Hessa gishshas Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey Xoossa Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa guye Yerusalaame zaaridi heen takkida.
2Samuel15:30 Gido attiin Dawiti yeekkishe pude Dabrazayte zuma pudunththaa kezides; ba hu7e gullunttidi mela tohora dees; izara issife diza asay ubbay izayssaththo bantta hu7e gullunttidi yeekkishe pudunththaa kezeettes.
2Samuel15:31 He wode
2Samuel15:32 Dawiti derey Xoossa goynnizasoho pude zumaa kaara gakkishin Arkke dere as Hushey ba may7o daakkidi ba hu7e bolla gudulla laallidi izara gayttanaas yides.
2Samuel15:33 Hessafe guye Dawiti iza
2Samuel15:34 gido attiin neni guye katamayo simmada Abeseloomes
2Samuel15:35 Qeeseti Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey heen nenara daana deettennee? Kawo keeththafe ne siyidayssa ubbaa isttas yoota.
2Samuel15:36 Saadooqe naa Akimaasinne Abiyaataare naa Yoonataaney nam7u attuma nayti heen isttara deettes. Ne siyiza ubbaa taas istta bolla kiita yedda» gides.
2Samuel15:37 Hessa gishshas Dawites siiqo lagge Hushey Abeseloomey Yerusalaame gelida mala hee gakkides.
2Samuel16:1 Dawiti zumaappe guuth aadhdhi bida mala Xiibba geetettiza Memfeboste oosanchchay 200 sollo
2Samuel16:2 Dawiti Xiibba

2Samuel16:4 Hessafe guye kawozi Xiibbas
2Samuel16:5 Kawo Dawiti Bahirime gakkishin Sa7oole keeththa asaa qommofe issaadey puttu gides; izikka Geera naa Shim7e; izi doqqishe kezides.
2Samuel16:6 Kawoza wottadaratinne kawo bonchcho naagiza zabeti ubbay Dawiteppe hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara dishinkka Dawite bollanne iza shuumeta bolla shuch caddides.
2Samuel16:7 Shim7ey iza doqqishe

2Samuel16:14 Kawozinne izara issife diza asati ubbay bantti baana gi qoppidaso gakkida; keehi daaburda gishshas heen shempida.

2Samuel16:23 He wode Akxofeeley immiza zorey ubbay Xoossa qaalay zorizayssa misati qoodettees; Dawitinne Abeseloomey Akxofeele zore hessaththo histti ekkeettes.
2Samuel17:1 Hessafe guye Akxofeeley Abeseloomes
2Samuel17:2 Izi daaburdi wolqqa ixettida wode ta iza bolla daafa yeggananne shiro yeddana; histtiko izara issife diza derey iza aggidi baqatana; tani kawoza xalla wodhana.
2Samuel17:3 Deraa ubbaa neekko zaarana; neni koyzay issi asa hayqo gaason ubba deraa neekko zaarana mala ooththana; hessafe guye derey saron daana» gides.
2Samuel17:4 Iza zorezi Abeseloomenne izara diza Isra7eele cimata ubbaa ufayssides.
2Samuel17:5 Abeseloomey gidikko
2Samuel17:6 Hushey izakko yiin Abeseloomey izas
2Samuel17:7 Husheykka Abeseloome
2Samuel17:8 Ne aawaynne iza olanchchati mino olanchchatanne marati izippe bonqqettichchida zardo mala istti babisizayssa nekka eraasa; hessafe bollarakka ne aaway olan keehi loohida asa; omars ba olanchchatara aqenna;
2Samuel17:9 Hanni wode izi issi gongolo giddon woykko harason qotetti uttidaa gidana. Izi sinththatidi asaa bolla daafa yeggiin ne asatappe guuththati hayqqiko hessa siyida ubbay
2Samuel17:10 Ne aaway mino olanchcha
2Samuel17:11 «Hessa gishshas ta nena zoriza zorey hayssa; izas qooday abba shaamintta mala darida Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asay ubbay neekko shiiqikko neni ne hu7era olaa kaaleththa.
2Samuel17:12 Histtiko izi gelidaso ubbaa gelidi iza bolla daafa yeggana; xaazay biitta bolla wodhdhiza mala nu iza bolla wodhdhana; iza gidiin izara diza asatappe issaadeyka kessi ekki attenna.
2Samuel17:13 Izi biidi issi katamayn gelikko Isra7eeley ubbay wodoro ekki biidi issi shuchchika heen attonttaashe gakkanaas katamayo duge laalli yeggana» gides.
2Samuel17:14 Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asay kumeth
2Samuel17:15 Hushey qeese Saadooqenne Abiyaataare
2Samuel17:16 Ha7i izas eeson kiittidi
2Samuel17:17 He wode Yoonataaneynne Akimaasi katama gelikko istti beettana En-Roogeelen naageettes; issi geela7o aylle daara hee baada isttas yootiin istti hessa efidi kawo Dawites yooteettes.
2Samuel17:18 Gido attiin issi naateth dayssi istta be7idi Abeseloomes yootides; hessa gishshas nam7atikka eeson dendidi Bahirimen diza issi addezaso bida; addeza gibbe giddon ollay diza gishshas istti he ollaan wodhdhida.
2Samuel17:19 He addeza machcheya micciza miish ehada iza bolla kath miccadus; hessa oonikka eribeenna.
2Samuel17:20 Abeseloome asati he maccassayko yiidi
2Samuel17:21 Asati bidaappe guye ha nam7ati ollaafe kezidi bida; kawo Dawites
2Samuel17:22 Hessa gishshas Dawitinne izara issife diza derey ubbay dendi Yordaanoose pinnida; gadey wontishin Yordaanoose pinnonttay oonikka deenna.
2Samuel17:23 Akxofeeley istti iza zoreza ekkontta ixxidayssa be7idi ba hareza caani ekkidi ba keeththi diza katama bides; baso maarasi giigsidaappe guye ba kushen cuuletti hayqqides; hessaththo hayqqidi ba aawa duufon moogettides.
2Samuel17:24 Abeseloomey kumeththa Isra7eele asaara Yordaanoose pinnishin Dawiti Mahanayme gakkides.

2Samuel19:28 Ta aawa keeththas ubbaas hayqoy bessishin neni gidikko tana ne oosanchchaza ne maaddafe mizaytara issife utisadasa; hayssafe haray taas hano gaada kawoza oychchanaas ta oonee?» gides.

2Samuel19:32 He wode Barziley wode sugida 80 layththa cima; izi keehi dure gidida gishshas kawozi Mahanaymen dishin izas maana miish ehides.

2Samuel19:34 Barziley gidikko kawozas
2Samuel19:35 Tani ha7i 80 layththa cima; Histtiin tani iitanne kiya shaakka erana dandayanee? Hayssafe guye ne aylley mizayssanne uyizayssa mal7o shaakki eranee? Attuma nayta cenggurssinne macca nayta cenggurs ha7i ta siyana dandayanee? Histtiin ne aylley ta godaa kawozas ays bollara hara tooho gidanee?
2Samuel19:36 Ne aylley kawozara pinnidi guuththa oge baana; kawoy hessa kushe taas zaarandee?
2Samuel19:37 Ta diza katamaan hayqqada ta aawaanne ta aayey duufo achchan ta moogettana mala ne aylleza ne moyzikko izi simmo; gido attiin ne aylle Keme7aamey ta godaa kawozara pinno; histtiko nena lo7ida miish ne izas ooththa» gides.

2Samuel19:40 Kawozi Gelgela bishin Keme7aamey izara issife bides; Yuhuda olanchchati ubbaynne Isra7eele olanchchatappe baggay kawoza azhabidi pinththida.

2Samuel20:1 He wode Biniyaame qommota giddofe Bikire naa Sheba7e geetettiza kofa asi dees; izi zaye punnishe
2Samuel20:2 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay Dawite kaddidi Bikire naa Sheba7e kaallides; gido attiin Yuhuda asay Yordaanooseppe doommidi Yerusalaame gakkanaas bantta kawozappe shaakettontta issife bida.
2Samuel20:3 Dawiti Yerusalaamen diza ba kawoteththa keeth simmida wode ba kawoteththa keeththaa naagana mala kase izi woththi bida tammu laggeththo maccassata ekkides; istti issi keeththan naagetti daana mala naage woththides; isttas koshshiza qallabakka immides. Gido attiin isttara aqibeenna; istti hayqqanaashe gakkanaas am7i mala banttarkka dumma de7ida.
2Samuel20:4 Hessafe guye kawozi Amasas
2Samuel20:5 Amasi Yuhuda xeygana bides; gido attiin kawozi barida gallassatappe keehi takkides.
2Samuel20:6 Dawiti Abisayes
2Samuel20:7 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aabe wottadarati
2Samuel20:8 Istti Geba7oonen wogga zaalla matan dishin Amasi isttara gayttana kezides; Iyo7aabey ola may7o may7idi giththa mashsha kohozara gixxi uttides; izi sinththe tanggida mala mashshazi kohozappe kezi gaden wodhdhides.
2Samuel20:9 Iyo7aabeykka Amasa
2Samuel20:10 Gido attiin Amasi Iyo7aabe kushen mashshay dizayssa akeekontta aggida gishshas bana naagibeenna. Histtiin Iyo7aabey iza ulon caddides; iza maracey biitta bolla wololu gides; Iyo7aabey hara gujjontta dishin Amasi heerakka shemppo kezides. Hessafe guye Iyo7aabeynne iza isha Abisayey Bikire naa Sheba7e goodereththo doommida.
2Samuel20:11 Amasa aha achchan eqqida Iyo7aabe wottadaratappe issoy
2Samuel20:12 He wode Amasa ahay suuththan moorettidi oges giddo addan porccu gi dees. Heera aadhdhi biza wottadarati ubbay eqqi xeellishin he addezi be7idi ahaza mata gakkida wottadarati ubbay eqqi xeellizayssa akeekides; Amasa ahaza oge bollafe goshsha giddo efidi may7o iza bolla yeggides.
2Samuel20:13 Ahazi ogeppe dendidaappe guye asay ubbay Bikire naa Sheba7e gooddanaas Iyo7aabe kaalli bides.
2Samuel20:14 Sheba7ey Isra7eele nayta qommota ubbaa giddora kanththidi Aabeeli-Beeti-Ma7ikanne Beere dere yides. Beere asay issi bolla shiiqettidi iza kaallides.
2Samuel20:15 Iyo7aabera diza wottadarati yiidi Aabeeli-Beeti-Ma7ikan Sheba7e giddoththida; katamappe kare baggara yuuyi aadhdhanaas gimbezas pude xeera gakkanaas biitta doorida; istti gimbeza laallanaas keehi shociza wode
2Samuel20:16 he katamayn issi wozinama maccassi dizaara ba qaala dhoqqu histtada «Aso siyite! Siyite! Iyo7aabes ta yootana miishshi diza gishshas izi haa yaana mala izas yootite!» gadus.
2Samuel20:17 Iyo7aabey izikko biin maccassaya izas
2Samuel20:18 Izakka zaarada izas
2Samuel20:19 He katamaya gita katama; Isra7eelen saroy kumidaaranne ammanettida katamaya izo; histtiin neni Isra7eelen aayo gididaaro dhayssana koyaasa. GODAA xinxxoyo mittanaas ays ne koyay?» gadus.
2Samuel20:20 Iyo7aabeykka izis
2Samuel20:21 Yo7oy hessa mala gidenna; heen zumazan Efreeme gezzefe Bikire naa Sheba7e geetettizayssi kawo Dawite bolla ba kushe denththides; intte he addeza xalla taas aaththi immiko tani hanno katamayo yedda baana» gides. Maccassayakka zaarada Iyo7aabes
2Samuel20:22 Hessafe guye maccassaya cinccateththan kumida ba zore ubbaa deraakko ekka badus. Isttika Bikire naa Sheba7e hu7eza qanxxidi Iyo7aabes kare olida. Histtiin Iyo7aabey zaye punnides; asaykka katamayppe haakki bida. Ubbaa baggarakka laaletti baso baso bida. Iyo7aabey kawozaakko Yerusalaame simmi bides.
2Samuel20:23 Iyo7aabey Isra7eele olanchchata ubbaa bolla azazizaade gidides; Yoodahe naa Bannayay qasse Keliteta bollanne Peliteta bolla halaqa gidides.
2Samuel20:24 Adoraamey wolqqa ooso ooththizayta bolla halaqa gidides. Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafizaade gidides.
2Samuel20:25 Sheba7ey kawo keeththas xaafe gidishin Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey qeese gidida.
2Samuel20:26 Hessaththoka Ya7ire dere as Iray Dawite zorizaade gidides.
2Samuel21:1 Dawite kawoteththa wode heedzdzu layth kumeth iita koshay biitta bolla dendides; hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAA oychchides; GODAYKKA izas
2Samuel21:2 Kawozi Geba7oone asaa xeygi haasayssides; Geba7ooneti Amooretappe attidayta attiin Isra7eele dere as gidettenna; Isra7eele asay kase istti naaganaas caaqqidaa gidikkoka Sa7ooli Isra7eele asaassinne Yuhuda asaas mishettiza gishshas Geba7ooneta mulera dhayssanaas koyides.
2Samuel21:3 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Geba7oone asaa
2Samuel21:4 Geba7oone asay izas zaaridi
2Samuel21:5 Isttika
2Samuel21:6 zereththafe laappun attuma nayti nuus imettetto. Nunikka GODAAN doorettida Sa7oole dere Gibi7an GODAA sinththan istta kaqqana» gi zaarida. Histtiin kawozi
2Samuel21:7 Kawo Dawiti Sa7oole naa Yoonataane giddoninne ba giddon GODAA sinththan caaqettida caaqo gishshas giidi Sa7oole naaza Yoonataane naa Memfeboste hayqoppe ashshides.
2Samuel21:8 Gido attiin kawozi Aaya biyo Erxifay Sa7ooles yelida 2 attuma nayta Armoonenne Memfeboste
2Samuel21:9 Istta Geba7oone asatas aaththi immides; Geba7ooneti istta wodhidi zumbullata bolla GODAA sinththan kaqqida; laappunati issi bolla hayqqida; istti hayqqiday kaththa shiisho wode koyro gallas
2Samuel21:10 Hessafe guye Aaya biyo Erxifay maaqa ekkada zaalla bolla dunkaanadus; kaththa shiisho koyro gallassafe biidi iray bukkanaashe gakkanaas
2Samuel21:11 Sa7oole laggeththoya Aaya biyo Erxifay ooththidayssa Dawiti siyida wode
2Samuel21:12 biidi Sa7oole meqeththaanne iza naa Yoonataane meqeththaa Yaabuse Gala7aade asaappe ekkides. Yaabuse asay
2Samuel21:13 Dawiti Sa7oole meqeththinne iza naa Yoonataane meqeth heeppe ehides. Hessaththoka he hayqqida asata meqeth shiishshida.
2Samuel21:14 Sa7oole meqeththinne iza naa Yoonataane meqeth Biniyaame biittan Xela geetettizason iza aawa Qiise duufon moogida; kawozi azazidayssaka ubbaa ooththida. Hessafe guye biittays istti woossida woosaa Xoossi siyides.
2Samuel21:15 Qasseka Filisxeemessinne Isra7eeles giddon olay dendides; Dawitikka ba asaara Filisxeeme asaa olanaas duge wodhdhides; izi heen daaburdes.
2Samuel21:16 Erafaye zereththatappe issoy Eshbi-Benoobe geetettiza asi dees; izi Xarqimalappe oosettida 300 saqile deexxiza tooranne ooraththa mashsha gixxi uttides; izikka Dawite wodhana qoppides.
2Samuel21:17 Gido attiin Xuriya naa Abisayey Dawite shemppo ashshanaas yiidi Filisxeeme addeza caddi wodhides. Hessafe guye Dawite asati
2Samuel21:18 Hessafe guye Gobbe geetettizason Filisxeeme asaara olay dendides. He wode Huushe dere as Sibikayey Erafaye zereththatappe Saafe wodhides.
2Samuel21:19 Gobben Filisxeemetara dendida hara olan Beeteliheeme dere as Jaar-Orgime naa Elyaaney izas toora toomay wondiraashe mith likkizayssa Geete dere as Golyaade wodhides.
2Samuel21:20 Qasseka Geeten dendida olan izas issi issi kushe bollanne issi issi toho bolla usuppun biradhdhey
2Samuel21:21 Izi Isra7eele asaara eqettishin Dawite isha Shim7e naa Yoonataaney iza wodhides.
2Samuel21:22 Hayti oyddati Geeten diza Erafaye zereththata; isttika Dawite kusheninne iza asata kushen kundida.
2Samuel22:1 GODAY Dawite iza morkketa ubbaa kusheppenne Sa7oole kusheppe ashshida wode Dawiti hayssafe kaalliza mazamure GODAA bonchchos yexxides;
2Samuel22:2 «GODAY taas zaalla
2Samuel22:3 Ta Xoossay ta geemettiza zaalla
2Samuel22:4 Galatay bessiza GODAA ta xeygays; tani ta morkketappekka attays.
2Samuel22:5 «Hayqo dambalay tana giddoththides; dhayssiza di7oy tana mittides.
2Samuel22:6 Si7oole wodoroy ta bolla xaaxettides; hayqo woximadey taas waaxettides.
2Samuel22:7 Ta ceecida wode GODAA xeygadis; ta Xoossaako waassadis. Izi ba Keeththan dishe ta cenggurssaa siyides; ta waasoy iza hayththan gelides.
2Samuel22:8 «Izi hanqettida gishshas biittaya kokkoradussinne shirotadus; salota yochchi za7idessinne qaaxxides.
2Samuel22:9 Iza siidheppe hanqo cuway cuwattides; iza doonappe xuuggiza tamay eexxides; tama bonqoyka kezides.
2Samuel22:10 Salota daakki wodhdhides; iza toho garsan dhippi gida shaaray dees.
2Samuel22:11 Izi kirube bolla uttidi piradhdhides; carko qefe bolla uttidi pude paallides.
2Samuel22:12 Dhumay iza giddoththides; dhippi gida ira shaaray iza genththides.
2Samuel22:13 Iza sinththan diza poo7ozappe wawaci giza wolqqanththi kezides.
2Samuel22:14 GODAY salotappe guummides; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa cenggurs sissides.
2Samuel22:15 Ba yiishshaa dukkidi ba morkketa laallides; wolqqanth yeddidi istta shirosides.
2Samuel22:16 GODAA seerappenne iza siidheppe keziza hanqo cuwaappe dendidayssan
2Samuel22:17 «Bollafe ba kushe yeddidi tana oykkides; ciimma haaththata giddofekka tana kessides.
2Samuel22:18 Mino morkketappe
2Samuel22:19 Ta metotida gallas ta bolla yida; gido attiin GODAY tana kaafides.
2Samuel22:20 Izi tana aakoso kessides; tanan ufayettida gishshas izi ashshides.
2Samuel22:21 «GODAY taas ta xilloteththa mala ooththees; ta xilloteththa mala taas kushe zaarides.
2Samuel22:22 GODAA oge ta naagida gishshas tani Xoossafe sher7i gaada iita ooththabeekke.
2Samuel22:23 Iza woga ubbay ta sinththan dees; iza maarappeka haraso simmabeekke.
2Samuel22:24 Iza sinththan borey baynda de7adis; tanakka nagarappe naagadis.
2Samuel22:25 GODAY ta xilloteththa mala
2Samuel22:26 «Ammanettidaytas nekka ammanettidayssa
2Samuel22:27 Geeshshatas neni geesh gididayssa
2Samuel22:28 Neni qohettida deraa ashshaasa; gido attiin ne ayfey kawushshanaas otoranchchata xeellees.
2Samuel22:29 Abeet GODAWU! Neni taas xomppe; GODAY ta dhumaa poo7isees.
2Samuel22:30 Ne maadon morkketa ola sinth suga suga baana; tani ta Xoossaa wolqqan gimbeza bollara xaallays.
2Samuel22:31 «Xoossa ogey kumeththa; GODAA qaalay muuruta; izan ammanettidayta ubbaas izi gondalle.
2Samuel22:32 GODAAPPE attiin hara Xoossi oonee? nu Xoossaafe attiin zaallay oonee?
2Samuel22:33 Taas wolqqa immizayssi
2Samuel22:34 Ta tohota genessa toho mala pilatisees; dhoqqasohotan tana minththi essees.
2Samuel22:35 Ta kusheta ola tamaarssees; ta qeseti xarqimala wondafe zinqqeettes.
2Samuel22:36 Ne atoteththa gondalle taas immadasa; ne kaafoy tana gitasides.
2Samuel22:37 Ta tanggo aassadasa; ta tohotikka dhuphettibeettenna.
2Samuel22:38 «Ta morkketa yedeththa dhayssadis; istti dippi gaanaashe gakkanaas guye gabeekke.
2Samuel22:39 Mulera ta istta dhayssadis; simmidikka eqqanaas dandaybeettenna; ta toho garsankka kundida.
2Samuel22:40 Olas taas wolqqa immadasa; tanara eqettizayta ta toho garsan ne gulbatissadasa.
2Samuel22:41 Ta morkketi guye simmi baqatana mala ooththadasa; tana ixxizayta dhayssadasa.
2Samuel22:42 Istti maado demmanaas waassida; gido attiin istta maaddiday deenna; istti GODAAKKO waassida; gido attiin izi isttas zaaribeenna.
2Samuel22:43 Gudulla mala istta liiqisa gaaccadis; ogen diza urqqa mala istta gindadissinne yedhettadis.
2Samuel22:44 «Ta derey qoppida daafaappe tana ashshadasa; kawoteththatas tana hu7e histtadasa. Ta erontta asay taas haarettides.
2Samuel22:45 Allagati tana shoobbanaas yida; istti tana siyida mala taas azazetteettes.
2Samuel22:46 Allagati babbida; bantta miixappe kokkorishe yida.
2Samuel22:47 «GODAY de7o Xoossa; ta zaallay izi anjjetto; ta atoteththa zaallay ta Xoossay dhoqqu dhoqqu go.
2Samuel22:48 Ta gishshas halo kessiza Xoossay
2Samuel22:49 Izi ta morkketa kusheppe tana kessees; ta morkketappe tana dhoqqu dhoqqu histtadasa; menxe iitatappe tana ashshadasa.
2Samuel22:50 Abeet ta GODAWU! Kawoteththata giddon ta nena galatana; ne sunththaas galata mazamure ta yexxana.
2Samuel22:51 Izi kawozas gita xoono immees; ba tiyda Dawitesinne iza zereththas
2Samuel23:1 Dawiti wurseththan haasayda qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa; «Yaaqoobe Xoossaan tiyettidayssi
2Samuel23:2 «GODAA Ayanay ta baggara haasaydes; iza qaalay ta doonan dees.
2Samuel23:3 Isra7eele Xoossi haasaydes; Isra7eele zaallay taas
2Samuel23:4 izi shaaray bayndason
2Samuel23:5 «Ta keeththi Xoossa matan likke gidennee? Ubba miish giigsidinne naagidi
2Samuel23:6 Gido attiin iita asati ubbay
2Samuel23:7 Agunth bochchiza ubbaas
2Samuel23:8 Dawites erettida qara asata sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; koyroyssi Tahikimoone dere as Yoshebi-Baashebete gidishin izi heedzdzu halaqatas halaqa; izikka issi olan ba toora xongidi 800 as wodhida qara.
2Samuel23:9 Nam7anththozi Ahihohe dere as Doode naa El7ezeere; olettanaas issi bolla shiiqida Filisxeeme asay eqettiza wode Isra7eele asay baqatides; Dawitera diza heedzdzu qarata garsafe issoy iza.
2Samuel23:10 Izi gidikko ba eqqidaso yeddibeenna; iza kushey argacanaashenne mashshara issife oykettanaashe gakkanaas Filisxeemeta olides; he gallas GODAY izas gita xoono immides. Baqati bida olanchchati hayqqida asaappe ola miishshinne may7o xalla qaaratanaas Ele7eezerekko guye simmida.
2Samuel23:11 Heedzdzanththozi Harare dere as Aage naa Shaama; Filisxeemeti Leehan kumeth misiray zerettida gaden istti issi bolla shiiqi dishin Isra7eele olanchchati Filisxeemeta sinththafe baqatida.
2Samuel23:12 Shaamay gidikko ba eqqidaso yeddibeenna; he olaa eqettidi Filisxeemeta wodhides; he gallas GODAY gita xoono immides.
2Samuel23:13 Kaththa shiisho wode Filisxeeme olanchchati Erafayme zullen dunkaani uttidaashe heedzdzu tammu halaqatappe heedzdzati Dawiti dizaso Adulaame gongolo yida.
2Samuel23:14 He wode Dawiti miixa giddon dees; Filisxeeme olanchchati Beeteliheemen deettes.
2Samuel23:15 Dawiti laamotidi
2Samuel23:16 Hessa gishshas erettida ola qara heedzdzati Filisxeeme olanchchata giddora kanththi biidi Beeteliheeme penge achchan diza haaththa ollafe duuqqi Dawites ehida; izi gidikko GODAA sinththan yarsho histti gussides attiin uyibeenna.
2Samuel23:17 «Abeet GODAWU! Hayssa mala ooso ta wostta ooththoo? Hayssi taappe haakko! Hayssi bantta shemppo bolla pirdida asata suuth deennee?» giidi Dawiti uyana koyibeenna; hekko erettida heedzdzu ola qarati ooththida goobateththa oosoy hessa.
2Samuel23:18 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabe ishaa Abisayey heedzdzu erettida ola qaratas halaqa; heedzdzu xeetu asaa bolla ba toora xongidi wodhidanne ha heedzdzu qarata mala erettida gooba asa.
2Samuel23:19 Abisayey heedzdzatappe bollara keehi erettida as gidennee? Izi isttafe gidontta aggikokka izi isttas halaqa.
2Samuel23:20 Hara erettida qaray Qabxi7eele dere as Yoodahe naa Bannayay gita erettida ooso ooththides. Izikka nam7u erettida Mo7aabe asata wodhides; qasseka shachchi bukkida gallas olla giddo gelidi gaammo wodhides.
2Samuel23:21 Hessaththoka issi gita Gibxe as wodhides; he Gibxe addezi ba kushen toora oykkides; gido attiin Bannayay izara olettanaas guufe oykkidi izakko bides; Gibxe addeza kusheppe iza toora woththi ekkidi iza tooran iza wodhides.
2Samuel23:22 Yoodahe naa Bannaya goobateththi hessa; izikka erettida heedzdzu qara asata mala erettida gooba asa.
2Samuel23:23 Izi he heedzdzu tammu asatappe aadhdhi bonchchettidaade; gido attiin erettida heedzdzu qara asata mala sabettenna. Dawiti Bannaya ba bonchcho zabeta bolla shuumides.
2Samuel23:24 He heedzdzu tammatappe baggayta sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa. Iyo7aabe ishaa Asaheele
2Samuel23:25 Harare dere as Shammaha
2Samuel23:26 Palixe dere as Heleexe

2Samuel23:29 Naxoofe dere as Ba7aana naa Helebe
2Samuel23:30 Piraatoone dere as Bannaya

2Samuel23:32 Shaalboone dere as Eliyaahibe

2Samuel23:34 Ma7ikate dere as Ahasiba naa Elfaleexe
2Samuel23:35 Qarmeloose dere as Hexiro

2Samuel23:38 Yatire dere as Ira
2Samuel23:39 Hessaththoka Hiite dere as Ooriyo
2Samuel24:1 Qasseka GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla keehi hanqettides; istta bolla Dawite denththeththidi
2Samuel24:2 Hessa gishshas kawozi Iyo7aabenne izara diza ola asaa azazizayta
2Samuel24:3 Iyo7aabey kawozas
2Samuel24:4 Gidikkoka kawoza qaalay Iyo7aabenne ola asaa azazizayta xoonida gishshas Isra7eele ola asaa mazgabanaas iza sinththafe kezi bida.
2Samuel24:5 Istti Yordaanoose shaafa pinnidaappe guye shoobbaza giddon diza katamaappe dugeha baggara diza Aaro7eere matan dunkaanida; heeppeka Gaade baggara aadhdhi Iyaazeere bida.
2Samuel24:6 Heeppe Gala7aadenne Hiite deren diza Qaadeese asaakko bida; qasse Daani-Jaanera yuuyidi Sidoona bida.
2Samuel24:7 Qasse Xiroose miixa
2Samuel24:8 Biittayo uddufun aginanne nam7u tammu gallas ubbaa yuuyi xeellidaappe guye Yerusalaame simmida.
2Samuel24:9 Iyo7aabey ola asaa qooda ubbaa kawoza erisides; Isra7eelen 800
2Samuel24:10 Dawiti olanchchata qoodidaappe guye ba wozinara modhettidi
2Samuel24:11 Wonteththa gallas Dawiti dendanaappe sinththan GODAA qaalay Dawites ajjuuta yootiza nabey Gaadekko yiidi
2Samuel24:12 «Baada Dawites
2Samuel24:13 Gaadey Dawitekko biidi
2Samuel24:14 Dawiti Gaades
2Samuel24:15 Hessa gishshas GODAY he gallassa maaladoppe doommidi ba barida gallas gakkanaas Isra7eele bolla iita harge yeddides; hessa gaason Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas 70
2Samuel24:16 GODAA kiitanchchay Yerusalaame dippi histtidi dhayssanaas ba kushe yeddiin asaa bolla gakkida qohoy GODAA qadheththides; histtiin dereza wursiza kiitanchchaza
2Samuel24:17 Dawiti dereza bolla bosha gaththiza kiitanchchaza be7idi GODAAS
2Samuel24:18 He gallas Gaadey Dawitekko biidi
2Samuel24:19 Hessa gishshas Dawiti GODAY Gaade baggara izas azazida mala kezides.
2Samuel24:20 Ornay duge simmi xeellishin kawozinne iza derezi baakko yizayssa be7ides; izi kare kezidi izas biitta bolla hokki ziggides.
2Samuel24:21 Ornaykka
2Samuel24:22 Ornaykka Dawites
2Samuel24:23 Kawoo! Tani Ornay hayssa ubbaa kawos immays» gides; qasseka Ornay
2Samuel24:24 Kawozi gidikko Ornas
2Samuel24:25 Heen Dawiti yarsho yarshizaso giigsides; xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshides; hessafe guye GODAY biittay gishshas shiiqida woosaa siyides. Isra7eele bolla yida boshazi simmides.
1Kings1:1 Kawo Dawiti keehi cimmida gishshas izas ooththizayti iza meegoppe ashshanaas may7o iza bolla koriin aykkoka iza ho7anaas dandaybeenna.
1Kings1:2 Hessa gishshas izas ooththizayti
1Kings1:3 Isra7eele biitta ubbaan koyidi Abishaago geetettiza issi mala lo7o geela7iyo Suneme katamappe demmidi kawozas ehida.
1Kings1:4 Izakka keeha mala lo7o; kawozara dashe izas ooththashe iza lo7eththa oykkadus; gido attiin izi izo ekkibeenna.
1Kings1:5 Hagiti naa Adoniyaasi
1Kings1:6 Iza aawaykka
1Kings1:7 Adoniyaasi Xuriya naa Iyo7aaberanne qeese Abiyaataarera ha yo7oza zorettides; isttika iza maaddanaas qofa qachchida.
1Kings1:8 Gido attiin qeese Saadooqey
1Kings1:9 Issi gallas Adoniyaasi En-Roogeele katama matan Zoheleete Zaalla geetettizason dorsata
1Kings1:10 Gido attiin nabe Naataane
1Kings1:11 Hessafe guye Naataaney Solomoone aayo Bersaabeho
1Kings1:12 Ha7i neni ne shempponne ne naaza Solomoone shemppo wostta ashshanaakko ane ta nena zorays.
1Kings1:13 Kawo Dawitekko baada
1Kings1:14 Neni kawozara heen haasayan dishin ta gelada ne gidayssi tumu gididayssa qonccisana» gides.
1Kings1:15 Suneme katamappe yida Abishaaga cimmida kawoza heemmiza ilpinne giddo Bersaabeha kawoza haasayssanaas geladus.
1Kings1:16 Bersaabeha kawoza sinththan zaqullada ba kushe denththadus; qasseka iza sinththan gulbatadus. Kawozikka izo
1Kings1:17 Bersaabeha izas
1Kings1:18 Gido attiin ha7i Adoniyaasi kawotides; neni ta goday kawoy hessa erakka.
1Kings1:19 Izi keehi daro meheta
1Kings1:20 Ta godawu
1Kings1:21 Histtontta aggiko ta godaa kawoy hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttiza wode taninne ta naa Solomooney mooro ooththida asa mala qoodettana» gadus.
1Kings1:22 Bersaabeha buro kawozara haasayan dishin nabe Naataaney gakki wodhdhides.
1Kings1:23 Kawozas
1Kings1:24 Hessafe guye Naataaney
1Kings1:25 Hach izi duge biidi keehi daro meheta
1Kings1:26 Gido attiin tana ne aylle
1Kings1:27 Ta godaa kawoo! Neeppe guyera ne kawoteththa araatan ooni uttanaakko ne aylleta erisontta dashe hayssa Adoniyaasi kawotana mala ooththiday nenee?» gides.
1Kings1:28 Histtiin Kawo Dawiti
1Kings1:29 He wode kawozi izis
1Kings1:30 GODAAN
1Kings1:31 Bersaabeha kawoza sinththan gufannada ba kushe denththadus; «Ta godaa
1Kings1:32 Hessafe guye Kawo Dawiti
1Kings1:33 Kawozi isttas
1Kings1:34 Heen qeese Saadooqeynne nabe Naataaney iza tiydi Isra7eele asaa bolla kawoththetto; hessafe guye zaye punnidi intte qaala dhoqqu histtidi
1Kings1:35 Hessafe guye intte iza azhabidi haa pude kezite; izi yiidi ta kawoteththa araatan utto; izi ta sohon uttidi deraa aysso; tani Isra7eele deraa bollanne Yuhuda deraa bolla iza shuumadis» gides.
1Kings1:36 Yoodahe naa Bannayay kawozas zaaridi
1Kings1:37 GODAY
1Kings1:38 Hessa gishshas qeese Saadooqey
1Kings1:39 Qeese Saadooqey Gaytoteththa Dunkaaneppe zayte kaceza ekkidi Solomoone tiydi kawoththides; hessafe guye zaye punnida; ubba asaykka ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
1Kings1:40 Asay ubbayka iza azhabidi pude bides; istti dinke punni punni kaa7ishe keehi ufayettida; asaa homboceththan biittay qaaxxides.
1Kings1:41 Adoniyaasinne izara diza imaththati gibira mi wursishe hessa siyida; Iyo7aabey dinkeza giirissaa siyidi
1Kings1:42 Izi buro haasayan dishin qeese Abiyaataare naa Yoonataaney gakki wodhdhides. Histtiin Adoniyaasi
1Kings1:43 Yoonataaneykka zaaridi
1Kings1:44 Iza azhabana mala kawoy qeese Saadooqe
1Kings1:45 Qeese Saadooqeynne nabe Naataaney
1Kings1:46 Hessafe bollarakka Solomooney kawoteththa araatan uttides.
1Kings1:47 Qasse kawo shuumeti nu godaa kawo Dawitekko yiidi
1Kings1:48 ‹Ta kawoteththa araatan uttidi ta sohon kawotizayssa tana hach ta ayfen bessida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto!› gides» gi yootides.
1Kings1:49 Hessa siyidi Adoniyaasi xeygida imaththati ubbay dagammi dendidi laalettida.
1Kings1:50 Adoniyaasi gidikko Solomoones yayyidi bi yarshizasoza kaceta oykkides.
1Kings1:51 Hessafe guye asay Solomoones
1Kings1:52 Solomooney zaaridi
1Kings1:53 Hessafe guye kawo Solomooney as kiittiin istti biidi iza yarsho yarshizasoppe duge woththida; histtiin Adoniyaasi yiidi Solomoones ziggides; Solomooneykka iza
1Kings2:1 Dawiti hayqqiza wodey matiin ba naa Solomoone xeygidi izas basse bazides;
1Kings2:2 Dawiti
1Kings2:3 GODAA ne Xoossaa azazo naaga; iza ogetan hemetta; Muse wogan xaafettida mala iza awajjata
1Kings2:4 GODAY taas
1Kings2:5 «Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey ta bolla ooththidayssa hessaththoka Isra7eele ola gadawata nam7ata
1Kings2:6 Ooththana bessizayssa aadho erateththan ooththa; izi ceeggidi saro duufon gelontta mala ooththa.
1Kings2:7 «Tani ne ishaa Abeseloomeppe baqatiza wode istti taas mille gidida gishshas Gala7aade biittan diza Barzile naytas lo7o ooththa; istti ne maaddan miza asaara issife metto.
1Kings2:8 «Tani Mahanayme bida wode tana iita qanggeth qanggida Biniyaame biittan Bahirime katamappe yida Geera naa Shim7ey nenara dizayssa hassa7a; izi tana mokkanaas Yordaanoose shaafa duge yida wode
1Kings2:9 Gido attiin ha7i neni iza xillo asa mala qoodoppa; nees aadho erateththi diza gishshas ooththanaas bessiza yo7ota ne eraasa; iza puulunththaa suuththara duge duufon gelththa» gides.
1Kings2:10 Hessafe guye Dawiti hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; ba kataman Yerusalaamen moogettides.
1Kings2:11 Dawiti Kebroonen 7 layth
1Kings2:12 Solomooney ba aawa Dawite kawoteththa araatan uttides; iza kawoteththika keehi minnides.
1Kings2:13 Hagiti naa Adoniyaasi Solomoone aayo Bersaabehikko bides; Bersaabeha iza
1Kings2:14 Qasseka gujjidi
1Kings2:15 Adoniyaasi izis
1Kings2:16 Ha7i ta nena issi miish oychchiko ne taas akkay gooppa» gides. Izakka
1Kings2:17 Izikka
1Kings2:18 Bersaabehakka zaarada
1Kings2:19 Hessa gishshas Bersaabeha Adoniyaasa kiitaa yootanaas kawo Solomoonekko geliin kawozi izo mokkanaas dendi eqqidi izo sarokkidaappe guye simmidi ba kawoteththa araatan uttides. Qasse ba aayo utissanaas hara araata ehisidi izo baappe ushachcha baggara utisides.
1Kings2:20 Iza uttidaappe guye
1Kings2:21 Izakka izas
1Kings2:22 Kawo Solomooney zaaridi ba aayo
1Kings2:23 Kawo Solomooney GODAAN caaqqidi
1Kings2:24 Ha7i tana ta aawaa Dawite kawoteththa araatan utisidi ba immida hidota mala ta kawoteththaa minththida GODAY beyiin Adoniyaasi hach hayqqana!» gides.
1Kings2:25 Hessa gishshas Kawo Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya azaziin izi biidi Adoniyaasa wodhides.
1Kings2:26 Hessafe guye Kawo Solomooney qeese Abiyaataare
1Kings2:27 GODAY Seelon qeese Eele keeththa asaa gishshas yootidayssa polanaas Solomooney Abiyaataare GODAAS qeeseteththan ooththizasoppe diggides.
1Kings2:28 Abeseloomera gidontta Adoniyaasara issife zuppetida Iyo7aabekko ha yo7oy gakkides; histtiin Iyo7aabey GODAA Dunkaanekko baqati biidi yarshizaso kaceta oykkides.
1Kings2:29 Iyo7aabey GODAA Dunkkaanekko baqati biidi yarshizasoza lanqen dizayssa kawo Solomoones yootida; histtiin Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya
1Kings2:30 Bannayay GODAA Dunkaaneza giddo gelidi Iyo7aabe
1Kings2:31 Kawo Solomooney Bannaya
1Kings2:32 Ta aawa Dawiti erontta dishin Iyo7aabey nam7u asata giththa mashshan wodhida suuththa gishshas GODAY iza ooso mala izas zaarana; Isra7eele ola gadawa Neere naa Abineerinne Yuhuda ola gadawa Yootore naa Amasi istti nam7ayka izappe keehi suure asa.
1Kings2:33 Istta suuththaa acoy mernaas Iyo7aabe bollanne iza zereththa bolla gido; gido attiin Dawite bollanne iza keeththaa asaa bolla
1Kings2:34 Hessa gishshas Yoodahe naa Bannayay pude kezidi Iyo7aabe wodhiin izi bazzon diza ba gaden moogettides.
1Kings2:35 Kawo Solomooney Yoodahe naa Bannaya Iyo7aabe sohon ola gadawa histtidi shuumides; qasse Abiyaataare sohon qeese Saadooqe shuumides.
1Kings2:36 Hessafe guye Kawo Solomooney Shim7es kiittidi
1Kings2:37 Neni katamaappe kezada Qediroone shoobbaa pinnida gallas hayqqanayssa era; ne suuththa gomey nena oykkana» gides.
1Kings2:38 Shim7ey zaaridi kawozas
1Kings2:39 Gido attiin heedzdzu layththafe guye Shim7e aylletappe nam7ati betidi Ma7ika naa Geete kawo Ankusekko bida; he worey
1Kings2:40 Hessa siyidi Shim7ey ba hare koori ekkidi ba aylleta koyanaas Ankusekko Geete biidi ba aylleta ekki yides.
1Kings2:41 Shim7ey Yerusalaameppe Geete katama biidi simmidayssa Solomooney siyidi
1Kings2:42 Shim7e xeygisi shiishshidi
1Kings2:43 Histtiin GODAAS caaqqida caaqonne ta azazo ays naagabeekkii?» gides.
1Kings2:44 Qasseka kawoy Shim7es
1Kings2:45 Gido attiin Kawo Solomooney anjjettana; Dawite kawoteththa araataykka GODAA sinththan mernaas minni daana» gides.
1Kings2:46 Hessafe guye kawozi Yoodahe naa Bannaya azaziin biidi Shim7e wodhides. Hessa gaason kawoteththay Solomoone kushen minni de7ides.
1Kings3:1 Solomooney Gibxe kawo Paaroonera laggetidi iza nayo machcho ekkides; kawo keeththaa
1Kings3:2 GODAA sunththas Xoossa Keeth keexettanaashe gakkanaas asay yarsho zumbullata bolla shiishshees.
1Kings3:3 Solomooney GODAA siiqees; ba aawa Dawite wogaa mala dees; gido attiin zumbullata bolla yarsho yarsheessinne exaane cuwasees.
1Kings3:4 Geba7ooney ubbaafe aadhdhi erettida yarshosoho gidida gishshas kawo Solomooney yarsho yarshanaas hee bides; Solomooney 1
1Kings3:5 GODAY Solomoones Geba7oonen omars agumon qonccides; Xoossi izas
1Kings3:6 Solomooney izas
1Kings3:7 «Abeet GODAWU
1Kings3:8 Tani ne aylley neni doorida asaa giddoninne qooday baynda keehi daro asaa giddon de7ays.
1Kings3:9 Hessa gishshas tani ne asaa ayssanaas lo7onne iita shaakkada erana mala taas ne ayllezas akeekiza wozina imma; histtontta aggiko ha gita dereza ooni kaaleththana dandayzee?» gides.
1Kings3:10 Solomooney hessa oychchida gishshas GODAY ufayettides.
1Kings3:11 Qasseka Xoossay iza
1Kings3:12 hessa ne oychchidayssa ta nees immana; neeppe kase oonaska imettonttanne neeppe guye oonikka demmontta aadho erateththaninne akeekay kumida wozina ta nees immana.
1Kings3:13 Hessafekka bollara ne de7o layththan ubbaan kawota giddon nenara ginattiza kawoy dontta mala neni tana oychchontta dureteththinne bonchcho ta nees immana.
1Kings3:14 Ne aawa Dawiti ta ogera bida mala nekka ta ogera biikko
1Kings3:15 Hessafe guye Solomooney dhiskofe beeggidi hessi agumo gididayssa akeekides; izi Yerusalaame simmi biidi GODAA Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa sinththan eqqides; xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho yarshides. Histtidi ba shuume ubbatas gibira kessides.
1Kings3:16 He wode layman aqiza nam7u maccassati kawo Solomoonekko yiidi iza sinththan eqqida.
1Kings3:17 Isttafe issiniya
1Kings3:18 Ta yelida heedzdzanththo gallas izakka naa yeladus; he keeththan nu nam7atappe attiin haray oonikka deenna.
1Kings3:19 «Issi gallassa omars hanna maccassaya ba naaza bolla ichchiin naazi hayqqides.
1Kings3:20 Histtiin iza giddoth dendada tani ne ashkariya dhiskon dishin ta naaza ta ki7oppe ekka efada ba ki7on woththadus; qasse hayqqida ba naaza ehada ta ki7on woththadus.
1Kings3:21 Wontiin tani ta naaza dhanththanaas dendishin hayqqi beettides; gido attiin tani maalado poo7on tishshi histta xeelliin ta yeloza gidonttayssa ta eradis» gadus.
1Kings3:22 Hankko nam7anththo maccassaya qasse
1Kings3:23 Kawo Solomooney isttas
1Kings3:24 Kawozikka
1Kings3:25 He wode kawozi
1Kings3:26 Paxa diza naaza aaya ba naazas keeha mishettiza gishshas kawozas
1Kings3:27 Hessafe guye kawozi
1Kings3:28 Asaas xilloteththan pirdanaas izas aadho erateththay Xoossafe imettidayssa be7ida gishshas Isra7eele asay ubbay kawoy pirdida pirdaa siyida wode kawozas keehippe yayyides.
1Kings4:1 Kawo Solomooney Isra7eele biitta ubbaa bolla kawotides.
1Kings4:2 Izi shuumida alaafeti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. Saadooqe naa Azaariyaasi qeese.
1Kings4:3 Shiisha nayti Elihorefinaynne Akayay waanna xaafeta; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey taarike xaafe;
1Kings4:4 Yoodahe naa Bannayay ola gadawa; Saadooqeynne Abiyaataarey qeeseta;
1Kings4:5 Naataane naa Azaariyaasi dere ayssizaytas alaafe; Naataane naa Zaabudey qeesenne kawos mata zoranchcha;
1Kings4:6 Ahishaarey kawo keeththa alaafe; Abida naa Adooniraami un7ettidi wolqqa ooso ooththizayta alaafe.
1Kings4:7 Qasse Solomoones Isra7eele biitta ubbaan tammanne nam7u dereta ayssizayti deettes; istti kawossinne kawoson diza asaa ubbaas miza kath shiishshizayta; istti taran taran layththa giddon issi issi aginas gidiza kath eheettes.
1Kings4:8 Istta sunththinne istta ayssiza zooneti hayssafe kaallidi xaafettida. Beeni-Huurey Efreeme gezze ayssees.
1Kings4:9 Beeni-Diqaarey Maqaxa
1Kings4:10 Beeni-Heseedi Arubboote deren diza Sookonne Hefeere dere ubbaa ayssees.
1Kings4:11 Beeni-Abinadaabi Naafoti-Doore biitta ayssees; izikka Solomoone nayo Xaafiti azina.
1Kings4:12 Ahiluude naa Ba7aanay Ta7inaakenne Magiddo dere
1Kings4:13 Beeni-Gebeeri Gala7aaden diza Eramoote dere
1Kings4:14 Iddo naa Ahinaadaabi Mahanayme dere ayssees.
1Kings4:15 Ahima7aasi Niftaaleme dere ayssees; izi Solomoone nayo Baasemaati azina.
1Kings4:16 Hushe naa Ba7aanay Aaseerenne Ba7aaloote dere ayssees.
1Kings4:17 Paaruhe naa Iyoosaafixey Yisakoore dere ayssees.
1Kings4:18 Eela naa Shim7ey Biniyaame dere ayssees.
1Kings4:19 Uure naa Gebeeri Gala7aade biittan diza Amooreta kawo Sihoone derenne Baasaane kawo Aage dere ayssees. He dereta ubbaa ayssizayta bolla alaafeteththi diza issi asi dees.
1Kings4:20 Yuhuda asaa qoodaynne Isra7eele asaa qooday abba shaamintta mala corattides; istti mishenne uyishe ufayssan de7ida.
1Kings4:21 Solomooney Efiraaxise Shaafaappe doommidi Filisxeeme biittaa gakkanaas
1Kings4:22 Solomoones hach hach qumas 50 konttaale muuruta dhiille
1Kings4:23 dhiikettida 10 boorata
1Kings4:24 Solomooney Efiraaxise Shaafappe arshey wulliza baggara diza kawoteththata ubbaa Tifisa katamappe doommidi Gaaza katama gakkanaas haarides; ba yuushon diza ubbaa deretarakka saron de7ides.
1Kings4:25 Solomooney de7ida layth ubbaan Daaneppe biidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas Yuhuda asaynne Isra7eele asay ubbay ba woyne tura kuwaninne ba eththaa kuwan woppan uttida.
1Kings4:26 Solomoones para-gaareta goochchiza 40
1Kings4:27 He zooneta ayssizayti bana gakkida aginan taran taran kawo Solomoonessinne iza maaddafe maanaas yida asaas ubbaas aykkoka pacisontta shiishsheettes.
1Kings4:28 Qasseka gaare goochchiza paratinne hankko parati bangganne harqqo ehidi woththizason woththeettes.
1Kings4:29 Xoossay Solomoones aadho erateth
1Kings4:30 Solomoones diza aadho erateththay arshey mokkiza baggara dizayta aadho erateththafenne Gibxetas diza aadho erateththa ubbaafekka aadheththa.
1Kings4:31 Izi asa ubbaafe aadho eranchcha; qasse izi Ezirahe as Etaaneppe
1Kings4:32 Izi 3
1Kings4:33 Solomooney Libaanoose zigappe biidi keeththa gimbe bolla mokkiza hisophphe mith gakkanaas diza doozata gishshas yootides; hessaththoka meheta
1Kings4:34 Iza aadho erateththaa siyida sa7a kawota ubbaafe kiitettidayti iza aadho erateththaa siyanaas yida.
1Kings5:1 Xiroose Kawo Kiraamey Dawitera ba diza layth ubbaan siiqon gam7ida gishshas Solomooney ba aawa Dawite sohon kawotanaas tiyettidayssa siyidi ba oosanchchata Solomoonekko kiittides.
1Kings5:2 Solomooneykka Kiraames zaaridi
1Kings5:3 «Ta aawaa Dawite bolla ubbasora dendida olaa gaason GODAY iza morkketa iza tohoppe garsara haarisana gakkanaas GODAA ba Xoossaa sunththaas Keeththe izi keexxana dandayontta aggidayssa ne eraasa.
1Kings5:4 Ha7i gidikko GODAA ta Xoossay taas ubbasora saroteth immida gishshas taas morkkey woykko iita miishshi deenna.
1Kings5:5 GODAY ta aawa Dawites
1Kings5:6 Hessa gishshas Libaanooseppe ziga taas qanxxiza asata azaza; ta asati ne asatara ooththana; ne asatas neni qanxxa gida damoza tani qanxxana. Sidoona asaa mala miththa qanxxo hiilla nu asay eronttayssa neni eraasa» gi kiittides.
1Kings5:7 Kiraamey Solomoone kiitaza siyidi keehippe ufayettidi
1Kings5:8 Hessafe guye Kiraamey Solomoones
1Kings5:9 Ta asay mudeththata Libaanooseppe duge abba mata gakkanaas miiyana; tanikka istta qachcha caanada abbaa bollara tookettidi neni malatidaso gaththada ta birshisana; neni heeppe ekkada ne baggara ta kawoteththa keeththan diza asaas miza kath yeddada ta amo kunththa» gi kiittides.
1Kings5:10 Hessaththo ooththidi Kiraamey Solomooney koyida keena ziga mudeththatanne xiidda mudeththata ubbaa shiishshides.
1Kings5:11 Solomooneykka kawo Kiraame kawoteththa keeththan diza asatas qallaba gidana mala 20
1Kings5:12 GODAY Solomoones immida hidota qaalaa mala izas aadho erateth immides. Kiraamessinne Solomoones lo7o gaytoteththi diza gishshas bantta giddon caaqettida.
1Kings5:13 Kawo Solomooney Isra7eele asa ubbaafe 30
1Kings5:14 Adooniraame istta bolla halaqa histti shuumides. Gabbaratakka tammu tammu shiyan shaakki heedzdzu kessides; issi issi buttey issi agina Libaanoosen ooththana malanne nam7u agina bason bason shempana mala tara oyththides.
1Kings5:15 Solomoones tooho tookkiza 70
1Kings5:16 Qasseka oosoza aawateththan kaaletti oosisiza 33
1Kings5:17 Isttika Kawo Solomooney azaziin Xoossa Keeththaas yoch gidana mala wogga muuruta shuchchata qeridi massida.
1Kings5:18 Kushe hiillateth eriza Solomoone asati
1Kings6:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida oyddu xeetanne osppun tammanththa layththan Solomooney Isra7eele bolla kawotida oydanththo layththan Ziife geetettiza nam7anththo aginan GODAA Keeth keexo doommides.
1Kings6:2 Solomooney GODAAS keexxida Keeththaas adussateththay 60 wadha
1Kings6:3 Xoossa Keeththaa daaranchchaza gomppay 20 wadha gidishin izas adussateththay 10 wadha kare kezees.
1Kings6:4 Xoossa Keeththaas soo baggara aakkidi kare baggara xuummida maskooteti deettes.
1Kings6:5 Xoossa Keeththaa yuushon ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a kifile godaara oyseththidi hara kifileta keexxides;
1Kings6:6 Pooqezas garsa kifileza gomppay 5 wadha
1Kings6:7 Xoossa Keeththazi gimbettida shuchchati masetti giigiday heen ba dizason gidida gishshas Xoossa Keeththay keexettishin naariqa giirissi
1Kings6:8 Pooqezas garsa kifileza geliza pengey Xoossa Keeththaafe dugeha baggara dees; heeppe pude nam7anththo pooqezanne heedzdzanththo pooqeza baanaas yedhdhi yedhdhi keziza kechchi dees.
1Kings6:9 Hessaththo ooththidi Solomooney keeththaa keexxi polides; histtidi kaaraza soo baggara ziga sanqqan kammides.
1Kings6:10 Qasse Xoossa keeththaa yuushon isttas dhoqqateththay ichchashu ichchashu wadha gidida kifileta keexxides; histtidi Xoossa Keeththa godaara ziga sanqqan oyseththides.
1Kings6:11 GODAA qaalay Solomoonekko yides;
1Kings6:12 histtidi
1Kings6:13 Histtada tani Isra7eele asaa giddon de7ana; tani ta deraa Isra7eele yegga aggike» gides.
1Kings6:14 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaa keexxi giigides.
1Kings6:15 Xoossa Keeththaa godaa soo baggara ziga sanqqan kammides; wuygeza qasse xiidda sanqqafe ooththides.
1Kings6:16 Xoossa Keeththaa giddon guye baggara 20 wadhazi Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a gidana mala wuygeppe biidi kaara gakkanaas ziga sanqqan gordides.
1Kings6:17 He Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththa baggara diza wuygezas adussateththay 40 wadha.
1Kings6:18 Xoossa Keeththas soo baggay pudhiza ciishshataninne ciishshata mislen aleqettides; giddo baggara ziga sanqqan kamettida gishshas mulekka gimbe shuchchi beettenna.
1Kings6:19 Solomooney Caaqo Taabotaa woththanaas Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a giigsides.
1Kings6:20 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aa adussateththay 20 wadha
1Kings6:21 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaas giddo baggaza muuruta worqqan meeshides; worqqan meeshettida Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aas sinththa baggara worqqa sansalatan aleqissides.
1Kings6:22 Histtidi Keeththaas soo giddoza worqqan meeshides; hessaththoka Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azan diza yarshosoza muuruta worqqan meeshides.
1Kings6:23 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azan woththanaas issaas issaas geesay 10 wadha gidiza nam7u kirube misleta wogara miththafe massidi giigsides.
1Kings6:24 Koyro kirubeza qefey issoy ichchashu wadha; nam7anththozi ichchashu wadha; koyro qefe xeerappe biidi nam7anththo qefeza xeera gakkanaas tammu wadha.
1Kings6:25 Nam7anththo kirubeza qefeykka tammu wadha; nam7u kirubeta medhaynne gubbay issi gina.
1Kings6:26 Issi issi kirube geesay tammu wadha.
1Kings6:27 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththan diza Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan kirubeta woththides; istta qefey micetti uttides; issi kirubeza qefey issi bagga godaa bochchishin hankko kirubeza qefey hankko bagga godaa bochchees; istta nam7ata qefey soo giddon issoy issaara gayttees.
1Kings6:28 Solomooney kirubetakka worqqan meeshides.
1Kings6:29 Ubbaafe Dummatiza Giddo Qol7aza soo baggaranne kare baggara godaa kirube misletan
1Kings6:30 Qasseka Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7azanne Xoossa Keeththaa wuygeza ubbaa worqqan meeshides.
1Kings6:31 Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7a gelizasozas pengeza wogara miththafe sanqqata giigsides; qosilaththatassinne qoretas ichchashu zoozey dees.
1Kings6:32 Wogara miththafe oosettida nam7u sanqqata kirube misletan
1Kings6:33 Hessaththoka Xoossa Keeththaa gelizaso pengezan wogarappe oosettida oyddu zoozera diza qosilath essides.
1Kings6:34 Nam7u nam7u sanqqati maaxafan issi bolla oykettida nam7u sanqqata giigsides.
1Kings6:35 Istta bolla kirube misleta
1Kings6:36 Xoossa Keeththan giddo wuygen masettida shuch heedzdzu maaran licides; qasse issi maaran ziga sanqqa licides.
1Kings6:37 Solomooney kawotida oydanththo layththan
1Kings6:38 Solomooney kawotida tammanne issinththa layththan
1Kings7:1 Solomooney ba keeth keexxi giiganaas 13 layth ekkides.
1Kings7:2 Libaanoose Wora geetettiza kawoteththa keeth keexxides; he keeththaas adussateththay 100 wadha
1Kings7:3 Tuussati tookki oykkiza gede wodhdhiza miththati deettes; issi maara bolla 15 zongalththati deettes; heyti issi bolla oyddu tammanne ichchasha. He zongalththatappe bollara kaara kammiza ziga sanqqati deettes.
1Kings7:4 He keeththaa maskooteti heedzdzu maaran dhoqqu gi oosettida; istti issoy issaara ginan deettes.
1Kings7:5 Pengetassinne maskootetas oyddu zoozera diza qosilaththati deettes; maskooteti heedzdzu maaran oosettida; istti issoy issaara ginan deettes.
1Kings7:6 Solomooney daro tuussatara diza Keeththe geetettiza keeth keexxides; he keeththaas adussateththay 50 wadha
1Kings7:7 Qasse izi pirda pirdanaas uttiza shilota keeth keexxides; he keeththay wuygeppe biidi kaara gakkanaas ziga sanqqan gordettides.
1Kings7:8 Pirda Keeththaafe guye baggara diza zagon kawoteththa keeththaa baas daanaso hankko keeththaa mala ooththi keexxides; Solomooney ba machcho Paaroone nayis hessa mala kawoteththa keeth keexxi immides.
1Kings7:9 He keeththati ubbay kareppe biidi gita zagoza gakkanaas
1Kings7:10 Yochchazikka wodhdhiday 10 wadhaninne 8 wadhan lo7i masettida gita shuchchatanna.
1Kings7:11 Izappe bolla baggara mixen mixen masettida lo7o shuchchatinne ziga sanqqati deettes.
1Kings7:12 Xoossa Keeththaa wuygey yaanne haa simerettiza daaranchchaara gujjiin gita zagoza mala lo7i masettida heedzdzu yuusho shuchchan
1Kings7:13 Kawo Solomooney kiittidi Kiraame geetettiza as Xiroose katamappe ehisides.
