1Kings7:14 Niftaaleme qommofe gidida Kiraame aaya am7o; iza aaway Xiroose asa; xarqimala oosonkka erettida hiillanchcha; Kiraamey xarqimala qoxxiza hiillateththi diza asa; izi xarqimalappe qoxxidi kessiza ooso ubbaan akeekan
1Kings7:15 Kiraamey issi issi geesay 18 wadha
1Kings7:16 Hessaththoka tuussata xeeran woththanaas nam7u qustteta xarqimalappe seerisidi ooththides; issi issi qusttey ichchash wadha aduqqees.
1Kings7:17 Tuussaa hu7en diza qusttetas alleqo gidana mala issi qusttes gite misatiza laappun sansalata ooththides.
1Kings7:18 Tuussata bolla diza qustteta aleqissanaas issi issi gite sansalata yuushon nam7u maaran oroomaaneta oosisides; nam7u qusttetaska hessaththo ooththides.
1Kings7:19 Daaranchchan eqqida tuussata hu7en diza qustteta adussateththay 4 wadha; istta bolla suufe ciish misatiza ciishshi dees.
1Kings7:20 Nam7u tuussata hu7e bolla diza gite sansalatatappe kaallidi diza edzdzoy uttidasohoppe bolla baggara 200 oroomaane teera misleti nam7u maaran yuuyi aadhdhi deettes.
1Kings7:21 Kiraamey he nam7u tuussata hee haa simerettizason Xoossa Keeththaa daaranchchan essides; dugeha baggara essida tuussaa Yaakine
1Kings7:22 Tuussata hu7en diza qustteti suufe ciish misateettes; hessa malan tuussata oosoy polettides.
1Kings7:23 Kiraamey izas medhay edzdzo mala gita gabate xarqimalappe seerisi medhdhides; he gita gabateza doonay ha gaxaappe ya gaxa gakkanaas 10 wadha; geesay 5 wadha; yuuyi aadhdhanaas qasse 30 wadha.
1Kings7:24 Gita gonggeza doonan kare baggara ziqqi giidi izara oyketti medhettida gose misleti deettes; he misleti nam7u maaran issi issi wadhan tammay tammay yuuyi aadhdhanaas shuuyettides.
1Kings7:25 He gita gabatey xarqimalappe medhettida 12 boora misleta zokkon uttides; boorata misletappe heedzdzati pudeha bagga
1Kings7:26 He gita gonggezas ordeteththay kushe qaa7a likke; iza doonay ciishsha misatidi wanca misatees; he gita gabatezi 40
1Kings7:27 Kiraamey qasse dumma dumma miishshata woththiza tammu gaareta xarqimalappe medhdhides; he gaaretas issaas issaas adussateththay 4 wadha
1Kings7:28 He gaareti hessaththo oosettida; pude eqqida oyddu biratata bolla piddi gida lochcha xarqimalati oyketti uttida.
1Kings7:29 He xarqimalata bolla gaammota
1Kings7:30 Miishshata istta bolla woththiza xarqimalappe oosettida oyddu gaareti deettes; he gaareti genderana mala oykkida marcoti deettes; hessaththoka oyddu baggara meechcha gonggey istta bolla uttiza xarqimalappe oosettida ciishsha enccursatan alleqetti uttida.
1Kings7:31 Meechcha gonggeza qoodhe geesay issi tadhdhako; qasse gonggeza geesay issi wadha mala; izikka edzdzo mala; gonggeza qoodhey misletan alleqetti uttides; iza tookki oykkida oyddu gulay dees attiin edzdzo deenna.
1Kings7:32 Oyddu gaaretas issaas issaas geesay issi wadhanne bagga; he gaareti lochcha xarqimalaappe garsa baggara deettes; gaareti istta bolla miishshe woththizasotara issife marcon oyketti uttida.
1Kings7:33 Gaareti ola para-gaare misateettes; gaareta issi bolla gaththi waaxiza marcoti
1Kings7:34 He gaareta ubbaa zoozetaska istta tohosora tohosora isttara issino gidi oykettidi xarqimalappe medhettida zemppoti deettes.
1Kings7:35 Issi issi gaareza hu7e yuushon izas geesay issi wadhas bagga pireemey dees; zemppotinne lochcha xarqimalati gaarezara oyketti issino gidi oosettida.
1Kings7:36 Ha zemppotappenne lochcha xarqimalatappe giddon diza hankko attida sohoti ubbay kirubetan
1Kings7:37 Tammu gaaretikka hessaththo oosettida; istti seeridi medhettida miishshay issino gidida gishshas istta geesaynne medhay issi mala.
1Kings7:38 Kiraamey tammu meechcha gonggeta xarqimalappe medhdhides; issi issi gongge gomppay 4 wadha gididi
1Kings7:39 Kiraamey ichchash gaareta Xoossa Keeththaas pudeha baggara
1Kings7:40 Qasse Kiraamey xaarota
1Kings7:41 Heytikka nam7u tuussata; he tuussata hu7e bolla woththiza edzdzo mala oosettida nam7u qustteta
1Kings7:42 qustteta bollanne tuussata bolla nam7u maaran oosettida gite mala sansalatata
1Kings7:43 tammu gaareta
1Kings7:44 gita gonggezanne iza tookkida 12 boora misleta
1Kings7:45 xaarota
1Kings7:46 Kawo Solomooney Sukooteppenne Phartaaneppe giddon Yordaanoose dembaan de7iza xarqimala seerisizason hayta ubbaa oosisides.
1Kings7:47 Xarqimalappe medhettida ha miishshay ubbay keehi daro gidida gishshas Solomooney iza meezanissibeenna; hessa gishshas ha medhettida miishshati ay keena deexokko erettibeenna.
1Kings7:48 Qasseka Solomooney GODAA Keeththa giddon go7ettana mala oosisida miishshati ubbay hayssafe kaallizayta. Worqqafe oosettida yarsho yarshizaso
1Kings7:49 ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththan ichchashati
1Kings7:50 xuu7ata
1Kings7:51 Kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththa ooso ubbaa polidaappe guye iza aawa Dawiti GODAAS dummasi woththida bira
1Kings8:1 Hessafe guye kawo Solomooney Taabotaza Dawite katama Xiyooneppe kessidi Xoossa keeth ehanaas Isra7eele cimata
1Kings8:2 Etaanime geetettiza laappunththa aginan Daase Ba7aaley bonchchettiza wode Isra7eele attuma asay ubbay kawo Solomoonekko shiiqides.
1Kings8:3 Isra7eele cimati ubbay shiiqiin qeeseti Taabotaza denththi tookkida.
1Kings8:4 Lewetinne qeeseti Taabotaa
1Kings8:5 Kawo Solomooneynne izara diza Isra7eele asay kumeth Taabotaa sinththan shiiqidi qoodanaas dandayettontta cora dorsatanne boorata yarshida.
1Kings8:6 Hessafe guye qeeseti Taabotaa Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan kirube misleta qefetappe garsa baggara woththida.
1Kings8:7 Micetti uttida kirubeta qefeti Taabotaanne Taabotaa tookkiza miththaa kammida.
1Kings8:8 Tooho miththati keehippe adussa gidida gishshas istta xeeray Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aafe sinththa baggara dishe beetteettes; gido attiin Ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aas sinththa baggara gidontta hara baggara dizaytas beetettenna; istti hanno gakkanaas heen deettes.
1Kings8:9 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida wode GODAY isttara caaqettida Siina zuma bolla Musey Taabotaa giddon woththida masettida nam7u shuchchatappe attiin haray aykko miishshika baawa.
1Kings8:10 Qeeseti Geeshshasozappe keziin shaaray GODAA Keeth kumi uttides.
1Kings8:11 He shaaraa giddon diza Xoossa bonchchoy sohoza kumida gishshas qeeseti bantta ooso ooththanaas dandaybeettenna.
1Kings8:12 Hessafe guye Solomooney
1Kings8:13 Hekko tani neni izan mernaas de7ana mala gita Keeth keexxadis» gi woossides.
1Kings8:14 Isra7eele as ubbay duulatan kumi eqqidishin kawoy isttako simmidi
1Kings8:15 «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto! Ta aawa Dawites ba doonan yootida hidota qaalaa ba kushen polides; he izi immida hidotay
1Kings8:16 ‹Ta deraa Isra7eele tani Gibxe biittafe kessida gallassafe doommiin ta sunththay izan xeygettana mala Xoossaa keeth keexxanaas Isra7eele qommota katamatappe issaaka doorabeekke; gido attiin ta deraa Isra7eele kaaleththana mala Dawite dooradis› gees.
1Kings8:17 «Ta aawa Dawiti GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanaas ba wozinan qoppides.
1Kings8:18 GODAY ta aawaa Dawites
1Kings8:19 gido attiin Xoossa Keeththaa keexxanay nena gidakka; ta sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanay ne gulbateppe yelettana ne naa› gides.
1Kings8:20 «GODAY ba immida hidota qaala polides; GODAY immida hidota qaalaa mala tani ta aawaa Dawite sohon kawotada Isra7eele kawoteththa araatan uttadis. Qasseka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxadis.
1Kings8:21 GODAY nu aawata Gibxeppe kessida wode isttara caaqettida caaqo qaalay izan diza Taabotay daanaso ta iza giddon giigsadis» gi anjjides.
1Kings8:22 Hessafe guye Solomooney GODAAS yarsho yarshizaso sinththan kumeththa Isra7eele deraa duulatay dizason eqqidi ba kushe pude salo denththides;
1Kings8:23 histtidi
1Kings8:24 Ne ashkaraas ta aawaa Dawites neni ooththana gaada immida hidota naagadasa; neni kase ne doonan yootida hidota qaalaa ne kushen hach poladasa.
1Kings8:25 «Ha7ikka abeet GODAWU
1Kings8:26 Ha7ikka abeet Isra7eele Xoossawu! Neni ne ashkaraas ta aawa Dawites immida hidota qaalay poletto.
1Kings8:27 «Tumappe Xoossi sa7a bolla de7i erizee? Be7a saloy
1Kings8:28 Gidikkoka abeet GODAWU
1Kings8:29 Neni
1Kings8:30 Tani ne ashkaraynne ne dere Isra7eeley hayssa Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi shoobbi woossiza woosaa ne siya; ne duussason salon dashe siyada nuus atto ga.
1Kings8:31 «Issi asi ba lagge qohidi kashii giin iza caaqeththanaas ehiin hayssa Xoossa Keeththaa giddon diza yarshizasoza sinththan izi caaqqiko
1Kings8:32 neni salon dashe hessa siyada pola; ne aylleta giddon pirda qohidaades iza ooso mala izas zaara; xillozas iza xilloteththaa qonccisada shatumissa.
1Kings8:33 «Ne dere Isra7eeley nena qohida gaason ba morkketan xoonettidi istti neekko simmidi ne sunththaa xeygikko ha Xoossa Keeththan nena woossikonne nena shoobbiko
1Kings8:34 neni salon dashe siya; ne dere Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga; histtada neni istta aawatas immida biittayo istta zaara gelththa.
1Kings8:35 «Ne asay ne bolla ooththida nagara gaason saloy gordettiin iray bukkontta ixxiko
1Kings8:36 Histtada ne ashkara Isra7eele deraa nagara atto ga; istti hemettanaas bessiza lo7o oge istta tamaarsa; hessafe guye neni ne deraa laatissida biittan ira bukisa.
1Kings8:37 «Biittaa bollan koshay woykko iita hargey
1Kings8:38 Ne dere Isra7eeleppe oonikka ba wozinan un7ettidayssa eridi ba kusheta haa Xoossa Keeththaako miccidi shoobbi woossiko
1Kings8:39 neni istta woosaa salon dashe siyada istta nagaraa atto ga; histtada isttas ooththa; neni xalla asa ubbaa wozina eriza gishshas izaade ooso ooso mala izas imma.
1Kings8:40 Histtiko neni nu aawatas immida biittaan diza wode ubbaan istti nees yayyana.
1Kings8:41 «Ne dere Isra7eele gidonttayti ne gita sunththaa gishshas siyidi haaho biittafe yida kare dere asi diikko
1Kings8:42 asay haahoppe yizay ne gita sunththaa gishshas
1Kings8:43 neni ne dizason salon dashe siya; ne asati Isra7eeleti eriza mala sa7an diza asay ubbay ne sunththaa erana malanne nees yayyana mala
1Kings8:44 «Ne derey bantta morkketa olana mala neni kiittidaso awakka biidi istti neni doorida ha katamaan tani ne sunththaas keexxida Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi nena GODAA woossiko
1Kings8:45 neni istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe siyada istta maadda.
1Kings8:46 «Nagara ooththontta asi baynda gishshas istti nagara ooththiin neni istta bolla hanqettada morkketas istta aaththa immiin morkketikka istta di7idi haako woykko mata gidiin bantta biitta ekki efiin
1Kings8:47 istti ba di7ettida biittan dishe bantta wozinan nagarappe simmiko
1Kings8:48 banttana di7idi efida morkketa biittan dishe istti bantta kumeththa wozinappenne bantta kumeththa shemppofe neekko simmiko
1Kings8:49 neni istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe siyada istta maadda.
1Kings8:50 Ne derey ooththida nagaraanne nena qohida qohoza atto ga; istti di7idi efida asay isttas qadhettana mala ooththa.
1Kings8:51 Gaasoykka istti birata seerisiza itoone tama mala gidida Gibxe biittafe neni nees shaakka kessida ne deretanne ne xinxxota.
1Kings8:52 «Tani ne ashkaraynne ne dere Isra7eeley shoobbizayssa ne ayfey xeello; qasse istti waassiza wode aydekka neni istta waaso alla.
1Kings8:53 Abeet GODAWU
1Kings8:54 Solomooney woosaanne shoobeththaa GODAAKKO shiishshidaappe guye ba kushe pude salo denththidi yarsho yarshizaso sinththan gulbatidasoppe dendi eqqides.
1Kings8:55 Kumeththa Isra7eele duulata deraa ubbaas ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
1Kings8:56 «Izi kase immida hidota qaalaa mala ba dere Isra7eeles shempo immida GODAAS galatay gido; izi ba ashkara Muse baggara immida hidota qaalaa ubbaa polides.
1Kings8:57 GODAA nu Xoossay kase nu aawatara diza mala nunarakka de7o; izi nuna mulekka aggofo woykko yeggofo.
1Kings8:58 Nuni iza ogeta ubbaan hemettana malanne izi nu aawatas immida azazota
1Kings8:59 Hach hach de7os koshshiza mala
1Kings8:60 Hessika sa7an de7iza asay ubbay Xoossi xalla GODAA gididayssanne izappe attiin hara xoossi bayndayssa istti erana malassa.
1Kings8:61 Hachchayssaththoka intte iza wogaan daana malanne iza azazota naagana mala GODAAS
1Kings8:62 Hessafe guye kawozinne Isra7eele asay ubbay issife GODAA sinththan yarsho yarshida.
1Kings8:63 Solomooney GODAAS issifeteththa yarsho yarshanaas 22
1Kings8:64 Kawo Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaas sinththa baggan de7iza dembaas giddo addaa he gallas dummasides. Heen xuugettiza yarsho
1Kings8:65 He wode Solomooneynne Isra7eele asay ubbay laappun gallas Daase Ba7aale bonchchida; qasseka hara laappun gallas gujjidi issi bolla tamman oyddu gallas bonchchida; Isra7eele zawan Hamaate pinniza purdefe biidi Gibxe Shaafa gakkanaas de7iza cora asay GODAA nu Xoossaa sinththan ba7aale bonchchanaas shiiqides.
1Kings8:66 Wonteththa gallas kawoy asaa moyzides; asay kawoza anjjidi GODAY ba aylle Dawitesinne ba asaa Isra7eeles ooththida kiyateththan wozinappe ufayettishe baso baso bides.
1Kings9:1 Solomooney GODAA Keeththinne kawo keeth keexxi giigidi ba ooththanaas amottida amo ubbaa polidaappe guye
1Kings9:2 Geba7oone kataman kase qonccida mala GODAY nam7anththo izas qonccides.
1Kings9:3 Histtidi GODAY izas
1Kings9:4 «Neni gidikko ne aawa Dawiti simerettida mala borey baynda suureteththan ta sinththan simerettiko
1Kings9:5 tani ne aawa Dawites
1Kings9:6 «Gido attiin neni woykko ne nayti tana kaalo aggidi guye simmiko
1Kings9:7 Isra7eele deraa kase tani immida biittaafe dhoqallana; tani ta sunththas dummasida ha Xoossa Keeththaaka aggaagana; hessafe guye Isra7eele asay kawoteththata ubbaa giddon qidhessinne miichchas attana.
1Kings9:8 Hayssi ha Xoossa Keeththay malalisizaaz gidikkoka laalettidi doore gidana; bizay yizay wuri miiccishe
1Kings9:9 Asay
1Kings9:10 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaanne kawo keeththaa keexxi giigida nam7u tammanththa layththa wurseththan
1Kings9:11 Xiroose Kawo Kiraamey izas koshshiza xiidda
1Kings9:12 Gido attiin Kiraamey Xiroose katamappe kezidi Solomooney izas immida katamata be7anaas bida wode izi katamatan ufayettibeenna.
1Kings9:13 Histtiin Kiraamey Solomoone
1Kings9:14 Kiraamey 4
1Kings9:15 GODAA Xoossa Keeththaa
1Kings9:16 Gibxe kawo Paarooney kase Gezeere katama bolla daafa gaththidi oli oykkides; histtidi katamaa taman xuuggides; izin diza Kanaane asaa wodhidi Solomoone gelida ba nays woyto immides;
1Kings9:17 Solomooneykka Gezeere katamaa zaari keexxides. Hessaththoka qasse Solomooney garsa Beeti-Horoone
1Kings9:18 Ba7alaate
1Kings9:19 shinqe minjji woththiza katamata ubbaa
1Kings9:20 Amooretappe
1Kings9:21 Istta Isra7eele asati biittaafe wursi dhayssanaas dandayontta aggiin he biittaan attida asata zereththata; Solomooney istta shaakki ayllesidi gabbarateththan oosisides; istti hach gakkanaaska aylleteththan ooththeettes.
1Kings9:22 Gido attiin Solomooney Isra7eele asaappe oonakka aylleteththan oosisibeenna; istti izas oosanchchata
1Kings9:23 Heytikka Solomooney keexisiza keeththaa kaaletti keexisizayta; isttaskka qooday ichchash xeetanne ichchash tamma.
1Kings9:24 Gibxe kawo naya Dawite katamappe Solomooney izis keexisida keeththaa pude bidaappe guye Solomooney izis keela keelides.
1Kings9:25 Solomooney GODAAS oosisida yarshosoza bolla xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho layththan heedzdzuto yarshees; GODAA sinththan exaanekka cuwasees; histtidi Xoossa Keeththaa ooso polides.
1Kings9:26 Hessafe guye kawo Solomooney Eedoome biittaan Zo7o abbaa doonan Eelaate geetettiza katamaa matan diza Eexiyoon-Gaabiren markabeta medhdhides.
1Kings9:27 Kawo Kiraamey Solomoone asatara ooththana mala markabe laagon loohida ba asata kiittides.
1Kings9:28 Histtiin istti Ofire biittaa biidi 14
1Kings10:1 Saaba kawoya GODAY Solomoones immida aadho erateththaa siyada deexo oyshata ekkada iza paaccanaas yadus.
1Kings10:2 Gita azhaban shitto
1Kings10:3 Solomooney iza oychchidayssa ubbaa zaarides; izis birshettontta izappe geemmi attiday aykkoyka baa.
1Kings10:4 Saaba kawoya Solomoones imettida aadho erateththaa
1Kings10:5 iza maaddan shiiqiza qumaa
1Kings10:6 Hessafe guye iza kawozas
1Kings10:7 Gido attiin tani yaada ta ayfen be7anaashe gakkanaas istti taas yootidayssa ammanabeekke; taas asay yootidayssi ta be7idayssas bagga gidenna; ne aadho erateththaynne dureteththi ta siyidayssafe bolla.
1Kings10:8 Ubba wode ne sinththan eqqidi ne aadho erateththaa siyiza shuumetassinne ne oosanchchatas qaaday ay mala lo7oo!
1Kings10:9 Nenan ufayettidi nena Isra7eele kawota araatan utisida GODAA ne Xoossay galatetto! GODAY Isra7eele asaa mernaas siiqida gishshas suure pirdaynne xilloteththi daana mala izi nena kawoththides» gadus.
1Kings10:10 Histtada kawoya 4
1Kings10:11 (Kawo Kiraame markabeti
1Kings10:12 Kawo Solomooney he sanddalezappe GODAA Keeththaassinne kawo keeththas tuuqeta
1Kings10:13 Kawo Solomooney kawoy immanaas bessiza imotaappe hara
1Kings10:14 Solomooney layththan layththan ekkiza worqqay 23
1Kings10:15 Hessika qaraxappe
1Kings10:16 Solomooney 200 wogga gondalleta oosisides; issi issi gondalley laappun kilo giraame gidiza worqqan meeshisides.
1Kings10:17 Qasseka izi 300 qeeri gondalleta oosisides; issi issi gondalle nam7u kilo giraame gidiza worqqan meeshisides; kawoy he gondalleta Libaanoose Wora geetettiza keeththan woththides.
1Kings10:18 Qasseka kawoy gita araata danggarsa zaaleppe oosisidi muuruta worqqan meeshides.
1Kings10:19 He araatay dizaso pude kezanaas usuppun dhekkati deettes; he araatay guye hu7eso baggara edzdzo misatees; araataas nam7u baggarakka qese zemppissizasoti deettes; he zemppizasota millen gaammo misle nam7ati eqqida.
1Kings10:20 Usuppun dhekkatas hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara usuppun usuppun gaammo misleti eqqida; mulera 12 misleti deettes; hayssa mala araatay hara awa dere kawotankka oosettibeenna.
1Kings10:21 Kawo Solomooney ushshu uyiza wanca ubbay worqqafe oosettides; Libaanoose wora geetettiza kawo keeththan diza miishshi ubbayka muuruta worqqafe oosettides; kawo Solomoone woden biray hiraysso gidida gishshas birappe oosettida miishshi mulekka deenna.
1Kings10:22 Kawo Solomoones Kiraame markabetara issife wogga gita abba bollara biza Tarseese zal7e markabeti deettes; he markabeti worqqa
1Kings10:23 Kawo Solomooney dureteththaninne aadho erateththan biitta bolla diza kawota ubbaafe aadhdhees.
1Kings10:24 Biitta bolla diza asay ubbay Xoossi Solomoone wozinan woththida aadho erateththaa siyanaas izakko yaana koyeettes.
1Kings10:25 Layththan layththan izakko yiza asi ubbay birappenne worqqafe oosettida miish
1Kings10:26 Solomooney para-gaaretanne parata shiishshides; izas 1
1Kings10:27 Kawoy Yerusalaamen biray shuchchaththo korettana mala
1Kings10:28 Solomoone parati Gibxeppenne Qaaweppe yida; kawo zal7anchchati istta Qaaweppe shammi shammi eheettes.
1Kings10:29 Istti issi issi para-gaare 600 saqile biran
1Kings11:1 Kawo Solomooney daro allaga biitta maccassata siiqides; heytikka Gibxe kawo biyey bolla gujjiin Mo7aabe maccassata
1Kings11:2 GODAY Isra7eele asaas
1Kings11:3 Solomoones kawotappe yelettida 700 machchetinne 300 laggeththoti deettes; he maccassati iza wozinay Xoossa wogappe kare kezana mala ooththida.
1Kings11:4 Solomooney cimmi cimmi bishin iza machcheti iza wozinaa hara xoossatakko zaarida; histtiin iza aawa Dawiti kumeththa wozinappe GODAA ba Xoossaa siiqida mala izi siiqibeenna.
1Kings11:5 Solomooney Astaroote geetettiza Sidoonata eeqa xoossayssinne harassiza Amooneta xoossaa Molookes goynnides.
1Kings11:6 Histtidi Solomooney GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides; ba aawa Dawite mala wurseth gakkanaas GODAA kaallibeenna.
1Kings11:7 Hessafe guye Solomooney harassiza Mo7aabeta xoossa Kamooshessinne Amooneta xoossa Molookes Yerusalaameppe arshey mokkiza baggan diza zumbullata bolla goynnizasota giigsides.
1Kings11:8 Istti bantta eeqa xoossatas heen exaane cuwasizaytassinne yarsho shiishshiza hara machchetaska hessaththoka ooththides.
1Kings11:9 Izas nam7uto qonccida GODAA Isra7eele Xoossafe Solomoone wozinay haraso simmida gishshas GODAY iza bolla hanqettides.
1Kings11:10 Hara xoossata kaallontta mala GODAY Solomoone azazides; izi GODAA azazo naagibeenna.
1Kings11:11 Hessa gishshas GODAY Solomoones
1Kings11:12 Gidikkoka ne aawa Dawite gishshas gaada ne kawoteththa layththan gidontta ne naaza kawoteththa layththan tani hayssa ooththana.
1Kings11:13 Ne naazappe gidikkoka kawoteththaa izappe mulera woththa ekkike; ta ashkaraa Dawite gishshassinne tani doorida katama Yerusalaame gishshas issi qommo ta izas immana» gides.
1Kings11:14 Hessafe guye GODAY Eedoome kawota zareppe Hadaade morkke histti Solomoone bolla denththides.
1Kings11:15 Hayssafe kase Dawiti Eedoome asatara olettida wode hayqqidayta moogissanaas pude bida ola gadawa Iyo7aabey
1Kings11:16 Eedoomen diza attumasa ubbaa dhayssana gakkanaas Iyo7aabeynne Isra7eele asay ubbay heen usuppun agina uttides.
1Kings11:17 Gido attiin he wode Hadaadey yelagateththan dishe ba aawaas ooththiza Eedoome oosanchchatappe guuththatara Gibxe biitta baqatides.
1Kings11:18 Istti Midiyaameppe dendidi Paaraane biitta bida; Paaraaneppe banttanara asaa ekkidi Gibxe kawo Paaroonekko bida. Kawozi Hadaades keeththinne gade immides; maana kaththika azazides.
1Kings11:19 Kawo Paarooney Hadaade keehi dosida gishshas ba machcho Xaafineesi michcheyo izas machcho immides.
1Kings11:20 Xaafineesi michchiya izas Ganubaate geetettiza naa yeladus; Xaafineese iza kawo keeththan dichchadus; Ganubaatey heen kawo naytara issife diccides.
1Kings11:21 Hadaadey Gibxen dishe Dawiti hayqqi ba aawatan gayttidayssanne ola gadawa Iyo7aabeykka hayqqidayssa siyides; histtidi Hadaadey kawozas
1Kings11:22 Kawoy iza
1Kings11:23 Hessaththoka Xoossay Xoobba kawo Hadaadi7eezereppe baqati bida El7aada naa Erazoone geetettizayssa Solomoone bolla morkke histti denththides.
1Kings11:24 Dawiti Xoobba biitta olanchchata dhayssida wode Erazooney baqatida asaa shiishshidi pangata halaqa gidides; istti Damasqo biidi heen iza kawoththida.
1Kings11:25 Hadaadey gaththida metoza bolla gujjidi Solomooney de7ida layth ubbaan Erazooney Isra7eeletas morkke gidides; Erazooney Aaraamen kawotidi Isra7eeletara eqettides.
1Kings11:26 Qasseka Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Solomoone bolla makkallateththan dendides; izi Solomoone shuumetappe issaa gidishin Efreeme biitta Xaaredeppe yides; iza aayeya Xiru7o geetettiza am7eyo.
1Kings11:27 Izi kawaa bolla makkallateththan dendida gaasoykka Solomooney gimbes keela keelissidessinne ba aawaa Dawite katamaa yuushon diza gimbezas paceso kunththides.
1Kings11:28 Iyorba7aamey oosozas keehi hiillateththi diza naateththa asa; Solomooney ha naateththazi oosoza ay mala ooththizaakko be7idi gabbara ooththi aqiza Yooseefe qommota bolla alaafe ooththi shuumides.
1Kings11:29 Issi gallassi Iyorba7aamey Yerusalaame katamappe bishin Seeloppe yida nabe Akayay izara ogen gayttides. He wode Akayay ooraththa may7o may7i uttides. He sohozan istti nam7ay xalla deettes.
1Kings11:30 Akayay ba may7ida seelo may7oza tammanne nam7u kessi pooshshi yeggides.
1Kings11:31 Histtidi Iyorba7aames
1Kings11:32 Gido attiin ta ashkara Dawite gishshassinne Isra7eele qommota ubbaa giddofe tani doorida Yerusalaame katamaa gishshas issi qommo izas aggana.
1Kings11:33 Ta hayssa ooththanaas gaasoykka Solomooney tana aggidi Sidoonata xoos Astarootes
1Kings11:34 « ‹Gidikkoka tani kawoteththaa Solomoone kusheppe ubbaa ekkike; tani iza doorida gishshassinne ta azazonne ta wogaa naagida ta ashkara Dawite gishshas Solomooney shemppora paxa de7ida wode ubbaan izi haarana mala ooththadis.
1Kings11:35 Hessafe guye tani kawoteththaa iza naaza kusheppe woththa ekkada tammu qommota nees immana.
1Kings11:36 Ta sunththi izan xeygettana mala ta doorida Yerusalaame kataman ubba wodekka ta ashkara Dawite zarey poo7o gidana mala tani issi qommo iza naazas immana.
1Kings11:37 « ‹Gido attiin nena tani taas ekkana; ne wozinay amottida ubbaa ne haarana; Isra7eele bollaka ne kawotana.
1Kings11:38 Ta aylle Dawiti ooththida mala ta azazota ubbaa ne polikko
1Kings11:39 Solomoone nagara gishshas Dawite zereththata tani qaxxayana; gido attiin mernaas gidenna› gees» gides.
1Kings11:40 Hessa gishshas Solomooney Iyorba7aame wodhanaas koyides; gido attiin Iyorba7aamey Gibxe Kawo Shiishaaqekko baqati biidi Solomooney hayqqana gakkanaas Gibxen takkides.
1Kings11:41 Solomooney hanida haray
1Kings11:42 Solomooney Isra7eele ubbaa bolla Yerusalaamen 40 layth kawotides.
1Kings11:43 Hessafe guye Solomooney hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; ba aawaa Dawite katamankka moogettides. Iza naa Erobi7aamey izasohon kawotides.
1Kings12:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay Erobi7aame kawoththanaas Seekeeme bida gishshas izikka hee bides.
1Kings12:2 Kawo Solomooneppe baqatidi Gibxen de7iza Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey hessa siyidi Gibxeppe simmi yides.
1Kings12:3 Histtiin Isra7eele asay Iyorba7aames kiita yeddi xeygisiin izinne Isra7eele maabaray ubbay Erobi7aamekko biidi
1Kings12:4 «Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossides; gido attiin ha7i neni izi nuna oosisiza wolqqama oosonne deexo qambara nuus kawushsharkkii! Histtiko nuni nees haarettana» gida.
1Kings12:5 Histtiin Erobi7aamey isttas
1Kings12:6 Hessafe guye kawo Erobi7aamey iza aawa Solomooney shemppora paxa diza wode Solomoone zoriza cimata zore oychchides. Izi isttas
1Kings12:7 Histtiin cimati Erobi7aame
1Kings12:8 Gido attiin Erobi7aamey cimati zorida zoreza aggidi izara diccidi izas ooththiza yelaga asata zore oychchides.
1Kings12:9 Izi isttas
1Kings12:10 Izara diccida yelagati
1Kings12:11 Ta aaway intte bolla deexo qambara woththides; tani gidikko hessafekka aaththada deexeththana. Ta aaway inttena lisson wadhdhides; tani gidikko inttena masimaso mala dukkiza lisson wadhdhana› gaada zaara» gida.
1Kings12:12 Hessafe guye Kawo Erobi7aamey
1Kings12:13 Histtiin kawoy cimata zore ixxidi deraa hanqeththiza zaaro immides.
1Kings12:14 Yelagata zore ekkidi
1Kings12:15 Kawoy asay gizayssa siyontta ixxides; gaasoykka GODAY Seeloppe yida nabe Akaya baggara kase Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aames yootida qaalay polettana mala hayssi GODAAPPE hanides.
1Kings12:16 Isra7eele asay ubbay kawoy istti gizayssa siyontta ixxidayssa eridi kawozas
1Kings12:17 Erobi7aameykka Yuhuda katamatan diza Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotides.
1Kings12:18 Hessafe guye kawo Erobi7aamey ba gabbarata halaqa Adoraame Isra7eele asaakko kiittiin istti shuchchan caddi wodhida. Histtiin Kawo Erobi7aamey ba para-gaare bolla eeson kezi uttidi Yerusalaame baqatides.
1Kings12:19 Heedeppe doommidi hach gakkanaas Isra7eele qommotappe tammati Dawite zareppe kawotida kawota bolla makkallida.
1Kings12:20 Iyorba7aamey Gibxeppe simmidayssa Isra7eele asay ubbay siyidi iza bantta duulataakko xeygisidi Isra7eele bolla kawoththida; Dawite zareppe kawotida kawotas ammanettidi attiday Yuhuda qommo xalla.
1Kings12:21 Solomoone naa Erobi7aamey Yerusalaame katama gakkida mala Isra7eele biitta asaara olettidi kawoteththaa baas zaarana mala Yuhuda qommofenne Biniyaame qommofe doorettida 180
1Kings12:22 He wode Xoossa qaalay Xoossa as Shama7ekko yiidi
1Kings12:23 «Solomoone naa
1Kings12:24 GODAY inttena
1Kings12:25 Hessafe guye Iyorba7aamey Efreemen shaara menththon diza Seekeemen miixa giigsi uttides; hessafe kezi biidi Panu7eelen miixa giigsides.
1Kings12:26 Iyorba7aamey ba wozinan
1Kings12:27 Ha asay GODAA Xoossa Keeththan yarsho yarshanaas Yerusalaame katama bizaa gidikko
1Kings12:28 Hessa gishshas kawoy zorettidaappe guye worqqafe oosettida mara misle nam7ata medhdhidi asaas
1Kings12:29 Isttafe issaa Beetelen
1Kings12:30 Mara misles goynnanaas asay Daane gakkanaas bida gishshas ha yo7oy isttas nagara gidides.
1Kings12:31 Iyorba7aamey zumbullata bollan goynnizasohon eeqa misleta ooththides; deraa giddofe Lewe qommo gidonttayta qeese histti sunththides.
1Kings12:32 Kase Yuhudan bonchchizayssaththo osppunththa aginan tammanne ichchashanththa gallassan ba7aaley bonchchettana mala Iyorba7aamey woga woththidi yarsho yarshides. Izi ba oosisida mara misletas Beetelen diza yarsho sohotan yarsho yarshides. Qasse zumbullata bolla goynnizasotan ba oosisida eeqa misletas qeeseta Beetelen shuumides.
1Kings12:33 Izi ba doorida osppunththa aginan tammanne ichchashanththa gallas Beetele biidi he gallas Isra7eele asaas ba7aale gidana mala awajjides; histtidi exaane cuwasanaas pude yarsho yarshizaso kezides.
1Kings13:1 Iyorba7aamey exaane cuwasanaas yarsho yarshizaso matan eqqidishin GODAA qaalan kiitettida Xoossa asi Yuhudappe Beetele yides.
1Kings13:2 GODAY azazida qaala mala yarsho yarshizasoza eqettishe
1Kings13:3 He gallas Xoossa asi malata immidi
1Kings13:4 Kawo Iyorba7aamey Xoossaa asi Beetelen diza yarshizasoza bolla waassidayssa siyida wode
1Kings13:5 Qasseka he Xoossaadey GODAA qaalan immida malataa mala yarshosozi phalqetti wodhdhides; iza bolla diza bidinththayka laalettides.
1Kings13:6 Histtiin kawo Iyorba7aamey Xoossaadeza
1Kings13:7 Kawoy Xoossaadeza
1Kings13:8 Gido attiin Xoossaadezi kawozas
1Kings13:9 Gaasoykka GODAA qaalay tana
1Kings13:10 Hessa gishshas addezi kase ba bida ogera gidontta hara ogera Beetele simmides.
1Kings13:11 Tinbite yootiza issi cima nabey Beetele kataman dees; iza nayti Beetelen he gallas Xoossaadezi ooththida ubba miishshinne kawozakka izi ay gidaakko biidi bantta aawaas yootida.
1Kings13:12 Histtiin aaway isttas
1Kings13:13 Hessafe guye izi ba nayta
1Kings13:14 Histtidi Xoossaadeza geedo kaalli bides; issi wola kuwan uttidayssa demmidi
1Kings13:15 Histtiin he cima nabezi iza
1Kings13:16 Xoossaadezi zaaridi
1Kings13:17 Ays giikko GODAA qaalay tana
1Kings13:18 Cima nabezi gidikko
1Kings13:19 Hessa gishshas Xoossaadezi izara simmidi iza soon midessinne uyides.
1Kings13:20 Istti maaddan uttidaashin GODAA qaalay zaari ehida cima nabezaakko yides.
1Kings13:21 Histtiin Yuhudappe yida Xoossa nabezas
1Kings13:22 He sohon mooppa woykko uyoppo gida soho guye simma baada heen kaththika madasa; haaththika uyadasa. Hessa gishshas ne ahay ne aawata duufon moogettenna› gees» gishe waassi yootides.
1Kings13:23 Xoossa asi miidinne uyi giigidaappe guye tinbite yootizayssi ba guye zaari ehida nabezas hare koorides.
1Kings13:24 Histtiin izi ogera bishin gaammoy gayttidi iza wodhides. Iza ahay ogen porccu gides; hareynne gaammoy nam7ayka iza lanqen eqqida.
1Kings13:25 He ogera aadhdhiza asay ahay porccu gi ichchidayssanne gaammoyka iza lanqen eqqidayssa be7idi cima nabezi diza katamaan biidi yootida.
1Kings13:26 Bizasaappe addezas tinbite yootidi guye zaarida cima nabezi hessa siyida wode
1Kings13:27 Hessafe guye cima addezi ba nayta
1Kings13:28 Nabezi bishe ahay oge bolla porccu gi ichchida gaammoynne harey iza matan eqqidayssa demmides. Gaammozi ahaa mibeenna; harezakka bochchibeenna.
1Kings13:29 Cima nabezi Xoossa nabeza ahaa denththidi hareza bolla caanides; yeekkanaassinne mooganaas guye ba katama ekki ehides.
1Kings13:30 Histtidi baas giigsi woththida duufon ahaa woththidi
1Kings13:31 Moogi simmidaappe guye ba naytas
1Kings13:32 Gaasoykka Beetelen diza yarsho yarshizasoza bolla
1Kings13:33 Hayssi ubbay hankkoka Iyorba7aamey ba iita ogeppe simmibeenna; hessafe bollarakka zumbullata bolla diza yarshosotan ooththanaas dere ubbaafe qeeseta shuumides; qeese gidanaas koyza oonakka zumbullata bolla yarshizasohotan woththides.
1Kings13:34 Hayssi ha nagaray Iyorba7aame keeththa asaa bashshassinne biitta bollafe dhayssanaas gaaso gidides.
1Kings14:1 He wode Iyorba7aame naa Abiyay hargides.
1Kings14:2 Histtiin Iyorba7aamey ba keeththaayo
1Kings14:3 Tammu uketh
1Kings14:4 Iyorba7aame keeththaaya izi gida mala ooththadus; dendada Akaya soo Seelo badus. Akayay cimmida gishshas iza ayfey doljumidi demmenna.
1Kings14:5 Gido attiin GODAY Akayas
1Kings14:6 Hessa gishshas Akayay maccassaya penge gelishin siyidi
1Kings14:7 Neni Iyorba7aamekko baada GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay nena
1Kings14:8 Tani Dawite zareppe kawoteththaa woththa ekkada nees immadis; gido attiin neni ta ashkara Dawite mala gidakka; izi ta azazo naagidessinne ta sinththan suure miish xalla ooththishe ba kumeththa wozinan tana kaallides.
1Kings14:9 Neeppe kase sinththan dizayti ubbay ooththida iitappe aadhdhiza iita neni ooththadasa; neni nees biratappe seerisada eeqa xoossata medhdhadasa. Ta hanqo denththeththadasa; histtada tana guye oladasa.
1Kings14:10 « ‹Hessa gaason tani Iyorba7aame keeththa asaa bolla dhayo ehana. Isra7eele biittan Iyorba7aame keeththa asaappe aylle gidiin woykko goqa gidiin
1Kings14:11 Iyorba7aame zareppe kataman hayqqidayta kanay maana; gaxaren hayqqidayta kafoy maana; hayssa yootiday tana GODAA!› gides.
1Kings14:12 «Neni gidikko ha7i dendada neso ba. Neni katama gakkida mala naazi hayqqana.
1Kings14:13 Isra7eele ubbay naazas yeekkidi moogana; GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa sinththan Iyorba7aame keeththa asaappe ha naaza bolla xalla lo7o miishshi beettida gishshas wogan moogettanay iza xalla.
1Kings14:14 «Hessafe guye Iyorba7aame keeththa asaa dhayssiza kawo
1Kings14:15 Haaththa giddon qaaxxiza maqqa mala GODAY he wode Isra7eeleta shocidi qaaththana. Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossay misle essidi GODAA hanqeththida gishshas istta aawatas izi immida lo7o biittafe istta diggana; histtidi istta Efiraaxise Shaafappe he pinththan laallana.
1Kings14:16 Iyorba7aamey ooththida nagara gaasoninne Isra7eele asaa izi oosisida nagaraa gishshas GODAY Isra7eele yeggi aggana» gides.
1Kings14:17 Hessafe guye Iyorba7aame keeththa aaya denda baada Tirxxan ba keeththaa penge gakkida mala naazi hayqqides.
1Kings14:18 Nabe Akaya baggara GODAY yootida mala Isra7eele asay ubbay izas yeekkidi moogides.
1Kings14:19 Attida Iyorba7aame taarikey
1Kings14:20 Iyorba7aamey 22 layth kawotides; hessafe guye hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides. Izasohon iza naa Nadaabey kawotides.
1Kings14:21 Solomoone naa Erobi7aamey Yuhudan kawotides; Erobi7aamey kawotiza wode izas layththay 41. GODAY ba sunththay xeygettana mala Isra7eele qommota katamata ubbaa giddofe doorida Yerusalaame kataman Erobi7aamey 17 layth kawotides. Izas aayey sunththi Naa7imo; izakka Amoone biitta asa.
1Kings14:22 Yuhuda asati GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththida; bantti ooththida nagaran istti bantta aawatappe aaththidi GODAAPPE deexo hanqo ba bolla denththeththida.
1Kings14:23 Qasseka istti banttas goynniza dhoqqasohota
1Kings14:24 Haray attiin istti goynnizasohotan goyno woga ooththidi para laymateththa wogata poliza asati deettes. GODAY Isra7eeleta sinththafe kessi yedeththida kawoteththati meezetida mala harassiza oosota ubbaa Isra7eele asati ooththida.
1Kings14:25 Erobi7aamey kawotida ichchashanththo layththan Gibxe Kawo Shiishaaqi Yerusalaame katama bolla worajjides.
1Kings14:26 Histtidi Xoossa Keeththaninne kawo keeththan diza buquraa
1Kings14:27 Kawo Erobi7aamey he gondalleta gishshas xarqimalappe ha gondalleta oosisidi istta naagidi woththana mala kawo keeththaa naagiza zabeta halaqatas immides.
1Kings14:28 Kawozi Xoossa keeth biza wode ubbaan naagizayti gondalleta oykkeettes; heeppe simmidi istta zabeta halaqa keeththan zaari woththeettes.
1Kings14:29 Erobi7aamey ayssida ayso wogatinne izi ooththida ubbaa oosoti Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti uttida.
1Kings14:30 Erobi7aameynne Iyorba7aamey ba wode ubbaan ba giddon olettishe de7ida.
1Kings14:31 Erobi7aamey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; izi Dawite katamaan diza ba aawata duufon moogettides. Iza aayey sunththi Naa7imo; izakka Amoone biitta asa. Erobi7aame sohon izi naa Abiyay kawotides.
1Kings15:1 Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan Abiyay Yuhudan kawotides.
1Kings15:2 Abiyay Yerusalaamen heedzdzu layth kawotides; iza aayeya Abeseloome bolloto; izi sunththayka Ma7ikko.
1Kings15:3 Izi kase iza aaway ooththida nagara ubbaa ooththides; iza wozinay iza mayza Dawite wozinay kumeth ammanettida mala GODAA ba Xoossaas kumeth ammanettibeenna.
1Kings15:4 Gidikkoka izappe guye Yerusalaamen kawotana malanne Yerusalaame saroteththaa naagana mala GODAA iza Xoossay Dawite gishshas Abiyas issi attuma naa immides.
1Kings15:5 GODAY hessa ooththiday Dawiti Hiite as Ooriyo bolla ooththida nagarayppe attiin GODAA sinththan suure miish ooththides; ba de7o layth ubbaan GODAA azazotappe kare kezibeenna.
1Kings15:6 Abiyay kawotida layth ubbaan Abiya asaaranne Erobi7aame asaara bantta giddon olettishe de7ida.
1Kings15:7 Abiyay ooththida hara miishshati ubbay Yuhuda kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti uttida. Abiyaynne Iyorba7aamey bantta giddon olettishe de7ida.
1Kings15:8 Abiyay hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; izi Dawite kataman moogettides. Iza sohonkka iza naa Aasi kawotides.
1Kings15:9 Isra7eele kawo Iyorba7aamey kawotida nam7u tammanththa layththan Aasi Yuhudan kawotides.
1Kings15:10 Aasi Yerusalaamen 41 layth kawotides; iza aawaa aaya Abeseloome biyo Ma7ikko.
1Kings15:11 Aasi ba makakulle Dawiti ooththida mala GODAA sinththan suure miish ooththides.
1Kings15:12 Goyno woga polanaas para layma laymatizayta Aasi ba biittafe dhayssides; izappe kase de7ida kawoti ooththida eeqa xoossa misleta ubbaa dhoqqalereththi yeggides.
1Kings15:13 Iza aawa aaya Ma7ika Asheero geetettiza harassiza eeqa misle medhdhida gishshas godatteyntta geetettiza bonchchofe izo diggides. Aasi he eeqa misleza qanxxereththidi Qediroone Zullen xuuggides.
1Kings15:14 Aasi zumbullata bolla goynnizasohota ubbaa dhayssontta aggikokka izi ba de7ida layth ubbaan Xoossas wozinappe ammanettiza as gidi de7ides.
1Kings15:15 Izinne iza aaway Xoossas dummasi woththida biraa
1Kings15:16 Yuhuda Kawo Aasinne Isra7eele Kawo Baashey bantta de7o layth ubbaan olettishe de7ida.
1Kings15:17 Isra7eele Kawo Baashey Yuhuda bolla worajjidi Yuhuda kawo Aasa biitta gelontta malanne ke7ontta mala teqqanaas Eraama katama yuuyi aadhdhanaas miixa histti gimbides.
1Kings15:18 Hessa gaason Kawo Aasi GODAA Xoossa Keeththaninne ba kawoteththa keeththan attida worqqanne bira ubbaa kessidi ba oosanchchata kushen woththides. Histtidi Heziyoonaasa naa Xabrimoona naazas Damasqo kataman de7iza Aaraame kawo Beeni-Hadaades imota histti yeddides.
1Kings15:19 Histtidi izas
1Kings15:20 Beeni-Hadaadey kawo Aasi gida qaala ekkidi ba ola gadawata Isra7eele katamata olanaas yeddides; istti Iyoone
1Kings15:21 Kawo Baashey hessa siyidi Eraama katama gimbizayssa aggidi Tirxxa geetettiza katamaa guye simmides.
1Kings15:22 Hessafe guye Kawo Aasi Yuhudan de7iza asay ubbay attontta kezana mala awajjissides; Baashey kase heen go7ettiza shuchchaanne miththaa Eraamappe miiyida. Kawo Aasi Mixiphphaninne Biniyaame biittan de7iza Geeba izan minththi gimbides.
1Kings15:23 Aasi hanida hanotati
1Kings15:24 Aasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; ba makakulle Dawite katamankka moogettides. Iza naa Iyoosaafixey izasohon kawotides.
1Kings15:25 Yuhuda Kawo Aasi kawotida nam7anththo layth Iyorba7aame naa Nadaabey Isra7eelen kawotides; izi Isra7eele biittaa nam7u layth haarides.
1Kings15:26 Nadaabey kase ba aaway nagara ooththida Isra7eele asay nagara ooththana mala kaaleththides.
1Kings15:27 He wode Nadaabeynne iza olanchchati Filisxeemen diza Gabatoone katama dooddi dishin Yisakoore zare gidida Akaya naa Baashey Nadaabe bolla dendidi iza wodhides.
1Kings15:28 Yuhuda Kawo Aasi kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Baashey Nadaabe wodhidi izasohon kawotides.
1Kings15:29 Baashey kawotida mala Iyorba7aame soo asaa ubbaa wodhi wursides; GODAY Seeloppe yida ba ashkaraa nabe Akaya baggara yootida mala Iyorba7aame keeththa asay ubbay hayqqi wurides.
1Kings15:30 Hessi haniday Iyorba7aamey ba hu7en ooththida nagaraa gishshas
1Kings15:31 Nadaabey hanida hanotatinne izi ooththida oosoti ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti uttida.
1Kings15:32 Yuhuda Kawo Aasinne Isra7eele Kawo Baashey bantta layth ubbaan olettishe de7ida.
1Kings15:33 Yuhuda Kawo Aasi kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Akaya naa Baashey Isra7eele asaa ubbaa bolla kawotides; izi Tirxxa kataman 24 layth kawotides.
1Kings15:34 Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa ooththidinne iza ogen hemettidi Baashey GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
1Kings16:1 Hanaaniya naa Iyu baggara GODAA qaalay Baashe bolla hizgishe yides;
1Kings16:2 «Tani nena gudullafe denththada ta deraa Isra7eele bolla kawosadis; gido attiin neni Iyorba7aamey bida ogera baada ta dere Isra7eele nagara oosisadasa; histtada ta istta nagaran hanqettana mala tana denththeththadasa.
1Kings16:3 Hessa gishshas tani Baashenne iza keeththa asaa mulera dhayssana; tani ne keeththa asaa Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aame keeththa asaa mala ooththana.
1Kings16:4 Baashe zare kataman hayqqiza oonakka kanay maana; qasse gaxaren hayqqiza oonakka kafoy maana» gides.
1Kings16:5 Baashey hanida hanotay
1Kings16:6 Baashey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; Tirxxa kataman moogettides. Iza naa Eelay izasohon kawotides.
1Kings16:7 GODAY Hanaaniya naa nabe Iyu baggara Baashe bollanne iza soo asaa bolla tinbite yootida gaasoykka Baashey ooththida nagaraa gishshas
1Kings16:8 Yuhuda Kawo Aasi kawotida 26 layththan Baashe naa Eelay Isra7eelen kawotides. Tirxxa kataman izi nam7u layth kawotides.
1Kings16:9 Kawo shuumenne iza para-gaaretappe baggaa azaziza Zimirey kawo bolla makkallateththan dendides. He wode Kawo Eeli Tirxxan diza kawo keeththaas shuume gidi diza Arxxason maththotti dees.
1Kings16:10 Yuhuda kawo Aasi kawotida 27 layththan Zimirey Arxxaso gelidi kawo Eela wodhidi izasohon kawotides.
1Kings16:11 Zimirey kawotidi kawoteththa araatan uttida mala Baashe soo asaa ubbaa wodhides. Baashes dabbo gidiin woykko lagge gidiin issaadeka ashshibeenna.
1Kings16:12 Nabe Iyu baggara GODAY Baashe bolla haasayda qaalaa mala Zimirey Baashe soo asaa ubbaa wodhides.
1Kings16:13 Hessi haniday Baasheynne iza naa Eelay bantta eeqa xoossas goynon ooththida nagara ubbaa gaasoninne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagara gaason GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqeththida gishshassa.
1Kings16:14 Eelay hanida hara hanotatinne izi ooththida oosoti ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti uttides.
1Kings16:15 Yuhuda Kawo Aasi kawotida 27 layththan Zimirey Tirxxan laappun gallas xalla kawotides. He wode Isra7eele olanchchati Gabatoone geetettiza Filisxeeme katamaa dooddidi uttida.
1Kings16:16 Heen dooddi uttida Isra7eeleti Zimirey kawoza bolla dendidi iza wodhidayssa siyida mala ola gadawa Omire he gallassika he sohon Isra7eele bolla kawoththida.
1Kings16:17 Omireynne izara diza Isra7eele asay ubbay Gabatoone katamappe pude kezidi Tirxxa katamaa dooddida.
1Kings16:18 Katamazi oykettidayssa be7ida mala Zimirey kawo keeththaa giddon diza miixaan gelidi kawo keeththan tama oyththidi heen izan hayqqides.
1Kings16:19 Hessi haniday Iyorba7aamey ooththida nagaraanne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa kaallidi Zimirey GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththida gishshassa.
1Kings16:20 Zimirey hanida hara hanotinne izi ooththida makkalla oosoy ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti uttides.
1Kings16:21 He wode Isra7eele asay nam7u kezi shaakettides. Asaappe baggay Ginaate naa Tiibine kawoththana koyiin baggay qasse Omire kawoththanaas koyides.
1Kings16:22 Omire maaddiza asay Ginaate naa Tiibine maaddiza asaappe minnides. Hessa gishshas Tiibiney hayqqiin Omirey kawotides.
1Kings16:23 Yuhuda kawo Aasi kawotida 31 layththan Omirey Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotidi 12 layth haarides; histtidi 6 layth Tirxxa haarides.
1Kings16:24 Omirey Samaariyan diza zumbulla Shemereppe 6
1Kings16:25 Gido attiin Omirey GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; izi baappe kase de7ida kawota ubbatappeka aadhdhida nagara ooththides.
1Kings16:26 Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey ooththida nagaranne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa Omirey kaallides; he eeqa xoossaas goynniza hanotay GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqeththides.
1Kings16:27 Omirey hanida hara hanotay
1Kings16:28 Omirey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; Samaariya katamankka moogettides. Iza naa Akaabey izasohon kawotides.
1Kings16:29 Yuhuda kawo Aasi kawotida 38 layththan Omire naa Akaabey Isra7eelen kawotides; Omire naa Akaabey Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla 22 layth kawotides.
1Kings16:30 Omire naa Akaabey baappe kase wode de7ida kawota ubbatayssafekka aadhdhida iita miish GODAA sinththan ooththides.
1Kings16:31 Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey ooththida nagara laafa miish giidi qofo xalla gidontta Sidoonata kawo Etiba7aale nayo Elzabeelo baas machcho ekkidi Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossas haggazidessinne goynnides.
1Kings16:32 Samaariya kataman izi keexisida eeqa xoossa ba7aale keeththan yarsho yarshizaso keexxides.
1Kings16:33 Qasse Akaabey Asheero geetettiza xoossay misle essidi baappe kase de7ida kawota ubbatappe aaththidi GODAA Isra7eele Xoossaa hanqeththissiza nagara ooththides.
1Kings16:34 Akaabe kawoteththa wode Beeteleppe yida Hi7eeley Iyarkko katamaa zaari essides. Nawe naa Iyaaso baggara GODAY yootida mala Hi7eeley Iyarkko keexxanaas yoch yeggiza wode Abraame geetettiza izas bayra naazi hayqqides; gimbe pengeta gelththiza wode Sagube geetettiza izas wurseththa kaalo naazi hayqqides.
1Kings17:1 Gala7aaden Tesibe geetettizasoppe yida nabe Eelaasi kawo Akaabes
1Kings17:2 Hessafe simmiin GODAA qaalay nabe Eelaasakko yiidi izas
1Kings17:3 «Hayssafe dendada arshey mokkiza bagga ba; heen Yordaanoose Shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Korate shaafa matan qotetta.
1Kings17:4 Neni he shaafaappe haath uyana; quuroti nena heen quma mizana mala tani istta azazadis» gides.
1Kings17:5 Eelaasikka GODAY gida mala bides; Yordaanoose Shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Korate Shaafa biidi heen uttides.
1Kings17:6 Maaladonne omars quuroti ukeththinne asho Eelaasas ehida; haaththika he shaafappe uyishe de7ides.
1Kings17:7 Biittan iray bukkontta aggida gishshas guuththa wodeppe guye shaafazi melides.
1Kings17:8 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay Eelaasakko yiidi
1Kings17:9 «Hayssafe dendada Sidoonan diza Sirafta baada heen de7aashsha. Issi am7e maccassaya nena quma mizana mala tani azazadis» gides.
1Kings17:10 Hessafe guye Eelaasi dendidi Sirafta bides; izi biidi katamaa penge gakkida mala issi am7e maccassaya mith maxizaaro demmides; Eelaasi izo xeygidi
1Kings17:11 Maccassiya haaththaa ehanaas bishin izi izo xeygidi
1Kings17:12 Histtiin maccassaya izas
1Kings17:13 Eelaasikka maccassays zaaridi
1Kings17:14 Gaasoykka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
1Kings17:15 Maccassiyakka baada Eelaasi yootida mala ooththadus; hessa malan Eelaasi
1Kings17:16 Ays giikko GODAY Eelaasa baggara yootida qaalaa mala otoppe dhiilley wuribeennanne xaaroppe zaytey mulekka wuribeenna.
1Kings17:17 Guuththa wodeppe guye he am7ey nay hargides; hargezi minni minni biin naazi hayqqides.
1Kings17:18 Maccassaya Eelaasa
1Kings17:19 Eelaasikka izis zaaridi
1Kings17:20 Histtidi GODAAS
1Kings17:21 Hessafe simmidi naaza bolla heedzdzuto zaqullidi GODAAS
1Kings17:22 Histtiin GODAY Eelaasa waaso siyides. Naaza shemppoyka simmiin naazi paxides.
1Kings17:23 Eelaasi naaza ekkidi pooqezappe duge wodhdhides; naaza aayeys immidi
1Kings17:24 Hessafe guye mishireya Eelaasa
1Kings18:1 Iray dhayoosofe heedzdzanththo layththan
1Kings18:2 Histtiin Eelaasi Akaabes beettanaas dendi bides. He wode Samaariyan wolqqama koshay dees.
1Kings18:3 Akaabey ba kawoteththa keeththan alaafeteththan azaziza Abdiyu xeygides. Abdiyuy GODAAS keehi yayyiza asa.
1Kings18:4 Elzabeela GODAA nabeta wodhisiza wode Abdiyuy isttafe xeetata ekkidi nam7u kessi shaakkides; ichchash tammata issi gongolon hankko attida ichchash tammata hara gongolon efi qottidi kaththinne haath isttas immishe gam7ides.
1Kings18:5 Akaabey Abdiyu xeygidi
1Kings18:6 Hessa gishshas ba baanaaso baanaaso shaaketti bida; Akaabey issi baggara barkka bides; qasse Abdiyuykka hara baggara bides.
1Kings18:7 Abdiyuy bishe oge bolla Eelaasara gayttides. Abdiyuy Eelaasa gididayssa eridi biitta bolla gufannidi
1Kings18:8 Eelaasi izas
1Kings18:9 Histtiin Abdiyuy Eelaasas
1Kings18:10 Ne GODAY de7o Xoossay beyiin ta goday nena koyssanaas kiittontta derey woykko kawoteththi mulekka baawa. Istti
1Kings18:11 Ha7i tani ta godaakko baada
1Kings18:12 Tani neeppe shaaketta biza wode GODAA Ayanay nena denththidi awa efanaakko ta erikke; tani Akaabes yootidaappe guye izi nena demmontta aggiko tana wodhana; tani ne ashkaray naateththafe doommada GODAAS yayyiza asa.
1Kings18:13 Elzabeela GODAA sunththan tinbite yootizayta wodhisiza wode tani isttafe xeetu asata ekkada ichchash tammu ichchash tammu issi gongolon qottada quma mizadissinne haaththika ushshadis. Histtiin hessa tani ooththidayssa neni ta goday siyabeekkii?
1Kings18:14 Ha7i tani ta godaakko baada
1Kings18:15 Eelaasikka izas
1Kings18:16 Abdiyuy Akaabera gayttanaas biidi Akaabes yootiin Akaabey Eelaasara gayttanaas bides.
1Kings18:17 Akaabey Eelaasa demmidi
1Kings18:18 Eelaasi Akaabes
1Kings18:19 Ha7i Isra7eele asaa ubbaa Qarmeloose zumaa bolla tanara gayttana mala xeyga; qasse Elzabeeli maaddafe mizayta 450 ba7aale nabetanne 400 Asheeri nabeta shiishsha» gides.
1Kings18:20 Hessa gishshas Akaabey kiittidi Isra7eele asaa ubbaanne nabeta Qarmeloose zumaa bolla shiishshides.
1Kings18:21 Eelaasi shiiqida asaakko biidi
1Kings18:22 Hessafe guye Eelaasi deraas
1Kings18:23 Ane nuus nam7u korma boorata immite; he kormatappe issaa istti dooretto; kormaa shukkidi qanxxereththetto; histtidi ashoza miththa bolla woththetto; gido attiin tama eeththofetto. Tanikka nam7anththo kormaa giigsada miththaa bolla woththana; histtada tamakka eeththike.
1Kings18:24 Intte intte xoossaa sunth xeygite; tanikka GODAAKKO woossana; sunththaa xeygiin siyidi yarshoza miza tamaa kiittizayssi Xoos gido» gides. Histtiin asay
1Kings18:25 Hessa gishshas Eelaasi Ba7aale nabetas
1Kings18:26 Istti baas imettida kormaa ekkidi giigsida. Maaladoppe seeta gallas gakkanaas Ba7aale sunththaa xeygidi
1Kings18:27 Sa7ay seeta gallas gidiin Eelaasi
1Kings18:28 Hessa gishshas bantta qaala dhoqqu histtidi woossida. Qasse kase bantta goynniza wogaa mala bantta bollara suuththay goggana gakkanaas tooraninne mashshan bana madunththida.
1Kings18:29 Seeta gallassi aadhdhiin omarsa yarsho shiishshiza wodey gakkanaas istti happanne buura tinbite haasayda shin aykko zaarokka demmibeettenna; istta cenggurssaa siyidi zaaro immizay baawa.
1Kings18:30 Histtiin Eelaasi ubba asaas
1Kings18:31 GODAA qaalay Yaaqoobekko yiidi
1Kings18:32 Histtidi GODAA sunththas he shuchchatan yarshosoho gimbides; yarsho yarshizasoza yuuyi aadhdhanaas tammanne oyddu litiro haath oykkiza olla bookkides.
1Kings18:33 Hessafe guye yarsho yarshizasoza bolla mith giigsi woththidi kormaa ashoza qommon qommon qanxxereththidi miththaa bolla woththides. Histtidi asaa
1Kings18:34 Zaaridikka Eelaasi asay
1Kings18:35 Haaththay yarsho yarshizaso ollaa kumi goggides.
1Kings18:36 Omarsa wode yarsho shiishshiza wodey gakkiin nabe Eelaasi yarshosoho shiiqidi
1Kings18:37 Abeet GODAWU! Neni GODAY tuma Xoossaa gididayssanne neni istta wozinaa neekko zaaro bolla dizayssa ha asay erana mala neni ta woosa siya; siyadakka taas zaaro imma!» gides.
1Kings18:38 Histtiin GODAA tamay wodhdhidi xuuggiza yarsho
1Kings18:39 Asay ubbay hessa be7ida wode gufannidi
1Kings18:40 Hessafe guye Eelaasi isttas
1Kings18:41 Eelaasi Akaabes
1Kings18:42 Hessa gishshas Akaabey maanaassinne uyanaas bides. Gido attiin Eelaasi Qarmeloose zumaa xeera kezidi ba hu7e gulbateta giddo duge gelththidi xuggunides.
1Kings18:43 Hessafe guye Eelaasi ba ashkaraa
1Kings18:44 Ashkarazi laappunththozan
1Kings18:45 Guuth gam7ishin ira shaaray salo dhippi histtides; carkoy carkides; wolqqama iraykka bukkides. Akaabey para-gaaren uttidi Izra7eele katama bides.
1Kings18:46 GODAA wolqqay Eelaasa bolla wodhdhides; Eelaasi ba may7o pude marxxidi Izra7eele katama gakkanaas Akaabeppe sinththan sinththan woxxides.
1Kings19:1 Eelaasi ooththida ooso ubbaa
1Kings19:2 Histtiin Elzabeela
1Kings19:3 Histtiin Eelaasi babbidi ba shemppo ashshanaas Yuhuda biittan diza Bersaabehe gakkanaas betides; ba ashkaraakka heen aggides.
1Kings19:4 Issi gallassa oge bazzon hemettides. Bishe sankkara miththa kuwa garsan uttidi
1Kings19:5 Hessafe guye sankkara kuwan ichchidi dhiskides; izi heen dhiskon dishin issi kiitanchchay iza bochchidi
1Kings19:6 Histtiin dendidi izi xeelliza wode seelan uukettida kompanne otora diza haath ba hu7esoppe demmides; izappe mi uyidaappe guyen simmi dhiskides.
1Kings19:7 GODAA kiitanchchay nam7anththoka yi Eelaasa beegoththidi
1Kings19:8 Histtiin Eelaasi dendidi midessinne uyides. Eelaasi kaththaa mi minnidi Xoossa zuma Korebe gakkanaas oyddu tammu gallassinne oyddu tammu omars hemettides.
1Kings19:9 Heen diza gongolo giddo gelidi aqides. GODAA qaalay izakko yiidi
1Kings19:10 Histtiin Eelaasi
1Kings19:11 GODAY izas
1Kings19:12 Biitta qaaththaafe simmiin tamay kezides; gido attiin GODAY tamaa giddon deenna. Tamaappe simmiin saasukeththa cenggurssi siyettides.
1Kings19:13 Eelaasi hessa siyidi ba may7ida hashe may7on ba ayfeso kammides. Histtidi kare kezi gongoloza pengen eqqides. Hessafe guye
1Kings19:14 Eelaasi zaaridi
1Kings19:15 Histtiin GODAY Eelaasas zaaridi
1Kings19:16 Qasseka Nimishe naa Iyu Isra7eele bolla kawotana mala tiya. Hessaththoka ne sohon nabe gidana mala Aabeeli-Mahoole dere as Saafaaxe naa Elssa7e tiya.
1Kings19:17 Azaheele mashshafe kessi ekki attidayssa Iyuy wodhana; qasse Iyu mashshafe kessi ekki attidayssa Elssa7i wodhana.
1Kings19:18 Ba7aales gulbatonttaytanne ba doonan Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa misleza yeerontta attida 7
1Kings19:19 Eelaasi heeppe dendi bishin Saafaaxe naa Elssa7i tammanne nam7u waaxa booran goyishin demmides; tammanne nam7anththa waaxa booratan Elssa7i goyees. Eelaasi izakko shiiqidi ba hashe may7o iza bolla yeggides.
1Kings19:20 Elssa7i boorata aggidi Eelaasakko woxxi biidi
1Kings19:21 Hessa gishshas Elssa7i aggi guye simmidi nam7u boorata shukkides; boora miishshata qeridi izan ashoza doyssides; he kaxxida ashoza deraas aaththiin asay mides. Hessafe guye dendi biidi Eelaasa kaallidessinne Eelaasa maaddides.
1Kings20:1 Aaraame Kawo Beeni-Hadaadey ba olanchchata ubbaa issife shiishshides. Heedzdzu tammanne nam7u kawotan
1Kings20:2 Gede katamaa giddo Isra7eele kawo Akaabekko qasttanneta kiittiin istti biidi
1Kings20:3 «Beeni-Hadaadey
1Kings20:4 Histtiin Isra7eele kawoykka zaaridi
1Kings20:5 Qasseka qasttanneti nam7anththo yiidi
1Kings20:6 Hessaththoka wonto hanni wode ne kawoteththa keeththaanne ne shuumeta keeth qociri xeellana mala ta shuumeta yeddana. Isttika nees dees giza payya miish ba kushe yeddi ekkana› gides» gida.
1Kings20:7 Isra7eele kawoy he biitta cimata ubbaa xeygi shiishshidi
1Kings20:8 Histtiin cimatinne derezi ubbay Akaabe
1Kings20:9 Hessa gishshas Beeni-Hadaadey kiittida qasttannetas Akaabey
1Kings20:10 Hessafe guye Beeni-Hadaadey hara qasttanneta yeddidi
1Kings20:11 Isra7eele kawoy kiitetti yidaytas
1Kings20:12 Beeni-Hadaadeynne kawoti bantta dunkaaneta giddon ushshu uyishe hessa he kiitaa siyida; kawo Beeni-Hadaadey ba olanchchata
1Kings20:13 He wode issi nabey Isra7eele Kawo Akaabekko biidi
1Kings20:14 Akaabey
1Kings20:15 Hessa gishshas Akaabey awuraajjan azaziza 232 ola gadawata shiishshides. Qasse attida 7
1Kings20:16 Beeni-Hadaadey bana maaddiza 32 kawotara issife dunkaanen utti uyishe maththotti dishin seeta gallas Isra7eele olanchchati olas kezida.
1Kings20:17 Awuraajjan azaziza yelaga mokkonneti olaas koyro kezi bida. Beeni-Hadaadey yuuyi wochchizayta kiittiin istti simmidi izas
1Kings20:18 Beeni-Hadaadeykka
1Kings20:19 Awuraajjan azaziza yelaga mokkonneti katamaappe gaxa kezida; Isra7eele olanchchatikka istta kaallidi kezida.
1Kings20:20 Ubbatikka banara tiran gayttida morkketa ubbaa wodhida. Histtiin Aaraame asay baqatiin Isra7eele asay kaalli kaallidi istta yedeththides. Qasse Aaraame kawo Beeni-Hadaadey toga asatara ba paran kessi ekkidi bides.
1Kings20:21 Isra7eele kawo Akaabey olaa sinth sinth sugi biidi paratanne para-gaareta di7i ekkides; Aaraame asaakka dippi histtides.
1Kings20:22 Hessafe guye nabezi Isra7eele kawookko yiidi
1Kings20:23 He wode Aaraame kawo zoriza shuumeti
1Kings20:24 Ha7i gidikko issi miish ooththa; kawota ubbaa istta kawoteththaafe denththada isttasohon hara woththa.
1Kings20:25 Nuni Isra7eeletara demban olettanaassinne xoonanaas dandayana mala nees kase wurida olanchchata sohon olanchchata
1Kings20:26 Yiza layththa ofinththi gakkiin Beeni-Hadaadey Aaraame olanchchata shiishshidi Isra7eeletara olettanaas Afeeqe geetettiza katama bides.
1Kings20:27 Isra7eele olanchchatikka shinqenne ola miish ekkidi isttara olettanaas nam7u butte gididi kezida. Aaraame olanchchati biittaa gadaa may7i uttiin Isra7eele olanchchati gidikko nam7u guuththa deysha wudeta mala isttafe sinththa baggara dunkaani uttida.
1Kings20:28 Xoossa nabe issoy Isra7eele kawozaakko biidi
1Kings20:29 Aaraametinne Isra7eele asay issoy issaakko simmi zamadi uttidi laappun gallas gakkanaas gam7ides. Laappunththa gallassan ola oykettidi he gallas Isra7eele asay Aaraame asaappe 100
1Kings20:30 Isttafe attidayti Afeeqe katama baqatida; heen katamaa gimbey 27
1Kings20:31 Iza shuumeti iza
1Kings20:32 Histtiin istti maaqa may7idi
1Kings20:33 Asay izi gida qaalaa ellesi lo7o qofan ekkidi
1Kings20:34 Beeni-Hadaadey Akaabe
1Kings20:35 Nabeta naytappe issoy GODAA qaalas azazettidi ba laggeza
1Kings20:36 Hessa gishshas nabezi iza
1Kings20:37 Nabezi hara as demmidi
1Kings20:38 Hessafe guye nabezi oge bolla bi eqqidi kawoza naago doommides; erettontta mala ba hu7e quraace birshidi ba sinth kammides.
1Kings20:39 Kawoy ogaara kanththi bishin nabezi kawoza
1Kings20:40 Taas ne ashkarazas oosoy dariin tani yaanne haa gishin addezi kessi ekki bichchides» gides. Histtiin Isra7eele kawoy
1Kings20:41 Nabezi ba sinth kammida quraaceza qaari yeggides; Isra7eele kawozi he addezi nabetappe issaa gididayssa heerakka erides.
1Kings20:42 Nabezi kawozas
1Kings20:43 Histtiin Isra7eele kawoy yiillotishenne hanqettishe Samaariya kataman diza ba kawoteththa keeth simmides.
1Kings21:1 Izra7eele dere as Naabutes Samaariya Kawo Akaabe keeththa matan woyne tokkizasohoy dees.
1Kings21:2 Akaabey Naabutes
1Kings21:3 Histtiin Naabutey Akaabes
1Kings21:4 Izra7eele as Naabutey
1Kings21:5 Iza machcha Elzabeela izakko gelada
1Kings21:6 Akaabey izis
1Kings21:7 Iza machcha Elzabeela izas
1Kings21:8 Hessa gishshas Elzabeela Akaabe sunththan dabdaabbe xaafada iza maatamen shocada Naabutey diza katamaan diza cimatassinne shuumetas yeddadus.
1Kings21:9 He dabdaabeza giddon
1Kings21:10 Hessafe guye wordo markka nam7ata iza sinththan utisite; isttas
1Kings21:11 Hessa gishshas Naabutey diza katamaan diza cimatinne shuumeti Elzabeela isttas xaafida dabdaabbeza mala polida.
1Kings21:12 Isttika issi gallassa xooma awajjidi Naabute asaa giddon bonchcho sohon utisida.
1Kings21:13 Hessafe guye wordo markka nam7ati yiidi iza sinththan uttida; histtidi deraa sinththan
1Kings21:14 Hessafe guye cimati Elzabeelikko kiittidi
1Kings21:15 Naabutey shuchchan cadetti hayqqoyssa Elzabeela siyida mala Akaabes
1Kings21:16 Izra7eele as Naabutey hayqqidayssa Akaabey siyidi Naabute woyne tokkizasohoza baas ekkanaas dendidi duge bides.
1Kings21:17 Hessafe guye Tesibe as Eelaasakko GODAA qaalay yiidi
1Kings21:18 «Samaariyan kawotida Isra7eele Kawo Akaabera gayttanaas duge wodhdha. Izi ha7i Naabutey woyne tokkizasohoza ekkanaas biidi heen dees.
1Kings21:19 Neni izas
1Kings21:20 Akaabeykka Eelaasas zaaridi
1Kings21:21 GODAY nena
1Kings21:22 Neni Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisida gishshassinne tana hanqeththida gishshas tani ne soo asaa Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aame soo asaa malanne Akaya naa Baashe soo asaa mala ooththana› gees.
1Kings21:23 «Qasseka GODAY Elzabeeli gishshas
1Kings21:24 Akaabe zareppe katama giddon hayqqida oonakka kanay maana; qasse gaxaren hayqqidayta salo kafoti maana» gides.
1Kings21:25 Iza machcha Elzabeela denththeththiin GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththanaas banateththaa nagaras bayzida Akaabe mala asi mulekka deenna.
1Kings21:26 GODAY Isra7eele asaa sinththafe gooddi kessida Amooreti ooththida mala izikka eeqa xoossata goynon keehi harassiza tuna miishshata ooththides.
1Kings21:27 Akaabey ha yo7oza siyida mala ba may7o pooshshi yeggidi maaqa may7i xoomides. Maaqaa may7ida mala ichchides; ceecishekka yuuyides.
1Kings21:28 Hessafe guye GODAA qaalay Tesibe as Eelaasakko yiidi
1Kings21:29 «Akaabey banateththaa ta sinththan wostti kawushshidaakko be7ay? Izi ta sinththan banateththaa kawushshida gishshas tani ha metoza iza woden iza bolla ehikke. Gido attiin tani iza naa woden iza soo asaa bolla ha metoza ehana» gides.
1Kings22:1 Aaraameynne Isra7eeley ba garsan ola olettontta heedzdzu layth saron de7ida.
1Kings22:2 Heedzdzanththo layththan Yuhuda kawo Iyoosaafixey Isra7eele kawo be7anaas bides.
1Kings22:3 Isra7eele kawoy ba shuumetas
1Kings22:4 Qasseka izi Iyoosaafixe
1Kings22:5 Qasseka Iyoosaafixey Isra7eele kawos
1Kings22:6 Isra7eele kawoy tinbite yootiza oyddu xeetu nabeta shiishshidi
1Kings22:7 Iyoosaafixey zaaridi
1Kings22:8 Isra7eele kawo Iyoosaafixes zaaridi
1Kings22:9 Hessafe guye Isra7eele kawoy ba shuumetappe issaa xeygidi
1Kings22:10 Isra7eele kawoynne Yuhuda kawo Iyoosaafixey bantta kawoteththa may7o may7idi
1Kings22:11 Isttafe issoy Kin7aane naa Saadooqey biratappe kaceta giigsidi Akaabes
1Kings22:12 Hankko nabeti ubbayka
1Kings22:13 Hessafe guye Mikiyaasa xeyganaas kiitetti bida addezi iza
1Kings22:14 Gido attiin Mikiyaasi he addezas
1Kings22:15 Mikiyaasi kawozaakko gakkida mala kawozi iza
1Kings22:16 Kawozi gidikko izas
1Kings22:17 Mikiyaasi
1Kings22:18 Isra7eele kawo Iyoosaafixey
1Kings22:19 Mikiyaasi zaaridi
1Kings22:20 GODAY
1Kings22:21 Wurseththan issi ayanay kezi GODAA sinththan eqqidi
1Kings22:22 «GODAY ayanaza
1Kings22:23 Hessa gishshas Mikiyaasi
1Kings22:24 Hessafe guye Kin7aane naa Sedeqiyaasi shiiqidi Mikiyaasa shagalan baqa shaayidi
1Kings22:25 Mikiyaasikka zaaridi
1Kings22:26 Hessafe guye Isra7eele kawoy ba olanchchatappe issaa azazishe
1Kings22:27 Histtidi kawozi
1Kings22:28 Mikiyaasi izas
1Kings22:29 Hessafe guye Isra7eele kawo Akaabeynne Yuhuda kawo Iyoosaafixey Gala7aaden diza Eramoote katama bida.
1Kings22:30 Isra7eele kawoy Iyoosaafixes
1Kings22:31 Aaraame kawoy ba para-gaareta azaziza 32 shuumeta
1Kings22:32 Para-gaareta azazizayti Iyoosaafixe be7ida mala
1Kings22:33 Izi waassiin para-gaareta azazizayti izi Isra7eele kawoza gidonttayssa eridi iza gooddizayssa aggida.
1Kings22:34 Issaadey coo ba wondafe olanchchata bolla yeddiin Isra7eele kawozas ola may7oy gayttizasora dukkides; hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawoy ba gaareza laaggizayssas
1Kings22:35 He gallas olay suullishe pe7iin Isra7eele kawo Akaabey ba para-gaare giddon zemppidi Aaraame asaa sinththan takkides. Iza suuththay para-gaareza bolla gukkishin he gallassa omars kawozi hayqqides.
1Kings22:36 Arshey wullanaas matishin ola asaa giddon
1Kings22:37 Hessafe guye istti kawoza Samaariya katama efidi moogida.
1Kings22:38 Laymatizayti meecettiza eele haaththan para-gaareza meeccida. GODAY kase yootida qaala malakka iza suuththaa kanati laaccida.
1Kings22:39 Akaabey hanida hara hanoti
1Kings22:40 Akaabey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Akaziyaasi izasohon kawotides.
1Kings22:41 Isra7eele kawo Akaabey kawotida oydanththo layththan Aasa naa Iyoosaafixey Yuhudan kawotides.
1Kings22:42 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 35; izi Yerusalaamen 25 layth kawotides; iza aayeya Shilihe naa Azubbo geetettawus.
1Kings22:43 Iyoosaafixey ba aawaa Aasa oge ubbaa kaallides; izi he ogeppe sher7i gibeenna; GODAA sinththan suure miish ooththides. Gidikkoka dhoqqasohon diza eeqas goynnizasohota dhayssibeenna; asay he sohotan yarsho shiishonne exaane cuwaseth aggibeenna.
1Kings22:44 Iyoosaafixey Isra7eele kawora sigan de7ides.
1Kings22:45 Iyoosaafixey hanida hara hanoti
1Kings22:46 Eeqa xoossata keeththan para layma laymatizayta kase iza aawa Aasi dhayssishin attidayta biittafe dhayssides.
1Kings22:47 He wode Eedoome biittan kawoy baawa; he biittay Yuhuda kawoy woththidaaden haarettees.
1Kings22:48 Ofire biitta biidi worqqa ehana mala Iyoosaafixey gita markabeta medhdhides; gido attiin he markabeti Eexiyoon-Gaabiren meqqi attida gishshas mulekka hee baana dandaybeettenna.
1Kings22:49 He wode Akaabe naa Akaziyaasi Iyoosaafixes
1Kings22:50 Iyoosaafixey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides. Istti moogettida ba aawaa Dawite katamaan moogettides. Iza naa Iyoraamey izasohon kawotides.
1Kings22:51 Yuhuda Kawo Iyoosaafixey kawotida tammanne laappunththa layththan Akaabe naa Akaziyaasi Isra7eele bolla Samaariyan kawotides; Isra7eele 2 layth haarides.
1Kings22:52 Akaziyaasi GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; izikka ba aawa
1Kings22:53 Akaziyaasi kase iza aaway ooththidayssaththo izikka Ba7aales ooththidessinne goynnides; izi hessankka GODAY
2Kings1:1 Akaabey hayqqidaappe guye Mo7aabe derey Isra7eele dere bolla dendides.
2Kings1:2 He wode Akaziyaasi Samaariyan diza ba ilpinne pooqe bollafe maskootera duge kundidi sakettides; hessa gishshas izi
2Kings1:3 GODAA kiitanchchay Tesibe dere as nabe Eelaasas
2Kings1:4 Hessa gishshas GODAY
2Kings1:5 Kiitetti bida asati kawozaakko guye simmi yiin izi isttas
2Kings1:6 Isttika izas
2Kings1:7 Kawozikka isttas
2Kings1:8 Isttika izas
2Kings1:9 Hessafe guye kawozi hamsa halaqaza ichchash tammu wottadaratara Eelaasakko yeddides. Hamsa halaqazi Eelaasi diza zumbulla hu7e kezidi
2Kings1:10 Eelaasikka zaaridi hamsa halaqazas
2Kings1:11 Kawozi qasse hara hamsa halaqanne ichchash tammu wottadarata kiittides; hamsa halaqazikka
2Kings1:12 Eelaasikka zaaridi
2Kings1:13 Hessa gishshas kawozi heedzdzanththo hamsa halaqazanne izara 50 as yeddides; ha heedzdzanththo hamsa halaqazi biidi Eelaasa sinththan gulbatidi
2Kings1:14 Hayssafe kase saloppe wodhdhida tamay nam7u hamsa halaqatanne isttara diza asata ubbaa mides; ha7i gidikko ta shemppiya ne sinththan bonchchettu» gides.
2Kings1:15 GODAA kiitanchchazi Eelaasa
2Kings1:16 Izi kawozas
2Kings1:17 Hessa gishshas Eelaasi izas yootida GODAA qaala mala Akaziyaasi hayqqides. Akaziyaasas attuma nay baynda gishshas Iyoosaafixe naa Iraamey Yuhuda dere bolla kawotida nam7anththo layththan iza isha Iyoraamey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings1:18 Akaziyaasi ba woden ooththida oosotinne izi polida oosoti ubbayka Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings2:1 GODAY Eelaasa gote carkora pude salo efana wodey gakkiin Eelaasinne Elssa7i Gelgelappe dendidi issife bishe deettes.
2Kings2:2 Eelaasi Elssa7es
2Kings2:3 Beetelen diza nabeta maabaray Elssa7ekko biidi
2Kings2:4 Qasseka Eelaasi Elssa7es
2Kings2:5 Iyarkkon diza nabeta maabaray Elssa7ekko shiiqidi
2Kings2:6 Hessafe guye Eelaasi
2Kings2:7 Nabeta maabara garsafe ichchash tammay biidi Eelaasinne Elssa7i eqqi dizaso ginara Yordaanoose pinththan haakki eqqida.
2Kings2:8 Eelaasi ba kaabba qaari ekkidinne xaaxidi izara haaththaa shocides; hessafe guye haaththay hadirsinne ushach shaaketti wodhdhides. Nam7ayka booluma biittara pinnida.
2Kings2:9 Istti pinni kezidaappe guye Eelaasi Elssa7e
2Kings2:10 Eelaasikka
2Kings2:11 Istti haasayshe loddara bishin tama para-gaaretinne tama parati istti qoppontta dishin istta giddon gelidi nam7atakka shaakki yeggida; Eelaasi gote carkon pude salo bides.
2Kings2:12 Elssa7i hessa be7idi
2Kings2:13 Eelaasappe wodhdhida kaabbaza ekkidinne guye simmi biidi Yordaanoose shaafa achchan eqqides.
2Kings2:14 Eelaasappe wodhdhida kaabbaan haaththaa shocishe
2Kings2:15 Iyarkkofe biidi hessa be7ida bagga nabeti
2Kings2:16 Hessafe guye
2Kings2:17 Hanenna guussi iza yeellachchana gakkanaas iza un7eththida; hessa gishshas
2Kings2:18 Istti Iyarkkon diza Elssa7ekko simmiin izi isttas
2Kings2:19 He katamayn diza asay Elssa7e
2Kings2:20 Izikka isttas
2Kings2:21 Hessafe guye izi pultto haaththi dizaso biidi pulttozan maxine yeggidi
2Kings2:22 Elssa7i gida malakka haaththazi hach gakkanaas paxi attides.
2Kings2:23 Elssa7i heeppe dendi Beetele kezides; izi buro bishe ogen dishin katamappe kezida naateththati
2Kings2:24 Elssa7ikka guye simmi istta xeellidi GODAA sunththan istta qanggides; hessafe guye nam7u macca zardoti worappe kezidi naateththa naytappe oyddu tammanne nam7ata menththereththi yeggida.
2Kings2:25 Izi pude Qarmeloose zumaa bolla kezides; heeppe Samaariya simmides.
2Kings3:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyoosaafixey kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan Akaabe naa Iyoraamey Isra7eele bolla Samaariyan kawotidi 12 layth haarides.
2Kings3:2 Izi GODAA sinththan ixettida daro iita miish ooththides; he iita oosozikka kase iza aayanne iza aaway ooththida iita oosoza mala gidenna; iza aaway oosisida ba7aale hawulteza diggides.
2Kings3:3 Gido attiin Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaran izi oykettides; izappeka shaakettibeenna.
2Kings3:4 He wode Mo7aabe kawo Meshay haarees; izi 100
2Kings3:5 Akaabey hayqqidaappe guye Mo7aabe kawoy Isra7eele kawo bolla makkallides.
2Kings3:6 Hessa gishshas he wode kawo Iyoraamey Samaariyappe dendi biidi Isra7eele asaa ubbaa issi bolla shiishshides.
2Kings3:7 Yuhuda kawo Iyoosaafixes
2Kings3:8 Iyoosaafixey
2Kings3:9 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawoy
2Kings3:10 Isra7eele kawozi
2Kings3:11 Iyoosaafixey gidikko
2Kings3:12 Iyoosaafixeykka zaaridi
2Kings3:13 Elssa7ikka Isra7eele kawos
2Kings3:14 Elssa7ikka izas
2Kings3:15 Ane ha7i taas bagana diixxizayssa ekki yiite» gides. Baganaa diixxizay diixxishin GODAA kushey Elssa7e bolla yides.
2Kings3:16 Elssa7i
2Kings3:17 Carkoka
2Kings3:18 Hayssi GODAAS laafa miishsha. Izi Mo7aabe asaa intte kushen aaththi immana.
2Kings3:19 «Gimbettida katamatanne lo7iza istta katamata ubbaa intte xooni oykkana. Lo7iza istta miththata intte qanxxana; istta pulttotakka mulera intte tuccana; kath lo7eththi immiza gadeza intte shuchchan moorana» gides.
2Kings3:20 Wonteththa gallas yarshoy yarshettiza saaten Eedoome baggara haaththi di7o mala yiin biittaya haath xalla gidadus.
2Kings3:21 He wode kawoti istta olanaas yidayssa Mo7aabe asay ubbay siyidi nay gidiin cimay ola miish oykkanaas dandayza ubbay xeygetti kezidi bantta zawa bolla eqqidi naago oykkida.
2Kings3:22 Wonteththa gallas maalado wonttara istti dendishin haaththaa bolla wodhdhida xalqqey xolqides; pinththan diza Mo7aabe derezas ayfen haaththi suuththa mala zo7i beettides.
2Kings3:23 Hessa gishshas isttas
2Kings3:24 Mo7aabe asay Isra7eele asay dizaso kezishin Isra7eele asay dendidi istta olides; Mo7aabeti istta sinththafe baqatida; hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Mo7aabe bolla worajjidi istta dippi histtides.
2Kings3:25 Istta katamata mulera dhayssida; lo7o kaththa gadetikka shuchchan kamettana gakkanaas issoy issoy issi issi shuch gadezan yeggides; pulttotakka mulera tuccida; lo7o lo7o miththata ubbaaka qanxxi qanxxi yeggida; Qiire-Hereesete geetettizaara xalla ba shuchchara attadus; izo gidikkoka yanbarshan olettiza olanchchati giddoththidi olida.
2Kings3:26 Mo7aabe kawoy iza ola asay xoonettanayssa erida mala giththa mashsha gixxida 700 as banara ekkidi Eedoome kawoy dizaso menththi gelanaas dafettides; gido attiin istti gida mala isttas hanibeenna.
2Kings3:27 Hessafe guye izappe kaalli kawotanayssa baas bayra naaza ekki biidi katamay gimbeza bolla xuugettiza yarsho histti yarshides; Isra7eele bolla wolqqama hanqoy gakkides; histtiin istti heeppe kezidi guye ba dere simmida.
2Kings4:1 Nabeta maabara garsafe issaa machcheya
2Kings4:2 Elssa7ikka izis
2Kings4:3 Elssa7ikka izis
2Kings4:4 Ne nayta ubbatara soo gelada kare intte bolla gorda; zaytezakka ne garxxa ehida otota ubbaan duuqqa; issi issi otoy kumida mala issi baggan woththa» gides.
2Kings4:5 Hessa gishshas iza nabeza heen agga baada soo gelada kare ba bollanne ba nayta bolla gordadus; nayti izis otota shiishshiin iza zayteza tigeth doommadus.
2Kings4:6 Ototi ubbay kumidaappe guye iza ba naaza
2Kings4:7 Izakka baada hessa Xoossa nabezas yootadus; izi izis
2Kings4:8 Issi gallas Elssa7i Suneme bides; heen issi dure maccassi daara dawus; Elssa7i izi soon quma maana mala minththa woossadus; izi kase heera aadhdhi biza wode quma maanaas izi soo gelees.
2Kings4:9 He maccassaya ba azinaas
2Kings4:10 Hessa gishshas bolla pooqen issi guuththa kifileyn nu izas hiiththa
2Kings4:11 Issi gallas Elssa7i yiidi ba shempiza kifileyn gelidi shempanaas geddi gides.
2Kings4:12 Ba aylleza Giyaaze
2Kings4:13 Elssa7i
2Kings4:14 Elssa7ikka Giyaazes
2Kings4:15 Elssa7ikka izas
2Kings4:16 Elssa7ikka izis
2Kings4:17 Maccassayakka qanththatadus; Elssa7i izis yootida malakka izi gida woden attuma naa yeladus.
2Kings4:18 Naazikka diccides; issi gallas iza aaway kath shiishshizaytara dishin naazi hee bides.
2Kings4:19 Izi ba aawaas
2Kings4:20 Ashkarazikka naaza ba7i efidi aayeykko gaththides; naazi seeta gallas gakkanaas ba aayey ki7on uttides; hessafe guye hayqqides.
2Kings4:21 Iza aaya pude kezada Xoossa nabeza hiixan iza ishisadus; kare iza bolla gordada kezadus.
2Kings4:22 Hessafe guye ba azina xeygada
2Kings4:23 Izi azinazikka
2Kings4:24 Hessafe guye hareza koora ekkada oosanchchaza
2Kings4:25 Hessa gishshas iza Xoossa nabezi dizaso pude Qarmeloose zumaa bolla kezadus. Xoossa nabezikka izo haahon be7idi ba oosanchcha Giyaaze
2Kings4:26 Ane izikko woxxa baada
2Kings4:27 Iza Xoossa nabezi diza zumaa bolla gakkida mala iza too bolla xaaxettadus; Giyaazey izo yedisanaas bishin Xoossa nabezi Giyaaze
2Kings4:28 Iza
2Kings4:29 Elssa7i Giyaazes
2Kings4:30 Naaza aaya qasse
2Kings4:31 Giyaazeykka isttafe sinththati biidi guufeza naaza sinththan woththides; gido attiin aykko qaalay siyettibeenna; malataykka beettibeenna; hessa gishshas Giyaazey guye Elssa7ekko simmi biidi
2Kings4:32 Elssa7i soo gelidi naazi hayqqidi iza hiiththa bolla ichchi dizayssa be7ides.
2Kings4:33 Izi giddo gelidi kareza ba bollanne naaza bolla gordidi GODAA woossides.
2Kings4:34 Hiiththaa bolla kezidi naaza bolla zaqullidi ba doona iza doonara
2Kings4:35 Elssa7i dendidi keeththaa giddon yaanne haa simerettidaappe guye hiiththan kezidi qasseka naaza bolla mulera zaqullides; naazi laappunto dhishin iza ayfeti xeellida.
2Kings4:36 Elssa7i Giyaaze xeygidi
2Kings4:37 Izakka gelada iza too bolla kundadus; duge biittan gufannada ba naaza ekka kezadus.
2Kings4:38 Elssa7i aggi Gelgela simmides; He derezan koshay dees. Nabeta maabaray iza sinththi shiiqi dishin Elssa7i ba oosanchchaza
2Kings4:39 Istta garsafe issoy santhe misatiza hayththata maxanaas gede demba kezidi bazzon mokkiza tura demmidi he turazappe gose misatiza ayfe ba may7on maxi ekkidi simmides; iza anccidi distten keemmides shin izi aazakko oonikka eribeenna.
2Kings4:40 Asay maana mala woxezi duuqetti kezides; asay buro baadhida mala
2Kings4:41 Elssa7ikka
2Kings4:42 Issaadey shachcha banggafe kaxxida nam7u tammu quntonne guuththa tiya qeeri lukkamon ekkidi Ba7aali-Shalishappe Xoossa nabekko yides. Elssa7ikka ba ayllezas
2Kings4:43 Ashkarazikka
2Kings4:44 Hessafe guye izi asaas shiishshides; GODAY gida malakka asay mi kalliin palahi attides.
2Kings5:1 He wode Ni7imaaney Aaraame kawo olanchchata azazizayssa; GODAY iza baggara Aaraame derey xoono demmana mala ooththida gishshas izi ba godaa achchan daro gitanne bonchchettida asa. Izi ola qara gidikkoka inchchirachcha hargey iza bolla wodhdhides.
2Kings5:2 Pangati Aaraameppe kezidi Isra7eele dereppe issi geela7oyo di7i efiin iza Ni7imaassinne machcheys haggazawus.
2Kings5:3 Iza ba godatteys
2Kings5:4 Ni7imaaneykka ba godazaakko biidi Isra7eele dereppe yida naya izas yootoyssa zaari yootides.
2Kings5:5 Aaraame kawozikka izas
2Kings5:6 Isra7eele kawozas izi ekki biza dabdaabbezi
2Kings5:7 Isra7eele kawozi dabdaabbeza nababida mala ba may7o daakkidi «Tani iza inchchirachcha hargefe paththana mala izi taakko yeddanaas tani wodhada paththana dandayza Xoossee? Hayssa izi tanara ooyettana koyzayssa be7ite» gides.
2Kings5:8 Xoossa asi Elssa7i Isra7eele kawoy ba may7o daakkidayssa siyida mala
2Kings5:9 Hessa gishshas Ni7imaaney ba para-gaaren uttidi Elssa7e keeththa penge gakki eqqides.
2Kings5:10 Elssa7ikka iza
2Kings5:11 Ni7imaaney gidikko hanqettidi
2Kings5:12 Hayssas hayssas gidikko Damasqo shaafati Amaanaynne Farfarey awankka diza Isra7eele dere haaththatappe lo7ettennee? Meeceteththi meeceteth gidikko isttan meecetta geeykkinaa?» gishe hanqetti simmides.
2Kings5:13 Ni7imaane ashkarati izakko shiiqidi
2Kings5:14 Hessa gishshas Ni7imaaney duge shaafan wodhdhidi Xoossa nabezi izas yootida mala Yordaanoosen laappunto geli kezides; iza bollayka geeyidi guuththa naa bolla mala gidides.
2Kings5:15 Hessafe guye Ni7imaaney bana kaalli yida asaa ubbaara gede Xoossa nabekko simmi bides; iza sinththan aadhdhi eqqidi
2Kings5:16 Nabezikka izas
2Kings5:17 Ni7imaaney izas
2Kings5:18 Gido attiin GODAY issi miishsha gishshas tana ne aylleza maaro; hessika ta goday goynnanaas Armoone eeqa xoossaa soo gelishin ta qese izi oykki maaddishe izayssaththo tanikka heen goynniko Armoone eeqa xoossa soon ta goynnidayssas GODAY tana ne aylleza maaro» gides.
2Kings5:19 Elssa7ikka iza
2Kings5:20 Xoossa nabeza ashkara Giyaazey
2Kings5:21 Hessa gishshas Giyaazey Ni7imaane kaalli bides; Ni7imaaney Giyaazey izakko woththan kaalli yizayssa be7idi iza haasayssanaas para-gaarezappe gaden wodhdhidi
2Kings5:22 Giyaazeykka izas
2Kings5:23 Ni7imaaneykka «Histtiko 6
2Kings5:24 Giyaazey biidi pude zumbulla bolla gakkida mala miishshaza aylletappe ekkidi ba keeththan woththides; histtidi asata moyziin asati simmi bida.
2Kings5:25 Hessafe guye Giyaazey gelidi ba godaa Elssa7e sinththan aadhdhi eqqides. Elssa7ikka iza
2Kings5:26 Gido attiin Elssa7i izas
2Kings5:27 Hessa gishshas Ni7imaane inchchirachchay ne bolla aadhdhana; mernaa gakkanaas nees zereththafe zereththaan aadhdhana» gides. Hessafe guye Giyaazey Elssa7e sinththafe kezi bides; inchchirachcha hargey iza bollaa shachcha mala booththides.
2Kings6:1 Nabeta maabaray Elssa7e
2Kings6:2 hessa gishshas nuni duge Yordaanoose biidi nuni nuus issi issi tuus qanxxi ekki yaana; nu izan daanaas keeth keexxana» gida; izikka isttas
2Kings6:3 Istta giddofe issaadey iza
2Kings6:4 Izi isttara issife bides; isttika biidi Yordaanoosen mith qanxxo oykkida.
2Kings6:5 Istta garsafe issoy miththaa qanxxishin kalttazi kusheppe kessi ekkidi haaththa giddo gelides; izikka
2Kings6:6 Elssa7ikka
2Kings6:7 Hessafe guye
2Kings6:8 He wode Aaraame kawoy Isra7eelera olettees; izi ba olanchchata halaqatara issife zorettidaappe guye
2Kings6:9 Xoossa nabezi
2Kings6:10 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawozi Xoossa asi izas yootidasohoza xomosana mala as kiittides; Elssa7ikka kawozi heytantta mala sohotappe bana naagana mala zaari zaari qofsides.
2Kings6:11 Hessi Aaraame kawoza keehi shenechchida gishshas ba olanchchata azazizayta baakko xeygi shiishshidi
2Kings6:12 Olanchchata azazizaytappe issoy
2Kings6:13 Kawozikka
2Kings6:14 Hessa gishshas izi parata
2Kings6:15 Xoossa nabezas aylley wonttara izi kare kezishin parataninne para-gaaretan minnida wolqqama olanchchati katamayo yuuyi aadhdhi dizayssa be7idi
2Kings6:16 Nabezikka
2Kings6:17 Elssa7ikka
2Kings6:18 Aaraame ola asay duge wodhdhidi izakko yishin Elssa7i be7idi
2Kings6:19 Elssa7ikka isttas
2Kings6:20 Istti biidi he katamayo geliin Elssa7i «GODAWU! Hayti xeellana mala ne istta ayfe doya» gides. GODAYKKA istta ayfe doydes; isttika bantti Samaariya giddon dizayssa be7ida.
2Kings6:21 Isra7eele kawozi istta be7idi
2Kings6:22 Elssa7ikka
2Kings6:23 Hessa gishshas gita gibira isttas giigsiin midaappenne uyidaappe guye gede istta godaakko istta moyzi yeddiin bida. Aaraame olanchchati nam7anththo Isra7eele bolla worajjibeettenna.
2Kings6:24 Guuththa wodeppe guye Aaraame kawo Beeni-Hadaadey ba olanchchata issi bolla shiishshides; kezi biidi Samaariya giddoththides.
2Kings6:25 Izi he katamayo giddoththida mala issi hare hu7ey 80 saqile bira
2Kings6:26 Isra7eele kawozi gimbe bollara hemettishin issi maccassaya ba qaala dhoqqu histtada
2Kings6:27 Kawozikka izis
2Kings6:28 Qasseka
2Kings6:29 Histtiin ta naaza doysi midos. Wonteththa gallas qasse nu maana mala
2Kings6:30 Kawozikka maccassaya gizayssa siyidi ba may7ida may7oza daakki yeggides; kase izi gimbeza bollara yaanne haa simerettishin izi ba may7ida may7ozappe garsara maaqa may7idayssa asay be7ides.
2Kings6:31 Kawozikka
2Kings6:32 He wode Elssa7i ba soon dees; cima asaykka izara dees. Kawozi issi asi izappe sinththati baana mala kiittides; he kiitettida addezi bi gakkontta dishin Elssa7i banara diza cimatas
2Kings6:33 Elssa7i cimatara haasaya bolla dishin kiitetti yidayssi duge izakko wodhdhides; kawozikka gakkidi
2Kings7:1 Elssa7ikka izas
2Kings7:2 Kawozas keehi mata gidida olanchchata halaqazi nabeza
2Kings7:3 He wode inchchirachcha hargera diza oyddu asati he katamays geliza penge achchan deettes; heyti ba garsan issoy issaas
2Kings7:4 Gede katamayo nu gelana giikko heen koshay diza gishshas nuni koshan hayqqana; haan hayssan diikkoka nuus hayqoy attenna; Aaraame olanchchata giddo ane co7u giidi boos; istti co7u giikko nu attana; wodhikkoka heen hayqqana» gida.
2Kings7:5 Hessafe guye gadey lem7i lem7ishin istti dendidi Aaraame olanchchati diza heera bi gakkishin heen issaadeyka deenna.
2Kings7:6 Hessi hanida gaasoykka goday Aaraame ola asay siyana mala para-gaareta giirssi
2Kings7:7 Hessafe guye sa7ay qammana gishin bantti dizasoppe dendidi bantta dunkaaneta
2Kings7:8 He inchchirachcha harganchchati he asay diza heera gakkidi dunkaanetappe issaan gelidi midanne uyida; hessafe guye bira
2Kings7:9 Istti bantta garsan issoy issaa
