2Kings7:10 Hessa gishshas istti biidi katamayo geliza penge naagizayta waassi xeygidi
2Kings7:11 Pengeza naagizaytikka hessa siyidi ba siyidayssa asaas zaari yootida; he worezi biidi kawo keeththan seetettides.
2Kings7:12 Kawozi wontta maalado dendidi ba olanchchata halaqatas
2Kings7:13 Olanchchata halaqatappe issoy
2Kings7:14 Hessa gishshas nam7u para-gaareta paratara doorida; kawozikka «Intte biidi hanidaaz ubbaaka xeellite» giidi Aaraame olanchchata guyera baana mala aaththi yeddides.
2Kings7:15 Isttika Yordaanoose shaafa gakkanaas istta kaalli bida. Aaraame asay eeson baqatishe yeggi bida may7onne miishshata ogey dizason dizason laalettidayssa demmida; he kiitettidaytikka guye simmidi ba be7idayssa kawozas yootida.
2Kings7:16 Hessafe guye derezi kezidi Aaraame olanchchatas diza aqota baas ekkides; hessa gishshas kase GODAY yootida mala heedzdzu kilo gistte dhiilley woykko usuppun kilo banggay issi saqilen bayzettides.
2Kings7:17 He wode kawozas keehi mata gidida olanchchata halaqaza kawoy gimbeza penge naagana mala shuumides; histtiin derey keziza katama pengen sugettishe iza yedhereththides. He Xoossa nabey kase kawozi izakko yiin yootida mala iza olanchchata azazizayssi hayqqides.
2Kings7:18 Hessaththoka Xoossa nabezi kawozas
2Kings7:19 Olanchchata azazizayssi Xoossa nabezas
2Kings7:20 Geliza penge bolla derey iza yedhettiin izi hayqqida gishshas kase yootettida tinbitey iza bolla polettides.
2Kings8:1 He wode kase Elssa7i izi naaza hayqoppe denththida maccassays Xoossi
2Kings8:2 Maccassayakka Xoossa nabezi izis yootida mala hanadus; ba soo asaara denda baada Filisxeeme deren laappun layth uttadus.
2Kings8:3 Laappun layththafe guye Filisxeeme dereppe ba dere simmadus; ba keeththaa gishshassinne ba gade gishshas kawozas abeet gaanaas izakko badus.
2Kings8:4 He wode kawozi Xoossa nabeza aylle Giyaaze
2Kings8:5 Elssa7i izi naaza hayqoppe denththida naaza aaya ba keeththa gishshassinne ba gade gishshas kawozas waassanaas kawozaakko gelida wode Elssa7i izi naaza hayqoppe wostti denththidaakko Giyaazey kawozas yootides. Giyaazeykka kawozas
2Kings8:6 Kawozi hessa he yo7oza gishshas izo oychchiin izakka yootadus. Hessafe guye kawozi
2Kings8:7 Elssa7i Damasqo bides; he wode Aaraame kawo Beeni-Hadaadey sakettides; kawozas
2Kings8:8 Izikka Azaheele
2Kings8:9 Azaheeleykka Damasqon diza lo7o miishshata ubbaafe oyddu tammu gaamellan caani ekkidi Elssa7era gayttanaas bides; iza sinththan bi eqqidi
2Kings8:10 Elssa7ikka zaaridi
2Kings8:11 Izi yeellatana gakkanaas Azaheeley iza tishshi histti xeellides; hessafe guye Xoossa nabezi ayfunth gussides.
2Kings8:12 Azaheeleykka
2Kings8:13 Azaheeleykka
2Kings8:14 Hessafe guye Azaheeley Elssa7e achchafe gede ba godaakko simmi bides; Beeni-Hadaadeykka iza
2Kings8:15 Izi wonteththa gallas orde may7o ekkidi haaththan maadhi kessi ekki izara kawoza ayfeso goozides; kawozi hessa geedon hayqqides; Azaheeleykka izasohon kawotides.
2Kings8:16 Isra7eele kawo Akaabe naa Iyoraamey kawotida ichchashanththo layththan Iyoosaafixe naa Iyoraamey Yuhuda deren kawotides.
2Kings8:17 Izi kawotishin izas layththay 32; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 8 layth deraa haarides.
2Kings8:18 Iza machcheya Akaabe naa gidida gishshas Akaabeso asay ooththida mala izikka Isra7eele kawota oge kaallides; GODAA sinththankka iita miish ooththides.
2Kings8:19 Gido attiin GODAY ba aylleza Dawite gishshas giidi Yuhuda dhayssanaas koyibeenna. Gaasoykka Dawitesinne iza zereththas xomppe dhayssontta mala kase hidota immi woththides.
2Kings8:20 Iyoraame kawoteththa layththan Eedoomey Yuhuda bolla dendidi baas hara kawo kawoththides.
2Kings8:21 Hessa gishshas Iyoraamey para-gaareta ubbaa shiishshidi Xa7ire bolla worajjides; Eedoome dere asay izanne para-gaareta azazizayta giddoththides; izinne para-gaare azazizayti gidikko giddoth dendidi bana giddoththidayta xooni kezi bida; iza olanchchati baqatidi guye simmida.
2Kings8:22 Eedoomeykka hach gakkanaas Yuhuda bolla makkallida mala dees; he wode Libinaykka makkallides.
2Kings8:23 Iyoraame kawoteththa wode hanida hara miish ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings8:24 Iyoraameykka kase ba aawatan gayttides; isttaththoka Dawite katamaan moogettides; iza naa Akaziyaasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings8:25 Isra7eele kawo Akaabe naa Iyoraamey kawotida tammanne nam7anththo layththan Iyoraame naa Akaziyaasi Yuhudan kawotides.
2Kings8:26 Akaziyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay 22. Izi Yerusalaamen uttidi deraa issi layth haarides; iza aaya Gottoliya geetettawus; izakka Isra7eele kawo Omires naaza naa.
2Kings8:27 Akaziyaasi Akaabeso asaara bollotida gishshas Akaabeso asay ooththida mala izikka Akaabeso asaa oge kaallides; GODAA sinththankka iita ooththides.
2Kings8:28 Akaziyaasi Akaabe naa Iyoraamera issife Aaraame kawo Azaheele bolla worajjanaas Gala7aaden diza Eramoote bides; Aaraame asay heen Iyoraame madunththides.
2Kings8:29 Hessa gishshas kawo Iyoraamey Eramooten Azaheelera olettida olazan Aaraame asay iza madunththida madunththaafe paxanaas Izra7eele simmides. Hessafe guye Akaabe naa Iyoraamey sakettida gishshas Yuhuda kawo Iyoraame naa Akaziyaasi iza oychchanaas duge Izra7eele wodhdhides.
2Kings9:1 Nabe Elssa7i nabeta maabara garsafe issaa xeygidi
2Kings9:2 Neni hee ba gakkashe Nimishes naaza naa Iyoosaafixe naa Iyu koya. Ne gede izakko shiiqada iza iza laggetappe dumma shaakkada gede ilpinnen gelththa.
2Kings9:3 Hessafe qasse he xuu7aan diza zayteza iza hu7en gussada
2Kings9:4 Hessa gishshas he yelaga nabezi Gala7aaden diza Eramoote bides.
2Kings9:5 Izi hee bi gakkida mala ola gadawati issi bolla utti dishin izi
2Kings9:6 Iyuykka dendi eqqidi gede soo gelides; hessafe guye nabezi iza hu7en zayteza gussidi izas
2Kings9:7 Ta oosanchchata nabeta suuththaa hessaththoka GODAA oosanchchata suuththa ubbaa gishshas Elzabeeli bolla ta halo kessana mala neni ne godaa Akaabeso asaa shoca.
2Kings9:8 Akaabeso asay mulera dhayana; aylle gidiin woykko iza yelo gidiin Isra7eelen dizayssa izas wurseththan yelettida attuma naakka Akaabesoppe pitta dhayssana.
2Kings9:9 Hayssafe guye tani Akaabe keeth Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aame keeththa malanne Akaya naa Baashe keeththa mala ooththana.
2Kings9:10 Elzabeelo gidikko Izra7eele gade giddon kanati izo maana; izi ahay moogettenna› gees» gi yootida mala kare doyi yeggidi woxxides.
2Kings9:11 Iyuy kezidi ba lagge ola gadawatakko gakkida mala isttafe issoy
2Kings9:12 Isttika izas
2Kings9:13 Hessafe guye ubbayka bantta may7o qaari qaari yeggidi izi baana ogeza bolla miccida; qasseka zaye zayidi
2Kings9:14 Hessa gishshas Nimishes naaza naa Iyoosaafixe naa Iyuy Iyoraame bolla dere denththeththides. He wode Iyoraameynne Isra7eele asay ubbay Gala7aaden diza Eramoote dere Aaraame kawo Azaheele kusheppe ashshanaas naageettes.
2Kings9:15 Kawo Iyoraamey Aaraame kawo Azaheelera olan gayttiin Aaraame asay iza caddi madunththida; izi he madunththaafe paxanaas guye Izra7eele simmi bides. Iyuykka
2Kings9:16 Hessafe guye izi ba para-gaaren uttidi Izra7eele gakkanaas hordofides. Izi hessaththo ooththiday Iyoraamey heen ichchi diza gishshassinne Yuhuda kawo Akaziyaasikka iza oychchanaas duge izakko wodhdhida gishshassa.
2Kings9:17 Izra7eele gimbe bolla diza shakkozan eqqi naagizayssi Iyu wottadarati izakko matidayssa be7idi
2Kings9:18 Toganchchazi Iyura gayttanaas para yeddi toggi biidi
2Kings9:19 Hessa gishshas kawozi hara toganchcha yeddides; izi biidi isttako gakkida mala
2Kings9:20 Naagizayssika «Kiitetti yizayssi isttako gakkides shin he izikka haa simmi yibeenna; wottadarata kaaleththizayssa para-gaareza laagoy likke Nimishe naa Iyu laago mala; izi laaggishe gooshsha asa mala laaggees» giidi erisides.
2Kings9:21 Iyoraameykka
2Kings9:22 Iyoraamey buro Iyu be7ida mala
2Kings9:23 Iyoraamey ba para-gaareza guye zaari baqatishe
2Kings9:24 Hessafe guye Iyuy ba wondafe yiishshan Iyoraames baqinaten caddides. Yiishshazi kanththi biidi izas wozinaa caddida gishshas izi para-gaareza giddon bolqu gi kundides.
2Kings9:25 Iyuykka para-gaareza laaggizayssa alaafe Bidiqaares
2Kings9:26 GODAY
2Kings9:27 Yuhuda kawo Akaziyaasi hessa be7idi gede Beeti-Hagaane efiza ogezara baqatides; Iyuykka iza gooddishe ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
2Kings9:28 Iza oosanchchati iza aha para-gaare bolla woththidi Yerusalaame efida; Dawite katamaan kase iza aawata duufon moogida.
2Kings9:29 Akaziyaasi Isra7eele kawo Akaabe naa Iyoraamey kawotida tamman issinththo layththan Yuhudan kawotides.
2Kings9:30 Hessafe guye Iyuy gede Izra7eele bides; Elzabeela hessa siyada
2Kings9:31 Iyuy gimbeza kanththi gelidayssa be7ada
2Kings9:32 Iyuy izo pude xeellidi
2Kings9:33 Iyuykka isttas
2Kings9:34 Iyuy soo gelidi midessinne uyides; hessafe guye
2Kings9:35 Istti izo moogana kezishin izis hu7e meqeththatappe
2Kings9:36 Istti simmidi izas hessa yootiin Iyuy
2Kings9:37 Izi ashoy Izra7eele biittan goshsha gades igisa gidana;› hessa gishshas ay asikka
2Kings10:1 He wode Akaabes Samaariyan 70 attuma nayti deettes; hessa gishshas Iyuy dabdaabbe xaafidi Izra7eelen diza shuumetas
2Kings10:2 «Intte godaza nayti inttenara diza gishshassinne para-gaaretinne parati
2Kings10:3 intte godaza nayta giddofe ubbaafe aadhdhizaadenne hayssi izas bessees gizaade dooridi iza aawaa kawoteththa araatan utisite; hessafe guye kase intte godaza keeththaa gishshas olettite» gees.
2Kings10:4 Istti gidikko daro babbida gishshas
2Kings10:5 Hessa gishshas kawoteththa keeththaan azazizayssi
2Kings10:6 Hessafe guye Iyuy
2Kings10:7 He dabdaabbezi isttako gakkida mala nayta dichchizayti kawo nayta laappun tammata ubbaa wodhida; he nayta hu7e qanxxi qanxxi keeshen ekkidi Iyus Izra7eele yeddida.
2Kings10:8 Kiitetti biday bi gakkida mala Iyus
2Kings10:9 Wonteththa gallas maalado Iyuy kezi dereza sinththan eqqidi
2Kings10:10 Hessa gishshas GODAY kase Akaabeso asaa bolla yootida qaalaappe issineyakka coo biitta bolla wodhdha attonttayssa intte erite. GODAY kase ba aylle Eelaasa baggara yootidayssa polides.
2Kings10:11 Iyuy Akaabeso asaappe attida asaa ubbaa
2Kings10:12 Iyuy heeppe dendidi Samaariya bides; izi biidi Beet-Ekkede geetettizason dorsa heemmizaytaso bi gakkishe
2Kings10:13 Yuhuda kawo Akaziyaasas asho dabbotappe amardayta demmidi
2Kings10:14 Izikka
2Kings10:15 Izi heeppe dendi bishin Erekaabe naa Iyoonadaabey baakko bizayssa oge bolla demmides; Iyuykka iza sarokkidi
2Kings10:16 Iyuykka iza
2Kings10:17 Iyuy biidi Samaariya gakkidi heen Akaabeso asaappe attidayta ubbaaka wodhides; kase nabe Eelaasas yootettida GODAA qaala mala ubbaaka wodhi wursides.
2Kings10:18 Hessafe guye Iyuy deraa ubbaa issi bolla shiishshidi
2Kings10:19 Ha7i intte ba7aale nabeta
2Kings10:20 Iyuy
2Kings10:21 Hessafe guye kumeththa Isra7eele asaas kiita yeddides; ba7aales haggazizayti ubbay yida; isttafe oonikka attibeenna; ubbayka ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossaso gelida; asay ba7aale keeththaa cippi gi kumides.
2Kings10:22 Iyuy may7o keeththa alaafeza
2Kings10:23 Hessafe guye Iyuy Erekaabe naa Iyoonadaabera ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossaa keeth gelides. Ba7aale oosanchchatas
2Kings10:24 Hessafe guye xuugettiza yarshonne hara yarshoka yarshana gelida; istti gelida mala Iyuy isttas
2Kings10:25 Iyuy xuugettiza yarshoza shiishshidaappe guye naagizaytanne ola gadawata
2Kings10:26 Asay goynnana mala shuchchafe masetti giigida misleta ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossaa keeththafe kare kessi xuuggida.
2Kings10:27 Ba7aales goynniza misleza qoxereththida; izan ba7aales goynniza keeththaaka laallida; hessa he sohoza hach gakkanaas derey sheesh uttizaso kessides.
2Kings10:28 Iyuy hessaththo ooththidi ba7aales goynnizayssa Isra7eele dereppe dhayssides.
2Kings10:29 Gido attiin Iyuy Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Beeteleninne Daanen worqqafe oosettida mara misletas Isra7eele asay goynnana mala asaa oosisida nagarappe haakkibeenna.
2Kings10:30 GODAY Iyus
2Kings10:31 Gido attiin Iyuy GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa wogaa ba kumeththa wozinappe naagibeenna; Iyorba7aameykka Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe haakkibeenna.
2Kings10:32 He wode GODAY Isra7eele biittaa guuththi guuththi efo doommides. Azaheeley Isra7eele asaa he gaxappe ha gaxa gakkanaas oli xoonides.
2Kings10:33 Hessika Yordaanooseppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Gala7aade dere ubbaa gidishin Arnoone shaafa achchan diza Aaro7eereppe biidi Gaade dere
2Kings10:34 Hankko attidayssi Iyu kawoteththa layththan hanidayssinne izi ooththida ooso ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings10:35 Iyuy kase ba aawata mala hayqqides; iza Samaariyan moogida; iza naa Iyo7akaazi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings10:36 Iyuy Samaariyan dishe Isra7eele bolla 28 layth kawotides.
2Kings11:1 Akaziyaasa aaya Gottoliyay ba naaza hayqo siyada kawo keeththa as ubbaaka wodha dhayssadus.
2Kings11:2 Kawo Iyoraame naa Akaziyaasa michcho Yosabeeta hayqqana shiiqi uttida kawo nayta giddofe Akaziyaasa naaza Iyo7aasa kaysa ekkadus. Istti iza wodhontta mala Gottoliyappe iza qotta ekkada izanne iza naagizaaro issi ilpinne keeththan gelththa qottadus.
2Kings11:3 Gottoliyay dereza haariza wodekka izi bana naagizaarira 8 layth GODAA keeththan qotettides.
2Kings11:4 Laappunththo layththan Yoodahey kiita yeddidi Kaara dere asinne zabe naagizayta azaziza mato halaqata izi dizasoho GODAA Keeth yaana mala azazides; izi isttara caaqettidi GODAA keeththan caaqeththides; hessafe guye kawaa naaza istta bessides.
2Kings11:5 Izi isttas
2Kings11:6 Nam7anththo shaakozi Suure geetettiza pengeza naago; Xoossa keeth taran taran nabetappe guye baggara diza pengeza naago.
2Kings11:7 Inttes kasekka dose gidida mala sambata gallas zabe naagoppe shempidayti ubbay heedzdzaafe nam7u kusheti kawozi izan diza Xoossa Keeththaza naagite.
2Kings11:8 Intte ubbayka intte massara massara oykkidi kawoza yuushon eqqite; intteko shiiqiza asi diikko hayqqo» gides.
2Kings11:9 Mato halaqati qeese Yoodahey azazizayssa ubbaaka ooththida; isttafe issoy issoy sambata gallas zabe naaganaas gelizaytinne zabe naagidi kezizayti bana kaallizayta kaaleththi ekkidi qeese Yoodahekko gakki wodhdhida.
2Kings11:10 Qeesezikka Xoossa Keeththan diza kawo Dawite toorazanne gondalleza mato halaqatas immides.
2Kings11:11 Wottadaratikka issoy issoy ba massara ekkidi Xoossa Keeththazas dugeha baggafe doommidi pudeha gakkanaas yarsho yarshizasonne Xoossa Keeththaa matan kawoza yuushon eqqida.
2Kings11:12 Yoodaheykka kawo naaza izi dizasohoppe kessidi iza hu7en kallachcha goxxides; caaqo qaala maxaafaakka izas immides; iza tiydi kawoththidayssa awajjides; hessafe guye derezi
2Kings11:13 Gottoliyaykka ola asaa waasozanne dereza waasoza siyada derezi dizaso Xoossa Keeththaako badus.
2Kings11:14 Hekko kase diza wogaa mala kawozi tuussa matan eqqidayssa iza shuumetinne zaye punnizayti iza achchan dizayssa be7adus; derey ubbay ufayssan guppeessinne zayekka zayees. Gottoliyay ba may7ida may7oza daakka yeggada
2Kings11:15 Qeese Yoodahey ola asata azazizayta mato halaqata
2Kings11:16 Hessa gishshas iza parati kawo keeth geliza soo bi gakkishin oykkidi izo heen wodhida.
2Kings11:17 Yoodaheykka asay GODAA dere gidana mala Xoossa sinththaninne kawoza sinththan derezasinne GODAAS giddon caaqo qaalay daana mala ooththides. Hessaththoka kawozassinne derezas giddon caaqo qaala woththides.
2Kings11:18 Asay ubbayka biidi ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossaa keeth laallides; yarshosozanne misleta ubbaa menththereththi yeggides; ba7aale qeese Mataanekka yarsho yarshizasohota sinththan wodhides. Hessafe guye qeese Yoodahey Xoossa Keeththaa naagiza zabeta woththides.
2Kings11:19 Hessafe guye mato halaqata
2Kings11:20 He dere asay ubbayka ufayettides; Gottoliyay kawo keeththa giddon mashshan siifettida gishshas katamaya sirphi gadus.
2Kings11:21 Iyo7aasi kawotishin izas layththay laappuna.
2Kings12:1 Iyuy kawotida laappunththa layththan Iyo7aasi kawotides; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 40 layth haarides; iza aaya Sabiyo geetettizaara Bersaabehe kataman yelettadus.
2Kings12:2 Qeese Yoodahey tamaarsiza wode ubbaan Iyo7aasi GODAA sinththan lo7o miish ooththides.
2Kings12:3 Gido attiin zumbullata bollan goynnizasohota dhayssibeenna; derezikka he sohotan yarsho shiishonne exaane cuwaseth gujji gujji bides.
2Kings12:4 Iyo7aasi qeeseta
2Kings12:5 Qeeseti issoy issoy miishshaza shiishshizayta kusheppe ekketto; he miishshazi koshshiza mala Xoossa Keeththa giddon moorettida sohota ooraxissana kezo» gides.
2Kings12:6 Gido attiin Iyo7aasi kawotiin biidi nam7u tammanne heedzdzanththo layththi gakkanaas qeeseti Xoossa Keeththaza garsan moorettida sohota ooraxissibeettenna.
2Kings12:7 Hessa gishshas Iyo7aasi qeese Yoodahenne hara qeesetakka baakko xeygi shiishshidi
2Kings12:8 Qeesetikka hessafe guye deraappe miishshe shiishshontta malanne Xoossa Keeththaaka banttarkka ooraxissontta mala qaala qachchida.
2Kings12:9 Hessafe guye qeese Yoodahey issi saaxine ekkidi izas kamaza lukkidi xoo7e kessides; efidi Xoossa Keeththan gelizasoppe ushachcha baggara yarsho yarshizasohoza achchan woththides. Kareza naagiza qeesetikka Xoossa Keeththas yiza miish ubbaaka he saaxinezan gelththeettes.
2Kings12:10 Saaxineza giddon daro miishshi dizayssa beyi be7idi kawoza xaafezinne qeeseta halaqay yiidi yiidi Xoossa Keeththas yida miishshaa qoodi qoodidi karaxiiten gelththi qachchi woththeettes.
2Kings12:11 He miishshaza meezaaney erettidaappe guye GODAA Keeththaza ooso alaafeteththan oosisana mala miishshazi doorettida asatas imettees; hessika Xoossa Keeththaa keexxiza anaaxetas
2Kings12:12 shuch massizaytas
2Kings12:13 Xoossa Keeththazas gelida miishshafe gidikko Xoossa Keeththas soo giddo oosos koshshiza bira xuu7ata
2Kings12:14 He miishshafe Xoossa Keeththaza ooraxissizaytas xalla qanxxettides.
2Kings12:15 Keeththaa ooraththiza asatas miish qanxxanaas doorettida asati mulera ammanettidayta gidida gishshas istta kaalli xeellizaade koshshibeenna.
2Kings12:16 Qoho gishshas shiiqiza yarshoynne nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarshoy gidikko hayti qeesetas gidida gishshas Xoossa Keeththaa gelettenna.
2Kings12:17 He wode Aaraame kawo Azaheeley kezidi Geete bolla meto gaththidi izo oykkides; qasseka Yerusalaame bolla meto yegganaas hee simmides.
2Kings12:18 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aasi gidikko kase iza aawati Yuhuda kawoti Iyoosaafixey
2Kings12:19 Iyo7aasi ba kawoteththa layththatan ooththida hara oosotinne izi polida hanoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings12:20 Iza shuumetikka iza bolla dendida; duge Sila woththiza ogeza bolla Betemiloonen iza wodhida.
2Kings12:21 Iza wodhidaytikka shuumeti Shim7aata naa Yozakaarenne Shomereye naa Yozabaade; izi hayqqidi kase ba aawata ubbata mala Dawite katamaan moogettides; iza naa Amasiyaasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings13:1 Yuhuda kawo Akaziyaasa naa Iyo7aasi kawotida nam7u tammanne heedzdzanththo layththan Iyu naa Iyo7akaazi Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla kawotides; izi 17 layth haarides.
2Kings13:2 Izikka Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagara kaallidi GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides; hessa he oosozappe simmibeenna.
2Kings13:3 GODAA hanqoy Isra7eele bolla tama mala eexxides; hessa gishshas Aaraame kawo Azaheeleynne iza naa Beeni-Hadaadey diza wode ubbaan GODAY Isra7eeleta istta kushen aaththi immides.
2Kings13:4 Hessafe guye Iyo7akaazi GODAA woossides; GODAYKKA Aaraame kawoy Isra7eele wostti metoththidaakko be7ida gishshas iza woosa siyides.
2Kings13:5 Hessa gishshas GODAY Isra7eele ashshiza as isttas immides; isttika Aaraame asaa un7eteththafe kessi ekkida; kase malakka bantta keeththan keeththan duus oykkida.
2Kings13:6 Gido attiin kase Isra7eele baleththida Iyorba7aame keeththa nagarappe simmibeettenna; sinth gujji gujji bida. Asheeri misle tuussas Samaariyan gujji goynnida.
2Kings13:7 Iyo7akaaze ola asappe 50 toga asati
2Kings13:8 Iyo7akaazi ba kawoteththa layththatan ooththidaazi
2Kings13:9 Iyo7akaazi kase ba aawata mala hayqqides; Samaariyankka moogettides; iza naa Iyo7aasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings13:10 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aasi kawotida heedzdzu tammanne laappunththa layththan Iyo7akaaze naa Yo7aasi Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla kawotidi 16 layth deraa haarides.
2Kings13:11 Izikka GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides; Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagara ubbaafe haakkibeenna; gede gujji gujji bides.
2Kings13:12 Yo7aasi ba kawoteththa layththatan ooththidaazi
2Kings13:13 Yo7aasi kase ba aawata mala hayqqides; Samaariyan Isra7eele kawoti moogettidason moogettides; Iyorba7aamey izasohon kawoteththa araatan uttides.
2Kings13:14 He wode Elssa7i hargidi shemppo bolla dees. Isra7eele kawo Iyo7aasi iza oychchana duge wodhdhidi izas yeekkides; «Ola! Ta aawawu! Ola! Ta aawawu! Neni Isra7eeles para-gaarenne toganchcha!» gi waassides.
2Kings13:15 Elssa7ikka
2Kings13:16 Isra7eele kawoza
2Kings13:17 Qasseka
2Kings13:18 Qasseka
2Kings13:19 Xoossa asi iza bolla hanqettidi
2Kings13:20 Elssa7ikka hayqqides; asay iza moogides. He wode Mo7aabe asay layththan layththan ofinththa aginatan Isra7eele asaa bolla olas worajjeettes.
2Kings13:21 Issito issi Isra7eele asi hayqqidayssa moogishe meto gaththanaas zamadi uttida asata dingate demmida; hessa gishshas hayqqidayssa ahaza Elssa7e duufon yeggida; ahazikka Elssa7e meqeththi bochchida mala heerakka paxidi addezi ba tohon eqqides.
2Kings13:22 Iyo7akaaze kawoteththa wode ubbaan Aaraame kawo Azaheeley Isra7eele asaa keehi un7eththees.
2Kings13:23 GODAY gidikko isttas qadhettides
2Kings13:24 Aaraame kawo Azaheeley hayqqides; izi hayqqiin iza naazi Beeni-Hadaadey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings13:25 Hessafe guye Iyo7akaaze naa Yo7aasi
2Kings14:1 Isra7eele kawo Iyo7akaaze naa Yo7aasi kawotida nam7anththo layththan Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aasa naa Amasiyaasi kawotides.
2Kings14:2 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 29 layth haarides; iza aaya Yoha7adaano geetettiza Yerusalaame maccassa.
2Kings14:3 Amasiyaasi GODAA sinththan lo7o miish ooththides; gido attiin kase iza aawa Dawiti ooththoyssa mala ooththibeenna; ubbaa miishshika ba aawa Iyo7aasi ooththoyssaththo ooththides.
2Kings14:4 Zumbullata bolla diza goynnizasoti kichchibeettenna; asay zumbullata bolla yarsho shiishonne Exaane cuwaseth essibeenna.
2Kings14:5 Amasiyaasi ba kawoteththaa minththi oykkidaappe guye ba aawaa wodhida shuumeta wodhides.
2Kings14:6 Gido attiin Muse woga maxaafan GODAY
2Kings14:7 Amasiyaasi
2Kings14:8 Hessafe guye Amasiyaasi Iyus naaza naa Iyo7akaaze naa Isra7eele kawo Iyo7aasakko
2Kings14:9 Isra7eele kawo Yo7aasi Yuhuda kawo Amasiyaases
2Kings14:10 Tumakka ne Eedoome xoonadasa; gidikkoka ne wozinay wogay baynda otorettofo; ne iza xoonida gishshas zaradhettofa; shempa utta! Neni ne kundeththinne Yuhuda kundeth ays koyay?» gi kiittides.
2Kings14:11 Gido attiin Amasiyaasi izi gizayssa siyontta ixxides; hessa gishshas Isra7eele kawo Yo7aasi olas kezides; izinne Yuhuda kawo Amasiyaasikka Yuhuda deren Beeti-Shemisheppe sinththa baggan ola danxxida.
2Kings14:12 Yuhuday Isra7eelen xoonettides; asay issoy issoy baso baso baqatides.
2Kings14:13 Isra7eele kawoy Yo7aasi Akaziyaasas naaza naa Iyo7aasa naaza Yuhuda kawo Amasiyaasa Beeti-Shemishen di7ides. Hessafe guye Yo7aasi Yerusalaame bides; Efreeme gimbe pengefe doommidi gula penge geetettizaso gakkanaas adussateththay 400 wadha gidida gimbeza laallides.
2Kings14:14 GODAA Keeththaninne kawo minjja keeththan diza worqqa
2Kings14:15 Yo7aasa kawoteththa layththatan oosettidaazi
2Kings14:16 Yo7aasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; kase Isra7eele kawoti moogettiza Samaariyan kawota duufon moogettides; iza naa Iyorba7aamey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings14:17 Yo7aasa naazi Yuhuda kawo Amasiyaasikka Isra7eele kawo Iyo7akaaze naa Iyo7aasi hayqqidaappe guye 15 layth de7ides.
2Kings14:18 Amasiyaasa kawoteththa layththatan hanida hanoti Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings14:19 Yerusalaame asay Amasiyaasa bolla seeri dendida gishshas izi gede Laakishe baqati bides; gido attiin istti ba baggara iza kaalettiza as kiittidi wodhisida.
2Kings14:20 Iza ahazikka paran caanetti yiidi Dawite katamaan kase iza aawati moogettizason Yerusalaamen moogettides.
2Kings14:21 Hessafe guye Yuhuda dere ubbay 16 layththa naa Azaariyaasa ekkidi iza aawa Amasiyaasa sohon kawoththida.
2Kings14:22 Amasiyaasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttidaappe guye Azaariyaasi Eelaate zaari ooththidi Yuhudan gaaggides.
2Kings14:23 Iyosiyaasa naa Amasiyaasi Yuhudan kawotida tammanne ichchashanththo layththan Isra7eele kawo Yo7aasa naa Iyorba7aamey Samaariyan kawotides; 41 layth gakkanaas haarides.
2Kings14:24 Izi GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey kase Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe guye simmibeenna.
2Kings14:25 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay Geet-Hefeere nabe Amaate naa ba aylle Yoonaasa baggara yootida mala Hamaate aadhdhiza purdefe biidi hayqo abbaa gakkanaas diza Isra7eele zawaa zaarissiday Iyorba7aame.
2Kings14:26 Aylle gidiin woykko goqa gidiin Isra7eelen dizay ubbayka keehi waayettizayssa GODAY be7ides; istta maaddizaykka deenna.
2Kings14:27 Gido attiin GODAY Isra7eele sunththaa biitta bollafe dhayssana giidi kase yootibeenna gishshas Yo7aasa naa Iyorba7aamen eqqidi istta ashshides.
2Kings14:28 Iyorba7aame kawoteththa layththatan izi ooththidaazi
2Kings14:29 Iyorba7aamey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Zakaraasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings15:1 Isra7eele kawo Iyorba7aamey kawotida nam7u tammanne laappunththa layththan Yuhuda kawo Amasiyaase naa Azaariyaasi kawotides.
2Kings15:2 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 16; izi Yerusalaame ichchash tammanne nam7u layth haarides; iza aaya Yikolyay Yerusalaame maccassa.
2Kings15:3 Kase iza aawa Amasiyaasi ooththoyssaththo Azaariyaasikka GODAA sinththan lo7o ooso ooththides.
2Kings15:4 Gido attiin zumbullata bolla goynnizasahoti dhaybeettenna; asaykka heen yarsho shiishonne exaane cuwaseth aggibeenna.
2Kings15:5 GODAY kawoza izi hayqqana gakkanaas iza bolla inchchirachcha harge yeggides; izikka asappe shaakettidi dumma keeththan uttides; he wode iza kawoteththa keeththaa alaafeteththan deraa ayssizay kawoza naa Iyo7aatame.
2Kings15:6 Azaariyaasa kawoteththa layththan oosettidaazinne hanida hanoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings15:7 Azaariyaasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; Dawite katamaan iza aawata duufo matan iza moogida; iza naa Iyo7aatamey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings15:8 Yuhuda kawo Azaariyaasi kawotida heedzdzu tammanne osppunththa layththan Iyorba7aame naa Zakaraasi Samaariya kataman Isra7eelen kawotides; 6 aginakka haarides.
2Kings15:9 Kase iza aaway ooththoyssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe izi simmibeenna.
2Kings15:10 Yaabuse naa Shaloomey Zakaraasa bolla dendidi deraa sinththan iza bolla meto gaththi wodhides; iza sohonkka kawotides.
2Kings15:11 Zakaraasa kawoteththa layththatan oosettida hara miishshatikka Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafettida.
2Kings15:12 Kase GODAY Iyus
2Kings15:13 Yuhuda kawo Ooziyay kawotida heedzdzu tammanne uddufunththo layththan Yaabuse naa Shaloomey Isra7eele bolla kawotides. Samaariyan uttidi issi agina deraa haarides.
2Kings15:14 Gaade naa Minaheemi Tirxxafe kezi Samaariya biidi meto gaththides; Yaabuse naa Shaloome wodhidi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings15:15 Shaloome kawoteththa layththatan oosettida hara oosotinne izi denththeththida yo7oti Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafettida.
2Kings15:16 He wode Minaheemi Tirxxafe kezidi Tifisa katama asaanne he heeran diza asaa ubbaa bolla meto gaththides; izi hessaththo ooththiday istti he katamay pengeta doyontta ixxida gishshassa; Tifisa asaa wodhidessinne shaarara diza maccassata ubbata ulo daakkides.
2Kings15:17 Yuhuda kawo Azaariyaasi kawotida heedzdzu tammanne uddufunththo layththan Gaade naa Minaheemi Isra7eele bolla kawotides; izi Samaariyan uttidi 10 layth haarides.
2Kings15:18 Izi GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; izi ba diza layth ubbaan Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe simmibeenna.
2Kings15:19 Hessafe guye Asoore kawo Teligelitelifelisoorey biittayo oli oykkides; Minaheemikka baas maado demmanaasinne ba kawoteththan diza ba zawa minththanaas giidi 1
2Kings15:20 Minaheemi he miishshaa Isra7eele asay kesetti shiishshana mala ooththides; izi hessaththo ooththiday miishshaza Asoore kawos immana mala dure asay issoy issoy 50 saqile bira kessana mala wolqqaththides; hessa gishshas Asoore kawoy he deren gam7ontta ba dere simmi bides.
2Kings15:21 Minaheeme kawoteththa layththan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings15:22 Minaheemi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Fiqaseyaasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings15:23 Yuhuda kawo Azaariyaasi kawotida ichchash tammanththa layththan Minaheeme naa Fiqaseyaasi Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla kawotidi 2 layth haarides.
2Kings15:24 Fiqaseyaasi GODAA sinththan iita ooththides; Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe simmibeenna.
2Kings15:25 Iza ola asaa halaqatappe issoy Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey iza bolla dendides; Gala7aadeppe 50 as ba bolla ekki biidi Samaariyan kawo keeththan diza miixan Fiqaseyaase
2Kings15:26 Fiqaseyaasa kawoteththa layththan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafettides.
2Kings15:27 Yuhuda kawo Azaariyaasi kawotida ichchash tammanne nam7anththo layththan Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey Samaariya kataman Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotides; 20 layth kawotides.
2Kings15:28 Izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraappe simmibeenna.
2Kings15:29 Isra7eele kawo Faaquhey kawoti diza layththatan Asoore kawo Teligelitelifelisoorey yiidi Iyoone
2Kings15:30 Hessafe guye Eela naa Hose7ey Eromeliyo naa Faaquhe bolla dereza denththides; iza bolla meto gaththidi wodhides; Ooziya naa Iyo7aatamey kawotida nam7u tammanththa layththan Hose7ey Faaquhe sohon kawotides.
2Kings15:31 Faaquhe kawoteththa layththatan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings15:32 Isra7eele kawo Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey kawotida nam7anththo layththan Yuhuda kawo Ooziya naa Iyo7aatamey kawotides.
2Kings15:33 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 16 layth haarides. Iza aaya Saadooqe naa Iyeruso geetettawus.
2Kings15:34 Izi kase ba aawa Ooziyay ooththida mala GODAA sinththan lo7o ooso ooththides.
2Kings15:35 Gido attiin zumbullata bollan goynnizasohoti kichchibeettenna; asay heen yarsho shiishonne exaane cuwaseth aggibeenna. Iyo7aatamey GODAA Keeththas pude bagga pengeza zaari giigsides.
2Kings15:36 Iyo7aatame kawoteththa layththatan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings15:37 He wode GODAY Aaraame kawo Eraasooneynne Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey Yuhuda olana mala ooththides.
2Kings15:38 Iyo7aatamey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; kase iza aawati moogettida duufon ba aawa Dawite katamaan moogettides. Iza naa Akaazey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings16:1 Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey kawotida tammanne laappunththa layththan Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aatame naa Akaazey kawotides.
2Kings16:2 Akaazey kawotiza wode izas layththay 20; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 16 layth haarides. Iza aawa Dawiti lo7o ooththida mala GODAA sinththan lo7o ooththibeenna.
2Kings16:3 Izi kase Isra7eele kawota kaallides; hessafekka bollara GODAY Isra7eele asaa sinththafe gooddi kessida kawoteththata tunateththaa kaallidi ba naa taman xuugettiza yarshos shiishshides.
2Kings16:4 Hessaththoka zumbullata bollan goynnizasotan
2Kings16:5 Aaraame kawo Eraasooneynne Isra7eele kawo Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey Yerusalaame olanaassinne Akaaze giddoththanaas kezida; gido attiin istti iza xoonanaas dandaybeettenna.
2Kings16:6 He wode Aaraame kawo Eraasooney Yuhuda asaa gooddi yeddidi Eelaate biittaa Aaraames zaarides; hessafe guye Eedoome asay Eelaate yiidi hach gakkanaas heen dees.
2Kings16:7 Hessa gaason Akaazey Asoore kawo Teligelitelifelisoores
2Kings16:8 Akaazey GODAA Keeththaninne ba kawoteththa keeththan diza biranne worqqa Asoore kawos kiyateth yeddides.
2Kings16:9 Asoore kawozikka Akaazey iza woossida woosa Ero gi ekkidi Damasqo xooni oykkides. Asaakka di7i ekkidi Qiire geetettizasoho efidessinne Eraasoonekka wodhides.
2Kings16:10 Hessafe guye kawo Akaazey Asoore kawoza Teligelitelifelisoorera gayttanaas Damasqo bides; heen Damasqon diza yarsho yarshizasohoza be7idi izas ayfe yo7oza paateththa qofaara gaththi pilggidi qeese Ooriyas yeddides.
2Kings16:11 Qeese Ooriyay kawo Akaazey Damasqofe izas yeddida paateththa qofaa pilggi yeddidayssa mala yarsho yarshizasoza ooththides; kawo Akaazey simmi yaanaappe kasetidi oosoza giigides.
2Kings16:12 Kawozi Damasqofe simmi yiidi he yarshosohoza be7ides. Izi shiiqidi yarsho shiishshanaas yarshosoza bolla kezides.
2Kings16:13 Hessafe guye xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarsho yarshizasohoza bolla shiishshides; ushsha yarshoka iza bolla gussides; issifeteththa yarsho suuththika iza bolla wuxxides.
2Kings16:14 Yarsho yarshanaas oorath oosettidasozappenne Xoossa Keeththafe giddon GODAA sinththan eqqi diza xarqimalappe oosettida yarshosoza kawo Akaazey izi dizasoppe denththidi oorath oosettida yarshosohozappe pudeha baggara woththides.
2Kings16:15 Hessafe guye kawo Akaazey qeese Ooriya
2Kings16:16 Qeese Ooriyay kawo Akaazey iza azazida mala ooththides.
2Kings16:17 Kawo Akaazeykka he milleranne ha millera diza sanqqata shoddi ekkides; miish iza bolla woththi yuushshiza gaareza bollafe meechcha saaneta diggides. Gita gonggeza garsa baggara tookki oykkida xarqimalappe oosettida 12 korma misleta bollafe lochcha shuchcha bolla woththides.
2Kings16:18 Asoore kawo ufayssanaas giidi sambata gallas kawo araatay micettana mala Xoossa Keeththan dhoqqu gi oosettidasozanne kawoti GODAA Keeth gelizasoppe kare baggara diza pengeza denththides.
2Kings16:19 Akaaze kawoteththa layththan oosettida hara oosotinne hanida hanoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings16:20 Akaazey hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; istti moogettizason Dawite katamaan moogettides; iza naa Hizqiyaasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings17:1 Yuhuda kawo Akaazey kawotida tammanne nam7anththo layththan Eela naa Hose7ey Samaariya kataman Isra7eele bolla kawotides; 9 layththika dereza haarides.
2Kings17:2 Izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides; gido attiin izappe sinththan Isra7eelen kawotidayti ooththidayssa keena gidenna.
2Kings17:3 Asoore kawo Saliminaasoorey izara olettanaas yides; Hose7ey izas haarettidessinne giirides.
2Kings17:4 Hose7ey Gibxe kawo Sigoorekko kiita yeddida gishshassinne kase izi Asoore kawos layththan layththan giira giirizayssa diggida gishshas Asoore kawoy Hose7ey iza kaddidayssa erides; hessa gishshas Saliminaasoorey iza oykki qasho keeththan yeggides.
2Kings17:5 Asoore kawoy dereza mulera worajjides. Samaariya zaari zaari heedzdzu layth giddoththides.
2Kings17:6 Hose7ey kawotida uddufunththo layththan Asoore kawoy Samaariya oykkides. Isra7eele asaa di7i ekkidi Asoore dere denththi efides. Heytakka Alahen
2Kings17:7 Hayssi ubbay istta bolla gakkiday Gibxe kawo Paaroones haareteththafe kessida GODAA bantta Xoossaa istti qohida gishshassinne hara eeqa xoossatas goynnida gishshassa.
2Kings17:8 GODAY istta sinththafe gooddi kessida kawoteththatinne Isra7eele kawoti he biittayo gelththida iita loseta istti kaallida.
2Kings17:9 Isra7eele asay GODAA bantta Xoossaa bolla iita miish geemara ooththida; naagizasohotappe doommidi miixara giigi diza katama gakkanaas asay diza sohon ubbaan zumbullata bolla banttas goynnanasoho ooththida.
2Kings17:10 Zumbullatinne daashsha miththati dizason dizason eeqa xoossata tuussinne asheeri misle tuus essida.
2Kings17:11 GODAY istta sinththafe gooddi kessida kawoteththati ooththizayssaththo zumbullata bolla exaane cuwasida; GODAA hanqeththiza iita ooso ooththida.
2Kings17:12 GODAY isttas
2Kings17:13 Gidikkoka GODAY isttas
2Kings17:14 Gido attiin istti siyibeettenna; istti GODAA bantta Xoossan ammanettontta ixxida bantta aawata mala ba wozina muumisida.
2Kings17:15 Iza maara
2Kings17:16 GODAY istta Xoossay istta azazidayssa ubbaa polibeettenna; mara misle nam7atanne asheeri misle ooththida. Salo xoolinttessinne ba7aales goynnida.
2Kings17:17 Hessaththoka ba attuma naytanne ba macca nayta taman xuuggiza yarshos shiishshida; maroththidanne muurennida; GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththanaas banttanateththa bayzida; izakka hanqos denththeththida.
2Kings17:18 Hessa gishshas GODAY istta bolla keehi hanqettides; Yuhuda qommoti xalla attaafe hankko Isra7eele deraa ba sinththafe haassides.
2Kings17:19 Yuhuda qommoti gidikkoka kase Isra7eeleppe ekkida loseta kaallida attiin GODAA bantta Xoossa azazota naagibeettenna.
2Kings17:20 Hessa gishshas GODAY Isra7eele asa ubbaaka aggides; un7eththidessinne ba sinththafe digganaashe gakkanaas di7izayta kushen aaththi immides.
2Kings17:21 Izi Isra7eele asaa Dawite keeththafe shaakkidaappe guye istti Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aame kawoththida; Iyorba7aameykka Isra7eeley GODAA kaallontta mala baleththidi gita nagara oosisides.
2Kings17:22 Isra7eele asaykka Iyorba7aame nagaran minni eqqides; hessafe simmibeenna.
2Kings17:23 GODAY ba aylleta nabeta baggara isttas kase minththi yootida mala ba sinththafe istta diggana gakkanaas istti nagara ooso gujji gujji bida; hessa gishshas Isra7eele derey ba dereppe di7etti Asoore dere bides; ha7ikka heen dees.
2Kings17:24 Asoore kawoy dereza Baabilooneppe
2Kings17:25 Istti heen duus doommida mala GODAAS goyno aggaagida; hessa gishshas GODAY gaammota istta bolla yeddides; gaammoti isttafe amardayta menththereththi wodhida.
2Kings17:26 Asoore kawos
2Kings17:27 Hessafe guye Asoore kawozi
2Kings17:28 Hessa gishshas Samaariyappe istti di7i efida qeesetappe issoy Beetele simmidi asay GODAAS wostti goynnanaakko tamaarsides.
2Kings17:29 Gidikkoka asay ba zarkken zarkken ba diza kataman kataman baas xoos medhdhides; hessaka kase Samaariya dere asay zumbullata bolla goynnizasohotan efi efi essides.
2Kings17:30 Baabilooneppe yidayti Sukoote-Benoote ooththida; Kutappe yidayti Nerigale ooththida; Hamaateppe yidayti Ashmaate ooththida;
2Kings17:31 Aweti Elibazarenne Taritaqe geetettiza eeqa xoossata ooththida. Sefarwaymeppe yidayti Adiramelekenne Anameleke geetettiza eeqa xoossatas bantta nayta xuugettiza yarshos shiishshida.
2Kings17:32 GODAAS goynnida; gido attiin issi issi qommoti kase ba yida deraa lose kaallida; zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata haggaziza qeeseta shuumida.
2Kings17:33 Istti issi baggara GODAAS goynnishe hara baggara qasse kase bantta kawoteththa lose mala bantta eeqa xoossatas goynneettes.
2Kings17:34 He loseza hach gakkanaas aggibeettenna; GODAAS bessiza mala goynnettenna; Isra7eele gi xeygida Yaaqoobe qommotas izi immida maaratanne zoreta
2Kings17:35 GODAY kase Isra7eele asatara caaqo qaala geliza wode
2Kings17:36 Gido attiin intte goynnanaas bessizay ba gita wolqqaninne micettida ba kushen inttena Gibxe biittafe kessida GODAAS xalla gido. Intte izas xalla goynnitenne izas yarshite.
2Kings17:37 Izi inttes xaafida maaratanne zoreta
2Kings17:38 Tani inttenara caaqettida caaqoza balopite; eeqa xoossas goynnofte.
2Kings17:39 Intte morkketa ubbaa kusheppe inttena ashshizay iza gidida gishshas GODAA intte Xoossas goynnite» gi azazi woththides.
2Kings17:40 Gido attiin istti kase bantta losen minni eqqida attiin simmibeettenna.
2Kings17:41 Hayti ha dereti issi baggara GODAAS goynnikokka hara baggara qasse ba giigsida eeqa xoossatas haggazeettes. Istta naytinne isttas nayta naytikka kase istta aawati ooththida mala ha7ikka izaththo ooththeettes.
2Kings18:1 Isra7eele kawo Eela naa Hose7ey kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Yuhuda kawo Akaaze naa Hizqiyaasi kawotides.
2Kings18:2 Izi kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 29 layth haarides. Iza aayeya Zakaraasa naa Abiyo geetettawus.
2Kings18:3 Iza aawa Dawiti GODAA sinththan ooththida mala izikka lo7o ooththides.
2Kings18:4 Zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata menththereththi yeggides; asheeri misle tuussatakka qanxxereththi yeggides; qasse Musey xarqimalappe ooththida shooshshaaka menththereththides; gaasoykka he wodey gakkanaaska Isra7eele asay izas exaane cuwasishe gam7ida gishshassa; he shooshshaa sunththay Nahushttaan geetettees.
2Kings18:5 Hizqiyaasikka GODAA Isra7eele Xoossan ammanettides; izappe kase gidiin woykko guyeppe kawotida Yuhuda kawota ubbatan iza malay deenna.
2Kings18:6 Izi GODAARA oyketti uttides; izi GODAA kaaloppe guye gibeenna; GODAY Muses immida azazotakka naagides.
2Kings18:7 GODAY izara diza gishshas izi ooththiza miish ubbay izas polettides; izi Asoore kawora eqettidi izas giira giirontta ixxides.
2Kings18:8 Biidi Gaaza zawa gakkanaassinne Filisxeeme asay naagiza shakkoy dizaso gakkanaas gimbetti uttida katamayo xooni oykkides.
2Kings18:9 Hizqiyaasi ba kawotida oydanththa layththan
2Kings18:10 Heedzdzanththo layththa wurseththan oykkides; Samaariyay oykettiday Hizqiyaasi kawotida usuppunththa layththan Hose7ey Isra7eele bolla kawotida uddufunththa layththanna.
2Kings18:11 Asoore kawoy Isra7eele asaa di7i Asoore efidi Alahen
2Kings18:12 Hessi istta bolla gakkida gaasoykka kase GODAA aylle Musey isttas yootida qaala ubbaa istti siyontta ixxidi caaqo qaala laallida gishshassa; iza azazotakka wozinan woththi siyibeettennanne polibeettenna.
2Kings18:13 Hizqiyaasay kawotida tammanne oydanththa layththan Asoore kawo Senakireemey gimbetti diza Yuhuda katamata ubbaa bolla meto gaththi oykkides.
2Kings18:14 Hessa gishshas Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasi
2Kings18:15 Hessa gishshas Hizqiyaasi Xoossa Keeththaninne ba kawoteththa keeththan diza bira ubbaa izas immides.
2Kings18:16 He wode Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasi Xoossa Keeththa sanqqata bollanne qosilaththata bolla meeshettida worqqata Asoore kawos shoddi shoddi immides.
2Kings18:17 Asoore kawoy Laakisheppe ba olanchchata azazizaytas waanna gadawaza
2Kings18:18 Kawozaakko yeddida; hessafe guye kawoteththa keeththan waanna azaziza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey
2Kings18:19 Olanchchata kaaleththiza gadawazi isttas
2Kings18:20 Neni taas ola erateththinne wolqqay dees gaasa; gido attiin hessi wore xalla; neni ta bolla makkalliday oonan ammanettadaa?
2Kings18:21 Neni izin ammanettiza Gibxey izin zemppishin meqqi wodhdhidi kushen eqqiza dinccettida maqqa mala; Gibxe kawo Paarooneykka banan ammanettiza asa ubbaasikka hessa mala› giidi yootite.
2Kings18:22 Qasseka neni
2Kings18:23 «Izi nees hankko ta godaza Asoore kawora mandetta; neni toganchchata demmana dandaykko ta nees 2
2Kings18:24 Neni ceeqettizay Gibxe para-gaaretaninne Gibxe paratan gidikkoka ta godazappe garsara diza olanchchata shuumetappe haray attoshin issaa ne wostta zaarana dandayay?
2Kings18:25 Hessafe bollara tani meto ne bolla gaththada hanno sohoyo dhayssanaas GODAA sheney baynda yidaa misatizee? Tani hanno dereyo worajja dhayssana mala taas yootiday GODAA» gides.
2Kings18:26 Hessafe guye Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey
2Kings18:27 Olanchchata gadawazi zaaridi
2Kings18:28 Hessafe guye olanchchata gadawazi eqqidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi Ibraaweta qaalara
2Kings18:29 Kawoy
2Kings18:30 Qasseka Hizqiyaasi isttas
2Kings18:31 «Hizqiyaasi inttena gizayssa siyopite; Asoore kawoy
2Kings18:32 Hessika hananay tani inttena gede intte biittayo misatiza soho kaththinne woyne ushshi
2Kings18:33 Asoore kawo kusheppe biitta bolla diza xoossatappe ba kawoteth ashshiday oonee?
2Kings18:34 Hamaate eeqa xoossatinne Arfaade eeqa xoossati ane awan dizoo? Sefarwayme
2Kings18:35 Hayta ha dereta eeqa xoossatappe ba dere ta kusheppe ashshana dandayday oonee? Histtiin GODAY Yerusalaame ta kusheppe wostti woththi ekkana dandayzee?» gides.
2Kings18:36 Gido attiin derezi co7u gides; izas aykkoka zaaribeenna; kawozi
2Kings18:37 Hessafe guye kawoteththa keeththa azaziza Kilqiyaasa naa Elyaaqeemey
2Kings19:1 Kawo Hizqiyaasi hessa siyidi ba may7o daakkides; maaqa may7idi Xoossa keeth gelides.
2Kings19:2 Hessafekka kawoteththa keeththan azaziza Elyaaqeemey
2Kings19:3 Isttika izas
2Kings19:4 De7o Xoossaa kawushshanaas ba goda Asoore kawoy yeddida gadawaa qaala ubbaaka GODAA ne Xoossay siyidaa gidana; izi siyida qaalaa gishshas GODAA ne Xoossay iza hanqana mala neni shemppora paxa diza asaas Xoossa woossarkkii!› gides» gida.
2Kings19:5 Kawo Hizqiyaasa shuumeti Isayaasakko yida wode
2Kings19:6 Isayaasi isttas
2Kings19:7 Tani iza bolla hessa mala ayana yeddana; izikka wore siyidi guye ba dere simmi baana; izi heen mashshan hayqqana mala ta iza ooththana› gi yootite» gides.
2Kings19:8 Olanchchata gadawazikka Asoore kawoy Laakisheppe dendi bidayssa siyidi guye simmides; kawozi Libinara olettishin demmides.
2Kings19:9 He wode Tophphiya dere yeleta gidida Gibxe kawo Tiraaqey iza olanaas yuussa bolla dizayssa Senakireemey siyides; hessa gishshas zaareththidi Hizqiyaasakko qasttanneta bolla dabdaabbe
2Kings19:10 «Intte biidi Yuhuda kawo Hizqiyaasas
2Kings19:11 Hayssafe kase aydekka Asoore kawoti dere ubbaa bolla ay ooththidaakko ne siyadasa; izi istta mulera dhayssides; histtiin neni kessa ekkada attanaaz nees misatizee?
2Kings19:12 Kase ta aawati dhayssida kawoteththata Gozaanen
2Kings19:13 Hamaate kawotinne Arfaade kawoti ha7i awan dizoo? Sefarwayme katama kawozi awan dizee? Qasseka Heena kawoynne Iwa kawoti ha7i awan dizoo?» gi kiittides.
2Kings19:14 Hizqiyaasi Dabdaabeza qasttanneta kusheppe ekki nababides; hessafe guye pude GODAA Keeth kezidi dabdaabbeza GODAA sinththan miccides.
2Kings19:15 Hessafe guye Hizqiyaasi GODAAKKO
2Kings19:16 GODAWU! Ha7i neni ne hayth yeggada hayssa siya; neni ne ayfetakka doyada xeella; Senakireemey de7o Xoossaa cayanaas kiittida qaala ezga.
2Kings19:17 «Abeet GODAWU; Asoore kawoti hayta kawoteththatanne istti biitta tumukka dhayssida;
2Kings19:18 Istta eeqa xoossatakka taman yeggi xuuggi dhayssida; isttika asa kushen miththafenne shuchchafe oosettidayta attiin xoos gidettenna.
2Kings19:19 Ha7ikka GODAWU nu Xoossawu! Neni xalla Xoossa gididayssa ha biittaa bolla diza kawoteththati erana mala iza kusheppe nuna ashsha» gi woossides.
2Kings19:20 Hessafe guye Amoxe naa Isayaasi kawo Hizqiyaasas hayssafe kaalli diza kiitaa yeddides. «GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
2Kings19:21 Hessa gishshas GODAY iza bolla yootida qaalay hayssa. «Geela7o Xiyoone naya nena kadhadussinne kawushshadus; Yerusalaame naya ne izi bollara piradhdha bishin ba qoodhe ne bolla qaaththawus.
2Kings19:22 Histtiin ne cayidaynne kawushshiday oonee? Neni ne qaala dhoqqu histtiday oona bollaa? ne otoreteththan dereqa xeellizay oona bollaa? Isra7eele geeshshaza bollayee!
2Kings19:23 Neni qasttannidayta baggara Godaa bolla cash koradasa. Neni
2Kings19:24 « ‹Tani hara deretankka haaththa olla bookkadis; isttafe haath uyadis; Tani ta toho caammatan yedhdhada Gibxe biitta pulttota melissadis› gadasa.
2Kings19:25 «Daro wodeppe sinththan neni gimbettida katamata qoqofada
2Kings19:26 Heen diza asaa wolqqayka cingi wurides; istti dagammidi yeella may7ida; Coo mela demban mokkida atakilte mala
2Kings19:27 «Ne awan uttizaakko
2Kings19:28 Ne ta bolla hanqettida gishshassinne ne kadhey ta hayththan wodhdhida gishshas tani ne siidhen dafo yeggana; tani nena bixala barsana; ne yida ogera nena guye zaarana.
2Kings19:29 «Hizqiyaasa! Hessas malatay hayssafe kaallizayssa; « ‹Ha layth wodhdhi maadhdhidayssa; yiza layth azabba maandeta; heedzdzanththa layththan zeridayssa maxandeta; woyne tura tokkidi iza ayfe maandeta.
2Kings19:30 Ha7ikka Dawite keeththafe casha attidayti bantta xapho duge yeddana; bollarakka ayfe immana.
2Kings19:31 Yerusalaamen shemppora paxa attidayti
2Kings19:32 «GODAY Asoore kawo gishshas
2Kings19:33 Izi ba yida ogera simmi baana; ha katamayo mulera simmi gelenna.
2Kings19:34 Ta gishshassinne ta aylle Dawite gishshas gaada hanno katamayo tani gondalla ashshana› gees.»
2Kings19:35 He gallassa omars GODAA kiitanchchay kezidi Asoore asay dunkaani uttidasohon 185
2Kings19:36 Asoore kawo Senakireemey heeppe dendi bides; guye Nannawe simmi biidi heen uttides.
2Kings19:37 Issi gallas Nisraake geetettiza ba eeqa xoossaa keeth gelidi izi heen goynnishin iza nayti Adiramelekeynne Sarsarey iza mashshan siifi wodhida; heeppe kessi ekkidi Araraate gakkanaas baqatida; iza naa Aseradooney izasohon kawotides.
2Kings20:1 He wode Hizqiyaasi daro sakettidi shemppo bolla dishin Amoxe naa nabe Isayaasi izakko biidi
2Kings20:2 Hizqiyaasikka gede goda bagga simmidi GODAAKKO woossishe
2Kings20:3 «Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne sinththan ammaneteththan
2Kings20:4 Isayaasi buro kawo keeththaa zago kanththi bishin GODAA achchafe izas
2Kings20:5 «Neni guye simmada ta dereza halaqa Hizqiyaasas
2Kings20:6 Ta ne layththaa bolla 15 layth gujjana; nenanne hanno katamayo Asoore kawo kusheppe ashshana; tani ta gishshassinne ta aylle Dawite gishshas gaada hanno ha katamayo naagana› ga» giza qaalay yides.
2Kings20:7 Hessafe guye Isayaasi
2Kings20:8 Hizqiyaasi
2Kings20:9 Isayaasikka izas zaaridi
2Kings20:10 Hizqiyaasi izas
2Kings20:11 Nabe Isayaasi hessafe guye pude GODAAS waassides; GODAYKKA Akaazey ooththida kechchaa bolla wodhdhida kuwaza 10 kech guye simmana mala ooththides.
2Kings20:12 He wode Baabiloone kawo Balidaane naa Marodoke-Baldaane Hizqiyaasi sakettidayssa siyida gishshas Hizqiyaasas dabdaabbenne imota yeddides.
2Kings20:13 Hizqiyaasikka qasttanneta mokki ekkidi ba miish ubbaa woththiza keeththan diza bira
2Kings20:14 Hessafe guye Isayaasi Hizqiyaasakko biidi
2Kings20:15 Nabezikka iza
2Kings20:16 Hessafe guye Isayaasi Hizqiyaasas
2Kings20:17 GODAY
2Kings20:18 Neeppe yelettida ne naytappe baggati di7ettidi baananne Baabiloone deren istti kawo keeththan gundulata gidi daana» gides.
2Kings20:19 Hizqiyaasikka
2Kings20:20 Hizqiyaasa kawoteththa layththatan hanida hara miishshati
2Kings20:21 Hizqiyaasi hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Minaasey izasohon kawotides.
2Kings21:1 Minaasey kawotiza wode izas layththay 12; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 55 layth haarides; iza aaya Hafeseebo geetettawus.
2Kings21:2 Minaasey GODAY Isra7eele sinththafe gooddi kessida harassiza kawoteththata lose kaallidi GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides.
2Kings21:3 Kase iza aawa Hizqiyaasi zumbullata bolla diza eeqa xoossata keeth laallidayssa zaari keexxides; Isra7eele kawo Akaabey ooththoyssaththo izikka Ba7aales yarsho yarshizaso giigsides. Asheeri misle tuus essides; hessaththoka salo xoolinttetaska goynnides.
2Kings21:4 GODAY
2Kings21:5 Xoossa Keeththa zago nam7atan salo xoolinttetas goynnanasohota giigsides.
2Kings21:6 Ba naaza xuugettiza yarsho histti shiishshides; histtidi muurennizayta
2Kings21:7 Izi ba massi giigsida Asheeri misleza Xoossa Keeththa giddon woththides. Hessika GODAY kase Dawite naa Solomoones
2Kings21:8 Gidikkoka tani istta azazidayssa ubbaaka istti minni polettonne ta aylle Musey kase isttas immida wogaza istti poli naagetto attiin hayssafe guye Isra7eele asaa kase istta aawatas immida biittafe istti kezidi waayettana mala ta ooththike» gida qaalay hayssa ha sohoza gishshassa.
2Kings21:9 Derezi gidikko hessa siyibeenna; kase GODAY dhayssida kawoteththatappekka bollara istti iita ooththana mala Minaasey asaa baleththides.
2Kings21:10 GODAY ba aylle nabeta baggara hizgi yootides;
2Kings21:11 «Yuhuda kawo Minaasey hayssa shuunniza iita nagara ooththides; izi kase baappe kase diza Amoore dere asaappeka bollara iita ooththides. Yuhuda asaakka eeqatan baleththides.
2Kings21:12 Hessa gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay siyidaade hayththas iitiza meto tani Yerusalaame bollanne Yuhuda bolla yeddana.
2Kings21:13 Tani Samaariyas giigsida wadha wodoro
2Kings21:14 Casha attida ta xinxxota tani aggana; tani istta istta morkketas aaththa immana; istti ba morkketas di7o miish gidana.
2Kings21:15 Tani hessaththo ooththiza gaasoykka istti kase ba aawati Gibxeppe kezoosofe hanno gakkanaas istti ta sinththan iita ooso ooththidi tana hanqos denththeththida gishshassa» gides.
2Kings21:16 Harappeka Minaasey Yuhuda asay Xoossa sinththan iita ooththana mala istti nagara oosisida nagaraappe harakka Yerusalaames ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas xillo gidida daro asaa suuth gussides.
2Kings21:17 Minaase kawoteththa wode hanida hara miish ba ooththida nagaraa bolla gujjidi izi ooththiday ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings21:18 Minaasey kase ba aawata mala hayqqides; izi Ooza atakilte giddon diza duufon moogettides; iza naazi Amooneykka izasohon kawotides.
2Kings21:19 Amooney kawotishin izas layththay 22; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 2 layth haarides. Iza aaya Mesolamo geetettawus; iza Yaxiba dere as Haruse naa.
2Kings21:20 Iza aawa Minaasey ooththoyssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
2Kings21:21 Kase ba aaway bida ogezara izikka bides; kase ba aaway goynnida eeqa xoossatas goynnidessinne isttas hokki gulbatides.
2Kings21:22 Kase ba GODAA Xoossa aggaagides; izi GODAA ogen bibeenna.
2Kings21:23 Amoone dere shuumeti makkallida; kawozakka kawoteththa keeththa giddon wodhida.
2Kings21:24 Hessafe guye he dere asay kawo Amoone bolla dendidi iza wodhides; iza naaza Iyosiyaasakka izasohon kawoththida.
2Kings21:25 Amooney kawoti diza wode hanida hara oosoy izi poliday ubbayka Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafatan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings21:26 Izi Ooza atakilte giddon diza duufon moogettides; iza naazi Iyosiyaasi izasohon kawotides.
2Kings22:1 Iyosiyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay 8. Izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 31 layth haarides; iza aaya Boxiqaate
2Kings22:2 Iyosiyaasi GODAA sinththan lo7o ooththides; kase iza aawa Dawiti bida ogera bides; hadirsika ushachchika gibeenna.
2Kings22:3 Izi kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan Iyosiyaasi Mashulaame naaza naa Axaaliya naaza xaafeza Saafaane GODAA Keeth kiittidi
2Kings22:4 «Neni qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasakko ba; baada penge naagizayti deraappe GODAA Keeththas shiishshidi gelththida miishshay ay keenakko Kilqiyaasi qoodana mala ooththa.
2Kings22:5 Hessika GODAA Keeththa oosoza kaalli oosisana mala shuumettida asatas immetto; isttika GODAA Keeth ooraththiza oosanchchatas immetto.
2Kings22:6 Istti miishshaa anaaxetas
2Kings22:7 Asati ammanettidayta gidida gishshas isttas imettida miishsha kaallanaas koshshenna» gides.
2Kings22:8 Qeeseta halaqa Kilqiyaasi xaafe Saafaanes
2Kings22:9 Hessafe guye xaafezi Saafaaney kawozaakko biidi
2Kings22:10 Hessafe guye xaafezi Saafaaney kawozas
2Kings22:11 Kawozikka woga maxaafaza qaala siyidi ba may7o daakkides.
2Kings22:12 Hessafe guye qeese halaqa Kilqiyaasa
2Kings22:13 «Intte biidi ta gishshas
2Kings22:14 Qeese Kilqiyaasi
2Kings22:15 Nabeyakka
2Kings22:16 ‹GODAY Yuhuda kawozi nababida maxaafaan xaafettida bashshaa ubbaa tani hayssa ha sohoza bollanne deraa bolla ehana.
2Kings22:17 Asay tana aggidi hara eeqa xoossatas exaane cuwasida gishshas
2Kings22:18 GODAA oychchanaas inttena haa kiitti yeddida Yuhuda kawozas hayssafe kaallizayssa yootite; ‹Neni siyida yo7oza gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
2Kings22:19 istti qanggettanayssanne dhayanayssa tani hayssa ha sohoza bollanne dereza bolla kase yootidayssa neni siyada ne wozinay meqqiin nenateththaa GODAA sinththan kawushshadanne ne may7oka daakkada ta sinththan ne yeekkida gishshas GODAY nena siyadis.
2Kings22:20 Hessa gishshas tani nena ne aawatan gaththana; neni saron duufon gelana; tani hayssa ha deraa bolla ehana metoza ne ayfey be7enna› gees gi yootite» gadus. Hee bida qasttanneti zaaroza kawozas ekki bida.
2Kings23:1 Hessafe guye kawozi Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen diza cima as ubbaa xeygides;
2Kings23:2 Yuhuda asaynne Yerusalaamen diza asay ubbay qeesetinne nabeti ubbaafe naappe cima gakkanaas ubbaa GODAA Keeth ekki yides; GODAA Keeththafe beettida caaqo qaala maxaafa istti bantta hayththan siyana mala ubbaa nababides.
2Kings23:3 Kawozi worqqa tuussa achchan GODAA sinththan eqqidi GODAA kaallanaas iza azazota
2Kings23:4 Kawozi Ba7aales
2Kings23:5 Yuhuda katamataninne Yerusalaame yuushon diza zumbullata bolla exaane cuwasana mala kase Yuhuda kawoti eeqa xoossatas shuumida qeesetakka gooddides; hessaththoka ba7aales
2Kings23:6 Asheeri misle GODAA Keeththafe kessidi Yerusalaameppe karera diza gede Qediroone shoobba efidi heen xuuggides; gaacci liiqisidi deraa duufon laallides.
2Kings23:7 GODAA keeththa giddon goyno woga ooththidi addey addera parattiza kifiletanne maccassati Asheersi may7os suqiza kifileta laallides.
2Kings23:8 Iyosiyaasi qeeseta ubbaa Yuhuda katama garsafe Yerusalaame kessides. Geebappe doommidi Bersaabehe gakkanaas qeeseti istta bolla exaane cuwasiza zumbullata tunisides. Katamays hadirsa baggara diza katamayo haariza Iyaaso penge achchara diza pengetan goynnizasohota laallides.
2Kings23:9 Zumbullata bolla goynnizasota Yerusalaamen GODAAS yarshosohota haggazontta aggikokka qeese gidida ba ishatara irshoy bochchontta uketh meettes.
2Kings23:10 Henoome naa shoobban diza Toofeete geetettiza goynnizasohoza tunisides; ay asikka attuma naa gidiin woykko macca naa Molookes taman xuuggi yarshontta malassa.
2Kings23:11 Yuhuda kawoti GODAA Keeththe geliza sohon awa arshes goynnanaas immida parata heeppe diggides. Heytikka Naataan-Meleeke geetettiza issi shuumeza keeththa matan diza dubbushan deettes. Iyosiyaasikka awa arshes goynnana mala imettida para-gaareta taman xuuggides.
2Kings23:12 Yuhuda kawoti pude Akaaze ilpinne achchan pooqe bolla ooththida yarshosohota
2Kings23:13 Hessaththoka Yerusalaameppe arshey mokkiza baggara tunateththa zumaappe dugeha baggan Isra7eele kawo Solomooney Sidoonata tunateththa xoos Astarootes
2Kings23:14 Ha7ikka Iyosiyaasi asay isttas goynniza shuchcha hawulteta menththereththi yeggides; Asheeri misle tuussatakka qanxxereththi yeggides; he sohotakka asa meqeth kunththides.
2Kings23:15 Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisida Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey ooththida yarshosohoza
2Kings23:16 Iyosiyaasi yuushshi xeelliza wode zumbulla bolla diza duufota be7ides; meqeththata duufotappe kessidi Xoossa asi kase yootida mala GODAA qaalay polettana mala yarsho yarshizasohoza tunisanaas iza bolla xuuggides.
2Kings23:17 Kawozikka
2Kings23:18 Iyosiyaasikka
2Kings23:19 Iyosiyaasi Beetelen ooththida mala Samaariya kataman zumbullata bolla Isra7eele kawoti kase oosisidaytanne GODAA hanqeththida eeqa xoossa keeththata ubbaa dhayssidessinne tunisides.
2Kings23:20 Iyosiyaasi heyta zumbullata bolla goynnizasohotan ooththiza qeeseta ubbaa yarsho yarshizasohota bolla shukkides; he yarshosohota bollaka asa meqeth xuuggides; hessafe guye Yerusalaame simmides.
2Kings23:21 Kawozi kumeththa deraas
2Kings23:22 Kase Isra7eele kaaleththida daannata wodeppe doommidi Isra7eele kawotanne Yuhuda kawota wode ubbaan hessa mala Paaziga ba7aaley bonchchetti erenna.
2Kings23:23 Iyosiyaasi kawotidi tamman osppunththa layththan hayssi ha Paazigazi Yerusalaamen GODAAS bonchchettides.
2Kings23:24 Hessafe bollara Iyosiyaasi moytille haasayssizayta
2Kings23:25 Kase Muse wogan xaafettida mala ba kumeththa wozinappe
2Kings23:26 Gido attiin hayssi ubbay haniinkka Minaasey GODAA hanqeththanaas ooththida iita ooso ubbaa gaason GODAY Yuhuda bolla hanqettida tama mala babisiza hanqozappe irxxibeenna.
2Kings23:27 Hessa gishshas GODAY
2Kings23:28 Iyosiyaasa kawoteththa layththan oosettida oosoti
2Kings23:29 Iyosiyaasi kawoteththan diza wode Gibxe kawo Faroon-Nikay Asoore kawo maaddanaas gede Efiraaxise shaafa bides; kawo Iyosiyaasikka izara olettanaas kezides; gido attiin Faroon-Nikay izara tiran gayttidi iza Magiddon wodhides.
2Kings23:30 Iyosiyaasa oosanchchati iza ahaza Magiddofe para-gaaren Yerusalaame ekki ehidi iza duufon moogida. Iza dere asay Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7akaaze efides; tiydi iza aawaa sohon iza kawoththida.
2Kings23:31 Iyo7akaazi kawotiza wode izas layththay 23
2Kings23:32 Kase iza aawati ooththoyssaththo izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
2Kings23:33 Izi Yerusalaamen uttidi kawotontta mala Faroon-Nikay Hamaate deren Erebila geetettizason iza sansalatan qachchides. Yuhuda bolla 3
2Kings23:34 Kawo Faroon-Nikay Iyosiyaasa naa Elyaaqeeme iza aawa sohon kawoththides; iza sunththaaka laammidi Iyo7aaqeme gi sunththides. Gido attiin Iyo7akaaze di7i Gibxe efides; histtiin izi heen hayqqides.
2Kings23:35 Iyo7aaqemeykka Paaroon-Nikay iza oychchida biranne worqqa izas qanxxides; izi hessa ooththanaas biitta bolla giira yeggides; he dere asay ba wolqqa wolqqa mala biranne worqqa giirana mala ooththides.
2Kings23:36 Iyo7aaqemey kawotiza wode izas layththay 25; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 11 layth haarides. Iza aaya Zebido geetettawus; iza Uruume dere as Paddaya naa.
2Kings23:37 Iyo7aaqemey kase iza aawati ooththida mala GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
2Kings24:1 Iyo7aaqemey kawotiza wode Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Yuhuda bolla worajjides; Iyo7aaqemeykka izas 3 layth giirides. Hessafe guye izi ba qofa laammidi Nabukadanaxoore bolla makkallides.
2Kings24:2 GODAY Baabilooneppe
2Kings24:3 Izi istta ba sinththafe haassana mala hayti ha yo7oti ubbay GODAY azazida mala Yuhuda bolla polettana dandayda; hessika Minaasey ooththida nagara gishshassinne izi polida hano ubbaa gishshassa;
2Kings24:4 Qasseka izi xillo suuth gussida gishshassa. Yerusalaameykka xillo suuththan kumana mala izi ooththida gishshas GODAY iza maaranaas koyibeenna.
2Kings24:5 Iyo7aaqeme kawoteththa layththan hanida hanotinne oosettida hara oosoti ubbay Yuhuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetti dees gidennee?
2Kings24:6 Iyo7aaqemeykka hayqqidi ba aawatan gayttides; iza naa Iyo7aakiney izasohon kawotides.
2Kings24:7 Baabiloone kawoy haaththi baynda Gibxe shaafatappe biidi Efiraaxise shaafa gakkanaas izi haariza dereta ubbaa iza kusheppe woththi ekkida gishshas Gibxe kawozi ba dereppe zaari ola olettanaas kezibeenna.
2Kings24:8 Iyo7aakiney kawotiza wode izas layththay 18; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 3 agina haarides; iza aaya Nehishitto geetettawus; iza Yerusalaame as Elnataane naa.
2Kings24:9 Kase iza aaway ooththoyssaththoka Iyo7aakiney GODAA sinththan iita ooso ooththides.
2Kings24:10 He wode Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoore ola gadawati Yerusalaame yiidi katamayo giddoththida.
2Kings24:11 Ola gadawati katamayo giddoththiza wode Nabukadanaxoorey ba hu7era he katamayo yides.
2Kings24:12 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakine aaya
2Kings24:13 GODAY kaseti yootida mala Nabukadanaxoorey Xoossa Keeththaninne kawo keeththan diza aqota ubbaa denththi efides. Isra7eele kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththas worqqafe oosisida miish ubbaa ekki bides.
2Kings24:14 Qasseka Yerusalaame asaa ubbaa
2Kings24:15 Nabukadanaxoorey Iyo7aakine di7i ekkidi Baabiloone efides; hessaththoka kawoza aayeyo
2Kings24:16 Qasseka Baabiloone kawoy minonne olas gakkida 7
2Kings24:17 Hessafe guye Iyo7aakine aawa isha Maataaniya izasohon kawoththides; iza sunththaa laammidi Sedeqiyaasa gi sunththides.
2Kings24:18 Sedeqiyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay 21; izi Yerusalaamen uttidi 11 layth haarides; iza aaya Amxalo geetettawus; iza Libina as Ermaasa biyo.
2Kings24:19 Iyo7aaqemey ooththida mala izikka GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
2Kings24:20 Hayssi ubbay Yerusalaame bollanne Yuhuda bolla gakkanaas dandayday GODAA hanqo gaasonna; wurseththan izi istta ba sinththafe haassides. Sedeqiyaasi Baabiloone kawo bolla makkallides.
2Kings25:1 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufunththa layththan tammanththa aginan tammanththa gallas Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba olanchchata ubbaa ekkidi Yerusalaame bolla worajjides; katamay gimbefe kare baggara yuuyi aadhdhi giddoththi uttida.
2Kings25:2 Katamayakka Sedeqiyaasi kawoti diza tammanne issinththa layth gakkanaas hessaththo giddoththetta uttadus.
2Kings25:3 Oydanththa aginan uddufunththo gallas katamay giddon dendida koshay daro minnida gishshas asaas doonan baadhizaazi dhaydes.
2Kings25:4 Baabiloone olanchchati katamayo giddoththi uttidi issi baggara katamay gimbe menththi gelida; Yuhuda olanchchati ubbayka kawo atakilte achchan diza nam7u gimbeta giddora diza pengezara kanththidi omarsara duge Yordaanoose shoobba gakkanaas baqatida.
2Kings25:5 Gido attiin Baabiloone olanchchati kawoza kaalettidi Iyarkko demban gakkida. Olanchchati ubbay kawoza aggaagi laalettida.
2Kings25:6 Kawozikka heen oykettides; he wode iza Erebilan diza Baabiloone kawozaakko ehida; iza bolla pirday pirdettides.
2Kings25:7 Sedeqiyaasi ba ayfen be7ishin iza nayta wodhida; hessafe guye iza ayfe nam7ata wooci kessidi xarqimala sansalatara qachchi Baabiloone dere efida.
2Kings25:8 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida tammanne uddufunththa layththan ichchashanththa aginan laappunththa gallassan izas bonchcho zabeta azazizayssinne Baabiloone kawozas daro dhoqqa shuume gidida Nabuzaradaaney Yerusalaame yides.
2Kings25:9 GODAA Keeth
2Kings25:10 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssa kaallida kumeththa Baabiloone olanchchati Yerusalaame yuushon diza gimbeza laalli yeggida.
2Kings25:11 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssi he katamayn casha attidayta
2Kings25:12 Gidikkoka Nabuzaradaaney asaa garsafe putteesa manqotappe amardayta woyne tokkana malanne gade goyana mala heen aggides.
2Kings25:13 Baabiloone dere asay xarqimalappe oosettida tuussata
2Kings25:14 Hessaththoka qeeri xaarota
2Kings25:15 Kawo bonchcho naagiza zabeta azazizayssi muuruta worqqafenne birappe oosettida xuu7atanne wuxxiza miishshas go7ettiza shel7eta ekki bides.
2Kings25:16 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththan go7ettanaas giidi xarqimalappe oosisida nam7u tuussati
2Kings25:17 Tuussati issoy issoy 18 wadha gidishin xarqimalappe oosettida qusttey dees; he qustteza adussateththay heedzdzu wadha gidishin Yuuyi aadhdhanaas xarqimalappe oosettida sansalatanne Oroomaane miththa ayfe misateettes; hankko attida tuussazikka koyroyssa mala.
2Kings25:18 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azazizayssi qeeseta halaqa Saraya
2Kings25:19 He wode gakkanaas katamay giddon attidaytappe olanchchata halaqanne kawo zoriza 5 asata ekki bides; qasse deraa giddofe olas asaa dooriza ola gadawaa xaafeza
2Kings25:20 Kawo bonchcho naagizayta azaziza Nabuzaradaaney heyta ubbaa Erebilan diza Baabiloone kawozaakko efides.
2Kings25:21 Kawozikka he asaa Hamaate biittan heen Erebilan woththisides. Yuhuday ba biittafe hessa malan di7etti bides.
2Kings25:22 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Saafaanes naaza naa Akiqaame naa Godoliyaasa casha attida Yuhuda asaa bolla shuumides.
2Kings25:23 Kumeththa olanchchata gadawatinne istta asati Baabiloone kawoy Godoliyaasa deraa ayssanaas shuumidayssa siyidi izi dizaso Mixiphpha gakkanaas yida; isttika Nataniya naa Isma7eele
2Kings25:24 Gadoliyaasikka
2Kings25:25 Gido attiin laappunththa aginan kawo zereth gidida Elshamas naaza naa Nataniya naa Isma7eeley banara tammu asata ekki yiidi Godoliyaasa
2Kings25:26 Baabiloone asaas babbida gishshas gashey
2Kings25:27 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakiney di7ettida heedzdzu tammanne laappunththa layththan tammanne nam7anththo aginan nam7u tammanne laappunththa gallas Yori-Marodeeqey Baabiloonen kawotida layth Iyo7aakine qashoppe birshi yeddides.
2Kings25:28 Lo7o qaalan iza haasayssides; kase izara issife Baabiloonen diza kawotappe bollara izas bonchcho soho immides.
2Kings25:29 Iyo7aakineykka qasho keeththan dishe may7iza may7o qaari yeggides; hayqqana gakkanaas ubba wode kawoza maaddafe mishe gam7ides.
2Kings25:30 Kawozi Iyo7aakines izi hayqqana gakkanaas hachchis hachchis gidiza qallaba izas immides.
1Chronicles1:1 Addaamey Seete yelides; Seetey Heenoose yelides; Heenoosey Qaynaane yelides.
1Chronicles1:2 Qaynaaney Malal7eele yelides; Malal7eeley Yaareede yelides.
1Chronicles1:3 Yaareedey Heenooke yelides; Heenookey Maatusaala yelides; Maatusaalay Laameeke yelides.
1Chronicles1:4 Laameekey Nohe yelides; Nohey Seeme
1Chronicles1:5 Yaafeetey
1Chronicles1:6 Goomere nayti Ashkenaaze
1Chronicles1:7 Yaawaane nayti Elishe
1Chronicles1:8 Kaame attuma nayti Kuushe
1Chronicles1:9 Kuushe nayti Seeba
1Chronicles1:10 Kuushey Namuruude yelides; Namuruudeyka alame bolla erettida wolqqama olanchcha gidides.
1Chronicles1:11 Mixiraymey Luudimeta
1Chronicles1:12 Phaxirooseta

1Chronicles1:15 Hiiwetas
1Chronicles1:16 Arwaadetas
1Chronicles1:17 Seeme nayti
1Chronicles1:18 Arfaakisidey Sheelahe yelides; Sheelahey Eboore yelides;
1Chronicles1:19 Eboorey nam7u attuma nayta yelides; issoy yelettida wode sa7ay shaakettida gishshas iza sunththi Peeleege geetettides; nam7anththozi Yoqixaane geetettides.

1Chronicles1:31 Yixure

1Chronicles1:33 Midiyaaneykka Eefa

1Chronicles1:36 Elfaazey Temaane
1Chronicles1:37 Era7u7eeley Nahaate
1Chronicles1:38 Eedoomen koyro de7ida Seyre attuma nayti Looxa
1Chronicles1:39 Looxaane attuma nayti Hoorenne Homaame; Teminaa7a Looxaanes michcho.
1Chronicles1:40 Shobaale attuma nayti Aliwa
1Chronicles1:41 Aanay Dishoone yelides; Dishoone attuma nayti Hemda
1Chronicles1:42 Exeere attuma nayti Bilihaane
1Chronicles1:43 Isra7eelen ay kawoykka kawotanaappe kase Eedoome biittan kawotida kawoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta. Bi7oore naa Beelay kawotides; iza katamaa sunththay Dinaabe.
1Chronicles1:44 Beelay hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Booxira dere as Zaraahe naa Yobaabey kawotides.
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaabey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Temaane dere as Hushamey kawotides.
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Mo7aabe deren Midiyaameta xoonida Badaade naa Hadaadey kawotides; iza katamaya Awite geetettawus.
1Chronicles1:47 Hadaadey hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Maasireeqe dere as Sha7uley kawotides.
1Chronicles1:48 Sha7uley hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Efiraaxise shaafa matan diza Erahoobote dere as Sa7ooli kawotides.
1Chronicles1:49 Sa7ooli hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Akiboore naa Ba7aali-Hanaaney kawotides.
1Chronicles1:50 Ba7aali-Hanaaney hayqqiin izappe kaallidi Paa7u dere as Hadaadey kawotides; iza machcheyakka Mahexabi7eela Mezahaabe naa Maxireeda biyo; hessafe guye Hadaadey hayqqides.
1Chronicles1:51 Eedoomen keehi erettiza halaqati Teminaa7e

1Chronicles2:1 Yaaqoobey 12 attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Oroobeele
1Chronicles2:2 Daane
1Chronicles2:3 Yuhuday Kanaane dere as Shu7a biype Eera
1Chronicles2:4 Yuhudaykka ba naaza machcho Ti7imaarippe Paareesenne Zaraahe geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides; Yuhuday ichchash attuma nayta yelides.
1Chronicles2:5 Paareeseykka Hexiroomenne Hamule geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides.
1Chronicles2:6 Zaraahey ichchashu attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Zimire
1Chronicles2:7 Zaraahe zereththafe gidida Karme naa Akaaney Xoossas dummatida di7o miishshafe kaysotidi qottida gishshas Isra7eele deraa bolla meto ehides.
1Chronicles2:8 Etaaneykka Azaariya geetettiza issi attuma naa yelides.
1Chronicles2:9 Hexiroomey heedzdzu attuma nayta yelides; heytikka Yerahim7eele
1Chronicles2:10 Aaraamey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Yuhuda naytas halaqa gidida Ne7asoone yelides.
1Chronicles2:11 Ne7asooney Salamo yelides; Salamoykka Boo7eeze yelides.
1Chronicles2:12 Boo7eezey Iyoobeede yelides; Iyoobeedeykka Isseye yelides.
1Chronicles2:13 Isseye bayra naazi Elyaabe; Elyaabe kaaloti Abinadaabe
1Chronicles2:14 Natina7eele
1Chronicles2:15 Oxeemenne Dawite.
1Chronicles2:16 Istta michcheti Xuriyanne Abigaalo geetetteettes; Xuriyay Abisaye
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaala Isma7eele zereththafe gidida Yootores Amasa geetettiza attuma naa yeladus.
1Chronicles2:18 Hexiroome naa Kaalebey Azubbo geetettizaaro machcho ekkidi Yir7aato geetettiza macca naa yelides; Yir7aatakka Yeshere
1Chronicles2:19 Azubba hayqqidaappe guye Kaalebey Efraato machcho ekkidi Huure geetettiza attuma naa yelides.
1Chronicles2:20 Huureykka Uure geetettiza attuma naa yelides; Uurey Basli7eele yelides.
1Chronicles2:21 Hexiroomey izas 60 layth kumishin Gala7aade aawa Maakire nayo machcho ekkidi Sagube yelides.
1Chronicles2:22 Sagubeykka Ya7ire yelides; Ya7irey Gala7aade deren diza 23 katamata ayssees.
1Chronicles2:23 Gido attiin Geeshureynne Aaraamey Qenaateninne izi heeran diza 60 qeeri katamatanne Ya7ire katamata oli oykkida; heyti ubbayka Gala7aade aawa Maakire zereththata.
1Chronicles2:24 Hexiroomey Kaalebe Efraata geetettizason hayqqidaappe guye iza machcha Abiyay Tequhe aawa Ashihuure izas yeladus.
1Chronicles2:25 Hexiroomes bayra naazi Yerahim7eeley 5 attuma nayta yelides; heytappe bayrazi Eraama
1Chronicles2:26 Yerahim7eeles Axaaro geetettiza hara machcha dawus; iza Oonname aayo.
1Chronicles2:27 Yerahim7eeles bayra naa Eraamay Maaxe
1Chronicles2:28 Oonnamey Shamayenne Yaadda geetettiza attuma nayta yelides; Shamayey Nadaabenne Abishuure geetettiza attuma nayta yelides.
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuureykka Abihaylo geetettizaaro machcho ekkidi Ahibaanenne Moolide yelides.
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaabey Seledenne Afayme yelides; Seledey gidikko naa yelontta hayqqides.
1Chronicles2:31 Afaymey Yushi7e yelides; Yushi7ey Sheshaane yelides; Sheshaaney Ahilaye yelides.
1Chronicles2:32 Shamaye isha Yaadday Yootorenne Yoonataane yelides; Yootorey gidikko naa yelontta hayqqides.
1Chronicles2:33 Yoonataaney Paletenne Zaaza geetettiza 2 attuma nayta yelides; heyti wurikka Yerahim7eele zereththata.
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshaanes macca naytappe attiin hara attuma nay deenna; izas ooththiza Gibxe dere as Yaraha geetettiza oosanchchay dees.
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshaaney ba macca nayo Yarahas machcho gidana mala immides; izakka izas Attaye geetettiza attuma naa yeladus.
1Chronicles2:36 Attayey Naataane yelides; Naataaney Zabaade yelides;
1Chronicles2:37 Zabaadey Efilaale yelides; Efilaaley Iyoobeede yelides;
1Chronicles2:38 Iyoobeedey Iyu yelides; Iyuy Azaariyaasa yelides;
1Chronicles2:39 Azaariyaasi Heleexe yelides; Heleexey El7aasa yelides;
1Chronicles2:40 El7aasay Sismaye yelides; Sismayey Shaloome yelides;
1Chronicles2:41 Shaloomey Yiqaamiyanne Elshama yelides.
1Chronicles2:42 Yerahim7eele isha Kaalebey bayra naaza Mesha yelides; Meshay Ziife yelides; Ziifey Mareesha yelides; Mareeshayka Kebroone yelides.
1Chronicles2:43 Kebrooneykka Qoore
1Chronicles2:44 Shema7eykka Erahaame yelides; Erahaamey Ereqeeme yelides; Ereqeemey Shamaye yelides.
1Chronicles2:45 Shamayey Ma7oone yelides; Ma7ooneykka Beeti-Xuure yelides.
1Chronicles2:46 Kaalebes Eefo geetettiza laggeththo machcha dawus; Kaalebey izippe Kaaraane
1Chronicles2:47 Yaahiday Ergeme
1Chronicles2:48 Kaalebes Ma7ika geetettiza laggeththo machcha dawus; izakka Sheberenne Tirihaana geetettiza attuma nayta yeladus.
1Chronicles2:49 Qasseka Ma7ika Sha7aafenne Shawa yeladus; Sha7aafey Madimaana yelides; Shaway Makibaanenne Gibi7a yelides. Kaalebes Akisa geetettiza macca nay dawus.
1Chronicles2:50 Kaalebey yelida hara nayti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Kaalebey Efraatippe bayra naaza Uure yelides; Uurey Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime aawa Shobaale.
1Chronicles2:51 Beeteliheeme aawaa Salamonne Beeti-Gadera aawaa Hareefe yelides.

1Chronicles2:55 Yaabexe katamaan diza xaafizayta zareti qasse Tir7ata
1Chronicles3:1 Dawiti Kebroonen dishe yelida attuma nayta sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayta; bayra naa Aminoone Izra7eele dere maccas Ahinahoomppe yelides; iza kaalo Daaneela Qarmeloose dere maccas Abigaalippe yelides.
1Chronicles3:2 Heedzdzanththoza Abeseloome Geeshure kawo Talimaye naa Ma7ikippe yelides. Oydanththoza Adoniyaasa Hagitippe yelides.
1Chronicles3:3 Ichchashanththoza Shafaaxiya Abixaalippe yelides Usuppunththoza Yitiraame Eglippe yelides.
1Chronicles3:4 Hayti usuppunati Dawiti Kebroonen laappun layththinne bagga deraa ayssiza wode yelettida; Dawiti Yerusalaamen 33 layth kawotides.
1Chronicles3:5 Izi heen dishe yelida attuma nayti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Am7eele naa Bersaabeha Shim7a

1Chronicles3:8 Elshama
1Chronicles3:9 Heytappeka hara Dawiti garadetappe yelida attuma nayti deettes; isttaskka Ti7imaaro geetettiza michcha dawus.
1Chronicles3:10 Kawo Solonooney Erobi7aame yelides; Erobi7aamey Abiya yelides; Abiyay Aasa yelides; Aasay Iyoosaafixe yelides;
1Chronicles3:11 Iyoosaafixey Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Akaziyaasa yelides; Akaziyaasi Iyo7aasa yelides;
1Chronicles3:12 Iyo7aasi Amasiyaase yelides; Amasiyaasi Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi Iyo7aatame yelides;

1Chronicles4:2 Shobaaley Era7aye yelides; Era7ayeykka Yahaate yelides; Yahaateykka Xora7aatas koyro aawa gididayta Ahumayenne Lahade yelides.

1Chronicles4:5 Tequhe aawa Ashihuures Heelonne Na7iro geetettiza nam7u machcheti deettes.
1Chronicles4:6 Ashihuurey Na7iro geetettiza ba machcheyfe Ahuzaame
1Chronicles4:7 Qasseka Heelippe Xerete
1Chronicles4:8 Haqoxey Anuube
1Chronicles4:9 Yabeexey ba ishata giddon keehi bonchchettida as gidides; iza aaya

1Chronicles4:13 Qanaazey Otin7eelenne Saraya geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides; Otin7eeleykka Hataatenne Ma7onotaye geetettiza nam7u attuma nayta yelides.
1Chronicles4:14 Ma7onotayey Oofira yelides. Sarayaykka kushe hiillanchchati diza Geharishimo geetettiza katamayo essida Iyo7aabe yelides.

1Chronicles4:18 Mereedey Gadoore aawa Yaareede
1Chronicles4:19 Hoddiyay Nahaamo michcho ekkides; iza Garimite dere as Qi7ila aawaanne Ma7ikate dere as Eshttamo7a aawa yeladus.
1Chronicles4:20 Shimooni Aminoone
1Chronicles4:21 Yuhuda naa Seela zareti Lekka aawaa Eera
1Chronicles4:22 Harati qasse Yoqiime
1Chronicles4:23 Istti kawo keeththa oosos urqqa medhdhizayta gididi kase Naxaamenne Gadeere geetettiza katamatan de7ida.
1Chronicles4:24 Simooni Namu7eele
1Chronicles4:25 Sha7uleykka Shaloome yelides; Shaloomey Mibisaame yelides; Mibisaamey Mishima7e yelides.
1Chronicles4:26 Mishima7ey Hamu7eele yelides; Hamu7eeley Zakure yelides; Zakurey Shim7e yelides;
1Chronicles4:27 Shim7ey tammanne usuppun attuma naytanne usuppun macca nayta yelides; iza ishati gidikko daro nayta yelibeettenna; hessa gishshas Simoona zarkketi Yuhuda zarkketa mala daribeettenna.
1Chronicles4:28 Simoona zareti Bersaabehe katamaninne Molaade
