1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markaboote
1Chronicles4:32 Qasse istta mooththati Exaame
1Chronicles4:33 Ba7aala gakkanaas ha katamata yuushon diza mooththati ubbay istta bolla gujetteettes; heyti istti de7idasohotanne istta yeletata maaran mazgaban xaafi oykkida.
1Chronicles4:34 Simoona zareta halaqati hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; isttika Mashobaabe
1Chronicles4:35 Iyu7eele
1Chronicles4:36 Elyo7enaye
1Chronicles4:37 Ziizay Shif7a naa
1Chronicles4:38 Hayssafe bollan xaafettida asati bantta zarkketas zarkketas korapinneta; isttaso asata zereththi keehippe coratti coratti bides.
1Chronicles4:39 Istti bantta mehetas heenththasoho koyanaas Gadoore gelizaso matan diza shoobbaafe arshey mokkiza baggara dizasota gakkanaas bida.
1Chronicles4:40 Istti heen keehippe araddanne lo7o heenththasoho demmida; he biittaya woppaynne saroy kumida aaho biitta; kase heen Kaame zereththati deettes.
1Chronicles4:41 Hayssafe bollara istta sunththay xaafettida Simoona zareti Yuhuda Kawo Hizqiyaasa wode Gadoore biitta biidi heen diza Kaame zereththatanne Ma7uune asata olidi dhayssidayta; histtidi he biittan istta mehetas heemmizasohoy diza gishshas Simoona zareti hach gakkanaas heen uttida.
1Chronicles4:42 Simoona zaretappe 500 asati Seyre zumaakko bida; istta halaqati Palaaxiya
1Chronicles4:43 Kase baqati attida Amaaleeqe asata Simoona zareti dhayssida; istti hach gakkanaas he biittan deettes.
1Chronicles5:1 Yaaqoobes koyro bayra naa Oroobeele zereththati hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Oroobeeley ba aawa hiixa tunisida gishshas iza bayrateththa maatay Yooseefe zereththatas imettides; hessafe dendoyssan iza zereththati bayrateththa maaran xaafettibeettenna.
1Chronicles5:2 Bayrateththa maatay Yooseefe zereththatas imettikokka Yuhuday ba ishata giddon mino gidida gishshas dere ayssizaadey iza zereththafe kezides.
1Chronicles5:3 Yaaqoobes bayra naa Oroobeele attuma nayti Heenooke
1Chronicles5:4 Iyu7eele nay Shama7e
1Chronicles5:5 Shim7e nay Mikiyaasa
1Chronicles5:6 Ba7aale nay Be7eera. Oroobeele qommos korapinne gidida Be7eera Asoore Kawo Teligelitelifelisoorey di7i ekki bides.
1Chronicles5:7 Ba7eera zareti bantta yeleta mazgaban xaafettida Oroobeele zereththata halaqati Yi7i7eele
1Chronicles5:8 Beelay Azaaza naa; Azaazi Shema7e naa; Shema7ey Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eele zareti Aaro7eereppe biidi Nebonne Ba7aali-Me7oone gakkanaas dunkaani uttida.
1Chronicles5:9 Oroobeele zareta mehey Gala7aaden corattida gishshas istti heeppe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Efiraaxise Shaafappe biidi bazzaas gaxa gakkanaas dunkaani uttida.
1Chronicles5:10 Sa7oole kawoteththa layththan Aggaari zareti Oroobeele zaretara olettiin Oroobeele zareti xoonida; histtidi Gala7aadeppe arshey mokkiza baggara diza Aggaari zareta biittan dunkaani uttida.
1Chronicles5:11 Gaade zareti Oroobeele zaretappe pudeha baggara biidi Salaaka gakkanaas diza Baasaane biittan dunkaani uttida.
1Chronicles5:12 Koyro zereththata halaqay Iyu7eele; nam7anththo zereththata halaqay Shafaame; qasseka Baasaanen dunkaani uttidayta halaqay Ya7inayenne Saafaaxe.
1Chronicles5:13 Hankko attida laappun zarkketa halaqati
1Chronicles5:14 Hayti Abi7eele nayti Buuze zareta; Buuzey Yaahida yelides; Yaahiday Yeshishaaye yelides; Yeshishaayey Mika7eele yelides; Mika7eeley Gala7aade yelides; Gala7aadey Yaarooha yelides; Yaaroohay Huure yelides; Huurey Abihayle yelides.
1Chronicles5:15 Istta zarkketa halaqay Gune naaza Abi7eele naa Ahi.
1Chronicles5:16 Hayti wurikka Baasaaneninne Gala7aaden he dere katamataninne Lasharoone biitta mehe heemmizasoho ubbaan dunkaani uttida.
1Chronicles5:17 Hayta ubbata zereththati Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aatame wodeninne Isra7eele Kawo Iyorba7aame wode zareta mazgaban xaafettida.
1Chronicles5:18 Oroobeelesi
1Chronicles5:19 Heytikka Aggaaretara
1Chronicles5:20 Ba ammano Xoossa bolla yeggidi izi istta maaddana mala Xoossa woossida. Xoossika istta woosaa siyidi Aggaaretanne isttara diza harata istta kushen aaththi immides.
1Chronicles5:21 Istti bantta morkketa kusheppe 50
1Chronicles5:22 Olazi Xoossaafe gidida gishshas daroti hayqqida; xoonidayti guyeppe di7eteththa layththi wurana gakkanaas he asata soon uttida.
1Chronicles5:23 Minaase qommotappe bagga zareti Baasaaneppe doommidi Ba7aali-Hermoone
1Chronicles5:24 Istta zarkketa halaqati Efere
1Chronicles5:25 Gido attiin istti bantta aawata Xoossaas ammanettibeettenna; Xoossi istta sinththafe dhayssida he biitta asati goynniza eeqa xoossatas goynon laymatida.
1Chronicles5:26 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele Xoossay Asoore kawo Puule woykko Teligelitelifelisoore denththeththidi Oroobeele qommota
1Chronicles6:1 Lewe nayti Gershoone
1Chronicles6:2 Qa7aate nayti Amiraame
1Chronicles6:3 Amiraame nayti Aaroone
1Chronicles6:4 El7ezeerey Finihaase yelides; Finihaasi Abishu7a yelides;
1Chronicles6:5 Abishu7ay Buuqa yelides; Buuqay Uuze yelides;
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzey Zarahiya yelides; Zarahiyay Marayoote yelides;
1Chronicles6:7 Marayootey Amaariya yelides; Amaariyay Ahixuube yelides;
1Chronicles6:8 Ahixuubey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Akimaase yelides;
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaasi Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi Yohanaane yelides;
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaaney Azaariyaase yelides; Azaariyaasi kawo Solomooney Yerusalaamen keexisida Xoossa Keeththaan qeeseteththan ooththides.
1Chronicles6:11 Azaariyaasi Amaariya yelides; Amaariyay Ahixuube yelides;
1Chronicles6:12 Ahixuubey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Shaloome yelides;
1Chronicles6:13 Shaloomey Kilqiyaasa yelides; Kilqiyaasi Azaariyaase yelides;
1Chronicles6:14 Azaariyaasi Saraya yelides; Sarayay Iyosaadoqe yelides.
1Chronicles6:15 GODAY Yuhuda asaanne Yerusalaame asaa Nabukadanaxooren di7issida wode Iyosaadoqeykka isttara di7etti bides.
1Chronicles6:16 Lewe attuma nayti Gershoone
1Chronicles6:17 Gershoone nayti Libinanne Shim7e;
1Chronicles6:18 Qa7aate nayti Amiraame
1Chronicles6:19 Meraare nayti Mahilenne Mushe; bantta aawa keeththan keeththan xaafettida Lewe zarkketi hayssafe kaalli dizayta;
1Chronicles6:20 Gershoone zereththata; Gershooney Libina yelides; Libinay Yahaate yelides; Yahaatey Ziima yelides;
1Chronicles6:21 Ziimay Yo7aaha yelides; Yo7aahi Iddo yelides; Iddoy Zaraahe yelides; Zaraahey Ye7atire yelides;
1Chronicles6:22 Qa7aate zereththata; Qa7aatey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Qoore yelides; Qoorey Assire yelides;
1Chronicles6:23 Assirey Hilqaana yelides; Hilqaanay Abiyaasaafe yelides; Abiyaasaafey Assire yelides;
1Chronicles6:24 Assirey Tahaate yelides; Tahaatey Ur7eele yelides; Ur7eeley Ooziya yelides; Ooziyay Sa7oole yelides.
1Chronicles6:25 Hilqaana zereththata; Hilqaanay Amasayenne Ahimoote yelides;
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimootey Hilqaana yelides; Hilqaanay Xoofaye yelides; Xoofayey Nahaate yelides;
1Chronicles6:27 Nahaatey Elyaabe yelides; Elyaabey Yirohaame yelides; Yirohaamey Hilqaana yelides.
1Chronicles6:28 Sameeli nam7u attuma nayta yelides; bayrazi Iyu7eele; iza kaalozi Abiya.
1Chronicles6:29 Meraare zereththata; Meraarey Mahile yelides; Mahiley Libina yelides; Libinay Shim7e yelides; Shim7ey Uuzahe yelides;
1Chronicles6:30 Uuzahey Shim7a yelides; Shim7ay Haggiya yelides; Haggiyay Asaaya yelides.
1Chronicles6:31 Dawiti Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa Yerusalaame ehidaappe guye Godaa Xoossa Keeththan mazamure yexxizaytas halaqata shuumides.
1Chronicles6:32 Kawo Solomooney Yerusalaamen Godaa Xoossaa Keeththa keexxanaashe gakkanawu Gaytoteththa Dunkaane pengen mazamure yexxishe gam7ida; baas imettida ooso maaran maaran ooththi polishe de7ida.
1Chronicles6:33 Bantta naytara issife yexxizayti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Qa7aate zarkketappe yexxizay Hemaane; Hemaaney Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eeley Sameela naa;
1Chronicles6:34 Sameeli Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Yirohaame naa; Yirohaamey El7eele naa; El7eeley Tooha naa;
1Chronicles6:35 Toohi Zuufe naa; Zuufey Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Mahaate naa; Mahaati Amaasaye naa;
1Chronicles6:36 Amaasayey Hilqaana naa; Hilqaanay Iyu7eele naa; Iyu7eeley Azaariyaase naa; Azaariyaasi Sofonaasa naa;
1Chronicles6:37 Sofonaasi Tahaate naa; Tahaatey Assire naa; Asirey Abiyaasaafe naa; Abiyaasaafi Qoore naa;
1Chronicles6:38 Qoorey Yixihaare naa; Yixihaarey Qa7aate naa; Qahaatey Lewe naa; Lewey Isra7eele naa.
1Chronicles6:39 Emaane dabbo Aasaafey izas ushachcha baggara eqqidi ooththees; Aasaafey Baraakaye naa; Baraakayey Shim7a naa;
1Chronicles6:40 Shim7ay Mika7eele naa; Mika7eeley Ba7aseya naa; Ba7aseyay Malkiya naa;
1Chronicles6:41 Malkiyay Etaane naa; Etaaney Zaraahe naa; Zaraahey Addaya naa;
1Chronicles6:42 Addayay Etaane naa; Etaaney Ziima naa; Ziimay Shim7e naa;
1Chronicles6:43 Shim7ay Yahaate naa; Yahaatey Gershoome naa; Gershoomey Lewe naa.
1Chronicles6:44 Isttas hadirsa baggara istta dabbo Meraare zarkketi eqqeettes; Etaaney Qiisha naa; Qiishi Abide naa; Abdey Maallukke naa;
1Chronicles6:45 Maallukkey Hashaabiya naa; Hashaabiyay Amasiyaasa naa; Amasiyaasi Kilqiyaasa naa;
1Chronicles6:46 Kilqiyaasi Amoze naa; Amozey Baane naa; Baaney Shemere naa;
1Chronicles6:47 Shemerey Mahile naa; Mahiley Mushe naa; Mushey Meraare naa; Meraarey Lewe naa.
1Chronicles6:48 Isttas ishantta gidida hankko Lewe qommoti Xoossa Keeththan Gaytoteththa Dunkaanen oosettiza hara ooso ubbaas doorettida.
1Chronicles6:49 Aarooneynne iza nayti gidikko Xoossa aylle Musey azazida mala Isra7eele deraa nagara wursanaas ubbaafe dummatida giddo qol7aan oosettiza oosota ubbaas
1Chronicles6:50 Aaroone nayta zarkketi hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Aaroone nay El7ezeere; El7ezeere nay Finihaase; Finihaase nay Abishu7a;
1Chronicles6:51 Abishu7a nay Buuqa; Buuqa nay Uuze; Uuze nay Zarahiya;
1Chronicles6:52 Zarahiya nay Marayoote; Marayoote nay Amaariya; Amaariya nay Ahixuube;
1Chronicles6:53 Ahixuube nay Saadooqe; Saadooqe nay Akimaase.
1Chronicles6:54 Aaroone naytas imettida duussa sohoti hayssafe kaalli xaafettida; koyro saamay Qa7aate baggatas kezides;
1Chronicles6:55 Isttas Yuhuda biittan diza Kebroonenne iza heeran diza mehe heemmizasohota immida.
1Chronicles6:56 Kebroone yuushon diza goshsha gadetinne mooththati Yoofine naa Kaalebes imettida.
1Chronicles6:57 Aaroone naytas shemppo wodhidaadey baqati biidi attiza katamata
1Chronicles6:58 Hiilenenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:59 Ashaanenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:60 Qasse Biniyaame qommota gadeppe Geebanenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:61 Arshey wulliza baggara diza Minaase zarkke baggati oykkida gadezappe 10 katamati hankko attida Qa7aate zarkketas imettida.
1Chronicles6:62 Yisakoore zarkketa biittafe
1Chronicles6:63 Oroobeele zarkketa biittafe
1Chronicles6:64 Hessaththo ooththidi Isra7eele asay Lewetas ha katamatanne istta heeran diza mehe heenththasohota immides.
1Chronicles6:65 Hayssafe bollara sunththay isttas xeygettida katamata Yuhuda zarkketappe
1Chronicles6:66 Qa7aate zarkketa giddofe issi keeththa asatas Efreeme zarkketa gakkida biittaafe katamatanne mehe heemmizasoho immida.
1Chronicles6:67 Isttas shemppo wodhidaadey baqati biidi attiza katamata
1Chronicles6:68 Yoqima7aamenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaaloonenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:70 Minaase zarkketa baggafe Aneerenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Balaamanne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi Qa7aate zarkketappe attidaytas immida.
1Chronicles6:71 Minaase zarkketa baggafe Baasaanen diza Golaanenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Astarootenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi Gershoone zarkketas immida.
1Chronicles6:72 Qasse Yisakoore zarkketappe Qaadeesenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:73 Eramootenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Aneemanne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida.
1Chronicles6:74 Aaseere zarkketappe Mashaalanne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:75 Huqooqenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Erahoobenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida.
1Chronicles6:76 Hessaththoka Niftaaleme zarkketappe Galilan diza Qaadeesenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:77 Attida Meraare zarkketas Zaabiloone zarkketappe Armoonenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Taaboorenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi immida.
1Chronicles6:78 Qasse Oroobeele zarkketappe Iyarkko ginan
1Chronicles6:79 Qidimootenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Mefa7aatenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida.
1Chronicles6:80 Gaade zarkketappe Gala7aaden diza Eramootenne mehe heemmizasohota
1Chronicles6:81 Haseboonenne mehe heemmizasohotanne Iyaazeerenne mehe heemmizasohota ekkidi isttas immida.
1Chronicles7:1 Yisakoores oyddu attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Tola
1Chronicles7:2 Tola nayti Uuze
1Chronicles7:3 Uuzey Yiziraaheya yelides; Yiziraaheyay Mika7eele yelides; Mika7eeley Abdiyu yelides; Abdiyuy Iyu7eele yelides; Iyu7eeley Yishiya yelides; ha ichchashatikka baso asatas halaqa.
1Chronicles7:4 Isttas daro machchetinne nayti diza gishshas isttaso asaa zarkketappe olas gakkida olanchchata qooday 36
1Chronicles7:5 Yisakoore zarkketappe olas gakkida olanchchati mazgaban qoodettidi 87
1Chronicles7:6 Biniyaames heedzdzu nayti deettes; isttika Beela
1Chronicles7:7 Beela nayti Exiboone
1Chronicles7:8 Bekere nayti Zimira
1Chronicles7:9 Istti ubbay baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 20
1Chronicles7:10 Yidi7eele nay Bilihaane; Bilihaane nayti Ya7uushe
1Chronicles7:11 hayti ubbati Yidi7eele nayta; istti baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 17
1Chronicles7:12 Shufimeynne Huppiimey Ire zereththata; Hushimey Aheere zereththa.
1Chronicles7:13 Niftaaleme nayti Yahixele
1Chronicles7:14 Minaase zareti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Minaasey Aaraame biittafe ekkida garadeya yelida attuma nayti Asira7eelenne Gala7aade aawa Maakire.
1Chronicles7:15 Maakirey Huppimenne Shufime baggafe Ma7ikko machcho ekkides; iza michchey sunththika Ma7ikko geetettees; Maakire zare Xilofaadey macca nayta xalla yelides.
1Chronicles7:16 Maakire machcha Ma7ikay attuma nayta yeladus; bayra naaza Pareesha
1Chronicles7:17 Ulaame nay Badaane; hayti Minaase naa Maakire naa Gala7aade zareta.
1Chronicles7:18 Gala7aade michchiya Hamoleketa Ishawu
1Chronicles7:19 Shamida nayti Ahiyaane
1Chronicles7:20 Efreeme nay Shutula; Shutula nay Baareede; Baareede nay Tahaate; Tahaate nay El7aade; El7aade nay Tahaate;
1Chronicles7:21 Tahaate nay Zabaade; Zabaade nay Shutula. Efreeme naa Ezeereynne Elaadey mehe kaysana Geete dere biin he biitta asati istta wodhida.
1Chronicles7:22 Hessa gishshas istta aawa Efreemey daro wode kayottides; histtiin iza dabboti yiidi iza minththeththida.
1Chronicles7:23 Hessafe guye izi ba machcheyra gayttides; histtiin iza shaarada attuma naa yeladus; iza keeththan gakkida iita metoza gaason naaza Barihe gi sunththides.
1Chronicles7:24 Efreemes She7iro geetettiza macca nay dawus; izakka pude Beeti-Horoone
1Chronicles7:25 Efreemes Erfaha geetettiza hara attuma nay dees; Erfaha nay Eresheefa; Eresheefa nay Telaahe; Telaahe nay Tahaane;
1Chronicles7:26 Tahaane nay Laadaane; Laadaane nay Amihuude; Amihuude nay Elshama;
1Chronicles7:27 Elshama nay Nawe; Nawe nay Iyaaso.
1Chronicles7:28 Efreeme zareta duussasoynne istta biittay Beetele yuushon diza katamata
1Chronicles7:29 Qasseka Minaase zareta biitta zawan Beeti-Sha7aane
1Chronicles7:30 Aaseere nayti Yimine
1Chronicles7:31 Barihe nayti Heeberenne Birizawaate aawa Malkki7eele.
1Chronicles7:32 Heebere nayti Yaafaleexe
1Chronicles7:33 Yaafaleexe nayti Paasaake
1Chronicles7:34 Yaafaleexe isha Shemere nayti Ahi
1Chronicles7:35 Iza isha Hoottamo nayti Xofaaha
1Chronicles7:36 Xofaaha nayti Suuha
1Chronicles7:37 Bexere
1Chronicles7:38 Yootore nayti Yoofine
1Chronicles7:39 Uule nayti Arahe
1Chronicles7:40 Hayti ubbay Aaseere zareta; istti baso asatas halaqata; ba yeleta zarkketa mazgaban 26

1Chronicles8:9 Shaharayme ba machcho Hodeeshippe Yobaabe
1Chronicles8:10 Ya7uuxe
1Chronicles8:11 Qasse ba machcho Hushimippe Ahixuubenne Elpa7eele yelides.
1Chronicles8:12 Elpa7eele nayti Eboore
1Chronicles8:13 Bariheynne Shema7ey Ayaaloone katamaan diza bantta keeththa asatas halaqa gidida; istti Geete katamaan diza asaa yedeththida.

1Chronicles8:20 El7enaaye

1Chronicles8:23 Abdoone
1Chronicles8:24 Hanaaniya
1Chronicles8:25 Yifidayenne Panu7eele.
1Chronicles8:26 Yirohaame zareti Shaamisharaye
1Chronicles8:27 Ya7ireeshe
1Chronicles8:28 Hayti ubbati ba keeththa asatas halaqata; ba zereththa zarkketi xaafetti diza Yerusalaamen deettes.
1Chronicles8:29 Geba7oone aawa Yi7i7eeley Geba7oone kataman dees; iza machchey sunththika Ma7ikko.
1Chronicles8:30 Izas bayra naazi Abdoone geetettees; iza kaaloti Xuure
1Chronicles8:31 Gadoore
1Chronicles8:32 Shime7e aawa Miqiloote; hayti ubbati ba dabbota matan Yerusalaamen deettes.
1Chronicles8:33 Neerey Qiise yelides; Qiisey Sa7oole yelides; Sa7ooli Yoonataane
1Chronicles8:34 Yoonataane nay Mariiba-Ba7aale; Mariiba-Ba7aaley Mikiyaasa yelides.
1Chronicles8:35 Mikiyaasa attuma nayti Pitoone
1Chronicles8:36 Akaazey Yaho7aade yelides; Yaho7aadi Alemeete
1Chronicles8:37 Moozay Bini7e yelides; Bini7ey Erafaye yelides; Erafayey El7aasa yelides; El7aasi Azeele yelides.
1Chronicles8:38 Azeeles 6 attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Azirqaame
1Chronicles8:39 Azeele isha Esheeqes heedzdzu attuma nayti deettes; bayrazi Ulaame kaaloti Ya7uushenne Elfaleexe.
1Chronicles8:40 Ulaame nayti wolqqamanne mino olanchchata; isttika wondafen duko erizayta; Ulaames 150 attuma naytinne nayta nayti deettes. Hayti ubbati Biniyaame zareta.
1Chronicles9:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay ba yeleta zarkken zarkken xaafettides; ha taarikey Isra7eele Kawota Maxaafan xaafetti uttides. Yuhuda asay ba nagara gaason Baabiloone biitta di7etti bides.
1Chronicles9:2 Di7etti bidasoppe Koyro simmidi bantta biittan uttidayti qeeseta
1Chronicles9:3 Yuhuda zaretappe
1Chronicles9:4 Yuhuda naa Paareese zarkkefe Uutayey Yerusalaamen uttidaytas halaqa; Uutayey Amihuude naa; Amihuudey Imire naa; Imirey Baane naa.
1Chronicles9:5 Yuhuda naa Seelo zaretappe Asaayaynne iza nayti Yerusalaamen dizaytas halaqata.
1Chronicles9:6 Yuhuda naa Zaraahe zaretappe Yi7i7eeley Yerusalaamen dizaytas halaqa. Yuhuda zareti qoodiin mulera 690.
1Chronicles9:7 Yerusalaamen de7ida Biniyaame zarkke halaqati hayssafe kaalli xaafettida; Halaqa Saaluy Mashulaame naa; halaqa Mashulaamey Hoddaye naa; halaqa Hoddayey Hasanu7e naa.
1Chronicles9:8 Halaqa Yibenayey Yirohaame naa. Halaqa Eelay Uuze naa; Uuzi Mikire naa. Halaqa Mashulaamey Shafaaxiya naa; Shafaaxiya Era7u7eele naa; Era7u7eeley Yibinaye naa.
1Chronicles9:9 Biniyaame zareta qooday mulera 956; heyti ubbay ba keeththa asatas halaqata.
1Chronicles9:10 Yerusalaamen de7ida qeeseti hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayta; istti Yaddaya
1Chronicles9:11 Xoossa Keeththan halaqatida Azaariyaasa; Azaariyaasi Kilqiyaasa naa; Kilqiyaasi Mashulaame naa; Mashulaamey Saadooqe naa; Saadooqey Marayoote naa; Marayootey Ahixuube naa.
1Chronicles9:12 Harati qasse Yirohaame naa Adayanne Adi7eele naa Ma7isaya; Yirohaamey Pashkure naa; Pashkurey Malkiya naa. Adi7eeley Yahizeere naa; Yahizeerey Mashulaame naa; Mashulaamey Mashilemite naa; Mashilemitey Imere naa.
1Chronicles9:13 Banttaso asatas halaqatida qeeseti 1
1Chronicles9:14 Yerusalaamen de7ida Leweti hayssafe kaalli xaafettidayta; Hashube naa Shama7ey Meraare zarkke; Hashubey Azirqaame naa; Azirqaamey Hashaabiya naa.
1Chronicles9:15 Baqibaqire
1Chronicles9:16 Harati qasse Naxoofeta mooththatan uttida Abdiyunne Barakaye. Abdiyuy Shama7e naa; Shama7ey Galaale naa; Galaaley Edotaane naa. Barakayey Aasa naa; Aasi Hilqaana naa.
1Chronicles9:17 Xoossa Keeththa Penge naagiza zabeti Shaloome
1Chronicles9:18 Ha zereththati arshey mokkiza baggara diza kawo Penge geetettizasoza naageettes; hayssafe kase istti Leweti dunkaani uttidaso gelththiza penge naageettes.
1Chronicles9:19 Shaalumey Abiyaasaafe naaza Qoore naa; izi Qoraaha zarkke asa. Qoore zereththati kase Godaa Xoossa Dunkaane naagida mala Shaloomeynne Qoraaha zarkke gidida iza dabboti Xoossa Keeththa naageettes.
1Chronicles9:20 El7ezeere naa Finihaasi beni wode Qoraaha zarkketa halaqa; GODAY izara dees.
1Chronicles9:21 Qasseka Mashelemiya naa Zakaraasi Dunkaane penge naagees.
1Chronicles9:22 Pengaa naaganaas doorettidayti mulera 212; haytanti bantta kataman kataman qoodettidi xaafettida; istta zaretas ha aawateththaa immiday kawo Dawitenne nabe Sameela.
1Chronicles9:23 Hessa gishshas isttinne istta nayti Xoossa Keeththa dunkaane pengeza naageettes.
1Chronicles9:24 Zabeti arshey wulliza baggara
1Chronicles9:25 He katamatan diza istta dabboti laappunththa gallas laametti laametti naagishe istta maaddanaas bessees.
1Chronicles9:26 Penge naagiza zabeta halaqatappe oyddu Leweti Xoossa Keeththaa
1Chronicles9:27 Xoossa Keeththa naagizaynne qasse maalado maalado kare doyzayti istta gidida gishshas heen aqeettes.
1Chronicles9:28 Isttafe guuththati Xoossa Keeththa oosos go7ettiza miishshata aawateththan naageettes; he miishshata kare kessiza wodenne soo gelththiza wode istti qoodeettes.
1Chronicles9:29 Qasse isttafe issoti issoti Xoossa Keeththa giddon go7ettiza hara miishshata
1Chronicles9:30 Gido attiin qeeseta naytappe issoti issoti sawoza geeddari geeddari walakkeettes.
1Chronicles9:31 Qoore zarkkefe Shaloomes bayra naa Lewe Matitiyas yarsho uketh uukkanaas aawateththi dees.
1Chronicles9:32 Qa7aate zarkke gidida istta dabbotappe guuththatas Sambatan Sambatan xaraphpheeza bolla woththiza yarsho giigsana aawateththi dees.
1Chronicles9:33 Lewe zaretappe amarda halaqati Xoossa Keeththan yexxizayta; istti omarsinne gallas ooththiza gishshas hara ooso oosettenna; istti Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon diza keeththatan de7eettes.
1Chronicles9:34 Hayti ubbay Lewe qommotas halaqati bantta zarkken zarkken xaafettidi Yerusalaamen deettes.
1Chronicles9:35 Geba7oone aawa Yi7i7eeley Geba7oone kataman de7ides; iza keeththa aayey sunththi Ma7ikko.
1Chronicles9:36 Izas bayra naazi Abdoone; iza kaaloti Xuure
1Chronicles9:37 Gadoore
1Chronicles9:38 Miqilootey Shime7e yelides; isttika bantta dabbota matan Yerusalaamen de7ida.
1Chronicles9:39 Neerey Qiise yelides; Qiisey Sa7oole yelides. Saa7ooley Yoonataane
1Chronicles9:40 Yoonataane nay Mariiba-Ba7aale; Mariiba7aaley Mikiyaasa yelides.
1Chronicles9:41 Mikiyaasa nayti Pitoone
1Chronicles9:42 Akaazey Ya7ire yelides; Ya7irey Alemeete
1Chronicles9:43 Moozay Bini7e yelides; Bini7ey Erafaya yelides; Erafayay El7aasa yelides; El7aasi Azeele yelides.
1Chronicles9:44 Azeeles usuppun attuma nayti deettes; heytikka Azirqaame
1Chronicles10:1 Filisxeeme asati Isra7eele asatara olettida; Isra7eele asati Filisxeeme asata sinththafe baqatida; Isra7eeletappe daroti Gilbo7a zuma hu7en hayqqida.
1Chronicles10:2 Filisxeeme asati Sa7oolenne iza nayta yedeththi gakkidi iza nayta Yoonataane
1Chronicles10:3 Olay Sa7oole yuuyi aadhdhidi un7eththides; olanchchati iza wondafen dukki madunththida.
1Chronicles10:4 Sa7ooli ba ola massara tookkiza wottadaraza
1Chronicles10:5 Iza ola massara tookkizayssi Sa7ooli hayqqidayssa be7idaappe guye izikka ba giththa mashsha sa7an essidi iza bolla kundi hayqqides.
1Chronicles10:6 Hessaththo hanidi Sa7ooli
1Chronicles10:7 Zullezan de7iza Isra7eele asati ubbay bantta olanchchati baqatidayssa
1Chronicles10:8 Wonteththa gallas Filisxeemeti ola massarata hayqqidayta bollafe qaari ekkanaas yiidi Sa7oolinne iza nayti Gilbo7a zuma hu7en hayqqidayssa demmida.
1Chronicles10:9 Histtidi istti Sa7oole hu7e qanxxi ekkidinne iza ola massara qaari ekkida; hessafe guye bantta eeqa xoossatassinne bantta deraas ha xoono mishiraachchoza awajjana mala Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas as kiitti yeddida.
1Chronicles10:10 Istti Sa7oole ola massarata bantta eeqa xoossata keeththatan woththida; iza hu7eza bantta eeqa xoossaa Daagone Keeththan kaqqida.
1Chronicles10:11 Filisxeeme asati Sa7oole bolla ooththidayssa ubbaa Gala7aaden diza Yaabuse katama asati siyida wode
1Chronicles10:12 mino asati biidi Sa7oole ahaanne iza nayta ahaa ekkidi Yaabuse katama ehida; histtidi Yaabusen diza gita miththa garsan moogida; hessafe guye 7 gallas xoomida.
1Chronicles10:13 Sa7ooli GODAAS ammanettibeenna; iza qaalaakka naagontta ixxidi moytille xeygizayta zore oychchida gishshas hayqqides.
1Chronicles10:14 Hessa gaason GODAY iza wodhidi iza kawoteththaa Isseye naa Dawites aaththi immides.
1Chronicles11:1 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay ubbay issife Dawitekko Kebroone biidi
1Chronicles11:2 Kase Sa7oole kawoteththa wodekka Isra7eele asaa olas kaaleththiday nena; GODAA ne Xoossay nena
1Chronicles11:3 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele cimati ubbay Kawo Dawitekko Kebroone katama yida; izi isttara Kebroonen GODAA sinththan caaqettides; GODAY Sameela baggara haasayda qaalaa mala Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawotana mala tiyda.
1Chronicles11:4 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay Yerusalaame katama bida; he wode Yaabuse asati heen diza gishshas he katamaya Yaabuse geetettawus.
1Chronicles11:5 Yaabuse asati Dawite
1Chronicles11:6 Dawiti
1Chronicles11:7 Dawiti he miixayo baas duussaso histtida gishshas miixaya Dawite katama geetettadus.
1Chronicles11:8 Dawiti he katamay yuushon kechchata keccidi katamayo zaari keexxides; attida katamaa qasse Iyo7aabey zaaridi keexxides.
1Chronicles11:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY izara diza gishshas Dawiti minni minni bides.
1Chronicles11:10 Mino gidida Dawite olanchchati hayssafe kaallidi xaafettida; isttika hankko Isra7eele asatara gididi GODAY izas immida hidota qaala mala iza kawoteththay aakkana mala keehi maaddidanne minththeththida.
1Chronicles11:11 Mino gidida Dawite olanchchatappe koyroyssi Hakimoone zarkkefe gidida Yashobi7aame; izi ola gadawa heedzdzatas halaqa; izi issito olan 300 as wodhides.
1Chronicles11:12 He heedzdzu mino olanchchatappe nam7anththozi Ahihohe zarkkefe Doode naa El7ezeere.
1Chronicles11:13 Filisxeeme asati olettanaas Efsi-Deemime geetettizaso shiiqida wode Alazaarey Dawitera issife dees; banggay kumida goshsha gade giddon Isra7eele olanchchati Filisxeemeta sinththafe baqatida.
1Chronicles11:14 Gido attiin izinne iza kaallizayti heen soho oykkidi Filisxeeme asatara eqettida; GODAY isttas wolqqama xoono immides.
1Chronicles11:15 Filisxeeme olanchchati Erafayme shoobban dunkaani diza wode 30 halaqatappe heedzdzati Dawiti dizaso Adulaame gongolo matan diza zaallaako wodhdhida.
1Chronicles11:16 He wode Dawiti miixaa giddon dees; Filisxeeme olanchchata buttey Beeteliheemen dees.
1Chronicles11:17 Dawiti haath uyanaas amottidi
1Chronicles11:18 Heedzdzu mino Dawite olanchchati Filisxeeme asati dunkaani uttidasohora kanththi biidi Beeteliheeme katamaa pengen diza pulttozappe haath duuqqidi Dawites ehida; gido attiin Dawiti uyontta ixxidi he haaththaa GODAA sinththan gussides.
1Chronicles11:19 Histtidi
1Chronicles11:20 Iyo7aabe isha Abisayey heedzdzatas halaqa; izi ba tooran 300 asata oli wodhides; hessa gaason izikka heedzdzata mala erettides.
1Chronicles11:21 Izi heedzdzatara qoodettontta aggikokka isttafe aadhdhida bonchcho demmides; isttaskka halaqa gidides.
1Chronicles11:22 Qabxi7eeleppe yida Yoodahe naa Bannayay erettida olanchchanne wolqqama miish ooththida asa; izi nam7u erettida Mo7aabe biitta asata wodhides; qasse shachchi darida issi gallas gongolo giddo gelidi gaammo wodhides.
1Chronicles11:23 Bannayay izas geesay ichchashu wadha gidiza Gibxe biitta as wodhides; he Gibxe addeza kushen shemmaane wondiraashe keena tooray dees; Bannayay gidikko guufe oykki biidi iza kushen diza tooraa dafi ekkidi iza tooran iza zaari wodhides.
1Chronicles11:24 Yoodahe naa Bannayay haytantta ooththides; izikka heedzdzata mala erettida as gidides.
1Chronicles11:25 Izi heedzdzatara qoodettontta aggikokka 30 olanchchatappe aadhdhi bonchchettides; Dawiti iza bana naagizayta bolla halaqa histti shuumides.
1Chronicles11:26 Asaa giddon diza mino olanchchati hayssafe kaalli dizayta
1Chronicles11:27 Haroode as Shaamote
1Chronicles11:28 Tequhe as Iqesha naa Ira
1Chronicles11:29 Huushe as Sibikaye
1Chronicles11:30 Naxoofe as Mahiraye
1Chronicles11:31 Biniyaame zarkkefe Gibi7a as Eribaye naa Ittaye
1Chronicles11:32 Ga7aashe shoobba as Huraye
1Chronicles11:33 Bahiruume as Azimoote
1Chronicles11:34 Gizoone as Hasheeme
1Chronicles11:35 Harare dere as Sakkare naa Ahi7aame
1Chronicles11:36 Makeere dere as Hefeere
1Chronicles11:37 Qarmeloose as Hexire
1Chronicles11:38 Naataane isha Iyu7eele
1Chronicles11:39 Amoone as Zallaqa
1Chronicles11:40 Yatire as Ira
1Chronicles11:41 Hiite as Ooriyo
1Chronicles11:42 Oroobeele zarkkefe Shiiza naa Adiine; izi Oroobeele zarkketassinne banara issife diza 30 asatas halaqa.
1Chronicles11:43 Ma7ika naa Hanaane
1Chronicles11:44 Ashtaarote as Uuziya
1Chronicles11:45 Shimire naa Yidi7eelenne iza isha Tizeete dere as Yooha
1Chronicles11:46 Mahaawe as El7eele
1Chronicles11:47 El7eele
1Chronicles12:1 Dawiti Qiise naa Sa7ooleppe baqatidi Xigilaagen uttida wode izakko yida asati hayssafe kaallizayta; isttika kase iza ola wode iza maaddida ola qarata giddon deettes.
1Chronicles12:2 Istti ushachcha kusheninne hadirsa kushen wondafe dukkanaassinne yanbarshe dhayqanaas dandayza olanchchata; isttika Biniyaame zare gidida Sa7ooles asho dabbota.
1Chronicles12:3 Istta halaqay Gibi7a as Shama7e naa Ahi7ezeerenne Iyo7aasa. Harati qasse Azimoote naa Yizi7eelenne Paleexe
1Chronicles12:4 erettida 30 olanchchatas halaqanne erettida olanchcha Geba7oone dere as Yishima7e
1Chronicles12:5 El7uzaye
1Chronicles12:6 Qoore as Hilqaana
1Chronicles12:7 Gadoore as Yirohaame naa Yo7eelenne Zabaadiya.
1Chronicles12:8 Dawiti bazzon baqati attizason diza wode Gaade zarkketappe olanchchati izakko yida; isttika minonne olas giigettida asata; qasseka gondallenne toora oyth dandayzayta; istta ayfesoy gaammo mala babisees; istti zuma bolla guppiza genessa mala pilateettes.
1Chronicles12:9 Istta halaqay koyroyssi Eezere
1Chronicles12:10 oydanththozi Mishimaane
1Chronicles12:11 usuppunththozi Attaye
1Chronicles12:12 osppunththozi Yohanaane; uddufunththozi Elzabaade;
1Chronicles12:13 tammanththozi Ermaasa; tammanne issinththozi Makibaanaye.
1Chronicles12:14 Hayti Gaade zarkketa garsan olanchchata halaqata; isttafe daroti shaalaqata mala
1Chronicles12:15 Yordaanoose shaafay kixa salo shempida koyro aginan pinnidi zullaafe arshey mokkiza baggaranne arshey wulliza baggara dunkaani uttida asaa ubbaa yedeththida.
1Chronicles12:16 Biniyaame zarkketappenne Yuhuda zarkketappe amarda asati Dawiti dizaso miixa yida.
1Chronicles12:17 Histtiin Dawiti isttara gayttana ke7idi
1Chronicles12:18 Hessafe guye 30 asata halaqa Amasaye bolla Xoossa Ayanay wodhdhiin izi
1Chronicles12:19 Dawiti Filisxeemetara issife gididi Sa7oole olanaas bida wode Minaase zarkkefe amarda asati Dawitekko biidi iza qoommida; gido attiin
1Chronicles12:20 Dawiti Xigilaage katama simmishin iza maaddanaas Minaase zarkketappe kezi yida shaalaqati Adinahe
1Chronicles12:21 Istti ubbatikka erettida mino olanchchata gidida gishshas Dawite ola wottadarata bolla halaqata gidida; Dawite morkketa olidi iza maaddida.
1Chronicles12:22 Dawite olanchchati Xoossa olanchchata mala corattana gakkanaas iza maaddiza asay gallas gallas gujettees.
1Chronicles12:23 GODAY immida hidota qaalaa mala Sa7oole kawoteththaa Dawites zaaranaas Dawitekko Kebroone yida ola tamaarda wottadarata qooday hayssafe kaallizayssa;
1Chronicles12:24 Gondallenne toora oykkidi olas giigettida Yuhuda zarkketi usuppun shiyanne osppun xeeta.
1Chronicles12:25 Simoona zarkkefe olas giigida minonne wolqqama olanchchati laappun shiyanne issi xeet.
1Chronicles12:26 Lewe zarkkefe oyddu shiyanne usuppun xeet
1Chronicles12:27 Aaroone zarkketa halaqa Yoodahe gujjiin heedzdzu shiyanne laappun xeet.
1Chronicles12:28 Erettida olanchcha Saadooqe dabbota giddofe izara gujjiin nam7u tammanne nam7a.
1Chronicles12:29 Biniyaame zarkkefe Sa7oole dabboti heedzdzu shiya. Gido attiin Biniyaame zarkkefe dariza baggati Sa7oole keeththa asaas he wodey gakkanaas ammanettizayta.
1Chronicles12:30 Efreeme zarkkefe bantta aawata keeththan erettida minoti nam7u tammu shiyanne osppun xeet.
1Chronicles12:31 Dawite kawoththanaas doorettida Minaase zarkke baggaafe tammanne osppun shiya.
1Chronicles12:32 Isra7eele asay ay ooththanaas bessizaakko wodeza shaakki eriza aadho eranchchatinne Yisakoore zarkke halaqati nam7u xeet; isttara yida istta dabboti ubbay isttas azazetteettes.
1Chronicles12:33 Ola meezetidayti
1Chronicles12:34 Niftaaleme zarkketas issi shiya halaqati deettes; gondallenne toora oykkida heedzdzu tammanne laappun shii asati isttara issife deettes.
1Chronicles12:35 Daane zarkkefe olas giigettida asati nam7u tammanne osppun shiyanne usuppun xeet.
1Chronicles12:36 Aaseere zarkkefe ola meezetidi giigettida olanchchati oyddu tammu shiya.
1Chronicles12:37 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggan diza Oroobeele zarkketappe
1Chronicles12:38 Ha olas giigida olanchchati ubbay Dawite Isra7eele bolla kawoththanaas bantta qofaa issi bolla qachchidi Kebroone katama yida; qasse hankko attida Isra7eele dere ubbay Dawite kawoththanaas issi wozinan gidides.
1Chronicles12:39 Istta dabboti isttas koshshizayssa giigsi woththida gishshas mishenne uyishe Dawitekkon heedzdzu gallas gam7ida.
1Chronicles12:40 Isra7eele asaas gita ufays gidiza gishshas istta shooroppe doommidi haakon diza Yisakooreppe
1Chronicles13:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti shaalaqatara
1Chronicles13:2 Histtidi Isra7eele asaa ubbaas
1Chronicles13:3 Sa7oole kawoteththa wode nuni yeggi aggida nu Xoossa Taabotaa ane zaaridi ehoos» gides.
1Chronicles13:4 Dawiti yootidayssi ammanththizaaz gidida gishshas asay iza qofaa ekkides.
1Chronicles13:5 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Xoossaa Taabotaa Qiriyaate-Yi7aarimeppe ehana mala Gibxe zawappe doommidi Hamaate purde gakkanaas diza Isra7eele asaa ubbaa shiishshides.
1Chronicles13:6 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay kirubetappe giddon ba araata bolla uttida GODAA sunththan xeygettida Xoossa Taabotaa ehanaas Yuhuda biittan diza Ba7aala geetettiza Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime katama bida.
1Chronicles13:7 Xoossa Taabotaza Abinadaabe sooppe ooraththa para-gaare bolla woththi ehida; para-gaareza laaggizayti Oozanne Ahiyo.
1Chronicles13:8 Dawitinne Isra7eele asay ubbay diiththan maasinqon
1Chronicles13:9 Istti Kiidoona geetettizason diza kaththa balezakko gakkida wode caanida boorati bargagi dhuphettiin Oozay Taabotaza ashshanaas kushe yeddides.
1Chronicles13:10 Iza kushey Taabotaza bochchida gishshas GODAA hanqoy Ooza bolla eexxi kezides; hessa gishshas izi heen GODAA sinththan hayqqides.
1Chronicles13:11 GODAY hanqettidi Ooza wodhida gishshas Dawiti kayottides; hach gakkanaas he sohoy Ooza meqoso geetettees.
1Chronicles13:12 He gallas Dawiti Xoossas yayyida gishshas
1Chronicles13:13 Hessa gishshas Dawiti Taabotaza banara efanaappe Geete dere as Abidaareso efides.
1Chronicles13:14 Xoossa Taabotay Abidaareson izaso asatara heedzdzu agina gam7ides; GODAY iza keeththa asaanne izas diza miish ubbaa anjjides.
1Chronicles14:1 Xiroose Kawo Huraamey Dawites kawo keeth keexxana mala kiita asata
1Chronicles14:2 GODAY Isra7eele bolla iza kawoththidayssanne ba asaa Isra7eele gishshas iza kawoteththa dhoqqu histti bonchchidayssa Dawiti akeekides.
1Chronicles14:3 Hessafe guye Dawiti Yerusalaamen hara machcheta gujji ekkidi attuma naytanne macca nayta yelides.
1Chronicles14:4 Dawiti Yerusalaamen yelida attuma nayti Shaamu7e
1Chronicles14:5 Iyabeheere
1Chronicles14:6 Nogahe
1Chronicles14:7 Elshama7e
1Chronicles14:8 Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawo gididi tiyettidayssa Filisxeeme asay siyidi ubbay Dawite oykkanaas ke7ides; Dawiti hessa siyidi isttara olettanaas kezides.
1Chronicles14:9 Filisxeeme asay Erafayme zulleza yiidi worajjides.
1Chronicles14:10 Dawitikka
1Chronicles14:11 Histtiin Dawitinne izara diza asay Ba7aali-Paraaxime geetettizaso biidi heen istta oli xoonida; Dawiti
1Chronicles14:12 Filisxeemeti bantta eeqa xoossata heen yeggi bida. Histtiin Dawiti istta eeqa xoossata taman xuuggana mala azazides.
1Chronicles14:13 Filisxeeme asay nam7anththo yiidi he shoobbaa worajjides.
1Chronicles14:14 Dawiti Xoossaa nam7anththo zaari oychchides; histtiin Xoossi izas
1Chronicles14:15 Eththaa miththaza xeeran salfe giiris neni siyida wode olanaas elle keza; gaasoykka hessi Filisxeeme olanchchata shocanaas Xoossay neeppe sinththan kezida gishshassa guussa» gides.
1Chronicles14:16 Hessa gishshas Xoossay azazida mala Dawiti ooththides. Geba7ooneppe biidi Gezeere gakkanaas Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme olanchchata dippi histtides.
1Chronicles14:17 Hessa gaason Dawite goobateththi biitta ubbaan nashettides. GODAY kawoteththati ubbay Dawites yayyana mala ooththides.
1Chronicles15:1 Dawiti ba sunththan xeygettida kataman baas keeththata keexxides; Xoossa Taabotasikka soho giigsidi dunkaane essides.
1Chronicles15:2 Hessafe guye Dawiti
1Chronicles15:3 Dawiti GODAA Taabotaas giigsida soho Taabotaza ehana mala Isra7eele asaa ubbaa Yerusalaamen shiishshides.
1Chronicles15:4 Qasseka Aaroone zaretanne Leweta xeygi shiishshides;
1Chronicles15:5 Qa7aate zereththatappe halaqa gidida Ur7eelenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne nam7u tamma;
1Chronicles15:6 Meraare zereththatappe halaqa Asaayanne iza dabbotappe nam7u xeetanne nam7u tamma;
1Chronicles15:7 Gershoone zereththatappe halaqa Iyu7eelenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne heedzdzu tamma;
1Chronicles15:8 Elxafaane zereththatappe halaqa Shama7enne iza dabbotappe nam7u xeeta;
1Chronicles15:9 Kebroone zereththatappe halaqa El7eelenne iza dabbotappe osppun tamma;
1Chronicles15:10 Uzi7eele zereththatappe halaqa Aminadaabenne iza dabbotappe issi xeetanne tammanne nam7a.
1Chronicles15:11 Hessafe guye Dawiti qeeseta Saadooqenne Abiyaataare
1Chronicles15:12 Histtidi isttas
1Chronicles15:13 Kasekka intte Lewe qommoti Xoossa Taabotaa tookkontta aggida gishshassinne nunikka iza woga mala wostti efanaakko Xoossa oychchontta aggida gishshas GODAA nu Xoossay nuna qaxxaydes» gides.
1Chronicles15:14 Hessa gishshas GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa Taabotaa ehanaas qeesetinne Leweti banttana geeshshida.
1Chronicles15:15 GODAY Muse baggara kase azazida mala Leweti Xoossa Taabotaa tooho miththara bantta hashen tookkida.
1Chronicles15:16 Hessafe guye diiththinne maasinqo diixxishe
1Chronicles15:17 Hessa gishshas Leweti Iyu7eele naa Hemaane
1Chronicles15:18 Qasse nam7anththo maaran Zakaraasa
1Chronicles15:19 Xarqimala daala dhoqqu histti giirissi sissana mala Hemaane
1Chronicles15:20 Qasse maasinqo kaa7ana mala Zakaraasa
1Chronicles15:21 Diith ordera shocana mala Matitiya
1Chronicles15:22 Leweta halaqa Kanaaniya yeththas imotay izas diza gishshas yexxizayta tamaarsana mala sunththida.
1Chronicles15:23 Baraakayeynne Hilqaanay Taabotaa dunkaane penge naaganaas doorettida.
1Chronicles15:24 Qasse qeeseti Shebaaniya
1Chronicles15:25 Hessafe guye Dawiti
1Chronicles15:26 Caaqo Qaala Taabotaa tookkida Leweta Xoossay maaddida gishshas istti laappun korma booratanne laappun dharshota yarshida.
1Chronicles15:27 Dawiti
1Chronicles15:28 Histtidi Isra7eele ubbay hombocishe xurumbanne zaye punnishe
1Chronicles15:29 Caaqo Qaala Taabotay Dawite katama gelishin kawo Dawiti ufayettidi durishininne kaa7ishin Sa7oole naya Milkoola maskootera mokka xeellada kawo Dawite ba wozinara kadhadus.
1Chronicles16:1 Istti Xoossa Taabotaa ehidi Dawiti Taabotaa woththanaas tolida dunkaaneza giddon woththida; histtidi xuugettiza yarshonne issifeteththa yarsho Xoossas yarshida.
1Chronicles16:2 Dawiti xuugettiza yarshozanne issifeteththa yarsho yarshidaappe guye GODAA sunththan dereza anjjides.
1Chronicles16:3 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asa ubbaas
1Chronicles16:4 GODAA Taabotaa sinththan ooththana malanne GODAA Isra7eele Xoossa woossanaas
1Chronicles16:5 Leweta halaqay Aasaafe; izappe garsara Zakaraasa; Zakaraasara dizayti Yi7i7eele
1Chronicles16:6 Qeese Bannayaynne Yahazi7eeley Xoossaa Taabotaa sinththan ubba wode zaye punnana mala summida.
1Chronicles16:7 He gallas Dawiti kasetidi Aasaafessinne izara ooththiza laggetas GODAA galatiza mazamure immides.
1Chronicles16:8 GODAA galatite; iza sunththaa xeygite; izi ooththida ubbaa kawoteththatas yootite.
1Chronicles16:9 Iza sabbite; galata mazamurekka izas yexxite; izi ooththida malalisiza ooso ubbaa yootite.
1Chronicles16:10 Iza geeshsha sunththaan bonchchite; GODAA koyzayta wozinay ufayetto.
1Chronicles16:11 GODAANNE iza wolqqa xomosite; ubba wode iza koyite.
1Chronicles16:12 Izi ooththida malalisiza oosota
1Chronicles16:13 Intteno Xoossa aylle Isra7eele zereththatoo! Intteno doorettida Yaaqoobe naytoo!
1Chronicles16:14 Izi GODAY nu Xoossa; iza pirday ubbaa bollanna.
1Chronicles16:15 Ba caaqqida qaalaa mernaas
1Chronicles16:16 Abrahaames caaqqida caaqaa
1Chronicles16:17 Yaaqoobes woga gidana mala
1Chronicles16:18 «Kanaaney nees xinxxo gidana mala ta nena laatissana» gides.
1Chronicles16:19 Istti qoodan guuth gidi diza wode
1Chronicles16:20 issi dereppe hara dere
1Chronicles16:21 Oonikka istta un7eththana mala aaththi immibeenna; istta gishshas kawota seerides;
1Chronicles16:22 «Ta tiydayta bochchofte; ta nabeta qohopite» gides.
1Chronicles16:23 Biitta ubbay GODAAS yexxite; izi ashshizayssa hach hach yootite.
1Chronicles16:24 Kawoteththatas iza bonchcho awajjite; izi ooththida malalisiza miishshata dere ubbaas yootite.
1Chronicles16:25 GODAY gita; izas bessiza galataykka dhoqqa; xoossata ubbaafe aadhdhees; izas yayyanaas bessees.
1Chronicles16:26 Ayzaabeta xoossati ubbay eeqa xoossata; GODAY gidikko salota medhdhida Xoossa.
1Chronicles16:27 Bonchchoynne teemay izas dees; minoteththinne ufayssi iza Keeththan dees.
1Chronicles16:28 Intteno asa zare ubbatoo! GODAA sabbite; «Bonchchoynne wolqqay GODAASSA» gi yootite.
1Chronicles16:29 GODAA sunththaas bessiza bonchcho immite; yarsho ekkidi iza sinth shiiqite; iza geeshshateththa bonchcho gishshas GODAAS goynnite.
1Chronicles16:30 Biittan diza as ubbay iza sinththan kokkorite; Sa7ay minni eqqides; mulekka qaaxxenna.
1Chronicles16:31 Saloti ufayetetto! sa7aykka hashshu go! Kawoteththata giddon isttas
1Chronicles16:32 Abbaynne iza giddon diza ubbay guummetto; dembatinne istta bolla diza ubbati ufayetetto.
1Chronicles16:33 Izi biitta bolla pirdanaas yaana. He wode wora miththati Godaa Xoossaa sinththan ufayssan yexxana.
1Chronicles16:34 GODAY kiya; iza maaroteththayka mernaassa; hessa gishshas GODAA galatite.
1Chronicles16:35 «Abeet nuna ashshiza GODAWU! Nuna ashsha; ne geeshsha sunththaa nu galatana mala
1Chronicles16:36 GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas galatetto! Hessafe guye dere ubbay
1Chronicles16:37 GODAA Taabotaa sinththan hach hach goynos koshshizaaz ubba wode istti ooththana mala Dawiti Aasaafenne iza dabbota woththides.
1Chronicles16:38 Qasseka Obeed-Eedoomenne iza dabbota usuppun tammanne osppunata isttara ooththana mala woththides; Edotaane naa Obeed-Eedoomenne Hoosa dirsaa penge naagana mala woththides.
1Chronicles16:39 Qeese Saadooqenne izara ooththiza qeeseti Geba7oonen dhoqqasohon diza GODAA Dunkaaneza sinththan ooththana mala heen woththides.
1Chronicles16:40 Gaasoykka GODAY Isra7eeles immida wogaa mala istti ubba wode xuugettiza yarshoy yarshettizason maaladonne omars xuugettiza yarsho yarshanaassa.
1Chronicles16:41 Iza maarotay mernaas gidida gishshas GODAA galatana mala Hemaane
1Chronicles16:42 Hemaanessinne Edotaanes xurumba punnanaas
1Chronicles16:43 Hessafe guye ubba asay baso baso bides; Dawitikka baso asaa anjjanaas soo simmides.
1Chronicles17:1 Dawiti ba kawoteththa keeththan de7ishe
1Chronicles17:2 Naataaney qasse Dawites
1Chronicles17:3 Gido attiin he gallassa omars Xoossa qaalay Naataanekko yiidi
1Chronicles17:4 «Ba; baada ta aylle Dawites GODAY nees gizayssi ta izan de7ana keeth keexxanay nena gidakka.
1Chronicles17:5 Tani Isra7eeleta Gibxeppe kessida gallassaafe doommada hach gakkanaas
1Chronicles17:6 Tani Isra7eele asaa ubbaara yuuyida soho ubbaan ta deraa heemmanaas tani azazida Isra7eele daannatappe oonaska
1Chronicles17:7 «Hessa gishshas ha7ikka neni ta aylle Dawites
1Chronicles17:8 Neni bida soho ubbaan tani nenara issife gidadis; ne morkketa ubbaa ne sinththafe diggadis; ha7ikka tani ha sa7an erettida gita asata sunththaa mala ne sunththaa gitasana.
1Chronicles17:9 Tani ta asaa Isra7eeles daanasoho immana; isttas duussasoho immidaappe guye istti qaaxxontta mala ta ooththana; iita asati kase istta un7eththidayssaththo hayssafe guye istta un7eththettenna.
1Chronicles17:10 Hayssafe kase ta deraa Isra7eele kaaleththizayta ta sunththida wode kase iitati un7eththidayssaththo hayssafe guye un7eththettenna; intte morkketa ubbaa ta kawushshana; tani Xoossay nees keeth keexxanayssa yootays.
1Chronicles17:11 Ne cimmada kase hayqqida ne aawatan gayttiza wode tani ne naytappe issaa denththada ne sohon kawoththana; iza kawoteththaaka ta minththana.
1Chronicles17:12 Taas keeth keexxanay iza; tani iza kawoteththa araataa mernaas minththa essana.
1Chronicles17:13 Tani izas aawa gidana; izikka taas naa gidana; neeppe kase kawotida Sa7ooleppe tani ta maaroteththaa denththida mala izappe mulekka denththike.
1Chronicles17:14 Tani iza ta asaa bollanne ta kawoteththaa bolla mernaas sunththana; iza kawoteththa araataykka mernaas minni eqqana› gaada yoota» gides.
1Chronicles17:15 Naataaney Xoossay izas ajjuutan qonccisida qaala ubbaa Dawites yootides.
1Chronicles17:16 Hessafe guye Kawo Dawiti dunkaanen gelidi GODAA sinththan uttides; histtidi
1Chronicles17:17 Abeet Xoossawu! Hayssi ne ayfe sinththan guuththa misatiin ne aylle zareti sinththafe yaana layththatan hananayssa yootadasa; neni tana gita asatappe dhoqqu histta xeelladasa.
1Chronicles17:18 Neni tana ne aylleza bonchchida gishshas tani Dawiti hayssafe bollara ay gaana dandayazinaa? Neni tana ne aylleza eraasa.
1Chronicles17:19 Abeet GODAWU! Ne aylleza gishshas ne wozina qofaa mala ha gita miishshata ubbaa ooththada ha gitateththaa ubbaa tana erisadasa.
1Chronicles17:20 «Abeet GODAWU! Ne malay haray baawa; nuni nu hayththan siyida mala neeppe attiin hara Xoossi deenna.
1Chronicles17:21 Neni Xoossi Gibxe biittafe kessida ne deraa sinththafe kawoteththata gooddada gitanne yashissiza miish ne sunththas ooththana mala
1Chronicles17:22 Neni ne deraa Isra7eele mernaas nees histtadasa; abeet GODAWU nenikka istta Xoossa gidadasa.
1Chronicles17:23 «Abeet GODAWU! Neni ne ayllezasinne iza zereththatas immida hidotaa mernaas minththa; neni immida hidota qaalaakka pola.
1Chronicles17:24 Hessa ne ooththanay ne sunththi minni daana malanne mernaas gita gidana malassa; hessafe guye asay
1Chronicles17:25 «Abeet ta Xoossawu
1Chronicles17:26 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tumu Xoossa; ha lo7o hidota qaala ne ayllezas immadasa.
1Chronicles17:27 Ne sinththan mernaas daana mala ne aylleza keeth anjjanaas ne koyadasa; Abeet GODAWU! Neni anjjiday mernaas anjjettidaade gidana› gi woossees» gides.
1Chronicles18:1 Hessafe guye Dawiti Filisxeemeta xooni haarides; histtidi Geete katamanne iza yuushon diza mooththata Filisxeeme asata kusheppe woththi ekkides.
1Chronicles18:2 Histtiin Mo7aabe dere asay izas haarettidi giira ehides.
1Chronicles18:3 Hessafe guye Dawiti Efiraaxise shaafa heeran diza dereta oykkana bida wode Xoobba Kawo Hadaadi7eezere oli xoonidi Hamaate gakkanaas diza biitta oykkides.
1Chronicles18:4 Dawiti Hadaadi7eezereppe 1
1Chronicles18:5 Damasqo kataman diza Aaraame asati Xoobba dere Kawo Hadaadi7eezere maaddanaas yida wode Dawiti isttafe 22
1Chronicles18:6 Hessafe guye Aaraame biittan Damasqo kataman olanchchati dunkaani uttanaaso giigsides; histtiin Aaraame dere asati Dawites haarettidi giirida; Dawiti bidaso ubbaan GODAY izas xoono immides.
1Chronicles18:7 Kawo Dawiti Hadaadi7eezere olanchchata halaqati oykkida worqqa gondalleta woththi ekkidi Yerusalaame efides.
1Chronicles18:8 Qasseka Dawiti Hadaadi7eezerey haariza Xibahaaneppenne Kuna katamappe keehi daro xarqimala ekkides; Solomooney he xarqimalata gita gabate
1Chronicles18:9 Dawiti Xoobba dere Kawo Hadaadi7eezere olanchchata ubbaa xoonidayssa Hamaate kawo Too7uyi siyides.
1Chronicles18:10 Histtidi banara olettishe gam7ida Hadaadi7eezere Dawiti oli xoonida gishshas iza hashshu gaanaassinne sarokkanaas Too7uyi ba naaza Hadoraame kawo Dawitekko kiittides; Hadoraamey worqqafe
1Chronicles18:11 Kawo Dawiti Eedoomeppe
1Chronicles18:12 Xuriya naa Abisayey Eedoome asaappe 18

1Chronicles18:14 Dawiti Isra7eele deraa ubbaa bolla kawotides; deraa ubbaa xilloteththaninne suure pirdan ayssides.
1Chronicles18:15 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey ola gadawa; Ahiluude naa Iyoosaafixey mazgaba keeththa alaafe.

1Chronicles20:1 Ofinththan kawoti olas keziza wode Iyo7aabey olanchchata kaaleththi biidi Amoone dere dhayssides; Eraabe katamaakka dooddi uttides; gido attiin Dawiti Yerusalaamen takkides; Iyo7aabey Eraaba katama oli laallides.
1Chronicles20:2 Hessafe guye Dawiti yiidi istta kawoza hu7eppe worqqa kallachcha ekkides; kallachchazi 34 kilo giraame gidides; iza giddon inqqu geetettiza al7o shuchchi dees; he kallachchaa ekkidi Dawite hu7en goxxida; qasse Dawiti he katamaappe keehi daro miish di7i ekkides.
1Chronicles20:3 Heen de7iza deraa kessidi magaaze
1Chronicles20:4 Hessafe simmiin Filisxeeme asatara Gezeeren olay dendides; he wode Huushe dere as Sibikayey Erafayme zere gidida Sifaye wodhides; histtiin Filisxeemeti xoonettida.
1Chronicles20:5 Hessafe guye Filisxeemetara hara olay dendides; he wode izi oykkiza tooraa toomay shammaane wondiraashe keena gidida Geete katamappe yida Golyaade isha Lahiime Ya7ire naa Elyaaney wodhides.
1Chronicles20:6 Qasseka hara olay Geete kataman dendides; heen izas kusheninne tohon usuppun usuppun biradhdheti issi bolla 24 biradhdheti diza Erafaye zereththafe gidida gubbanne geesa adussa asi dees.
1Chronicles20:7 He addezi Isra7eeleta bolla eqettida wode Dawite isha Shim7a naa Yoonataaney iza wodhides.
1Chronicles20:8 Haytanti Geete kataman diza Erafaye zareta; istti ubbay Dawite kusheninne iza asaa kushen hayqqida.

1Chronicles23:2 Dawiti Isra7eele kaaleththiza ubbata

1Chronicles23:4 Haytanttafe 24
1Chronicles23:5 Oyddu shiyatas gimbeza penge naagana mala aawateth immides; attida oyddu shiyatas ba ooththida yeththa massaratan GODAA Xoossa galatana mala sunththides.

1Chronicles23:15 Muse nayti Gershoomenne El7ezeere.

1Chronicles23:18 Yixihaare naytas halaqay bayra naaza Shalomite.
1Chronicles23:19 Kebroone naytappe bayrazi Yiriya
1Chronicles23:20 Uzi7eele attuma naytappe bayrazi Mikiyaasa
1Chronicles23:21 Meraare attuma nayti Mahilenne Mushe; Mahile attuma nayti El7ezeerenne Qiise.
1Chronicles23:22 El7ezeerey macca naa xalla yelidi attuma naa yelontta hayqqides; hessa gishshas istti bantta aawa isha Qiise nayta gelida.
1Chronicles23:23 Mushe attuma nayti heedzdza; heytikka Mahile
1Chronicles23:24 Haytanti ubbay baso asataninne ba zarkketan xeygettida; Lewe zareti issoy issoy ba sunththan mazgabettida; isttas layththay nam7u tammanne hessafe bolla gididayti Xoossa Keeththan ooththeettes.

1Chronicles24:1 Aaroone nayta cugay hayssafe kaallizayssa; Aaroone nayti Nadaabe
1Chronicles24:2 Nadaabeynne Abihuy naa yelontta ba aawappe kaseti hayqqida; hessa gishshas El7ezeereynne Itamaarey qeese gidida.
1Chronicles24:3 Dawiti El7ezeere zarkkefe Saadooqenne Itamaare zarkkefe Ahimelekera gididi Aaroone zareta istta ooson ooson maaddana mala shaakki woththides.
1Chronicles24:4 El7ezeere zare halaqati Itamaare zare halaqatappe daro gidida gishshas El7ezeere zareti tammanne usuppun cugan shaakettiin
1Chronicles24:5 Xoossa Keeththaa kaaleththizaytinne Xoossa cimati El7ezeere zareta giddoninne Itamaare zareta giddon diza gishshas oonakka maaddontta oosoza saaman shaakkida.
1Chronicles24:6 Lewe zare Natina7eele naa xaafezi Shama7ey kawoza sinththaninne iza shuumeta sinththan
1Chronicles24:7 Ha asati saama kessiin koyro saamay Yoharibe gakkides; nam7anththozi Yaddaya gakkides;
1Chronicles24:8 Heedzdzanththozi Harime gakkides; Oydanththozi Sa7oorime gakkides.
1Chronicles24:9 Ichchashanththozi Malkiya gakkides; Usuppunththozi Miyaamine gakkides;
1Chronicles24:10 Laappunththozi Haqoxe gakkides; osppunththozi Abiya gakkides;
1Chronicles24:11 Uddufunththozi Iyaaso gakkides; tammanththozi Shakaaniya gakkides;
1Chronicles24:12 Tamman issinththozi Elyaasheebe gakkides; tamman nam7anththozi Yaaqime gakkides;
1Chronicles24:13 Tamman heedzdzanththozi Huppa gakkides; tamman oydanththozi Yasheba7aabe gakkides;
1Chronicles24:14 Tamman ichchashanththozi Bilga gakkides; Tamman usuppunththozi Imere gakkides;
1Chronicles24:15 Tamman laappunththazi Hezire gakkides; tamman osppunththozi Hafixeexe gakkides;
1Chronicles24:16 Tamman uddufunththozi Pattaya gakkides; nam7u tammanththazi Hiziqeela gakkides;
1Chronicles24:17 Nam7u tamman issinththozi Yaakine gakkides; nam7u tamman nam7anththozi Gaamule gakkides;
1Chronicles24:18 Nam7u tamman heedzdzanththozi Dallaya gakkides; Nam7u tamman oydanththozi Ma7aaziya gakkides.
1Chronicles24:19 Isra7eele GODAY istta azazida malanne kase istta aawa Aarooney isttas woththida waaga mala istti Xoossaa keeth geliza wode ooththana mala imettida wogay hayssa.
1Chronicles24:20 Attida hara Lewe zareti Amiraame naytappe Shebu7eele
1Chronicles24:21 Erahaabiya naytappe bayra naaza Yishiya.
1Chronicles24:22 Yixihaaretappe Shalomite; Shalomite naytappe Yahaate.
1Chronicles24:23 Kebroone naytappe koyrozi Yiriya
1Chronicles24:24 Uzi7eele naytappe Mikiyaasa naa Shamire.
1Chronicles24:25 Mikiyaasa isha Yishiya naytappe Zakaraasa.
1Chronicles24:26 Meraare attuma nayti Mahile
1Chronicles24:27 Yaa7ize attuma nayti Benno
1Chronicles24:28 Mahile attuma nayti El7ezeerenne Qiise; El7ezeeres attuma nay deenna.
1Chronicles24:29 Qiises Yerahim7eele geetettiza issi attuma nay dees.
1Chronicles24:30 Mushes Mahile
1Chronicles24:31 Istta isha Aaroone nayti ooththoyssaththo kawo Dawite sinththan

1Chronicles25:4 Hemaane naytappe Buuqiya

1Chronicles26:1 Xoossa Keeththaa penge naagizayti hayssafe kaallizayta. Qoore baggafe Aasaafe nayta garsan Qoore naa Mashelemiya.
1Chronicles26:2 Mashelemiya nayti
1Chronicles26:3 ichchashanththozi Elaame
1Chronicles26:4 Xoossi Obeed-Eedoome anjjida gishshas izi osppun attuma nayta yelides; koyrozi Shama7e
1Chronicles26:5 usuppunththozi Am7eele
1Chronicles26:6 Qasse Obeed-Eedoome naa Shama7eykka attuma nayta yelides; istti erettida mino as gidida gishshas bantta aawa keeththan halaqa gidida.
1Chronicles26:7 Shama7e nayti Ootine
1Chronicles26:8 Hayti ubbati Obeed-Eedoome zareta; isttas
1Chronicles26:9 Mashelemiyas erateththi kumida mino naytinne dabboti deettes; istti mulera tammanne osppuna.
1Chronicles26:10 Meraare baggafe gidida Hoosaskka attuma nayti deettes; issoy Shimire; izi bayra gidontta aggikokka iza aaway iza bayrasides.
1Chronicles26:11 Nam7anththozi Kilqiyaasa
1Chronicles26:12 Xoossa Keeththa penge naagizayti bantta keeththa asaa halaqata garsan cugan cugan shaakettidi istta dabboti ooththoyssaththo Xoossa Keeththa ooso ooththanaas ba taran taran uttida.
1Chronicles26:13 Pengeta ubbaa naaganaas bantta keeththan keeththan cimanne yooga gontta issi bolla saama kessida.
1Chronicles26:14 Arshey mokkiza baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay Shelemiyas kezides; pudeha baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay lo7o zoriza iza naa Zakaraasas kezides.
1Chronicles26:15 Dugeha baggara diza pengeza naaganaas saamay Obeed-Eedoomes kezides; minjja keeththaa naaganaas saamay iza nayta gakkides.
1Chronicles26:16 Arshey wulliza baggara diza pengezanne ganna oge baggara diza Shelekete penge naaganaas saamay Shufimessinne Hoosas kezides.
1Chronicles26:17 Issi baggara naagiza zabeta ginara hara zabey dees; hach hach arshey mokkiza baggara usuppun zabeti
1Chronicles26:18 arshey wulliza baggara diza dubbusha demban nam7u zabe qasseka oge bolla oyddu zabe gididi naageettes.
1Chronicles26:19 Qoore zaretasinne Meraare zaretas penge naaganaas imettida istta ooso gishay hessa.
1Chronicles26:20 Lewe baggafe Akayay Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza minjja keeththanne Xoossas dummasi woththida imotata naaganaas aawateththi izas imettides.
1Chronicles26:21 Yihi7eele aawa Laadaaney Gershoone baggafe gidida iza nayti baso keeththa asatas halaqata.
1Chronicles26:22 Yihi7eele naa Zettaamessinne iza isha Iyu7eeles Xoossa Keeththa giddon diza minjja keeththaa naaganaas aawateththi imettides.
1Chronicles26:23 Amiraame zaretas
1Chronicles26:24 Muse naa Gershoome zareppe gidida Shuba7eeles minjja keeththa naagizayta bolla alaafeteththi imettides.
1Chronicles26:25 Izi Gershoome isha El7ezeere baggara Shalomites dabbotees; El7ezeerey Erahaabiya yelides; Erahaabiyay Yesha7iya yelides; Yesha7iyay Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Zikire yelides; Zikirey Shalomite yelides.
1Chronicles26:26 Kawo Dawiti
1Chronicles26:27 Kase olan di7i ehida miishshafe baggaa Xoossa Keeththa giigsanaas dummasi woththida.
1Chronicles26:28 Qasse nabe Sameeli
1Chronicles26:29 Yixihaare zaretappe Kanaaniyassinne iza naytas Xoossa Keeththafe kare baggara diza oosotan Isra7eele asaa aassanaassinne istta bolla pirdanaas aawateththi imettides.
1Chronicles26:30 Kebroone zareppe Hashaabiyaynne iza dabboti 1
1Chronicles26:31 Kebroone zaretappe isttaso asaa mazgabezan xaafettida mala Yiiriyay isttas halaqa gidides; kawo Dawiti kawotida oyddu tammanththa layththan mazgabe pilggi xeellishin Gala7aade deren Iyaazeere geetettizason Kebroone asatappe mino asati beettida.
1Chronicles26:32 Yiriyas minonne soo asatas halaqa gidida 2
1Chronicles27:1 Bantta butten butten layth kumeth aginan aginan kawozasinne deraas taran taran ooththiza Isra7eele keeththa asata halaqati
1Chronicles27:2 Koyro aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Zabdi7eele naa Yashobi7aame; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:3 Yashobi7aamey Paareese zare; izi koyro aginan olas ke7iza halaqatas gadawa.
1Chronicles27:4 Nam7anththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Ahihohe dere as Doodeya; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:5 Heedzdzanththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey qeese Yoodahe naa Bannaya; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:6 Bannayay 30 asatappe aadhdhi erettida mino as gidida gishshas izi istta bolla halaqa gidides; iza naa Amizabaadey izappe garsara azazizaade gidides.
1Chronicles27:7 Oydanththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Iyo7aabe isha Asaheele; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:8 Ichchashanththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Yixira as Shamihuute; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:9 Usuppunththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Tequhe as Iqesha naa Ira; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:10 Laappunththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Efreeme zareppe Piloone dere as Heleexe; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:11 Osppunththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Huushe as Sibikaye; izi Zaraahe zareppe yides; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:12 Uddufunththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Biniyaame zareppe Anatoote as Abi7eezere; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:13 Tammanththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Zaraahe zareppe Naxoofe dere as Mahiraye; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:14 Tammanne issinththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Efreeme zareppe Piraatoone as Bannaya; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:15 Tammanne nam7anththo aginan ooththiza buttezas alaafey Otin7eele zareppe Naxoofe dere as Heldaye; iza buttezan 24
1Chronicles27:16 Isra7eele asaa garsan qommota qommota bolla shuumettida ola gadawati hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayta. Oroobeele qommo bolla summiday Zikire naa El7ezeere. Simoona qommo bolla summiday Ma7ika naa Shafaaxiya.
1Chronicles27:17 Lewe qommo bolla summiday Qamu7eele naa Hashaabiya. Aaroone zarkke bolla summiday Saadooqe.
1Chronicles27:18 Yuhuda qommo bolla summiday Dawite isha Eelihu. Yisakoore qommo bolla summiday Mika7eele naa Omire.
1Chronicles27:19 Zaabiloone qommo bolla summiday Abdiyu naa Yishima7e. Niftaaleme qommo bolla summiday Azari7eele naa Yarmoote.
1Chronicles27:20 Efreeme qommo bolla summiday Azaaziya naa Hose7e. Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey wulliza baggan diza Minaase qommo baggata bolla summiday Paddaya naa Iyu7eele.
1Chronicles27:21 Yordaanoose shaafappe arshey mokkiza baggan Gala7aaden diza Minaase qommo baggata bolla summiday Zakaraasa naa Iddo. Biniyaame qommo bolla summiday Abineere naa Ya7isi7eele.
1Chronicles27:22 Daane qommo bolla summiday Yirohaame naa Azari7eele. Hayti Isra7eele asaa garsan qommota qommota kaaleththiza ola gadawata.
1Chronicles27:23 GODAY
1Chronicles27:24 Xuriya naa Iyo7aabey asaa qooda doommides shin polibeenna; asaa qoodida gaason GODAY Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqettides; hessa gishshas istta qooday Kawo Dawite taarike mazgaban xaafettibeenna.
1Chronicles27:25 Kawo keeththan buqura woththiza minjja keeththa alaafey Adi7eele naa Azimoote. Gaxaretan
1Chronicles27:26 Goshshanchchata alaafey Kaalube naa Eezire.
1Chronicles27:27 Woyne mith tokkizasohota alaafey Eramaate dere as Shim7e; woyne ushshu minjjizasota alaafey Shafaame dere as Zabde.
1Chronicles27:28 Shaara menththotan zumbullata xaphon diza wogara miththinne wola miththata naaganaas alaafeteththi Gadeere dere as Ba7aali-Hanaanes imettides; zayte minjjiza keeththa alaafeteththi Iyo7aasas imettides.
1Chronicles27:29 Lasharoone demban heemettiza wude meheta alaafeteththi Saaroone as Shiixirayas imettides; shoobban heemettiza wude meheta alaafeteththi Adilaya naa Saafaaxes imettides.
1Chronicles27:30 Gaamellata bolla alaafeteththi Isma7eele as Obilas imettides. Hareta bolla alaafeteththi Meronoote as Yehidayes imettides.
1Chronicles27:31 Dorsa wudetanne deysha wudeta naagana alaafeteththi Aggaari zareppe gidida Yaazizes imettides; hayti ubbay kawo Dawite aqota naaganaas alaafeteth ekkida.
1Chronicles27:32 Dawite aawaa ishay Yoonataaney xaafe
1Chronicles27:33 Akxofeeley qasse kawoza zorizaade; Arkke dere as Hushey kawos siiqo lagge.
1Chronicles27:34 Akxofeeleppe guye Bannaya naa Yoodaheynne Abiyaataarey kawo zoranchcha gidida; Iyo7aabey kawo olanchchata halaqatas gadawa gidides.

1Chronicles29:1 Hayssafe guye kawo Dawiti shiiqida as ubbaas
1Chronicles29:2 Tani taas diza wolqqa keena ta Xoossa Keeththaas worqqan oosettanayssas worqqa

1Chronicles29:23 Hessafe guye Solomooney ba aawa Dawite sohon GODAA kawoteththa araatan uttides; izas ubba miishshi eeno gides; Isra7eele ubbayka izas azazettides.

2Chronicles1:1 Dawite naa Kawo Solomooney ba kawoteththan minnides; GODAA iza Xoossay izara gidida gishshas iza keehippe gitasides.

2Chronicles1:3 Hessafe guye Solomooneynne shiiqida asay ubbay Geba7oonen de7iza goynniza dhoqqa soho bides; ays giikko GODAA aylle Musey bazzon ooththida Xoossa Dunkaaney heen dees.
2Chronicles1:4 Kase Dawiti Xoossaa Taabotaas Yerusalaamen dunkaane tolides; Xoossaa Taabotaa Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime katamappe ba giigsi woththida soho ehides.
2Chronicles1:5 Huures naaza naa
2Chronicles1:6 Solomooney Xoossaa Dunkaaneza sinththan de7iza xarqimalappe oosettida yarshosozakko
2Chronicles1:7 He gallassa omars Xoossi Solomoones qonccidi
2Chronicles1:8 Histtiin Solomooney Xoossaa
2Chronicles1:9 Ha7ikka abeet ta GODAA Xoossawu! Ne tana sa7an de7iza gudulla mala corattida asaa bolla kawoththida gishshas kase ne ta aawa Dawites gida qaalay poletto.
2Chronicles1:10 Tani ha deraa kaaleththana mala aadho erateththinne akeeka taas imma; histtontta aggiko hayssa gita deraa neyssa ooni ayssanaas dandayzee?» gides.
2Chronicles1:11 Xoossika Solomoones
2Chronicles1:12 tani nees aadho erateththinne akeeka immana; qasse neeppe kase de7ida kawotas woykko neeppe guyen yaana kawotaskka baynda dureteth
2Chronicles1:13 Hessafe guye Solomooney Xoossa Dunkaaney Geba7oonen de7iza zumbullaafe Yerusalaame simmidi Isra7eele bolla kawotides.
2Chronicles1:14 Solomooney para-gaaretanne parata shiishshides; izas 100 para-gaaretinne 12
2Chronicles1:15 Kawozi worqqanne bira Yerusalaamen shuchcha mala korides; zigakka shaara menththon dicciza eththa miththaththo corattana mala ooththides.
2Chronicles1:16 Solomoone parati Gibxeppenne Qaawe geetettizasohoppe yida; kawoza zal7anchchati istta Qaaweppe shammi ehida.

2Chronicles2:1 Solomooney GODAA sunththas Xoossa keeth keexxanaassinne baas kawoteththa keeth keexxanaas qofa qachchides.
2Chronicles2:2 Hessa gishshas Solomooney tooho toossanaas 70
2Chronicles2:3 Hessafe guye Solomooney Xiroose Kawo Huraames kiita yeddides; hessika
2Chronicles2:4 Ha7i tani ta GODAA sunththaas keeth keexxana giigeteththan days. Tani sawo tongu giza exaane cuwasanaas
2Chronicles2:5 «Nu Xoossay hara xoossata ubbaafe gita gidida gishshas tani keexxanaas giigettiza Xoossa Keeththayka gita.
2Chronicles2:6 Gido attiin saloynne saloppe bollara diza salota dhoqqateththi iza ekkenna; histtiin izas keeth keexxanaas dandayzay oonee? Iza sinththan exaane cuwasizasoppe attiin izas keeth keexxanaas tani oonee?
2Chronicles2:7 «Ha7ikka ta aaway Dawiti giigsida Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen tanara de7iza hiillanchchatara issife gididi ooththanaas worqqa
2Chronicles2:8 «Ne asati Libaanooseppe miththa qanxxo erizayta gididayssa tani erays; hessa gishshas neni taas Libaanooseppe ziga
2Chronicles2:9 Tani keexxana Xoossa Keeththay gitanne malalisizaaz gidiza gishshas istti taas daro mith giigsana.
2Chronicles2:10 Miththaa qanxxiza ne aylletas tani 20
2Chronicles2:11 Xiroose Kawo Huraamey Solomoones
2Chronicles2:12 Huraamey qasseka
2Chronicles2:13 «Hekko tani nees hiillanchchanne akeekanchcha gidida Huraam-Abe yeddadis.
2Chronicles2:14 Izas aayeya Daane qommo; aaway Xiroose dere asa; izi worqqa
2Chronicles2:15 «Neni ta goday immana gida gisttezanne banggaa
2Chronicles2:16 Neni Libaanooseppe koyida keena mith nuni qanxxi qashissidi abbaa bollara wogolon neekko Yoophphe yeddana. Neni heeppe Yerusalaame gakkanaas efisana dandayaasa» gides.
2Chronicles2:17 Iza aawa Dawiti kase qoodida mala
2Chronicles2:18 Solomooney he asaappe 70
2Chronicles3:1 Solomoone aawa Dawiti GODAA Xoossa keeth keexettana soho Mooriya zumaa bolla Yerusalaamen giigsi woththides. He sohoy GODAY Dawites qonccida
2Chronicles3:2 Solomooney ba kawotida oydanththo layththan
2Chronicles3:3 Solomooney Xoossa keeththaa keexxanaas yeggida yochchay beni wode wadhan adussateththay 60 wadha; gomppay 20 wadha.
2Chronicles3:4 Xoossa Keeththa gelizason de7iza daaranchchaa gomppay keeththaa keena 20 wadha; geesay 20 wadha. Izas soo baggara muuruta worqqan meeshides.
2Chronicles3:5 Xoossa Keeththaas waanna kifileza xiidda xalla licidi kammides; histtidi muuruta worqqan meeshides; zamba misatiza misleninne sansalata misatiza mislen alleqissides.
2Chronicles3:6 Xoossa Keeththaaka al7o shuchchan alleqissides; izi alleqissida worqqay Pariwayme biittafe yida worqqa.
2Chronicles3:7 Godata
2Chronicles3:8 Solomooney Ubbaafe Dummatiza Giddo Qol7a keexxides; he sohozas adussateththay 20 wadha; gomppay 20 wadha. He sohoza godaa 20
2Chronicles3:9 Istti go7ettida misimaarey 570 giraame worqqafe oosettides. Pooqezan de7iza kifiletakka worqqan meeshides.
2Chronicles3:10 Solomooney Ubbaafe Dummatiza Giddo Qol7an nam7u kirubeta misle giigsidi worqqan meeshides.
2Chronicles3:11 He kirubeta qefey micettidi 20 wadha
2Chronicles3:12 Nam7anththo kirubezas koyro qefey ichchashu wadha gididi
2Chronicles3:13 Ha nam7u kirubeta qefey micettidi 20 wadha gidides; istti bantta sinththaa waanna kifilezakko zaaridi bantta tohon eqqida.
2Chronicles3:14 Solomooney salo misatiza may7ofe
2Chronicles3:15 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaas sinththan issaa issaa geesay 35 wadha aduqqiza nam7u tuussata medhissidi istta hu7en 5 wadha qustte woththides.
2Chronicles3:16 Qasse sansalata gite mala medhissidi tuussata xeera oyseththides; histtidi 100 oroomaane teera misleta medhissidi sansalata bolla oyseththides.
2Chronicles3:17 Tuussatappe issaa Xoossa Keeththaas sinththan pudeha baggara

2Chronicles5:7 Hessafe guye qeeseti GODAA Taabotaa Xoossaa keeththan Ubbaafe Dummatiza Giddo Qol7an ehidi kirubeta misleta qefetappe garsan woththida.

2Chronicles6:20 Neni
2Chronicles6:21 Tani ne aylleynne ne dere Isra7eeley haa ne Keeththaako simmi woossiza woosaa neni siya. Neni de7izason salon dashe siyada nuus atto ga.
2Chronicles6:22 «Issi asi ba lagge qohidi kashii giikko
2Chronicles6:23 neni salon dashe siya; siyadakka ooththa. Mooranchchaa bolla iza ooso mala ne aylleta giddon pirda; xillozas iza xilloteththa mala zaara.
2Chronicles6:24 «Ne dere Isra7eeley nena qohida gaason ba morkketa sinththan xoonettidi
2Chronicles6:25 neni salon de7ashe siya. Ne deraa Isra7eele nagaraakka atto ga; histtada neni kase istta aawatassinne isttas immida biittaa istta guye zaara.
2Chronicles6:26 «Ne derey nena qohida gaason saloy gordettiin iray bukkontta ixxiko
2Chronicles6:27 neni salon de7ashe siya. Ne aylleta nagaraanne ne deraa Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga. Istti hemettanaas bessiza lo7o ogeza istta tamaarsa; histtada neni ne asaas xinxxo histta immida biittaan ira bukisa.
2Chronicles6:28 «Biittaa bollan koshay woykko iita hargey yiikko
2Chronicles6:29 ne dere Isra7eele asaa garsafe oonikka izas metoynne sakoy erettiin izi ba kushe ha Keeththaako micci woossiko
2Chronicles6:30 neni salon de7ashe siyada iza nagaraa atto ga; asa ubbaa wozina shaakka erizay nena xalla gidida gishshas issaas issaas iza ooso mala imma.
2Chronicles6:31 Histtiko neni kase nu aawatas immida biittan bantti de7iza wode ubbaan istti nees yayyidi ne ogera baana.
2Chronicles6:32 «Hessaththoka ne dere Isra7eele gidontta hara dere asi ne gita sunththaa gishshassinne neni ne deraas ooththida malalisiza oosota gishshas
2Chronicles6:33 neni salon de7ashe siya; histtada ha sa7aa asay ubbay ne deraa Isra7eele mala ne sunththaa eridi nees yayyana mala
2Chronicles6:34 «Ne asay bantta morkketa olana mala neni kiittidaso awakka biidi istti neni doorida ha katamayn tani ne sunththaas keexxida Xoossa Keeththaako simmidi nena woossiko
2Chronicles6:35 istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe neni siya; istti nena woossidayssaka neni isttas imma.
2Chronicles6:36 «Nagara ooththontta asi baynda gishshas istti nena qohida gaason neni istta bolla hanqettada haako gidiin woykko mata biitta gidiin istta di7i efiza morkketas aaththa immiko
2Chronicles6:37 istti he di7ettida biittaan de7ishe ba wozinay meqqiin maaroteththan simmiko
2Chronicles6:38 banttana di7idi efida morkketa biittan dishe
2Chronicles6:39 neni istta woosaanne shoobeththaa salon dashe siya. Istti nena woossidayssaka isttas imma; nena qohida ne deraa nagara atto ga.
2Chronicles6:40 «Ha7ikka abeet ta Xoossawu! Ha sohaan woossiza woosaa ne ayfey xeello; ne hayththika siyo.
2Chronicles6:41 «Abeet GODAA Xoossawu! Denda! Ne wolqqas malaata gidida ne Taabotaara ne shempiza keeththaan gela. Abeet GODAA Xoossawu! Ne qeeseti atoteththaa may7etto; ne geeshsha asatikka ne kiyateththan ufayetetto.
2Chronicles6:42 Abeet GODAA Xoossawu! Neni tiyda kawoza aggofa. Ne ashkara Dawites immida maaroteththaa hassa7a» gi woossides.
2Chronicles7:1 Solomooney woosaa polida mala saloppe tamay wodhdhidi xuugettiza yarshozanne hara yarshoza mides. Histtiin GODAA bonchchoy Xoossa Keeththaa kumides.
2Chronicles7:2 GODAA bonchchoy Xoossa Keeththaa kumida gishshas qeeseti Xoossa Keeth gelanaas dandaybeettenna.

2Chronicles7:6 Qeesetikka banttas giigidasohon eqqiin Leweti qasse kawo Dawiti GODAA sabbanaas kase ooththida mazamure yexxiza miishshaa oykki istta sinththan eqqidi
2Chronicles7:7 Solomooney xarqimalappe ooththida yarsho yarshizasozi xuugettiza yarsho
2Chronicles7:8 He wode Solomooneynne Isra7eele asay ubbay laappun gallas gakkanaas ba7aaleza bonchchida; Isra7eele zawan diza Hamaate pinnizasoppe biidi Gibxe Shaafa gakkanaas diza cora asay heen shiiqides.
2Chronicles7:9 Asay yarsho yarshizasoza laappun gallas dummasidinne qasse laappun gallas anjjiso ba7aale bonchchidaappe guye osppunththa gallas wurseththan dumma shiiqo shiiqides.

2Chronicles7:14 ta sunththan xeygettida ta asay banttanateththaa kawushshidi woossiko
2Chronicles7:15 Ha7ikka ha sohon woosettiza woosaa ta ayfey xeellana; ta hayththatikka ezgi siyana.
2Chronicles7:16 Ta sunththi izan mernaas de7ana mala ha Keeththaa ta doorada geeshshadis; ta ayfeynne ta wozinay ubba wode heen de7ana.

2Chronicles8:1 Solomooney Xoossa Keeththaanne ba kawoteththa keeththaa keexxida nam7u tammanththa layththa wurseththan
2Chronicles8:2 Kawo Huraamey immida katamata Solomooney zaari keexxidi Isra7eele asaa he katamatan woththides.
2Chronicles8:3 Hessafe guye Solomooney Hamaatenne Xoobba geetettiza biittata biidi worajji oykkides.
2Chronicles8:4 Histtidi bazzon de7iza Taaximoore katamanne ubba miish isttan minjjiza katamata Hamaate biittan keexxides.
2Chronicles8:5 Qasseka Solomooney bolla Beeti-Horoonenne garsa Beeti-Horoone geetettiza katamata zaari essides; he katamati dirsay pengeynne kolatay de7iza diretti uttida katamata.

2Chronicles8:7 Hiitetappe

2Chronicles8:10 Qasse isttafe 250 shuumeti kawo Solomoones ooththiza gabbarata xeelli oosiseettes.

Qasseka Xoossa as Dawiti azazida mala Xoossa Keeththa penge naagiza zabeta istta ooson ooson shaakkidi sunththides.
2Chronicles8:15 Kase Dawiti buqura minjjiza keeththa gishshassinne hara alaleta gishshas qeesetanne Lewetas imettida azazotappe issinokka ashshontta ubbaa polides.

2Chronicles9:1 Saaba kawoya Solomoone goobateththaa siyada
2Chronicles9:2 Solomooney iza oychchida ubbaa izis yootides; izi izis birshontta izappe geemmi attida ay miishshika deenna.
2Chronicles9:3 Saaba kawoya Solomoone aadho erateththaa
2Chronicles9:4 iza maaddan shiiqiza qumaa
2Chronicles9:5 Hessafe guye iza kawoza
2Chronicles9:6 Gido attiin tani yaada ta ayfen be7ana gakkanaas istti taas yootida ubbaa ammanabeekke. Ne aadho erateththaafe baggayka taas yootettibeenna; tumappe tani siyoyssafe ne aadho erateththay keehi aadhdhees.
2Chronicles9:7 Ubba wode ne sinththan eqqidi ne aadho erateththaa siyiza ne shuumetinne ne aylleti ay mala anjjettida asee!
2Chronicles9:8 Nenan ufayettidi ba kawoteththa araatan utisida ne GODAY galatetto! Ne Xoossay Isra7eele asaa siiqida gishshassinne mernaas minththi essanaas koyida gishshas suure pirdaynne xilloteththi aakkana mala istta bolla nena kawoththides» gadus.
2Chronicles9:9 Histtada kawoya 4
2Chronicles9:10 Huraame asatinne Solomoone asati Ofireppe worqqa
2Chronicles9:11 Kawo Solomooney he sanddale miththaafe Xoossa Keeththaanne kawoteththa keeththaa gelizaso dhekkatanne mazamure yexxizaytas maasinqonne diith oosisides. Hayssa mala miishshi kase Yuhuda biittan beetti erenna.
2Chronicles9:12 Kawo Solomooney Saaba kawoya amottidayssanne iza oychchida ubbaa izis immides; iza Solomoones ehidayssafe daro izi izis immides. Hessafe guye Saaba kawoya ba azhabazara dendada ba dere simmadus.
2Chronicles9:13 Solomooney layththan layththan ekkiza worqqay 23
2Chronicles9:14 Hessi zal7anchchatappe ekkida qaraxa
2Chronicles9:15 Kawo Solomooney 200 wogga gondalleta qoxissidi worqqafe medhissides; issi issi gondallen laappun kilo giraame gidiza worqqay gelides.
2Chronicles9:16 Qasseka izi 300 qeeri gondalleta qoxxissidi worqqafe medhissides; issi issi qeeri gondallen nam7u kilo giraame gidiza worqqay gelides; kawoy he gondalleta
2Chronicles9:17 Qasseka kawozi danggarsa zaaleppe issi gita kawo araata oosisidi muuruta worqqan meeshides.
2Chronicles9:18 Kawoteththa araatay de7izaso pude ke7anaas yedhdhiza usuppun dhekkati deettes. Tohon yedhdhanaas kawoteththa araataara gaththidi worqqafe oosettida oydey dees. Araataas nam7u baggarakka qese zemppissiza sohoti deettes; he nam7u sohota lanqen ya baggaranne ha baggara eqqida issi issi gaammo misley dees.
2Chronicles9:19 He araataa pude ke7izaso usuppun dhekkatan ya baggaranne ha baggara issi issi gaammo misley
2Chronicles9:20 Kawo Solomooney isttan ushshu uyiza miishshati ubbay worqqafe oosettida; «Libaanoose Wora» geetettiza Keeththan de7iza miishshati ubbayka muuruta worqqafe oosettida. Solomoone wode biray mulekka go7iza miishsha mala qoodettontta gishshas birappe oosettida miishshi mulekka deenna.
2Chronicles9:21 Kawozas Huraame asati laggiza zal7e markabeti deettes; he markabeti worqqa
2Chronicles9:22 Kawo Solomooney dureteththaninne aadho erateththan sa7an de7iza kawota ubbaafe aadhdhees.
2Chronicles9:23 Sa7an de7iza kawoti ubbay iza sinth aadhdhanaassinne Xoossi iza wozinan woththida aadho erateththaa siyanaas koyeettes.
2Chronicles9:24 Layththan layththan yiza ubbay izas immanaas worqqanne bira miishshata
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoone paratassinne gaaretas 4
2Chronicles9:26 Solomooney Efiraaxise Shaafappe doommidi Filisxeeme biittanne Gibxe zawa gakkanaas de7iza kawota ubbaa haarides.
2Chronicles9:27 Kawoy Yerusalaamen biray shuchchaththo korettana mala
2Chronicles9:28 Solomoones parata Gibxeppenne hara biitta ubbaafe eheettes.
2Chronicles9:29 Koyroppe wurseth gakkanaas Solomoone kawoteththa layththan hanida hara miishshi ubbay Tinbite yootiza Naataane Taarike Maxaafan
2Chronicles9:30 Solomooney Isra7eele ubbaa bolla Yerusalaamen 40 layth kawotides.
2Chronicles9:31 Hessafe guye Solomooney hayqqidi kase ba aawatan gayttides; ba aawaa Dawite kataman moogettides; iza naa Erobi7aamey izasohon kawotides.
2Chronicles10:1 Isra7eele asay ubbay Erobi7aame kawoththanaas Seekeeme katama bida gishshas izikka hee bides.
2Chronicles10:2 Kawo Solomooneppe baqatidi Gibxen de7iza Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aamey hessa siyidi Gibxeppe simmi yides.
2Chronicles10:3 Isra7eele asay Iyorba7aames kiita yeddi xeygides; izinne Isra7eele asay ubbay Erobi7aamekko biidi
2Chronicles10:4 «Kase ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossides; ha7i neni izi nuna oosisida wolqqama oosaanne deexo qambaraa nuus kawushshiko nuni nees haarettana» gida.
2Chronicles10:5 Histtiin Erobi7aamey isttas
2Chronicles10:6 Hessafe guye kawo Erobi7aamey ba aawa Solomooney paxa de7iza wode Solomoone zoriza cimata zore oychchides. Izi isttas
2Chronicles10:7 Cimatikka Erobi7aame
2Chronicles10:8 Gido attiin Erobi7aamey cimati zorida zoreza aggidi izara diccidi izas ooththiza yelaga asata zore oychchides.
2Chronicles10:9 Izi isttas
2Chronicles10:10 Izara diccida yelagati izas
2Chronicles10:11 Ta aaway inttes qambaraa deexeththides; tani gidikko hessafekka aaththada deexeththana. Ta aaway inttena lisson shocides; tani gidikko inttena masimaso mala dukkiza lisson wadhdhana› gaada zaara» gida.
2Chronicles10:12 Hessafe guye kawo Erobi7aamey
2Chronicles10:13 Histtiin kawo Erobi7aamey isttas hanqon zaarides. Cimata zore aggidi
2Chronicles10:14 yelagati zorida zoreza kaallides; histtidi
2Chronicles10:15 GODAY Seelo as Akaya baggara kase Nabaaxe naa Iyorba7aames yootida qaalay polettana mala hessi Xoossafe hanida gishshas kawozi asay gizayssa siyontta ixxides.

2Chronicles10:18 Hessafe guye kawo Erobi7aamey ba gabbarata halaqa Adooniraame Isra7eele asaakko kiittides; istti iza shuchchan caddi wodhida. Histtiin kawo Erobi7aamey ba para-gaare bolla eeson ke7i uttidi Yerusalaame baqatides.

2Chronicles11:3 «Solomoone naa Yuhuda kawo Erobi7aames Yuhudaninne Biniyaamen de7iza Isra7eele asaa ubbaas
2Chronicles11:4 ‹GODAY inttena
2Chronicles11:5 Erobi7aamey Yerusalaamen uttidi hayssafe kaallidi xaafettida Yuhudanne Biniyaame katamatas miixata gimbides.
2Chronicles11:6 He katamati Beeteliheeme
2Chronicles11:7 Beeti-Xuure
2Chronicles11:8 Geete
2Chronicles11:9 Adora7ime

2Chronicles11:12 He gimbettida katamata ubbaan gondalletanne toorata shiishshidi istta keehippe minththides; hessaththo ooththidi Yuhudanne Biniyaame biittata haari de7ides.
2Chronicles11:13 Isra7eele ubbaan de7iza qeesetinne Leweti ubbay bantti de7izasoppe Erobi7aamekko yida.
2Chronicles11:14 Istti qeese gididi GODAAS ooththontta mala Iyorba7aameynne iza nayti diggida gishshas Leweti bantta heenththa gadenne bantta soho aggidi Yuhudanne Yerusalaame yida.
2Chronicles11:15 Iyorba7aamey goynniza dhoqqasohotan hara qeeseta sunththides; histtiin istti izi medhdhida deysha misletassinne mara misletas qeese gididi ooththida.
2Chronicles11:16 Gido attiin Isra7eele qommota ubbaafe Isra7eele GODAAS bantta wozinappe goynnanaas koyzayti GODAA bantta aawata Xoossas yarsho yarshanaas Leweta geedo kaallidi Yerusalaame yida.
2Chronicles11:17 Istta yuussay Yuhuda kawoteththaa minththides; istti heedzdzu layth kumeth Solomoone naa Erobi7aame maaddida; istti Kawo Dawite ogenne kawo Solomoone oge kaallidi saro de7ida.

2Chronicles11:22 Erobi7aamey Ma7iki naa Abiya baappe guyen kawoththanaas qoppida gishshas

2Chronicles12:1 Erobi7aame kawoteththay minni eqqida wode izinne Isra7eele asay ubbay GODAA wogaa yeggi aggida.
2Chronicles12:2 Istti GODAAS ammanettontta ixxida gishshas Erobi7aamey kawotida ichchashanththo layththan Gibxe Kawo Shiishaaqi Yerusalaame katama bolla worajjides.
2Chronicles12:3 Izara issife Gibxeppe yiday 1
2Chronicles12:4 Kawo Shiishaaqi gimbettida Yuhuda katamata oli oykkidi Yerusalaame katama gakkanaas kanththi bides.
2Chronicles12:5 Hessafe guye nabe Shama7ey Shiishaaqes babbidi Yerusalaamen shiiqi uttida Yuhuda kaaleththizaytakkonne Erobi7aamekko yiidi
2Chronicles12:6 Kawo Erobi7aameynne Isra7eele kaaleththizayti banttana kawushshidi
