Nehemiah11:34 Hadiden
Nehemiah11:35 Loodaninne
Nehemiah11:36 Yuhuda dere garsan diza Lewe baggatappe baggayti Biniyaame derera issife uttida.
Nehemiah12:1 Salatiyaale naa Zerubaabelenne qeeseta halaqa Iyaasora di7eteththafe simmida qeeseta sunththinne Leweta sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Qeeseti
Nehemiah12:2 Amaariya
Nehemiah12:3 Shakaaniya
Nehemiah12:4 Iddo
Nehemiah12:5 Miyaamine
Nehemiah12:6 Shama7e
Nehemiah12:7 Saalu
Nehemiah12:8 Leweta
Nehemiah12:9 Baqibuqiya
Nehemiah12:10 Iyaasoy Iyo7aaqeme yelides; Iyo7aaqemey Elyaasheebe yelides; Elyaasheebey Yoyada7e yelides.
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada7ey Yoonataane yelides; Yoonataaney Yaadu7e yelides.
Nehemiah12:12 Iyo7aaqemey qeeseta halaqateththan diza wode qeesetinne istta halaqati hayssafe kaallizayta; Saraya zereththafe Maraaye
Nehemiah12:13 Izra zereththafe Mashulaame
Nehemiah12:14 Maallukke zereththafe Yoonataane
Nehemiah12:15 Harime zereththafe Adana
Nehemiah12:16 Iddo zereththafe Zakaraasa
Nehemiah12:17 Abiya zereththafe Zikire
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga zereththafe Shama7e
Nehemiah12:19 Yoyaaribe zereththafe Mataaniya
Nehemiah12:20 Sallaye zereththafe Qallaye
Nehemiah12:21 Kilqiyaasa zereththafe Hashaabiya
Nehemiah12:22 Qeesetaso asa sunththinne Lewe bagga asatas soo asaa sunththi hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; Elyaasheebe
Nehemiah12:23 Gido attiin Lewe baggata soo asata halaqatappe qonccen mazgabettidi erettidayti Elyaasheebes naaza naa Yohanaaney hayqqana gakkanaas diza woden xalla.
Nehemiah12:24 Hashaabiyay
Nehemiah12:25 Xoossa Keeththaa gimbe penge achchan oosettida miish woththiza minjja keeth naagiza zabeti Maataaniya
Nehemiah12:26 Heyti Iyosaadoqe naaza naa Iyaaso naa Iyo7aaqeme dere ayssiza Nahimiya
Nehemiah12:27 Yerusalaame katama gimbey anjjettiza gallas Lewe baggati daalan
Nehemiah12:28 He ba7aaleza bonchchana Lewe baggafe yexxizayti wuri ba dizasoppe Yerusalaame heerappenne Naxoofe biittan diza heeratappe
Nehemiah12:29 Yerusalaame yuushon istti banttas duussaso ooththida gishshas yexxizayta Beeti-Galgalappe
Nehemiah12:30 Qeesetinne Lewe baggati ba gishshas
Nehemiah12:31 Tani Nahimiyay Yuhuda dere kaaleththizayti gimbaa bolla kezana mala histtidaappe guye lo7eththi mazamure yexxizayti nam7u butten shaakettidi yexxana mala ooththadis; koyro buttezi gimbaas hu7e bolla kezidi ushachcha baggara diza
Nehemiah12:32 Isttaka Hosha7iyaynne Yuhuda dere kaaleththizaytappe baggati kaallida.
Nehemiah12:33 Harati qasse isttara diza Azaariyaasi
Nehemiah12:34 Yuhuday
Nehemiah12:35 zaye punniza qeeseti
Nehemiah12:36 Zakaraasa zereththi gidida Shama7ey
Nehemiah12:37 Pultto haaththa pengeeko gakkidaappe guye Dawite katama efiza oge oykkida; gimbaa bolla diza kechchata pude kezidi kawo Dawite kawoteththa keeththa achchara aadhdhidi he katamays arshey keziza baggara diza haaththa gimbe penge simmida.
Nehemiah12:38 Hankko mazamure yexxiza buttezi gimbaa bollara hadirsa bagga aadhdhi bides; tanikka bagga asara ha butteza kaalladis; Itoone gimbe geetettizasora kanththidi gede aaho gimbezaakko gakkidos.
Nehemiah12:39 Qasse nu hessafe aadhdhi Efreeme gimbe penge
Nehemiah12:40 Hayssaththo nam7u butte salfezi Xoossa yeththan galatishe tanara diza deraa kaaleththizaytara Xoossa keeththi dizaso zawa gakkidos;
Nehemiah12:41 Ta diza salfezan xurumba punniza qeeseti hayssafe kaalli dizayta; Elyaaqeeme
Nehemiah12:42 Isttaka kaallizayti Ma7isaya
Nehemiah12:43 He gallas asay daro yarsho shiishshides; Xoossay iza ufayssida gishshas derezi keehi ufayettides; Maccassaynne naytikka isttara issife ufayettida; Yerusalaamen hanida ililisa qaalay haahon siyettides.
Nehemiah12:44 He wode Xoossa Keeththa oosos imettiza Asraatanne layththan layththan koyro gakkiza kaththa xeeranne meetettiza dumma dumma miththata ayfe xeera woththiza keeth naagiza zabeta doorida; he asati dumma dumma katamata matan diza goshsha gadeppe wogay azaziza mala qeesetassinne Lewe baggatas imettana bessizayssa shiishshana alaafeteth isttas dees; kumeththa Yuhuda asay qeeseta bollanne Lewe baggata bolla keehi ufayettida.
Nehemiah12:45 Istti ufayettidaykka Xoossay istta azazida qeesetinne Leweti polanaas bessiza woganne geesho wogata ooththida gishshassa; Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytinne Xoossa Keeththa naagiza zabetikka Dawitinne iza naa Solomooney kase woththida woga mala isttafe naagettiza ooso ooththi polida.
Nehemiah12:46 Kase kawo Dawitapenne Aasaafe wodeppe doommidi mazamure yexxizaytassinne galata mazamuren Xoossa bonchchiza asata kaaleththizayti deettes.
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubaabele wodeninne Nahimiya woden kumeththa Isra7eele asay Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytassinne naagiza zabetas gallas gallas imettana bessizayssa immeettes; hankko Lewe baggatayssa dumma immeettes; Lewe baggatikka Aaroone zereththafe gidida qeesetas bessizayssa immeettes.
Nehemiah13:1 He wode asay wuri Muse maxaafay nababettiin siyishe
Nehemiah13:2 Ha azazozi imettida gaasoykka Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezi biza wode Mo7aabe dere asaynne Amoone dere asay kaththinne haath Isra7eele asaa diggida gishshassa; hessafe bollarakka Isra7eele asaa doqqana mala Balaame geetettizaades miish immida; gido attiin Xoossay he doqeththaza anjjon laammides.
Nehemiah13:3 He woga qaalaza Isra7eele asay siyida wode allaga gidida asaa ba giddofe shaakki kessida.
Nehemiah13:4 Xoossa Keeththa miishshata woththiza kifiletas alaafe gidida qeese Elyaasheebes daro layththafe doommidi Xoobbiyara mino gaytoteththi dees;
Nehemiah13:5 Hessafe dendidayssan Kaththa muxuwaata
Nehemiah13:6 Hayssi ubbay hanishin ta Yerusalaamen diikke; gaasoykka kawo Arxekisisi Baabiloonen kawotida heedzdzu tammanne nam7anththo layththan tani guye simma Baabiloone dere badis; gido attiin guuththa wodeppe guye kawoza piqaade oychchadis;
Nehemiah13:7 oychchadakka Yerusalaame simmadis; ta hee gakkida mala Elyaasheebey Xoobbiyas Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddon izi daana mala izas issi kifile immidayssa siyadis.
Nehemiah13:8 Hessa gishshas hanqettada Xoobbiyas diza miish ubbaa izi gelththida kifilaappe kare kessa kessa oladis.
Nehemiah13:9 Kifiletikka wogay gizayssaththo geeyana malanne Xoossa Keeththa miishshati
Nehemiah13:10 Qasse asay Xoossa Keeththan yexxizaytassinne Lewe baggatas koshshizayssa immontta aggida gishshas Yerusalaameppe Xoossa oosaa aggidi kase ba diza goshsha gade goyi daanaas guye simmi bidayssa eradis.
Nehemiah13:11 Hessa gishshas tani halaqata
Nehemiah13:12 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay wuri ba kaththafe
Nehemiah13:13 Tani qeese Shelemiya
Nehemiah13:14 Ta Godoo! Ne keeththaynne ne keeththa oosoy suure baana mala ta ammaneteththan ooththida lo7o oosoza qoppada ne taas kiyateth ooththa.
Nehemiah13:15 He wode Yuhuda dere asay Sambata gallas woyne ayfeppe woyne gum7ishin beyadis; qasse kath
Nehemiah13:16 Yerusalaamen diza Xiroose dere asati Molenne hara hara zal7e miishshata ehidi Sambata gallas Yerusalaamen diza Yuhuda dere asaas bayzeettes;
Nehemiah13:17 Hessa gishshas tani Ayhuda kaaleththizayta hanqettada «Hayssa intte ooththiza iita oosoza ubbaa be7ite! Hekko intte Sambata tunisishe deeta;
Nehemiah13:18 Nu Xoossay nu bollanne ha katama bolla ehida hanqoy kase intte aawati hayssa mala iita ooso ooththida gishshas gidennee? Ha7ikka intte Sambata bonchchontta gishshas Xoossa hanqo Isra7eele deraa bolla denththeththeeta» gadis.
Nehemiah13:19 Hessafe guye Sambatay gelanaappe sinththa gallas gadey lem7i lem7ishin Yerusalaame pengeti gordettidi Sambatay aadhdhana gakkanaas doyettontta mala tani azazadis; qasse Sambata gallas aykko miishshe zal7ana ekki yontta mala ta oosanchchatappe issota issota gimbaa penge naagana mala zabe woththadis.
Nehemiah13:20 Dumma dumma miishshata ehi zal7iza zal7anchchati issito woykko nam7uto mala Arba omars Yerusalaame gimbes kare baggara aqida;
Nehemiah13:21 Tanikka isttas
Nehemiah13:22 Hessafe guye Leweti banttana geeshshidi Sambata gallas dummateththan naagettizayssa erisanaas gimbaa pengeta naagana mala istta azazadis. Ta Xoossawu! Hayssa ubbaa gishshas tana qoppa; qasse neni ne mino siiqozan tana maaddana mala ta nena woossays.
Nehemiah13:23 He wode Ayhuda asaappe daroti Ashdoode
Nehemiah13:24 Istta naytappe baggati Ashdoode dere qaalanne issi issi hara dere qaalan haasayeettes attiin Ayhuda dere qaalan haasayana dandaybeettenna.
Nehemiah13:25 Tani he asata hanqada qanggadis; wadhdhadissinne istta hu7e binanakka buucadis; hessafe guye istta gidiin istta nayti allaga asatara ekettontta malanne gelettontta mala Xoossa sunththan caaqeththadis.
Nehemiah13:26 Qasse isttas
Nehemiah13:27 Histtiin intte allaga kawoteththa maccassata ekon hayssa mala gita mooro ooththoyssanne intte nu Godaaska ammanettontta aggoyssa nu siyana bessizee?» gadis.
Nehemiah13:28 Qeese Elyaasheebe naytappe issoy Yoodahe geetettizayssi Beeti-Horoone katama asi Sanbalaaxe nayo baas machcho ekkides; Hessa gishshas Yoodahey Yerusalaame yeddi baana mala gooddadis.
Nehemiah13:29 «Ta Xoossawu! Hayti qeeseteththa woga
Nehemiah13:30 Istti allaga dere tunateththafe bana Geeshshana mala ta ooththadis
Nehemiah13:31 Qasse yarsho xuugganaas eeso mith koshshiza woden ehana mala giigsadis; asaykka ba shiishshiza kaththafenne ayfiza miththa ayfeppe koyro gakkida xeera wostti shiishshanaas bessizaakko maara oyththadis; ta Xoossawu! Ne lo7eteththan hayssa ta ooththida lo7o oosoza gishshas tana qoppa.
Esther1:1 Kawo Arxekisisi Hinde biittafe Tophphiya biitta gakkanaas diza 127 dereta haariza wode hayssafe kaallizayssi hanides;
Esther1:2 he wode kawo Arxekisisi Suusa gimben diza kawoteththa araata bolla utti haarides.
Esther1:3 Izi kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan
Esther1:4 Isttas kawozi ba kawoteththa dureteththaa 180 gallas kumeth bessides.
Esther1:5 He gallassatappe guye kawozi Suusa kataman guuththatappe biidi gita asata ubbaas
Esther1:6 He zagozan booththinne salo misetiza laynoppe dadettida magalashati deettes. Isttika bira qalabaten
Esther1:7 Woyne ushshazikka issoy issaafe dummatiza worqqa wancan shiiqees. Kawoza kiyateththafe dendidayssan kawoteththa keeththan woyne ushshazi gidi palahides.
Esther1:8 Kawozi issoy issoy koyida mala immana mala woyne ushshaa duuqqizayta ubbaa azazides. Kawozi azazida mala issoy issoy ba dandayda keena uyana mala imettides.
Esther1:9 Godatteya Asxiina kawo Arxekisise kawoteththa keeththan hessaththoka maccassatas gibira giigsadus.
Esther1:10 Gibirazi doomettida laappunththa gallas
Esther1:11 Hessika godatteya Asxiina ufayssizaaronne mala lo7o gidida gishshas dereynne gita mokkonneti izo be7ana mala iza kallachcha ba hu7en woththada kawoza sinth yaana mala ooththida.
Esther1:12 Gido attiin kawoza oosanchchati kawozi azazida mala izis yootiin godatteya Asxiina baana koyabeekku. Histtiin kawozi keehi hanqettides; daro yiillotides.
Esther1:13 Suurenne tuma pirda pirdanaas eranchchatappe zore oyshoy kawozas lose gidida gishshas wode hanoteth eriza eranchchatara zorettides.
Esther1:14 Heytikka Karshana
Esther1:15 Kawozikka isttas
Esther1:16 Hessafe guye Mamukay kawozasinne mokkonnetas
Esther1:17 Hayssi godatteya ooththidayssi harata hayththan seetettiko istti ba azinata kadhana; ‹Kawo Arxekisisi godatteya Asxiina izakko yaana mala xeygiin yontta ixxadus› gaana.
Esther1:18 Hanno hachcha gallassayn godattey hano siyida Paarisetanne Meedoone dere mokkonneta machcheti ubbay kawozas mokkonneta ubbaas hessaththo zaarana. Izi hessaththo hankko pacey baynda gallassinne omars ooshshi medhettana.
Esther1:19 «Hayssi yo7ozi kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko hayssafe guye Asxiina kawo Arxekisisekko mulekka gelontta mala kawo matappe awajjay kezo; hessika shaarettontta Paarisenne Meedoone woga mala xaafetto; hessaththoka kawozi godatteteththa bonchchoza izippe ekkidi izippe lo7iza hara maccassas immo.
Esther1:20 Hessafe guye kawoza awajjay izi haariza kumeththa deraa bolla yootettiko guuththatappe biidi gitata gakkanaas diza maccassay ubbay ba azina bonchchana» gi zaarides.
Esther1:21 Kawozinne mokkonneti ubbay he zorezan ufayettida; kawozikka Mamukay shiishshida qofaza polides.
Esther1:22 Ubbayka baso as ayssana mala kiita yeddides; he kiitazikka ba dere qaala malanne xaafiza woga mala xaafettidi dere ubbaas gakkides.
Esther2:1 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi iza hanqoy irxxidaappe guye Asxiina ooththidayssanne izikka izi bolla kessida awajja qoppides.
Esther2:2 He wode kawoza achchan dosettida oosanchchati
Esther2:3 Heyta lo7o geela7ota ubbata Suusa gimben diza maccassata duussaso ehana mala
Esther2:4 Hessafe guye kawoza ufayssiza geela7oya Asxiini gishshas godatto gidu» gida. He zorezi kawoza ufayssides; istti gida malakka ooththides.
Esther2:5 He wode Biniyaame qommofe Qiise naa
Esther2:6 Izikka Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey di7i efidaytappe Yuhuda kawo Ikoniyaanera Yerusalaameppe di7etti bida asatappe issaa.
Esther2:7 Mardikiyoosa aawa ishas Hadeso geetettiza biya dawus; izis aawaynne aaya baynda gishshas izo dichchiday iza. Hanna Astero geetettizaara asateththan gidiin medhan keeha lo7o. Izi aawaynne izi aaya hayqqidaappe guye Mardikiyoosi izo ba naa mala dichchides.
Esther2:8 Kawoza azazoynne awajjay kezida wode daro geela7ota efidi Suusa kataman naagiza Hegges immida; Asterokka kawo keeth efidi maccassata naagiza Hegges hadara imettadus.
Esther2:9 Naya iza ufayssadus; izikka izo dosides; izikka izis mala lo7eththiza dumma qommo kath heerakka izis immides. Kawoteththa keeththafe doorettida laappun aylleta izis giigsidi izonne izi aylleta daro izan maccassata naagiza doorettidaso efides.
Esther2:10 Mardikiyoosi izis kasetidi yootida mala Astera Ayhuda as gididayssa oosikka yootabeekku.
Esther2:11 Qasseka Mardikiyoosi Asteri lo7eteththanne izis gidizayssa erana giidi
Esther2:12 Geela7oti kawozaakko gelanaappe kasetidi issi layth kumeth dhiiketteettes; layththafe koyro usuppun agina kumeth istta bollay liiqi lo7ana mala karbbenne tiyettiza zayte go7etteettes; kaalliza usuppun aginatan dumma dumma shittotanne dumma dumma sinth tiyiza qalameta go7etteettes.
Esther2:13 Hessafe guye issi geela7oya kawozaakko geliza wodey gakkiko
Esther2:14 Omars gelada kawozara aqidaappe wonteththa gallas harason maccassati naagetti dizaso efeettes. Heen kawoza laggeththotas alaafe gidida kawoza keeththan ooththiza gundula Shaashigaaze aawateththaa garsan naagettawus; kawozi izo dosidi izi sunththan xeygontta aggiko zaara kawozaakko gelukku.
Esther2:15 Mardikiyoosi ba naa mala dichchida izas aawaa isha Abi7eele biya Astera kawozaakko geliza taray izo gakkiin maccassati naagetti diza keeththaa alaafe Heggey izis yootidayssafe attiin hara aykkoka oychchabeekku. Astera izo be7iza as ubbaa sinththan ayyotta beettadus.
Esther2:16 Arxekisisi kawotida laappunththa layththan
Esther2:17 He wode kawozi hara maccassa ubbaafe Astero aaththi dosides; hara geela7ota ubbaafe bollara iza kawo matan ayyottadusinne dosettadus. Hessa gishshas izi hu7en godatteteththa kallachcha goxxides. Asxiini godatteteththaa izis immides.
Esther2:18 Hessafe guye kawozi Asteri bonchcho gishshas ba mokkonnetassinne ba shuumeta ubbaas gita gibira giigsides. He ba7aalezi izi ayssizaso ubbaan bonchchettana mala awajjissides. Imotakka ba kiyateththa mala isttas immides.
Esther2:19 Geela7oti nam7anththo shiiqetti uttidaashe Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththa penge naagishe uttides.
Esther2:20 Astera Mardikiyoosi izis yootida mala ba qommonne ba dereza qottadus; iza hessa ooththida gaasoykka Mardikiyoosi kase izo dichchiza wode iza ooththiza mala ha7ikka iza zore ekkashe diza gishshassa.
Esther2:21 Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththa penge naagiza olanchchata halaqa nam7ati Gabataynne Tereshay kawoza bolla hanqettidi kawoza wodhanaas duulatida.
Esther2:22 Mardikiyoosi istti seeridayssa gakki eridi godatto Asteris yootides; izakka Mardikiyoosappe siyidayssa kawozas qonccisa yootadus.
Esther2:23 Yo7oza pilggishin tumu gidi beettides; he nam7u shuumeti kaqetti hayqqana mala istta bolla pirdettides; hessi ubbay kawoza sinththan taarike maxaafan xaafettides.
Esther3:1 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi Agaage dere as Hamadaate naa Haama dhoqqu dhoqqu histtidi hara shuumetappe bollara izas maata immidi bonchchides.
Esther3:2 Asay iza bonchchana mala kawoy azazi woththida gishshas kawo keeththa pengen ooththiza shuumeti ubbay Haamas gulbatidi izas bonchcho saroka immeettes. Gido attiin Mardikiyoosi izas gufanni goynnibeennanne bonchcho saroka immibeenna.
Esther3:3 Hessa gishshas kawo keeththa pengen ooththiza kawo oosanchchati Mardikiyoosa
Esther3:4 Hessaka gallas gallas izas yootishe takkida; gido attiin izi istti yootizayssa ekkanaas koyibeenna. Izi Ayhuda as gididayssa isttas yootida gishshas
Esther3:5 Mardikiyoosi izas gulbati goynnonttayssanne iza bonchchonttayssa be7idi keehippe hanqettides.
Esther3:6 Harappeka Mardikiyoosi oonantta baggakonne shaakki eridaappe guye Mardikiyoosa xalla wodhoy qeeri miishsha mala qoodides. Hessa gishshas Haamay Arxekisise kawoteththa garsan diza Mardikiyoosa bagga gidida Ayhudata ubbaa dhayssana oge koyides.
Esther3:7 Kawo Arxekisisi kawotida tammanne nam7anththo layththan
Esther3:8 Hessafe guye Haamay Kawo Arxekisises
Esther3:9 Hayssi yo7oy kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko istta dhayssana awajjay kezo; tanikka hayssa ha oosoza ooththana asatas 340
Esther3:10 Hessa gishshas kawozi ba midiga maatameza biradhdhefe kessidi Ayhudatas morkke gidida Agaage dere as Hamadaate naa Haamas immides.
Esther3:11 Kawozi Haama
Esther3:12 Histtiin koyro aginan
Esther3:13 Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan
Esther3:14 Ubbaa awuraajjan diza deraas erettana mala
Esther3:15 Qasttanneti kawoza azazon eesoti kezida; awajjazikka Suusa gimben awajettides; kawozinne Haamay uyanaas uttida; gido attiin Suusa katamaya shirotadus.
Esther4:1 Mardikiyoosi ha hanida ubbaa eridaappe guye ba may7o daakkides; maaqa may7idi
Esther4:2 Maaqa may7ida asi kawoteththa keeth gelanaas dandayontta gishshas izas penge gakkanaas bides.
Esther4:3 Kawoza awajjaynne iza azazoy gakkida awuraajjata ubbaan Ayhudata garsan gita ceecey medhettides; histtiin xoomida; yeekkida; waassida; darotikka maaqa may7idi bidinththa bolla ichchida.
Esther4:4 Godatto Asteri dangaxiretinne izo naagiza gundulati yiidi Mardikiyoosa gishshas izis yootiin iza keeha ceecadus; histtada maaqa qoodhe izi may7ana may7o yeddadus; gido attiin izi ekkibeenna.
Esther4:5 Hessafe guye Astera izis ooththana mala kawoy woththida gundulatappe Hataka xeygada Mardikiyoosa ay metoy gakkidaakkonne ays hessaththo izi hanizaakko shaakki erana mala kiittadus.
Esther4:6 Histtiin Hatakay kawo keeth geliza pengen diza katamay zago Mardikiyoosakko yides.
Esther4:7 Mardikiyoosi ba bolla gakkidayssa ubbaa qonccisi izas yootides. Qasseka Haamay Ayhudata dhayssanaas kawo minjja keeth gelththanaas geppida miishshaa likkeka ashshontta geeshshi yootides.
Esther4:8 Ayhudata dhayssanaas Suusa gimben kezida awajjaappe duuqettidayssa Astero bessanaassinne izis paatti yootana mala immides. Izakka kawozaakko gelada ba deraa gishshas maaroteth oychchana malanne gaannatana mala
Esther4:9 Hatakay simmi yiidi Mardikiyoosi izas yootidayssa ubbaa Asteris yootides.
Esther4:10 Izakka Hatakay Mardikiyoosas
Esther4:11 «Kawoza aylletinne iza awuraajjan diza asay ubbay macca gidiin
Esther4:12 Asteri kiitay Mardikiyoosa gakkiin
Esther4:13 izi izis
Esther4:14 Neni hayssa mala woden co7u giikko Ayhudatas maadoynne ashshanay harasoppe yaana. Neninne ne aawa keeththa asay gidikko dhayana; qasseka neni godatto gididay hayssa mala wodessakonne oonee erizay?» giza zaaro yeddides.
Esther4:15 Hessafe guye Astera Mardikiyoosas
Esther4:16 «Baada Suusan diza Ayhuda asa ubbaa issiso shiishsha. Histtidi taas xoomite; heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu omars gakkanaas moopitenne uyopite. Taninne ta dangaxireti hessaththo xoomana; hessi polettidaappe guye hanozi wogappe karera gidikkoka tani kawozaakko gelana; tani hayqqikokka hayqqana» giza zaaro yeddadus.
Esther4:17 Histtiin Mardikiyoosi simmi biidi Astera azazida ubbaa polides.
Esther5:1 Heedzdzanththo gallas Astera ba bonchcho may7oza may7ada kawoza araataas sinththa baggara diza kawoteththa keeththas giddo dabaaban gela eqqadus. Kawozi gede keeththaa gelizaso ginara ba araata bolla utti dees.
Esther5:2 Godatteya Astera dabaaban eqqidaaro kawozi be7idi ufayettides. Ba kushen oykkida worqqa guufeza izis denththides; Asterakka shiiqada guufeza xeera bochchadus.
Esther5:3 Hessafe guye kawozi izo
Esther5:4 Astera zaarada
Esther5:5 Kawozikka
Esther5:6 Istti woyne ushshu uyishin qasseka kawozi Astero
Esther5:7 Asterakka izas zaarada
Esther5:8 «Ta woosaynne ta oyshay hayssafe kaallizayssa; tani kawo matan ayyoteth demmidaa gidikkonne ta koyidayssa imoynne ta woosaa poloy kawoza ufayssizaa gidikko kawozinne Haamay ta giigsiza gibiraan wonto taas beettetto; histtiko tani kawozi oychchida oyshaas zaaro immana» gadus.
Esther5:9 He gallas Haamay kawoza achchafe ufayettishe kezi bides; gido attiin izi Mardikiyoosa kawoza pengen be7ishin izi uttoosappe dendontta ixxidayssanne izas bonchcho immontta aggidayssa be7ida mala iza hanqoy Mardikiyoosa bolla tama mala eexxides.
Esther5:10 Gidikkoka Haamay coo gencecidi baso bides. Ba laggetanne ba machcho Zosaara xeygisidi issi bolla shiishshidaappe guye
Esther5:11 Haamay ba dureteththaanne gitateththaa
Esther5:12 Haamay
Esther5:13 Gido attiin Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosi kawoza pengen uttidayssa ta be7ishin hayssi ubbayka tana ufayssenna» gides.
Esther5:14 Iza machcheya Zosaaraynne iza laggeti ubbay
Esther6:1 He gallassa omars kawozi dhisko dhayi aqides; hessa gishshas ba kawoteththa layththan xaafettida Taarike maxaafati shiiqidi nababettana mala azazides.
Esther6:2 Heen penge naagiza kawoza ola gadawatappe nam7ati Gabataynne Tereshay kawo Arxekisise wodhanaas zoretti uttidayssa Mardikiyoosi yootiin xaafetti uttidayssi beettides.
Esther6:3 Kawozikka
Esther6:4 Kawozi zaaridi
Esther6:5 Izas mata oosanchchati
Esther6:6 Haamay gelidaappe guye kawozi
Esther6:7 Hessa gishshas kawozi izas zaaridi
Esther6:8 kawozi iza mayziza kawoteththa may7oy
Esther6:9 Hessafe guye may7ozinne parazi keehippe bonchchettida kawo shuumetappe issaa kushen imetto. Kawozi bonchchana dosidaade mayzetto; iza paraa togisidi katamays waanna waanna ogeta yuushshishe
Esther6:10 Kawozi zaaridi Haama
Esther6:11 Hessa gishshas Haamay kawoteththa may7o mayzidi para togisides; wogga ogetan kaaleththishe
Esther6:12 Hessafe guye Mardikiyoosi kawoza penge simmides; gido attiin Haamay ceecishe ba hu7e gullunttidi eeson baso simmi bides.
Esther6:13 Ba bolla gakkida ubbaa ba machcho Zosaarassinne ba laggetas ubbaas yootides. Iza zoranchchatinne iza machcho Zosaaray izas
Esther6:14 Istti izara buro hessa haasayan dishin kawo gundulati yiidi Astera giigsida gibiraas Haama eeson ekki bida.
Esther7:1 Histtiin kawozinne Haamay godatteyo Asteri gibiraa maanaas bida.
Esther7:2 He nam7anththo gallassa gibiraas biidi istti woyne ushshaa uyishin kawoy qasseka
Esther7:3 Godatteya Astera zaarada
Esther7:4 Gaasoykka taninne ta derey bashshas
Esther7:5 Kawo Arxekisisi zaaridi
Esther7:6 Asterakka
Esther7:7 Kawozi keehi hanqettidi ba uttidasohoppe dendi eqqides; ba ushsha aggaagidi kawo keeththa atakiltey dizasoza bides. Gido attiin Haamay kawoy iza bolla iita miish ehanaas qachchidayssa erida gishshas godatteya Astera iza hayqoppe ashshana mala woossanaas guye attides.
Esther7:8 Kawozi kawo keeththa atakiltey dizasohoppe simmidi gibiraa keeth geliza wode Haamay godatteyo Asterippe maarettana giidi iza uttida arjetaa bollan gufannidayssa be7ides. Hessafe guye kawozi keehi hanqettides; ba qaalakka dhoqqu histtidi
Esther7:9 Hessafe guye istta giddofe Harboone geetettiza gundulay
Esther7:10 Hessa gishshas Mardikiyoosa kaqqana giidi giigsida koca bolla efidi Haama kaqqida; hessafe guye kawoza hanqoy irxxides.
Esther8:1 Ayhudata morkke Haamay kaqettida gallas kawo Arxekisisi Haama haaro ubbaa godatteyo Asteris aaththi immides. Qasse Mardikiyoosi izis mata dabbo gididayssa Astera kawozas yootadus. Hessa gishshas he gallassafe doommidi Mardikiyoosi kawozaakko gelanawu dandaydes.
Esther8:2 Kawozi Haamappe zaari ekkida ba maatame midigaza Mardikiyoosas immides. Histtiin Astera Haama aqota bolla Mardikiyoosas aawateth immadus.
Esther8:3 Hessafe guye Astera yeekkashe kawoza toho bolla kundada Agaage zare Haamay Ayhudata bolla qachchida iita maqqoy ooson pe7ontta mala kawoza woossadus.
Esther8:4 Histtiin kawozi ba worqqa guufe izis micciin iza denda eqqada
Esther8:5 izas
Esther8:6 Ha boshay wuri ta deraa bolla gakkishin tani waana co7u ga xeellana dandayazinaa? Qasse ta dabbotikka dhayshin tani waana co7u ga xeellana dandayazinaa?» gadus.
Esther8:7 Hessafe guye kawo Arxekisisi godatto Asterissinne Ayhuda as Mardikiyoosas
Esther8:8 Gidikkoka kawo sunththan xaafettidi iza qalabate maatamen shocettida dabdaabbey shaarettana dandayontta gishshas intteka intte baggara Ayhudatas lo7o misati beettiza hara awajja kawoza sunththan xaafidi kawoza qalabate maatamen shocite» gides.
Esther8:9 Siwaana geetettiza heedzdzanththo aginan
Esther8:10 Mardikiyoosi he awajjata ubbaa kawo Arxekisise sunththan xaafissidi
Esther8:11 Kawoza awajjay ubbaa katamatan diza Ayhudati ba dizason dizason issi bolla shiiqana malanne bantta morkketara eqettana mala
Esther8:12 Kawo Arxekisisi haariza biitta ubbaan Ayhudati hessa ooththanaas qachchida gallassay Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassanna.
Esther8:13 Ayhudati ba morkketa bollan halo kessanaas he gallas giigetti uttana mala kawoza awajjafe duuqettida wogay ubbaa deren asay erana mala awajettides.
Esther8:14 Kiitettizayti kawo keeththa parata toggidi kawoza azazo gaththanaas eesotidi bida. Qasse Suusa gimbenkka ha awajjay asa ubbaas yootettides.
Esther8:15 Mardikiyoosi salo misatizanne booththa qacinan dadettida kawo may7o may7idi
Esther8:16 Hessi Ayhudatas ufayssa gallassinne kaassa gallas
Esther8:17 Kawoza awajjay gakkida deretaninne katamata ubbaan Ayhudatas ufayssinne miichcha
Esther9:1 Adaare geetettiza tammanne nam7anththo aginan tammanne heedzdzanththo gallassay gakkides. He gallassay kawoy koyro kessida awajja wode Ayhudata morkketi istta xoonana gida gallassa. Gido attiin yo7ozi laamettiin Ayhudati bantta morkketa xoonida.
Esther9:2 Kawo Arxekisise kawoteththa garsan diza Ayhudati wuri banttana qohanawu koyza ubbaa dhayssanaas bantta kataman kataman issife shiiqida. Hara dere kawoteththati ubbay isttas babbida gishshas isttara ay asikka eqettanawu dandaybeenna.
Esther9:3 Dere haarizaytinne ayssiza gita asati
Esther9:4 Mardikiyoosi kawo keeththan erettidaade gidides; iza goobateththi dere ubbaan seetettides; iza wolqqayka minni minni bides.
Esther9:5 Ayhudati bantta morkketa ubbaa mashshan siifida
Esther9:6 Waanna katama Suusan 500 as wodhi dhayssida.
Esther9:7 Qasse istti Parshandaate
Esther9:8 Poraate
Esther9:9 Parmmashite
Esther9:10 Hayti Ayhudatas morkke gidida Hamadaate naa Haamay yelida tammu attuma nayta. Gido attiin Ayhudati istta aqotan bantta kushe gelththibeettenna.
Esther9:11 Ayhudati Suusa kataman wodhida asaa qooday aappunakko he gallassika kawos yootettides.
Esther9:12 Histtiin kawoy godatteyo Astero
Esther9:13 Astera zaarada
Esther9:14 Histtiin kawozi hessi hanana mala azazides; awajjayka Suusa kataman nam7anththo awajettin Haama nayta tammata ahay kaqettides.
Esther9:15 Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththo gallas Suusa kataman diza Ayhudati qasseka issi bolla shiiqidi qasseka 300 as wodhida; gido attiin istta aqotan bantta kushe gelththibeettenna.
Esther9:16 He wode kawoy hara deretan diza Ayhudatikka bana ashshanaasinne bantta morkketara eqettanaas issi bolla shiiqida. Isttika 75
Esther9:17 Hessi ubbay Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne heedzdzanththa gallas hanides; histtidi tammanne oydanththa gallas gibira gallassinne ufayssa gallas ooththidi shempida.
Esther9:18 Gido attiin Suusa kataman diza Ayhudati tammanne heedzdzanththonne tammanne oydanththo gallassatan wodhishe pe7idi tammanne ichchashanththo gallas gibira gallassinne ufayssa gallas ooththidi shempida.
Esther9:19 Hessa gishshas gaxare giddon diza Ayhudati hach gakkanaaska Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththo gallas gibira gallas
Esther9:20 Mardikiyoosi hayssa ha taarikeza xaafides; kawo Arxekisisi haariza dereta ubbaan
Esther9:21 Mardikiyoosi yeddida dabdaabey Ayhudati layththan layththan Adaare geetettiza aginan tammanne oydanththonne tammanne ichchashanththo gallassatan ba7aale bonchchanaassa.
Esther9:22 He gallassati Ayhudati bantta morkketappe attidi shemppo demmida gallassata; qasse he aginaykka istta kayoteththaynne hidota qanxxoy ufayssaninne kaassan laamettida agina; he gallassatan ufayettishe gibira
Esther9:23 Hessa gishshas Ayhudati Mardikiyoosi immida azazo ekkidi istti bonchchanaas doommida ba7aale layththan layththan aggontta bonchchanaas qachchida.
Esther9:24 Agaage zare Hamadaate naa Haamay Ayhudata ubbata morkkey istta dhayssanaas kase maqettidi istta ubbaa wodhana aginanne gallassa erana mala
Esther9:25 He maqqoy kawoza matan erettidaappe guye Haamay Ayhudata bolla maqettida iita maqqoy wuri guye simmidi iza bolla polettana mala izinne iza nayti miththa bolla kaqettana mala xuufen azazides.
Esther9:26 Hessa gishshas ha gallassati Puurime geetetti xeygettida; hayssa dabdaabbezan isttas xaafettida ubbaa gaason istti ba ayfen be7idayssa gaasoninne istta bollan gakkidayssa gaason
Esther9:27 Ayhudati banttas
Esther9:28 Qasse ha Puurime gallassati yeletan yeletan
Esther9:29 Hessafe guye Abi7eele biya godatteya Astera Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosara issife kase Mardikiyoosi Puurime gishshas xaafida dabdaabbeza minththanaas baas diza maataa qonccisiza dabdaabbe xaafa yeddadus.
Esther9:30 Arxekisisi haariza 127 deren diza Ayhudatas ubbaas saroynne woppay gido giza dabdaabbe sarokara gaththi yeddides.
Esther9:31 Qasse istti kase xoomanaassinne kayottanaas woga kessida mala
Esther9:32 Godatto Asteri awajjay Puurime ba7aale woga minththees; hessika mazgaban xaafettides.
Esther10:1 Kawo Arxekisisi ba haariza dere ubbaa bolla biidi abba lanqe gakkanaas dizayta bolla giira yeggides.
Esther10:2 Izi ooththida gitanne wolqqama oosoti ubbay qasse Mardikiyoosakka wostti dhoqqu histti bonchchidaakko qonccisiza taarikey Meedoonenne Paarise kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafettides.
Esther10:3 Ayhuda dere as Mardikiyoosi kawo Arxekisiseppe bonchchon nam7anththo maaran dees; izi Ayhudati saroteththaninne hirgay baynda daana mala keehi daaburda as gidida gishshas izi Ayhudatankka keehi bonchchettidanne dosettida asa.
Job1:1 Uuxe geetettiza deren issi Iyoobe geetettiza asi dees. Izikka iita ubbaafe haakkidaade; wosoy iza bolla bayndaade; Xoossas yayyizaadenne suure asa.
Job1:2 Izas laappun attuma naytinne heedzdzu macca nayti deettes.
Job1:3 Haaro baggarakka izas 7
Job1:4 Iyoobe attuma nayti issoy issoy bason taran taran diggisa giigsidi issife shiiqi ufayetteettes; heedzdzu michchetakka banttako xeygisidi isttara issife meettessinne uyeettes.
Job1:5 Diggisa gallassati aadhdhidaappe guye Iyoobi wonttara dendidi ba nayta xeygisidinne issaa issaa sunththan yarsho shiishshees. Izi hessaththo ooththizay
Job1:6 Gallassatappe issi gallas salo kiitanchchati GODAA sinth shiiqida wode Xala7eykka isttara issife shiiqides.

Job3:1 Hayssafe guye Iyoobi haasaya doommides; ba yelettida gallassaa

Job3:13 Ha7i tani saron ichchidaakko

Job4:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgi zaarides;
Job4:2 «Iyoobee! Issi asi ne bolla wolqqaththi haasaykko izaade ne dandayan ezganee? Haasayanaappe attiin ooni agganee?
Job4:3 Neni daro asata tamaarsadasa; daaburda qesetakka minththadasa.
Job4:4 Kase ne qaalati dhuphettizayta maaddeetteskoshin; neni kokkoriza gulbatetakka minththaasakkoshin.
Job4:5 Ha7i gidikko metoy ne bolla gakkida gishshas hidotay bayndaade gidadasa; metoykka ne bolla minnida gishshas hidota qanxxadasa.
Job4:6 Xoossaas ne yayyiza yashshay ammanththizaaz gidennee? Ne suure ogetikka nees hidotata deettennee?
Job4:7 Xillo as gidi dishin iza metoy gakkidaadey
Job4:8 Tani akeekida mala
Job4:9 Istti Xoossa peenon dhayana; iza hanqo dambalan istti dippi gi dhayana.
Job4:10 Iitati gaammo mala xaaggana; ba qaala dhoqqu ooththidi waassana; Xoossi gidikko isttas achchaa menththereththana.
Job4:11 Gaammoy shankkatidi mizaaz dhayda wode hayqqiza mala isttika hayqqana; gaammo maratikka laalettiza mala istta naytikka laalettana;
Job4:12 Gallassafe issi gallas xuura gidida kiitay taakko yides; hessa he kiitaza saasukeththan ta siyadis.
Job4:13 Asay omars wolqqama dhisko seerida wode
Job4:14 Baboynne kokkorsi tana oykkiin
Job4:15 Ayanay ta sinththara aadhdhides; dagamappe dendidayssan ta hasay eqqides.
Job4:16 Heenkka issi miishshi eqqi dizayssa beyadis; tishshi ooththa xeelladis shin izi aazakko shaakka eranawu dandayabeekke. Hessafe guye co7u gidasohoppe hizgiza qaala siyadis
Job4:17 ‹Xoossa sinththan xillo gidi beettanaas dandayza asi dizee? woykko bana medhdhidayssa sinththan geeshsha asi beettanee?
Job4:18 Xoossi baas ooththizaytan ammanettontta aggiko
Job4:19 histtiin haradhdhoy montta dishin laalettiza istta yochchay biittafe gidida urqqafe oosettida keeththa giddon dizayta bolla waani ammanettanee?
Job4:20 Maaladoppenne omarsafe giddon istti meqerettana; erettontta dishin istti mernaaskka dhayana.
Job4:21 Tole dhishkey shodettichchida dunkaane mala istti erateththi baynda hayqqana.›
Job5:1 «Iyoobee! Ne xeygiin nees koyanaadey diikko xeyga; nees maado immana mala kiitanchchatappe awayssako xeellay?
Job5:2 Eeya as yiilloy wodhana; qanaateykka as dhayssana.
Job5:3 Eeya asi minnidi dishin beyadis; gido attiin iza aqoy qoppontta dishin Xoossa hanqon laalettides.
Job5:4 Iza naytikka ba de7ozas ammanththizaaz demmettenna; dubbushankka istta gishshas haasayza as istti demmontta gishshas istta bolla qohoy gakkana.
Job5:5 Izi zerida kaththaaka koshattida asati maana; haray attiin agunththa giddon mokkidayssaka izas ashshettenna; Saametti uttida asati iza haaroza ekkanaas amotteettes.
Job5:6 Metoy coo biittafe dendenna; waayeykka gadeppe coo kezenna.
Job5:7 Tama finxeththi bonqofe dendidi pude finxiza mala
Job5:8 «Tani nena gididaakko Xoossa woossana; ta meto ubbaa izas qonccisana.
Job5:9 Izi qooday baynda malalisiza miish
Job5:10 Biitta bolla ira bukisees; goshshatakka haaththan shugisees.
Job5:11 Kawuyidayta bonchchon dhoqqu histtees; muuzottizayta minththeththidi ufayssees.
Job5:12 Istta oosoy polettontta mala gene asata qofa hada ooththees.
Job5:13 Cinccata istta gene oosozan zaari oykkees. Gene asata qofaakka eesora dhayssees.
Job5:14 Gallassay isttas dhuma gidees; buro seeta gallassan omars dhuma giddon diza mala istti tattafettana.
Job5:15 Manqota istta morkketa mashshafe ashshees; metotanchchatakka waayisizayta kusheppe kessi ekkees.
Job5:16 Manqotas hidota immees; makkallateththika biitta bollafe dhayssees.
Job5:17 «Xoossi seeriza asi anjjettidayssa; hessa gishshas Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa seera leqqofa.
Job5:18 Xoossi madunththikokka zaaridi paththees; izi menththees; ba kushen zaaridi koolees.
Job5:19 Usuppun qommo boshappe nena ashshi ekkana; laappunththazanka ay qohoykka ne bolla gakkenna.
Job5:20 Kosha layththan izi nena shemppora paxa woththana; ola layththankka izi nena hayqoppe ashshana.
Job5:21 Xoossi nena iita inxarsafe naagana; boshay ne bolla yiikkoka yayyaka.
Job5:22 Wolqqamata qohoynne koshay nena daganththenna; biitta do7ataska ne yayyaka.
Job5:23 Ne goyiza gaden nena shuchchi waayisenna; do7atarakka ne saron daana.
Job5:24 Ne keeththan saroy kumanayssa ne shaakka erana; ne mehe xeellishin aqoppe paccenna.
Job5:25 Ne zereththay daranayssa ne erana; ne zereththayka demban diza maata mala darana.
Job5:26 Kaththi kaxxidi maxettizayssa mala nekka lo7eththa cimmada duufon baana.
Job5:27 Nuni hayssa ubbaa pilggidi tumu gididayssa eridos; nenikka akeekada hayssa ooson peysha.»
Job6:1 Hayssafe guye Iyoobi hizgi zaarides;
Job6:2 «Ta muuzoteththi geeddaretti uttidaakko aazee dizay! ta metoy ubbay geeddaran geeddaretti uttidaakko aazee dizay!
Job6:3 Abba lanqen diza aceppe aadhdhi deexxanakkoshin; hessa gishshas dandayay paccida ta haasayay nena malalisanaas bessenna.
Job6:4 Ubbaa dandayza Xoossay tana ba yiishshatan caddides; istta marzetikka ta asateththa giddon laalettida; daganththiza Xoossa boshay ta yuushon yuuyi aadhdhides.
Job6:5 Tumappe hardiday cilila maata demmidi caaggi erizee? Booraykka basso maata demmiko xaaggi erizee?
Job6:6 Maxiney gelontta mal7ontta kaththi meetettizee? Phuuphphulle haaththi mal7izee?
Job6:7 Hayssa mala kath maanaas koykke; muusi attiin kushenkka bochchike.
Job6:8 «Ta amottizayssa Xoossi taas immidaakko aazee dizay! Izi ta waaso siyidaakko aazee dizay!
Job6:9 Hayssa ubbaafe izas shene gidiin izi tana menththereththi yeggizaakko! Ba kusheza yeddidi izi tana dhayssidaakko!
Job6:10 Shempo immontta ay hargey tana sakkikokka tani ufayssan guppana; tani Geeshshaza qaala ay wodenkka kaddabeekke;
Job6:11 «De7on de7ana mala dandayza ay minoteththi taas dizee? Hidotay baynda aggiko ays de7azinaa?
Job6:12 Tani shuchcha mala minoo? Ta asateththayka xarqimalaththo minoo?
Job6:13 Tana maaddanaas taas aykko wolqqay deenna; taas diza wolqqay ubbay eketichchides.
Job6:14 «Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossas yash aggidaadessinne daaburdaadeska iza laggey izas kiyateth bessanaas koshshees.
Job6:15 Ta ishati gidikko haroy harotti wodhidaappe guye meliza ammanththontta shaafata mala baleththizayta.
Job6:16 Shaafatan balgo balgo shachchi kumees.
Job6:17 Bone aginatan gidikko maayi dhayees; shaafatikka haaththi baynda melata gideettes.
Job6:18 Caana meheta laaggi ogera biza asati haath koshshas ogeppe ke7i bazzo biitta gelidi toylu toylishe dhayeettes.
Job6:19 Teema biittafe biza mandara asati haaththe koyeettes; Saaba dere zal7anchchatikka haaththe demmanaas hidota ooththeettes.
Job6:20 Banti ammanetti uttida shaafati melidayssa be7idi hidota qanxxeettes; haaththaako gakkiza wode yiilloteettes.
Job6:21 Intteka taas hayta ha shaafata mala; ta bolla gakkida metoza be7idi gede guye baqatideta.
Job6:22 Histtiin ta inttena hessa woykko hayssa taas immite
Job6:23 Qasse ta morkketa kusheppe tana ashshite; woykko tana waayisizayta kusheppe tana kessi ekkite gadinaa?
Job6:24 «Tana tamaarsite; tanikka co7u gaana; ta moorozakka tana bessite.
Job6:25 Tuma qaalay camo gidikkoka ekettees; intte walassay gidikko aykkoska go7enna.
Job6:26 Intte ta haasaya carko mala qoodeeta; histtiko hidota qanxxida taas zaaro immanaas ays koyeetii?
Job6:27 Yi7o nayta bolla saama yeggeeta; intte intte siiqo laggeta bayzanaas miishshan marshetteetii?
Job6:28 «Ane tana haa xeellite; intte sinththan ta wordotadinaa?
Job6:29 Inttes qoho gidontta mala simmite
Job6:30 Tumukka ta inxarsan qohoy beettanee? Ta doonaykka gene miish shaakki eranaas dandayennee?
Job7:1 «Asas biitta duussay baaxe duus deennee? Isttas gallassayka une ooththiza oosanchchata gallassa mala gidennee?
Job7:2 Isttika kuwa garsan shempanaas amottiza oosanchchatanne ba damoza ekkanaas naagiza une asa mala gidettennee?
Job7:3 Ta daaburda aginati taas go7ay bayndayta gidida; meto omarsatikka taas qofa omars gidida.
Job7:4 Ichchiza wode awude dendandinaasha gaada qoppays; omarsayka gidikko taas gede aduqqees; tanikka wonttana gakkanaas haa hee shirettashe aqays.
Job7:5 Taas kumeththa asateththay guxunen kumides; taas ashoykka madunxi goggides; taas madunththayka dhuuqqidi uzazees.
Job7:6 Ta layththata gallassati daththa mooqe xongeththafe eesoteettes; issi hidotay baynda wurseth gakkeettes.
Job7:7 Ta Godawu! Ta shemppoya peeno mala gididayssa qoppa; hayssafe guye ubbaka lo7o miish demmike.
Job7:8 Ha7i tana be7izayssi nam7anththo zaaridi beyenna; izi koyzaa gidikkoka tana demmanawu dandayenna.
Job7:9 Shaaray laaletti dhayzayssa mala hayqqidi duufon biza asi haa simmidi yeenna.
Job7:10 Nam7anththo zaaridi baso simmenna; izaade erizayti ubbay iza balettana.
Job7:11 «Hayssafe guye co7u giikke! Taas ayanay ceecidayssafe dendidayssan ta haasayays; ta shemppoya irayettida gishshas zuuzumays.
Job7:12 Hayssa likke naagettizaade ne tana ooththiday tani abbayee? Woykko abba giddon diza do7aayee?
Job7:13 Ta hiixay tana minththeththees; ta ichchizasoy ta sakoza baleththees gaada ta qoppadis.
Job7:14 Neni gidikko tana agumon yashissaasa; ajjuutankka daganththaasa.
Job7:15 Hayssa metoy darida asateththa tookkada daanaappe ta cuuletta hayqqanayssa doorays.
Job7:16 Hidota qanxxadis; daanaaska ta koykke; taas layththayka qaanth gidida gishshas tana aggaaga.
Job7:17 «Ne soho immanaassinne qoppanaas asi aazee?
Job7:18 Wonttan wonttan pilggana mala
Job7:19 Cuch mittiza guuththa wodekka taas immikii?
Job7:20 Asa kaalettiza Godawu! Tani nagara ooththoyssan neni ay qohettadii? Ays ta bolla ne toora zaaradii? Ays hayssa keena ta nena deexxadinaa?
Job7:21 Ubbaaka ta nagara atto giikkii? Ta ooththiza qoho taappe diggikii? Ta duufon gelana wodey gakkides; hayssafe guye ne tana koyidaakkoka ta beettike.»
Job8:1 Shuha dere as Belidaade geetettizayssi hizgidi zaarides;
Job8:2 «Ne doonappe ke7iza qaalati gote carko mala; awude gakkanaas hayssaththo ne haasayanee?
Job8:3 Xoossi pirda bokkasi erizee? Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay xilloteth bokkasi erizee?
Job8:4 Ne nayti Xoossa qohidaa gidikko
Job8:5 Gidikkoka ne Xoossako simmiko
Job8:6 suurenne geesh gidikko izi eesoti nees bessiza sohon nena zaarana.
Job8:7 Ne doomeththay guuth misatikkoka
Job8:8 «Ane kase yeleta oychcha; kase aawati gakkidasoza pilgga xeella.
Job8:9 Nu layththazi buro guuth gidida gishshas nuni aykkoka erokko; nu layththayka eesho mala aadhdhizaaza.
Job8:10 Istti nees tamaarsizayssinne nees yootizayssi ba akeekizayssafe ekkidi gidennee?
Job8:11 Tumukka carey bayndason shacca maatay mokki erizee? Haaththi bayndason marcoy cililizee?
Job8:12 Hayssi hanontta aggiko diccidi buuch gakkanaappe sinththan buro cililan dishe melees.
Job8:13 Xoossa dogiza asata ubbaa wurseththay hessa mala hanana; Xoossi baawa giza asata hidotay qanxxettana.
Job8:14 Achcharo keeththa mala miishshan ammanetteettes; istti hidota ooththiza miishshi diikkoka kawushshara dhayana.
Job8:15 Achcharo keeththa bolla istti zemppizaa gidikko izi minni eqqenna; achcharo keeththaza izi oykkiko duuxeretti wodhdhana.
Job8:16 Haaththa kallida harumay ho7o demmidi daayees;
Job8:17 Xaphoza shuchcha muuhe giddon yeddees; zaalla za7an xaphees.
Job8:18 Ba dizasoppe shodettiza wode izi dizasozi erettenna.
Job8:19 Iza wurseththi hessa mala gidees; hara maatati biittafe doleettes.
Job8:20 «Xoossi wosoy baynda asata olenna; iita asata qese minththenna.
Job8:21 Hessa gishshas nenikka ufayssan miiccana malanne ‹Ililana› mala izi ooththana.
Job8:22 Nena ixxiza asati gidikko yeella may7ana; iita asata keeththika dhayana.»
Job9:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides;
Job9:2 «Ee! Tani hayssa tumu gididayssa erays; gido attiin asi Xoossa sinththan waani xillo gidanaas dandayzee?
Job9:3 Izarakka ooni marshettanaas dandayzee? Izi issi shii oyshota oychchizaa gidikko isttafe issinokka zaaranaas dandayzaadey deenna.
Job9:4 Xoossi eranchchanne wolqqama; oonee izara eqettidi xoonettonttay?
Job9:5 Akeekontta zumata kokkorsana; ba hanqozankka shirechchi yeggana.
Job9:6 Xoossi biitta dizasoppe kokkorsana; biitta tuussatakka qaaseththana.
Job9:7 Awa arshey mokkontta mala ooththanawu dandayees; Xoolinttetikka poo7isontta mala ooththana.
Job9:8 Oonikka maaddontta dishin salota micciday iza; izi abba dambala bolla hemettees.
Job9:9 Zardo
Job9:10 Izi ooththiza malalisiza miishshata nuni pilggidi akeekanawu dandayokko; izi poliza makkalla miishshata nuni qoodanawu dandayokko.
Job9:11 «Xoossi ta matara aadhdhikokka ta demmike; haa taakko shiiqikkoka shaakkada erikke.
Job9:12 Izi ba koyidayssa ekkiko oonikka iza diggenna; ‹Ays hayssaththo ooththay?› giidi iza oychchanaas xalizay deenna.
Job9:13 Xoossay ba hanqozappe guye simmenna; Era7aabe geetettiza abba giddo do7ata maaddizaytikka iza toho garsan gulbatana.
Job9:14 «Histtiin tani izas zaaro waana immana dandayazinaa? Izara marshettanaas ay qaala ta demmanee?
Job9:15 Geesh gida ta beettidaakkoka; ta bolla pirdizaadey tana maarana mala woossana attiin izas zaaro immanaas xalikke.
Job9:16 Ta iza sunththa xeygikko izi zaaro taas immizaa gidikkoka ta magana izi siyana gaada ta ammanettike.
Job9:17 Izi tana gote carkon liiqisana; aykko gaasoykka baynda taas madunththaa ha darsana.
Job9:18 Shempo ta zaarana wodey gakkanaaska taas shemppo immenna; ta shemppon waaye kunththides.
Job9:19 Taas diza wolqqan ta izara baaxetana gontta mala wolqqan izara eqettidi dandayanay deenna; ta mootettada iza laththana gontta mala iza pirdiza asataakko shiishshanaas dandayza asi deenna.
Job9:20 Tani geeshshinne xillokoshin ta haasayay tana qohanchcha kessees; ta haasayza haasayati ubbay ta bolla pirdeettes.
Job9:21 «Aykkoka tani borey bayndaade gidikkoka ta gishshas qoppike; ta shemppoyokka harassetays.
Job9:22 Xoossi xillozanne qohanchchazakka dhayssiza gishshas aykko dummateththika deenna ta giday hessa gishshassa.
Job9:23 Asi iita meton wurshin izi geeshsha asa meto qidhees.
Job9:24 Biittay iita asata kushen aadhdhi imettishin izi pirdiza asata ayfe goozees; hayssa ooththiday Xoossa gidontta aggiko haray oonee?
Job9:25 «Ta layththati woxxizaytappe haa aadhdhi eesoteettes; aykko ufayssika ta demmontta aadhdheettes.
Job9:26 Isttika sookke gizayssafe oosettida wogolo mala eesoteettes; baqqi ekkiza golle kafo mala eesoteettes.
Job9:27 Tani ta zuuzunththaa balana; ‹Ta sinththaaka kareththo aggada ane poo7isa bessays› giikko
Job9:28 Xoossi tana geesh ooththidi qoodonttayssa tani eriza gishshas metoynne waayey ta bolla gakkana gaada yayyays.
Job9:29 Histtiin ta qohanchcha geetetta qoodettidaa gidikko taas hada daaburay aazassee?
Job9:30 Tani ta asateththa saamunan meeccizaa gidikko
Job9:31 ha ubbaa ooththiinkka neni duge iita ciimman tana olana; ta may7otikka tana shaatettana.
Job9:32 Izi ta mala as gidontta gishshas
Job9:33 Nu bolla ba kusheza gaththi woththidi pirdi nuna shaakkiza asi nu giddon dizaakko
Job9:34 iza teemateththi tana hirgisontta mala Xoossi ba guufeza ta bollafe denththidaakko
Job9:35 tani izas yayyontta haasayanakkoshin; ha7i gidikko ta diza hanon dashe haasayana dandaykke.
Job10:1 «Duussi tana saleththides; ta de7iza camo de7oza qonccen sissana.
Job10:2 Tani Xoossa hizgana; ta bolla nees lancey diikko taas qonccisa attiin ta bolla pirdofa!
Job10:3 Hayssa likke ne tana metoththoyssi nees wogaa? Neni nerkka medhdhida asaa ne kadhanaas nees bessizee? Iita asata duulatay nena ufayssizee?
Job10:4 Ne ayfey asa ayfe malaa? Woykko ne asaththo xeellay?
Job10:5 Ne wodeti asayssa malaa? Woykko ne layththati asa layththa mala qaanththee?
Job10:6 Ays ne ta qohoza xeellay? Ays ne ta nagarakka kaalla kaallada aggontta ixxay?
Job10:7 Tani qohonttayssanne ne kusheppe oonikka tana ashshonttayssa ne eraasa.
Job10:8 Taas medhanne mala immi medhdhiday ne kusheta; histtiin ha7i ha kusheti tana zaari laalli dhayssanee?
Job10:9 Mana miishsha mala ne tana biittafe medhdhoyssa qoppa; histtiin ha7i ne tana gudulla mala liiqisanee?
Job10:10 Tana maaththa mala tigada
Job10:11 Ta asateththa galbaninne ashon kammadasa; meqeththaninne shayan gaththa oyththadasa.
Job10:12 De7onne mernaa siiqo taas immadasa; ne naagoykka ta ayana minththides.
Job10:13 «Hekko hayta ha miishshata ne wozinan qotta woththada daasa; ne qofaykka hayssa gididayssa ta eradis.
Job10:14 Ta qohidaa gidikko ne ayfeti beyana; ta nagara gishshas tana qaxxayontta aadhdhaka.
Job10:15 Ta nagara ooththidaakko eesora meto giddon kundana; lo7o miish ooththidaa gidikkoka galatetikke; ta gilqiin yeellay tana gakkides.
Job10:16 Ta otorettidaakko ne tana gaammo mala shankkatada oykkana; ne tana qohanaas zaara zaara shankkatana.
Job10:17 Ta bolla markkattiza asata ne ubbaa gallas demmana; ta bolla ne hanqoy gede dari dari baana; neni tana qohanaas ubba gallas ooraththa qofata ola asata mala ta bolla denththaasa.
Job10:18 «Ta Godaa Xoossawu! Ays ta yelettana mala ooththadii? Oonikka tana be7ontta ta hayqqaychchidaakko lo7okkoshin!
Job10:19 Ta medhettontta attarkina; tani ta aayey uloppe duufon bidaakko taas lo7o gidanakkoshin!
Job10:20 Ta daana layththaya qaanth gidekkee? he qaanththa layththayn guuththara ta ufayettana mala tana aggarkkii!
Job10:21 Hessika tani nam7anththo haa simmanaas dandayontta girdi gida dhumaso baanaappe sinththana.
Job10:22 Ta baanaasozi dhuma kuwaynne shiroy kumida biitta; heen diza poo7ozi dhuma mala.»
Job11:1 Na7imaane dere as Zoofaarey hizgides;
Job11:2 «Hayssa ha hada qaalatas ubbaas zaaro immizay baye? Asi haasaya daron xillo gidana dandayzee?
Job11:3 Iyoobee! Ne haasayda hada haasayatas zaaroy imettontta misatizee? Ne hayssa mala qilccishin nena seerana asi bayndaz misatizee?
Job11:4 Ne qofan
Job11:5 Xoossi nees haasaydaakkonne likke zaaro immidaakko aazee dizay!
Job11:6 Erateththas ogey daro gidida gishshas
Job11:7 «Neni Xoossas ciimma gidida xuura eranaas dandayay? Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa pilggada gakkanawu dandayay?
Job11:8 Iza gitateththay saloppe bolla; neni ay ooththanawu dandayay? Iza ciimmateththayka si7ooleppeka ziqqa; neni ay eray?
Job11:9 Xoossa gitateththay biittafe darees; abbafe aakkees.
Job11:10 Xoossi yiidi qachchiko
Job11:11 Xoossi go7ontta asata erees; izi qoho beyishe co7u giidi xeellenna.
Job11:12 Eeya asi eranchcha gidanaappe harey as gididi yelettanayssi kawuyana;
Job11:13 Gidikkoka neni ne wozina suurisikko
Job11:14 Neni nagarappe haakkiko
Job11:15 he wode dhoqqu gaada yeellay baynda ubbaa miish ne beyana; yeellay baynda minna eqqanawu dandayaasa.
Job11:16 Ne metoza ubbaa ne dogana; ne akeekizaykka aadhdhi bichchida haro haaththa mala gidana.
Job11:17 Ne shemppoya seeta gallassa awappe aadhdhada poo7ana; dhumaykka wontta poo7o mala gidana.
Job11:18 Nees hidotay diza gishshas nenikka ammanettada daana; Xoossi nena naagiza gishshas neni hirgay baynda woppu gaada daana.
Job11:19 Ne oonaska babbontta ichchana; daro asatikka ne sinththan bonchcho demmanaas koyana.
Job11:20 Iitata ayfey qooqana; istti attana ogeti ubbay gorda gidana; istta wurseththayka hayqo.»
Job12:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides;
Job12:2 «Tumukka intte keehi eranchchata; intte hayqqishinkka erateththi inttenara issife hayqqana misatees.
Job12:3 Gido attiin taaska intteyssa mala akeekay dees; tani inttefe ay miishshankka guuxxike; intte haasaydayssa asi ubbay erees.
Job12:4 «Ta Xoossa xeygiin taas izi zaarida wodey dees; ha7i tani ta laggetas qidhes gidadis; mooroy baynda xillo tani asa ubbaas qidhes attadis.
Job12:5 Metoy iza bolla gakkontta asa matan metotida asa meto leqqanayssi kawushsha miishsha; gido attiin kundanaas gandigarzaade sugi yeggeeta.
Job12:6 Ba eeqa xoossata goynnizayti
Job12:7 «Gidikkoka medosata oychcha; istti nena tamaarsana; salo kafota oychcha; istti nees yootana.
Job12:8 Woykko biittays yoota; izakka nena tamaarsana; abba giddo moletikka nees yootana.
Job12:9 Hayssa ubbaa giddofe Xoossa kushey hayssa ooththidayssa eronttay oonee?
Job12:10 Shemppora paxa diza medheteththi ubbaynne issi issi asa shemppoy Xoossa maata giddon dees.
Job12:11 Inxarsi kaththa qaana shaakki erizayssa mala
Job12:12 Erateththay cimateththan
Job12:13 «Xoossas gidikko aadho erateththinne wolqqay dees; zoreynne akeekay iza matappe beetteettes.
Job12:14 Xoossi laallidayssa oonikka zaari keexxanawu dandayenna; Xoossi qachchidayssa oonikka birshanawu dandayenna.
Job12:15 Xoossi ira diggiko kosha gidana; ira bukisikko qasse biittay haron meecettana.
Job12:16 Xoossi minonne xoonizaade; balettizaadeynne baleththizaadey
Job12:17 Izi zorizayta erateth diggana; dere kaaleththizayta izi eeya ooththana.
Job12:18 Izi kawota kawoteththa araataappe woththana; qasho asa mala dancco birshisana.
Job12:19 Qeesetappe istta qeeseteththaa woththi ekkidi istta gooddana; godateththa bolla dizayta istta godateththafe diggana.
Job12:20 Ammanettida asata co7u ooththana; cimatappeka akeeka diggana.
Job12:21 Gita asata yeellachchana; wolqqamata wolqqa diggana.
Job12:22 Dhumason qotettida xuura qonccisana; sakkanna dhuma poo7on laammana.
Job12:23 Kawotakka gitasana; zaaridikka dhayssana; kawoteththaaka darsana; zaaridikka laallana.
Job12:24 Kaaleththizaytas akeekay paccana malanne ogey baynda bazzo biittan toylattana mala izi ooththana.
Job12:25 Poo7oy baynda dhumason istti dhuphettana malanne maththottida asa mala istti gadigadana mala ooththana.
Job13:1 «Hekko hayssa ubbaa ta ayfey be7ides; ta hayththika siyidi akeekides.
Job13:2 Intte erizayssa keena tanikka erays; ta aykkonka inttefe guuxxike.
Job13:3 Gidikkoka ta haasayay ubbaa dandayza Xoossara; ta izarakka marshettana.
Job13:4 Intte gidikko wordon kumideta; oonakka paththanawu dandayontta aakimeta mala.
Job13:5 Hayssa ubbaafe intte co7u gidaakko eranchchata misati beettanakkoshin!
Job13:6 Tani shiishshiza marshe qaala siyite; ta qohokka tani yootishin co7u giidi ezgite.
Job13:7 Xoossa sunththan ays wordo haasayeetii? baleththon intte Xoossa ufayssana inttes misatizee?
Job13:8 Iza bessontta ogera maaddeetii? Izas xabaqa eqqandetii?
Job13:9 Xoossi inttena qoridaakko issi lo7o miish inttefe demmandeshaa? Intte asata eeysizayssa mala Xoossaka eeyssanawu dandayana inttes misatizee?
Job13:10 Intte geemara wordo maaddiko tumappe Xoossi inttena hanqana.
Job13:11 Iza bonchchoy inttena yashshennee? Iza teemaykka inttena daganththennee?
Job13:12 Intte leemison haasayza haasayati bidinththa mala go7ay bayndayta; intte marsheteththayka mana miishsha mala meqerettana.
Job13:13 Ane co7u giite! Tani haasayana mala taas gisha immite; hessafe guye ba dosoyssa hano.
Job13:14 «Tani ach saxxada gencecashe dizay aazassee? Ta shemppoyakka ta kushen dawus.
Job13:15 Hessa gishshas Xoossi tana wodhana koykkoka taappe attiza miishshi aykkoyka deenna; gidikkoka ta hanoza izas erisana.
Job13:16 Nagaranchcha asi Xoossa sinththi shiiqanaas dandayontta gishshas oonee erizay hayssi ta xalateththi paxanaas gaaso gidanaas dandayees.
Job13:17 Ane ta haasayza qaalata wogara ezgite; ta doonara ta markkattizayssa siyite.
Job13:18 Ta marsheteththaa lo7eththa giigsada shiishshadis
Job13:19 Tana mootizay diikko tani marshettontta co7u gaada hayqqana.
Job13:20 «Godawu! Ta ne sinththafe qotettontta mala heyta nam7u miishshata taas ooththa.
Job13:21 Heytikka ne hanqo qeseta ta bollafe denththa; yashissiza ne taman tana daganththofa.
Job13:22 Xoossawu! Koyro ne haasaya; ta nees zaaro immana; tanikka haasayana; nekka zaaro imma.
Job13:23 Ero gido ta ooththida nagaraynne qohoy ay likkee? Ane ta moorozanne ta nagara tana erisa.
Job13:24 Ne sinththa taappe genththada tana ne morkke mala aazas qooday?
Job13:25 Carkoy qoqofiza boncco malanne mela happa mala ne ays tana yashiseththan goodday?
Job13:26 Ta bolla ne xaafida mootoy keehi camo; tani yelagateththan ooththida qohozakka taas aggabeekka.
Job13:27 Ne ta tohota durumata giddon qachchadasa; ta tanggo ubba wode ne kaalettaasa; ta geedon ne eqqaasa.
Job13:28 «Hessa gishshas tani wooqqida miishsha mala gidada attana; baday mida may7o malakka ta dhayana.
Job14:1 «Asho may7ida asas layththay qaanththa; hessika meton kumides.
Job14:2 Ciishsha mala beettidi heerakka qokkees; eesho mala daro gam7ontta heera aadhdhees.
Job14:3 Histtiin neni hayssa mala asa medheteththa kaalettay? Ne sinththika pirdas shiishshanee?
Job14:4 Tuna miishshafe geeshsha miish demmanaas dandayzaadey oonikka deenna.
Job14:5 Asa layththas wodhida zaway dees; asi daana aginatikka ne matan qoodan deettes; nenikka woththida layththa zawappe aadhdhizaadey deenna.
Job14:6 Uneti aqizaadey ba ooththana gallassa oosoyo polidi ufayettiza mala
Job14:7 Qanxxettida miththa uththaska hidotay dees; nam7anththo simmi aacanaassinne haggata kessanaas dandayees.
Job14:8 Aykkoka xaphoti biitta giddon cimmikokka
Job14:9 Irxxa demmiko nam7anththo aacees; oorath tokettida miththa mala haggata kessees.
Job14:10 Asi gidikko hayqqidi kase baynda mala hanees; hayqqidaappe guye awan beettanee?
Job14:11 Abba haaththi wuriza mala
Job14:12 asikka hessa mala hayqqidaappe guye haa simmenna; saloy aadhdhanaashe gakkanaas dendenna; dhiskofekka beeggenna.
Job14:13 «Hayqqidayta giddon ne tana qottidaakko aazee dizay! Ne hanqozi aadhdhana wodey gakkanaas ne tana qottidaakko! Qaxaro gallas qachchada ne tana qoppidaakko!
Job14:14 Asi hayqqidaappe guye ashora paxa daanaas dandayzee? Taas wodey laamettana gakkanaas
Job14:15 He wode neni tana xeygana; tanikka nees ‹Yee› gaana; ne medheta gidida tana beyanaas ne laamotana.
Job14:16 Hekko ha7i ne ta hemeta kaalettaasa; gidikkoka ta nagara qoppaka.
Job14:17 Ta qohoy karaxiiten xunttettana; ta nagarakka ne kammana.
Job14:18 «Zumay harottiza malanne woddiza mala
Job14:19 haaththi shuch woocidi ongiza mala
Job14:20 Ne wolqqay mernaas izaade bolla minnees; izikka kase baynda mala hanees; ne iza medhaka laammada ne sinththafe dhayssaasa.
Job14:21 Iza nayti bonchcho demmidaakkoka izi erenna; kawuyizaakokka izi xeellenna.
Job14:22 Izas iza asateththa waayezi siyettees; izikka ba metoza gishshas xalla yeekkees.»
Job15:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgides;
Job15:2 «Tumu era asi carko mala kushen oykettontta miish haasayi erizee? Iza ulon qohiza qofay daanaas bessizee?
Job15:3 Era asi aykko go7ontta qaalataninne go7ay baynda haasayan marshettizee?
Job15:4 Neni Xoossas yayyizayssa aggadasa; Xoossas bessiza goynnozakka diggaasa.
Job15:5 Ne qohanchcha gididayssi ne haasayan erettees; gido attiin cinccateththa haasayan kammanaas baaxetaasa.
Job15:6 Ne bolla pirdizay ne doonappe attiin tana gidikke; ne haasayay nenateththaa qonccisees.
Job15:7 «Asappe sinththan yelettiday nenee? Zumati medhettanaappe sinththan ne yelettadii?
Job15:8 Tumu Xoossa xuura siyadii? Asa erateth erizay nena xalla nees misatizee?
Job15:9 Nuni erizayssafe dumma miish ne erizayssi aazee? Nu erizayssafe nees qonccida dumma miishshi aazee?
Job15:10 Yeletan ne aawappe cimmiza hu7ey pulumida cimati qofan nunara deettes.
Job15:11 Nu baggara nees yootettiza Xoossafe imettida minththeththoy nees gidennee?
Job15:12 Nena ne wozinay ays haraso efizee? Ays hanqon dereqa xeellay?
Job15:13 Hayssaththo ooson Xoossa bolla ne ayana denththeththadasa. Hayssa mala hanqo qaala haasayanawu gakkadasa.
Job15:14 «Asi geesh gidanaas dandayzee? Asho may7iday xillanaas dandayzee?
Job15:15 Xoossay ba kiitanchchata bolla ammanettenna; saloykka iza sinththan geesh gidenna.
Job15:16 Moorettidaynne tuniday nagarakka haaththa mala uyiza asi ay mala iitaa?
Job15:17 «Istta aawati qottontta isttas ooththidayssa
Job15:18 
Job15:19 Biittaya isttas xalla imettadus; imaththatikka istta giddon walakettibeettenna.
Job15:20 As waayisishe de7iza iita asi ba layththa kumeththan waayettishe daana.
Job15:21 Daganththiza giiris izi ba hayththan siyana; ubbaa miishshi saro misatidi izas beettiza wode iza dhayssiza miishshi iza bolla yaana.
Job15:22 Izas qaaday mashshan hayqo gidida gishshas
Job15:23 Kafos wora attida kaththa mala izi wora attana; izi dhayana dhuma gallassay izaakko matidayssa izi erees.
Job15:24 Metoynne ceecey iza yashshana; olas giigettida kawo mala iza bolla minnana.
Job15:25 Hayssi hananay Xoossa bolla ba kushe denththida gishshassa; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa bolla xalida gishshassa.
Job15:26 Izi ba ordenne mino gondalle ekkidi Xoossara eqettana kezides.
Job15:27 «Iza ayfey moodhen goozettides; iza xeessayka ordides.
Job15:28 Hayssi ha addezi mulera kundidi dhayda katamatan
Job15:29 Duretenna; iza haaroykka daro wode gam7enna; biitta bollaka aakkenna.
Job15:30 Dhumappe atti baanawu dandayenna; tama lacoy haggata melissidayssa malanne ciishshatikka carkon qokkida miththa mala gidana.
Job15:31 Hada miishshan ammanettishe bana barkka baleththofo; hessankka izi go7ay bayndayssa gidi attana.
Job15:32 Izi wodey gakkontta dishin uththay meliza malanne haggatikka cililontta miththa mala hanana.
Job15:33 Izi buron kaxxontta dishe ayfezi qoqofettiza woyne miththa malanne ciishshay qoqofettiza wogara miththa mala gidana.
Job15:34 Xoossa Xoossateththa erontta asatas zereththi de7enna; gubbon oosettida keeththatikka taman dippi gi xuugettana.
Job15:35 Hayssa mala asati gene miish qoppeettes; metokka medhdheettes; istta wozinaykka baleththon kumides.»
Job16:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides;
Job16:2 «Tani hayssa mala haasaya daro wode siyadis; intte saleththiza zoranchchata.
Job16:3 Hayssa intte hada haasayas wurseththi bayee? Hayssa lagge tanara marshettana mala inttena denththeththiday aazee?
Job16:4 Intte ta sozan gidiin tani intte sohon gididaakko kadhen tani hu7e qaaththada ha7i intte gizayssa ubbaa intte bolla lo7eththa haasayanakkoshin.
Job16:5 Hessa malakka ta doonan inttena minththeththananne minththanaas daro haasayanakkoshin.
Job16:6 «Gido attiin daro haasaykkoka ta hargey haa lo7enna; co7u ga dandaykkoka ta waayey taappe kichchenna.
Job16:7 Xoossawu! Tana asateththafe kare kessadasa
Job16:8 Ta asateththay gundoyssi ta bolla dendidi neni nagaranchcha giidi ta bolla markkattees.
Job16:9 Xoossi tana hanqidi ta asateththa qanxxereththides; tana ixxidi ba ach ta bolla garccides; ta morkkey ba ayfe ta bolla maxi kessides.
Job16:10 Asay ta yuushon shiiqettidi ta bolla ceeqettides; tana qidhe qaalan baqqida.
Job16:11 Xoossi tana iita asatas aaththi immides; makkallanchchata kushen yeggides.
Job16:12 Ta saron daysikoshin gidikkoka Xoossi ba hanqozan tana menththereththides; ta qoodhe cuulli oykkidi daaburissides; ba qofa ta bolla polides.
Job16:13 Wondafanchchati tana giddoththida; qadheteththi baynda ta kilahota qanxxereththida; ta ciyezakka biitta bolla gussida.
Job16:14 Izi tana zaari zaari madunxides; mino olanchcha mala ziizimi yiidi tana shocides.
Job16:15 «Ta kayoteththas maaqa sikka may7adis; gudulla bolla gufannadis.
Job16:16 Ta ayfesoy yekon zo7ides; sakkanna dhumay ta siphinth kammides.
Job16:17 Hayssi ubbay hanshin ta ooththida qohoy deenna; tani ta woosa Xoossako shiishshizay wozina geeshshateththanna.
Job16:18 «Biittazoo! Tana gakkida qohoza ne kammofa! Suure pirda gishshas ta shiishshiza maganay kametti attana mala ne ooththofa!
Job16:19 Hekko taas markkattizaadeynne afakaato eqqizaadey salon dees.
Job16:20 Ta laggeti tana leqon xeelleettes; tani gidikko pude Xoossas yeekkays.
Job16:21 As asara gaththi haasayssidi maqayinththizaadey dizayssa mala; as Xoossara gaththi maqayinththiza asi didaakko aazee dizay?
Job16:22 «Ta layththas wurseththay gakkees; ta haa simma yonttaso baanaas guuththa wodey xalla attides.
Job17:1 «Ta ayanay daaburdes; ta daana layththayka polettanawu matides; duufoykka tana naagees.
Job17:2 Tana qidhizayti tana yuuyi aadhdhida; ta ayfeykka istti ixxizayssa xeellees.
Job17:3 Ta Xoossawu! Neeppe attiin taas eqqanay haray deenna; neni ne hu7era taas waase gida.
Job17:4 Istti pilggidi akeekanawu dandayontta mala istta qofa gordadasa; hessa gishshas istti xoonana mala ooththofa.
Job17:5 Miishshe demmanawu giidi ba laggeza aaththi immiza asa nayta bolla gomey gakkana.
Job17:6 «Xoossi tana asas kaassa miish ooththides; asay izaade bolla cuttiza asa mala gidadis.
Job17:7 Afunththafe dendidayssan ta ayfeti doljumida; kumeththa ta asateththayka eesho mala gidides.
Job17:8 Xillo asati hayssan dagamettida; geeshshati Xoossa ammanontta asata bolla hanqettida.
Job17:9 Gido attiin xilloti tuma ogeppe kare ke7ettenna; geeshshati minoteththa bolla minoteththi gujettees.
Job17:10 «Intte ubbayka nam7anththo yiidi ta sinththan marshettiko; intte giddofe issi akeekara diza as demmike.
Job17:11 Ta layththay wurides; ta qofaynne taas wozina amoy hada gidi attides.
Job17:12 Hayti ha asati omarsa gallas geettes; poo7oza qasse dhumana hanees geettes.
Job17:13 Hayssafe guye taas diza qaaday duge hayqqida asati dizaso duufon wodheththa; yaan dhumason tani ta hiixa ongana.
Job17:14 Duufo
Job17:15 Histtiin taas ay hidotay dizee? taas hidota gidiza miish oonee taas xeellanay?
Job17:16 Tani duge si7oole wodhishin hidotay tanara issife wodhanee? Issifekka duge duufon nu gelanee?»
Job18:1 Shuha dere as Belidaadi hizgi zaarides;
Job18:2 Iyoobee! Ne ays hayssa mala haasaya darsay? Ane ezga; nunikka haasayoos.
Job18:3 Neni nuna ays meheta mala qooday; neni ays nuna tulleta mala akeekontta as ooththa xeellay?
Job18:4 Neni hanqettiko nena qohaasa attiin ne hanqozan biittay mela attenna. Zaallatikka ba dizasoppe qaaxxettenna.
Job18:5 Nagaranchcha xomppey to7ana; tama lacoykka nam7anththo beettenna;
Job18:6 Iza dunkaane giddon diza poo7oy to7ana; poo7ozikka dhumana.
Job18:7 Izas mino tanggoy qaammi qaammi baana; gene qoppizaade qofay iza zaari kundisana.
Job18:8 Izi barkka biidi woximaden gelana; iza tohoykka giten qaxettana.
Job18:9 Woximadey iza qirphe oykkana; heenkka waaxi ashshana.
Job18:10 Sa7a bolla yarde wodoroy micettides; iza ogenkka woximadey giigettides.
Job18:11 «Yashshi iza giddoththides; guyera kaalli kaalli goodereththees.
Job18:12 Iza wolqqay koshan wurides; boshaykka iza dhayssanaas giigettides.
Job18:13 Hargey iza asateththa gilqisana; hayqoykka mulera ekki baana.
Job18:14 Hirgay baynda ammanetti diza keeththafe izi goodettana; as ubbaa haariza hayqoy iza ekkana.
Job18:15 Iza keeththan ay miishshika attenna; izi aqizasozankka diine tamay laalettana.
Job18:16 Xaphoppe meliza miththa malanne haggatikka meqerettiza miththa mala gidana.
Job18:17 Biitta bolla iza qoppiza asi deenna; iza goobateththika biittafe dhayana.
Job18:18 Izi Poo7osoppe gede dhuman goodettana; biitta bollafe izi kichchana.
Job18:19 Iza dabbota giddofe iza laattana yeletay beettenna; iza baachchanka zarey izas attenna.
Job18:20 Ushachcha baggaranne hadirsa baggara diza asay; iza bolla gakkida metoza gishshas keehi babbidi kokkorana.
Job18:21 Ay wodekka iita asata wurseththay hessa mala; Xoossas yayyontta asa qaaday hayssa.»
Job19:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides;
Job19:2 «Intte tana awude gakkanaas waayisandetii? Awude gakkanaas yo7on taas meqeth menththandetii?
Job19:3 Hekko intte tana tammuto cayeeta; tana kawushshishekka yeellatekketa.
Job19:4 Tumukka tani balettidaa gidikko ta balay tana xalla qohana.
Job19:5 Tumu intte inttena dhoqqisidi ta kawushshateththaa inttes marshe miish ooththeeta.
Job19:6 Gidikkoka hayssa ubbaa metoza ta bolla gaththidaynne
Job19:7 Ta qohettadis gaada woossiin tana siyiza as demmabeekke; ta qaala dhoqqu ooththada magannikokka suure pirda demmabeekke.
Job19:8 Xoossi taas ogeza gordida gishshas aadhdhanaasoy deenna; ta baanaasozakka dhuman gordides.
Job19:9 Ta bonchchoza ta hu7eppe qaaridi tana kawushshides.
Job19:10 Ta asateththa Ubbasora qoxereththidi mulera laallides; taas diza hidota xaphoppe shodettidi kundiza miththa mala ooththides.
Job19:11 Xoossi tana hanqettidi gita meto ta bolla gaththides; baas morkke mala tana qoodides.
Job19:12 Tana dhayssanaas ba oosanchchata kiittides; taas dunkaaneza yuuyi aadhdhidi tana giddoththida.
Job19:13 «Xoossi ta ishati taappe haakkana mala ooththides; tana eriza asati ubbay tana asa dere as kessida.
Job19:14 Ta dabboti taappe haakkida; ta laggetikka tana balida.
Job19:15 Tani tason imaththateth mokka ekkidayti ubbay tana balida; ta garadeti tana imaththa mala qoodida; allaga malakka xeellida.
Job19:16 Tani ta oosanchchaza xeygishin izi taas koyenna; «tana maaddarkkii» ga ta waassishinkka ero geenna.
Job19:17 Ta machcha taappe ke7iza peenoza shaatettadus; ta ishatikka hararettida.
Job19:18 Qeeri naytikka tana kadheettes; tana be7iza wode ta bolla qilcceettes.
Job19:19 Taas mata laggetikka tana shaatettida; ta siiqoti ta bolla morkke gidi dendida.
Job19:20 Taas ashozi wuriin galbazi meqeththara oykettides; tana shiishshiin attadis.
Job19:21 «Ta siiqotoo! Xoossa kushey tana shocida gishshas ane zay taas mishettite! Taas qadhettite!
Job19:22 Xoossi tana gooddoyssa mala intteka tana aazas gooddeetii? Hayssa gakkanaas intte tana waayisidayssi gidennee?
Job19:23 Hayssa gakkanaas ta haasayda qaala akeekizaynne maxaafan xaafiza asi dizaakko tana ay mala ufayssaneeshin!
Job19:24 Iskirtoninne irsaasen xaafettidi woykko shuchcha bolla woocetti uttidi mernaas daana mala ooththidaakko ay mala tana ufayssandeeshin!
Job19:25 Gido attiin tana ashshizayssi paxa de7iza mala wurseththa woden tana wozzanaas biitta bolla izi eqqanayssa tani erays.
Job19:26 Taas galbazi meetetti wurikkoka tani ta asateththafe shaakettada tani Xoossaa beyanayssa erays.
Job19:27 Hara as gidontta izakka tani ta hu7en ta ayfera beyana; ta wozinayakka he gallassayo keehi laamotees.
Job19:28 «Ta siiqotoo! Tana walassidi waayisanaas ‹Hayssa metoza izi barkka baas ehides› gidi haasayeeta.
Job19:29 Xoossa hanqoy mashshan qaxxayeteththan gaththiza gishshas mashshay inttena montta mala naagettite. Xoossa pirday dizayssaka erite.»
Job20:1 Na7imaane dere as Zoofaarey hizgi zaarides;
Job20:2 «Iyoobee! Tana yiillo qofay ne bolla zaaro immana mala sugides; hessa gishshassa ta haasayanawu eesotiday.
Job20:3 Tani tana kawushshiza seera siyays; ta akeekiza akeekazi tana nees zaaro imma imma gees.
Job20:4 «Asi biitta bolla beettoosofe doommidi kaseppe hayssa mala gidoyssa ne eray?
Job20:5 Iita asa ceeqeteththi guuththa wodessa; Xoossa kaddiza asatas diza ufayssay qiphida ayfey xeellana gakkanaassa.
Job20:6 Iita asi aykkoka otorettidi salo gakkikokka
Job20:7 izi ba sheeshsha uteththa mala mulera pitettana; kase iza beyishe diza asatikka
Job20:8 Agumo mala tim7i gi dhayza gishshas beettenna; omarsa elunththa mala izi dhayana.
Job20:9 Izi dizasoppe eeshora dhayza gishshas
Job20:10 Iza nayti aadashidi istta aaway manqotappe genera bonqqida miishsha zaarana.
Job20:11 Wolqqan kumida yelagateththa asateththay guuththa wodeppe guye biitta gidana.
Job20:12 «Iitateththi iza doonan kaththa mala ay mal7ikkoka ba inxarsan izi laacci xeellikokka
Job20:13 wurontta mala doonan coommishe gam7ikokka
Job20:14 Iza ulo giddon camon laamettana; izas shooshsha marze mala gidana.
Job20:15 Iita asi ba mida miishsha un7etti zaarana; ulo giddon dizayssaka Xoossi iza cooshshana.
Job20:16 Iita asi mizayssi wuri izas shooshsha marze mala gidana; shooshsha marze mala gididi iza wodhana.
Job20:17 Wogara zaytey di7o mala goggishin eessinne maaththi shaafa haaththa mala goggishin izi be7ontta hayqqana.
Job20:18 Izi ba daaburda daabura ayfe zaareththi gede immana attiin ba hu7es meenna. Zal7idi izi shiishshida de7ozankka ufayettenna.
Job20:19 Hayssika hanzayssi izi manqota un7eththida gishshassinne ba ooththontta keeththa genen ekkida gishshassa.
Job20:20 «Iza hirgeteththazi izas shemppo dhayssides; izi shiishshida haaroykka iza ashshanawu dandayenna.
Job20:21 Iza haaroy wuri qucetti wuriza gishshas izas doonan gelththanaazikka attenna.
Job20:22 Aykokka izi dure as gidiinkka; iza yiilloy gakkana; daro metoykka izara gayttana.
Job20:23 Izi ta maada kallana gishin Xoossi wolqqama hanqo iza bolla yeggana; ba hanqozakka iza bolla gussana.
Job20:24 Izi birata mashshafe attiko xarqimala wondafen cadettana.
Job20:25 Wondafezikka zokkaara kanththi ke7ana; xoxolqu giza xeerazi izas tireza duusereththidi aadhdhana; wolqqama hirgan iza wozinay dagammana.
Job20:26 Izi shiishshida haarozi ubbay girdi gida dhuma giddon dhayana; asi oyththontta tamay xuuggana; izason attiza miish ubbaa dippi histtana.
Job20:27 Izi ooththida nagara saloy qonccisana; sa7ayakka izas morkke gidada dendana.
Job20:28 Xoossas hanqo gallas iza soon diza haaroy wuri di7on qucetti dhayana.
Job20:29 Xoossi makkallanchchatas woththida qaaday
Job21:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides;
Job21:2 «Ane ta haasaya wozinappe ezgite; hayssi intte tana minththeththida mala inttes qoodettana.
Job21:3 Issito haasayana mala taas gishi immite; hessafe guye intte koyida mala tana qidhanawu dandayeeta.
Job21:4 «Tani asho may7ida asa bolla mishettazinaa? Histtiin taas dandayontta aggiko izan aazi malalisizee?
Job21:5 Ane taakko ha xeellite; haasayay inttena xoonanaashe gakkanaas ta hanozi inttena shaaphees.
Job21:6 Tani qoppishin tanakka daganththees; ta asateththaaka yashshan kokkorisees.
Job21:7 «Ays iita asata layththay aduqqidi istta haaroykka daridi biitta bolla dizee?
Job21:8 Ays istta naytinne nayta nayti diccidi lo7i dishin beyizoo?
Job21:9 Istti aykko hirgay baynda saron deettes; Xoossafe boshay istta bolla gakki erenna.
Job21:10 Istta mehetikka issi metoy baynda yeletteettes; isttas miizatikka awucayontta yeleettes.
Job21:11 Bantta nayta dorsa wude mala heemmeettes; istta naytikka guppi guppi kaa7eettes.
Job21:12 Karabe baqqishe
Job21:13 Bantta layththa wogeteththaninne ufayssan aaththeettes; waayettontta ha biittafe hayqon shaaketteettes.
Job21:14 «Hessi hessaththo gidi dishin istti Xoossa
Job21:15 ‹Nu izas goynnana mala Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay izi oonee? Nu iza woossiin izi nuna ay maaddanee?› geettes.
Job21:16 Istti hessa gizay istta kushen diza haaroy wuri istta wolqqan isttas shiiqida misatiza gishshassa. Tani gidikko iita asata qofa ekkike.
Job21:17 «Histtiin iita asatas xomppey to7i erizee? Boshay istta bolla gakki erizee? Xoossika istta bolla hanqetti erizee?
Job21:18 Istti happa mala carkon bidasoy gudulla mala gote carkon istti pitetti dhayda wodey dizee?
Job21:19 Intte
Job21:20 Nagaranchchati bantti ooththida qohon bantta qixaate ekketto; ubbaa dandayza Xoossi ba hanqoza istta bolla eho.
Job21:21 Asi hayqqidaappe guye ba naytas qoppi erizee?
Job21:22 «Xoossi gita asata bollaka pirdana; histtiin asi iza pirda tamaarsana dandayzee?
Job21:23 Issi issi asati bantta layththa wurseththi gakkanaas aykko metoy istta bolla gakkontta minotanne hargey bayndayta gididi
Job21:24 istta bollay ordidi kayshida mala
Job21:25 Harati gidikko yiillonne camon kumida mala meton oykettida mala aykko lo7o miish be7ontta hayqqeettes.
Job21:26 Ubbayka duge duufon gelidi biitta gideettes; guxuneykka istta laattana.
Job21:27 «Be7ite! Intte tana qohanaas qoppidi intte qachchida geneza ta erays.
Job21:28 Intte
Job21:29 Mandara asata oychchibeekketii? Istti inttes markkattida markkateththaa intte ekkeketii?
Job21:30 Heyti
Job21:31 Iita as iza iitateththaa gishshas walassizay oonee? Iza iita oosoza gishshas iza qaxxayanay oonee?
Job21:32 Izi hayqqidaappe guye iza aha tookki ekkidi duufon efeettes; iza duufoykka naageettes.
Job21:33 Shoobban diza biittay izas giiga gidees; asati ubbayka iza kaalleettes; addafe daro asatikka izappe sinththara beettes.
Job21:34 «Histtiin intte hada gidida yo7ora tana minththeththanaas ays qoppeetii? Intte taas immiza zaaroti ubbay wordo.»
Job22:1 Temaane dere as Elfaazey hizgi zaarides;
Job22:2 «Asi Xoossa go7anawu dandayzee? Haray attoshin era as gidikkoka go7azi izaadesafe attiin Xoossas gidenna.
Job22:3 Ne xilloteththi Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaa ay go7anee? Wosoy baynda ne de7ozi iza ay maaddanee?
Job22:4 Histtiin ne bolla izi pirdidaynne hayssaththo nena hanqiday neni Xoos yayyiza gishshassee?
Job22:5 Hayssi ubbay nena gakkiday ne iitateththi darida gishshassinne ne nagaray zaway bayndayssa gidida gishshas gidennee?
Job22:6 Issi gaasoykka baynda ne ishatappe oyso ekkadasa; qasse istta may7o qaara ekkada istta kallo ashshadasa.
Job22:7 Gafidinne saamettidi daaburdayta kaththinne haath diggadasa.
Job22:8 Ne gadaadenne wolqqama as gidada izan diza bonchcho as gidikkoka
Job22:9 Neni am7e maccassata mela kushe yeddadasa; yi7o naytikka bana ayssana de7oza dhayssadasa.
Job22:10 Hayssa gaason nena oykkana woximadey nena yuuyi aadhdhides; ne ezgontta metoy nena daganththana.
Job22:11 Nena Xeeloy metana gakkanaas nees dhumides; di7o haaththika nena meeccides.
Job22:12 «Xoossay dhoqqa salon dizayssa gidennee? Xoolintteti aykkoka dhoqqasohon diikkoka izi isttafe bollara diidi istta xeellees.
Job22:13 Neni gidikko
Job22:14 Salo bollan izi simerettishin dhippi gida shaaray iza kammiza gishshas izi beyanawu dandayenna› gaasa.
Job22:15 «Nagaranchchati simerettiza beni ogeza ne kaallay?
Job22:16 Isttika wodey gakkontta sinththara boshan shocettida; di7onkka meecettidi xaphora dhayda.
Job22:17 Isttika Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa
Job22:18 Gidikkoka istta keeththa dureteththan kunththiday Xoossa. Hessa gishshas tani iita asata qofa ekkike.
Job22:19 «Kiya asati iita asati qaxxayettishin be7idi ufayetteettes; suure asati istta bolla qilcceettes
Job22:20 ‹Tunkka nu morkketi dhayda; istta haarozi kumeth taman xuugettides.›
Job22:21 «Hessa gishshas Iyoobe nenateththaa Xoossas haarisa; izarakka ne saron da; ne hayssa ooththiko lo7o miish demmana.
Job22:22 Xoossi nees immiza timirtaa ekka; iza qaalakka ne wozinan woththa.
Job22:23 Nenateththaa ne Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaako ne zaaridaakko
Job22:24 Worqqa gudullan ola; ofire worqqa shaafa shuchcha mala wora ola.
Job22:25 He wode Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay nees worqqanne muuruta bira gidana.
Job22:26 He wode Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaan neni ufayettana; izan ammanettada ne daana.
Job22:27 Ne izakko woossiza wode izi ne woosaa siyana; ne adinettidayssa izas gaththana.
Job22:28 Ne qofay ubbay nees polettana; nees oge ubbay poo7o gidana.
Job22:29 Xoossi otoranchchata kawushshana; ashketa gidikko izi ashshana.
Job22:30 Nenikka suure wozinay dizaade gidikko Xoossi iita ubbaafe nena naagana; ne kushetikka qoho oosoppe geesh gidikko Xoossi nena ashshi ekkana.»
Job23:1 Iyoobikka hizgi zaarides;
Job23:2 «Ha7ikka ta wozinay camo qofaninne zuuzunththan kumides; gencecan ta woossiinkka iza kushey ta bolla deexxida mala dees.
Job23:3 Izi dizasota eridaakko ay mala dosazinaashin; gede izi dizaso gakkidaakko ta ay mala ufayettaneeshin;
Job23:4 ta maganaa ta izas shiishshanakkoshin; ta mishaza maarara ta izs shiishshanakkoshin.
Job23:5 Taas imettiza zaarozakka ta eranakkoshin; tana izi ay gaanaakko ta eranakkoshin.
Job23:6 Histtiin Xoossi ba gita wolqqara tana pirdandeshaa? Akkay; ta gizayssa izi ezgana.
Job23:7 Heenkka suure asi izara marshettana; taas pirdiza Xoossay mernaas tana naxa kessana.
Job23:8 «Gido attiin ta arshey mokkiza bagga biikko heen izi deenna; arshey wulliza baggaka simmiko iza demmanawu dandaykke.
Job23:9 Izi gidikko pudehan ba oosaa ooththees; tani gidikko iza beyanawu dandayabeekke; duge bagga simmadakka iza demmanawu dandayabeekke.
Job23:10 Izi ta tanggo ubbaa erees; tana izi paaccikokka tani worqqa mala geesh gida dishin izi tana demmana.
Job23:11 Ta tohoti izi dosiza ogetara beettes; baleththon hadirsika ushachchika giikke.
Job23:12 Tani iza azazotappe ke7ikke; iza qaalaakka ta miza qumappeka aaththada ta wozinan naagadis.
Job23:13 «Izi barkka bana danday dees; izara eqettanay deenna; izi ba dosidayssa ubbaa ooso dandayees.
Job23:14 Ta bolla izi qoppidayssa ubbaa polana; hayssa misatiza daro qofati deettes.
Job23:15 Hessa gishshas iza sinththan eqoy keehi tana keehi yashshees; ta hayssa qoppada yayyadis.
Job23:16 Xoossi taas wozinay daaburana mala ooththides; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay tana daganththides.
Job23:17 Girdi gida dhumay ta ayfeta goozikkoka; sakkanna dhumay ta haasayontta mala tana diggibeenna.
Job24:1 «Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay ays ba pirda immana gallassa baribeennee? Izas ammanettidayti awude gakkanaas iza pirda qaala naagettandettoo?
Job24:2 Iita asati zawa laalleettes; kaysi ehida dorsata heemmeettes.
Job24:3 Yi7ota hare bonqqeettes; am7e maccassaya boora oyththadus giidi banttas ekkeettes.
Job24:4 Manqota shaatettidi coo ogeppe gooddeettes; istta sinththafe baqatidi qotettana mala ooththeettes.
Job24:5 Manqoti bazzon diza hardida mala
Job24:6 Unetidi haratas kath shiishshizayta gideettes; iita asata haaro gidida woyne tokkizasohozan geedon attida pushulo maxeettes.
Job24:7 Kumeththa omars kallo ichchi aqeettes; mooce ashshiza may7oy isttas deenna.
Job24:8 Zuma bolla bukkiza iran istta asateththay musees; aqizasoy dhayiin zaalla gars shiiqi aqeettes.
Job24:9 Aaway hayqqida nay isttas aylle gidana mala aayey dhanth diggidi bonqqeettes; metotidayssa naaza ba aco gishshas giidi oyso ekkeettes.
Job24:10 Manqoti aykko may7oy baynda paxa kallo ooson geleettes. Kaththa shiisho wode mirqqeza tookki miiyishe banttas gafan hayqqeettes.
Job24:11 Iita asata gaden wogara ayfeppe zayte kesseettes; woyne miththa ayfeppe cajje ageettesseshin istti gidikko saametteettes.
Job24:12 Katamatan hayqqanaas tooqiza asati gootareettes; madunxida asatikka maado oyshon waasseettes. Xoossi gidikko istta bolla oosettida geneza beyibeenna.
Job24:13 Poo7o ixxiza asati deettes; poo7oy aazakko erontta gishshas poo7o oge kaallettenna.
Job24:14 Shempo wodhiza uray wonttontta dendidi manqotanne metotanchchata wodhees; omarsika kaysos kezees.
Job24:15 Layma uray gadey omarsanayssa naagettees; oonikka be7ontta mala ba sinththa goozeettes.
Job24:16 Kaysoti kaysotanaas omarsara keeth bookki geleettes; gallas gidikko qotetti pe7eettes. Poo7oka ixxeettes.
Job24:17 Dhumara shiroteththi istta ufayssiza gishshas ubbaasikka girdi gida dhumay isttas wontta maalado mala.
Job24:18 «Gidikkoka istti haaththa bolla beettiza hoomo mala guuththa wodes xalla istti beettana. Istta biittayka qanggettidayssa gidana; istti woyne miththa tokkizasohoza oonikka beenna.
Job24:19 Shachchi ho7on maayidi dhayzayssa mala si7ooleykka nagaranchchata baakko bonqqa ekkana.
Job24:20 Istta aayeti ubbay istta dogana; istta ashozakka guxuney maana; iita asati qofettokona; hessaththoka miththa mala meqerettana.
