Job24:21 Hayssi ubbay istta bolla gakkiday istti yelontta maynida maccassata bonqqida gishshassinne istta azinati hayqqida maccassatas aykko qadheteththika bessontta gishshassa.
Job24:22 Gido attiin Xoossi ba wolqqan daannateththan diza asata diggana; isttas de7oy giiga misatikkoka istta duussas ammanththiza miishshi deenna.
Job24:23 Xoossi istta saron daana mala ooththikokka
Job24:24 Iita asati guuththa wodes duretana; gido attiin eesora sharafa mala shulli dhayana; shulla kaththa mala buucettana.
Job24:25 «Hayssa mala gidenna geetettiko tani wordanchchatanne ta haasayda qaalay likke gidonttayssa oonee ammanththanay?»
Job25:1 Shuha dere as Belidaadey hizgi zaarides;
Job25:2 «Maataynne yashshateththi Xoossassa; bollan ba haarizason salon saroteth medhdhana.
Job25:3 Iza wottadarata tiripateththi qoodettanawu dandayzee? Xoossa poo7oy izas poo7isonttaadey oonee?
Job25:4 Asi Xoossa sinththan waani xillo gidi beettanawu dandayzee? Asho may7ida medheta gididi waani geesh gidanawu dandayzee?
Job25:5 Hekko Xoossa sinththan aginaykka muqqa booth gidenna; xoolinttetikka iza sinththan geeshshata gidettenna.
Job25:6 Musanne guxune gidada hayqqiza asi hessafekka ay mala iita!»
Job26:1 Iyoobi hizgi zaarides;
Job26:2 «Hayssa ne haasayoyssan daaburanchchata maaddida nees misatizee? Qesey argacidaade minththida nees misatizee?
Job26:3 Aadho erateththi paccidaades ne ay zore immadii! Ay erateththika izaades qonccisadi!
Job26:4 Histtiin hayssa ne haasayana mala nena maaddiday oonee? Ne haasayana mala nena denththeththiday oona ayanaa!»
Job26:5 «Wolqqama wogga gita abbaafe garsan diza hayqqidayta shemppoti wolqqama kokkorsan deettes.
Job26:6 Si7ooleykka Xoossa sinththan qonccen dees; Abadoone geetettizasoza ay miishshika kammanawu dandayenna.
Job26:7 Xoossi pudeha baggara diza saloza carko bolla miccides; biittaaka aykkoy bayndason kuulloti daana mala ooththides.
Job26:8 Xoossi shaarati haath xunxi oykkana mala ooththees; haaththafe dendoyssan shaarati daaketettenna.
Job26:9 Izi uttiza kawoteththa araata genththana; shaararakka kammana.
Job26:10 Poo7onne dhuma shaakkanaas; wolqqama wogga gita abbaa sinththan saloza zawa ooththidi miccides.
Job26:11 Izi hanqiza wode salo tuussati dagaman kokkoreettes.
Job26:12 Izi ba wolqqan abbaa co7u ooththees; iza aadho erateththayka Era7aabe geetettizayssa dhayssana.
Job26:13 Ba peenozan saloza geeshshana; xongettiza shooshshaa ba kushen caddana.
Job26:14 Haytanti ubbay Xoossi ooththiza oosotappe guuththata; nu siyizayssi izas saasuketh xalla; wolqqama giirissa izayssa ooni akeekanawu dandayzee?»
Job27:1 Iyoobikka ba haasaya sinththawu gujjidi hizgides;
Job27:2 «Suure pirda diggidi ta shemppoyo addafe camo ooththida; Ubbaa Dandayza De7o Xoossa sunththan caaqqays;
Job27:3 Xoossi tana shemppora woththida wodey gakkanaas
Job27:4 ubbaaka iita qaalay ta doonappe ke7enna; ta inxarsankka wordo haasaykke.
Job27:5 Intte haasaydayssi wuri likke gaada mulekka ekkike; ta hayqqanaashe gakkanaas suureteththan minna eqqanayssa aggike.
Job27:6 Tani ta xilloteththan minna eqqana attiin xilloteththa aggike; shemppora paxa diza layththa ubbaan ta wozinay ha miishshan sidhenna.
Job27:7 «Nagaranchchata bolla pirdettiza mala ta morkketa bolla pirdetto; tana ixxizayta bollaka gene asata bolla pirdettiza mala pirdetto.
Job27:8 Xoossi istta shemppoyo istta ashoppe shaakkidi istta layththa qanxxida wode Xoossa kaddida asatas ay hidotay daandee?
Job27:9 Metoy istta bolla yiza wode Xoossi istta waasoza siyandee?
Job27:10 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossan istti ufayettandettoo? Woden wodenkka Xoossa sunththa xeygandettoo?
Job27:11 «Xoossa wolqqay ay mala gitakko ta inttena tamaarsana; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay qoppi woththoyssa ta inttefe qottike.
Job27:12 Inttenikka hayssa ubbaa ereeta; histtiin hayssa hada miish ays haasayeetii?
Job27:13 «Hekko Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay iita asinne genanchchati ekkana laatay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Job27:14 Iza nayti tiripikkoka olan wurana; iza zereththatikka kaththi dhayiin koshattana.
Job27:15 Hessafe attidayti hargen wurana; am7etikka isttas yeekkettenna.
Job27:16 Iita asi bira biitta mala shiishshanawu
Job27:17 Gido attiin iita asi shiishshida may7oza xillo asi may7ana; izi shiishshida biraakka geeshshati gishetti ekkana.
Job27:18 Izi keexxiza keeththatikka achcharo keeththa malanne kath naagizaadey aqiza gaabba mala laalettana.
Job27:19 Iita asi wurseththa wode dure gididi ichchees; izi beeggiza wode gidikko iza aqotay ubbay dhaydes.
Job27:20 Dagamay iza bolla di7o mala qoppontta dishin gakkana; giddoththika gote carkoy iza denththi efana.
Job27:21 Arshey mokkizaso bagga carkoy izasoppe iza pitti dhayssana.
Job27:22 Izi baqatidi atti baanaas baaxetikkoka carkozi qadheteththi baynda iza bolla gede minnana.
Job27:23 Carkozi iza bolla kushe baqqides; izi dizasoppe wayqeththan pixiri yeggides.
Job28:1 «Tumappe biitta garsan diza ma7idineti bookettidi bira ke7izasoynne worqqay seeri oosettizasoy dees.
Job28:2 Biratay biittafe beettes; xarqimalay ma7idine shuchchafe seeridi ke7ees.
Job28:3 Asay dhuma kanththidi
Job28:4 Asi dizasoppe haakkidi
Job28:5 Biittay meetettiza kath immees. Izas giddoy taman seeridi shiretti shiretti wodhdhees.
Job28:6 Semppere geetettiza al7o shuchchay biittan diza shuchchata giddon beettees; he biitta giddonkka worqqay beettees.
Job28:7 Gede ma7idinezakko efiza oge xilloyka erenna; ankkota ayfeykka beyibeenna.
Job28:8 Iita do7ati he sohoza yedhdhibeettenna; gaammoyka iza baggara aadhdhibeenna.
Job28:9 Asi gade goyishe mino shuchchata ba kushen denththees; zumatakka xaphoppe shiri yeggees.
Job28:10 Zaallaka phalqidi iza giddora aadhdhanaas oge kessees; al7o gidida ma7idine shuchchatakka demmees.
Job28:11 Shaafata pulttota teqqees; biitta giddon qotan diza miishshata qoncce kessees.
Job28:12 Histtiin aadho erateththi awappe beettizee? Akeekasikka dizasoy awaa?
Job28:13 Aadho erateththi shemppora paxa diza medhetati diza biittan beettuku; izis tuma waagakka eriza asi deenna.
Job28:14 ‹Wogga gita abbayka ta giddon duukku; abbayka tanara duukku› gees.
Job28:15 Erateththi geeshsha worqqan shamettuku; izi waagaykka biran heregettenna.
Job28:16 Aadho erateththi ofire geetettiza worqqafe
Job28:17 Worqqaynne geeshsha heregay izira ginattettenna; xintta worqqafe oosettida geexeykka izo laammana.
Job28:18 Bonchchettida heleloynne almaaze geetettizayti aadho erateththara ginattettenna; aadho erateththa gatey luule geetettizayssafekka bolla.
Job28:19 Tophaaziyoone geetettiza Tophphiya biitta inqquyka izira ginenna; keehi geeyida worqqafekka aadhdhawus.
Job28:20 «Histtiko erateththi awappe yazee? Akeekaykka awappe beettazee?
Job28:21 Shemppora paxa diza medhetatappe geemmidaaro; salora piradhdhiza kafotikka koyidi izo demmettenna.
Job28:22 Dhayoynne hayqoy
Job28:23 Aadho erateththako efiza ogezanne iza dizasoza erizay Xoossa xalla.
Job28:24 Izikka sa7a gaxa kumeth demmees; saloppe garsan dizayssa ubbaa beyees.
Job28:25 Izi carko wolqqa ooththida wode wogga gita abba izi makkida wode
Job28:26 irassinne wolqqanththara diza dadas woga woththida wode
Job28:27 Xoossi erateth be7ides; paacci xeellidi izo bonchchides; pilggi be7idi minththi woththides.
Job28:28 He wode asas
Job29:1 Iyoobikka ba haasaya sinth gujjidi hizgides;
Job29:2 «Taas ha7i de7ozi kase Xoossi tana naagiza wodeza mala gididaakko tana ay mala ufayssandeeshaa!
Job29:3 He wode dhuma giddora ta bishin Xoossi taas poo7isishin tani poo7on hemettaysikoshin.
Job29:4 Xoossa maadoy ta keeththaa kase naateteththa wode naagizayssaththo ha7ikka naagidaakko aazee dizay?
Job29:5 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay tanara diza gishshas ta nayti ubbay ta yuushon deetteskoshin.
Job29:6 Tani toho maaththan meecettanaashe gakkanaas daro maath demmayskoshin; wogara miththati mela biittankka tokettidi di7o mala goggiza daro zayte taas immeetteskoshin.
Job29:7 Katama penge achchan diza dubbusha baada duulatan ta uttiza wode
Job29:8 naateththa nayti tana be7idi
Job29:9 Haasayshe diza dere kaaleththizayti tana be7idi bantta kushetan ba doona doona oykkidi co7u geetteskoshin.
Job29:10 Dere daannatikka tani dizason co7u geettesishin; isttas inxarsi oykettiin haasayaykka istta xooneeskoshin.
Job29:11 Tana siyida ubbay nashshides; tana be7ida ubbay galatides.
Job29:12 Hayssika haniday tani manqota woosa siyada istta ashshizayssanne yi7o nayta ta maaddiza gishshassa.
Job29:13 Hayqqana matida asata ta maaddiza gishshas tana istti anjjida; am7e maccassata ta maaddiza gishshas ufayssan yexxida.
Job29:14 Xilloteth may7o mala may7adis; suure pirdaka kaabba mala gopha may7adis; qoobe malakka hu7en woththadis.
Job29:15 Qooqetas ayfe
Job29:16 Manqotas aawa
Job29:17 Gene asa banqila menththadis
Job29:18 «Tani
Job29:19 Xaphoti ubba wode haaththe demmiza malanne haggatikka xaazan cililiza miththa malakkoshin.
Job29:20 Ubba wode ta bonchchettida mala dayskoshin; ta wolqqayka ubba wode ooraxeskoshin.
Job29:21 Asay ta zoreza laamotan co7u giidi ezgees.
Job29:22 Ta haasayay istta aliza gishshas taappe guyera haasayza asi deenna.
Job29:23 Goshshanchchay badhdhesa ira demmanawu amottizayssa mala isttika ta haasaya siyanawu bantta doona doydi naageetteskoshin.
Job29:24 Ta miicca bessishin istti ufayettetes; ta sinththay poo7ishin xirphotida istta sinththay birshettees.
Job29:25 Kase ta istti koyida mala ayssayskoshin; ba ola asa kaaleththiza kawo mala ta istta kaaleththadiskoshin; istti muuzottishin tani istta minththeththayssikoshin.
Job30:1 «Istta aawati taas dorsa wudeza heemmiza ta kanatara montta mala istti ta kadhiza asatakkoshin; ha7i gidikko layththan taappe naatiza asati ta bolla qilcceettes.
Job30:2 Isttas wolqqay ixxida gishshassinne istta bollay gilqida gishshas aykkoka tana go7ettenna.
Job30:3 Metoppenne kosha daroppe dendidayssan bazzo biitta bi biidi miththa xapho maxeththi gancceettes.
Job30:4 Maxine mala mal7iza bazzon mokkiza dumma dumma miththa hayththata maxeettes; mal7ontta sankkara xapho qorereththi meettes.
Job30:5 Asi kaysota waassidi gooddizayssa mala isttika deraa giddofe gooddeettes.
Job30:6 Istti bantta duussaso haaththi baynda shaafa giddon
Job30:7 Woray dizaso yuuyi yuuyi wora do7ata mala waasseettes; wora garsan issi bolla shiiqetti aqeettes.
Job30:8 Bantta biittafe xurqafen shocetti goodettida gishshas lo7o sunththinne wozinay bayndayta gididi deettes.
Job30:9 Ha7i qasse istta nayti yeththan tana qidheettes; tani istta giddonkka miiceteththas attadis.
Job30:10 Tana shaatettidi taappe haakkeettes; aykko yeellayka baynda ta sinththan cutetteettes.
Job30:11 Xoossay ta wolqqa daabursidi tana kawushshida gishshas istti qasse bixalay baynda para mala ta bolla dhoodhu dhoodheettes.
Job30:12 Taappe ushachcha baggara yeda diccidayti ta bolla dendida; tana oykkanaas woximade woththida; tana giddoththida.
Job30:13 Taas aadhdhizaso dhayssidi tana wodhana koyeettes. Istti hayssaththo ooththanayssa digganaadey deenna.
Job30:14 Di7oy menththi gelizayssa mala isttika tana cuggi gelida; ubbaaka menththereththidi ta bolla yida.
Job30:15 Gita dagamay tana gakkides; taas diza bonchchoy carko mala aadhdhides; ta attana giza hidotay shaara mala dendi dhaydes.
Job30:16 «Ta shemppoya keeha ceecadus; hayqoska matadus.
Job30:17 Omars kumeth ta meqeththati hargen waayetteettes; sakozikka taas shemppo immenna.
Job30:18 Tana sakkiza wolqqama sakoza gaason ta may7oy gundi moorettides; qoodhe xunththa shamize mala tana cuulli oykkides.
Job30:19 Xoossi tana duge biittan olida gishshas tani gudullanne bidinth misatadis.
Job30:20 Xoossoo
Job30:21 Ne taas addafe menxe iitadasa; neni ne gita wolqqankka tana gooddadasa.
Job30:22 Ne tana denththada carko bolla woththadasa; izi tana yuushshana malakka ooththadasa; gote carkoyka tana shirechchi shirechchi yeggees.
Job30:23 Asa ubbaas qaada gidida hayqos ne tana aaththada immanayssa ta erays.
Job30:24 «Issi metotida uray maado demmanaas ba kushe miccidi woossishin tumappe ay asikka iza qohenna.
Job30:25 Tani metotida asatas yeekkabeekkinaa? Manqotaska mishettabeekkinaa?
Job30:26 Lo7o miish demmana ga ta naagishin iita miishshi tana gakkides; poo7oy yaana ga ta naagettishin taas gallassay dhumides.
Job30:27 Ta wozinay daro ceecides; ay saroka demmabeekke; meto gallassatikka ta bolla gakkida.
Job30:28 Ta bollay awa xuussan gidontta muuzoteththan karexxides; duulata asa sinththan eqqada maado taas oychchays.
Job30:29 Asappe shaakettada worakanatas isha
Job30:30 Taas galbazi karexxidi dendides; taas bollazikka mishan xuugettides.
Job30:31 Tani ta ufays isttan qonccisiza bagananne zayey ha7i ta kayottada kessiza zilassa qaala sissiza miish gidida.
Job31:1 «Lo7o maccassako xeellada amottontta mala; tani ta ayfetara caaqo geladis.
Job31:2 Bollan de7iza Xoossay asas ay qaada immandeesha? Salon diza Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossafe asas imettida gishay aazeeshaa?
Job31:3 Iita asa bolla qohoy
Job31:4 Xoossay ta ooththizayssa ubbaa beyennee? Ta hemetakka shaakki erennee?
Job31:5 Tani wordo haasaydaa gidikko
Job31:6 Xoossi tana suure geeddaran geeddaro. Tani xillo gididayssa shaakki ero.
Job31:7 Ta suure ogeppe ke7idaa gidikko
Job31:8 tani zeridayssa hara asi mo. Ta caarechchazikka kumeththi shodetti oletto.
Job31:9 «Ta wozinay hara macca amottidaa gidikko
Job31:10 ta machcha hara asas gaaccu; qasseka hara addey izira zin7o.
Job31:11 Hayssika keehi tuna; Wogankka qaxxayssiza nagara.
Job31:12 Ha nagaray tama mala xuuggiza gishshas ta hayssa ooththidaakko ta aqota xuuggi dhayssanakkoshin.
Job31:13 «Maccanne attuma gidida ta aylleti tana mootiin istta mootoza ta kadhada aggidaa gidikko
Job31:14 Xoossi tana pirdiza wode tani waananee? Qasse izi tana oychchiza wode tani ay zaaro immanee?
Job31:15 Ta aayey ulon tana medhdhidayssi ta aylletakka medhdhiday iza gidennee? Nuna ubbatakka aayi ulon medhdhiday iza deennee?
Job31:16 «Manqoti tana woossiin ta digga erikke; Qasseka am7e maccassata minththeththontta agga erikke.
Job31:17 Yi7onne yitto nayta aggada ta kath tarkka mabeekke.
Job31:18 Tani ta yelagateththafe doommada tani istta aawa mala dichchadis
Job31:19 May7oy dhayiin meegoy wodhizaade; woykko metoppe dendidayssan kallo dizaade beyada
Job31:20 ta dorsata iskefe oosettida may7o ta mayziin
Job31:21 Tani mooton istta laththanayssa erada aaway baynda nayta naaqqidaa gidikko
Job31:22 ta kushey hasheppe ke7o. Ta qeseykka kurezappe koldo.
Job31:23 Tani Xoossa hanqos yayyiza gishshassinne iza teemateththaas yayyiza gishshas Hayssa mala yo7ota ooththanawu ta dandaykke.
Job31:24 «Tani taas diza aqotan ammanettabeekke. Woykko payya worqqaka taas ammanettiza miish ooththabeekke.
Job31:25 ‹Taas diza aqoy darides; Tani dureteththafe dendidayssan daro miish demmadis› gaada ufayetta erikke.
Job31:26 Arshe poo7oza beyada
Job31:27 ta wozinan istta geemara bonchchabeeke; qasseka ta kushe micca yeerada isttas goynnabeekke.
Job31:28 Tani hayssa mala ooththidaakko salon diza xoossa kaddo gidida gishshas hayti ha oosoti ta bolla pirda ehiza nagarata.
Job31:29 «Ta morkketa kundeththaan tani ufayettabeekke; iita miishshi istta bolla gakkishinkka miiccabeekke.
Job31:30 ‹Ta morkketi dhayetto› ga qanggada nagara ooththabeekke.
Job31:31 Tani ubba wode imaththa mokkizayssa taso aylleti ta gishshas markkatteettes.
Job31:32 Tani ta keeththa kare ogera aadhdhi biza mandaras doya woththadis. Hessa gishshas gadey qammiin yida imaththi karen ayssa erikke.
Job31:33 Tani ta mooro genththabeekke; hara asata mala ta nagaraakka qottabeekke.
Job31:34 Tana asa daroy yashissininne soo asata kadhoy daganththiin tani tason co7u gaada qotettida wodey deenna.
Job31:35 «Ta gizayssa siyizaadey beettereneshin! Tanikka teqe qaala shiishshanakkoshin! Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay ta gizayssa zaaro izi immo! Tana mootiza mootanchchay tana mootizayssa xaafi shiishshiin ta beyarkinaashin!
Job31:36 Woyto mala tani ta hashen tookkanakkoshin; kallachcha malakka ta hu7e bolla goxxana.
Job31:37 Daannateththi diza asa mala Xoossa sinththan yayyontta eqqada ta ooththida ubbaa qonccisa yootanakkoshin.
Job31:38 «Asa gade wogay baynda bonqqa ekkada tani goyidaa gidikko
Job31:39 he gadaa godata ta mishisidaa gidikko
Job31:40 he ta goyiza goshshason diza gistte gishshas agunththi
Job32:1 Iyoobi
Job32:2 Eraama zereththafe Buuze dere as Barakele naa Eelihuy; Iyoobi bana Xoossafe aaththidi xillisida gishshas Iyoobe bolla keehi hanqettides.
Job32:3 Qasseka Iyoobe lagge heedzdzati Iyoobe bolla pirdafe attiin iza ammanththiza qaala yooti ammanththontta gishshas istta bollaka hanqettides.
Job32:4 Eelihuy hankkoytappe yelaga gidida gishshas hankkoyti banttas dizayssa haasayi wursanaashe gakkanaas Iyoobera haasayanawu ba tara naago bolla dees.
Job32:5 Iyoobe lagge heedzdzati Iyoobes bessiza zaaro immanaas dandayontayssa be7idi keehi hanqettides.
Job32:6 Buuze dere as Barakele naa Eelihuy
Job32:7 ‹Cimati sinththati haasayetto; bantta layththan demmida aadho erateththafe tamaarsetto› ga qoppadis.
Job32:8 Gido attiin asa giddon aqidi aadho erateth asas immizay Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa ayana.
Job32:9 As aadho eranchcha kessizay cimateth gidenna; qasseka asi akeekanaas dandayzay izaades layththi aduqqida gishshas gidenna.
Job32:10 «Hessa gishshas lo7eththi siyite; tanikka ta qofa inttes yootana.
Job32:11 Intte haasayza wode tani co7u gaada ezgays; intte haasayana qaala qoppishinka tani naagays.
Job32:12 Tani intte haasayzayssa lo7eththa siyadis; gido attiin inttefe oonikka Iyoobi mooranchcha gididayssa ammanththidaynne qasseka iza haasayas bessiza zaaro immiday deenna.
Job32:13 Iyoobe haasayas bessiza zaaro immanaas dandayzay Xoossafe attiin as gidontta gishshas intte
Job32:14 Iyoobi marshettiday inttenarappe attiin tanara gidenna; tanikka intte haasayzayssa malan izas zaaro immike.
Job32:15 «Istti dagammidi haasayza qaalay dhayda gishshas aykko haasayanawu dandaybeettenna.
Job32:16 Hekko! Istti haasayza miishshi dhayiin co7u giidi eqqida; histtiin tanikka co7u ga naaganaas taas bessizee?
Job32:17 Akkay! Co7u giikke; tanikka ta baggara diza zaaroza immana; ta qofaakka qonccisana.
Job32:18 Ta haasayanaas bessizaazi daroy diza gishshas; tanan diza ayanay tana wolqqara haasayssees.
Job32:19 Be7ite! Tani haasayontta aggiko
Job32:20 Ane! Tani hayssafe haasayada shempays; ta doona doyada tani haasayanaas bessees.
Job32:21 Hayssa ha yo7ozan tani oonakka maaddike; woykko ay asakka aadashikke.
Job32:22 Tani as aadashoy mulekka hanenna; ta hessa mala ooththiko tana medhdhidayssi tana hanqana.
Job33:1 «Iyoobee! Ta nees yootizayssa siya; ta nees gizayssaka akeekan ezga;
Job33:2 ta nees zaaro immanaas giigetta uttadis; ta doonaykka haasayanaas giigetti uttides.
Job33:3 Ta haasayza qaalati ta wozina suureteththa qoncciseettes; ta inxarsay ta eriza tuma haasayees.
Job33:4 Tana medhdhiday Xoossa Ayana; taas de7o immiday Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossa Ayana.
Job33:5 Neni dandayzaa gidikko ta goyssas zaaro imma; ne gaanayssa giigsada tanara haasayeeta.
Job33:6 Hekko! Tani Xoossa sinththan nenara gina; tanikka medhettiday urqqafe.
Job33:7 Neni taas yayyanaas bessenna; tanikka nena naaqqanawu koshshenna.
Job33:8 Neni haasayda ubbaa ezgashe ta gam7adis; ne inxarsafe ke7ida qaalata ta siyadis.
Job33:9 Neni haasayashe
Job33:10 Gido attiin Xoossi tana qaxxayanaas gaaso koyees; tanakka baas morkke mala qoodees.
Job33:11 Ta tohota izi duruman duxxi qachchides. Ta bizaso ubbaan tana xeellees› gadasa.
Job33:12 «Iyoobee! Hayssi ne haasayay bala gidides; tanikka nees qonccisanaas koyays; Xoossi asa ubbaafe aadhdhees.
Job33:13 Histtiin
Job33:14 Asi akeekennafe attiin Xoossi dumma dumma ogera haasayees.
Job33:15 Omars asi hiixan ichchi diza wode asi koyro dhisko seeraagida wode; agumoninne ajjuutankka Xoossi haasayees.
Job33:16 He wode asi iza qaala siyana mala hayththa doyees; izi ba immiza seerankka daganththees.
Job33:17 Hessa mala ooson asi nagara ooththontta mala diggees; otoreteththaaka isttafe denththees.
Job33:18 Xoossi asa shemppo dhayoppe ashshees; bashsha hayqoppeka wozzees.
Job33:19 Woykko asi meqeththan gelida sakon dishin asi ba balappe simmana mala harge hiixan Xoossi zorees.
Job33:20 Hayssa malan harganchcha kath lanqanaas iza iitees; lo7o kaththika harassees.
Job33:21 Gilqateththappe dendoyssan izas ashozikka wurides; meqeththi xalla attides.
Job33:22 Iza shemppoy kezanaassinne moogettanaas matides.
Job33:23 «Asi suure oge bessanaas shiyan qoodettiza Xoossa kiitanchchatappe
Job33:24 kiitanchchay izas qadhettidi
Job33:25 hessa gishshas iza asateththay
Job33:26 He wode Xoossako izi woossana. Iza woosaakka Xoossi siyana; Xoossa sinth izi be7idi ufayettana; Xoossika iza woosaas zaaro immana.
Job33:27 Izi asa sinththan
Job33:28 Tani duufon gelontta mala tana ashshides; hekko ha7i paxa daada tani poo7o beyays› gi yexxides.
Job33:29 «Hekko! Xoossi hayssa ubbaa miishsha asas zaari zaari ooththees.
Job33:30 De7on diidi poo7o beyana mala iza shemppo hayqoppe ashshees.
Job33:31 «Iyoobee! Ta nees yootizayssa lo7eththa siya; tani nees yootays ane neni co7u ga.
Job33:32 Neni haasayanaas koyza miishshi diikko taas yoota
Job33:33 Akkay giikko! Tani haasayzayssa co7u gaada siya; tani nena erateth tamaarsana» gides.
Job34:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides;
Job34:2 «Intteno aadho eranchchatoo! Ta inttes haasayzayssa siyite; intteno eranchchatoo ta haasaya ezgite.
Job34:3 Inxarsi kaththa mal7o shaakki erees; hessaththoka hayththi yo7o shaakki erees.
Job34:4 Tumu gidida yo7o ane shaakki eroos; lo7o gidida miishshika issife tamaaroos.
Job34:5 «Iyoobi
Job34:6 Tani tumanchchashin wordanchcha mala qoodettadis; ta aykkoka moorontta dashe paxontta madunththan waayettays› gides.
Job34:7 Iyoobe mala Xoossa bolla qilccizaadey beettandeesha?
Job34:8 Izi iita ooththizaytara laggetees; izas peyshayka iita laggetara.
Job34:9 ‹Xoossa ufayssana giidi oosoy as aykkoka maaddenna› gees.
Job34:10 «Akeekiza asatoo ane tana ezgite! Iita oosoy Xoossafe; bala oosoy Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossafe haakko!
Job34:11 Xoossi asas izaade ooso mala immees; izas izaade hemeththa mala ooththees.
Job34:12 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay mulekka iita miish ooththenna; ay asaska suure pirda geellasenna.
Job34:13 Xoossasi biitta hadara immidaadey deenna; iza alame bollaka shuumidaadey deenna.
Job34:14 Xoossi ba ayanazanne ba shemppoza; baakko zaari ekkana koyidaakko
Job34:15 asho may7iday kumeth dhayana; asa zereththika duge biittan simmana.
Job34:16 Neni akeekizaa gidikko hayssa siya; ta nees haasayzayssa ezga.
Job34:17 Suure pirda ixxizaadey dere ayssanaas dandayzee? Neni xillonne wolqqama Xoossa nagaranchcha kessay?
Job34:18 Kawota intte dhalleketa; shuumetakka intte iita gaanay oonee?
Job34:19 Ubbatikka iza medhetata gidida gishshas izi shuumeta shaakki maaddenna; duretakka manqotappe shaakkenna.
Job34:20 Istti leela giddoth qoppontta hayqqana; ubbay kokkori dhayana; wolqqamatikka oona kusheykka bochchontta kichchana.
Job34:21 «Xoossi asa ubbaa tanggoza xeellees; issaa issaa hemeth kaalleettes.
Job34:22 Iita asati qotettana mala girdi gida dhumay deenna.
Job34:23 Xoossi asa bolla pirdanaas bare immenna.
Job34:24 Wolqqama daannata daannateththafe denththanaas
Job34:25 Izi istta oosaa eriza gishshas issi omars istta daannateththafe dhayssana.
Job34:26 Istti ooththida makkallateththa gaason ubbaa asa sinththan makkallanchchata qaxxayees.
Job34:27 Izi istta qaxxayizayssi istti iza kaallizayssa aggida gishshassa; iza azazotakka istti kadhida gishshassa.
Job34:28 Istti manqota un7eththida; pude Xoossako waassana mala ooththida. Xoossika manqota waasoza siyides.
Job34:29 Xoossi co7u giikko oonee iza bolla pirdanay? Izi ba zokko zaarikko oonee iza beyanay?
Job34:30 Hessaththoka Xoossas yayyontta deraa un7eththiza kawoy deraa bolla dendiko iza oonee digganay?
Job34:31 «Iyoobee! Neni ne nagara Xoossas paaxada zaara nagara ooththike ga qaala geladii?
Job34:32 Ta ooththida nagaray awayssako tana tamaarsa; ta mooridaa gidikko zaarada izaththo ooththike! gadii?
Job34:33 Histtiin neni maarettanaappe ixxis gaada neni shiishshiza qofa mala Xoossi ne amoza nees polana mala ne koyay?
Job34:34 «Tana siyiza asati akeekiza eranchchatikka
Job34:35 ‹Iyoobi erateththi baynda haasayees; hu7ey baynda haasayata haasayees› geettes.
Job34:36 Iita asata zaaro mala zaariza gishshas Iyoobi wurseththi gakkanawu paacettidaakko aazee dizay!
Job34:37 Nu giddon wogappe kare ke7ides; Xoossa bolla kadhe darssides; ba nagara bollaka makkallateth gujjides» geettes.
Job35:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides;
Job35:2 «Iyoobe ne nena
Job35:3 ‹Nagara ooththontta aggiko ta ay go7ettanee? qasseka ay demmanee?› gaada neni oychchadasa.
Job35:4 Tani neessinne nenara dizaytas zaaro immana.
Job35:5 «Dhoqqu gaada pude salo xeella; neeppe dhoqqu giidi diza shaara akeeka.
Job35:6 Neni nagara ooththiko Xoossa aazan qohay? Neni iza darsa darsa qohikko iza ay ooththanawu dandayay?
Job35:7 Neni xillo gidikko izas ay immanee? Izi neeppe aykkoka koyenna.
Job35:8 Ne nagara ooththiko qohanay ne mala asata xalla. Ne lo7o miish ooththikoka ne go7izay as xalla.
Job35:9 «Asi haray darssi qohishin waassees; baappe wolqqatizaade kusheppe bana ashshi ekkanaades magannees.
Job35:10 Gido attiin isttafe oonikka
Job35:11 Mehetappe nuna aaththi tamaarsida; salo kafotappeka aadho eranchchata ooththiday iza› giday baawa.
Job35:12 Istti waasseettes; izi gidikko istti otoranchchatanne iitata gidida gishshas isttas zaaro immenna.
Job35:13 Xoossi tuma wozinappe gidontta waaso siyenna; Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay hessa mala ezgenna.
Job35:14 Iyoobee! Neni ta Xoossa aykkoka be7ikke giikkoka
Job35:15 Qasseka Xoossi nena ba hanqon hanqontta asa iitateththa co7u giidi aadhdhana nees misatizee?
Job35:16 Iyoobee! Neni coo mela haasaya darsaasa; erateththi baynda coo gaada haasayaasa.»
Job36:1 Eelihuy ba haasaya gujjidi hizgides;
Job36:2 «Xoossa gishshas tani haasayana haray diza gishshas guuth dandayada ta gizayssa siya.
Job36:3 Tani darosoppe demmida erateththan
Job36:4 Ta qaalay wordo gidonttayssa neni lo7eththa era; nenara haasayana taas kumeththa erateththi dizayssa era.
Job36:5 «Tumukka Xoossi wolqqama; gido attiin oonakka kadhenna; izi ubbaaka akeekees.
Job36:6 Izi iita asata paxa woththenna. Metotida asatas gidikko suure pirda pirdees.
Job36:7 Xoossi xillo asata naagees; kawota mala bonchcho algan utisees; mernaas istta dhoqqu dhoqqu histtees.
Job36:8 Gido attiin asi sansalatan qashettiko
Job36:9 istti ba otoreteththan ooththida nagara qonccisees.
Job36:10 Istti seera siyana mala istta hayththaa doyees; istti bantta iita oosaappe simmidi maarettana mala azazees.
Job36:11 Istti Xoossas azazettidi ooththiko
Job36:12 Gido attiin iza siyontta ixxiko istti olan wurana; istti bantta eeyateththan dishe hayqqana.
Job36:13 «Bantta wozinara Xoossa kaddizayti qaxxayettida mala daana; izi istta qaxxayshinkka istta kaaleththizayti woossettenna.
Job36:14 Istti ba poliza iita laymateththa boshan dhayana; bantta yelagateththa layththankka mulqqetti hayqqana.
Job36:15 Xoossi meton un7ettizayta istta metaappe ashshana; istta gakkida metaan isttas timirte immana.
Job36:16 «Hayssa ha wodezan Xoossi nees qoppizay nena ne diza metaappe kessidi lo7o kaththi kumida maaddan efanaassa.
Job36:17 Ha7i gidikko ne ooththida mooraappe dendoyssan ne bolla pirdettida gishshas
Job36:18 Oonikka nena dureteththa daron cimontta mala; matta7enkka nena baleththontta mala naagetta.
Job36:19 Nees diza aqotaynne godateththi daro gidikkoka nena metoppe ashshettenna.
Job36:20 Deraa dizasoppe dhayssiza dhuma wodey yaana mala amottofa.
Job36:21 Neni meto giddon paacettizay hessa gaason gidida gishshas simmada nagara ooththontta mala naagetta.
Job36:22 «Xoossa wolqqay ay mala gitakko akeeka; Xoossi ubbaafe aadho astamaare.
Job36:23 ‹Hayssa ooththa› giidi Xoossa azaziza asi woykko
Job36:24 Izi ooththiza oosaa gishshas asay ubba wode mazamuren galatizayssa mala
Job36:25 Asa zereththi ubbay Xoossa oosaa be7ides; asay tishshi ooththi haakon be7ides.
Job36:26 Xoossa gitateththa pilggidi gakkanaas nuni dandayokko; iza layththa qoodaykka nu erappe bolla.
Job36:27 «Xoossi haaththa abbafe pude salo efees; zaaridikka ira saloppe duge bukisees.
Job36:28 Ira shaarappe kessidi wolqqama ira asas bukisees.
Job36:29 Gido attiin Xoossi shaara wostti miccizaakko
Job36:30 Xoossi abba ciimmateththa kammidi izi ba yuushon wolqqanththa wostti laallizaakko xeella.
Job36:31 Hayssa mala ooththidi Xoossi ba deraa ayssees; asay miza daro kaththaaka mokisees.
Job36:32 Wolqqanththa izi ba kushen oykkees; oykkidi ba dosida bagga baana mala azazees.
Job36:33 Daday wolqqama iray yaanayssa malatees; mehetikka ira uushoy yizayssa ereettes.
Job37:1 «Wolqqama uushoppe dendoyssan ta wozinay kokkorides; Yashshateththafe dendoyssan piri baana gakkides.
Job37:2 Iza doonappe ke7iza qaala siyite; Dada mala guummiza giirissa qaala siyite.
Job37:3 Saloppe garsan wolqqanththi wolqqamees; biitta gaxa gakkanawu kiittees.
Job37:4 Hessafe guye wolqqama ba giirissa sissees; yashissiza ba giirissa dada mala guunththees; Wolqqanththa poo7oykka zaari zaari beettees; ba yashissiza giirissan guummees; Izi ba giirissa sissiza wode wolqqanththa diggenna.
Job37:5 Xoossa giirissa gunththay malalisiza gita guunth guummees; nuni eranawu dandayontta gita miishshata ooththees.
Job37:6 Biitta bolla shachchi wodhdhana mala ooththees; wolqqama iraykka bukkana mala azazees.
Job37:7 Izi medhdhida asati iza ooso erana mala; ubbaa asay bantta oosoza ooththontta mala teqqees.
Job37:8 He wode wora do7ati
Job37:9 Wolqqama carkoy pudehappe dendees; moociza carkoy pudehappe yees.
Job37:10 Xoossa peenoy haaththa moocisees; izappe shach medhdhees.
Job37:11 Shaaray haaththa tookkana mala ooththees; ba giddon wolqqanththi wolqqamana mala ooththees.
Job37:12 Goda kaaleththon shaarati biitta yuushon yuuyeettes; banttana maaddiza azazotakka poleettes.
Job37:13 Xoossi ira bukisizay biittaa irxxisanaas
Job37:14 Iyoobee! Neni takki gaada siya; Xoossi ooththiza malalisiza oosota wozinan woththada akeeka.
Job37:15 Xoossi shaara wostti azazizaakko
Job37:16 Shaara salo bolla wostti woththidaakko
Job37:17 Saloy xarqimala misatiza wode
Job37:18 Xoossi salo seerida mastoote mala micciko
Job37:19 «Nuus eray pace gidida gishshas nuni ay giidi Xoossas zaaranaakko neni nuna ane tamaarsa.
Job37:20 Xoossara haasayana gaada oychchike; ta iza oychchada aazas izi tana dhayssana mala denththeththoo?
Job37:21 Carkoy shaara saloppe qucci geeshshiza wode
Job37:22 Pudehappe worqqa mala xolqiza poo7oy yaana; Xoossi malalisiza teeman qonccana.
Job37:23 Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossay nu qofappe bolla; iza wolqqay gita; izikka tumu pirdizaade.
Job37:24 Bantta qofan
Job38:1 Hayssafe guye GODAY gote carko giddon gididi Iyoobes hizgides
Job38:2 «Hayssi eray baynda haasayan ta zoreza kadhizay izi baas oonee?
Job38:3 Ane adde gidikko danccetta ta sinththan eqqa; tani nena oychchizayssa taas zaara.
Job38:4 Tani hayssa alameza medhdhishin neni awan day? Ne erizanne akeekizaa gidikko ane taas yoota.
Job38:5 Hayssi sa7ay ay keena gidanaakko qofa qachchiday oonee? Sa7a bolla izi mixe wodorota micciday oonakko ne eray?
Job38:6 Biitta tuussati kundontta mala minththi oykkida wolqqay aazee? Alameza ooso doommishin yochcha shuch yeggiday oonee?
Job38:7 Bakkale xoolintteti issi bolla yexxizaashe
Job38:8 «Abbay biittafe dhuuqqi ke7iza wode pultto ayfeta gordiday oonee?
Job38:9 Abba shaaran kammiday Qasseka girdi gida dhuman gordiday tana.
Job38:10 Abbas zawa medhdhiday pengenne zawa woththiday tana.
Job38:11 Hayssa gakkanawu ya! Hayssafe aadhdhofa! Ne wolqqama dambalay
Job38:12 «Iyoobee! Neni yelettoosofe wonttay wonttana mala azaza eray? Wontta poo7oska soho giigsa eray?
Job38:13 Wonttay biitta bolla poo7o bessana mala iita asati qotettidasoppe qoncce kezana mala ne istta azaza eray?
Job38:14 Wontta poo7oy biitta qalam7etti diza may7o mala beettana mala ooththees; mana miishsha bolla diza maatame mala qonccen bessees.
Job38:15 Iitati poo7o digettida; istti makkallateththan denththida kusheykka meqqides.
Job38:16 «Ne duge ciimma abban wodhdhadii? Wogga gita abba garsan simeretta eray?
Job38:17 Hayqo pengeta nena bessidee? Girdi gida dhuma pengetakka beyadii?
Job38:18 Sa7ay ay keena dalga gididaakko ne eray? Ane hayssa ubbaa erizaa gidikko ne taas yoota.
Job38:19 «Poo7oy dizaso efiza ogey awanee? Qasseka dhumay de7izasoy awakko ne eray?
Job38:20 Neni poo7onne dhuma istti dizaso dizaso efanaas dandayayii? Isttasoy dizaso efiza ogeza ne eray?
Job38:21 Neni biittay medhettiza wode yelettida gishshassinne nees layththayka daro gidida gishshas ne erontta aggaka!
Job38:22 Shachchi wodhdhiza keeththan geladiyee? Woykko uttida shachcha doore beyadii?
Job38:23 Hayssa ha shachchaza ta ola gallassasinne meto gallassas go7ettanaas minjja woththidaaza.
Job38:24 Wolqqanththi awappe dendizee? Woykko arshey mokkiza baggafe carkoy biitta bolla laalettizaso efiza ogey awanee?
Job38:25 Iraththo wodhdhizaso giigsiday; daday walakettida uushos oge giigsiday oonee?
Job38:26 Oonikka baynda biittan asikka dontta bazzon ashshizay
Job38:27 iray bukkana malakka ooththizay oonee? Asi baynda sohozanne bazzo biitta haath kalssiday biittayka maata mokkana mala ooththiday oonee?
Job38:28 Iranne xaaza immizay oonee?
Job38:29 Shachchinne kenchcho immizay oonee?
Job38:30 Kenchcho haaththa shuchcha mala minththees; abba haaththika shachchaththo shuchchatana mala ooththees.
Job38:31 «Piliyaadise geetettiza xoolintteta issi bolla qachchanaas dandayay? Ooriyo geetettiza xoolintteti issi bolla oykettida wodoroza duuththanawu dandayay?
Job38:32 Xoolintteta ubbaa istta woden woden kessanawu dandayay? Zardo geetettiza do7a medhoy diza xoolinte
Job38:33 Saloti ay mala wogan a qizaakko eray? Hayssa ha wogazakka biitta bolla oosisana dandayay?
Job38:34 «Daro ira nees bukisana mala shaara ne azazanawu dandayay?
Job38:35 Wolqqanth ne azazon wolqqamizee? Wolqqanth ne yeddanaas dandayay? Isttika nees
Job38:36 Wozinas cinccateth qoppanaas kaha immiday oonee?
Job38:37 Ba eran shaarata qoodanaas dandayzay oonee? saloppe haath duge tiganaas dandayzay oonee?
Job38:38 Gudulla oyseththidi phashe kessanaas dandayzay oonee?
Job38:39 «Macca gaammoy wora giddon zamada uttidaashin ne izis miza miish shankkatada immanaas dandayay?
Job38:40 Woykko gafi uttida izi marata kalssanawu dandayay?
Job38:41 Quuroti gafidi bichchariza wode istta ciyetikka miza miish dhaydi taakko waassiza wode isttas miza miish immizay oonee?
Job39:1 «Genessati yeliza wode ne eray? Wusha geetettiza do7ay miixattidi yelishin beya eray?
Job39:2 Istti seebbatidi ay lagge wode gam7izaakko awude yelizaakko ne eray?
Job39:3 Gulbati miixattishe bantta marata istti yelizay awudekko ne eray?
Job39:4 Istta marati woran diccidi minneettes; isttafe shaakettidi beettes; bidaappe guye bantta aayetakko simmettenna.
Job39:5 Hardiday yeda daana mala ooththiday oonee? Istta qashoppe birshiday oonee?
Job39:6 Bazzoza isttas dizaso histta immadis; maxiney diza demban istta woththadis.
Job39:7 Kachchi dariza katamatappe haakkidi deettes; guyera laaggizayti qoodizayssa dosettenna.
Job39:8 Zumata bollan pe7eettes; heen baas gidiza cilila maata koyeettes.
Job39:9 «Menththi nees ooththanaas eeno gaandee? Woykko ne zedhen eeno gi eqqandee?
Job39:10 Menth waaxada gosh goyanawu dandayay?
Job39:11 Iza minoteththan ne ammanettay? Nees deexxiza oosoza izi ooththana mala izas agga eray?
Job39:12 Izi neekko simmi yaana mala
Job39:13 «Yanchchay ba qefe eeson miccawus; gido attiin sangano kafo mala piradhdhuku.
Job39:14 Yanchchay ba phuuphphulle biittan yeggawus; biitta giddon uttidi ho7ana mala ooththawus.
Job39:15 ‹Heera aadhdhizaadey ba tohon menththees; wora do7atikka yedhdhi liiqiseettes› gaada qoppuku.
Job39:16 Ba ciyetas allaga mala menxe iitawus; izi daaburay hadan attikokka wuda guukku.
Job39:17 Hayssaththo izis cinccateth dhayssada iza erontta mala ooththiday tana.
Job39:18 Iza dendada woxxiza wode
Job39:19 «Iyoobee! Paratas wolqqa immidaynne adussa gamma istta morgen mayziday nenee?
Job39:20 Parata boole mala guppizay istti harbuqishe asata daganththana mala ooththizay nenee?
Job39:21 Parati ola demba togetti bishe
Job39:22 Yash giza miish mulekka erettenna; ay miishshika istta daganththenna; istta bolla giththa mashsha; denththidaakkoka guye simmettenna.
Job39:23 Istta toggiza olanchchati oykkida ola miishshati
Job39:24 Zayey zayetishin co7u gi eqqanawu dandayettenna; yiilloninne hanqon kumidi ola demba woxxeettes.
Job39:25 Zayey punettida taybon ufayssan wayqeettes; haakon dishe ola peeno ereettes; Ola kaaleththizayti immiza azazozanne olanchchata ceeqeteththa siyeettes.
Job39:26 «Xiloy salo bolla paallizay
Job39:27 Golley pude ke7idi dhoqqasohon ba keeth keexxizay ne azaziinee?
Job39:28 Golley zaallata giddon aqees; kelka giddon ba keeth keexxees; zaallatikka izas qotettizaso gideettes.
Job39:29 Heen uttidi baas miza miish xeellees; iza ayfetikka haakon dizaaz demmeettes.
Job39:30 Hayssa malan golleti mizaazi dizaso shiiqeettes; istta ciyetikka suuth uyeettes» gides.
Job40:1 Qasseka Xoossi Iyoobes
Job40:2 «Iyoobee! Asi Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossara marshettidi laththana nees misatizee? Tanara Xoossara marshettizay nena gidida gishshas ane taas zaara» gides.
Job40:3 Iyoobi zaaridi
Job40:4 «Godoo! Tani aykko maaddontta laafa asa
Job40:5 Tani issito gaanayssa gadis; gido attiin taas zaariza miishshi baawa; hayssafe guye ubbaaka ta haasaykke» gides.
Job40:6 Hessafe guye GODAY gote carko giddon gididi Iyoobes hizgides
Job40:7 «Ane adde gidikko dendada gixeta; ta oychchizayssa taas zaara.
Job40:8 Tana pirda geellasizaade kessada nena xillo as kessanaas dafettay?
Job40:9 Xoossa wolqqa mala mino wolqqay nees dizee? Xoossa qaala gunththa mala ne qaalay guummanawu dandayzee?
Job40:10 Hessa mala gidikko ane ne bonchchoninne ne gitateththan denda! Ne teemateththinne gitateththa may7a.
Job40:11 Otoranchchata beyada kawushsha; ne hanqoza istta bolla guussa.
Job40:12 Ane lo7eththa xeellada otoranchchata ubbaa yeellachcha; iita ooththizayta istti dizason heen dhayssa.
Job40:13 Istta ubbaa moogo may7on xaaxada issi bolla duufon mooga.
Job40:14 Hessafe guye neni ne wolqqan xoonizayssa tani nees markkattana.
Job40:15 «Tani nena medhdhidayssaththo Horiqe geetettiza do7a medhdhadis; izikka boora mala maata mees.
Job40:16 Izas xeessan diza wolqqa beya; izas ulo giddon diza shaya minoteththa xeella.
Job40:17 Izas goynay Libaanoose ziga miththa mala sitti gidayssa; izas gedaa xaphotikka minonne ordeta.
Job40:18 Iza meqeththatikka xarqimalanne birata marco mala minota.
Job40:19 Ta medhdhida medheta ubbaafe wolqqama; taappe attiin iza xoonanay haray deenna.
Job40:20 Wora do7ati ubbay kaa7iza zumay
Job40:21 Kuway diza miththa garsan
Job40:22 Kuway diza miththati iza bantta kuwan genththeettes; shaafa doonan dicciza miththati iza kammeettes.
Job40:23 Shaafa haaththa kixas izi dagammenna; Yordaanoose shaafay keehi kumidi goggiinkka izi yayyenna.
Job40:24 Iza ayfeta toyssidi iza oykkana asi dizee? iza siidhekka dafon qachchidi iza oykkanaas dandayzay oonee?
Job41:1 «Neni lewataane geetettiza abba giddon diza do7a mole oykkiza manxakon oykkanaas dandayay? Woykko iza inxarsaa wodoron qachchanaas dandayay?
Job41:2 Iza siidhezan dafo aaththada
Job41:3 Izi
Job41:4 Nees mernaas aylle gididi nees ooththanawu izi nees qaala gelanee?
Job41:5 Asara meeze kafo mala ne iza nenara meezesanee? Woykko nees macca nayta kaassana mala ne qachcha woththanee?
Job41:6 Mole zal7anchchati iza shammanawu miishshan marshettanee? Woykko qanxxereththidi iza banttas gishettanee?
Job41:7 Iza galbakka ne koyidasora tooran cadda daakkanaas dandayay? Woykko iza hu7eza hoxe miishshan cadda lukkanawu dandayay?
Job41:8 Ane neni iza dandayana gidikko kushen bochcha! Izara ne baaxetida baaxe wodenawukka balakka; nam7anththo izara ne baaxetanaas kajjalakka.
Job41:9 Lewataane geetettiza abba giddo do7ara baaxetidi iza xoonana kajjalos dhaley deenna. iza be7iza ubbay babon kokkorees.
Job41:10 Iza bolla meto gaththana guussi
Job41:11 Saloppe garsan diza miishshi wurikka taassa; histtiin ta izas zaarana mala taas tal7iday oonee?
Job41:12 Lewataane geetettiza abba do7a gishshas
Job41:13 Orde gidida iza galba shooqanaas
Job41:14 Keehi yashissiza achchati diza iza banqilata pooqqana dandayzay oonee?
Job41:15 Izas zokko galbay maarara uttida gondalleta mala; addafe shiddi oykettidayta.
Job41:16 Istti issoy issaara shiphi gida gishshas Istta giddora haray attiin carkoyka aadhdhenna.
Job41:17 Istti ubbayka issoy issaara oyketti uttida gishshas ay miishshika istta shaakkanawu dandayenna.
Job41:18 Izi dhishiza wode xoxolqu giza poo7oy beettees; iza ayfetikka wontta maalado arshe mala poo7eettes.
Job41:19 Iza doonappe tama lacoy kezees; tamaa pinxeththika laalettishe beettes.
Job41:20 Penttiza disttey uttida coocen diza afiray cuwattiza mala; iza siidheppe cuway kezishe beettes.
Job41:21 Izi shempiza shemppoza seelay xiixinththa oyseththees; tama lacoykka iza doonappe kezees.
Job41:22 Iza morgen wolqqay kumida gishshas iza sinththay yashissees.
Job41:23 Iza ashoy dila7a gidida gishshas iza bollay birata mala minnees.
Job41:24 Izas tiray shuchcha mala mino; gaacciza woxa malakka mino.
Job41:25 Ha do7azi dendiza wode wolqqamati attontta babon kokkoreettes.
Job41:26 Ay mashshaninne tooran woykko wondafeninne caddizaazan
Job41:27 Izi birata maqa mala menththereththees; Xarqimalakka musa miththa mala tiifereththees.
Job41:28 Iza bolla wondafe xongikokka izi yayyidi baqatenna; Yanbarsha shuchchika iza sinththan ishina mala.
Job41:29 Koxe maata mala qoodees; asi iza bolla toora xongishin qidhe miich miiccees.
Job41:30 Izas ulo galba hanchchazi izi urqqa giddora bishin biitta maarasha mala bookkees.
Job41:31 Abba haaththa pentta mala pocisees; oton penttiza zayte mala podhisees.
Job41:32 Izi aadhdhi biza ogey poo7isees; abba haaththaaka hoomo coppu histtees.
Job41:33 Izi yash erontta medheta; biitta bolla iza misatiza medhetay mulekka deenna.
Job41:34 Keehi gita gidida medhetatakka izi kadhees; izi do7a ubbaa bolla kawo.»
Job42:1 Hayssafe guyen Iyoobi Xoossas hizgi zaarides;
Job42:2 «Ta Godawu! Neni ubba miish ooththanaas dandayzayssa ta eradis; ne qofaakka dhuphi digganay deenna.
Job42:3 Ta erizaara keehi guuth gidishin ta daro haasayzayssa aazas gididaakko ne oychchadasa; tumukka tani eronttayssanne akeekontta ubbaa haasayadis.
Job42:4 ‹Ta oyshaa ezga siyada taas zaaro imma› gadasa.
Job42:5 Ta hanno gakkanaas ne gishshas erizayssi asappe siyoyssan xalla; ha7i gidikko ta ayfetan ta nena beyadis.
Job42:6 Hessafe dendidayssan ta haasayda miishshati tana yeellachchida gishshas bidinththaninne gudullan uttada ta neeppe maarettana.»
Job42:7 Xoossi Iyoobera haytantta ubbaa haasayettidaappe guye Temaane dere as Elfaazes
Job42:8 Hessa gishshas ha7i laappun wofanotanne laappun dharshota ekkidi ta oosanchcha Iyoobekko biite. Heen intte nagara gishshas xuugettiza yarsho shiishshite. Ta oosanchcha Iyoobi inttes woossana; tanikka iza woosa siyada inttena intte nagara mala qaxxaykke. Intte taas Iyoobe mala lo7o miish haasaybeekketa» gides.
Job42:9 Hessafe guye Temaane dere as Elfaazey
Job42:10 Iyoobi ba heedzdzu laggetas woossidaappe guye Xoossi izi zaari durettana mala ooththides. Kase izas dizayssafe aaththidi dakko izas immides.
Job42:11 He wode Iyoobe ishati
Job42:12 Xoossi Iyoobes wurseththa de7oza koyroyssafe aaththi anjjides. Hessa gishshas Iyoobes 14
Job42:13 Qasseka laappun attuma naytanne heedzdzu macca nayta zaari yelides.
Job42:14 Macca naytappe koyroro Yimima
Job42:15 Biitta bolla Iyoobe macca nayta mala medha lo7o maccay beettibeenna. Istta aaway isttas istta ishatara biitta laattana mala shaakki immides.
Job42:16 Hessafe guye Iyoobi 140 de7ides. Ba nayta oydanththo yeleta gakkanaas be7ides.
Job42:17 Iyoobi daro layth diidi lo7o cima cimmidi hayqqides.
Psalms1:1 Iitata zoren bonttay
Psalms1:2 Hessa mala asi GODAA wogan ufayettees; iza wogaa gallassinne qamma qoppees.
Psalms1:3 Hessaadey goggiza haaththa achchan tokettidi
Psalms1:4 Gido attiin iitati hessa mala gidettenna; carkoy pitti efiza suulla mala.
Psalms1:5 Hessa gishshas iitata bolla GODAY pirdana; nagaranchchatikka xillota shiiqon eqqettenna.
Psalms1:6 Ays giikko GODAY xillota oge erees; gido attiin iitata ogey istta dhayon gaththees.
Psalms2:1 Kawoteththati ays dendizoo? Qasse kawoteththay ays iita ooththanaas maqettizee?
Psalms2:2 Sa7a kawotinne daannati dendida; istti GODAA bollanne GODAY tiydayssa bolla dendanaas issife duulatida.
Psalms2:3 Istti
Psalms2:4 Salon ba araata bolla uttidayssi istta bolla miiccees; Goday istta qidhees.
Psalms2:5 Goday ba hanqon istta seerees; ba wolqqama hanqon istta daganththees.
Psalms2:6 Goday
Psalms2:7 He kawoy
Psalms2:8 Neni tana oychcha; tani kawoteththa ubbaa nees immana; sa7a ubbay nees gidana.
Psalms2:9 Neni birata guufen istta qoxereththana; istta neni mana miishshi meqqiza mala menththereththana› gees» gides.
Psalms2:10 Hessa gishshas intteno kawotoo akeekite; ha sa7a haarizaytoo intte naagettite!
Psalms2:11 GODAAS yashshateththan ooththite; izas kokkorsan haarettite.
Psalms2:12 GODAY hanqettiin ogen intte dhayontta mala izas suure wozinan goynnite; ays giikko iza hanqoy eeson eexxi kezana. Iza banttas zemppo ooththizayti anjjettidayta.
Psalms3:1 GODAWU! Ta morkketi ay keena corattidoo! Ta bolla aappunati dendidoo!
Psalms3:2 Daroti
Psalms3:3 Gido attiin GODAWU! Neni ta yuushon gondalle. Tana bonchchisizaynne minththeththizay nena.
Psalms3:4 Tani ta qaala dhoqqisada GODAAKKO waassana; histtiko izi ba geeshsha zuma bolla dishe ta woosa siyana.
Psalms3:5 GODAY tana naagiza gishshas
Psalms3:6 Tani tana giddoththi uttida cora morkketaska babbike.
Psalms3:7 Abeet GODAWU! Denda! Abeet ta Xoossawu! Tana ashsha! Neni ta morkketa ubbaa banqila shoca; iitata achchaaka menththa.
Psalms3:8 Maadoy GODAASSA; GODAWU ne anjjoy ne deraa bolla gido.
Psalms4:1 Abeet ta xillo Xoossawu! Tani xeygiza wode ne taas koya. Tani un7ettida wode
Psalms4:2 Intteno asatoo! Intte awude gakkanaas ta bonchcho kawushshanee? Intte awude gakkanaas hada miish siiqanee? Intte awude gakkanaas wordo miish kaallanee?
Psalms4:3 GODAY xillo asata baas shaakki dumma woththidayssa intte erite; hessa gishshas tani GODAA xeygiza wode izi taas siyees.
Psalms4:4 Hanqettite; gido attiin intte hanqon nagara ooththofte. Hiixan ichchi diza wode sirphi giidi intte wozina qorite.
Psalms4:5 GODAAS bessiza yarsho yarshite; GODAANKKA Xoossankka ammanettite.
Psalms4:6 Daroti
Psalms4:7 Kaththinne woyne ushshu daro demmidi harati ufayettizayssafe aaththada neni ta wozina ufayssan kunththadasa.
Psalms4:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ne xalla tana saron naaga ayssiza gishshas tani ichchada saroteththan dhiskays.
Psalms5:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani yootizayssa ezga; ta un7on woossiza woosaakka siya.
Psalms5:2 Ta kawozo Xoossoo! Ta nena woossiza gishshas tana maadda gaada ta waassiza waaso ne siya.
Psalms5:3 Abeet GODAWU! Maalado maalado guuran neni ta qaala siyaasa. Maalado maalado guuran tani ta woosa ne sinth shiishshada
Psalms5:4 Neni iitateththan ufayettontta Xoossa; iitati nenara de7ettenna.
Psalms5:5 Ceeqettizayti ne sinththan eqqettenna; iita miish ooththiza ubbata neni ixxaasa.
Psalms5:6 Wordo haasayzayta neni dhayssaasa. Suuth gussizaytanne cimmiza asata neni harasettaasa.
Psalms5:7 Gido attiin tani ne maaro daron ne keeththa gelana. Ne geeshsha Keeththaako simmada bonchchoninne yashshateththan nees goynnana.
Psalms5:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ta morkketappe ne tana ashsha; tana ne xilloteththankka kaaleththa; ne oge ta sinththan suurisa.
Psalms5:9 Istta doonappe keziza qaalay tumu gidenna. Istta wozinankka geney kumides; istta doonay doyettida duufo mala; istti bantta inxarsan as cimmeettes.
Psalms5:10 Abeet Xoossoo! Istta bolla neni pirda; istta geney istta ekki bo. Istta nagaray daro; hessa gishshas neni istta goodda digga; ays giikko istti ne bolla geellattida.
Psalms5:11 Gido attiin nenan zemppida ubbati ufayetetto; istti mernaas ufayssan yexxetto. Ne sunththa siiqiza ubbati ufayetetto; isttika nenan naagettetto.
Psalms5:12 Abeet GODAWU! Neni xillota anjjaasa; Neni gondallen kammiza mala ne kiyateththan istta kammaasa.
Psalms6:1 Abeet GODAWU! Yiillon tana seeroppa; woykko ne hanqon tana qaxxayoppa.
Psalms6:2 Abeet GODAWU! Tani daaburanchcha gidida gishshas tana maara. Abeet GODAWU! Ta wozinay madunxida gishshas tana paththa.
Psalms6:3 Ta shemppoya keeha un7ettadus; histtiin GODAWU! Tana maaddanaas neni awude gakkanaas gam7anee?
Psalms6:4 Abeet GODAWU! Neni simmada tana ashsha; ne maaroteththa daron tana kessa ekka.
Psalms6:5 Hayqqida asi ooninne nena qoppenna; duufon nena galatizay deenna.
Psalms6:6 Ta ceecen xalla daaburadis; omars omars tani yeekkashe ta hiixa caphisays; ta borkoththaaka ta afunththan musissays.
Psalms6:7 Ta ayfeti daro afunxxida gishshas daaburda; ta morkketa ubbaa gaasonkka demo ixxida.
Psalms6:8 GODAY tani yeekkiza yeeho siyida gishshas
Psalms6:9 GODAY ta shoobeththaa be7ides; ta woosaakka siyides.
Psalms6:10 Ta morkke ubbati yeellatananne dagammana; qoppontta kawuyidi guye simmana.
Psalms7:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta Xoossawu neni taas qotettizaso; tana gooddiza ubbaafe neni tana ashsha.
Psalms7:2 Neni tana ashshontta aggiko
Psalms7:3 Abeet GODAWU ta Xoossawu! Tani as qohidaa gidikko
Psalms7:4 
Psalms7:5 ta morkkey tana gooddi oykko; tana sa7ankka yedhereththo; tana biittan yeggidi ta bonchcho kawushsho.
Psalms7:6 Abeet GODAWU! Ne hanqon denda eqqa; eexxiza ta morkketa hanqo bolla denda; ta Xoossawu beegga; tumu pirda pirda.
Psalms7:7 Dereta duulatay ne yuushozan shiiqo; neni istta bolla kawota.
Psalms7:8 GODAY kawoteththata bolla pirdees. Abeet GODAWU! Taas ta xilloteththa malanne ta suureteththa mala pirda.
Psalms7:9 Qofanne wozina pilgga eriza xillo Xoossawu! Iitata geneza neni dhayssa; gido attiin xillota saron naaga.
Psalms7:10 Xoossi taas gondalle; wozina xillota izi ashshiza Xoossa.
Psalms7:11 Xoossay xillo pirdiza Xoossa; izi gallas gallas ba hanqo qonccisiza Xoossa.
Psalms7:12 Asi ba nagara paaxidi simmontta aggiko
Psalms7:13 Izi wodhiza ola miishshata giigssees; tama laco mala popol7u giza ba toora yiishshaa giigssees.
Psalms7:14 Iitateth shaaridi
Psalms7:15 Hara asatas olla bookkida asi ba bookkida ollan simmi kundees.
Psalms7:16 Izi ehiza geney iza hu7es simmees; iza makkallaykka simmidi izas gidees.
Psalms7:17 GODAA xilloteththa gishshas tani iza galatana; qasse Ubbaafe Dhoqqa GODAA sunththas tani galata mazamure yexxana.
Psalms8:1 Abeet GODAWU! Nu Godawu ne sunththi biitta ubbaan keehi bonchchettides; neni ne bonchcho salotappe bollan dhoqqu dhoqqu histta woththadasa.
Psalms8:2 Neni ne morkketa gishshas ne baalgaaranne ne bolla mandizayssa sirphi ooththanawu guuththa nayta doonaninne dhammiza nayta doonan galata kunththadasa.
Psalms8:3 Neni ne kushen medhdhida salota
Psalms8:4 neni asas qoppanawu asi aazee? Woykko neni asa naas wudettanawu izi aazee?
Psalms8:5 Iza neni kiitanchchatappe guuththara ziqqisadasa; bonchchonne gitateththa kallachcha iza hu7en goxxisadasa.
Psalms8:6 Iza neni ne medhdhida medheteththa ubbaa bollan haarizaade ooththada sunththadasa; ubbaaka izas haarisadasa.
Psalms8:7 Dorsatanne miizata
Psalms8:8 salo kafota
Psalms8:9 Abeet nu GODAA Xoossawu! Ne sunththi biitta ubbaa bolla keehi bonchchettides.
Psalms9:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nena kumeththa wozinappe galatana; malalisiza ne oosoza ubbaaka ta yootana.
Psalms9:2 Tani nenan ufayettananne hashshu gaana. Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossawu! Tani ne sunththas galata mazamure yexxana.
Psalms9:3 Ne qoncciza wode ta morkketi guye simmana; ne sinththafekka dhuphetti dhayana.
Psalms9:4 Neni taas xillo pirda pirdadasa; neni xilloteththan pirdashe ne kawoteththa araatan uttadasa.
Psalms9:5 Neni kawoteththata seeradasa; iitatakka dhayssadasa; neni istta sunththaa meri mernaaskka qucca diggadasa.
Psalms9:6 Morkketi meri mernaas dhayda; istta katamatakka mulera dhoqalla dhayssadasa; istti mulera dogetti attida.
Psalms9:7 Gido attiin GODAY mernaas kawotidi dees; izi pirdanaas ba araata giigsides.
Psalms9:8 Izi ha alameza xilloteththan pirdana; kawoteththata bollaka tumateththan pirdana.
Psalms9:9 GODAY un7ettidaytas baqati attizaso; meto wodetankka qotetti attizaso.
Psalms9:10 Ne sunththa erizayti nenan ammanetteettes; ays giikko GODAWU! Neni nena koyzayta yegga aggabeekka.
Psalms9:11 Xiyoonen kawoti uttida GODAAS galata mazamure yexxite; izi ooththida ooso dere ubbaas qonccen yootite.
Psalms9:12 Ays giikko suuth gussizaytas halo kessiza Xoossi naaqettidayta waasoza izi dogenna.
Psalms9:13 Abeet GODAWU! ta morkketi tana yedeththizayssa be7a. Neni taas qadhettada hayqoppe tana ashsha.
Psalms9:14 Hessika tani Xiyoone asa karen eqqada nena galatanaassinne ne ashshidayssan keeha ufayettanaassa.
Psalms9:15 Kawoteththay ba bookkida ollan kundides. Istti qotti woththida woximadey istta toho oykkides.
Psalms9:16 GODAY ba xillo pirdan erettides; iita asi ba kushen ooththida ooso woximaden oykettides.
Psalms9:17 Iitati si7oolen gelana; Xoossa dogiza kawoteththay ubbayka istta mala hanana.
Psalms9:18 Hiyeesati aydekka dogetti attettenna; woykko manqota hidotay coo mernaas dhayenna.
Psalms9:19 Abeet GODAWU! Kawoteththati ba wolqqan dendidi ne bolla ceeqettontta mala neni istta bolla pirda.
Psalms9:20 Abeet GODAWU! Ne istta daganththa; istti as gididayssa neni istta erisa.
Psalms10:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne ays haakkada eqqay? Meto wodenkka ays geemmay?
Psalms10:2 Iita asati otoretteettes; hiyeesatakka yedeththeettes; istti haras woththida woximaden zaari oykettetto.
Psalms10:3 Iita asi ba wozina amon ceeqettees; Yoray GODAA cayeessinne kaddees.
Psalms10:4 Iita asi otoreteththan Xoossa koyenna; iza qofa ubbaan Xoossi deenna.
Psalms10:5 Ubbaa miishshi izas kumees; ne wogay izas gelenna; otoranchchay ne wogappe haakkees; hessa gishshas ba morkketa bollan izi qilccees.
Psalms10:6 Ba wozinan izi
Psalms10:7 Iza doonan qanggeththi
Psalms10:8 Dere giddon geemason zuggi uttees; maadoy bayndayta dhayssanaas naagettees; xillo asata geeman wodhees.
Psalms10:9 Ba qotettizason geemmidi
Psalms10:10 Maadoy bayndaynne hiyeesay iza kushen kundees; izikka istta nippi histti menththereththees.
Psalms10:11 Iita asi ba wozinan
Psalms10:12 Abeet GODAWU! Denda. Xoossoo! Ne kusheza dhoqqu histta denththa; maadoy baynda metotanchchata dogoppa.
Psalms10:13 Iita asi Xoossa ays kadhizee? Ba wozinankka
Psalms10:14 Gido attiin Xoossoo! Neni metozanne waayezakka beyaasa; neni ubba wode maaddanaas giiga uttadasa; neni yi7ota maaddaasa; maadoy bayndaytikka bana nees sheedhdheettes.
Psalms10:15 Gene asata wolqqa menththa; iita asata wolqqaka liiqisa; istti nam7anththo iita ooththontta mala istta ooso mala istta qaxxaya.
Psalms10:16 GODAY merippe mernaas kawotidi dees; hara kawoteththati iza biittafe dhayana.
Psalms10:17 Abeet GODAWU! Neni hiyeesata amo eraasa; istta woosaakka siyada minththeththaasa.
Psalms10:18 Oonikka istta yashisontta mala maadoy bayndaytassinne yi7otas ne pirda.
Psalms11:1 GODAY tani baqata attizaso; histtiin intte tana ays
Psalms11:2 Nagaranchchati wozina geeshshata dhuman caddanaas bantta wondafe dafi oykkida.
Psalms11:3 Yochcha shuchchi woddiza wode
Psalms11:4 GODAY ba geeshsha Keeththan dees; salon ba araatan uttidi asaa be7ees; iza ayfeti asaa pilggi xeelleettes.
Psalms11:5 GODAY xillotanne nagaranchchata pilggi xeellees. Gido attiin geellateththinne makkallateth siiqizayta izi keehippe ixxees.
Psalms11:6 GODAY iitata bolla eexxiza tama bonqonne diine tama bukisana. Dhayssiza gote carkon istta qaxxayana.
Psalms11:7 GODAY xillo gidida gishshas xilloteththa ooso dosees. Suure asati iza sinth beyana.
Psalms12:1 GODAWU! Lo7o asi biitta bollafe wurida gishshas ne tana maaddarkki; deraa giddon ammanettiza asi deenna.
Psalms12:2 Issoy issaas wordo haasayees; issoy issaa doonan cimmeettes;
Psalms12:3 Abeet GODAWU! baleththiza doona gorda; otoron haasayza inxarsata qanxxa;
Psalms12:4 Istti
Psalms12:5 GODAY
Psalms12:6 GODAA qaalay izan walakay baynda muuruta; cooce taman laappunto paacetti geeyida bira mala.
Psalms12:7 Abeet GODAWU! Neni nuna saroteththan naaga; ha woden diza iita yeletappe mernaas ne nuna ashsha.
Psalms12:8 Asaa giddon iitay bonchchettida wode geellati ubba wode otoreteththan simeretteettes.
Psalms13:1 Abeet GODAWU! Awude gakkanaas neni tana doganee? Ne tana mernaas balanee? Awude gakkanaas neni taappe geemmanee?
Psalms13:2 Awude gakkanaas tani ta qofara baaxetanee? Awude gakkanaas ta wozinay ceecishe daanee? Ta morkketi ta bolla awude gakkanaas goobanee?
Psalms13:3 Ta GODAWU! Haa taakko xeellada taas zaaro imma; ta ayfe poo7isada
Psalms13:4 «Nuni iza xoonidos» giidi
Psalms13:5 Gido attiin ne maaroteththa daron tani ammanettays; neni tana ashshiza gishshas tani ufayettays.
Psalms13:6 GODAWU! Ne kiyateththi taas darida gishshas tani nees yexxana.
Psalms14:1 Eeyati bantta wozinan
Psalms14:2 Xoossa koyzaynne akeekizay de7izakko be7anaas
Psalms14:3 Gido attiin ubbayka ogeppe kare ke7ida; ubbayka mulera go7onttaaz gidida; lo7o ooththizay ooninne deenna; haray atto issaadeyka deenna.
Psalms14:4 GODAY
Psalms14:5 Gido attiin Xoossi xillo asatara de7iza gishshas iita asati hessan dagammana.
Psalms14:6 Intte hiyeesata halchcho laalleeta; gido attiin GODAY hiyeesati baqati attizaso gidees.
Psalms14:7 Isra7eeles atoteththi Xiyooneppe yidaakko! GODAY istta duussa zaariza wode Yaaqoobe zereththati ufayettana; Isra7eele asay ufayssan galatana.
Psalms15:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne Dunkaanezan gam7anay oonee? Ne geeshsha zumaa bolla nenara de7anay oonee?
Psalms15:2 Suure de7o de7izay
Psalms15:3 as cimmonttay
Psalms15:4 Iita asata kadhizay
Psalms15:5 ba miishsha dichchas tal7onttay
Psalms16:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta baqata attizasoy nena; ne ki7on tana qotta.
Psalms16:2 Tani GODAAS
Psalms16:3 Sa7an de7iza geeshshati ay mala bonchchettidaytee! Tani isttan ufayettays.
Psalms16:4 Wordo xoossata kaallizayti bantta bolla meto darseettes. Gido attiin tani eeqa xoossatas shukkike; isttas sunththaaka xeygikke.
Psalms16:5 GODAWU! Taas laata xinxxoynne qaaday nena;
Psalms16:6 Ne taas wadhdhida zaway lo7o gidides; keehippe lo7o xinxxoy tana gakkides.
Psalms16:7 Tana zoriza GODAA galatays; omars ta wozinay tana tamaarssees.
Psalms16:8 Tani ubbato GODAA sinththasays; izi ta ushachchan diza gishshas tani kokkorikke.
Psalms16:9 Hessa gishshas ta wozinay ufayettees; ta shemppoyka woppu gees; ta asateththayka hirgay baynda shempi dees.
Psalms16:10 Ne tana Si7oolen aggaka; ne geeshshaza wooqqana mala aggaka.
Psalms16:11 Neni tana de7o oge bessaasa; ne matan kumeththa ufayssi
Psalms17:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta xilloteththan maganniza magana siya; ta waasoza ezga; cimoy baynda woossiza woosaas zaaro imma.
Psalms17:2 Taas xilloteththi neeppe yo; tumaa ne ayfey xeello.
Psalms17:3 Neni qamman tana xomosadasa; ta wozina paaccadasa; ne paaccidaa gidikkoka ta bolla aykkoka demmabeekka. Ta inxarsay iita haasaybeenna.
Psalms17:4 Tani hara asa mala iita qaala haasaykke; tani ne azazo naagiza gishshas gene oge kaallabeekke.
Psalms17:5 Ta tohoti ne ogeppe handarshontta mala ta tanggoy ne ogeppe kare kezibeenna.
Psalms17:6 Abeet Xoossawu! Tani woossiin neni siyiza gishshas tani nena woossays; ne hayththa taakko zaarada
Psalms17:7 Bantta morkketappe baqatizayta ne ushachcha kushezan qottada ashshizayssoo! Ne kiyateththa malalisiza ogera qonccisa.
Psalms17:8 Ne ayfe ciro mala tana naaga; ne qefeta giddon tana qotta.
Psalms17:9 Un7eththiza iitatappenne dooddi uttida wolqqama morkketa kusheppe ne tana ashsha.
Psalms17:10 Isttas qadhettiza wozinay baawa; otoro haasaya haasayeettes.
Psalms17:11 Tani bizaso ubbaan istti tana dooddeettes; tana duge biittan kundis yegganaas dereqeettes.
Psalms17:12 Istti banttas miza miish koyza gaammo mala; woykko geeman zamadi naagiza wodalla gaammo mala.
Psalms17:13 Abeet GODAWU! Denda. Ta morkketara eqettada istta shoca; ne mashshan iitatappe tana ashsha.
Psalms17:14 Abeet GODAWU! Hessa mala asatappe tana qotta; Istta qaaday ha sa7a de7o xalla gidiza asaappe ne kushen tana ashsha; ne mazgaban minjjida qixaateppe istta kalssa; istta naytas daridi tirpo; istta nayta naytaska gidi palaho.
Psalms17:15 Gido attiin tani xilloteththan ne sinththa beyana; tani beeggiza wode ne bonchcho be7ada alana.
Psalms18:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne taas wolqqa immida gishshas ta nena siiqays.
Psalms18:2 GODAY taas zaalla; tani olappe naagettiza miixa; izi tana ashshizayssa; ta Xoossay tani izan geemetta attiza wogga zaalla. Izi taas gondalle; izi tana ashshiza kace; taas izi mino zemppo.
Psalms18:3 Galatay bessiza GODAA tani xeygays; izi ta morkketappe tana ashshees.
Psalms18:4 Hayqo wodoroy tana cuullides; dhayssiza di7oy tana mittides.
Psalms18:5 Duufo wodoroy tana qachchides; hayqo woximadey ta sinththan waaxettides.
Psalms18:6 Tana metoy un7iin GODAA xeygadis; «Tana maadda» gaada ta Xoossas waassadis; izi ba Keeththan dishe ta cenggurssaa siyides; tani waassida waasoy iza hayththan wodhdhides.
Psalms18:7 Xoossi hanqettida gishshas biittay qaaxxides; zumata xaphoy kokkorides.
Psalms18:8 Iza sidheppe hanqo cuway cuwattides; iza doonappe miza tama lacoy kezides; iza doonappe xuuggiza bonqoy pulttides.
Psalms18:9 Salo phalqidi wodhdhides; he wode iza toho garsara dhippi gida shaaray dees.
Psalms18:10 Kiruben uttidi paallides; carko qefe ekkidi pude dendi bides.
Psalms18:11 Bana dhuman kammides; iza Dunkaaneza dhippi gida irara shaaray dooddides.
Psalms18:12 Iza sinththan de7iza gita poo7ozappe shachchinne wolqqanththi ke7ides; dhippi gida shaarakka kanththi ke7ides.
Psalms18:13 GODAY dada mala saloppe guummides; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay ba cenggurssa sissides; wolqqanththaninne tama lacon qonccides.
Psalms18:14 Ba wondafeza yiishshaa yeddides; ba morkketakka laallides; wolqqanththa poo7o kiittidi istta yedeththides.
Psalms18:15 Abeet GODAWU! Neni seerida wodenne ne hanqoy eexxida wode
Psalms18:16 GODAY bollafe ba kusheza duge yeddidi tana oykkides; ciimma haaththafe tana kessides.
Psalms18:17 Izi ta bolla wolqqatiza ta morkketappe
Psalms18:18 Tana metoy un7ida gallas istti ta bolla dendida; gido attiin GODAY taas zemppo gidides.
Psalms18:19 Izi tana aaho demban kessides; tanan ufayettida gishshas tana ashshides.
Psalms18:20 Ta xilloteththa mala GODAY taas qanxxides; ta kushe geeshshateththa mala izi taas zaarides.
Psalms18:21 Tani GODAA oge kaalladis; tani ta Xoossa aggada iita ooththabeekke.
Psalms18:22 Tani iza woga ubbaa naagadis; iza azazoza polanaappe guye gabeekke.
Psalms18:23 Tani iza sinththan suure de7adis; tanateththaa nagarappe naagadis.
Psalms18:24 Hessa gishshas GODAY taas ta xilloteththa mala immides; ta kushey iza sinththan geesh gidida mala zaarides.
Psalms18:25 Abeet GODAWU! Ammanettizaytas neni ammanettaasa; suuretas neni suure.
Psalms18:26 Geeshshataskka neni geeshsha; gido attiin geellatas neni geella.
Psalms18:27 Ashketa ne ashshaasa; gido attiin otoranchchata kawushshaasa.
Psalms18:28 Abeet GODAWU! Ne taas xomppaasa; Xoossay neni taas dhuma poo7isaasa.
Psalms18:29 Ne maaddiin tani ta morkketa olays; ta Xoossa wolqqan tani istta gimbe bollara guppa aadhdhays.
Psalms18:30 Xoossa ogey suure; GODAA qaalay ammanettizayssa; Izakko baqatiza ubbatas izi gondalle.
Psalms18:31 Xoossafe attiin hara xoossi oonee? nu GODAAPPE attiin hara zaallay oonee?
Psalms18:32 Taas wolqqa immizaynne ta oge saro ooththizay Xoossa.
Psalms18:33 Izi ta tohota genessa toho mala minththees; tana dhoqqasohotan saroteththan woththees.
Psalms18:34 Izi ta kusheta ola tamaarssees; hessa gishshas tani ta qesen xarqimala birata wondafeza dafada dukkays.
Psalms18:35 Ashshiza ne gondalle taas immadasa. Ne ushachcha kushen tana zemppisadasa; taakko ziqqi gaada tana gitasadasa.
Psalms18:36 Ta oge aassadasa; hessa gishshas ta tohoy handarashibeenna.
Psalms18:37 Ta morkketa tani yedeththa oykkadis; tani istta dhayssana gakkanaas guye simmabeekke.
Psalms18:38 Istti nam7anththo dendontta mala shocadis; ta toho garsankka kundida.
Psalms18:39 Olas tana wolqqa gixissadasa; ta morkketa ta sinththan gulbatissadasa.
Psalms18:40 Ta morkketa ta sinththafe guye zaara baqatissadasa; tana ixxizayta tani dhayssadis.
Psalms18:41 Banttana maaddana mala waassida; gido attiin ooninne istta ashshibeenna. GODAA istti xeygida; gido attiin izi isttas koyibeenna.
Psalms18:42 Carkoy pittidi efiza gudulla mala tani istta ooththadis; ogen de7iza urqqa malakka istta yedhettadis.
Psalms18:43 Makkalla asappe tana ashshadasa; ne tana kawoteththata ayssizaade histta shuumadasa; ta erontta derey taas haarettides.
Psalms18:44 Tana erontta allaga derey taas azazettees; istti ta goobateththaa siyidi taas ziggeettes.
Psalms18:45 Istti yashshan kaha dhayeettes; bantti naagiza miixappe kezidi kokkorishe taakko yeettes.
Psalms18:46 GODAY de7o Xoossa! Ta zemppiza wogga zaallay galatetto! Tana ashshida Xoossay dhoqqu dhoqqu go!
Psalms18:47 Izi ta halo kessiza Xoossa; kawoteththata taas haarisiza Xoossa.
Psalms18:48 Ta morkketappe tana ashshaasa; Abeet GODAWU! Neni ta morkketa bolla tana dhoqqu dhoqqu histtaasa; makkallanchcha asatappe neni tana ashshaasa.
Psalms18:49 Hessa gishshas tani nena kawoteththata sinththan galatana; tani ne sunththa yeththan sabbana.
Psalms18:50 Xoossi ba kawoththida kawos xoono bolla xoono immees. Ba tiydayssas kiyateththa bessees; Dawitesinne iza zereththatas mernaas hessaththo ooththees.
Psalms19:1 Saloti Xoossa bonchcho yooteettes; salo gufanththoy iza kushe ooso awajjees.
Psalms19:2 Issi gallassay hara gallassas hessa yootees; issi qammayka kaalliza qammas erateth qonccisees.
Psalms19:3 Isttas haasayay woykko qaalay baawa; istta cenggurssikka siyettenna.
Psalms19:4 Gido attiin istta haasaya cenggurssi sa7a ubbaan laalettana; istta qaalaykka biitta gaxa gakkana. Xoossi arshes salon soho giigsides.
Psalms19:5 Arshey mishiray ba keeththafe keziza mala poo7i ke7ees; gaadde woxxiza pilata asa mala ufayettees.
Psalms19:6 Arshey kessasoppe wuloso gakkanaas bees; iza seelappe geemmi attana miishshi deenna.
Psalms19:7 GODAA wogay suure; shemppo zaari cil7isees; GODAA azazoy ammanettizayssa; akeekay paccidaytas aadho erateth immees.
Psalms19:8 GODAA wogay likke; wozina ufayssees. GODAA azazoy geeshsha; ayfe poo7isees.
Psalms19:9 GODAAS yashshi geeshshateththa; izi mernaas eqqidi de7ana. GODAA pirday mulera tumanne xillo.
Psalms19:10 Worqqafenne muuruta worqqafe aadhdhi dosettees; eessafenne eessa ililoppe aadhdhi mal7ees.
Psalms19:11 Qasse tana ne aylleza naagettana mala zorees; ne woga naagoy daro go7ees.
Psalms19:12 Ba bala demmizay oonee? Abeet GODAWU! Geemmida nagarappe tana geeshsha.
Psalms19:13 Tani ne aylley
Psalms19:14 Abeet GODAWU! Ta zemppiza wogga zaallawu! Tana wozzida ta Godawu! Ta doonappe ke7iza qaalaynne ta wozina qofay nena ufayssizayssa gido.
Psalms20:1 Neni metotida wode GODAY ne woosa siyo; Yaaqoobe Xoossa sunththi nena minththi esso.
Psalms20:2 Ba Keeththafe nees maado kiitto; Xiyooneppe maadoy yo.
Psalms20:3 Ne yarsho ubbaa izi akeeko; ne xuuggiza yarshon izi ufayetto.
Psalms20:4 Ne wozina amo nees immo; ne halchcho ubbaa polo.
Psalms20:5 Ne xoonida gishshas nuni ufayssan hombocana; nu Xoossa sunththan nu bandira dhoqqu ooththana; ne woosa ubbaa GODAY nees immo.
Psalms20:6 GODAY ba doorida kawozas xoono immizayssa tani ha7i eradis; ba ushachcha kushezan izi gita xoonon kunththana; ba geeshsha saloppeka izas zaaro immana.
Psalms20:7 Issoti issoti bantta ola para-gaaren ammanetteettes; harati bantta paran ceeqetteettes; nuni gidikko nu GODAA wolqqan ceeqettoos.
Psalms20:8 Istti dhuphettidi kundana; nuni gidikko dendidi minni eqqana.
Psalms20:9 Abeet GODAWU! Kawozas xoono imma; nunikka nena xeygiza wode siya.
Psalms21:1 Abeet GODAWU! Kawoy ne immida wolqqa gishshas ufayettees; neni immida xoonon izi keehi hombocees.
Psalms21:2 Neni iza wozina amo izas immadasa; qasse izi nena ba doonan oychchidayssa neni diggabeekka.
Psalms21:3 Neni lo7o anjjora iza mokkaasa; geeshsha worqqa kallachcha iza hu7aan goxxisadasa.
Psalms21:4 Neni de7o izas immana mala nena woossides; nekka izas de7onne adussa layth immadasa.
Psalms21:5 Neni xoono immida gishshas izas bonchchoy darides; gitateththinne teema izas immadasa.
Psalms21:6 Neni izas mernaa anjjo immadasa; ne izara duussan iza ufayssadasa.
Psalms21:7 Kawozi GODAAN ammaneettes. Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa kiyateththi izara diza gishshas izi yayyenna.
Psalms21:8 Ne kushey ne morkketa ubbaa demmana; ne ushachchay nena ixxizayta oykkana.
Psalms21:9 Neni qoncciza wode coocen eexxiza tama mala ne istta xuuggana; GODAY ba hanqoza suulen istta xuuggana; iza tamaykka istta mi dhayssana.
Psalms21:10 Neni istta nayta biittafe diggana; istta zereththaaka dereppe denththa dhayssana.
Psalms21:11 Ne morkketi ne bolla genen duulateettes; iita miishshika maqetteettes; gido attiin isttas hanenna.
Psalms21:12 Nekka istta ne wondafeza yiishshan gooddaasa; istti guye simmidi baqatana mala ooththaasa.
Psalms21:13 Abeet GODAWU! Ne minoteththay dhoqqu dhoqqu go; ne gita wolqqaa gishshas galata mazamure yexxoos.
Psalms22:1 Ta Xoossawu! Ta Xoossawu! Tana ays aggadii? Tana maadda gaada tani waassishin ays siyontta ixxadii? Taappeka ays haakkadii?
Psalms22:2 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Gallas kumeth ta neekko waassishin ne siyabeekka; qamma ubbaankka neekko waasoppe shempabeekke.
Psalms22:3 Ne gidikko geeshsha kawo; Isra7eele galatay ne yuushon dees.
Psalms22:4 Kase nu aawati nenan ammanettida; nenan ammanettiin ne istta ashshadasa.
Psalms22:5 Istti neekko waassiin ashshadasa; nenan ammanettiin istta yeellasabeekka.
Psalms22:6 Tani guxune attiin as gidikke; tani asan kadhettidaadenne ixettidaade.
Psalms22:7 Tana be7ida ubbati qidheettes; zaaridikka inxars kessi qidheettes; ba qoodhekka ta bolla qaaththeettes.
Psalms22:8 Histtidi
Psalms22:9 Gido attiin ta wogara yelettana mala maaddiday nena; tani ta aayi dhanth dhammishinkka ne taas ammanettaasa.
Psalms22:10 Tani yelettoosofe doommada nenan diccadis; ta aayey uloppe doommadakka neni ta Xoossa.
Psalms22:11 Metoy taakko mati mati yiza gishshas
Psalms22:12 Daro morkketi korma boorata mala tana giddoththida; qayciza Baasaane biitta boorata mala tana dooddida.
Psalms22:13 Menththereththi yeggidi xaaggiza gaammo mala ba doona ta bolla doyda.
Psalms22:14 Tani haaththa mala goggadis; ta meqeththati someppe someppe kolettida. Ta wozinay muqaadda mala ta giddon seerides.
Psalms22:15 Taas qoodhey kon7a mala melides; ta inxarsay gonggiraththara oykettides; neni tana hayqqida asa mala gudullan baanan yeggadasa.
Psalms22:16 Kanati tana giddoththida; Iita asati tana dooddi oykkida; Ta kushetanne ta tohota shiishshi dhishkida.
Psalms22:17 Tani meqeththata qoodana dandayays; ta morkketikka tana phirxi histti xeelleettes.
Psalms22:18 Ta may7oza gishetti ekkida; ta adussa may7ozan saama yeggida.
Psalms22:19 Abeet GODAWU! Neni ha7i taappe haakkofa. Abeet ta wolqqawu! Tana maaddanaas eesota.
Psalms22:20 Tana mashshafe ashsha; ta shemppoyo wolqqama kanatappe ashsha.
Psalms22:21 Tana gaammota doonappe ashsha; qayciza menththa kacezappe tana naaga.
Psalms22:22 Tani ne sunththa ta ishatas yootana; istti shiiqidasonkka ta nena galatana.
Psalms22:23 Intteno GODAAS yayyizaytoo
Psalms22:24 Izi naaqettidayssa kadhibeenna; metotishin yeggi aadhdhibeenna; ba sinththa izappe genththibeenna; izi maaddarkki gi waassiin iza waaso siyides.
Psalms22:25 Neni ooththida lo7o ooso gishshas
Psalms22:26 Hiyeesati miidi kallana. GODAA koyzayti iza galatana. Istti mernaas ufayettana.
Psalms22:27 Sa7a gaxa gakkanaas diza asay iza gishshas yuushshi qoppana; GODAAKKO simmana. Asa zere ubbay izas goynnana.
Psalms22:28 Ays giikko maatay izassa; kawoteththay ubbay izas haarettana.
Psalms22:29 Sa7a bolla diza dureti izas goynnana. Bana hayqoppe ashshanawu dandayontta biittan baana asi ubbay iza sinththan gulbatana.
Psalms22:30 Buro yaana yeletay izas ooththana; he yeletay kaalli yiza yeletas Godaa ooso yootana.
Psalms22:31 Istti iza xilloteththa gishshas buro yaana yeletas yootana.
Psalms23:1 GODAY ta heenththanchcha; taas aykkoyka paccenna.
Psalms23:2 Tana aaca qooron shempisees; xillo haaththi dizaso tana kaaleththees.
Psalms23:3 Ta de7o ooraxissees. Ba sunththa gishshas tana xilloteththa ogen kaaleththees.
Psalms23:4 Neni ta GODAY tanara diza gishshas tani girdi gida dhuma shoobba giddora biikkoka iita miishshas babbike. Ne guufeynne gatumay tana minththeththees.
Psalms23:5 Ta morkketa sinththan taas maadda giigsadasa; ta hu7e zayten tiyadasa; ta ushshi kunththa palahissadasa.
Psalms23:6 Ne kiyateththinne ne maaroteththay ta de7o layththa ubbaan tana kaallana; tani GODAA keeththan mernaas daana.
Psalms24:1 Sa7aynne sa7an kumida ubbay GODAASSA; salo gufanththon diza ubbay Xoossassa.
Psalms24:2 Sa7aa gita abbata bolla miccides; haaththa bollaka minththidi essides.
Psalms24:3 GODAA zuma bolla kezanay oonee? Iza geeshshasohon eqqanay oonee?
Psalms24:4 Iza kushey nagarappe geeyiday
Psalms24:5 izi GODAAPPE anjjo ekkana; bana ashshiza Xoossafe xillo pirda demmana.
Psalms24:6 Xoossako xeelliza asaynne Yaaqoobe Xoossaa sinth koyza asay heytantta mala.
Psalms24:7 Kareti doyettetto; Bonchcho Kawoy gelo; beni pengeti iza ufayssan mokkite!
Psalms24:8 He Bonchcho Kawoy oonee? Minonne wolqqama GODAA! Olaska izi wolqqama GODAA!
Psalms24:9 Kareti doyettetto; Bonchcho Kawoy gelo; beni pengeti iza ufayssan mokkite!
Psalms24:10 Ha Bonchcho Kawoy oonee? He Bonchcho Kawoy salo medheteththa GODAA!
Psalms25:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta nena wozinappe woossays.
Psalms25:2 Abeet ta Xoossawu! Tani nenan ammanettays; tana yeellasoppa; ta morkketikka ta bolla ceeqettofetto.
Psalms25:3 Nena hidota ooththizayti yeellatettenna; gido attiin gene ooththizayti yeellatana.
Psalms25:4 Abeet GODAWU! Tana ne oge bessa; ne geedo kaalo tana tamaarsa.
Psalms25:5 Neni tana ashshiza Xoossa; ne tumateththan tana kaaleththanne tamaarsa; ubba wode ta hidotay nena.
Psalms25:6 Abeet GODAWU! Beniisofe diza ne qadheteththaanne ne kiyateththa hassa7a.
Psalms25:7 Ta yelagateththa nagaranne mooro hassa7oppa; Abeet GODAWU! Ne gita kiyateththa malanne ne lo7eteththa keena tana qoppa;
Psalms25:8 GODAY kiyanne suure; hessa gishshas nagaranchchata ba oge tamaarssees.
Psalms25:9 Ashketa suure ogera kaaleththees; isttaka ba oge tamaarssees.
Psalms25:10 GODAA caaqo qaalanne maara naagizaytas iza ogey ubbay kiyanne tuma.
Psalms25:11 Abeet GODAWU! Ta nagaray keehi daro; gidikkoka ne sunththa gishshas atto ga.
Psalms25:12 GODAAS yayyiza asi oonee? Ne doorada baana ogeza izi nena tamaarsana.
Psalms25:13 Izi ubbaa wodekka lo7o duus daana; iza zereththati biitta laattana.
Psalms25:14 GODAY bana yayyizaytappe ba xuura qottenna; izi isttas ba gelida caaqo qaalakka erisees.
Psalms25:15 GODAY ta toho narxafe kessi ekkiza gishshas
Psalms25:16 GODAWU! Tani bizza dizaadenne qohettida as gidida gishshas
Psalms25:17 Taas metoy darides; ta metozappe tana neni kessa.
Psalms25:18 Ta metozanne ta tuggaa neni be7a; Ta nagara ubbaa atto ga.
Psalms25:19 Ta morkketi ay keena daridaakko ne be7a; istti tana ay mala ixxizaakko ne xeella.
Psalms25:20 Neni tana naaganne ashsha; ta nenan zemppadis; ne tana yeellasoppa.
Psalms25:21 Ne taas hidota gidida gishshas suureteththaynne tumateththay tana naago.
Psalms25:22 Abeet Xoossawu! Isra7eele asa meto ubbaafe neni wozza.
Psalms26:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani suureteththaninne sidhey baynda nenan ammanetta de7ida gishshas ne taas pirda.
Psalms26:2 Abeet GODAWU! Tana paacca; ta qanth pilgga; ta wozina xeella;
Psalms26:3 Ays giikko ne siiqoy ta sinththan dees; tani ne tumateththa ogen hemettays.
Psalms26:4 Tani baleththiza asatara issife uttike; lo7o misatiza iitata maabaran gelikke.
Psalms26:5 Iita ooththiza asata issifeteththa tani ixxays; kofa asatara issife uttike.
Psalms26:6 Abeet GODAWU! Tanan qohoy bayndayssa bessanaas ta kusheza meeccays; histtada yarsho yarshizasoza yuuyays.
Psalms26:7 Galata mazamure yexxays; neni ooththida miish ubbaaka yootays.
Psalms26:8 Abeet GODAWU! Neni de7iza keeththanne ne bonchchoy aqizasoho tani dosays.
Psalms26:9 Tana nagaranchchatara issife pirdofa; as wodhizaytarakka issife ta shemppo dhayssofa.
Psalms26:10 Istta kushen iita halchchoy dees; qasse istta ushachcha kushey matta7en kumides.
Psalms26:11 Tani gidikko borey baynda duus days; tana wozza; taas qadhetta.
Psalms26:12 Ta tohoy dembason eqqides; tani derey shiiqidason GODAA galatana.
Psalms27:1 GODAY taas poo7onne tana ashshizayssa; histtiin tani oonas yayyanee? GODAY ta shemppoys attiza miixa; histtiin tani oonas babbanee?
Psalms27:2 Iita asati
Psalms27:3 Morkke tooray tana dooddizaakkoka ta wozinay yayyenna; olay ta bolla worajjidaakkoka
Psalms27:4 Tani GODAA issi miish oychchays; hessika tani ta de7o layth ubbaan GODAA keeththan de7anaassa; tani GODAA bonchcho lo7oteththa be7anaassa; iza Keeththankka iza koyashe de7anaassa.
Psalms27:5 Hessa gishshas meto gallas izi tana ba dizason genththana; ba dunkaanen tana qotti ashshana; dhoqqa zaalla bollaka izi tana essana.
Psalms27:6 He wode tana dooddida ta morkketappe bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; tani iza Dunkaaneza sinththan ufayssa yarsho yarshana; tani GODAAS diixxananne yexxana.
Psalms27:7 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nena xeygiza wode neni taas koya; taas qadhetta; tana siya.
Psalms27:8 Neni
Psalms27:9 Abeet tana ashshiza ta Xoossawu! Neni tana maaddizaade; Ne sinththa taappe genththofa; tana ne aylle hanqettada neeppe haassofa. Tana oloppanne aggofa.
Psalms27:10 Ta aawaynne ta aaya tana aggikokka GODAY tana shiishshi ekkana.
Psalms27:11 Abeet GODAWU! Ne oge tana tamaarsa; ta morkketa gishshas tana suure ogera kaaleththa.
Psalms27:12 Wordo markkati ta bolla makkallateththan dendida; hessa gishshas ne tana istta iita amos aaththa immofa.
Psalms27:13 Tani shemppora paxa dashe GODAA kiyateth beyanayssa hidota ooththays.
Psalms27:14 GODAAN ammanetta; minna
Psalms28:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta Zaallawu! Tani nena xeygishin taas sissi ixxofa; ta waassishin ne co7u giikko tani duufon geliza asata mala gidana.
Psalms28:2 Ta kusheza ne Geeshsha aqoso miccada woossishinne tana maaddarkki gaada ta waassishin ne siya.
Psalms28:3 Ba wozinan iita qoppishe ba laggetara saroteth haasayza iita ooththizaytara tana isttara gaththa efoppa.
Psalms28:4 Ne isttas istta iitateththaa malanne istta ooso mala imma; isttas istta kushe ooso mala zaara; istti ooththida iita oosozas halo kessa.
Psalms28:5 Istti GODAA oosos wudu gontta ixxida gishshas
Psalms28:6 Ta woosa siyida gishshas
Psalms28:7 GODAY taas wolqqanne gondalle; ta wozinay izan ammaneettes; hessan tani maadettadis; hessa gishshas ta wozinay izan ufayettees; tani iza yeththan sabbana.
Psalms28:8 GODAY ba deraas wolqqa; izi ba tiyda kawoza ashshiza miixa.
Psalms28:9 GODAWU! Ne deraa ashsha; nees gidizayta anjja; istta heenththanchchay nena gida; neni istta mernaaskka tookka.
Psalms29:1 Intteno salon diza medhetatoo! «Bonchchoynne wolqqay GODAASSA» giidi yootite.
Psalms29:2 GODAA bonchcho sunththaa galatite; Iza geeshshateththa teemas GODAA goynnite.
Psalms29:3 GODAA cenggurssay haaththata bollan siyettees. Bonchcho Xoossay dada mala guummees; GODAY gita haaththata bollan guummees.
Psalms29:4 GODAA cenggurssay wolqqama; GODAA gunththay
Psalms29:5 GODAA cenggurssay ziga miththa menththereththees; Libaanoose zigatakka GODAY menththereththees.
Psalms29:6 Libaanoose zumaa galo mara mala buraqissees; Siriyoone zumaakka menththa mala xikisees.
Psalms29:7 GODAA cenggurssay wolqqanth popol7u gees.
Psalms29:8 GODAA cenggurssay bazzo qaaththees; GODAY Qaadeese Bazzo qaaththees.
Psalms29:9 GODAA cenggurssay wolata qaaththees; miththa hayththika qoqofees. Iza Keeththan de7izayti
Psalms29:10 GODAY di7o haaththa bolla ba araata woththidi uttides; GODAY ba kawoteththa algan uttidi mernaas haarees.
Psalms29:11 GODAY ba deraas wolqqa immees. Ba asaakka saroteththan anjjees.
Psalms30:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana ciimmafe kessadasa; ta morkketi ta bolla ufayettontta mala ooththadasa; hessas ta nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtays.
Psalms30:2 Abeet ta GODAWU! Neni tana maaddana mala ta neekko waassadis; nekka tana paththadasa.
Psalms30:3 Abeet GODAWU! Tana duufon bontta mala naagadasa; duge ciimma ollan gelontta mala neni tana ashshadasa.
Psalms30:4 Intteno Xoossa asatoo! GODAAS yexxite; iza geeshsha sunththaaka sabbite.
Psalms30:5 Iza hanqoy guuththa wodessa
Psalms30:6 Tani woppan diza wode
Psalms30:7 Abeet GODAWU! Neni taas kiyida wode
Psalms30:8 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nena xeygadis; tani Godaappe maaroteth woossadis;
Psalms30:9 «Ta hayqqiko woykko duufon gelikko ne taappe ay demmanee? Biittan gelida asi nena galati erizee? Ne ammaneteththa haasayi erizee?
Psalms30:10 Abeet GODAWU! Ta woosa ne siya; taas qadhetta. Abeet GODAWU! Ne taas maado gida» gadis.
Psalms30:11 Ta yeeho yeththan laammadasa. Kayo may7oza taappe qaarada ufayssa may7o tana mayzadasa.
Psalms30:12 Hessa gishshas tani nena sabbanaappe attiin co7u giikke. Abeet ta GODAWU! Tani nena mernaas galatana.
Psalms31:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne taas kuwa gidana mala ta neekko yadis; aydekka tana yeellasoppa; ne xilloteththan tana ashsha.
Psalms31:2 Ne hayththa taakko zaara; eeson tana ashsha; neni tana genththiza zaalla gida; tana ashshiza mino miixa taas gida.
