Psalms88:1 Abeet GODAWU! tana ashshiza Xoossawu! Tani gallassinne omars ne sinththan yeekkays.
Psalms88:2 Ta waasoy ne sinththi gakko; ne hayth ta woosakko zaara.
Psalms88:3 Ays giikko ta de7oy meton kumides; tani hayqqana matadis.
Psalms88:4 Tani duufon geliza asatara qoodettadis; wolqqay baynda as gidadis.
Psalms88:5 Tani ahata giddon olettida asa mala
Psalms88:6 Neni tana ciimma ollan
Psalms88:7 Ne hanqoy tana deexxees; ne hanqoza dambalay tana mulera mittides.
Psalms88:8 Neni ta laggeta taappe haassadasa; istti tana shuunettana mala ooththadasa; tana giddoththida; kessa ekkanawukka dandaykke.
Psalms88:9 Abeet GODAWU! Kayo gaason ta ayfeti doljumida; Ubbaa gallas tani neekko waassays; ta kushetakka neekko miccays.
Psalms88:10 Neni hayqqidaytas malalisiza miish ooththay? Istti dendidi nena galatanee?
Psalms88:11 Ne mernaa siiqoy duufon ne ammaneteththayka bashshason yootettizee?
Psalms88:12 Ne malalisiza oosoy dhuman erettizee? Woykko ne xilloteththay dogettida asata biittan beettanee?
Psalms88:13 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana maaddana mala ta neekko waassays; maalado maalado ta woosay ne sinth gakko.
Psalms88:14 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana ays ixxay? Ne sinththaa taappe ays genththay?
Psalms88:15 Yelagateththasofe doommada
Psalms88:16 Suulliza ne hanqoy ta bolla gakkides; babisiza ne hanqoy tana dhayssides.
Psalms88:17 Istti kumeththa gallas di7o haaththa mala tana giddoththida; issi bolla gididi tana dooddi oykkida.
Psalms88:18 Neni ta laggetanne ta siiqota taappe haassadasa; dhumay xalla taas dabbo gidides.
Psalms89:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaa siiqo gishshas tani mernaas yexxana; ne ammaneteththaa yeleta ubbaas ta awajjana.
Psalms89:2 Tani ne mernaa siiqoy mernaas eqqidayssanne neni ne ammaneteththaa salon minththada essidayssa yootana.
Psalms89:3 Neni
Psalms89:4 ‹Tani ne zareta mernaas kawosana; ne kawoteththa algaa yeleta ubbaas minththana› ga caaqqadis» gadasa.
Psalms89:5 Abeet GODAWU! Saloti neni ooththida malalisiza oosota awajjeettes; geeshshata duulatay ne ammaneteththaa sabbees.
Psalms89:6 Salon GODAARA likkettanaas dandayzay oonee? Salo medheteththata giddonkka GODAA malay oonee?
Psalms89:7 Geeshshata shiiqon Xoossi yashissizaade; Ba yuushon diza ubbaafe keehi yashissizaade.
Psalms89:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossawu! Ne mala wolqqamay oonee? Abeet GODAWU! Neni ubbaa miishshan ammanettidaade.
Psalms89:9 Ne bul7akettiza abba seeraasa; abba dambalakka co7u ooththaasa.
Psalms89:10 Neni Era7aabe geetettiza abba do7aza qoxereththa wodhadasa; ne morkketa ne wolqqama qesen laalladasa.
Psalms89:11 Saloti neyta; sa7aykka neessa; biittanne izan kumida ubbaa neni medhdhadasa.
Psalms89:12 Pudehanne dugeha neni medhdhadasa; Taaboorenne Hermoone zumati ufayssan ne sunththan yexxeettes.
Psalms89:13 Nees wolqqama qesey dees; ne qesey mino; ne ushachcha qesey yashshees.
Psalms89:14 Xilloteththinne suure pirday ne kawoteththa araataas yochcha; maaroteththinne ammaneteththi neeppe sinththara beettes.
Psalms89:15 Abeet GODAWU! Ililisan nena sabbizaytinne ne poo7on hemettizayti anjjettidayta.
Psalms89:16 Ne sunththan kumeththa gallas ufayetteettes; ne xilloteththa gishshas istti nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histteettes.
Psalms89:17 Istti ceeqettiza wolqqay nena; ne teeman istta kacey dhoqqu dhoqqu gees.
Psalms89:18 Nu gondalley GODAA kushenna; nu kawoykka Isra7eele geeshsha kushenna.
Psalms89:19 Beni neni ne ammanettida asatas ajjuutan
Psalms89:20 Ta aylle Dawite demmadis; ta geeshsha zaytenkka tiyada iza kawoththadis.
Psalms89:21 Ta kushey iza maaddana; ta qeseykka iza minththana.
Psalms89:22 Iza ay morkkey haaridi giirisenna; ay iita asikka iza qohenna.
Psalms89:23 Tani iza morkketa iza sinththan tinchchereththana; iza ixxizaytakka shoca nififi histtana.
Psalms89:24 Ta ammaneteththaynne ta mernaa siiqoy izara issife gidana; Ta sunththan iza kacey dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana.
Psalms89:25 Tani iza kawoteththa Mediteraane Abba gakkanaas aassana. Iza zawakka Efiraaxisenne Xegroose Shaafata gakkanaas aassana.
Psalms89:26 Dawiti tana
Psalms89:27 Tani iza taas bayra naa histtana; sa7an diza kawota ubbaafe ta iza gitasana.
Psalms89:28 Tani ta siiqo izas mernaas naagana; tani izas gelida caaqo qaala minththana.
Psalms89:29 Tani iza zareta mernaas minththa essana; iza kawoteththa araataakka salo mala mernaas minththa tokkana.
Psalms89:30 «Gido attiin iza zereththati ta woga aggiko
Psalms89:31 istti ta woththida maara moorikko
Psalms89:32 tani istta nagara gishshas istta guufen qaxxayana; istta mooro gishshas istta xurqafen shocana.
Psalms89:33 Gido attiin tani ta siiqo izappe haassike; woykko ta ammaneteth izas pacinchchike.
Psalms89:34 Tani caaqqida caaqo qaala miikke; ta doonappe ke7ida qaala laammike.
Psalms89:35 Tani issito ta geeshsha sunththan caaqqida qaala Dawites wordotikke.
Psalms89:36 Iza zareti mernaas minnidi daana; iza kawoteththa algayka awa arshe mala ta sinththan mernaas daana.
Psalms89:37 Salo bolla ammanettida markka gidada diza agina mala izi mernaas minni daana» gadasa.
Psalms89:38 Gido attiin ha7i neni tiyada kawoththidayssa bolla keeha hanqettadasa; iza kadhadasanne yegga aggadasa.
Psalms89:39 Neni ne ayllezas caaqqida caaqo qaala laalladasa; iza kallachcha baanan olada tunisadasa.
Psalms89:40 Neni katamaa gimbeza ubbaa laalladasa; iza miixa ubbaa dhayssadasa.
Psalms89:41 Ogera aadhdhiza ubbati iza bonqqida; izi ba shoorotas qidhes attides.
Psalms89:42 Neni iza morkketas ushachchadasa; istta ubbaa ufayssadasa.
Psalms89:43 Neni iza mashsha qaraza dun7isadasa; olankka iza maaddabeekka.
Psalms89:44 Neni iza kawoteththa guufaa iza kusheppe woththa ekkadasa; qasse iza kawoteththa araataa biittan oladasa.
Psalms89:45 Neni iza yelagateththa layththaa qaanththadasa; yeellaka mayzadasa.
Psalms89:46 Abeet GODAWU! Awude gakkanaas nena genththanee? Neni mernaas geemmanee? Ne hanqoy tama mala awude gakkanaas eexxanee?
Psalms89:47 Ta layththay ay keena qaanththako qoppa; ne asa naa coo hada medhdhadii!
Psalms89:48 Asi hayqqontta mernaas shemppora paxa daanaas dandayzee? Qasse duufon gelontta mala bana ashshanaas dandayza asi dizee?
Psalms89:49 Abeet Godawu! Dawites ne ammaneteththan caaqqida caaqoynne kase ne mernaa siiqoy awan dizee?
Psalms89:50 Abeet Godawu! Tani ne aylley ay mala borettidaakko neni haasaya; tani asa ubbaa boreza wostta dandaydaakko ane ne qoppa.
Psalms89:51 Abeet GODAWU! Ne morkketi ne doorada tiyda kawoza cayizayssa
Psalms89:52 GODAY meri mernaas galatetto! Amiin! Amiin.
Psalms90:1 Godawu! Neni nuus yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas shiiqi attizaso gidadasa.
Psalms90:2 Zumati medhettanaappe kase
Psalms90:3 Neni asa nayta
Psalms90:4 Shii layththi nees aadhdhida issi gallassa mala; woykko omarsafe issi saate mala.
Psalms90:5 As qoppontta efiza di7o mala ne efishin
Psalms90:6 Maatay maalado diccidi ciiyees; omarsa wode gidikko shullidi melees.
Psalms90:7 Nuni ne qanggeththan wuridos; ne hanqo suulen dagammidos.
Psalms90:8 Neni nu iita ooso ne sinththan woththadasa; qasse nu genththida nagara ne sinththa poo7okko aaththadasa.
Psalms90:9 Nu wode ubbay ne hanqon aadhdhides; nu layththaaka oolen wursoos.
Psalms90:10 Nu daana layththay laappun tamma; dares giikko osppun tamma; heytikka metoninne ceecen kumida; nu layththay eeson aadhdhees; nunikka eeson baana.
Psalms90:11 Ne hanqoza wolqqa oonee erizay? ne hanqo seelay yashshees.
Psalms90:12 Nu layththa maarara nu go7ettana mala nuna aadho erateth tamaarsa.
Psalms90:13 Abeet GODAWU! Ne hanqoy awude gakkana gam7anee? Simma! Ne aylletas qadhetta!
Psalms90:14 Nu layththa ubbaan nuni ufayettana malanne yexxana mala maalado maalado ne siiqon nuna kalssa.
Psalms90:15 Neni nuna metoththida gallassata keenanne nuni tugga be7ida layththata likke nuna ufayssa.
Psalms90:16 Nuus ne aylletas ne oosoy qoncco; ne bonchchoy nu naytas beetto.
Psalms90:17 Abeet GODAWU! Nu Xoossawu! Ne kiyateththi nunara gido; nu ooththiza ubbaa nuus injjesa; ero! Nu ooththiza ubbaa nuus injjesa.
Psalms91:1 Ubbaafe Dhoqqa GODAAN zemppi de7izay
Psalms91:2 Tani GODAA
Psalms91:3 Izi nena shankkanchchata giteppe
Psalms91:4 Izi ba wangotan nena kammana; iza qefeta garsan neni qotetta attana; iza ammaneteththay nees gondallenne zemppo gidana.
Psalms91:5 Neni omarsan daganththiza miishshas
Psalms91:6 dhuman oykkiza harges
Psalms91:7 Issi shii ne millesora
Psalms91:8 Neni ne ayfen xeelo xalla xeellana; iitatikka qaxxayettishin be7ana.
Psalms91:9 GODAA neni nees baqata attizaso
Psalms91:10 iita miishshi nena bochchenna; boshaykka ne keeth shiiqenna.
Psalms91:11 Ne biza oge ubbaan nena naagana mala Xoossi ba kiitanchchata azazana.
Psalms91:12 Ne tohoy shuchchan dhuphettontta mala kiitanchchati ba kushen nena denththana.
Psalms91:13 Neni gaammonne haso shooshsha bolla hemettana; qasseka wodalla gaammonne iita shooshsha yedhdhana.
Psalms91:14 GODAY
Psalms91:15 Izi tana xeygiza wode tani izas koyana; izi metotida wode tani izara issife gidana; tani iza ashshananne bonchchana.
Psalms91:16 Tani iza layththaa adussana; ta ashshizaade gididayssa ta iza bessana» gees.
Psalms92:1 GODAA galatoy lo7o; Abeet Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossawu! Ne sunththaas mazam-ure shiishoy lo7o.
Psalms92:2 Maalado ne mernaa siiqo
Psalms92:3 Tammu shayan waaxettida bagananinne maasinqo diixxishe awajjay lo7o.
Psalms92:4 Abeet GODAWU! Ne ooththida wolqqama oosoti tana ufayssida; ne kushey ooththida gishshas tani ufayssan yexxays.
Psalms92:5 Abeet GODAWU! Ne oosoy ay keena gitaa! Ne qofaykka ay keena ciimmaa!
Psalms92:6 Hessa eeya asi eranawu dandayenna; damma asikka akeekanawu dandayenna.
Psalms92:7 Iitati maata mala diccikokka
Psalms92:8 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! Neni mernaas ubbaafe dhoqqa.
Psalms92:9 Abeet GODAWU! Ne morkketi dhayana; iita ooththiza ubbati piski gaanayssa nu eroos.
Psalms92:10 Ta kaceza menththa kace mala dhoqqisadasa; lo7o zaytenkka tana tiyadasa.
Psalms92:11 Ta morkketi xoonettidayssa ta ayfen be7adis; ta baalgaarata kundeth ta ayfen be7adis.
Psalms92:12 Xilloti zamba mala daayana; qasse Libaanoose xiidda mala diccana.
Psalms92:13 Istti GODAA keeththan tokettida; istti Xoossa Keeththa zago gakkanaas daayana.
Psalms92:14 Istti ceeggidikka ayfana; istti ubba wode cililida malanne minnida mala daana.
Psalms92:15 Istti
Psalms93:1 GODAY kawotides! Teemanne wolqqa may7ides; alamey qaaxxontta mala minththi essides; oonikka izo qaaththenna.
Psalms93:2 Ne kawoteththa araatay beniisofe minni eqqides; neni mernaas daasa.
Psalms93:3 Abeet GODAWU! Ciimma abbay guummides; ciimma abbay ba gunththa dhoqqu histtides; ciimma abbay dambala guunth dhoqqu ooththides.
Psalms93:4 Salon diza GODAY gita haaththata gunththafe
Psalms93:5 Abeet GODAWU! Ne wogay laamettontta mino; ne Keeththay mernaas geeshshateththan lo7i daana.
Psalms94:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni halo kessiza Xoossa; Abeet halo kessiza Xoossawu! Ne bonchcho qonccisa.
Psalms94:2 Abeet sa7a pirdizayssoo! Denda! Otoranchchatas bessiza qixaate imma.
Psalms94:3 Abeet GODAWU! Iitati awude gakkanaas gam7anee? Istti awude gakkanaas ufayettanee?
Psalms94:4 Iita ooththiza ubbati bantta otoro qaalan haasayeettes; coo ceeqetteettes.
Psalms94:5 Abeet GODAWU! Istti ne deraa liiqiseettes; asaa toochcheettes.
Psalms94:6 Istti am7etanne bete asata wodheettes; yi7ota siifeettes.
Psalms94:7 Histtidi isttas
Psalms94:8 Intteno asaa giddofe dammatoo! Akeekite! Intteno eeyatoo! Awude intte eranee?
Psalms94:9 Hayth immida Xoossi siyennee? Ayfe medhdhida Xoossi be7ennee?
Psalms94:10 Kawoteththaa seerizayssi qaxxayennee? As erateth tamaarsizayssi baas erennee?
Psalms94:11 GODAY asa qofay dhallonttayssanne hada gididayssa erees.
Psalms94:12 Abeet GODAWU! Neni seerizaadeynne neni ne wogappe tamaarsiza asi anjjettidaade.
Psalms94:13 Iitati kundana ollay bookettana gakkanaas
Psalms94:14 GODAY ba asaa olenna; izi bayta aggenna.
Psalms94:15 Pirday simmidi xillo pirdas yoch gidana; xilloti ubbay tuma pirda kaallana.
Psalms94:16 Makkallanchchata bolla ta gishshas eqettanay oonee? Iita ooththizaytarakka ta gishshas mootettanay oonee?
Psalms94:17 GODAY tana maaddonttaakko
Psalms94:18 Abeet GODAWU! Tani
Psalms94:19 Ta wozinay ceecen kumida wode ne minththeththoy ufays darsees.
Psalms94:20 Wogan zemppidi geella pirdizaadera neni zuppetanaas dandayay?
Psalms94:21 Xillo asata bolla gene duulateettes; suure asata bollaka hayqo pirda pirdeettes.
Psalms94:22 GODAY gidikko taas tani baqata attiza miixa; ta Xoossi ta izan zemppiza wogga zaalla.
Psalms94:23 Istta iitateththaa gishshas izi istta qaxxayana; istta nagara gishshas izi istta dhayssana; GODAA nu Xoossay istta dippi histtana.
Psalms95:1 Haa yiite! Ane GODAAS ufayssan yexxoos; nuna ashshiza zaallas ililoos.
Psalms95:2 Ane iza sinth galatara shiiqoos; galata mazamure ufayssan yexxoos.
Psalms95:3 Gaasoykka GODAY wolqqama Xoossa
Psalms95:4 Biitta ciimmati iza kushen deettes; zuma xeeratikka izassa.
Psalms95:5 Abba haaththi izassa; hessa iza kusheti medhdhida; biittaaka medhdhiday iza.
Psalms95:6 Haa yiite! Hokkidi ane izas goynnoos; nuna medhdhida GODAA sinththan gulbatoos.
Psalms95:7 Izi nu Xoossa; Nuni iza qooron heemettizayta; nuni izas dorsa wudeta. GODAY inttena gizayssa hach siyite!
Psalms95:8 «Kase intte aawati Maasaninne Mariiban ooththoyssaththo intte wozina muumisopite.

Psalms95:11 Hessa gishshas tani
Psalms96:1 GODAAS ooraththa mazamure yexxite; sa7an de7iza asawu! Ubbay GODAAS yexxite.
Psalms96:2 GODAAS yexxite; iza sunththaa sabbite; izi ashshizayssa hach hach yootite.
Psalms96:3 Kawoteththata giddon iza bonchcho qonccisite; asa ubbaa giddon malalisiza iza ooso awajjite.
Psalms96:4 GODAY gita; gita galataykka izas bessees; ubba xoossatappe aadhdhidi izi yayettanaas bessees.
Psalms96:5 Dere asay goynniza xoossati ubbay eeqa xoossata; gido attiin GODAY salota medhdhida Xoossa.
Psalms96:6 Bonchchoynne teemay iza yuushon dees; minoteththaynne puulay iza Keeththan dees.
Psalms96:7 Intteno biitta bolla diza dere ubbatoo! GODAA bonchcho gishshassinne iza wolqqa gishshas galatite.
Psalms96:8 Iza sunththas bessiza bonchcho GODAAS immite; Yarsho ekkidi iza Keeththa zago gelite.
Psalms96:9 Iza geeshshateththa puulan GODAAS goynnite; biittan de7iza as ubbay iza sinththan kokkorite.
Psalms96:10 Kawoteththata giddon
Psalms96:11 Saloynne sa7ay ufayetetto! abbaynne iza giddon diza ubbati guummetto!
Psalms96:12 Goshsha gadeynne iza bolla diza ubbay ufayetto! Woran diza mith ubbay iza sinththan ufayssan yexxana.
Psalms96:13 Ays giikko GODAY yaana; izi sa7a bollan pirdanaas yaana; izi ha sa7a bolla xilloteththan
Psalms97:1 GODAY kawotides; sa7an de7iza asay ufayetto; abba giddon de7iza haruroti ufayetetto.
Psalms97:2 Shaaraynne sakkanna dhumay iza yuuyi aadhdhides; xilloteththinne tumateththi iza kawoteththa araataas yochcha.
Psalms97:3 Tamay izappe sinththara bees; iza yuushon diza morkketakka xuuggees.
Psalms97:4 Iza wolqqanththi sa7a poo7isees; biittay hessa be7idi qaaxxees.
Psalms97:5 GODAA sinththan
Psalms97:6 Saloti iza xilloteththaa awajjeettes; asay ubbay iza bonchcho be7ees.
Psalms97:7 Misletas goynnizaytinne eeqa xoossatan ceeqettizayti ubbay yeellatetto! eeqa xoossati Ubbay GODAAS gulbatetto!
Psalms97:8 Abeet GODAWU! Xiyoone asay ne xillo pirda siyidi ufayettees; Yuhuda katamatikka
Psalms97:9 Abeet GODAWU! Neni sa7a ubbaafe dhoqqaasa; xoossata ubbaafe neni gitataasa.
Psalms97:10 GODAA dosizaytoo! Iita ixxite; izi baas ammanettizayta shemppo naagees; qasseka iitata kusheppeka ashshees.
Psalms97:11 Xillotas poo7oy poo7i poo7i baana; wozina suuretas ufayssi daana.
Psalms97:12 Intteno xillotoo! GODAAN ufayettite; geeshsha sunththa izayssa galatite.
Psalms98:1 GODAAS ooraththa mazamure yexxite; gaasoykka izi malalisiza miish ooththides; iza ushachcha kusheynne iza geeshsha qesey izas xoono immides.
Psalms98:2 GODAY ba ashshizayssa erisides; izi ba xilloteththaka kawoteththas qonccisides.
Psalms98:3 Izi Isra7eeleta siiqizayssanne isttas ammanettizayssa hassa7ides; sa7a gaxa gakkanaas diza asay ubbay nu Xoossay ashshizayssa be7ides.
Psalms98:4 Sa7a bollan diza as ubbay GODAAS ufayssan yexxite; qaala dhoqqu ooththidi ufayssa yeththan galatite.
Psalms98:5 Bagana diixxishe mazamuren GODAA galatite;
Psalms98:6 Dinkenne zaye punnishe nu kawaa GODAA sinththan ufayssan ililite.
Psalms98:7 Abbaynne abba giddon kumida ubbay guummo! sa7aynne sa7a bollan diza ubbay yexxo!
Psalms98:8 Shaafati issife bantta kushe baqqetto! zumati GODAA sinththan issife ufayssan yexxetto!
Psalms98:9 GODAY sa7a bollan pirdanaas yaana; izi ha sa7a bolla xilloteththan asa bollaka suureteththan pirdana.
Psalms99:1 GODAY kawotides! Hessa gishshas asay kokkoro! kirubeta giddon kawoteththa araatan uttides; hessas biittayka qaaxxo.
Psalms99:2 GODAY Xiyoonen gita; kawoteththa ubbaafe izi dhoqqu dhoqqu gides.
Psalms99:3 Gitanne keehippe yashissiza ne sunththa istti ubbay sabbetto! izi dumma!
Psalms99:4 Tuma pirda dosiza wolqqama kawo! neni suureteththas yoch yeggadasa; neni Yaaqoobes tumu pirdanne xilloteth essadasa.
Psalms99:5 Izi dumma gidida gishshas GODAA nu Xoossaa dhoqqu dhoqqu histtite; iza toho garsankka gufannidi izas goynnite.
Psalms99:6 Iza qeeseta giddofe Museynne Aarooney deettes; Sameelikka iza sunththan woossidaytappe issaa; istti GODAAS waassida; izikka istta waaso allides.
Psalms99:7 Izi shaara tuussa giddora isttas haasaydes; istti izi immida maaraanne woga naagida.
Psalms99:8 Abeet GODAWU
Psalms99:9 GODAA nu Xoossaa dhoqqu dhoqqu histtite; iza geeshsha zuma bollan izas goynnite; ays giikko GODAA nu Xoossay geeshsha Xoossa.
Psalms100:1 Sa7an de7iza as ubbay GODAAS ufayssan ililite.
Psalms100:2 GODAAS ufayssan haggazite; ufayssa yeththara iza sinth shiiqite.
Psalms100:3 GODAY Xoossa gididayssa erite; nuna medhdhiday iza; nuni izayta; nuni iza asati izi heemmiza dorsa wudeta.
Psalms100:4 Iza penge galatara
Psalms100:5 Ays giikko GODAY kiya; iza siiqoy mernaassa; iza ammaneteththay yeletappe yeleta gakkanaassa.
Psalms101:1 Tani ne siiqo gishshassinne tuma pirda gishshas yexxana; abeet GODAWU! Tani nees galata mazamure yexxana.
Psalms101:2 Tani suure oge kaallana; neni taakko awude yaanee? Tani ta keeththan suureteththan daana.
Psalms101:3 Tani ta ayfera iita miish xeellike; Xoossafe kare kezida asata ooso ixxays; tani isttara mulekka zuppetikke.
Psalms101:4 Wozina geellati taappe haakketto; iitateththara taas gaytoteththi deenna.
Psalms101:5 Geeman ba lagge zigirzayssa tani sirphi ooththana; otorettizayssinne ceeqettiza as tani co7u ga aggike.
Psalms101:6 Istti tanara daana mala biitta bolla de7iza ammanettizayta tani lo7o ayfen xeellays. Suureteththan hemettiza asi taas haggazana.
Psalms101:7 Cimo ooththizay oonikka ta keeththan deenna; wordo haasayzay ta sinththan eqqenna.
Psalms101:8 Biittan de7iza iita as ubbaa tani hach hach dhayssana; iita ooththizayta ubbaa tani GODAA katamappe dhoqalla dhayssana.
Psalms102:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta woosa siya; ta waasoy neekko gakko.
Psalms102:2 Ta metotida gallas ne sinththa taappe genththofa; ne hayththa taakko zaara; tani neekko waassiza wode taas eeson alla.
Psalms102:3 Ays giikko ta layththay cuwa mala dhayees; ta meqeththaykka tama bonqo mala eexxees.
Psalms102:4 Ta wozinay away labida maata mala handes; taas qoodhey kath ixxides.
Psalms102:5 Taas oole daroppe dendoyssan meqeththi xalla attides.
Psalms102:6 Tani bazzon diza biya kafo woykko laalettida keeththan de7iza gutto mala.
Psalms102:7 Tani ichchiin dhiskoy yeenna; tani keeththa hu7en barkka uttida kafo mala gidadis.
Psalms102:8 Ta morkketi ubbaa gallas tana cayeettes; tana iiseththizayti ta sunth qanggettida mala qoodida.
Psalms102:9 Tani bidinth dhiille mala qam7adis; ta afunththaaka ushshara walakka uyadis.
Psalms102:10 Ne hanqo gaasoninne ne bosha gaason ne tana pude denththoosoppe duge oladasa.
Psalms102:11 Ta de7o layththay omarsa wode kuwa mala; tani maata mala meladis.
Psalms102:12 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! Neni kawoteththa araatan mernaas uttadasa; ne sunththayka yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas hassa7ettana.
Psalms102:13 Neni Xiyoonis kiyateth ooththiza wodey gakkida gishshassinne wodezikka ha7i gidida gishshas neni dendada izis qadhettana.
Psalms102:14 Ne oosanchchati izan diza shuchchata doseettes; budhettida biittaska qadhetteettes.
Psalms102:15 Kawoteththati GODAA sunththaas yayyana; sa7a kawoti ubbay iza bonchchana.
Psalms102:16 GODAY Xiyoono zaari essiza wode izi ba gitateththa bessana.
Psalms102:17 Izi hiyeesata woosaa siyana; istta shoobbeka kadhenna.
Psalms102:18 Buron yelettanay GODAA galatana mala hayssi yiza yeletas xaafetto.
Psalms102:19 GODAY dhoqqan diza ba geeshsha sohoppe duge xeellides; izi saloppe duge sa7a be7ides.
Psalms102:20 Hessika qashettida asata waaso siyanaassinne hayqos pirdettida asata qashoppe birshanaassa.
Psalms102:21 Hessa gishshas GODAA sunththi Xiyoonin yootettana; iza galatay Yerusalaamen awajjettana.
Psalms102:22 Deretinne kawoti issife shiiqidi GODAAS he wode goynnana.
Psalms102:23 Izi tani naateteththan dishin
Psalms102:24 Histtiin tani
Psalms102:25 Neni beni sa7a medhdhadasa; salotikka ne kushe ooso.
Psalms102:26 Heyti ubbay dhayana; gido attiin neni minna daana; istti ubbayka afala mala wurana; neni istta carqqa mala laammana; isttika aadhdhana.
Psalms102:27 Gido attiin awudekka neni nena; ne layththay mulekka wurenna.
Psalms102:28 Nees ooththizayta nayti saroteththan daana; istta zereththayka ne sinththan minni eqqana.
Psalms103:1 Ta shemppoyee! GODAA galata! Ta kumeththa asateththay iza geeshsha sunththa galato.
Psalms103:2 Ta shemppoyee! GODAA galata! Izi nees ooththida kiyateththa ubbaa dogoppa.
Psalms103:3 Izi ne nagara ubbaa atto gees; izi ne harge ubbaafe nena paththees.
Psalms103:4 Izi nena duufon gelontta mala ashshees; mernaa siiqoninne maarotan nena anjjees.
Psalms103:5 Golle kafoththo neni ooraxana mala izi ne amo ubbaa lo7o miishshan kunththana.
Psalms103:6 GODAY naaqettidaytas xillo ooththeessinne suure pirda pirdees.
Psalms103:7 Izi ba oge Muse bessides; ba oosokka Isra7eele asaa erisides.
Psalms103:8 GODAY qadhettizaadenne maarizaade; izi hanqettanaas eesotonttaade; iza siiqoy keehippe daro.
Psalms103:9 Izi ubba wode nu mooros mootenna; mernaaskka hanqettenna.
Psalms103:10 Izi nu nagara mala nuus ooththibeenna; nu iitateththaa mala nuus zaaribeenna.
Psalms103:11 Saloy sa7appe dhoqqiza mala GODAAS yayyizaytas iza siiqoy gita.
Psalms103:12 Arshey mokkizasoppe wullizasoy haakkiza mala GODAY nu mooroza nuuppe haassides.
Psalms103:13 Aaway ba naytas qadhettiza mala GODAY baas yayyizaytas qadhettees.
Psalms103:14 Nuni aazappe medhettidaakko izi erees; nuni biitta gididayssaka izi akeekees.
Psalms103:15 Asa de7oy gidikko maata mala; izi bazzo ciishsha mala ciiyees.
Psalms103:16 Carkoy carkiza wode qoqofetti dhayees; izi kase dizasoy mulekka erettenna.
Psalms103:17 Gido attiin GODAAS yayyizaytas iza siiqoy mernaappe mernaa gakkanaassa; iza xilloteththayka yeletappe yeleta gakkanaassa.
Psalms103:18 Hessi hananay iza caaqo qaala naagizaytassinne iza azazo polanaas minettizaytassa.
Psalms103:19 GODAY ba araataa salon essides; iza kawoteththay ubbaa haarees.
Psalms103:20 Intteno iza kiitanchchatoo! Iza azazo poliza wolqqamatoo! Izi gizayssa ezgizaytoo! GODAA galatite.
Psalms103:21 Intteno salon de7iza minotoo! Iza shene ooththiza aylletoo! GODAA galatite.
Psalms103:22 Intteno izi haariza soho ubbaan de7iza medhetatoo! ubbayka GODAA galatite. Ta shemppoyee! GODAA galata.
Psalms104:1 Ta shemppoyee! GODAA ta Xoossa galata! Abeet GODAA ta Xoossawu! Neni ay keena gitaa! Neni bonchchonne teema may7adasa.
Psalms104:2 Neni afala mala poo7o quma7adasa; salotakka dunkaane mala toladasa.
Psalms104:3 Ne keeththaa salo gufanththo bollan keexxadasa; shaara nees para-gaare kessadasa; carko qefe toggada baasa.
Psalms104:4 Neni carkota ne kiitanchcha
Psalms104:5 Neni sa7a yochcha bolla essadasa; izi meri mernaaskka qaaxxenna.
Psalms104:6 Wogga gita abba biitta bollan afala mala miccadasa; haaththika gita zumata kammides.
Psalms104:7 Gido attiin ne seeriin haaththati kichchida; ne azazo siyidi eeson baqatida.
Psalms104:8 Istti gita zumatappe duge shoobbata wodhdhida; neni isttas giigsidaso goggida.
Psalms104:9 Haaththati simmidi biitta kammontta mala
Psalms104:10 Neni pulttota shoobban pulttisaasa; haath zumata giddora duge gogissaasa.
Psalms104:11 Bazzo do7ati ubbay izappe uyeettes; harididatikka saamos izappe uyi aleettes.
Psalms104:12 Salo kafoti haaththaa matan bantta keeththa keexxeettes; miththa haggata giddonkka yexxeettes.
Psalms104:13 Neni gita zumata bollan saloppe ira bukisaasa; biittaaka ne kushe ooso ayfen kunththadasa.
Psalms104:14 Neni mehes maata
Psalms104:15 Asa wozina ufayssiza woyne
Psalms104:16 GODAA miththati
Psalms104:17 Isttan kafoti bantta keeth keexxeettes; zigiletikka ziga bolla keexxidi de7eettes.
Psalms104:18 Dhoqqa zumata bollan Wushati de7eettes; qasse guppaleti shuchcha gongolon qotetteettes.
Psalms104:19 Wodaa qooda erisanaas neni agina medhdhadasa; arshey ba wulliza wode erees.
Psalms104:20 Neni dhuma ehiza wode sa7ay qammees; wora do7atikka kezidi woxeretteettes.
Psalms104:21 Wodalla gaammoti maana miishshas waasseettes; istti banttas miza miish Xoossafe koyeettes.
Psalms104:22 Arshey mokkiza wode guye simmidi bantta aqoson ichcheettes.
Psalms104:23 He wode asi ba oosos kezees; sa7ay qammana gakkanaas ooththees.
Psalms104:24 Abeet GODAWU! Ne oosoy ay keena daroo! Ne aadho erateththan neni istta ubbaa medhdhadasa; ne medhdhida medhetati biitta kumida.
Psalms104:25 Hanna abbaya gitanne aaho; qooday baynda qaaxxiza medheteththati
Psalms104:26 Izi bollan markabeti simeretteettes; qasse neni medhdhida Lewataane geetettiza miiminttey izin kaa7ees.
Psalms104:27 Koshshiza wode ne isttas mizaaz immana mala istti ubbay neekko xeelleettes.
Psalms104:28 Neni isttas immida wode istti shiishsheettes; neni ne kusheppe yeggiin istti lo7o miish kalleettes.
Psalms104:29 Neni ne sinththa genththiza wode dagammeettes; ne istta shemppo ekkiza wode hayqqeettes; duge biittankka simmi geleettes.
Psalms104:30 Gido attiin neni isttas ne ayana kiittida wode harati medhetteettes; biittaaka ooraxissaasa.
Psalms104:31 GODAA bonchchoy mernaas de7o; GODAY ba ooson ufayetto.
Psalms104:32 Izi biitta xeelliin biittay qaaxxees; qasse izi zumata bochchiin zumati cuwatteettes.
Psalms104:33 Tani de7iza layth ubbaan GODAAS yexxana; tani shemppora paxa de7ida wode ubbaan ta Xoossas yexxana.
Psalms104:34 Tani GODAAN ufayettiza gishshas ta wozina qofay iza ufaysso.
Psalms104:35 Nagaranchchati biittafe dhayetto; hayssafe sinththas iitati dooppetto. Ta shemppoyee! GODAA galata! GODAA galata!
Psalms105:1 GODAA galatite; iza sunththa xeygite; izi ooththida oosota kawoteththata erisite.
Psalms105:2 Izas ginxo giigsite; galata yeththika yexxite; malalisiza iza ooso ubbaa yootite.
Psalms105:3 Geeshsha sunththan izayssan ceeqettite; GODAA koyzayta wozinay ufayetto.
Psalms105:4 GODAANNE iza wolqqa xomosite; ubbato iza sinththa koyite.
Psalms105:5 Intteno iza aylle Abrahaame zereththatoo! Doorettida Yaaqoobe naytoo! Izi ooththida malalisiza oosota
Psalms105:6 
Psalms105:7 Izi GODAA nu Xoossaa; iza suure pirdayka sa7a ubbaa bolla dees.
Psalms105:8 Izi ba caaqo qaala mernaas ba azazida qaala shii yeleta gakkanaas naagees.
Psalms105:9 Izi Abrahaames caaqqida caaqo qaala
Psalms105:10 Hessa Yaaqoobes woga
Psalms105:11 Qasseka
Psalms105:12 Istti qoodan qii guuththatanne Kanaane biittan bete gididi diza wode
Psalms105:13 issi dereppe hara dere
Psalms105:14 Xoossi istta oonikka qohanaas immibeenna; istta gishshas kawota seerishe
Psalms105:15 «Tani tiydayta bochchofte; nabeta qohopite» gides.
Psalms105:16 GODAY biittaa bolla kosha yeddides. Istta kath ubbaa dhayssides.
Psalms105:17 Gido attiin izi ba asaa ashshanaas isttafe sinththan aylleteththas bayzettida Yooseefe kiittides.
Psalms105:18 Iza tohoti kaatenan waaxettida; izi sansalatan qashettides.
Psalms105:19 Izi kase yootidayssi polettana gakkanaas GODAA qaalay iza paaccides.
Psalms105:20 Kawoy as kiittidi iza birshisides; deraa haarizayssi qasho keeththafe kessides.
Psalms105:21 Kawozi iza ba keeththas goda ooththides; baas diza ubbaa aqota bolla shuumides.
Psalms105:22 Hessika shuumeta maarara kaaleththana malanne gita asata aadho erateth tamaarsana mala sunththides.
Psalms105:23 Hessafe guye Isra7eeley Gibxe gelides; Yaaqoobey Kaame biittan bete as gididi de7ides.
Psalms105:24 GODAY ba asaa keehi corasides; istta morkketappe istta aaththi minththides.
Psalms105:25 Izi Gibxe asay ba asaa ixxana malanne ba aylleta bolla dendana mala ooththides.
Psalms105:26 Hessafe guye ba aylle Musenne ba doorida Aaroone isttako kiittides.
Psalms105:27 Istti Gibxe asata sinththan Xoossa malaata
Psalms105:28 GODAY dhuma kiittidi he biitta dhumisides; gido attiin Gibxe asati iza azazo ixxis gida.
Psalms105:29 Istta haaththa suuththan laammidi moleta wodhides.
Psalms105:30 Istta biitta ubbaa kawoza keeththaaka shodhdhey kumides.
Psalms105:31 Izi azaziin boxeynne uu7ey istta biitta ubbaa bolla shom7ushom7ides.
Psalms105:32 Istta biitta bollan ira gishshas shach wolqqanththara bukisides.
Psalms105:33 Izi istta woyne turanne balase mith ubbaa dippi histtides; istta biittan de7iza miththatakka menththereththides.
Psalms105:34 Izi azaziin booleynne qooday baynda gumbaroy kezides.
Psalms105:35 Histtidi istta gaden mokkida kath ubbaa mides; istta biittan diza cilila miish ubbaaka dippi histtides.
Psalms105:36 GODAY Gibxe deren bayrata ubbaa wodhides; koyro yelettida nayta ubbaaka dhayssides.
Psalms105:37 Hessafe guye izi Isra7eele asaa worqqanne bira alleqora kessides; istta giddofe kundidi attiday ooninne baawa.
Psalms105:38 Gibxe asati isttas daro yayyida gishshas istti kezi bishin ufayettida.
Psalms105:39 Xoossay istta kammanaas shaara miccides; omars isttas poo7isanawu tama giigsides.
Psalms105:40 Istti miza miish oychchiin kuracho misatiza kafota isttas yeddides; istta salo quma kalisides.
Psalms105:41 Izi zaalla phalqiin haaththi pulttides; shaafa malakka duge bazzo goggides.
Psalms105:42 Izi ba aylle Abrahaames caaqqida geeshsha qaala hassa7ides.
Psalms105:43 Izi ba asaa ufayssan
Psalms105:44 Izi isttas hara kawoteththata biitta immides; histtiin istti harati daaburi kessida kaththa ayfe laattida.
Psalms105:45 Hessa izi ooththiday istti izi woththida maara naaganaassa; iza wogaakka polanaassa. GODAA galatite!
Psalms106:1 GODAA galatite! Izi kiya gidida gishshas
Psalms106:2 GODAY ooththida wolqqama ooso yootanaas
Psalms106:3 Pirday geellattontta mala naagizaytinne ubba wode xillo ooththizayti anjjettidayta.
Psalms106:4 Abeet GODAWU! Neni ne asaa maaddiza wode tana qoppa; istta neni ashshiza wode tanakka alla.
Psalms106:5 Hessika ne doorida asaas sa7ay kiyiin tani beyana mala
Psalms106:6 Nuni nu aawata mala nagara ooththidos; mooronne iita ooththidos.
Psalms106:7 Nu aawati Gibxen de7iza wode
Psalms106:8 Gidikkoka izi ba sunththaa gishshas
Psalms106:9 Izi Zo7o abba seerides; abbayka melides; bazzon kaaleththizayssa mala ciimma giddora istta kaaleththidi pinththides.
Psalms106:10 Izi istta ixxizayta kusheppe ashshides; morkketa kusheppe istta wozzides.
Psalms106:11 Istta morkketa haaththi mittides; isttafe issoyka attibeenna.
Psalms106:12 He wode Isra7eeleti iza qaala ammanida; iza yeththan sabbida.
Psalms106:13 Gidikkoka istti izi ooththoyssa heerakka dogida. Iza zore naagontta bantti koyidayssa ooththida.
Psalms106:14 Istti bazzo biittan keehi amottida; qasse mela biittankka Xoossa paaccida.
Psalms106:15 Hessa gishshas izi istti woossidayssa immides; gido attiin istta shemppos gilqateth kiittides.
Psalms106:16 Asati bazzon dunkaani dishe Musenne GODAAS dummatida aylle Aaroone qanaatida wode
Psalms106:17 biittay doyettidi Daataane mittides; Abraame iza keeththa asatara moogides.
Psalms106:18 Qasse istta maabaraa giddon tamay eexxiin
Psalms106:19 Korebe Zuman de7ishe worqqa seerisidi mara misle medhdhida; histtidi he mislaas goynnida.
Psalms106:20 Istti bantta bonchcho Xoossaa maata miza miiza mislen laammida.
Psalms106:21 Istti banttana ashshida Xoossa dogida; izi Gibxen gita ooso
Psalms106:22 Kaame biittankka malalisizayssanne Zo7o abban
Psalms106:23 Hessa gishshas Xoossi istta dhayssana gides; gido attiin dhayssontta mala iza hanqoza zaaranaas Xoossi doorida Musey giddon eqqides.
Psalms106:24 He lo7o biittayo kadhida; Hessafe guye iza qaalan ammanettibeettenna.
Psalms106:25 Istti bantta Dunkaaneza giddon zuuzumidanne GODAA qaalas azazettontta ixxida.
Psalms106:26 Hessa gishshas istti bazzon kundi dhayana mala
Psalms106:27 Istta zereththati kawoteththata giddon olettanayssanne istti biitta gaxa gakkanaas laalettanayssa yootides.
Psalms106:28 Hessafe guye istti Ba7aali-Pe7ooren diza eeqas goynnizaytara issife gayttida; shemppoy baynda eeqatas yarshettida yarshoza mida.
Psalms106:29 Istti bantta ooson GODAA hanqeththida; histtiin istta giddon iita hargey wodhdhides.
Psalms106:30 Gido attiin Finihaasi dendidi istta mooroza pirdiin iita hargey istta bollafe kichchides.
Psalms106:31 Hessika yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas mernaas izas xilloteth gididi qoodettides.
Psalms106:32 Mariiba pultto matan GODAA hanqeththida; istta gaason Muse bolla metoy gakkides.
Psalms106:33 Ays giikko istti Muse yiillosida; histtiin iza doonappe bessontta qaalay ke7ides.
Psalms106:34 GODAY dhayssite giin istti Kanaane asata dhayssibeettenna.
Psalms106:35 He palaappe istti he kawoteththatara geletti ekettidi walakettidanne istta de7o woga kaallida.
Psalms106:36 Xoossa asati istta eeqas goynnida; hessika isttas woximade gidides.
Psalms106:37 Istti bantta attumanne macca nayta daydanththatas yarshida.
Psalms106:38 Istti xillo suuth Kanaane eeqatas yarshida; bantta attumanne macca nayta suuth gussida; he suuththan biittay tunides.
Psalms106:39 Hessaththo istti bantta ooson tunidanne layma maccassa mala bantta Xoossas ammanettontta ixxida.
Psalms106:40 Hessa gishshas GODAA hanqoy iza asaa bolla eexxi ke7ides; izi bayta harassettides.
Psalms106:41 Izi istta hara kawoteththata kushen aaththi immides; istta morkketi istta haarida.
Psalms106:42 Istta morkketi istta naaqqidanne bantta shenen ayssida.
Psalms106:43 Izi istta daroto ashshides; gido attiin istta makkallas gixxi kezida; bantta nagara gaason dhayda.
Psalms106:44 Gidikkoka istti waassida waasoza siyidi istta waayeza qoppides.
Psalms106:45 Istta gishshas ba caaqo qaala hassa7ides; aggontta ba siiqo daron istta maarides.
Psalms106:46 Istta di7ida ubbay isttas qadhettana mala ooththides.
Psalms106:47 Abeet GODAWU Nu Xoossawu! Nuna ashsha. Nuni ne geeshsha sunththa galatana mala kawoteththata giddofe nuna shiishsha.
Psalms106:48 GODAY
Psalms107:1 Izi kiyanne iza siiqoy mernaas gidida gishshas GODAA galatite.
Psalms107:2 GODAY istta wozzidayti
Psalms107:3 arshey mokkizasoppenne wullizasoppe
Psalms107:4 Isttafe issoti issoti bazzo biittan toylattida; ba de7iza katama efiza oge demmanaas dandaybeettenna.
Psalms107:5 Istti gafidanne saamettida; keehippe daaburda.
Psalms107:6 Istti metotida wode GODAAKKO waassida; izikka istta waayezappe ashshides.
Psalms107:7 Istti de7ana katama gakkanaas
Psalms107:8 Mernaa iza siiqozassinne izi asas ooththida malalisiza miishshatas istti GODAA galatetto!
Psalms107:9 Ays giikko izi saamettidayta ushshi alisees; gafidaytakka lo7o miishshan kalssees.
Psalms107:10 Isttafe issoti issoti birata sansalatan qashettidi waayettizayta; sakkanna dhuma giddonkka uttidayta;
Psalms107:11 Gaasoykka istti Xoossa qaala bolla makkallidanne Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossa zore kadhida.
Psalms107:12 Hessa gishshas wolqqa ooson istta ixeththides; istti daaburiin istta maaddizay dhaydes.
Psalms107:13 Istti metotida wode GODAAKKO waassida; izikka istta waayezappe ashshides.
Psalms107:14 Sakkanna dhumappe istta kessides; istti qashettida sansalatakka duusereththides.
Psalms107:15 Mernaa iza siiqozassinne izi asas ooththida malalisiza miishshatas istti GODAA galatetto.
Psalms107:16 Ays giikko izi xarqimalappe oosettida penge menththides; birata kolatatakka qanxxereththides.
Psalms107:17 Isttafe issoti issoti ba makkallateththa gaason eeya gidida; ba nagara gaasonkka meton gelida.
Psalms107:18 Istta qoodhey kath ixxiin hayqqana matida.
Psalms107:19 Istti metotida wode GODAAKKO waassida; izikka istta waayezappe ashshides.
Psalms107:20 Izi ba qaala kiittidi istta paththides; duufo doonappeka istta ashshides.
Psalms107:21 Mernaa iza siiqozassinne izi asaas ooththida malalisiza miishshatas istti GODAA galatetto.
Psalms107:22 Istti izas galata yarsho yarshetto; qasseka ufayssa yeththan izi ooththida ooso qonccisetto.
Psalms107:23 Isttafe issoti issoti markaben gita abba giddora bida; he gita abba bolla bantta ooso ooththida.
Psalms107:24 Istti GODAA ooso be7ida; izi ciimma garsan ooththida malalisiza oosota xeellida.
Psalms107:25 Izi azaziin gote carkoy dendides; histtiin abba dambalay qaaxxides.
Psalms107:26 Istti pude salo kezida; simmidikka duge ciimman gelida; istta gakkida metoppe dendoyssan istta wozinay taahides.
Psalms107:27 Istti maththottida asa mala yiicotidi gandigarda; isttas akeekiza wozinaykka dammides.
Psalms107:28 Istti metotida wode GODAAKKO waassida; izikka istta waayezappe ashshides.
Psalms107:29 Izi gote carkoza co7u histtides; abba dambalakka sirphi histtides.
Psalms107:30 Co7u gida gishshas istti ufayettida; istti amottiza wodeben gaththides.
Psalms107:31 Mernaa iza siiqozassinne izi asas ooththida malalisiza miishshatas istti GODAA galatetto.
Psalms107:32 Istti iza dere duulatan dhoqqu dhoqqu histtetto; qasse cimata shiiqon iza galatetto.
Psalms107:33 Shaafata mulera melissides; pulttoti pulttontta mala teqqides.
Psalms107:34 Heen de7iza asaa iitateththaa gaason aradda biittayo aykko dolisontta maxine biitta ooththides.
Psalms107:35 Izi bazzon haath eelissides mela biittan pulttoy dhuuqqana mala ooththides.
Psalms107:36 Gafidayta heen woththides; isttika banttas de7ana katama keexxida.
Psalms107:37 Istti bantta goshshan zerida; woyne tokkida; daro kath shiishshida.
Psalms107:38 Izi istta anjjiin istti keehi corattida; istta mehetakka guuththibeenna.
Psalms107:39 Meton
Psalms107:40 GODAY halaqata kawushshides; ogey baynda bazzon toylattana mala istta ooththees.
Psalms107:41 Gido attiin izi metotanchchata istta waayeppe kessides; dorsa wude mala cora naytakka isttas immides.
Psalms107:42 Suure asati hessa be7idi ufayetteettes; gido attiin geellata doonay gordettana.
Psalms107:43 Era asi ha yo7oza ba wozinan woththo; izikka GODAA maaroteth akeeko.
Psalms108:1 Abeet Xoossawu! Ta wozinay mino; tani nees kumeththa wozinappe yexxananne nena sabbana.
Psalms108:2 Ta diiththinne maasinqoy dendite! tanikka maalado wonttara dendana.
Psalms108:3 Abeet GODAWU! Tani deraa giddon nena galatana; qasse kawoteththata giddon nees saban yexxana.
Psalms108:4 Ne siiqoy gita; salotappeka aadhdhees. Ne ammaneteththayka pude salo gakkees.
Psalms108:5 Abeet Xoossawu! Salotappe bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu ga! Ne bonchchoy biitta ubbaa gakko.
Psalms108:6 Neni siiqizayti attana mala ne ushachcha qesen nuna ashsha; ta woosa siya.
Psalms108:7 Xoossi ba geeshshasohon dishe
Psalms108:8 Gala7aadey tayssa; Minaaseykka tayssa; Efreemey ta hu7en woththiza birata qoobe; Yuhuday ta kawoteththa guufe.
Psalms108:9 Mo7aabey taas meechchaso; Eedoomey tayssa gididayssa erisanaas tani ta caamma iza bolla woththays; tani Filisxeeme xoonada gererays» gides.
Psalms108:10 Gimbettida katamaakko tana oonee efanay? Eedoome gakkanaas tana oonee kaaleththanay?
Psalms108:11 Abeet Xoossawu! Nuna aggiday nena gidikkii? Neni nu olanchchatara kezikke gadasa.
Psalms108:12 Asa maadoy hada; hessa gishshas nu morkketa bolla nuus xoono imma.
Psalms108:13 Xoossi nunara gidikko nuni morkketa xoonana; izi nu morkketa ba tohon yedhdhana.
Psalms109:1 Abeet tani galatiza Xoossawu! Neni taas co7u gooppa.
Psalms109:2 Iitatinne wordanchchati ba doona ta bolla doyda; ta bollaka wordo haasayda.
Psalms109:3 Istti ixo qaalara tana giddoththida; gaasoykka baynda tana keehi qohida.
Psalms109:4 Tani istta siiqishin istti tana mootida; gido attiin ta woossays.
Psalms109:5 Tani lo7o ooththiin taas iita zaarida; ta istta siiqiin tana ixxida.
Psalms109:6 Iza bolla iita daanna shuuma; iza mootizaykka iza ushachchan eqqo.
Psalms109:7 Pirdason izi mooranchcha gidi beetto; iza woosaykka izas simmidi gometo!
Psalms109:8 Iza layththi qaammo; iza shuumeteththaaka haray ekko!
Psalms109:9 Iza nayti aawa dhaydi yi7otetto; iza machcheyakka am7o gidu!
Psalms109:10 Iza nayti yuuyi yuuyidi woossetto; ha7i ba diza laalettida keeththafekka goodettetto!
Psalms109:11 Iza aqota ubbaa aco aaway laatto; izi daaburdi kessida ubbaa allagay bonqqo!
Psalms109:12 Oonikka iza maaroppo; woykko yi7o gidida naytas qadhettizay dooppo!
Psalms109:13 Iza nayti ubbay dhayetto; kaalliza yeletan iza sunththi dogetto.
Psalms109:14 Iza aawata nagaray GODAA sinththan qofetto; iza aayey nagaray mulekka qucettofo!
Psalms109:15 Istta nagaray GODAA sinththan ubbato beetto; istta akeekissiza miishshi biitta bolla dooppo.
Psalms109:16 Gaasoykka izi manqidaade
Psalms109:17 Izi qangganaas dosiza gishshas izi qanggetto! Izi anjjanaas dosontta gishshas izappe haakkides!
Psalms109:18 Qanggeth may7o mala may7ides; haaththa mala izas bollan gelides; zayte malakka meqeththa giddo gelides.
Psalms109:19 Afala mala iza kammo; saqqe mala ubba wode iza xeessan de7o!
Psalms109:20 Hayssi tana mootizaytassinne ta bolla iita haasayzaytas GODAY immiza woyto gido!
Psalms109:21 Gido attiin abeet Ubbaafe Dhoqqa GODAWU! ne sunththa gishshas tana lo7o ayfen xeella; ne siiqoy lo7o gidida gishshas tana ashsha.
Psalms109:22 Tani hiyeesanne metotanchcha asa; ta wozinay madunxides.
Psalms109:23 Tani omarsa wode kuwa mala dhayana hanays; boole malakka qoqofettadis.
Psalms109:24 Xoomishin ta gulbatey daaburdes; ta ashoy gilqidi meqeth attides.
Psalms109:25 Ta morkketas tani qilcciza miish gidadis; istti tana be7idi ba qoodhe qaaththeettes.
Psalms109:26 Abeet GODAWU ta Xoossawu! Tana maadda; ne mernaa siiqo mala tana ashsha.
Psalms109:27 Abeet GODAWU! Hayssa ne kushey ooththidayssanne neni polidayssa ta morkketi eretto.
Psalms109:28 Istti tana qanggeettes; neni gidikko tana anjjaasa; ta bolla dendizayti yeellatana; gido attiin tani ne aylley ufayettana.
Psalms109:29 Tana mootizayti kawushshateth may7etto; bantta yeellaaka kuta mala quma7etto.
Psalms109:30 Tani ta inxarsan GODAA keeha galatana; daro derey shiiqida duulatan iza sabbana.
Psalms109:31 Gaasoykka istta bolla hayqo pirda pirdizaytappe ashshanaas manqotappe ushachcha baggara izi eqqees.
Psalms110:1 GODAY ta Godaas
Psalms110:2 GODAY nees maata guufe Xiyooneppe kiittana; nenikka morkketa haarana.
Psalms110:3 Neni ne morkketara olettiza gallas ne olanchchati ba shenen ne millen eqqana; wontta maalado awa mala geeshshateththan phoollashe ne naateteththa asay neekko yaana.
Psalms110:4 GODAY
Psalms110:5 GODAY ne ushachchan dees; izi ba hanqo gallas kawota tinchchereththana.
Psalms110:6 Kawoteththata bolla izi pirdana; ola wosanatakka aha xalla histtana; sa7an ubbaan diza kawota izi menththereththana.
Psalms110:7 Kawozi oge lanqen diza haaththa pulttofe uyidi
Psalms111:1 GODAA galatite! Suureta shiiqoninne dere duulatan tani kumeththa wozinappe GODAA galatana.
Psalms111:2 GODAA oosoti ay keena gitaa! Isttan ufayettizayti ubbay istti yuushshi qoppanaas bessees.
Psalms111:3 Iza oosoti bonchchoninne teeman kumidayta; iza xilloteththika mernaas dees.
Psalms111:4 Izi ba malalisiza oosota hassa7ettana mala ooththides. Izi kiyanne maariza GODAA.
Psalms111:5 Baas yayyizaytas kath immees; ba caaqo qaalaakka mernaas qoppees.
Psalms111:6 Allagata biitta ba deraas immidi ba mino oosoza ba kawoteththaa bessides.
Psalms111:7 Iza oosoti tumanne suure; iza wogatikka ubbay ammanettizayta.
Psalms111:8 Istti mernaas eqqi de7izayta; tumateththaninne suureteththan imettida.
Psalms111:9 Izi ba asaas atoteth immides; ba caaqo qaalakka isttas mernaas azazides; iza sunththi geeshshinne yashissizaaza.
Psalms111:10 Aadho erateththas koyroy GODAAS yashshateththa; iza azazo ooththizaytas lo7o akeekay dees. GODAY mernaas galatetto!
Psalms112:1 GODAY galatetto! GODAAS yayyiza asi
Psalms112:2 Iza nayti biittan wolqqama gidana; suure asata yeletay anjjettana.
Psalms112:3 Aqotaynne dureteththi iza keeththan dees; iza xilloteththayka mernaas de7ana.
Psalms112:4 Kiya
Psalms112:5 Kiyateththan coo tal7iza asas
Psalms112:6 Xillo asi awudenne kundenna; mernaas izi hassa7ettishe de7ana.
Psalms112:7 Iita miishshi iza daganththenna; ays giikko iza wozinay hirgenna; GODAAN ammaneettes.
Psalms112:8 Iza wozinay mino; mulekka yayyenna; wurseththan ba morkketa kundeth izi be7ana.
Psalms112:9 Izi hiyeesatas kiyateththan immees; qasse iza xilloteththay mernaas dees; iza kacey bonchchon dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana.
Psalms112:10 Iita asi hessa be7idi yiillotees; ba achchaa garccishe coo gilqi dhayees; iitata amoy hada gidana.
Psalms113:1 GODAY galatetto! Intteno GODAA oosanchchatoo! GODAA galatite! Iza sunththaaka sabbite!
Psalms113:2 GODAA sunththi hachchife mernaa gakkanaas galatetto!
Psalms113:3 Arshey mokkizasoppe biidi wullizaso gakkanaaska GODAA sunththi galatetto!
Psalms113:4 GODAY kawoteththata ubbaafe gita; iza bonchchoyka salotappe dhoqqa.
Psalms113:5 GODAA nu Xoossa malay oonee? Izi bolla dhoqqan kawoteththa araatan uttides.
Psalms113:6 Izi salotaninne sa7an dizayta duge xeellees.
Psalms113:7 Izi hiyeesa gudullafe dhoqqu dhoqqu histtees; metotanchchaka bidinththafe denththees.
Psalms113:8 Histtidi istta gita asataranne dere shuumetara issife utisees;
Psalms113:9 Mayneyo nayta aayo ooththees; bonchchidikka izison izo ufayssan woththees; GODAY galatetto!
Psalms114:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe kezida wode
Psalms114:2 Yuhuda asay Xoossas geeshsha as gidides; Isra7eele asaykka izas haarettides.
Psalms114:3 Zo7o abbay hessa be7idi baqatides; Yordaanoose shaafaykka guye simmides.
Psalms114:4 Zumati dharsho mala guferettida; zumbullatikka dorsa laaqqa mala xikkida.
Psalms114:5 Abbazoo! Ne ays baqatadii? Yordaanoose shaafazoo! Ays guye simmadii?
Psalms114:6 Intteno zumatoo! Dharsho mala ays guppidetii? Intteno zumbullatoo! Dorsa laaqqa mala ays xikkidetii?
Psalms114:7 Hanne biittayee! Godaa sinththan Yaaqoobe Xoossa sinththan kokkora.
Psalms114:8 Izi zaalla eele haath kessides; wolqqama zaalla pultto haath kessides.
Psalms115:1 Abeet GODAWU! Nu gishshas gidontta ne siiqo gishshassinne ne ammaneteththa gishshas ne sunththaa bonchcha.
Psalms115:2 Kawoteththati ays
Psalms115:3 Nu Xoossay salon dees; izi ba dosidayssa ubbaa ooththees.
Psalms115:4 Gido attiin istta eeqa xoossati birappenne worqqafe asa kushen oosettidayta.
Psalms115:5 Isttas doonay dees shin haasayettenna; ayfeykka dees shin demmettenna.
Psalms115:6 Isttas hayththi dees shin siyettenna; siidheykka dees shin singettenna.
Psalms115:7 Isttas kushey dees shin bochchettenna; tohoykka dees shin hemettettenna; istta poorandey cenggurs kessenna.
Psalms115:8 Istta medhdhizaytinne isttan ammanettizayti ubbay istta mala gidetto.
Psalms115:9 Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! GODAAN ammanettite! Izi inttes gondallenne inttena maaddizaade.
Psalms115:10 Intteno Aaroone zereththatoo! GODAAN ammanettite! Izi inttes gondallenne inttena maaddizaade.
Psalms115:11 Intteno GODAAS yayyizaytoo! GODAAN ammanettite! Izi inttes gondallenne inttena maaddizaade.
Psalms115:12 GODAY nuus qoppees; izi nuna anjjana; izi Isra7eele asatanne Aaroone zereththatakka anjjana.
Psalms115:13 GODAAS yayyizayta ubbaa guuth gidiin gita izi anjjana.
Psalms115:14 GODAY inttenakka intte naytakka darso!
Psalms115:15 Salonne sa7a medhdhida GODAY inttena anjjo!
Psalms115:16 Saloti Xoossassa; gido attiin sa7a asa naytas immides.
Psalms115:17 Hayqqidi duge duufon gelidayti GODAA galatanaas dandayettenna.
Psalms115:18 Gido attiin nuni shemppora paxa dizayti hachchife doommidi mernaa gakkanaas GODAA galatana. GODAY galatetto!
Psalms116:1 Izi ta shoobba woossiza woosa siyida gishshas tani GODAA dosays.
Psalms116:2 Izi ba hayth taakko yeggida gishshas tani de7iza wode ubbaan iza xeygana.
Psalms116:3 Hayqoy woximade mala tana dooddi oykkides; duufon geloy tana hirgisides. Ceeceynne un7oy tana toli oykkides.
Psalms116:4 He wode tani
Psalms116:5 GODAY kiyanne xillo; nu Xoossay maarizayssa.
Psalms116:6 GODAY ashketa naagees; tani metotida wode izi tana ashshides.
Psalms116:7 Ta shemppoyee ane woppu ga; GODAY nees lo7o miish ooththides.
Psalms116:8 GODAY tana hayqoppe
Psalms116:9 Hessa gishshas tani GODAA sinththan shemppora paxa dizayta giddon hemettays.
Psalms116:10 Ta
Psalms116:11 Taas gizaazi dhayiin
Psalms116:12 Izi taas kiyida kiyateththaa gishshas tani GODAAS ay qanxxanaas dandayazinaa?
Psalms116:13 GODAY tana ashshida gishshas woyne ushshu galatas shiishshada iza sunththu xeygana.
Psalms116:14 Iza deraa ubbaa sinththan tani adinida adina GODAAS gaththana.
Psalms116:15 Geeshshata hayqoy GODAA sinththan bonchcho.
Psalms116:16 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne aylle; tani ne aylley naa; tana qashoppe birshadasa.
Psalms116:17 Abeet GODAWU! Tani galata yarsho nees yarshana; histtada ne sunththaa xeygana.
Psalms116:18 Iza deraa ubbaa sinththan tani adinettida adina GODAAS gaththana.
Psalms116:19 Hessaka tani gaththanay
Psalms117:1 Kawoteththati ubbay GODAA galatite! Ubba asay iza galatan sabbite!
Psalms117:2 Ays giikko izi ba gita siiqo nuna bessides; iza ammaneteththayka mernaassa; GODAY galatetto!
Psalms118:1 Izi kiyanne iza siiqoy mernaas gidida gishshas GODAA galatite!
Psalms118:2 Isra7eele asay
Psalms118:3 Aaroone zereththati
Psalms118:4 GODAAS yayyizayti ubbay
Psalms118:5 Tani un7ettida wode GODAAKKO waassadis; histtiin izi ta waasoza allidi tana un7ofe kessides.
Psalms118:6 GODAY tanara diza gishshas tani yayyike. Asi tana ay ooththanee?
Psalms118:7 GODAY tana maaddanaas tanara dees; ta morkketa xooneteththaa tani ayfen be7ana.
Psalms118:8 Asan ammaneteththafe GODAAN ammaneteththay lo7o.
Psalms118:9 Daannatan ammaneteththafe GODAAN ammaneteththay lo7o.
Psalms118:10 Kawoteththati ubbay tana dooddida; gido attiin GODAA sunththan tani istta xoonadis.
Psalms118:11 Istti tana ubbasora dooddi oykkida; gido attiin GODAA sunththan tani istta xoonadis.
Psalms118:12 Istti tana maththi dooddiza mala dooddida; gido attiin agunththi eexxiza mala eexxi dhayda; GODAA sunththan tani istta xoonadis.
Psalms118:13 Tana sugiin kundanaas gandigaradis; gido attiin GODAY tana maaddides.
Psalms118:14 GODAY taas minoteththinne yeththa; tana ashshizay iza.
Psalms118:15 Xillota dunkaane giddon xoono ililisinne ufayssa yeththi
Psalms118:16 GODAA ushachcha kushey dhoqqu dhoqqu gides! GODAA ushachcha kushey wolqqama miish ooththides.
Psalms118:17 Tani hayqqike shemppora paxa de7ana; GODAY ooththida ooso buroppeka awajjana.
Psalms118:18 GODAY tana keehi qaxxaydes; gido attiin hayqos aaththi immibeenna.
Psalms118:19 Tani giddo gelada GODAA galatana mala xilloteththa pengeta ane taas doyte!
Psalms118:20 Hayssi GODAA penge; izara xilloti xalla gelana.
Psalms118:21 Neni taas siyida gishshassinne xoono immida gishshas tani nena galatays.
Psalms118:22 Gimbizayti kadhidi ixxida shuchchay gulas hu7en woththiza shuch gidides.
Psalms118:23 Hayssika GODAA ooso; qasse nu ayfesikka malalisiza miishsha.
Psalms118:24 Hayssi gallassay GODAY ooththida gallassa; ane nuni izan ufayettoossinne ililoos.
Psalms118:25 Abeet GODAWU! Ha7i nuna ashsharkkii! Abeet GODAWU! Ha7i nuus injjesarkkii!
Psalms118:26 GODAA sunththan yiza asi anjjettidayssa gido! Nuni GODAA Keeththan inttena anjjoos.
Psalms118:27 GODAY Xoossa; izi nuus poo7isides; cilila miththa haggata oykkite; yarsho yarshizasoza bolla diza kacetakko gakkanaas kezite; ba7aale bonchchite.
Psalms118:28 Neni ta Xoossa; tani nena galatana; Neni ta Xoossa; tani nena gitasana.
Psalms118:29 Izi kiya gidida gishshas GODAA galatite! Iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms119:1 Bantta ogen borey bayndaytinne GODAA wogga mala hemettizayti anjjettidayta.
Psalms119:2 Izi yootidayssa ooththizaytinne ba kumeththa wozinappe iza koyzayti anjjettidayta.
Psalms119:3 Istti makkalla miish ooththettenna; GODAA ogen hemetteettes.
Psalms119:4 Ne woga ammanettidi naagana mala neni nuna azazadasa.
Psalms119:5 Ne woththida woga naaganaas ta ogey minnana mala ta amottays.
Psalms119:6 Ne azazota ubbaa ta lo7eththa akeekikko mulekka yeellatikke.
Psalms119:7 Ne xillo pirda tani tamaarda keena suure wozinappe nena galatana.
Psalms119:8 Tani ne woththida maarata naagana; tana mulekka yeggofa.
Psalms119:9 Naateththi ba oge geeshshateththan wostti naaganaas dandayzee? Ne qaalay giza mala de7ikko dandayees.
Psalms119:10 Tani ta kumeththa wozinappe nena koyays; ne azazotappe kare kezontta mala tana naaga.
Psalms119:11 Tani ne bolla nagara ooththontta mala ne qaala ta wozinan qottadis.
Psalms119:12 Abeet GODAWU! Neni galatetta! Ne maara tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:13 Ne doonappe keziza maara ubbaa tani ta inxarsan yootays.
Psalms119:14 Asi ba dureteththan ufayettiza mala tani neni immida maara kaallashe ufayettays.
Psalms119:15 Ne woththida wogata yuushsha qoppays; ta wozinakka ne ogetan woththadis.
Psalms119:16 Ne awajjay tana ufayssees; ne qaalaakka tani dogikke.
Psalms119:17 Tani shemppora paxa de7ana malanne ne qaalas azazettana mala
Psalms119:18 Ne woga giddon diza malalisiza tumateththa tani be7ana mala ta ayfe doya.
Psalms119:19 Tani ha sa7an imaththa; ne azazota taappe genththofa.
Psalms119:20 Ta shemppoya ubba wode ne maara demmanaas keeha laamotadus.
Psalms119:21 Ne azazozappe kare kezizayta
Psalms119:22 Ta neni yootidayssa naagida gishshas istta cashshanne kadheza ta bollafe digga.
Psalms119:23 Dere kaaleththizayti ubbati ta bolla maqettikokka tani ne aylley ne awajjata yuushsha qoppana.
Psalms119:24 Ne markkateththati tana ufaysseettes; isttika tana zoreettes.
Psalms119:25 Ta shemppoy kezana hanees; neni gida qaala mala tana ashsha.
Psalms119:26 Tani ta oge ubbaa nees qonccisadis; neni taas siyadasa; ne awajjata tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:27 Ne maara tana akeekissa; malalisiza ne ooso ta yuushsha qoppana.
Psalms119:28 Ta shemppoya ceecey darida gishshas daaburadus; neni gida qaala mala tana minththa.
Psalms119:29 Baleththiza oge taappe haassa; ne kiyateththan ne woga tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:30 Tani tumaa oge dooradis; ne wogaakka ta wozinan woththadis.
Psalms119:31 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne yootidayssa minththa oykkadis; ne tana yeellas aaththa immofa.
Psalms119:32 Neni ta wozina aassida gishshas tani ne azazo ogen woxxays.
Psalms119:33 Abeet GODAWU! Ne awajjata tana tamaarsa; tani wurseththi gakkanaas iza naagana.
Psalms119:34 Tani ne woga naagana malanne kumeththa wozinappe izas azazettana mala neni taas akeeka imma.
Psalms119:35 Ne azazoy tana ufayssees; hessa gishshas ne ogen tana kaaleththa.
Psalms119:36 Ta wozina bessontta go7as gidontta ne maara polana mala zaara.
Psalms119:37 Paththontta miish xeellontta mala ta ayfeta naaga; ne qaala mala ta de7o ooraxissa.
Psalms119:38 Nees yayyana mala ne gelida qaala taas ne ayllezas pola.
Psalms119:39 Ne pirday suure gidida gishshas tani yayyiza kawushshateththafe tana naaga.
Psalms119:40 Tani ne woga naaganawu amottays; neni xilloteththan ta de7o ooraxissa.
Psalms119:41 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaa siiqoy taakko haa yo; neni gida qaala mala tana ashsha.
Psalms119:42 Tani ne qaalan ammanettays; tana cayizaytaska tani zaaro immana.
Psalms119:43 Tani ne wogan hidota ooththadis; tuma qaala ta doonappe dhayssofa.
Psalms119:44 Tani meri mernaaskka ne wogaas ubba wode azazettana.
Psalms119:45 Tani ne woga siiqiza gishshas la7an simerettana.
Psalms119:46 Tani kawota sinththan eqqada neni yootidayssa yootashe yeellatikke.
Psalms119:47 Tani ne azazota dosays; isttankka ufayettays.
Psalms119:48 Tani siiqiza ne azazota bonchchays; ne awajjata yuushsha qoppana.
Psalms119:49 Neni taas ne ayllezas immida qaala qoppa; hessa gishshas tani he qaalan hidota ooththays.
Psalms119:50 Ne qaalay taas de7o immides; hessi meto wode tana minththeththees.
Psalms119:51 Otoranchchati tana keehi kadhida; gido attiin tani ne wogappe sher7i giikke.
Psalms119:52 Abeet GODAWU! beniisofe diza ne woga tani qoppadis; hessan tani minettays.
Psalms119:53 Iitati ne wogas azazettonttayssa be7ada keeha hanqettadis.
Psalms119:54 Tani imaththateththan de7iza biittan ne wogay taas mazamure gidides.
Psalms119:55 Abeet GODAWU! Tani giddoth ne sunththaa qoppays; ne wogaakka naagays.
Psalms119:56 Ta ne wogaas azazettana; hessi taas ooso gidides.
Psalms119:57 Abeet GODAWU! Ta qaaday nena; tani ne qaalas azazettanaas qachchadis.
Psalms119:58 Tani kumeththa wozinappe nena koyays; neni gida qaala mala taas qadhetta.
Psalms119:59 Tani ta oge xomosa xeelladis; ne maara kaallanaas simmadis.
Psalms119:60 Tani ne azazo naaganaas eesotanaappe attiin takkike.
Psalms119:61 Iitati tana oykkana gite yeggida; tani gidikko ne woga dogabeekke.
Psalms119:62 Ne xillo woga gishshas ta nena galatanaas giddoth dendays.
Psalms119:63 Tani nees yayyizayta ubbaassinne ne woga naagizaytas lagge.
Psalms119:64 Abeet GODAWU! Sa7ay ne mernaa siiqon kumides; ne awajjata tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:65 Abeet GODAWU! Ne gida qaala mala taas ne ayllezas lo7o ooththadasa.
Psalms119:66 Tani ne azazota ammanays; lo7o pirdanne erateth tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:67 Ta qaxxayettanaappe kase ne wogappe kare kezadis; ha7i tani ne qaalas azazettana.
Psalms119:68 Neni lo7o; ne oosoykka lo7o; hessa gishshas ne awajjata tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:69 Otoranchchati ta sunththaa wordora moorida; gido attiin tani ne woga ta kumeththa wozinappe naagays.
Psalms119:70 Istta wozinay mulekka dammides; gido attiin tani ne wogan ufayettays.
Psalms119:71 Tani qaxxayettidayssi taas lo7o gidides; ne woga taamarana mala tana maaddides.
Psalms119:72 Daro shii birappenne worqqafe ne doonappe ke7ida wogay taas aadhdhees.
Psalms119:73 Tana ne kushey medhdhidessinne giigsides; ne azazo tani taamarana mala taas akeeka imma.
Psalms119:74 Tani ne qaala hidota ooththadis; hessa gishshas nees yayyizayti tana be7idi ufayetetto.
Psalms119:75 Abeet GODAWU! Ne pirday xillo gididayssanne neni tana qaxxayday ammaneteththan gididayssa tani erays.
Psalms119:76 Neni taas ne ayllezas gelida qaala mala ne mernaa siiqoy tana minththeththo.
Psalms119:77 Ne wogay tana ufayssiza gishshas tani shemppora paxa de7ana mala taas qadhetta.
Psalms119:78 Otoranchchati tana wordon mootiza gishshas yeellatetto. Tani gidikko ne wogata yuushsha qoppays.
Psalms119:79 Nees yayyizaytinne ne azazo erizayti ubbay haa taakko simmetto.
Psalms119:80 Tani yeellatontta mala ne maaran ta wozinay borey bayndaaz gido.
Psalms119:81 Ne tana ashshana mala ta shemppoya keeha laamotadus; tanikka ne qaala hidota ooththadis.
Psalms119:82 «Ayde tana minththeththandeesha?» guussan ne immida hidota qaala ta naagishin ta ayfey doljumides.
Psalms119:83 Cuwan kaqqida lukkamo mala gidadis; gidikkoka ne awajjata balabeekke.
Psalms119:84 Tani ne aylley awude gakkanaas daanee? Tana yedeththizayta bolla neni awude pirdanee?
Psalms119:85 Ne woga naagontta otoranchchati tana dhayssanaas olla bookkeettes.
Psalms119:86 Ne azazoti ubbay ammanettizayta; asay gaasoy baynda yedeththiza gishshas tana maadda!
Psalms119:87 Istti tana biittafe dhayssana gakkida; gido attiin tani ne woga aggabeekke.
Psalms119:88 Ne mernaa siiqon ta de7o ooraxissa; tanikka ne azazota naagana.
Psalms119:89 Abeet GODAWU! Ne qaalay mernaasa; izikka salon minni dees.
Psalms119:90 Ne ammaneteththay yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas dees; neni sa7as yochcha yeggadasa; izikka minnidi dees.
Psalms119:91 Neni gida mala ubbayka hach gakkanaas minnidi dees; ays giikko ubbatikka ne aylleta.
Psalms119:92 Ta metotida wode dhayaychchana shin ne wogay taas ufays gidides.
Psalms119:93 Ne azazoti tana shemppora paxa woththida gishshas tani mulekka istta dogikke.
Psalms119:94 Tani neessa; tana ashsharkkii! tani woga naaganawu koyays.
Psalms119:95 Iitati tana dhayssanawu zamadidi naageettes; gido attiin neni yootidayssa tani yuushsha qoppays.
Psalms119:96 Polo gidida miish ubbaas zaway dizayssa tani be7adis; gido attiin polo gidida ne azazotas zaway deenna.
Psalms119:97 Tani ne woga ay keena siiqazinaa! Gallas kumeth tani iza yuushsha qoppays.
Psalms119:98 Ne azazoti ubba wodekka tanara diza gishshas ta morkketappe aaththidi tana akeekanchcha histtida.
Psalms119:99 Ne woththida woga yuushsha qoppiza gishshas tana tamaarsida ubbaafe wozinama gidadis.
Psalms119:100 Tani ne azazota kaalliza gishshas cimatappe bollara akeekiza as gidadis.
Psalms119:101 Tani ne qaalas azazettanaas koyza gishshas ta toho iita oge ubbaafe naagadis.
Psalms119:102 Neni tana tamaarsida gishshas tani ne wogappe sher7i gabeekke.
Psalms119:103 Ne qaalay ay mala mal7izee! Eessa ililoppeka aadhdhidi doonan mal7ees.
Psalms119:104 Ne wogappe akeeka demmadis; hessa gishshas tani geella oge ubbaa ixxadis.
Psalms119:105 Ne qaalay ta tohos xomppe; ta ogeska poo7o.
Psalms119:106 Ne xillo woga naaganaas tani caaqqida caaqoza minththana.
Psalms119:107 Abeet GODAWU! Ta keeha metotadis; Neni gida qaala mala tana shemppora paxa woththa.
Psalms119:108 Abeet GODAWU! Ta doonappe keziza galata yarshoza ne ekka; ne woga tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:109 Ta shemppoya ubba wode meto bolla dawus; tani gidikko ne woga balabeekke.
Psalms119:110 Iitati tana oykkanaas woximade woththida; gido attiin tani ne wogappe sher7i gabeekke.
Psalms119:111 Ne immida wogay taas mernaas laata; ta wozinay izan ufayettees.
Psalms119:112 Ta hayqqana gakkanaas ne immida azazo polanaas qaala geladis.
Psalms119:113 Tani wozina ballata ixxays; gido attiin ne woga siiqays.
Psalms119:114 Neni taas gondallenne baqata attizaso; tani ne qaala hidota ooththays.
Psalms119:115 Tani ta Xoossaa azazo naagana mala intteno iita ooththizaytoo! Taappe haakkite!
Psalms119:116 Neni gida qaala mala tana kaafa; histtiko tani shemppora paxa de7ana; ta hidotay hada gidiin tana yeellasoppa.
Psalms119:117 Ne tana kaafa oykka; histtiko ta saron de7ana; tani ubba wode ne awajjata polana.
Psalms119:118 Ne wogappe kare kezidayta ubbaa yegga aggadasa; istti baleththoninne wordon ooththida ubbay hada gidana.
Psalms119:119 Sa7an de7iza iitata ubbaa neni buura mala yegga aggaasa; hessa gishshas tani ne immida azazo dosadis.
Psalms119:120 Ta ashoy nees yayyidi kokkorees; takka ne pirdas yayyays.
Psalms119:121 Tani suurenne xillo miish ooththadis; tana un7eththizaytas aaththa immofa.
Psalms119:122 Taas ne aylleza lo7eteththas waase gida; tana otoranchchatan un7eththofa.
Psalms119:123 Ta ayfeti ne ashshizayssanne ne xillo qaala naagishe doljumida.
Psalms119:124 Taas ne aylles ne siiqoza keena ooththa; ne woga tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:125 Tani ne aylle; ne wogaa ta erana mala taas akeeka imma.
Psalms119:126 Abeet GODAWU! Ne immida wogay moorettishe dees; neni pirdana wodeya hanno.
Psalms119:127 Tani ne azazo worqqafe aaththada siiqays; muuruta worqqafekka aaththada dosays.
Psalms119:128 Ne wogati ubbay tumu gididayssa ammanadis; hessa gishshas geella oge ubbaa ixxadis.
Psalms119:129 Ne yootida qaalay ubbay malalisees; hessa gishshas ta shemppoya iza naagawus.
Psalms119:130 Ne qaala birsheththay poo7o immees; akeekay paccidaytas akeeka immees.
Psalms119:131 Tani ne qaala saamettadis; ta doonakka doyada yeemottays.
Psalms119:132 Haa taakko simma; ne sunththa siiqizayta ubbaas neni ooththizayssa mala taaska qadhetta.
Psalms119:133 Ta hemeta ne qaala mala suurisa; nagaray haarana mala tana aaththa immofa.
Psalms119:134 Tani ne azazo naagana mala tana un7eththizayta kusheppe wozza.
Psalms119:135 Taas ne ayllezas ne ayfeso poo7isa; ne awajjata tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:136 Ne wogay bonchchettontta gishshas ta afunththi haaththa mala goggees.
Psalms119:137 Abeet GODAWU! Neni xillo; ne pirdayka likke.
Psalms119:138 Ne immida azazoti xillonne ammanththizaaza.
Psalms119:139 Ta morkketi ne qaala toochchida; histtiin ne qaala mishay ta gomppan tama mala eexxides.
Psalms119:140 Ne qaalay paacetti geeyidaaza; tani ne aylley iza siiqays.
Psalms119:141 Tani laafanne kadhettida asa; gidikkoka tani ne woga dogabeekke.
Psalms119:142 Ne xilloteththay mernaas dees; ne wogaykka tuma.
Psalms119:143 Metoynne tuggay tana gakkides; gido attiin ne azazoti tana ufaysseettes.
Psalms119:144 Neni yootidayssi mernaaskka xillo; tani shemppora paxa daana mala ne taas akeeka imma.
Psalms119:145 Abeet GODAWU! Tani Kumeththa wozinappe neekko waassadis; tana alla. Tani ne awajjatas azazettana.
Psalms119:146 Tani neekko waassays; ne tana ashsha; tani ne immida azazoza naagana.
Psalms119:147 Bazzoy zo7ontta wonttara dendada
Psalms119:148 Ne qaala yuushsha qoppashe omars kumeth ayfe qiphontta utta aqays.
Psalms119:149 Abeet GODAWU! Ne siiqo keena ta qaala siya; ne woga mala tana shemppora paxa woththa.
Psalms119:150 Gene qoppizayti taakko shiiqida; heytikka ne wogappe haakki dizayta.
Psalms119:151 Abeet GODAWU! Neni gidikko ta matan daasa; ne azazoti ubbayka tuma.
Psalms119:152 Ne istta mernaas minththa essadasa; hessa tani benippe doommada ne wogappe tamaaradis.
Psalms119:153 Ta tuggaa beyada tana ashsha; ays giikko tani ne woga dogabeekke.
Psalms119:154 Ne ta gishshas mootettada tana wozza; ne gida qaala mala tana shemppora paxa woththa.
Psalms119:155 Iitati ne woga koyontta gishshas isttas atoteththi deenna.
Psalms119:156 Abeet GODAWU! Ne qadhetay daro; ne qaala mala tana shemppora paxa woththa.
Psalms119:157 Ta morkketinne tana yedeththizayti daro; gido attiin tani ne yootida qaalaappe sher7i gabeekke.
Psalms119:158 Ne azazota naagontta gishshas ta ammanettonttayta beyada shaatettadis.
Psalms119:159 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne woga dosizaakko be7a; ne siiqo mala tana shemppora paxa woththa.
Psalms119:160 Ne qaala ubbay tuma; ne xilloteththa wogay mernaassa.
Psalms119:161 Dere haarizayti tana coo yedeththida; gido attiin ta wozinay ne qaalas yayyees.
Psalms119:162 Daro miish di7ida asi ufayettiza mala neni gida qaalan tani ufayettays.
Psalms119:163 Tani wordo ixxayssinne shaatettays; gido attiin ne woga siiqays.
Psalms119:164 Ne xillo pirda gishshas tani nena gallassan laappunto galatays.
Psalms119:165 Ne woga siiqizaytas daro saroteththi dees; istta dhuphiza miishshi deenna.
Psalms119:166 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ne atoteththaa ufayssan naagays; ne azazotakka polays.
Psalms119:167 Tani ne yootida qaala naagays; ta iza daro siiqays.
Psalms119:168 Tani ne wogassinne ne yootida qaalas azazettana; ta oge ubbay ne sinththan qoncce.
Psalms119:169 Abeet GODAWU! Ta waasoy neekko gakko; neni gida qaala mala taas akeeka imma.
Psalms119:170 Ta shoobeththi pude ne sinth gakko; neni gida qaala mala tana ashsha.
Psalms119:171 Ne awajjata tana tamaarsadasa; hessa gishshas ta metershatappe galatay pulttees.
Psalms119:172 Ne azazoti ubbay xillo; hessa gishshas ta doonay ne qaala yexxo.
Psalms119:173 Tani ne azazota dooradis; hessa gishshas ne kushey tana maaddanaas giigi utto.
Psalms119:174 Abeet GODAWU! Ne atoteththa ta laamotays; ne wogay tana ufayssees.
Psalms119:175 Tani nena galatana mala tana shemppora paxa woththa; ne wogay taas maado gido.
Psalms119:176 Dhayda dorsa mala tani toylattadis; gido attiin tani ne woga balabeekke; hessa gishshas tana ne aylleza koya.
Psalms120:1 Tani metotida wode GODAA xeygadis; izikka taas koyides.
Psalms120:2 Abeet GODAWU! Wordotiza metershatappenne cimmiza inxarsatappe tana ashsha.
Psalms120:3 Intteno wordanchchatoo! Izi inttena wosttanee? hessafe hara intte bolla ay ooththanee?
Psalms120:4 Izi inttena hoxe tooran caddana; izi inttena bonqo taman xuuggana.
Psalms120:5 Ta Mesheeke deraa giddon days; Qeedaare dunkaanenkka uttida gishshas taas aayye ana!
Psalms120:6 Saroteth ixxiza asatara tani daro wode de7adis.
Psalms120:7 Tani saro koyays; gido attiin tani saro haasayza wode istti oosh koyeettes.
Psalms121:1 Tani
Psalms121:2 Taas maadoy salonne sa7a medhdhida GODAAPPE yees.
Psalms121:3 Izi ne toho hallixissenna; nena naagizayssi dhiskenna.
Psalms121:4 Isra7eele naagizayssi mulekka ichchennanne dhiskenna.
Psalms121:5 GODAY nena naagizayssa; GODAY nees ushachcha baggara kuwa gidana.
Psalms121:6 Gallassa away nena xuuggenna; omarsa aginaykka nena qohenna.
Psalms121:7 GODAY iita ubbaafe nena naagana; ne shemppo heemmana.
Psalms121:8 GODAY ne buussaanne yuussaa hachchife mernaa gakkanaas naagana.
Psalms122:1 Istti tana
Psalms122:2 Hanne Yerusalaame katamayee! Nuni ne pengetara gelidi eqqidos.
Psalms122:3 Yerusalaame katamaya danxxetta keexettida mino katama.
Psalms122:4 Isra7eeles imettida woga mala Isra7eele qommoti GODAA sunth galatanaas hee baana.
Psalms122:5 Dawite zereththafe kawotidayti pirdanaas heen uttida.
Psalms122:6 Yerusalaame saroteththas
Psalms122:7 Ne gimbeta giddon saroy de7o! Ne kawoteththa keeththan woppay kumo» gi woossite;
Psalms122:8 Ta dabbota gishshassinne laggeta gishshas «Ne giddon saroy do!» gays.
Psalms122:9 GODAA nu Xoossa Keeththa gishshas gaada tani nees lo7o amo amottana.
Psalms123:1 Nenoo salo araatan uttidayssoo! Tani neekko pude xeellays.
Psalms123:2 Ashkaray ba godaa kushe xeelliza mala
Psalms123:3 Abeet GODAWU! Nu bolla kadhey darida gishshas maararkkii! Nuna maara.
Psalms123:4 Ceeqettizaytappe daro cashshi otoranchchatappe daro kadhey nuna gakkides.
Psalms124:1 Isra7eeley
Psalms124:2 Nu morkketi nu bolla dendida wode GODAY nunara bayndaako
Psalms124:3 istta hanqoy nu bolla tama mala eexxida wode istti nuna paxa mittanashin.
Psalms124:4 Haaththi nuna ekki baanashin; di7oy nuna mittanashin.
Psalms124:5 Kixa haaththi nuna maanashin» getto.
Psalms124:6 Nuna nu morkketa achchan puuzisontta ashshida GODAY galatetto.
Psalms124:7 Nuni shankkanchchata narxafe kafoy kessi ekkiza mala kessi ekkidos; Yardey duuxxides nunikka kessi ekkidi attidos.
Psalms124:8 Salonne sa7a medhdhida GODAA sunththan nuus maadoy yees.
Psalms125:1 GODAAN ammanettizayti mernaas qaaxxontta diza Xiyoone Zuma mala.
Psalms125:2 Zumati Yerusalaame katama yuushon diza mala hachchife mernaa gakkanaas GODAY ba deraa yuushon dees.
Psalms125:3 Xilloti iitateth tamaarontta mala iitati haarishe xillota biittan gam7ettenna.
Psalms125:4 Abeet GODAWU! Lo7o asatassinne wozina suure asatas ne lo7o ooththa.
Psalms125:5 Gido attiin kase ba geella oge simmizayta neni iita ooththizaytara issife gaththa qaxxaya; Isra7eeles saroy gido!
Psalms126:1 GODAY nuna di7ettidayta zaaridi Xiyoone ehida wode nuus agumo misatides.
Psalms126:2 He wode nu doonay miichchan kumides; nu inxarsika ufayssa mazamure yexxides; histtiin kawoteththati bantta giddon
Psalms126:3 Tumukka GODAY nuus gita miish ooththides; nunikka keehi ufayettidos.
Psalms126:4 Abeet GODAWU! Negebe Bazzon ira bukisada shaafa haaththan kunththiza mala nu duussa ooraththa.
Psalms126:5 Yeekkishe zeridayti ufayssan yexxishe shiishshana.
Psalms126:6 Zereth tookkidi yeekkishe bidayti mirqqeta tookkidi ufayssan yexxishe simmana.
Psalms127:1 GODAY keeth keexxontta aggiko keexxizayti coo mela daabureettes; GODAY katama naagontta aggiko naagizayti coo mela dafetteettes.
Psalms127:2 Neni aqota demmanaas maalado wonttara denda woxxikonne giddoth gakkanaas ne daaburkko hessi wurikka hada; GODAY ba siiqizaytas shemppo immees.
Psalms127:3 Nayti GODAAPPE imettiza imotata; naytikka tumappe iza woyto.
Psalms127:4 Asi naateththan dishe yeliza attuma nayti olanchcha kushen diza yiishsha mala.
Psalms127:5 Iza kohoti he yiishshatan kumiday anjjettidaade. Izi katama pengen ba morkketara marshettiza wode shatumettenna.
Psalms128:1 GODAAS yayyizaytinne iza ogen hemettizayti ubbay anjjettidayta.
Psalms128:2 Neni ne daabura ayfe maana; ne anjjettananne nees injjetana.
Psalms128:3 Ne machchiya neson ayfiza woyne mala gidana; ne naytikka ne maadda yuushon wogara puute mala gidana.
Psalms128:4 GODAAS yayyiza asi hessaththo anjjettana.
Psalms128:5 GODAY nena Xiyooneppe anjjo! Neni de7ida layth ubbaan Izi nena Yerusalaame lo7eteth besso!
Psalms128:6 Izi nena nayta nayta gaththi besso! Isra7eeles saroy gido!
Psalms129:1 Isra7eele asay
Psalms129:2 Tumappe istti tana yelagateththafe doommidi daro wode un7eththida; gido attiin istti tana xoonibeettenna.
Psalms129:3 Ta zokko xurqafen shoci shocidi worxafettida gade misatissida» go.
Psalms129:4 Gido attiin GODAY xillo; iitata wodoro duusereththidi tana birshi yeddides.
Psalms129:5 Xiyoone ixxiza ubbay yeellatidi guye simmo!
Psalms129:6 Keeththa kaara bolla mokkidi heerakka meliza maata mala gido!
Psalms129:7 Hessi buucizaytas kushe kumontta maata mala woykko mirqqizaytaskka danke kumontta kaththa mala.
Psalms129:8 He ogera aadhdhizayti
Psalms130:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ciimma meto giddon dashe neekko waassays.
Psalms130:2 Abeet Godawu! Ta cenggurssa siya; tani shoobbizayssa ne hayththati ezgetto.
Psalms130:3 Abeet GODAWU! Neni nu nagara kaaletta kaaletta mazgabidaakko abeet Godawu oonee ne sinththan eqqi dandayanee?
Psalms130:4 Gido attiin nuni nena bonchchana mala neni nu nagara atto gaasa.
Psalms130:5 Tani GODAA laamotan naagays; ta shemppoya dandayan naagawus; iza qaalaakka hidota ooththawus.
Psalms130:6 Zabeti sa7ay awude wonttaneesha giidi naagizayssafekka bolla tani Goda laamotan naagays.
Psalms130:7 GODAA achchan siiqoynne maaroteththi diza gishshas Isra7eele asawu! GODAAN hidota ooththite.
Psalms130:8 Izi Isra7eele asaa istta nagara ubbaafe ashshana.
Psalms131:1 Abeet GODAWU! Ta wozinay otorettibeenna; tani otoron xeella erikke; ta qofan bessontta gitateththas amottabeekke; ta wolqqafe bollara zaradhdhabeekke.
Psalms131:2 Dhanth duuxxida nay ba aayi ki7on co7u gi uttiza mala
Psalms131:3 Isra7eele asawu! Hachchife doommidi mernaa gakkanaas GODAAN hidota ooththite.
Psalms132:1 Abeet GODAWU! Dawitenne izi dandayda metoza ubbaa ne qoppa.
Psalms132:2 GODAWU! Izi nees caaqqida qaala
Psalms132:3 Izikka
Psalms132:4 dhiskoka dhiskike; ta ayfetakka liiphikke.
Psalms132:5 Hessika tani GODAAS duussaso
Psalms132:6 Hekko nuni Taabotaza gishshas Efraatan dishe siyidos; Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime biittan iza demmidos.
Psalms132:7 Nuni
Psalms132:8 «Abeet GODAWU! Denda! Ne minoteththas malata gidida Taabotaara ne Keeth gelada shempa.
Psalms132:9 Ne qeeseti xilloteth may7etto; geesh gidida ne asati ililetto» gidos.
Psalms132:10 Ne aylle Dawite gishshas gaada neni tiydayssa yeggofa.
Psalms132:11 GODAY Dawites qanththafe caaqqides; laamettontta qaalan
Psalms132:12 Ne nayti ta caaqo qaalanne tani tamaarsida qaala istti naagikko istta naytikka ne kawoteththa araatan mernaas uttana» gi caaqqides.
Psalms132:13 GODAY Xiyoono doorides; baas de7izaso ooththanaas amottidi
Psalms132:14 «Hanna taas mernaas shempposo gidana; tani izo dosida gishshas izin de7ana.
Psalms132:15 Tani izo keeha anjjana; izin de7iza manqotakka kath kalssana.
Psalms132:16 Tani izin diza qeeseta atoteth mayzana; izin de7iza Xoossa asatikka ufayssan yexxana.
Psalms132:17 «Ha sohon Dawite zereththafe kawo kessana; tani tiydayssas poo7o giigsana.
Psalms132:18 Tani iza morkketa yeellachchana; gido attiin iza hu7aan de7iza kawoteththa kallachchay phoollana» gides.
Psalms133:1 Ishantti issifeteththan de7izayssi ay mala lo7onne ay mala ufayssizaazee!
Psalms133:2 Hessi Aaroone hu7en tigiin buuchchaara biidi iza may7o macara gakkanaas goggidi sawo tunnu giza al7o zayte mala.
Psalms133:3 Qasseka Hermoone zumatappe duge Xiyoone Zumbullata bolla xokkiza xaaza mala; GODAY hessan anjjonne de7o mernaas azazides.
Psalms134:1 Intteno GODAA aylletoo! GODAA Keeththan omars ooththizaytoo! ubbayka haa yiidi GODAA galatite.
Psalms134:2 Xoossa Keeththan intte kushe denththidi GODAA galatite.
Psalms134:3 Salonne sa7a medhdhida GODAY inttena Xiyooneppe anjjo.
Psalms135:1 Intteno GODAA aylletoo! Iza galatite! GODAA sunththa sabbite!
Psalms135:2 Intteno GODAA Keeththan ooththizaytoo! Intteno nu Xoossa Keeththa zagon eqqidayto galatite!
Psalms135:3 Izi kiya gidida gishshas GODAA galatite! Izi lo7o gidida gishshas iza sunththaas yexxite!
Psalms135:4 GODAY Yaaqoobe baas buzo ooththides; Isra7eelekka baas al7o miish histti doorides.
Psalms135:5 GODAY gita gididayssanne nu GODAY xoossata ubbaafe dhoqqizayssa tani erays.
Psalms135:6 Saloninne sa7an
Psalms135:7 Kareththa shaara sa7a gaxappe izi denththees; izi irara wolqqanth kiittees; ba minjji woththidasoppe carko kessi yeddees.
Psalms135:8 Gibxe biittan asappe biidi mehe gakkanaas bayra yelettida ubbaa wodhides.
Psalms135:9 Nenoo Gibxe! Paaroone bollanne iza oosanchchata bolla ooraththinne malalisiza miish yeddides.
Psalms135:10 Izi daro kawoteththata dhayssides; wolqqama kawotakka wodhides.
Psalms135:11 Amooreta kawo Sihoone
Psalms135:12 Istta biittaaka ba deraa Isra7eele laatissides.
Psalms135:13 Abeet GODAWU! Ne sunththi mernaas daana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas neni hassa7ettana.
Psalms135:14 GODAY ba asaas pirdana; izi ba aylletaskka qadhettana.
Psalms135:15 Kawoteththati goynniza eeqa xoossati birappenne worqqafe asa kushen oosettidayta.
Psalms135:16 Isttas doonay dees shin haasayettenna; ayfey dees shin xeellettenna.
Psalms135:17 Hayththi dees shin siyettenna; istta siidhen peenoykka deenna.
Psalms135:18 Istta medhdhidaytinne isttan ammanettizayti ubbay istta mala gidetto.
Psalms135:19 Isra7eele derezoo! GODAA galatite; Aaroone keeththa asatoo! GODAA sabbite;
Psalms135:20 Lewe keeththa asatoo! GODAA galatite; GODAAS yayyizaytoo! Ubbay GODAA galatite.
Psalms135:21 Yerusalaamen de7iza GODAY Xiyoonen galatetto! GODAY galatetto!
Psalms136:1 GODAA galatite! Izi kiya; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:2 Xoossata Xoossa galatite! iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:3 GODAA galatite! iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:4 Izi xalla gita malalisiza miish ooththees; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:5 Ba hiillateththan salota medhdhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:6 Biittaa haaththa bollan miccides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:7 Gita poo7ota medhdhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:8 Arshey gallas poo7ana mala ooththides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:9 Aginaynne xoolintteti omars poo7isana mala ooththides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:10 Izi Gibxe biittan bayrata wodhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:11 Isra7eele asaa Gibxeppe kaaleththi kessides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:12 Ba mino kusheninne ba wolqqama qesen hayssa ooththides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:13 Zo7o abba shaakki yeggides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:14 Isra7eele asaa he abba giddora pinththides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:15 Gibxe kawonne iza olanchchata Zo7o abban mitissides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:16 Izi ba asaa bazzora kaaleththides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:17 Gita kawota shocides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:18 Wolqqama kawota wodhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:19 Amooreta kawoza Sihoone wodhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:20 Qasse Baasaane kawoza Aage wodhides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:21 Histtidi istta biitta ba asaa laatissides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:22 Ba aylle Isra7eele laatissides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:23 Nuni kawuyida wode izi nuna qoppides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:24 Nuna nu morkketappe ashshides; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:25 Medheta ubbaas mizaaz immees; iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms136:26 Salo Xoossa galatite! iza siiqoy mernaassa.
Psalms137:1 Baabiloone shaafata lanqen uttidi nuni Xiyoone qoppida wode yeekkidos.
Psalms137:2 Heen nuni nu diiththata haaththa matan dicciza miththata bolla kaqqidos.
Psalms137:3 Nuna di7ida asati nuni yexxidi istta ufayssana mala
Psalms137:4 GODAA mazamure nuni allaga biittan wostti yexxonii?
Psalms137:5 Yerusalaame katamayee! Tani nena balikko ta ushachcha kushey ba ooso balo.
Psalms137:6 Tani nena hassa7ontta aggiko ta ufayssa ubbaafe aaththada Yerusalaame dosontta aggiko ta inxarsay gonggiraththara oyketto.
Psalms137:7 Abeet GODAWU! Yerusalaamey kundiza gallas Eedoome asati ooththidayssa qoppa; istti
Psalms137:8 Hanne Baabiloone biittayee ne dhayana! Neni nu bolla polida iita ooso ne bolla zaari ooththizay anjjettidayssa.
Psalms137:9 Ne guuththa nayta oykkidi zaalla bolla dincereththizay anjjettidayssa.
Psalms138:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani ta kumeththa wozinappe nena galatays; xoossata sinththan nena sabbays.
Psalms138:2 Ne geeshsha Keeththakko simmada nena goynnays; ne siiqo gishshassinne ne ammaneteththa gishshas tani ne sunththa sabbays; neni ne sunththaanne ne qaala ubbaafe aaththada dhoqqu histtadasa.
Psalms138:3 Tani xeygida gallas taas koyadasa; ne minoteththan tana minththeththa.
Psalms138:4 Abeet GODAWU! Sa7an diza kawoti ubbay ne doonappe ke7ida qaala siyidi nena galatetto!
Psalms138:5 GODAA bonchchoy gita gidida gishshas istti izi ooththida ooso gishshas yexetto.
Psalms138:6 GODAY bolla dhoqqan diikkoka hiyeesata lo7o ayfen xeellees; gido attiin otoranchchata izi haahoppe erees.
Psalms138:7 Tani meto giddon diikkoka neni tana naagaasa; ta morkketa hanqo bolla ne qese denththaasa; ne ushachcha kushen tana ashshaasa.
Psalms138:8 GODAY taas qoppidayssa polana; abeet GODAWU! Ne siiqoy mernaassa; ne kushe ooso yegga aggofa.
Psalms139:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana pilgga eradasa.
Psalms139:2 Tani awude uttizaakkonne awude eqqizakko neni eraasa; neni ta qofa ubbaa haakoppe akeekaasa.
