Proverbs27:1 Wontoyssan ceeqettofa; wonto aazi hananaakko ne erakka.
Proverbs27:2 Nena hara asi galatoppe attiin nerkka nena galatoppa; hara asi nena sabbofe attiin neni nerkka nena sabbofa.
Proverbs27:3 Shuchchi deexo; anccoy tooko; gido attiin eeya asi denththiza ooshshi nam7atappeka deexxees.
Proverbs27:4 Sheney menxe iita; hanqoy menxe iita; qanaate sinththan eqqi dandayanay oonee?
Proverbs27:5 Geemmida siiqoppe qonccen seeriza seeray lo7o.
Proverbs27:6 Morkkey nena daroto yeeranaappe siiqoy nena dechchizayssi kiya.
Proverbs27:7 Kallida as eessa ililoy iitees; gido attiin gafida as gara mala cammiza miishshika mal7ees.
Proverbs27:8 Ba soo aggidi yuuyiza asi
Proverbs27:9 Shittoynne exaaney as ufayssizayssa mala
Proverbs27:10 Ne laggenne ne aawa lagge aggofa; nena metoy gakkiza wode ne ishaakko booppa. Haahon diza ishappe nees matan diza shooroy kiya.
Proverbs27:11 Ta naazoo! Neni aadho eranchcha gida; ta wozina ufayssa; histtiko tana kadhizayta oyshakka zaarana.
Proverbs27:12 Cincca asi metoy yiza wode be7idi qotettees; gido attiin akeekay paccida asi meto gars bi gelees; histtidi guyeppe qohettees.
Proverbs27:13 Erontta asas hurbuta geliza asa may7o qaara ekka; hawusha maccassas waase geliza asa may7o oykka.
Proverbs27:14 Maalado wonttara ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi ba shooro anjjoy qanggeththa mala qoodettees.
Proverbs27:15 Ubbaa wode oosh ooyettiza machcha ira gallas pacey baynda aaththiza keeththa mala.
Proverbs27:16 Carko teqqanaas woykko zayte cucumidi oykkanaas dandayettonttayssa mala izo co7u ooththanaas dandayettenna.
Proverbs27:17 Biratay birata qarasiza mala asikka issoy issaa qarasees.
Proverbs27:18 Balase miththayo ishalsidi naagida asi izi ayfe maana; ba godaas ooththiza asi bonchchettana.
Proverbs27:19 Haaththay heregaththo sinth bessiza mala asa wozinay izaade kando bessees.
Proverbs27:20 Hayqoynne Bashshi kalli erettenna; hessaththoka asa ayfey kallenna.
Proverbs27:21 Biraynne worqqay taman paacettidi geeyza mala asikka ba ekkiza galatan paacettees.
Proverbs27:22 Eeya as kaththa mala udulan yeggada
Proverbs27:23 Ne dorsati de7iza hanota lo7eththada era; ne wudekka wozinappe heemma.
Proverbs27:24 Ays giikko dureteththi mernaas de7enna; kallachchayka yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas minni de7enna.
Proverbs27:25 Mela maatay buucettidaappe
Proverbs27:26 dorsata iskefe neni nees may7o kessana; deyshatan nees goshsha gade shammana.
Proverbs27:27 Attida deyshata maaththi neessinne ne soo asas
Proverbs28:1 Iita asi oonikka yedeththontta baqatees; gido attiin xilloy gaammo mala wozina kumeththa.
Proverbs28:2 Derey makkalliko haarizay corattees; Gido attiin era asinne akeekiza asi woga essees.
Proverbs28:3 Hiyeesata un7eththiza daannay kath dhayssiza wolqqama ira mala.
Proverbs28:4 Woga bonchchontta asi mooranchchata sabbees; gido attiin wogaa bonchchizay istta qofa palqqees.
Proverbs28:5 Iita asatas suure pirday gelenna; gido attiin GODAAS goynnizayti ubbaaka ereettes.
Proverbs28:6 Geella as gidi uttidi dure gidanaappe borey baynda hiyeesa gideththi lo7o.
Proverbs28:7 Wogaa naagiza nay akeekanchcha; gido attiin ganjamatara zuppetizay ba aawa yeellasees.
Proverbs28:8 Bessontta dishon ba aqota dagasiza asi he aqota hiyeesas kiyiza asas shiishshees.
Proverbs28:9 Wogaa siyanaappe ba hayth wora zaariza asa woosay Xoossa harassees.
Proverbs28:10 Suureta iita oge kaaleththiza asi ba bookkida ollan kundana; gido attiin geeshsha asi lo7o miish laattana.
Proverbs28:11 Dure asi bana aadho eranchcha giidi qoppees; gido attiin akeekay de7iza hiyeesay iza paaccees.
Proverbs28:12 Xilloti xoonida wode asay ubbay ufayettees; gido attiin iitati maata oykkida wode asay baqatees.
Proverbs28:13 Ba nagara genththiza asi aacenna; gido attiin paaxizaynne nagara aggizay maarettana.
Proverbs28:14 GODAAS ubbato yayyiza asi anjjettidaade; gido attiin ba wozina dammasiza asi meton gelana.
Proverbs28:15 Hiyeesa haariza iita daannay xaaggiza gaammonne guppi oykkiza zardo mala.
Proverbs28:16 Wozinay paccida daannay menxe iitees; gido attiin bessontta go7a ixxizaadey daro layth de7ees.
Proverbs28:17 As wodhida asi hayqqana gakkanaas toylattishe dees; iza oonikka shiishshi ekkenna.
Proverbs28:18 Borey baynda hemettiza asi qohettontta attana; gido attiin geella asi issi gallas kundana.
Proverbs28:19 Ba gade goyiza mino asi kath kallees; gido attiin hada yo7o kaalliza asi manqoteththaafe ke7enna.
Proverbs28:20 Ammanettida asi keehi anjjettana; gido attiin durettanaas jaamizay qaxxayettontta attenna.
Proverbs28:21 Shaakkidi maadoy lo7enna; gido attiin asi guuththa kaththas giidi mooro ooththees.
Proverbs28:22 Uuzettiza asi durettanaas jaamees; bana hiyeesateththi oykkanayssaka erenna.
Proverbs28:23 As coo sabbiza asappe seeriza asi guyeppe dosettees.
Proverbs28:24 Ba aawappenne ba aayppe kaysidi
Proverbs28:25 Yiiqey asi oosh denththees; gido attiin GODAAN ammanettizay anjjettees.
Proverbs28:26 Banan ammanettiza asi eeya; gido attiin aadho erateththan hemettizay saron de7ees.
Proverbs28:27 Hiyeesas immiza asas paccenna; gido attiin istti be7ishe be7onttaththo hanizaade qanggeththi gakkana.
Proverbs28:28 Iita asati maata demmiza wode derey baqatees; gido attiin istti dhayza wode xilloti coratteettes.
Proverbs29:1 Daro wode seeriin ixxidi ba morge zoodisida asi hassa7ontta meqqana; hessaades paxeteththika deenna.
Proverbs29:2 Xillo asati maata oykkiza wode asay ufayettees; gido attiin iita asati biitta haariza wode asay oolees.
Proverbs29:3 Aadho erateth dosiza asi ba aawa ufayssees; gido attiin laymatara laggetizay ba aqota dhayssees.
Proverbs29:4 Tumaa pirdiza kawoy ba dere woppu histtees; gido attiin matta7e maanaas yiiqetizay ba deraa laallees.
Proverbs29:5 Ba laggezas cimo haasayza asi iza tohos woximade waaxees.
Proverbs29:6 Iita asi barkka ba nagaran oykettees; gido attiin xillo asi ufayetteessinne yexxees.
Proverbs29:7 Xillo asi hiyeesatas suure pirday pirdettana mala qoppees; gido attiin iita asi hessa mala wudukka geenna.
Proverbs29:8 Miirizayti kataman shiro denththeettes; gido attiin aadho erateththi diza asati hanqo irixiseettes.
Proverbs29:9 Aadho erateththi diza asi eeya asara pirdaso biikko eeyay hanqetteessinne qidhees; izas saroykka deenna.
Proverbs29:10 Suuth gussanaas jaamiza asati suure as ixxeettes; qasse xillo asaakka wodhanaas koyeettes.
Proverbs29:11 Eeya asi zaway baynda hanqeettes; gido attiin aadho eranchchay ba hanqo mittees.
Proverbs29:12 Dere haarizaadey wordo yo7o ekkiko iza shuumeti ubbay iita gideettes.
Proverbs29:13 Hiyeesaynne as naaqqizaades koththa miishshi dees; GODAY nam7ataska xeelliza ayfe immides.
Proverbs29:14 Issi kawoy hiyeesas suure pirdiko iza kawoteththa araatay mernaas minni daana.
Proverbs29:15 Xunduqi dishoy naytas aadho erateth immees; gido attiin yeda diccida nay ba aayo kawushshees.
Proverbs29:16 Iita asati maata oykkiza wode nagaray darees; gido attiin xilloti istta kundeththaa be7ana.
Proverbs29:17 Ne naa seera; histtiko neni saro demmana; izi nena ufayssana.
Proverbs29:18 Ajjuutay bayndason derey yeda daana; gido attiin wogaa naagiza asi anjjettidaade.
Proverbs29:19 Ashkaray coo doonan yootiin xalla erenna; yo7oy izas gelizaakkoka izi azazettenna.
Proverbs29:20 Eeson haasayza as beyay? Izappe eeya asas hidotay dees.
Proverbs29:21 Asi ba aylle naateteththafe doommidi al7ison dichchiko wurseththan izaade bolla ceecey gakkana.
Proverbs29:22 Hanqettiza asi oosh denththeththees; elle yiillotiza asi daro nagara ooththees.
Proverbs29:23 Otoroy as kawushshees; gido attiin ashketeththi bonchchisees.
Proverbs29:24 Kaysora zuppetiza asi bana ixxiza asa; qanggi caaqisishin siyishekka izi co7u gees.
Proverbs29:25 Asas yayyizayssi izaades woximade gidees; gido attiin GODAAN ammanettiza asi saron de7ees.
Proverbs29:26 Daroti dere haarizayta sinththan erettana koyeettes; gido attiin asas suure pirday GODAA achchafe beettees.
Proverbs29:27 Xilloti as baleththizayta shaatetteettes; Iitati suure asata ixxeettes.
Proverbs30:1 Hayssafe kaallidi xaafettidayssi Yaaqe naa Agurey haasayda leemisota. Agurey Itti7eelessinne Ukaalas hayssa haasaydes.
Proverbs30:2 «Tani asa ubbaafekka eeya darays; asas de7iza akeekay taas baawa.
Proverbs30:3 Tani aadho erateth tamaarabeekke; Geeshshaza gishshassika tani eriza miishshi deenna.
Proverbs30:4 Salo pude ke7idi duge wodhdhiday oonee? Carko ba kushen oykkiday
Proverbs30:5 «Xoossay yootiza qaalay ubbay tuma; Izan ammanettiza ubbaas izi gondalle.
Proverbs30:6 Iza qaala bolla aykkoka gujjofa; gujjiko izi nena seerana; neni wordanchcha gididayssaka izi qonccisana.
Proverbs30:7 «GODAWU! Tani nena nam7u miish oychchays; tani hayqqana gakkanaas istta tana diggofa.
Proverbs30:8 Tani as cimmontta malanne wordo haasayontta mala tana naaga; tana dure woykko manqo histtofa; gido attiin hachchis hachchis gidiza kath taas imma.
Proverbs30:9 Histtontta aggiko tani keeha kallada nena kaddana; ‹GODAY izi oonee?› gaana; woykko manqada kaysana; histtada tani Xoossa sunththaa caysana.
Proverbs30:10 «Nena qanggontta malanne izi qanggiin nees gometontta mala
Proverbs30:11 Ba aawa qanggizanne ba aayokka anjjontta yeletay dees.
Proverbs30:12 Tuna gidi uttidi banttana geeshsha mala qoodiza asati deettes.
Proverbs30:13 Otoron kumida asatinne as kadhidi xeelliza asati deettes.
Proverbs30:14 Hiyeesatanne metotanchchata dere giddofe dhayssanaas istta achchay mashsha mala gidida istta gaaginay biillama mala gidida asati deettes.
Proverbs30:15 «Ulos nam7u macca nayti deettes. Istti
Proverbs30:16 Hessanttika duufo
Proverbs30:17 «Ba aawa qidhiza naa ayfenne
Proverbs30:18 Tana keehi malalisiza heedzdzu miishshati deettes; oydanththozi ubbaarakka taas gelenna.
Proverbs30:19 Hessanttika golleti salora paalliza paalo
Proverbs30:20 «Layma maccassaya haniza hanoykka hessa mala. Iza muussa mawus; gido attiin midaappe guyen
Proverbs30:21 «Heedzdzu yo7otan biittay qaaxxees; oydanththoza ubbaaka tookkanaas dandayenna.
Proverbs30:22 Hessanttika aylley kawotida wode
Proverbs30:23 asi ixxida maccassaya adde gelida wodenne macca ashkariya ba godatteyo laattida wode haniza hanota.
Proverbs30:24 «Sa7a bolla oyddu guuththa medhetati deettes; gido attiin istti keehi aadho eranchchata.
Proverbs30:25 Hessanttika cunccalleti wolqqay baynda medheta; gido attiin banttas miza miish bone shiishshi dagaseettes.
Proverbs30:26 Guppaleti guuththa wolqqay de7izayta; gido attiin bantta keeth zaalla giddon keexxeettes.
Proverbs30:27 Booletas kawoy deenna; gido attiin istti ubbayka maaran maaran zatteettes.
Proverbs30:28 Zareti kushen oykkiinkka oyketteettes; gido attiin istti kawo keeththankka de7eettes.
Proverbs30:29 «Bantta maata bessishe hemettiza
Proverbs30:30 Hessanttika do7a ubbaafe wolqqamanne aykkoska yayyidi baqati erontta gaammo.
Proverbs30:31 Maccassata giddon kososi hemettiza adde kutto
Proverbs30:32 «Neni eeyada otorettidaa gidikkonne iita miish ooththanaas halchchidaa gidikko ane takki gaada qoppa.
Proverbs30:33 Maaththi bukkiin oysi ke7iza mala
Proverbs31:1 Kawo Limu7eele aaya kawo Limu7eele tamaarsida timirtey hayssafe kaallidayssa.
Proverbs31:2 «Ta naazoo! Ta uloppe wodhdhida ta naazoo! Tani adinetta yelida ta naazoo!
Proverbs31:3 Maccassan ne wolqqa wursofa; kawota bashshiza miishshan ne akata dhayssofa.
Proverbs31:4 «Limu7eele hayssi kawotas bessenna; kawoti woyne ushshu uyanaas bessenna; dere ayssizayti maththosiza ushshu yaaretanaas bessenna.
Proverbs31:5 Istti uyiza wode wogaa baletteettes; qohettidayta maata sugeettes.
Proverbs31:6 Hayqqana hanizaytas maththosiza ushshu meto bolla dizaytas woyne ushshu immite.
Proverbs31:7 Istti uyidi bantta manqoteththa dogetto; bantta tuggaka zaari qoppofetto.
Proverbs31:8 «Bantta gishshas haasayanaas dandayonttaytas neni haasaya; metotanchchata maata gishshas neni mootetta.
Proverbs31:9 Haasayada isttas suure pirda pirda; hiyeesatanne metotanchchata maata bonchchisa» gaada tamaarsadus.
Proverbs31:10 Wozinama machcho ooni demmanawu dandayzee? Iza zo7o inqqufekka keeha aadhdhawus.
Proverbs31:11 Izi keeththa aaway izo ubbaa miishshankka ammanees; izas aykkoyka paccenna.
Proverbs31:12 Iza ba de7o layth ubbaan izas lo7o attiin iita miish ooththuku.
Proverbs31:13 Dorsa iskefenne talbba buuxa ekkada
Proverbs31:14 Iza zal7anchchata markabe mala; ba kath haakko biittafe ehawus.
Proverbs31:15 Iza ba soo asas quma kaththanaassinne ba macca aylletas ooso shaakka immanaas
Proverbs31:16 Iza barkka qoppada goshsha gade shammawus; ba demmida miishshan woyne tokkawus.
Proverbs31:17 Iza minnada ba ooso polawus; izi qesetikka oosos mino.
Proverbs31:18 Iza ba oosos wodhey dizayssa akeekawus; omarsika izi xomppey to7enna.
Proverbs31:19 Iza ba liqaqan suqawus
Proverbs31:20 Iza hiyeesatas ba kushe miccawus; metotanchchatas kiyateth immawus.
Proverbs31:21 Izi soo asay ubbay ho7iza may7o may7ida; hessa gishshas iza shachchi bukkikokka hirguku.
Proverbs31:22 Hiiththan ongiza may7o ooththawus; laynonne ochcha teera misatiza may7o may7awus.
Proverbs31:23 Dere cimati dubbusha shiiqizason izi keeththa aaway bonchchettida asa.
Proverbs31:24 Laynoppe seelo may7ota ooththada bayzawus; zal7anchchataskka dancco dadda shiishshawus.
Proverbs31:25 Iza minonne puulara diza maccassa; iza yiza layththata ufayssan mokkawus.
Proverbs31:26 Aadho eran iza haasayawus; izi inxarsafe suure zorey ke7ees.
Proverbs31:27 Iza ba soo asaa hano lo7eththa kaallawus; azalla hanoy izi bollan beetti erenna.
Proverbs31:28 Izi nayti izo
Proverbs31:29 «Lo7o miish ooththida daro maccassati deettes; gido attiin neni istta ubbaafe aadhdhaasa» gees.
Proverbs31:30 Mala lo7oy baleththees; puulaykka qokkees; gido attiin GODAAS yayyiza maccassi iza anjjettidaaro.
Proverbs31:31 Izis bessiza imota immite; iza ooththida oosoy ubbay dubbushan izo galatisso.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Hayssi Dawite naa Yerusalaamen kawotida eranchchaza qaala.
Ecclesiastes1:2 He eranchchay
Ecclesiastes1:3 Alame bolla asa nay daaburza daabura ubbaas ay wodhey dizee?
Ecclesiastes1:4 Yeletay aadhdhi bishin hara yeletay yees; gido attiin biittaya mernaaskka minna de7awus.
Ecclesiastes1:5 Arshey mokkeessinne wullees; qasseka ba mokkizaso baanaas eesotees.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Carkoy dugeha bagga carkees; hara wode pudeha bagga simmees; qasse yuuyi yuuyi aadhdhidi ba losida ogen gelees.
Ecclesiastes1:7 Shaafa haath ubbay biidi abban gelees; gido attiin abbay mulekka kumi erenna; shaafa haaththati kase ba yidaso simmi beettes.
Ecclesiastes1:8 Asi haasayanaas dandayzaazappe bollara yo7oti ubbay saleththizaaza; ayfey xeellidi kalli erenna; hayththika siyidi
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kase haniday simmi izi hanana; qasse ha7i hanishe dizaykka kase hanidayssa. Hessa gishshas salo gufanththon aykkoyka ooraththa miishshi deenna.
Ecclesiastes1:10 Oonikka
Ecclesiastes1:11 Beni wode hanida hanota zaaridi hassa7issiza miishshi deenna; sinththafe yaanaytikka isttafe kaalli yaanaytan qofettettenna.
Ecclesiastes1:12 Tani eranchchazi Yerusalaamen Isra7eeles kawo gidada de7adis.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Tani salo gufanththon diza ubbaa shaakka eranaassinne aadho erateththan pilgga xeellanaas ta qofaa qachchadis; Xoossi asa nayta toossida toohoy ay mala deexoo!
Ecclesiastes1:14 Salo gufanththon hanida hanota ubbaa ta be7adis; gido attiin ubbayka hada; carko oykkana yedeththiza mala.
Ecclesiastes1:15 Geellattida miishshi sitti gaanawu dandayenna; qasse baynda miishshi qoodettana dandayenna.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Tanikka ta wozinan
Ecclesiastes1:17 Qasse tani aadho erateth
Ecclesiastes1:18 Aadho erateththi darshin ceecey darees; eray dariza wodekka metoy darees.
Ecclesiastes2:1 Tani ta wozinan
Ecclesiastes2:2 Qasseka
Ecclesiastes2:3 Hessi wuri haniinkka aadho erateth demmanaas ta wozinan amottada tana woyne ushshan ufayssanaassinne eeyateth oykkanaas baaxetadis; qasse asay sa7a bolla diza qaanththa layththan salo gufanththon diza miish ubbaa bolla ooththidaakko istta go7izaazi aazakko ta erana koyadis.
Ecclesiastes2:4 Hessa gishshas hara issi gita miishshata ooththadis; taas keeththatakka keexxadis; woyne turakka tokkadis.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Dumma dumma atakilteta
Ecclesiastes2:6 He dicciza miththata ushshanaas haath eelissizaso zeera giigsadis.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Attumanne macca aylleta shammadis; taas soon yelettida hara aylletikka deettes; taappe kase Yerusalaamen de7ida oonappeka bollara daro mehe
Ecclesiastes2:8 Tani dumma dumma biittatappe gita asatappenne kawotappe aqota
Ecclesiastes2:9 Hessa gishshas tani taappe kase Yerusalaamen de7ida ooppenne aadhdhida gita as gidadis; ta aadho erateththayka tanara de7ides.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ta ayfey xeellidayssa diggabeekke; ta wozinay amottidayssa ubbaa diggabeekke; tani ooththida ubbaan ta wozinay ufayettides; ta daaburaas wodhey hessa.
Ecclesiastes2:11 Gido attiin hessa ubbaa ooththa simmada tani akeekiza wode tani keeha demmana gaada daaburda daabura ubbaa ta qoppiza wode ubbayka hada; salo gufanththon ay wodheykka deenna; ubbayka carko oykkanaas yedeththiza mala.
Ecclesiastes2:12 Hessafe guye tani aadho erateththi
Ecclesiastes2:13 Tumukka poo7oy dhumappe lo7iza mala aadho erateththika eeyateththafe aadhdhizayssa be7adis.
Ecclesiastes2:14 Era asa ayfey izaades hu7e bolla dees; eeyay gidikko dhuma giddora hemettees; gido attiin istta nam7aa qaadaykka issino gididayssa akeekadis.
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tani ta wozinan
Ecclesiastes2:16 Aadho eranchchayka eeyaza mala mernaas hassa7ettenna; sinththafe yaana layththatan nam7ayka dogettana; eeyay hayqqiza mala aadho eranchchasikka hayqoy attenna.
Ecclesiastes2:17 Salo gufanththon haniza miishshi ubbay iitiza gishshas ha sa7a duussay tana iitees; hessi ubbayka hada; carko oykkanaas yedeththiza mala.
Ecclesiastes2:18 Salo gufanththon tani keeha daabura demmida ubbaa taappe guyen yiza yeletas yeggada biza gishshas tani daabura demmida ubbay tana iitees.
Ecclesiastes2:19 Taappe guyera yaanayssi izi aadho eranchcha gidiin woykko eeya gidiin oonee erizay? Izi oona gidikkoka tani keeha daaburdayssanne ta aadho erateththan tani demmida ubbaa bolla goda gidana; hessika hada.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Hessa gishshas salo gufanththon hayssa keena ays daaburadinaa gaada ta wozinan hidota qanxxo doommadis.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Gaasoykka asi ba ubbaa aadho erateththan
Ecclesiastes2:22 Hessa gishshas salo gufanththon asi keehi dafettikonne daaburkko izas ay wodhey dizee?
Ecclesiastes2:23 Izi ba de7o layththan daaburza daaburay ubbay waayenne meto xalla; omarsika iza guuggey shempo demmenna; hessi ubbayka hada.
Ecclesiastes2:24 Asas muussafenne ushshafe qasse ba ooththida ooson ufayeteththafe hara lo7iza miishshi deenna; hessika Xoossa kusheppe imettizayssa ta beyadis.
Ecclesiastes2:25 Iza achchafe imettontta aggiko ooni maanaassinne ufayettanaas dandayzee?
Ecclesiastes2:26 Xoossi bana ufayssiza asas aadho erateth
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ubbaasikka wodey dees; saloppe garsa baggara oosettizayssas ubbaas wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Hessa gishshas yelettanaas wodey dees; hayqqanaaskka wodey dees. tokkanaas wodey dees; shoddanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:3 Wodhanaas wodey dees; ashshanaaskka wodey dees. laallanaas wodey dees; gimbanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:4 Yeekkanaas wodey dees; miiccanaaskka wodey dees. kayottanaas wodey dees; qasse ufayettishe guppanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:5 Shuch laallanaas wodey dees; shuch shiishshanaaskka wodey dees. Idimettanaas wodey dees; shaakettanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:6 Koyanaas wodey dees; agganaaskka wodey dees. Shiishshi oykkanaas wodey dees; kessi olanaaska wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:7 Daakkanaas wodey dees; sikkanaaska wodey dees. Co7u gaanaas wodey dees; haasayanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:8 Dosanaas wodey dees; ixxanaaskka wodey dees. Olas wodey dees; saron daanaaskka wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Histtiin oosanchchay ba dafetti daaburdayssafe ay wodhe demmanee?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Tani qasse asaa nayti daaburdi ooththana mala Xoossi immida toohoy keehi deexo gididayssa be7adis.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ubbaa miish iza woden woden lo7eththidi ooththides. Xoossi asaa wozinan mernateth woththides; gidikkoka Xoossi ooththidayssa ubbaa koyroppe wurseth gakkanaas asi ubbaa eranaas dandayenna.
Ecclesiastes3:12 Hessa gishshas asi ba de7o layththan lo7o ooso ooththizayssafenne ufayssizaaz ooththizaazappe aadhdhiza hara miishshi bayndayssa tani eradis.
Ecclesiastes3:13 Qasse asas izas iza daaburaas waaga gidizay miidinne uyidi bana ufayssizayssa; hessika izas Xoossafe imettida imota.
Ecclesiastes3:14 Xoossay ooththidayssi ubbay mernaas de7anayssa ta erays; izi ooththidayssa bolla gujjanaas woykko izappe guuththanaas dandayettenna. Xoossi hessa ooththiday asay iza bonchchana malassa.
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ha7i dizayssi hayssafe kasekka dizayssa; sinththafe hananayssi benikka dizayssa; Xoossi kase aadhdhidayssa zaari koyees.
Ecclesiastes3:16 Qasseka tani salo gufanththon hara miish be7adis; pirda sohon makkallateththi dees; suure pirda sohon geney dees.
Ecclesiastes3:17 Tanikka ta wozinan
Ecclesiastes3:18 Qasse tani ta wozinan
Ecclesiastes3:19 Asa qaadaykka meheyssa mala; nam7aa qaadaykka issino; issoy hayqqiza mala hankkoyssika hayqqees; nam7aaska issi qommo peenoy dees; hessa gishshas izi meheppe dummatenna; hessika hada.
Ecclesiastes3:20 Nam7ayka issi soho beettes; nam7ayka biittafe medhettida gishshas biittan simmeettes.
Ecclesiastes3:21 Histtiin asaa shemppoy pude salo kezizayssa
Ecclesiastes3:22 Hessa gishshas asi ba ooththida ooson ufayssafe hara aadhdhiza miishshi bayndayssa ta be7adis; hessika asas imettida qaada; izi hayqqidaappe guye oosettida oosota iza zaari ehidi bessanay oonee?
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tani qasseka salo gufanththon diza qoho ubbaa be7adissinne akeekadis; qohettidayta afunth be7adis; istta minththeththiza asikka deenna; wolqqay istta qohiza asata kushen dees; istta minththeththiza asikka deenna.
Ecclesiastes4:2 Hessa gishshas tani
Ecclesiastes4:3 Gido attiin ha nam7atappeka bollara mulekka yelettonttayta qaaday lo7o; gaasoykka istti salo gufanththon oosettiza qohoza mulekka be7ibeettenna.
Ecclesiastes4:4 Hessaththoka asay ba amottidayssa demmanaas keehi daaburdi ooththees; gido attiin he daaburay ba lagge bolla qanaateteththan dendon gididayssa tani akeekadis. Hessika hada; carko oykkanaas yedeththiza mala.
Ecclesiastes4:5 Azallay ba kushe idimmi uttees; barkka bana wodhees.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Coo daaburaninne carko kaalon nam7u kushe demmanaappe woppan beettiza issi kuphphay kiyees.
Ecclesiastes4:7 Qasseka tani salo gufanththon diza miishshi hada gididayssa be7adis.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Yeloy woykko ishay baynda bizza asi dees; iza dafeteththaas zaway deenna; iza ayfey izas diza aqota kallibeenna; izikka
Ecclesiastes4:9 Istta oosoy lo7o ayfe immanaas dandayza gishshas issino gidanaappe nam7u gideththi lo7o.
Ecclesiastes4:10 Qasse nam7aafe issoy kundiko issoy denththees; gido attiin kundiko denththiza laggey bayndaadey ay mala qadheththizee!
Ecclesiastes4:11 Nam7ay issife ichchiko ho7ees; gido attiin barkka ichchidaade waani ho7ana dandayzee?
Ecclesiastes4:12 Asi bizza qohana dandayees; nam7u gidikko izara eqettana dandayeettes; Heedzdzan dooqettida wodoroy elle duuxxenna.
Ecclesiastes4:13 Zore ekkontta eeyanne cima kawo gidanaappe aadho erateththi diza naateththa manqoy lo7o.
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ays giikko izi he hiyeesa gidida sohoppe dendidi woykko qasho keeththafe kezidi ba biittan kawotanaas dandayees.
Ecclesiastes4:15 Tani salo gufanththon dizaytinne simerettizayti ubbay kawo araata laattiza yelagaa kaallizayssa be7adis.
Ecclesiastes4:16 Iza sinththan qooday baynda derey dees; kawoteththafe izi kichchiza wode izi ooththidayssas oonikka iza galatenna. Hessika hada; carko oykkanaas yedeththiza mala.
Ecclesiastes5:1 Xoossa Keeth gelashe ne toho shiishsha ekka; siyanaas shiiqoy eeyata yarshofe aadhdhees; ays giikko istti bantta oosoy iita gididayssa erettenna.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Haasayanawu eesotoppa; qasse issi miish Xoossas immana gaada eeson geppofa; ays giikko Xoossi salon dees; neni gidikko sa7an daasa; hessa gishshas ne haasayana qaalay ginara gido.
Ecclesiastes5:3 Ooso daron agumoy beettiza mala haasaya daron eeyateththa qaalay qonccees.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Xoossas neni adinida adina gam7ontta gaththa; eeson polontta attiko izi ufayettenna; hessa gishshas neni adinettidayssa ubbaa pola.
Ecclesiastes5:5 Issi miish Xoossas adinettidi he adinettidayssa gaththontta agganaappe kase adinettontta agoy lo7o.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Nena ne doonay nagaran yeggontta mala ne doona shiishsha; qasse Xoossa Keeththa oosanchcha sinth shiiqada
Ecclesiastes5:7 Daro agumoynne daro haasayay hada; hessa gishshas neni Xoossas yayya.
Ecclesiastes5:8 Dere garsan manqoy sugettiin
Ecclesiastes5:9 Biittafe beettiza go7ay ubbaassa; kawoykka ba hu7es hessafe go7ettees.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Bira siiqiza asas biray gidi erenna; dureteth koyza asi duretidikka kalli erenna; hessi ubbayka hada.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Aqotay dari dari bishin mizay darees; haaridaades ayfen be7oppe hara aaza go7ay dizee?
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ooso ooththiza asi guuth miikko
Ecclesiastes5:13 Salo gufanththon keehi ceecesiza iita miish ta be7adis; hessika iita woden bana maaddo giidi asi guye yeggi dagasida miishshi izaades meto;
Ecclesiastes5:14 woykko issi gaason coo dhayza dureteththa. Izi naa yelikkoka he yelettidayssas laatissiza miishshi deenna.
Ecclesiastes5:15 Asi ba aayi uloppe kallo yelettida mala kallo bees; ay keena daaburkkoka izi ba daaburdayssafe aykkoka ekkibeenna.
Ecclesiastes5:16 Hessika keehippe iita; asi ba yida mala simmi bees; iza daabura ubbay carko oykkiza mala hada gidizaa gidikko izas ay go7ay dizee?
Ecclesiastes5:17 Izi ba layth ubbaa ceecen
Ecclesiastes5:18 Asa qaaday hessa gidida gishshas salo gufanththon Xoossi asi de7ana mala immida qaanththa layththa garsan asi ba daaburda daaburappe muussinne ushshi lo7onne bessizayssa gididayssa ta akeekadis.
Ecclesiastes5:19 Xoossay asas dureteththinne aqo immizay ba daaburda waaga demmidi miidinne uyidi ufayettanaassa. Hessi Xoossafe izas imettida imota.
Ecclesiastes5:20 Xoossay iza wozinan ubba wode ufays kunththi woththiza gishshas izi ba de7o layththas daro hirgenna.
Ecclesiastes6:1 Salo gufanththon hara iita miish tani be7adis; hessika asas keehi deexo.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Asi ba wozinan amottida miish demmana mala Xoossi asas aqota
Ecclesiastes6:3 Issi asi xeetu nayta gakkanaas yeli cimmidi adussa layth de7anawu dandayees; gido attiin izi ba aqotan ufayettontta aggikonne hayqqidi wogara moogettontta aggiko izappe awucayay kiya.
Ecclesiastes6:4 Gaasoykka coo hada yiidi dhuman bees; iza sunththika dhuman kamettides.
Ecclesiastes6:5 Izi eronttanne poo7o be7ontta aggikokka he addezappe izas aadho woppay dees.
Ecclesiastes6:6 Ufayssi baynda dishin nam7u shii layth de7ikkoka izas aaza go7ay dizee? Wurseththan nam7ayka issi soho baana deettennee?
Ecclesiastes6:7 Asi daaburdi ooththiza ubbay ulossa; gido attiin iza amoy mulekka kalli erenna.
Ecclesiastes6:8 Histtiin aadho eranchchay eeyappe aazan aadhdhizee? Manqoy harata sinththan waani simerettanaakko eroy iza ay maaddizee?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Amon toylattanaappe ayfen be7oy kiya; hessika hadanne carko oykkanaas yedeththiza mala
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ha7i diza ubbaas kaseti sunththi imetti uttides; asi hananaazi eretti uttides; asi baappe minnizayssara baaxettenna.
Ecclesiastes6:11 Haasayay darshin hada yo7oy darees; histtiin hessi as ay go7anee?
Ecclesiastes6:12 Hadanne eesho mala elle aadhdhiza guuththa layththatan asas lo7o miishshi hananayssa erizay oonee? Qasseka izi hayqqidaappe guye salo gufanththon haniza miish izas yootana dandayzay oonee?
Ecclesiastes7:1 Lo7o shittofe lo7o sunththi aadhdhees; yeleta gallassafe hayqo gallassi lo7o.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Gibira keeth buussafe yeeho keeth buussi lo7o; gaasoykka hayqoy as ubbaas wurseththa; shemppora paxa diza asi ubbay hessa ba wozinan woththanaas bessees.
Ecclesiastes7:3 Miichchafe kayoy kiya; gaasoykka kayoy sinth kareththikokka wozina poo7isees.
Ecclesiastes7:4 Aadho eranchcha wozinay kayo keeththan dees; eeyata wozinay gidikko ufayssa keeththan dees.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Eeyati sabbishe yexxiza yeth siyanaappe aadho eranchchay seeriza seera ezgoy lo7o.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Eeyata miichchi oto garsan eexxishe dhuuqettiza agunththa mala; hessika hada.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Gene oosoy aadho eranchcha eeya kessees; maganxoy asas wozina moorees.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Issi miishshas doomeththafe wurseththi kiya; qasse otoranchchafe dandayanchchay kiya.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Eeyata hanqoy istta ki7o garsan diza gishshas neni hanqos eesotoppa.
Ecclesiastes7:10 Neni
Ecclesiastes7:11 Aadho erateththi lo7o xinxxo mala; iza go7ay poo7o be7iza as ubbaassa.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Miishshi as iitappe kammi ashshiza mala aadho erateththi ashshees. Hessafe bollarakka aadho erateththi keeththa aawa shemppo naagees.
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ane Xoossay ooththidayssa wozinan woththa! Izi bokkasidayssa ooni luulisana dandayzee?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Nees wodey lo7ishin ufayetta; gido attiin wodey iitishin hayssa wozinan woththa; Xoossi issaa ooththida mala harakka ooththides; hessa gishshas asi sinththafe hanana miish aykkoka pilggidi erana dandayenna.
Ecclesiastes7:15 Nagaranchchay ba nagaraara adussa layth de7ishin
Ecclesiastes7:16 Hessa gishshas ne dhayontta mala keeha xillo
Ecclesiastes7:17 Qasse keeha iita as
Ecclesiastes7:18 Issaa oykkidi hankkoyssaka yeddontta agoy lo7o; Xoossas yayyiza asi shikkalateth ixxees.
Ecclesiastes7:19 Aadho erateththi aadho eranchchas immiza wolqqay issi kataman dere haariza tammatappe aadhdhees.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Nagara ooththontta mulera suure oosoninne xilloteththan xalla kanththiza asi biitta bolla deenna.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Haasayettiza qaala ubbaa hayth yegga siyoppa; ne histtontta aggiko ne ashkaray nena qanggishin ne siyandasa.
Ecclesiastes7:22 Qasse nenikka ne hu7en harata qanggoyssa ne wozinay erees.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hayssa ubbaa tani aadho erateththan pilgga xeellada
Ecclesiastes7:24 Aadho erateththi ay gidikkoka keehi ciimmanne haako; histtiin ooni gakki erana dandayzee?
Ecclesiastes7:25 Hessa gishshas aadho erateththinne yo7oti hanizayssa pilgga eranaas
Ecclesiastes7:26 Izis wozinay woximade mala
Ecclesiastes7:27 Aadho eranchchazi
Ecclesiastes7:28 Hessika tani hach gakkanaas pilggashe dhaydayssa shii attumasappe issi suure as demmadis. Gido attiin haytantta giddofe issi suure maccas demmabeekke.
Ecclesiastes7:29 Tani hayssa ubbaafe issi miish tamaaradis; Xoossi as suure histti medhdhides; gido attiin asi daro gitettidaaz giigsides» gides.
Ecclesiastes8:1 Yo7ota birshana dandayza aadho eranchcha mala asi oonee? Yo7ota ubbaa birsheth erizay oonee? Aadho erateththi asa ayfeso poo7isees; xirphotida sinththika birshees.
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ne kase Xoossaa sinththan caaqqida gishshas kawos azazetta.
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kawo sinththafe eeson kezoppa; izi ba dosidayssa ooththanaas dandayza gishshas iita oosos zuppetoppa.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ubbaa miish ooththanaas kawos maatay diza gishshas
Ecclesiastes8:5 Izas azazettiza asi ubbay qohettenna; aadho erateththi diza wozinay likke wodenne bessiza ooso oge shaakki erees.
Ecclesiastes8:6 As metoy keehi un7eththikokka ubbaa miishshaska likke wodeynne bessiza ooso ogey dees.
Ecclesiastes8:7 Sinththafe hananayssa erizay deenna; hessa gishshas sinththafe hananayssa yootanaas dandayzay oonee?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Asi ba shemppo naagi ashshanaas dandayenna; woykko ba hayqqana gallassa bolla maatay diza asi deenna; ola gallas oonikka ola yeggidi guye simmonttayssa mala iita oosoykka banara meezetidayta yeddenna.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Salo gufanththon haniza miish ubbaa tani pilgga be7adis; asi as qohanaas daannatiza wodey dees.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Qasse iitati bonchchon moogettishininne geeshsha kataman sabettishin
Ecclesiastes8:11 Iita ooththida asa bolla eeson pirdontta aggiko asa wozinay iita ooththana halchchon kumees.
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nagaranchchay xeetuto iita miish ooththishin iza layththay aduqqikokka
Ecclesiastes8:13 Gido attiin iitati Xoossas yayyontta gishshas lo7o miishshi isttas hanenna; istta layththi eesho mala elle aadhdhana.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Sa7a bolla oosettiza haray hada miishshi dees; hessika xilloti iitatas bessiza qixaate
Ecclesiastes8:15 Salo gufanththon asas muussafe
Ecclesiastes8:16 Tani aadho erateth eranaassinne asi ha sa7a bollan omarsinne gallas dhiskoy baynda daaburza daaburaa eranaas ta wozinan pilggadis.
Ecclesiastes8:17 Hessafe guye Xoossi ooththida ubbaa be7adis; salo gufanththon oosettiza miish oonikka erenna; asi keehi dafettidi pilggi xeellikokka iza birsheththaa demmanaas dandayenna. Aadho eranchchay
Ecclesiastes9:1 Hessa gishshas ha ubbaa yo7ota ta wozinan qoppada aadho eranchchatinne xilloti ooththiza oosoy Xoossa kushenna; gido attiin asi sinththafe bana naagizayssi siiqo gidiin woykko ixo gidiin erenna.
Ecclesiastes9:2 Xillota woykko nagaranchchata gidiin
Ecclesiastes9:3 Salo gufanththon ubbaa bolla gakkiza iitateththi hayssa; ubbaas wurseththa qaaday issino; hessafe bollarakka asa wozinay iitateththan kumidessinne gooyides; wurseththankka hayqqida asan gayttees.
Ecclesiastes9:4 Hayqqida gaammofe paxa diza kanay kiya; hessaththoka shemppora paxa dizayta giddon diza asas hidotay dees.
Ecclesiastes9:5 Shemppora paxa diza asi ba hayqqanayssa erees; gido attiin hayqqidayti aykkoka erettenna; istta qofsiza miishshi ubbay dogettees; istti go7ettana miishshika deenna.
Ecclesiastes9:6 Istta siiqoy
Ecclesiastes9:7 Baada ne kath ufayssan ma; ne woyne ushshaaka ne wozinay ufayettishin uya; ays giikko Xoossi ne ooththida ooson ufayettees.
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ubbaa wode ne may7oy booth gido; ne hu7eykka zayten tiyetto.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Salo gufanththon Xoossi nees immida guuth gidida ne de7o layththata ubbaan ne siiqiza ne machcheyra ufayssan de7a; ays giikko salo gufanththon ne de7oninne ne daaburda daabura ubbaan hayssi nees qaada.
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ne kushey ooththanaas demmidayssa ubbaa ne kumeththa wolqqan ooththa; ays giikko neni baana duufon oosoy
Ecclesiastes9:11 Tani salo gufanththon hara miish be7adis; woththan xoonoy pilatatas olan xoonoy wolqqamatas gidenna; kaththi aadho eranchchatas
Ecclesiastes9:12 Qasseka ba wode eriza asi deenna; kafoy yarden geliza mala
Ecclesiastes9:13 Hessaththoka tana keehi malalisida hayssa aadho leemiso salo gufanththon be7adis.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Hessika issi biittan amarda asati de7iza qeeri katamay dawus; he katamayo olanaas issi wolqqama kawoy worajji dooddides; izi yuushon miixa giigsides.
Ecclesiastes9:15 He katamayn aadho eranchcha gidida issi manqo asi dees; izi ba aadho erateththan he katamayo ashshides. Gido attiin he manqozas oonikka qoppibeenna.
Ecclesiastes9:16 Hessa gishshas tani
Ecclesiastes9:17 Eeyata ayssiza daanna waasoppe aadho eranchchay liiqon haasayza qaalay seetettees.
Ecclesiastes9:18 Aadho erateththi ola miishshafe aadhdhees; gido attiin issi nagaranchchay daro lo7o miish dhayssees.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Hayqqida udunxxeti shitto zeeqeththeettes; hessaththoka guuththa eeyateththi aadho erateththinne bonchcho kawushshees.
Ecclesiastes10:2 Aadho eranchcha wozinay iza ushach kaaleththees; gido attiin eeya wozinay hadirs kaaleththees.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Eeyay oge bishin izas akeekay paccees; ba eeyateththa oonaska qonccisees.
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ne goday ne bolla hanqettiko ne soho yeddofa; gaasoykka dandayay gita hanqo co7u histtees.
Ecclesiastes10:5 Salo gufanththon tani be7ida iita miishshi dees; hessika dere haarizaadefe keziza bala.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Eeyati keehi dhoqqasohon uttiin dureti hirki ziqqa sohon uttida.
Ecclesiastes10:7 Aylleti daannata mala togan bishin daannati qasse aylleta mala tohon bishin be7adis.
Ecclesiastes10:8 Olla bookkiza asi he ollan izi kundana; qasse dirsa laalliza as shooshshi dukkana.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Shuch dhoqallizay he shuchchaan deshettees; qasse mith qerizay he miththaan qohettees.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Dun7e kaltta leefontta ooththiko daro wolqqa wursees; gido attiin hiillan ooththiko oosoza ayfisees.
Ecclesiastes10:11 Shooshshi muurennon jallanaappe sinththan dukkiko muurennizaade aykkoka go7enna.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Aadho eranchchaa doonappe keziza qaalay puulan kumidaaza; gido attiin eeyay barkka ba inxarsan dhayees.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Koyroppe doommidi iza qaalay eeyateththa; wurseththankka iita goosh gidees.
Ecclesiastes10:14 Eeyay haasaya darssees; buroppe hananayssa erizay deenna; hayqqidaades izappe guyen hananayssa oonee izas yootana dandayzay?
Ecclesiastes10:15 Eeya oosoy ooththizaade daaburssees; izi katama gaththiza oge erenna.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Hanne ne kawoy yelaga gididaaree! Ne daannati wonttara gibira giigsiza biittayee nees aayye ana!
Ecclesiastes10:17 Hanne ne kawoy bonchchettida zareppe gididaaree! maththottanaas gidontta minettanaas koshshiza wode miza daannati diza biittayee! Neni anjjettidaaro.
Ecclesiastes10:18 Addey azalla gidikko kaaray yarphattees; iza kusheti daaburkko keeththi aaththees.
Ecclesiastes10:19 Gibiray miicisees; woyne ushshi as ufayssees; miishshi diikko miishshi hanees.
Ecclesiastes10:20 Qofankka gidiin kawo kadhoppa; ne aqiza kifilen dashe dure qanggofa; qefen piradhdhizaara ne gizayssa efa gaththana dandayawus.
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ne kath haaththan yegga; daro gallassatappe guye neni zaara demmana.
Ecclesiastes11:2 Nees diza aqo laappun woykko osppun sohon shaakereththa woththa; ays giikko biitta bolla ay iitay yaanaakko neni erakka.
Ecclesiastes11:3 Shaaray karexxiko biittaa bolla iray bukkees. Miththi pudeha woykko dugeha kundiko ba kundidason ichchi attees.
Ecclesiastes11:4 Carko hanota naagizay zerenna; qasse shaara mallizay ba kath shiishshenna.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Carkoy awara bizaakko iza oge erakka; qasse shemppoy woykko ayanay aayi ulon diza medheta giddon waani gelizaakko ne erakka. Hessaththoka ubbaa medhdhida Xoossa ooso ne shaakka erana dandayakka.
Ecclesiastes11:6 Maaladora ne zereth zera; omarsika ne kushey ooso birshofo; gaasoykka hayssi woykko hessi
Ecclesiastes11:7 Poo7oy lo7o; awa ayfe be7oy ayfe ufayssees.
Ecclesiastes11:8 Asi keehi adussa layth ha sa7an de7ikko he ubbaankka ufayetto. Gido attiin dhuma gallassati dariza gishshas qoppo; buro yaana miishshi ubbayka hada.
Ecclesiastes11:9 Haysso yelagazoo! Ne naateteththa layththan ufayetta; ne naateteththa layththan ne wozinan ufayetta; ne ayfey xeellida ubbaanne ne wozinay amottida ubbaa pola; gido attiin ne ooththida ooso ubbaa gishshas Xoossi nena pirdas shiishshanayssa era.
Ecclesiastes11:10 Hessa gishshas ne wozinappe ceece haassa; iita miishshika neeppe digga; gaasoykka naateteththinne yelagateththi elle aadhdhana.
Ecclesiastes12:1 Meto gallassati yontta dishin neni
Ecclesiastes12:2 Awaynne poo7oy
Ecclesiastes12:3 Keeth naagizayti kokkoriza wode
Ecclesiastes12:4 dubbushaso efiza ogeti gordettiza wode
Ecclesiastes12:5 pudunth kessi xooniza wode
Ecclesiastes12:6 Bira sansalatay duuxxontta dishin
Ecclesiastes12:7 biittay duge biittan simmontta dishin
Ecclesiastes12:8 Eranchchazi
Ecclesiastes12:9 Eranchchazi ba hu7es aadho eranchcha xalla gidontta asaakka erateth tamaarsides. Daro leemisota pilggi xeellidaappe guyen maaran maaran giigsides.
Ecclesiastes12:10 Eranchchazi suure qaala demmanaas pilggides; izi xaafidayssi suurenne tuma.
Ecclesiastes12:11 Aadho eranchcha qaalay cikka mala hoxe; qasse iza tossetikka addafe dhishkettida dhishke mala; heytikka issi heenththanchchafe imettidayta.
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ta naazoo! Ha ubbaafe bollara ay miishshafekka naagetta; aykkoka gujjofa; daro maxaafata xaafikkoka wurseththi deenna; xinaate daroy bolla daaburssees.
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hekko ubbaa miishshi yootettides; yo7o ubbaas kuushshi hayssa; Xoossas yayya; iza azazo naaga; hessika asa naas imettida kumeththa ooso.
Ecclesiastes12:14 Xoossay ooso ubbaa bolla

SongOfSongs1:5 «Intteno Yerusalaame maccassatoo
SongOfSongs1:6 Ta medha kareththiday awa seela; tani kareth gidida gishshas tana kadhopite. Ta aayi naa ishati tanara ooyettidi tana woyne atakilte naaganaas woththida; hessa gishshas tani tayssa naagabeekke.
SongOfSongs1:7 Ta siiqozoo! Ane taas yoota; ne dorsa wude heemmizay awanee? Gallas awappe ne istta guurissizay awanee? Nena demmanaas ne laggeta wude kaallashe ays coo toylattiza maccassa mala gidoo?» gadus.
SongOfSongs1:8 «Haa macca ubbaafe aadhdha lo7iza malanchchayee! Ta dizaso erontta aggiko dorsati bida geedo kaallada ya; ne deysha laaqqatakka heenththanchchata dunkaane matan heemma.»
SongOfSongs1:9 «Ta godee! Gibxe kawos para-gaare goochchiza parata giddon diza macca paray mala lo7aasa.

SongOfSongs1:11 Nuni nees biran alleqettida worqqa geexe oosisana» gides.

SongOfSongs2:2 «Ta siiqoya maccassata garsan agunththa giddon diza lo7o ciish misatawus» gides.
SongOfSongs2:3 «Ta siiqoza tani naateththatara gaththa xeelliza wode
SongOfSongs2:4 Izi tana gibiras aaho keeththan gelththides; ba siiqo ta bolla bandira mala dhoqqu dhoqqu ooththides.
SongOfSongs2:5 Tani iza siiqon oykettada hargadis; hessa gishshas tana zabibe ayfe mizidi gazidissite; appile mizidi tana beegoththite.
SongOfSongs2:6 Ba hadirsa kushe bolla tana borkotissides; ba ushachcha kushen tana idimmides.
SongOfSongs2:7 Intteno Yerusalaame yelaga maccassatoo! siiqoy baas dosidi dendana gakkanaas iza intte beegoththontta mala
SongOfSongs2:8 Be7ite! Ta siiqoza cenggurssi zumata bollara pirishe
SongOfSongs2:9 Ta siiqozi Wusha laaqqa woykko genessa laaqqa misatees. Be7ite! Izi nu keeththa daaranchchan eqqides; maskootera soo xeellees; magalasha xoo7era xuulungi xeellees.
SongOfSongs2:10 Ta siiqozi tana
SongOfSongs2:11 Beya
SongOfSongs2:12 Ubbason ciishshi ciiyides; mazamure yexxiza aginaykka gakkides; haraphphe yeththika nu biittan siyettees.
SongOfSongs2:13 Balasey ayfe imo doommides; woyney ciiyides; iza ciishsha sawoy ubbason tunnu gees. Hessa gishshas ta godee
SongOfSongs2:14 «Neni aafo doonan zaalla za7a giddon diza haraphphey mala; ane issito ne ayfeso tana bessa; ne qaala cenggurssikka tana sissa. Ays giikko ne cenggurssay tana ufayssees; ne ayfesoykka tana lo7ees» gides.
SongOfSongs2:15 Nu woyne atakiltey ciiyides; hessa gishshas nu woyne atakilte giddo moorontta mala worakanatanne istta butulata woximaden oykkite.
SongOfSongs2:16 «Ta siiqozi taassa; tanikka izassa; cilila maata giddon izi ba mehe heemmees.
SongOfSongs2:17 Omarsa dhumay qaarettanaashin
SongOfSongs3:1 «Omars kumeth ta hiixan ichchada

SongOfSongs4:1 «Ta godee! Ne ay mala lo7o! Neni ay mala giiga! Ne ayfeti ne ayfeso kammiza quraace giddora xeelliza wode haraphphe mala lo7eettes; ne binanay Gala7aade zumaara duge wodhdhiza deysha wude misatees.
SongOfSongs4:2 Istta giddon maynney baynda mentte mentte yeliza iskey diirettiin meecetti keziza booththa dorsa wudeta mala ne achchati tana ufaysseettes.
SongOfSongs4:3 Ne metershati zo7o qacina mala lo7eettes; ne haasayza wode keehi ufaysseettes; ne shagalati ayfeso kammiza quraace giddora xeelliza wode oroomaane nam7u kessi phalqidaa misateettes.
SongOfSongs4:4 Ne qoodhey shiyan qoodettiza gondalleti
SongOfSongs4:5 Ne dhanththati mentte yelettidi
SongOfSongs4:6 Qammay wonttana gakkanaas

SongOfSongs4:11 Ta mishirayee! Ne metershara eessa ililoy xokkees. Ne doonappe eessinne maaththi pulttees; ne may7o sawoy Libaanoose shitto mala sawees.

SongOfSongs7:1 «Kawo naada lo7izaaree! Ne tohoti neni naxala caamma aaththa dishin be7iza wode ay mala lo7izoo! Ne sheechchati hiillanchcha wogacey qoxxidi lo7eththi alleqissida inqqu misatees.

Isaiah1:1 Yuhuda kawota Ooziya
Isaiah1:2 GODAY
Isaiah1:3 Booray ba godaa erees; harey iza goday izas giigsida zedhekka erees; Isra7eeley gidikko tana erenna; ta dereykka akeekenna» gides.
Isaiah1:4 Intteno nagaranchcha kawoteththatoo! Qohon kumidaytoo! Iita ooththiza zereththatoo! Intte aawata tunateththaa kaalliza naytoo! Inttena aayye ana! GODAA aggaagideta; Isra7eele geeshshaza yeggi aggideta; zokkoka izas zaarideta.
Isaiah1:5 Makkalla bolla makkalla gujjidi intte ays zaari zaari qaxxayetteetii? Intte hu7ey mule sakettides; intte wozinaykka daaburdes.
Isaiah1:6 Hessa gaason hirki toho xugunththafe biidi hu7e iske gakkanaas paxateththi inttes baawa. Madunth
Isaiah1:7 Intte derey aykkoy baynda bazzo gidana; intte katamati taman xuugettana; intte ayfey xeellishin intte biitta allagay bonqqi ekkana; istti intte biitta bula kessana.
Isaiah1:8 Xiyoone naya woyne miththa giddon diza gaabba mala
Isaiah1:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY nuus zereth ashshonttaakko
Isaiah1:10 Intteno Sodoome ayssizaytoo! GODAA qaala siyite; intteno Gamoora deretoo! Nu Xoossa timirte ezgi siyite.
Isaiah1:11 «Intte yarsho daroy taas ay ooththanee? Hanno gakkanaas intte taas shiishshida xuugetti shiiqiza dharsho ashonne modhdho meheta asho kalladis; tani boora suuththan
Isaiah1:12 Intte taas goynnanaas yiza wode hessa ubbaa intte ekki yaana malanne ta Keeththa zago intte yedhdhana mala ooni oychchidee?
Isaiah1:13 Hayssafe guye hayssa misatiza hada yarsho nam7anththo shiishshofte; intte cuwasiza exaaney tana shaattees; agina xeeron
Isaiah1:14 Agina xeeron intte bonchchiza gallassatanne kase intte woththida ba7aale gallassata ta shemppoya harasettadus; heyti taas daro deexo tooho gidida gishshas ta istta tookkanaas dandaykke.
Isaiah1:15 Intte intte kushe woosas taakko micciko tani ta ayfe inttefe haraso zaarana; intte kushen suuththi kumida gishshas intte keehi woossikokka ta intte woosa siyikke.
Isaiah1:16 Meecettite; inttena geeshshite; intte iita oosoza ta sinththafe diggite; iita oosokka aggite.
Isaiah1:17 Lo7o ooso tamaarte; suure pirda koyite; qohettidayta minththeththite; yi7otas eqqite; am7etas mootettite» gides.
Isaiah1:18 Qasseka GODAY
Isaiah1:19 Intte taas eeno gi azazettiko biitta anjjo maana.
Isaiah1:20 Intte taas akkay gi makkalliko mashshay inttena maana; hayssa yootiday tana GODAA» gides.
Isaiah1:21 Kase ammanettida katamaya waanada layma gidadee? Kase izin suure pirday kumidaaranne xilloteththi izin kumidaara ha7i gidikko shemppo wodhizaytas duussaso gidadus.
Isaiah1:22 Hanne ne biray shiydes; ne woyne ushshay haaththan yeellettides.
Isaiah1:23 Nena kaaleththizayti makkallanchchataranne kaysotara laggetida; istti ubbayka maganxo doseettes. Matta7ekka keehi koyeettes; yi7otas aadhdhi eqqettenna; am7eta magana siyettenna.
Isaiah1:24 Hessa gishshas GODAY
Isaiah1:25 Tani ta kushe ne bolla denththana; ne bolla diza kinththaka ta geeshshana; ne qitaakka ne bollafe diggana.
Isaiah1:26 Kase nena ayssizayta mala hara nena ayssanaytanne zoranayta tani nees denththana; hessafe guye neni
Isaiah1:27 Xiyoona suure pirdan
Isaiah1:28 Gido attiin makkallanchchatinne nagaranchchati issi bolla liiqana; Xoossa aggizayti wurikka dhayana.
Isaiah1:29 Kase intte dosiza kaashshatan intte yeellatana; kase intte doorida atakiltesohotan intte kawuyana.
Isaiah1:30 Wurseththan intte bonccoy qokkida wola mala
Isaiah1:31 Mino asi happa mala; iza oosoykka pil7i giza laco mala gidana; nam7ayka issi bolla xuugettana; he tamaa toyssana asikka deenna» gides.
Isaiah2:1 Amoxe naa Isayaasi Yuhuda dere gishshassinne Yerusalaame katama gishshas be7ida ajjuutay hayssa.
Isaiah2:2 Wode wurseththan Xoossa keeththi iza bolla keexettida zumay hara zuma ubbaafe dhoqqi beettana. Zumbullata ubbaafe dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; ubbaa kawoteththati hee goochchana.
Isaiah2:3 Daro asay yiidi
Isaiah2:4 Izi kawoteththata giddon pirdana; daro asata garsan diza palama izi diggana. Istti bantta giththa mashsha maarasha
Isaiah2:5 Intteno Yaaqoobe zaretoo! Haa yiite! Ane GODAA poo7on simerettoos.
Isaiah2:6 GODAWU! Neni ne asaa Yaaqoobe zareta aggadasa. Istti arshey mokkiza baggara diza asata mala bitan kumida; Filisxeeme asaa mala muurenneettes. Istti allagara issife zuppeteettes.
Isaiah2:7 Istta biittan biraynne worqqay kumides; istta dureteththas zaway baawa; istta biittan paray kumides; istta para-gaaretas zaway deenna.
Isaiah2:8 Istta biittan eeqa xoossati kumida; bantta kushen ooththi kessida miishshas goynneettes.
Isaiah2:9 Hessa gishshas asi ubbay ziqqi gaananne kawuyana. Istta qoho atto gooppa.
Isaiah2:10 Yashissiza GODAA hanqofenne iza teemappe attanaas zaallatakko biidi biitta giddon qotettite!
Isaiah2:11 Otoranchcha ayfey gukkana; moodhettizayti kawuyana; he wode GODAY xalla dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana.
Isaiah2:12 Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAY Otoranchchata
Isaiah2:13 Adussinne dhoqqa gidida Libaanoose zigatanne Baasaane wolata ubbaa
Isaiah2:14 Gita zumatanne dhoqqa zumbullata ubbaa
Isaiah2:15 katama naagiza adussa miixatanne katamaa yuushon diza mino gimbeta ubbaa
Isaiah2:16 Tarseese markabetanne bonchcho wogolota ubbaa izi kawushshana wodey dees.
Isaiah2:17 Moodhettizaadey kawuyana; otoranchchay kundana; he gallas GODAY xalla dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana;
Isaiah2:18 Eeqa xoossati ubbay mulera dhayana.
Isaiah2:19 GODAY hayssa biittaa qaaththanaas dendiza wode Yashissiza GODAA hanqofenne iza teemappe attanaas asay qotettanaas shuchcha garsinne ollay dizaso baqatana.
Isaiah2:20 He gallas asay goynnanaas medhdhida bantta bira
Isaiah2:21 GODAY ha biittaa qaaththanaas dendiza wode iza yashiseththaafenne iza teemaappe dendidayssan shuchcha gongoloynne zaalla za7ay dizaso baqatana.
Isaiah2:22 Shemppoy siidhera keziin aha gidiza asan ammanettofte; asi ay maaddanee?

Isaiah3:15 Ta deraa ays meton liiqisidetii? Manqota ays yeesseetii? Hayssa yootiday tana Goda
Isaiah3:16 GODAY

Isaiah3:19 hayththa gutichchata
Isaiah3:20 hu7e goosseta
Isaiah3:21 siidhe midigata

Isaiah4:1 He wode laappun maccassati issi adde oykkidi
Isaiah4:2 He wode GODAA miththa haggay lo7ananne bonchchettana; Isra7eele asaappe dhayshe attidaytas he biitta kaththay ceeqossinne bonchchos gidana.
Isaiah4:3 Xiyoonen attidayti
Isaiah4:4 GODAY Xiyoone maccassata qitaa meeccana; maadhetti uttida suuththaafe Yerusalaame pirda ayananinne xuuggiza ayanan geeshshana.
Isaiah4:5 GODAY Xiyoone zuma bollanne heen shiiqiza ubbata bolla gallas shaaranne cuwa
Isaiah4:6 Izi gallassa awa suuleppe ashshiza kuwa
Isaiah5:1 Tani ta siiqo laggeza gishshassinne iza woyne turaa tokkizasoho gishshas siiqo mazamure yexxana. Tani siiqiza laggezas aradda zumbullan woyne turaa tokkizasohoy dees.
Isaiah5:2 Biitta bookkidi
Isaiah5:3 Histtiin ta siiqoy
Isaiah5:4 Tani ta woyne turaa sohozasi ooththidayssafe hara ay ooththanayssi attidee? Izi lo7o ayfe ayfana gaada ta naagishin ays caala phanqida ayfe ayfidee?
Isaiah5:5 Ha7i tani ta woyne tokkiza gadeza bolla ooththanaaz inttes yootays. Dirsaa shoddana; izikka dhayana mala ooththana; Tani gimbeza laallana; he sohoykka durettana.
Isaiah5:6 Tani he sohoza mago biitta ooththana. He turay xunqqettenanne bul7ettenna; Histtiin kindichchoynne agunththi izan mokkana. Iray izan bukkontta mala
Isaiah5:7 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA woyne tokkiza gadey Isra7eele asaa. Yuhuda asay izi ufayettiza atakilte. Istti suure pirda pirdana giidi naagides; gido attiin suuth gussishin be7ides. Izi xilloteth koyides; gido attiin meto waaso siyides.
Isaiah5:8 Haratas sohoy dhayanaashe gakkanaas
Isaiah5:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY tani ta hayththara siyishin
Isaiah5:10 Tammu waaxa booratan tokkida woyne ayfeppe issi oto gidiza woyne ushshi xalla ke7ana; tammu qun7a kath zeriin issi qun7a kaththi xalla ayfana» gides.
Isaiah5:11 Maththosiza ushshu koyanaas maalado guurara dendidi woyne ushshan xuugettana gakkanaas
Isaiah5:12 Istta gibirasohon maasinqoy
Isaiah5:13 Histtiin ta Derey akeeka dhayda gishshas di7etti baana; istta shuumeti koshan hayqqana; istta dere asaykka haaththa saamon xuugetti hayqqana.
Isaiah5:14 Duufoy ba gomppa aassadus; ba doonaakka zawappe bollara doyadus; Yerusalaamen de7iza gita asatinne hankko derey
Isaiah5:15 Asi ubbay tooshettananne kawuyana; otoranchchati ubbay yeellatana.
Isaiah5:16 Gido attiin Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Isaiah5:17 He wode dorsati bantta qooron heemettiza mala heemettana; dorsa laaqqati laalettida dureta keeththata sohon maata maana.
Isaiah5:18 Cimo wodoron nagaraa goochchizaytas
Isaiah5:19 «Nuni nu ayfera be7ana mala ane Xoossi elelo! Ba oosokka eesoso! Nuni erana mala Isra7eele Geeshshay qoppida qofay matan poletto» gizaytas aayye ana!
Isaiah5:20 Iitaa lo7o
Isaiah5:21 Banttana barkka
Isaiah5:22 Woyne ushshan erettidaytassinne maththosiza ushshu walakkanaas goobizaytas aayye ana!
Isaiah5:23 Matta7e ekkidi
Isaiah5:24 Istti Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA wogaa ixxida gishshas
Isaiah5:25 GODAA hanqoy iza deraa bolla eexxi ke7ides; izi ba kushe denththidi istta shocides. Zumati qaaxxida; hayqqida asaa ahay oge bolla pitti yeggida buura mala gidides; histti pe7iinkka iza hanqoy simmibeenna; iza kushey ha7ikka dendida mala dees.
Isaiah5:26 GODAY haakon de7iza kawoteththatas malaata dhoqqan essees; sa7a gaxan de7iza morkketaska wayqees; isttika eeson bichcharishe puttu gaana.
Isaiah5:27 Istta giddon daaburanchchaynne wobbey deenna; Isttafe issoynne dhiskennanne ichchenna. Xeessan gixxida qabattoyka birshettenna; Istta caammaa dafoykka duuxxenna.
Isaiah5:28 Istta yiishshay hoxe; istta wondafeykka waaxetti uttides. Istta parata qinccafilley zaalla shuchcha mala; istta para-gaareta erzoykka gote mala.
Isaiah5:29 Istta xaagoykka gaammo xaago mala; wodalla gaammota mala xaaggeettes; banttas miza miish shankkati oykkidi xaaggeettes; istti oykkidayssa tookki ekki beettes; isttafe woththi ekkanay oonikka deenna.
Isaiah5:30 He gallas istti gita abba dambala mala
Isaiah6:1 Kawo Ooziyay hayqqida layth GODAY dhoqqa araata bolla uttidayssa beyadis; izi may7ida afala macaray Xoossa Keeth kumi uttides.
Isaiah6:2 Suraafeele geetettiza kiitanchchati izappe bollara deettes; issi issi suraafeeles usuppun qefeti deettes; nam7u qefetan ba ayfeso ayfeso kammeettes; nam7u qefetan ba toho toho kammeettes; nam7u qefetan piradhdheettes.

Isaiah7:1 Ooziya naa Iyo7aatamey yelida Akaazey Yuhuda biittan kawotida wode Aaraame biitta kawo Eraasooninne Isra7eele biitta Kawo Eromeliyo naa Faaquhey Yerusalaame olanaas kezida; gido attiin xoonanaas dandaybeettenna.
Isaiah7:2 Aaraame dereynne Efreeme derey issi bolla gididi olas ke7idayssa Dawite zareppe kawotida kawoy siyida wode wora mith carkoy qaaththiza mala Akaaze wozinaynne deraa wozinay qaaxxides.
Isaiah7:3 Histtiin GODAY Isayaasas
Isaiah7:4 Histtada izas
Isaiah7:5 Aaraame biitta asay Efreeme asaaranne Eromeliyo naara ne bolla iita miish ooththanaas

Isaiah7:8 Gaasoykka Damasqoy Aaraame biittas hu7e; kawo Eraasooney Damasqos hu7e. Usuppun tamman ichchash layththa garsan Efreeme derey laalettana; simmidi dere gidana dandayenna.
Isaiah7:9 Qasse Samaariyay Efreeme biittaas hu7e; Eromeliyo nay Samaariyas hu7e; intte intte ammanon minnidi eqqontta ixxiko mulekka eqqanaas dandayekketa» gees.

Isaiah7:11 «GODAY ne Xoossa nees bolla saloppe
Isaiah7:12 Akaazey gidikko
Isaiah7:13 Isayaasi
Isaiah7:14 Histtiko GODAY barkka inttes malata bessana; geela7oy shaarana; attuma naa yelana; iza sunththaaka
Isaiah7:15 Izi iitanne lo7o shaakki eriza wode hangara maaththinne ees maana.
Isaiah7:16 Gido attiin naazi iitanne lo7o shaakki eranaappe sinththan neni keehi yayyida nam7u kawota biittati aykkoy baynda bula gidana.
Isaiah7:17 «Efreeme biittay Yuhuda biittafe shaakettoosofe doommiin hayssafe sinththan hani erontta wode GODAY ne bolla
Isaiah7:18 He wode GODAY haako biittan diza Gibxe shaafappe udunxxeta
Isaiah7:19 Istti ubbayka yiidi bazzo shoobban
Isaiah7:20 He wode GODAY Efiraaxise Shaafa pinththafe garxxi ehida magallan
Isaiah7:21 He wode issi asas issi ussa miizinne nam7u deyshati xalla attana.
Isaiah7:22 Gidikkoka istti maaxxiza maaththi keehi daro gidida gishshas izi oys maana; he biittan attida asay ubbayka hangaranne ees maana.
Isaiah7:23 He wode issi shii biran washettiza issi shii woyne turati tokettidasohoti ubbay agunththinne kindichcho xalla gidana.
Isaiah7:24 Biitta ubbaan kindichchoynne agunththi kumida gishshas asay hee biza wode wondafenne yiish oykki baana.
Isaiah7:25 Kase xoyllen goyettidi kath immiza zumbullati kindichchoninne agunththan kumida gishshas yayyidi issi asikka hee beenna; meheynne dorsi la7ettizaso gidana.

Isaiah8:4 Naazi

Isaiah8:8 Buuri ekkidi duge Yuhuda wodhdhana; biittaa kumidi aadhdhana; qoodhe gakkanaas mittana» gides. Gido attiin Amanu7eelee! Micettida iza qefey ne biittaa gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas kammi oykkides.
Isaiah8:9 Intteno kawoteththatoo! Olas dendidi waassite; intte dippi gaana; haaho deren dizayti ezgite! Olaska giigettite! Intte dippi gaana; Olaska giigettite! Intte meqerettana;

Isaiah8:12 «Hayssi asay
Isaiah8:13 Intte dummasana bessizay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA xalla; intte yayyanaassinne kokkoranaas bessizay iza.
Isaiah8:14 Izi geeshshasoho gidana; gido attiin izi Yuhuda biittaa asaassinne Isra7eele keeththaa asaas dhuphiza shuchchinne kundisiza zaalla gidana; Yerusalaamen diza asaas izi gitenne woximade gidana.
Isaiah8:15 Isttafe daroti dhuphettana; kundidikka meqqana; woximaden geli oykettana» gides.
Isaiah8:16 Markkateththaa lo7eththa oykka; ta tamaareta giddon wogaa maatamen shoca.
Isaiah8:17 Tani ba sinth Yaaqoobe zaretappe genththida GODAA naagana; izakka hidota ooththana.

Isaiah8:19 Asay inttena
Isaiah8:20 Wogaakkonne markkateththa qaalaakko biite! Istti hayssa mala qaala inttes yootontta aggiko wontta poo7oy isttas poo7enna.
Isaiah8:21 Istti ceecishenne gafishe biitta bolla toylattana; istti keehi gafida wode hanqettana; pude xeellidi bantta kawaanne bantta Xoossaa qanggana.
Isaiah8:22 Hessafe guye istti duge biitta xeellana; istti xeellanayssika waaye
Isaiah9:1 Ceecishe dizaytas hayssafe guyen hidotay dhayenna; beni wode Zaabiloone biittanne Niftaaleme biitta kawushshides; sinththafe yaana woden gidikko Mediteraane abbaa ogen de7iza biittanne Yordaanoose Shaafappe he pinththan de7iza
Isaiah9:2 Dhuman de7iza derey wolqqama poo7o be7ides; hayqo kuwa garsan diza deretas poo7oy poo7ides.
Isaiah9:3 Neni kawoteththaa darsadasa; isttas ufayssaa bolla ufays gujjadasa; asay kath shiishshishenne di7i ekkida miish gishettishe ufayettiza mala isttika ne sinththan ufayettana.
Isaiah9:4 Kase neni Midiyaame biitta xoonida mala istta deexxiza qambara
Isaiah9:5 Olanchchata caammay ubbay
Isaiah9:6 Hekko nuus nay yelettides! Attuma naykka nuus imettides! Halaqateththi iza hashe bolla gidana; iza sunththi
Isaiah9:7 Iza kawoteththa aakoteththaassinne iza saroteththaas zaway deenna; hachchife doommidi mernaa gakkanaas ba kawoteththaa
Isaiah9:8 GODAY Yaaqoobe zareta bolla pirda qaala kiittides; izikka Isra7eele bolla polettana.
Isaiah9:9 Efreemeninne Samaariyan de7iza derey ubbay hessa Xoossi ooththidayssa erana; otoroninne moodheteththan dendidi
Isaiah9:10 «Xuubeppe oosettida gimbetti laalettida; nuni gidikko masettida shuchchan zaari gimbana; eththati qanxxettida; nuni gidikko isttasohon ziga laammana» gida.
Isaiah9:11 Hessa gishshas GODAY Eraasoone morkketa minththana; istta morkketa istta bolla denththeththidi ehana.
Isaiah9:12 Arshey mokkiza baggafe Aaraame biittaa asatinne arshey wulliza baggafe Filisxeeme biitta asati bantta doona hangidi Isra7eele mittana. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna.
Isaiah9:13 Derezi gidikko bana shocida GODAAKKO simmibeenna; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAKKA koyibeenna.
Isaiah9:14 Hessa gishshas GODAY hu7enne goyna
Isaiah9:15 Cimatinne bonchchettidayti hu7e; wordo tamaarsiza nabeti goyna.
Isaiah9:16 Hayssa deraa kaaleththizayti baleththeettes; kaalliza dereykka ogeppe kare kezidi toylattees.
Isaiah9:17 Hessa gishshas GODAY naateththa naytan ufayettenna; yi7otassinne am7etas qadhettenna; ubbayka iita ooththizaytanne Xoossa yashshateth bayndayta; ubbaa asaa doonappe harassiza qaalay kezees; hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna.
Isaiah9:18 Deraa iitateththi kindichchonne agunth xuuggiza tama mala; dhippi gida woray xuugettishin keziza cuwa tuussa mala sitti giidi pude kezees.
Isaiah9:19 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA hanqon biittay xuugettana; dereykka taman geliza miththa mala gidana; ishay ishas qadhettenna.
Isaiah9:20 Ushachcha baggara tuxxana; gido attiin gafa teqqenna. Hadirsa baggara maana; gido attiin kallettenna. Issoy issoy ba yelida nayta maana.
Isaiah9:21 Minaasey Efreeme maana; Efreemeykka Minaase maana; istti issife gididi Yuhuda bolla dendana. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy irxxibeenna; iza kusheykka dendidasoppe simmibeenna.

Isaiah10:4 Qashettida asaara issife qasheteththafe shukettiza asaara issife shuketeththafe attiin haray inttes attanaasoy deenna. Hessi ubbay haniinkka GODAA hanqoy dochchibeenna; qaxxayanaas izi ba kushe denththi woththides.

Isaiah10:9 ‹Kalnnoy Karkamishe mala

Isaiah10:13 Asoore kawoy
Isaiah10:14 Asi ba kushe kafo keeththan yeddiza mala tanikka ta kushe kawoteththata aqotan yeddadis. Qasse asi dogetti attida phuuphphulleta shiishshiza mala tanikka dere ubbaa shiishshadis. Paallanaas ba qefe micciday deenna; waassanaas ba doona doyday deenna» gides.

Isaiah11:1 Isseye durumappe aacay purccana; iza xaphotappe issi haggay ayfe immana.
Isaiah11:2 GODAA Ayanay
Isaiah11:3 GODAAS yashshan izi ufayettana; ba ayfen be7ida malanne ba hayththan siyida mala pirdenna.
Isaiah11:4 Gido attiin hiyeesatas xillo pirdana; sa7a bolla manqotas suure pirdana; ba inxarsaa xam7an sa7a shocana; ba doona peenon iitata wodhana.
Isaiah11:5 Xilloteththi izas xeessa dancco gidana; ammaneteththay izas dabala dancco gidana.
Isaiah11:6 Kana suytey dorsa laaqqara issife daana; maaheykka deysha laaqqara issife ichchana; miiza mari
Isaiah11:7 Miizinne zardoy issife heemettana; istta maratikka issife ichchana; gaammoy boora mala happa maana.
Isaiah11:8 Dhammiza nay iita shooshsha ollan kaa7ana; dhanth duuththontta nay ba kushe goppe shooshsha ollan yeddana.
Isaiah11:9 Geeshshi gidida ta zumaa bolla qohettenna woykko oonikka dhayenna; haaththi abba kumiza mala sa7a ubbay GODAA eron kumana.
Isaiah11:10 He wode Isseye zereththi kawoteththatas malaata gidi eqqana; kawoteththati izakko yaana; iza shemposoy bonchchettana.
Isaiah11:11 He wode GODAY nam7anththo ba kushe miccidi attida asaa Asooreppe
Isaiah11:12 Kawoteththatas malaata essana; dhoqqu ooththidi denththana; Isra7eeleppe goodetti bidayta zaari ehana; laalettida Yuhuda asaa oyddu bagga biitta gaxappe izi shiishshana.
Isaiah11:13 Efreeme qanaateteththi eqqana; Yuhuda morkketikka qanxxettana; Efreemey Yuhuda bolla qanaatenna; Yuhudaykka Efreeme ixxenna.
Isaiah11:14 Istti arshey wulliza baggara Filisxeemeta dugunththaa wodhdhana; nam7ayka issife gididi arshey mokkiza dereza bonqqana; istti Eedoome bollanne Mo7aabe bolla bantta kushe denththana; Amoone asay isttas haarettana.
Isaiah11:15 GODAY iita carkon Gibxe abba melissana; izi ba kushe Efiraaxise shaafa bolla yeddana; laappun kessi shaakereththi yeggana; hessa gishshas asay tohoppe caamma kessontta pinnana.
Isaiah11:16 Kase Isra7eeley Gibxeppe kezishin hanidayssaththo Asooren attida asay kezana oge isttas giigsana.
Isaiah12:1 He wode neni
Isaiah12:2 ‹Be7ite
Isaiah12:3 Paththiza ta pulttotappe haath ufayssan duuqqandeta.
Isaiah12:4 He wode intte GODAA galatite! Iza sunththaaka xeygite. Izi ooththidayssa kawoteththata giddon erisite. Iza sunththay dhoqqu dhoqqu gidayssa awajjite.
Isaiah12:5 GODAY gita ooso ooththida gishshas izas yexxite. Hessi kumeththa alames eretto.
Isaiah12:6 Intte giddon diza Isra7eele Geeshshay gita gidida gishshas Xiyoone asawu ilili giite; ufayssankka yexxite» gaandeta.
Isaiah13:1 Amoxe naa Isayaasas GODAY Baabiloone gishshas qonccisiin izi be7idayssi hayssafe kaallizayssa;
Isaiah13:2 aykkoy baynda mela diza zumbulla bolla malata essite; intte qaala dhoqqu histti waassite; istta shuumeta pengera gelana mala malata bessite.
Isaiah13:3 Ta xoonon ufayettizayta ta geeshshata azazadis; ta hanqo istti polana mala ta olanchchata xeygadis.
Isaiah13:4 Daro derey wocamiza mala zumata bolla wocamiza wocamaa siyite! Kawoteththata giddon metottida derey gugumiza gugunththaa siyite! Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY olanchchata olas salfisides.
Isaiah13:5 GODAYNNE izi ba hanqo polisanaas go7ettiza miishshati biitta ubbaa dhayssanaas haaho biittafe salota gaxappe yida.
Isaiah13:6 GODAA gallassi matida gishshas yeekkite! He gallas Ubbaa Dandayza Xoossaa matappe bashshi yaana.
Isaiah13:7 Hessa gishshas kushe ubbay silana; asa ubbaa wozinaykka seerana.

Isaiah15:1 Mo7aabe biitta gishshas GODAY yootida qaalay hayssa; Qiire-Mo7aaben diza Eerey laalettadus; issi gallassa omarsan dippi gadus; qasse Qiire-Mo7aaben diza Qiirey laalettadus; issi gallassa omars dippi gadus.
Isaiah15:2 Diboone asay Xoossa keeth kezides; yeekkanaas pude zumbullata bolla kezides; Mo7aabe asay Nebo gishshassinne Medeba gishshas waassees; hu7eynne buuchchay milxi gi meedettides.

Isaiah22:25 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Isaiah23:1 Xiroose bolla yootettida mino yo7o; Xiroosey dippi gi dhayda gishshas Tarseese markabetoo waassite; keeththinne wodebey bayndaso gidadus. Qophiroose biittafe worey kezides.
Isaiah23:2 Intteno harurotoo! Intteno duretida Sidoona zal7anchchatoo! Co7u giite!
Isaiah23:3 Gita abbaara Shihooreppe Xirooses kaththi yees; Xiroose aqotay Abbayeppe beettees; iza kawoteththatas zal7e baach gidadus.
Isaiah23:4 Hanne Sidoona katamayee! Hanne abba miixaye neni yeellata; abbay
Isaiah23:5 Xirooseppe keziza paapunththay Gibxe biittan siyettiza wode istti ceecana.
Isaiah23:6 Intteno harurotoo! Zilalite; Tarseese pinnite.
Isaiah23:7 Izi tohoy izo haako dere efidaara heen iza uttana mala ooththidaara
Isaiah23:8 Kallachcha goxissidaari bolla
Isaiah23:9 Otorettizayta ubbaa bonchcho kawushshanaas qasse biittaa bolla dhoqqu dhoqqu gidayta ziqqi histtanaas GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay halchchides.
Isaiah23:10 Intteno Tarseese biitta asatoo! Inttena teqqizay baynda gishshas Abbaye shaafa mala intte biitta bollan kumidi goggite.
Isaiah23:11 GODAY ba kusheza abba bolla miccides; izi kawoteththatakka daganththides; Kanaane miixati laalettana mala azazides.
Isaiah23:12 Qasseka
Isaiah23:13 Ane Baabiloone biitta be7ite; he biitta asay paththontta as gidides; Asoore asay izo bazzo do7as gufaso kessides; istti bantta shakkota izi bolla gimbida; izi miixata laallida; budhettoyssi doore gidides.
Isaiah23:14 Intteno Tarseese markabetoo
Isaiah23:15 He wode Xiroose katamay issi kawos de7o layththa keena laappun tammu layth dogettana; hessafe guye layma maccassay gishshas yexettida yeththi Xiroose bolla yexettana.
Isaiah23:16 Istti
Isaiah23:17 Laappun tammu layththi polettidaappe guye GODAY Xiroose qoppana; gido attiin iza kase ba layma ooson simmana; sa7a bolla kawoteththata ubbaara ba laymateththa zal7e zal7ana.
Isaiah23:18 Gidikkoka iza demmida ubbaynne wodhey GODAAS dummatana; dagattennanne suuddenna; izi wodhey GODAA sinththan de7izaytas palahida kaththinne lo7o may7o gidana.
Isaiah24:1 Be7ite! GODAY biittaa bula kessana; mulera dhayssana; budheththa doore histtana; izin diza asaa laallana.
Isaiah24:2 Ubbaa miishshika issi mala gidana; dereza bolla hanzayssi qeeseza bolla hanana; aylle bolla hanzayssi godaa bolla hanana; ashkaray bolla hanzayssi godattey bolla hanana; shammizayssa bolla hanzayssi bayzizayssa bolla hanana; tal7e ekkizayssa bolla hanzayssi tal7e immizayssa bolla hanana; aco ciggizayssa bolla hanzayssi aco cigissizayssa bolla hanana.
Isaiah24:3 Biittay mulera bula gidana; mulera bonqqettana; ha qaalaa GODAY haasaydes.
Isaiah24:4 Biittaya melana; izin diza ubbay qokkana; alamey daaburana; biitta bolla erettida gita asati daaburana.
Isaiah24:5 Biittay ba asaan tunadus; istti woga menththida; maaraa moorida; mernaa caaqo qaala menththida.
Isaiah24:6 Hessa gishshas qanggeththi biittaa mees; izin de7iza dereti bantta mooron qaxxayettana bessees; Hessa gishshas sa7a bolla diza asati xuugettida; isttafe qoodan guuththa asati attida.
Isaiah24:7 Woyne turay meliin woyne ushshi wurides; kase ufayettiza ubbay ceecides.
Isaiah24:8 Ufayssan karabe baqay co7u gides; kaa7izayta hombocaykka eqqides; ufayssiza diiththa giirissi co7u gides.
Isaiah24:9 Hayssafe guye istti yexxishe woyne ushshu uyettenna; ushshayka uyizayta cammana.
Isaiah24:10 Laalettida katamaya kayzadus; keeththa pengetikka gordettida.
Isaiah24:11 Woyne ushsha gishshas dubbushan waasseettes; ufayssi ubbay ceecen laamettana; homboca kaassi biitta bollafe dhaydes.
Isaiah24:12 Katamaya mulera laalettadus; pengetikka meqeretti kundida.
Isaiah24:13 Wogara miththa ayfe shoci qoqofiin woyne miththa qanxxi ekkiin attiza attida pushulo mala biittaa bolla
Isaiah24:14 Istti bantta qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi ufayssan yexxana; arshey wulliza baggafe GODAA gitateththa yootana.
Isaiah24:15 Hessa gishshas arshey mokkiza baggara dizaytoo
Isaiah24:16 Biittaa gaxaappe
Isaiah24:17 Intteno sa7a bollan diza asatoo
Isaiah24:18 Salo maskooteti doyettida gishshas
Isaiah24:19 Biittay qaaxxides; za7idessinne phalqetti wodhdhides.
Isaiah24:20 Biittay maththottida asa mala yiicotides; carkoy sugida gaabba mala gidadus. Biitta makkallateththay deexo gidida gishshas kundana; nam7anththoka simmi dendenna.
Isaiah24:21 He gallas GODAY bolla salon diza wolqqamata gars biitta bolla diza kawotakka qaxxayana.
Isaiah24:22 Istti ollan diza qasho asa mala issi bolla uucettana; istti qasho keeththan gordetti uttana; daro wodeppe guye istti pirda ekkana shiiqana.
Isaiah24:23 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY Xiyoone zumaninne Yerusalaamen cimata sinththan bonchchon kawotana; he wode aginay shaaphettana; awa ayfeykka yeellatana.
Isaiah25:1 Abeet GODAWU! Neni ta Xoossaa. Tani nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana; ne sunththaaka sabbana. Gaasoykka benippe qofettidayssa malalisiza hano kumeththa ammaneteththan ooththadasa.
Isaiah25:2 Neni katamayo shuchcha doore ooththadasa; gimbettida katamayokka laalladasa; hayssafe sinththan gimbettida allagata katamati deettenna; Simmidi mulekka oosetettenna.
Isaiah25:3 Hessa gishshas mino dereti nena bonchchana; menxe iita kawoteththati nees yayyana.
Isaiah25:4 Neni hiyeesatas zemppo; Metotanchchatas meto wode neni zemppo; gote carkofe geemmi attizaso; awa seelappe kuwattizaso gidadasa. Gaasoykka menxe iitata peenoy keeththa godara icettiza gote carko mala.
Isaiah25:5 Bazzo biitta seela mala. Allaga otoreteththa waaso co7u ooththaasa. Awa seelay shaaraa kuwan irxxiza mala menxe iitata mazamure sirphi gaana.
Isaiah25:6 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay hayssa zumaa bolla dere ubbaas gidiza gita gibiraa
Isaiah25:7 Hayssa ha zumaan dere ubbaa bollan wodhdhida magalasha
Isaiah25:8 Hayqo izi mernaas mittana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY asa ubbaa ayfeppe afunththu quccana; ba deraa kawushshateth biitta ubbaafe diggana. Hayssa GODAY haasaydes.
Isaiah25:9 He gallas isttas
Isaiah25:10 GODAA kushey ha zumaa bolla shemppana. Gido attiin uttulay urqqan yedhettiza mala Mo7aabeykka yedhettana.
Isaiah25:11 Haaththa wadhdhizay ba kushe micciza mala iza giddon dizayti bantta kushe miccana; Xoossi istta gene ooso balettontta istta otoreteththaa kawushshana.
Isaiah25:12 Istti dhoqqu histti gimbida gimbeza izi duge ziqqi histtana; duge woththana; kawushshidi duge sa7an woththidi gudulla bolla yeggana.
Isaiah26:1 He gallas ha yeththay Yuhuda biittan yexettana. Nuus mino katamay dees; Xoossi iza gimbetanne miixata atoteththas ooththides.
Isaiah26:2 Ba ammano naagida
Isaiah26:3 Nenan ammanettida gishshas nenan zemppida shemppoyo neni kumeththa saroteththan naagaasa.
Isaiah26:4 Mernaas GODAAN ammanettite; GODAY nuus mernaa Zaalla.
Isaiah26:5 Dhoqqasohon dizayta ziqqi ooththana; dhoqqu gida katama kawushshana; duge biittan olana; gudullara walakkana.
Isaiah26:6 Tohon yedhettana; un7ettidayta tohoynne manqota tohoy iza yedhdhana.
Isaiah26:7 Xillota ogey moole. Nenoo Suurezoo
Isaiah26:8 Abeet GODAWU! Ne woga ogera hemettishe nuni nena hidota ooththidos; ne sunththinne ne gitateththi nu wozinas amo.
Isaiah26:9 Ta shemppoya omarsi nena laamotawus; ta ayanay maalado nena koyawus; ne pirday biitta bolla yida wode sa7an de7iza asay xilloteth tamaarees.
Isaiah26:10 Iita asatas kiya ooththikokka
Isaiah26:11 Abeet GODAWU! Ne qesey dhoqqu dhoqqu gides. Istti gidikko be7ettenna; Ne asaas ne mishettizayssa be7ettonne yeellatetto; Ne morkketas giigida tamay istta mo.
Isaiah26:12 Abeet GODAWU! Neni nuus saroteth yoch ooththadasa; nu ooso ubbaa neni ooththadasa.
Isaiah26:13 Abeet GODAWU Nu Xoossawu! neeppe hara allaga xoossati nuna haarida; nuni gidikko ne sunththaa xalla bonchchoos.
Isaiah26:14 Istti hayqqida; simmidi shemppora paxa de7ettenna; istta shemppoy simmi yeenna; neni istta qaxxayadasanne dhayssadasa; istta hassa7issiza miish ubbaa pitta dhayssadasa.
Isaiah26:15 Abeet GODAWU! Neni kawoteththaa darsadasa; Neni deraa darsadasa. Neni bonchchettadasa; biittaa zawa ubbaaka aassadasa.
Isaiah26:16 Abeet GODAWU! Istti metotida wode neekko yida; Neni istta seerida wode
Isaiah26:17 Abeet GODAWU! Shaara maccassi miixan metotiza malanne waassiza mala nunikka ne sinththan metotidi waassoos.
Isaiah26:18 Nuni shaaridos; miixankka un7ettidos; gido attiin carko yelidos. Nuni sa7as atoteth ehibookko; sa7an diza deraakka yelibookko.
Isaiah26:19 Gido attiin hayqqida ne asay paxana; istta ahaykka dendana. Intteno biitta garsan dizaytoo! Dendite ufayssan yexxite; ne xaazay biitta yakkissiza maalado xaaza mala sa7ay mittidayta zaara cuttana.
Isaiah26:20 Ta derezoo! Ba ne keeth gela; ne penge ne bolla gorda; iza hanqoy aadhdhana gakkanaas guuththa wodes qotetaashsha.
Isaiah26:21 Biittaa bollan diza asaa istta nagaraa gishshas qaxxayanaas
Isaiah27:1 He gallas GODAY lewataane geetettiza xongettiza shooshshaanne xaaxettiza shooshshaa ba mino
Isaiah27:2 He gallas

Isaiah27:4 Tani hanqettike; tanara olettanaas agunththinne kindichchoy kezidaakko ta istta issi bolla xuuggana!
Isaiah27:5 Woykko taakko yiidi tana banttas qotettizaso kessetto; tanara giigetto; ee tanara giigetto» geetettana.
Isaiah27:6 Yaana gallassatan Yaaqoobey xapho yeddana; Isra7eeley aacananne ciiyana; histtiin istta ayfey sa7a kumana.
Isaiah27:7 Izo shocidayta shocida mala GODAY izo shocidee? Izo wodhidayta izi wodhida mala izo wodhidee?
Isaiah27:8 Olaninne di7on ne izo qaxxayadasa; arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy carkiza mala wolqqama gote carkon ne izo gooddadasa.
Isaiah27:9 Yaaqoobey yarsho yarshizaso shuchchata booqintta shuchcha mala gaacci liiqisishin Asheero geetettiza eeqa xoossay mislenne exaane cuwasiza sohota istti dizasohotappe shoddi olishin he gallas mooroy atto geetettana; hessi izi ba nagara diggoyssas kumeththa ayfe gidana.
Isaiah27:10 Gimbettida katamaya kayzadus; bazzo biitta mala olettidaso gidadus; marati heen heemettidi heen ichchana; izi haggatakka poqqi maana.
Isaiah27:11 Izi xeeray melidi meqqana; maccassatikka mixi eeththana; akeekay baynda dere gidida gishshas iza medhdhiday izas qadhettenna; ooththidayssika iza maarenna.

Isaiah28:7 Hayti woyne ushshu uyidi yiicoteettes; maththosiza ushshan gandigareettes. Qeesetinne nabeti maththosiza ushshan gandigarda; woyne ushsha gaason yo7oy isttafe balettides; maththosiza ushshan gandigarda; ajjuutaa likkera be7ettenna; pirda pirdishe dhuphetteettes.

Isaiah28:29 Hayssi ubbay ba zoren malalisizaaz
Isaiah29:1 Hanne Dawiti nenan de7ida Ar7eele katamayee! Nena aayye ana! Layththa bolla layth gujja; ba7aaletakka zaara zaarada bonchcha.
Isaiah29:2 Gido attiin tani Ar7eele katamayo giddoththana; iza yeekkananne waassana; iza taas yarsho yarshizaso gidana.
Isaiah29:3 Tani ne yuushon dunkaanana; ta ne yuushon gimbe yuushsha aaththana; ne yuushon shakko ooththada ta nena un7eththana.
Isaiah29:4 Neni duge wodhdhana; biitta garsafe pude haasayana; ne haasayay gudullaa giddofe kezana; ne cenggurssi moytille cenggurssa mala biitta garsafe pude kezana; ne haasayaykka gudulla giddofe saasukettana.
Isaiah29:5 Gido attiin daro ne morkketi gudulla suulla mala

Isaiah29:10 GODAY intte bolla wolqqama dhisko yeggides; intte nabeta ayfe goozides; ajjuuta be7izayta hu7e gullunttissides.

Isaiah29:13 GODAY

Isaiah29:15 Bantta halchcho GODAAPPE genththanaas duge ciimma ollan wodhdhizaytas bantta ooso dhuman ooththizaytas «Nuna ooni be7anee? Nuna ooni eranee?» gizaytas aayye ana!
Isaiah29:16 Intte yo7ota laammi yeggeeta; manata urqqa mala xeelleeta! Medhettidayssi medhdhidayssa

Isaiah29:22 Hessa gishshas Abrahaame wozzida GODAY Yaaqoobesos

Isaiah30:1 GODAY

Isaiah30:16 Qasseka
Isaiah30:17 Intte zuma hu7en eqqida bandira mala zumbullata xeeran eqqida malata mala gidi intte attanaashe gakkanaas issi asa mandeththan 1
Isaiah30:18 Gido attiin GODAY inttes kiya ooththanaas naagees; inttena ba qadheteththa bessanaas dendees; GODAY tumu pirdiza Xoossa gidida gishshas ammanettidi iza naagizayti anjjettidayta.
Isaiah30:19 Intteno Yerusalaamen de7iza Xiyoone derezoo! Hayssafe sinththan intte yeekkeketa; intte izakko waassishin izi inttena waani maarennee? Intte waaso izi siyidi inttes eeson zaaro immana.
Isaiah30:20 GODAY inttes waaye kaththinne meto haath immikokka hayssafe guye intte astamaarey inttefe qotettenna; intte ayfetikka intte astamaareza be7ana.
Isaiah30:21 Intte hadirs woykko ushach giikko intte guyera
Isaiah30:22 Hessafe biran meeshettida intte eeqa xoossatanne worqqan meeshettida misleta intte moorana; «Nuuppe haakkite» giidi tuna carqqa mala intte wora yeggana.
Isaiah30:23 Ne zerida kaththas izi ira immana; biittafe mokkida kaththay muurutanne daro gidana. He wode intte mehey aaho demban heemettana.
Isaiah30:24 Goshsha booratinne hareti bakkan bukki suragettida harqqonne basso maana.

Isaiah30:27 Be7ite

Isaiah30:31 GODAA cenggurssi Asoore daganththana; iza guufeykka istta shocana.
Isaiah30:32 GODAY istta bolla yeddiza qixaate guufe ubbay karabe giirissaninne diiththa giirissan azhabettidayssa; izi ba wolqqa olan bessidi istta shocides.
Isaiah30:33 Beni wodeppe doommidi Toofeete geetettiza xuuggizasoy giigetti uttides; kawozasikka giigetti uttides; xuuggana gongolozikka aahonne ciimma; iza giddon daro tamaynne eexxana miththi dees; GODAA peenoy diine tama mala eeththi kessana.
Isaiah31:1 Pude Isra7eele geeshshaako xeellonttaytas

Isaiah31:3 Gibxe asay asappe attiin Xoos deettenna; istta paratikka ashoppe attiin ayana gidettenna. GODAY ba kushe micciza wode iza maaddizaadey dhuphettana; maadettizaadeyka kundana; nam7ayka issife dhayana.

Isaiah31:8 «Asoorey asa mashsha gidontta mashshan hayqqana; asho may7idaade mashsha gidontta hara mashshay iza maana; izi giththa mashsha sinththafe baqatana; naateththati dosay baynda wolqqaththon ooththana.
