Isaiah32:1 Be7ite
Isaiah32:2 Asi hu7en hu7en carkofe geemmizasoho
Isaiah32:3 Xeelliza asata ayfey hayssafe guye qilim7enna; siyizayta hayththi beeggidi ezgana.
Isaiah32:4 Tapitapizayta wozinay erananne akeekana; Deddotizayta inxarsika birshettana; geeshshidikka haasayana.
Isaiah32:5 Hayssafe guyen eeyay gita as geetettenna; wogay baynda asi bonchchettenna.
Isaiah32:6 Eeyay eeyateth haasayees; iza wozinay iitateth yuushshi qoppees; Xoossas yashshateththi baynda miish ooththees; GODAA bolla bala qaala haasayees; gafidayssas kath immenna; saamettidayssas haath immenna.
Isaiah32:7 Wogay baynda asata hiillateththi iita; metotanchchata maganay suure gidikkoka hiyeesata wordora dhayssanaas iitateththan yuushshi qoppees.
Isaiah32:8 Gita asas qofaykka gita; ba gitateththa ooson minni de7ees.
Isaiah32:9 Intteno otoroy tuccida maccassatoo! Dendite; ta gizaaz siyite; intteno badhdhi gi uttida macca naytoo! tani inttes yootizayssa ezgite.
Isaiah32:10 Layththay buro aadhdhida mala
Isaiah32:11 Intteno otoroy tuccida maccassatoo! Kokkorite. Intteno badhdhi gida macca naytoo! Hirgan gajigajite. Intte may7ida may7o qaari yeggite; intte xeessan maaqa danccite.
Isaiah32:12 Aradda biitta gishshas intte tiraa iccite; ayfiza woyne miththaa gishshas ceecite;
Isaiah32:13 Ta deraa biittaa gishshas
Isaiah32:14 Miixati kayzana; daro shirotiza katamaya dimmi gaana; miixatinne qatoti mernaas gongolo
Isaiah32:15 Hessika hananay Ayanay nuus bollafe gukkanaashe
Isaiah32:16 Hessafe guye bazzo biittan suure pirday de7ana; aradda biittankka xilloteththi daana.
Isaiah32:17 Xilloteththa ayfey saroteth; xilloteththa oosoy woppanne mernaas ammaneteth gidana.
Isaiah32:18 Ta derey saroy dizason
Isaiah32:19 Shachchi woraa kurakkiko
Isaiah32:20 shaafay dizason dizason kath zerizaytoo
Isaiah33:1 Nees dhayontta dashe hara dhayssizayssoo! Nees aayye ana! Nena aaththi immontta dishin hara aaththa immizayssoo! Nees aayye ana! Neni dhayso aggida wode ne dhayana; neni aaththa imo aggida wode nena aaththi immana.
Isaiah33:2 Abeet GODAWU! Nuna maara; nuni nena hidota ooththidos; maalado maalado nuus wolqqa gida; meto wodekka nuna ashshizaade gida.
Isaiah33:3 Ne cenggurssay dada mala guummiza wode derey baqatees; neni denda eqqiza wode kawoteththati laaletteettes.
Isaiah33:4 Kawoteththatoo! Booley shiiqiza mala inttefe di7ettidayssi shiiqana; gumbaroy guppiza mala asay iza bolla dirbbatana.
Isaiah33:5 GODAY bolla salon de7iza gishshas
Isaiah33:6 Izi ne diza layth ubbaan ammanththiza yoch
Isaiah33:7 Be7ite
Isaiah33:8 Wogga ogeti samida; ogera kanththizay deenna. Qachchida qaalay laalettides; zorizayti kadhettida; bonchchettizaykka deenna.
Isaiah33:9 Biittaya yeekkadussinne gilqadus; Libaanoosey yeellatidi shullides; Lasharooney Arabe mala bazzo gidadus; Baasaaneynne Qarmeloosey bantta hayth qoqofida.
Isaiah33:10 GODAY kawoteththatasi
Isaiah33:11 Intte uttula shaaridi suulla yelideta. Intte shemppiza shemppoy inttena miza tama.
Isaiah33:12 Derey booqintta keziza shuchcha mala taman xuugettana; qasseka agunththa tusha mala taman eexxana.
Isaiah33:13 Intteno haakon de7izaytoo! tani ooththidayssa siyite; matan dizaytoo! Ta wolqqaa erite» gees.
Isaiah33:14 Xiyoonen diza nagaranchchati dagammida; Xoossi isttas bayndayti babbidi
Isaiah33:15 Xilloteththan hemettizay
Isaiah33:16 Hessaadey dhoqqasohon daana; zuma miixay izas shiiqi attizaso gidana; izas qumay imettana; haaththika izas paccenna.
Isaiah33:17 Ne ayfeti kawoza puulateth be7ana; haakon micetti diza biittaaka be7ana.
Isaiah33:18 Beni waayey nees qofettishin neni
Isaiah33:19 Heytantti qadhetay baynda asa; istta haasayay asas gelonttaytanne istta inxarsi deddotizayta; hayssafe guye intte istta beyekketa.
Isaiah33:20 Nu ba7aaleta izin bonchchiza Xiyoone katamayo be7ite! Saron dizasohoyo
Isaiah33:21 Heen GODAY nuus wolqqa gidana; he sohoy dalga shaafanne kanchche gidana; wogoloy iza bollara baanaas dandayenna; gita markabetikka iza bollara beettenna.
Isaiah33:22 GODAY nuus pirdiza daanna; GODAY nuus woga immizaade; GODAY nuus kawo; nuna ashshanaykka iza.
Isaiah33:23 Ne tole wodoroy leppides; tuussay minni eqqibeenna; sharazi tolettibeenna; he wode di7ettida gita miishshi gishettana; wobbeyka attontta di7o ekkana.
Isaiah33:24 Xiyoonen dishe
Isaiah34:1 Intteno kawoteththatoo shiiqidi siyite! Neni derezi akeeka! Biittaynne biittan diza ubbay
Isaiah34:2 GODAY kawoteth ubbaa hanqettides; iza hanqoyka iza olanchchata ubbaa bollana. Izi istta mulera dhayssana; shukaska aaththi immana.
Isaiah34:3 Isttafe hayqqidayti kare olettana; istta ahay xinqqana. Zumati suuth xalla gidana.
Isaiah34:4 Salo xoolintteti ubbay seerana; saloy galba mala xaaxettana; cora xoolintteti ubbay
Isaiah34:5 Ta giththa mashshay salota giddon baas gidana gakkanaas uyadus; be7ite; Eedoome bolla
Isaiah34:6 GODAA giththa mashshay suuth may7adus; modhdhoka kalladus; dorsa laaqqa suuththaninne deysha suuththan goozettadus; dharsho kilaho moodhen goozettadus; GODAY Booxira kataman yarsho
Isaiah34:7 Qasse Isttara menththi
Isaiah34:8 Hessika GODAY halo kessiza gallassinne Xiyoone gishshas morkketa oliza layth gidana.
Isaiah34:9 Eedoome kanchcheti shida gidana; izi biittay xuugettiza diine gidana; izi biittay shida mala eexxana.
Isaiah34:10 Izo miza tamay qammanne gallas to7enna; cuwaykka mernaas tullu gaana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas kays gidana. Oonikka nam7anththo heera aadhdhenna.
Isaiah34:11 Xiloynne quxarsi izo laattana; guttoynne quuroy izin keeth keexxana; Xoossi Eedoome bolla izo laallana wodoronne izo dhayssana tumbe yeddana.
Isaiah34:12 Izi daannati kawo geetetti xeygettanaas dandayza miishshi deenna; izi halaqati mulera pitetti dhayana.
Isaiah34:13 Gimbetti yuuyida katamata
Isaiah34:14 Bazzo do7ati godaretara issife daana; bazzo deysh misatiza daydanththati bantta giddon xeygettana; omarsa medhetati heen shemppana; banttas duussaso heen demmana.
Isaiah34:15 Guttoy he keeththan phuuphphulleta yeggana; zaaradakka phuqissana; ba ciyetakka haphphana; woleti waaththan waaththan heen shiiqana.
Isaiah34:16 GODAA maxaafan xeellite; nababite. Haytappe issoyka paccenna; issoy issoy baas waaththa lagge dhayenna; hayssi ha azazozi iza doonappe kezides; iza ayanay istta issi bolla shiishshana.
Isaiah34:17 Istta gisha gisha isttas woththana; iza kushey meezaanen meezaanen gishana; iza mernaas isttas gidana; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas istti izin de7ana.
Isaiah35:1 Bazzoynne mela biittay ufayettana; aykkoy baynda bazzoy ufayettana; ciishsha malakka ciiyana.
Isaiah35:2 Izi daro ufayettananne miiccana; Libaanoose bonchchoy izas imettana; Qarmeloosenne Lasharoone teema izi may7ana; nu GODAA bonchchonne Xoossaa gitateththaa istti be7ana.
Isaiah35:3 Daaburda qeseta minththite; argacida gulbatata minththite.
Isaiah35:4 Wozinan yashshay dizayta «Minnite! Yayyofte! Intte Xoossi yiidi halo kessana; izi inttena ashshanaasinne halo kessanaas yaana» giite.
Isaiah35:5 He wode qooqeta ayfey xeellana; tulleta hayththi siyana.
Isaiah35:6 Wobbey genessa mala guppana; duude doonay ufayssan yexxana; bazzofe haaththi kezana; pulttoy bazzo biittafe pulttana.
Isaiah35:7 Xuuggiza biittan eele haaththi kumana; mela biittati haath pulttana; worakanati aqiza ollan maatay
Isaiah35:8 Heen wogga ogey oosettana; izikka
Isaiah35:9 Heen gaammoy de7enna; dafi miza do7aykka izan kezenna; heytantti heen beettettenna; wozzettidayti xalla heera baana.
Isaiah35:10 GODAY maaddidayti simmana; istti yexxishe Xiyoone gelana; mernaa ufayssa kallachcha mala goxxana; injjenne ufays demmana; ceeceynne kayoy heeppe baqatana.

Isaiah40:1 Intte Xoossay

Isaiah40:16 Libaanoosey yarshosoho tamas gidukku; izi medosata qoodaykka xuugettiza yarshos guuththa.

Isaiah40:28 Ne erabeekkii? Ne siyabeekkii? GODAY mernaa Xoossa; izi biittaa ubbaaka medhdhidayssa. Izi daaburenna; azallenna; iza akeekaykka oonankka pilggettenna.

Isaiah41:1 GODAY
Isaiah41:2 Arshey mokkiza baggafe issaa denththiday

Isaiah41:7 Hiillanchchay worqqa ooththizayssa minththeththees; naariqan qoxxi le7issizaadey birata marcon seerisizayssa minththeththees; birata seerisi oyseththoy
Isaiah41:8 GODAY
Isaiah41:9 tani nena biitta gaxappe ehidayssoo
Isaiah41:10 Tani nenara diza gishshas yayyofa; tani ne Xoossa gidida gishshas dagammofa. Tani nena minththananne maaddana. Ta xilloteththa ushachcha kushen zemppisa oykkana.
Isaiah41:11 «Be7a ne bolla hanqettida ubbay keehi yeellatananne kawuyana; nenara eqettizayti tim7i gi dhayana.
Isaiah41:12 Neni ne morkketakka koyadakka demmaka; nena olizayti pitetti dhayana.
Isaiah41:13 Gaasoykka tani GODAA ne Xoossay
Isaiah41:14 Nenoo guxunezoo Yaaqoobe
Isaiah41:15 Be7a tani nena oorath
Isaiah41:16 Neni istta suraggana; carkoy istta pitti efana; goteykka istta laallana. Gido attiin neni GODAAN ufayettana; qasse Isra7eele Geeshshan bonchchettana.
Isaiah41:17 Hiyeesatinne metotanchchati haath koyana; gido attiin aykkoka demmettenna; haaththa saamon isttas poorandey melides; Gido attiin tani GODAY isttas zaaro immana; tani Isra7eele Xoossay istta yegga aggike.
Isaiah41:18 Tani bulattida zumbullata bolla shaafata
Isaiah41:19 Bazzo biittan ziga
Isaiah41:20 Hessa gishshas asay hessa be7ananne erana; GODAA kushey hayssa ooththidayssa
Isaiah41:21 GODAY
Isaiah41:22 Buroppe hananayssa yootana mala intte eeqa xoossata haa ehite; nu akeekana malanne istta wurseththaaka erana mala kase yo7oti aazakko nuus yootite; buroppe hanana miishshata erite.
Isaiah41:23 Intte xoossata gididayssa nu erana mala
Isaiah41:24 Hekko intte aykko qoodan gelonttayta; intte oosoy mulekka hada; inttena dooridayti harassizayta.
Isaiah41:25 «Tani pudeha baggafe issaa denththadis; izikka yees. Arshey mokkiza baggara yizayssi ta sunththaa xeygizayssa; manay urqqa yedhdhiza mala izi kaaleththizaytakka yedhdhees.
Isaiah41:26 Nuni erana mala koyrotti nuus awajjiday
Isaiah41:27 Koyrottada
Isaiah41:28 Tani xeelliza wode oonikka deenna; istta giddon zoranchchay baawa; ta oychchida wode zaaro immizaykka deenna.
Isaiah41:29 Be7ite istti ubbayka hada; istta oososka go7ay deenna; istta misletikka aykkoy baynda carko mala» gees.
Isaiah42:1 GODAY
Isaiah42:2 Waassenna; ba qaala dhoqqisenna; ba cenggurssaaka oge bolla keehi sissenna.
Isaiah42:3 Dinccettida maqqa izi menththenna; cuwattiza muqaadda izi toyssenna; ammaneteththan izi suure pirda ehana.
Isaiah42:4 Izi biitta bolla suure pirda ehana gakkanaas daaburenna; hidotakka qanxxenna; haruroti iza wogan ammanettana» gees.
Isaiah42:5 Salota medhdhiday
Isaiah42:6 «Tani GODAY nena xilloteththan xeygadis; ta ne kushe oykkana; ta nena naagana. Tani nena kawoteththaas caaqo qaala
Isaiah42:7 Ne qooqeta ayfe doy7ana; di7ettidayta qasho keeththafe birshana; dhuman uttidaytakka karchchallefe kessana.
Isaiah42:8 «Tani GODAA; hayssi ta sunththa; ta bonchcho haras aaththa immike; ta galataakka eeqa xoossatas sheedhdhike.
Isaiah42:9 Be7ite beni yo7oti polettida; ha7i tani ooraththa miish awajjays; izi mokkanaappe sinth ta inttes yootays» gees.
Isaiah42:10 Intteno duge abban wodhdhizaytoo
Isaiah42:11 Bazzoynne katamati bantta cenggurssaa dhoqqu histtetto; Qeedaarey de7iza gutay ufayetto; Seela dere asati ufayssan yexetto; zuma xeerankka ililetto.
Isaiah42:12 Istti bonchcho GODAAS immetto; iza galataykka harurotan awajjetto.
Isaiah42:13 GODAY ola qara mala kezana; olanchcha mala ho7etti dendana. Ceeqeteththa gayro sissana; ba morkketakka oli xoonana.
Isaiah42:14 GODAY
Isaiah42:15 Tani zumatanne zumbullata woddisana; doozata ubbaa melissana. Shaafata haruro biitta kessana; eele haaththatakka micinchchana.
Isaiah42:16 Tani qooqeta istti erontta oge kaaleththana; istti meezetontta ogerakka ta istta efana; dhumaza ta istta sinththan poo7isana; kundukurcco sohota ta giigsana; haytantta ubbaa ta ooththontta aggike.
Isaiah42:17 Eeqa xoossatan ammanettizayti gidikko misletakka
Isaiah42:18 GODAY
Isaiah42:19 Ta ashkaraappe attiin hara qooqey oonee? Tani kiittidaadefe attiin hara tulley oonee? taas ammanettidaade mala qooqey
Isaiah42:20 Daro miish be7ideta shin akeekibeekketa; intte hayththay doya dees shin siyekketa» gees.
Isaiah42:21 GODAY ba xilloteththaa gishshas giidi
Isaiah42:22 Ha derey bogettidanne bonqqettida
Isaiah42:23 Intte giddofe hayssa siyizay
Isaiah42:24 Yaaqoobey bogettana mala
Isaiah42:25 Hessa gishshas eexxiza ba hanqoza
Isaiah43:1 Ha7i gidikko Yaaqoobe
Isaiah43:2 Neni haaththa giddora pinniza wode
Isaiah43:3 Gaasoykka tani GODAA ne Xoossay
Isaiah43:4 Neni ta sinththan al7onne bonchcho gidida gishshas
Isaiah43:5 «Tani nenara diza gishshas yayyofa; tani ne nayta arshey mokkiza baggafe ehana; nena arshey wulliza baggafe shiishshana.
Isaiah43:6 Tani pudeha bagga
Isaiah43:7 ta sunththan xeygettida ubbaa
Isaiah43:8 Ayfey dishin qooqidayta
Isaiah43:9 Kawoteththati ubbay issife shiiqetto; asaykka issi bolla shiiqo; isttafe kasetidi hayssa nuus yootiday oonee? Beni miish nuus awajjiday oonee? Harati siyidi
Isaiah43:10 «Intte tana erana malanne ammanana mala
Isaiah43:11 Tana; tani GODAA; Taappe attiin hara ashshizay deenna.
Isaiah43:12 Tani qonccisadis; ashshadissinne yootadis; intte giddon hara allaga xoossi de7ibeenna. Tani Xoossa gididayssas intte ta markkatta.
Isaiah43:13 Beniisofe doommada tani tana; ta kusheppe kessi ekkanay deenna; ta ooththizayssa laammanawu dandayzay oonee?» gees GODAY.
Isaiah43:14 GODAY inttena wozziza Isra7eele Geeshshay
Isaiah43:15 Tani GODAY intte Geeshshay
Isaiah43:16 Abbaa giddora oge
Isaiah43:17 para-gaaretanne parata
Isaiah43:18 «Beni yo7ota hassa7opite; kase aadhdhidayssa balite.
Isaiah43:19 Hekko ta ooraththa miish ooththana; izikka ha7i hanana; intte yuushshi qoppeketii? Tani bazzon oge giigsana; tani aykkoy baynda bazzonkka shaafata kessana.
Isaiah43:20 Bazzo do7ati
Isaiah43:21 Tani taas giigsida derey ta galataa awajjana mala ta hayssa ooththana.
Isaiah43:22 «Yaaqoobe
Isaiah43:23 Neni taas xuugettiza yarshos dors ehabeekka; ne yarshonkka tana bonchchabeekka. Tani nena kaththa yarshon waayisabeekke; exaane yarshonkka saleththabeekke.
Isaiah43:24 Neni taas lo7o sawiza exaane shammabeekka; modhdho yarshon tana kalssabeekka. Gido attiin ne nagara tooho tana toossadasa; qohon tana daaburissadasa.
Isaiah43:25 «Ta gishshas gaada ne qohoza dhayssizay tani tana; ne nagaraa ta qoppike.
Isaiah43:26 Ane kase aadhdhidayssa tana qofsa; ane issife shiiqidi qoodhettoos; ne tumateththaa ane erisa.
Isaiah43:27 Ne aawa koyroyssi nagara ooththides; ne astamaaretikka ta bolla makkallida.
Isaiah43:28 Hessa gishshas tani ne Xoossa Keeththa halaqata kawushshana; Yaaqoobe bashshas
Isaiah44:1 GODAY
Isaiah44:2 Nena medhdhiday
Isaiah44:3 Tani saamettida biittan haath gussana; mela biittankka shaafa gogisana. Tani ta Ayana ne zereththa bolla
Isaiah44:4 Istti demban cilila maata mala
Isaiah44:5 Issoy
Isaiah44:6 Isra7eele kawoynne istta wozzizay
Isaiah44:7 Ta malay ooni dizee? Ane yooto; koyro ta deraas ta yoch yeggishin aazi hanidaakko
Isaiah44:8 Yayyofte; dagammofte. Hayssa tani inttes yootabeekkinaa? Beniisofe ta inttena erisabeekkinaa? Hessas intte ta markkata. Taappe attiin hara xoossi dizee? Mulekka deenna; woykko hara Zaallay dizee? Deenna; ta oonakka erikke» gees.
Isaiah44:9 Eeqa misleta medhdhizayti ubbati hada; misleta isttafe ooththiza miishshatikka hada; isttas yootizaytikka qooqe; Isttas erateththi deenna; istti yeellatana.
Isaiah44:10 Aykkoka go7ontta eeqa xoossa massi giigsizay oonee?
Isaiah44:11 Eeqa xoos medhdhizay as attiin hara gidenna; izinne iza misatizayti yeellatana; ubbayka shiiqidi issi bolla eqqetto; istti dagammananne yeellatana.
Isaiah44:12 Birata qoxxizay naariqa oykkees; xiifa bonqqo bolla woththi ooththees; eeqa xoos naariqan qoxxidi misle giigssees; ba mino qesen giigssees. Hessafe guye gafees; wolqqa dhayees; haath saamettees; daaburees.
Isaiah44:13 Massizay wodoron wadhdhees; chokken malata woththees; maarssara woocees; irsaasen iza bolla malata woththees; asa misatissi giigssees; asa mala puulasees; goynoson efi woththees.
Isaiah44:14 Ziga mith qanxxees; wola woykko moqoththa doorees; woran diza miththatara issife diccana mala aggees; woykko xiidda tokkees; izakka iray dichchees.
Isaiah44:15 Asi eesos go7ettees; izappe guuth ekkidi taman eeththi ho7ees; ukeththika izan uukkees; izappe massidi eeqa xoos giigssees; izaskka goynnees. Eeqa xoos ooththees; kundidikka izas ziggees.
Isaiah44:16 Bagga miththaa eeththees; iza bollaka quma kaththees; asho izan xiixidi kalli mees; tamaza ho7ishe
Isaiah44:17 Qasse attida miththaza baas eeqa xoos giigssees; hokkidi izas ziggees; izakka goynnees; iza woossishe
Isaiah44:18 Istti aykkoka erettennanne akeekettenna; istti xeellontta mala istta ayfey goozettides; istti yuushshi qoppontta mala istta wozinay gordettides.
Isaiah44:19 Oonikka takki gi qoppibeenna; erateththi woykko akeekay baynda gishshas
Isaiah44:20 Eeya wozinay iza baleththiin izi bidinth qam7ees; bana ashshana dandayenna; «Hayssi taas ushachcha kushen dizay wordo gidennee? gaanaas dandaybeenna.»
Isaiah44:21 GODAY
Isaiah44:22 Tani ne mooro shaara mala
Isaiah44:23 GODAY hayssa ooththida gishshas Salotoo yexxite; ciimma biittatoo ufayssan ililite. Intteno zumatoo
Isaiah44:24 Nena aayi ulon medhdhidi wozzida GODAY
Isaiah44:25 Tani wordo nabeta malata hada ooththana; bitizaytakka eeya kessana. Tani aadho eranchchata shira yeggana; istta erateththaaka hada ooththana.
Isaiah44:26 Ta ashkaraza qaala ta polana; ta kiittidayta zore ta minththana; tani Yerusalaame
Isaiah44:27 Tani ciimma haaththaaka
Isaiah44:28 Qiroosekka
Isaiah45:1 «Ta tiydayssas
Isaiah45:2 Tani ne sinththara baana; zumata baasa ginasana; xarqimala pengeta menththana; birata kolatatakka qanxxana.
Isaiah45:3 Nena ne sunththan xeygida GODAY
Isaiah45:4 Ta ashkara Yaaqoobe gishshassinne tani doorida Isra7eele gishshas
Isaiah45:5 Tani GODAA; taappe haray oonikka deenna; taappe hara Xoossi deenna; ne tana erontta aggikokka ta nena minththana.
Isaiah45:6 Hessika asay arshey mokkizasoppe biidi arshey wullizaso gakkanaas taappe haray bayndayssa erana malassa. Tani GODAA; taappe haray oonikka deenna.
Isaiah45:7 Tani poo7o ooththadis; dhumakka medhdhadis; ta duresayssinne manqisays; hayssa ubbaa ooththiza GODAY tana.
Isaiah45:8 Intteno salotoo
Isaiah45:9 «Mana miishshata giddofe bana medhdhidayssara marshettizayssas aayye ana! Urqqay bana medhdhidayssa
Isaiah45:10 Ba aawa
Isaiah45:11 «Isra7eele Geeshshay
Isaiah45:12 Sa7a ooththiday tana; asikka izi bolla medhdhadis. Salota tani ta kushen toladis; istta bolla salo medhetata woththadis.
Isaiah45:13 Tani Qiroose xilloteththan denththana; iza oge ubbaa giigsana; ta katamayo izi zaari essana; di7ettida ta asaa miish qanxxisontta coo izi mela yeddana› » gees GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay.
Isaiah45:14 GODAY
Isaiah45:15 Ashshiza Isra7eele Xoossawu
Isaiah45:16 Eeqa xoossata medhdhizayti ubbay yeellatana
Isaiah45:17 Isra7eeley gidikko GODAAN mernaa atoteth attana; intteka mernaas yeellatekketanne kawuyekketa.
Isaiah45:18 Salota medhdhiday izi GODAA; biitta giigsidi medhdhiday
Isaiah45:19 Ta dhuma biittan geeman yootabeekke; Yaaqoobe zereththatas
Isaiah45:20 «Intteno kawoteththatappe beettidaytoo! issife shiiqidi haayite; mata shiiqite. Miththaafe oosettida eeqa xoossaa tookkizaytassinne
Isaiah45:21 Ane intte mooto yootite; shiishshite; istti ane issife shiiqidi zoretetto. Hayssa koyrottidi awajjiday oonee? Beni yootiday oonee? Tana GODAA gidikkinaa? Xilloynne Ashshiza Xoossi taappe attiin haray deenna.
Isaiah45:22 «Intteno biittaa gaxan de7iza ubbatoo! taakko simmidi attite. Tani Xoossa; taappe attiin haray deenna.
Isaiah45:23 Gulbatey ubbay ta sinththan gulbatana; inxars ubbayka tanan caaqqana; Tani tarkka ta hu7en caaqqadis; guye simmontta qaalay ta doonappe xilloteththan kezides.
Isaiah45:24 «Istti ta gishshas haasayshe
Isaiah45:25 Gido attiin Isra7eele zereth ubbay GODAAN xillana; bonchchoka demmana.
Isaiah46:1 Beeley kawuyides; Neboy keehi guuxxides; istta eeqa xoossati caana mehetan caanettida; istti oykki yuuyiza misleti tooho; daaburda medosatas deexo ba7o.
Isaiah46:2 Isttika issi bolla duge gufannana; caanaakka ashshana dandayettenna; isttika di7ettidi baana.
Isaiah46:3 GODAY
Isaiah46:4 Intte cimmidi puulumana gakkanaaska inttena tookkizay tana; tani tana; tani inttena medhdhadis; tani inttena tookkana; tani inttena kaafana; ta inttena ashshana.
Isaiah46:5 «Tana oonara giniseetii? Tana oonara likkiseetii? Nuni issino misatana mala tana oonara geeddareetii?
Isaiah46:6 Amarda asati worqqa bantta karaxiiteppe qoleettes; biraakka meezaanen geeddareettes; istti seerisi tigiza hiillanchcha qaxxareettes; izikka isttas xoossa histti medhdhees. Isttika izas goynneettessinne yaynneettes.
Isaiah46:7 Denththidi bantta hashen tookkeettes; zaaridi he denththida sohon woththeettes; izikka heen eqqaa gees; heeppe awakka qaaxxenna; oonikka izakko waassiko zaaro immenna; metoppeka iza ashshenna.
Isaiah46:8 «Intteno mooranchchatoo! Hayssa akeekite; yuushshika qopite; intte wozinan qum7i oykkite.
Isaiah46:9 Kase beni wode hanida yo7ota akeekite; tani Xoossa; taappe haray deenna; tani Xoossa; ta malay oonikka deenna.
Isaiah46:10 Wurseththan hananayssa koyrotta
Isaiah46:11 Arshey mokkiza baggafe bonqqiza arganth
Isaiah46:12 «Intteno wozina shuchchatoo
Isaiah46:13 Tani ta xilloteththaa ehon days; haaho gidenna. Ta atoteththay gam7enna; tani Xiyoone atoteth. Isra7eele bonchcho mayzana» gees.
Isaiah47:1 GODAY
Isaiah47:2 Woxa ekkada kath gaacca; Ne goossaa qaara; ne qamisaza qaara; ne xifaa bessa; gadigadashe shaafaa pinna.
Isaiah47:3 Ne kalloteththi qoncco; yeellachchiza ne kalloy beetto; tani halo makkana; ta oonakka aggike» gees.
Isaiah47:4 Nuna Wozziza Isra7eele Geeshshaas
Isaiah47:5 «Hanne Baabilooneta nayee
Isaiah47:6 Tani ta deraa hanqettadis; tani xinxxozakka tunisadis; tani istta ne kushen aaththa immadis. Neni gidikko isttas qadhettabeekka; cimmidayta bollaka keehi deexo qambara woththadasa.
Isaiah47:7 Neni
Isaiah47:8 «Hanne ishalo duus dizaaree! Nerkka nenan ammanetta uttidaaree! Ne wozinan
Isaiah47:9 Ha nam7u yo7oti
Isaiah47:10 Neni ne iitateththan ammanettada
Isaiah47:11 Bashshi ne bolla yaana; neni wostta muurenna zaaranaakko erakka; ne qanxxo immada ne dandayontta qohoy ne bolla gakkana. Ne qoppontta metoy ne bolla dingate yaana.
Isaiah47:12 Hekko be7a; neni naateththafe doommada ooththashe daaburda bitatanne daro muurennota gujja gujja ooththa; oonee erizay nees hananaakko
Isaiah47:13 Ne ekkida zore ubbay nena daaburara ashshides; aginappe agina gakkanaas xoolintte xeelli kaayizayti
Isaiah47:14 Hekko istti happa mala; tamay istta maana. Tamaa lacoppe dendidayssan bana ashshanaas dandayettenna. Asi ho7ana bonqqoy deenna; uttidi ho7ana tamaykka deenna.
Isaiah47:15 Naateththafe doommada ne isttara daaburdayti
Isaiah48:1 GODAY
Isaiah48:2 ‹Nuni geeshsha katamayn dizayta› giidi intterkka inttena xeygizaytoo! Isra7eele Xoossan ammanettizaytoo! GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay gizayssa siyite.
Isaiah48:3 «Kase hanida miishshata tani daro wodeppe sinththan yoota woththadis; ta doonappe kezides. Istti erettana malakka tani ooththadis; ta dingate ooththiin isttika polettida.
Isaiah48:4 Ne ay mala simmontta as gididaakko ta erays; ne morge shayay birata mala
Isaiah48:5 Hessa gishshas hayta ha yo7ota beni ta nees yootadis; istti polettanaappe sinththan ta nena erisa woththadis; hessika
Isaiah48:6 «Hayta ha yo7ota ne siyadasa; ane ubbaaka xeella; istti likke gididayssa neni ne hu7era markkattikii? Ha7ippe doommada ooraththa miishshata
Isaiah48:7 Heyti ha7i medhettida attiin kase gidenna; istta gishshas ne hachchife attiin kase siyabeekka; hessa gishshas
Isaiah48:8 Neni siyabeekka woykko erabeekka; ne hayththi benippeka doyettibeenna. Gaasoykka neni kasekka cimmizaadenne naateththafe doommada ne makkallanchcha geetettidayssa ta eradis.
Isaiah48:9 «Ta sunththaa gishshas gaada tani ta hanqo gam7isana; ta galata gishshas gaada ta neeppe teqqana; ta nena qanxxontta aggana malassa.
Isaiah48:10 Be7a bira mala gidontta aggikokka nena gaccadis; tama mala meton paaccadis;
Isaiah48:11 Ta gishshas gaada
Isaiah48:12 «Nenoo Yaaqoobe
Isaiah48:13 Biittaas yoch yeggiday ta kushe; salota micciday ta ushachcha kushe. Ta istta xeygiza wode istti ubbayka issi bolla eqqeettes.
Isaiah48:14 «Intte ubbayka issi bolla shiiqidi siyite; eeqa xoossatappe kase haytantta yootiday oonee? GODAAS doorettida laggey izi Baabiloone bolla halchchidayssa polana; iza qeseykka Baabilooneta bolla gidana.
Isaiah48:15 Tani tarkka yootadis; tumukka ta xeygadis; ta iza ehana; iza oosoykka izas polettana.
Isaiah48:16 «Taakko haa shiiqidi hayssa siyite; tani koyroppe doommadakka geeman haasayabeekke; izi polettishin ta heen days» gees. Ha7ikka Ubbaa Haariza GODAYNNE iza Ayanay tana kiittida.
Isaiah48:17 GODAY nena Wozzida Isra7eele Geeshshay
Isaiah48:18 Neni ta azazo siyidaa gididaakko
Isaiah48:19 Ne zereththi abba shaamintta mala
Isaiah48:20 Baabiloone biittafe kezite; Baabiloone asaappe baqatite! Hayssa ililisan erisite; awajjite; biitta gaxa gakkanaas yootite; «GODAY ba ashkaraa Yaaqoobe wozzides» giite.
Isaiah48:21 Izi istta bazzo biittara kaaleththishin istti saamettibeettenna. Izi isttas zaallafe haath pulttisides; izi zaallaa phalqides; haaththika dhuuqqi kezides.
Isaiah48:22 «Iitatas saroy baa» gees GODAY.
Isaiah49:1 Intteno harurotoo
Isaiah49:2 Ta inxarsaa giththa mashsha mala qarasides; ba kushe kuwan tana genththides; izi tana hoxe yiishsha mala ooththides; histtidi ba kooho giddon tana qottides.
Isaiah49:3 Izi tana
Isaiah49:4 Gido attiin tani
Isaiah49:5 Ha7i tani GODAA ayfe sinththan bonchchettadis; Xoossay taas wolqqa gidides; tani Yaaqoobe izakko zaarana mala
Isaiah49:6 «Neni taas oosanchcha gideththi
Isaiah49:7 Kadhettidayssassinne kawoteththan ixettidayssas
Isaiah49:8 GODAY
Isaiah49:9 Neni di7ettidayta
Isaiah49:10 Istti gafettettenna woykko saamettettenna; istta bazzo biitta seelay woykko awa seelay qohenna. Isttas qadhettizay istta kaaleththana; haaththa pulttoy dizason istta heemmana.
Isaiah49:11 «Ta zumata ubbaa oge kessana; ta wogga ogetikka dhoqqu gaana.
Isaiah49:12 Hekko istti haaho dereppe yaana; issi issineti pudehappe
Isaiah49:13 Salotoo intte
Isaiah49:14 Xiyoona gidikko
Isaiah49:15 GODAY
Isaiah49:16 Hekko tani nena ta kushe qaa7an xaafadis; ne dirsa gimbetikka ubbatoo ta sinththan deettes.
Isaiah49:17 «Ne attuma naytikka eeson simmana; nena laallidayti neeppe baqatana.
Isaiah49:18 Ane dhoqqu gaada ne yuusho xeella; ne nayti ubbay issife shiiqidi neekko yaana. Tani GODAY ta de7on caaqqays; neni istta ubbaa alleqo mala may7ana; ne istta mishira may7o mala may7ana» gees.
Isaiah49:19 «Ne laalettada bula gidikkoka
Isaiah49:20 Ceece wode ne yelida nayti
Isaiah49:21 Neni ne wozinan
Isaiah49:22 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Isaiah49:23 Kawoti nena dichchiza aawata gidana; istta machcheti nena dichchiza aayeta gidana; istti gufannidi nees goynnana; ne toho bollafe baanaakka laaccana; nekka tani GODAA gididayssa erana; tanan hidota ooththizayti yeellatettenna» gees.
Isaiah49:24 Di7i ekkida miish olanchchatappe guye zaaranaas
Isaiah49:25 Gido attiin GODAY
Isaiah49:26 Nena un7eththizayti banttarkka ba asho maana; woyne ushshan maththottiza mala banttarkka ba suuththan maththottana; hessafe guye asa zereth ubbay
Isaiah50:1 GODAY
Isaiah50:2 Tani yiza wode heen asi ays dhaydee? Ta xeygiza wode zaaro immiza asi heen waani dhaydee? Inttena wozzana miish cigganaas ta kushey qaammadee? Woykko inttena ashshanaas taas wolqqay guuththee? Be7ite ta hanqon abba melissays; shaafatakka bazzo kessays; isttan diza moleti saamon hayqqidi zeeqqeettes.
Isaiah50:3 Tani salo dhumisana; tani iza maaqa mayzana» gees.
Isaiah50:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY taas inxarsa erateth immides; hessa gishshas daaburanchchatas ta ay gaana bessizaakko ta erays; maalado maalado tana beegoththees; tamaarshe diza tamaare mala siyanaas ta hayth doyees.
Isaiah50:5 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY ta hayth doydes; tani makkallanchcha diikke; guyekka baqatabeekke.
Isaiah50:6 Ta zokko shocizaytas
Isaiah50:7 Ubbaa Haarizaa GODAY tana maaddiza gishshas tani kawuykke; hessa gishshas ta ayfeso daldacha shuchcha mala ooththadis; tani yeellatonttayssa erays.
Isaiah50:8 Ta xilloteththa qonccisizaadey ta matan dees; histtiin tana mootana dandayzay izi oonee? Ane issife tiran gayttoos! Ta baalgaaray oonee? Ane haayo!
Isaiah50:9 Be7ite
Isaiah50:10 Intte giddofe GODAAS yayyizay
Isaiah50:11 Ha7i gidikko intte tama eeththidi
Isaiah51:1 «Intteno xilloteth kaallizaytoo
Isaiah51:2 Intte aawa Abrahaamekko
Isaiah51:3 «GODAY Xiyoono tumu minththeththana; izi laaleteththaa qadhetan xeellana; izi bazzo biittaza Edene mala
Isaiah51:4 «Ta baggatoo ta gizayssa siyite; ta derezoo ta gizaa ezga; wogay taappe kezana; ta pirday kawoteththatas poo7o gidana.
Isaiah51:5 Ta xilloteththay eesoti yeeththa bolla
Isaiah51:6 Pude dhoqqu giidi salota xeellite; ziqqi giidi duge sa7aakka xeellite. Saloti cuwa mala tim7i gi dhayana; sa7aykka afaladan ceeggana; izin de7iza asay udunxxe mala eeson dhayana; ta atoteththay mernaas daana; ta xilloteththaaska wurseththi deenna.»
Isaiah51:7 GODAY
Isaiah51:8 Bilay may7o miza mala istta maana; istti guxuney mida suufe mala gidana; ta xilloteththi gidikko mernaas
Isaiah51:9 Abeet GODAA qesey denda; wolqqa may7a; kase aadhdhida wodetan
Isaiah51:10 Wozzetti attidayti pinnana mala
Isaiah51:11 GODAY wozzidayti simmana; yexxishekka Xiyoone gelana; mernaa ufayssa kallachcha hu7en goxxana; istti injjenne ufayssa duus demmana; ceeceynne yeehoy isttafe baqatana.
Isaiah51:12 GODAY
Isaiah51:13 Nena medhdhidayssa
Isaiah51:14 Qashettidayti eeson birshettana; istti ba qashettida olla giddon hayqqettenna; kaththi isttas paccenna.
Isaiah51:15 Gaasoykka dambalay dendana mala abba qaaththiza Tani GODAY ne Xoossa; ta sunththi GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa.
Isaiah51:16 Tani ta qaala ne doonan woththadis; ta kushe kuwan kammadis; salota istti dizason woththiday
Isaiah51:17 GODAA kusheppe hanqo ushshu uyidaaree
Isaiah51:18 Iza yelida nayta ubbaafe kaaleththizay issoyka baawa; qasse iza dichchida nayta ubbaafekka izi kushe oykkizay issoyka baawa.
Isaiah51:19 Be7a bashsha bolla bashshi ne bolla yides; histtiin nena oonee minththeththanay? isttika laaleteththinne dhays
Isaiah51:20 Ne attuma nayti daaburda; woximaden oykettida genessa mala oge gaxan ubbaan ichchida. GODAA hanqoynne ne Xoossa seeray istta bolla kumides.
Isaiah51:21 Hessa gishshas woyne ushshan gidontta coo maththottizaare hayssa siya
Isaiah51:22 Ba deraa ashshiza ne GODAY Ubbaafe wolqqama Xoossay
Isaiah51:23 Tani hessa nena un7eththizayta kushen woththana. Istti nena
Isaiah52:1 Hanne Xiyoone denda; denda; wolqqa may7a; geeshsha katamaye Yerusalaamee! Ne bonchcho may7o may7a; hayssafe guye qaxxarettonttaynne tunay ne giddo gelenna.
Isaiah52:2 Hanne Yerusalaame
Isaiah52:3 GODAY
Isaiah52:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Isaiah52:5 ‹Histtiin ta derey gaasoykka baynda di7etti biichchiin taas haan aazi dizee?› Istta haaridayti istta bolla qilccida; gallas kumeth ta sunththaa pacey baynda cayeettes.
Isaiah52:6 Hessa gishshas ta derey ta sunththaa erana; he gallas kasekka yootiday tana gididayssa istti erana. Ee hessi tana» gees.
Isaiah52:7 Zuma bolla eqqida tohoti
Isaiah52:8 Hanne siya! Nena naagiyzayti bantta qaala dhoqqu histtida. Issi bolla ililishe yexxeettes; GODAY Xiyoone simmiza wode
Isaiah52:9 Intteno Yerusalaamen qolettida sohotoo! Intte issi bolla ililisan yexxite; GODAY ba deraa minththeththides; Yerusalaame katamaakka wozzides.
Isaiah52:10 GODAY ba geeshsha qesaa kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan qonccisana; qasse biittaa gaxan diza ubbayka nu Xoossaa atoteththaa be7ana.
Isaiah52:11 Intteno GODAA keeththa miishshata tookkizaytoo! Shaakettite
Isaiah52:12 Gidikkoka eeson kezekketa; woykko beti beekketa; GODAY inttefe sinth aadhdhidi inttena kaaleththana; Isra7eele Xoossayka guyera inttena naagana.
Isaiah52:13 GODAY
Isaiah52:14 Daro asay izan dagamanaashe gakkanaas as ubbaafe qohettida gishshas iza medhay asa medhappe laamettides.
Isaiah52:15 Hessa gishshas izi daro kawoteththata malalisana; iza gaason kawoteththati bantta doona oykkana; isttas yootettonttayssa istti be7ana; istti siyi erontta miish akeekana» gees.
Isaiah53:1 Derezi
Isaiah53:2 Izi iza sinththan caarechcha mala
Isaiah53:3 Izi asan kadhettidaadenne ixettidaade; izi hargefenne metoppe shaaketti erontta asa; Izi asi iza be7anaappe ba ayfeso haraso zaariza asa mala kadhettidaade gidides; nunikka iza bonchchibeekko.
Isaiah53:4 «Tumukka Izi nu harge baas ekkides; qasse nu sakokka izi tookkides. Nuni gidikko iza gakkida metoy
Isaiah53:5 Gido attiin izi nu mooro gishshas cadettides; nu qoho gishshas liiqides; iza bolla wodhdhida qixaatey nuus saro ehides; iza madunththan nu paxidos.
Isaiah53:6 Nuni ubbay dorsa mala toylatti dhaydos; nuni issoy issoy nu oge bidos; GODAY nu ubbaa qoho iza bolla woththides.
Isaiah53:7 «Izi un7ettidessinne waayettides; gido attiin doonakka pogibeenna. Dorsa laaqqa mala shukettanaas laagettides; ba iske qanxxizayta sinththan co7u giza dorsa mala izi doonakka phoqqibeenna.
Isaiah53:8 Iza metoththoninne pirdan efida; Izi ta deraa mooro gishshas deshettidi
Isaiah53:9 Izi aykko gene haasayontta
Isaiah53:10 «Iza liiqeththinne waayezi GODAA shene gidides; GODAY iza shemppo nagara yarsho ooththikoka izi ba zereththaa be7ana; GODAA sheney iza kushen polettana.
Isaiah53:11 Iza shemppoy waayettidaappe guye izi de7o poo7o be7ananne ufayettana. Ta xillo ayllezi ba erateththan darota xillisana; istta moorokka tookkana.
Isaiah53:12 Hessa gishshas iza gakkiza gisha gita asata gishara issife histtana; di7i ehidayssa wolqqamatara izi issife gishettana; izi ba shemppo hayqos aaththi immidi
Isaiah54:1 GODAY
Isaiah54:2 Ne dunkaane essanaaso aassa; ne dunkaane magalashatakka aassa tola; xuunththofa; ne wodorota adussa; dhishketakka minththa essa.
Isaiah54:3 Neni ushachcha baggaranne hadirsa baggara aakkana; ne zareti kawoteththata laattana; histtidi aykkoy baynda istta katamatan istti daana.
Isaiah54:4 «Aykkoy baa babbofa; ne yeellatakka; hirgofa; ne kawuyaka; ne yelagateththa yeellaa neni dogana; ne am7eteththaa borokka hayssafe sinththan hassa7akka.
Isaiah54:5 Nena medhdhidayssi nees azina; iza sunththayka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA. Nena wozziday Isra7eele Geeshsha; izi biitta ubbaa Xoossa geetettees.
Isaiah54:6 Naateththan ekkidi kadhida machchi mala; neni wozina meqqidanne kadhettida machchi mala; gido attiin GODAY nena guye zaari xeygana» gees Xoossay.
Isaiah54:7 «Guuththa wode tani nena aggadis; gido attiin gita qadhetan ta nena zaara shiishshana.
Isaiah54:8 Ta guuththa wodes keeha hanqettida gishshas
Isaiah54:9 «Hayssi taas Nohe wode haaththi biitta zaari dhayssontta mala ta caaqqoyssaththo ha7ikka ne bolla zaarada hanqettontta malanne seerontta mala ta caaqqadis.
Isaiah54:10 Zumati qaaxxiko
Isaiah54:11 GODAY
Isaiah54:12 Tani ne qustte zo7o inqqun
Isaiah54:13 Ne attuma nayti ubbay GODAAPPE tamaardayta gidana; ne nayta saroteththika darana.
Isaiah54:14 Neni xilloteththan minna eqqana; gene ogera aysoy neeppe haakkana. Nena babisiza miishshi deenna; shiroteththi neeppe haakkana; ne matakka shiiqenna.
Isaiah54:15 Oonikka nena qohikko
Isaiah54:16 «Be7a

Isaiah55:1 GODAY
Isaiah55:2 Go7ontta kaththas ays intte miish dhaysseetii? inttena kalssontta miishshas ay ekkanaas intte wolqqa wurseetii? Siyite; ta gidaaz siyite; lo7o gididaaz miite; lo7o quman inttena ufayssite.
Isaiah55:3 Intte hayth doydi haa taakko shiiqite; intte shemppora paxa daana mala ta gizaa ezgi siyite; kase ta Dawitera caaqqida mino siiqon inttenarakka mernaa caaqo caaqettana.
Isaiah55:4 Be7ite
Isaiah55:5 Be7a

Isaiah55:7 Iita asi ba oge
Isaiah55:8 GODAY
Isaiah55:9 Saloti sa7appe dhoqqida mala
Isaiah55:10 Iraynne shachchi saloppe wodhdhidi biitta kalssidi
Isaiah55:11 ta doonappe keziza qaalaykka coo hada haa taakko simmenna; gido attiin izi tani koyidayssa ooththees; ba kiitettida waanna qofaakka polees.
Isaiah55:12 Intte ufayssan kezana; saron moyzettana. Zumatinne zumbullati intte sinththan ililisara yexxana; demban diza miththati ubbayka bantta kushe baqqana.
Isaiah55:13 Agunththa gishshas xiidday
Isaiah56:1 GODAY
Isaiah56:2 Sambata tunisontta bonchchizay
Isaiah56:3 GODAAKKO shiiqida betey

Isaiah56:6 GODAAS haggazanaas
Isaiah56:7 tani ta geeshsha zumaa bolla istta ehana; ta woosa keeththa giddon ta istta ufayssana. Taas yarsho yarshizasoza bollan istti shiishshiza xuugettiza yarshonne hara yarshota ta ekkana; gaasoykka ta keeththay ubbaa asaa woosa keeth geetettana» gees.
Isaiah56:8 Laalettida Isra7eele shiishshiza
Isaiah56:9 Intteno do7atoo
Isaiah56:10 Isra7eele asaa naagizayti qooqe; isttas erateththi deenna istti ubbay boccontta kana mala; boccanaas dandayettenna; istti ichchidi agumetteettes; istti dhiskanchcha.
Isaiah56:11 Istti ganjama kana mala; miidi kalli erettenna. Istti akeekay baynda heenththanchchata; istti ubbay bantta oge oge beettes; issoy issoy ba go7a xalla xeellees.
Isaiah56:12 Istti issoy issaara
Isaiah57:1 Xillo asi hayqqees; hessa oonikka wozinan woththenna; Xoossaas aqiza asata shemppoy ekettees; xilloti iitappe attana mala ekettidayssa oonikka akeekenna.
Isaiah57:2 Suureteththan bizayti saron gelana; hayqqidikka ba hiiththan saron shemppana.
Isaiah57:3 GODAY
Isaiah57:4 Intte oona bolla qilcceetii? Intte inxarsi oona bolla kesseetii? Intte makkallanchchata naytanne wordanchchata zare gidekketii?
Isaiah57:5 Intte wola garsaninne daashsha miththata garsan ziitan xuugettizayta gidekketii? zulletaninne zaalla za7ata garsan intte nayta yarshizayta gidekketii?
Isaiah57:6 Hanne zullen diza liiqo shuchchati nees eeqa xoossata; isttika ne qaadata; tumukka ne istta bolla ushsha yarsho gussadasa; kaththa yarshoka shiishshadasa; histtiin ha yo7ota gishshas ta co7u gaanee?
Isaiah57:7 Ne hiixa dhoqqu gida adussa zumbulla hu7en hiixxadasa; heen ne yarsho shiishshana kezadasa.
Isaiah57:8 Ne pengefenne qosilaththaafe soo baggara eeqa misleta essadasa. Tana aggada ne hiixaa qaaradasa; iza bolla kezada keeha qaaradasa; ne dosidaytara qaala giigadasa; istta kalloka be7adasa.
Isaiah57:9 Wogara zayte ekkada
Isaiah57:10 Ne oge daroppe dendidayssan daaburadasa; gido attiin
Isaiah57:11 «Neni taas wordotiday
Isaiah57:12 Tani ne xilloteththinne ne ooso qonccisana; isttika nena go7ettenna.
Isaiah57:13 Neni maado demmanaas waassiza wode
Isaiah57:14 GODAY
Isaiah57:15 Dhoqqu gidayssi
Isaiah57:16 Asa ayanay ta sinththan daaburontta mala ta medhdhida asaas peenoy eqqontta mala ta mernaas walassike; ta ubbato hanqettike.
Isaiah57:17 Iza nagara gishshassinne iza yiiqeteththa gishshas ta hanqettadis; ta iza qaxxayadis; ta sinththaaka hanqon izappe genththadis; gido attiin ha7ikka simmidi izi ba ogen bides.
Isaiah57:18 Tani iza ogeta be7adis; gidikkoka ta iza paththananne kaaleththana; izassinne iza gishshas yeekkiza geeshshata ta minththeththana.
Isaiah57:19 Isra7eele biittan yeekkizayta doonan ta galata woththana. Mataninne haahon dizaytas saroynne woppay gido. Tani istta paththana» gees.
Isaiah57:20 Gido attiin iitati dambalay urqqanne buura kessiza mala co7u gaanaas dandayonttayssa mala bulakettiza abba mala.
Isaiah57:21 Ta Xoossay
Isaiah58:1 GODAY
Isaiah58:2 Istti tana hach hach koyeettes; ta ogeza eranaas laamotiza misateettes. Suure miish ooththida kawoteththa malanne ba Xoossaa azazo yeggi aggontta dere mala
Isaiah58:3 Istti shiiqidi
Isaiah58:4 Intte xoomay ooshshaninne palaman
Isaiah58:5 Tani dooriday hayssa mala xoomaa? Asi bana kawushshanay hayssa mala gallas xallaa? Shacca mala bana ziqqi histteththee? woykko maaqa may7idi bidinththaa bolla bululeteththee? Histtiin ne xooma ga xeygizayssi hayssee? GODAY hessa malan ufayettizee?
Isaiah58:6 «Be7ite tani doorida xoomay
Isaiah58:7 Qasseka ne qumaappe gafidaades shaakkanaas
Isaiah58:8 Ne hessaththo ooththiko ne poo7oy wontta xalqqe mala caarana; paxateththi nees eeson gakkana; xilloteththi neeppe sinththara baana; Xoossa bonchchoy nena garadana.
Isaiah58:9 He wode neni xeygana; GODAYKKA nees koyana. Neni maado demmanaas waassana; izikka
Isaiah58:10 gafidaades ne qadhettiko
Isaiah58:11 GODAY nena ubbatoo kaaleththana; away xuuggida biittan ne amo izi kunththana; ne meqeththatakka izi minththana. Neni haath alada atakiltesohonne mulekka to7ontta pultto mala gidana.
Isaiah58:12 Ne dabboti beni yochchata yeggana; kase laalettidayta zaari keexxana; neni laalettida gimbe zaari ooraxissizaade
Isaiah58:13 Qasseka
Isaiah58:14 he wode ne GODAAN ufayettana. Biitta bollan dhoqqasohotan ta nena togisana; ne aawa Yaaqoobe xinxxo ne kalla maana mala ooththana» giidi GODAY hayssa ba doonan haasaydes.
Isaiah59:1 Hekko GODAA kushey inttena ashshanaas qaammibeenna; iza hayththi siyanaappe tullibeenna.
Isaiah59:2 Gido attiin intte qohoy inttena intte Xoossaafe shaakkides; intte nagaray iza ayfeso inttefe genththides. Hessa gishshas izi siyenna.
Isaiah59:3 Intte kushey suuththan
Isaiah59:4 Xilloteththan mootizay baawa; tumateththan pirdizay oonikka deenna. Hada yo7on ammanetteettes; wordo haasayeettes; shiro qanththatidi iitateth yelida.
Isaiah59:5 Istti shooshsha phuuphphulle haphphida; achcharo keeth keexxida; istta phuuphphulleta miza asi hayqqees; isttafe issoy meqqiko puukkiza shooshshi kezees.
Isaiah59:6 Istta qacinay may7o gidenna; istti ooththidayssan bantta bolla kammana dandayettenna; istta oosoy iita; istta kushetan makkalla oosoy kumides.
Isaiah59:7 Istta tohoti nagarakko woxxeettes; xillo suuth gussanaas eesoteettes; istti iita qofa qoppeettes. Bashshinne qohoy istti aadhdhida oge ubbaas malata.
Isaiah59:8 Istti saroteththa oge erettenna; istti biza ogen suure pirday baawa; istti bantta oge geellasida; he ogera bizay saro demmenna.
Isaiah59:9 Hessa gishshas suure pirday nuuppe haakkides; xilloteththika nuukko gakkenna. Nuni poo7o koyidos; gido attiin ubbay dhuma gidides; wagagga poo7o koyidos; gido attiin sakkanna dhuma gidides.
Isaiah59:10 Qooqe mala gimbeza bolla gandigardos. Nu hemetay ayfey baynda asa mala tattafeteth gidides; arshey wullishin haniza seeta gallas dhuphettidos. Qasse mino asata giddon nuni hayqqida asa mala gididos.
Isaiah59:11 Nuni ubbay zardo mala laawoos; haraphpheta malakka ceecishe guugumoos; nuni suure pirda koyidos; gido attiin demmibeekko; attana koyidos; gido attiin izi nuuppe haakkides.
Isaiah59:12 Gaasoykka nu qohoy ne sinththan darides; nu nagaraykka nu bolla markkattides. Nu mooroy nuuppe shaakettibeenna; nu makkallateththaaka nuni eroos.
Isaiah59:13 Nuni GODAA bolla makkallidi wordo haasaydos; nu Xoossaa kaalo aggidi sher7i gidos; makkallateththinne gene yo7o haasaydos. Nu wozinay shaari uttida wordo haasaydos.
Isaiah59:14 Hessa gishshas suure pirday guye sugettides; xilloteththika nuuppe haakkides; tumateththi oge bolla dhuphettides; suureteththika gelanaas dandaybeenna.
Isaiah59:15 Tumateththi awankka beettenna; iitateththaafe haakkizay qohettees; GODAY be7idi suure pirday dhayda gishshas ceecides.
Isaiah59:16 Oonikka bayndayssa be7ides; izakko gaannatizay bayndayssa be7idi malalettides; Hessa gishshas iza qesey izas atoteth ehides; iza xilloteththi iza kaafi oykkides.
Isaiah59:17 Izi xilloteththa xurure mala tiran may7ides; atoteththaa birata qoobe mala ba hu7e bolla woththides. May7o garsara may7iza mala halo keso may7ides; may7o gophi may7iza mala qanaate bollara gophides.
Isaiah59:18 Istta ooso mala hanqo ba baalgaaratas
Isaiah59:19 GODAA peenoy sugi ekki biza wolqqama di7o mala yaana. Hessa gishshas arshey wulliza baggara dizayti GODAA sunththas yayyana; arshey mokkiza baggara dizayti iza bonchchos haarettana.
Isaiah59:20 GODAY
Isaiah59:21 Qasseka GODAY
Isaiah60:1 GODAY
Isaiah60:2 Be7a
Isaiah60:3 Kawoteththati ne poo7okko
Isaiah60:4 «Dhoqqu gaada ne yuusho xeella; istti ubbay issife shiiqidi neekko yaana; ne attuma nayti haahoppe
Isaiah60:5 He wode ne be7ananne phoollana; ne wozinay ufayssan kumana; abban diza aqotay neekko yaana; kawoteththata dureteththi nees gidana.
Isaiah60:6 Gaamella marati
Isaiah60:7 Qeedaareppe dorsata wudey ubbay neekko shiiqana; Nebayoote dere dharshoti nena go7ana; haytanti taas yarsho yarshizasoza bolla ekettida yarshota gidana; tanikka ta bonchcho keeththaa puulasana.
Isaiah60:8 «Haraphphey ba aqizaso biza malanne shaara mala bizayti haytanti oonee?
Isaiah60:9 Tumukka haruroti tanan hidota ooththeettes; izi nena ba bonchcho mayzida gishshas
Isaiah60:10 «Allagati ne gimbe gimbana; istta kawoti nees haggazana; ta hanqon ta nena shocidaa gidikkoka
Isaiah60:11 Ne pengeti ubbatoo doya de7ana; gallas gidiin omars mulekka gordettettenna; hessika asay kawoteththata dureteththaa neekko ehanaassa; istta kawotikka xoonon neekko gelana malassa.
Isaiah60:12 Nees haarettontta kawoteththinne derey mulekka dippi gaana.
Isaiah60:13 Ta Keeththay dizaso alleqissanaas
Isaiah60:14 Nena un7eththidayta attuma nayti ziggishe neekko yaana; nena kadhida ubbati ne toho bolla kundana; ‹Hanne GODAA katamayee! Isra7eeles Geeshsha miish gidida Xiyoone› gi xeygana.
Isaiah60:15 «Hanne ixettada yegettidaaree
Isaiah60:16 Neni kawoteththata maath uyana; kawota dhanththika dhammana. Hessafe guye tani GODAY nena Ashshizayssa
Isaiah60:17 Xarqimala sohon worqqa
Isaiah60:18 Hayssafe guye ne biittan shiroy
Isaiah60:19 «Hessafe guye gallas awa poo7oy nees koshshenna; omarsika aginay poo7enna; gaasoykka GODAY nees mernaa poo7o gidana; ne Xoossay nees bonchcho gidana.
Isaiah60:20 Ne arshey hayssafe guye gelenna; ne aginaykka poo7o imo aggenna. GODAY nees mernaa poo7o gidana; ne ceecida gallassati gidana.
Isaiah60:21 Ne asay ubbay xillo gidana; biittayokka mernaas laattana; istti ta bonchcho qonccisanaas tani tokkida puutetanne ta kushe oosota.
Isaiah60:22 Neeppe kaalozi shii
Isaiah61:1 Ubbaa Haariza GODAA Ayanay ta bolla dees; hiyeesatas mishiraachcho yootana mala
Isaiah61:2 Dosettida GODAA layth
Isaiah61:3 Qasseka Xiyoonen kayottizayta doshisana mala
Isaiah61:4 Istti beni laalettidayta zaari keexxana; kase wode kundidaytakka zaari essana; daro yeletatappe kase kundidaytanne laalettida katamata zaari keexxana.
Isaiah61:5 Imaththati intte dorsa wudeta heemmana; allaga biitta asati intte gadeninne intte woyne atakilte giddon ooththana.
Isaiah61:6 Intte qasse
Isaiah61:7 Ta derey yeellatidayssa qoodhe nam7u kushe ekkana; kawuyidayssa qoodhe bantta xinxxon ufayettana; bantta biittaas nam7u kushe laattana; mernaa ufayssi isttas gidana.
Isaiah61:8 Tani GODAY suure pirda dosays; bonqqanne qoho ixxays. Ta ammaneteththan isttas bessizayssa immana; isttara mernaa caaqo qaala gelana.
Isaiah61:9 Istta zareti kawoteththata giddon
Isaiah61:10 Tani GODAAN keehippe ufayettays; ta shemppoyakka ta Xoossan hombocawus; mishiray ba hu7en kallachcha goxxiza mala
Isaiah61:11 Biittay caarech caarissiza mala
Isaiah62:1 Izi xilloteththi maalado poo7o mala phoollanaashe gakkanaas
Isaiah62:2 Kawoteththati ne xilloteth
Isaiah62:3 Neni GODAA kushe bonchcho akilile
Isaiah62:4 Hayssafe guye neni
Isaiah62:5 Panththi geela7o ekkiza mala
Isaiah62:6 Hanne Yerusalaamee! Naagizayta ne dirsata bolla essadis; istti gallassika omars guye geettenna; Intteno GODAAKKO waassizaytoo
Isaiah62:7 Izi Yerusalaame minththana gakkanaassinne biitta ubbaa bolla erettida katama ooththana gakkanaas izas shemppo immofte.
Isaiah62:8 GODAY ba ushachcha kusheninne ba wolqqama qesen
Isaiah62:9 Gido attiin kaththaa shiishshidayti maana; GODAAKKA galatana; woyne teera maxi shiishshidayti ta keeththa pengen uyana» gi caaqqides.
Isaiah62:10 Aadhdhite! Iza pengeta baggara kanththi biite; deraas oge baasite; giigsite; shuchchata diggite; kawoteththatas malaata essite.
Isaiah62:11 Be7ite
Isaiah62:12 Istti
Isaiah63:1 Eedoome biittan diza Booxira katamappe zo7o seelo may7o may7idi yizay hessi izi oonee? hayssi bonchcho may7idi ba wolqqa gitateththan hemettishe yizay izi oonee? «Xillo haasayzaynne ashshanaas wolqqay dizay tana gidikkinaa!» gees GODAY.
Isaiah63:2 Ne seelo may7oy woyne gum7iza asata may7o mala ays zo7idee?
Isaiah63:3 «Gum7izasohozan woyne tani tarkka yedhdhadis; kawoteththatappe oonikka tanara deenna; tani istta ta hanqon yedhdhadis; ta bashshankka istta dirxxereththadis; istta suuththi ta seelo may7o bolla dhacettides; ta may7oy ubbay moorettides.
Isaiah63:4 Tani halo kessana gallassay ta wozinan dees; ta wozzana gallassayka gakkides.
Isaiah63:5 Tani xeelladis shin maaddizay beettibeenna; maaddizaadey baynda gishshas tani malalettadis. Hessa gishshas ta qesey taas atoteth ehides; ta hanqoyka tana minththides.
Isaiah63:6 Ta hanqon kawoteththata yedhdhadis; ta bashshan istta maththosadis; istta suuththaaka biittan gussadis» gaana.
Isaiah63:7 GODAA kiyateththi
Isaiah63:8 GODAYKKA
Isaiah63:9 Istta meto ubbaan ceecides; Iza duussaa erisiza kiitanchchay istta ashshides; izi ba siiqoninne ba maaroteththan istta wozzides. Kase aadhdhida wode ubbaan istta denththidesinne tookkides.
Isaiah63:10 Istti gidikko makkallida; iza Geeshsha Ayanaakka mishisida hessa gishshas izi simmidi isttas morkke gidides; istta olides.
Isaiah63:11 Hessafe guye asay beni wodezanne Muse wode yuushshi qoppides; Ba dorsata heenththanchchatara ubbaafe kessidayssi izi awan dizee? Ba Geeshsha Ayana istta giddon woththidayssi ha7i awan dizee?
Isaiah63:12 Bonchchettida wolqqama qese
Isaiah63:13 Paray aykkoy baynda bazzo biittara kanththi biza mala
Isaiah63:14 Duge zulle wodhdhiza mehe wude mala
Isaiah63:15 Abeet GODAWU
Isaiah63:16 Abrahaamey nuna erontta aggiko
Isaiah63:17 Abeet GODAWU
Isaiah63:18 Guuththa wodes ne derey geeshshasohoza laattides; ha7i gidikko nu morkketi ne Keeththaa yedhdhida.
Isaiah63:19 Hekko beniisofe nuni neyta; gido attiin istta neni haarabeekka; istti ne sunththankka xeygettibeettenna.
Isaiah64:1 Abeet GODAWU
Isaiah64:2 Qayxare tamay haath penttisiza mala
Isaiah64:3 Kasekka neni nu qoppontta yashissiza miish ne ooththida wode ne wodhdhiin zumati kokkorida.
Isaiah64:4 Beniisofe doommidi hidota ooththi naagizaytas gakkiza malaata ooththiday neeppe attiin hara Xoos be7ida ayfeynne siyida hayththi mulekka deenna.
Isaiah64:5 Suure miish ufayssan ooththizaytanne ne oge qoppizayta neni maaddaasa; gido attiin nuni istta bolla pacey baynda nagara ooththida gishshas hekko neni nu bolla hanqettadasa; histtiin nuni waani attana dandayzonii?
Isaiah64:6 Nuni ubbayka tuna asa mala gididos; nu xilloteththa ooso ubbay tunida carqqa mala. Nuni ubbayka boncco mala qokkidos; nu nagaray nuna carko mala pitti efides.
Isaiah64:7 Oonikka woosan ne sunth xeygenna; nena oykkana paaccizaykka deenna; neni ne ayfeso nuuppe genththadasa; nu nagaray nuna dhayssana mala aggadasa.
Isaiah64:8 Gidikkoka abeet GODAWU
Isaiah64:9 Abeet GODAWU
Isaiah64:10 Ne geeshsha katamati aykkoy baynda bazzo gidida; Xiyoonakka aykkoy baynda bazzo biitta gidadus; Yerusalaameykka yegetta attadus.
Isaiah64:11 Nu aawati kase nena izan galatiza Xoossa Keeththay taman xuugettides; kase lo7osoti ubbatikka dhayda.

Isaiah65:1 GODAY
Isaiah65:2 Makkallanchcha deretas
Isaiah65:3 Atakiltesohon yarsho yarshizayti
Isaiah65:4 Duufo giddon uttizayti
Isaiah65:5 Istti
Isaiah65:6 «Be7ite
Isaiah65:7 Intte nagara halonne intte aawata nagara halo ta kessana. Istti zumata bolla xuugettiza yarsho shiishshida gishshas
Isaiah65:8 GODAY
Isaiah65:9 Tani Yaaqoobe zereththatappenne Yuhuda zereththafe ta zumata laattanayta ta ehana; doorettida ta derey istta laattana; ta ashkaratikka heen daana.
Isaiah65:10 Tana minththi koyza ta derezas
Isaiah65:11 Gido attiin GODAA aggida inttes
Isaiah65:12 ta xeygiin zaarontta ixxida gishshas
Isaiah65:13 Hessa gishshas
Isaiah65:14 Ta ashkarati wozinappe ufayssan yexxana; intte gidikko wozinay meqqiin intte waassana; intte ayanay meqqida gishshas intte woo woo giidi waassana.
Isaiah65:15 Intte intte sunththaa doorettida ta derey qanggana mala aaththi immana; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY inttena wodhana; baas haggazizaytas gidikko izi hara sunth immana.
Isaiah65:16 Hessa gishshas biittay bolla anjjo koyzaadey tuma Xoossa sunththan anjjettana; biittayn caaqqiza asi tuma Xoossa sunththan caaqqana; kase aadhdhida metoti dogettida; ta ayfeppekka geemmida» gees.
Isaiah65:17 GODAY
Isaiah65:18 Gido attiin tani medhdhizayssan ufayettite; mernaas hombocite; tani Yerusalaame ufayssas
Isaiah65:19 Tani Yerusalaamen ufayettana; tani ta derezan hombocana; hayssafe guyen yeehoynne waasoy heen seetettenna.
Isaiah65:20 Hayssafe guyen heen guuththa wodes shemppora paxa daana yidhay woykko wode kallontta cimay deenna; xeetu layth kumida asi hayqqiko wodey gakkontta mulqqetti hayqqida asa mala qoodettana; asi xeetu layth kumontta hayqqiko boshan hayqqida mala qoodeettes.
Isaiah65:21 He wode asay keeth keexxana; izankka daana; woyne mith tokkidi iza ayfe maana.
Isaiah65:22 Hayssafe guye hara asi izan daana keeth keexxettenna; woykko haray maana miishshi tokettenna; ta deraa layththi miththa layththa mala aduqqana; tani dooridayti bantta kushe ooson adussa layth ufayettana.
Isaiah65:23 Istta daaburay hada attenna; qaada iita naakka yelettenna; isttinne istta zereththi GODAY anjjida dere gidana.
Isaiah65:24 Istti buro tana xeyganaappe kaseta tani koyana; istti taas yooti wursontta ta siyana.
Isaiah65:25 Kana suyteynne dorsa laaqqay issife maana; gaammoy boora mala maata maana; shooshshi gudulla laaccana; ta geeshsha zumaa bolla istti qohettettenna; bashshika istta bolla yeenna» gees.
Isaiah66:1 GODAY
Isaiah66:2 Hayta ubbaa ta kushey ooththibeennee? Hayti beettana mala ooththiday tana gidikkinaa? Tani ashke; wozinay meqqidaadenne ta qaalaska kokkorizaadeko ta xeellays.
Isaiah66:3 «Gido attiin taas boora yarshizaadey as wodhizaade mala
Isaiah66:4 Hessa gishshas meto ta istta bolla gaththana; istti yayyida miishshika ta istta bolla ehana; gaasoykka ta xeygiza wode istti koyibeettenna; ta yootishin istti ezgibeettenna; ta sinththan iita miish ooththida; tana iitiza miish doorida» gees.
Isaiah66:5 Intteno qaalaas kokkorizaytoo
Isaiah66:6 Hessa kataman diza waasoza siyite; Xoossa keeththan diza caabba siyite; hessika GODAA cenggurssa; izi ba morkketas bessiza waaga qanxxana.
Isaiah66:7 Miixattanaappe kaseta yelawus; miixa waaye be7ontta dashe attuma naa yelawus.
Isaiah66:8 Hessa mala yo7o siyi erizay oonee? Hessa mala yo7o be7i erizay oonee? Derey issi gallas medhetti erizee? Woykko kawoteththati qiphida ayfey xeellanaashe gakkanaas beetti erizoo? Xiyoono buro miixay oykkishin heerakka ba nayta yelawus.
Isaiah66:9 Yelettana matidayssa yelettontta mala tani diggazinaa?» gees GODAY. «Yelishin yeliza ulo ta gorda erazinaa?» gees ne GODAY.
Isaiah66:10 «Intteno Yerusalaamo siiqiza ubbatoo
Isaiah66:11 Minththeththiza izi dhanththaa intte dhammidi kallana; inttes gidanaashe gakkanaas intte uyana; keehippe daro gidida izi dureteththan intte ufayettana» gees GODAY.
Isaiah66:12 GODAY
Isaiah66:13 Aaya ba naa al7isiza mala takka inttena al7isana; intte Yerusalaamen minettana» gees.
Isaiah66:14 Intte hessa be7iza wode intte wozinay ufayettana; intte meqeththaykka maata mala cililana; qasse GODAA kushey iza aylleta bolla dizayssi erettana; iza hanqoy gidikko iza morkketa bolla qonccana.
Isaiah66:15 Hekko GODAY tama lacon yaana; iza para-gaareti gote carko mala; izi ba yiillo hanqon
Isaiah66:16 Tamaninne mashshan GODAY ba pirdaa asa ubbaa bolla ehana; daroti GODAA mashshan shukettana.
Isaiah66:17 GODAY
Isaiah66:18 «Tani istta oosonne istta qofa eriza gishshas
Isaiah66:19 Tani istta giddon malata ooththana; isttafe attida issi issineta gede kawoteththatakko
Isaiah66:20 GODAAS yarsho gidana mala intte ishata ubbata kawoteththatappe bonchchettida ta zumaa Yerusalaame paran
Isaiah66:21 Tanikka isttafe baggayta qeesetanne Leweta gidana mala ta doorana» gees.
Isaiah66:22 GODAY
Isaiah66:23 Agina xeeroppe biidi hara aginay xeerana gakkanaas
Isaiah66:24 Istti kezidi ta bolla makkallida asata aha be7ana. Istta miza guxuneykka hayqqenna; istta miza tamaykka to7enna. Istti asa zereth ubbaas harassizaaz gidana» gees.
Jeremiah1:1 Biniyaame biittan Anatoote kataman diza qeesetappe issaa Kilqiyaasa naa Ermaasi yootida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Jeremiah1:2 Amoone naa Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasi kawotida tammanne heedzdzanththo layththan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides.
Jeremiah1:3 Qasse Iyosiyaasa naa Yuhuda Kawo Iyo7aaqemey kawotida layththatan GODAA qaalay Ermaasakko yides. Hessafe guye Iyosiyaasa naa Sedeqiyaasi kawotiin tammanne issinththa layththan he wode ichchashanththa aginan Yerusalaame asay di7ettidi baana gakkanaas GODAA qaalay Ermaasa baggara izas yootettides.
Jeremiah1:4 GODAA qaalay taakko hizgishe yides.
Jeremiah1:5 «Ermaasa! Tani nena ne aayey ulon medhdhanaappe kase erays. Neni yelettanaappe sinththan ta nena dummasa woththadis. Qasseka kawoteththatas nabe gidana mala shuumadis.»
Jeremiah1:6 Histtiin tani
Jeremiah1:7 Gido attiin GODAY tana
Jeremiah1:8 Tani nena ashshanaas nenara diza gishshas ne isttas yayyofa; tani GODAY hayssa nees yootays» gides.
Jeremiah1:9 GODAY ba kushe yeddidi ta metershata bochchidi
Jeremiah1:10 Neni shoddanaassinne laallanaas
Jeremiah1:11 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Jeremiah1:12 GODAY tana
Jeremiah1:13 GODAA qaalay qasseka taakko yiidi
Jeremiah1:14 GODAY taas
Jeremiah1:15 Tani pudeha baggan diza kawoteththata haa yaana mala xeygana; Yerusalaameninne izi yuushon diza Yuhuda katamata bolla meto gaththidi istta oykkana; hessafe guye Yerusalaame geliza pengeta bolla bantta araata miccana.
Jeremiah1:16 «Yuhuda asay tana aggidi
Jeremiah1:17 «Neni gidikko giigetta! Denda eqqada tani nena azazizayssa ubbaa isttas yoota; isttas yayyofa. Neni isttas yayyiko tani nena istta sinththan gujja yashissana.
Jeremiah1:18 «Hach tani nena ha biitta ubbaa bolla
Jeremiah1:19 Istti nenara olettana; gido attiin tani ashshanaas nenara issife diza gishshas nena xoonettenna. Tani GODAY hayssa nees yootays» gides.
Jeremiah2:1 GODAA qaalay yiidi taas
Jeremiah2:2 «Ba! Baada waassa; Yerusalaame asaa hayththan sissa; GODAY
Jeremiah2:3 He wode Isra7eeley GODAAS geeshsha
Jeremiah2:4 Intteno Yaaqoobe keeththa asatoo! Isra7eele zare ubbatoo! GODAA qaala siyite!
Jeremiah2:5 GODAY
Jeremiah2:6 Isttika
Jeremiah2:7 Intte izi ayfenne izi anjjo maana mala tani inttena aradda biitta ehadis; gido attiin intte yiidi ta biitta tunisideta; ta xinxxoyo harasettana mala ooththideta.
Jeremiah2:8 Qeesetikka
Jeremiah2:9 Qasseka GODAY
Jeremiah2:10 Kiitime pinni xeellite; Qeedaare kiittidi lo7eththi xomosite; Histtidi ane hayssa mala hanoy kase hani erizaakko be7ite.
Jeremiah2:11 Istti tumu xoossata gidontta aggikokka ba eeqa xoossata laammida kawoteththi dizee? Ta derey gidikko isttas bonchcho gididayssa hada gidida eeqa xoossatan laammides» gees.
Jeremiah2:12 Qasseka Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Jeremiah2:13 Ta derey nam7u iita miishshata ooththides; de7o haaththa pultto gidida tana aggides; haaththa oykkanaas dandayontta lukettida ollata baas bookkida.
Jeremiah2:14 Isra7eeley kareppe yida ayllee? woykko soon yelettida ayllee? Histtiin ays bonqqas aadhdhi imettidee?
Jeremiah2:15 Gaammoti iza bollan xaaggida; istti bantta qaala dhoqqu histtidi iza bolla garmamida; istti iza biitta bula kessida; iza katamatikka xuugettidanne kayzida.
Jeremiah2:16 Qasseka Memppisanne Xaafinaase asati ne hu7e bulusida.
Jeremiah2:17 Oge nena kaaleththizayssa GODAA ne Xoossa aggada hayssa ne bolla ehiday nena gidikkii?
Jeremiah2:18 Shihoore shaafappe haath uyanaas
Jeremiah2:19 Ne iitateththi ne bolla qixaate gaththana; ne tana kaddoyssi ne bolla hanqo ehana. GODAA ne Xoossaa ne aggishin
Jeremiah2:20 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Jeremiah2:21 Tani nena muuruta zereththafe ekkada
Jeremiah2:22 Neni hadinccen meecettikokka
Jeremiah2:23 Neni waanada
Jeremiah2:24 Neni bazzo biittan baas dose histtada ziita keza singeththashe woxxiza hardida mala gidadasa; Iza birassas kezaychchiko oonee izo teqqanaas dandayzay? Iza biras keziin izo koyzayti ubbati waayontta demmeettes.
Jeremiah2:25 Ne tohoy argacana gakkanaas woxxofa; ne doonay saamon melana gakkanaas toylattofa; ne gidikko
Jeremiah2:26 «Kaysoy oykettidi yeellatiza mala Isra7eele asay yeellatides; isttika
Jeremiah2:27 Istti mith
Jeremiah2:28 Histtiin ane intte inttes medhdhida xoossati awan dizoo? Yuhudaa
Jeremiah2:29 GODAY
Jeremiah2:30 Tani intte nayta coo mela qaxxayadis; istti gidikko baaybeettenna; gafida gaammo mala intte mashshay intte nabeta mides» gees.
Jeremiah2:31 Intteno ha wode yeletatoo! GODAA qaala yuushshi qopite; «Tani inttes Isra7eele asaas bazzo mala woykko sakkanna dhumay diza biitta mala gidadinaa? Histtiin ays ta asay
Jeremiah2:32 Geela7oy ba alleqo woykko mishiraya ba mishirateththa may7o bala erazee? ta derey gidikko tana daro wode gakkanaas balides.
Jeremiah2:33 Ziitan as oykkanaas ne ay mala eranchchaa? Huskku huskkiza iita maccassatikka ne hanoteththaafe daro iita miish tamaareettes.
Jeremiah2:34 Ne istta kaysoteththan oykkontta xillo manqota suuththi ne may7o bolla beettides. Neni hayssa ubbaa ooththa woththadakka
Jeremiah2:35 ‹Tani xillo; tumappe iza hanqoy tana gakkenna› gaasa. Neni
Jeremiah2:36 Histtiin ne oge laamma laamma ays woxxay? Kase nena Asoore biittay kawushshida mala Gibxe biittay nena kawushshana.
Jeremiah2:37 Neni ammanettizayta GODAY kawushshida gishshassinne isttafekka maado demmontta gishshas hayssafekka ne hu7e kushen baqqa oykkada kezana.
Jeremiah3:1 «Issi asi ba keeththaayo anjji yeddiin iza baada hara azina gelikko
Jeremiah3:2 «Ane dhoqqu gaada aykkoy baynda zumbullata xeella; neni laymas ichchonttasoy hessan dizee? Bonqqana bazzon uttida panga mala oge doonan uttada ne laggeththota naagadasa; histtada neni laymateththaninne iitateththan biittayo tunisadasa.
Jeremiah3:3 Hessa gishshas puuseykka puusontta mala digettides; balgo iraykka bukkontta aggides; ne gidikko hanno gakkanaas laymateth aggabeekka; neni yeellatonttaka ixxadasa.
Jeremiah3:4 Ha7i neni tana
Jeremiah3:5 Neni ubbato ta bolla hanqettanee? Ne hanqoy mernaassee?› gadasa. Ee neni hizgaasa; gido attiin neni dandayda keena iita miish ubbaa ooththaasa» gees.
Jeremiah3:6 Kawo Iyosiyaasi kawotida layth GODAY taas
Jeremiah3:7 Iza hayssa ubbaa ooththadakka taakko simmana gaada qoppadis shin simmabeekku. Qasse ammanettontta izi michcho Yuhudaykka hessa beyadus.
Jeremiah3:8 Ammanoy baynda Isra7eele dereti laymatida gishshas anjjo waraqata imma yeddadis; Isra7eele michcho ammanettontta Yuhudaykka hayssa be7ashe yayyontta kezada laymatishin be7adis.
Jeremiah3:9 Ba kawushshateththan biitta tunisadus; miththarakka shuchcharakka laymatadus.
Jeremiah3:10 Hessan ubbaankka izi michchiya
Jeremiah3:11 GODAY taas
Jeremiah3:12 «Ba; baada pudeha baggas
Jeremiah3:13 Gidikkonne neni
Jeremiah3:14 Qasseka GODAY
Jeremiah3:15 «Hessafe guye tani ta wozina mala inttena erateththaninne akeekan heemmiza heenththanchchata inttes immana.
Jeremiah3:16 Qasseka GODAY intte qooday biitta bolla corattiza wode
Jeremiah3:17 He woden istti Yerusalaame
Jeremiah3:18 He gallassatan Yuhuda asati Isra7eele asatara gayttidi pudeha bagga biittafe tani kase intte aawatas xinxxo histta immida biitta issife yaana» gees.
Jeremiah3:19 GODAY
Jeremiah3:20 Gido attiin Isra7eele asawu! Intte ba azinaas ammanettontta maccassa mala taas ammanettibeekketa» gees.
Jeremiah3:21 Istti GODAA bantta Xoossaa balidi bantta oge geellasida gishshas Isra7eele deraa waasoy
Jeremiah3:22 Istti
Jeremiah3:23 Nuni zumbullata bollanne zumata bolla eeqa xoossatas goynoy tumappe nuus bala; tumappe nuus Isra7eeletas atoteththi GODAA nu Xoossaafe.

Jeremiah4:2 intte tuman

Jeremiah4:4 Intteno Yuhuda asatoo
Jeremiah4:5 GODAY

Jeremiah4:7 Gaammoy ba dizasoppe kezides; kawoteththata dhayssizay kiitettides; ne biittayokka bulasanaas ba dizasoppe kezides; ne katamati laalettana; kundidikka kayzi attana.

Jeremiah4:9 Qasseka GODAY
Jeremiah4:10 Histtiin tani
Jeremiah4:11 He woden ha asaassinne Yerusalaames
Jeremiah4:12 Hessafekka keehi wolqqamiza carkoy ta azazon carkana; ha7i tani istta bolla pirdana» geetetti yootettana.
Jeremiah4:13 Be7ite! Morkkey shaara mala biitta kumides; iza para-gaaretikka gote carko mala yeettes; iza paratikka golle kafota mala eesoteettes; aayye ana nu dhayana goos!
Jeremiah4:14 Nenoo Yerusalaamee! Ne attana koykko ne wozina iitateththaa meecetta; Iita qofay ne wozinan ayde gakkanaas gam7anee?
Jeremiah4:15 Cenggurssi Daaneppe seetettees; Efreeme zumata bolla bashshi awajjeettes.
Jeremiah4:16 «Kawoteththatas yootite; Yerusalaameskka
Jeremiah4:17 Iza ta bolla makkallida gishshas kath naagiza asa mala istti Yuhuda giddoththana› giite.
Jeremiah4:18 Ne hanoynne ne oosoy hessa ne bolla ehides; hessi nees qixaate; hessika ay mala cammizaazee! ay mala wozina menththizaazee!» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah4:19 Waanoo tanii! Tani hayssa wostta dandayanee! Tana metides! Ta wozinay hirgees; tani co7u gaanaas dandaykke. Ays giikko tani zaye cenggurssinne ola cenggurs siyadis.
Jeremiah4:20 Iita miishshi iita miish kaallees; mule biittay moorettides; ta dunkaanetinne magalashati eeson dhayda.
Jeremiah4:21 Tani ayde gakkanaas ola malata xeellanee? ta ayde gakkanaas zaye giiris siyanee?
Jeremiah4:22 GODAY
Jeremiah4:23 Tani sa7a xeellada sa7ay lo7i giigonttayssanne coo mela dizayssa be7adis. Qasse salota xeellada isttan poo7oy bayndayssa be7adis.
Jeremiah4:24 Tani zumata xeellada istti kokkorishininne zumbullati ubbay yon7iyon7ishin be7adis.
Jeremiah4:25 Tani xeelladis shin ay asikka be7abeekke; salo kafotikka ubbay piradhdhidi dhayda.
Jeremiah4:26 Aradda biittay bazzo gididayssa be7adis; GODAA sinththan
Jeremiah4:27 GODAY
Jeremiah4:28 Hessa gishshas sa7ay yeekkana; saloykka dhumana. Ays giikko tani gadis; he qofaa ta laammontta mala qachchadis» gees.
Jeremiah4:29 Para asatanne wondafe asata kachcha gaason asay katama ubbaafe baqatana. Baggay woxxidi wora gars gelana; baggay qasse zaalla bolla kezana; katamay ubbay asi baynda kayzi attana.
Jeremiah4:30 Hanne bashshas uttidaaree! Neni ay ooththay? Ne zo7o may7o ays may7ay? Worqqa alleqokka ays aaththay? Ne ayfe ciro ays tiyay? Neni coo mela nena lo7eththaasa; Ne laggeththoti nena kadhida; istti nena wodhanaas koyeettes.
Jeremiah4:31 Tani koyro bayra naa yelanaas miixattiza maccassa mala ne waassishin ta siyadis; Yerusalaame macca naya peenoy tucettanaashe gakkanaas waassishininne ba kushe miccada

Jeremiah5:2 Gido attiin isttas

Jeremiah5:4 Hessafe guye tani ta wozinan
Jeremiah5:5 Hessa gishshas tani gita asataakko baana; isttaskka yootana; gaasoykka GODAA ogenne bantta Xoossa woga ereettes» gaada qoppadis. Gido attiin istti ubbayka issife iza qambara menththida; qashozakka duuththida.
Jeremiah5:6 Hessa gishshas gaammoy worappe kezidi istta menththereththana; kana suytey bazzofe kezidi istta puuzereththana; Maahey istta katamata yuusho zamadi naagana. He katamatappe keziza ubbaa izi puuzana. Gaasoykka istta makkallateththinne kaddoy darides.

Jeremiah5:8 Istti dhiikettida korma para mala gidida; istti issoy issoy asa machcho laggeththanaas kaallida.
Jeremiah5:9 Tumuppe tani ha yo7ota gishshas istta qaxxayanaas bessennee? Tani ta hu7era hessa mala kawoteththa bolla halo kessana bessennee?» gees.

Jeremiah6:1 GODAY

Jeremiah6:24 Nuni he yo7o siyiin nu qesey kim7ilish gides. Maccas miixay oykkida mala nuna ceecey oykkides.

Jeremiah7:25 Intte aawati Gibxe biittafe kezida gallassafe doommidi hanno gakkanaas tani ta aylle gidida nabeta isttas kiittashe days.
Jeremiah7:26 Derezi gidikko ta gizaaz siyibeenna; wozinan woththi siyanaaska koyibeenna; istti bantta morge minththidanne istta aawati ooththida iita miishshafe aadhdhiza iita miish ooththida.

Jeremiah10:1 Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! GODAY inttes yootiza qaala siyite!
Jeremiah10:2 GODAY
Jeremiah10:3 Gaasoykka dereta wogay hada. Istti mith worappe qanxxeettes; hiillay massi giigssees.
Jeremiah10:4 Istti biraninne worqqan alleqisseettes; qaaxxontta mala naariqara misimaaren dhishkidi oyththeettes.
Jeremiah10:5 Istta eeqa xoossati istta kaththa giddon do7a daganththanaas essiza misle mala. Haasayanaas dandayettenna. Hemettanaas istti dandayontta gishshas asay istta tookkees. Istti iita gidiin woykko lo7o miish intte bolla ooththanaas dandayontta gishshas isttas mulekka yayyofte» gees.
Jeremiah10:6 Abeet GODAWU! Ne malay oonikka deenna. Neni gita; ne sunththayka gitanne wolqqama.
Jeremiah10:7 Abeet kawoteththatas kawoo! Nees yayyonttay oonee? Nees bonchchoy bessees; gaasoykka aadho eranchchata garsaninne istta kawoteththata ubbaa garsan ne malay deenna.
Jeremiah10:8 Hada gidida miththafe masettida eeqa xoossatappe timirte tamaarza ubbay eeyanne damma.
Jeremiah10:9 He eeqa xoossati Tarseeseppe yida biraninne Ufaazeppe yida worqqan alleqettida. Istti woyne ushshaninne ochcha teera misatiza medhara diza may7on kamettida. Istti ubbay kushe ooso hiillatan oosettida.
Jeremiah10:10 Gido attiin GODAY tumu Xoossa; izi de7o Xoossanne mernaa Kawo. Izi hanqettiza wode biittay qaaxxees; kawoteththatikka iza yiillo dandayettenna.
Jeremiah10:11 GODAY
Jeremiah10:12 Ba wolqqan sa7a medhdhiday
Jeremiah10:13 Izi guummiza wode
Jeremiah10:14 Asi ubbay era dhaydi dammides; worqqa seerisiza asi ubbay ba ooththida eeqa xoossatan yeellatides. Gaasoykka eeqa xoossati wordo; isttas shemppoy deenna.
Jeremiah10:15 Istti coo qidhes medhettida miishsha. Pirday istta bolla gakkiza wode istti dhayana.
Jeremiah10:16 Gido attiin Yaaqoobe qaaday heyta mala gidenna. Gaasoykka izi ubbaa medhdhidayssa; Isra7eeley doorettida dere. Iza dooridayssa sunththay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossa.
Jeremiah10:17 Intteno morkkey giddoththidaytoo! Diza miish dizasoppe shiishshite.
Jeremiah10:18 Gaasoykka GODAY
Jeremiah10:19 Waanoo ay hanoo! Ta madunththay paxontta madunththa. Gido attiin ta tana
Jeremiah10:20 Ta dunkaaney laalettides; iza wodoroy ubbay duuxerettides. Ta nayti ubbay taappe shaakettidi bichchida; hayssafe guye simmettenna; ta dunkaana zaaridi tolanaas woykko ta magalasha kaqqanaas ha7i issi asinne attibeenna.
Jeremiah10:21 Heenththanchchati dammida; istti GODAA oychchibeettenna. Hessa gishshas isttas injjetibeenna; istta wude ubbay laalettides.

Jeremiah10:23 Abeet GODAWU! Asa de7oy izaade kushen donttayssanne ba hemetaakka barkka ba shene mala lo7eththana dandayonttayssa ta erays.
Jeremiah10:24 Abeet GODAWU! Tana seera; gido attiin ginara gido. Tani mulera dhayontta mala neni hanqora ta bolla yooppa;
Jeremiah10:25 Yaaqoobe mulera mi mittidayta bollanne ne sunththaa xeygontta asata bolla guussa. Iza duussasokka kayzisida gishshas neni ne hanqoza nena erontta dereta bollanne ne sunth xeygontta kawoteththata bolla gussa.

Jeremiah11:2 «Ha caaqo qaalata siya; histtada Yuhuda asaassinne Yerusalaame kataman dizaytas yoota.

Jeremiah11:4 « ‹Hayssi azazozi beni intte aawata Gibxe biittafe
Jeremiah11:5 Hessan maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta kase intte aawatas immanaas tani caaqqida caaqo polana› gadis» gees. Tanikka

Jeremiah11:7 Kase intte aawata tani Gibxe biittafe kessoosappe hach gakkanaas

Jeremiah11:9 Zaaridikka GODAY taas
Jeremiah11:10 Istti kase ta qaala siyontta ixxidi nagara ooththida bantta aawata malakka nagara ooththida; istti hara xoossatas goynnidanne istta kaallida; Isra7eele asaynne Yuhuda asay tani kase istta aawatara caaqettida caaqo qaala laallida.
Jeremiah11:11 Hessa gishshas GODAY isttas
Jeremiah11:12 He wode Yuhuda katamata asatinne Yerusalaame asati biidi bantti exaane cuwasiza eeqa xoossatas waassana; gido attiin meto wode he xoossati mulekka istta maaddettenna.
Jeremiah11:13 Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Intte xoossati intte katamata keena cora. Qasse Ba7aale geetettiza he yeellachchiza xoossas exaane cuwasanaas intte essida yarshizasohoti Yerusalaame ogeta keena cora› gees.

Jeremiah11:17 «Isra7eele asatinne Yuhuda asati Ba7aales exaane cuwasidi tana yiillosida gishshas inttena tokkida Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY intte bolla iita miish ehanaas awajjadis» gides.

Jeremiah12:1 Abeet GODAWU! Tani nenara palamettiza wode ubbaankka ne xillo. Iita asati ooththizayssi isttas ays injjetizee? Ammanettonttayti ays ishalo duus dizoo?
Jeremiah12:2 Neni istta tokkadasa; histtiin xapho yeddida; diccidi ayfe ayfida. Istti nena doonappe yeggettenna; neni gidikko istta wozinappe haakon daasa.
Jeremiah12:3 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! Neni tana eraasa. Tana be7aasa; tani nees ay qoppizaakko paaccaasa. Shukettana biza dorsata mala neni istta laagga! Shuka gallassas istta dumma shaakka woththa!
Jeremiah12:4 Iray dhayiin biittay ayde gakkanaas melanee? Maataykka ayde gakkanaas melanee? Asaa iitateththaafe dendidayssan medosatinne kafoti dhayda. Hessa bollaka asay

Jeremiah12:9 Ta xinxxoya phircoti maana giddoththida kafo mala gidabeekkee? Biidi wora do7ata ubbaa shiishshite; istti izo duuththeththi maana mala xeygite.
Jeremiah12:10 Daro heenththanchchati ta woyne tura soho moorida; tani izan ufayettiza ta gadeza bulasida.

Jeremiah18:1 GODAA matappe Ermaasakko
Jeremiah18:2 «Dendada manaso ba; heen ta nees ta kiita yootana» giza qaalay yides.
Jeremiah18:3 Tanikka duge manazaso badis; izi ba medhdhiza irzo bolla oto medhdhishin be7adis.
Jeremiah18:4 Izi medhdhishin otozi iza kushen moorettides; histtiin izi he urqqaa zaaridi ba koyida mala medhdhides.
Jeremiah18:5 He wode GODAA qaalay
Jeremiah18:6 «Isra7eele asawu! Manazi ooththizayssaththo ta inttena ooththanaas dandaykkinaa? Isra7eele asawu! Urqqay mana kushen dizayssaththo intteka ta kushen deeta.
Jeremiah18:7 Tani issi derey woykko issi kawoteththi shodettana mala
Jeremiah18:8 he tani yootida kawoteththay ba iitateththaafe aggidi simmiko
Jeremiah18:9 Qasse hara wodekka tani issi dere woykko issi kawoteth minththa essanaas yootikko

Jeremiah18:13 Hessa gishshas GODAY
Jeremiah18:14 Shuch xalla gidida Libaanoose zumata bollafe shachchi dhayi erizee? Ladde bollafe duge goggiza irxxa haaththi gogeth aggi erizee?
Jeremiah18:15 Ta derey gidikko tana balides; istti go7ontta xoossatas exaane cuwaseettes; bantta ogera biidi dhuphettida; beni ogeppe kare kezida; baasettontta diza kundukurcco ogera bida.
Jeremiah18:16 Istta biittay bulanne mernaas kadhettidaaz gidana; heera aadhdhiza ubbay malalettana; ba hu7ekka qidhishe qaaththana.
Jeremiah18:17 Arshey mokkiza bagga carko mala tani istta istta morkketa sinththan laallana. Istti dhayza gallas ta isttas zokko zaarana attiin ta ayfeso bessike» gees.
Jeremiah18:18 Isttika
Jeremiah18:19 Abeet GODAWU! Ta gizaaz siya; ta morkketi ta bolla haasayzayssa ezga.
Jeremiah18:20 Lo7o ooththidaades iita zaarizoo? Istti gidikko taas olla bookkida; ne hanqoy isttafe simmana mala ne sinththan eqqada istta gishshas ta yootidayssa qoppa.
Jeremiah18:21 Hessa gishshas istta nayta koshassinne mashshas aaththa imma; istta maccassati maynnenne am7eta gidetto; istta attumasatikka para hayqon wuretto; istta naateththa nayti olason mashshas gidetto
Jeremiah18:22 Istti tana kundisanaas olla bookkiza gishshassinne ta tohoska woximade woththida gishshas istti qoppontta neni istta bolla bonqqizayta yeddiin istta keeththan waasoy kezo.
Jeremiah18:23 Gido attiin abeet GODAWU! istti tana wodhanaas maqettidayssa ubbaa neni eraasa; neni istta iitateththaa atto gooppa
Jeremiah19:1 GODAY Ermaasas
Jeremiah19:2 Kon7a Meqo Penge achchara aadhdhada Henoome naa shoobba ba; heen tani nees yootiza qaala awajja.
Jeremiah19:3 ‹Intteno Yuhuda kawoto! Yerusalaamen diza derezoo! GODAA qaala siyite! Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay: Siyanaas hayththas iitiza miish ha biitta bolla tani ehana.
Jeremiah19:4 Gaasoykka asay tana aggidi hayssa ha sohoza eeqa goynnizasoho kessides; istti gidiin woykko kase istta aawati
Jeremiah19:5 Qasse tani istta azazonttayssa
Jeremiah19:6 Hessa gishshas asay ha sohoza shuka shoobba gaanaappe attiin Toofeete woykko Henoome naa shoobba gi xeygontta wodey yaana.
Jeremiah19:7 « ‹Ha sohon Yuhuda halchchonne Yerusalaame halchcho ta laallana; istti bantta morkketa mashshaninne banttana wodhanaas koyzayta kushen hayqqana mala tani ooththana; istta aha salo kafotassinne wora do7atas quma histta immana.
Jeremiah19:8 Tani ha katamayo mulera dhayssana; miichchaska kessana; izi matara aadhdhiza asay ubbay hanno pala! gi qidhi kaa7ana.
Jeremiah19:9 Istti bantta macca nayta ashonne bantta attuma nayta asho maana mala tani ooththana; istta wodhanaas koyza istta morkketi istta giddoththiin istti ubbay issoy issaa asho maana› gees.
Jeremiah19:10 «Hessafe guye nenara issife bida asata sinththan he gomboza menththa.
Jeremiah19:11 Histtidi isttas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay
Jeremiah19:12 Tani ha sohozaninne izan diza asaa bolla hessaththo ooththana; tani ha katamayo Toofeete mala ooththana.
Jeremiah19:13 Bantta keeththa kaara bolla salo medheteththatas exaane cuwasidinne eeqa xoossatas ushshu shiishshidayti Yerusalaame asaa keeththatinne Yuhuda kawota keeththati Toofeete mala tunana› gees.

Jeremiah20:7 Abeet GODAWU! Neni tana cimmadasa; tanikka cimettadis. Neni taappe keeha minnada tana xoonadasa. Gallas kumeth tani asas miichchas attadis; ubbayka tana qidhees.

Jeremiah20:12 Abeet Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAWU! xilloza paaccizayssoo! wozinanne kaha pilgga xeellizayssoo! tani ta mooto nees aaththa immida gishshas neni istta bolla halo kessishin ta ayfen be7anaas tana gaththa.

Jeremiah25:33 He woden GODAY wodhidayta ahay biitta gaxaappe biitta gaxa gakkanaas porccu gi kundana; isttas yeekettenna; istta ahay shiiqennanne moogettenna; biitta bolla buura mala olettana.
Jeremiah25:34 Intteno heenththanchchatoo! Yeekkitenne waassite. Intteno wudaa heemmizaytoo! bidinththan genderettite. Intte shukettana wodey gakkida gishshas lo7i medhettida mana miishshi tinchchettiza mala intte kundi tinchchettana.
Jeremiah25:35 Heenththanchchati baqatizasoy deenna; wude heemmizayti kessi ekki attizasoy baa.

Jeremiah26:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7aaqemey kawotida koyro layththan hayssafe kaalli diza qaalay GODAA achchafe yides.
Jeremiah26:2 GODAY tana
Jeremiah26:3 Istti siyidi ba biza iita ogeppe simmanaakko oonee erizay? Tanikka istti ooththida iitateththaa gishshas istta bolla ehana gida qixaateza aggana.
Jeremiah26:4 Ne isttas
Jeremiah26:5 intte siyana mala ta oosanchchata zaara zaara ta intteko yeddida nabeta qaala intte siyontta ixxiko
Jeremiah26:6 tani ha Keeththaa Seelo mala ooththana; ha katamayokka sa7a bolla diza kawoteththa ubbaa sinththan qanggettidaaro histtana› gees ga» gides.
Jeremiah26:7 Ermaasi GODAA Keeththan ha qaala yootishin qeeseti
Jeremiah26:8 Gido attiin Ermaasi derezas yootana mala GODAY izas yootidayssa derezas yooti wursida mala qeeseti
Jeremiah26:9 Neni
Jeremiah26:10 Yuhuda shuumeti hessa ubbaa siyida mala kawoteththa keeththafe kezidi GODAA Keeth bida. Histtidi GODAA Keeththas
Jeremiah26:11 Qeesetinne nabeti shuumetassinne dere ubbaas
Jeremiah26:12 Ermaasikka shuumetassinne dere ubbaas
Jeremiah26:13 Ha7ikka intte ogenne intte ooso lo7eththite; GODAA intte Xoossas azazettite; intte histtiko GODAY intte bolla ehana gi yootida iita miishshaa izi aggaagana.
Jeremiah26:14 «Tani gidikko hekko intte kushen days; inttes lo7onne suure misatizayssa ta bolla ooththite.
Jeremiah26:15 Gido attiin hayssa intte siyida qaala ubbaa tani inttes yootana mala GODAY taas addafe yootida gishshas intte tana wodhikkoka intte xillo suuth gussidi intte intte hu7essinne hanno katamayn diza as ubbaa mooranchcha histtontta mala naagettite» gides.
Jeremiah26:16 Histtiin shuumetinne derezi ubbay qeesetassinne nabetas
Jeremiah26:17 Dere cimatappeka issi issi asati dendi eqqidi shiiqida deraas
Jeremiah26:18 «Hizqiyaasi Yuhudan kawotidi diza wode Moresheteppe yida Mikiyaasi Yuhuda dere ubbaas
Jeremiah26:19 «Histtiin
Jeremiah26:20 Qasseka beni wode Qiriyaate-Yi7aarime gizason diza Shama7e naa Ooriyoy dees; izikka Ermaasi yootida mala ha katama bollanne ha biitta bolla GODAA sunththan tinbite yootides.
Jeremiah26:21 Kawo Iyo7aaqemey
Jeremiah26:22 Gido attiin Kawo Iyo7aaqemey Akiboore naa Elnataanenne hara asatakka iza bolla gujjidi Gibxe biitta kiittides.
Jeremiah26:23 Istti Ooriyo Gibxeppe oykki ehidi kawo Iyo7aaqemekko efida. Kawozi iza mashshan wodhidi iza aha beettiday moogettizason efi yeggides.
