Jeremiah46:1 Kawoteththata gishshas nabe Ermaasakko yida GODAA qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa;
Jeremiah46:2 Gibxe gishshas Yuhuda kawo Iyosiyaasa naa Iyo7aaqemey kawotida oydanththo layththan
Jeremiah46:3 «Intte wogga gondallenne qeeri gondalle giigsite; histtidi olas kezite!
Jeremiah46:4 Intte parata kooridi toggite; intte hu7en birata qoobe woththidi
Jeremiah46:5 Gido attiin hayssi tani be7izay aazee? keehi yayyidi guye undudeettes; wolqqama istta olanchchati xoonettida; guye simmi xeellontta eeson baqateettes; ubbason shiroy dees.
Jeremiah46:6 Pilatay baqati attenna; minoykka kessi ekki attenna; pudeha baggan Efiraaxise Shaafa matan dhuphetti kundida.
Jeremiah46:7 Hayssi Abbaye Shaafa mala kixxidi guppizay qasse di7o haaththa mala goggizay oonee?
Jeremiah46:8 Gibxey Abbaye shaafay kixxidi guppiza mala guppees; di7o haaththa mala xongettees; Gibxey
Jeremiah46:9 Paratoo guppi kezite; para-gaaretoo adaraasite; gondalle oykkida Tophphiya asaynne Puuxe asay
Jeremiah46:10 He gallassay GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa gallassa; izi ba morkketa bolla halo kessiza gallassa; mashshay kallana gakkanaas maana; saamo alana gakkanaaska suuth uyana; GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay pudeha baggan Efiraaxise Shaafa matan isttas yarsho giigsi woththides.
Jeremiah46:11 Hanne Gibxe geela7oyee! pude Gala7aade keza; tiyettiza dhale ekka ya; gido attiin neni dhale coo mela darssaasa; ne paxakka.
Jeremiah46:12 Kawoteththati ne yeellateththaa siyana; ne yeehoy biitta kumana; olanchchay olanchchara oyketti kundana» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah46:13 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Gibxe biitta yiidi olanayssa GODAY nabe Ermaasas yootida qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa;
Jeremiah46:14 «Hayssa Gibxen yoota; qasse Gibxe katamatan Migidoolen
Jeremiah46:15 Wolqqama gidida Aphphise geetettiza eeqa xoossay ays kundidee? GODAY iza sugi yeggida gishshas eqqana dandaybeenna.
Jeremiah46:16 Iza kaalliza asati zaari zaari dhuphettana; issoy issaa bolla kundana; ‹Ane dendite! Gede nu derenne nu asaakko ane simmoos; morkke mashshafekka ane kessi ekkoos› gaana.
Jeremiah46:17 Istti heen
Jeremiah46:18 Iza sunththay GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa geetettiza Kawoy
Jeremiah46:19 Intteno Gibxe biittan dizaytoo! Di7etti baanaas inttes dizaaz giigsite; Memppisa laallettada izin asi baynda bula gidana.
Jeremiah46:20 Gibxe biittay lo7o ussa mala; gido attiin saxxiza boxey pudeha baggafe yaana.
Jeremiah46:21 Miishshan shametti yida izi olanchchati modhdhida wofano mala. Istti qaxxayettana wodey gakkida gishshassinne istti dhayanaas wodey matida gishshas istti issife guye simmi baqatana; ba dizason minni eqqidi eqettanaas dandayettenna.
Jeremiah46:22 Morkkey xooni xooni yishin Gibxe asay baqatishe shooshshi suyqiza mala suyqana; mith qanxxana biza asa mala izi morkketi izo qanxxana kaltta ekki yaana.
Jeremiah46:23 Dhippi gida wora gidikkoka woray qeexettees; istta daroteththay boole mala; istti qoodettanaas dandayettenna.
Jeremiah46:24 Gibxe macca naya yeellatana; pudeha bagga deres aadhdha imettana.»
Jeremiah46:25 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
Jeremiah46:26 Istta wodhanaas koyza Baabiloone Kawo Nabukadanaxoore kusheninne iza olanchchata kushen ta aaththa immana. Guuththa wodeppe guye Gibxey kaseyssaththo asi dizaso gidana» gees.
Jeremiah46:27 «Ta oosanchcha Yaaqoobe yayyofa; Isra7eele shirotoppa; ta nena haaho biittafe ne zarekka di7etti bidasoppe ashshana. Yaaqoobeykka simmidi saroteththan woppu gi daana; iza babisana miishshika deenna.
Jeremiah46:28 Ta nenara diza gishshas ta oosanchcha Yaaqoobe babbofa. Ta nena izan laallida kawoteth ubbaa mulera dhayssikokka nena gidikko mulera dhayssike. Ta nees bessiza qixaate qaxxayana attiin mela aggike» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah47:1 Paarooney Gaaza oli oykkanaappe kase Filisxeemeta gishshas GODAAPPE Ermaasakko yida qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa.
Jeremiah47:2 GODAY
Jeremiah47:3 Para toho giirissi morkke para-gaareta waaso
Jeremiah47:4 Filisxeeme asaa ubbaa dhayssanaas
Jeremiah47:5 Gaazay kayos ba binana meedettana; Asqeloonay ba doona bolla kushe woththana; intteno demba bolla casha attidaytoo! Intte ayde gakkanaas intte bolla qaacishe daanee?
Jeremiah47:6 «Intte
Jeremiah47:7 Gido attiin GODAY Asqeloonanne abba gaxa olana mala azazishin waani shemppanaas dandayettizee?» gees.
Jeremiah48:1 Mo7aabe gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
Jeremiah48:2 Hayssafe guye Mo7aabey bonchchettuku; asay Haseboonen uttidi
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaymeppe keziza dhayssa waasonne gita bashsha waaso giiris siyite;
Jeremiah48:4 Mo7aabey meqqana; izi naytikka waaso sissana.
Jeremiah48:5 Camo yeeho yeekkana; Luhite pudunth kezana; bana gakkida iita metoppe dendidayssan camo yeeho yeekkishe Horonayme dugunththa wodhdhana.
Jeremiah48:6 Baqatidi intte shemppo ashshite; bazzon tusha wora gidite.
Jeremiah48:7 Intte ooththida oosoninne intte aqotan intte ammanettiza gishshas intteka di7ettana; Kamoosheykka ba qeesetaranne ba shuumetara di7etti baana.
Jeremiah48:8 Katama ubbaa bolla dhayssizay yaana; issi katamaykka kessi ekki attenna; GODAY yootida gishshas shoobbay dhayana; dembatikka dhayana.
Jeremiah48:9 Mo7aabey piradhdha attana mala izis qefe immite; izi katamati aykkoy baynda bula gidana.
Jeremiah48:10 «GODAA oosos wudu gonttaadey qanggettidaade gido! iza mashshay suuth gussontta mala diggizaadey qanggettidaade gido.
Jeremiah48:11 «Mo7aabey yelagateththafe doommidi gacettontta tocera diza woyne ushsha mala woppan dees; otoppe oton laamettibeenna; izi di7etti bi erenna; iza mal7oy kase diza mala dees; iza sawoykka laamettibeenna.
Jeremiah48:12 Gido attiin otoza laammiza asata ta kiittana wodey yaana; isttaka wora gussidi otaa xalla ashshana; duuqqiza miishshatakka menththereththi yeggana.
Jeremiah48:13 Isra7eele asay Beetelen ammanetti dishe yeellatidayssaththo Mo7aabe asaykka ba xoossan Kamooshen yeellatana.
Jeremiah48:14 «Intte
Jeremiah48:15 Be7ite Mo7aabe biittay dhayana; izi katamatikka worajjettana; doorettida izi yelaga naytikka shukettanaas duge wodhdhana; iza sunththay GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah48:16 «Mo7aabes kundeththa wodey gakkides; bashshi iza bolla eeson yaana.
Jeremiah48:17 Iza yuushon diza ubbay iza gitateth erizayti ubbay izas yeekkite; intte
Jeremiah48:18 «Mo7aabe dhayssanay ne bolla yaana; gimbettida ne katamata izi dhayssana; hanne Diboone nayee! Ne bonchchozappe duge wodhdha; mela biitta bolla wodhdha utta.
Jeremiah48:19 Hanne Aaro7eeren dizaaree! Neni oge doonan eqqada xeella; baqatiza attumas
Jeremiah48:20 Mo7aabey laalettidi kawuyides; ‹Wu! Wuy› giidi waassite; Mo7aabey mulera dhaydayssa Arnoone Shaafa achchan awajjite!
Jeremiah48:21 Pirday bolla gezze biittan Holoone bolla
Jeremiah48:22 Diboone bolla
Jeremiah48:23 Qiriyaatayme bolla
Jeremiah48:24 Qiriyaate bollanne Booxira bolla
Jeremiah48:25 Mo7aabe kacey qanxxettides; iza qeseykka meqerettides.
Jeremiah48:26 «Izi GODAA kadhida gishshas Mo7aabe ushshan maththosite; Mo7aabey ba cooshsha bolla genderetto; qidhes atto.
Jeremiah48:27 Neni kase Isra7eele qidhabeekkii? Izi gishshas ne haasayza wode neni ne hu7e qaaththabeekkii? Iza kaysotara kaysotashe oykettadee?
Jeremiah48:28 Intteno Mo7aaben dizaytoo! katamappe kezi biidi zaalla giddon diite; aafo doonan ba keeth keexxiza haraphphey mala gidite.
Jeremiah48:29 Mo7aabe otoreteth
Jeremiah48:30 Tani iza wolqqa erays; gido attiin hessi hada; iza ceeqeteththaas go7ay deenna.
Jeremiah48:31 Hessa gishshas tani Mo7aabes yeekkays; Mo7aabe dere ubbaas
Jeremiah48:32 Nenoo Seebama woyne miththazoo! Iyaazeeres yeekkoyssafe aaththada tani nees yeekkays. Ne haggati daayidi Abba pinnidi Iyaazeere gakkida; gido attiin nees maxa gakkida kaththa ayfenne woyne dhayssanay yides.
Jeremiah48:33 Mo7aaben atakiltesoppenne goshsha gadeppe hashshu histtizaazinne ufayssi dhaydes; woyne ushshi gum7iin wodhdhontta mala melissadis; oonikka iza ililishe gum7enna; heen asa qaalay siyettikokka ililisa cenggurssa gidenna.
Jeremiah48:34 «Hasebooneppe biidi El7eelenne Yahaaxe gakkanaas
Jeremiah48:35 Dhoqqasohota bolla yarshizaytanne bantta eeqa xoossatas exaane cuwasizayta tani Mo7aabe biittafe dhayssana.
Jeremiah48:36 «Ta wozinay Mo7aabessinne Qiire-Hereese asaas zayen yeekkiza asa mala yeekkees; gaasoykka istta dureteththi dhaydes.
Jeremiah48:37 As ubbaa hu7eynne buuchchi meedettides; bantta kushekka cadereththida; qasse maaqa may7ida.
Jeremiah48:38 Mo7aaben diza keeththa ubbaaninne dabaaban yeehoppe attiin haray deenna; gaasoykka tani Mo7aabe dere mooho oto mala menththereththa yeggadis.
Jeremiah48:39 «Mo7aabey ay meqo meqqidee! Asay ay yeeho yeekkizee! Mo7aabey ay mala yeellatidi zokko zaaridee! Mo7aabey ba heeran diza asa ubbaas cashshassinne shabarsas malata gidides» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah48:40 GODAY
Jeremiah48:41 Iza katamatinne iza miixati oykettana; He gallas Mo7aabe olanchchata wozinaykka miixa oykettida maccassa wozina mala gidana.
Jeremiah48:42 Mo7aabey GODAA kawushshida gishshas dhayana; iza kawoteththayka attana.
Jeremiah48:43 Nenoo Mo7aabe derezoo! Nena shabarsi
Jeremiah48:44 «Shabarsafe baqati attida ubbay ollan gelana; ollafe keziday woximaden oykettana; tani Mo7aabey qaxxayettiza layth ehana gishshassa.
Jeremiah48:45 «Hasebooneppe Mo7aabe liiphe
Jeremiah48:46 Mo7aabe nees aayye ana! Kamooshes goynniza derey wuri wurides. Ne attuma nayti ubbay di7ettida; macca nayti ubbayka di7etti bida.
Jeremiah48:47 «Gido attiin wurseththan Mo7aabeppe di7etti bidayta ta zaarana» gees. Mo7aabe bolla pirdettida pirday hessa.
Jeremiah49:1 Amoone asaa GODAY
Jeremiah49:2 Amoone katama Eraaba bolla ola waaso cenggurssi seetettana wodey yaana. Iza budhettada doorettida doore gidana; izi gutati ubbay xuugettana; Isra7eeley bana kessi gooddidayta ba dereppe kessa gooddana.
Jeremiah49:3 Hanne Haseboone! Aye katamay dhayda gishshas yeekka; Eraaba macca naytoo waassite; maaqa may7idi yeekkite; gaasoykka Milkkoomey ba qeesetaranne ba shuumetara di7ettidi baana; dirsa giddon yaanne haa woxerettite.
Jeremiah49:4 Hanne kaddidaaree! Neni ne shoobbatan ays ammanettay? Neni lo7o kath immiza ne shoobban ays ceeqettay? neni ne dureteththan ceeqettada
Jeremiah49:5 Tani ne yuushon dizaytappe ne bolla shiro ehana; intte ubbayka goodettana; baqata bolla dizayta shiishshana asi beettenna.
Jeremiah49:6 «Hessafe guye tani Amoone asaappe di7ettida miishshaa zaarana» gees.
Jeremiah49:7 Eedoome gishshas GODAY Ubbaafe wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah49:8 Tani Eesawe qaxxayiza wode ta iza bolla bashsha ehiza gishshas intte Didaanen dizayti guye simmi baqatite; ciimma olla giddon qotettite.
Jeremiah49:9 Woyne maxizayti intteko yiidi maxishe pushulo ashshi erettennee? kaysoti kaysotana gelikko ba koyidayssa xalla ekkeettes deettennee?
Jeremiah49:10 Gido attiin tani Eesawe paxa kallo ashshana; izi qotetti attontta mala izi qotettanaasohota tani qoncce kessana; iza nayti
Jeremiah49:11 «Yelida aayanne aaway baynda ne garsan diza nayta ne aggaaga; ta istta dichchana; am7etikka tanan ammanettetto» gees.
Jeremiah49:12 GODAY
Jeremiah49:13 Booxiray laalettada dagamas
Jeremiah49:14 GODAAPPE yida issi kiita siyadis; «Eedoome bolla worajjanaas shiiqite; olettanaas dendite!» gi yootiza qasttanney kawoteththatakko kiitettides.
Jeremiah49:15 GODAY
Jeremiah49:16 Nenoo zaalla gongolo giddon dizayssoo! Nenoo dhoqqa zumbulla hu7en uttidayssoo! Ne yombiza yombaynne ne wozina otoroy nena baleththides; neni ne keeth golle mala dhoqqasohon keexxikokka tani nena heeppe duge olana» gees.
Jeremiah49:17 GODAY
Jeremiah49:18 Sodoomeynne Gamooray bantta yuushon diza katamatara issife dhayda mala Eedoomey dhayana; oonikka he biittan de7enna; issaadeyka izin uttenna» gees.
Jeremiah49:19 GODAY
Jeremiah49:20 Hessa gishshas tani GODAY Eedoome bolla polanaas halchchida halchchonne Temaanen dizayta bolla ta qoppida qofaa siyite! guuththa wudeti gooshetti baana; hessa gaason wudey heemettizaso mulera dhayssana.
Jeremiah49:21 Eedoome kundeththa giirissi biitta qaaththana; istta waasoykka Zo7o abba gakkanaas kooshumees.
Jeremiah49:22 Golle mala duge sitti gi izi bolla wodhdhana; ba qefetakka Booxira bolla miccana; he wode Eedoome olanchchati miixay oykkida maccassa mala hirgana.
Jeremiah49:23 GODAY Damasqo gishshas
Jeremiah49:24 Damasqoy daaburadus; baqatanaas guye simmadus; kokkoradus; miixay oykkida maccassa mala ceeceynne tuggay izo oykkides.
Jeremiah49:25 Ta izin ufayettiza erettida katamaya waana yegetta attadee?
Jeremiah49:26 He wode izis naateththa attuma nayti ubbay ke7idason ke7idason oge bolla kundana; olanchchati ubbayka hayqqi wurana.
Jeremiah49:27 Tani Damasqo katama yuushon diza gimbe bolla tama yeddana; he tamay Beeni-Hadaade shakko maana» gees.
Jeremiah49:28 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey oli xoonida Qeedaare kawoteththa gishshassinne Haxoore kawoteththa gishshas GODAY
Jeremiah49:29 Istta dunkaanetanne istta wudeta ekkite! Istta aqosoynne istta gaamellati ubbay attontta ekettana; Histtidi isttas
Jeremiah49:30 «Intteno Haxooren dizaytoo! Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey intte bolla iita miish ooththana maqetti uttida gishshas baqatite; biidi ciimma gongolon qotettite.
Jeremiah49:31 «Dendite! Hirgay baynda badhdhi gi uttida banan ammanetti uttida kawoteththaa olite! Ibiththi woykko kolatay baynda dishin barkka diza deraa bolla worajjite» gees.
Jeremiah49:32 GODAY
Jeremiah49:33 «Haxoorey worakanata duussaso gidana; mernaas bula gidana; oonikka heen de7enna; ay asikka izin uttenna» gees.
Jeremiah49:34 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida koyro layth GODAAPPE Elaame gishshas taakko yida qaalay
Jeremiah49:35 Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAY
Jeremiah49:36 Oyddu bagga gulatappe tani Elaame bolla oyddu carkota ehana; istta he oyddu bagga carkotan ta laallana; Elaameppe di7etti bidayti gakkontta kawoteththay deenna.
Jeremiah49:37 Istta shemppo wodhana koyza istta morkketa sinththan tani Elaame yarkiyarkisana; istta bolla bash ehana; hessika ta istta bolla ehana hanqo; tani istta mulera dhayssana gakkanaas mashshan yedeththana.
Jeremiah49:38 Tani araata Elaamen tokkana; tani izi kawotanne shuumeta dhayssana.
Jeremiah49:39 «Gido attiin wurseththa wodetan tani Elaame zaara ishalsana» gees.
Jeremiah50:1 Baabiloone biittanne Baabiloone asa gishshas Xoossi nabe Ermaasa baggara yootida qaalay hayssafe kaallizayssa;
Jeremiah50:2 «Kawoteththata ubbaa giddon awajjite! Bandira dhoqqu histti oykkidi awajjite! Aykkoka ashshontta dishe
Jeremiah50:3 Pudeha baggafe issi kawoteththay yiidi Baabiloone biitta olana; hessafe dendidayssan asinne mehey baqatana; biittayokka bula kessana; oonikka izin deenna.»
Jeremiah50:4 GODAY
Jeremiah50:5 Istti Xiyoone efiza oge oychchana; bantta sinth hee zaarana; yiidi mulera dogettontta mernaa caaqo qaalan GODAARA oykettana.
Jeremiah50:6 «Ta derey dhayda dorsa mala gidides; istta heenththanchchati istta baleththidi wora kaaleththida; zumata bollanne zumbullata bolla toylattida; ba aqizasokka dogida.
Jeremiah50:7 Demmida ubbay istta qohees; istta morkketi
Jeremiah50:8 «Baabilooneppe baqatite! Istta biittaaka yeddite! wude kaaleththiza deysha orge mala gidite.
Jeremiah50:9 Tani pudeha baggafe wolqqama kawoteththata Baabiloone bolla denththeththana; isttika izi bolla salfana; histtidi izo heeppe oykkana; istta wondafey yeddontta loohida olanchchata mala.
Jeremiah50:10 Baabiloone biittay bonqqettana; izo bonqqizayti baas gidanaashe gakkanaas bonqqana» gees.
Jeremiah50:11 «Intteno ta xinxxo bonqqi ekkidaytoo! Intte ufayettida gishshassinne ufayssan maggulida gishshas
Jeremiah50:12 intte aaya keeha yeellatana; inttena yelidaarakka kawuyana; kawoteththata ubbaa giddon iza guuth gidana; iza asi bayndaso
Jeremiah50:13 GODAA hanqo gaason iza bazzo gidana attiin asi izin deenna; izi bolla gakkida bashsha gaason Baabiloonera aadhdhi biza ubbay malalettishe iza qidhana.
Jeremiah50:14 «Intteno yiishshan dukkizaytoo! Baabiloone olanaas izi yuushon salfte; nagara ooththida gishshas intte yiish issinokka ashshontta izi bolla yeddite.
Jeremiah50:15 Ubbaa baggarakka izi bolla maggulite! Iza inttes kushe immana; izi miixatinne gimbetti laalettana; hayssi GODAY halo kessiza oge gidida gishshas intte izi bolla halo kessite; iza harata bolla ooththida mala intte izi bolla ooththite.
Jeremiah50:16 Baabilooneppe zereththi zerizayssa
Jeremiah50:17 «Isra7eeley gaammoy gooddidi laallida wude mala gidides; koyro Asoore kawoy puuzerethi mides; guyeppe Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey meqeththaa dhoggides» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah50:18 Hessa gishshas Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
Jeremiah50:19 Gido attiin tani Isra7eele kase izi heemettizaso iza zaarana; Qarmelooseninne Baasaane deren izi heemettana; qasse izi Efreeme zumbullata bollanne Gala7aade zumbullata bolla kallanaashe gakkanaas maana» gees.
Jeremiah50:20 He wodetaninne he gallassatan GODAY
Jeremiah50:21 «Mirataymeninne Paqooden diza asaa gooddite; wodhitenne mulera dhayssite; tani inttena azazidayssa ubbaa ooththite.
Jeremiah50:22 He biittan ola shiroynne gita bashsha waasoy seetettides.
Jeremiah50:23 Alame ubbaa liiqisiza madooshay waani meqqidee? Waani liiqidee? Kawoteththata giddon waana Baabilooney bula gidadee?
Jeremiah50:24 Hanne Baabiloonee! Ta nees woximade woththadis; nekka erontta dashe oykettadasa; neni GODAARA eqettida gishshas beettada oykettadasa.
Jeremiah50:25 GODAY ba ola massaraa woththiza minjja keeththaa doydes; ba hanqo ola massara kessides; GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay Baabiloone biittan ooththiza oosoy dees.
Jeremiah50:26 Yaara haara izi bolla worajjite; izi gootarata laallite; di7ettida miishsha kaththa mala doorite; mulera izo dhayssite; izin aykkoyka attofo.
Jeremiah50:27 Izi wofanota ubbaa shukkite; duge shukettizaso wodhdhetto! Istti qaxxayettana wodeynne gallassay gakkida gishshas aayye ana!
Jeremiah50:28 «GODAA nu Xoossay halo kessidayssa
Jeremiah50:29 «Wondafen olizayta Baabiloone bolla xeygite; issaadeyka kessi ekki bontta mala istta giddoththidi dunkaanite; GODAA Isra7eele geeshshaa kawushshida gishshas izi ooso mala izis zaarite; iza harata bolla ooththidayssaththo izi bolla ooththite.
Jeremiah50:30 Hessa gishshas izi naateththa attuma nayti aadhdhooson aadhdhooson hayqqana; izi olanchchati ubbay he gallas kundana» gees GODAY.
Jeremiah50:31 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah50:32 Otoranchchay dhuphettidi kundana; denththanaykka deenna; iza yuushon dizayta ubbaa miza tama iza katamata bolla yeddana» gees.
Jeremiah50:33 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah50:34 Gido attiin istta wozzizay mino; iza sunththayka GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossaa; istti biittas shemppo immanaas keehi baaxetees; gido attiin Baabiloonen dizaytas shemppo dhayssees» gees.
Jeremiah50:35 GODAY
Jeremiah50:36 Mashshay wordo gidida izi nabeta bolla yides; istti eeyata gidana; mashshay istta olanchchata bolla shodettana; isttika shirotana.
Jeremiah50:37 Istta parata bollanne istta para-gaareta bolla qasse izi giddon diza hara dere wottadarata bolla mashshay yaana; isttika maccassata mala gidana; mashshay izi aqota ubbaa bolla yaana; isttika bonqqettana.
Jeremiah50:38 Biittaya babisizanne as gooshshiza eeqa xoossatan kumida gishshas izi haaththata bolla arshey kezana; isttika melana.
Jeremiah50:39 «Hessa gishshas bazzo do7atassinne godares duussaso gidana; guttos aqoso gidana; hayssafe guye oonikka izin deenna; yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas izin uttanay beettenna.
Jeremiah50:40 Sodoomenne Gamoora katamaa istta yuushon diza dereta asi dontta mala ooththides; hessaththoka oonikka heen deenna; izin uttanaykka beettenna» gees.
Jeremiah50:41 «Be7ite! Pudeha baggafe asay yeeththa bolla dees; issi wolqqama kawoteththinne daro kawoti sa7a gaxappe dendida.
Jeremiah50:42 Istti wondafetanne mashshata oykkida; istti maarontta menxe iitata
Jeremiah50:43 Baabiloone kawoy istta gishshas siyides; iza kushetikka doccida; iza ceecey oykkides; miixay oykkida maccassa mala sakettides.
Jeremiah50:44 Gaammoy Yordaanoose woratappe mehe heemmiza demban kezi wodhdhiza mala tanikka Baabilooney qoppontta dishin keza wodhdhana; izi biittafe ta izo gooddana; ta dooridayssa izi bolla shuumana; ta malay oonee? tanara eqettana dandayzay oonee? tanara eqettana dandayza heenththanchchay oonee?
Jeremiah50:45 Hessa gishshas GODAY Baabiloone bolla halchchida halchcho
Jeremiah50:46 Baabiloone kundeththa giirissi biitta qaaththana; izi waasoy kawoteththa ubbaa garsan kooshumana» gees.
Jeremiah51:1 GODAY
Jeremiah51:2 Izo suragganaassinne izo dhayssanaas allagata ta Baabiloone bolla kiittana; iza metotida gallas izo dooddi oykkidi un7eththana.
Jeremiah51:3 Wondafe dukkizayti ba wondafe dukkanaas
Jeremiah51:4 Istti Baabiloone biittan siifettidi
Jeremiah51:5 Istta biittaya Isra7eele Geeshsha sinththan mooron kumidaa gidikkoka Isra7eelenne Yuhuda Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY istta Xoossay istta yeggi aggibeenna.
Jeremiah51:6 «Baabilooneppe baqati kezite! Elelidi intte shemppo ashshite; izi nagara gaason dhayopite; hayssi GODAY halo kessiza wode izi ooso mala izis immana.
Jeremiah51:7 Baabilooney GODAA kushen worqqa xuu7a; biitta ubbaa maththosadus; kawoteththati ubbay izi woyne ushshaa uyida; hessa gishshas ha7i gooyida.
Jeremiah51:8 Baabilooney qoppontta dashe kunda meqqana; hessa gishshas izis waassite! Oonee erizay iza paxanaakko izi madunththaska dhale koyite.
Jeremiah51:9 «Asay
Jeremiah51:10 GODAY nu suureteththa gishshas markkattides; ane haa yiite; GODAA nu Xoossay ooththidayssa Xiyoonen awajjoos› gides.
Jeremiah51:11 «Toorata leefte; gondalletakka giigsite; GODAY Baabiloone dhayssana qoppida gishshas Meedoone kawota denththeththides; GODAY halo kessana; ba Keeththa gishshas halo kessana.
Jeremiah51:12 Baabiloone gimbeta bolla malata essite; minththi naagite; zabe naagizayta essite; zamadi uttidi olizayta giigsite. GODAY Baabiloone asaa bolla qoppida qofaanne ba halchcho polana.
Jeremiah51:13 Hanne daro shaafata matan dizaaree! aqotan keeha duretidaaree! Ne dhayana wodey gakkides; nees wurseththi gakkides» gees.
Jeremiah51:14 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah51:15 «Xoossi ba wolqqan sa7a medhdhides; ba aadho erateththan alame giigsides; salotakka ba akeekan miccides.
Jeremiah51:16 Izi ba cenggurssa sissiza wode salon diza haaththati guummeettes; shaarata izi sa7a gaxappe ehees; irara wolqqanth kiittees; ba minjjasohoppeka carko kiittees.
Jeremiah51:17 «As ubbay dammanne erateththi bayndayssa gidides; worqqa seerisizayti ubbay ba ooththida eeqa misletan yeellatida; istti giigsida misleti wordonne shemppoy bayndayta.
Jeremiah51:18 Istti hadanne kadhettidayta; istta bolla pirday yiza wode istti dhayana.
Jeremiah51:19 Yaaqoobe qaaday gidikko heytantta mala gidenna; izi ubbaa medhdhidayssa; Isra7eele asay izi baas doorida dere; iza sunththi GODAA Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa» gees.
Jeremiah51:20 GODAY
Jeremiah51:21 Nenan paratanne para toggizayta dhayssadis; para-gaaretanne istta laaggizayta menththereththadis.
Jeremiah51:22 Nenan maccassatanne attumasata menththereththadis; cimatanne naateththata menththereththadis; panththatanne geela7ota menththereththadis.
Jeremiah51:23 Nenan heenththanchchatanne wudeta menththereththadis; goshshanchchatanne boorata menththereththadis; dere haarizaytanne shuumeta menththereththadis» gees.
Jeremiah51:24 GODAY
Jeremiah51:25 GODAY
Jeremiah51:26 Neeppe yochcha shuchchi beettenna; gulas gidiza shuchchi ekettenna; neni mernaas bula gidana» gees.
Jeremiah51:27 «Biitta ubbaa bolla bandira denththite; kawoteththata giddon zaye punnite; kawoteththata izi bolla olas giigsite; Araraate
Jeremiah51:28 Meedoone kawota
Jeremiah51:29 Baabiloone oonikka dontta bazzo biitta histtanaas GODAY qoppida qofay polettana wodey gakkida gishshas biittay kokkorees; metonkka poporqqu gees.
Jeremiah51:30 Baabiloone olanchchati ola aggida; bantta miixan uttida; isttas wolqqay wurides; istti maccassa mala gidida; istta keeththatikka xuugettida; izi penge kolatati meqerettida.
Jeremiah51:31 Katamaya mulera oykettidayssa Baabiloone kawos yootanaas issi yombay hara yombas
Jeremiah51:32 Shaafa pinniza purdeti oykettidayssa
Jeremiah51:33 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay
Jeremiah51:34 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Yerusalaame aqota bonqqides; gaacci liiqisides; aykkoy baynda kayssa oto kessides; dawey mittiza mala deraa mittides; mal7o miza mala miidi guyeppe nuna kessi cuttides.
Jeremiah51:35 Hessa gishshas Xiyoone asay
Jeremiah51:36 Hessa gishshas GODAY
Jeremiah51:37 Baabilooney laaleththi doorettizaso gidana; worakanati kaa7izaso gidana; dagamassinne qidhes malata gidana; oonikka izin deenna.
Jeremiah51:38 Izin diza asay wodalla gaammo mala xaaggees; gaammo mara mala daarees; istti ho7etti dendettishin ta isttas gibira giigsana; istti maththottana mala ooththana.
Jeremiah51:39 Miiccishe mernaas beeggontta dhisko dhiskana.
Jeremiah51:40 Laaqqa mala
Jeremiah51:41 «Sheshaaka waana di7ettadee! Sa7a ubbay izin ceeqettizaara waana oykettadee! Baabilooney kawoteththata ubbaa sinththan ay mala daganththizaaz gidadee!
Jeremiah51:42 Abbay Baabiloone bolla kezana; dambalaykka guummishe izo mittana
Jeremiah51:43 Izi katamati asi bayndaso
Jeremiah51:44 Beele tani Baabiloonen qaxxayana; izi mittidayssaka ta cooshshana; hayssafe kawoteththay izakko goggenna; Baabiloone gimbey kundana.
Jeremiah51:45 Ta deretoo! Izippe kezite; intte shemppo ashshite; yashshiza GODAA hanqofe kessi ekki attite.
Jeremiah51:46 Worey biittayn seetettishin hidota qanxxoftenne babofte; kawoy kawo bolla dendizayssa
Jeremiah51:47 Tumappe tani Baabiloone eeqa xoossata qaxxayana wodey yaana; biittaya kumeth kawuyana; siifettidayti ubbay izin porccu gi kundana.
Jeremiah51:48 Dhayssizayti pudeha baggafe yiidi izo oliza gishshas saloynne sa7ay qasse istta giddon diza ubbay Baabiloone bolla ilili gaana» gees.
Jeremiah51:49 GODAY
Jeremiah51:50 Intteno mashshafe kessi ekki attidaytoo! Biite; hayssan takkofte; haako biittan dizaytoo GODAA akeekite; Yerusalaamekka qopite.
Jeremiah51:51 «Allagati geeshshasoho GODAA Keeth gelida gishshas
Jeremiah51:52 Gido attiin GODAY
Jeremiah51:53 Baabilooney pude salo kezikokka
Jeremiah51:54 «Baabilooneppe waasoy siyettana; istta biittafe gita bashsha cenggurssi siyettana.
Jeremiah51:55 GODAY Baabiloone dhayssana; keeha waassiza izi waasoza co7u histtana; istta morkketi gita haaththa mala guummana; istta waasoykka kooshumana.
Jeremiah51:56 Baabiloone dhayssiza miishshi yaana; izi olanchchati di7ettana; istta wondafeykka meqqana; GODAY gene ooso gishshas halo kessizaadenne izi haniza miish ubbaas bessiza waaga qanxxiza Xoossa.
Jeremiah51:57 Izi shuumetanne aadho eranchchata izo haarizaytanne gita asata
Jeremiah51:58 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay
Jeremiah51:59 Yuhuda kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotida oydanththo layththan kawoza gibbe zabezi Ma7iseya naaza Neeriya naa Sarayay kawozara Baabiloone bida wode nabe Ermaasi izas yootida kiitay hayssa.
Jeremiah51:60 Ermaasi Baabiloone gishshas kase xaafi woththidayssa ubbaa Baabiloone bolla yaana bash ubbaa xaaththa maxaafan xaafides.
Jeremiah51:61 Sarayaska
Jeremiah51:62 Neni
Jeremiah51:63 Neni hayssa xaaththa maxaafaza nababa wursidaappe guye iza giddon shuch qachchada Efiraaxise shaafan efa yegga.
Jeremiah51:64 Histtada
Jeremiah52:1 Sedeqiyaasi kawotiza wode izas layththay nam7u tammanne issino; izi Yerusalaamen tammanne issi layth kawotides; iza aayey sunththi Amxalo gidishin iza Libina dere as Ermaasa naa.
Jeremiah52:2 Sedeqiyaasika Iyo7aaqemey ooththoyssaththo GODAA sinththan iita miish ooththides.
Jeremiah52:3 GODAY Yerusalaame bollanne Yuhuda bolla hessa ubbaaka gaththidaynne wurseththan izi ba sinththafe diggiday hanqettida gishshassa. Sedeqiyaasikka Baabiloone kawo bolla makkallides.
Jeremiah52:4 Hessa gishshas Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufunththa layththan tammanththa aginan tammanththa gallas Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba ola wottadarata ubbaa shiishshi ekkidi Yerusalaame bolla worajjides. Katamayokka giddoththides; yuuyi aadhdhanaas keela keelides.
Jeremiah52:5 Katamayakka kawo Sedeqiyaasi kawotiin izas layththay biidi tammanne issi layth gidana gakkanaas giddoththida mala gam7adus.
Jeremiah52:6 Oydanththa aginan uddufunththa gallas he katamayn koshay minnida gishshas derezas maana kaththi dhaydes.
Jeremiah52:7 He katamay gimbey laalettides; ola asay ubbayka kezi baqatides. Baabiloone dere asay he katamay yuushon diikkoka kawoza atakilte achchan nam7u gimbeta giddon diza pengezara giddoth katamayppe kessi ekki baqatidi Arabe geetettizaso bida.
Jeremiah52:8 Baabiloone dere olanchchati kawo Sedeqiyaasa yedeththidi Iyarkko demban iza gakkida; wottadarati ubbayka izappe shaakettidi laaleteththan dishin kawoza oykkida.
Jeremiah52:9 Iza Hamaate deren Erebila geetettizason diza Baabiloone kawookko efida; Baabiloone kawoy heen iza bolla pirdides.
Jeremiah52:10 Erebilan Baabiloone kawoy Sedeqiyaasa attuma nayta iza sinththan shukkides; Yuhuda dere shuumeta ubbaaka wodhides.
Jeremiah52:11 Sedeqiyaasa ayfetakka wooci kessides; xarqimala sansalatan iza qachchidi Baabiloone efides; histtidi izi hayqqana gakkanaas heen qasho keeththan gam7isides.
Jeremiah52:12 Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida tammanne uddufunththa layththan ichchashanththo aginan tammanththa gallas Baabiloone kawoza bonchcho naagiza wottadarata halaqay kawo shuume Nabuzaradaaney Yerusalaame yides.
Jeremiah52:13 GODAA Keeththazanne kawoteththa keeththaa hessaththoka Yerusalaamen diza keeth ubbaaka taman xuuggides; hara wolqqama keeththatakka dippi histti xuuggides.
Jeremiah52:14 Kawoza bonchcho naagiza wottadarata halaqappe garsara diza Baabiloone olanchchati ubbay Yerusalaame yuushon diza gimbeza ubbaa laallida.
Jeremiah52:15 Nabuzaradaaney issi issi manqota
Jeremiah52:16 Gido attiin Nabuzaradaaney hankko he biittan diza manqota woyne tokkanaassinne goshshanchchata gidana mala heen aggides.
Jeremiah52:17 Baabiloone dere asay GODAA Keeththan diza xarqimala tuussata; miishshata istta bolla woththidi issi sohoppe haraso efiza gaaretanne xarqimalappe oosettida haaththa gonggeta menththereththi yeggida; xarqimala ubbaaka Baabiloone ekki bida.
Jeremiah52:18 Heytappe harakka xaarota
Jeremiah52:19 Kawo bonchcho naagiza wottadarata halaqay muuruta worqqafenne muuruta birappe oosettida miishshata ubbaa
Jeremiah52:20 Kawo Solomooney GODAA Keeththes xarqimalappe oosisida nam7u tuussati
Jeremiah52:21 Issi issi tuussa geesay 18 wadha
Jeremiah52:22 Issi tuussa hu7e bolla wadhdhiza xarqimalappe oosettida qusttey dees; issi issi xarqimalappe oosettida qustte adussateththay 5 wadha gidishin yuuyi aadhdhanaas oroomaane miththa ayfe misatiza geexen geexettides; hankko tuussayka he oroomaane ayfe misatiza geexen geexetti kaseyssara issino misatides.
Jeremiah52:23 Uddufun tammanne usuppun oroomaane miththa ayfeti mille baggara waayey baynda beettizayta gidishin yuushozan diza oroomaane miththa ayfeta qooday xeeta.
Jeremiah52:24 Kawoza bonchcho naagiza wottadarata halaqay kase qeeseta halaqa Saraya
Jeremiah52:25 Katamaa giddon attida asaappe olanchchatas alaafe gidida ola gadawa
Jeremiah52:26 Kawoza bonchcho naagiza wottadarata halaqa Nabuzaradaaney heytantta ubbaa ekkidi Baabiloone kawoy dizaso Erebila gaththides.
Jeremiah52:27 Kawozikka istta heen Erebilan dippi histti wodhides; Yuhudaykka hessa malan ba biittafe di7etta badus.
Jeremiah52:28 Nabukadanaxoorey di7i efida dereza qooday hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; izi ba kawotida laappunththa layththan 3
Jeremiah52:29 ba kawotida tammanne osppunththa layththan Nabukadanaxoorey 832 as
Jeremiah52:30 Ba kawotida nam7u tammanne heedzdzanththo layththan Nabuzaradaaney 745 ayhudata di7i efides; izi di7i efida asaa qooday issi bolla 4
Jeremiah52:31 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakiney di7ettida heedzdzu tammanne laappunththa layththan Yori-Marodeeqey Baabiloonen kawotides; he layththankka tammanne nam7anththa aginan nam7u tammanne ichchashanththo gallassan Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aakine qoppides; qasho keeththafekka iza kessides.
Jeremiah52:32 Iza lo7o qaalan haasayssides; Baabiloonen izara qashoson diza kawota ubbatappe bollara aaththidi iza bonchchoson woththides.
Jeremiah52:33 Iyo7aakiney qashoson dishe may7ida may7oza izappe qaari yeggides; hessafe biidi hayqqana gakkanaas ba diza wode ubbaan kawoza maaddafe mishe gam7ides.
Jeremiah52:34 Baabiloone kawo Iyo7aakiney biidi hayqqana gakkanaas pacey baynda ubba wode izas maana qallaba immides.
Lamentations1:1 Kase izin daro kawoteththay diza katamaya waanada oletta attadee! Dereta giddon kase gita gididaara waanada am7i mala gidadee! Awuraajjata garsan godatto gididaara ha7i waanada aylle gidadee!
Lamentations1:2 Iza giddoththi camo yeeho yeekkawus; izis afunththayka shagalara goggees; izi laggetappe izo minththeththizay oonikka deenna; ubbatikka izo kaddida; zaaridikka izis morkke gidida.
Lamentations1:3 Yuhuday daro waayettidaappenne tooshettidaappe guye di7ettadus; iza kawoteththata giddon uttadus; izis shempizasoykka dhaydes; iza meto garsan dishin gooddizayti ubbay izo demmida.
Lamentations1:4 Oonikka izi ba7aaleta bonchchanaas yontta gishshas Xiyoone ogeti yeekkeettes; izi pengetara gelizaynne kezizay deenna; izi qeeseti ceeceettes; geela7otikka muuzotteettes; izakka gita meto garsan tuggatawus.
Lamentations1:5 Izi nagaray daro gidida gaason GODAY izi bolla meto yeggides; izi morkketi izo haarida; izi naytikka morkketan di7ettida; izi morkketas duussi lo7ides.
Lamentations1:6 Xiyoone macca nayppe izi puulateththinne teemay shaaketti kichchides; izi daannati maata mizasoy dhayda genessa mala gidida; istti bana gooddizaytappe wolqqay wuriin baqatida.
Lamentations1:7 Yerusalaamey metotida wodeninne waayettida gallassatan kase izis diza aqota yuushsha qoppawus; iza morkke kushen kundida wode izo maaddizay oonikka baynda wode
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalaamey daro deexo nagara ooththadus; kadheska attadus; iza kallo dishin be7ida gishshas kase izo bonchchidayti ubbay izo kadhida; izakka ba baggara yeellatada biitta xeellashe guye simmadus.
Lamentations1:9 Izi tunateththi izi may7o bolla beettides; sinththafe izi bolla hananayssa iza qoppabeekku; izi kundeththi daganththizaaz gidides; iza
Lamentations1:10 Izi aqota ubbaa bolla morkkey ba kushe yeddides; Xoossa asaa shiiqon gelontta mala neni diggidayti eeqa xoossatas goynniza ayzaabeti gede izi Xoossa Keeththan gelishin be7adus.
Lamentations1:11 Izi asay miza kath demmanaas koshshan daaburees; shemppora paxa daanaas baas diza aqota maana kaththara laammeettes; Yerusalaame asay
Lamentations1:12 «Godaa Xoossi ba wolqqama hanqoza nu bolla yeddida wode nu bolla gakkida meto mala metoy gakkida asi dizaa gidikko intteno ogera aadhdhi biza ubbato ane be7ite! Ha metoy inttes kawushsha misatizee?
Lamentations1:13 «Izi bolla dhoqqasohoppe tama yeddides; he tamazikka nuus meqeththan gelides; nu tohota qachchanaas gite yeggides; histtidi nuna guye zaari kundisides; kumeththa gallas nuna daaburssides; coo melakka toylasides.
Lamentations1:14 «Ta nagara shiishshi qachchidi ta morgen woththides; ta wolqqaka wursides; tani eqettanaas dandayontta morkketas GODAY tana aaththi immides.
Lamentations1:15 «Nu garsan diza olanchchata ubbatara Xoossi eqettides; nu giddofe yelagata dhayssanaas olanchchata nu bolla yeddides. Woyne miththa ayfe ushshu kessanaas yedhdhiza mala GODAY boshettontta geela7o misatiza Yuhuda asaa yedhides.
Lamentations1:16 «Morkkey nu bolla goobides; nu naytikka barkka attida; nuna zori minththeththizayti nuuppe haakkida; hessa gishshas ta yeekkayssinne afunththa gussays.
Lamentations1:17 Xiyoona ba kushe miccadus; izo minththeththizaadey deenna; Yaaqoobe zaretas shooroti izas morkke gidana mala Xoossi azazo kessides; Yerusalaameykka istta giddon tuna miishsha mala qoodettadus.
Lamentations1:18 «Xoossi xillo; tani gidikko iza azazo bolla makkalladis; intte wurikka siyite; ta metozakka xeellite; macca naytinne naateththa attuma nayti taappe di7etti bida.
Lamentations1:19 Tani ta dosizayta xeygadis; istti gidikko tana kaddida; ta qeesetinne cimati ba shemppo ashshanaas kath koyishe katamay giddon wurida.
Lamentations1:20 «Abeet GODAWU! Ta waayeza be7a! ta giddo asateththay metotides; ta keeha makkalladis; ta wozinaykka meqqides; Karen gidiin soon deraa hayqoy wursees.
Lamentations1:21 «Derey ta zilalizayssa siyides; gido attiin oonikka tana minththeththizaadey beettibeenna; ta morkketi ubbayka ta metotoyssa siyida; neni ooththoyssaka eridi istti ufayettida; ne istta bolla ehana ga qachchida gallassaya yu; isttika ta mala zilaletto.
Lamentations1:22 «Istta iitateththi ne sinththan beetto; ta nagara gaason ne ta bolla ooththoyssaththo istta bollaka ooththa; ta ceecada zilaliza zilasay darides; ta wozinaykka daaburdes» gishe waasseettes.
Lamentations2:1 GODAY Xiyoone macca nayo ba hanqon wostti kawushshidee! Isra7eele bonchcho saloppe duge sa7an yeggides; izi ba hanqo gallas ba toho shempisizaso gididaaro zaari qoppanaas koyibeenna.
Lamentations2:2 Yaaqoobe duussaso ubbaa Xoossi qadhetay baynda dhayssides; Yuhuda dere miixata izi ba hanqon laallides; izi kawoteththanne dere ayssizayta kawushshidi duge biittan yeggides.
Lamentations2:3 Izi ba gita hanqon Isra7eele wolqqa liiqisides; morkkey iza olanaas yiza wode ba maado kushe isttafe denththides; ba yuushon diza ubbaa miza tama laco mala iza hanqoy Yaaqoobe bolla eexxi kezides.
Lamentations2:4 Izi morkke mala wondafe dafi oykkides; iza ushachcha kushey yiishshaa yeddanaas giigsides; bana lo7izayta ubbaa morkke mala shukkides; Xiyoone dunkaaneta bollaka ba hanqo tama mala qolides.
Lamentations2:5 Xoossi morkke mala gididi Isra7eele dippi histtides; kawoteththa keeththaaka dhayssides; izi miixaakka laallides; Yuhuda asaa bolla kayonne zilas darssides.
Lamentations2:6 Izi ba keeththa kaththa giddon diza gaabba shoddiza mala shoddi olides; Xoossi Xiyoono iza layththan layththan bonchchiza ba7aaletanne sambatata diggides; izi ba mino hanqon kawozanne qeeseza kawushshides.
Lamentations2:7 GODAY yarsho yarshizasohoza kadhides; ba keeththaaka aggides; ba kawoteththa keeththa gimbeta morkkes aaththi immides; ba7aale gallassatan ooththizayssaththo istti GODAA Keeththan keehi waassida.
Lamentations2:8 GODAY Xiyoone katama gimbe laallanaas qanxxi dendides; mixe wodoroza piddisides; izi istta dhayssontta aggenna; miixatinne gimbetti laalettida; isttika issife dhayda.
Lamentations2:9 Izi pengeti duge biittan gelida; kare gordiza birata kolatati meqeretti wodhdhida; izi kawozinne daannati ayzaabetan di7etti bida; hayssafe guye kase isttas diza wogay ooththenna; izi nabetaska hayssafe guye GODAAPPE ajjuutay qonccenna.
Lamentations2:10 Xiyoone dere cimati biitta bolla co7u gi uttida; istti ba hu7en gudulla laallida; maaqaka may7ida; Yerusalaame geela7oti duge biitta xeellida.
Lamentations2:11 Ta derey wurides; naateththa naytinne qeeri nayti katama giddon labbani kundida. Hessa gishshas ta ayfey afunththan baljumides; taas maracey kokkorides; ta wozinaykka seerides;
Lamentations2:12 Olason madunxi kundida asata mala katamay giddon istti daaburda; istti bantta aayeta
Lamentations2:13 «Hanne Yerusalaame! Ta ne gishshas ay gaanaas dandayazinaa? Ta nena aazara ginasa xeelloo? Hanne dosettida Xiyoone geela7oyee! Ta nena wostta minththeththanaas dandayazinaa? ne madunththay abbafeka cimmatees; nena paththanaas dandayzay oonee?
Lamentations2:14 Ne nabeta ajjuutay wordonne coo hada; ne nagara qonccisidi nena di7eteththafe ashshettenna; istti nees yootiza tinbitey baleththizaazinne ogeppe kare kessizaaza.
Lamentations2:15 Ne achchara aadhdhi biza ubbay ne bolla ba kushe baqqi kaa7ana; biitta ubbaan aadho lo7o geetettiza katamayanne dere ubbay ufayettiza katamaya hanii?» gaana; qidhishekka ba hu7e qaaththana.
Lamentations2:16 Ne morkketi ubbay issife bantta doona keehi doyda; bantta ach saxxishe qidhida; «Nuni izo mittidos! nuni amottidaara hanno; shemppora paxa diidi gakki ayfen be7idos» gida.
Lamentations2:17 Xoossi ba qoppidayssa ooththides; daro wodeppe kase yootida qaala polides; izi nena qadhetay baynda laallides; ne waayettishin morkkey ufayettana mala ne morkketa dhoqqu dhoqqu histtides.
Lamentations2:18 Yerusalaame gimbe giddon diza asawu! Xoossaako waassite; intte afunththi omarsinne gallas di7o mala goggo; intteka shempofte; intte ayfesikka shemppo immofte.
Lamentations2:19 Qammaa kumeth dendidi waassite; Godaa sinththan intte wozina haaththa mala gussite; oge doonan koshatti kundida ne nayta shemppo gishshas ne kushe pude izakko denththada woossa.
Lamentations2:20 Abeet GODAWU! Hayssa ne be7a! Neni hayssaththo kase oona bolla ooththa erizaakko ane akeeka; aaya yela dichchida naa zaara maanaas bessizee? Qeeseynne nabey Xoossa Keeththan hayqqanaas bessizee?
Lamentations2:21 Yelagatinne cimati hayqqidi ogen kundi attida; yelaga maccassatinne attumati mashshan hayqqida; ne hanqettida gallas istta wodhadasa; qadhetay bayndaka shukkadasa.
Lamentations2:22 Ba7aale gallas diggisas xeygiza mala ta morkketa ta bolla xeygadasa; ne hanqo gallas oonikka kessi ekkibeenna; woykko shemppora paxa attiday deenna; ta yela dichchidayta morkkey taappe dhayssides.
Lamentations3:1 Godaa hanqo guufen waaye be7ida asi tana.
Lamentations3:2 Izi tana ba sinththafe kessi yeddides; poo7oy baynda gede dhuman tana gelththides.
Lamentations3:3 Izi kumeththa gallas zaari zaaridi tana shocides.
Lamentations3:4 Izi ta asateththaaka ceegissides; ta meqeththatakka menththereththides.
Lamentations3:5 Izi tana metoninne iita tugga giddo yeggides.
Lamentations3:6 Hayqqidi gam7ida asa mala tani dhuman daana mala ooththides.
Lamentations3:7 Ta kezontta mala ta yuushoza dirdes; mino sansalatan tana qachchides.
Lamentations3:8 Tani maado koyada waassa xeygiinkka izi ta waasaa siyanaas koyibeenna.
Lamentations3:9 Ta ogeza masettida shuchchan gordides; ta aadhdha biza ogezakka geellasides.
Lamentations3:10 Izi taas zamadi uttida zardo mala gidides; qasseka qotetti naagiza gaammo mala gidides.
Lamentations3:11 Tana ta biza ogeppe goochchi kessidi duusereththi yeggides; tana asi bayndason olaagides.
Lamentations3:12 Izi ba wondafe dafi oykkides; tana caddanaas ba yiish giigsi woththides.
Lamentations3:13 Izi yiishshaa yeddidi taas wozina ayfen caddides.
Lamentations3:14 Tani ta dere asaas qidhe miish gidadis; gallas kumeth ta bolla qidhe mazamure yexxeettes.
Lamentations3:15 Izi ta de7oza camon kunththides; izi tana ciye ushshu kalssides.
Lamentations3:16 Izi ta ach shuchchan menththides; izi tana gudullan yedhettides.
Lamentations3:17 Ta shemppoys saroteththi dhaydes; ufayssi izi aazakkonne ta baladis.
Lamentations3:18 Hessa gishshas
Lamentations3:19 Ta waayenne ta toylateththaa ta qoppishin ta de7oy tana cammides.
Lamentations3:20 Ubbaa wodekka ta hayssa qoppishin ta wozinay ceecees.
Lamentations3:21 Gidikkoka tani hayssa qoppiza wode taas sinththafe hidotay dees.
Lamentations3:22 Hessika nuni dhayontta aggiday GODAA siiqoy daro gidida gaasonna; iza qadhetaykka mernaas wurontta gishshassa.
Lamentations3:23 Istti maalado maalado ooraththa; Ne ammaneteththayka daro.
Lamentations3:24 Taas qaaday GODAA; hessa gishshas ta izan xalla hidota ooththays.
Lamentations3:25 GODAY bana hidota ooththizaytassinne iza koyzaytas lo7o.
Lamentations3:26 GODAY as ashshiza ashoza izaadey co7u gi naagikko lo7o.
Lamentations3:27 Asi yelagateththa woden qambara tookkiko lo7o.
Lamentations3:28 GODAY iza toossida gishshas izi barkka co7u gi utto.
Lamentations3:29 Sinththafe izas hidotay daana dandayza gishshas bana ziqqi histti haariso.
Lamentations3:30 Baqqana koyidaades izi ba shagala besso; kawushshateththika ekko.
Lamentations3:31 GODAY ase mernaaskka yeggi aggenna.
Lamentations3:32 Izi asa bolla meto ehikkoka ba mernaa siiqon simmi qadhettees;
Lamentations3:33 Izi odidi asa bolla meto woykko waaye ehi erenna.
Lamentations3:34 Deraan diza qasho asay ubbay genen yedhettishin
Lamentations3:35 Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay beyishin asas asateththa maatay digettiza wode
Lamentations3:36 qasseka tuma pirday geellattiza wode GODAY hessa mala hanota demmennee?
Lamentations3:37 Xoossi azazontta dishin ba gidaaz polanaas dandayzay oonee?
Lamentations3:38 Iita gidiin woykko lo7o gidiin ba gidaaz polizay Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa gidennee?
Lamentations3:39 Histtiin shemppora paxa diza asi ba nagaran qaxxayettishe aazas zuuzumizee?
Lamentations3:40 Hessa aggidi nuni nu oge ane pilggi xeelloos; GODAAKKOKA simmoos.
Lamentations3:41 Ane nuni nu wozinanne nu kushe salon diza Xoossako pude denththidi
Lamentations3:42 «Nu GODAWU! Nuni makkallidos; nagarakka ooththidos; hessa gishshas neni nuna maarabeekka.
Lamentations3:43 Neni hanqon kumada nuna gooddadasa; ne nuna qadhetay baynda wodhadasa.
Lamentations3:44 Woosay neekko aadhdhi bontta mala nena shaaran kammadasa.
Lamentations3:45 Ne nuna ayzaabeta giddon orcconne buura kessadasa.
Lamentations3:46 Nu morkketi ubbay ba doona nu bolla doyda.
Lamentations3:47 Nuni bashshaninne laaleteththan metoninne shiron kumdos» goos.
Lamentations3:48 Ta derey wurida gishshas ta ayfeppe afunththi di7o mala goggides.
Lamentations3:49 Shempontta ubba wode ta ayfeppe afunththi gukkees.
Lamentations3:50 Hessi hananay Xoossi saloppe duge xeellana gakkanaassa.
Lamentations3:51 Tani diza kataman diza ubbaa maccassata bolla gakkida metoza tani ta ayfen be7ida gishshas ta wozinay ceecides.
Lamentations3:52 Gaasoykka baynda taas morkke gididayti kafo mala tana shankkatida.
Lamentations3:53 Istti tani shemppora paxa dishin duge ollan yeggida; shuchchika ta bolla olida.
Lamentations3:54 Haaththi kumidi taas hu7e bollara goggides; tani dhayadis gaada qoppadis.
Lamentations3:55 Ta GODAWU! Tani ciimma olla giddon dashe ne sunththa xeygadis.
Lamentations3:56 Ta waaso ne siyana mala ta nena woossiin siyadasa.
Lamentations3:57 Ta nena xeygida wode ne taakko shiiqada
Lamentations3:58 Godoo! Ne taas mootettada tana ashshadasa.
Lamentations3:59 GODAWU! Ne ta bolla gakkida qohoza beyadasa; ne taas pirda.
Lamentations3:60 Ta morkketi ta bolla halo kessanaas qoppidayssanne istti ta bolla zuppetidayssa ne beyadasa.
Lamentations3:61 Ta GODAWU! Istti tana cayida cashshanne ta bolla maqettida maqqoza ne siyadasa.
Lamentations3:62 Gallas kumeth ta morkketi ta bolla saasuketteettessinne zuuzumeettes.
Lamentations3:63 Ne istta xeella! Istti eqqidi gidiin uttidi ba yeththan tana caddeettes.
Lamentations3:64 Ta GODAWU! Ne isttas istta ooso mala imma.
Lamentations3:65 Istta wozina dammisa; Ne qanggeththi istta gakko.
Lamentations3:66 Abeet GODAWU! Ne istta ne hanqon goodda; salo garsafe dhayssa.
Lamentations4:1 Worqqay waani tasides; Walakay baynda muuruta worqqay waani laamettidee! Xoossa keeththi keexettida bonchcho shuchchati oge doonan laalettida.
Lamentations4:2 Kase bonchchettida worqqa misatiza Xiyoone nayti ha7i waanidi kushen urqqafe tilidi medhdhida mana miishsha mala gididoo!
Lamentations4:3 Worakanati ba marata dichchanaas ba dhanth dhanththeettes; ta derey gidikko bazzon diza yanchcha kafota mala menxe iitides.
Lamentations4:4 Daro saamettida gishshas guuththa nayta inxarsi pude gonggiraththara oykettides; nayti kath woossida shin oonikka isttas immibeenna.
Lamentations4:5 Kase lo7o kath mizayti ha7i metotidi oge bolla toylattida; kase lo7o may7o may7idi ishalon diccidayti ha7i bidinththan ichchida.
Lamentations4:6 Ta dereza bolla gakkida qixaatey oona kusheykka bochchontta dishin eeson aadhdha wodhdhida Sodoome katama asaa gakkida qixaatezappeka keehi iita.
Lamentations4:7 Istta kaaleththizayti shachchafe aadhdhida geeshsha; maaththafe aadhdhi booththa; istta bollay zo7o inqqufe aadhdhida aarissa; qasse isttas medhaykka simpere geetettiza shuchcha mala.
Lamentations4:8 Ha7i gidikko istta medhay shaalapeka aadhdhi karettides; oonikka istta ogen be7idi erenna; istti meqeth xalla attida; mela miththa mala gidida.
Lamentations4:9 Koshan hayqqidaytappe mashshan hayqqidayti lo7o;
Lamentations4:10 Ta asaa bolla gakkida hanqo gaason naytas mishettiza aayeti ba yelida nayta ba kushera doysi mida.
Lamentations4:11 Xoossi ba wolqqama hanqoza qonccisides; Xiyoono dippi histti dhayssiza tama oyseththides.
Lamentations4:12 Biitta bolla diza kawotappe woykko alame bolla diza asaappe oonikka istta morkketi woykko worajjizayti Yerusalaame pengeta menththi gelana giidi oonikka qoppibeenna.
Lamentations4:13 Hayssi haniday nabetinne qeeseti ooththida nagara gaasonna; qasse istti xillota suuth gussida gishshassa.
Lamentations4:14 Qooqe asa mala istti oge bolla gadigadana; istti suuththan tunida gishshas istta may7o bochchanaas xalizaadey deenna.
Lamentations4:15 Hessa gishshas asay istta bolla
Lamentations4:16 Istta laalliday Xoossa; hayssafe guye izi isttas qoppenna; istta qeesetas bonchchoy imettenna; cimataska puulay deenna.
Lamentations4:17 Nu ayfey maado demmanaas xeellishe coo mela daaburdes; nuna ashshanaas dandayontta deretappe maado demmanaas laamotan naagidos.
Lamentations4:18 Asay nu geedon eqqiza gishshas nu ogera hemettanaas dandaybeekko; nuus wurseththi matides; nu layththi wurides; nu dhayza wodey gakkides.
Lamentations4:19 Nuna gooddizayti salora paalliza gollefe aadhdhi eesoteettes; istti nuna zuma bollara gooddida; bazzon nuna zuggi naagida.
Lamentations4:20 Nuni iza kuwa garsan utti de7ana gi qoppidayssa
Lamentations4:21 Intteno Uuxe biittan diza Eedoome asatoo! Ufays nococu giite! Gido attiin qaaday inttenakka gakkana; intte maththottananne kallo attana.
Lamentations4:22 Intteno Xiyoone asatoo! Intte mooro gaason qaxxayettoyssi inttes gidana; hayssafe guye inttena di7ettida biittan gam7isenna; gido attiin Eedoome asatoo! Izi inttena intte nagara gishshas qaxxayana; izi intte moorozakka qoncce kessana.
Lamentations5:1 Abeet GODAWU! Nu bolla gakkidayssa ne qoppa; nu kawushshateththaka xeella.
Lamentations5:2 Nu biitta allagati laattida; nu keeththaaka baas duussaso ooththida.
Lamentations5:3 Nuni yi7o gididos; nu aayeti am7eta gidida.
Lamentations5:4 Nuni nu haaththa miishshan shammi uyidos; nuni nu miththaaka shammi ekkidos.
Lamentations5:5 Nuna gooddizayti nuus geedon eqqida; keehippe daaburdos; shempoka digettidos.
Lamentations5:6 Nuni kath kallanaas giidi Asoore asatassinne Gibxes kushe immidos.
Lamentations5:7 Nu aawati nagara ooththida; nuni istta qixaate ekkidos.
Lamentations5:8 Aylleti nuna haarida; istta kusheppe nuna kessi ekkanay oonikka deenna.
Lamentations5:9 Bazzon diza ola gaason nuni nu shemppo aaththi immidi kath demmidos.
Lamentations5:10 Kosha daroppe dendidayssan hargidos; nu medhaykka shaala mala gidides.
Lamentations5:11 Maccassata Xiyoonen tunisida; geela7otakka Yuhuda katamatan wolqqan oykki kawushshida.
Lamentations5:12 Daannata istti kaqqida; cimatakka bonchchibeettenna.
Lamentations5:13 Yelaga attuma nayti woxan gaaccana mala wolqqaththida; panththati deexo mith tookkidi gadigadida.
Lamentations5:14 Cimati pirdanaas uttiza dubbusha aggida; panththatikka bantta mazamure aggida.
Lamentations5:15 Ufayssi nu wozinappe dhaydes; nu durissika yeehon laamettides.
Lamentations5:16 Kallachchay nu hu7eppe kundides; nu nagara ooththida gishshas aayye ana!
Lamentations5:17 Hessa gaason nu wozinay daaburdes; nu ayfeykka baljumides.
Lamentations5:18 Xiyoone biittay bula gidida gishshas worakanati guppizasoho gidides.
Lamentations5:19 Abeet GODAWU! Neni mernaas haaraasa; ne kawoteththay yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas daana.
Lamentations5:20 Ne nuna ays ubba wode co7u gay? qasse ays hayssa gakkanaas aggaagadii?
Lamentations5:21 GODAWU! Neni nuna neekko zaara; nunikka neekko simmana! beni nu bonchchoza zaarada nuna ooraththa!
Lamentations5:22 Ne hessaththo ooththontta aggiko nuna mulera aggadii? ne hanqozaska zaway baawee?
Ezekiel1:1 Heedzdzu tammanththa layththan
Ezekiel1:2 Kawo Iyo7aakiney di7ettida ichchashanththa layththan
Ezekiel1:3 Baabiloonen Koboore shaafa matan diza Buuze naa qeese Hiziqeelakko GODAA qaalay yides; GODAA wolqqay tana oykkides.
Ezekiel1:4 Tani dhoqqu ga xeellishin pudeha baggafe gote carkoy yizayssa be7adis; izappe wolqqanththi wawaci giza dhippi gida shaaraa gita poo7oy giddoththi woththides; tamazas giddo adday birata bonqqo misatees.
Ezekiel1:5 Tamaza giddon shemppora paxa diza oyddu medheteththata misley dees; istta medhaykka asa medha misatees.
Ezekiel1:6 Isttas issaas issaas oyddu ayfesoynne oyddu qefey dees.
Ezekiel1:7 Isttas sitti gida luule tohoy dees; istta tohoy mara qinccifille malanne qucettidi xolqiza xarqimala misatees.
Ezekiel1:8 Isttas oyddu baggara qefeta garsan asa kushey dees; he oyddatasikka ayfesotinne qefeti deettes.
Ezekiel1:9 Istta qefeti issoy issaara diishetteettes; istti ubbayka guye simmi xeellontta sitti giidi sinth beettes.
Ezekiel1:10 Istta ayfesoy hayssafe kaalli dizayssa mala; istta oyddatasikka issaas issaas sinththa baggara asa ayfeso malay dees; ushachcha baggara gaammo ayfeso malay
Ezekiel1:11 Istta ayfesoy hessa misatees; istta qefey pude yangetti uttides; isttas issaas issaas nam7u nam7u qefey dees; issaa issaa qefey hankkoyssa qefera diishetti uttides.
Ezekiel1:12 Istti ubbayka sitti giidi sinth beettes; guye simmontta Xoossa Ayanay bizaso awakka beettes.
Ezekiel1:13 Ha shemppora paxa diza medheteththata medhay eexxiza tama bonqonne xomppe misatees; he shemppora paxa diza medheteththata giddon tamay yaanne haa qaaxxees; tamazi phoollees; iza giddofekka wolqqanththi kezees.
Ezekiel1:14 Ha shemppora paxa diza medheteththati wolqqanththi eeson wawaci giza mala yaanne haa simeretteettes.
Ezekiel1:15 Ta ha oyddu shemppora paxa diza medheteththata xeellashe
Ezekiel1:16 He irzota medhaynne hanotay hayssafe kaallizayssa mala; al7o shuchcha mala xolqeettes; oyddata medhaykka issi mala; issi issi irzoy hara irzora qaxetti uttidaa misatees.
Ezekiel1:17 Istti biza wode medheteththati oyddu bagga yuuyana dandayeettes; medheteththati biza wode irzoti yaanne haa geettenna.
Ezekiel1:18 He oyddu irzotas odzdzodzdzoy dees; ha oyddu irzoti gitanne babisizaaza; yuuyi aadhdhanaaska isttan ayfeti kumida.
Ezekiel1:19 Ha shemppora paxa diza medheteththati biza wode istta millen diza irzotikka beettes; he shemppora paxa diza medheteththati biittafe pude dendiza wode irzotikka isttara issife dendeettes.
Ezekiel1:20 Xoossa Ayanay bizaso awakka istti beettes; ayanay istta giddon diza gishshas irzoti isttara issife pude dendeettes.
Ezekiel1:21 De7oy diza medheteththati biza wode irzotikka beettes; istti eqqiza wode irzotikka eqqeettes; qasse irzoti isttara issife pude dendeettes.
Ezekiel1:22 Ha shemppora paxa diza medheteththata hu7eppe bollara babisizanne mastoote mala xolqidi ayfe caddiza salo gufanththo misatizay micetti dees.
Ezekiel1:23 He salo gufanththozappe garsa baggara istta qefey sitti giidi
Ezekiel1:24 Ha shemppora paxa diza medheteththati piradhdhiza wode istta qefeta giirissa siyadis; he giirissay di7o haaththa gunththa mala
Ezekiel1:25 Istti piradhdhizayssa aggidi bantta qefeza shiishshida mala istta hu7eppe bollara diza salo gufanththofe bollara giirissi seetettides.
Ezekiel1:26 Isttafe bollara diza salo gufanththofe dhoqqu giidi simpere araata misatizay dees; he araataa bolla as misatizaazi uttides.
Ezekiel1:27 Izas xees misatizasoppe pude baggay taman bonqqida birata misatizayssa; xees misatizasoppe duge baggay tama misatizayssa be7adis; iza yuushon phoolliza poo7oy dees.
Ezekiel1:28 Iza yuushon diza phoolliza poo7oy ira gallas shaara bolla eqqida zuulla misatees. Hessika GODAA bonchcho qoncceth misatees. Tani hessa be7ida wode

Ezekiel4:1 «Haysso asa nawu! Urqqafe medhettida issi xuube ekkada ne sinththan woththa; histtada Yerusalaame misle iza bolla ooththa.
Ezekiel4:2 Histtada wottadaray giddoththiza mala izo giddoththa; miixa izin giigsa; biitta shiishsha doora; ola wosanata izi yuushon giigsa; gimbeza laalliza duruma izi yuushon waaxa.
Ezekiel4:3 Qasse birata bashe ekkada neeppenne katamaappe giddon birata gimbe mala essa. Ne sinththaa izikko zaarada dereqa; iza doodettidaaro gidana; nekka izo dooddana. Hessika Isra7eele asaas malata gidana.
Ezekiel4:4 «Tani Isra7eele keeththaa murizayssas malata gidana mala neni hadirsa millen ichcha; neni hadirsa millen ichchida wodeta ubbaan Isra7eele keeththa bala mala gidana mala bessana.
Ezekiel4:5 Isra7eele keeththay ba balan waani qaxxayettanaakko ne bessana mala ta nees 390 gallassata immadis; issi issi gallassay istti qaxxayettana issi issi layth bessees.
Ezekiel4:6 «Hessafe guye neni ushachcha millen 40 gallas ichcha; hessi Yuhuda asay ba balan waani qaxxayettanaakko bessiza malata gidana; issi issi gallassay istti qaxxayettana issi issi layth bessees.
Ezekiel4:7 Ne sinth Yerusalaame doodeteththaako zaarada dereqa; ne kushe denththada mandashe tinbite izi bolla yoota.
Ezekiel4:8 He doodeteththaa aginay wurana gakkanaas ne mille shirontta mala ta nena wodoron qachchana.
Ezekiel4:9 «Ha7i neni gisttenne bangga
Ezekiel4:10 Hach hach ne maana kaththaa geeddara woththa; iza woden woden issi zolla ma.
Ezekiel4:11 Ne uyana haaththaaka makka woththa; hessa iza woden woden nam7u kubbaya uya.
Ezekiel4:12 He walakettida kaththaa ekkada deraa sinththan bangga ukeththa mala shi7a kefen uukkada ma.»

Ezekiel5:2 Ne dooddiza wodey wurshin neni shaakkida binanaas issi kusheza Yerusalaame katama misle giddon xuugga; nam7anththo kusheza katamay yuushon giththa mashshan qanxxereththa yegga; attida heedzdzanththo kusheza carko bolla laalla; tani istta mashshan yedereththana.
Ezekiel5:3 Binanappe guuth ekkada ne seelo may7o xeeran qachcha.
Ezekiel5:4 Qasse he binanaafe guuththara ekkada taman xuugga; tamay heeppe kezidi Isra7eele asaa maana» gides.

Ezekiel6:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel6:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne ayfeso pude Isra7eele zumbullatakko zaarada hanqettashe istta bolla tinbite yoota.
Ezekiel6:3 ‹Isra7eele zumbullatoo! Ubbaa Haariza GODAA qaala siyite! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY zumbullatas
Ezekiel6:4 Intte istta bolla yarsho yarshizasohotikka laalettana; qasse intte istta bolla exaane cuwasizasohotikka meqerettana; shukettida intte asata isttas goynniza eeqa xoossata sinththan ta yeggana.
Ezekiel6:5 Tani Isra7eele asa aha istta eeqata sinththan ichchisana; intte meqeththatakka intte yarshizasohota yuushon laallana.
Ezekiel6:6 Intte isttan diza katamati ubbay kays gidana; intte goynnizasoti ubbay laalettana; hessaththoka intte yarshizasohoti tunananne laaletti dhayana; intte eeqa xoossati nippi gi meqerettana; intte exaane yarshizasohoti nippi gi meqerettana; intte kushe oosoti dippi gi dhayana.
Ezekiel6:7 Intte asay shukettidi intte giddon kundana; tani GODAA gididayssa intte hessan erana.
Ezekiel6:8 « ‹Tani inttefe mashshafe kessi ekki attida guuththata ashshana; hessafe guye kawoteththata giddoninne dereta giddon inttena ta laallana.
Ezekiel6:9 Hayti hayqoppe attidayti di7etti bidason dishe istti tana qoppana; istti taappe haakkidi laymateththan kumida wozinaninne ziitay kumida eeqa xoossata kaalliza intte ayfetan tana mishisideta; ba ooththida iitateththaafenne harassiza eeqa xoossatappe dendidayssan istti barkka bana harassettana.
Ezekiel6:10 Qasseka tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana; tani istta bolla iita miish ehana gidayssi coo hada gidenna.
Ezekiel6:11 « ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: yiillon ne kushe baqqa; ne tohonkka biitta qakkashe

Ezekiel6:13 Istta asaappe shukettidayti yarsho yarshizasohota yuusho ubbaan
Ezekiel6:14 Tani ta kusheza istta bolla denththana; istti dizasohota dugehan bazzo biittafe biidi pudehan Dibila gakkanaas bula histtana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana» gides.
Ezekiel7:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel7:2 tana «Haysso asa nawu! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Isra7eele biittas
Ezekiel7:3 Ha7ikka ne wurseththi gakkides! Tani ta hanqoza intte bolla gussana; intte hano mala ta intte bolla pirdana; harassiza eeqa xoossatas intte goynniza gishshas ta nees bessiza qixaate immana.
Ezekiel7:4 Ta inttena qadheta ayfen xeellike; ta inttena maarikke; intte hanota mala ta intte bolla pirdana; intte giddon diza harassiza eeqa xoossata ta qonccisana; tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana› gees.
Ezekiel7:5 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel7:6 Wurseththi gakkides! Wurseththi gakkides! Intte bolla dendides; hekko gakkides!
Ezekiel7:7 Intteno hanno biittay bolla dizaytoo! Inttena dhayssana pirday intte bolla gakkides; wodezi gakkides; zumbullata bolla ufayssa ilis gidontta shiroy gakkides.
Ezekiel7:8 Ha7i matan tani ta hanqoza intte bolla gussana; tani ta hanqo intte bolla polana; intte hanota mala ta intte bolla pirdana; harassiza eeqa xoossatas intte goynniza gishshas ta inttes bessiza qixaate immana.
Ezekiel7:9 Ta inttena qadheta ayfen xeellike; ta inttena maarikke; intte hanota mala ta intte bolla pirdana; intte giddon diza harassiza eeqa xoossata ta qonccisana; tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana.
Ezekiel7:10 « ‹Hekko gallassaa! He gallassay gakkides! Intte bashshay intte pengen dees! Iitateththa guufey gumbides; otoreteththi ciiyides.

Ezekiel7:12 Wodezi gakkides; gallassayka matides! Hanqoy dere ubbaa bolla gakkida gishshas bayzizay ceecoppo; shammizaykka ufayettofo.
Ezekiel7:13 Istti nam7ay shemppora paxa dishin bayzidayssi ba bayzidayssa zaaroppo; hessaththoka kumeththa Isra7eele bolla yootettida ajjuutay laamettenna. Ba nagara gaason oonikka ba shemppo ashshana dandayenna.
Ezekiel7:14 Ta hanqoy asa ubbaa bolla yida gishshas istti zaye zaykkonne ubbaa miish giigsikko olaso baanay oonikka deenna.
Ezekiel7:15 « ‹Karera olay dees; soora iita hargeynne koshay dees; katamappe karen dizayti olan wurana; kataman dizayti koshaninne iita hargen wurana.
Ezekiel7:16 Isttafe kessi ekki attizayti shoobba giddofe gooddiin hirgishe piradhdhi biidi zumbulla bolla gugumiza haraphpheta mala bantta nagara gaason zilalishe zuma bolla daana.
Ezekiel7:17 Kushe ubbay doccana; yashshan gulbate ubbayka haaxxana.
Ezekiel7:18 Istti maaqa may7ana; istti dagaman shirotana; istta ubbaa ayfesoy yeella may7ana; istta ubbaa hu7eykka bulisettana.
Ezekiel7:19 Istti bantta biraa ogen olana; istta worqqayka tuna mala qoodettana; GODAA wolqqama hanqo gallas istta biraynne worqqay istta ashshenna; istta biraynne worqqay istti nagaran kundana mala isttas dhuphe gidides; biraynne worqqay miin istta kalssenna; istta ulokka kumenna.
Ezekiel7:20 Istti bantta lo7o alleqon otorettida; heyta bantta harassiza eeqa xoossatanne massi giigsida yeellachchiza misleta ooththanaas go7ettida. Hessa gishshas tani he lo7o alleqoza isttas tuna kessana.
Ezekiel7:21 Tani istta alleqota allagatas di7os
Ezekiel7:22 Tani ta ayfeso haraso zaarana; bonchchettida ta keeththaa pangati gelananne tunisana.

Ezekiel7:25 Shiroy yiza wode istti saroteth koyana shin demmettenna.

Ezekiel7:27 Kawoy yeekkana; halaqay hidota qanxxana; he biitta asaa kushey babon kokkorana. Tani istta ooso mala isttas immana; istti harata bolla pirdida mala tani istta bolla pirdana. Tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees» gishe yides.

Ezekiel14:1 Isra7eele cimatappe guuththati taakko yiidi ta sinththan uttida.

Ezekiel14:5 Bantta eeqa xoossata gaason taappe shaakettida Isra7eele asaa ubbaa wozina haa taakko zaaranaas ta hessa ooththana› gees.
Ezekiel14:6 «Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asaas
Ezekiel14:7 « ‹Isra7eele asaappe oonakka gidiin woykko Isra7eele biittan diza bete asaappe oonakka gidiin
Ezekiel14:8 Iitateththan tani ta ayfeso hessaadeko zaarana; tossessinne qidhes ta iza kessana; tani iza ta deraa giddofe diggana; tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana.
Ezekiel14:9 « ‹Nabeza tinbite yootana mala baleththiko
Ezekiel14:10 Istta qohoy isttas gidana; nabezinne iza oychchana yidaadey nam7ay issi gina qixaate ekkana.
Ezekiel14:11 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay oge balidi taappe shaakettenna; simmidi ba nagaran ubbaan bana tunisenna. Istti ta dere gidana; tanikka istta Xoossa gidana› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY» gides.
Ezekiel14:12 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel14:13 «Haysso asa nawu! Issi derey tanan ammanettontta ixxidi nagara ooththiko
Ezekiel14:14 Nohey
Ezekiel14:15 «Tani wora do7ata deraa bolla kiittiin he do7ati deraa dhonth histtiin
Ezekiel14:16 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel14:17 «Woykko tani ha biitta bollan mashsha ehada
Ezekiel14:18 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel14:19 «Woykko tani biittay bolla iita harge yeddada
Ezekiel14:20 tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays: Nohey
Ezekiel14:21 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: tani asaanne mehe wodhanaas Yerusalaame bolla ta oyddu pirdata
Ezekiel14:22 Gidikkoka heeppe amarda asati kessi ekkidi attana; attuma naytinne macca nayti intteko yaana; intte istta hemeththinne istta ooso be7ida wode tani Yerusalaame bolla ehida metozinne gaththida iita bashshazi ubbay likke gididayssa intte erana.
Ezekiel14:23 Istta hemetanne istta ooso intte be7idi minettana; tani istta bolla coo hadan ooththonttayssa intte erana» gees.
Ezekiel15:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel15:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Woyne turay woran diza hara miththata ubbaa haggafe aazan aadhdhizee?
Ezekiel15:3 Go7iza miish ooththanaas iza anoppe eketti erizee? Issi miish kaqqanaas kocay izappe eketti erizee?
Ezekiel15:4 Izi eexxana mala taman yeggidaappe guyen nam7u bagga xeera tamay miidi giddoza labikko hessi go7anaas dandayzee?
Ezekiel15:5 Lo7o gidi uttidi ay go7akka immontta aggiko tamay xuuggidaappenne labidaappe guye keehi go7ay bayndaaz gidana.

Ezekiel16:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel16:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Yerusalaames iza ooththiza harassiza oosota izis qonccera yoota.
Ezekiel16:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Yerusalaames
Ezekiel16:4 Ne yelettida gallas ne gul7ay qanxxettibeenna; geeyanaas haaththan meecettabeekka; maxinen shooshettabeekka; carqqankka xaaxettabeekka.
Ezekiel16:5 Qadheta ayfen nena xeellidi woykko nees mishettidi haytappe issinokka nees ooththidaadey deenna; neni yelettida gallas kadhettida gishshas demban yegetta attadasa.
Ezekiel16:6 «Ta heera kanththa bashe neni ne suuththaan moorettada qakettishin be7adis; neni ne suuththa giddon ichcha dishin ta nena
Ezekiel16:7 Tani nena demba gaden diza kaththa mala dichchadis; neni dicca gakkada inqqu mala al7o gidadasa; ne dhanththati uttida; ne binanaykka diccides; gido attiin neni aayi uloppe yelettida mala pixxinni kallo daasa.
Ezekiel16:8 «Qasseka ta heera aadhdha bashe xeelladis; ne gelo gakkida geela7o gididayssa be7ada ta may7o macara ne bolla yeggada ne kalloteth kammadis; nees caaqqadis; nenara qaala geladis; ne taassa» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY.
Ezekiel16:9 «Tani ne bollay suuththan moorettidayssa haaththan meecca geeshshada zayte tiyadis.
Ezekiel16:10 Tani nena xibabe qamisa mayzada galbafe oosettida lo7o caammaka aaththisadis; lo7o laynoppe oosettida goosse nena goozisadis; qasse seelo kutakka qumayssadis.
Ezekiel16:11 Nena ta alleqon pocissadis; ne kushen sagayo
Ezekiel16:12 Qasse ne siidheninne ne hayththan gutichcha aaththadis; ne hu7enkka lo7o kallachcha goxxisadis.
Ezekiel16:13 Neni worqqaninne biran alleqettadasa; ne may7oy ubbay lo7o layno
Ezekiel16:14 Ta nees immida teemaappe dendidayssan ne puulateththi kumeth gidida gishshas ne worey kawoteththata giddon erettides» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY.
Ezekiel16:15 «Gido attiin neni ne puulateththaan ceeqettadasa; ke7ida ne sunththaa neni laymateththas go7ettadasa; aadhdhi biza ubbaara ne shene mala laymatadasa; neni nenateththaa beettaas beettaas aaththa immadasa.
Ezekiel16:16 Ne may7otappe guuththata ekkada ne laymatashe goynnizasohota aleqissa giigsadasa; hessa mala hanotay hayssafe sinththan hanibeenna; hayssafe guyenkka hanenna.
Ezekiel16:17 Tani nees immida worqqafenne biraappe oosettida lo7o alleqota ekkada attumasaa misleta nees ooththadasa; histtada isttara laymatadasa.
Ezekiel16:18 Ne xibabeta efada istta bolla gophadasa; qasse ta zaytenne ta exaane isttas shiishshadasa.
Ezekiel16:19 Qasse ne maana mala ta nees immida qumaa
Ezekiel16:20 «Qasseka ne taas yelida attuma naytanne macca nayta istti maana mala efada misletas yarshadasa. Hessa ne ooththizay ne laymatizayssi guuxxinee?
Ezekiel16:21 Neni ta nayta shukkada eeqa xoossatas yarshadasa.
Ezekiel16:22 Ha harassiza ne oosotaninne ne laymateth ubbaan ne aayey uloppe ne pixxinni kallo yelettida mala ne suuththan moorettada qakettashe diza yelagateththa wodeta ne qoppabeekka.
Ezekiel16:23 « ‹Aayye ana! Hanne nees aayye ana!› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY; ne ooththida iita miishshata ubbaafekka bollara hara gujjada
Ezekiel16:24 nees poggono giigsadasa; he ubbaan nees goynnizasohota ooththadasa.
Ezekiel16:25 Oyddu oge doonan ubbaan goynnizasohota giigsadasa; nenateththaa aadhdhi biza ubbaas laymateththas shiishshada ne puulateththaa tunisadasa.
Ezekiel16:26 Ziita kezida ne shooro Gibxe asatara laymatadasa; buuteppe daro ne laymateththan tana hanqeththadasa.
Ezekiel16:27 Hessa gishshas tani ta qese ne bolla denththada nees immiza go7atappe pacinchchadis; ne iita hanotappe dendidayssan
Ezekiel16:28 Nena buro alontta gishshas Asooretarakka laymatadasa; hessafe guyekka alabeekka.
Ezekiel16:29 Ne tunateththa zal7anchchata biitta Baabiloone gakkanaas darsadasa; histtadakka alabeekka.
Ezekiel16:30 « ‹Yeellay baynda layma maccassa mala hessa ubbaa ne poliday ay mala laafa wozinay nees diinee?› gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY.
Ezekiel16:31 Oyddu oge doona ubbaan nees poggonota goynnizasohota giigsadasa; gidikkoka hara layman aqiza maccassata mala miishshe qanxxisabeekka.
Ezekiel16:32 « ‹Hanne layma maccassayee! Neni azinay de7ishin hara addera laymatiza maccassa mala.
Ezekiel16:33 Ay layma maccassas imotay imettees; ne gidikko ne laggetas gede imota immaasa; awa baggarakka yidayti nenara laymatana mala baleththanaas mogota immaasa.
Ezekiel16:34 Hessa gishshas ne laymateththay haratappe dumma; laymatanaas koyzaadey nenara giiganaas metotenna; neni izas imota immaasa attiin izi nees imota immenna; ne hanotay hankkoytappe dummatees› gees» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY.
Ezekiel16:35 Hanne layma maccassayee
Ezekiel16:36 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel16:37 neni isttan ufayettida ne laggeta ubbaa
Ezekiel16:38 Tani laymatiza maccassata bollanne shemppo wodhiza maccassata bolla pirdiza mala ne bolla pirdana; ta hanqoninne mishonan shemppo wodhanaashe gakkanaas ta halo kessana.
Ezekiel16:39 Tani nena ne laggetas aaththa immana; isttika ne poggonotanne ne zumbullaa bolla goynnizasohota laallana; istti ne may7o qaari ekkana; lo7o ne alleqota bonqqi ekkana; nena pixxinni kallonne kushe mela ashshana.
Ezekiel16:40 Istti ne bolla dere denththana; shuchchara nena kurakkana; mashshara istti nena qanxxereththana.
Ezekiel16:41 Ne keeththata taman xuuggana; daro maccassata sinththan ne bolla qixaate ehana; ne laymateththaa ta nena diggana; hayssafe guye ne siiqotas ne miish qanxxaka.
Ezekiel16:42 Hessan ne bolla diza ta hanqoy irxxana; ta seela hanqoy neeppe haakkana; ta co7u gaana attiin hayssafe guye hanqettike.
Ezekiel16:43 «Ne tana haytan hanqeththadasa attiin ne yelagateththa wodeta qoppabeekka; hessa gishshas ne ooso mala ta nees immana» gees Ubbaa Haariza GODAY. Ne ooththida iita oosota bolla hara ziitateth gujjabeekkii?
Ezekiel16:44 «Yerusalaame! As ubbay leemiso haasayshe
Ezekiel16:45 Tumu neni ba azinaanne ba nayta shaatettiza ne aayey naa; neni bantta azinatanne bantta nayta shaatettiza ne michcheta mala. Intte aaya Hiite biitta asa; intte aaway qasse Amoore biitta asa.
Ezekiel16:46 Nees bayra michchiya neeppe pudeha baggara ba macca naytara diza Samaariya; nees kaalo michchiya neeppe dugeha baggara diza Sodoomo.
Ezekiel16:47 Neni istta oge buussinne istta iita oge kaalo xalla gidontta guuththa woden isttafe bollara iita ooththizaaro gidadasa.
Ezekiel16:48 Ta Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani de7o Xoossa gididayssan caaqqays: Neninne ne macca nayti ooththidayssa mala ne michcho Sodoomanne izi macca naytikka ooththibeettenna.
Ezekiel16:49 Ne michchiya Sodooma ooththida nagaray hayssa: izanne izi macca nayti otoranchcha
Ezekiel16:50 Istti otoranchcha gididi ta sinththan harassiza miish ooththida; hessa gishshas intte be7ida mala ta sinththafe dhayssadis.
Ezekiel16:51 Samaariyay ne ooththida nagaraas bagga gidanayssaka ooththabeekku; neni gidikko izippe keehi iita gidida ooso ooson he ubbaan neni ne michcheta xillo asa mala misatissadasa.
Ezekiel16:52 Neni ne michcheta xillo mala qoodida gishshas yeella may7a; ne nagaray isttayssafe keehi iita gidida gishshas istti neeppe xillo; neni ne michcheta xillisida gishshas yeella quma7a.
Ezekiel16:53 «Tani gidikko Sodoomonne izi macca nayta
Ezekiel16:54 Ne ooththida ubbaan ne kawuyananne keeha yeellatana; hessan ne michcheti minettana.
Ezekiel16:55 Ne michcho Sodoomanne izi macca nayti
Ezekiel16:56 Kase ne otorettiza wode ne michcho Sodoomis sunth xeyganaaskka koyabeekka.
Ezekiel16:57 Hessi ne nagaray qonccanaappe sinththan hanides; ha7i gidikko ne yuushon dishe nena kadhiza Eedoome macca naytassinne izi shoorota ubbaas
Ezekiel16:58 Ne pokko hanossinne ne iita oosos bessiza qixaate ekkana» gees.
Ezekiel16:59 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel16:60 Gido attiin ne naateththan dishin ta nenara caaqqida qaala qoppana; qasse mernaas eqqi daana caaqo qaala ta nenara caaqettana.
Ezekiel16:61 Neni nees bayra michchetanne kaalo michcheta mokka ekkiza wode ne hemeth qoppa ekkada yeellatana; istti nees macca nayta gidana mala ta nees immana; gido attiin ta nenara gelida caaqo qaala mala gidenna.

Ezekiel18:25 «Intte gidikko

Ezekiel18:29 Isra7eele asay gidikko

Ezekiel18:31 Intte ta bolla ooththida qoho ubbaa wora olite; inttes ooraththa wozinaynne ooraththa ayanay de7o; intteno Isra7eele asatoo ays hayqqeetii?

Ezekiel19:5 « ‹Iza hidota ooththidayssi calqamidayssa
Ezekiel19:6 Izi gaammota giddon noochu gides; minni minnika bides; wodhi muus eridi asaakka mides.
Ezekiel19:7 Izi istta miixa menththereththides; istta katamatakka kayzisides; Biittaynne biittan diza asay ubbay iza xaagoppe dendidayssan kokkorida.
Ezekiel19:8 Iza yuushon diza kawoteththati ubbay iza bolla dendida; bantta dere ubbaafe iza bolla shiiqida; bantta gite iza oykkana yeggida; izi istta ollan gelidi oykettides.
Ezekiel19:9 Siidhen dafo yeggidi kooththa giddon gelththida; Baabiloone kawookko efida; Nam7anththo iza cenggurssi Isra7eele zumata bolla seetettontta mala
Ezekiel19:10 « ‹Ne aaya haaththa doonan tokettida woyne tura mala; goshsha gaden daro haaththi diza gishshas

Ezekiel19:12 Gido attiin hanqon dhoqallettadus; duge biittan olettadus; arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy izo melissides; iza ayfida ayfeza qoqofides; mino izi haggati dagammida; tamaykka istta mides.
Ezekiel19:13 Ha7i haath saamettida mela biittan bazzon tokettadus.
Ezekiel19:14 Izis wogga haggata issaafe tamay kezides; iza ayfida ayfeza mides; kawoteththas gidiza issi mino haggayka attibeenna; hayssi zilassa; ceece gallas milassas gidana› ga» gides.
Ezekiel20:1 Nuni di7ettida laappunththa layththan
Ezekiel20:2 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel20:3 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele cimatas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel20:4 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel20:5 Isttas
Ezekiel20:6 ‹Tani istta Gibxe biittafe kessada ubbaafe lo7o gidida maaththinne eessi goggiza biitta ta isttas giigsa woththida biitta gelththana› gaada caaqqadis.
Ezekiel20:7 Qasse tani isttas
Ezekiel20:8 «Istti issoy issoy gidikko ta bolla makkallida; ta yootizayssaka siyana koyibeettenna; istti bantta ayfeta istta bolla woththida tuna misleta diggibeettenna; Gibxe eeqa xoossatakka aggibeettenna. Hessa gishshas istti Gibxen dishin tani ta hanqo istta bolla gussana; polana gakkanaashe istta bolla yeddanaas qachchadis.

Ezekiel24:8 Ta hanqoy eexxana malanne halo kessanaas taas injjetana mala
Ezekiel24:9 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel24:10 Eeso mith doora; tamaakka eeththa. Sawo gujjada ashoza lo7eththa doyssa; meqeththazikka micco.
Ezekiel24:11 Shi7azi seerana malanne birata shi7azi taman xuugettana mala
Ezekiel24:12 Daro wolqqay wurikkoka doorettida birata shi7i tamankka yeddana dandayenna.
Ezekiel24:13 « ‹Ne tuniday ne baalage oosonna; ta hanqoy ne bolla polettanaashe gakkanaas hayssafe guye ne geesh gidakka; gaasoykka tani nena ne tunateththaafe geeshshana koyiinkka ne geeyana dosabeekka.
Ezekiel24:14 « ‹Tani GODAY hayssa yootadis; ta ooththanaas wodey gakkides; ta guye giikke; qadhettikenne sidhikke; ne oge malanne ne ooso mala ne bolla pirdettana› gees» gides.
Ezekiel24:15 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel24:16 «Haysso asa nawu! Neni ne ayfe shempisiza miish tani ta hanqon neeppe ekka diggana; neni gidikko waassofa; yeekkofa; afunththika gussofa.
Ezekiel24:17 Ne qaala ziqqi histtada kayottashe milala attiin hayqqidayssas yeekkofa; ne hu7eppe quraace diggofa; ne tohoppe caamma kessofa; ne doona gaththa kammofa; shochchika mooppa» gides.
Ezekiel24:18 Tanikka wonttara deraas hessa yootadis; he gallassa omarsa wode ta keeththa aayeya hayqqadus; wonteththa gallas maalado GODAY tana azazida mala ooththadis.
Ezekiel24:19 Derezi tana
Ezekiel24:20 Tanikka deraas zaarada
Ezekiel24:21 Isra7eele keeththas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel24:22 Ta ooththida mala he wode intteka ooththana; intte doona gaththi kammeketa; shochchika meekketa.
Ezekiel24:23 Intte hu7eppe quraace diggeketa; intte tohoppe caamma kesseketa; intte intte nagaran gilqana; issoy issaara tookki shempana attiin kayos utteketanne yeekkeketa.
Ezekiel24:24 He woden Hiziqeeli inttes malata gidana; izi ooththida mala intteka ooththana› gides. Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tana gididayssa hayssi haniza wode intte erana» gees.
Ezekiel24:25 GODAY tana
Ezekiel24:26 he gallas kessi ekki attida asi he paapunththaa yootanaas neekko yaana.
Ezekiel24:27 He gallas ne doonay doyettana; nenikka izara haasayana; hessafe guye ne doona duude gidakka; ne isttas malata gidana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana» gides.
Ezekiel25:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel25:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne sinth Amoone biittaako zaarada istta bolla tinbite yoota.
Ezekiel25:3 Isttas
Ezekiel25:4 arshey mokkiza baggara diza derezas intte haarettana mala ta inttena aaththa immana. Isttika intte giddon bantta dunkaane tokkidi daana; intte miththata ayfe maana; intte maaththika istti uyana.
Ezekiel25:5 Tani Eraaba katama gaamellati heemettizaso
Ezekiel25:6 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel25:7 tani ta qese intte bolla denththana; tani kawoteththati inttefe bonqqana mala ooththana; ta inttena kawoteththata giddofe shoddana; asaappeka shaakkada dhayssana; ta inttena dippi histtana. Tani GODAA gididayssa intte he wode erana› gees.
Ezekiel25:8 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel25:9 istta biitta zawa bolla dizaytanne izis bonchcho gidida katamata Beeti-Yashimooteppe
Ezekiel25:10 Mo7aabetinne Amooneti isttas haarettana mala ta istta arshey wulliza baggara diza deraas aaththa immana; Amoone asaas hayssafe guye kawoteththata matan istta qofsiza miishshi deenna.
Ezekiel25:11 Tani Mo7aabe qaxxayana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees.
Ezekiel25:12 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel25:13 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: tani ta qese Eedoome bolla denththana. Iza asaanne mehaa ta wodhana; ta iza bula histtana; Temaaneppe biidi Dadaane gakkanaas istti mashshan wurana.
Ezekiel25:14 Ta dere Isra7eele denththada Eedoome bolla halo kessana; isttika ta hanqo malanne ta bosha mala Eedoome deraa bolla ooththana; tani halo kessidayssa istti he wode erana› gees.
Ezekiel25:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
