Ezekiel25:17 Tani istta bolla wolqqama halo kessana; ta boshankka istta qaxxayana; ta istta qaxxayiza wode istti tani GODAA gididayssa erana› gees» gides.
Ezekiel26:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne issinththa layththan
Ezekiel26:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroosi Yerusalaame gishshas
Ezekiel26:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: hanne Xiroose ta ne bolla dendadis; abba dambalay dendiza mala ta ne bolla daro dere denththana.
Ezekiel26:4 Istti Xiroosi gimbeza mulera dhayssana; izi naage gimbetakka laallana; tani izi biittaa pitta dhayssada kallo diza zaalla kessana.
Ezekiel26:5 Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootida gishshas iza abba giddon gite micci melissizaso gidana; kawoteththati izis dizaaz bonqqana.
Ezekiel26:6 He biittan abbaafe haakki diza gutati mashshan wurana; tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana.
Ezekiel26:7 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel26:8 Izi deraas giddon diza ne gutata mashshan wursana; izi yuushon keela keelana; ne gimbes xeera gakkanaas biitta doorana; izi ba gondallezakka ne bolla denththana.
Ezekiel26:9 Gimbeza laalliza miishshan dirsaa laallana; ola massaran naage gimbetakka laallana.
Ezekiel26:10 Para daroteththafe dendidayssan gudullay nena goozi oykkana; asay gimbey laalettida katama mala izi ne pengetara geliza wode
Ezekiel26:11 Ne ogeti ubbay para tohon durettana; ne deraa mashshan wodhana; ne wolqqama tuussatikka sa7an kundana.
Ezekiel26:12 Ne aqota istti bonqqana; ne shaqace istti bonqqi ekkana; ne dirsa istti laallana; ne lo7o keeththatakka ubbaa dhayssana; ne shuchchaanne ne miththa
Ezekiel26:13 Ne yeththaa tani sirphi histtana; hayssafe guye ne diiththa giirissi seetettenna.
Ezekiel26:14 Ta nena kallo diza lochcha zaalla ooththana; neni mole gite miccizaso gidana; nam7anththo simma oosettaka; hayssi hananay tani GODAY yootida gishshassa› gees.
Ezekiel26:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Xiroosis
Ezekiel26:16 Abba gaxan diza halaqati ubbay bantta kawoteththa araataappe wodhdhana. Bantta seelo may7o yeggana; bantta xibabe may7oza qaari yeggana. Babon kumidi biitta bolla utti kokkorishe ne bolla gakkida hanoza gaason istti shirotana› gees.
Ezekiel26:17 Ne gishshas zilalishe
Ezekiel26:18 Ha7i ne kundeththa gallas abba gaxan diza dereti hirgida; ne laalettida gaason harurotikka qaaxxida› gees.
Ezekiel26:19 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel26:20 beni wode asati gelida ollan wodhdhizaytara ta nena duge woththana; duge ollan gelizaytara ta nena issife beni laalettidi diza biitta garsan ta nena woththana; hessafe guye neni biitta bolla shemppora paxa dizayta garsan nees de7oso demmaka;
Ezekiel26:21 Tani ne wurseththaa miichchizaaz ooththana; hessafe guye ne de7akka; ne koyettanashin beettaka; gido attiin neni nam7anththo mulekka beettaka› gees» gides.
Ezekiel27:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel27:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Xiroosi gishshas zilala.
Ezekiel27:3 Abban gelizaso pengen dizaarissinne daro abba gaxatan diza deretara zal7iza Xiroosis
Ezekiel27:4 Ne zaway abba giddon dees; nena ooththidayti keehi lo7eththi ooththida.
Ezekiel27:5 Ne sanqqata ubbaa
Ezekiel27:6 Baasaaneppe yida wolappe markabe laaggiza miish ooththida; Qophiroose zawappe yida ziga miththaa
Ezekiel27:7 Ne Markabeza xibabey Gibxe biitta laynoppe oosettides; hessi nena bandira mala go7ides. Salo misatizanne ochcha teera misatiza ne sharati Qophirooseppe yida.
Ezekiel27:8 Markabe sololissizayti Sidoonappenne Arwaadeppe yidayta; hanne Xiroose
Ezekiel27:9 Gebaaleppe loohida daannatinne hiillanchchati ne markabeta koolanaas ne giddon deettes; abba bollara biza markabetinne markabe laaggizayti ubbay heregettidi nenara zal7ettanaas neekko yeettes.
Ezekiel27:10 «Paarise
Ezekiel27:11 Arwaadenne Heleeke asati ne gimbeta ubbasora naageettes; Gamaadeppe yida asati ne gimbe giddon deettes; istti bantta gondalle ne gimbeza yuushon kaqqida; ne puulateththaa kumeth ooththida.
Ezekiel27:12 «Keehi daro gidida ne dureteththa gaason Tarseesey nenara zal7en gayttadus; iza biranne birata
Ezekiel27:13 «Yaawaaney
Ezekiel27:14 «Beeti-Togarma asati caana parata
Ezekiel27:15 «Erodoose asati zal7en nenara gayttida; daro haruro dereti ne shaqaceta danggarsa zaaleninne Zophe geetettiza miththan laammeettes.
Ezekiel27:16 «Keehi daro gidida ne aqota gaason Aaraamey nenara zal7en gayttadus; ne shaqacekka beluren
Ezekiel27:17 «Yuhudaynne Isra7eeleykka attontta nenara zal7en gayttida; istti Miniteppe yida gistte
Ezekiel27:18 «Ne daro dureteththanne ishalo duussa gaason Damasqo asati Helboone woyne ushshinne Zahaare dere dorsa iske shiishshidi nenara zal7ettida.
Ezekiel27:19 «Oozeelen diza Daaneynne Girke asay ne dumma dumma miishshaa shammida; istti ne miishshaara laammanaas aleqettida birata
Ezekiel27:20 «Dadaaney ne shaqace gilaasera laammawus.
Ezekiel27:21 «Arabiya halaqatinne Qeedaare halaqati ubbay ne laggeta; istti laaqqa
Ezekiel27:22 «Saaba zal7anchchatinne Eraa7ime zal7anchchati nenara zal7etteettes; doorettida qimame ubbaa
Ezekiel27:23 «Kaaraane
Ezekiel27:24 Heytikka ne giya giddon lo7o may7o
Ezekiel27:25 «Tarseese markabeti ne shaqace caani caani efida; neni abba giddon deexo caana caanettada daasa.
Ezekiel27:26 Markabe sololissizayti ciimma abba giddon nena efida; gido attiin arshey mokkiza bagga carkoy abba giddon nena menththereththides.
Ezekiel27:27 Markabe daafay ne bolla gakkiza gallas ne aqotay
Ezekiel27:28 Ne markabe sololissizayti waassishin
Ezekiel27:29 Markabe sololissizayti ubbay bantta markabeta oli baana; markabe sololissizaytinne markaben dizayti ubbay wodhdhidi abbaa gaxan eqqana.
Ezekiel27:30 Bantta qaala dhoqqu histtidi camo yeeho nees yeekkana; bantta hu7en gudulla qolidi bidinththa bolla bululettana.
Ezekiel27:31 Ne gishshas kayottidi bantta hu7e bulusana; maaqaka may7ana; wozinappe ceecidi camo yeeho nees yeekkana.
Ezekiel27:32 Ne gishshas istti waassishe yeekkana; istti nees zilalishe
Ezekiel27:33 Ne shaqacey abbaafe pinni kezida wode
Ezekiel27:34 Ha7i gidikko ciimma haaththan abba giddon meqeretta kundadasa; ne caanaynne caanettida asay ubbay nenara abban mitettida.
Ezekiel27:35 Abba gaxan de7iza asay ubbay ne bolla gakkidayssa be7idi dagammida. Istta kawotikka hirgan kokkorida; istta ayfesoy laamettides.
Ezekiel27:36 Hara kawoteththata giddon diza zal7anchchati ne bolla ay keena wayqidoo! ne wurseththay daganththizaaz gidides; ne mernaas beettaka» gides.

Ezekiel29:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanththa layththan

Ezekiel29:5 Nenanne ne shaafatan diza moleta ubbaa

Ezekiel29:13 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel29:14 Tani isttas zaara ishalo de7o immana; kase istta aawata biitta Phaxiroose ta istta zaarana; izakka kawoteththata ubbaafe laafa gidana.
Ezekiel29:15 Hara kawoteththatappe bollara iza bana dhoqqu histtana dandayukku; tani izo keeha laafa histtana; hessa gishshas iza hara kawoteththata zaara haarana dandayukku.
Ezekiel29:16 Gibxey hayssafe guye Isra7eeley izin zemppiza dere gidukku; maado demmanaas izikko istti simmida wode istti ooththida nagaraa istti qofsiza dere gidana; hessafe guye tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAA gididayssa istti erana› gees» gides.

Ezekiel30:6 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY

Ezekiel30:9 «He gallas ta qasttanneti markaben biidi badhdhi ga uttidasohoppe kessanaas Tophphiya daganththana; Gibxey dhuman mitettiza wode istta ceecey oykkana; tumappe he gallassay yaana».
Ezekiel30:10 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY

Ezekiel30:12 Abbaye shaafa tani melissana; biittayokka iita asatas bayzana; allagata kushen biittayonne izin diza ubbaa ta bula histtana; tani GODAY hayssa yootadis.

Ezekiel30:17 Heeliyootenne Buubastte naateththati mashshan siifettana; he katamatikka di7ettana.

Ezekiel30:22 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel30:23 Tani Gibxe asaa kawoteththata giddon laallana; hara dereta giddonkka zerana.
Ezekiel30:24 Tani Baabiloone kawo qese minththada ta mashshaaka iza oyththana. Gido attiin Paaroone qeseza ta menththana; izikka ba morkkeza sinththan iita madunxida asa mala toqqana.

Ezekiel31:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne issinththa layththan
Ezekiel31:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe kawo Paaroonessinne qooday baynda iza deraas
Ezekiel31:3 Iza haggay woraas kuwa gididi daro luule gididi iza xeeray salo gakki diichiza Libaanoose ziga misatiza Asoore xeellite.
Ezekiel31:4 Haaththati iza caarissida; ciimma pulttotikka iza dichchida; istta kanchche haaththati goggida; istta xaphoy dizaso ubbaa irxxisida; demban diza miththata ubbaakko zara haath yeddida.
Ezekiel31:5 Haath kallida gishshas wora giddon diza mith ubbaafe
Ezekiel31:6 Salo kafoti ubbay iza haggata bolla bantta keeth keexxida; wora do7ati ubbay iza haggata garsan marata yelida; gita kawoteththati ubbay iza kuwa garsan de7ida.
Ezekiel31:7 Daayida iza haggatara izas puulazi keehi lo7o; iza xaphoti haaththi dari dizaso bida.
Ezekiel31:8 Xoossa gannaten diza zigatikka izara ginattana dandaybeettenna; xiiddatikka iza haggatara ginattettenna; wolatikka iza haggara ginattettenna; Xoossa gannaten diza ay miththika lo7eteththan iza gakkenna.
Ezekiel31:9 Tani iza daro haggatara gaththa puulasa medhdhadis; Xoossa gannaten diza miththati ubbay iza amottana mala ooththadis› gees ga.
Ezekiel31:10 «Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel31:11 tani iza iitateththaa keena iza ooso gate immana mala kawoteththata haarizayssas ta iza aaththa immadis. Ta iza kessa wora oladis.
Ezekiel31:12 Kawoteththata garsan keehi menxe iita allagati iza qanxxereththi yeggida; iza unquloti zumataninne zulletan kundida; iza haggatikka meqeretti haaththa zaratan wodhdhida; biittan diza kawoteththati ubbay iza kuwa garsafe kezidi yeggi bida.
Ezekiel31:13 Salo kafoti yiidi kundida miththaa bolla uttida; wora do7atikka ubbay kundida miththaa haggata bolla uttida.
Ezekiel31:14 Hessa gishshas haaththa lanqen diza ay miththika ba xeera cuppu gida bonccotappe bollara dhoqqu histtidi hayssafe guye bana otoron zaradhissenna; qasseka ay miththika lo7eththidi hayssaththo aduqqenna; ubbayka hayqqidi duge duufon gelizaytara issife hayqqana mala pirdettides› gees.
Ezekiel31:15 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel31:16 Duge duufon gelizaytara ta iza gelththiza wode izi kundishin siyettida giirissay kawoteththata daganththides; hessafe guye Edene miththati
Ezekiel31:17 Kawoteththata giddofe izara zuppetidayti
Ezekiel31:18 «Edenen miththatappe puulateththaninne adussateththan nenara ginattanay oonee? Gido attiin nenikka hessaththo Edene miththatara issife biitta gars gelana; mashshan hayqqidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issi bolla ichchana. «Paaroonenne qooday baynda iza deraa gakkanayssi hayssa; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootadis» gides.
Ezekiel32:1 Nuni di7ettida tammanne nam7anththo layththan
Ezekiel32:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe kawo Paaroones zilalashe
Ezekiel32:3 « ‹Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: daro dere shiishshada
Ezekiel32:4 Ta nena biitta bolla yeggana; demba bollaka miccana; salo kafoti ubbay ne bolla uttana mala ta ooththana; wora do7ati ubbay nena yiiqeti mi kallana.
Ezekiel32:5 Tani ne asho zumata bolla laallana; zulletakka ne ahan kunththana.
Ezekiel32:6 Biittaa ne suuththan ta caphisana; neeppe goggizayssi zulleta kumidi zumata gakkanaas diza oge ubbaa kammana.
Ezekiel32:7 Ta nena dhayssiza wode salota goozana; istta xoolinttetakka dhumisana; awakka shaaran kammana; aginaykka ba poo7o diggana.
Ezekiel32:8 Salon poo7isiza poo7ota ubbaa
Ezekiel32:9 «Ne bolla yida bashshaa ta sissiza wode ne erontta biittan kawoteththata giddon
Ezekiel32:10 Daro asay ne bolla gakkida meton dagammana mala ta ooththana; tani ta mashshaa istta sinththan shodda seessishin ne bolla gakkida hanoza gaason istta kawoti dagaman nozhzhu gaana; neni kundiza gallas issoy issoy ba shemppos yashshan ayfe qiphon kokkorana.
Ezekiel32:11 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY Gibxe kawos
Ezekiel32:12 Kawoteththata ubbaafe keehi menxe iita gidida
Ezekiel32:13 Daro haaththa matan diza izi wudeta ta dhayssana; hessafe guye asa tohon yedhettettenna; mehe tohoy uullosenna.
Ezekiel32:14 Histtada ta izi haaththata xillisana; izi shaafata zayte mala ta gogisana.
Ezekiel32:15 Ta Gibxe bulasishin biittayn dizay ubbay dhayshin
Ezekiel32:16 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel32:17 Nuni di7ettida tammanne nam7anththo layththan
Ezekiel32:18 «Haysso asa nawu! Gibxe olanchcha corata gishshas yeekka! Izonne wolqqama kawoteththata macca nayta duge duufon gelizaytara issife duge biitta gars gelththa.
Ezekiel32:19 Neni isttas
Ezekiel32:20 Istti mashshan siifettidayta giddon kundana; mashshay shodettides; iza ba daro oosanchchatara issife gooshettu.
Ezekiel32:21 Duufo giddon wolqqama halaqati Gibxe gishshassinne izira zuppetizayta gishshas istti duge wodhdhidi
Ezekiel32:22 «Asoorey ba kumeththa olanchchatara dawus; izippe mashshan kundidaytanne siifettidayta duufon doodetta uttadus.
Ezekiel32:23 Istta duufoy ciimma olla giddon dees; izi olanchchati izi duufo yuushon korettida; paxa dizayta biittan shiro denththidayti ubbay shukettida; mashshankka wurida.
Ezekiel32:24 «Elaama heen dawus; izi olanchchati ubbay izi duufo yuuyi aadhdhi deettes; ubbatikka shukettida; mashshankka hayqqida; paxa dizayta biittan shiro denththida ubbati ammanontta biitta gars gelida; duge biitta gars gelidaytara issife yeella may7i gelida.
Ezekiel32:25 Izi duufo yuushon diza kumeththa olanchchatara shukettidayta giddon hiixay izis giigettides. Istti ubbay ammanonttaytanne mashshan siifettidayta; istta shiroy shemppora paxa dizayta biittan worekettida gishshas duge duufon gelizaytara issi bolla yeella may7ana; shukettidayta giddon istti ichchana.
Ezekiel32:26 «Mesheekeynne Tubaale duufoy bantta olanchchata duufon doodetti uttana; istti ubbayka ammanonttayta gidi uttidi shemppora paxa dizayta biittan ba shiro denththeththida gishshas mashshan hayqqida.
Ezekiel32:27 Daro layththafe kase hayqqida ola qarati bantta mashsha borkotidi
Ezekiel32:28 «Paaroone! Nenikka hessaththo meqqana; mashshan siifettidaytaranne ammanonttaytara ne issi bolla ichchana.
Ezekiel32:29 «Eedooma heen de7awus; izi kawotinne izo haarizayti ubbay heen deettes; istti wolqqara dizayta gidikkoka mashshan siifettidaytara
Ezekiel32:30 «Pudeha bagga haarizaytinne Sidoonati ubbay heen deettes; hayssafe kase istti ba wolqqan ammanettidi shiro denththidayta gidikkoka shukettidaytara issife yeellan kundida; mashshan siifettidayta ammanonttaytaranne duge duufon wodhdhidaytara issife yeella may7i ichchana.
Ezekiel32:31 «Paarooneynne iza olanchchati ubbay istta be7ana; mashshan siifettida ba olanchchata ubbaa kayoppe izi minettana.
Ezekiel32:32 Tani hayssafe kase kawoteththati ubbay Gibxe kawos yayyana mala shemppora paxa dizayta biittan shiroy aakkana mala koykkoka Paarooneynne iza olanchchati ubbay mashshan siifettidaytaranne ammanonttaytara issife ichchana; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootadis» gides.

Ezekiel33:4 hessafe guye oonikka zayeza siyidi naagettontta aggiko
Ezekiel33:5 Zayeza siyidi naagettontta aggiko iza suuththay iza bolla gidana; izi naagettidaakko bana ashshana
Ezekiel33:6 Gido attiin woshe addezi mashshay yizayssa be7idi deraa erisanaas zaye punnontta aggiko istta giddofe issi asa shemppo mashshay wodhikko izaadey ba nagara gishshas hayqqana; gido attiin iza suuththaa gishshas woshe addezi oyshettana mala tani ooththana› ga yoota.
Ezekiel33:7 «Haysso asa nawu! Tani nena Isra7eele keeththas woshe as histta dooradis; hessa gishshas ta nees yootiza qaala siya; ta seerakka istta erisa.
Ezekiel33:8 Tani iitaza
Ezekiel33:9 Gido attiin iita asi ba ogeppe simmana mala ne yootiin ixxiko izi ba nagaran hayqqana; neni gidikko ne shemppo ashshana.

Ezekiel33:11 Neni isttas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel33:12 «Haysso asa nawu! Ha7ikka ne dere asatas

Ezekiel33:14 Qasse iita as ne tumappe hayqqana giikko
Ezekiel33:15 izi tal7idayssas oyso ekkidayssa zaarikko
Ezekiel33:16 Izi ooththida nagarappe issoyka qofettenna; izi suurenne likke gidida miish ooththida gishshas tumappe shemppora paxa daana.
Ezekiel33:17 «Hessaththo hankkoka ne dere asay
Ezekiel33:18 Xillo asi ba xilloteththa ooso aggidi iita miish ooththiko izi ba nagaran hayqqana.

Ezekiel33:20 Intteno Isra7eele keeththa asatoo intte
Ezekiel33:21 Nuni di7ettida tammanne nam7anththo layththan

Ezekiel33:24 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele biittan laaletti diza asati

Ezekiel33:29 Istti ooththida harassiza oosoppe dendidayssan tani biittayo bulanne asi baynda kays histtishin tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees.

Ezekiel33:31 Ubbaa gallas istti ooththiza mala ta derey neekko yaana; ne qaalaa siyanaas istti ne sinththan uttana; gido attiin siyidayssa polettenna. Bantta metershan daro siiqo qoncciseettes; gido attiin istta wozinay bessontta go7an shempides.
Ezekiel33:32 Istti ne qaalaa siyidi ooson peyshonttayta gidida gishshas

Ezekiel34:4 Daaburdayta minththeththibeeketa; hargidayta dhallibeekketa; meqqidayta koolibeekketa; toylattidayta zaaribeekketa; dhaydayta koyibeekketa. Intte istta geneninne menxe iitateththan haarideta.
Ezekiel34:5 Wudeti heenththanchchay baynda gishshas laalettida; laalettidayti wora do7atas quma gidida.
Ezekiel34:6 Ta wudeti zumata bollanne zumbullata ubbaa bolla toylattida. Biitta gade gakkanaas laalettida; gido attiin istta xomosiday woykko koyiday deenna› ga.

Ezekiel34:11 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY

Ezekiel34:14 Tani istta lo7o qooron heemmana; dhoqqa Isra7eele zumati istti heemettizasoho gidana; lo7o qooroy diza maatan istti ichchana; heen Isra7eele zumata bolla cililason istti heemettana.
Ezekiel34:15 Tani tarkka ta wudeta heemmananne shempisana.
Ezekiel34:16 Tani dhaydayssa koyana; toylattidayssaka zaarana; meqqidayssa koolana; daaburdayssaka minththeththana. Gido attiin tani modhdhidaytanne minnidayta dhayssana; wudeza wogara heemmana.

Ezekiel34:18 Cilila qooron intte heemettizayssi inttes gidennee? Mishin attida maata intte yedhettana bessizee? Intte xillo haath uyizayssi inttes gidennee? Attidayssa intte intte tohon bulqosanaas bessizee?
Ezekiel34:19 Ta wudeti intte intte tohon yedhettida maata maanaassinne intte intte tohon bulqosida haaththaa uyanaas bessizee?› gees.

Ezekiel34:26 Istta yuushoninne ta zumbullata yuushon dizasohota ta anjjana. Woden woden ta isttas ira immana; izikka isttas anjjo ira gidana.
Ezekiel34:27 Gaden diza miththati ayfe immana; biittayka kath moyzana; as ubbay ba biitta bolla saron daana. Ta istta qambara menththada istta aylleteththan haaridayta kusheppe wozziza wode tani GODAA gididayssa istti erana.

Ezekiel34:29 Hessafe guye istti koshattontta mala

Ezekiel35:6 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY tani de7o Xoos gididayssan caaqqays; ne suuththi gukkana mala ta nena izas aaththa immana; izikka nena yedeththana; suuth gussizayssa ne ixxontta gishshas suuth gussizayti nena yedeththana.

Ezekiel36:1 GODAY
Ezekiel36:2 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: ne gishshas morkketi be7ite! Heyti beni zumati nuus xinxxo gidida› gida;
Ezekiel36:3 Hessa gishshas neni tinbite yoota; Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:4 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele zumatoo! Ubbaa Haariza GODAA qaala siyite! Ubbaa Haariza GODAY zumatassinne zumbullatas
Ezekiel36:5 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:6 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele biitta gishshas neni tinbite yoota. Zumatas
Ezekiel36:7 Hessa gishshas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:8 «Isra7eele zumatoo
Ezekiel36:9 Intte gishshas taas siyettees; ta inttena lo7o ayfen xeellana; intteka goyettana; zereththika intte bolla zerettana.
Ezekiel36:10 Isra7eele keeth kumeththi attontta ta intte asaa qooda darssana; katamati asa duussaso gidana; laalettidasoti simmi gimbettana.
Ezekiel36:11 Tani intte bolla asa qoodanne meheta qooda gujjana; istti yelettananne corattana; beniissa malakka intte bolla asay daana mala tani ooththana; tani inttena kaseppe aaththa duresana; hessafe guye tani GODAA gididayssa intte erana.
Ezekiel36:12 Ta dere Isra7eele asay inttenan simerettana mala ta ooththana; istti inttena laattana; intteka isttas xinxxo gidana; hayssafe guye intte istta yeloy bayndayta ooththeketa.
Ezekiel36:13 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY: derezi inttena
Ezekiel36:14 Hessa gishshas hayssafe guye biittaya as muukku; kawoteththaaka nay bayndaaz histtike.
Ezekiel36:15 Hayssafe guye ta nena kawoteththata naach sissike; ne asa cashshan metotakka; neni kawoteththataskka dhuphe gidakka gees» gides.
Ezekiel36:16 Qasseka GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel36:17 «Haysso asa nawu! Isra7eele asay bantta biittan diza wode bantta oosoninne bantta duussan biittayo tunisida; maccassay agina wogay yiza wode tuniza mala istta kandoy ta sinththan tuna.
Ezekiel36:18 Istti biittay bolla suuth gussida gishshassinne bantta eeqa xoossatan biitta tunisida gishshas ta hanqo istta bolla gussadis.
Ezekiel36:19 Tani istta kawoteththata giddon laalladis; isttika dere ubbaan laalettida; tani istta bolla istta kando malanne istta ooso mala pirdadis.
Ezekiel36:20 Istti ba bida kawoteththata ubbaa giddon ta geeshsha sunththaa tunisida; istta gishshas
Ezekiel36:21 Isra7eele keeththay ba bida kawoteththata ubbaa giddon tunisida ta geeshsha sunththa gishshas taas seetettees.
Ezekiel36:22 «Hessa gishshas Isra7eele keeththas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:23 Intte istta matan tunisiin kawoteththata giddon tunida gita ta sunththaa geeshshateththaa tani bessana. Istti xeellishin intte baggara tani ta geeshshateththaa qonccisiza wode kawoteththati tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana. Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootays.
Ezekiel36:24 « ‹Tani inttena kawoteththata giddofe kessana; dere ubbaafe ta shiishshana. Histtada inttena intte biitta zaara ehana.
Ezekiel36:25 Tani inttena xillo haaththan aracana; intteka geeyana; histtada ta inttena intte eeqa xoossata ubbaafenne intte tunateth ubbaafe geeshshana.
Ezekiel36:26 Tani inttes ooraththa wozina immana; ooraththa ayanakka intte ta giddon ayssana; qasse shuchcha wozina intte giddofe kessada asho wozina immana.
Ezekiel36:27 Tani ta Ayana intte giddon ayssana; intte ta maaraa kaallana malanne ta wogaa minththi naagana mala ooththana.
Ezekiel36:28 Tani kase intte aawatas immida biittan intte daana; intte ta dere gidana; tanikka intte Xoossaa gidana.
Ezekiel36:29 Intte tunateththaafe ta inttena geeshshana; kaththaa ta muurutisananne darsana; koshakka intte bolla ehikke.
Ezekiel36:30 Kosha gaason intte kawoteththata giddon intte kawuyidi yeellatontta mala miththa ayfenne kath ta inttes darsana.
Ezekiel36:31 He wode intte intte iita ogenne tunida intte oosota intte akeekana; intte nagara gishshassinne harassiza intte oosota gishshas intterkka intte inttena bashashettana.
Ezekiel36:32 Tani hayssa ooththizay intte gishshas gidonttayssa erite; intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Intte intte ooson yeellatitenne bashashettite; tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayssa yootays› gees.
Ezekiel36:33 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:34 Bizanne yiza asa ayfen asi bayndaso gidi beettiza bula biittay goyettana.
Ezekiel36:35 Istti hayssi asi bayndasozi Edene Gannate misatides; dhayda
Ezekiel36:36 Hessafe guye kase intte yuushon attida kawoteththati kase budhettida katamata zaara keexxiday
Ezekiel36:37 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel36:38 Yerusalaamen ba7aale gallas yarshettana shiiqiza mehe mala ta darsana; be7ite kase laalettida katamati daro asas duussaso gidana; hessafe guye tani GODAA gididayssa istti he wode erana› gees» gides.
Ezekiel37:1 GODAA kushey ta bolla dees; izikka tana GODAA Ayanan kessides; meqeththati kumi uttida shoobban tana woththides.
Ezekiel37:2 Izi tana heen yuushshi bessides; tanikka keehi shich gi melida daro meqeththati kumidayta shoobba giddon be7adis.
Ezekiel37:3 Izi tana
Ezekiel37:4 Histtiin izi tana
Ezekiel37:5 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY hayta ha meqeththatas peeno ta immana; inttenikka shemppora paxa daana.
Ezekiel37:6 Ta intte bolla shayata woththada
Ezekiel37:7 Hessa gishshas tani azazettida mala tinbite yootadis; tani tinbite yootishin saasuketeththa giirissi seetettides; meqeththati issay issaara oykettida.
Ezekiel37:8 Ta xeellishin istta bollan shayay dees; shayaa bolla ashoy dees; ashoza bolla galbay kammi oykkides; gido attiin shemppoy isttan baawa.
Ezekiel37:9 Hessafe guye izi tana
Ezekiel37:10 Hessa gishshas izi tana azazida mala tinbite yootadis; peenoykka istta giddo gelides; isttika paxida; keehippe daro olanchchata gididi eqqida.
Ezekiel37:11 Hessafe guye izi taas
Ezekiel37:12 Hessa gishshas isttas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel37:13 Hessafe guye ta deretoo
Ezekiel37:14 Tani ta Ayana intte giddon woththana; intteka shemppora paxa daana; ta inttena intte biittan woththana; hessafe guye tani GODAY yootida mala ooththidayssa intte erana; tani GODAY hayssa yootays› gees» gides.
Ezekiel37:15 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel37:16 «Haysso asa nawu! Issi guufe ekkada iza bolla
Ezekiel37:17 Istti issi guufe misatana mala istta ne kushen gaagga oykka.
Ezekiel37:18 «Ne dere nayti
Ezekiel37:19 ne isttas: Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel37:20 Ne istta bolla xaafida guufeta istta sinththan oykka.
Ezekiel37:21 Neni isttas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel37:22 Biittay bolla Isra7eele zumatan ta istta issi kawoteth ooththana; istta ubbaa bolla issi kawoy kawotana. Hayssafe guye istti nam7u dere gidettenna; istta kawoteththay nam7u kezi shaakettenna.
Ezekiel37:23 Istti bantta eeqa xoossatan
Ezekiel37:24 « ‹Ta aylle Dawiti istta bolla kawotana; ubbaasikka issi heenththanchchay daana; istti ta wogaa kaallana; ta maaraakka minththi naagana.
Ezekiel37:25 Tani ta aylle Yaaqoobes immidanne intte aawati de7ida biittan istti daana. Heen isttas
Ezekiel37:26 Tani isttara Saroteththa caaqo qaala gelana; he caaqo qaalaykka mernaas gidana. Tani istta minththana; corissana; ta Keeththaaka istta giddon mernaas woththana.
Ezekiel37:27 Ta duussasoy isttakon gidana; ta istta Xoossa gidana; isttika ta dere gidana.

Ezekiel38:1 GODAA qaalay taakko yiidi
Ezekiel38:2 «Haysso asa nawu! Ne ayfeso gede Maagooge biittan diza Mesheekessinne Tubaales waanna halaqa Googe bolla zaara; iza bolla tinbite yoota.
Ezekiel38:3 Neni izas Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Ezekiel38:4 Ta nena guye zaarana; tani ne siidhen dafo aaththada kumeth ne olanchchatara
Ezekiel38:5 Gondalle oykkidaytinne birata qoobe woththida ubbati
Ezekiel38:6 Qasse Goomere iza olanchchatara pudeha baggan haakon diza Beeti-Togarma iza olanchchataranne daro kawoteththata ta nenara kessana.

Ezekiel38:13 Saaba asay
Ezekiel38:14 «Hessa gishshas asa nawu

Ezekiel39:1 «Ubbaa Haariza GODAY

Ezekiel39:20 Ta maaddan parata
Ezekiel39:21 «Kawoteththata giddon tani ta bonchcho qonccisana; kawoteththati ubbay tani istta bolla ehida qixaatenne ta istta bolla deexeththida kushe be7ana.

Ezekiel39:23 Isra7eele asay taas ammanettontta ixxidi nagara ooththida gaason istti goodettidayssa kawoteththati erana. Hessa gishshas tani ta ayfeso isttafe genththadis; tani istta istta morkketas aaththa immadis; istti ubbay mashshan wurida.
Ezekiel39:24 Istta tunateththaa malanne istta qohoza mala ta istta bolla pirdadis; ta ayfesokka ta isttafe genththadis.

Ezekiel40:1 Nuni di7ettida nam7u tammanne ichchashanththa layththan
Ezekiel40:2 Xoossa ajjuutan izi tana Isra7eele biitta efidi dhoqqa zuma bolla woththides; he zumaappe dugeha baggara katama misatiza gimbe keeththata be7adis.
Ezekiel40:3 Izi tana hee efides; histtiin tani xarqimala misatiza issi as be7adis; izi laynoppe oosettida wodoronne wadha mith ba kushen oykkidi geliza penge bolla eqqides.
Ezekiel40:4 Addezi tana
Ezekiel40:5 Tani Xoossa Keeththa mulera yuuyi aadhdhida dirsa gimbe be7adis. Addeza kushen usuppun wadha gidiza zange be7adis; issi issi wadha miishshay wadhanne tadhdhako gidees; izi gimbeza wadhdhides; aakoteththay issi wadha
Ezekiel40:6 Hessafe guye arshe kessa baggara diza dirsa pengeekko bides. Kechchata kezidi geliza pengeza madirake wadhdhides; izas geesay usuppun wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:7 Zabeta keeththas geesaynne gomppay usuppun usuppun wadha
Ezekiel40:8 Hessafe guye gelizasora kanththi biza daaranchchaa wadhdhides.
Ezekiel40:9 Izas adussateththay 8 wadha
Ezekiel40:10 Arshey mokkiza bagga pengezas hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara issi gina gidida heedzdzu heedzdzu zabe keeththati deettes; istta giddon shaakkiza gimbeta ordeteththay issi ginanne issi mala.
Ezekiel40:11 Hessafe guye pengeza gomppaa wadhdhides; iza gomppay tammu wadha
Ezekiel40:12 Zabe keeththatas issaas issaas sinththa baggara adussateththay issi wadha gimbe gidida dirsay dees; zabeta keeththaa gomppay issi gina gidida usuppun usuppun wadha.
Ezekiel40:13 Zabe keeththas guye bagga godaappe doommidi harayssa xeera gakkanaas diza geloso penge wadhdhides; issi godaappe biidi hankko godaa gakkanaas 25 wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:14 Gelizaso penge yuushon diza ke7i ke7i uttida gimbeta ubbaa sinththan dizasoza wadhdhiin 20 wadha gidides; wadhettidaykka zagozappe sinththa baggara diza simerettizaso daaranchcha gakkanaassa.
Ezekiel40:15 Geliza pengefe biidi simerettizasoza daaranchcha gakkanaas diza adussateththay 15 wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:16 Kifileti simerettizason diza daaranchchata mala hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara isttas guuththa maskooteti deettes. Yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza maskooteti geliza pengezappe sinththa baggara dizayta gidishin issi issi kifiles hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara godaa bolla zamba miththa misley giigetti uttides.
Ezekiel40:17 Hessafe guye addezi kare bagga zago tana efides; heen zagoza yuushon yochcha shuchchi yegetti uttida simerettizasohota be7adis; istta yuushonkka 30 kifileti deettes.
Ezekiel40:18 Shuchchi yegetti oosettida zagozi gimbaas ubba yuusho gakkees; kare zagozi giddo zagoppe ziqqees.
Ezekiel40:19 Heeppe duge baggara geliza penge sinththafe doommidi giddo zagoza penge gakkanaas dizasoza wadhdhides; arshey mokkiza baggara gidiin pudeha baggara diza adussateththay 100 wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:20 Hessafe guye pudeha bagga ginara diza gede kare zago kessiza pengeza adussateththinne aakoteth wadhdhides.
Ezekiel40:21 Koyro pengeza mala hayssika mille baggara diza heedzdzu heedzdzu zabe keeththatas
Ezekiel40:22 Maskooteti
Ezekiel40:23 Arshey mokkiza baggara dizayssaththo pudeha baggara diza penge gina gede giddo zago gelththiza pengey dees; issi pengezappe biidi hara penge gakkanaas dizayssa wadhdhides; hessika 100 wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:24 Hessafe simmidi he bitaney tana dugeha bagga dirsa penge kaaleththides; kaaleththiin baada
Ezekiel40:25 Likke harata mala
Ezekiel40:26 Hee gaththiza laappun dhekkati deettes. Daaranchchay dabaaba sinththan wurseththa baggara dees. Pengeza bolla he baggaranne ha baggara zamba misley medhetti uttides.
Ezekiel40:27 Giddo dabaabaska hara pengey dees. He bitaney ha nam7u dirsa pengetappe giddon dizasoho mizaanin 100 wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:28 He bitaney tana dugeha dirsa penge baggara heni giddo dabaabaakko efides. Izi dirsa penge meezaaniin hara pengetara likke gidides.
Ezekiel40:29 Hessas naagizayta kifileti
Ezekiel40:30 Iza yuushon daaranchchati deettes; istta zoonoy 25 wadha; aahoteththaykka 5 wadha.
Ezekiel40:31 He daaranchchati kare bagga dabaaba xeelleettes. Penge bolla he baggaranne ha baggara zamba misley medhetti uttides. Hee gaththiza 8 dhekkati deettes.
Ezekiel40:32 He bitaney tana arshe kessa bagga dirsa pengera heni giddo dabaabaakko efides. Izi he dirsa penge meezaaniin hara pengetara issi gina gidides.
Ezekiel40:33 Naagizayta kifileti
Ezekiel40:34 Daaranchchay kare bagga dabaaba xeellees. Penge bolla he baggaranne ha baggara zamba misley medhetti uttides. Hee gaththiza 8 dhekkati deettes.
Ezekiel40:35 He bitaney tana pudeha bagga dirsa pengeekko efides. Izi he dirsa penge meezaaniin
Ezekiel40:36 Naagizayta kifileti
Ezekiel40:37 Daaranchchay kare bagga dabaabaa xeellees. Penge bolla he baggaranne ha baggara zamba misley medhetti uttides. Hee gaththiza osppun dhekkati deettes.
Ezekiel40:38 Kare dabaabaas pudeha baggara
Ezekiel40:39 He daaranchchan ha baggara nam7u xaraphpheezati
Ezekiel40:40 Daaranchchaafe kare baggara pudeha dirsa penge matan nam7u xaraphpheezati ha baggara
Ezekiel40:41 Hessa gishshas yarshos shiiqida mehey istta bolla shukettiza mulera osppun xaraphpheezati deettes; isttafe oyddati daaranchchan deettes; oyddati qasse kare dabaaban deettes.
Ezekiel40:42 Qasse xuugettiza yarsho woththanaas giigsida
Ezekiel40:43 Oyddu biradhdhe aduqqiza kaqo hookkoti godaza bolla yuuyi aadhdhidi dhishketti uttida. Yarshos shiishshiza ashoy ubbay he xaraphpheezata bolla wodhdhees.
Ezekiel40:44 Hessafe guye he bitaney tana giddo dabaaba gelththides. Hessan pengeti giddo dabaabaakko doyettiza nam7u kifileti deettes. Isttafe issi kifiley pudeha dirsa penge matara dugeha bagga xeellees; nam7anththay qasse dugeha dirsa penge matara pudeha bagga xeellees.
Ezekiel40:45 He bitaney tana
Ezekiel40:46 Pudeha bagga xeelliza kifiley qasse yarshizason ooththiza qeesetayssa. Qeeseti ubbay Saadooqe zareppe yelettida Leweta; GODAAKKO shiiqidi ooththanaas besseettes geetettiday istta xalla» gides.
Ezekiel40:47 He bitaney dabaaba mizaaniin adussateththay 100 wadha
Ezekiel40:48 Hessafe guye izi tana Xoossa Keeththaa daaranchcha efides. Daaranchchaa gelizason diza qosilaththaa mizaanin dhoqqateththay 5 wadha; aahoteththaykka 14 wadha. Hadirsaranne ushachchara diza godata ordeteththay heedzdzu heedzdzu wadha gidides.
Ezekiel40:49 Daaranchcha adussateththay 20 wadha; aahoteththaykka 12 wadha. Hee gaththiza tammu dhekkati deettes. Gelizason ushachcharanne hadirsara eqqida nam7u tuuqeti deettes.
Ezekiel41:1 Hessafe simmidi he bitaney tana Xoossa Keeththan diza Geeshshasoho gelththides. He Geeshshasoho godaa ordeteththaa mizaanin usuppun wadha gidides.
Ezekiel41:2 Penge aahoteththazi qasse tammu wadha gidides. Hadirsaranne ushachchara diza godata aahoteththay ichchash ichchash wadha. Qasse izi Geeshshasoho wadhdhiin adussateththa 40 wadha
Ezekiel41:3 Hessafe guye qol7a gelides. Hee geliza penge godaa ordeteththaa wadhdhiin nam7u nam7u wadha gidides. Pengeza aahoteththay usuppun wadha gidides; hadirsaranne ushachchara diza godata aahoteththay laappun laappun wadha.
Ezekiel41:4 Qasse izi qol7a wadhdhides; adussateththay 20 wadha
Ezekiel41:5 He bitaney Xoossa Keeththa godaa wadhdhides; histtiin ordeteththay usuppun wadha gidides. He godazara oykettidi
Ezekiel41:6 He kifileti issoy issaa bolla keexettida heedzdzu pooqe gidishin issi issi pooqes heedzdzu tammu kifileti deettes. Zongalth yeggiza miththi Geeshshasohoza giddo gelontta mala
Ezekiel41:7 He keeththay garsa wurseththa pooqen ordida gishshassinne pude shiiqishe lee7iza gishshas
Ezekiel41:8 Tani Xoossa Keeththa yuushon dhoqqu gida baasay dizayssa beyadis. Iza yuushon diza kifileti he baasaa bollan keexettida; he baasay giddo dabaabaappe usuppun wadha dhoqqees.
Ezekiel41:9 He kifiletas kare bagga godaa ordeteththay ichchash wadha. Kifileta geliza nam7u pengeti

Ezekiel41:11 
Ezekiel41:12 Xoossa Keeththafe arshe geloso baggara diza mela soho ginara issi keeththay dees. He keeththas adussateththay uddufun tammu wadha; aahoteththaykka laappun tammu wadha. He keeththaa goday ichchash wadha orde.
Ezekiel41:13 He bitaney Xoossa Keeththaas kare bagga wadhdhides; histtiin adussateththay xeetu wadha. Xoossa Keeththa zokkosoppe biidi
Ezekiel41:14 Arshe kessa baggara diza Xoossa Keeththaa aahoteththay nam7u mela sohota gujjidi wadhdhiin xeetu wadha aakkees.
Ezekiel41:15 Nam7u baggarakka diza kanththiza sohota gujjidi arshey wulliza baggara diza keeththa adussateththaa wadhdhides; histtiin xeetu wadha gidides. Xoossa Keeththa Geeshsha sohoy
Ezekiel41:16 wuygeppe biidi maskooteta gakkanaas
Ezekiel41:17 Xoossa Keeththas soo bagga kifileta goday pengetappe bolla aadhdhana gakkanaas
Ezekiel41:18 
Ezekiel41:19 Issi baggara asa ayfeso misatizay zamba mislezaakko xeellees; qasse hara baggara gaammo ayfeso misatizay zamba mislezaakko xeellees.
Ezekiel41:20 Wuygeppe dendi biidi pengetappe bolla baggan dizasoho gakkanaas
Ezekiel41:21 Xoossa Keeththaa penge qosilaththati ubbay oyddu zooze gididi masettidayta; istti ubbayka issi gina.
Ezekiel41:22 Ubbaafe Aadhdhida Geeshshasoho gelizaso sinththan miththafe oosettida yarsho yarshizaso misatizay beettees. Izikka oyddu zooze gididi geesay heedzdzu wadha
Ezekiel41:23 Geeshsha Sohozas issi pengey dees; qasse Ubbaafe Aadhdhida Geeshsha zaissi pengey dees.
Ezekiel41:24 Issi issi penges giddon dakkotidi doyettiza nam7u sanqqati deettes.
Ezekiel41:25 Geeshshasoho godata bolla oosettida mala
Ezekiel41:26 He daaranchcha godata millen maskooteti deettes. Nam7u bagga godatikka zamba mislen alleqettida; hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara diza kifiletas dhekkaa baggara kammiza kaaray dees.
Ezekiel42:1 Hessafe guye he bitaney tana pudeha bagga pengera kare dabaaba kaaleththides; histtidi Xoossa Keeththa giddo dabaaba gimbera oykettida keeththaako tana ehides.
Ezekiel42:2 Ha keeththaa pengey pudeha bagga simmidi xeetu wadha adussinne ichchash tammu wadha aaho.
Ezekiel42:3 Giddo zagoppe nam7u tammu wadha haakkidi qasse sinththa baggara kare zagozan diza hiixettida shuchchaafe sinththa baggara issoy issaakko xeelliza heedzdzu deththi diza pooqey dees.
Ezekiel42:4 He kifileta pengeti pudeha bagga xeelleettes; isttafe sinththa baggara tammu wadha aahonne xeetu wadha adus gidida giddora aaththiza ogey dees.
Ezekiel42:5 He keeththas bolla heedzdzanththo pooqey nam7anththozappe xuummees; nam7anththay qasse koyroyssafe xuummees. Gaasoykka istti issoy issaafe guye shiiqi shiiqidi gimbettida gishshassa.
Ezekiel42:6 Qasse istti heedzdzu pooqe gidida gishshassanne kare dabaaban diza hara keeththata mala isttas tuussay baynda gishshassa; hessa gishshas bollara diza pooqe kifileti garsa baggan diza pooqe kifiletappe xuummeettes.
Ezekiel42:7 He kifiletappe sinththa baggara
Ezekiel42:8 Kare dabaabaa baggara diza kifileta adussateththay ichchash tammu wadha gidishin Xoossa Keeththaa sinththan diza kifileta adussateththay xeetu wadha gidees.

Daniel1:1 Kawo Iyo7aaqemey Yuhudan kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Baabiloone kawo Nabukadanaxoorey Yerusalaame dooddides.
Daniel1:2 GODAY Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aaqeme amarda Xoossa Keeththa miishshatara iza kushen aaththi immides; izikka ba xoossa keeththan woththana Sana7oore efides; izi di7i efida Xoossa Keeththa miishsha ubbaaka ba eeqa xoossata miishshe woththiza keeththan woththides.
Daniel1:3 Hessafe guye kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba oosanchchata halaqa Ashifenaazey kawoso asaappenne daannata zereththafe gidida Isra7eeleta ehana mala azazides.
Daniel1:4 He doorettidayti naateththinne kawo keeththan ooththanaas dandayza erateththi dizayta gidana mala
Daniel1:5 Istti maana kaththinne uyana woyne ushshi kawoza maaddafe gidana mala azazettides; histtidi heedzdzu layth tamaari eridaappe guye istti kawoza sinth shiiqidi kawo keeththan ooththana mala yo7oy qashettides.
Daniel1:6 He doorettidayta giddofe Yuhuda qommofe Daaneeli
Daniel1:7 Kawoza shuumeta halaqay istta sunththaa laammidi Daaneela Bilxxasoore
Daniel1:8 Daaneeli kawoza maaddafe miidinne woyne ushsha uyidi bana tunisontta mala qofa qachchides; histtidi hessa he qofaza ero gi ekkana mala Ashifenaaze woossides.
Daniel1:9 Xoossi Daaneelas shuumeza sinththan teema immidi qadhettana mala ooththides.
Daniel1:10 Gido attiin Ashifenaazey kawozas babbida gishshas Daaneelas
Daniel1:11 Hessafe guye Daaneela
Daniel1:12 «Nuni atakilte mishenne haath uyishe gam7ana mala ne nuna ne oosanchchata ane tammu gallas gakkanaas paacca beya.
Daniel1:13 Hessafe guye nuna hankko kawoza maaddafe miza naateththatara gaththa paacca xeellada ne dosidaaz nu bolla ooththa» gides.
Daniel1:14 Istta naagizayssika he qofaza ekkidi tammu gallas gakkanaas istta paaccides.
Daniel1:15 He tammu gallassay wuridaappe guye kawoza maaddafe miza naateththa ubbaafe aadhdhidi istta asateththay lo7idinne ordidi beettides.
Daniel1:16 He gallassafe doommidi istta naagizayssi kawo maaddafe isttas yiza lo7o qumanne woyne ushsha aggidi atakilte imo oykkides.
Daniel1:17 Xoossika he oyddu naateththatas aadho erateth
Daniel1:18 Kase kawozi woththida heedzdzu layththay gakkiin Ashfenaazey he naateththata ubbaa ekki efidi Nabukadanaxoore sinth shiishshides.
Daniel1:19 Kawozikka istta ubbaa haasayssida wode istta giddofe Daaneelara
Daniel1:20 Kawozi oychchida ay aadho erateththaninne akeekan izi ayssiza deren diza marotappe
Daniel1:21 Daaneelikka Paarise kawo Qiroosi kawotida koyro layth gakkanaas kawoteththa garsan ooththishe gam7ides.
Daniel2:1 Nabukadanaxoorey kawotida nam7anththo layththan agumo agumettides; he agumoza gaason keehi ceeciin dhiskoy izas dhaydes.
Daniel2:2 Hessa gishshas izakko yiidi he iza agumoza birsheth izas yootana mala maroti
Daniel2:3 Kawozi isttas
Daniel2:4 Xoolintte taybiza eranchchati kawozas
Daniel2:5 Kawozikka isttas
Daniel2:6 Gido attiin intte ta agumozanne iza birsheththaa gaththi taas yootikko ta inttes imota
Daniel2:7 Isttika zaaridi
Daniel2:8 Kawozi hessa siyida mala
Daniel2:9 Intte taas agumoza yootanaas dandayontta aggiko inttes ubbatasikka issi mala qixaatey giigetti uttides; yo7oti inttes laamettana misatiin wordonne gene qaala haasayan coo mela wode wursanaas koyideta; koyrottidi agumoza intte taas yootikko iza birsheththi inttena waayisonttayssa ta erays» gides.
Daniel2:10 Xoolintte taybiza eranchchati izas
Daniel2:11 Kawoo! Neni oychchiza oyshay keehi deexo gidida gishshas asara issife dontta xoossatappe attiin asi nees qonccisanaas dandayenna» gi zaarida.
Daniel2:12 Hessi kawoza yiillochchidessinne hanqeththides; hessa gishshas Baabiloonen diza aadho eranchchati wurikka hayqqana mala azazides.
Daniel2:13 Aadho eranchchati hayqqana mala awajjay kezides; Daaneelanne iza laggeta koyidi wodhana mala asi kiitettides.
Daniel2:14 Kawos zabeta halaqa Aryookey Baabiloonen diza aadho eranchchata wodhanaas yida wode Daaneeli izakko shiiqidi hiillaninne mal7o qaalan iza haasayssides.
Daniel2:15 Daaneeli kawo shuumeza
Daniel2:16 Daaneeli he wode kawozaakko gelidi agumoza birshanaas guuththa wodey izas imettana mala woossides.
Daniel2:17 Hessafe guye Daaneeli baso simmi biidi he hanida yo7oza ba laggetas Hanaaniyas
Daniel2:18 Izinne iza laggeti hankko attida Baabiloone eranchchatara issife hayqqontta mala
Daniel2:19 He xuura yo7oy Daaneelas omarsi ajjuutan qonccides; hessa gishshas izi salo Xoossa galatides.
Daniel2:20 Daaneeli
Daniel2:21 Izi wodetanne aginatakka laammees; Kawota araatan utisees; kawoteththa araataappeka duge woththees; eranchchatas aadho erateth akeekizaytasikka erateth immees.
Daniel2:22 Izi ciimma gidida xuura yo7otanne geemmidayta qonccisees; ubba wode iza matan poo7oy dees; hessa gishshas izi dhuman dizaaz erees.
Daniel2:23 Kase ta aawata Godawu! Ta nena galatays; ta nena bonchchays; ne taas aadho erateththinne wolqqa immadasa; nu woosaakka siyadasa; kawoza agumozakka nuus qonccisadasa» gi galatides.
Daniel2:24 Hessafe guye Daaneeli Baabiloone eranchchata wodhana mala kawozappe azazoy izas imettida Aryookekko biidi
Daniel2:25 Aryookey heerakka Daaneela gede kawo Nabukedenaxoore sinththi shiishshidi
Daniel2:26 Kawozikka Bilxxasoore geetettida Daaneela
Daniel2:27 Daaneelikka izas
Daniel2:28 Gido attiin xuura yo7o ubbaa qonccisiza Xoossi salon dees; izi buro sinththafe yaana layththatan hananayssa ubbaa nees qonccisides; neni ne hiiththan ichcha dashe be7ida agumoynne ajjuutay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Daniel2:29 «Kawoo! Neni ne hiiththan ichcha dashe sinththafe hanana yo7ota qoppadasa; he wode xuura qonccisiza Xoossay buro sinththafe hanana yo7ota nena bessides.
Daniel2:30 Hayssi ha xuura yo7ozi taas qoncciday tani hankko asaappe aadho eranchcha gidida gishshas gidenna; gido attiin neni he agumoza birsheth erana malanne ne wozina giddon simerettiza qofa shaakka eranaassa.
Daniel2:31 «Kawoo! Ne sinththan keehi gita xolqizanne babisiza misley eqqidayssa be7adasa.
Daniel2:32 He misleza hu7ey geeshsha worqqafe
Daniel2:33 iza suuletikka biratappe
Daniel2:34 Neni misleza xeellishin gita shuchchi asi bochchontta ba dizasoppe dhoqallettidi birappenne mana urqqafe oosettida misleza tohota menththereththi liiqisides.
Daniel2:35 Heerakka biratazi
Daniel2:36 «Hekko agumozi hayssa; iza birsheththayka hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Daniel2:37 Kawoo! Neni kawotas kawo; salo Xoossi nees kawoteththi
Daniel2:38 Izi neni biitta ubbaa haarana mala ooththides; izi nees asaa
Daniel2:39 «Neeppe guye neeppe simmiza kawoy dendana; izappeka kaallidi xarqimalan leemisettida heedzdzanththo kawoy dendana; izikka kumeththa alame haarana.
Daniel2:40 Qasseka beettida miish ubbaa menththereththi yeggiza birata mala mino gidida oydanththo kawoy kawotana; biratay ubbaa menththereththi liiqisiza mala izi baappe kase kawotida kawota menththereththi yeggana.
Daniel2:41 Iza tohotinne iza toho biradhdheti baggay biratappe baggay mana urqqafe gididayssa ne be7ida mala he kawoteththay nam7u kezi shaakettida kawoteth gidana; birataynne urqqay walakettidayssa ne be7ida mala he kawoteththaafe baggay birata mala mino gidana.
Daniel2:42 Iza tohota biradhdhetappe baggay birata
Daniel2:43 Birataynne mana urqqay walakettidayssa mala asay ubbay walaka gidana; gido attiin biratay mana urqqara oykettonttayssaththo isttika ba giddon issino gidi oyketettenna.
Daniel2:44 «Heyta he kawota woden salo Xoossay mulerakka laalettonttanne hara deres aadhdhi imettontta kawoteth essana; he kawoteththazi hara kawoteththata mulera liiqisana; istta wurseth gakkanawukka dhayssana; he kawoteththazi ba hu7es mernaas minni daana.
Daniel2:45 Asi bochchontta dishin zuma bollafe dhoqallettidi biratappe
Daniel2:46 Hessafe guye kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba hu7e duge biitta gaththidi Daaneelas ziggides; izakka bonchchides; izas yarshonne exaane shiishshana mala azazides.
Daniel2:47 Kawozi Daaneela
Daniel2:48 Hessafe guye Kawozi Daaneela gita bonchchoson woththides; keehi daro imotata izas immides; Baabiloone kawoteththa ubbaa ayssizaade histtides; Baabiloone eranchchata ubbaa bolla halaqa histti shuumides.
Daniel2:49 Hessafekka bollara Daaneeli kawoza qofsiin kawozi Sidiraaqa
Daniel3:1 Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey geesay 60 wadha
Daniel3:2 He izi essida misleza anjjisanaas gita asata
Daniel3:3 Heyti dere ayssizayti wurikka he misleza anjjisanaas issife shiiqidi he misleza sinththan eqqida.
Daniel3:4 He wode awajja awajjiza issaadey ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Daniel3:5 Zayenne dinke giiris
Daniel3:6 Biittan gufannidi goynnonttay oonikka diikko laciza itoone taman yegettana» gi awajjides.
Daniel3:7 Hessa gishshas dumma dumma dereppe
Daniel3:8 He wode xoolintte pilggiza issi issi Baabiloone eranchchati shiiqidi Ayhudata mootida.
Daniel3:9 Kawo Nabukadanaxooreskka
Daniel3:10 Kawoo! Neni
Daniel3:11 Biittan gufannidi mislezas goynnonttaadey diikko laciza itoone taman yegetto› ga awajjadasa.
Daniel3:12 Hekko neni Baabiloone awuraajjata ayssana mala shuumida Sidiraaqi
Daniel3:13 Kawozi hessa siyidi keehi hanqettidi Sidiraaqa
Daniel3:14 Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey
Daniel3:15 Ha7ikka zaye
Daniel3:16 Sidiraaqi
Daniel3:17 Kawoo! Nuni hayssa laciza itoone taman yegettizaa gidikkoka nuni izas goynniza Xoossay hayssa laciza itoone tamappenne ne kusheppe izi nuna ashshana dandayees.
Daniel3:18 Gido attiin kawoo! Izi nuna ashshontta aggikokka nuni ne eeqa xoossatas haggazonttayssanne ne essida worqqa mislezas nu goynnonttayssa ne era» gi zaarida.
Daniel3:19 He wode Nabukadanaxoorey Sidiraaqa bolla
Daniel3:20 He heedzdzu asata qachchidi laciza itoone taman yeggana mala ba ola asaa giddofe amarda mino asata azazides.
Daniel3:21 Hessa gishshas istti seelo may7oza
Daniel3:22 Kawozi immida mino azazoza itoone tamazi keehi eexxiza gishshas Sidiraaqa
Daniel3:23 He heedzdzu asati gidikko istti minththi qachchiin laciza itoone taman yegettida.
Daniel3:24 Hessafe guye kawo Nabukadanaxoorey ba uttidasohoppe malalettishe dendi eqqidi
Daniel3:25 Kawozikka
Daniel3:26 Hessa gishshas Nabukadanaxoorey he eexxiza itoone tamakko shiiqi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Daniel3:27 Hessafe guye gita asati
Daniel3:28 Hessafe guye tani kawo Nabukadanaxoorey
Daniel3:29 «Hayssa mala ashshiza hara Xoossi deenna; hessa gishshas dumma dumma derey
Daniel3:30 Hessafe guye kawozi Sidiraaqa
Daniel4:1 Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey alame bolla dumma dumma deretas
Daniel4:2 Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay taas ooththida gitanne malalisiza oosota ta inttes yootanaas koyays.
Daniel4:3 Xoossi bessiza malatay ay mala gitaa! malalisiza iza oosoti ay mala minoo! Xoossi mernaas kawo; iza kawoteththay yeletappe yeleta gakkanaas de7ees.
Daniel4:4 Tani Nabukadanaxoorey ta keeththan taas injjen ta kawoteththankka ishalon days.
Daniel4:5 Gido attiin gallassatappe issi gallas tani ta hiiththan ichcha dashe daro daganththiza agumonne ajjuuta beyadis.
Daniel4:6 Hessa gishshas he agumoza birsheth taas yootana mala Baabiloonen diza eranchchati wuri taakko yaana mala azazadis.
Daniel4:7 Bitizayti
Daniel4:8 Hessafe guye ta Xoossa sunththan Bilxxasoore geetetti xeygettizayssinne geeshsha xoossata ayanay izan diza Daaneeli gelidi ta sinththan eqqiin ta agumoza izas yootadis.
Daniel4:9 Tanikka
Daniel4:10 «Tani ta hiiththan ichcha dashe issi wogga gita miththi dayssi biitta bolla eqqidayssa ajjuutan beyadis.
Daniel4:11 Hessi he miththazi keehi diccides; minnides; iza xeeraykka salo gakkides; sa7a gaxa gakkanaas beettides.
Daniel4:12 Iza hayththay cilila; iza ayfey dere ubbaas gidana gakkanaas darides; iza kuway do7atas shempizaso gidides; salo kafotikka iza haggata bolla ba keeththa keexxidi izan deettes; shemppora diza medheteththati wurikka he miththaza ayfe meettes.
Daniel4:13 «Tani ta hiiththan ichcha dashe ajjuutan issi geeshsha kiitanchchay saloppe duge wodhdhishin be7adis.
Daniel4:14 Izikka ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Daniel4:15 Gido attiin iza durumazanne xaphoza biratappenne xarqimalappe oosettida sansalatan yuushshi qachchidi heen demban maata giddon biitta garsan aggaagite; Izi saloppe wodhdhiza kenchchon muso! Izi do7atara tusha giddon de7o.
Daniel4:16 Iza kahay asayssafe laametto; laappun layththi gakkanaas izas mehe kahay imetto.
Daniel4:17 « ‹Ha pirda qashoy geeshsha kiitanchchata baggara qoncci yootettides; hessika Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossas sa7a kawota bolla izas godateththi dizayssanne kawoteththatakka ba dosidaades immizayssa
Daniel4:18 «Tani kawo Nabukadanaxoorey be7ida agumoy hayssa; Bilxxasoore! Neni taas agumoza birsha; ta kawoteththan diza eranchchati birsheththaa taas yootanaas dandaybeettenna; ne gidikko geeshsha xoossata ayanay nenan diza gishshas taas birsheththaa yootana dandayaasa» gides.
Daniel4:19 He wode Bilxxasoore geetettiza Daaneeli keehi dagammidi hanizaaz dhaydes; ba qofan guuththa wodes ceecides; kawozikka iza
Daniel4:20 Keehi dicci minniin ne be7ida miththazi xeeraykka izas salo gakkiin biitta ubbaan beettiza miththazi
Daniel4:21 iza hayththati cililiday
Daniel4:22 «Kawoo! He miththay nena; ne gitateththay diccidi salo gakkides; ne kawoteththayka biitta gaxa gakkides.
Daniel4:23 «Kawozoo! Ne be7ida geeshsha kiitanchchay saloppe wodhdhidi
Daniel4:24 «Kawoo! Hekko birsheththay hayssa; Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay ta goda kawoza bolla polettana mala kessida awajjay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Daniel4:25 Neni ne derezappe shaakettada goodettana; nees duussasoyka wora do7atara gidana; laappun layththi polettana gakkanaas neni mehe mala maata maana; neni kenchchon musana; hessi wuri nena gakkanay Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kawota ubbaa bolla izas godateththi dizayssanne izi kawoteththa wursika ba dosidaades immizayssa ne shaakka erana gakkanaassa.
Daniel4:26 Durumazi xaphozara heen gade giddon attana mala izi azaziday Xoossas alame bolla kumeththa maatay dizayssa ne erada neni simma ne kawoteththan uttanayssa bessees.
Daniel4:27 Hessa gishshas kawoo! Tani ta baggara nena zorizayssa siya; neni nagara ooso agga; suure ooso ubba wode ooththa; ne iita ooso aggada qohettizaytas qadhetta; hessaththo ne ooththiko ne saron duussa layththay aduqqontta aggenna» gides.
Daniel4:28 Hessi wurikka kawo Nabukadanaxoore bolla gakkides.
Daniel4:29 Tammanne nam7u aginappe guye izi Baabiloonen kawoteththa keeththa pooqe bolla simerettishe
Daniel4:30 «Ta mino wolqqan ta bonchchos kawos duussaso gidana mala ta oosisida gita Baabiloone katamaya hanno gidekkee?» gides.
Daniel4:31 Izi buro haasaya ba doonappe kessi wursontta dishin saloppe
Daniel4:32 Neni dereza garsafe goodettana; nees duussasoy wora do7atara gidana; laappun layththi kumana gakkanaas neni mehe mala maata maana; hessika hananay Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kawota ubbaa bolla izas godateththi dizayssanne kawoteththi wursika izi ba dosidaades immizayssa ne shaakka erana gakkanaassa» giza qaalay yides.
Daniel4:33 He qaalay heerakka kawo Nabukadanaxoore bolla polettides; hessa gishshas izi dereza garsafe goodettides; mehe mala maata mides; saloppe wodhdhiza kenchchon izi musides; iza binanaykka golle kafo baalle mala diccides; iza xugunththika kafo xugunththa mala gidides.
Daniel4:34 Kawo Nabukadanaxoorey
Daniel4:35 Biitta bolla diza dereti wurikka iza achchan qeeri uu7e mala; salon diza oosanchchata bollanne biitta bolla diza deraa bolla izi ba dosidaaz ooththees; iza shene digganaas dandayzaynne ‹Ne hayssa aazas ooththay?› gaanay oonikka deenna.
Daniel4:36 «Ta wozina kahay taakko simmiin heerakka ta kawoteththas bonchchoy
Daniel4:37 «Hekko be7ite! Tani Nabukadanaxoorey salo kawos galata
Daniel5:1 Gallassatappe issi gallas kawo Belishaxoorey shiyan qoodettiza gita shuumetas keehi gita gibira giigsides; izi asaara woyne ushshu uyishe qamisides.
Daniel5:2 Asay woyne ushsha uyishin Belishaxoorey kase iza aawa Nabukadanaxoorey Yerusalaamen diza Xoossa Keeththafe bonqqi ekkida worqqafenne birappe oosettida xuu7ata ehana mala ba oosanchchata azazides; kawozi hessa ooththiday izinne iza shuumeti
Daniel5:3 Iza oosanchchatikka he Yerusalaameppe Xoossa Keeththafe bida worqqafenne birappe oosettida xuu7ata heerakka ehida; kawozinne iza shuumeti
Daniel5:4 Ushsha uyishe worqqafe
Daniel5:5 Qoppontta dishin asa kushe biradhdheti beettidi Xoossa Keeththan xomppe woththizasoppe sinththa baggara meeshetti diza kawo keeththan godaa bolla xaafo oykkida; he biradhdheti xaafishin kawozi be7ides.
Daniel5:6 He wode kawozi keehi dagammides; iza ayfesoy laamettides; iza kushetinne tohoti doccida; iza gaadey kokkorides.
Daniel5:7 Kawozi saggata
Daniel5:8 Aadho eranchchati kawozaakko shiiqida shin he xaafettidayssa nababanaassinne iza birsheththaa kawoza erisanaas dandayday oonikka istta giddofe beetibeenna.
Daniel5:9 Kawo Belishaxoorey kaseppe keehi babbida gishshas iza ayfesoy laametti laametti bides; iza shuumetas hanizaazi dhayiin dagammida.
Daniel5:10 Godatteya kawoza cengurssinne shuumeta qaala siyada gibiray izan diza keeth gelada
Daniel5:11 Geeshsha xoossata ayanara diza issaadey ne kawoteththa giddon dees; hessaadeyka kase ne aaway kawoteththan dishin izas xoossata mala aadho erateththi
Daniel5:12 Izi agumonne maaleththo birshanaasi
Daniel5:13 He wode heerakka Daaneela kawoza sinth shiishshida; kawozikka iza
Daniel5:14 Ne bolla geeshsha xoossata ayanay dizayssanne nees erateththi
Daniel5:15 Aadho eranchchatinne saggati ubbay hayssa xaafettidayssa nababidi birshana mala ta sinththi shiiqida; istti gidikko iza birsheththaa tana erisanaas dandaybeettenna.
Daniel5:16 Neni gidikko xuura yo7ota birshanaassinne waayisiza miishshata wursa qonccisanaas dandayzayssa ta siyadis; hessa gishshas neni hayssa xaafettidayssa nababada taas birsha yootikko istti nena ochcha teera misatiza seelo may7o mayzana; worqqafe oosettida mogga ne qoodhen aaththana; ta kawoteththankka heedzdzanththo maaran ta nena shuumana» gides.
Daniel5:17 Daaneelikka izas
Daniel5:18 «Kawoo! Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kase ne aawa Nabukadanaxoores kawoteththinne gitateth
Daniel5:19 Izi immida gitateththaafenne maataappe dendidayssan dumma dumma dereti
Daniel5:20 Gido attiin izi otorettida wodenne iza wozinay muumida wode
Daniel5:21 Izikka dere giddofe goodettides; iza kahaykka laamettidi izas mehe kahay imettides; izi mehe mala maata mishe izi hardidatara de7ides; aqizasoy dhayiin iza bollay xaazan musides; hessi hessaththo haniday Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay kawoteththa ubbaa bolla Godaa gididayssanne kawoteth ubbaa ba koyida asas immanaas dandayzayssa izi erana gakkanaassa.
Daniel5:22 «Belishaxoore! Neni iza naa gida uttada hessa ubbaa erashe neni nena ziqqi histtabeekka.
Daniel5:23 Hessafe bollarakka Salo Godaa bolla ne otorettada nerkka nena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtadasa; Xoossa Keeththafe di7etti yida worqqafenne birappe oosettida miishshata neni ehisada
Daniel5:24 Hessa gishshas izi xaafeza xaafida kusheza yeddides.
Daniel5:25 «Xaafettidayssika
Daniel5:26 Hessa birsheththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Manee! Guussi
Daniel5:27 Teqeele! Guussi
Daniel5:28 Faaris! Guussi
Daniel5:29 Hessafe guye Belishaxoore azazon heerakka Daaneela ochcha teera misatiza seelo may7o mayzida; worqqafe oosettida mogga iza qoodhen aaththida; iza kawoteththan heedzdzanththo maaran shuumida.
Daniel5:30 He gallassa omars Baabiloone kawo Belishaxoorey asa kushen hayqqides.
Daniel5:31 He wode izas layththay 62 gidida Meedoone dere as Daariyoosi kawoteththa oykkides.
Daniel6:1 Kawo Daariyoosi ba kawoteththa ubbaa giddon baappe garsara biittaa haariza 120 daannata shuumanaas koyides.
Daniel6:2 Qasse kawozas aykkoyka paccontta mala
Daniel6:3 Daaneeli hankko dere ayssizaytappenne daannatappe aadho erateththan kumidaade gidi beettida gishshas kawozi iza ba kawoteththaa bolla shuumanaas qoppides.
Daniel6:4 Hessafe guye hankko dereza ayssizaytinne daannati Daaneeli ooththiza kawo oosoza bolla kasase demmidi mootana koyida; gido attiin Daaneeli keehi bana naagizaade
Daniel6:5 Hessa gishshas istti ba garsan
Daniel6:6 Hessafe guye dere ayssizaytinne daannati issi bolla kawozaakko biidi
Daniel6:7 Nuni ne kawoteththa garsan deraa ayssanaas uttidayti kawoteththan dhoqqa shuumeti
Daniel6:8 Hessa gishshas kawoo! Hayssi awajjazi Meedoonenne paarise woga mala laamettontta mino gidana mala neni iza bolla ne pirima woththa» gida.
Daniel6:9 Hessa gishshas Kawo Daariyoosi awajjoza xaafi paramidi kessides.
Daniel6:10 Daaneeli awajjazi paramettidi kezidayssa erida mala baso bides; pooqe bolla maskootey Yerusalaame bagga simmidi doyetti diza kifilezan kase woossizayssaththo gallas gallas heedzdzuto gulbatidi woossides; ba Xoossaaka galatides.
Daniel6:11 Heyti zuppetida asati issife biidi Daaneeli ba Xoossa woossishin demmida.
Daniel6:12 Ubbayka issife kawozaakko biidi
Daniel6:13 Isttika
Daniel6:14 Kawozikka hessa siyidi keehi ceecides; Daaneela ashshanaas qofa qachchides; arshey wullana gakkanaas iza ashshana oge medhdhanaas dafettides.
Daniel6:15 Asatikka issife kawozaakko biidi «Kawoo! Meedoonenne paarise wogan issi kawoy ba awajjida awajja woykko ba azazida azazo laammanaas dandayonttayssa ne era!» gida.
Daniel6:16 Hessa gishshas Daaneeli oyketti yiidi gaammota ollan yegettana mala kawozi azazides. Kawozikka Daaneela
Daniel6:17 Ollaza doona shuchchara gordidi Daaneela bolla oosettoyssi laamettontta mala kawozi ba midiga maatameninne shuumeta midiga maatamen shocides.
Daniel6:18 Hessafe guye Kawozi gede baso kawo keeth simmides; kawokka mibeenna; iza ufayssiza miishshi izakko shiiqontta mala ixxidi dhiskoy baynda aqides.
Daniel6:19 Maalado wonttara buro bazzoy zo7ishin kawozi dendidi eeson gaammota ollaako bides.
Daniel6:20 Izi hee gakkida mala ceecishe
Daniel6:21 Daaneelikka izas
Daniel6:22 Gaammoti tana qohontta mala Xoossi ba kiitanchcha taakko kiittidi istta doona gordides; izi hessaththo ooththiday tani iza achchan xillonne nenakka tani qohonttayssa izi eriza gishshassa» gi zaarides.
Daniel6:23 Kawozi keehi ufayettides; Daaneelakka gaammo olla giddofe kessana mala azazides. Daaneeli ba Xoossan ammanettida gishshas izi ollafe kezida wode iza bolla issi qohoykka gakkibeenna.
Daniel6:24 Hessafe guye kase Daaneela wordora mootida asati ba machchetara
Daniel6:25 Hessafe guye kawo Daariyoosi alame bolla diza deraas
Daniel6:26 Ta kawoteththan diza derey wurikka Daaneela Xoossas yayyana malanne iza bonchchana mala tani awajja kessadis; izi mernaas de7iza De7o Xoossa; iza kawoteththi dhayontta kawoteththa; iza kawoteththaskka wurseththi deenna.
Daniel6:27 Izi ashsheessinne maaddees; Izi saloninne sa7an malaatatanne malalisiza miishshata ooththees; izi Daaneela gaammota doonappe ashshides» gides.
Daniel6:28 Hessa gishshas Daaneeli kawo Daariyoosa kawoteththa wodeninne Paarise dere as Qiroosa kawoteththa layth ubbaan izas de7oy injjetides.
Daniel7:1 Baabiloone kawo Belishaxoorey kawotida koyro layth Daaneeli ba algan ichchi dishe agumonne ajjuuta be7ides; hessafe guye ba be7ida agumoza xaafides.
Daniel7:2 Daaneeli
Daniel7:3 Dumma dumma qommo wogga gita oyddu do7ati abbaafe kezida.
Daniel7:4 «Koyro do7azi gaammo misatees; izas golle qefe mala qefeti deettes; tanikka xeelon dishin he qefeti shodetti shodetti wodhdhida; he do7azi dhoqqu giidi asa mala nam7u tohotan eqqides; izas asa wozinay imettides.
Daniel7:5 «Nam7anththo do7azi zardo do7a misatees; izi issi millen dhoqqu gi eqqides; izi ba achchan heedzdzu mille meqeththata saxxi oykkides; ‹Ne koyida keena asho ma› giza qaalay izas yootettides.
Daniel7:6 «Tani hessa xeelon dishin maahe misatiza hara do7ay kezides; izas kafo qefe misatiza oyddu qefeti zokko bolla deettes. Oyddu hu7eti izas deettes; godateththika izas imettides.
Daniel7:7 «Hessafe guye oydanththo do7aza ta beyadis; izikka keehi babisiza
Daniel7:8 «Tani kaceta gishshas qofan dishin kaceta giddora hara issi guuththa kacey kezides. Koyro kacetappe heedzdzati shodetti wodhdhida; he guuththa kacezas asa ayfeynne otoreteththan haasayza doonay dees.
Daniel7:9 «Ta xeelon dishin araatati micettida; beni beniisofe dizayssi iza bolla uttides; iza may7oy shachcha mala booththa; iza binanaykka puutto mala booththa; iza araatay tama laco
Daniel7:10 Iza sinththara tama haaththi pultti goggees; izas daro shiyan qoodettiza oosanchchati deettes; qooday baynda derey iza sinththan eqqides; pirda shilotaykka uttides; maxaafatikka doyettida.
Daniel7:11 «Tani he kacezi haasayza otoro qaalappe dendidayssan ta izakko gujja gujja xeelladis; he do7azi oykettidi shukettana gakkanaassinne iza ashoy siifalettidi gede laciza taman olettana gakkanaas tani xeelo aggabeekke.
Daniel7:12 Hankko attida do7ata godateththi isttafe ekettides; gido attiin guuththa wodes istti shemppora paxa de7ana mala piqaadey imettides.
Daniel7:13 «Asa naa misatizaadey salo shaaray iza giddoththi oykkiin yizayssa omars ajjuutan beyadis; iza gede beni beniisofe dizayssako shiishshida.
Daniel7:14 Alame bolla diza as ubbay
Daniel7:15 «Tani Daaneeli hayssa ta be7ida ajjuutan keeha metotadis; ta shemppoyakka ceecadus.
Daniel7:16 Taas heen gadaan eqqidaytappe issaakko shiiqada hayssa ubbaa tumu birsheththi aazakko oychchadis; izikka taas hessa ubbaa birsheth yootides.
Daniel7:17 Izikka taas
Daniel7:18 Gido attiin Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa geeshshati iza kawoteththa baas ekkana; mernaas oykkana; ee mernaas istti oykkana› gides.
Daniel7:19 «Hessafe guye tani hankko do7ata ubbaafe dummatidi yashissiza oydanththo do7aasi diza tumu birsheththaa eranaas koyadis. He do7aas birata achchinne xarqimala xugunththi dees; izi banara gayttida ubbaa menththereththi mees; mishin attoyssa ba tohon yedhdherettees.
Daniel7:20 Qasseka he do7aza hu7en diza tammu kaceta gishshas
Daniel7:21 Be7ite ta xeellishin hayssi ha kacezi geeshshata bolla ola awajjidi istta xoonides.
Daniel7:22 Hessika haniday beni beniisofe dizayssi yaana gakkanaassinne Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossay geeshshatas tuma pirda pirdana gakkanaassa. Geeshshati iza kawoteththa laattiza wodey gakkides.
Daniel7:23 «Izikka taas hessa birsheththaa
Daniel7:24 Tammu kaceti he kawoteththa giddofe kezana tammu kawota; hessafe guye kase kawotappe hara dumma kawoy dendidi he tammu kawotappe heedzdzata shiri yeggana.
Daniel7:25 Izi Ubbaafe Dhoqqa Xoossaa bolla makkalla qaala haasayana; iza geeshshata izi waayisana; iza bonchcho ba7aaletanne iza woga laammanaas izi dafettana; geeshshati heedzdzu layththinne bagga gakkanaas iza godateththa garsan de7ana.
Daniel7:26 « ‹Hessafe guye pirda araatay micettana; iza kawoteththay izappe qaaretti ekettiin izi mernaas mulera dhayana.
Daniel7:27 Saloppe garsara de7iza kawoteththa ubbaa maatay
Daniel7:28 «Ta ajjuuta birsheththi hayssan polettees; tani Daaneeli ta qofan keeha ceecadis; ta ayfesoy laamettides; gido attiin tani hayssa wursaka ta wozinan qum7a oykkadis» gides.
Daniel8:1 Belishaxoorey kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan tani Daaneeli hayssafe kase be7idayssafe hara ajjuuta beyadis.
Daniel8:2 Elaama awuraajjan Suusa gimbe matan ajjuutan tana beyadis; ajjuutazan tani Ulaye shaafa achchan days.
Daniel8:3 Tani dhoqqu histta xeellashe he shaafaza achchan nam7u gita kaceti diza issi dharshoy eqqidayssa beyadis; kaceti adussa; he kacetappe issoy aduqqi ekkees; gido attiin izi mokkiday guyeppe.
Daniel8:4 He dharshozi ba kacen arshey wulliza bagga
Daniel8:5 Tani hessa he ajjuutaza gishshas yuushsha qoppishin iza ayfetappe giddon gita kacey diza deysha orgey tohon gade yedhdhontta dishe biitta kanththidi qoppontta arshey wulliza baggafe yides.
Daniel8:6 Kase shaafa achchan eqqi dishin ta be7ida nam7u kacera diza dharshozakko hanqora diidimi yiidi iccides.
Daniel8:7 Izi dharshozakko shiiqishin ta beyadis; izi dharshoza hanqon iccidi dharshoza kaceta nam7ata menththereththi yeggides; dharshozikka izara eqettanaas wolqqa dhaydes; hessa gishshas orgezi dharshoza duge biitta bolla yeggidi iza ba tohon yedhdhi eqqides; dharshoza deyshaafe ashshana dandayzay beettibeenna.
Daniel8:8 Deyshsha orgezi keehi minni minni wolqqati bides; gido attiin izi ba wolqqan minni minni bida wode izas gita kacezi meqqi wodhdhides; he kacezasohozan hara oyddu gita kaceti mokkida; istti ubbayka salo carko oyddata bagga simmi diccida.
Daniel8:9 Hayta oyddu kacetappe issaa bolla hara guuththa kacey mokkides; he guuththa kaceza wolqqay dugeha bagganne arshey mokkiza bagga gede lo7o dereykko keehi dicci dicci bides.
Daniel8:10 Pude salo medheteththataakko gakkanaas dhoqqu gides; salo xoolinttetappe amardayta duge biitta bolla yeggidi istta bolla durettides.
Daniel8:11 Salon diza medheteththata halaqara ginattana koyidi bana dhoqqu doqqu histtides; gallas gallas shiiqiza yarshozi izas shiiqontta mala diggides; Xoossa Keeththaaka tunisides.
Daniel8:12 Makkallateththa gaason geeshshata olanchchatinne gallas gallas shiiqiza yarshozi izas imettides; izi ooththiza miishshi wurikka izas giigi giigi bides; tumaykka duge sa7an olettides.
Daniel8:13 Hessafe guye geeshshatappe issoy haasayshin ta siyadis; qasse geeshshatappe haray issoy izas
Daniel8:14 He oyshettida geeshshayka
Daniel8:15 Tani Daaneeli hayssa ajjuutaza xeellishininne yuushsha qoppishin ase misatizay ta sinththan eqqides.
Daniel8:16 Ulaye shaafappe he pinththan
Daniel8:17 Gabreeley ta eqqa dizaso mati mati yishin ta dagammada sinththa guth gufannadis; izikka
Daniel8:18 Izi hessa yootishin tani biitta bolla sinththa guth gufannadis; keeha dhisko seeradis; izi gidikko tana kaafidi pude denththi ta tohon essides.
Daniel8:19 Izi tana
Daniel8:20 Ne be7ida nam7u kacera diza dharshozi Meedoonenne Paarise kawoteththata bessees.
Daniel8:21 Deyshsha orgezi Girike kawoteththa bessees; iza ayfeta giddon diza gita kacezi koyro kawoza bessees.
Daniel8:22 Meqqidasozan mokkida oyddu kaceti he kawoteththay oyddu kezanayssa besseettes; gido attiin koyro kawoteththa mala mino gidonttayssa bessees.
Daniel8:23 «Istta kawoteththa wurseththa wodey gakkishin makkallanchchati iitateththan gujji gujji biza wode babisiza sinththi diza baleththiza kawoy kawotana.
Daniel8:24 He kawozi keehippe minnana; gido attiin ba wolqqan minnenna; shaaphiza iita miish ooththana; izi ooththiza ubbay izas giiga gidana; gita asatanne geeshshata dhayssana.
Daniel8:25 Izi makkallanchcha gidida gishshas shocechchi shocechchi durettana; izi bana barkka gita mala qoodana; saron doos gishin izi darota dhayssana; kawota kawo bolla izi dendana; histtikokka zaaridi izi dhayana; gidikkoka asa wolqqan gidenna.
Daniel8:26 «Maaladonne omarsa wode shiiqiza yarsho gishshas ne be7ida ajjuutay tuma; gido attiin ha ajjuutay polettanay buro daro layththafe guyen gidida gishshas ne wozinan qum7a oykka» gides.
Daniel8:27 Taas Daaneelas wolqqay ixxides; daro wodekka saketta ichchadis; hessafe guye dendada kawo oososo badis; ta be7ida ajjuutan keeha dagammadis; ta erappe bolla gidides.
Daniel9:1 Meedoone dere as Arxekisise naa Daariyoosi Baabiloonen kawotides.
Daniel9:2 Izi kawotida koyro layththi tani Daaneeli kase nabe Ermaasas imettida GODAA qaala mala Yerusalaamey laalettada laappun tammu layth gam7anayssa geeshsha maxaafatappe akeekadis.
Daniel9:3 Hessa gishshas tani maaqa may7adanne bidinththa bolla uttada xoomanaas
Daniel9:4 Tani GODAA ta Xoossaa woossashenne paaxashe
Daniel9:5 Nuni gidikko nagara ooththidos; nena qohidos; iita miish ooththidos; makkallidos; ne azazotappenne ne wogappe kare kezidos.
Daniel9:6 Nuni nu kawotas
Daniel9:7 «Abeet GODAWU! Neni xillo; nuni gidikko nees ammanettontta gishshas nuna biitta ubbaa bollan ne laallida Yuhuda asay
Daniel9:8 Abeet GODAWU! Nuni wurikka nena qohida gishshas nu kawota
Daniel9:9 Abeet GODAA nu Xoossawu! Nuni ne bolla makkallikokka neni maarizanne atto giza Xoossa.
Daniel9:10 Abeet GODAA nu Xoossawu! Nuni nees azazettibeekko; ne oosanchcha gidida nabeta baggara ne immida wogata naagibeekko.
Daniel9:11 Isra7eele asay ubbay nees azazettibeenna; ne wogaakka ubbaa menththidi kare kezides. «Nuni nena qohida gishshas ne oosanchchaza Muse wogaan xaafettida caaqozinne qanggeththazi nu bolla gakkides.
Daniel9:12 ‹Intte bollanne inttena kaaleththizayta bolla ta gita meto ehana› gaada kase ne yootidayssa ubbaa nu bolla poladasa; he wode Yerusalaame bolla gakkida qixaate malay haraso awanka gakkibeenna.
Daniel9:13 Kase Muse wogan xaafettida mala neni hayssa ha metoza wursaka nu bolla ehadasa; GODAA nu Xoossawu! Hessi wuri haniinkka nuni nu nagarappe simmidinne tumaa kaallidi neeppe maaroteth demmanaas koyibeekko.
Daniel9:14 GODAA nu Xoossay ba ooththiza ooso ubbaan xillo; GODAY nu bolla bash ehanaas modhettibeenna.
Daniel9:15 «Abeet GODAA nu Xoossawu! Hayssafe kase neni ne dereza ne minoteththan Gibxeppe kessada hach gakkanaas ne sunththay erettana mala ooththadasa; nuni gidikko nagara ooththidos; nenakka qohidos.
Daniel9:16 Abeet GODAWU! Neni kase ooththida xillo oosoza gishshas gaada ne katama Yerusalaameppe
Daniel9:17 «Abeet nu Xoossawu! Ha7i ne oosanchcha woosaanne gaannateththaa siya; abeet Godawu
Daniel9:18 Abeet Xoossawu! Ne hayththaa taakko zaarada ta woosaa siya; ne ayfe doy7ada nu dhayzayssanne ne sunththi xeygettida katamayo be7a; Nuni nena woossizay ne gita maaroteththaan ammanettidi attiin nu xilloteththan ceeqettidi gidenna.
Daniel9:19 Abeet Godawu! Nu woosa ezga! Nuna maara! Neni siyada ooththa! Hanno katamayninne deraa bolla ne sunththi xeygettides; Godo ne sunththaa gishshas gaada gam7ofa» ga woossadis.
Daniel9:20 Tani ta nagaranne ta dere Isra7eele asaa nagara paaxashe geeshsha zumaa gishshas GODAA ta Xoossa sinththan aggontta woossadis.
Daniel9:21 Tani woosa bolla dashe koyro ajjuutan be7ida Gabreeley omarsa wode yarshoy shiiqiza woden taakko eeson piradhdhishe yides.
Daniel9:22 Izi tana tamaarsishe
Daniel9:23 Ne keeha dosettidaade gidida gishshas ne buro woosa doommishin Xoossi ne woosaa siyides; tanikka hessa nees yootana yadis; hessa gishshas ha7i ta nees yootizayssa wozinan woththa; ajjuutazakka akeeka.
Daniel9:24 «Makkallateththaa essanaas
Daniel9:25 «Ne hayssa era
Daniel9:26 Usuppun tammanne nam7u saaminttatappe guyen tiyettidaadey aykko mooroy baynda asa kushen hayqqana; buro yaana halaqaza asati Yerusalaamenne Xoossa Keeththaa dippi histti dhayssana; iza wurseththika haaththa di7o mala yaana; wurseth gakkanaas olay gujji gujji baana; bashshi awajettides.
Daniel9:27 Halaqazi daro asaara issi saaminttas caaqettana; saaminttaas bagga bolla yarshozanne kaththa imota diggana; isttasohon bash ehiza tunateth Xoossa Keeth gelththana; hessika hananay he bashsha kaaleththizayssa bolla awajjettida qixaatey polettana gakkanaassa» gides.
Daniel10:1 Paarise kawo Qiroosi kawotida heedzdzanththo layththan Bilxxasoore geetettiza Daaneeli ajjuuta be7ides; ajjuutan izas yootettida qaalay tuma; hessika wolqqama ola gishshas qonccisizaaza; izi he kiitaa erana mala izas akeekay ajjuutan imettides.
Daniel10:2 He wode tani Daaneeli heedzdzu saamintta kumeththi yeekkadis.
Daniel10:3 Heedzdzu saaminttati aadhdhana gakkanaas asho gidiin hara lo7o kath mabeekke
Daniel10:4 Layththas koyro aginay gelida nam7u tammanne oydanththo gallas tani wogga shaafa Xegroose achchan eqqadis.
Daniel10:5 Tani dhoqqu ga xeellishin lee7e haare may7idi worqqa qabatto danccida issi as beyadis.
Daniel10:6 Iza bollay inqqu mala xolqees; iza ayfesoy wolqqanththa mala popol7u gees; iza ayfetikka tama laco misateettes; iza tohotinne iza kusheti taman bonqqida xarqimalaththo xolqeettes; iza qaala giirissay daro dere qaala mala kooshumees.
Daniel10:7 He ajjuutaza tani Daaneeli xalla beyadis; hankko tanara dizayti gidikko aykkoka beyibeettenna; keehi dagammida gishshas baqati biidi qotettida.
Daniel10:8 Tanikka hessa keehi malalisiza ajjuuta xeellashe tarkka attadis; taas diza wolqqay wuriin daaburadis; ta ayfesoykka keehi gilqides.
Daniel10:9 Hessafe guye qaala cenggurs siyadis; ta he cenggurssaa siyiza wode sinththa guth biittan gufannadis; wolqqama dhisko seeradis.
Daniel10:10 Hekko tana issi kushey bochchides; ta kokkorishin izi tana kaafidi ta kusheninne ta toho gulbaten essides.
Daniel10:11 Izikka
Daniel10:12 Qasseka izi taas
Daniel10:13 Gido attiin Paarise kawoteththa halaqay tanara nam7u tammanne issi gallas eqettides; Faarise kawoteththi tani takkisidayssa be7idi waanna halaqatappe Mika7eeley tana maaddanaas yides; tanikka iza Faarise halaqara heen aggada yadis.
Daniel10:14 Ajjuutazi polettanaas buro sinththafe daro layththi diza gishshas sinththafe ne dereza bolla hanana yo7ota nees qonccisanaas ta yadis» gides.
Daniel10:15 Izi hayssa taas yootiza wode ta gaanaazi dhayiin duge biitta xeelladis.
Daniel10:16 Hessafe guye as misatizaadey ba kushe yeddidi ta mettershata bochchides; tanikka izas
Daniel10:17 Tani ne oosanchchazi nenara waana haasayana dandayazinaa? Ta Godawu! Taas abbey ixxides; tani peeno kessa shempanaaska xoonettadis» gadis.
Daniel10:18 As misatiza kiitanchchazi qasseka tana bochchiin tani minnadis.
Daniel10:19 Izikka tana
Daniel10:20 Izi qasseka taas
Daniel10:21 Koyrottada tuma maxaafan xaafettidayssa ta nees qonccisana; ha halaqatara ta olettishin intte halaqa Mika7eeleppe attiin haray tana maaddiday baawa.
Daniel11:1 «Meedoone as Daariyoosi kawotida koyro layth tani iza maaddanaassinne iza minththeththanaas iza achchan eqqa days.
Daniel11:2 «Ha7ikka tani nees tuma yootana; hara heedzdzu kawoti buro Paarise bolla kawotana; heyta heedzdzata kaallidi oydanththo kawotana kawozi hankko kaseytappe dureteththan aadhdhana; izas dureteththi keehi darshin izi ba bolla hara kawota gujji ekkidi Girike kawoteththa bolla dendana.
Daniel11:3 Hessafe guye wolqqama kawoy dendana; iza kawoteththayka gita gidana; izi ba koyidaazi ubbaa ooththana.
Daniel11:4 Gido attiin izi daro minnida wode iza kawoteththay laalettana; alame bolla oyddu kezi shaaketti wodhdhidi oyddu bagga baana; iza zereththi gidonttayti iza kawoteththan kawotana; gidikkoka isttafe issoyka iza mala minnenna; gaasoykka kawoteththay laalettiin harati gishetti ekkida gishshassa.
Daniel11:5 «Dugeha bagga kawoy minnana; gido attiin iza olanchchata azazizaytappe issoy kawozappe keehi minnana; iza kawoteththay keehi gita gidana.
Daniel11:6 Guuththa layththatappe guye dugeha bagga kawoy pudeha bagga kawora laggeteththa caaqo caaqettana; dugeha bagga kawoy ba nayo pudeha bagga kawozas machcho histti immana; gido attiin iza ba wolqqa minththanaas dandayontta gishshassinne kawoza wolqqay minnontta gishshas kase gelida caaqo qaalazi minnenna; hessa gishshas iza bana maaddizaytara
Daniel11:7 «Heerakka izi dabbo gidida issaadey izi soho oykkanaas dendana; pudeha bagga kawoza olanchchatara ola oykettana; isttas ola miixaakka menththi gelidi izi istta xoonana.
Daniel11:8 Istta eeqa xoossata misleta
Daniel11:9 Hessafe guye pudeha bagga kawoy dugeha kawoy haariza deraa olanaas worajjana; gido attiin izi ba yida ogera guye simmi baqatidi ba dere baana.
Daniel11:10 Pudeha bagga kawo attuma nayti olas giigettishe keehi wolqqama olanchchata shiishshana; he ola asaykka ba sinththan diza biitta meecci efiza wolqqama di7o haaththa mala ba morkke miixa bolla meto gaththana.
Daniel11:11 «He wode dugeha kawoy keehi hanqettidi pudeha bagga kawora olettanaas dendides; pudeha bagga kawoy shiishshida wolqqama olanchchati xoonettana.
Daniel11:12 Dugeha bagga kawoy daro olanchchata di7ida wode ba wozinan otorettana; daro shiyan qoodettiza olanchchatakka izi wursana; gidikkoka izi xoonida mala minni deenna.
Daniel11:13 Pudeha bagga kawoy gede ba dere simmidi kaseyssafe minththidi olanchchata giigsana; guuththa layththatappe guye izi ba olanchchata kumeththa ola miish gixissi ekkidi yaana.
Daniel11:14 «Hessafe guye daro asay dugeha bagga kawo bolla makkallana; Daaneela neni hayssa ajjuutazan be7idayssi wurikka polettana mala ne bagga asaappe makkallanchchati biitta bolla shiro denththana shin istta qofay polettenna.
Daniel11:15 Hessa gishshas pudeha bagga kawoy issi gimbey yuuyi aadhdhida katamayo giddoththidi izo oykkana; dugeha bagga wottadarati isttara eqettanaas dandayettenna; istta garsafe doorettida mino olanchchatikka izara eqetti dandayana wolqqay isttas deenna.
Daniel11:16 Pude baggafe worajjanayssi ba koyida mala ooththana; izara eqetti dandayanay deenna; izi lo7o biittayo haarana; izo dhayssanaaska wolqqa demmana.
Daniel11:17 «Pudeha bagga kawoy ba olanchchata kumeth shiishshi olas worajjanaas qoppana; hankko baas morkke gidida dugeha bagga kawora sigettidi caaqettana; he kawoza kundisanaas ba nayo izas machcho histti immana; gido attiin iza qofay polettenna.
Daniel11:18 Hessafe guye abba achchan diza dereta bolla meto gaththidi istta haarana; gido attiin olanchchata halaqay iza otoreteththaa purshisana; izi ooththida ubbaa iza bolla zaarana.
Daniel11:19 Histtidi he kawozi kase ba dere miixatan simmana; gido attiin dhuphettidi izi kundana; nam7anththo beettenna.
Daniel11:20 «Izasohon hara kawoy kawotana; he kawotida kawozi ba kawoteththa bonchcho naaganaas giira giirissiza as shuumana; gido attiin he kawozi guuththa wodeppe guye derey dendiin woykko olan gidontta izi coo hayqqi dhayana.»
Daniel11:21 Taas ajjuutaa birshiza kiitanchchazi
Daniel11:22 Hessafe guye izara eqettiza daro olanchchati iza sinththafe pitetti dhayana; caaqeththiza halaqazikka hayqqana.
Daniel11:23 Izi izara sigeteththas caaqettidaappe guye cimon gene ooso ooththana; amarda asata oykkidi minni minni baana.
Daniel11:24 Izi keehi duretida dere qoppontta dishin worajji oykkana; kase iza aawati ooththi erontta miish izi ooththana; izi di7i ekkidayssa ubbaa ba olanchchatas gishechchi immana; ola miixata bollaka meto gaththanaas qofa qachchana; gido attiin hessi guuththa wodessa.
Daniel11:25 «Wolqqama olanchchata giigsidi olettanaas dugeha bagga kawo bolla worajjana; dugeha bagga kawoykka ba baggara daro wolqqamanne mino olanchchata giigsidi ba bolla yiza olaa teqqanaas dendana; gido attiin iza bolla kasetidi maqettida maqeteththafe dendoyssan izi isttara eqettanaas dandayenna.
Daniel11:26 Izara issife miza iza laggeti iza dhayssanaas maqettana; iza olanchchati ubbay wurana; darotikka olan hayqqana.
Daniel11:27 Hessafe guye he nam7u kawoti bantta wozinan gene qofa oykki issi maaddafe maanaas issife uttana; issoy issaas baleththo yo7o haasaynna; gidikkoka barezi gakkontta gishshas istta qofay polettenna.
Daniel11:28 Pudeha bagga kawoy baas shiishshida aqota ekkidi ba dere simmana; gido attiin iza wozinay geeshsha caaqo qaala dhayssanaas dendana; caaqo qaala bolla iita miish ooththana; hessafe guye ba dere simmi baana.
Daniel11:29 «Barettida gallassan dugeha bagga zaari worajjana; gido attiin izas kaseyssa mala hanenna.
Daniel11:30 Arshey wulliza baggara diza derey markaben yiidi oliza gishshas izi keehi dagammana; guye simmi baana; geeshsha caaqo qaalaa bolla hanqettana; simmidikka geeshsha caaqo qaalaa kaddidaytara laggetana.
Daniel11:31 «Iza olanchchati Xoossa Keeththaanne dirsaa tunisana; hach hach shiiqiza yarshoza diggana; bash ehiza tunateth tokkana.
Daniel11:32 Kawozi caaqo qaalaza kaddidayta baleththidi istta ogeppe istta kare kessana; ba Xoossaa eriza derey gidikko goobana; minnika kawozara eqettana.
Daniel11:33 «Dere giddon diza aadho eranchchati darota tamaarsana; gido attiin istti guuththa wodes taman xuugettana; mashshan siifettana; di7ettananne istti haaridayssika bonqqetti ekettana.
Daniel11:34 Ha deexo metozi istta bolla gakkida wode istti amarda maado demmana; daro asati istta bagga misatidi isttako shiiqana shin wozinappe gidenna.
Daniel11:35 Aadho eranchchatappe issoti issoti dhuphettana; hessaththo hanidi wurseththa wodey gakkanaas istti gacettidi
