Daniel11:36 «Pudeha bagga kawoy ba qoppidayssa ubbaa polana; izi bana eeqa xoossatappeka bollara dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana; xoossatappe aadho Xoossaa bolla hayssafe kase seetetti erontta cashsha qaala haasayana; Xoossa hanqoy polettana gakkanaas izi ooththiza ubbay izas injjetana; kase barettidayssi polettana bessees.
Daniel11:37 Ha kawozi kase ba aawata eeqa xoossata kawushshana; maccassati dosiza eeqa xoossata izi leqqana; izi bana ubbaafekka bollara xeelliza gishshas eeqa xoossata ubbaa qelli gaana.
Daniel11:38 Isttasohon miixata xoossa bonchchana
Daniel11:39 Allaga xoossata maadon izi mino miixata worajji oykkana; izas haarettizayta keehi bonchchana; daro dere haarana mala istta shuumana; qasse biittayokka isttas shaakki shaakki immana.
Daniel11:40 «Wurseththa wodey gakkishin dugeha bagga kawoy pudeha bagga kawoza bolla olas worajjana; pudeha bagga kawoy para-gaaren
Daniel11:41 Lo7o biittayokka worajji oykkana; daro dereti iza kushen kundana; gidikkoka Eedoomey
Daniel11:42 Izi ba godateththa daro dereta bolla aassana; he wode Gibxeyka izappe kessa ekka attuku.
Daniel11:43 Worqqa
Daniel11:44 Hessafe guye arshey mokkiza baggaranne pudeha baggara yiza worey iza daganththana; izi keehi hanqettidi daro asata wodhanaassinne dhayssanaas dendana.
Daniel11:45 Izi ba kawoteththa dunkaaneza abbaafenne geeshsha zumaappe giddon tokkana; gido attiin hessi wuri haniinkka izas wurseth gidana; iza maaddanaykka beettenna» gides.
Daniel12:1 Kase taas ajjuutaza birshiza kiitanchchazi taas
Daniel12:2 Istti hayqqiin biittay midayti wurikka dendana; istta garsafe baggayti mernaa de7os
Daniel12:3 He wode aadho eranchchati salo poo7o mala phoollana; darota xilloteththa oge kaaleththidayti wuri merippe mernaa gakkanaas salo xoolintteta mala xolqana.
Daniel12:4 «Daaneela! Neni alame wurseththi gakkanaas hayssa maxaafaza gordada maatamen shoca; he wode asay erateth darsanaas yaanne haa woxerettana» gides.
Daniel12:5 Hessafe guye ta sinththan haaththa shaafa doonan hara nam7ata he pinththaninne ha pinththan eqqidayta be7adis.
Daniel12:6 Istta giddofe issay lee7e haare may7idi he shaafazappe pude baggara eqqida kiitanchchaza
Daniel12:7 Lee7e haare may7idi shaafappe ganna baggara eqqida kiitanchchazi ba kusheta pude salo denththidi
Daniel12:8 Izi gizayssa siyadis shin taas gelibeenna; histtiin tani
Daniel12:9 Izikka taas
Daniel12:10 Daroti qorettana
Daniel12:11 «Gallas gallas shiiqiza yarshoy digettoosafenne bashsha tunateththi doomettoosafe ha simmiin 1
Daniel12:12 Genccidi 1
Daniel12:13 «Daaneela! Neni wurseth gakkanaas ba; hessafe guye ne shempana; wurseththa gallas nees giigida xinxxo ne laattana» gides.
Hosea1:1 Ooziyay
Hosea1:2 GODAY Hose7e baggara Isra7eele naytas qaala buro yootishe Hose7es
Hosea1:3 Hessa gishshas Hose7ey biidi Dibilayeme nayo Goomero machcho ekkides; izakka qanththatada izas attuma naa yeladus.
Hosea1:4 Hessafe guye GODAY Hose7es
Hosea1:5 He wode Izra7eele shoobban Isra7eele ola asa ubbaa ta menththereththana; hessa gishshas ne naaza sunththaa
Hosea1:6 Goomera qasseka qanththatada macca naa yeladus. GODAYKKA Hose7es
Hosea1:7 Yuhuda asaas gidikko tani ta siiqo bessana. Tani GODAY istta Xoossay ashshana; ta istta ashshanayssi ola wolqqan gidenna; mashshan
Hosea1:8 Goomera ba nayo dhanththi duuththidaappe guye qasseka qanththatada attuma naa yeladus.
Hosea1:9 GODAYKKA Hose7e
Hosea1:10 Gidikkoka Isra7eele asay qooday baynda abban shaamintta mala darana. Ha7i Xoossi
Hosea1:11 He wode Yuhuda asaynne Isra7eele asay simmidi issino gidana. Nam7ati banttana ayssanaade issi as doorana. Qasseka istti bantta deren dichchaninne dureteththan de7ana. Izra7eele gallassay gita gidana.
Hosea2:1 Hessa gishshas intte intte ishata Isra7eele nayta
Hosea2:2 «Ta naytoo! Intte aayo zorite; hayssafe guye iza taas machcho gidukku; tanikka izis azina gidikke; ba sinththafe layma suuke hano
Hosea2:3 Iza simmontta ixxiko iza ba aayey uloppe kallo yelettida mala ta izo xiire kallo ashshana. Bazzo malanne mela biitta mala ta izo ooththana. Ta izo haaththa saamon wodhana.
Hosea2:4 Layma maccassafe yelettida gishshas izi naytas ta mishettike.
Hosea2:5 Istta aaya layma; kawushsha hanon shaaradus. Iza ba doonara
Hosea2:6 Hessa gishshas tani izi oge agunththara gordana; iza kezana penge demmontta mala tani gimbe yuushsha aaththa gordana.
Hosea2:7 Iza ba laggeththota demmanaas woxxana shin isttako gakkanaas dandayukku. Iza istta daro koyana shin demmuku; hayssafe guye
Hosea2:8 Tani izis kase kath
Hosea2:9 Hessa gishshas kaththi kaxxiza wode ha kaxxiza kaththaa
Hosea2:10 Izi laggeththota sinththan ta izo kallo ashshana; izo ta kusheppe ashshanay deenna.
Hosea2:11 Iza ba ufayssa ba7aaleta ubbaa
Hosea2:12 Iza ba laggeththotappe baas waaga gaada ekkida woyne miththatanne balase miththata ta dhoqallana. Isttaka wora do7ati maana.
Hosea2:13 Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossas exaane cuwasanaassinne lo7o geexe woththada iza ba laggeththota kaallada tana aggida gishshas ta izo qaxxayana.
Hosea2:14 «Hessa gishshas ta izo maqqada bazzo efana; heen ta izira siiqo qaalan haasayssana.
Hosea2:15 Kase izi woyne atakilteza ta izis zaarana; meto shoobba ta izis hidota penge histtana; heen iza Gibxeppe kezida gallas naateththan dashe yexxida mala yexxana.
Hosea2:16 Iza he gallassi tana
Hosea2:17 Ba7aale geetettiza eeqa xoossata sunththaa ta izi doonappe diggana; hayssafe guye istta sunththi dendenna.
Hosea2:18 He wode do7atara
Hosea2:19 Hanne Isra7eele! Ta nena mernaas taas giigsana; Ta nees xilloteththaninne suureteththan pirdana; aggontta siiqoninne qadhetan ta nena taas oychcha giigsana.
Hosea2:20 Tani ammanettada nena taas machcho giigsana. Nenikka tani GODA gididayssa erana.
Hosea2:21 «He gallas tani zaaro immana; tani salo azazana; saloykka sa7as zaaro immana.
Hosea2:22 Biittay kath
Hosea2:23 Tani ta dereyo biitta bolla tokkana. ‹Maaroteththi bayndaaro› geetettidaaro ta zaarada maarana; ‹Ta maarikke› gidayssaka zaara maarana; ‹Intte ta dere deekketa› geetettideta. ‹Ta dereta› gaada ta xeygana gaana; isttika tana
Hosea3:1 GODAY tana
Hosea3:2 Hessa gishshas ta izo tammanne ichchashu saqile biraninne 150 kilo banggan shammadis.
Hosea3:3 Ta izo
Hosea3:4 Hessaththoka Isra7eele asay kawoy baynda woykko kaaleththizaadey baynda
Hosea3:5 Hessafe guye Isra7eele derey GODAA ba Xoossaakonne ba kawo Dawitekko simmana. Wurseththa wode istti yashshan kokkorishe GODAAKKONNE iza anjjoko yaana.
Hosea4:1 Hanno biittay bolla diza asa ubbaa bolla GODAY shiishshiza mootoy dees. Hessa gishshas Isra7eele asawu! Izi inttena gizayssa siyite; «Hanno biittay bollafe ammaneteththay
Hosea4:2 Haan dizay qanggeth
Hosea4:3 Hessa gaason biittay bolla koshay yees; izi bolla dizay wuri gilqees; meheti
Hosea4:4 GODAY
Hosea4:5 Intte omarsinne gallas dhuphetteeta; nabetikka inttenara dhuphetteettes. Hessa gishshas tani intte aayo Isra7eele dhayssana.
Hosea4:6 Ta derezas erateththi paccida gishshas dhaydes. Intte tana eranaas koyontta gishshas tanikka intte taas qeeseta gidi ooththana mala koykke. Intte ta woga balettida gishshas tanikka intte nayta balana.
Hosea4:7 Qeeseta qooday dari dari bishin istti ta bolla ooththida nagaray dari dari bides; bantta bonchchoka kawushshan laammida.
Hosea4:8 Ta dereza nagaray isttas muussas kiyides; hessa gishshas derey nagara ooththizayssa keehi dosida.
Hosea4:9 Intte qeesetikka deraappe dummatekketa; hessa gishshas ta ubbaaka izaade hano mala iza qaxxayana; iza ooso malakka izas immana.
Hosea4:10 Ta derey tana GODAA aggida gishshas istti maanashin kallettenna; laymatanashin corattettenna» gees.
Hosea4:11 «Laymateththas
Hosea4:12 Hessa gishshas miththafe oosettida eeqa xoossa zore oychcheettes; istti izan maroththiza guufezikka isttas zaaro immiza misatees; laymateththa qofay baleththides; bantta Xoossaas ammanettibeettenna.
Hosea4:13 Zumay dizason dizason yarsho yarsheettes; zumbullata bolla
Hosea4:14 Intte macca naytinne intte nayta machcheti laymatishin tani istta qaxxaykke; gaasoykka intte attumasati layma maccassatara suuketeettes; eeqa xoossatas laymateththa yarsho shiishshizaytara intteka izaththo yarsheeta. Hessa gishshas akeekay baynda derey dhayana.
Hosea4:15 «Intteno Isra7eele asatoo! Intte laymatikkoka Yuhuda asay laymatana mala ooththofte; hessa gishshas taas goynnanaas Gelgela woykko Beeti-Awene geetettizaso boopite; ‹De7o GODAY beyiin› giidi ta sunththan caaqqofte.
Hosea4:16 Isra7eele derey makkallanchcha ussa mala makkallides; histtiin GODAY istta dorsa laaqqata mala lo7oson wostti heemmanee?
Hosea4:17 Efreemey eeqa xoossata goynon oykettida gishshas istta gede aggaagite.
Hosea4:18 Woyne ushshu uyidaappe guye laymateettes. Istta ayssizaytikka yeellachchiza miish doseettes.
Hosea4:19 Istta gote carkoy pitti efana; istta yarshoy istta bolla yeella ehana.
Hosea5:1 Intteno qeeseto hayssa siyite! Isra7eele asatoo akeekite! Kawo keeththa asatoo hayssa ezgite! Hekko pirday intte bolla yides; Gaasoykka intte Mixiphphan narxa
Hosea5:2 Makkallanchchati shemppo wodho kaseppe haa darssida; hessa gishshas tani istta ubbaaka qaxxayana.
Hosea5:3 Tani Isra7eele asa ubbaa erays. Isra7eeley ta ayfeppe geemmabeekku; Efreeme
Hosea5:4 Isra7eele asay ooththida mooroy istti ba Xoossaako simmontta mala diggides. Laymateththa ayanay istta wozina kumides. Hessa gishshas istti GODAA erettenna.
Hosea5:5 Isra7eele asaa otoroy istta bolla simmi markkattees. Istti bantta nagaran dhuphettana. Yuhudaykka isttara issife dhuphetti kundana.
Hosea5:6 Istti GODAA koyanaas bantta wude mehetanne miizatakka laaggi efana; gido attiin izi isttafe shaakettida gishshas istti iza demmettenna.
Hosea5:7 Istti eeqa xoossatas goynniza gishshas GODAAS ammanettibeettenna; istti layman nayta yelida. Hessa gishshas istti agina xeeron bonchchiza ba7aaley isttanne istta nayta issife dhayssana.
Hosea5:8 Asay olas kezana mala Gibi7an zaye zayite; Eraaman xurumba punnite. Beeti-Awenen
Hosea5:9 Qixaatey yiza wode Efreemey bula gidana; hayssi Isra7eele bolla gakkanayssa ta lo7eththa erisays» gees.
Hosea5:10 GODAY
Hosea5:11 Isra7eele asay hada xoos kaalon minnides. Hessa gaason naaqettidetanne pirdan qohettideta.
Hosea5:12 Hessa gishshas tani Isra7eele asaa piinno mala
Hosea5:13 Isra7eeley ba sakoza; Yuhudaykka ba madunththa be7idi Isra7eeley Asoorekko ba ayfso zaaradus; Isra7eeley maado demmanaas gita Asoore kawookko qasttanne kiittadus. Gido attiin izi inttena ashshanaas woykko intte madunththa paththanaas dandaybeenna.
Hosea5:14 Hessafe dendidayssan tani Isra7eeles gaammo mala Yuhudaska wodalla gaammo mala gidana; ta istta nififi histta menththereththa yeggana; bonqqa ekkada baana; oonikka istta ta kusheppe ashshanaas dandayenna.
Hosea5:15 Istti ba bala eridi taakko simmana gakkanaas tani isttafe haakkana. Istta bolla metoy dariza wode istti tana minththi koyana» gees.
Hosea6:1 Derezi
Hosea6:2 Nam7u gallassatappe guye izi nuna beegoththana; heedzdzanththo gallas izi nuna denththana; nunikka iza sinththan paxa daana.
Hosea6:3 Ane nuni GODAA eroos! Nu iza lo7eththi eranaas ane minettoos! Izi wontta poo7o mala nuus qonccana; biitta kalssiza assura ira malanne balgo ira mala izi nuukko yaana» gees.
Hosea6:4 GODAY
Hosea6:5 Hessa gishsha s tani ta nabeta baggara inttena qanxxereththadis; ta doonappe ke7iza qaalan ta inttena wodhadis. Ta pirdayka intte bolla wolqqanththa mala poo7ides.
Hosea6:6 Tani yarshofe aaththada maaroteth dosays. Xuugettiza yarshofe aaththada Xoos ero dosays.
Hosea6:7 Istti qasse kase Addaame geetettizason tanara gelida caaqo qaala laallida; heenkka istti tanan ammanettibeettenna.
Hosea6:8 Gala7aadey suuththan moorettadus; iita asata duussaso gidadus.
Hosea6:9 Pangati ase wodhanaas zamadiza mala qeesetikka zuppetidi hessaththo ooththeettes. Gede Seekeeme efiza oge bollaka naagi naagi as wodheettes; yeellachchiza iita miish ooththeettes.
Hosea6:10 Dizhiginthiza iita miish Isra7eelen beyadis; Efreemey eeqas goynoninne laymateththan tunides.
Hosea6:11 «Intteno Yuhuda asatoo! Ta inttena qaxxayana gallas bara woththadis.
Hosea7:1 «Tani ta dere Isra7eele asa paththanaassinne zaarada duresanaas koyza wode; Efreeme nagaraynne Samaariya asa iitateththi keehi dari beettides. Istti issoy issaas wordoteettes
Hosea7:2 Gido attiin tani hayssa istta iitateththaa wursa erizayssa istti akeekibeettenna. Hessa gishshas istta istta nagaray giddoththi woththides; istta iita oosoy taappe geemmibeenna» gees.
Hosea7:3 GODAY
Hosea7:4 Istti wurikka laymatizayta
Hosea7:5 Nu kawoza ba7aale gallas halaqati woyne ushshan maththo leelaa gida. Izikka qidhizaytara zuppetides.
Hosea7:6 Istta wozinay cooce tama mala seellides; genen izakko shiiqeettes. Istti omarsi kumeththi hanqo cuwattishe aqeettes wonteththa gallas eexxiza tama mala popol7u geettes.
Hosea7:7 Wurikka tama cooce mala seellidayta; banttana ayssizayta dippi histti wursida. Istta kawotikka kundida; isttafe oonikka taakko shiiqibeenna.
Hosea7:8 «Efreemey hara kawoteththatara walakettides; izi shirettontta attida ukeththa mala.
Hosea7:9 Allagati istta wolqqa mida; gido attiin istti hessa eribeettenna. Iza hu7ey puulunth caddides; gido attiin izi hessa eribeenna.
Hosea7:10 Isra7eele asaa otoreteththi istta bolla markkattees; hessi wuri haniinkka istti GODAA bantta Xoossako simmibeettenna; izakka koyibeettenna.
Hosea7:11 «Isra7eele asay elle balettizanne qofay baynda haraphphe kafo mala. Issito Gibxe xeygees; hara wode qasse Asoorekko simmees;
Hosea7:12 Istti piradhdhishin ta gite istta bolla yeggana; salo kafota mala duge goochcha woththana; istti ooththida iita ooso gishshas ta istta dere sinththan qaxxayana.
Hosea7:13 Istti taappe haakki bida gishshas isttas aayye ana! Ta bolla istti makkallida gishshas istta bolla dhayssizaazi yo; Tani istta wozzana koyadis; istti gidikko ta bolla wordo haasayeettes.
Hosea7:14 Istti ba hiixa bolla ichchidi yeekkeettes; gido attiin wozinappe taakko woosettenna; kaththassinne ushshas shiiqeettes; gido attiin taappe sher7i gida.
Hosea7:15 Tani istta tamaarsadissinne istta minththadis; istti gidikko ta bolla dendida.
Hosea7:16 Taappe haakkidi hada miishshako simmida; Istti caddana xongiin wora biza toora mala. Istta kaaleththizaytikka bantti haasayza iita qaala gaason mashshan wurana; hessafe dendoyssan istti Gibxe biittan qidhes attana.
Hosea8:1 «Asay tanara diza caaqo qaala laallides; ta woga bollaka makkallides. Hessa gaason morkkey arganththa mala GODAA keeththa bolla alaanththees. Hessa gishshas istti naagettana mala zaye punna!
Hosea8:2 Isttika
Hosea8:3 Gido attiin Isra7eele asay lo7o miish ixxida gishshas morkkey istta gooddana.
Hosea8:4 «Ta sheney baynda istti baas kawota kawoththida; tana oychchontta dishe daannata doorida; ba birappenne ba worqqafe bana dhayssana eeqa xoossata baas ooththida.
Hosea8:5 Samaariya dere asatoo! mari misatissi intte medhdhida eeqa xoossati tana shaatteettes. Ta hanqoy intte bolla tama mala eexxees; intte mooro ooson ayde gakkanaas intte gam7anee?
Hosea8:6 Hiillanchchay mara misle medhdhida eeqa xoossati Xoos gidanaas dandayettenna. Hessa gishshas mar misati oosettida Samaariya eeqa xoossati meqeretti wodhdhana.
Hosea8:7 Istti carko zeridi gote shiishshana; buuxa bolla ayfey deenna; dhiilleyka beettenna; ayfikkoka allagati maana.
Hosea8:8 Isra7eeley hara kawoteththata giddon hiraysso miishsha mala gidida.
Hosea8:9 Barkka bazzo biittan toylattiza hardida mala gede Asoore dere bida. Bana maaddana mala kawotas miishshe immidi baas dabbo shammida.
Hosea8:10 Istti bana kawotas aaththi bayzikkoka ha7i ta istta shiishshana; kawotinne daannati istta bolla gaththiza metoppe dendidayssan istti guuxxi guuxxi baana.
Hosea8:11 «Efreemey nagara wursanaas daro yarshosoho ooththides; gido attiin he yarshosohoti nagara ooththizaso gidida.
Hosea8:12 Ta isttas ta wogaa garsan diza daro miishshata xaafadis. Istti gidikko hada miishsha mala qoodida.
Hosea8:13 Istti lo7o yarsho shiishsheettes he yarsho ashozakka meettes; gido attiin GODAY isttan ufayettibeenna. Hessa gishshas izi istta iitateththaa zaari qoppana; istta nagara gishshas qaxxayana. Isttika Gibxe simmana.
Hosea8:14 «Isra7eele derey baas gita kawoteththa keeththata keexxides; gido attiin bana medhdhidayssa balides. Yuhuda dereykka daro mino katamata ooththides; gido attiin tani he katamata bolla tama yeddana; istta miixataka tamay maana» gides.
Hosea9:1 Isra7eele asawu! Ufayettofte! Hara kawoteththata mala ufays nococu goopite! Ays giikko intte intte Xoossas ammanettibeekketa; kaththa bale ubbaan laymateththas
Hosea9:2 Hessa gishshas hayssafe guye intte kaththa baleppe kath
Hosea9:3 Isra7eele derey GODAY isttas immida biittan uttenna. Efreemey duge Gibxe simmana; Asoorekka biidi tunida kath maana.
Hosea9:4 Heen GODAAS woyne ushshu yarshanaas dandayettenna; istta yarshoyka GODAA ufayssenna. Hessa gishshas isttas yarshozi shochcha kath gidana; iza miza ubbay tunana. He kaththazi coo gafas miza kath gidana attiin GODAA keeth yarshos shiiqenna.
Hosea9:5 Histtiin intte dumma dumma ba7aale gallassataninne GODAA ba7aale gallassatan ay ooththeetii?
Hosea9:6 Istti bashshafe attanaas betikkoka Gibxey istta shiishshana; Memppisa geetettizason istta moogana; istti haarida biray wurikka sharafa may7i attana; istta duussaso ubbaa agunththi laattana.
Hosea9:7 Qaxxayana wodey gakkides; Pirda gallassika gakkides; hessa Isra7eele asay ero. Intte ooththida nagaray daro gidida gishshassinne intte morkketeththi gita gidida gishshas nabey eeya mala
Hosea9:8 Nabey Xoossara gididi Efreeme naagizaade; gido attiin iza oge ubbaan woximadey
Hosea9:9 Isra7eele asay kase Gibi7a wode diza asa mala keehi tunides; Xoossi istta qohoza qoppidi istta nagara gishshas istta qaxxayana.
Hosea9:10 GODAY
Hosea9:11 Efreeme bonchchoy kafoy piradhdhiza mala piradhdhi dhayana; hayssafe guye naa qanththateththi
Hosea9:12 Naa yelidi dichchikokka istti dhoommana gakkanaas ta istta wodhana. Ta isttafe ta ayfeso zaarida wode isttas aayye ana!
Hosea9:13 Efreemey Xiroose mala lo7o gaden tokettiin be7adis; Ha7i gidikko Efreemey ba nayta shemppo wodhizaytas aaththi immana.
Hosea9:14 GODAWU! Ne ha deraas ay immanee? Awucayiza ulonne shulla dhanth imma!
Hosea9:15 «Istti Gelgelan ooththida iitateththaa gaason ta istta ixxadis; istti ooththida iita ooso gishshas ta keeththafe ta istta gooddana; hayssafe guyekka ta istta dosikke; istta kaaleththizayti ubbay makkallanchchata.
Hosea9:16 Efreemey shocettides; isttas xaphoykka melides; Istti ishalon dichchida nayta ta wodhana» gees.
Hosea9:17 Istti azazettontta ixxida gishshas ta Xoossi istta yeggi aggana; isttika kawoteththata giddon coo toylattana.
Hosea10:1 Isra7eele asay daayida woyne miththa mala. Istti daro ayfe ayfida; ayfezi darida keena daro yarshosoho medhdhida. Istta biittaya lo7o ayfe immada istta duresida mala istti goynniza tuussata aleqessida.
Hosea10:2 Istta wozinan geney kumides; istti ba ooththida geneza waaga ekkana. GODAY istti yarsho yarshizasohota ubbaa laallana. Istti goynniza eeqa xoossa tuussatakka shoddana.
Hosea10:3 Isttika
Hosea10:4 Istti wordora caaqqidi qaala geleettes; hada hidota ooththeettes; hessa gishshas kaththa giddon marzera diza haruma maatay mokkiza mala istta giddon gene pirday darana.
Hosea10:5 Samaariya kataman diza derey Beeti-Awenen diza mara mislen oosettida eeqa xoossas yayyees. Izappe bonchchoy qaaretti kichchida gishshas asay yeekkees. He eeqa misleza qeesetikka waasseettes.
Hosea10:6 He eeqa mislezi gita gidida Asoore kawos kiyateth imettana. Efreemey kawuyana; Isra7eeleykka bantta eeqa xoossa gishshas yeellatana.
Hosea10:7 Samaariya kawoy haaththa goppontto mala coo dhayana.
Hosea10:8 Isra7eeles nagara gidida Beet-Awenen goynnizasoho zumbullazi dhayana; okkaynne ohay mokkana; He wode derey zumata
Hosea10:9 GODAY
Hosea10:10 Tani koyza wode istta qaxxayana; Istti ooththida dakko nagara gishshas qixaatey istta bolla gakkana; kawoteththati istta bolla dendana.
Hosea10:11 Isra7eeley kath bukkanaas dosiza mehe mala; gido attiin lo7iza izi morge bolla qambara woththana; Efreeme waaxana; Yuhuday goyana; Yaaqoobe nayti waaxettidi biitta pixana.
Hosea10:12 GODAY yiidi xilloteth intte bolla ira mala bukisana gakkanaas hanna intte iza koyza wode gidida gishshas oththaa goyite; inttes xilloteth zerite; mino siiqo ayfe maxite.
Hosea10:13 «Intte gidikko intte wolqqaninne intte ola qarata daroteththan ammanettidi iitateththi zerideta; nagara shiishshideta; wordoteththa ayfe mideta.
Hosea10:14 Shilimaaney Beeti-Arbeele geetettiza katama olan kase laallidayssaththonne Aayeta naytara gaththi biitta bolla dincereththi wursida mala shiroy deraa bolla yaana. Intte dere asaa bolla wolqqama olay yaana; Intte miixay laalettana.
Hosea10:15 Beetele! Ne iitateththi gita gidida gishshas ne bollaka hessaththo hanana; he gallassaya gakkiza wode Isra7eele kawoy mulera dhayana» gees.
Hosea11:1 GODAY
Hosea11:2 Gido attiin ta istta xeygida keena istti taappe gede haakki haakki bida. Ba7aales yarsho shiishshida; iza misletasikka exaane cuwasida.
Hosea11:3 Efreemes kusheza oykkada hemeth tamaarsiday tana; Gido attiin istta paththiday tana gididayssa istti eribeettenna.
Hosea11:4 Ta istta qadheta wodoroninne siiqo sansalatan taakko shiishshadis; istta morgefe qambara denththadis; ziqqi ga hokkada istta mizadis.
Hosea11:5 «Histtiin istti maaroteththan gelontta gishshas duge Gibxe simmettennee? Asoorey istta haarennee?
Hosea11:6 Istta iita halchcho gishshas Morkke tooray istta katamata olana; istta katamata pengetakka menththereththi yeggana. Isttika mulera dhayana.
Hosea11:7 Ta derey taappe haakkanaas koyides; gidikkoka istti taakko Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossako waassiko ta istta ashshike.
Hosea11:8 «Efreemee! Ta nena wostta aggaaganee? Isra7eele ta nena wostta aaththa immanee? Ta kase Adaamaninne Xaboymen ooththidayssaththo wostta ne bolla ooththoo? Ta wozinay giddon qaaxxides; ta maaroteththay nena ashshana dendides.
Hosea11:9 Tani intte giddon diza Geeshsha Xoossa attiin as gidikke. Ta hanqora intte intteko yiikke; ta bosha hanqo intte bolla yeddike; Efreeme zaarada dhayssike.
Hosea11:10 «Tani GODAY istta ashshanaas xaaggiza gaammo mala tani ta qaala sissishin istti tana kaallana; ta nayti kokkorishe arshey mokkiza baggafe yaana.
Hosea11:11 Gibxeppe kafo mala Asooreppe haraphphe mala piradhdhi yaana. Tani istta isttasohon woththana» gees.
Hosea11:12 GODAY
Hosea12:1 Efreemey carko heenththanchcha; gallas kumeth arshey mokkiza bagga carko kaallees; wordonne makkalla darsees. Asoore deraara caaqo qaala gelees; wogara zayte Gibxe biitta yeddees.
Hosea12:2 GODAY Yuhuda deraa bolla shiishshiza mootoy dees; izi Yaaqoobe iza hanota mala qaxxayana. Iza ooso mala izas immana.
Hosea12:3 Yaaqoobey buro ba aayey ulon dishe ba isha toho qirphe oykkides; Asa zawa gakkidaappe guye oossara baaxetides.
Hosea12:4 Kiitanchchara baaxetidi iza xoonides; iza sinththan teema demmanaas yeekki woossides; izakka Beetelen demmides; heen izara haasayettides.
Hosea12:5 GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay izas erettida sunththay GODAA.
Hosea12:6 Hessa gishshas ne Xoossako simma; siiqonne tumu pirda lo7eththa oykka; ubba wode ne Xoossan ammanetta.
Hosea12:7 «Zal7anchchati wordo geeddaran bayzeettes; shocechchoka doseettes.
Hosea12:8 Efreemey
Hosea12:9 «Inttena Gibxe biittafe kessida GODAA intte Xoossay tana; layththa ba7aale gallas kase intte ooththiza mala intte intte dunkaanen daana mala ta ooththana.
Hosea12:10 «Tani kasetada nabetas yootadis; daro ajjuuta ta istta bessadis; istta baggara leemison yootadis.
Hosea12:11 Gala7aaden iitateththi kumides; asaykka shufuro xalla. Gelgelan mirgota yarshos shiishshizoo? Istta yarshizasoy meqerettidi goshsha giddon korettida shuchcha mala gidana» gees.
Hosea12:12 Yaaqoobey Mesphexoomiya baqatides; Isra7eeley machcho ekkanaas heen haggazides; izis immana ciloosha gishshas dors heemmides.
Hosea12:13 GODAY nabe baggara Isra7eele Gibxeppe kessides
Hosea12:14 Gido attiin Efreemey iza keehi hanqeththides; iza GODAY izi suuth gussida mala qohoza iza bolla gaththana; izi leqqiza leqoza gishshas izas bessizaaz qanxxana.
Hosea13:1 Efreemey Isra7eele dereza giddon bonchchetti diza gishshas izi haasayshin asay ubbay kokkorees. Gido attiin ba7aales goynnida gishshas qohides; hayqqides.
Hosea13:2 Ha7ikka nagara bolla nagara gujjida; bantta cinccateththan misleta baas giigsida; birappe eeqa xoossata banttas medhdhida; heyti wurikka asa kushen oosettidayta; hayta ha asata gishshas
Hosea13:3 Hessa gaason istti wontta maalado shaara mala coo tim7i gaana; maalado xaaza malakka coo wodhdhi dhayana; woykko bangga bukkiza baleppe gote carkoy efiza suulla mala gidana; woykko keeththafe kezidi beettishe coo dhayza cuwa mala gidana.
Hosea13:4 GODAY
Hosea13:5 Bazzo biittan kaththinne haaththi bayndason nena ishalsa woththadis.
Hosea13:6 Gido attiin ta miziin istti kallida; kallidi otorettida; hessafe guye tana balida.
Hosea13:7 Hessa gishshas tani istta bolla gaammo mala yaana; maahe mala oge bolla zamada uttana.
Hosea13:8 Izi marati bonqqettida zardo mala ta istta shocananne puuzereththana; ta istta gaammo mala puuzereththa mittana; wora do7a mala duusereththana.
Hosea13:9 «Isra7eele derezoo! Ne ta bolla dendida gishshassinne nena maaddiza tanara ne eqettida gishshas ne dhayana;
Hosea13:10 Ne tana
Hosea13:11 Ta hanqettashe inttes kawo immadis; gido attiin tani boshankka iza shaaradis.
Hosea13:12 «Efreeme qohoy doorettides; iza nagaraykka mazgaben xaafettides.
Hosea13:13 Miixay oykkida maccassa mala iza bolla metoy yaana; izi gidikko aadho erateththi baynda eeya naa; yelettiza wodey gakkiin ba aayey uloppe yelettanaas koyontta naa mala.
Hosea13:14 Tani nena duufo wolqqafe ashshana; hayqoppeka wozzana. Hayqoo! Ne wodhiza wolqqay awan dizee? Duufozoo! Neni as dhayssiza wolqqay awan dizee? Tani izas qadhettike.
Hosea13:15 Izi ba ishata giddon dure gidikkoka GODAAPPE kiitettida carkoy arshey mokkiza baggara bazzo biittafe dendidi yaana. Pulttoy to7ana; haaththa olaykka melana; izas diza al7o aqotay minjja keeththafe bonqqettana.
Hosea13:16 Samaariya asay bantta Xoossa bolla makkallida gishshas bantta qoho tookkana; mashshankka siifettana; qeeri nayti biitta bolla dinccettana; qanththara diza maccassata uloy daakettana» gees.
Hosea14:1 Isra7eele derezoo! Intte intte nagara gaason kundida gishshas GODAA intte Xoossako simmite.
Hosea14:2 Paaxeththa qaala ekki GODAAKKO simmidi
Hosea14:3 Asoorey nuna ashshenna; nuni ola paratankka ammanettoko; hayssafe guye nuni nu kushen medhdhida eeqa xoossata
Hosea14:4 GODAY
Hosea14:5 Tani Isra7eele asaas puuse ira mala gidana; isttika lo7o ciishsha mala ciiyana; Libaanoose ziga mala xapho yeddana.
Hosea14:6 Istta haggay diccana; wogara miththa mala istti lo7ana; Libaanoose ziga mala lo7o sawo sawana.
Hosea14:7 Istti simmidi ta kuwa garsan uttana; Caarechcha kaththa mala istti cililana; woyne miththa mala istti ciiyana. Istta sunththi Libaanoose dere woyne ushsha mala ubbason erettana.
Hosea14:8 Efreemee! Taassinne eeqa xoossatas ay gaytoteththi dizee? Ne woosa siyizaynne nena naagizay tana; Tani ubba wode cilili uttida miththa mala; ne ayfizay taappe dendidayssanna» gees.
Hosea14:9 Aadho eranchchay ha yo7ota akeekana. Akeekizaadey ha yo7ota erana; GODAA ogey suure; xilloti izan hemetteettes. Nagaranchchati gidikko izan dhuphetteettes.
Joel1:1 Sinththafe hananayssa Xoossi Iyu7eeles yootida qaalay hayssa;
Joel1:2 intte cimati hayssa siyite; Yuhuda deren dizayti wurikka hayssa ezgi siyite. Hayssa mala hanoy kase intte wode gidiin woykko kase intte aawata wode hani erizee?
Joel1:3 Intte hayssa intte naytas yootite; intte nayti qasse bantta naytas yootetto; nayta naytikka kaalliza yeletas yootetto.
Joel1:4 Gondoy mishin attida kaththaa biitta maate booley mides; izappe attidayssa uusho carkoththo shociza di7o mala booley dhayssides; izappe attidayssa qasse gumbaroy mides.
Joel1:5 Hessafe guye woyne ushshu intte demmontta gishshas yeekkite; intteno maththottizaytoo! Intte dhiskizasoppe beeggidi waassite; intteno wonttan wonttan woyne ushshu uyizaytoo! Camo yeeho yeekkite.
Joel1:6 Qooday baynda booley ola asa mala ta dereza bolla yides; iza achchay gaammo achcha mala; iza gaagina achchay macca gaammo gaagina achcha mala.
Joel1:7 Ta woyne miththa ayfeza mulera dhayssides; balase geetettiza miththa ubbaa menththereththides; miththa haggati mulera booxxana gakkanaas poqoza mulera poqqi denththichides.
Joel1:8 Hessa gishshas izo ekkana giigsidayssi hayqqiin maaqa may7ada yeekkiza geela7oy mala intteka yeekkite.
Joel1:9 GODAA Keeththan yarshos shiiqana kath gidiin woykko woyne ushshay baynda gishshas GODAAS ooththiza qeeseti yeekkeettes.
Joel1:10 Goyidi zerida kaththay meli dhayiin woyne miththay tokettidi melida gishshas zaytey dhaydes; hessa gishshas biittaya yeekkawus.
Joel1:11 Gistteynne banggay haraykka bone kaththi wurikka dhayda gishshas intteno goshshanchchatoo ceecite; intteno
Joel1:12 Woyne miththatinne balase miththati shullida; oroomaanenne temire miththati
Joel1:13 Intte intte Xoossa yarsho shiishshiza kath gidiin woykko woyne ushshi baynda gishshas intteno ta Godaa oosanchchata gidida qeesetoo! Ane haa yiidi maaqa may7idi kumeththa omars yeekkite. Intteno yarsho yarshizason ooththizaytoo! Intte
Joel1:14 Dumma xooma gallas awajjite; ayana shiiqos asa xeygite; deren diza cimatanne asaa ubbaa nu GODAA keeththan shiishshidi pude GODAAKKO waassite.
Joel1:15 Aye ana! GODAA gallassi matides. Ubbaa dandayza Xoossay dhayssizaaz ehiza gallassi gakkides. He gallassays aayye ana!
Joel1:16 Kaththi nu sinththafe dhaydes; ufayssinne ilisi nu Xoossa Keeththafe mule dhaydes.
Joel1:17 Zerettida kaththay wuri biitta garsan wooqqi dhaydes; kaththi biittafe dhayda gishshas kase kath woththiza miishshati wurikka mela deettes. Gootaratikka laalettida.
Joel1:18 Mehey miza maatay gaden baynda gishshas meheti koshattidi waasseettes; dorsa wudetikka maatay dhayiin daro waaye bolla deettes.
Joel1:19 GODAWU! Demba maata ubbaa tamay mida gishshas wora miththaaka tamay mida gishshas ta neekko waassays.
Joel1:20 Shaafati melida gishshas demban diza maatay wurikka xuugettida gishshas wora do7atikka neekko waasseettes.
Joel2:1 Xiyoonen zaye zayite; geeshsha zuma bolla waassite! GODAA yuussa gallassi gakkida gishshas biitta bolla dizay wurikka kokkoro.
Joel2:2 He gallassay dhumanne tulala gallassa; shaaranne sakkanna dhuma gallassa; wontta poo7oy eeson zumata gakkiza mala wolqqama booley biitta ubbaan may7ana; hessa malay hayssafe kase hanibeenna; hayssafe guyenkka wodenkka hanenna.
Joel2:3 He booleti ba sinththan beettidaazi ubbaa tama mala maana; tama laco mala xuuggana; buro istta gakkontta biittay Edene gannate mala cilila biitta shin istti gakki aadhdhida biittay aykkoy baynda bazzo biitta gidana; booleti mishin attida miishshika beettenna.
Joel2:4 Isttas medhay para mala; istta buussay ola para buussa mala.
Joel2:5 Para-gaare giirissa mala giiris sissishe zumata bollara guppeettes; tamay buura miza mala beettida miishsha ubbaa xuuggana; giigettida mino olanchchata salfe mala giireettes.
Joel2:6 Istta be7idi derey kokkorana; asa ayfesoy wurikka babon boottana.
Joel2:7 Ola qarata mala gede sinththe beettes; olanchchata mala dirsa bollara guppi aadhdhana; wurikka sitti giidi gede sinththe baana; ba biza ogeppe hara oge beettenna.
Joel2:8 Issoy issaara sugetettenna; issoy issoy ba oge yeddenna; ba morkke ola miish ubbaa dhayssidi aadhdhi baana; aykkoyka istta teqqenna.
Joel2:9 Istti katamaza worajjana; katama gimbeza bolla istti woxxana; guppi guppidi keeththata bolla kezana; kayso mala maskootera soo gelana.
Joel2:10 Biittay istta sinththan kokkorana saloykka qaaxxana; awa ayfeynne aginay dhumana; xoolintteyka poo7o immenna.
Joel2:11 GODAY ba olanchchata sinththan dada mala guummana; iza olanchchati ay mala daroo! Iza azazo ooththizayti ay mala wolqqamaa! tumappeka GODAA gallassay keehi wolqqama; keehi babisiza he gallassaa danday eqqanay oonee?
Joel2:12 GODAY
Joel2:13 Intte intte kayo bessanaas may7o daaketh xalla gidenna; hessafe bollara intte wozinay meqqiin maarettite; GODAA intte Xoossay kiyanne maariza Xoossa
Joel2:14 Oonee erizay GODAA intte Xoossay ba hanqoza zaaridi inttena anjjanaakko
Joel2:15 Xiyoone zuma bolla zaye punnite; dereza ayana shiiqos xeygite; xoomakka awajjite.
Joel2:16 Dereza ubbaa issi soo shiishshite; geeshsha duulatas giigsite; cimata xeygite; naytanne buro dhammiza naytakka ubbaa shiishshite; mishiratikka mishira keeththafe attontta kezetto.
Joel2:17 GODAAS ooththiza qeesetikka yarsho yarshizasozassinne asi simerettizaso giddon eqqidi yeekketto; GODAWU! Neni ne derezas qadhetta; kawoteththati istta Xoossay awan dizee? giidi nuna kadhanaassinne istti nu bolla miicci kaa7ana mala ne istta ooththofa» getto.
Joel2:18 GODAY biittays diza misheteththafe dendidayssan ba derezas qadhettides.
Joel2:19 Hessa gishshas GODAY
Joel2:20 Pudehappe yaana olanchchata ta inttefe haassana; duge bazzo zaara gooddana; sinththati yizayta duge hayqo abban yeddana; guyera yizayta Mediteraane abban yeddana; heen istta ahay zeeqqana; tumappe tani GODAY gita miish ooththadis.
Joel2:21 Biittayee babbofa; GODAY nees ooththida gita miishsha gishshas ufayetta!
Joel2:22 Intteno biitta bolla diza do7atoo babbofte; kase intte izan heemettiza gadey cililides; miththatikka ayfida; balaseynne woyne miththay keehi daro ayfides.
Joel2:23 Intteno Xiyoone deretoo
Joel2:24 Intte kase kath bukkiza balen kaththi kumana; woyne ushshinne wogara miththa zaytey kase isttan gum7ettiza ollata kumi palahana.
Joel2:25 Hayssafe kase wolqqama olanchcha misatiza ta yeddida uusho carkoththo shociza booleti
Joel2:26 Intte buro daro miidi kallana; inttes malalisiza miishshata ta ooththida gishshas intte tana GODAA intte Xoossaa galatana; hayssafe guye ta deraa yeellay gakkenna.
Joel2:27 Isra7eele asatoo tani intte giddon dizayssanne GODAA intte Xoossi tana xalla gididayssanne taappe haray bayndayssa intte erana; hessafe guye ta dereza yeellay gakkenna» gides.
Joel2:28 GODAY
Joel2:29 Hessaththoka he gallassatan taas ooththiza maccassa bollanne attumasa bolla tani ta Ayana gussana.
Joel2:30 Saloninne sa7an malalisiza miishshata ta bessana; suuththi
Joel2:31 Gita babisiza Godaa gallassay yaanaappe kasetidi arshey dhumana; aginaykka suuth aaththana.
Joel2:32 GODAA sunth xeygizay wurikka attana; GODAY kase yootida mala Xiyoone zuma bollafenne Yerusalaameppe atoteththi beettana; attanayta garsan GODAY xeygidayti daana» gides.
Joel3:1 Xoossi
Joel3:2 Tani kawoteththata ubbaa shiishshada duge Iyoosaafixe zulle woththana; heenkka ta istta bolla pirdana; gaasoykka ta dere Isra7eele asaa kawoteththata giddon laallidi istti biitta gishetti ekkida gishshassa.
Joel3:3 Istti ba di7i ehida ta dereta gishetti ekkanaas istta bolla saama yeggida; layma maccassata demmanaas attuma nayta aaththi immida; woyne ushshu uyanaas macca nayta aylleteththas bayzida.
Joel3:4 Intteno Xiroose
Joel3:5 Ta bira
Joel3:6 Yuhudanne Yerusalaame yeletata istta dere dhassafe haassi efidi Girike asas bayzideta.
Joel3:7 «Hekko tani ha7i istti bayzetti dizasoppe istta denththeththada zaarana; intte istta bolla gaththida qohoza ta intte bolla zaara ehana.
Joel3:8 Intte macca naytinne attuma nayti Yuhuda asaas bayzettana mala ta ooththana; isttika haaho deren diza Saabaane asaas aaththi bayzana; hayssa wursa yootiday tana GODAA.
Joel3:9 «Hayssa ubbaa kawoteththatas awajjite! olas giigettite! ola qarata denththeththite! Intte olanchchati ubbay kezidi morkketa oletto!
Joel3:10 Maarasha giththa mashsha qoxxite; baaca qasse toora qoxxite; laafaykka bana
Joel3:11 Intteno yuuyi aadhdhanaas diza kawoteththatoo! Intte wurikka eeson kezite! Hirki shoobban issi bolla shiiqite. GODAWU
Joel3:12 «Kawoteththati ubbay dendidi duge Iyoosaafixe shoobba betto; tani Xoossay intte yuushon diza kawoteththata bolla pirdanaas ta heen uttana.
Joel3:13 Istta iitateththi keehi darides; hessa gishshas kaxxida kaththi baacan cakettiza mala istta cakkite; woyne miththa ayfey gum7ettizason kumidi yedhettiza mala intte istta yedhettite» gides.
Joel3:14 Yo7o pirdiza zullen GODAY pirdiza gallassi gakkides; hessa gishshas daro derey heen shiiqi uttides.
Joel3:15 He gallas arsheynne aginay dhumana; xoolintteyka poo7enna.
Joel3:16 GODAY Xiyoone zumaa bolla Yerusalaamen dishe babisiza ba qaala giiris sissana; saloynne sa7ay qaaxxana; GODAY gidikko ba dere Isra7eeles shiiqi attizaso gidana.
Joel3:17 «Isra7eele asawu! He wode tani GODAA intte Xoossa gididayssa intte erana; tani geesh gidida ta zuma Xiyoone bolla de7ana; Yerusalaamey anjjettida katama gidana; hessafe guye hara allaga wottadaray izo worajjenna.
Joel3:18 «He wode zumati wurikka woyne miththan kumana; zumbullan daro maaththa miizati heemettana; GODAA Keeththafe pulttoy pulttana; Yuhuda deren diza shaafata ubbaa haaththi kumana; Shiixime shoobbay haath kallana.
Joel3:19 Gibxe asaynne Eedoome asay Yuhuda asaa bolla gene ooththida gishshas qasseka xillo asaa wodhida gishshas Gibxey bazzo gidana; Eedoomey asi bayndaso gidana.
Joel3:20 Hessa gakkanawu tani halo kessontta aggida xillota suuththa gishshas halo kessana; Yuhudaynne Yerusalaamey qasse mernaas ta derey de7izaso gidana; tanikka Xoossay Xiyoone zuma bolla de7ana» gides.
Joel3:21 
Amos1:1 Ooziyay Yuhuda kawo; hessaththoka Iyo7aasa naa Iyorba7aamey Isra7eele kawo gidi dishin hessika biittay qaaxxanaappe nam7u layththafe sinththan Isra7eele gishshas Tequhen mehe heemmizayta giddofe Amoxey be7idi yootida qaalay hayssafe kaalli dizayssa;
Amos1:2 Amoxey
Amos1:3 GODAY Aaraames
Amos1:4 Kawo Azaheele keeththan tama yeddana; he tamay Kawo Beeni-Hadaade miixata maana.
Amos1:5 Damasqo katama pengeta ta menththereththana; Beeti-Edene dere kawozanne Awe zullaan diza asaa ta dhayssana; Aaraame dere asaykka di7ettidi gede Qiire dere baana» gees.
Amos1:6 GODAY Filisxeemes
Amos1:7 Izi gimbeta maana mala Gaaza miixan tani tama yeddana.
Amos1:8 Asqeloona dere kawozanne Ashdoode dere asaa ta pitta dhayssana; Filisxeemen dizayti wuri wurana gakkanaas tani ta kushe Aqaroone bolla denththana» gees.
Amos1:9 GODAY Xirooses
Amos1:10 Hessa gishshas tani Xiroose katama gimbeta bolla tama yeddana; he tamay izi miixataka maana» gees.
Amos1:11 GODAY Eedoomes
Amos1:12 Hessa gishshas tani Temaane gimbeta bolla tama yeddana; he tamay Booxira miixataka maana» gees.
Amos1:13 GODAY Amoones
Amos1:14 Hessa gishshas Eraaba katama gimbeta bolla tani tama yeddana; he tamay istta miixata maana. Hessafe guye ola gallassan waasoy darana; olazikka gote carko mala eesotana.
Amos1:15 Istta kawoynne daannati di7ettana» gees.
Amos2:1 GODAY Mo7aabes
Amos2:2 Hessa gishshas tani Mo7aabe bolla tama yeddana; he tamay Qiriyaate miixata maana. Olanchchati maggulth
Amos2:3 Tani istta haariza kawozanne daannata ubbaa dhayssana» gees.
Amos2:4 GODAY Yuhuda
Amos2:5 Hessa gishshas tani Yuhuda bolla tama yeddana; he tamay Yerusalaame miixata maana» gees.
Amos2:6 GODAY Isra7eeles
Amos2:7 Istti manqota gudulla bolla genderisidi istta hu7e yedhetteettes; qohettidaytas geella pirdeettes; aawaynne nay issi maccassayra laymateettes; istti hessaththo ooththi ooththidi ta sunth tuniseettes.
Amos2:8 Asappe oyso ekettida may7o hiixxidi Yarsho yarshizasoza garsan aqeettes; istti bantta xoossa keeththan edasi ekkidi woyne ushshu izan uyeettes.
Amos2:9 «Isttas adussateththay ziga miththa mala; minoteththayka xiidda mala gidida Amoore asaa tani intte sinththafe dhayssadis; ayfontta mala xaphoppe shodda diggadis.
Amos2:10 Tani inttes Amoore dere biitta immanaas inttena Gibxeppe kessadis; oyddu tammu layth kumeth bazzora kaaleththa ehada laatissadis.
Amos2:11 Qasseka tani intte attuma nayta garsafe nabeta
Amos2:12 Xoossay
Amos2:13 Be7ite daro kath deexetti caanettida gaarey garsara diza miish liiqisiza mala tanikka inttena liiqisana.
Amos2:14 Pilata asi kessi ekki attenna; minoykka ba minoteththan maadettenna; wolqqamaykka ba shemppo ashshenna.
Amos2:15 Wondafe oykkidaadey ba dizason minni eqqidi ola zaarenna; pilata olanchchayka woxxi attenna; toganchchayka ba shemppo ashshenna.
Amos2:16 Ola qaratikka he gallas gooro kallo baqatana» gees.
Amos3:1 Isra7eele asawu! Gibxeppe kezida Isra7eele asaas inttes GODAY yootida qaala hayssa siyite.
Amos3:2 Xoossay
Amos3:3 Nam7u asati oge issife baana giidi qachchontta aggiko issife baanaas dandayzoo?
Amos3:4 Gaammoy wora giddon aykko miza miish shankkati demmontta dishe coo mela xaaggi erizee? Wodalla gaammoy aykko miza miish demmontta dishe ba dizason coo mela ba qaala sissi erizee?
Amos3:5 Yardey woykko gitey bayndason coo mela gaden kafoy oyketti erizee? Woykko diizay issi miishshi bana bochchontta dishin coo mela piri erizee?
Amos3:6 Katama giddon olas zayey punettishin babon kokkorontta asi di erizee? GODAA sheney baynda dishin katama bolla iita miishshi gakki erizee?
Amos3:7 GODAY ba xuura ba oosanchcha nabetas koyrotti yootontta dishe aykkoka ooththenna.
Amos3:8 Gaammoy xaaggiin siyidi dagammonttay oonee? GODAY ba xuura izas yootiin tinbite haasayonttay oonee?
Amos3:9 Ashdoodeninne Gibxen diza miixatan diza ubbaas
Amos3:10 GODAY
Amos3:11 Hessa gishshas intte dere morkkey worajjana; intte miixata laallidi intte keeththaaka bonqqana» gees.

Amos3:13 Salo GODAY
Amos3:14 Istti ooththida nagara gishshas tani Isra7eele asaa qaxxayiza wode Beetelen diza yarsho yarshizasohota tani laallana; yarshizasohota bolla diza kaceti meqeretti kundana.
Amos3:15 Istti izan bonenne balgo diza keeththata ubbaa ta laalla dhayssana; danggarsa zaalen lo7eththi alleqissida keeththati wurikka laalettana; gita keeththati wurikka dhayana» gees.
Amos4:1 Dhiikettida Baasaane miizata mala intte asateththa ordisida Samaariya maccassatoo! Hayssa qaala siyite! Intte daaburanchchata kawushsheeta; manqota bollaka godateeta; intte azinata
Amos4:2 Hessa gishshas GODAY ba geeshshateththan
Amos4:3 «Inttefe issoy issoy intte matan diza lukora gooshetti gooshetti kezidi gede Herimoonen yegettana» gi caaqqides.
Amos4:4 GODAY
Amos4:5 Intte ooththanaas koyzay hessa gidida gishshas irshoy izan diza uketh galata yarsho shiishshite; intte hessa intte shene mala shiishshiza gishshas izan ceeqettite» gees.
Amos4:6 «Inttes doonan baadhana kaththara ta dhayssada intte katamatan ubbaan kosha yeddadis. Intte gidikko haa taakko simmibeekketa.
Amos4:7 Intte kaththay gakkanaappe buro heedzdzu aginay dishin sinththata ta inttes iray bukkontta mala diggadis; issi kataman bukkishin hara kataman bukkontta mala diggadis; issi gaden bukkishin hankko issaa gaden iray dhayiin melides.
Amos4:8 Asay haath uyanaas koyishe ha katamappe he katama bides; gido attiin baas gidiza haaththe demmontta aggida gishshas uyidi alanaas dandaybeettenna; intteka taakko simmibeekketa.
Amos4:9 «Intte kaththa melissiza harge ta kiittadis; intte intte atakiltenne woyne miththata
Amos4:10 «Ta kase Gibxe biitta bolla yeddida iita hargeza mala harge intte bolla yeddadis; intte naateththa nayta mashshan hayqqana mala ooththadis; intte paratakka di7ettana mala ta ooththadis; intte dizason hayqqida asa aha xinqqoy intte siidhe tuccides; intte gidikko haa taakko simmibeekketa.
Amos4:11 Sodoomenne Gamoora kase ta dhayssida mala inttefe darotakka ta dhayssadis; intte attidaytikka tamay mishin attida miththa durca mala gidideta shin intte haa taakko simmibeekketa.
Amos4:12 «Intteno Isra7eele asatoo tanikka intte bolla hessaththo ooththana; hessa gishshas intte tanara intte GODAARA gayttanaas ane giigettite!» gees.
Amos4:13 Zumata ooththidaadey carkota medhdhidaadey ba qoppidayssa asas qonccisizay gallassa poo7o gede dhuman laammizay biitta bolla dhoqqasohon hemettizayssa sunththay GODAA Salo Xoossa.
Amos5:1 Isra7eele asawu! Intte gishshas ta zilaliza zilas siyite.
Amos5:2 «Geela7oya Isra7eeley kundadus; nam7anththo dendanaas dandayukku; izo maaddi denththanay baynda gishshas iza barkka ba deren kunda attana.»
Amos5:3 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY
Amos5:4 GODAY Isra7eele asaas
Amos5:5 Intte Bersaabehe boopite; Beeteley laalettada mulera dhayana; Gelgelan diza asay di7ettana; hessa gishshas Beetele gidiin woykko Gelgela boopite» gides.
Amos5:6 Haa Xoossaako simmite; histtiko intte shemppora paxa de7ana; akkay giikko Xoossi tama mala Isra7eele deraa maana; Beetelen dizaytakka tamay maana; he tama toyssanay isttas beettenna.
Amos5:7 Intteno pirda geellasizaytoo! Tumakka gede wordon laammizayto inttes aayye ana!
Amos5:8 Piliyaadise geetettiza laappun xoolinttetanne Oryoone geetettiza issi bolla diza xoolintteta medhdhiday gallassaa omarsan
Amos5:9 wolqqamatanne istta miixata laalli dhayssizay iza; izas sunththayka Xoossa.
Amos5:10 Intte qasse inttena pirdason hanqizaade ixxeeta; tumu haasayzaadekka kadheeta.
Amos5:11 Manqota un7eththeeta; istta wolqqara kath giiriseeta; inttes masettida shuchchafe keeth keexxideta shin he keeththan deekketa. Aradda biittan woyne miththa tokkideta shin izappe agettida woyne ushshu uyekketa.
Amos5:12 Intte qohoy ay mala darokkonne intte nagaray ay mala deexokko ta erays; intte xillo asata un7eththeeta; matta7e ekkidi pirdason manqotas geella pirdeeta.
Amos5:13 Hessa gishshas he wode wodey iita gidida gishshas akeekay diza asi co7u gees.
Amos5:14 Intte shemppora paxa de7ana mala lo7oppe attiin iita ooththofte; intte hessaththo ooththiko intte gida mala GODAY Salo Xoossay inttenara gidana.
Amos5:15 Iita miish ixxite; lo7o gididaaz dosite; pirda pirdizason tumu pirda geellasopite. GODAY Salo Xoossay attida Isra7eele asaa maaranaakko oonee erizay?
Amos5:16 Hessa gishshas GODAY Salo Xoossay
Amos5:17 Woyne miththi tokettizason ubbaan yeeho xalla gidana; hessika wuri hananay ta intte giddora aadhdhiza gishshassa» gees.
Amos5:18 Intteno GODAA gallas naagizaytoo! Inttes aayye ana! He gallassay dhumappe attiin poo7o gallas gidontta gishshas intte ays he gallassa koyeetii?
Amos5:19 He gallassay asi gaammofe attanaas qotettishe zardora gaaggiza mala woykko kessi ekki baso gelidi ba kushen keeththa goda oykkiin shooshshi dukkida mala hanana.
Amos5:20 GODAY pirdiza gallassay inttes dhumappe attiin poo7o gidenna; he gallassay izan aykko poo7oykka baynda girdi gida dhuma gidana.
Amos5:21 «Tani intte layththan layththan bonchchiza ba7aaleza kadhayssinne ixxays; intte goynos shiiqiza shiiqoykka tana ufayssenna.
Amos5:22 Taman xuugettiza yarshonne kaththa yarsho intte taas shiishshikokka ta hessa inttefe ekkike; dhiikettida intte mehetappe intte taas issifeteththa yarshos shiishshiko ta iza ayfenka xeellike.
Amos5:23 Intte yexxishe ta hayththan kaccofte; intte diiththa giiris ta siyanaas koykke.
Amos5:24 Gido attiin tumu pirday goggiza haaththa mala; xilloteththika miccontta pultto mala goggo.
Amos5:25 «Isra7eele asawu! Tumappe intte oyddu tammu layth bazzo biittan diza wode tumu yarshonne kaththa xeera taas shiishshidetii?
Amos5:26 Intte inttes ooththida
Amos5:27 Tani inttena Damasqofe gede haassa gooddana» gees GODAY Salo Xoossay.
Amos6:1 Xiyoonen badhdhi gi uttidaytoo! Samaariya zuma bolla hirgay baynda dizaytoo! Isra7eele asay maado koyidi intteko yizaytoo! Intteno dere halaqatoo! Inttes aayye ana!
Amos6:2 Ane intte gede Kalanahe katama biidi xeellite; heeppeka aadhdhidi Hamaate geetetti xeygettiza gita katamayonne duge Filisxeeme katama Geete wodhdhite; istti intte nam7u kawoteththatappe lo7izoo? Istta biittay intte biittafe aakkizee?
Amos6:3 Intte qasse
Amos6:4 Intte danggarsa zaaleppe oosettida algan ichcheeta; ohala laaqqa ashonne mara asho mishe soofa bolla utti shempeeta.
Amos6:5 Dawite mala yeththa miish inttes giigsidi bagananinne dumma dumma mazamure yexxizaytoo!
Amos6:6 Woyne ushshu birillera gidontta otora uyizaytoo! Keehi al7o gidida shitto tiyettizaytoo! Isra7eele deraa bolla gakkida meto gishshas qadhettonttayto inttena aayye ana!
Amos6:7 Hessa gishshas heera asappe koyro intte di7ettana; he wode intte kase ufayssan guppiza gufaynne badhdhi gi diza duussi attana.
Amos6:8 GODAY Salo Xoossay
Amos6:9 Issi keeththan tammati attiko he attidaytikka hayqqana.
Amos6:10 Hayqqidaytappe issaades mata dabbo gididaadeynne moogo woga polizaadey ahaza keeththafe kessi efana; he wode izaadey soon diza issi as xeygidi
Amos6:11 GODAA azazon wogga keeththati laalettana; guuththa keeththatikka laaletti attana.
Amos6:12 Paray shuchcha bolla togettizee? Goshshanchchay abba giddon boora waaxi goyanaas dandayzee? Intte gidikko pirda marzen laammideta; tumakka gede camon shirdeta.
Amos6:13 Intte Lodibaare katama xoonida gishshas ufayettideta; «Qarnayme katamayo nuni nu wolqqan oykkidos» gidi ceeqetteeta.
Amos6:14 GODAY Salo Xoossay
Amos7:1 GODAY ajjuutan booley yaanayssa tana bessides; hekko kawo kaththi maxetti wuridaappe guye geedora caarida azabba kaththa bolla Xoossi maate booley kezana mala ooththides.
Amos7:2 Boolezikka biitta bolla diza cilila ubbaa pitti midayssa tani beyada
Amos7:3 GODAYKKA isttas mishettidi

Amos7:5 He wode tani
Amos7:6 GODAYKKA isttas mishettidi
Amos7:7 GODAY tana hara ajjuuta bessides; tumben sitti gi oosettida gimbe achchan Xoossi ba kushen tumbe oykki eqqidayssa beyadis.

Amos7:16 «Ha7ikka GODAY nena gizayssa siya; neni tana
Amos7:17 Hessa gishshas amasiyaasa! Ne gishshas GODAY
Amos8:1 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY tana hara ajjuuta bessides; hessika teeray izan kumi diza keeshe.
Amos8:2 GODAY tana
Amos8:3 «Istti Xoossa Keeththan sissiza yeththay he wode yeehon laamettana; daro asa ahay awan awanka kundi attana; awanka coo yegetti attana» gees.
Amos8:4 Intteno metotida asa qohizaytoo! Qasse manqota biittafe dhayssana koyzaytoo! Hayssa siyite!
Amos8:5 Intte
Amos8:6 Gistte harqqoka muuruta gistte waagan bayzana; manqota biran
Amos8:7 Yaaqoobeynne iza zereththati izan ceeqettiza GODAY
Amos8:8 Hayssa geedon biittay buro qaaxxana; biittay bolla dizay wurikka yeekkana; Abbaye shaafay kixxidi guummizayssaththo biitta ubbay qaaththi yoshikuyoshikana» giidi barkka banan caaqqides.
Amos8:9 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Amos8:10 Intte layththan layththan bonchchiza ba7aaleza yeehon laammana; intte yexxiza yeththaaka waason laammana; diza pexi issi nay hayqqiin camo yeeho yeekkiza asa mala intte intte hu7e binana buucidi maaqa may7ana mala tani inttena ooththana; he wurseththa gallassay camo gallas gidana.
Amos8:11 Hekko tani biitta bolla kosha ehana wodey yaana; hessika asay Xoossa qaala siyana gafanne saamo attiin kaththa gafanne haaththa saamo gidenna.
Amos8:12 Derey wuri pudehappe dugeha gakkanaas arshey mokkizasoppe wullizaso gakkanaas GODAA qaala kosh yaanne haa yeemottanashin demmenna.
Amos8:13 He wode lo7o geela7otinne mino panththati saamoppe dendanayssan daaburana.
Amos8:14 Samaariya deren
Amos9:1 GODAY yarsho yarshizasoza millen eqqi dishin ta beyadis; izikka tana
Amos9:2 Istti duufo bookki gelidaakkoka ta kushey istta heeppe shoddi haa kessana; istti pude salo kezidaakkoka tani istta heeppe haa duge goochcha woththana.
Amos9:3 Istti pude Qarmeloose zumaa bolla kezi qotettidaakkoka ta kaaletta baada istta heeppe woththana; istti duge ciimma abba giddo gelidi taappe qotettizaakkoka heen istta shooshshi dukkana mala ta azazana.
Amos9:4 Istti ba morkketa kushen di7etti biikkoka heen istti mashshan hayqqana mala ta azazana; tani istta bolla ta ayfe lo7os gidontta iitas zaarana» gi azazides.
Amos9:5 Ubbaa Haariza GODAY izi biittayo bochchees; izakka seerawus; izin diza ubbay yeekkees; Nayle shaafay kixxi guummiza mala biitta ubbay qaaxxees; qasse zaaridi kixa haaththi wodhdhiza mala wodhdhana.
Amos9:6 Ba duussaso salo ooththiday
Amos9:7 GODAY
Amos9:8 Tani Ubbaa Haariza GODAY gede nagaranchcha Isra7eele asaa kawoteththaako xeellays; ta iza biittafe mulera dhayssana; gido attiin Yaaqoobe zereth ubbaa dhayssike» gees.
Amos9:9 «Be7ite kath zayzaren zayzariza mala Isra7eele asaa Ayzaabe kawoteththa giddon zayzarana mala ta azazana; gido attiin isttafe issaadeyka wora wodhdhi dhayenna.
Amos9:10 ‹Nu bolla aykko iitaykka gakkenna woykko nuna bochchenna› giza ta dere asaa garsan diza nagaranchchati ubbay olan hayqqana» gees GODAY.
Amos9:11 «Coo kundi laalettida keeththa mala gidida Dawite zereththata kawoteththas tani zaara essana wodey yaana; tani gimbeza zaara gimbana; laalettidayssaka ooraxissana; kaseyssaththo zaara ooththana.
Amos9:12 Hessaththoka Eedoome deren attidaytanne ta sunththan xeygettida dereta ubbaa istti laattana» gees GODAY.
Amos9:13 «Kath maxizayti maxi wursontta dishin goshsha wodey gakkees; woyne ayfe gum7izaadey gum7i giigontta dishin woyne puute tokkiza wodey gakkees; he wode mal7iza lo7o woyne ushshi zumaappe pulttana; zumbullatappeka goggana.
Amos9:14 Di7etti bida Isra7eele asaa haa istta dere zaara ehana; laalettida katamata zaari keexxidi izan de7ana; istti woyne tokkidi izappe agettida ushshu uyana; dumma dumma ayfiza mith tokkidi iza ayfe maana.
Amos9:15 Ta dere Isra7eele asaa tani kase istta biittan zaarada tokkana; tani isttas immida biittafe istti nam7anththo dhoqalletti dhayettenna» gees GODAY salo Xoossay.
Obadiah1:1 Abdiyuy be7ida ajjuuta; GODAY Eedoome gishshas Abdiyu kiittides; nu siyida Xoossa kiitay
Obadiah1:2 GODAY Eedoomes
Obadiah1:3 Nenoo zaalla gomppan dizayssoo! Ne duussaso dhoqqasohon keexxidayssoo! ‹Ta dizasoppe tana ziqqaso woththana dandayzay oonee?› gizayssoo! Ne wozina otoroteththi nena baleththides.
Obadiah1:4 Ne golle kafo mala keeha pude piradhdhikokka
Obadiah1:5 «Kaysoti woykko bonqqizayti omars yiikko baas gidizayssa ekkeettes; Kath maxizayti piixe ashsheettes; gido attiin ne morkketi issinokka ashshettenna.
Obadiah1:6 Intteno Eesawe zereththatoo! Intte keeth bonqqettides; hekko intte haaroy wuri bogettides.
Obadiah1:7 Nenara caaqettida laggeti nena baleththida; nena dosiza laggeti ne bolla morkketeththan dendida; ne kath midayti nees yarde woththidi nena ne dereppe gooddida; gido attiin istti hessa ne bolla ooththishin neni erabeekka.
Obadiah1:8 «He wode Eedoomeppe aadho eranchchata
Obadiah1:9 Eedoome deren de7iza asati wurikka hayqqana; Temaane oliza wolqqama olanchchati babbana.
Obadiah1:10 «Ne isha Yaaqoobe zereththata neni gene wodhida gishshas ne kawuyada mernaas dhayana.
Obadiah1:11 Yerusalaame morkketi penge menththidi haarida miish ubbaa bonqqiza wode neni lanqera eqqa xeelladasa; hessa gishshas Yerusalaame bolla saama yeggi gishetti ekkidaytappe neni dummatakka.
Obadiah1:12 Yuhuda deren de7iza ishata bolla gakkida meton neni ufayettana koshshennashin ufayettadasa; qasse istta dhayoninne meton ufayettananne otorettana nees bessennashin otorettadasa.
Obadiah1:13 Ta derey dhayza gallas istta pengera neni gelana bessennashin; istti dhayza gallas metotishin neni ufayettana bessennashin; qasseka istti dhayza gallas ne istta haaro boggana nees bessennashin.
Obadiah1:14 Goodettidi qotettidayta wodhana ne oyddu oge bolla naagana bessennashin naagadasa; qasse attida asata meto gallas ne aaththa immanaas bessennashin immadasa.
Obadiah1:15 «Ta Xoossay asa ubbaa bolla pirdiza wodey gakkida gishshas Eedoomee! Ne ooththida iita oosoy ne bolla simmana; hessa gishshas ne ooso mala ne ekkana.
Obadiah1:16 Anjjettida ta zuma bolla intte waaye ushshu uyida mala intte yuushon diza hankko derey waaye ushshu uyana; uyidayti wurikka dhayana.
Obadiah1:17 «Xiyoone zuman metoppe attanay daana; he zumayakka geesh gidana; Yaaqoobe derey bonqqettida ba haaro zaari ekkana.
Obadiah1:18 Yaaqoobe zereththati tama mala
Obadiah1:19 «Yuhuda dereppe dugeha baggara diza Negebe asay Eedoome biitta laattana; arshey wulliza baggara gadhan diza asati Filisxeeme
Obadiah1:20 Beti bida Isra7eele asay Alahe geetettiza dereppe simmidi Kanaane biittafe Sirafta gakkanaas diza biitta laattana; bete biidi Sirafta deren diza Isra7eele asay Negeben diza katamata laattana.
Obadiah1:21 Attida Isra7eele asati Xiyoone zumaa bolla uttidi Eedoome dere ayssana; qasse kawoteththayka Xoossas gidana» gi yootides.
Jonah1:1 Amaate naa Yoonaasakko GODAA qaalay
Jonah1:2 «Dendada he gita katamaa Nannawe ba; he katamaa asaa iitateth ta be7idayssa isttas yoota» gishe yides.
Jonah1:3 Gido attiin Yoonaasi GODAA sinththafe baqatidi Tarseese biitta baanaas dendides; izi Yoophphe katamaa wodhidi Tarseese biza markabe demmides; GODAA sinththafe baqatidi isttara Tarseese baanaas miish qanxxidi markabezan gelides.
Jonah1:4 Markabezi bishin GODAY abba bolla gote carko denththiin abba dambalay keehi darida gishshas markabezi meqqana gakkides.
Jonah1:5 Histtiin markabezan diza asay babbida gishshas wurikka ba xoossaako waassides; qasse markabezi kawuyana mala iza giddon diza caanaa denththidi abbaan olida; gidikkoka Yoonaasi markabezas garsa kifile wodhidi heen deexo dhisko wodhides.
Jonah1:6 Markabeza halaqay izakko biidi
Jonah1:7 Markabezan diza asay issoy issaa
Jonah1:8 Hessafe guye istti Yoonaasa
Jonah1:9 Histtiin Yoonaasi zaaridi
Jonah1:10 Hessa gishshas Xoossa sinththafe izi baqatizayssa izi isttas yootidayssafe asay erida gishshas keehi Babbidi
Jonah1:11 Qasse abba dambalay kaseyssafe haa darida gishshas asay Yoonaasa
Jonah1:12 Izikka isttas
Jonah1:13 Gido attiin markabezan diza asay markabeza guye abba lanqe kessanaas minththi laaggida shin abba dambalay keehi darida gishshas kessanaas dandaybeettenna.
Jonah1:14 Hessa gishshas isttas
Jonah1:15 Hessafe guye Yoonaasa denththidi abban oliin abba dambalay co7u gides.
Jonah1:16 Histtiin asay GODAAS keehi babbides; GODAAS yarsho yarshida; adinakka adinettida.
Jonah1:17 Yoonaasa mittana mala issi gita mole GODAY giigsiin he moleza ulon Yoonaasi heedzdzu gallassinne heedzdzu omars aqides.
Jonah2:1 Yoonaasi moleza ulon dishe ba GODAAKKO
Jonah2:2 «Tani tuggaa giddon dashe GODAA xeygiin izi taas koyides; tani hayqqidayti diza ciimma giddon dashe neekko waassadis; nekka ta waaso siyadasa.
Jonah2:3 Ne tana ciimma abba giddo duge yeggadasa; haaththi tana dooddides; ne Dambalay ta bollara aadhdhides.
Jonah2:4 Hessa gishshas tani
Jonah2:5 «Haaththay taas qoodhe gakkanaas mittides; ciimma abbay tana mittides; abbaa giddon diza maataykka ta hu7e bolla xaaxettides.
Jonah2:6 Tani zumata gars duge wodhdhadis; heen biittaa garsan mernaas gordan uttadis; gidikkoka abeet ta GODAWU! Neni ta shemppo ciimma ollafe kessadasa.
Jonah2:7 «Tani hayqqana matida wode nena GODAA qoppadis. Ta woosaykka neekko pude geeshsha keeth gakkides.
Jonah2:8 Hada eeqata kaallizayti wuri nenan GODAAN ammanettanayssa aggida.
Jonah2:9 Gido attiin ta galata nees yarshana; ta adinettidayssa ubbaaka gaththana; ays giikko atoteththi GODAAPPE yees» gi woossides.

Jonah3:1 GODAA qaalay nam7anththo Yoonaasakko
Jonah3:2 «Dendada he gita katamaa Nannawe baada tani nees yootiza qaalaa isttas awajja» gishe yides.
Jonah3:3 Histtiin Yoonaasi dendidi GODAA qaalaaththo Nannawe bides. Nannawey keehi gita katama; ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas heedzdzu gallas hemeththees.
Jonah3:4 Yoonaasi Nannawe katama bi gakkidi issi gallassa oge mala katamaas giddo biidi
Jonah3:5 Histtiin Nannawe asay Xoossaa ammanidi xooma awajjides; gitatappe guuththata gakkanaas wurikka maaqa may7ida.
Jonah3:6 Yo7ozi Nannawe kawookko gakkiin izi ba kawoteththaa araataappe wodhdhidi kawoteththaa may7o may7idayssa qaaridi maaqa may7idi bidinththan uttides.
Jonah3:7 Histtidi Nannawe asaas
Jonah3:8 Asaykka meheykka wuri maaqa may7o; asi wuri minththidi Xoossako waasso; ba iita ogeppenne qoho oosoppeka simmo.
Jonah3:9 Histtiko Xoossay nuus qadhettidi nu dhayontta mala ba wolqqama hanqofe simmanaakko oonee erizay» gides.
Jonah3:10 Istti ba iita ogeppe simmidayssa Xoossay be7idi isttas qadhettidi istta bolla ehana gida pirdaa aggides.
Jonah4:1 Yoonaasi gidikko he hanoza ubbaan ufayettibeenna; hessa gishshas keehi hanqettides;
Jonah4:2 Hessafe guye GODAA
Jonah4:3 Abeet GODAWU! Ha7i ta shemppo ekka; paxa duussafe taas hayqoy lo7o» gi woossides.
Jonah4:4 Histtiin GODAY izas
Jonah4:5 Yoonaasi katamaappe kezi biidi arshey mokkiza baggan uttides; katamaa bolla gakkizaaz beyanaas heen baas daase daasidi iza kuwan uttides.
Jonah4:6 Arshe seelappe Yoonaasa ashshanaas GODAY issi gose dolisides; he gosey diccidi Yoonaasa kuwasides; Yoonaasi he gosey gishshas keehi ufayettides.
Jonah4:7 Gido attiin wonteththa gallas maalado Xoossay guxune kiittides; he guxuneya gosey xapho duuththiin goseya meladus.
Jonah4:8 Arshey mokkiza wode Xoossay xuuggiza carko arshey mokkiza baggafe yeddides; hessafe dendidayssan Yoonaasi daaburana gakkanaas away Yoonaasa hu7e xuuggides; histtiin izi

Micah1:1 Yuhuda kawo Iyo7aatame
Micah1:2 Intteno deretoo; intte wurikka siyite! Ha biitta bolla dizayti wurikka haa ezgi siyite; salo GODAY ba geeshsha keeththaan uttidi intte iita oosoza intte bolla markkattees.
Micah1:3 Hekko Xoossi ba dizasoppe yaana; yiidikka biitta bollan dhoqqasohon dhoqqasohon hemettana.
Micah1:4 Muqaadday tama be7idi seeriza malanne haaththi aafora duge goggiza mala he wode zumati iza toho garsan seerana; shoobbatikka phalqetti wodhdhana.
Micah1:5 Hessi wuri hananay Yaaqoobey ooththida mooro gishshassinne Isra7eele nayta nagara gishshassa; Isra7eele asay iita ooththanaas gaaso gididay oonee? Izis waanna katamayo Samaariya gidekkee? Yuhuda asay eeqa goynnidi nagara ooththana mala gaththiday oonee? Yerusalaame gidekkee?
Micah1:6 Hessa gishshas tani Samaariya keeth laallettidasonne woyne miththi tokettizaso kessana; iza keexettida yochcha shuchcha ta duge shoobban olananne izi xapho shodda dhayssana.
Micah1:7 Izi eeqati wurikka meqerettana; izi eeqa keeththan diza laymatizaytas imettidaazi wuri taman xuugettana; izi misletakka ubbaa ta dhayssana; iza baas imettidayssa layman shiishshida mala ha7ikka izis dizaazi layman ekkizaaz gidana.
Micah1:8 Hessa geedon tani yeekkays
Micah1:9 Izi madunththay paxonttaaz gidana; izippe aadhdhi Yuhudassara gidana; ta derey geliza penge Yerusalaame gakkides.
Micah1:10 Geete deren haasayopite; yeeho mulekka yeekkofte; Beeti-Li7ofaaran gudulla bolla genderettite.
Micah1:11 Intteno Shafiren dizaytoo may7oy baynda kallo Yeellatishe aadhdhite; Xa7inan dizayti heeppe kezettenna; Beeti-Ezeeley ceece bolla dawus; intteska gakki shempanaaso gidanaas dandayukku.
Micah1:12 Metoppe shempanaas koshshan Maroten dizayti meton waayetteettes; hessika Yerusalaame penge gakkanaas iita metoy Xoossa achchafe yida gishshassa.
Micah1:13 Intteno Laakishen dizaytoo parata gaarera gaththi oyseththite. Xiyoone macca naytas koyro nagaray inttenakko. Isra7eeles qohoy intte achchafe beettides.
Micah1:14 Hessa gishshas intte Moreshet-Gates imota immana; Akiziibe katamay Isra7eele kawota baleththiza katama gidana.
Micah1:15 Inttenoo Mareeshan dizaytoo! Ta inttena xoonizaade intte bolla ehana; Isra7eeles bonchcho gididaazi Adulaame ha yaana.
Micah1:16 Intte isttan ufayettiza intte nayti inttefe di7etti baana gishshas intte hu7e bulusite.
Micah2:1 Iita ooththanaas qoppizaytassinne hiixan dishe gene ooththanaas yo7o tukkizaytas aayye ana! Omars qoppoyssa maalado wonttara poleettessinne hessa ooththanaaskka wolqqara deettes.
Micah2:2 Asa gade amottida mala oykkeettes; asa keeththika amottidi ekkeettes; ba lagge keeththinne biitta baleththon ekkeettes.
Micah2:3 Hessa gishshas Xoossi
Micah2:4 He wode derey intte bolla miicci kaa7ana; inttena qidhishe
Micah2:5 Hessa gishshas Xoossa duulata giddon gade saama yeggi gishanaadey oonikka deenna.
Micah2:6 Istta nabeti
Micah2:7 «Yaaqoobe soo asatoo hessaththo geetettanaas bessizee? Xoossa ayanay aggi aadhdherennee? Heytantta malakka ooththizee?» gi oychchana; «Suure oge hemettizaytas ta qaalay lo7o ooththi erennee?
Micah2:8 Wurseththan intte ta dereta bolla morkke gidi dendideta; isttas ola qofay baynda dishin saroteththara aadhdhizayta bollafe seelo may7o intte qaari ekkideta.
Micah2:9 Istti dosiza istta keeththafe ta asa macca nayta kessi efideta; ta bonchchoka istta naytappe mernaas ekkideta.
Micah2:10 Dendidi hessafe kichchite; hessi inttes shempposo gidenna; gaasoykka tunidessinne daro moorettides.
Micah2:11 Baleththiza wordo asi yiidi
Micah2:12 «Yaaqoobe! Tumappe ta inttena issiso shiishshana; Isra7eeletappe attidayta ta issi bolla ehana; yire giddon diza mehe malanne demban heemettiza mehe mala tani inttena issi bolla shiishshana; intte derey wuri as xalla gidana.
Micah2:13 Menththizay isttafe kaseti kezi baana; isttika pengeza menththidi kezi baana; istta kawoy Xoossay isttafe sinththe aadhdhi kaaleththana» gida.
Micah3:1 Qasseka
Micah3:2 Intte lo7o ixxideta; iita qasse dosideta; ta asaa galba shooqideta; istta ashokka meqeththafe shaakkideta.
Micah3:3 Ta asaa asho mideta; galbaaka shooqideta; istta meqeththika menththereththideta; asho caaciza bashen caaciza malanne distten doyssiza asho mala qanxxereththideta» ta gadis.
Micah3:4 Isttika pude Xoossako waassana shin Xoossi istta waaso siyenna; iitateththaa gishshas he wode Xoossay ba ayfeso isttafe haraso zaarana.

Micah3:6 Hessa gishshas istta bolla qammay beettontta
Micah3:7 Buro marotizayti kawuyana; tinbite yootizayti yeellatana; wurikka ba ayfeso kammana; gaasoykka isttas zaaroy Xoossa achchafe baynda gishshassa» gides.
