Micah3:9 Intteno Yaaqoobe soo asa kaaleththizaytoo! Intteno Isra7eele dere haarizaytoo! Tumu pirda kadhizaytoo! Tumu gididaaz ubbaa mirqqizaytoo! Ane siyite.
Micah3:10 Xiyoone
Micah3:11 Kaaleththizayti matta7es pirdeettes; qeeseti miishsha gishshas tamaarseettes; Nabetikka miishshe mida gishshas yooteettes. Hessa ubbaa ooththidikka
Micah3:12 Hessa gishshas intte geedon Xiyooney goshsha biitta mala goyettana; Yerusalaameykka qolettida keeththa doore gidana; Xoossa Keeththay diza zumaykka sharafa maatay iza bolla diccida zuma gidana.
Micah4:1 Wurseththa wode Xoossa keeththi iza bolla diza zumay hara zuma ubbaafe aadhdhi beettana; hara zumatappe bollara dhoqqu gaana; dereykka izakko goochchana.
Micah4:2 Daro kawoteththati izakko yiidi
Micah4:3 Izi daro asa giddon pirdana; haahoninne matan diza wolqqama katama giddon diza oosh essana; istti ba giththa mashsha maarasha
Micah4:4 Issi asi ba woyne miththa garsankka ba balase miththa garsan uttana; istta babisiza miishshi deenna; Ubbaafe wolqqama GODAA doonay hayssa yootides.
Micah4:5 Hankko derey ba eeqa sunththan bees; nuni qasse mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas nu GODAA sunththan baana.
Micah4:6 GODAY
Micah4:7 Gundatappe attidaytanne qohettidayta ta istta mino dere kessana; he gallassayfe doommidi mernaa gakkanaas GODAY Xiyoone zuman istta bolla kawotana.
Micah4:8 Haysso nenan uttidi mehe heemmiza dhoqqa zumazoo! Xiyoone macca nayta naagana giiga uttida zumazoo! Beni ne haariza derey nees simmana; ne kawoteththay Yerusalaame macca nays gidana.
Micah4:9 Histtiin ne ha7i aazas waassay? Nees kawoy bayee? Neni miixay oykkida maccassay mala un7ettiday nena zorizay dhaynee?
Micah4:10 Hanne Xiyoone macca nayee! Miixattiza maccassay mala ne metotana; ha7i qasse ne katamappe gede kezada coo demban de7ana bessiza gishshas Baabiloone baana; ne hee baada heen ne morkketa kusheppe attana; GODAY nena heen ne morkketappe ashshana.
Micah4:11 Ha7i qasse daro hankko dere asay ne bolla shiiqides; Isttika
Micah4:12 Gido attiin istti Xoossa qofa erettenna; bukettanaas balen shiiqiza mirqqe kaththa mala bana shiishshizaade qofa istti erettenna.
Micah4:13 Hanne Xiyoone nayee dendada kaththaa bukka; ta nees birata kacenne xarqimala xugunth immana; nekka hankko dereza izan liiqisana» gides. Istti genen shiishshidayssa Xoossas
Micah5:1 Hanne neni ola asata katamaye
Micah5:2 Hanne ne qasse Beeteliheeme Efraata
Micah5:3 Hessa gishshas yelizaara miixattada yelana gakkanaas Isra7eeley yegetta attana; hankko attida ishatikka simmidi Isra7eele asara walakettana.
Micah5:4 GODAA wolqqan GODAA ba Xoossa sunththa gitateththan minni eqqananne ba mehe izi heemmana; he wode iza wolqqateththay biitta gaxa gakkana gishshas asay giiga duus daana.
Micah5:5 Isttas saroteththi iza gidana. GODAY Isra7eele Asaa Ashshananne Istta Morkketa Dhayssana Asoore asay nu biitta worajjishin nu miixataka menththi gelishin laappun heemmizayta hessafekka osppun halaqata nu iza bolla denththana.
Micah5:6 Asoore derey mashshan Namuruude derey koohoppe shodettida giththa mashshan haarettana; Asoore asay nu biitta worajjishininne nu dhas bochchishin izi nuna ashshana.
Micah5:7 Yaaqoobe zereththafe attidayti daro dere giddon Xoossa achchafe wodhdhiza ira mala maata bolla loddara puusishe biitta kaaleththiza puuse ira mala asappe aykkoka koyontta asa gidana.
Micah5:8 Wora do7ata giddon diza gaammoy
Micah5:9 Ne kushey ne morkketa xoonidi dhoqqu dhoqqu gaana; ne morkketi wurikka dhayana.
Micah5:10 He wode Xoossi
Micah5:11 Intte biittan diza katamatakka dhayssana; intte miixataka ubbaa laallana.
Micah5:12 Intte marotizayssaka dhayssana; hessafe guye marotekketa.
Micah5:13 Masetti kezida intte eeqa misletanne intte eeqasohotakka ta intte giddofe dhayssana; hayssafe guye intte intte kushen ooththidaytas goynneketa.
Micah5:14 Asheero geetettiza eeqiza misleyo ta intte giddofe shoddana; ta intte katamaakka dhayssana.
Micah5:15 Taas azazettontta dereta wolqqama hanqon ta halo kessana» gees.
Micah6:1 Xoossi gizayssa siyite; «Dendite! Intte meto zumatas yootite; zumatikka intte gizayssa siyetto.
Micah6:2 Zumatoo! Xoossa mooto siyite; Intteno biitta mino xaphotoo siyite; Xoossas asara palamay dees; izi Isra7eele naytara pirdeettes.
Micah6:3 Ta derezoo! Ta nena wosttadinaa? Ta nees aazan tooho gidadinaa? Ane taas zaaro imma.
Micah6:4 Ta nena Gibxeppe kessadis; aylleteththa biittafekka wozzadis; nena kaaleththana mala Muse
Micah6:5 Ta derezoo! Mo7aabe kawoy Balaaqey iza zoriin Bi7oore naa Balaamey izas zaaroyssa ane yuushshi qopite; Xoossa xilloteththa ooso intte shaakki erana mala
Micah6:6 Ta ay ekkada Xoossa sinththe shiiqoo? De7o Xoossas wostta goynnoo? Xuugettiza yarsho issi layththa marara gaththa ekka baada iza sinth shiiqooshaa?
Micah6:7 Issi shii dharshotanne 10
Micah6:8 Asa nawu! Izi nena lo7o miish bessides Xoossi neeppe koyzay aazee? Lo7o ooththana mala maaroteth ne dosana malanne Xoossa sinththan neni ashketeththara baana mala gidennee?
Micah6:9 Xoossas baboy aadhdhida erateththa; Siyite! Xoossi katamayo hizgi xeygees
Micah6:10 Iitateththa keeththatoo! Intte genen shiishshida intte miish wordo maka miishshan makki intte shiishshida shuunniza miishshaa ta doganee?
Micah6:11 baleththiza maka miish oykkidaade
Micah6:12 Izi deren dure asati as qohizaadentta; izin diza asay wordanchcha xalla; istta inxarsay baleththiza inxarsa.
Micah6:13 Hessa gishshas ta nena dhayssana dendadis; ne nagara geedon ta nena laallana.
Micah6:14 Ne maanashin kallaka; ne qanththay coo mela daana; Ne shiishshanashin aykkoka nees shiiqenna; Ne shiishshidayssa tani mashshasinne tooras aaththa immana.
Micah6:15 Ne zerana shin maxakka; wogara miththa zayte ne gum7ana shin he zayteza tiyetta; woyne miththa ayfe xunqqa shiishshanashin woyne ushshu ne uyakka.
Micah6:16 Kawo Omire wogaanne kawo Akaabe keeththa wogaa ne ubbaa shiishsha oykkadasa; nekka istta haysi7e kaalladasa. Hessa gishshas nena dhayssas
Micah7:1 Tana aayye ana! Woyne miththa giddofe maxishin attida miththa ayfe bone qoriza asa mala gidadis; meetettiza woyne miththa ayfey deenna; nu izas amottiza eleli gakkiza balase miththa ayfeykka beettibeenna.
Micah7:2 Xoossas babbiza asi biitta bollafe dhaydes; suure asi issaadeyka baawa; asi wurikka suuth gussanaas zuggees; issi issi asi ba isha yarden oykkees.
Micah7:3 Iza kushey iita ooththanaas tamaardes; dere heemmizaadey kushe genththo koyees; pirdiza daannayka matta7e ekkees; wolqqamati bana koshshidaazi ooththeettes; wurikka issi bolla duulateettes.
Micah7:4 Istta garsafe lo7o geetettidaadey agunththa mala keehi lo7o geetettizaadey qasse kindichcho mala inttena naagizaytas wodey gakkides; Xoossa pirda gallassay gakkides; asay shirotana wodey gakkides;
Micah7:5 ne lagge ammanoppa; ne laggenkka ammanettofa; ne ki7on nenara aqizaariska ne yootizaaz akeekada yoota.
Micah7:6 Attuma nay ba aawa kadhana; macca naykka ba aayi bolla
Micah7:7 Tani gidikko Xoossa hidota ooththays; tana ashshida ta Xoossaa naagays; ta GODAYKKA taas siyana.
Micah7:8 Ta morkkezoo! Ta bolla gakkidaazi nena ufayssofo; kundikokka ta dendana; Ta dhuman uttikokka Xoossay taas poo7o gidana.
Micah7:9 Ta iza qohida gishshas izi ta gishshas eqqana gakkanaassinne taas pirdana gakkanaas Xoossay hanqettikokka ta dandayana; izi tana poo7on kessana; tanikka iza xilloteth beyana.
Micah7:10 Ta morkkezakka hessa beyandus; iza yeellatana. Tana
Micah7:11 Intte intte katama gimbe gimbiza wodeynne intte dhasika aassiza gallassi yaana.
Micah7:12 He gallas asay Asooreppe Gibxe katamata
Micah7:13 Istta ooso geedonne izin diza asaa gaason biittaya aykkoy bayndaaz gidana.
Micah7:14 Wora giddoninne cilila maata giddon barkka dizayti ne mehe gidida ne dereta neni ne guufera heemma; beni wode mala istti Baasaaneninne Gala7aaden heemettetto.
Micah7:15 Ne kase Gibxeppe kezida wodeza mala tani ta malata istta bessana.
Micah7:16 Ayzaabeti hessa beyananne yeellatana; isttaskka wolqqay dhayana; istti ba doona ba kushen tuccana; istta hayththika tullana.
Micah7:17 Biitta bollara tiran gooshettiza medheteththata mala
Micah7:18 Dhayshe attida zereththaa nagara atto gi maariza ne mala Xoossi oonee? Neni mernaas hanqettaka; maaro gelizayssan ne ufayettaasa.
Micah7:19 Simmadakka nuus ne qadhettaasa; nu nagarakka ne toho garsan yedhdhaasa; nu qohozakka ubbaa gede cima abba giddo yeggaasa.
Micah7:20 Beni wodeppe oykkada kase nu aawatas caaqo qaala ne gelida mala Yaaqoobes ammaneteth Abrahaames maaroteth ooththaasa.
Nahum1:1 Elqoshe dere as Nahomey Nannawe dhayo gishshas yootida ajjuuta maxaafay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Nahum1:2 GODAY zil7ettizanne halo kessiza Xoossa; GODAY halo kessizanne hanqon kumida Xoossa. GODAY halo kessizaadenne pala miishshi izan kumidaade. GODAY ba baalgaarata bolla halo kessees; ba morkketa bolla ba hanqo ehees.
Nahum1:3 GODAY hanqettanaas eesotenna; iza wolqqayka gita. GODAY mooranchcha qaxxayontta aggenna; gote carkoynne abba dambalay izas oge; shaaray iza toho gudulla.
Nahum1:4 Abba seeridi melissees; Shaafata ubbaa micinchchees. Baasaaneynne Qarmeloosey shullida. Libaanoose ciishshatikka qoqofettida.
Nahum1:5 Zumati iza sinththan kokkorida; zumbullatikka seerida. Iza sinththan biittay
Nahum1:6 Iza hanqora eqettana dandayzay oonee? iza hanqo minoza tookkana dandayzay oonee? Iza hanqoy tama mala eexxides; zaallatikka iza sinththafe za7ida.
Nahum1:7 GODAY lo7o; meto gallassika qotetti attizaso. Izan ammanettizayta naagees.
Nahum1:8 Gido attiin izi Nannawe wolqqama di7o haaththan dhayssana; ba morkketa dhumay dizaso yedeththana.
Nahum1:9 Istti Xoossa bolla ay duulatikkoka izi istta dhayssana. Metoy nam7anththo dendenna.
Nahum1:10 Istti agunththan qaxettana; ba woyne ushshan istti maththottana; tamay istta buuxa mala maana.
Nahum1:11 Hanne Nannawe! GODAA bolla iita duulatizaytinne iita zore zorettizayti ne garsafe beettida;
Nahum1:12 GODAY
Nahum1:13 Ha7ikka ta istta qambara ne morgefe menththa diggana; ne izan qashettida sansalatakka duuththa yeggana» gees.
Nahum1:14 Hanne Nannawe GODAY nena
Nahum1:15 Hekko mishiraachcho yootizayssi
Nahum2:1 Hanne Nannawe! Nena qohanay ne bolla yides; ne miixa naaga; ne oge xomosa; minththa gixxa; ne wolqqa ubbaa minththa.
Nahum2:2 Dhayssizayti istta mela ashshikokka
Nahum2:3 Iza wottadarata gondalley zo7o; iza olanchchatikka zo7o may7o may7ida; istti olettanaas giigettida gallas istta para-gaareta biratay xolqees; istta toora toomay luuxxees.
Nahum2:4 Para-gaareti demban yaanne haa buraqeettes; ogeta bollaka shom7ushom7u geettes; laciza xomppe misateettes; wolqqanththa mala wawaci geettes.
Nahum2:5 Doorettida olanchchata xeygees; gido attiin istti yishe ogen dhuphetteettes; katamaa gimbeko woxeettes; ola teqqiza gondalleyka heen dees.
Nahum2:6 Shaafa pengey waggi gi doyettides; kawoteththa keeththi kundides.
Nahum2:7 Nannawey kawuyiin izi kawoya di7ettada buussi attonttayssi kaseti yootettides. Izi macca aylleti haraphphe mala yeekkana; bantta tirakka iccana.
Nahum2:8 Nannawey eele haaththa mala; izi haaththika miccana. «Eqqa! Eqqa!» gi istti waassana; gido attiin guye simmizay deenna.
Nahum2:9 Iza minjja keeththan dagattida aqotas qooday deenna; biidi biraakka
Nahum2:10 Qocirettadus; bonqqettadus; kallottadus; wozinay taahides; gulbatey kokkorides; ashoy qaaxxides; ayfesoykka gilqides.
Nahum2:11 Gaammoti kase de7iza gongoloy
Nahum2:12 Gaammoy ba maratas gidanayssa keena wodhides; maccataska cuulli wodhides; ba wodhidayssa ba shemppizason
Nahum2:13 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Nahum3:1 Suuththa katamays aayye ana; wordoynne bonqqay izin kumides; izippe qociretti shiiqidayssi efinkka wurenna.
Nahum3:2 Xurqafe giirissi
Nahum3:3 Toganchchay toggees; mashshay popol7u gees; tooray xolqettees; daroy hayqqides; ahay aha bolla korettides; izas qoodaykka deenna; aadhdhi bizasoykka beettibeenna.
Nahum3:4 Hayssi ubbay haniday buute aaththada as baleththizanne muurenniza laymay gaasonna. Iza ba laymateththan kawoteththa
Nahum3:5 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Nahum3:6 Tani ne bolla buura olana; ta nena kadhana; qidheska aaththa immana.
Nahum3:7 Nena be7izayti neeppe baqatishe
Nahum3:8 Neni Abbaye shaafa achchan diza
Nahum3:9 Tophphiyaynne Gibxey izis zaway baynda wolqqa; Puuxeynne Liibiyay izo maaddizayta;
Nahum3:10 Gido attiin iza di7ettadus; goodetta badus; izi nayti ogeta tiixa bolla dinccettida; izi daannata bolla saamay wodhdhides; izi gita asati ubbay sansalatan qashettida.
Nahum3:11 Nenikka qasse maththottananne qotettana; morkketappe attizaso ne koyana.
Nahum3:12 Ne miixati ubbay muussas gakkida balase miththas koyro ayfe mala; istti qaaxxiza wode istta ayfeti mizaade doonan wodhdheettes.
Nahum3:13 Hekko ne ola asay wurikka macca xalla! Ne zawati ne morkketas waggi gi doyettida; istta kolatatakka tamay mides.
Nahum3:14 Nena giddoththiza wodes haath duuqqa; nees teqe minththa giigsa; mana urqqa koya; Urqqaa yedhdhada xuube ooththa.
Nahum3:15 Nena heen tamay maana; Mashshayka nena qanxxana; gumbaroy miza mala nena garccana; gumbaro mala yeletta; boole mala dara.
Nahum3:16 Ne zal7anchchata salo xoolinttepekka darsadasa. Istti gidikko biittayo boole mala pitti miidi piradhdhi bida.
Nahum3:17 Nena naagizayti boole mala; ne gita asati meego gallas gimbe garsan uttiza gumbaro mala. Istti arshey kezishin piradhdheettes; istti piradhdhi bizasoy awakko erettenna.
Nahum3:18 Asoore kawoo
Nahum3:19 Ne madunth paththana dandayzay deenna; neni hayqos gaththiza meqo meqqadasa; ne gishshas siyida ubbay ne kundeththaan ufayetti kushe baqqana; zaway baynda ne menxe iitateththi bochchonttay oonee?
Habakkuk1:1 Nabe Imbaaqos ajjuutan qonccida kiitay hayssafe kaallizayssa.
Habakkuk1:2 GODAWU! Ne tana maaddana mala ta nena xeygishin ne ayde gakkanaas siyikkii? «Qohoy darides» gaada ta waassishin ne ayde gakkanaas ashshikii?
Habakkuk1:3 Ne tana aazas qohoy darshin bessay? Hayssa mala gene oosoy oosettishin ne waana co7u gaada xeellay? Mooroynne makkallay ta sinththan dees. Ooshshinne palamay biitta bolla darides.
Habakkuk1:4 Hessa gishshas wogay leppides; tuma pirday deenna; tuma pirday geellattana mala iitati xillota un7eththeettes.
Habakkuk1:5 «Inttes yootettiinkka ammanontta inttena ta intte paxa dishin issi miish ooththana gishshas ane ha7i asaa xeellite; be7idinne daro malalettite.
Habakkuk1:6 Baas gidontta keeththanne dizaso oykkanaas biitta ubbaa worajjiza shemppo iitatanne pilatata Baabiloone dere asaa tani denththana.
Habakkuk1:7 Isttika babisizaytanne daganththizayta; istta pirdaynne bonchchoy isttafe kezana.
Habakkuk1:8 Istta paray maaheppeka pilata; omarsa kana suytetappeka menxe iita; istta toga asaykka too pilatanne haahoppe yizayta. Baqqi ekkidi eleliza golle kafo mala piradhdheettes.
Habakkuk1:9 Wurikka genes gixxi kezida; istta ola asay bazzo biitta carko mala gede sinththe hordofees. Di7ettidayta ace mala shiishshees.
Habakkuk1:10 Kawota leqqees; dere haarizayta qidhi kaa7ees; ola miixa ubbaa leqqees; biitta issiso shiishshi guuppidi katamata baas oykkees.
Habakkuk1:11 Hessafe guye gote carko mala pitti ekki bees; heyti ba wolqqa baas xoossa kessida nagaranchchata» gees.
Habakkuk1:12 Abeet GODAWU! Ne mernaasofe daasa gidikkii? Ta Geeshshawu
Habakkuk1:13 Ne ayfeti iita xeellontta mala keehi geeshsha; neni qoho co7u ga xeellanaas dandayakka; histtiin as baleththizayta aazas co7u gadii? He asati baappe keehi xilliza asata dhayssishin ne aazas co7u gay?
Habakkuk1:14 Neni asaa abba giddon diza mole malanne GODAY isttas baynda abba giddon diza medheteththa mala ooththadasa.
Habakkuk1:15 Iita morkkey istta wursika manxakora oykki kessana; izi istta gitenkka oykki goochchana; ba woththizason istta shiishshi woththana; hessankka ufayettidi hashshu gaana.
Habakkuk1:16 Hessankka shempidi diza gishshassinne izi miza qumay modhdho gidida gishshas ba oykkida gitezas yarsho yarshees; qasseka ba shiishshizasozas exaane cuwasees.
Habakkuk1:17 Histtiin izi wontiin wontiin pacey baynda ba gite yeggi yeggi mole oykkiza mala derezakka mishay baynda wodhanaas bessizee?
Habakkuk2:1 Tani naage naagizason eqqana; miixa gimbe bolla kezada heen takkana. Ta oyshaas GODAY ay zaaro immanakko ta dizason daada iza naagana.
Habakkuk2:2 Xoossi Imbaaqos
Habakkuk2:3 Ne ajjuutazi baas imettida wode naagees; izikka wurseththa gishshas yootees
Habakkuk2:4 «Hekko izi otorettides; iza amoy suure gidenna; xillo asi gidikko ammanon dees.
Habakkuk2:5 Dureteththi as baleththees; otoranchchas mulekka shemppoy deenna; izi duufo mala yora; wodhiza hayqo malakka kalo erenna; dere ubbaa shiishsheessinne di7i ekki bees.
Habakkuk2:6 Histtiin hessa mala asa bolla qidheninne kadhen asay
Habakkuk2:7 Ne acon yeggida asati ne qoppontta ne bolla dendettennee? Istti beeggidi nena daganththettenee? Hessafe guye ne istta kushen kundana.
Habakkuk2:8 Ne daro dere miish bonqqida gishshas hankko bonqqettonttayti nena bonqqana; ne asa suuth gussadasa; deraa
Habakkuk2:9 «Wordora baleththi ekkida miishshan baas daana keeth keexxizaadessinne ba morkke kusheppe attanaas ba keeth dhoqqasohon keexxizaades aayye ana!
Habakkuk2:10 Daro asa shemppoy dhayana mala qachchadasa; ne keeththa bollanne ne bolla dhayssizaaz ehadasa.
Habakkuk2:11 Gimbe giddon shuchchi waassees; giddon goda eqqida miththatikka izas zaaro immeettes.
Habakkuk2:12 «Suuth gussidinne iita ooththidi katama essizaytas aayye ana!
Habakkuk2:13 Asa oosoy ubbay taman xuugettana mala dereykka mela daaburana mala GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossay ubbaa woththibeennee?
Habakkuk2:14 Abbay kumiza mala biittay GODAA gitateth eron kumana.
Habakkuk2:15 «Asa kalloteth beyanaas ba laggeta ushshu ushshizaadessinne istti uyidi maththottana gakkanaas woyne ushshu duuqqizaades aayye ana!
Habakkuk2:16 Neni bonchcho gishshas yeellatana; hessika ha7i taray nees gidida gishshas uyada gandigara; ne kallotta. GODAA ushachcha kushen diza hanqo xuu7ay ne bolla simmana; kase nees diza bonchchoza kawushshateththan laammana.
Habakkuk2:17 Ne Libaanoose bolla ooththida geney nena mittana; neni medosata dhayssidayssi zaari nena daganththana; hessika ne asa suuth gussida gishshassinne dereta
Habakkuk2:18 «Asa kushey massi giigsida eeqanne wordo haasayza misles ay go7ay dizee? Histtiin iza ooththidaadey barkka ba ooson ammanettiza gishshassinne isttika haasayanaas dandayontta eeqa ooththiza gishshassa.
Habakkuk2:19 Miththaa
Habakkuk2:20 GODAY gidikko ba Geeshsha keeththan dees. Biitta bolla diza derey wurikka iza sinththan co7u go» gides.
Habakkuk3:1 Nabe Imbaaqoy yeththan shiishshida woossa.
Habakkuk3:2 Abeet GODAWU! Ta ne goobateththa gishshas siyadis. GODAWU ne oosoykka tana yashissides; neni ne ooso nu woden ooraththa; ne oosoti nu wodenkka erettana mala ooththarkkii! Hanqo wodekka maaroteth qopparkkii!
Habakkuk3:3 Xoossi Temaaneppe Geeshshayka Paaraane zuma bollafe yides; Iza bonchchoy salo kammi oykkides; Iza galataykka biitta bolla kumides.
Habakkuk3:4 Iza poo7oy awa arshe poo7o mala; awa xalqqey iza kusheppe kezides; iza wolqqayka heen qotettides.
Habakkuk3:5 Iita hargey izappe sinththara bides; hada hayqoykka iza geedo kaallides.
Habakkuk3:6 Izi eqqiin biittay qaaxxides; izi xeellidi asaa kokkorisides; Mernaas diza zumati laaleteth piski gida; Beniisofe diza zumatikka woddida; Iza ogey mernaassa.
Habakkuk3:7 Tophphiya dunkaaneti metotettishin
Habakkuk3:8 GODAWU! Ne haaththata bolla hanqettadii? Ne hanqoy haaththa pulttota bolla dizee? Neni ne paratanne xooniza para-gaareta toggada kaaleththida wode abba bolla hanqettadii?
Habakkuk3:9 Neni ne wondafe giigsadasa; yiishshay nees yaana mala azazadasa; biitta phalqada haath kessadasa.
Habakkuk3:10 Zumati nena be7idi mannida; Haaththaa dambalay aadhdhi bides; abbay ceeqettides; abbaa dambalakka pude denththides.
Habakkuk3:11 Ne pirisa yeddida ne yiishshatappenne xolqettiza ne toora poo7oppe dendidayssan arsheynne aginay ba dizason eqqi attida.
Habakkuk3:12 Neni biitta bolla hanqon simerettadasa; deretakka hanqon yedhdhadasa.
Habakkuk3:13 Neni ne dere ashshanaasinne ne tiydaade ashshanaas kezadasa
Habakkuk3:14 Gote carko mala nuna laallanaas yidayssa
Habakkuk3:15 Neni abba ne paratan yedhisiza woden ciimma abbay qaaxxees.
Habakkuk3:16 Tani siyadis; ta wozinaykka dagammides; Iza giirssafe dendidayssan ta metershay kokkorides. Babon taas maracey qaaxxides. Taas gulbatey kokkorides; gidikkoka nu bolla worajjiza dereza bolla metoy yaana gallas ta gencca naagays.
Habakkuk3:17 Balase geetettiza miththay ayfontta aggikokka woyne miththafe ayfey beettontta aggiko wogara miththika ayfontta aggiko goshsha gadey kath immontta aggiko Dorsi yiren dontta aggikokka Miizi zedhen dontta aggikokka
Habakkuk3:18 Tani ta GODAAN ufayettana; ta izan attida Xoossan ufayettana.
Habakkuk3:19 GODA Ta Xoossay taas wolqqa; ta tohota izi genessa toho mala minththo; izi tana dhoqqasohora hemeththana. Yexxizayta kaaleththizaades yeththa miishshan yexettida mazamure.
Zephaniah1:1 Amoxe naa Iyosiyaasi Yuhudan kawotida wode Hizqiyaasa naa
Zephaniah1:2 GODAY
Zephaniah1:3 GODAY
Zephaniah1:4 GODAY
Zephaniah1:5 Fooqe bolla kezidi salo medheteththatas goynnizayta
Zephaniah1:6 GODAA kaallanaappe guye simmizayta
Zephaniah1:7 GODAA gallassay matida gishshas Ubbaa haariza GODAA sinththan co7u giite; GODAY yarsho giigsides; ba xeygidayta baas dummasides.
Zephaniah1:8 «GODAA yarsho gallas daannatanne kawoza nayta
Zephaniah1:9 He wode allaga xoossata pengen guppizayta
Zephaniah1:10 GODAY
Zephaniah1:11 Intteno Makitesha giyan dizaytoo! Waassite; gaasoykka izan zal7iza zal7anchchati ubbay wurana; biran zal7izaytikka ubbay hayqqana.
Zephaniah1:12 He wode ta Yerusalaame giddoza xomppera koyana; aykko hirgay baynda badhdhi gi uttidayta
Zephaniah1:13 Istti haarida haaroy bonqqettana; istta keeththay laalettana; istti keeth keexxanashin ba keexxida keeththan deettenna; woyne mith tokkanashin ba tokkida woynezappe oosettida ushshaa uyettenna» gees.
Zephaniah1:14 «GODAAPPE yaana gita gallassay matides; hessika eeson yaana; GODAA gallassan siyettana yeehoy camo; heen olanchchati camo waaso waassana.
Zephaniah1:15 He gallassay bashsha gallas
Zephaniah1:16 He gallassay gimbettida katamata bollanne adussa gimbeta bolla ola zayeynne ola waasoy siyettiza gallas gidana.
Zephaniah1:17 Asay qooqeththo hemettana mala asaa bolla tani ceece yeddana; asay GODAA bolla nagara ooththida gishshas istta suuththi di7o mala gukkana; istta ahaykka buura mala olettana.
Zephaniah1:18 GODAA bashsha gallas istta biraynne worqqay istta ashshanaas dandayenna. Biittay kumeth iza hanqon dhayana; iza zil7eteththa suulen biitta ubbay xuugettana; biitta bolla diza ubbaa bolla qoppontta dishin wurseth ehana» gees GODAY.
Zephaniah2:1 Intteno yeellay baynda deretoo! Ane issi bolla shiiqite!
Zephaniah2:2 Bashsha gallassay gakkanaappe kasetidi
Zephaniah2:3 Intteno biitta bolla diza ashketoo; iza azazokka polizaytoo! GODAA koyite; Xilloteththinne ashketeth koyite; GODAA hanqo gallassafe intte attanaakko oonee erizay!
Zephaniah2:4 Gaazay bula biitta gidana; Asqeloonaykka laaletta attana. Azaxooney seeta gallas kayzana. Aqarooney shodettana.
Zephaniah2:5 Intteno abba achchan dizaytoo! Kelite dere asatoo
Zephaniah2:6 Kaalite asay diza abba achcha biittay heenththanchchata duussasonne dorsa yire gidana.
Zephaniah2:7 Hessika Yuhudappe casha attidaytas gidana; isttika heen baas aqota demmana; Gadey qammishin Asqeloona kataman diza keeththatan aqana; GODAY istta Xoossay istta naagana; isttafe di7ettidayssaka isttas zaarana.»
Zephaniah2:8 GODAY
Zephaniah2:9 Hessa gishshas GODAY Ubbaafe Wolqqama Isra7eele Xoossay
Zephaniah2:10 Bantta otoroteththafe dendidayssan istti Ubbaafe Wolqqama Xoossa deraa cayida gishshassinne qidhida gishshas hessi istta bolla gakkana.
Zephaniah2:11 GODAY he biitta eeqa xoossata ubbaa dhayssiza wode izi istta yashissizayssa gidana; Abba achchan diza dereti ubbay issoy issoy ba dizason dishe izas goynnana.
Zephaniah2:12 «Intteno Tophphiya asatoo! Intte ta mashshan siifettana.»
Zephaniah2:13 Izi ba kushe pudeha baggan diza dereta bolla denththana; Asoore dhayssana. Nannawekka bulasana; bazzo biitta mala melissana.
Zephaniah2:14 Dorsa wudeynne mehe wudey
Zephaniah2:15 Kase ufayssan diza katamaya hanno; izakka ba wozinan
Zephaniah3:1 Makkallanchchayssinne tunidaaris
Zephaniah3:2 Iza oonaska azazettuku; ooni zoriinkka ekkuku; GODAANKKA ammanettuku; ba Xoossakokka shiiqukku.
Zephaniah3:3 Izo kaaleththizayti xaaggiza gaammo mala. Izo ayssizaytikka wontos ashshontta miza kana suyte mala.
Zephaniah3:4 Izin diza nabeti otoranchchatanne as baleththizayta. Qeeseti Xoossa Keeththa tuniseettes; woga bollaka makkalleettes.
Zephaniah3:5 Izin diza GODAY izi xillo. Mulekka baletti erenna; maalado maalado suure pirdees; ubbaa gallassika daaburi erenna; gido attiin makkallanchchatas yeellay deenna.
Zephaniah3:6 GODAY
Zephaniah3:7 Ta he katamayo
Zephaniah3:8 GODAY
Zephaniah3:9 He wode asay ubbay GODAA sunth xeygana malanne sigan izas haggazana mala ta istta doona geeshshana.
Zephaniah3:10 Tophphiya shaafatappe he pinththan laaletti dishe taas goynniza ta derey taas yarsho ehana.
Zephaniah3:11 Intte ta bolla polida qoho ubbaafe dendidayssan; he gallas yeellatekketa; ba otoreteththan ufayettizayta
Zephaniah3:12 GODAA sunththan ammanettiza; ashketanne banttana kawushshizayta; ta intte giddon ashshana.
Zephaniah3:13 Isra7eeleppe casha attidayti nagara oosettenna. Wordo haasayettenna; Istta doonankka gene haasayay deenna. Hessa gishshas istti miidi saron de7ana; istta babisana miishshika deenna.
Zephaniah3:14 Hanne Xiyoone nayee ane yexxa! Isra7eele asawu ane ililite! Hanne Yerusalaame nayee! Kumeththa wozinappe ufayetta! Ufayettashe hashshu ga!
Zephaniah3:15 GODAY ne bolla yiza qixaateza diggides; ne morkketakka neeppe zaarides. GODAY Isra7eele kawoy nenara dees; hayssafe guye ay iitasikka babbaka.
Zephaniah3:16 He wode asay Yerusalaames
Zephaniah3:17 GODAA ne Xoossay nenara dees; izi ashshiza mino olanchcha. Izi nenan daro ufayettees; izi ba siiqon nena woppisana; ne yeththan izi bonchchettidi ufayettana› gaana.
Zephaniah3:18 «Bonchcho ba7aale gallassati attida gishshas neni muuzottidayssanne
Zephaniah3:19 He wode nena un7eththidayta ta qaxxayana. Wobbeta ta ashshana; laalettidaytakka ta shiishshana. Istti kawuyida dere ubbaan ta istta bonchchosinne sabas gaththana.
Zephaniah3:20 He wode ta inttena shiishshana; intte dere ta inttena zaarana. Intte intte ayfera beyishin

Haggai1:6 Daro zerideta shin guuth maxi shiishshideta. Mideta shin kallibeekketa; uyideta shin alibeekketa; may7ideta shin may7oy inttena ho7ibeenna; damoza ekkideta shin intte ekkida damozay daakeththa karaxiiten woththidayssa mala» gees.

Haggai2:4 Ha7i qasse Zerubaabelee minna! Qeeseta halaqa Iyosaadoqe naa Iyaasoo minna! Intteno ha dere asatoo wurikka minnite! Ta inttenara diza gishshas ooththite› ga yootanne oychcha.

Haggai2:17 Tani intte kushey ooththidaaz wursa kutul7en

Zechariah9:1 Isra7eele asa ubbaa ayfey pude GODAAKKO xeellees; hessa gishshas GODAY kase yooti woththida mala Sedireeke bollanne Damasqo bolla pirdana.
Zechariah9:2 Ha pirdazikka Damasqo zawan diza Hamaate bolla
Zechariah9:3 Xiroose katamaya baas mino miixa giigsadus; bira biitta mala
Zechariah9:4 Gido attiin GODAY iza guuppidayssa woththi ekkana; izis abba giddon diza wolqqa ubbaa dhayssana; izakka taman xuugetta dhayana.
Zechariah9:5 Asqeloonay hessa be7idi yayyana; Gaazay meton un7ettana; hessaththoka Aqarooney hidotakka qanxxana; Gaazay qasse kawoy bayndaaro gidana; Asqeloonay bula gidana.
Zechariah9:6 Walaka derey Azaxoone oykkana; ceeqettiza Filisxeeme asaa ta dhayssana.
Zechariah9:7 Tani istta doonappe suuth
Zechariah9:8 Tani gidikko ta keeththa bonqqiza wolqqamatappe naagana; hayssafe guye un7eththizay ta deraa laattenna. Tani ha7i minna naagays.
Zechariah9:9 Hanne Xiyoone nayee keeha ufayetta. Hanne Yerusalaame nayee ufayssan ilila; xillonne ashshiza ne kawoy ashke gididi hareyonne harey gutte toggidi neekko yees.
Zechariah9:10 Para-gaareta Efreemeppe ola parata Yerusalaameppe ta ekka dhayssana. Tani ola toorata menththereththana. Saroteth kawoteththatas awajjana. Izi abbaafe abban gakkanaas haarana; Efiraaxise shaafappe sa7a gaxa gakkanaas izi ayssana.
Zechariah9:11 Ta nenara suuththan caaqettida caaqoza gishshas haaththi baynda ollan qashettida asata ta birshada yeddana.
Zechariah9:12 Intteno hidotay diza qasho asatoo! Intte kase diza miixan simmite; kase inttes diza aqota dakko histta ta inttes zaarana.
Zechariah9:13 Yuhuda wondafe mala Efreemekka yiishsha mala ta go7ettana; hanne Xiyoone tani ne nayta Girike dere bolla denththeththana; nenakka tani wolqqama mashsha mala histta go7ettana.
Zechariah9:14 GODAY istta bolla qonccana; iza yiishshay wolqqanththa mala popol7u gaana; Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY xurumba punnana. Dugehappe keziza gote carko mala izi baana.
Zechariah9:15 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY isttas gondalle gidana; istti ba morkketa ubbaa dhayssana; istti yanbarshan olizayta yedhdhana; istti woyne ushshu uyida asa mala waassana; yarsho suuththi kere kumi yarshosoho bolla gukkiza mala istta morkketa suuththika gukkana.
Zechariah9:16 He wode GODAY istta Xoossay ba deraa baas wude mehe histti ashshana; kallachcha bolla diza seeloy xolqiza mala isttika Xoossa deren phoollana.
Zechariah9:17 Istti ay mala lo7onne puula as gidaneeshshaa! Kaththi naateththata woyne ushshi geela7ota anqarsana.
Zechariah10:1 GODAY inttes assura ira immana mala woossite. Ira shaara kiittizay GODAA; izi ubbaa asas gidiza ira immees; issaas issaas tokkanaas dooza immees.
Zechariah10:2 Eeqa xoossati baleththo yo7o yooteettes; Maroti wordo ajjuuta beyeettes; kaayizayti wordo agumo agumetteettes; asakka coo hada yo7on minththeththeettes; hessa gishshas derey heemmizaadey baynda dorsa mala coo mela toylattishe qohettides.
Zechariah10:3 GODAY
Zechariah10:4 Yuhudappe gulan woththiza shuchchi
Zechariah10:5 Istti ubbayka issi bolla ogen diza urqqa yedhdhiza mino olanchchata mala gidana; GODAY isttara diza gishshas paran olettizayta istti xoonana.
Zechariah10:6 «Tani Yuhuda keeth minththana; ta isttas qadhettiza gishshas istti kase dizasota istta zaarana; tani GODAA istta Xoossa gidida gishshas ta istta woosa siyana; isttika hayssafe kase ta yegga erontta asa mala gidana.
Zechariah10:7 Efreeme asay wolqqama asa mala gidana; istta wozinay woyne ushshu uyida asa mala ufayettana; istta nayti istta beyananne ufayettana; isttika GODAAN ufayettana.
Zechariah10:8 Tani istta wayqeththan xeygada issi bolla shiishshana; tumappe ta istta wozzana; kase mala ta istta darsana.
Zechariah10:9 Tani istta dereta giddon laallikokka istti heen haaho deren dishe tana qoppana; isttanne istta nayti shemppora paxa attidi guye simmana.
Zechariah10:10 Tani istta Gibxeppe kessana; asooreppeka shiishshana; isttas uttizasoy un7anaashe gakkanaas tani istta Gala7aadeninne Libaanoosen shiishshana.
Zechariah10:11 Istti abba giddora waayetti aadhdhana; abba dambalay co7u gaana; ciimma abbayka wuri miccana; otoranchcha Asoore dere asay kawuyana; Gibxe Kawoteththa xam7ay meqqana.
Zechariah10:12 Tani istta GODAAN minththana; isttika iza sunththan simerettana» gees.
Zechariah11:1 Libaanoose nenan diza ziga miththaa tamay maana mala ne pengeta doya.
Zechariah11:2 Xiiddatoo! Ziga miththay kundida gishshas yeekkite; bonchchettida miththati dhayda; Baasaane wolati «Wu! wuy» gi waassite; dhippi gida woray qeexettides.
Zechariah11:3 Heenththa nayta waaso siyite; istta bonchchoy qaarettides; Yordaanoose shaafa doonan diza dhippi gida woray wurida gishshas gaammota xaago siyite.
Zechariah11:4 GODAA ta Xoossay nena
Zechariah11:5 Istta shammi shukkidayti qaxxayettettenna; istta bayzidayti
Zechariah11:6 «Hayssafe guye ha biittay bolla diza asas ta qadhettike; tani ta baggara issaa issaa iza laggessinne iza kawos aaththa immana; isttika biitta un7eththana; tanikka istta istta kusheppe ashshike» gees.
Zechariah11:7 Hessa gishshas tani bayzizaytassinne shammizaytas qaxxaretta shukettanaas doorettida dorsata heemmizaade gidadis; dorsatakka heemmashe nam7u guufeta ekkada issaa
Zechariah11:8 Issi agina giddon mehe heemmiza heedzdzata diggadis; isttika tana ixxida gishshas tanikka istta salettadis.
Zechariah11:9 Tani isttas
Zechariah11:10 Qasseka dere ubbaara ta caaqettida qaala laallanaas
Zechariah11:11 He gallas kase caaqozi laalettides; un7etti uttidi tana xeelliza dorsati hessi GODAA qaala gididayssa erida.
Zechariah11:12 Tanikka isttas
Zechariah11:13 GODAYKKA istti taas immana giigida kadhettida bira ekkada
Zechariah11:14 Hessafe qasse Isra7eelenne Yuhuda ishateth laallada
Zechariah11:15 Qasseka GODAY tana
Zechariah11:16 Hekko tani biitta bolla ooraththa heenththanchcha denththana; he heenththanchchay kase dhaydayssa zaari qoppenna; laalettidayssaka koyenna; meqqidayssaka koolenna; paxidayssaka dhiikkenna; gido attiin modhidayssa asho maana; qinccifilleka ashshontta dippi histtana.
Zechariah11:17 Wudeza yeggi aggiza go7ay baynda heenththanchchas aayye ana! «Iza ushachcha ayfenne iza qese mashshay caddo; iza qesey silo; iza ushachcha ayfeykka qilch gi qooqo» gides.
Zechariah12:1 Salo miccida GODAY
Zechariah12:2 «Tani Yerusalaame izo yuuyi aadhdhi diza deretas maththosiza woyne ushshu izan tigiza birille mala ooththana; Yerusalaame dooddana mala Yuhuda katamayokka dooddana.
Zechariah12:3 Biitta bolla diza derey izi bolla dendiza gallas tani Yerusalaame dere ubbaas sugiin qaaxxontta zaalla kessana; izo qaaththana paacci xeellizay baas qohettana.
Zechariah12:4 He gallas tani toga parata dagaman
Zechariah12:5 Yuhuda asaa kaaleththizayti bantta wozinan
Zechariah12:6 «Ta he gallas Yuhuda kaaleththizayta doore miththa giddon diza tama cooce kessana; kaththa mirqqe giddon diza xomppe laco kessana; istti baappe hadirsaranne ushachchara yuuyi aadhdhi diza dereta xuuggana; Yerusalaamey gidikko ba dizasoppe mulekka qaaxxuku.
Zechariah12:7 «Dawiteso asaanne Yerusalaamen dizayta bonchchoy Yuhuda bonchchofe aadhdhontta mala tani GODAY kasetada Yuhuda asaas xoono immana.
Zechariah12:8 He gallas istta giddon daro laafa gididay Dawite mala mino gidana; Dawiteso asay qasse isttafe sinththe sinththe biza Xoossa malanne GODAA kiitanchcha mala gidana; Yerusalaamen dizaytas GODAY gondalle gidana.
Zechariah12:9 He gallas Yerusalaame olana dendiza kawoteththata ubbaa dhayssanaas ta dendana.
Zechariah12:10 «He wode Dawite keeththa asaa bollanne Yerusalaamen diza asaa bolla kiyateththa ayananne woosa ayana ta gussana; tana caddidayti taakko xeellana; isttika asi baas diza issi nay hayqqiin yeekkiza asa mala izas yeekkana; bayra naas asi yeekkiza mala camo yeeho yeekkana.
Zechariah12:11 He wode Magiddo geetettiza Hadaadey Ermoonas yeekkoyssaththo Yerusalaamenkka hessa mala gita yeeho gidana.
Zechariah12:12 Biitta bolla diza qommoy ubbay baas baas yeekkana; istta machchetikka baas baas yeekkana; hessa malan Dawite baggafe attumasay ba machchetara
Zechariah12:13 Lewe baggati bantta machchetara
Zechariah12:14 hankko attida qommotappe attumasay ubbay bantta machchetara yeekkana» gees.
Zechariah13:1 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Zechariah13:2 «Tani he wode biittafe eeqa xoossata sunth dhayssana; hessafe nam7anththo istti qofettettenna; istta nabetanne tuna ayanata biittay bollafe ta diggana.
Zechariah13:3 Oonikka tani nabe giikko izaade yelida aawaynne aayeya iza ne GODAA sunththan wordo haasayda gishshas nees hayqoy bessees getto; izi tinbite haasayshin iza yelidayti iza caddetto.
Zechariah13:4 He wode wordo haasaydaadey oonikka ba haasayda wordo tinbiten yeellatana; baleththanaas iskera diza nabeta may7o may7enna.
Zechariah13:5 Izikka
Zechariah13:6 Issi asi
Zechariah13:7 «Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY
Zechariah13:8 GODAY
Zechariah13:9 He attida issi kushe asaa ta gede taman yeggana; bira taman geeshshiza mala ta geeshshana; worqqa malakka paaccana; istti ta sunth xeygana; tanikka isttas koyana; ta isttas
Zechariah14:1 Hekko GODAY pirdiza gallassi gakkides; neeppe bonqqida miishsha ne ayfey be7ishin istti gishetti ekkana.
Zechariah14:2 Yerusalaame olana mala kawoteththata ubbaa ta shiishshana; katamayakka oykettana; keeththa giddon diza miishshi bonqqettana; maccassatarakka wolqqan ichchana; katama asaappe baggay di7ettana; attida derey qasse katamayppe kezenna.
Zechariah14:3 Hessafe guye GODAY kase ola gallas olettiza mala he kawoteththata olanaas dendana.
Zechariah14:4 He wode iza tohoy Yerusalaameppe arshey mokkiza baggara Dabrazayte zumaa bolla eqqana. Dabrazayte zumaykka arshey mokkizasoppe wullizaso gakkanaas nam7u kezi shaaketti wodhana; bagga zumay pudeha bagga
Zechariah14:5 Inttenikka Azeele gakkanaas zuma tani nam7u kessi shaakkida shoobbara baqatana; kase yuhuda kawo Ooziya wode biittay qaaxxiin beni intte aawati gangida mala intte gangana; hessafe guye GODAA ta Xoossay geeshshatara issife yaana.
Zechariah14:6 He wode ta kenchchoy
Zechariah14:7 He gallassay gallassinne qammay baynda GODAY eriza dumma gallas gidana; he gallassi poo7oy poo7oshin de7ana.
Zechariah14:8 He wode Yerusalaameppe de7o haaththi pulttana; izappe baggay arshey mokkiza baggan diza hayqo abban gelana; baggay qasse arshey wulliza baggara diza Mediteraane abban gelana; bone gidiin balgo gidiin layth kumeth pacey baynda goggishe de7ana.
Zechariah14:9 He wode GODAY biitta ubbaa bolla kawotana; he wode GODAY issaa xalla; iza sunththayka issaa gidana.
Zechariah14:10 Pudeha baggara Geebappe doommidi Yerusalaame dugeha baggara diza Armoone katama gakkanaas diza Awurajjay tidhdha demba gidana; Yerusalaame katamaya Biniyaame pengefe beni penge ginaranne gula penge gakkanaas hessaththoka Hanani7eele gimbefe gede kawo keeththaso woyne ushshu gum7izasoho gakkanaas dhoqqu gaada iza minna de7ana.
Zechariah14:11 Yerusalaamey daro asi daanaso gidana; hessafe guye iza dhayukku; izin diza derey hirgay baynda woppan daana.
Zechariah14:12 Yerusalaame olana dendiza dere bolla GODAY bosha harge ehana; istta shemppora paxa dishin istta ashoy wooqqana; istta ayfeynne inxarsay heen ba dizason wooqqana.
Zechariah14:13 He wode GODAY istta bolla hirganne babo yeddana; isttika issoy issoy ba laggeza bolla qoho gaththana.
Zechariah14:14 Yuhuda asay Yerusalaame bagga gididi olettana; bana yuuyi aadhdhida kawoteththati haarida aqota ubbaa worqqa
Zechariah14:15 Hessa misatiza boshay morkketi dizason dizason
Zechariah14:16 Hessafe guye Yerusalaame olana kezida kawoteththatappe hayqqontta attida ubbay Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAS goynnanaassinne daase ba7aale bonchchanaas layththan layththan Yerusalaamen shiiqana.
Zechariah14:17 Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAS goynnanaas Yerusalaame shiiqontta biitta kawoteththata ubbaas iray bukkenna.
Zechariah14:18 Gibxe asaykka hee bontta iray isttas bukkenna; Yerusalaame kezidi daase ba7aale bonchchontta ixxida kawoteththata bolla GODAY ehana boshaa istta bolla ehana.
Zechariah14:19 Gibxe asaakka gidiin hara dere asa kawota gidiin
Zechariah14:20 He wode parata qoodhen qashettiza daala ubbaa bolla
Zechariah14:21 Yerusalaameninne Yuhudan diza otoy wurikka medheteththa Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAS dummatidaaz gidana; Yarsho shiishshiza asay wurikka otota ekkidi yarsho asho isttan doyssana; he wode Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Keeththa giddon ay zal7anchchayka deenna.
Malachi1:1 Milkaasa baggara Isra7eele naytas yida GODAA qaala
Malachi1:2 GODAY
Malachi1:3 Gido attiin Eesawe ixxadis; iza deren diza zumata bazzo kessadis; iza gadezakka bazzon diza worakanatas aaththa immadis» gides.
Malachi1:4 Eedoomey
Malachi1:5 Hessaka intte intte ayfera beyana; intteka
Malachi1:6 «Nay ba aawa
Malachi1:7 Intte taas yarsho shiishshizason tunida kath woththeeta» Histti woththidi
Malachi1:8 Intte qooqe mehe yarshos ehizayssi hessi qoho gidennee? Wobbe woykko sakettiza mehe intte yarshos shiishshizayssi hessi qoho gidennee? Heytantta mala inttena ayssiza daannatas intte immizaakko istti inttefe ufayssan ekkanee?» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY.
Malachi1:9 «Ha7i qasse izi nuus mishettana mala Xoossa woossite; hessa mala yarsho intte shiishshiin Xoossi inttefe ekkandee?» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi1:10 «Taas Yarsho yarshizason go7ay baynda tama intte eeththontta mala inttefe issaadeyka Xoossa Keeththa penge gordizaakko aazee dizay! Ta inttenan ufayettikenne intte kusheppe ay yarshoka ekkike» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi1:11 Awa arshey kezizasoppe doommidi arshey wullizaso gakkanaas ta sunththay dere ubbaa giddon bonchchettana; beettooson ubbaan ta sunththas exaaneynne geeshsha yarsho asay shiishshana; ta sunththi asa ubbaa achchan bonchchettana.
Malachi1:12 «Intte qasse
Malachi1:13 Qasseka
Malachi1:14 «Dorsata garsan lo7o dharshoy dizayssa immanaas adinettidi qasse baleththon iza bolla wosoy diza mehe Godaas yarsho shiishshizaadey qanggetto; ta gita kawo; ta sunththika dere kumeththi babbanaas bessiza sunththa» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi2:1 «Ha7ikka qeeseto hayssi ha azazoy inttes imettides.
Malachi2:2 Intte ta gizaaz siyontta ixxikonne intte intte wozina ta sunththaa bonchchanaas giigsontta aggiko ta intte bolla qanggeth yeddana; ta inttena anjjana anjjoza qanggeththan laammana; intte tana bonchchanaas intte wozina giigsontta aggida gishshas addafe ta hayssa ubbaa intte bolla ooththana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY.
Malachi2:3 «Intte gaason intte nayta ta hanqana; intte yarshos shiishshiza mehe toce ta gede intte ayfe bolla laallana; intteka izara issife dhayana.
Malachi2:4 Ta Lewera caaqqida caaqo qaalay minnana mala hayssa inttena qofsanaas ta yeddoyssa intte erana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY.
Malachi2:5 «Ta izara caaqqida caaqoy de7onne saroteththa caaqo; heytakka ta izas immadis; hessika bonchcho ehides; izikka taas yayyides; ta sunththaaka bonchchides.
Malachi2:6 Iza doonan tumu timirtey dees; issi bala miishshika iza doonan beettibeenna; saroteththaninne suureteththan tanara hemettides; daro asaakka nagarappe zaarides.
Malachi2:7 Qeesey ubbaa dandayza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAAS kiitettizaade gidida gishshas iza doonay erateth naaganaas asay iza doonappe timirte koyanaas bessees» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY.
Malachi2:8 Gido attiin intte iza ogeppe kare kezideta; daro asaykka intte timirten dhuphettana mala ooththideta; Lewe caaqozaka laallideta.
Malachi2:9 Histtiin intte ta ogen bontta gishshassinne intte intte timirteza dumma maado ooththida gishshas intte asa ubbaa sinththan kadhettana malanne intte guuxxana malata ooththadis.
Malachi2:10 Nu wurikka issaade naa gidokkonii? Nuna medhdhiday issi Xoossa gidennee? Histtiin nu issoy issaas ammanettontta aggidi kase nu aawata caaqo aazas tunisizonii?
Malachi2:11 Yuhuday ammanettibeenna; Isra7eeleninne Yerusalaamen harassiza miishshi hanides; Yuhuday allaganne allaga xoossas goynniza macca nayta machcho ekkidi Godaa Xoossi dosiza iza keeththa tunisides.
Malachi2:12 Hessa mala ooththiza ay asikka salo GODAAS yarsho ehizaa gidikkoka GODAY Yaaqoobe dunkaanaappe iza digo.
Malachi2:13 Qasse intte ooththana hara miish GODAAS yarsho shiishshizasoza intte ayfunthan meeshana; hessafe guye intte yarshoko xeellontta gishshassinne ufayssan ekkontta gishshas intte yeekkananne waassana.
Malachi2:14 Intteka «Izi aazas nu yarshoza ekkontta ixxidee?» giidi oychchana; hessika haniday intte caaqon ekettida naateteththa machchetara caaqettida qaalaa intte ammanettontta laallida gishshassa; Godaa Xoossi intte giddon markka.
Malachi2:15 Godaa Xoossi inttessinne machchetas issi asateththinne issi ayanay daana mala ooththibeennee? Xoossi inttena aazas issino ooththidee? Izas waanna qofay Xoossas geeshsha zereth intte yelana mala gidennee? Hessa gishshas inttefe issay issay ba machcheys caaqqida qaala pacinchchontta ammaneteththan naago.
Malachi2:16 «Ays giikko tani GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay azinay ba machcho anjji yeddizayssa ixxays; inttefe issaadeyka hessa mala gene ooso ooththiko ta hessa ixxays; hessa gishshas intte intte machchetara caaqettida qaala laammontta mala naagettite» gees GODAA Isra7eele Xoossay.
Malachi2:17 Intte coo hada haasayan GODAA saleththideta; «Nu iza aazan saleththidonii?» geeta; intte iza saleththiday
Malachi3:1 «Hekko tani baana oge baasana as taappe sinththara yeddana; intte koyza GODAY intte qoppontta Xoossa keeth gakki wodhdhana; intte ufayssan naagiza caaqo qaala kiitaa ekki yiza ta kiittidaadey yaana.
Malachi3:2 Izi yaana gallassa teqqana dandayzay oonee? Izi qoncciza gallas iza sinththan eqqanaas dandayanay oonee? Izi cooce tama mala woykko may7o meecciza saamuna mala;
Malachi3:3 Bira taman seerisidi lo7eththi geeshshiza asa mala uttana; Lewe nayta worqqa malanne bira mala geeshshana; hessafe guye GODAAS yarsho shiishshiza xillo asati daana.
Malachi3:4 He wode Yuhudaninne Yerusalaamen shiiqiza yarshoy kase aadhdhida wode mala GODAA ufayssiza yarsho gidana.
Malachi3:5 «Hessa gishshas ta intteko pirdana yaana; muurennizayta
Malachi3:6 «Tani laamettontta Xoossa; hessa gishshas intteno Yaaqoobe naytoo! Intte dhaybeekketa» gees GODAY.
Malachi3:7 «Intte kase intte aawata wodeppe doommidi ta azazotappe haakkideta; isttaka naagibeekketa; haa taakko simmite tanikka intteko simmana; Intte gidikko
Malachi3:8 «Asi Xoossa miish kaysoti erizee? Intte gidikko kaysoteeta; intte qasse
Malachi3:9 Intte Isra7eele asay ubbay ta miish kaysotida gishshas intte qanggettidayta.
Malachi3:10 Ta keeththan miza kaththi daana mala intteka tana hayssan paaccanaas ane tammaafe issino ubbaa ha ta gootaran gelththite; ta inttes salo maskoote doyontta aggikonne inttes woththizasoy dhayana gakkanaas ta inttes anjja palahisontta aggiko beyandeta» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi3:11 Ta intte gishshas intte biittan mokkiza kaththa qohiza miishshati intte kath montta mala ta hanqana; intte kaththayka meetettenna; intte gade giddon intte tokkida woyne miththay ayfey baynda coo mela deenna;
Malachi3:12 «Hessafe kaallidi intte derey kalo biitta gidida gishshas hara derey wurikka inttena intte anjjettida dereta gi xeygana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi3:13 «Intte ta bolla xalateththa qaala haasaydeta» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay. «Intte gidikko
Malachi3:14 Qasseka intte
Malachi3:15 Ha7i nu otoranchchati anjjetti dishin iita ooththizayti duretishin Xoossa paccizayti kessi ekki attishin beyoos› geeta» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi3:16 He wode GODAAS babbiza asati ba garsan issoy issaara haasayettida Godaa Xoossika istti gizayssa lo7eththi siyides; GODAAS babbizaytas qasseka iza sunththaa bonchchizaytas istti oosoy balettontta mala qofsiza maxaafay iza sinththan xaafettides.
Malachi3:17 «Tani ooththiza gallas istti taas buzo miish gidana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay; «Aaway baas ooththiza naa ashshiza mala tanikka istta ashshana.
Malachi3:18 He wode qasseka xillonne nagaranchcha giddon Xoossas ooththizayta giddoninne ooththonttayta giddon diza dummateththa intte beyandeta.
Malachi4:1 «Hekko cooce tama mala eexxiza gallassi yaana; otoranchchatinne iita ooththizayti wurikka mela happa mala gidana; he yaana gallassayka istta xuuggana; xeerakka xaphokka ashshenna» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi4:2 «Ta sunththas babbiza inttes qasse xilloteththa arshey ba qefe garsan paththizaaz ekka yaana; intteka birshi yeddida galo mara mala xikettishe kezana.
Malachi4:3 Tani ooththiza gallas intte iitata intte toho garsan yedhdhana; istti intte toho caamma garsan bidinth gidana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi4:4 «Isra7eele nayti ubbay azazettana mala tani ta oosanchcha Muse baggara Korebe zumaa bolla ta immida wogaanne azazota qopite» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA Xoossay.
Malachi4:5 «Hekko keehi gitanne yashissiza Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAA gallassay gakkanaappe kase ta inttes nabe Eelaasa yeddana» gees Ubbaafe Wolqqama GODAY.
Malachi4:6 «Ta yaada biitta qanggeththan dhayssontta mala izi aawata wozina naytakko
Matthew1:1 Dawite naa
Matthew1:2 Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelides; Yisaaqi Yaaqoobe yelides; Yaaqoobey Yuhudanne iza ishata yelides;
Matthew1:3 Yuhuday Timaarippe Faareesenne Zaara yelides; Faareesey Esroome yelides; Esroomey Aaraame yelides;
Matthew1:4 Aaraamey Aminadaabe yelides; Aminadaabey Ne7asoone yelides; Ne7asooney Solomoone yelides;
Matthew1:5 Solomooneykka Boo7eeze Eraabippe yelides; Boo7eezey Urutippe Iyoobeede yelides; Iyoobeedey Isseye yelides;
Matthew1:6 Isseyey kawo Dawite yelides; Dawiti Ooriyo machcheyfe Solomoone yelides.
Matthew1:7 Solomooney Erobi7aame yelides; Erobi7aamey Abbiya yelides; Abbiyayka Aasaafe yelides;
Matthew1:8 Aasaafey Iyoosaafixe yelides; Iyoosaafixey Iyoraame yelides; Iyoraamey Ooziya yelides;
Matthew1:9 Ooziyay Iyo7aatame yelides; Iyo7aatamey Akaaze yelides; Akaazey Hizqiyaasa yelides;
Matthew1:10 Hizqiyaasi Minaase yelides; Minaasey Amoxe yelides; Amoxey Iyosiyaasa yelides;
Matthew1:11 Iyosiyaasi Baabiloone di7o layth Ikoniyaanenne iza ishata yelides.
Matthew1:12 Baabiloone di7oppe guye Ikoniyaaney Salatiyaale yelides; Salatiyaaley Zerubaabele yelides;
Matthew1:13 Zerubaabeley Abiyoode yelides; Abiyoodey Elyaaqeeme yelides; Elyaaqeemey Azaare yelides;
Matthew1:14 Azaarey Saadooqe yelides; Saadooqey Aakime yelides; Akimey Eliyoode yelides;
Matthew1:15 Eliyoodey Alazaare yelides; Alazaarey Maataane yelides; Maataaney Yaaqoobe yelides;
Matthew1:16 Yaaqoobeykka Kirstoosa geetettidayssa Yesusa yelida Maaramo ekkana giigsida Yooseefe yelides.
Matthew1:17 Hessa gishshas Abrahaameppe yiidi Dawite gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleteth; qasse Dawiteppe Baabiloone di7o wode gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleteth; Baabiloone di7oppe Kirstoosa yeleta gakkanaas tammanne oyddu yeleta gidees.
Matthew1:18 Yesus Kirstoosa yeleta taarikey hayssafe kaalli dizayssa; iza aayo Maarama Yooseefes giigetta dishin izi izira gayttontta Xillo Ayanan qanththatada beettadus.
Matthew1:19 Izo giigsida Yooseefey xillo as gidida gishshas Maaramo asa sinththan qoncce kessontta qotara agganaas ba wozinara qachchides.
Matthew1:20 Hayssa izi qoppishin Xoossa kiitanchchay agumora izas qonccidi
Matthew1:21 Iza attuma naa yelana; izi as nagarappe ashshanaade gidida gishshas iza sunth ne
Matthew1:22 Goday nabe Isayaasa doonan
Matthew1:23 
Matthew1:24 Yooseefeykka dhiskofe beeggidi Godaa kiitanchchay iza azazida mala Maaramo baso efides.
Matthew1:25 Gido attiin baada iza koyro naaza yelana gakkanaas izo ekkibeenna. Yelettida guuththa naaza sunththaa
Matthew2:1 Kawo Herdoosa wode Yesusi Beeteliheeme Yuhudan yelettidaappe guye arshey mokkiza baggafe eranchchati Yerusalaame yiidi
Matthew2:2 «Yelettida Ayhuda kawoy awan dizee? Awa arshey mokkiza baggara diza xoolintteza be7idi izas goynnana yidos» giidi oychchida.
Matthew2:3 Kawo Herdoosi hessa siyidi dagammides; Yerusalaamen diza asay wuri izara dagammides.
Matthew2:4 Izikka qeeseta halaqatanne woga tamaarsizayta ubba shiishshidi
Matthew2:5 Isttika izas
Matthew2:6 
Matthew2:7 Hessafe guye Herdoosi he eranchchata geemara xeygisidinne istta haasayssidi xoolinttezi isttas beettida wodeyo shaakki erides.
Matthew2:8 Eranchchata Beeteliheeme yeddidi
Matthew2:9 Eranchchatikka kawoy isttas gidayssa siyidaappe guye simmi bida; arshey mokkiza baggara isttas beettida xoolinttey istta kaaleththidi guuththa naazi dizaso gaththides.
Matthew2:10 Istti xoolintteza be7ida wode daro ufayettida.
Matthew2:11 Keeththe gelidi guuththa naaza iza aayo Maaramira demmidinne gulbatidi izas goynnida; ba saaxine saaxine doydi worqqa
Matthew2:12 Istti Herdoosakko simmontta mala agumon keehi naagettana mala geetettida gishshas hara ogera ba dere simmida.
Matthew2:13 Eranchchati bidaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay Yooseefes agumora beettidi
Matthew2:14 Hessa gishshas Yooseefey dendidi aayiyo naazara ekkidi giddoththara duge Gibxe biitta bides.
Matthew2:15 Herdoosi hayqqana gakkanaas heen de7ides. Hessankka
Matthew2:16 Eranchchati iza baleththidayssa erida wode Herdoosi keehi hanqettides. Eranchchati izas kase yootida mala ba as kiittidi nam7u layththinne nam7u layth kumonttayta Beeteliheemeninne Beeteliheeme yuushon diza guuththa attuma nayta ubbaa wodhisides.
Matthew2:17 Hessan
Matthew2:18 
Matthew2:19 Herdoosi hayqqidaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay agumora Yooseefes Gibxe biittan beettidi
Matthew2:20 «Dendada guuththa Naazanne iza aayiyo ekkada Isra7eele biitta simma; Naaza wodhana koyzayti hayqqida» gides.
Matthew2:21 Yooseefey dendidi naaza aayeyra ekkidi Isra7eele biitta simmides.
Matthew2:22 Gido attiin Arkalawoosey ba aawa Herdoosa sohon Yuhudan kawotidayssa siyidinne hee baanaas babbides; Goday agumora izi hee bontta mala yootida gishshas Galila awuraajja bides.
Matthew2:23 Naazirete geetettiza katamayo biidi heen duus oykkides. Hessankka kase nabetan «Naazirete as geetettana» geetettidi sinththafe hananayssa kaseti yootettidayssi polettides.
Matthew3:1 He wode xammaqiza Yohannisi asaas
Matthew3:2 
Matthew3:3 «Godaa oge ooththite; wogga ogezakka lo7eththite gishe bazzo biittan waassiza qaala» geetettidi kase nabe Isayaasan yootettidayssi Yohannisa gishshassa.
Matthew3:4 Yohannisi gaamella iskefe oosettida may7o may7ees. Ba xeessan dafo gixxees; izi miza qumay degera eessinne boole.
Matthew3:5 Yerusalaameppe
Matthew3:6 ba nagarakka izas paaxishe Yordaanoose Shaafan iza kushen xammaqettides.
Matthew3:7 Daro Farsaawetinne Saduqaaweti izi xammaqizaso yishin be7idi Yohannisi
Matthew3:8 Intte intte nagaraappe simmidayssa bessiza ooso ooththite.
Matthew3:9 ‹Nu aaway Abrahaamey nuus dees› gizayssan intterkka inttena baleththofte; ta inttes Xoossi hayta shuchchatappe Abrahaames naa histti denththanaas dandayees gays.
Matthew3:10 Hekko kalttay qanxxanaas miththata garsan giigetti uttides; hessa gishshas lo7o ayfe ayfontta miththi wuri qanxxettananne taman yegettana.
Matthew3:11 Tani maaroteththas haaththan xammaqays; haray attoshin ta iza caamma tookkanaas bessonttaadey taappe aadhdhiza minoy guyera yaana; izikka Xillo Ayananinne taman inttena xammaqana.
Matthew3:12 Kath suraggiza layday iza kushen dees; izikka ba kaththa baleza pitti geeshshana; ba gisttezakka di7en qolana; happaa gidikko to7ontta taman xuuggana» gides.
Matthew3:13 He wode Yesusi Yohannisan xammaqettanaas Galilappe Yordaanoose shaafa bides.
Matthew3:14 Gido attiin Yohannisi

Matthew4:3 Paaccizayssi Yesusaakko shiiqidi
Matthew4:4 Yesusikka

Matthew4:6 «Ne Xoossa Naa gidikko ane hayssafe duge guppa; ays giikko « ‹Ne tohoy shuchchan dhuphettontta mala kiitanchchati ba kushera nena oykki denththana mala ne gishshas Xoossi ba kiitanchcha kiittana› geetetti xaafettides» gides.
Matthew4:7 Yesusikka

Matthew4:21 Guuth sinththe bishe hara nam7u ishantta Zabdoosa naa nam7ata Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa be7ides; isttika ba aawa Zabdoosara wogolo giddon mole gite lo7eththeettes. Yesusikka istta xeygiin
Matthew4:22 istti heerakka wogolozanne ba aawaa aggidi iza kaallida.

Matthew5:1 Daro derey shiiqidayssa be7idi Yesusi pude zuma bolla kezi uttides; iza kaallizaytikka izakko yida.
Matthew5:2 Izikka istta hizgi tamaarso oykkides;
Matthew5:3 «Ayanan bana kawushshizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko Salo Kawoteththi isttassa.
Matthew5:4 Qadhettizayti anjjettidayta
Matthew5:5 Ashketi anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti biitta laattana.
Matthew5:6 Xilloteth gafizaytinne saamettizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti kallana.
Matthew5:7 Asas lo7o ooththizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko isttaskka lo7oy oosettana.
Matthew5:8 Wozina xilloti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti Xoossa beyana.
Matthew5:9 Saroteth ooththizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko istti Xoossa nayta geetetti xeygettana.
Matthew5:10 Xilloteththa gishshas goodettizayti anjjettidayta; ays giikko salo kawoteththi isttassa.
Matthew5:11 «Ta gaason asay inttena cayikko
Matthew5:12 Intte salon demmana waagay keehi gita gidida gishshas ufayssan guppite. Inttefe sinththan diza nabetakka hessaththo gooddida.
Matthew5:13 «Intte ha biitta asas maxine mala. Maxiney ba mal7oteththaa yeddizaa gidikko gede kare yegettidi yedheteththafe attiin zaaridi demmanaas dandayzee?
Matthew5:14 Intte alames poo7o. Zuma bolla diza katamaya qotettanaas dandayakku.
Matthew5:15 Asi xomppe oyththidi keeththan diza asaa kumeththaas poo7ana mala dhoqqasohon woththees attiin geemasohon woththi erenna.
Matthew5:16 Hessaththoka asay intte lo7o ooso be7idi salon diza intte Aawaa bonchchana mala intte poo7oy asa sinththan poo7o.
Matthew5:17 «Tani Muse wogaanne nabeta qaalaa shaarana yidaa inttes misatoppo; polanaas yadis attiin shaaranaas yabeekke.
Matthew5:18 Ta inttes tumu gays
Matthew5:19 Hessa gishshas oonikka ha azazotappe guuxxizaaro gidikkoka ooththontta yeggi aadhdhiko
Matthew5:20 Ta inttes gays
Matthew5:21 «Kase asatas
Matthew5:22 Ta qasse inttes gizay ba isha bolla ogey baynda hanqettizaade bolla pirdettana; oonikka ba isha
Matthew5:23 Hessa gishshas neni yarsho shiishshizason Xoossas yarshana gishin ne ishay ne bolla mishettidaazi nees qofettiko
Matthew5:24 ne yarshizayssa heen yarshizason aggada koyro baada ne ishara giiga; hessafe guye simmada ne yarshoza Xoossas shiishsha.
Matthew5:25 «Nena mootida ne morkkey ne bolla pirdisontta mala
Matthew5:26 Ta nees tumu gays; izi pirdisi wursidaa gidikko wurseththa santiyo qanxxana gakkanaas qashoppe neni birshettaka.
Matthew5:27 « ‹Laymatoppa› gizayssa intte siyideta.
Matthew5:28 Tani gidikko inttena hizgays; maccas amo ayfera xeellidaadey wuri ba wozinan izira laymatides.
Matthew5:29 Nagara ooththanaas ne ushachcha ayfey nees gaaso gidikko neeppe kessa wora yegga; ne asateththay kumeth gede Gaanname taman yegettanaappe ne asateththafe issina pacciko lo7o.
Matthew5:30 Ne ushachcha kushey nagara oosos gaaso gidikko neeppe qanxxa digga; ne asateththay kumeth Gaannamen yegettanayssafe ne asateththafe issi billitey nees pace gidikko lo7o.
Matthew5:31 « ‹Machcho anjji yeddizaadey pirma waraqata izis immana bessees› geetettides.
Matthew5:32 Tani qasse inttena hizgays
Matthew5:33 «Kase asatas
Matthew5:34 Ta qasse inttena aykkoka caaqqofte gays; saloy Xoossas uttiza araata gidida gishshas salon caaqqofte.
Matthew5:35 Biittay Xoossa tohoy yedhdhizaso gidida gishshas biittankka caaqqofte. Wogga kawo katama gidida gishshas Yerusalaamenkka caaqqofte.
Matthew5:36 Intte hu7enkka caaqqofte; intte hu7e binanappe issineyokka booth woykko kareth histtanaas dandayekketa.
Matthew5:37 Hessa gishshas intte intte giddon haasayettishin intte haasayay
Matthew5:38 « ‹Ayfe gishshas ayfe
Matthew5:39 Ta qasse inttes gizay iita ooththidaadera eqettofte; gido attiin nees ushachcha shagala baqqizaades hankkoyssaka yuushsha bessa.
Matthew5:40 Issi asi neni garsara may7idayssa neeppe ekkanaas nena mootikko bollara may7idayssaka gujjada izas imma.
Matthew5:41 Issi asi nena issi saate oge ne baana mala wolqqaththiko issife nam7u dakko gidana oge izara ba.
Matthew5:42 Nena woossizaades imma; neeppe tal7e ekkanaas koyzaades zokko zaaroppa.
Matthew5:43 « ‹Ne lagge siiqa; ne morkke ixxa› geetettidayssa siyideta.
Matthew5:44 Ta qasse inttena intte morkketa dosite; inttena gooddizaytas woossite gays.
Matthew5:45 Intte hessaththo ooththiko intte salo Aawaas nayta gidana. Izi arshe iitatassinne lo7otas issi bolla gaththi immees. Irakka xillotassinne nagaranchchatas issi bolla bukisees.
Matthew5:46 Inttena dosizayta xalla intte dosikko inttes aaza go7ay dizee? Qaraxa qanxxisizayti hessaththo ooththettennee?
Matthew5:47 Intte ishata xalla intte sarotikko hankkoytappe aazan lo7eetii? Ammanonttaytikka hessaththo ooththeettes.
Matthew5:48 Hessa gishshas intte salo Aaway wosoy bayndaytas gidida mala intteka wosoy bayndaade gidite.
Matthew6:1 «Asi inttena beyana mala asa sinththan lo7o ooththontta mala naagettite; hessaththo ooththiko intte salo Aawappe go7a demmeketa.
Matthew6:2 Intte manqotas maado immiza wode asi tana beyo giidi asa sinththan bonchchettanaas ogeninne Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan xurumba punisiza qoodheppe qommon hanizaytaththo ooththofte. Ta inttes tumu gays; istti ba waaga ubbaa haan ekkida.
Matthew6:3 Intte manqotas immishin ushachcha kushey ooththizaa hadirsa kushey eroppo.
Matthew6:4 Intte imoy geeman gido; qotan oosettidayssa be7iza intte Aawaykka intte waaga inttes immana.
Matthew6:5 «Intte woossishe qoodheppe qommon hanizayta mala hanopite; istti asi beyana mala Ayhuda woosa keeththataninne oyddu oge bolla eqqidi woossanaas doseettes. Ta inttes tumu gays; istti kumeththa waaga ekkichchida.
Matthew6:6 Neni woossana geliza ne kifile gela; karekka ne bolla gordada geeman diza ne Aawaakko woossa. Geeman oosettidayssa be7iza ne Aaway ne ooso mala nees immana.
Matthew6:7 «Ammanontta asay issi qaala zaari zaari woossiko isttas siyettiza misatiin istti zaari zaari gizayssaththo intteka woossishe issi qaala zaari zaari goopite.
Matthew6:8 Gido attiin intte Aaway intte woossanaappe kasetidi inttes aazi koshshizaakko eriza gishshas intte istta misatopite.
Matthew6:9 Intte woossishe
Matthew6:10 Ne kawoteththi haa yo; ne sheney salon gidida mala sa7ankka hano.
Matthew6:11 Hachchis gidiza kath nuus hach imma.
Matthew6:12 Nu nuna qohidaytas atto giza mala nekka nu qoho nuus atto ga.
Matthew6:13 Iitappe nuna ashsha attiin nuna paacen gelththofa; bonchchoy merippe mernaa gakkanaas neyssa. Amiin› gi woossite.
Matthew6:14 «Intte inttena qohidaytas atto giikko intte salo Aawaykka inttes atto gaana.
Matthew6:15 Qasse intte asa nagara atto gontta ixxiko intte Aawaykka intte nagara atto geenna.
Matthew6:16 «Intte xooma xoomishe qoodheppe qommon xoomizaytaththo shullofte. Istti ba xoomizayssa asi erana mala ba ayfeso iisseettes. Ta tumu gays; hessaththo ooththizayti ba waaga kumeth ekkichchida.
Matthew6:17 Neni xooma xoomashe ne ayfeso meecetta
Matthew6:18 Hessaththo ne xoomikko geeman diza ne Aaway xalala erizaazinne asi oonikka erontta qotan gidana. Qotan oosettidayssa be7iza ne Aawaykka ne waaga nees immana.
Matthew6:19 «Bilay mizason buuqqidinne shiydi moorettizason
Matthew6:20 Gido attiin bilay maanaas
Matthew6:21 Ne miishshay dizason ne wozinay heen dees.
Matthew6:22 «Ayfey asateththas poo7o; hessa gishshas ne ayfey paxa gidikko
Matthew6:23 Ne ayfey harganchcha gidikko
Matthew6:24 «Issi asi nam7u godaas ooththana dandayenna. Issaa ixxidi nam7anththoza dosana; woykko issaa bonchchidi nam7anththoza leqqana; Xoossassinne miishshas nam7atas gaththi ooththanaas dandayettenna.
Matthew6:25 «Hessa gishshas ta inttena intte duussa gishshas
Matthew6:26 Ane salo kafota xeellite! Zerettenna; maxettenna; di7en qolettenna; gido attiin intte salo Aaway istta mizees. Intte isttafe keehi aadhdheketii?
Matthew6:27 Ane inttefe daro waayettidi baas imettida layththa bolla hara issi gallas gujjana dandayza asi dizee?
Matthew6:28 «Qasse may7o gishshas aazas hirgeetii? Ane coo demban diza ciishshata xeellite; daaburettenna woykko suqettenna.
Matthew6:29 Hessa gishshas ta inttena gizay haray attoshin kawo Solomooneykka ba bonchchora ha ciishshatappe issiney mala lo7o may7ibeenna.
Matthew6:30 Intteno pace ammanoy dizaytoo! Hach asa ayfen beettidi wonto taman wodhdhana maata hayssaththo mayziza Xoossi inttena hessafe lo7eththi aaththi mayzanaas dandayennee?
Matthew6:31 Hessa gishshas nu ay maanee? Ay uyanee? Ay may7anee? giidi hirgofte.
Matthew6:32 Hankko ammanontta asay hayssa demmanaas daro qoppees. Hayssi wuri inttes koshshizayssa intte salo Aaway erees.
Matthew6:33 Harappe sinththatidi Xoossa Kawoteththa xilloteth koyite; hayti wuri inttes gujettana.
Matthew6:34 Hessa gishshas wontos keehi qoppofte; wonto metoy wontos aqo; issi issi gallassay baas baas gidiza metora dees.
Matthew7:1 «Intte bolla pirdettontta mala hara asa bolla pirdofte.
Matthew7:2 Intte pirdida mala intte bollaka pirdettana. Intte makkida miishshara inttes makettana.
Matthew7:3 Ne ayfen diza gita miththaa be7ontta dashe ne isha ayfen diza qeeri buura aazas xeellay?
Matthew7:4 Ne ayfen gita miththi dishin ne isha
Matthew7:5 Nenoo qoodheppe qommon hanizaysso kasetada ne ayfen diza gita miththaa kessaycha. Hessafe guye ne isha ayfen diza buuraa kessanaas lo7eththa xeellandassa.
Matthew7:6 Ba tohon yedhdhontta malanne simmidi inttena saxxi daakereththontta mala anjjettidayssa kanata sinththan yeggofte; qasse intte worqqaaka guddunthata sinththan yeggofte.
Matthew7:7 «Woossite inttes imettana; koyite intte demmana; kare qoxxite inttes doyettana.
Matthew7:8 Woossida ubbaas imettana; koyza asi demmana; qoxxizaades karey doyettana.
Matthew7:9 Intte giddofe issaades nay uketh woossiko shuch immiza aaway daandee?
Matthew7:10 Woykko mole woossiko shoosh immizaadey daandee?
Matthew7:11 Histtiin intte iitata gidi uttidi intte naytas lo7o miish imo erizayta gidikko intte salo Aaway iza woossizaytas waanidi aadhdhiza lo7o miish immennee?
Matthew7:12 Hessa gishshas hara asi inttes ooththana mala intte koyzayssa
Matthew7:13 «Xunththa pengera gelite; dhayoso efiza ogey gita; pengeyka aaho; daro asay he pengezara gelees.
Matthew7:14 De7os gaththiza ogey gidikko xunththa; pengeyka xunththa; gelanaytikka guuththata xalla.
Matthew7:15 «Isttas giddo baggay Kana suyte mala gidi uttidinne dorsa ite may7i gelidi intte giddo giddon ooththiza wordo nabetappe naagettite.
Matthew7:16 Intte istta
Matthew7:17 Hessaththoka lo7o miththi wuri lo7o ayfees; iita miththika iita ayfe ayfees.
Matthew7:18 Lo7o miththi iita ayfe ayfanaas dandayonttayssa mala iita miththi lo7o ayfe ayfanaas dandayenna.
Matthew7:19 Lo7o ayfe ayfontta miththi wurikka qanxxettananne taman yegettana.
Matthew7:20 Hessa gishshas intte istta istti ayfiza ayfen shaakki erana.
Matthew7:21 «Salon diza ta Aawaa shene polontta dishe tana
Matthew7:22 He gallas daroti
Matthew7:23 He wode ta isttas
Matthew7:24 «Histtiko hayssa ta qaalaa siyidi ooson peyshizaadey ba keeththe zaalla bolla keexxizaade misatees.
Matthew7:25 Deexo iray bukkiin haroykka harottides; carkoyka carkides; keeththaaka sugides shin zaalla bolla keexettida gishshas kundibeenna.
Matthew7:26 «Hayssa ta qaalaa siyidi ooththonttaadey gidikko ba keeththe ace bolla keexxida eeya asa mala.
Matthew7:27 Deexo iray bukkiin haroykka harottides; carkoyka carkides; he keeththaaka sugides; keeththayka iita kundeth kundides» gides.
Matthew7:28 Yesusi tamaarsi wursiin asay iza timirtezan malalettides.
Matthew7:29 Gaasoykka Muse woga tamaarsizayta mala gidontta izi godateththi diza asa mala tamaarsides.
Matthew8:1 Yesusi zuma bollafe wodhdhiin daro derey iza kaallides.
Matthew8:2 Issi inchchirachcha hargey dizaadey Yesusaakko shiiqidi iza sinththan gulbatidi
Matthew8:3 Yesusi ba kushe yeddidi
Matthew8:4 Qasseka Yesusi addeza
Matthew8:5 Yesusi Qifirnahoome gakkida mala mato halaqay izakko shiiqidi iza hizgi woossides.
Matthew8:6 «Godoo! Ta ashkaray keehi sakettidi keeththan ichchi dees» gides.
Matthew8:7 Yesusikka izas
Matthew8:8 Mato halaqazi izas zaaridi
Matthew8:9 Taaska tana azaziza halaqati taappe bollara deettes; qasseka taas azazettiza wottadarati taappe garsara deettes; isttafe issaa
Matthew8:10 Yesusi iza zaarozan malalettidi bana kaallizaytas
Matthew8:11 Ta inttes yootays; daroti arshey mokkiza baggafenne wulliza baggafe yaana. Salo Kawoteththa maaddan Abrahaamenttara Yisaaqanttaranne Yaaqoobenttara issife uttana.
Matthew8:12 Salo Kawoteththi isttas gidana bessiza asati heen kare dhuman yegettana. Heenkka yeehonne achcha garccech gidana» gides.
Matthew8:13 Yesusikka mato halaqazas
Matthew8:14 Yesusikka buro Phexroosa keeththe gelishin Phexroosa bolloteya misho harge sakettada ichchidaaro be7ides.
Matthew8:15 Izi kushe Yesusi bochchiin misho hargezi aggides. Izakka dendada Yesusa mokkadus.
Matthew8:16 He gallassa omars daydanththi oykkida daro asata Yesusaakko ehida. Izikka tuna ayanata ba qaalara isttafe kessides; harganchchata ubbaaka paththides.
Matthew8:17 Isayaasi
Matthew8:18 Daro asay iza giddoththidayssa biyidi Yesusi asaa abbafe he pinth pinnana mala azazides.
Matthew8:19 He wode issi Ayhuda ammano tamaarsizaadey izakko shiiqidi
Matthew8:20 Yesusikka izas zaaridi
Matthew8:21 Iza kaalliza issi hara asi qasse
Matthew8:22 Izi qasse
Matthew8:23 Hessafe guye Yesusikka wogolon geliin iza kaallizaytikka izara issife bida.
Matthew8:24 Qoppontta abba giddon dambalay dendidi wogoloyo mittana gakkanaas istta waayisides. Hessi wuri hanishin Yesusi dhiskides.
Matthew8:25 Iza kaallizayti iza beegoththidi
Matthew8:26 Yesusikka isttas
Matthew8:27 Isttika
Matthew8:28 Izi abba pinnidi Gergesenoone geetettiza dere gakkida mala daydanththi oykkida nam7u as dayti ba diza duufoppe kezidi izara gaaggida. Asi he ogezara aadhdhanaas dandayetontta mala asas daro keehi meto gidi deettes.

Matthew9:5 ‹Ne nagaray atto geetettides› guussafenne ‹Dendada ba!› guussafe awayssi kawushshee?
Matthew9:6 Gido attiin Asa Naas biitta bolla ase nagarappe maaranaas sheney dizayssa erana malassa» giidi gunda addeza «Denda! Ne halaa ekkada neso ba» gides.
Matthew9:7 Gunda addezikka dendidi baso bides.

Matthew9:17 Oonikka ooraththa woyne ushshu gal7a lukkamon gujjenna. Gujjizaa gidikko lukkamozi dhuuqqana; woyne cajjezikka gukkana; lukkamozikka go7ay bayndaaz gidana. Gido attiin ooraththa woyne cajjey ooraththa lukkamozan gujjeettes. Hessa malara woyne cajjezinne lukkamozi lo7on naagettidi gam7ees» gides.

Matthew9:28 Qooqetikka Yesusi gelida keeththaa iza kaallidi gelida. Yesusikka isttas

Matthew10:12 Intte oona keeththika gelshe
Matthew10:13 He keeththay sarotay bessiza keeththe gidikko intte sarotay he keeththaas gido; sarotay bessontta keeththe gidikko intte sarotay aggi inttes simmo.
Matthew10:14 Ay asikka inttena mokki ekkanaassinne intte gizaa siyanaas koyonttaade gidikko hessaade keeththafe woykko he katamaappe kezishe istta bolla yiza gomeppe intte attidayssas markka gidana mala intte toho bolla diza gudulla pittidi kezite.

Matthew10:16 «Ta inttena dorsa mala kana suyteta giddora kiittays. Hessa gishshas shooshsha mala cinccatanne haraphphe mala ashketa gidite.

Matthew10:18 Ta gaason dere haarizaytakkonne kawotakko inttena efana; istta sinththaninne ammanontta asata sinththan intte markka gidana.

Matthew10:21 «Ishay ba ishaa hayqos aaththi immana; aaway ba naa bolla
Matthew10:22 Ta gishshas asi wurikka inttena ixxana. Gido attiin wurseth gakkanaas minni eqqiday izi attana.
Matthew10:23 Asay inttena intte diza heeraappe gooddiko haraso kichchite! Ta inttes tumu gays; intte Isra7eele katama ubbaa gakkontta dishin ta Asa Nay yaana.
Matthew10:24 «Ashkaray godaappe woykko kaallizaadey kaaleththizaadefe aadhdhenna.

Matthew10:26 «Hessa gishshas isttas babbofte; geemettiday qonccontta qotettiday geesh kezontta attenna.
Matthew10:27 Ta inttes dhumara yootidayssa poo7on haasayte; hayththan siyidayssa qonccen haasayte.
Matthew10:28 Asho wodhikkofe attiin shempo wodhanaas dandayonttaytas babbofte; hessafe ashonne shempo gaththi Gaanname taman dhayssanaas dandayzayssas babbite.
Matthew10:29 Issi santen bayzettiza nam7u siine kafotappe issiniyakka intte salo Aawaa sheney baynda coo kunda attuku.
Matthew10:30 Haray attoshin intte hu7e binanaykka taybon dees.
Matthew10:31 Hessa gishshas babbofte. Daro siine kafotappe intte waagay aadhdhi bonchchettidaaza.
Matthew10:32 «Asa sinththan taas markkattizaades tanikka salon diza ta Aawaa sinththan izaades markkattana.

Matthew10:39 Ba shempo ashshanaas koyzaadey dhayssees; ba shempo ta gishshas aaththi immizaadey ashshees.
Matthew10:40 «Inttena mokki ekkizaadey tanakka mokki ekkees. Tana mokki ekkizaadey tana kiittidaadekka mokki ekkees.

Matthew12:29 «Woykko issi asi wolqqara dizaade keeththe gelidi miishshe bonqqana koykko kasetidi he wolqqara diza addeza oykki qachchontta wostti bonqqanee? Qachchidaappe guye bonqqana dandayees.
Matthew12:30 «Tanara gidonttaadey tanara eqettees; tanara issife shiishshontta asi wurikka laallees.

Matthew12:32 Ay asikka asa naa bolla haasayza iita qaalaa gishshas maarettanashin
Matthew12:33 «Miththi wuri ayfen erettizayssa mala intte lo7o ayfe demmanaas inttes lo7o miththi do; inttes iita miththi dizaa gidikko intte iita ayfe ekkana.
Matthew12:34 Intteno marzera diza shooshshatoo! Intte iitata gidi uttidi waani lo7o haasayanaas dandayeetii? Ulo giddon kumidaazi doonara haasayettees.
Matthew12:35 «Lo7o asi ba wozinan kunththi woththida lo7o qofaappe lo7o haasayees; iita asikka ba wozinan kunththi woththida iitateththaafe iita yo7o kessees.
Matthew12:36 Gido attiin ta inttes gizay asay ba haasayda hada qaala ubbaa gishshas pirda gallas wurikka oyshettana.

Matthew12:41 Nannawe asay pirda gallas hayssa ha yeletaara dendidi ha yeletaa bolla pirdana; gaasoykka Nannawe asay Yoonaasa markkateththan maaroteth gelida gishshassa. Hekko Yoonaasappe aadhdhizaadey haan dees.
Matthew12:42 Dugeha dere kawoya Solomoone erateth siyanaas biitta gaxappe dendada yida gishshas pirda gallas iza hayssa ha yeletaara dendada ha yeletaa bolla pirdana. Hekko Solomooneppe aadhdhizaadey hayssan dees.
Matthew12:43 «Tuna ayanay asappe kezidi shempo demmanaas haaththi baynda mela biittan daaburees. Gido attiin ba koyza shemppoza demmenna.
Matthew12:44 Hessafe qasse kase ta dizaso simma baana giidi beniiso izi simmishin kase izi dizasoy aykkoyka baynda mela keeththe gididi geeyidayssanne giigetti dizayssa demmees.
Matthew12:45 Hessafe biidi hara baappe iitiza laappun iita ayanata banara ekkidi yees. Isttika he addezan gelidi de7ana. He addezas kase duussaafe guye duussay iita gidana. Hayssa iita yeletaska hessa mala hanana» gides.

Matthew13:1 He gallas Yesusi keeththafe kare kezidi abbaa lanqen uttides.
Matthew13:2 Daro derey iza yuuyi aadhdhi giddoththida gishshas asaa abbaa gaxan aggidi wogolo giddo geli uttidi
Matthew13:3 daro yo7o leemisora
Matthew13:4 Izi zerishin issi issi zereththi oge doonan wodhdhiin kafoti yiidi maxi mida.
Matthew13:5 Issi issi zereththi melanne shuchchatiza biitta bolla wodhdhiin biittay mela biitta gidida gishshas elle caarides.
Matthew13:6 Gido attiin away awattiin shullidinne xapho yeddontta aggida gishshas melides.
Matthew13:7 Issi issi zereththay agunththa giddon wodhdhides; agunththayka diccidi caarechchaa cuullides.
Matthew13:8 Hara zereththika aradda biittan wodhdhidi ayfekka ayfides; issoy xeetu
Matthew13:9 Siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!» gi yootides.

Matthew13:11 Izikka isttas
Matthew13:12 Dizaades dizayssa bolla gujettananne darana shin bayndaadefe hinna dizaarakka ekettaychchana.

Matthew13:14 «Isayaasi
Matthew13:15

Matthew13:17 Ta inttes tumu gays; daro nabetinne daro xillo asati ha7i intte be7izayssa beyanaassinne ha7i intte siyizayssa siyanaas amottida shin isttas hanibeenna.
Matthew13:18 «Histtiko ha7i zereththaa leemisoza birsheth siyite.
Matthew13:19 Kawoteththa qaala siyidi yuushshi qoppontta ay asa wozinappeka Xala7ey yiidi zerettida zereththaa eeson maxichchana. Hessika oge bolla wodhdhida zereththa.
Matthew13:20 Shuchcha bolla zerettidayssi qaala ufayssan siyidi heerakka ufayssan ekkizaade misatees.
Matthew13:21 Gido attiin xapho yeddanaas dandayontta aggida gishshas daro gam7ontta qaalaa gaason metoynne goodeteththi yiza wode eleli dhuphettees.
Matthew13:22 Agunththa giddon zerettida zereththay qaala siyidi hayssa ha alamezas daro metoteththaninne dureteththa qofan balettidinne cuulettidi ayfe immontta asa mala.
Matthew13:23 Lo7o biittan zerettida zereththay qasse qaala siyidi yuushshi qoppizaade misatees; lo7o ayfe ayfees; issoy xeetu
Matthew13:24 Yesusi qasseka hara leemiso isttas
Matthew13:25 Gido attiin asi wuri ichchida wode morkkey yiidi gistteza giddon leeshsho zeridi bides.
Matthew13:26 Gisttezi diccidi ayfe ayfiza wode leeshshoyka izara issife beettides.
Matthew13:27 «Kaththaa godaza ashkarati godazaakko shiiqidi
Matthew13:28 «Izikka isttas
Matthew13:29 «Izikka isttas

Matthew13:31 Hara leemiso isttas
Matthew13:32 Barzaafe miththa ayfey hara miththa ayfe ubbaafe daro laafa gidikkoka diccada miththa ubbaafe gita gidawus. Salo kafotikka izi hagga bolla keexxidi daana gakkanaas gita mith gidawus» gides.
Matthew13:33 Ha7ikka hara leemiso isttas
Matthew13:34 Yesusi hayssa ubba asaas leemisora yootides. Leemisoy baynda issinokka yootibeenna.
Matthew13:35 Hessika kase nabe doonan
Matthew13:36 Hessafe Yesusi asaa aggidi soo gelides. Iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi
Matthew13:37 Izikka isttas zaaridi
Matthew13:38 Goshshay hayssa alameza; lo7o zereththay Kawoteththa nayta gididayssa bessees; leeshshoy qasse Xala7e nayta.
Matthew13:39 Leeshshoza zeridi bida morkkey Daabulosa. Maxa wodey alame wurseth gidishin maxizayti Xoossa kiitanchchata.
Matthew13:40 «Leeshshoy qorettidi taman xuugettiza mala alame wurseththan hessaththo hanana.
Matthew13:41 Asa Nay ba kiitanchchata kiittana; isttika nagaras gaaso gididaytanne iita ooththizayta iza Kawoteththa giddofe ubbaa qori kessana.
Matthew13:42 Yeehoy dizasoninne ach garccizason daro wolqqama taman istta yeggana.
Matthew13:43 He wode xilloti ba Aawaa Kawoteththan arshe mala poo7ana. Siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!
Matthew13:44 «Salo Kawoteththi gade giddon qotettida miishshe misatees. Issi asi he miishshayo demmidi zaari qottides. Ufayssafe dendidayssan biidi baas dizaaz ubbaa bayzidi he miishshiya diza biitta shammides.
Matthew13:45 «Hessaththoka Salo Kawoteththi al7o worqqa koyza zal7anchcha misatees.
Matthew13:46 Daro al7o gidida inqqu geetettiza shuch demmida mala biidi baas diza ubbaa bayzidi shammides.
Matthew13:47 «Qasseka Salo Kawoteththi abba giddon yegettidi dumma dumma mole oykkida mole gite misatees.
Matthew13:48 Mole oykkizayti gitey kumiin goochchidi abba lanqe kessida. Heen uttidi lo7o lo7o mole qoridi keeshen gujjida. Iita moleta wora yeggida.
Matthew13:49 Alame wurseththan hessaththo hanana. Kiitanchchati yiidi nagaranchchata xillotappe shaakkidi yeekkizasonne ach garccizaso gede to7ontta taman yeggana.

Matthew13:56 Michcheti nunara dizayta gidettennee? Histtiin hayssi addezi hayssa ubbaa awappe ekkidee?» gida.
Matthew13:57 Hessa gishshas istti izi gizayssa ekkibeettenna. Yesusikka isttas

Matthew14:1 He wode Galila dere haariza Herdoosi asay Yesusa nashshizayssa siyides.

Matthew18:29 He iza lagge ashkaray

Matthew18:33

Matthew19:10 Yesusa kaallizayti izas
Matthew19:11 Gido attiin Yesusi isttas

Matthew20:1 «Salo Kawoteththi ba woyne atakilte giddon ooththiza oosanchchata qaxxaranaas maaladora kezida issi atakiltey diza gadaade misatawus.

Matthew20:3 «Maalado heedzdzu saaten kezidi oosoy baynda mela giyay eqqizason eqqida hara asata demmides.

Matthew21:33 «Hara leemisokka siyite; woyne miththi tokkizasohoy dizaadey he woynezas birda yuushshi aaththidi woyneza ayfe gum7anaas olla bookkides. Woyneza naaganaas miththa bolla shakko giigsides. Hessafe guye gadeza woyne miththara goyizaytas kira immidi hara dere bides.

Matthew21:35 Gadeza goyizayti ashkarata oykkidi issaa wodhida; issaa qasse shuchchan caddida.
Matthew21:36 Gadaa goday kaseytappe aadhdhiza hara ashkarata yeddides. Goyizayti ha7ikka kaseyta bolla ooththidayssa malakka istta bollaka polida.

Matthew22:1 Qasseka Yesusi hara leemiso
Matthew22:2 «Salo Kawoteththi ba naas sarge giigsida issi kawo misatawus.

Matthew22:4 «Qasseka hara ashkarata
Matthew22:5 Xeygettidayti gidikko iza xeyssaa wudan yeggontta aggidi issoy ba goshshasoho
Matthew22:6 Hankko attidayta ashkarati oykkidi daro waayisidi wodhida.
Matthew22:7 «Kawoykka hanqettidi wottadarata yeddidi ashkaraza wodhidayta dhayssides; istta katamaa xuuggides.
Matthew22:8 Ba ashkaratakka
Matthew22:9 Gede oge bolla kezidi intte demmida as ubbaa haa diggisaso xeygite› gides.
Matthew22:10 Ashkaratikka oge bolla kezidi ba demmidayta lo7otakka iitatakka ubbaa shiishshidi sargezaso imath kunththida.

Matthew22:12 ‹Haysso! Sarge may7o may7ontta waanada haa gelanaas dandayadii?› gi oychchiin addezas zaarana qaalay dhaydes.
Matthew22:13 Kawoykka ba ashkarata
Matthew22:14 «Xeygettidayti darota; doorettidayti gidikko guuththata» gi yootides.

Matthew22:16 Bana kaallizayta Herdoosa asatara izakko kiittidi
Matthew22:17 Nees ay misatizaakko ane nuus yoota; Qeesaares giira qanxxanaas bessizee? Bessennee?» gida.
Matthew22:18 Yesusikka istta gene qofaa eridi

Matthew22:26 Nam7anththo ishaykka hayqqida ishaaththo naa yelontta hayqqides; hessaththoka hanishin maccassaya laappunththa ishaa geladus.
Matthew22:27 Wurseththan maccassaya hayqqadus.
Matthew22:28 Hessa gishshas laappunati wurikka izo ekkidashin hayqoppe denththa gallas maccassaya laappunatappe awayssa machcho gidanee?» gida.
