Matthew23:1 Qasseka Yesusi derezassinne bana kaallizaytas
Matthew23:2 «Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytinne Farsaaweti Muse wombora bolla uttida.
Matthew23:3 Hessa gishshas istti inttes yootizayssa ubbaa ooththitenne naagite; gido attiin istti doonan haasayzayssa mala ooson bessontta gishshas intte istta ooso kaallofte.
Matthew23:4 «Hessaththoka asi tookkanaas dandayontta deexo tooho qachchidi asa hashe bolla woththeettes; baas gidikko biradhdhe xeerankka bochchettenna.
Matthew23:5 Istta ooso ubbaa asi beyana mala ooththeettes; ba ashenkitaabe Geeshsha Maxaafa giddofe xaafi ekkida issi issi xiqiseta kitabe sikkidi liiphe bolla woykko kushen qachchizaaz ooththeettes. Ba may7o macara adusseettes.
Matthew23:6 Diggisay dizason bonchchoso Ayhuda Woosa Keeththankka sinththara uttana doseettes.
Matthew23:7 Hessaththoka giya giddon saro geetettanaassinne asay istta
Matthew23:8 «Intte gidikko
Matthew23:9 Salon inttes issi Aaway xalala diza gishshas biitta bolla oonakka
Matthew23:10 Intte astamaarey issi Kirstoosa xalla gidida gishshas intte
Matthew23:11 Intte giddon ubbaafe aadhdhizaadey inttes ooththizaade gidana.
Matthew23:12 Bana dhoqqisizaadey kawuyana; bana kawushshizaadey bonchchettana.
Matthew23:13 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo
Matthew23:14 Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo
Matthew23:15 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo! Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytoo! Qasseka Farsaawetoo! Issi as Ayhuda ammanon gelththanaas abba bollaranne biitta bollara yuuyi daaburdinne ammanththida asaa inttefe nam7u kushe aaththidi Gaanname naa intte kessiza gishshas inttes aayye ana!
Matthew23:16 «Intteno Inttes qooqi uttidi harata kaaleththizaytoo! Inttes aayye ana! ‹Oonikka Xoossa Keeththan caaqqiko aykkoy baa› gido attiin
Matthew23:17 Intteno qooqidaytoo! Balettidaytoo! Worqqafenne worqqa dummasida Xoossa Keeththafe awayssi aadhdhizee?
Matthew23:18 Hessaththoka
Matthew23:19 Intteno qooqetoo! Yarshofenne yarsho shiishshizasoppe awayssee aadhdhizay?
Matthew23:20 Hessa gishshas yarsho shiishshizaso bolla caaqqizaadey yarshosoza bollanne yarshizaso bolla diza ubba miishshan caaqqees.
Matthew23:21 Hessaththoka Xoossa Keeththaza bolla caaqqiday Xoossa Keeththaninne iza giddon aqizayssan caaqqees.
Matthew23:22 Salon caaqizaadeyka Xoossa alganinne alga bolla uttidayssan caaqqees.
Matthew23:23 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo
Matthew23:24 Intteno qooqi uttidi kaaleththizaytoo! Uu7e gaccidi uyeeta shin gaamella muume mitteeta!
Matthew23:25 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo
Matthew23:26 Nenoo qooqe Farsaawezoo! Koyrottada xuu7assinne keres giddo bagga geeshsha! Hessafe guye kare baggay geesh gidana.
Matthew23:27 «Intteno qoodheppe qommon hanizaytoo
Matthew23:28 Intteka bolla baggara asas xillo asata misateeta; intte giddoy gidikko cimoninne iitateththan kumides.
Matthew23:29 «Intteno doonan cimmizaytoo! Muse wogaa astamaaretoo
Matthew23:30 Nu aawati nabeta wodhiza wode nu dizaakko isttara zuppetokko shin
Matthew23:31 intte nabeta wodhida asata nayta gididayssa intte doonara intterkka intte intte bolla markkatteeta.
Matthew23:32 Histtiko oosettidi polettontta oge bolla diza intte aawata ooso polite.
Matthew23:33 «Intteno dukkiza iita shooshsha naytoo! Gaanname tama pirdafe intte waani attanee?
Matthew23:34 Hessa gishshas nabetanne eranchchata astamaaretakka ta inttes yeddana. Intte istta giddofe issi issi asata wodhana. Baggayta intte kaqqana; baggayta intte Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan garafananne he katamappe hara katama intte gooddana.
Matthew23:35 Hessa gishshas xillo Aabeele suuththaafe haa simmiin Xoossa Keeththaninne yarsho yarshizaso giddon intte wodhida Baarakiyo naa Zakaraasa suuththaa gakkanaas biitta bolla gukkida xillota suuththa ubbaas intte oyshettana.
Matthew23:36 Ta inttes tumu gays; kase aadhdhida yo7o ubbaas hayssi ha yeletay oyshettana.
Matthew23:37 «Hanne Yerusalaamee! Nabeta wodhizaaree! Neekko kiitettidayta shuchchara caddizaaree! Hanne Yerusalaame
Matthew23:38 Hekko intte keeththi kays gidi attana.
Matthew23:39 Ta inttes tumu gays; intte Godaa sunththan yizaadey anjjettidaade gaana wodey gakkanaas nam7anththo tana beyekketa» gides.
Matthew24:1 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththafe kezi bishin iza kaallizayti Xoossa Keeththazi shuchchan keexettidayssa bessana koyidi Yesusaakko shiiqida.
Matthew24:2 Izikka isttas
Matthew24:3 Izi Dabrazayte geetettiza zumaa bolla utti dishin iza kaallizayti xalala izakko shiiqidi
Matthew24:4 Yesusikka zaaridi
Matthew24:5 Buro daroti
Matthew24:6 Olanne ola gishshas haasayettiza wore intte siyana. Ha yo7oti wurikka wolqqara polettana shin wurseththi buro gidida gishshas intte hayssan dagammontta mala naagettite.
Matthew24:7 Derey dere bolla
Matthew24:8 Hessi wurikka miixas leesso mala.
Matthew24:9 He wode inttena waayes aaththi immana; inttena wodhana; ta sunththaa gaason dere ubbaan intte ixettidayta gidana.
Matthew24:10 «He wode daro asay dhuphettana; issoy issaa aaththi immananne ba giddon ixettana.
Matthew24:11 Daro wordo nabeti dendananne darota baleththana.
Matthew24:12 Iitateththi dariza gishshas darotappe siiqoy irxxana.
Matthew24:13 Wurseth gakkanaas minnidaadey attana.
Matthew24:14 Dere ubbaas markka gidana mala hayssi kawoteththa Mishiraachcho qaalay kumeththa alamen yootettana; hessafe guye wurseththi yaana.
Matthew24:15 «Hessa gishshas nabe Daaneelan yootettidayssa mala
Matthew24:16 He wode Yuhudan dizayti pude zuma bolla gangetto.
Matthew24:17 Keeththa kaara bolla dizaadey oonikka ba miish keeththaafe kessana giidi duge wodhdhofo.
Matthew24:18 Gade giddon dizaadey oonikka ba may7o ekkana giidi soo simmofo.
Matthew24:19 He gallassatan qanththara diza maccassatassinne naa dhanththiza aayetas aayye ana!
Matthew24:20 Hessa gishshas intte gangoy balgo woykko Sambata gallas gidontta mala woossite.
Matthew24:21 He wode alamey medhettoosoppe hach gakkanaas hani erontta miishshi sinththafekka iza misatizay baynda wolqqama metoy hanana.
Matthew24:22 He gallassati qaammonttaako asho may7ida asi wuri attenna shin doorettidayta gishshas he gallassati qaammana.
Matthew24:23 «He wode oonikka
Matthew24:24 Wordo Kirstoosinne wordo nabeti buro dendidi isttas dandayettiko doorettidayta baleththanaas giidi wolqqama malaatatanne kase oosetti erontta miish ooththana.
Matthew24:25 «Hekko hayssa ta inttes kaseta yootays.
Matthew24:26 Hessa gishshas
Matthew24:27 Wolqqanththi arshey mokkizasora wolqqamidi arshey wullizaso gakkanaas poo7izayssa mala Asa Naa yuussayka hessaththo hanana.
Matthew24:28 Ahay dizaso ankkoy shiiqees.
Matthew24:29 «Heerakka he iita meto gallassatappe guye arshey dhumana; aginay ba poo7o diggana; xoolintteti saloppe qoqofettana; salo wolqqamatikka qaaxxana.
Matthew24:30 «He wode asa naa malatay salo bolla beettana. Biitta bolla diza derey wuri yeekkana; Asa Naykka salo shaara bolla daro wolqqaranne gita bonchchora yishin asay beyana.
Matthew24:31 Kiitanchchatakka daro wolqqama xurumba giirissara yeddana. Isttika doorettidayta oyddu gulappe salos ha gaxappe he gaxa gakkanaas ubbaa issiso shiishshana.
Matthew24:32 «Balase geetettiza miththafe hayssa tamaarte; balase miththays unquloy cililiza wode iza hayth kessishin boney matidayssa intte ereeta.
Matthew24:33 Hessaththoka hayta intte be7iza wode izi penge matidayssa intte erana.
Matthew24:34 Ta tumu gays; hayssi wuri polettana gakkanaas ha yeletay aadhdhenna.
Matthew24:35 Saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana shin ta qaalay gidikko mulekka aadhdhenna.
Matthew24:36 «He gallassayonne he saateyo Aawappe attiin salo kiitanchchata gidiinkka Naaza gidiinkka oonikka erenna.
Matthew24:37 Nohe wode hanidayssa mala Asa Naa yuussi hessa mala gidana.
Matthew24:38 Dhayssiza haaththafe kase Nohey markaben geliza gallas gakkanaas asay mishenne uyishe
Matthew24:39 He wodey gakkanaas aazi hananaakko asay eronttanne qoppontta bashsha haaththi yiidi mittidayssa mala ta Asa Nay yiza wodeykka hessaththo hanana.
Matthew24:40 «He wode nam7u asati issife goshshan pe7ana shin isttafe issaadey ekettana; issaadey attana.
Matthew24:41 Nam7u maccassati woxan issife gaaccana shin isttafe issineya ekettana; issineya attana.
Matthew24:42 «Histtiko intte Goday yaana gallassaa intte erontta gishshas beeggidi naagite.
Matthew24:43 Hayssa wozinan woththite; kaysoy qammaafe aafuntha saate bolla yaanakkon erizaakko iza miish kaysoy ekkontta mala keeththaa aaway beeggidi naagana.
Matthew24:44 Asa Naykka intte qoppontta saate bolla yaana; intteka hessaththo giigettidayta gidite.
Matthew24:45 «Wodera soo asaa quma mizana mala goday ba keeththa asaa bolla shuumida ammanettiza cincca oosanchchay oonee?
Matthew24:46 Keeththa aaway simmidi yiza wode izas immida hadara ooththi polishe beettida oosanchchay anjjettidayssa.
Matthew24:47 Ta inttes tumu gays; goday iza ba haarida ubbaa bolla shuumana.
Matthew24:48 Gido attiin he oosanchchay iita gididi
Matthew24:49 dendi hankko oosanchchata wadha oykkiko maththottizaytara miikkonne uyikko
Matthew24:50 izi qoppontta gallassaninne erontta saaten iza goday yiidi
Matthew24:51 iza qanxxeththi kaa7ana; iza exa qoodheppe qommon hanizaytara ooththana. Heenkka yeehoynne achcha garccechchi hanana.
Matthew25:1 «He wode Salo Kawoteththiya mishira mokkanaas xomppe oykkidi kezida tammu geela7ota misatawus.
Matthew25:2 He tammatappe ichchashu geela7oti eeyata; hankko ichchashati cinccata.
Matthew25:3 Eeyati kuraaze
Matthew25:4 Cinccati gidikko ba kuraazezara wurikko gujjana lamba hara xarmusen oykkida.
Matthew25:5 Machchiyo ekkana mishiray yontta gam7iin dhiskoy deexxiin asay wurikka dhiskides.
Matthew25:6 «Leela giddoth gidishin
Matthew25:7 He wode geela7oti wurikka dendidi ba xomppe xomppe oyseththonne giigeteth oykkida.
Matthew25:8 Eeyati cinccata
Matthew25:9 «Cincca geela7oti isttas zaaridi
Matthew25:10 Istti lamba shammana bi kichchiin mishirazi gakki wodhdhides. Kase giigetti uttida geela7oti bullachchaso izara gelida; kareykka gordettides.
Matthew25:11 «Guuth gam7ishe hankko geela7oti yiidi
Matthew25:12 Izikka zaaridi
Matthew25:13 Hessa gishshas yaana gallassaa woykko saateza intte erontta gishshas giigettidi naagite.
Matthew25:14 «Xoossa Kawoteththi baas dizaaz ubbaa ba ashkaratas hadara immidi hara dere baana dendida issi as misatees.
Matthew25:15 Ashkaratas issaas issaas istta wolqqa mala giigsidi issaas ichchashu shii bira
Matthew25:16 Ichchashu shii bira ekkida addezi heerakka miishshaan zal7e oykkidi hara ichchashu shii bira wodhisides.
Matthew25:17 Qasseka nam7u shii bira ekkidayssi hara nam7u shii bira wodhisides.
Matthew25:18 Issi shii bira ekkidayssi ba godaa bira biittan moogidi qottides.
Matthew25:19 «Ashkarata goday ba bidason daro wode gam7i simmidi miishshaa isttara salla7ettides.
Matthew25:20 Ichchashu shii bira ekkida ashkaray hara ichchashu shii bira wodhisidayssa ekki yiidi
Matthew25:21 Iza godaykka
Matthew25:22 «Hessaththoka nam7u shii bira ekkidayssi godazaakko shiiqidi
Matthew25:23 Godazikka
Matthew25:24 «Issi shii bira ekkida ashkarazi shiiqidi
Matthew25:25 Hessa gishshas ta babbada biitta bookkada ne biraa bookkida ollan moogada qottadis; ne miish hessa beya!› gides.
Matthew25:26 «Iza goday zaaridi
Matthew25:27 Histtiin ta simma yiza wode ta miishshaa yelora ta ekkana mala tirpisi zal7iza asas ne immanaas besseesishin› gides.
Matthew25:28 « ‹Ane ha7i izappe shii bira ekkidi tammu shii biray dizaades immite.
Matthew25:29 Dizaades gujettananne dari dari baana; bayndaadefe he diza guuththayakka izappe ekettaychchana.
Matthew25:30 Hayssa go7ay baynda ashkaraa gede yeekkizasonne achchey garccettizaso heen karen diza dhuman kessi yeggite› gides.
Matthew25:31 «Asa Nay ba kiitanchchata ubbaara bonchchon yiza wode ba bonchcho alga bolla uttana.
Matthew25:32 Derey wuri iza sinththi shiiqana; izikka mehe heemmizaadey deysh dorsafe qori shaakkiza mala asaa issaa issaafe qori shaakkana.
Matthew25:33 Dorsata ba ushachcha baggara
Matthew25:34 He wode kawoy ushachcha baggara dizayta
Matthew25:35 Gaasoykka tani gafiin tana mizideta; ta saamettiin tana ushshideta; ta imath gidada yiin tana mokki ekkideta.
Matthew25:36 Ta kallottiin tana mayzideta; ta sakettiin tana hargisideta; ta qashettiin tana oychchideta› gaana.
Matthew25:37 «Xillotikka zaaridi
Matthew25:38 Nu ayde nena be7idi imaththateth mokkidonii? Woykko ayde ne kallottiin be7idi nena mayzidonii?
Matthew25:39 Hessaththoka ne sakettiin woykko qashettiin ayde be7idi nena oychchidonii?› gaana.
Matthew25:40 Kawoykka zaaridi
Matthew25:41 «Qasseka hadirsa baggara dizaytas
Matthew25:42 Gaasoykka ta gafiin tana mizibeekketa; ta saamettiin tana ushshibeekketa;
Matthew25:43 tana imaththateth mokkibeekketa; ta kallottiin tana mayzibeekketa; ta sakettininne qashettiin tana oychchibeekketa› gaana.
Matthew25:44 «Isttika zaaridi
Matthew25:45 «He wode izikka isttas zaaridi
Matthew25:46 Heyti gede mernaa pirdan baana; xilloti gidikko mernaa de7okko baana» gides.

Matthew26:5 Gido attiin

Matthew26:29 Ta inttes gizay ta Aawaa Kawoteththan ta inttenara ooraththa woyne ushshaa uyana gakkanaas hayssafe guye hayssa woyne ushshaa inttenara uyikke» gides.

Matthew26:41 Paacen intte gelontta mala minnidi woossite; ayanay giigettides shin ashoy gidikko daaburanchcha» gides.

Matthew26:64 Yesusikka

Matthew27:1 Maalado wonttara qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati wurikka Yesusa wodhana oge zorettida.
Matthew27:2 Yesusa qachchi efidi dere haariza Philaxoosas aaththi immida.
Matthew27:3 Iza aaththi immida Yuhudaykka Yesusa bolla pirdettidayssa be7idi
Matthew27:4 
Matthew27:5 Hessa gishshas Yuhuday biraa efidi Xoossa Keeththa giddon yeggidi kezi biidi cuuletti hayqqides.
Matthew27:6 Qeeseta halaqati biraa denththidi
Matthew27:7 Ba giddon zorettidi imath gidida asatas duufo gidana mala issi urqqa miish medhdhiza hiillaza gade shammida.
Matthew27:8 Hessa gishshas he gadey hach gakkanaas suuththa gade geetettees.
Matthew27:9 Izas waaga gidana mala
Matthew27:10 
Matthew27:11 He wode Yesusi dere haarizayssa sinth shiiqides. Dere haarizayssika
Matthew27:12 Qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati iza mootishin Yesusi isttas aynne zaaribeenna.
Matthew27:13 He wode Philaxoosi Yesusa
Matthew27:14 Dere haarizayssi keehi malalettana gakkanaas Yesusi issi qaalakka zaaribeenna.
Matthew27:15 Dere haarizayssas ba7aale gallas derey qasho asaappe
Matthew27:16 He wode gene ooson erettida Barbaane geetettiza issaadey qashoson dees.
Matthew27:17 Derey shiiqida mala Philaxoosi
Matthew27:18 Philaxoosi istta coo qanaates aaththi immidayssa erishe oychchides.
Matthew27:19 Izi pirda alga bolla utti dishin iza machcheya
Matthew27:20 Gido attiin qeeseta halaqatinne cimati isttas Barbaaney birshettana malanne qasse Yesusa wodhana mala woossanaas dereza qaalay gaaggana mala ooththida.
Matthew27:21 Dere haarizayssi
Matthew27:22 Philaxoosikka
Matthew27:23 Philaxoosikka aazas? «Izi ay iita ooththidee?» giidi istta oychchides. Isttika qasse keehi waassidi
Matthew27:24 Philaxoosi hanizayssi wurikka asay ba giddon bul7aketeththafe attiin hara ay go7ay bayndayssa yuushshi xeellidi
Matthew27:25 Derey wuri
Matthew27:26 He wode Barbaane isttas birshidi Yesusa garafissidaappe guye kaqqana mala aaththi immides.
Matthew27:27 Hessafe wottadarati Yesusa gede dere haarizayssa gibbe ekki biidi wuri shiiqidi Yesusa giddo aaththida.
Matthew27:28 Iza may7o qaaridi hara zo7o may7o mayzida.
Matthew27:29 Agunththa akilile xaaxidi giigsida; iza hu7e bolla woththida; shomboqo guufe ushachcha kushen oyththidinne iza sinththan gulbatidi
Matthew27:30 Iza bolla cuttida; shomboqo guufeza iza kusheppe ekkidi Yesusa hu7en zaari zaaridi shocida.
Matthew27:31 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7idaappe guye qasseka zo7o may7oza qaari ekkidinne kase iza may7oza zaari mayzidi kaqqanaaso ekki bida.
Matthew27:32 Istti ekki bishin Qareena geetettizasoppe yida Simoona geetettizayssa demmidi masqaleza iza wolqqara toossida.
Matthew27:33 Birsheththay
Matthew27:34 
Matthew27:35 Iza kaqqidaappe guye iza may7oza bolla saama yeggidi gishettida.
Matthew27:36 Heen uttidi iza naagida.
Matthew27:37 «Hayssi Ayhuda kawo Yesusa» giza mooto qaala iza hu7eppe bollara woththida.
Matthew27:38 Nam7u pangatappe issoy Yesusappe ushachcha baggara
Matthew27:39 Ogera aadhdhi biza asay cayishenne hu7e qaaththishe
Matthew27:40 
Matthew27:41 Qeeseta halaqati dere cimatara gididi iza bolla qidhishe;
Matthew27:42 «Hara asaa ashshides shin bana ashshanaas dandaybeenna; izi Isra7eele kawo gidikko ane ha7i masqale bollafe wodhdho; nunikka iza ammanana.
Matthew27:43 Xoossan ammanettides; bana Xoossa Naa gida mala Xoossi iza dosizaa gidikko ane ha7i iza ashsho» gida.
Matthew27:44 Izara issife kaqettida pangatikka hessaththo cashsha qaala iza bolla qoqofida.
Matthew27:45 Gallas usuppun saateppe biidi uddufun saate gakkanaas kumeththa biittay dhumides.
Matthew27:46 Uddufun saate gidishin Yesusi qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi
Matthew27:47 Heen eqqida asaappe issi issi asati iza waasoza siyidi
Matthew27:48 Isttafe issaadey woxxi biidi zandza misatiza safinege geetettiza miish ekkidi caalida woyne cajjen yeggi caphisidinne shomboqo geetettiza miththa xeeran qaaphidi uyana mala Yesusa doonaakko shiishshides.
Matthew27:49 Hankko asay qasse
Matthew27:50 Yesusi qasseka dhoqqa qaalan waassidi shempo kezides.
Matthew27:51 He wode Xoossa Keeththaa magalashay bolla hu7era duge simmi daakettidi nam7u kezides; biittay qaaxxides; zaallati za7ida.
Matthew27:52 Duufoti doyettida; kase hayqqida Xoossa asaappe dariza baggay dendides.
Matthew27:53 Duufoppe kezidi Yesusa denththaafe guye geeshsha katama gelidi darota ayfen beettida.
Matthew27:54 Mato halaqaynne izara issife Yesusa naagizayti biitta qaaththaanne hanidayssa ubbaa be7idi daro babbida. Qasse
Matthew27:55 Galilappe yiidi Yesusa koshshizaazan ooththi maaddanaas kaalliza daro maccassati hanizayssa wursika haahora xeellishe heen deettes.
Matthew27:56 Istta giddon Magdaleppe yida Maaramiranne
Matthew27:57 Gadey omarsishin Yooseefe geetettiza issi dure adde dayssi Armatiyase geetettizasoppe yides. Izikka ba baggara Yesusa kaallizaade.
Matthew27:58 Izi Philaxoosa sinththi shiiqidi Yesusa aha izas immana mala woossiin Philaxoosikka izas immana mala azazides.
Matthew27:59 Yooseefey ahaa ekkidi geesh gidida moogo afalan xaaxides.
Matthew27:60 Shuch woocidi baas giigsida duufon efi woththidi gita shuch genderisi duufoza gordides.
Matthew27:61 He wode Magdale Maaramiranne hankko Maaramira duufoza ginan uttida.
Matthew27:62 Sambatas giigettiza wonteththa gallas qeeseta halaqatinne Farsaaweti Philaxoosa sinth shiiqidi
Matthew27:63 «Godoo! He wordoy kase paxa dishe
Matthew27:64 Hessa gishshas iza kaallizayti iza ahaa kaysoti ekkidi deraas
Matthew27:65 Philaxoosi
Matthew27:66 Isttika biidi duufoza doona maatamen gordidi naagana zabe essida.
Matthew28:1 Sambatay aadhdhidaappe guye saaminttafe koyro gallas buro saloy zo7ishin Magdale Maaramanne hankko Maarama duufoza beyana bida.
Matthew28:2 Qoppontta dishin gita biitta qaaththi hanides; Godaa kiitanchchayka saloppe wodhdhi duufaakko biidi shuchchaa genderisidi iza bolla uttides.
Matthew28:3 Kiitanchchazas medhay wolqqanththa poo7o mala; iza may7oyka shachcha mala booththa.
Matthew28:4 Duufo naagizayti kiitanchchazas babbi kokkoridinne hayqeth misatida.
Matthew28:5 Kiitanchchazi maccassata
Matthew28:6

Matthew28:10 Yesusi istta

Matthew28:13 
Matthew28:14 Hayssi worey dere haarizayssa matan siyettikokka nuni izas lo7eththi yootana; aykko iitaykka intte bolla gakkontta mala nu ooththana» gida.
Matthew28:15 Wottadaratikka miishshaa ekkidi istti gida mala ooththida; hayssi yo7ozi hach gakkanaas Ayhudata achchan daroson yootettishe dees.

Matthew28:20 
Mark1:1 Xoossa Naa Yesus Kirstoosa koyro Mishiraachchoy hayssa;
Mark1:2 nabe Isayaasa baggara
Mark1:3 ‹Godaas oge giigsite; izi baana oge suurisidi ooththite› gishe bazzo biittan waassiza giiris» geetetti xaafettides.
Mark1:4 Hessaththoka Xammaqiza Yohannisi asaa xammaqishe
Mark1:5 Yuhuda derey kumeth Yerusalaame asay wuri Yohannisakko bi biidi ba nagara nagara paaxi paaxi Yordaanoose Shaafan Yohannisa kushen xammaqettides.
Mark1:6 He wode Yohannisi may7izay gaamella iskefe oosettida may7o; qasse ba xeessan dafo gixxees; izi miza qumay boolenne degera eessa.
Mark1:7 Izi
Mark1:8 Tani inttena haaththan xammaqays; izi gidikko inttena Xillo Ayanan xammaqana» gi sabbakides.
Mark1:9 He wode Yesusi Galila giddon diza Naazirete geetettiza katamayppe Yordaanoose Shaafa yiidi Yohannisa kushen xammaqettides.
Mark1:10 Yesusi xammaqettidi haaththaafe kezida mala saloy doyettiin Xillo Ayanay iza bolla haraphphe misatidi wodhdhishin be7ides.
Mark1:11 Qasseka
Mark1:12 Heerakka Xillo Ayanay iza duge bazzo kaaleththi efides.
Mark1:13 Heen bazzonkka oyddu tammu gallas gakkanaas Xala7era paacettishe gam7ides; do7atara issife de7ides; kiitanchchatikka iza maaddida.
Mark1:14 Yohannisi qasho keeth gelidaappe guye Yesusi Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakishe Galila biidi
Mark1:15 
Mark1:16 Yesusi Galila abbaa achchara aadhdhiin Simooninne iza isha Indiraasi mole oykkizayta gidida gishshas istti mole oykkiza gite abban yeggishin be7ides.
Mark1:17 Yesusi istta
Mark1:18 Istti heerakka mole giteza yeggi aggidi Yesusa kaallida.
Mark1:19 Guuth gede sinththe aadhdhidi Zabdoosa naa Yaaqoobeynne iza isha Yohannisi wogolon uttidi mole gite giigsishin be7idi heerakka istta xeygides.
Mark1:20 Isttika ba aawaa Zabdoosanne izas qaxxaretti ooththiza asatara issife wogoloza giddon aggidi Yesusa kaalli bida.
Mark1:21 Heeppeka Qifirnahoome bida. Heerakka Yesusi Ayhudata Sambata gallas Ayhudata Woosa Keeth gelidi tamaarso oykkides.
Mark1:22 Xaafeta mala gidontta godateththara diza asa mala izi tamaarsiin asay wuri iza timirtezan malalettides.
Mark1:23 He wode Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan tuna ayanay iza bolla diza issaadey
Mark1:24 «Naazirete Yesusa ne nuuppe ay koyay? Nuna dhayssana yadii? Ne oonakko ta nena erays; neni Xoossa geeshshaza» giidi waassides.
Mark1:25 Yesuska tuna ayanaza
Mark1:26 Tuna ayanay addeza genderisidi izi qakettishin izappe waassishe kezides.
Mark1:27 Derey wuri
Mark1:28 Heerakka iza ooso worey Galila yuushon diza dere ubbaan siyettides.
Mark1:29 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththafe kezida mala Yaaqooberanne Yohannisara issife gede Simoonasonne Indiraasaso gelida.
Mark1:30 Hee gelida mala Simoona bolloteya misha harge sakettada ichchidayssa izas yootida.
Mark1:31 Hessa gishshas Yesusi izikko shiiqidi izi kushe oykki denththides. Mishay aggiin iza dendada istta mokkadus.
Mark1:32 Arshey wullidaappe guye gadey dhumishin asay harganchchatanne daydanththi oykkida asaa wursi Yesusaakko ekki yides.
Mark1:33 He katamayin diza asay wuri keeththa karen shiiqides.
Mark1:34 Izikka dumma dumma hargen sakettidayta darota paththides; daro daydanththatakka kessides; gido attiin daydanththati Yesusi oonakko eriza gishshas istti haasayana mala Yesusi koyibeenna.
Mark1:35 Bazzoy zo7ontta Yesusi maalado wonttara dendidi asi bayndaso biidi heen woosa oykkides.
Mark1:36 Simooninne izara dizayti Yesusa koyana kezi bida.
Mark1:37 Istti iza demmidi
Mark1:38 Yesusikka
Mark1:39 Hessa gishshas Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan geli geli sabbakishenne daydanth kessishe Galila katama kumeththaan yuuyides.
Mark1:40 Issi inchchirachcha hargizaadey Yesusaakko shiiqidinne iza sinththan gulbatidi
Mark1:41 Yesusikka addezas mishettidi ba kushe yeddi iza bochchidi
Mark1:42 Heerakka addeza inchchirachcha hargey aggiin addezi paxides.
Mark1:43 Yesusikka addezas
Mark1:44 
Mark1:45 Gido attiin addezi kezi biidi ba bida ubbason wore darssi dharccides. Hessa gaason Yesusi ay katamankka qonccera gelanaas dandaybeenna. Hessafe dendidayssan katamaappe karera asi bayndason duus oykkides. Asay gidikko dumma dummasoppeka izakko yides.
Mark2:1 Guuththa gallassafe guye
Mark2:2 Hessa gishshas keeththara
Mark2:3 Oyddu as dayti issi tohoy silida issi as tookkidi izakko ehida.
Mark2:4 Asaa daroteththafe dendidayssan Yesusi dizaso gaththanaas dandayontta gishshas Yesusi diza ginara kaara qaaridi harganchchaza izi ichchida halaara Yesusa sinth duge woththida.
Mark2:5 Yesusi asata ammano be7idi tohoy silida addeza
Mark2:6 Heen gadaan uttida issi issi Muse woga xaafeti ba wozinara hayssi addezi wostti hayssaththo gizee? «Xoossa bolla cashsha qaala haasayees. Issi Xoossaafe attiin nagara maarana dandayzay oonee?» giidi qoppida.
Mark2:7 
Mark2:8 Yesusi heerakka istti ba wozinan qoppidayssa ba Ayanan eridi
Mark2:9 Tohoy silida addeza
Mark2:10 Gido attiin Asa Naas biitta bollan nagara maarana godateththi dizayssa intte erana mala» giidi toho sila addeza
Mark2:11 «Dendada ne tooketta yida halaa tookkada neso ba» gides.
Mark2:12 Izikka dendidi asay wuri beyishin halaa tookkidi bides. Heen gadaan diza asay wuri hanozan malalettidi
Mark2:13 Qasseka Yesusi Galila Abba lanqe bides. Daro derey izakko yiin izikka yida asaa tamaarsides.
Mark2:14 Izi ogera aadhdhi bishin Ilfiyoosa naa Lewey qaraxa shiishshizason uttidayssa be7idi
Mark2:15 Hessafe guye Lewe soon kaththa maaddan utti dishin qaraxa shiishshiza daro asatinne nagaranchchati izara kaalli yida gishshas istti Yesusaranne iza kaallizaytara issife maaddaan uttida.
Mark2:16 Farsaaweta baggafe gidida Muse woga tamaarsizayti Yesusi nagaranchchataranne qaraxa shiishshizaytara mishin be7idi iza kaallizayta
Mark2:17 Yesusikka istti gizayssa siyidi
Mark2:18 Yohannisa kaallizaytinne Farsaaweti xooma xoomeettes. Issi issi asati Yesusaakko yiidi
Mark2:19 Yesusikka isttas
Mark2:20 Mishiray isttafe ekettana wodey yaana. He wode istti xoomana.
Mark2:21 «Gal7a may7o bolla ooraththa woso woththi sikkizaadey oonikka deenna; hessaththo ooththiko ooraththazi gal7aa daakki daakki yeggees; daakeththayka kaseppe gede aadhdhi iitees.
Mark2:22 Hessaththoka ooraththa woyne cajje gal7a lukkamon woththizaadey deenna. Woththizaa gidikko woyne cajjezi gal7a lukkamoza dhuussees; woyne cajjezinne lukkamozi nam7ay mooretteettes. Hessa gishshas ooraththa woyne cajjey daanaas bessizay ooraththa lukkamonna» gides.
Mark2:23 Yesusi Ayhudata Sambata gallas gistte tiya giddora aadhdhishin iza kaallizayti izara issife bishe tiya xupho oykkida.
Mark2:24 Farsaaweti
Mark2:25 Izikka isttas
Mark2:26 Abiyaataarey qeeseta halaqateththan dishin izi Xoossa Keeththe gelidi qeeseti xalala maana bessiza dumma kaththaa baas miidinne banara dizaytas immides» gides.
Mark2:27 Qasseka Yesusi isttas
Mark2:28 Hessa gishshas ta Asa Nay Sambata godaa» gides.
Mark3:1 Hara gallas Yesusi Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe gelides. Heenkka kushey silidaadey dees.
Mark3:2 Yesusa mootanaas gaaso koyza asati izi Ayhudata Sambata gallas paththanaakkon giidi paththishin beyana koyida.
Mark3:3 Izikka kushey silida addeza
Mark3:4 Hessafe guye Yesusi asaa
Mark3:5 Istta wozina shuchchateththan mishettidi iza giddoththidi yuuyi aadhdhi eqqida asaa hanqora xeellidi addeza
Mark3:6 Farsaaweti kezi biidi iza wostti dhayssanaakko Herdoosa bagga gidida asatara zorettida.
Mark3:7 Yesusi bana kaallizaytara abbaako bides. Galilappenne Yuhudappe yida daro derey iza kaallides.
Mark3:8 Izi ooththizayssa siyidi asay Yuhudappe
Mark3:9 Asay darida gishshas iza un7eththontta mala guuththa wogolo istti giigsana mala bana kaallizayta azazides.
Mark3:10 Izi daro harganchchata paththida gishshas sakoy waayisizayti wuri iza ba kushera bochchanaas dafettida.
Mark3:11 Tuna ayanatikka Yesusa be7ida mala iza sinththan kundidi
Mark3:12 Gido attiin izi oonakko tuna ayanati qonccisontta mala keehippe hanqides.
Mark3:13 Yesusi pude zuma bolla kezidi ba koyzayta baakko yaana mala xeygides; isttika izakko yida.
Mark3:14 Izara issife gidana malanne sabbakanaas yeddana mala tammanne nam7ata
Mark3:15 Asaappe daydanththata kessana mala isttas godateth immides.
Mark3:16 Izi sunththida tammanne nam7ata sunththi hayssafe kaallizayssa; Phexroosa geetettida Simoona
Mark3:17 Bi7orinegeese woykko daada nayta geetettida Zabdoosa nayta Yaaqoobenne Yohannisa
Mark3:18 Indiraasa
Mark3:19 Yesusa aaththi immida Asqoronto Yuhuda.
Mark3:20 Hessafe guye Yesusi issi soo gelides. Izinne iza kaallizayti kath maana wodey isttas dhayana gakkanaas derey qasseka dari shiiqides.
Mark3:21 Iza hanotaa siyida iza dabboti
Mark3:22 Yerusalaameppe yida xaafetikka
Mark3:23 Izikka istta xeygidi leemisora
Mark3:24 Ba giddon shaakoy diza kawoteththi minnanaas dandayenna.
Mark3:25 Issi keeththa asikka ba giddon shaakettiko eqqanaas dandayenna.
Mark3:26 Hessaththoka Xala7ey ba garsan issoy issaara shaakettikonne ixettiko minni eqqanaas dandayenna. Hessika izas wurseth gidana.
Mark3:27 «Hessa gaason issaadey koyrottidi wolqqama as qachchontta dishe wolqqamaza soo gelanaassinne iza miishshe bonqqanaas dandayenna; iza aqo bonqqanaas dandayettizay wolqqamaza qachchiko xalala.
Mark3:28 «Ta inttes tumu gays; asa naytas nagaraynne cashshi wuri maarettana.
Mark3:29 Gido attiin Xillo Ayana bolla cashsha qaala haasayza asa ubbaas mernaas nagara aco gidana attiin maarettenna» gides.
Mark3:30 Hessa izi giday istti iza
Mark3:31 Hessafe guye iza aayeyanne iza ishati kare yi eqqidinne ase izakko kiitti xeygisida.
Mark3:32 Iza giddoththi uttida daro asay
Mark3:33 Izikka zaaridi
Mark3:34 Iza yuuyi uttida asaakko xeellidi
Mark3:35 Xoossa shene ooththizay wuri izi ta isha
Mark4:1 Qasse Yesusi hara wode abbaa achchan tamaarso oykkides. Izakko keehi daro derey shiiqida gishshas abbaa giddon diza wogolo dizaarin gelidi uttides; asaykka wuri abbaa achchan shiiqides.
Mark4:2 Izikka daro yo7ota leemison hizgi tamaarsides.
Mark4:3 «Siyite! Issaadey zereth zeranaas kezides.
Mark4:4 Izi zerishin issi issi zereththi oge bolla wodhdhides. Oge bolla wodhdhida zereththaa kafoti maxi mida.
Mark4:5 Baggay mela biittan wodhdhides. He biittay mela gidida gishshas heerakka caarides.
Mark4:6 Gido attiin arshey kezida mala shullidi xapho yeddontta gishshas melides.
Mark4:7 Qasse issi zereththi agunththa giddon wodhdhides; agunththayka diccidi cuullida gishshas ayfibeenna.
Mark4:8 Hara zereththi qasse lo7o orde biitta bolla wodhdhida gishshas caaridi diccides; ayfekka ayfides; Issoy heedzdzu tammu
Mark4:9 Yesusi qasseka
Mark4:10 Yesusi barkka dishin tammanne nam7atinne kase izara diza asay izi yootida leemisoza gishshas iza zaari oychchida.
Mark4:11 Izikka isttas
Mark4:12 Hessika kase
Mark4:13 Qasseka Yesusi
Mark4:14 Zerizaadey qaala zerees.
Mark4:15 Issi issi asati oge bolla wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes; istti qaala siyiza wode Xala7ey yiidi heerakka istti siyida qaalaa istta wozinappe ekkichchees.
Mark4:16 Hessaththoka harati mela biitta bolla wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes. Istti qaala siyidi ufayssan ekkeettes.
Mark4:17 Gido attiin istti xapho yeddontta gishshas guuththa wode gam7ishin qaalaa gaason metoy woykko goodetay asata bolla yiza wode heerakka dhuphetteettes.
Mark4:18 Harati qasse agunththa giddon wodhdhida zereththaa misateettes; istti qaalaa sis siyeettes.
Mark4:19 Gido attiin ha biitta metoy
Mark4:20 Hankkoyti lo7o biittan zerettida zereththaa misateettes; heytikka qaalaa siyidi ekkizaadenne heedzdzu tammu ayfe
Mark4:21 Qasseka Yesusi
Mark4:22 Hessa gishshas qotettidi qoncce kezonttay
Mark4:23 Hessa gishshas siyiza hayththi dizaadey siyo!» gides.
Mark4:24 Gujjidikka
Mark4:25 Dizaades gujettana shin bayndaadefe izas dizaarakka ekketaychchana» gides.
Mark4:26 Qasseka Yesusi
Mark4:27 Zeridaadey omars dhiskees. Wontishin dendees; gido attiin izi erontta dishin zerettida kaththay mokkidi diccees.
Mark4:28 Gadeyakka koyro caarech
Mark4:29 Kaththay kaxxidaappe guye boney gakkiin keeththa aaway heerakka maxa oykkees» gides.
Mark4:30 Yesusi
Mark4:31 Biitta bolla ubbaafe laafa gidida sanafice ayfe misatawus.
Mark4:32 Zerettada diccidaappe guye qasse atakilteta ubbaafe aadhdhiza gishshas kafoti yiidi he atakiltey haggata kuwa giddon shempeettes» gides.
Mark4:33 Yesusikka asay ekkanaas dandayzayssa keena hayta misatiza hara daro leemisora isttas yootides.
Mark4:34 Ay miish gidikkoka asaas leemisoy baynda yooti erenna. Izinne iza kaallizayti xalla diza wode gidikko wursi birshi yootees.
Mark4:35 He gallas gadey qammishin bana kaallizayta
Mark4:36 Istti asaa heen aggaagidi izi utti diza wogolozara Yesusa ekki bida. Hara wogolotikka isttara issife deettes.
Mark4:37 He wode wolqqama dambalay abbaa bolla dendidi wogoloza haaththi kumana gakkanaas shocechchides.
Mark4:38 Gido attiin Yesusi borkoth borkotidi wogolozas guye baggan ichchides. Isttika iza denththidi
Mark4:39 Izikka dendidi carkoza
Mark4:40 Bana kaallizaytakka
Mark4:41 Isttika keehi babbidi ba giddon issoy issaara
Mark5:1 Abbaa pinnidi gede Gergesenoone geetettizaso bida.
Mark5:2 Yesusi wogoloyppe wodhdhida mala tuna ayanay iza bolla dizaadey duufoppe kezidi Yesusara gaaggana izakko yides.
Mark5:3 Hayssi addezi duufoson dizaadenne haray attoshin oonikka iza sansalatankka qachchanaas dandaybeenna.
Mark5:4 Daro wode toho birataranne sansalatara qashettees. Gido attiin kushe sansalata duuseththi yeggees; toho biratakka menththereththi yeggees; oonikka iza oykkidi teqqanaas dandaybeenna.
Mark5:5 Gallassinne qamma duufota giddoninne zumata bolla yuuyi yuuyi waassishe ba bolla shuchchara qanxxereththidi madunththees.
Mark5:6 Izikka Yesusa haahon be7ida mala woththan izakko yiidi iza sinththan gulbatidi goynnides.
Mark5:7 Keehi waassidi
Mark5:8 Izi hessa giday Yesusi kase
Mark5:9 Hessafe qasse Yesusi iza
Mark5:10 He dereppe kessi yeddontta mala Yesusa keehi woossides.
Mark5:11 Heen matan zuma bolla daro guddunththi heemettees.
Mark5:12 Tuna ayanati
Mark5:13 Izikka isttas
Mark5:14 Guddunththa heemmizayti baqatidi hanidayssa katamaninne dere giddon yootida. Dereykka hanidayssa beyanaas ba dizasoppe dizasoppe kezides.
Mark5:15 Yesusaakko yiidi daro daydanththi iza bolla diza addeza wozinay izas simmiin may7o may7idinne wogara uttidayssa yida asay be7idi babbides.
Mark5:16 Hayssa be7ida asay daydanththi iza bolla diza addeza gishshassinne guddunththati hanoyssa derezas yootides.
Mark5:17 Hessafe guye he dere asay Yesusi istta dere yeddidi baana mala woossides.
Mark5:18 Yesusi wogolon gelishin daydanththati izappe kezida addezi Yesusara daanaas woossides.
Mark5:19 Yesusi qasse izi oychchidayssa akkay giidi
Mark5:20 Addezikka baso biidi Yesusi izas ooththida gita miish wursi tammu katama geetettiza deren yootiin siyiday wurikka malalettides.
Mark5:21 Qasseka Yesusi wogolon gelidi gede pinth pinnidi abbaa achchan dishin daro asay iza ach shiiqidinne iza giddoththides.
Mark5:22 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqatappe issoy Iya7iroosa geetettizayssi izi dizaso biidi Yesusa demmida mala iza toho bolla kundidi
Mark5:23 «Taas guuththa naa dizaara hayqqana gawus. Iza hayqqontta paxa daana mala ne haa yaada ne kushe izi bolla woththarkii?» giidi keehi woossides.
Mark5:24 Yesusikka izara issife bides. Daro asay iza un7eththana gakkanaas kaallides.
Mark5:25 Tammanne nam7u layth kumeth suuththi izi bollafe gukkiza maccas dizaara heen asaara dawus.
Mark5:26 Iza baas diza miish wursana gakkanaas aakimeppe aakime laamon daro daaburadus. Gido attiin sakoy izis gede darides attiin aykkoka lo7ibeenna.
Mark5:27 Iza Yesusa gishshas siyida mala asaa giddora Yesusa guyera kaallada iza may7o bochchadus.
Mark5:28 Gaasoykka
Mark5:29 Gukkiza suuththay heerakka eqqi aggides; izakka paxidayssa ba asateththan eradus.
Mark5:30 Baappe wolqqay kezidayssa Yesusi eridi gede asaakko simmidi
Mark5:31 Iza kaallizayti qasse
Mark5:32 Yesusi hessa ooththiday oonakkonne beyanaas yuushshi xeellides.
Mark5:33 Maccassayakka baas aazi waanidaakko erada babbashenne kokkorashe yaada Yesusa sinththan gufannada tumaa wursa izas yootadus.
Mark5:34 Izikka
Mark5:35 Yesusi buro haasayan dishin Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqa Iya7iroosa sooppe yiidi Iya7iroosas
Mark5:36 Gido attiin Yesusi istta haasayaa leppi histtidi Ayhudata Woosa Keeththaa halaqaza
Mark5:37 Phexroosa
Mark5:38 Gede Ayhudata Woosa Keeththa halaqazaso gakkida mala asay waassishe camo yeeho yeekkizayssa be7ides.
Mark5:39 Soo gelidi
Mark5:40 Qasse asay wuri iza bolla miiccides; asaa wursika keeththaafe kessidi nayi aawaanne nayi aayiyo qasseka izara issife yidayta iza kaallizayta xalla kaaleththidi naya dizaso gelides.
Mark5:41 Nay kushekka oykkidi
Mark5:42 Nayakka heerakka denda eqqadus; yaanne haa hemettadus. Iziska layththay tammanne nam7a; asaykka he hanozan daro malalettides.
Mark5:43 Yesusi hayssa oonikka erontta mala keehi minththi yootides; «Nays maana quma immite» gides.
Mark6:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi heeppe dendidi gede ba dere bides. Iza kaallizaytikka izara bida.
Mark6:2 Ayhudata Sambatay gakkiin Ayhudata Woosa Keeththe gelidi tamaarsishin siyida asay
Mark6:3 «Hayssi anaaxeza gidennee? Maarami naa Yaaqoobentta Yoosantta
Mark6:4 Yesusikka isttas
Mark6:5 Heen guuththa harganchchata bolla kushe woththi paththoriippe attiin hara aykko malaatakka ooththanaas dandaybeenna.
Mark6:6 Isttas ammanoy bayndayssa be7idi malalettides. Hessafekka Yesusi gutan gutan yuuyi yuuyi tamaarsides.
Mark6:7 Tammanne nam7ata baakko xeygidi nam7u nam7u histti kiittishe tuna ayanata bolla isttas godateth immides.
Mark6:8 Izi
Mark6:9 Caamma aaththite gido attiin laammana may7o oykkofte.
Mark6:10 Issi keeththe intte gelikko he katamaappe intte kezana gakkanaas he keeththaan diite.
Mark6:11 Awanka oonikka inttena mokki ekkontta ixxiko heeppe kezishe he dereta bolla markka gidana mala intte toho bolla diza gudulla qoqofte» giidi azazides.
Mark6:12 Isttika heeppe kezidi derey maaroteththan gelana mala sabbakida.
Mark6:13 Daro daydanththata kessida; daro harganchchata zayte tiyi tiydi paththida.
Mark6:14 Yesusa sunththi kaseppe eretti eretti bishin kawo Herdoosi hessa siyides. Issi issi asati
Mark6:15 Baggayti
Mark6:16 Herdoosi yo7oza siyidi
Mark6:17 Herdoosi ba isha Piliphoosa machcho Herodiyaado ekkida gaason oykettidi qashettana mala azazidi Yohannisa qasho keeththe gelththides.
Mark6:18 Yohannisi Herdoosa
Mark6:19 Herodiyaada hessa gishshas hoollottada iza wodhisanaas koyadus shin dandayabeekku.
Mark6:20 Gaasoykka Yohannisi xillonne geeshsha as gididayssa Herdoosi eriza gishshas Yohannisas babbeessinne iza naagees. Yohannisi yootizayssa Herdoosi siyidi hirgizaa gidikkoka izi yootizayssa wozinappe siyees.
Mark6:21 Herdoosa yeleta gallas bonchchanaas dhoqqa shuumetas
Mark6:22 Herodiyaadi macca naya gelada asaa sinththan mazamure yexxiin Herdoosanne izi xeygida asaa izi yeththay ufayssides. Kawozikka nayo
Mark6:23 Qasseka ta kawoteththa baggaa gididaakkoka ne oychchiko ubbaa ta nees immana giidi izis caaqqides.
Mark6:24 Naya elela kezada ba aayeyo
Mark6:25 Nayakka elela kezada kawozaakko gelada
Mark6:26 Kawoy he yo7ozan daro modhettides; gido attiin xeygettida imaththaa gishshassinne caaqqida qaalaa gishshas izis akkay gaanaas koyibeenna.
Mark6:27 Hessa gishshas wottadaratappe issaa eeson kiittidi Yohannisa qoodhe qanxxidi iza hu7e ekki yaana mala azazides; izikka biidi qasho keeththaa giddon Yohannisa qoodhe qanxxides.
Mark6:28 Hu7eza kerera ehidi nays immides; nayakka ba aayeys immadus.
Mark6:29 Yohannisa kaallizaytikka hessa siyida mala yiidi Yohannisa aha ekki efidi moogida.
Mark6:30 Hessafe guye Hawaareti simmidi Yesusa achchan yuuyi aadhdhi ba ooththidayssanne ba tamaarsidayssa ubbaa izas yootida.
Mark6:31 Daro asay yishenne bishe giza gishshas quma miza wodeykka beettibeenna; «Ane intte xalla tanara asi bayndaso biidi guuth shempi ekkite» gides.
Mark6:32 Hessa gishshas istti barkka wogolon gelidi issi asikka bayndaso bida.
Mark6:33 Istti bishin daroti be7idi tohora woththan isttafe sinththe aadhdhida.
Mark6:34 Yesusi wogolozappe wodhdhiza wode daro derey shiiqi uttidayssa be7ides. Heemmizaadey baynda mehe mala gidida gishshas asaas qadhettides; daro yo7okka tamaarso oykkides.
Mark6:35 He wode gadey qammi qammi biza gishshas iza kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi
Mark6:36 Hayssa heeran asi dizaso biidi asay baas miza kath shammi maana mala asaa yedda» gida.
Mark6:37 Izi isttas zaaridi
Mark6:38 Izikka isttas
Mark6:39 Hessafe kaallidi asaa cilila maata bolla butten butten utisana mala azazides.
Mark6:40 Asaykka xeetu xeetunne ichchashu tammu ichchashu tammu gididi butten uttides.
Mark6:41 Izikka ichchashu ukeththatanne nam7u moleta ba kushen oykkidi pude salo xeellidi anjjidinne ukeththaa menththi menththi asaas gishana mala bana kaallizaytas immides; nam7u moletakka ubba asaas shaakereththides.
Mark6:42 Asay wurikka miidi kallides.
Mark6:43 Yesusa kaallizayti asay kalli miin attidayssa tammanne nam7u leemate kumeth shiishshides.
Mark6:44 Kaththaa mida asaappe attumasay xalla ichchashu shii.
Mark6:45 Heerakka izi asaa moyzishe iza kaallizayti sinththatidi gede pinth Betesayda geetettizaso pinnana mala azazides.
Mark6:46 Heeppeka istta aggaagidi woossanaas pude zuma bolla kezides.
Mark6:47 Gadey qammiin wogoloy abbaa giddon dishin izi barkka biitta bolla dees.
Mark6:48 Abbaa bolla carkoy keehi metida gishshas iza kaallizayti abbaa shiri shiri wogolo laaggiza miishshaara baaxetishin Yesusi be7ides. Wontta bolla isttako yides; yiidinne istta achchara aadhdhi baanaaththo hanides.
Mark6:49 Gido attiin aadhdhi baana hanishin iza be7ida mala moytille be7ida misatiin wurikka waassida.
Mark6:50 Wurikka iza be7idi dagammida; izikka heerakka istta yoochchidi
Mark6:51 Izikka wogolon isttako geliin carkoy co7u gides
Mark6:52 Kase izi ukeththan ooththida malaata birsheth istti erontta gishshas istta wozinay doccides.
Mark6:53 Abbaa pinnidi Gensereexe geetettizaso gakkida; wogolaappe wodhdhidi wogoloza heen qachchidi aggi bida.
Mark6:54 Istti wogoloppe wodhdhida mala asay Yesusa erides.
Mark6:55 Wurikka ba dizaso dizaso woxerettidi harganchchata halan tookki tookki ekkidi Yesusi dizaso ehida.
Mark6:56 Izi gakkida gutan woykko katama giddon woykko dere giddon gidiin harganchchati izi aadhdhishin iza woossidinne iza may7o bochchidi paxana mala shiishshi shiishshi dubbushay dizason woththida. Izi aadhdhi bishin iza may7o bochchidayti wuri paxida.
Mark7:1 Hessafe guye Farsaawetinne Yerusalaameppe yida issi issi xaafeti Yesusa lanqen yuuyi aadhdhida.
Mark7:2 Yesusa kaallizaytappe baggayti meecettontta qita kushera kath mishin be7ida.
Mark7:3 Farsaawetinne kase cima Ayhuda asati kase dere woga naaganaas kushe lo7eththi meecettontta kath mi erettenna.
Mark7:4 Giya bi simmikokka bolla meecetti geeyontta dishe kath mi erettenna. Hessaththoka wancaka
Mark7:5 Farsaawetinne xaafeti Yesusa
Mark7:6 Izikka isttas
Mark7:7 Taas mela hada goynnees; istta timirteyka asi woththida woga xalla› giidi yootidayssi tuma» gides.
Mark7:8 Xoossa wogaa aggidi asi woththida wogaa naageettes.
Mark7:9 Qasseka
Mark7:10 Ays giikko Musey
Mark7:11 Gido attiin intte qasse
Mark7:12 intte qasse hayssaadey ba aawaska ba aayeysi hara aykkoka ooththana mala koyekketa.
Mark7:13 Hessa gishshas intte wogaa naagana giidi Xoossa qaalaa laammeeta. Heytantta misatiza darota ooththeeta» gides.
Mark7:14 Qasseka Yesusi asaa baakko xeygidi
Mark7:15 Kareppe ulo gido gelidi as tunisiza issi miishshika deenna; harappeka ase tunisizay keeththa aawappe gede kare keziza miishsha.
Mark7:16 Siyiza hayththi dizay siyo!» gides.
Mark7:17 Izi asaa karen aggidi keeththe geliin iza kaallizayti izi yootida leemisoza birsheth Yesusa oychchida.
Mark7:18 Izikka istta
Mark7:19 Kareppe gelizay gede wozinan gidontta duge qanththa giddo gelees; qasse heeppe izaade asateththaafe gede kare kezees» gides; Yesusi hessa giday asi miza kaththi wurikka geesh gididayssa qonccisanaassa.
Mark7:20 Kaaleththidikka
Mark7:21 Asa wozina giddofe kezizay iita qofata
Mark7:22 Yiiqeteth
Mark7:23 Hayti iita hanoti wuri asappe kezeettessinne ase tuniseettes» gides.
Mark7:24 Yesusi heeppe kezidi Xiroose geetettiza dere bides; heen issaade keeththe gelidi izi heen dizayssa asi erontta mala koyides. Gido attiin izi heen iza duussay qotettanaas dandayettibeenna.
Mark7:25 Heerakka issi tuna ayanay oykkida guuththa naa dizaari aaya Yesusi heen dizayssa siyada izakko yaada iza toho bolla kundadus.
Mark7:26 Maccassaya Girike qaala haasayza maccas shin iza yelettidasoy Sirofinqe geetettees. Izakka Yesusi nayppe tuna ayana kessana mala woossadus.

Mark7:28 Izakka zaarada
Mark7:29 Izikka
Mark7:30 Iza simmada soo bishin naya daydanththay yeddiin paxada hiixan ichchidaaro demmadus.
Mark7:31 Hessafe Yesusi Xiroose biittafe dendidi Sidoona geetettizasora aadhdhi tammu katama geetettizasora kanththidi gede Galila Abbaako gakkides.
Mark7:32 Asay issi hayththa tullenne doona duude as izakko hee ekki yiidi Yesusi iza bolla ba kushe woththana mala woossida.
Mark7:33 Yesusikka iza asaappe shaakki ekki biidi ba kushe biradhdheta addeza hayththan gelththides; qasseka cuch cuttidi addeza inxars bochchides.
Mark7:34 Pude salo xeellidinne tookki shempidi
Mark7:35 Heerakka addeza hayththati pogettida; inxarsayka birshettiin geeshshi haasaydes.
Mark7:36 Yesusi hayssa be7idayti oonaska yootontta mala azazides; gido attiin asay izi azazizadayssafe bollara keehi gujjidi yootides.
Mark7:37 Derezikka keehi malalettidi
Mark8:1 He wode qasse daro asi shiiqides. Shiiqida asaas miza kaththi baynda gishshas Yesusi bana kaallizayta xeygidi

Mark8:4 Iza kaallizaytikka zaaridi
Mark8:5 Izikka istta

Mark8:7 Qasseka heen diza qeeri guuththa moleta gishshas Xoossaa galatidi guuththa moleta asaas gishechchana mala bana kaallizayta azazides.
Mark8:8 Dereykka miidi kallides. Hessafekka iza kaallizayti maaddaafe palahida kath laappun leemate kumeth denththida.

Mark9:1 Kaaleththidikka Yesusi «Ta inttes tuma gays; hayssan eqqida asaappe Xoossa kawoteththi wolqqara yishin beyana gakkanaas hayqqontta gam7ana issi issi asati deettes» gides.

Mark11:1 Istti gede Yerusalaamen Dabrazayte geetettiza zuma achchan diza Betefaagenne Bitaaniya geetettizaso matida wode Yesusi bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata
Mark11:2 «Gede intte sinththan diza gutayo biite. Intte he gelida mala heen asi toggi erontta qashon diza hare gutte intte demmana; birshidi iza haa ekki yiite.
Mark11:3 Oonikka inttena
Mark11:4 Isttika biidi issi keeththa karen oge bolla qashetti diza hare gutte demmidi birshida.
Mark11:5 Heen eqqida issi issi asati
Mark11:6 Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusi isttas gida mala asatas yootiin ero ekki biite gida.
Mark11:7 Guttezakka Yesusaakko ehidi ba may7o iza zokko bolla yeggiin Yesusi iza toggides.
Mark11:8 Daro asay ba may7o kessi kessi oge bolla miccides. Bagga asay cilila miththa hayth qanxxi qanxxidi oge bolla laallides.
Mark11:9 Yesusappe sinththaranne guyera diza asay qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Mark11:10 Hanna yizaara nu aawaa Dawite kawoteththaya anjjettidaaro; hoosa7inna! Bolla salon Xoossi bonchchetto» gishe waassides.
Mark11:11 Yesusi Yerusalaame gakkidi hessafekka Xoossa Keeththe gelides. He heeran dizayssa ubbaa xeellidi gadey qammida gishshas tammanne nam7atara gede Bitaaniya kezides.
Mark11:12 Wonteththa gallas istti Bitaaniyappe kezi bishin Yesusi gafides.
Mark11:13 Izi issi hayththi cililida balase geetettiza miththi haahon be7idi ayfey daanakkon giidi izikko yides. Gido attiin balase miththi ayfontta wode gidida gishshas hayththafe attiin issi ayfekka izippe demmibeenna.
Mark11:14 Hessa gishshas miththayo
Mark11:15 Gede Yerusalaame bida; heeppeka Xoossa Keeththe gelidi heen bayzizaytanne shammizayta kessi goodo oykkides. Miishshe laammizayta xaraphpheezanne haraphphe bayzizayta oyde gufanththi gufanththi yeggides.
Mark11:16 Oonikka ay miish tookkidi Xoossa Keeththa gibbe giddora aadhdhontta mala diggides.
Mark11:17 Isttaka tamaarsishe
Mark11:18 Qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti hessa siyidi iza wostti dhayssanakkon oge kosh oykkida. Gido attiin dereykka iza timirtezan malalettida gishshas izas babbida.
Mark11:19 Isttika gadey qammiin katamayppe kezi bida.
Mark11:20 Wonteththa gallas maalado istti ogera aadhdhi bishin balase miththaya xaphoppe melidaaro be7ida.
Mark11:21 Yo7ozi iza wozinan akeekettiin Phexroosi Yesusa
Mark11:22 Izikka zaaridi
Mark11:23 Ta inttes tumu gays; ‹Oonikka hayssa zumaza ne dhoqallettada abban gela› gizaakko hessaka wozinan sidhontta ammanidaakko izaades hanana.
Mark11:24 Hessa gishshas intte woosan oychchidaaz ubbaa ekkida mala ammanikko inttes hanana.
Mark11:25 Hessaththoka intte woosas eqqiza wode intte Salo Aaway intte nagara atto gaana mala intteka inttena qohidayta nagara ubbaa atto giite.
Mark11:26 Intte atto gontta ixxiko intte salo aawaykka intte nagaraa atto geenna» gides.
Mark11:27 Qasseka Yerusalaame yida; Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa kare giddon yaanne haa yuuyettishin qeeseta halaqati
Mark11:28 «Hayssa ne ooththizay ay godateththaraa? Hayta ne ooththana mala hayssa mala godateth nees ooni immidee?» gida.
Mark11:29 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi
Mark11:30 Yohannisa xinqatay Xoossafeyee? Asappee? Ane taas zaarite» gides.
Mark11:31 Isttika ba giddon issoy issaara
Mark11:32 ‹Nu asappe› giikko» Yohannisi tumu nabe gididayssa derey wuri ammaniza gishshas hessaththo gaana babbida.
Mark11:33 Hessa gishshas
Mark12:1 Qasse isttas leemisora yootishe
Mark12:2 Miththay ayfiza wode woyne miththaa ayfe ekkada ya giidi ashkaratappe issaade goshshanchchatakko yeddides.
Mark12:3 Goshshanchchati ashkaraza oykki shocidi coo mela kushe yeddida.
Mark12:4 Nam7anththoka hara ashkara yeddides. Goshshanchchati ha7ikka ashkaraa oykkidi izas hu7etara qoo7idinne kawushshidi zaari yeddida.
Mark12:5 Ha7ikka zaaridi hara ashkara yeddides. He yeddoyssaka wodhida; hara darota giddofe issi issi asata qoxxida; baggayta wodhida.
Mark12:6 «Ha7ikka kiitettontta attida haray dees; izikka aaway dosiza ba naaza. ‹Ta naaza istti boossana› gi qoppidi wurseththan ba naaza yeddides.
Mark12:7 Goshshanchchati qasse ba giddon
Mark12:8 Hessa gishshas heen oykki wodhidi woyne miththay dizasoppe haraso kessi yeggida.
Mark12:9 «Histtiin woyne miththaa goday ay ooththana inttes misatizee? Izi yaana; goshshanchchatakka wodhana; woyne miththaa haratas immana.
Mark12:10 Geeshsha Maxaafan
Mark12:11 
Mark12:12 Izi isttas leemisoza yootiday istta gishshas gididayssa Ayhuda halaqati erida gishshas iza oykkanaas koyida; gido attiin asaas babbida gishshas aggi bida.
Mark12:13 Yesusa yo7on qaxxana mala Farsaawetappenne Herdoosa baggatappe guuththa asata dooridi izakko yeddida.
Mark12:14 Isttika izakko yiidi
Mark12:15 Yesusi istta oyshay qoodheppe qommo gididayssa eridi
Mark12:16 Isttika miishshaa ehiin
Mark12:17 Yesusikka
Mark12:18 Hessafe guye hayqqidaytas hayqoppe denththi baa giza Saduqaaweti izakko yiidi iza hizgi oychchida.
Mark12:19 «Astamaaree! Issi asi machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqiko hayqqidayssa ishay iza machcheyo ekkidi izas laata naa yelana mala kase Musey nuus xaafides.
Mark12:20 Gido attiin laappun ishantti deettes; isttafe bayray machcho ekkidi naa yelontta hayqqides.
Mark12:21 Kaalozi he maccassayo ekkidi ha7ikka naa yelontta hayqqides; heedzdzanththoyka yelontta hayqqides.
Mark12:22 Laappunatikka he maccassayo ekkidi laata yelibeettenna; wurseththan maccassayakka hayqqadus.
Mark12:23 Histtiin laappunatikka izo ekkidashin hayqoppe dendoy dizaa gidikko ha maccassaya isttafe oona machcho gidanee?» gida.
Mark12:24 Yesusikka isttas
Mark12:25 Hayqqidayti dendiza wode Salo Kiitanchchata mala gidana attiin ekettettenanne gelettenna.
Mark12:26 Hayqqidayta denththa gishshas gidikko Muse maxaafan hessika qeeri wora giddon eexxiza tama giddofe Xoossi
Mark12:27 Xoossi paxata Xoossa attiin hayqeththata Xoos gidenna; hessa gishshas intte daro balettideta» gides.
Mark12:28 Istti palaman dishin xaafetappe issaadey istta palamaa siyidinne Yesusi oyshettidayssas lo7eththi zaaridayssa akeekidi
Mark12:29 Yesusi izas
Mark12:30 Nekka Godaa ne Xoossaa ne kumeththa wozinappe
Mark12:31 Nam7anththoyka
Mark12:32 Xaafezikka
Mark12:33 Iza ne kumeththa wozinappe ne kumeththa qofappe ne kumeththa wolqqafe dosoy qasseka ne lagge ne hu7e mala dosoy xuugettiza yarshofenne hara yarsho ubbaafe aadhdhees» gides.
Mark12:34 Yesusikka addezi yuushshi qoppidi zaaridayssa be7idi
Mark12:35 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa gaaththan tamaarsishe
Mark12:36 Dawiti Xillo Ayanan haasayshe
Mark12:37 Histtiin Dawiti ba doonara iza
Mark12:38 Izi tamaarsishe
Mark12:39 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan dhoqqaso
Mark12:40 Istti azinay baynda maccassa keeth kalloseettes; qasseka bana bessanaas adussa woosa woosseettes. Haytanti iita pirda pirdettana» gides.
Mark12:41 Yesusikka asay muxuwaata yeggizason uttidi daro asati immizayssa Xoossa Keeththa miishsha shiishshiza saaxinen yeggizayssa xeellides. Daro dureti daro miish yeggida.
Mark12:42 Issi azinay baynda am7e dizaara issi sikkinnafe darontta xarqimala biratappe oosettida nam7u miish yeggadus.
Mark12:43 Yesusi bana kaallizayta xeygidi
Mark12:44 Hayti wuri baas diza tirpa miishshaafe yeggidashin hanna qasse ba manqoteththaafe baas dizayssa sinththafe izo koshshizayssara wursa immadus» gides.
Mark13:1 Izi Xoossa Keeththaafe kezishin iza kaallizaytappe issoy
Mark13:2 Yesusikka zaaridi
Mark13:3 Yesusi Xoossa Keeththa ginara Dabrazayte zumaa bolla utti dishin Phexroosi
Mark13:4 «Hayssi ayde hananaakko nuus yoota. Hayssi wurseththan polettanaas malatay aazee?» gi oychchida.
Mark13:5 Yesusikka isttas
Mark13:6 Buro daroti
Mark13:7 Intte olanne ola wore siyiza wode dagammofte; hessi hananayssi attenna; wurseththi gidikko buroona.
Mark13:8 Derey dere bolla
Mark13:9 «Intte inttes naagettite. Buro inttena dere duulatan aaththi immana. Istti inttena Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan garafana. Intte ta markkatta gidana mala ta gishshas dere daannata sinththaninne kawota sinththan eqqana.
Mark13:10 Koyrottidi Mishiraachcho qaalay dere ubbaas sabbakettana bessees.
Mark13:11 Intte oykettidi pirdas shiiqiza wode hinno he saateyin inttes imettizaaro haasayte attiin biidi
Mark13:12 «Ishay ishaa
Mark13:13 Ta gaason intte asa ubbaan ixettidayta gidana; wurseth gakkanaas minni eqqidaadey gidikko attana.
Mark13:14 «Intte harassiza tunateth izas bessonttason eqqidaashe beykko nababizaadey wozinan woththo; Yuhudan dizayti pude zuma bolla baqatetto.
Mark13:15 Keeththa karen dizaadey soo geloppo; ba miish kessana giidi keeththe geloppo.
Mark13:16 Goshshason dizaadey ba may7o ekkanaas guye simmofo.
Mark13:17 He gallassatan shaara maccassatassinne naa dhanththizaytas aayye ana!
Mark13:18 Hessika balgon gidontta mala Xoos woossite.
Mark13:19 Xoossi koyro medheteth ubbaa medhdhoosofe ha7i gakkanaas woykko hayssafe guye iza misatizay baynda gita metoy hanana.
Mark13:20 Goday he gallassata qaanththonttaako oonikka attenna shin baas doorettidayta gishshas izi he gallassata qaanththides.
Mark13:21 «He wode oonikka
Mark13:22 Wordo Kirstoosatinne wordo nabeti buro dendidi malaatatanne kase hani erontta pala miish ooththana; isttas dandayettiko haray attoshin doorettidaytakka baleththana.
Mark13:23 Hessa gishshas naagettite; he wodey gakkontta dishin haara hayssa wursa ta inttes yootadis.
Mark13:24 «He wode he metozappe kaallidi arshey dhumana; aginaykka poo7isuku.
Mark13:25 Xoolintteti saloppe qoqofettana
Mark13:26 «He wode Asa Nay gita wolqqaranne bonchchora salo shaarara yishin asay iza beyana.
Mark13:27 Izikka kiitanchchata yeddidi oyddu baggafe biitta gaxappe gaxa gakkanaas diza baas doorettidayta shiishshana.
Mark13:28 «Leemisoza balase miththafe tamaarte. Unquloy cililiza wode hayth kessishin boney matidayssa intte ereeta.
Mark13:29 Hessaththoka hayti ta gidayti polettishin intte beykko wodey mati yiidi penge gakkidayssa erite.
Mark13:30 Ta inttes tumu gays; ha yo7oti polettana gakkanaas hayssi ha yeletay aadhdhenna.
Mark13:31 Saloynne sa7ay aadhdhana shin ta qaalay gidikko aadhdhenna.
Mark13:32 «Qasse he gallassay gishshas woykko he saatey gishshas ta Aawappe attiin Salo Kiitanchchata gidiinkka Naaza gidiinkka oonikka erenna.
Mark13:33 Hessa gishshas wodey aydekko intte erontta gishshas naagettite
Mark13:34 Hessika ba keeth ashkaratas aggidi ashkarata issaa issaa ooso oyththidi penge naagizayssi beeggidi naagana mala azazidi bida asa misatees.
Mark13:35 «Histtiko keeththa aaway ayde yaanaakko woykko leela giddoth yaanaakko woykko koyro kuttoy baqqishin yaanaakko woykko wontta bolla bazzoy zo7ishin yaanaakko intte erontta gishshas beeggidi naagite.
Mark13:36 Intte qoppontta dishin izi yiidi intte dhiskidishin inttena demmofo.
Mark13:37 «Ta inttes yootizayssa as ubbaas yootays; minnidi naagite! gays» gides.
Mark14:1 Paaziganne ukeththa muussa ba7aale gallassay bonchchettanaas nam7u gallassi attishin qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti Yesusa baleththi oykkidi wodhana oge koyida.
Mark14:2 Gido attiin
Mark14:3 Izi Bitaaniya geetettizason issi inchchirachcha harganchcha gidida Simoonason quma bolla dishin waagay daro al7o gidida nardoose geetettiza shittoy kumi uttida albasxiroose bilqaaxe oykkida issi maccassaya bilqaaxeza menththada shittoza Yesusa hu7e bolla gussadus.
Mark14:4 Heen diza asatappe issi issi asati
Mark14:5 «Shittozi bayzettidaakko heedzdzu xeetu dinaareppe bollara bayzettidi manqotas imettenneeshin!» giidi maccassayokka kadhida.
Mark14:6 Gido attiin Yesusi isttas
Mark14:7 Manqoti ay wodekka inttenara deettes. Intte koyida wode aydekka istta maaddanaas dandayeeta; ta gidikko ubba wode inttenara diikke.
Mark14:8 Hanna ba ooththanaas dandayzaari keena ooththadus. Taas moogos gidana mala ta asho kaseta tiyadus.
Mark14:9 Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssi Mishiraachcho qaalay alame kumeththaan sabbakettizason awanka iza ooththidayssi izo hassa7issizaaz gididi haasayettana» gides.
Mark14:10 Hessafe guye tammanne nam7atappe issoy Asqoronto Yuhuday Yesusa aaththi immanaas qeeseta halaqataakko bides.
Mark14:11 Isttika hessa siyidi ufayettida; izas miishshe immanaas izara giigida; hessa gishshas Yesusa aaththi immanaas injje wode naagishe gam7ides.
Mark14:12 Paaziga dorsi shukettiza uketh muussa bonchchiza koyro gallas Yesusa kaallizayti Yesusaakko shiiqidi
Mark14:13 Izikka bana kaallizaytappe nam7ata
Mark14:14 Izi biidi gelizaso gakkanaas iza kaallite. Keeththaadezas
Mark14:15 Izikka bolla pooqe bolla diza giigi uttida aahoso inttena bessana; heen izan giigsite» gi kiittides.
Mark14:16 Iza kaallizaytikka kezidi katama bida. Wurikka Yesusi gida mala hani beettides; Paazigakka heen giigsida.
Mark14:17 Gadey qammishin Yesusi bana kaalliza tammanne nam7atara gakkides.
Mark14:18 Istti maaddan dishin
Mark14:19 Isttika muuzottidi
Mark14:20 Izikka isttas
Mark14:21 Kase xaafettida mala Asa Nay iza gishshas hayqqana shin asa naa aaththi immizaades aayye ana! Hessaadey kase yelettontta attidaakko izas lo7okkoshin!» gides.
Mark14:22 Istti mishin ukeththaa ekki anjjidinne menththidi bana kaallizaytas
Mark14:23 Ushshaaka denththi galatidi isttas immiin istti wurikka uyida.
Mark14:24 Qasse Yesusi
Mark14:25 Ta inttes tumu gays; ooraththa woyneppe giigida ushshaa Xoossa Kawoteththan ta uyana wode gakkanaas nam7anththo hayssa uyikke» gides.
Mark14:26 Hessafe guye mazamure issife yexxidi pude Dabrazayte zuma bolla kezida.
Mark14:27 Yesusi
Mark14:28 Ta dendidaappe guye gidikko ta inttefe kasetada Galila baana» gides.
Mark14:29 Phexroosikka
Mark14:30 Yesusikka
Mark14:31 Phexroosi qasse
Mark14:32 Hessafe guye Getesemaane geetettizaso bida; Yesusikka bana kaallizayta
Mark14:33 Phexroosa
Mark14:34 Qasseka isttas
Mark14:35 Istta achchafe guuth haakki bi biitta bolla gufannidi he saateya izappe aadhdhana mala woossides.

Mark14:38 Intte paacen gelontta mala beeggidi woossitenne minnite. Ayanay giigetti uttides shin ashoy gidikko daaburanchcha» gides.
Mark14:39 Qasseka biidi koyroyssaththo woossides.
Mark14:40 Izi nam7anththo simmi yishin istta ayfen dhiskoy deexxiin dhiskidayta demmides shin istti izas ay zaaranakkon eribeettenna.
Mark14:41 Heedzdzanththo yiidi
Mark14:42 Ane eqqite boos; tana aaththi immanaadey yides» gides.
Mark14:43 Yesusi buro haasayan dishin tammanne nam7atappe issoy Yuhuday yides. Izara issife qeese halaqatappenne Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytappe kiitettida daro asay giththa mashshanne durqqa oykkidi yides.

Mark14:45 Gakkida mala Yuhuday Yesusaakko shiiqidi
Mark14:46 Asatikka Yesusa oykkida.
Mark14:47 Iza achchan eqqida issoy mashsha koohoppe shoddi qeeseta halaqaza ashkara hayth qanxxides.
Mark14:48 Yesusikka isttas
Mark14:49 Wontiin wontiin Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsashe ta inttenara dishin oykkibeekketa shin kase xaafettidayssi polettana mala hayssi hanides» gides.
Mark14:50 He wode iza kaallizayti wuri iza yeggi aggi bida.
Mark14:51 Ba kalloteth qeeri naxalan kammida issi nay Yesusa kaallishin asay iza oykkiin
Mark14:52 Naazi naxalaa yeggidi kallo kichchides.
Mark14:53 Yesusakka gede qeeseta halaqaakko efida; qeeseta halaqati
Mark14:54 Phexroosikka Yesusa haahora kaallishe qeeseta halaqaza gibbe gakkanaas bides. Izi heen uttidi hara asatara tama ho7ishin
Mark14:55 qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimati wuri Yesusa wodhanaas markkattana as koyida shin demmanaas dandaybeettenna.
Mark14:56 Daroti iza bolla wordora markkattikokka markkatta qaalay oykettibeenna.
Mark14:57 Issi issi markkati dendidi wordora
Mark14:58 «Hayssi addezi
Mark14:59 Gido attiin istta markkateththi issi bolla wodhdhibeenna.

Mark14:62 Yesusikka zaaridi
Mark14:63 Qeeseta halaqay ba may7o daakkidi
Mark14:64 Izi cashsha qaala Xoossa bolla haasayshin intte siyideta; ha7ich inttes ay misatizee?» gides. Isttika
Mark14:65 He wode issi issi asati iza bolla cuch cuttida; iza ayfe goozi oykkidi iccishe
Mark14:66 Phexroosi duge baggara heen gibbe giddon dishin qeeseta halaqa garadetappe issiniya yadus.
Mark14:67 Phexroosi tama ho7ishin tishshi histta xeellada
Mark14:68 Izi qasse

Mark14:70 Izi qasseka kaddides. Guuththa wode gam7ishin heen eqqida asati Phexroosa

Mark14:72 Heerakka kuttoy nam7anththo waassides. Phexroosikka
Mark15:1 Maalado wonttara qeeseta halaqati
Mark15:2 Philaxoosikka Yesusa
Mark15:3 Qeeseta halaqatikka daro yo7o iza bolla shiishshi mootida.
Mark15:4 Philaxoosi qasse
Mark15:5 Gido attiin Yesusi ha7ikka izas aykkoka zaaro immontta gishshas Philaxoosikka malalettides.
Mark15:6 Paaziga ba7aale gallas Philaxoosi derey birshana mala oychchidaade birshi yeddiza wogay kase dees.
Mark15:7 Iita ooson dere bolla dendidi shempo wodhida asatara issife qashettida Barbaane geetettiza issaadey dees.
Mark15:8 Dereykka yiidi kase lose gididayssa izi ooththana mala Philaxoosa woossides.
Mark15:9 Philaxoosikka isttas
Mark15:10 Philaxoosi hessaththo oychchiday kase qeeseta halaqati Yesusa qanaaten aaththi immidayssa eriza gishshassa.
Mark15:11 Qeeseta halaqati qasse
Mark15:12 Philaxoosi
Mark15:13 Istti qasseka
Mark15:14 Philaxoosikka
Mark15:15 Philaxoosikka dereza ufayssana giidi Barbaane isttas birshides. Yesusa garafidi kaqqanaas aaththi immides.
Mark15:16 Wottadarati Yesusa dere haarizayssa gibbe ekki biidi attida wottadarata ubbaa shiishshida.
Mark15:17 Yesusa zo7o may7o mayzida; agunththa akilile xaaxidi iza hu7en woththida.
Mark15:18 Hessafekka
Mark15:19 Iza hu7e guufera shocida; iza bollaka cuttida; gulbatidi izas goynnida.
Mark15:20 Iza bolla qidhi kaa7idaappe guye kase mayzida zo7o may7oza qaari ekkidi kase iza may7oza zaari mayzidi kaqqanaaso ekki bida.
Mark15:21 Alakisandrosanne Erufoosa aawa Simoona geetettiza issi Qareena dere asi dereppe katama yizayssa Yesusa masqale wolqqara oykki toossida.
Mark15:22 Hessafe guye Yesusa Golgota geetettizaso efida; izas birsheththay
Mark15:23 Karbbe geetettiza camora walakettida woyne cajje uyana mala izas immiin izi ekkontta ixxides.
Mark15:24 Hessafe guye iza kaqqida; iza may7o issaade issaade awayssi gakkanaakko giidi saama yeggidi gishettida.
Mark15:25 Istti iza kaqqishin wonttafe heedzdzu saate gidides.
Mark15:26 Istti masqale bolla xaafi shiishshida mooto qaalay
Mark15:27 Izara issife nam7u pangata issaa izappe ushachchara issaa hadirsara kaqqida.
Mark15:28 Hessankka kase maxaafay
Mark15:29 Ogera aadhdhi bizaytikka ba hu7e qaaththishe
Mark15:30 «Ane ha7i masqale bollafe wodhdhada nena ashsha» gida.
Mark15:31 Hessaththoka qeeseta halaqatinne Muse wogaa tamaarsizayti ba giddon issoy issaas
Mark15:32 «Nu iza be7idi ammanana mala ane hayssi Kirstoosi Isra7eeleta kawoy ha7i masqaleppe wodhdho» gida. Izara kaqettidaytikka iza bolla cashshe korida.
Mark15:33 Usuppun saateppe doommidi uddufun saate gakkanaas biittay wuri dhumides.
Mark15:34 Uddufun saate bolla Yesusi
Mark15:35 Heen eqqida asaappe issi issi asati hessa siyidi
Mark15:36 Hessafe issi asi eleli biidi caalida woyne cajje isponje mala miishshan gelththi kessidi miththa xeeran oyththidi uyana mala Yesusas shiishshides. Hessafe qasse
Mark15:37 Hessafe Yesusi qaala dhoqqu histti waassidi shempo kezides.
Mark15:38 Xoossa Keeththe magalashay hu7era duge nam7u kezi daakettides.
Mark15:39 Yesusa ginara eqqida issi mato halaqay Yesusi hessaththo gita qaalara waassidi shempo kezishin be7idi
Mark15:40 He wode maccassati hanizayssa haahon diidi xeellida. Istta giddofe Magdaleppe yida Maaramanne kaalotiza Yaaqoobe Yoosa aayo Maaramira qasseka Saloomira issife deettes.
Mark15:41 Heyti maccassati Galilan Yesusa kaallishenne izas ooththishe gam7idayta. Isttarakka issife hara daro maccassati Yerusalaame bida.
Mark15:42 Gadey qammi qammi bishin Sambatas giigettiza gallassi gakkides.
Mark15:43 Dere cimata giddon bonchchettida issi Armatiyase dere as Yooseefe geetettizayssi Xoossa Kawoteth naagishe dizaadey babbontta Philaxoosakko biidi Yesusa aha woossides.
Mark15:44 Philaxoosikka izi hinni wode ellera hayqqidayssa siyidi malalettides. Mato halaqa xeygisidi
Mark15:45 Izi hayqqidayssa mato halaqay geeshshi eridaappe guye Yesusa aha Yooseefes immides.
Mark15:46 Yooseefeykka moogo may7o shammidi ahaa masqaleppe woththidi moogo may7on xaaxidi shuchchafe woocettida duufon moogides. Duufaa doona shuchchara gordides.
Mark15:47 Magdaleppe yida Maaramiranne Yooseefe aayo Maaramira Yesusa aha awan moogidaakko be7ida.
Mark16:1 Sambatay aadhdhidaappe guye Magdale Maarama
Mark16:2 Saaminttafe koyro gallas maalado wonttara buro arshey kezida mala Yesusa duufokko buro bishin
Mark16:3 «Duufoza doonappe shuchchaa nuus ooni genderisanee?» giidi ba giddon haasayettida.
Mark16:4 Istti dhoqqu gi xeellishin daro gita shuchchay duufoza doonappe genderidayssa be7ida.
Mark16:5 Duufoza giddo gelida mala issi booththa may7o may7ida panththi ushachcha baggara uttidayssa be7idi dagammida.
Mark16:6 Izi qasse isttas
Mark16:7 Gido attiin intte biidi iza kaallizaytassinne Phexroosas kase inttes yootida mala inttefe kasetidi izi Galila baana. Intte iza heen demmana giidi isttas yootite» gides.
Mark16:8 Maccassatikka malalettishenne kokkorishe duufaappe kezi baqatida. Babbida gishshas oonaska aykkoka qaattibeettenna.
Mark16:9 Saaminttafe koyro gallas Wogga wontta maaladora izi hayqoppe dendidaappe guye Yesusi izippe laappun daydanth kessida Magdale Maaramis koyro beettides.
Mark16:10 Izakka baada kase izara dizayti kayottishenne yeekkishe dishin demmada yootadus.
Mark16:11 Istti Yesusi paxa dizayssanne iza ta Yesusa beyadis gidayssa siyidi ammanibeettenna.
Mark16:12 Hessafe guye iza kaallizaytappe nam7ati gede dere gars bishin Yesusi isttas hara as misati beettides.
Mark16:13 Isttika simmidi hessa iza kaallizaytappe attidaytas yootida; gido attiin iza kaallizayti siyidi ammanibeettenna.
Mark16:14 Hessafe guye tammanne issineti maadda bolla dishin Yesusi isttas qonccides. Izi hayqoppe dendiin iza be7ida asati isttas yootiin siyidi ammanontta aggida gishshas isttas ammanoy bayndayssanne istta wozina muumeteththa gishshas istta borides.
Mark16:15 Isttaskka
Mark16:16 Ammanidaynne xammaqettiday attana. Ammanonttay gidikko pirdettana.
Mark16:17 Tana ammanizayta hayti malatati kaallana. Istti ta sunththan daydanththata kessana; ooraththa qaalankka haasayana.
Mark16:18 Istti shooshshata ba kushera oykkana; wodhiza marze uyikkoka istta qohenna. Ba kushe harganchchata bolla woththi woossiko harganchchati paxana» gides.
Mark16:19 Godaa Yesusi hessa yootidaappe guye pude salo dendi biidi Xoossa ushachchan uttides.
Mark16:20 Iza kaallizayti hessafe kezidi ubbason aadhdhi aadhdhi sabbakida. Godaykka isttara ooththides. Istta timirteza ekkidi ooththizaytas ba yootida qaalakka malaata ooththi ooththi minththides.
Luke1:1 Bonchcho Tofiloosaa! Nu achchan hanida yo7ota gishshas daro asati baas hanida mala xaafida.
Luke1:2 He taarikezikka koyroppe denththidi ba ayfera be7ida markkatinne Xoossa qaala yootidayti nuus aaththidayssa.
Luke1:3 Tanikka ta baggara xaphoppe denththada keeha naagettadanne paacca xeellada taarikeza wursa sinththe xaafettanaas bessizayssa sinththasada kaallidi xaafettanaas bessizayssa kaaleththada naagettada nees xaafana mala taas lo7o gidi beettides.
Luke1:4 Hayssa ubbaa ta ooththizay ne tamaardayssi tuma gididayssa nena ero guussassa.
Luke1:5 Herdoosi Yuhuda biittan kawotida wode Abiya geetettiza qeeseta halaqaza baggafe qeeseteththa ooso taray iza gakkida Zakaraasa geetettiza issi qeesey dees. Iza machcheyakka Elsabeexo geetettawus; izakka Aaroone bagga asa. Nam7atikka Godaa azazonne iza wogaa wosoy baynda naagidi dizaytanne Xoossa sinththan xillo asa.
Luke1:6 
Luke1:7 Gido attiin Elsabeexa naa yelontta maynne gidida gishshas isttas nay baa; nam7atikka wodey bida asa.
Luke1:8 Zakaraasi Xoossa sinththan qeeseteththa ooso taray iza gakkiin izi ooththishin
Luke1:9 qeesetas diza wogaa mala Xoossa Keeththan gelidi exaane cuwasana mala exay iza gakkides.
Luke1:10 Exaaney cuwattishin asay wurikka karen diidi woossees.
Luke1:11 Godaa kiitanchchay exaaney cuwattiza sooppe ushachcha baggara eqqidi Zakaraasas beettides.
Luke1:12 Zakaraasikka iza be7idi keehi dagammidi babbides.
Luke1:13 Kiitanchchay Zakaraasas
Luke1:14 Iza yeletan neni daro ufayettana; Daro asaykka ufayettana.
Luke1:15 Godaa sinththan izi gita gidana. Woyneppe oosettida cajje gidiinkka hara maththosiza ushshu gidiinkka izi uyenna; izi buro ba aayey qanththan dishe Xillo Ayanan kumana.
Luke1:16 Isra7eele asaappe darota istta Xoossako zaarana.
Luke1:17 Aawata wozina istta naytakko
Luke1:18 Zakaraasi kiitanchchazas
Luke1:19 Kiitanchchazikka zaaridi
Luke1:20 Hekko neni ba woden polettana ta qaala ammanontta ixxida gishshas ne doonay duudana; nenikka haasayana dandayakka» gides.
Luke1:21 He wode derey Zakaraasi
Luke1:22 Izi Xoossa Keeththaafe kezidi asa haasayssanaas dandaybeenna; malati malati besoppe attiin haasayanaas dandayontta aggiin asay izi Xoossa Keeththan Xoossafe ooraththa miish be7idayssa erides.
Luke1:23 Zakaraasikka ba ooso taray polettidaappe guye baso simmides.
Luke1:24 Hessafe guye iza machcheya Elsabeexa naa qanththatadus
Luke1:25 Izakka
Luke1:26 Elsabeexa qanththatida usuppunththa aginan
Luke1:27 Izikka kawo Dawite zereth gidida Yooseefe geetettiza asas giiga uttida Maaramo geetettiza geela7oykko kiitettides.
Luke1:28 Yiidinne iza dizaso gelidi
Luke1:29 Maarama kiitanchchaa haasayan keeha dagammada
Luke1:30 Kiitanchchayka Maaramo
Luke1:31 Neni qanththatana; attuma naakka yelana; sunththaaka Yesusa gaada sunththana.
Luke1:32 Izikka gita gidana; ubbaafe bolla gidida Xoossa naa geetettana; Godaa Xoossi iza aawaa Dawite kawoteththaa izas immana.
Luke1:33 Izi Isra7eele nayta bollan mernaas kawotana; iza Kawoteththaskka wurseththi deenna» gides.
Luke1:34 Maaramakka kiitanchchaas
Luke1:35 Kiitanchchayka Maaramis
Luke1:36 Asi yelukku; iza maynne giidi haasayza ne dabboya Elsabeexa cimateththan attuma naa qanththatada yelanaas usuppunththo agina oykkadus.
Luke1:37 Xoossas hanontta miishshi deenna» gides.
Luke1:38 Maaramakka zaarada
Luke1:39 Maaramakka he wode matara eesota dendada pude gezze deren diza issi Yuhuda katama badus.
Luke1:40 Zakaraasa keeththe gelada Elsabeexo sarotadus.
Luke1:41 Elsabeexa Maarami sarokaa siyida mala qanththan diza naazi izi qanththan guppides
Luke1:42 Izakka ba qaala dhoqqu histtada
Luke1:43 Ta Godaa aaya taakko yaada tana oychchanaas tani oonee?
Luke1:44 Ne saroka qaala ta siyida mala ta ulo giddon diza nay ufayssan guppides.
Luke1:45 Polettana giidi Goday izis yootidayssa ammanidaara iza anjjettidaaro» gadus.
Luke1:46 Maaramakka
Luke1:47 
Luke1:48 
Luke1:49 
Luke1:50 Iza maaroy izas babbizaytas naa naa gakkanaas daana.
Luke1:51 Ba wolqqan daro mino ooso ooththides; ba wozina qofan otorettizayta laallides.
Luke1:52 Kawota kawoteththafe woththides
Luke1:53 Gafidayta lo7o miishshan kalssides; dureta gidikko mela kushe yeddides.
Luke1:54 Kase nu aawatas Abrahaamessinne iza qommotas gida hidota qaala naaganaas ba maareteththaa yuushshi qoppidi ba aylle Isra7eele maaddides» gadus.
Luke1:55 
Luke1:56 Maaramakka Elsabeexi achchan heedzdzu agina sire gam7ada baso simmadus.
Luke1:57 Elsabeexis yelo gallassay gakkiin attuma naa yeladus.
Luke1:58 Izi gutatinne dabbotikka Goday izis gita maareteth ooththidayssa siyidi izira issife ufayettida.
Luke1:59 Yelettida osppunththa gallas qaxxaras yida. Iza aawaa sunththan Zakaraasa giidi sunththana koyida.
Luke1:60 Gido attiin aayeya
Luke1:61 Isttika izis
Luke1:62 Aaway Zakaraasi Naaza oona giidi sunththana koyidaakko malatan oychchida.
Luke1:63 Zakaraasikka xaafiza miish izas immana mala oychchi ekkidi sunththay
Luke1:64 Heerakka Zakaraasa doonay pogettidi inxarsi birshettiin Xoossaa galata oykkides.
Luke1:65 Iza gutati wuri daro babbida. Hayssi wurikka dhoqqa gezze biittan Yuhuda deren
Luke1:66 Hayssaka siyida asi wurikka
Luke1:67 Naaza aaway Zakaraasi Xillo Ayanan kumidi tinbite haasayshe
Luke1:68 «Yiidi ba asaa ashshida gishshas Isra7eele Xoossi galatetto.
Luke1:69 Beni wode ba geeshsha nabeta doonan haasayettidayssa mala ba aylle Dawite keeththan ashshiza wolqqa nuus denththides.
Luke1:70 
Luke1:71 Izi nuna nu morkketappenne
Luke1:72 Hayssa izi ooththiday nu aawatas ba maaroteth bessanaassa
Luke1:73 Kase nu aawaa Abrahaames caaqqidayssa qoppana malanne nu morkketa kusheppe izi nuna kessiin nuni izas baboy baynda ooththanaassinne nu diza wode ubbaan ba sinththan nuna geeshshateththaninne xilloteththan essanaassa.
Luke1:74 
Luke1:75 
Luke1:76 Godaa oge giigsanaas ne izappe sinththara biza gishshas ta naazoo neni wogga Xoossaa nabe geetettana.
Luke1:77 Asay ba nagarappe maarettida gishshas deres atoteththa erateth ne immana mala
Luke1:78 nu Xoossaa lo7o maaroteththaafe dendidayssan Saloppe nuus arshey kezides.
Luke1:79 Hessika dhuman dizaytassinne hayqo kuwa giddon dizaytaska poo7isana malanne nu tohotakka saroteththa oge kaaleththanaassa» gides.
Luke1:80 Guuththa naazikka diccides; Ayanankka minnides; Isra7eele asaas qonccen beettana gakkanaas bazzo biittan de7ides.
Luke2:1 He wode biitta bollan diza asi wurikka taybettidi xaafettana mala Oroome kawo Awugisxoosappe awajjay kezides.
Luke2:2 Hessika Qerenewoosa geetettizayssi Sooriya dere haariza wode hanida koyro dere taybo.
Luke2:3 Hessa gishshas asi wuri xaafettanaas ba dere dere bides.
Luke2:4 Yooseefeykka asho dabboteththan Dawite baggafe gidida gishshas Galila awuraajja giddon diza Naazirete katamappe Yuhuda awuraajja Beeteliheeme geetettiza Dawite katamappe yides.
Luke2:5 Izi xaafettana bishin izas giigetta dashe yelana matida Maaramira bides.
Luke2:6 Isttika heen dishin izis yelo wodey gakkides.
Luke2:7 Izakka koyro attuma naa yelidayssafe guye imaththi aqiza keeththan aqizasoy baynda gishshas naaza carqqara xaaxada miiza sinththan ishisadus.
Luke2:8 Beeteliheeme achchan dors heemmiza asati dorsa naagishe omarsara karen aqizayti deettes.
Luke2:9 Godaa kiitanchchayka isttako yides; Godaa bonchcho poo7oykka istta lanqen yuuyi aadhdhanaas poo7ides. Isttika keehi dagammida gishshas
Luke2:10 Kiitanchchay istta
Luke2:11 Hach kawo Dawite katama Beeteliheemen shempo dhaley yelettides. Izikka Godaa Kirstoosa geetettees.
Luke2:12 Carqqara xaaxetti ichchida gacino naa demmandeta; hessika inttes malata gido» gides.
Luke2:13 Izarakka hara daro salo kiitanchchati beettida. Xoossa galatishe
Luke2:14 «Bolla salon Xoossas bonchchoy gido; saroteththika biitta bollan izi dosiza asaa ubbaas gido» gida.
Luke2:15 Kiitanchchati isttafe shaakettidi salo simmiin dorsa heemmizayti ba giddon issoy issaa
Luke2:16 Isttika eleli biidi Maaramira
Luke2:17 Be7idaappe guye Godaa kiitanchchay naaza gishshas isttas yootidayssa ubbaa zaari yootida.
Luke2:18 Heemmizayti yootidayssa siyida asay wuri keehi malalettides.
Luke2:19 Gido attiin Maarama yo7oza wursa ba wozinan woththa denththa qoppashe gam7adus.
Luke2:20 Heemmizaytikka hanidayssi wurikka kiitanchchay isttas yootida mala gididi beettida gishshas siyidayssassinne be7idayssas ubbaas Xoossa galatishenne bonchchishe simmida.
Luke2:21 Naazi yelettiin osppunththa gallassan qaxxarettiza wodey gakkiin aayeya iza qanththatanaappe kase kiitanchchay gida mala Yesusa geetettidi summides.
Luke2:22 Muse wogaa mala istti geeyza wodey wuriin Yooseefeynne Maarama guuththa naaza Yesusa Godaa Xoossa sinththe shiishshanaas ekkidi Yerusalaame kezida. Hessika Godaa wogaan koyro yelettiza attuma nay wuri Godaas dumma gidana geetettidi xaafettidayssa polanaassinne
Luke2:23 
Luke2:24 qasseka Godaa wogaan nam7u haraphphetanne woykko nam7u haraphphe ciyeta geetettidayssa mala yarsho shiishshanaassa.
Luke2:25 He wode Yerusalaame kataman xillonne Xoossa babbiza issi Simoona geetettiza asi dees; izikka Isra7eele nayta atoteththaa naagiza asanne Xillo Ayanay iza bolla shempida asa.
Luke2:26 Qasseka Kirstoosa be7ontta dishe hayqqontta mala Xillo Ayanay izas qonccides.
Luke2:27 Izikka he wode Xillo Ayanay kaaleththiin Xoossa Keeththe lasha gaath gelides. Naaza aayeyranne aawara Muse wogaan bessizayssa polanaas guuththa naaza Yesusa ekkidi gelida wode
Luke2:28 Simooni naaza ekki idimmidi Xoossaa galatishe
Luke2:29 «Godoo! Ne caaqqida qaalaa mala ha7i tani ne aylley ne ashshizayssa ta ayfera be7ida gishshas hi7a tana saron ekka; asa ubbaa sinththan ne giigsida atoteththaa ha7i tani ta ayfera beyadis.
Luke2:30 
Luke2:31 
Luke2:32 Hayssika ubba deres geemettidayssa qonccisiza poo7o; ne dere Isra7eelesikka bonchcho» gides.
Luke2:33 Iza aawaynne aaya iza gishshas haasayettida yo7ozan malalettida.
Luke2:34 Simoonikka istta anjjides; Maaramokka
Luke2:35 Qasseka darota wozina qofay qonccana mala naaza mishay qara mashsha mala ne wozina phalqana» gides.
Luke2:36 Qasseka Aaseere baggafe Fanu7eele naa Haanna geetettiza cimmida nabey dawus; izakka ba koyro azinara laappun layth kumeth de7adus.
Luke2:37 Layththay izis osppun tammanne oyddu layth gidana gakkanaas omarsinne gallas xoomashenne woossashe Xoossa Keeththafe shaakettontta am7eteththan gam7adus.
Luke2:38 He wodekka shiiqada Xoossaa galatadus; Yerusalaame wozzeteth naagishe dizaytas ubbaas guuththa naaza gishshas yootadus.
Luke2:39 Yooseeferanne Maaramira Godaa wogaan azazettidayssa polidi Galila awuraajjan diza baso Naazirete katama simmida.
Luke2:40 Guuththa naazikka diccidi minni minni bides; aadho erateththan kumides; Xoossa aadho kiyateththika iza bolla dees.
Luke2:41 Iza aawaynne iza aaya layththan layththan Paaziga bonchchanaas Yerusalaame beettes.
Luke2:42 Naazas layththay tammanne nam7u layth kumida wode kase lose gididayssa mala Paaziga bonchchana kezida.
Luke2:43 Paaziga ba7aaleza bonchchidi baso simmishin Yesusi Yerusalaamen attides. Yelidaytikka izi attiddayssa eribeettenna.
Luke2:44 Banara issife biza oge asaara dees gishe issi gallassa oge bida. Gido attiin izi isttara bayndayssa eridi ba dabbota achchaninne laggeta achchan dizaakko giidi koyida.
Luke2:45 Koyi koyidi beettontta ixxiin Yerusalaame simmida.
Luke2:46 Heedzdzu gallassafe guye Xoossa Keeththan tamaarsizayta giddon uttidi siyishe
Luke2:47 Siyidayti wuri Yesusa akeekaninne iza zaarozan daro malalettida.
Luke2:48 Yooseefeynne Maarama iza be7ida wode malalettida. Maaramakka
Luke2:49 Izikka zaaridi
Luke2:50 Gido attiin isttas izi yootidayssi gelibeenna.
Luke2:51 Hessafe guye isttara issife Naazirete wodhdhidi isttas azazettishe de7ides. Iza aaya Maaramakka he hanida miishshaa ubbaa ba wozinan naagashe gam7adus.
Luke2:52 Yesusi aadho erateththan

Luke3:3 Yohannisi Yordaanoose shaafa achchan diza dereta
Luke3:4 Hessika qasse nabe Isayaasi
Luke3:5 Shoobba biittay wuri kumana; zumatinne zumbullati wuri ziqqi gaana; geella ogey sitti gaana; moorettida ogey lo7o gidana.
Luke3:6 Asa zereth ubbaa ashshiza Xoossa wolqqa beyana› giidi bazzon waassiza asa qaala giiris» giidi ba maxaafan xaafida mala.
