Luke4:1 Yesusi Xillo Ayanan kumidi Yordaanoose shaafappe simmida mala Xillo Ayanay iza kaaleththidi bazzo biitta efides.
Luke4:2 Heenkka Xala7en oyddu tammu gallas paacettides. He paacettiza gallassatan aykkoka montta gishshas wurseththan gafides.
Luke4:3 Xala7eykka Yesusa
Luke4:4 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke4:5 Hessafe kaallidi Xala7ey Yesusa issi dhoqqa zuma bolla kessidi salo gufanththon diza kawoteththata qiphida ayfey xeellanaas bessidi
Luke4:6 «Hayssi ne be7iza biitta kawota godateththinne bonchchoy wurikka taas imettides; tanikka ta dosizaades immanaas dandayza gishshas neeskka immana.
Luke4:7 «Hessa gishshas neni kundada taas goynniko hayssi wurikka nees gidana» gides.
Luke4:8 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke4:9 Hessafekka Yesusa Yerusalaamen Xoossa Keeththa xeera kessi essidi Xoossa Maxaafan
Luke4:10 
Luke4:11 
Luke4:12 Yesusikka
Luke4:13 Xala7eykka ba paaccanayssa wursidaappe guye baas injje wodey beettanaashe Yesusappe shaakettides.
Luke4:14 Yesusikka Xillo Ayana wolqqan Galila simmides; iza goobateththi Galila achchan diza deretan siyettides.
Luke4:15 Izikka Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan tamaarsishin iza timirtey lo7iin asay wurikka iza galatides.
Luke4:16 Heeppe ba yelettida katama Naazirete yiidi kase Sambata gallas Ayhuda Woosa Keeth geliza mala gelidi Xoossa Maxaafa nababanaas dendi eqqides.
Luke4:17 Nabe Isayaasa Maxaafay izas imettiin maxaafaa doyda mala.
Luke4:18 «Godaa Ayanay ta bolla dees; manqotas Mishiraachcho qaala yootana mala tana tiydes; qashettidaytas birsheteth
Luke4:19 
Luke4:20 Maxaafaakka gordidi Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe naagizayssas zaari immidi uttides. Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan dizayti wurikka iza tishshi histti xeellida.
Luke4:21 Izikka isttas
Luke4:22 Asay wurikka iza gishshas lo7o xalala haasayeettes; qasseka iza doonappe keziza lo7o qaalaappe dendidayssan malalettidi
Luke4:23 Izikka
Luke4:24 Qasseka
Luke4:25 «Gido attiin ta inttes tuma gays; heedzdzu layththinne bagga gakkanaas saloy gordettiin wolqqama koshay biitta bolla hanida Eelaasa wode he layththatan azinay baynda daro maccassati Isra7eele biittan deettes shin Eelaasi isttafe issineykkoka kiitettibeenna. Gido attiin Sidoona geetettiza biittan Seraphita geetettiza kataman diza issi azinay baynda maccassayko kiitettides.
Luke4:26 
Luke4:27 Nabe Elssa7e wode Isra7eele deren daro inchchirachcha hargizayti deettes; gido attiin Sooriya biitta as Ni7imaaneppe attiin he darotappe oonikka inchchirachcha hargefe paxibeenna» gides.
Luke4:28 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan dizayti wurikka hessa siyidi daro hanqettida.
Luke4:29 Ba uttidasohoppe dendi eqqidi Yesusa katamaappe kare kessidi duge zaari yeddanaas istta katamaya oosettida zumaa bolla aafotizason oosettidaso ekki efida.
Luke4:30 Gido attiin izi istta giddora shaakki yeggidi aadhdhi bides.
Luke4:31 Heeppeka Galila awuraajjan diza Qifirnahoome geetettiza katama wodhdhides; heenkka Sambata gallas daro asa tamaarso oykkides.
Luke4:32 Izi Godateththara haasayza gishshas iza timirtezan malalettida.
Luke4:33 Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan tuna ayanay oykkida addey dees. Izikka ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Luke4:34 «Naazirete Yesusaa ha7i ta waanoo? Nenara tana aazi gaththidee? Ne yiday nuna dhayssanaassee? Ne oonakko ta erays; ne Xoossa Xilloza gidikkii?» giidi waassides.
Luke4:35 Yesusikka tuna ayanaza ha addezappe
Luke4:36 Asay wurikka malalettidi ba giddon issoy issaara
Luke4:37 Yesusa goobateththika ubbaso gakkides.
Luke4:38 Hessafe guye Yesusi Ayhuda Woosa Keeththafe kezidi Simoona keeththe gelides. Simoona bolloteya
Luke4:39 Yesusikka izikko shiiqidi misho hargeza seerides. Misha hargeyka yeddiin heerakka denda eqqada imaththata mokkadus.
Luke4:40 Arshey wullana gishin dumma dumma hargey oykkida asaa wursi izakko ekki yida. Izikka hargiza asaa ubbaa bolla ba kushe woththidi paththides.
Luke4:41 Tuna ayanati qasseka Yesusa
Luke4:42 Gadey wontishin Yesusi issi asikka bayndaso bides. Daro asaykka iza koyishe izi dizaso gakkides. Izi isttafe shaakettidi bontta mala digganaas koyida.
Luke4:43 Gido attiin isttas
Luke4:44 Izikka Yuhudan Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan qaala gujji yootides.
Luke5:1 Yesusi Gensereexe Abba lanqen eqqidi Xoossa qaala tamaarsishin siyiza asay iza un7eththides.
Luke5:2 He wode nam7u wogoloti abba achchan dishin Yesusi be7ides. Mole oykkizayti wogolotappe wodhdhidi mole giteta meecceettes.
Luke5:3 Yesusi wogolotappe Simoona wogolon gelidi biittafe gede abba gido shiishshana mala oychchidinne wogolo giddon uttidi asaa tamaarsides.
Luke5:4 Tamaarsi wursidaappe guye Simoona
Luke5:5 Simooni Yesusas zaaridi
Luke5:6 Giteza yeggida wode daro mole oykkida. Giteykka daakettides.
Luke5:7 Hara wogolon dizayti yiidi istta maaddana mala kushera wutti xeygida. Isttika yiidi nam7u wogolota mole kunththida. Wogolotikka duge miteteth oykkida.
Luke5:8 Simoona geetettiza Phexroosi hessa be7idi Yesusa toho bolla kundidi
Luke5:9 Izi hessa giday izinne izara dizayti oykkida daro molezan malalettida gishshassa.
Luke5:10 Qasseka Simoona laggeti Zabdoosa nayti Yaaqoobeynne Yohannisi wurikka malalettida. Yesusikka Simoona
Luke5:11 Isttika wogolota biittako shiishshidi wursika yeggi aggidi Yesusa kaallida.
Luke5:12 Yesusi katamatappe issineyn dishin inchchirachcha hargey bolla wursi oykkida issi asi he kataman dees; he addezikka Yesusa be7idi iza sinththan kundidi
Luke5:13 Yesusi ba kushe yeddi bochchidi
Luke5:14 Yesusi izas
Luke5:15 Gido attiin iza gishshas asay haasayza worey kaseppe aakki aakki bides; keehi daro asay iza haasaya siyanaassinne bana sakkiza hargefe paxanaas izakko shiiqides.
Luke5:16 Yesusi daro wode asi bayndaso biidi woossides.
Luke5:17 Yesusi tamaarsishin asay Galilappenne Yuhudappe qasseka Yerusalaameppe yida Farsaawetinne wogaa tamaarsizayti heen uttida. Izi paththana mala Godaa wolqqay izara dees.
Luke5:18 He wode asay issi kumeththa bollay silidi qaaxxontta harganchcha halara tookki ekki yiidi keeththe gelththidi Yesusa sinththan woththanaas paaccida.
Luke5:19 Asaa daroteththafe dendidayssan keeththe gelththanaas xoonettida gishshas pude keeththa kaara bolla kezidinne kaaraa qaaridi harganchchaza halaara tookki ehidi asaa giddora Yesusa sinththan woththida.
Luke5:20 Yesusi istta ammano be7idi
Luke5:21 Muse wogaa xaafizaytinne Farsaaweti
Luke5:22 Yesusi istta qofaa erida gishshas
Luke5:23 ‹Ne nagaray atto geetettides› guussafenne ‹Dendada ba› guussafe awayssi kawushshee?
Luke5:24 Gido attiin ta hayssa giday asa naas biitta bolla as nagarappe maaranaas godateththi dizayssa intte erana mala» gides; qasseka he sila addeza
Luke5:25 Izi heerakka istta sinththan dendi eqqides; kase ba ichchida halaa tookkidi Xoossaa galatishe baso bides.
Luke5:26 He wode asi wuri malalettides. Xoossa galatishe
Luke5:27 Hessafe guye Yesusi heeppe kezi bides. Lewe geetettiza issi qaraxa qanxxisizayssi qaraxa qanxxizason uttidayssa be7idi
Luke5:28 Izikka wursi aggidi iza kaallides.
Luke5:29 Leweykka Yesusas ba keeththan gita diggisa diggisides. Qaraxa qanxxisiza daro asatinne hara asatikka isttara issife maaddan uttida.
Luke5:30 Farsaawetinne istta Xaafeti
Luke5:31 Yesusikka isttas
Luke5:32 Tanikka nagaranchchata maaroteththaako zaaranaas yadis attiin xillota xeyganaas yabeekke» gides.
Luke5:33 Isttika zaaridi
Luke5:34 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi
Luke5:35 Gido attiin mishiray isttafe shaakettana wodey yaana; istti he wode xoomana» gides.
Luke5:36 Isttas
Luke5:37 Woyneppe oosettida ooraththa cajje gal7a lukkamon kunththidi woththiza asi oonikka deenna; woththizaa gidikko woyneppe oosettida ooraththa cajjey gal7aza daakkana. Woyne cajjezikka biittan gukkana; gal7a lukkamoy sinththafe go7onttaaz gidana.
Luke5:38 Hessa gishshas ooraththa woyne cajjey ooraththa ogoron gujettanaas bessees.
Luke5:39 Histtiko caala woyne cajje uyidaappe guye caalonttaaz uyana koyzay oonikka deenna gaasoykka caalay lo7o gidida gishshassa» gides.
Luke6:1 Issi Sambata gallas Yesusi kaththa giddora aadhdhi bishin iza kaallizayti tiya xuphi ekkidi ba kushen shigechchi mishin
Luke6:2 Farsaawetappe issi issi asati
Luke6:3 Yesusikka isttas
Luke6:4 Izi Xoossa Keeththe gelidi qeeseti xalla maana mala azazettida dumma ukeththaa baas miidi banara dizaytas immides» giidi zaarides.
Luke6:5 Qasseka Yesusi
Luke6:6 Yesusikka hara Sambata gallas Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe gelidi tamaarsishin ushachcha kushey silida issi asi heen dees.
Luke6:7 Muse wogaa tamaarsizaytinne Farsaaweti Yesusa mootanaas gaaso koyidi ane izi Sambata gallassan addeza paththiko beyana giidi naagishe gam7ida.
Luke6:8 Yesusikka istta wozina qofaa eridi kushey silida addeza ubbaa sinththan
Luke6:9 Yesusikka istta
Luke6:10 Qasseka Yesusi ba yuushon diza ubbaa yuushshi xeellidaappe guye addeza
Luke6:11 Gido attiin asati hanqettida; Yesusa bolla ay ooththanaas koshshizaakko ba giddon zorettida.
Luke6:12 He gallassatappe issi gallas Yesusi woossanaas zuma bolla kezidi omars kumeth Xoossaa woossishe aqides.
Luke6:13 Gadey wontishin bana kaallizayta xeygidi isttafe tammanne nam7ata doorides. Isttaka
Luke6:14 Isttika Phexroosa giidi sunththida Simoonanne iza isha Indiraasa
Luke6:15 Matoosa
Luke6:16 Yaaqoobe naa Yuhudanne Yesusa aaththi immida Asqoronto Yuhuda.
Luke6:17 Yesusikka isttara issife zumaa bollafe duge wodhdhidi dembason eqqides. Iza kaallizaytappe daro asay heen dees
Luke6:18 Isttika yiday Yesusi gizayssa siyanaassinne hargefe paxanaassa; tuna ayanaykka waayisizayti wuri paxida.
Luke6:19 Wolqqayka izappe kezidi darota paththiza gishshas asay wuri iza bochchanaas yides.
Luke6:20 Yesusikka bana kaallizaytas
Luke6:21 «Intte guyeppe kallana gishshas ha7i gafizaytoo! Intte anjjettidayta; intte guyeppe miiccana gishshas intteno ha7i yeekkizaytoo! Intte anjjettidayta;
Luke6:22 asay ta gishshas inttena ixxishin ba giddofe shaakkishin
Luke6:23 «Inttes salon gita woytoy diza gishshas he wode ufayssan guppite; ays giikko istta Aawati nabeta bolla hessaththo ooththida.
Luke6:24 «Gido attiin intteno duretoo! Intte ha7i ufayettida gishshas inttes aayye ana!
Luke6:25 Intteno ha7i kallidaytoo! Inttena aayye ana! Intte guyeppe gafana; intteno ha7i miiccizaytoo! Inttes aayye ana! Intte guyeppe mishettananne yeekkana.
Luke6:26 «Asi wuri intte gishshas lo7o haasayza wode inttes aayye ana! Ays giikko istta aawati wordo nabetas hessa mala ooththida.
Luke6:27 «Gido attiin ta yootizayssa siyizaytoo! Tani inttes yootizay intte morkketa siiqite; inttena ixxizaytas lo7o ooththite;
Luke6:28 inttena qanggizayta anjjite; inttena qohizaytas woossite;
Luke6:29 Issi shagalan baqqiko nam7anththo shagalaa gujja bessa; oonikka ne bollara may7idayssa qaari ekkiko gaaththara may7idayssaka diggofa.
Luke6:30 «Nena woossiza ubbaas imma; ne miishshaa ekkida asi zaari immana mala oychchofa.
Luke6:31 «Asi inttes ooththana mala intte koyzayssaththo intteka hara asas ooththite.
Luke6:32 «Nagaranchchatikka bana siiqizayta siiqiza gishshas intte inttena siiqizayta xalla siiqikko inttes ay dumma anjjoy dizee?
Luke6:33 Intte inttes lo7o ooththizaytas xalala lo7o ooththiko inttes ay dumma anjjoy dizee? Ays giikko nagaranchchatikka hessaththo ooththeettes.
Luke6:34 Tal7e ekkidi zaarana dandayeettes gizaytas xalla intte tal7iko intte hara ay dumma anjjo demmanee? Ays giikko nagaranchchatikka istti tal7idayssa sire zaaridi ekkanaas nagaranchchatas tal7eettes.
Luke6:35 Gido attiin Xoossi bana galatonttaytassinne iitatas kiya gidida mala intte morkketa siiqite; lo7o ooththite; guyeppe zaari ekkanaas qoppontta dishe tal7e immite; hessankka inttes kushe zaaroy gita gidana; qasseka intte wogga Xoossaa naa gidana.
Luke6:36 Intte aaway kiya gidida mala intteka kiyata gidite.
Luke6:37 «Intte harata bolla pirdofte; intte bollaka pirdettenna; intte bolla pirday darontta mala harata bolla pirda darsofte; Asas atto giite; intteska atto geetettana.
Luke6:38 Immite! Intteska imettana; inttes intte makkida miishshan simmidi makettana; harappeka naaqqi baqettidi yigetti kumidi wora gukkanaashe lo7o makkiza miishshan makettidi inttes imettana» gides.
Luke6:39 Qasseka Yesusi isttas leemison
Luke6:40 Tamaarey bana tamaarsizaadefe aadhdhenna; gido attiin lo7eththi tamaarda asi wuri ba astamaare mala gidees.
Luke6:41 «Ne ayfe giddon diza tuussaa xeellontta dashe ne isha ayfe giddon diza buuraa ays xeellay?
Luke6:42 Ne ayfen diza tuussaa be7ontta ne ishaa
Luke6:43 «Lo7o miththi iita ayfe ayfenna; qasseka iita miththi lo7o ayfe ayfenna.
Luke6:44 Miththi wurikka ba ayfen ayfen erettees; Agunththafe Balase geetettiza miththa ayfey maxettenna; laadeppe woyne ayfey qanxxettenna.
Luke6:45 Lo7o asi ba wozinaa kumida lo7o miish kessees; iita asikka ba wozina kumida iita miishshaafe iita kessees; asi wurikka ba wozina kumi palahidayssa ba doonan haasayees.
Luke6:46 «Tani gizayssa ooththeketa shin ays tana
Luke6:47 Taakko yiidinne ta qaala siyidi polizay wuri oona misatizaakko ta inttena bessana; keeththe keexxanaas ziqqi ooththi bookkidi shuchcha bollan ba keeth keexxida asa misatees. Haro haaththi yiidi he keeththaa sugides; gido attiin minni keexettida gishshas qaaththanaas dandaybeenna.
Luke6:48 
Luke6:49 Gido attiin ta qaala siyidi polontta asi ba keeththe lo7eththi baasonttanne giddon shuch yeggontta keexxida asa misatees; haroykka keeththaa sugiin keeththay heerakka kundidi iita laaleth laalettides» gi yootides.
Luke7:1 Yesusi hessa wursika dere sinththan yooti wursidaappe guye Qifirnahoome gizaso bi gelides.
Luke7:2 Heen Qifirnahoomen mato halaqay dees; he addezas izi siiqiza ashkaray hargidi hayqos shempo bolla dees.
Luke7:3 Izikka Yesusa gishshas siyidi
Luke7:4 Kiitettidi bida asati Yesusaakko yiidi
Luke7:5 Ays giikko hayssi addezi nu asaa daro dosees; nuuska Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe keexisiday iza» giidi minththi woossida.
Luke7:6 Yesusikka isttara bides. Yesusi addeza keeththaako matiza wode addezi ba laggeta Yesusaakko yeddidi
Luke7:7 Tani ne sinththan beettanaas bessontta as gidida gishshas neekko babeekke; hessa gishshas neni heen daada qaala xalla giikko ta ashkaray paxana.
Luke7:8 Taaska tana azaziza asi taappe bollara dees. Taappe garsara tani azaziza wottadarati deettes. Issaa
Luke7:9 Yesusikka addezi gidayssa siyidi addeza hanoteththaan malalettides; guye simmidi bana kaalliza deraas
Luke7:10 Yesusaakko kiitettida asati guye kiittida halaqazaso simmidi ashkarazi paxidayssa be7ida.
Luke7:11 Hessafe guye Yesusi gam7ontta dishe Nayne geetettiza katama bana kaallizaytaranne daro derera issife bides.
Luke7:12 Izi biidi katamaa geliza miixaa gakkishin he katamayppe daro asay aha tookki ekkidi kezi wodhdhides. Hayqqidayssi ba aayeys izi mexi issino. Aayeyska azinay baa; katamappe daro asay izira issife dees.
Luke7:13 Godaykka izo be7ida wode izis mishettidi
Luke7:14 Shiiqidi ahaa tookkida hala bochchiin ahaa tookkidayti sitti gi eqqida. Yesusikka
Luke7:15 Hayqqida naazikka suuri uttidi haasaya oykkides. Yesusikka naaza aayeys efi immides.
Luke7:16 Asay wurikka keehi babbidi Xoossaa galatishe
Luke7:17 Hayssi Yesusa gishshas haasayettiza lo7o haasayay kumeththa Yuhudaninne Yuhuda yuushon diza deretan kezides.
Luke7:18 Xammaqiza Yohannisa kaallizaytikka hayssa ubbaa Yohannisas yootida. Yohannisikka istta giddofe nam7ata xeygidi
Luke7:19 «Izi yaana geetettidi haasayettizayssi neneyee? Hara as naaginoo? gi oychchite» giidi Godaakko yeddides.
Luke7:20 Bida asati Yesusaakko gakkidi
Luke7:21 He wode Yesusi daro asaa waayeppe
Luke7:22 Yohannisi kiittiin izakko yidayta
Luke7:23 Tanan dhuphettontta asi wurikka anjjettidayssa» gides.
Luke7:24 Yohannisi kiittida asati Yesusa achchafe bidaappe guye Yesusi daro asaas Yohannisa gishshas
Luke7:25 Ay beyanaas kezidetii? Lo7iza may7o may7ida as beyana kezidetii? Lo7o may7o may7idi warxi warxi gizayti ishalo duus dizayti kawo keeththan deettes.
Luke7:26 Histtiko ay beyanaas kezidetii? Nabe beyanaassee? Ee ta inttes tuma gays; intte keziday nabeppe aadhdhizaade beyanaassa.
Luke7:27 Xoossa qaalan
Luke7:28 «Tani inttes gizay maccassafe yelettida asaa giddon Yohannisappe aadhdhizaadey oonikka deenna; Xoossa Kawoteththan gidikko as ubbaafe guuth geetettida asi Yohannisappe aadhdhana» gi yootides.
Luke7:29 Qaraxa qanxxisizaytikka attontta hayssa Yesusa qaala siyidayti wurikka Yohannisa kushen xammaqettidi Xoossas bessiza bonchcho immida.
Luke7:30 Farsaawetinne Muse wogaa eranchchati Yohannisa kushen xammaqettontta gishshas Xoossi isttas waanna qofa ooththidi shiishshidayssa hirayssida.
Luke7:31 Qasseka Yesusi zaaridi
Luke7:32 Giyan uttidi ba giddon issoy issaara xeygettidi
Luke7:33 Ays giikko Xammaqiza Yohannisi kath monttanne woyneppe oosettida cajje uyontta yiin
Luke7:34 Asa nay qasse mishenne uyishe yiin
Luke7:35 Hessa gishshas erateththa tumateththay izi nayta ubbata achchan ammanettides» gides.
Luke7:36 Hessafe guye Farsaawetappe issi asi quma maanaas Yesusa baso xeygiin Yesusi xeygida Farsaawezaso bi uttides.
Luke7:37 He kataman diza issi nagaranchcha maccas dizaara Yesusi Farsaaweza keeththan quma maadda bollan dizayssa siyada issi albasxiroose bilqaaxe shitto ekka yadus.
Luke7:38 Histtada Yesusappe guyera iza toho achchan eqqada yeekkashenne ba afunththan iza toho caphisada ba hu7e binanara quccashenne yeerashe shittoza tiyadus.
Luke7:39 Yesusa qumas xeyssida Farsaaweykka hessa be7idi
Luke7:40 Yesusi
Luke7:41 Yesusi zaaridi
Luke7:42 Isttas qanxxiza miishshi dhayiin tal7e immidayssi nam7ata acoza ubbaaka maarides; histtiko ha nam7atappe ha tal7e immidayssa darssi dosanay awayssee?» gides.
Luke7:43 Simoonikka zaaridi
Luke7:44 He maccassayko yuuyidi Simoona
Luke7:45 Neni ubbaaka tana yeerabeekka; iza gidikko ta geloosoppe doommada ta toho yeero aggabeekku.
Luke7:46 Ne ta hu7e zayte tiyabeekka shin iza gidikko ta toho shitto tiyadus.
Luke7:47 «Hessa gishshas ta nena gizay iza tana keeha dosida gishshas iza ba daro nagarappe maarettadus; guuththara maarettiza asa siiqoykka guuththa» gides.
Luke7:48 Yesusi maccassayo
Luke7:49 Izara issife maaddan uttida imaththatikka
Luke7:50 Yesusikka maccassayo
Luke8:1 Hessafe guye Yesusi Xoossa Kawoteththa Mishiraachcho sabbakishe dumma dumma katamata giddoranne gutata giddora aadhdhides. Aadhdhi biza wode iza kaalliza tammanne nam7ati izara deettes.
Luke8:2 Qasseka tuna ayanappenne iita hargefe paxida issi issi maccassati izara deettes. Isttika laappun tuna ayanay izippe kezida Magdale geetettiza dereppe yida Maaramo
Luke8:3 Kawo Herdoosason ooththiza Kuza machcho Yohaano qasseka Soosinonne hara daro maccassati deettes; isttika banttas diza miishshara Yesusas ooththizayta.
Luke8:4 Daro derey issife shiiqi dishin qasseka asay dumma dumma katamappe izakko wodhdhiza wode Yesusi leemisora tamaarsishe
Luke8:5 «Issi goshshanchchay zereth zeranaas kezides; izi zerishin baggay ogen wodhdhidi asa tohon yedhettides; salo kafotikka yiidi maxi mida;
Luke8:6 Issi zereththay shuchcha gaden wodhdhidi heerakka caarides; gadezikka mela gade gidida gishshas elle melides.
Luke8:7 Qasseka hara zereththi agunththa giddon wodhdhides; agunththayka izara issife diccidi caarechchayka diccontta mala cuullides.
Luke8:8 Qasseka hara zereththay aradda gaden wodhdhides; caaridi xeetu kushe ayfides» gides. Yesusi haasayaa wursidaappe guye qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Luke8:9 Yesusa kaallizayti
Luke8:10 izikka isttas
Luke8:11 «Zereththaza leemisoykka hayssa; zereth geetettidayssi Xoossa qaala.
Luke8:12 Oge lanqen wodhdhidayssi qaala siyizayta; gido attiin istti ammanidi attontta mala Xala7ey yiidi qaalaa istta wozinappe ekkichchizayta.
Luke8:13 Shuchcha bolla wodhdhidaytikka qaala siyidi ufayssara ekkizayta; isttika ha7is ammaneettes attiin metoy istta bolla gakkiza wode xapho yeddontta gishshas ellera ammano kaddizayta.
Luke8:14 Agunththa giddon wodhdhidayti qaalaa siyizayta; heytikka hayssa ha alame qofaninne aqotan
Luke8:15 Aradda biittan wodhdhidayssi qaalaa suureninne lo7o wozinan siyidi naagizaytanne dandayan minnidi ayfe ayfizayta.
Luke8:16 «Poo7o poo7isidi baaththa giddon woykko arsa garsan woththiza asi deenna; gido attiin keeththe geliza asas poo7ana mala qoncceson woththeettes.
Luke8:17 Qotettidi qoncce kezonttay
Luke8:18 «Hessa gishshas intte siyizayssa naagetti siyite; diza asas gujettana; bayndaades ubbaafe izas dizaa misatizaarakka ekettaychchana» gi zaarides.
Luke8:19 Hessafe guye Yesusa aayanne iza ishati Yesusaakko yida; gido attiin asaa daroteththafe dendidayssan izakko shiiqanaas dandaybeettenna.
Luke8:20 He wode asay Yesusas
Luke8:21 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke8:22 Issi gallas Yesusi bana kaallizaytara wogolo giddo gelidi
Luke8:23 Isttika pinnishin abbaa bolla dambalay dendidi waayisiza wode Yesusi dhiskides; haaththika wogoloza giddo geliin asay daro metotettides.
Luke8:24 Yesusa kaallizayti izakko shiiqidi
Luke8:25 Izikka bana kaallizayta
Luke8:26 Izappe guye Galilappe he pinththan diza Gergesenoone geetettiza dere wogolora pinnida.
Luke8:27 Yesusi wogolozappe gaden wodhdhiin daydanththi iza bolla diza issaadey katamappe kezidi iza demmides; he addezi daro wode may7o may7ontta kallo dizaadenne keeththan aqontta duufo baas aqoso ooththida asa.
Luke8:28 Yesusa be7ida wode waassishe Yesusa sinththan kundides; qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi
Luke8:29 Tuna ayanay hessa gaanaas dandayday addezappe kezana mala Yesusi azazida gishshassa. Tuna ayanazikka woden woden dendiza gishshas addezi sansalataninne biratan toho qachchi naagiinkka qashettida sansalataa duusereththidi iza bolla diza daydanththay iza duge bazzo zaari efees.
Luke8:30 Yesusi
Luke8:31 Daydanththatikka bana wurseththi baynda ciimma ollan yeggontta mala minththidi woossida.
Luke8:32 Heenkka zuma bolla daro guddunththi heemettees; daydanththati
Luke8:33 Daydanththati addezappe kezidi guddunththatan gelida. Guddunththati aafoza dugunththaara bichcharishe biidi abbaan geli mitettida.
Luke8:34 Heemmizayti hanidayssa be7ida wode beerotti biidi katama asaassinne dere asaas yootida.
Luke8:35 Hanidayssa beyana giidi asay ba dizasoppe Yesusaakko yides; daydanththay izappe kezida addezikka kahay simmiin afala may7idi Yesusa toho giddon uttidayssa be7idi babbida.
Luke8:36 Daydanththan oykettida addezi paxishin be7idayti izi waani paxidaakko derezas yootida.
Luke8:37 Gergesenoone matan diza asay keehi babbida gishshas Yesusa
Luke8:38 Daydanththay izappe kezida addezi Yesusara issife daana mala woossides.
Luke8:39 Gido attiin Yesusi iza
Luke8:40 Asay wuri Yesusa yuussaa naagishe gam7ida gishshas izi simmishin ufayssan mokki ekkides.
Luke8:41 He wode Iya7iroosa geetettiza Ayhuda Woosa Keeththa halaqay yiidi Yesusa toho bolla kundidi baso baana mala woossides.
Luke8:42 Izi hessaththo oychchiday izas tammanne nam7u layth kumida issi macca nay sakettada shempo bolla diza gishshassa. Izi hee buussan dishin derey daridi ba giddon sugettidi iza keehi un7isides.
Luke8:43 Tammanne nam7u layth suuththi izippe gukkishin diza issi maccassaya baas diza miishshaa wursa dhale eriza asatas imma wursiin izo paththanaas dandayda asi issaadeyka deenna.
Luke8:44 Izakka guyera shiiqada Yesusa afala macarata bochchadus; izippe gukkiza suuththay heerakka eqqi aggides.
Luke8:45 Yesusikka
Luke8:46 Gido attiin Yesusi
Luke8:47 Maccassaya erettontta qotettada baanaas dandayonttayssa erada kokkorashe yaada Yesusa sinththan kundadus; izakka Yesusa waana bochchidaakkonne qasseka ellera waana paxidaakko ubba asaa sinththan yootadus.
Luke8:48 Izikka
Luke8:49 Yesusi buro maccassays haasaya bolla dishin Ayhuda Woosa Keeththa halaqa Iya7iroosa keeththafe issi asi Iya7iroosas
Luke8:50 Yesusi hessa siyidi Iya7iroosa
Luke8:51 Yesusi Iya7iroosa keeththe geliza wode Phexroosa
Luke8:52 He wode asay wuri nays
Luke8:53 Asaykka naya hayqqidayssa eriza gishshas Yesusa bolla miiccides.
Luke8:54 Gido attiin nayi kushe izi oykkidi
Luke8:55 Nays shemppoyka simmides; heerakka denda eqqadus; Yesusikka izis miza miish immana mala azazides.
Luke8:56 Nayo yelidaytikka malalettida; gido attiin izi hanidayssa oonaska yootontta mala azazides.
Luke9:1 Yesusikka tammanne nam7u Hawaareta issife xeygidi daydanththata kessana malanne hargefe paththana mala isttas wolqqanne godateth immides.
Luke9:2 Qasseka Xoossa Kawoteth yootanaassinne hargizayta paththanaas istta kiittides.
Luke9:3 Isttas
Luke9:4 Intteka he katamayppe kezana gakkanaas koyro gelida oona keeththankka gidiin heen gam7ite.
Luke9:5 Katamaa asay inttena mokki ekkontta ixxiko he katamayppe kezidi inttena mokkonttaytas markka gidana mala intte tohon diza gudulla pittidi kezite» gides.
Luke9:6 Isttika Goday gida mala kezidi Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootishenne harganchchata paththishe gutan gutan yuuyida.
Luke9:7 He wode issi issi asati
Luke9:8 
Luke9:9 Herdoosikka
Luke9:10 Hawaaretikka simmidi istti ooththidayssa ubbaa Yesusas yootida; izikka istta xalla banara ekkidi Betesayda geetettiza poossan diza katama bides.
Luke9:11 Gido attiin daro asay hessa eridi istta kaallides; izikka istta mokki ekkidi Xoossa Kawoteththa gishshas yootides; qasseka hargefe paththanaas bessizayta paththides.
Luke9:12 Gadey lem7ishin tammanne nam7u Hawaareti izakko shiiqidi
Luke9:13 Gido attiin izi isttas zaaridi
Luke9:14 Yesusikka bana kaallizayta
Luke9:15 Yesusa kaallizaytikka Yesusi azazida mala asaa ubbaa utisida.
Luke9:16 Yesusikka ichchashu ukeththaanne nam7u moleta oykki pude salo xeellidi Xoossaa galatides; izikka ukeththaa menththidi asaa gaththana mala bana kaallizaytas immides.
Luke9:17 Asay wurikka miidi kaallides. Yesusa kaallizaytikka asaappe attida tammanne nam7u leemate kumeth maaddaafe denththida.
Luke9:18 Issi gallas Yesusi barkka woossishin iza kaallizayti izakko yida. Izikka istta
Luke9:19 Isttika izas
Luke9:20 Izikka istta
Luke9:21 Yesusikka istta
Luke9:22 qasseka
Luke9:23 Qasseka ubbaas
Luke9:24 
Luke9:25 Asi alame go7a mule demmidi ba shempo dhayssiko aaza go7ay dizee?
Luke9:26 Oonikka tananinne ta qaalan yeellatiko Asa Nay ba bonchchora
Luke9:27 Ta inttes tumu gays; hayssan eqqida asaappe hayqqanaappe sinththan Xoossa Kawoteth beyana issi issi asati deettes» gides.
Luke9:28 Yesusi hessa gida osppun gallassa malappe guye woossanaas zuma bolla kezides; bishe banara Phexroosa
Luke9:29 Izi woossishin iza ayfesoy laamettides. Iza medhaykka wolqqanththa mala xolqidi boottides.
Luke9:30 Nam7u asati Museynne Eelaasi izara haasayettida
Luke9:31 Isttika bonchchora qonccidi Yerusalaamen polettana diza Yesusa hayqo gishshas haasayettida.
Luke9:32 Phexroosanne izara dizayta deexo dhiskoy oykkides; isttika dhiskofe beeggidi Yesusa bonchchonne nam7u asi izara eqqidayta be7ida.
Luke9:33 He nam7u asati Yesusappe shaaketti bishin Phexroosi Yesusa
Luke9:34 Izi hessa haasayshin shaaray yiidi istta genththides. Shaara giddo gelidi babbida.
Luke9:35 Shaaraa giddofekka
Luke9:36 Qaalay seetettida wode Yesusi xalla beettides. Yesusa kaallizaytikka hanida miish ubbaa ba wozinan oykkida attiin oonaska yootibeettenna.
Luke9:37 Wonteththa gallas istti zuma bollafe wodhdhiin daro asay yiidi Yesusara gaaggides.
Luke9:38 He wode asaa giddofe issaadey qaala dhoqqu histtidi «Tamaarsizayssoo! Taas issi nay xalla diza gishshas iza ne xeellana mala ta nena woossays.
Luke9:39 Iza iita ayanay oykkishin hassa7ay baynda waassees; qakettishe doonara goppontto kessees; qoho gaththidaappe guye daro waayisidi aggees.
Luke9:40 Nena kaallizayti naazappe kessana mala istta ta woossadis; gido attiin kessana dandaybeettenna» gides.
Luke9:41 Yesusikka isttas zaaridi
Luke9:42 Naazi yishin iita ayanay iza bollafe yeggiin qakettides. Yesusikka iita ayanaza seeridi naaza paththidi naaza aawaas immides.
Luke9:43 Asaykka wuri Xoossa gitateththan malalettides. Izi ooththidayssan asay wuri malalettishin Yesusi bana kaallizayta
Luke9:44 «Asa nay asa kushen aadhdhi imettana; intteka ha yo7oza balopite» gides.
Luke9:45 Gido attiin izi gizayssi isttas gelibeenna. Gaasoykka istti akeekontta mala yo7ozi isttafe geemettides; zaaridikka oychchontta mala babbida.
Luke9:46 Iza kaallizayti
Luke9:47 Yesusikka istta wozina qofaa eridi guuththa naa ekki yiidi ba matan essidi
Luke9:48 «Ha guuththa naaza ta sunththan ekkizaadey oonikka diikko tana ekkees; tana ekkizaadeyka tana kiittidayssa ekkees; inttefe ubbatappe guuxxizaadey izi ubbaafe aadhdhees» gides.
Luke9:49 Yohannisikka
Luke9:50 Yesusikka
Luke9:51 Yesusi salo biza wodey matida gishshas Yerusalaame baanaas dendides.
Luke9:52 Izikka sinththasidi ase kiittides; isttika koshshiza miish giigsanaappe kasetidi Samaariya biittan diza issi guta bida.
Luke9:53 Gido attiin derey izi Yerusalaame bizayssa erida gishshas mokki ekkibeenna.
Luke9:54 Iza kaallizaytappe Yaaqoobeynne Yohannisi hanizayssa be7idi
Luke9:55 Gido attiin Yesusi isttako yuuyidi
Luke9:56 Istti wurikka hara guta bida.
Luke9:57 Isttika bishin issi asi isttako shiiqidi
Luke9:58 Yesusi
Luke9:59 Yesusikka hinkoyssa
Luke9:60 Yesusikka
Luke9:61 Qasseka hara asi
Luke9:62 Gido attiin Yesusi
Luke10:1 Hessafe guye Goday hara laappun tammanne nam7u as dooridi sunththides; isttaka nam7u nam7u histtidi izi baana sohotanne katamata wursika istti kasetidi baana mala kiittides.
Luke10:2 «Maxa gakkida kaththay daro; kaththaa maxi shiishshizayti guuththata; hessa gishshas kaththaa Goday kaththaa maxidi shiishshizayta kaththay dizaso yeddana mala woossite.
Luke10:3 Hessa gishshas biite; dorsati kana suyte giddora biza mala ta inttena yeddays.
Luke10:4 Korojo woykko qaraxiite woykko caamma ekkofte; oge bolla oonakka saro goopite.
Luke10:5 «Intte oona keeththika gelizaa gidikko koyrottidi
Luke10:6 He keeththan saro dosiza asi diikko intte sarotay he keeththaan shempana; saro dosiza asi dontta aggiko intte sarotay inttes simmana.
Luke10:7 Inttes maana shiishshida kath ubbaa mishenne uyishe he intte gelida keeththaan uttite; ooththizaades ba wolqqa waaga ekkanaas izas bessees; ha keeththaafe he keeththe yuuyopite.
Luke10:8 «Intte ay katamakka gakkiza wode asay inttena mokki ekkiko istti inttes aaththida qumaa miite.
Luke10:9 He kataman diza harganchchata paththidi
Luke10:10 Gido attiin intte biidi issi katama gelishin he katamaa asay inttena mokki ekkontta ixxiko he katama asay shiiqiza dubbushaa kezidi
Luke10:11 ‹Nu toho bolla diza intte katamaa gudullaa inttes markka gidana mala nu toho bollafe pittoos; gido attiin Xoossa Kawoteththay intteko matidayssa erite› giite.
Luke10:12 Ta inttes yootays pirda gallas he katama pirdafe Sodoome katama pirday kawushshe gidana.
Luke10:13 «Kuraziine nees aayye ana! Betesayda nees aayye ana! Inttenan oosettida malaatati Xirooseninne Sidoonan oosettidaakko isttika maaqa may7idinne bidinth gorpettidi he wode beni maarettanashin.
Luke10:14 Gido attiin pirda wode inttefe Xiroosessinne Sidoonas kawuyana.
Luke10:15 Hanne Qifirnahoome pude salo dhoqqu dhoqqu gadii? Neni duge Si7oole wodhdhana
Luke10:16 «Intte gizayssa siyiza asi tana siyees; inttena ekkontta asi tanakka ekkenna; tana ekkonttaykka tana kiittidayssa ekkenna» gides.
Luke10:17 Laappun tammanne nam7atikka ufayettishe simmidi
Luke10:18 Izikka isttas
Luke10:19 «Histtiko shooshshinne masimaso intte yedhdhana mala morkke wolqqa ubbaa bolla inttes godateth ta immadis; inttena qohiza issi miishshika deenna.
Luke10:20 Intte sunththay salon xaafettida gishshas ufayettite attiin tuna ayanati inttes haarettida gishshas ufayettofte» gides.
Luke10:21 He wode Yesusi Xillo Ayanan ufayettidi
Luke10:22 «Wuri ta Aawaa matappe taas imettides; qasseka iza nay oonakko Aawappe attiin erizay baa; Aaway oonakko Naazappe attiin woykko Naazi izas qonccisanaas dosidaadefe attiin erizaadey baa» gides.
Luke10:23 Bana kaallizaytakko simmidi isttas dumma
Luke10:24 Ta inttes tuma gays; daro nabetinne kawoti intte ha7i be7izayssa beyanaas koyidi beyibeettenna; intte ha7i siyizayssaka siyanaas koyidi siyibeettenna» gides.
Luke10:25 Issi gallas Muse wogaa tamaarsiza issi asi Yesusa paaccanaas koyidi
Luke10:26 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke10:27 Addezi zaaridi
Luke10:28 Yesusikka
Luke10:29 Addezi bana xillisanaas koyidi
Luke10:30 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke10:31 Issi qeesey he ogera baas duge wodhdhishe aamunsontta he qoxettida addeza demmidi pooqeththara yeggi aadhdhides.
Luke10:32 Qasseka issi Lewe bagga asappe issi addezi he ogera aadhdhishe qoxettida addeza be7idi ha7ikka pooqqidi aadhdhides.
Luke10:33 Issi Samaariya biitta asi he ogera aadhdhi bishe qoxettida addeza bolla gakki wodhdhides; Addeza be7idi keehi mishettides.
Luke10:34 Addezakko shiiqidi madunththaa dhallana mala wogara miththa zaytenne woyne cajje madunththaa bolla gussidi qachchides; addeza ba Hare togisidi imaththi shempizaso efidi lo7eththi xeellides.
Luke10:35 Wonteththa gallas imaththi shempiza keeththa godaas nam7u dinaare immidi
Luke10:36 «Histtiko ha heedzdzu asatappe pangatan qoxettidi hayqoppenne paxappe giddon yegettidaades keehi mata laggey nees awayssa misatizee?» gides.
Luke10:37 Muse wogaa tamaarsizayssika
Luke10:38 Yesusinne iza kaallizayti oge bishin Yesusi issi guta gelides; Marta geetettiza issi maccassaya bason Yesusa mokka ekkadus.
Luke10:39 Izis Maaramo geetettiza issi michcheya dawus. Maaramakka izappe qaala siyashe Godaa toho garsan uttadus.
Luke10:40 Gido attiin Martay ooso daroppe dendidayssan daaburada Yesusaakko shiiqada
Luke10:41 Gido attiin Goday izis
Luke10:42 Koshshizay gidikko issi miish xalla; Maaramakka lo7o exa dooradus; hessika izippe ekettenna» gides.
Luke11:1 Issi gallas Yesusi issison woossides; izi woosaa wursishin iza kaallizaytappe issoy
Luke11:2 Izikka isttas
Luke11:3 Hachchis gidiza quma nuus imma.
Luke11:4 Nuna qohidayta nu maariza mala nuna maara; paacenkka nuna gelththofa› gi woossite» gides.
Luke11:5 Qasseka
Luke11:6 
Luke11:7 Laggezikka zaaridi
Luke11:8 Tanikka inttes yootays; laggeteththaa gishshas dendidi immontta aggikokka izi oyshon saleththida gishshas dendidi koyzayssa ubbaa immides.
Luke11:9 «Hessa gishshas tani inttes gizay woossite inttes imettana; koyite intte demmana; kare qoxxite inttes doyettana.
Luke11:10 Ays giikko woossizay wuri ekkana; koyzaykka demmana; kare qoxxizaadeska doyettana.
Luke11:11 «Inttefe aawaa gidi uttidi izi yelida nay mole oychchiko shoosh immizay daandee?
Luke11:12 Woykko phuuphphulle oychchiko masimaso immizay daandee?
Luke11:13 Intte iitata gidishe intte naytas lo7o imota imo erikko salon diza intte Aaway bana woossizaytas Xillo Ayana wostti darssi immennee?» gides.
Luke11:14 Issi gallas Yesusi haasayssontta duude daydanth kessides. Daydanththazikka kezidaappe guye doona duude addezi haasaydes; be7ida asatikka darssi malalettida.
Luke11:15 Gido attiin issi issi asati
Luke11:16 Issi issi asay iza paaccanaas
Luke11:17 Gido attiin Yesusi istta qofaa eridi
Luke11:18 Intte tana
Luke11:19 Histtiko tani daydanththata Bi7elizeebulan kessiko intte nayti oonan kessandettoo? Hessa gishshas intte nayti intte bolla pirdizayta gidana.
Luke11:20 Gido attiin tani daydanththata kessizay Xoossa wolqqan gakkides; Xoossa Kawoteththay intteko matidaaro erite.
Luke11:21 «Mino asi lo7eththi gixettidi ba keeththe naagikko keeththaan diza miishshi lo7on naagettees.
Luke11:22 Gido attiin izappe hara mino asi yiidi xoonikko izi ammanettida ola miishshata woththi ekkidi izas diza haarozakka wursi haras gishana.
Luke11:23 «Tanara gidonttay tanara eqettees; tanarakka shiishshonttaadey laallees
Luke11:24 «Tuna ayanay asappe kezida wode shemposo koyishe haaththi baynda melason waayettees; shemposoy dhaykko
Luke11:25 Izappe simmidi yishin kase izi aggi bida keeththay pitettidinne giigi uttidayssa demmees.
Luke11:26 Hessafe simmi biidi baappe iitiza hara laappun daydanththata banara ekkidi yees; isttika gelidi heen daana; hessaadeska koyroyssafe guyeyssi keehi iita gidana» gides.
Luke11:27 Yesusi hessa haasayza wode asaa giddofe issi maccas dizaara ba qaala dhoqqu ooththada
Luke11:28 Gido attiin izi
Luke11:29 Daro derey Yesusaakko shiiqida wode Yesusi
Luke11:30 Gaasoykka Yoonaasi Nannawe asaas malata gidida mala asa nay tani ha yeletas malaata gidana.
Luke11:31 Dugeha dere macca kawoya Solomoone erateth beyanaas biitta gaxappe dendada yida gishshas pirda wode iza ha yeletara dendada pirdana; hekko Solomooneppe aadhdhizaadey haan dees.
Luke11:32 Yoonaasi sabbakishin siyidi Nannawe asay ba nagarappe maarettida gishshas ha yeletara issife dendidi pirdana; gido attiin Yoonaasappe aadhdhizay haan dees.
Luke11:33 «Xomppe oyththidi kareppe geliza asas poo7ana mala qoncceson woththeettes attiin geemason woththiza asi deenna.
Luke11:34 Ne asateththas poo7oy ne ayfe; ne ayfey paxa gidikko ne kumeththa asateththayka poo7o gidana; ne ayfey sakettiko ne kumeththa asateththay dhuma gidana.
Luke11:35 Hessa gishshas nenan diza poo7oy dhumontta mala naagetta.
Luke11:36 Histtiko ne asateththay poo7o gidikko dhumida asateththi deenna aggiko ne kumeththa asateththay xomppey lo7eththi poo7iza mala lo7i beettana» gides.
Luke11:37 Yesusi haasaya wursida mala issi Farsaawey banara quma maanaas Yesusa xeygides.
Luke11:38 Yesusi quma maana kushe meecettontta aggidayssa be7idi malalettida.
Luke11:39 Goday izas
Luke11:40 Intteno eeyatoo! Kare bagga medhdhiday giddo bagga medhdhibeennee?
Luke11:41 Yo7on gidikko giddon dizayssa muxuwaata immite; he wode wurikka inttes geesh gidana.
Luke11:42 «Intteno Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Aanugappenne xalotappe qasseka dumma dumma kaththafe tammaafe issino kesseeta; gido attiin tumu pirdanne Xoos dosanayssa aggi aadhdheeta; gidikkoka intte aggi aadhdhanaas bessenna; hankkoyssa aggontta intte ooththana bessizaytikka hayta.
Luke11:43 «Intteno Farsaawetoo! Inttes aayye ana! Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan uttanaas bonchcho oyde koyeeta; giya giddonkka asay intte sinththan hokkana mala doseeta.
Luke11:44 Asi erontta iza bollara biza qotetti diza duufo intte misatiza gishshas inttes aayye ana!» gides.
Luke11:45 Muse wogaa erizaytappe issoy zaaridi
Luke11:46 Yesusikka zaaridi
Luke11:47 «Intte Aawati wodhida nabeta duufo intte lo7eththiza gishshas inttes aayye ana.
Luke11:48 Histtiko intte intte aawata ooso minththiza markkatta; istti nabeta wodhida; intteka istta duufo lo7eththeeta.
Luke11:49 «Hessa gishshas Xoossa erateththi
Luke11:50 Hessa gishshas ha yeletay biittay medhettoosofe ha7i gakkanaas gukkida nabeta ubbaa suuththaa gishshas oyshettana.
Luke11:51 Aabeele suuththafe doommidi yarshizasoppenne Xoossa Keeththa giddon gukkida Zakaraasa suuththa gakkanaas koyeettes› gadus. Ee ta inttes gizay ha yeletay hayssas oyshettana.
Luke11:52 «Intteno woga erizaytoo! Inttes aayye ana! Erateththa penge qulpe wolqqara woththi ekkidi intteska gelibeekketa; gelanaytakka diggeeta» gides.
Luke11:53 Yesusi heeppe kezidaappe guye Xaafetinne Farsaaweti eqettishe oyshan shempo diggida.
Luke11:54 Iza doonappe keziza qaalan iza qaxxanaas naagettida.
Luke12:1 He wode daro derey ba giddon issoy issaara yedhettana gakkanaas shiiqi uttidaashe Yesusi bana kaallizayta
Luke12:2 Qonccontta kamettidi attanaynne erettontta qotan attana miishshi deenna.
Luke12:3 Hessa gishshas intte geeman haasaydaazi wuri qoncce kezana; qasseka intte qol7an hayththan saasuketti haasaydaazi wuri dere sinththan yootettana.
Luke12:4 «Ta laggetoo! Ta inttes gizay asho xalla wodhanaappe attiin hara aykkoka ooththanaas dandayonttaytas babbofte.
Luke12:5 Gido attiin intte babbanaas bessizay oonakko ta inttena bessana; asho wodhidaappe guye ashonne shempo issife gaththi Gaanname taman yegganaas dandayzayssas babbite; ee izas babbite gays.
Luke12:6 «Siine kafo ichchashati nam7u santes bayzetteettes; gido attiin isttafe issineyokka Xoossi dogenna.
Luke12:7 Intte hu7e binanay kumeth taybon dees; hessa gishshas babbofte; daro Siine kafotappe intte aadhdheeta.
Luke12:8 «Ta inttes yootays; ta gishshas asa sinththan markkattiza asa ubbaas Asa Nay qasseka Xoossa kiitanchcha sinththan iza gishshas markkattana.
Luke12:9 Gido attiin asa sinththan tana kaddidaadey Xoossa Kiitanchcha sinththan kaddettana.
Luke12:10 «Asa Naa bolla kawushsha qaala haasayzaades nagaray wuri maarettanashin Xillo Ayana cayizaadey maarettenna.
Luke12:11 «Asay inttena oykkidi dere haarizaytakkonne godatizaytakko; Ayhuda Woosa Keeththe oykki efikko
Luke12:12 Ays giikko intte haasayanaas bessizayssa Xillo Ayanay he wode inttena tamaarsana» gides.
Luke12:13 Daro asaa giddofe issaadey
Luke12:14 Yesusikka
Luke12:15 Qasseka isttas
Luke12:16 Zaareththidikka isttas
Luke12:17 He addezikka ba wozinan
Luke12:18 «Addezikka
Luke12:19 Ta shemppoyee! Daro wodes gidiza kath shiishshida gishshas shempa uttada ma; uya; ufayetta› gaana gides.
Luke12:20 «Gido attiin
Luke12:21 «Hessa gishshas Xoossa achchan dure gidontta baas miishshe shiishshiza asa wurseththika hessa mala» gi leemison yootides.
Luke12:22 Hessafe guye Yesusi bana kaallizaytas
Luke12:23 Ays giikko shemppoy kaththafe asateththi qasse may7ofe aadhdhees.
Luke12:24 Quurota xeellite zerettenna; maxettenna; kath shiishshiza gootaray isttas baa shin Xoossi istta mizees. Histtiko intte isttafe keehi aadhdheketii?
Luke12:25 Gido attiin inttefe darssi qoppidi ba layththa bolla issi gallas gujjana dandayzay oonee?
Luke12:26 Histtiko guuththa miish oosoy inttes dandayettonttaashe ays hara miishshas keehi qoppeetii?
Luke12:27 «Ciishshati waanidi diccizaakko ane xeellite; waayettenna; suqettenna; gido attiin ta inttes yootays; Solomooneykka gita asa shin isttafe issineyththo may7ibeenna.
Luke12:28 Histtiko Xoossi hach beettidi wonto taman wodhdhana maata hayssaththo mayzizaa gidikko intteno ammanoy paccidaytoo! Inttena wostti aaththi mayizennee?
Luke12:29 «Hessa gishshas
Luke12:30 Biitta bollan diza asi wuri hayssa koyees; gido attiin hayssi wuri inttes koshshizayssa intte Salo Aaway erees.
Luke12:31 Ubbaafekka koyroththidi Xoossa kawoteth koyite; hayssi wuri inttes gujetti imettana.
Luke12:32 «Intteno guuththa wude mehe mala gididaytoo! Kawoteth inttes immanaas intte Aawaas lo7o qofa gidida gishshas babbofte.
Luke12:33 Inttes dizayssa bayzidi manqotas immite; kaysoy ekkonttason
Luke12:34 Intte wozinay intte miishshi dizason daana» gides.
Luke12:35 «Qaanththan gixxidi giigettite; intte poo7oykka poo7o
Luke12:36 Istta goday bullachcha diggisappe simmidi yaanaashe naagettizaytanne izi yiidi penge qoxxishin elle doyanaas giigi uttida asata misatite.
Luke12:37 Istta goday yiza wode dhiskontta naagi uttida ashkarati istti anjjettidayta; ta inttes tumu gays; istta goday baas qaanththan gixxi eqqidi istta maaddan utissidi mizana.
Luke12:38 Omars woykko leela giddoththan yiidi istti dhiskontta dishin demmiko he ashkarati anjjettidayta.
Luke12:39 Kaysoy ay wode yaanaakko erizaa gididaakko keeththaa goday kaysoy bookkishin co7u giidi bessonttayssa erite.
Luke12:40 Asa Nay intte qoppontta woden yaanayssa eridi intteka giigettidi naagite» gides.
Luke12:41 Phexroosikka
Luke12:42 Godaykka
Luke12:43 Goday simmishin hessaththo ooththishe beettizaadey izi anjjettidaade.
Luke12:44 Ta inttes tumu gays; baas diza miish ubbaa bolla hessaade godasana.
Luke12:45 Gido attiin
Luke12:46 hessaade goday izi qoppontta gallassan yaana giidi ezgontta saaten yaana; histtidi iza qanxxereththi yeggidi iza exa ammanonttaytara issife ooththana.
Luke12:47 «Ba godaa qofaa eridi giigettonttaynne godaa shene ooththontta ashkaray iita shoch shocettana.
Luke12:48 Gido attiin erontta dishe shochchas bessiza mooro ooththida ashkaray guuththara shocettana; daro imettida asa ubbaafe daroy koyettees; daro hadara ekkidaadefe daroy koyettees.
Luke12:49 «Tani yiday biitta bollan tama eeththanaassa; he tamay ha7i eexxi kezidaakko tana daro ufayssana.
Luke12:50 Gido attiin tani xammaqettana xinqatay dees; he xinqatay polettanaashe tani keeha metotettadis.
Luke12:51 Inttes tani biitta bolla saro ehana yidaa misatizee? Gidenna; ta inttes yootays; tani yiday issaa issaafe shaakkanaassa.
Luke12:52 Hayssafe sinththan issi keeththan ba giddon shaakettida ichchashu asati daana. Nam7ati heedzdzata bolla heedzdzati nam7ata bolla dendidi ba giddon shaakettana.
Luke12:53 Aaway ba attuma naa bolla
Luke12:54 Qasseka derezas
Luke12:55 Dugeha baggara pudeha carkishin
Luke12:56 Intteno Lo7o misatiza iitatoo; saloyssanne sa7a medha be7idi hananayssa ereeta shin ha wodeza eroy inttena waani xoonizee?»
Luke12:57 «Histtiko intte ays tuma pirdeketii?
Luke12:58 «Ne morkkera daanna sinththan eqqana bishin buro oge bollan dashe izara giigana oge koya; ne histtontta aggiko izi nena goochchidi daanna sinth efana; daannayka nena aaththidi halaqas immana; halaqaykka nena woynen yeggana.
Luke12:59 Ta nees yootays; daannay pirdida wurseththa santiyo qanxxa wursana gakkanaas ne heeppe kezakka» gides.
Luke13:1 He wode issi issi asati Yesusaakko yiidi
Luke13:2 Izikka zaaridi
Luke13:3 Gidenna! Ta inttes yootays; intte maarettontta ixxiko intte wurikka he asata mala dhayana.
Luke13:4 Woykko Selihoomen gimbey istta bolla kundiin hayqqida tammanne osppun asati Yerusalaamen diza asaa ubbaafe nagaranchcha gidida gishshas giidi qoppeetii?
Luke13:5 Gidenna! Ta inttes yootays; intte maarettontta ixxiko intte wurikka he asata mala dhayana» gides.
Luke13:6 Qasseka isttas
Luke13:7 Woyne atakilte ooththizayssas
Luke13:8 Izikka zaaridi
Luke13:9 Yiza layththas iza ayfikko lo7o; ayfontta ixxiko qanxxandasa› » gides.
Luke13:10 Yesusi Sambata gallas issi Ayhuda Woosa Keeththan tamaarsishin
Luke13:11 tammanne osppun layth kumeth iita ayanay oykkidi asateththaa pacisida issi maccassaya heen dawus; izakka zokkoy quunnida gishshas mulekka dhoqqu gaanaas dandayukku.
Luke13:12 Yesusi izo be7idaappe guye xeygidi
Luke13:13 Yesusi ba kushe izi bolla woththiin iza heerakka sitti gaada eqqadus; Xoossaaka galatadus.

Luke13:15 Godaykka zaaridi
Luke13:16 Histtiin hanna maccassaya Abrahaame naa gidada tammanne osppun layth kumeth Xala7ey qachchiin dizasoppe Sambata gallas birshettanaas izis bessennee?» gides.
Luke13:17 Yesusi hizgi oychchida wode izara eqettizayti wurikka yeellatida; gido attiin derey wurikka izi oychchida malalisiza oyshan ufayettides.

Luke13:19 Issi asi Sanafice geetettiza miththa ayfe ba gaden tokkiin mokka diccada gita gidiin kafoti izi hagga giddon duussaso giigsana gakkanaas diccida sanafice mith misatawus» gides.
Luke13:20 Qasseka
Luke13:21 Issi maccassi munuqa caalisanaas daro dhiillera walakkida guuththa irsho misatawus» gides.
Luke13:22 Hessafe guye Yesusi Yerusalaame bishe kanththi biza katamaninne gutatan asaa tamaarsishe aadhdhishin
Luke13:23 issaadey izakko shiiqidi
Luke13:24

Luke13:26 «Intteka izas zaaridi
Luke13:27 «Izikka zaaridi
Luke13:28 «Intte Abrahaame

Luke13:31 He wode Farsaawetappe issi issi asi yiidi
Luke13:32 Yesusi isttas

Luke13:34 «Hanne Yerusalaame nabeta wodhizaaree! Neekko kiitettidayta shuchchara caddizaaree! Kuttoy ba ciyeta ba qefe gars shiishshiza mala ne nayta shiishshanaas aappun wode koyadinaashin ne gidikko akkay gadasa.

Luke14:1 Issi gallas Yesusi quma maanaas Farsaaweta halaqatappe issaa soo gelida wode asay wuri Yesusi ay ooththanaakko giidi ayfe iza bolla tokki xeellides.
Luke14:2 Heenkka izas asateththay puuriin waayettiza issi asi iza sinththan dees.
Luke14:3 Yesusikka Muse wogaa erizaytanne Farsaaweta
Luke14:4 Isttika co7u gida; izikka addeza bochchidi paththi yeddides.
Luke14:5 Qasseka
Luke14:6 Isttika oyshaas aykko zaarokka demmanaas dandaybeettenna.
Luke14:7 Xeygettida asati uttanaas bonchchoso koyishin Yesusi be7idi leemisora isttas
Luke14:8 «Issi asi nena sarges xeygikko bonchchoson uttofa; neeppe bollara bonchchettizaadey xeygettiko
Luke14:9 inttena nam7atakka xeygidaadey yiidi
Luke14:10 Gido attiin ne xeygettida wode ziqqaso xeellada utta; nena xeygidaadey yiidi
Luke14:11 Gaasoykka bana dhoqqu histtizaadey wuri ziqqi gaana; bana ziqqi histtizaadey wuri dhoqqu gaana» gides.
Luke14:12 Yesusikka xeygida addeza
Luke14:13 Gido attiin asaa xeyssada mizana koykko manqota
Luke14:14 Xeygettidayti kushe zaaranaas dandayontta gishshas xillota denththa wode nees kushey zaarettana» gides.

Luke14:16 Yesusikka
Luke14:17 «Gibira maana wodeykka gakkiin xeygettida imaththata
Luke14:18 Gido attiin wurikka baas hara gaaso shiishshidi issoy
Luke14:19 «Hankkoyssika
Luke14:20 «Qasse hara issaadeyka
Luke14:21 «Oosanchchazi kiitettidasoppe simmidi heedzdzati gidayssa ba godaas yootides; he wodekka gibira giigsidayssi hanqettidi oosanchchaza
Luke14:22 «Oosanchchazikka zaaridi
Luke14:23 «Godazikka oosanchchaza
Luke14:24 Tani tuma gays; gibiraa maana xeygettidaytappe issaadeyka doonan gelththenna› » gides.

Luke14:26 «Taakko yizay wuri ba aawaa

Luke14:28 «Inttefe issi asi keeththe keexxanaas koykko polanaas dandayanaakkonne dandayonttaakko koyrottidi baas diza bira qopponttay oonee?

Luke14:30 Isttika
Luke14:31 «Woykko issi kawoy hara kawora olas giigettidi nam7u tammu shii as ekki yiza kawo zaaranaas tammu shii ola asara zaaranaakko uttidi qopponttay oonee?
Luke14:32 Ola zaaranaas dandayetontta misatidi beettiko buro haahon dishin maqaynnanaas gaanna yeddees.
Luke14:33 Hessaththoka inttefe oonakka gidiin baas dizayssa aggonttay tana kaallizaade gidanaas dandayenna.
Luke14:34 «Maxiney lo7oshin ba maxineteththaa mal7o yeddiko zaaridi waani mal7ana dandayzee?
Luke14:35 Gaden yeggiin aradisontta gishshas coo kare wora yegettees; siyiza hayththi diza asi siyo!» gides.
Luke15:1 Issi gallas qaraxa shiishshizaytinne nagaranchchati wuri Yesusappe siyanaas iza achchi shiiqida.
Luke15:2 Farsaawetinne Xaafeti
Luke15:3 Yesusikka isttas leemiso hizgi yootides;
Luke15:4 «Intte giddofe issaades xeetu dorsi diikko he xeetu dorsatappe issina dhaykko attida uddufun tammanne uddufunata demban yeggidi dhaydayssa demmana gakkanaas koyana bonttay oonee?
Luke15:5 Demmidi ufayssara hashen tookki ekkidi
Luke15:6 baso simmees; ba laggetanne guta asata issi bolla xeygidi
Luke15:7 Ta inttes yootays
Luke15:8 «Woykko issi tammu bira santey diza maccassaya he tammaafe issineya dhaykko xomppe oyththada demmana gakkanaas keeththa gars pittada lo7eththa koyontta maccassi oonee?
Luke15:9 Izakka demmida wode ba laggetanne ba gutata issife xeygada
Luke15:10 Ta inttes yootays; ‹Hessaththoka maarotan geliza issi nagaranchcha asan Xoossa kiitanchchata achchan ufays gidana.›
Luke15:11 «Issaades nam7u nayti deettes.
Luke15:12 Isttafekka kaalo naazi ba aawaa
Luke15:13 «Daro wode gam7ontta dishe kaalo naazi ba miishshaa ubbaa shiishshi ekkidi haaho biitta bides; heenkka baas diza miishshaa go7ay baynda coo mela dhayssides.
Luke15:14 Izikka baas dizayssa ubbaa dhayssidaappe guye he biittan iita koshay dendiin daro waayettides.
Luke15:15 Hessa gishshas he deren diza asaappe issaadeko shiiqides; izaadeyka ba guddunth heemmana mala guddunth heemmizasoho yeddides.
Luke15:16 Naazikka guddunththati miza harqqozappe maanaas amottides shin hessaka immizaadey beettibeenna.
Luke15:17 «Gido attiin iza wozinay simmida wode
Luke15:18 Dendada ta aawa soo baada aabboo! Salon Xoossaa
Luke15:19 Hayssafe guye
Luke15:20 Hessa gishshas dendidi ba aawaakko bides; gido attiin buro izi haahora yishin aaway beyi mishettidinne izakko woxxi biidi idimmi oykkidi yeerides.
Luke15:21 «Naazikka
Luke15:22 «Gido attiin aaway ashkaratas
Luke15:23 Modhdho mirgo boora ehidi shukkite; ane miidi ufayettoos.
Luke15:24 Hayssi ta naazi hayqqides shin paxides; dhaydes shin beettides› gides; hessafe guye ufayeteth oykkida.
Luke15:25 «Hessi haniza wode bayra naazi goshshason dees; heeppeka simmidi soo matida wode diiththa duris siyides.
Luke15:26 Izikka ashkaratappe issaa xeygidi
Luke15:27 Ashkarazikka
Luke15:28 «Bayra ishazikka hanqettidi soo gelanaaska koyibeenna. Aawaykka kare kezidi izi soo gelana mala woossides.
Luke15:29 Gido attiin izikka zaaridi aawaas
Luke15:30 Gido attiin hayssi ne naazi nees dizayssa ubbaa laymatizaytara wursidi yishin modhdho mirgo boora izas shukkadasa› gides.
Luke15:31 «Aawaykka
Luke15:32 Hayssi ne ishay hayqqides shin paxides; dhaydes shin beettides; hessa gishshas nuni ufayettanaas bessees› gides.»
Luke16:1 Yesusi bana kaallizaytas
Luke16:2 Dure addezi he addeza xeygidi
Luke16:3 «Keeththaa ayssiza addezi ba wozinara
Luke16:4 tani alaafeteththaafe kezikko asay tana mokki ekkana mala ooththana oge ta erays.
Luke16:5 «Hessa gishshas iza godaa acoy istta bolla diza asata issaa issaa xeygides. Koyro yidayssa
Luke16:6 « ‹Issi xeetu xaaro kumeththa zaytey ta bolla dees› gides; alaafezi zaaridi kase ne faramida waraqataa hey ekka uttada elle ichchashu tammu xaaro gaada xaafa gides.
Luke16:7 «Kaallidi hankkoyssa
Luke16:8 «Godazikka shocechchiza alaafezi ooththida cinccateththaa gishshas iza nashshides; hayssabha alameza nayti bana misatizaytara diza gaagoteththan poo7o naytappe aadhdhida cinccata.
Luke16:9 «Hessa gishshas tani inttena gizay ha biittaa miishshay wurida wode mernaa keeththan intte ekettana mala ha7i inttes diza miishshaara inttes lagge medhdhite gays.
Luke16:10 Guuththa miishshan ammanettizaadey daro miishshankka ammanettana; guuththa miishshan ammanettonttaadey daro miishshankka ammanettenna.
Luke16:11 Histtiko intte ha biittaa miishshan ammanettontta ixxiko tuma miishsha hadara oykkite giidi ooni inttes immanee?
Luke16:12 Asa miishshan intte ammanettontta ixxiko inttes buzo gidana miish ooni immanee?
Luke16:13 «Nam7u godaas issito azazettana dandayzaadey oonikka deenna; woykko issaa dosidi issaa ixxees woykko issaakko shiiqidi hankkoyssa leqqees; Xoossassinne miishshas issife gaththi haarettanaas dandayekketa» gides.
Luke16:14 Miish darssi siiqiza Farsaaweti hessa ubbaa siyidi Yesusa qidhida.
Luke16:15 Yesusikka isttas
Luke16:16 «Muse wogaynne nabeti Yohannisi yaana gakkanaas yootishe gam7ida. Hessa kaallidi qasse Xoossa Kawoteththa Mishiraachcho qaalay sabbakettides. Asi wurikka hee gelanaas wadhettees.
Luke16:17 Gido attiin Muse wogappe issi qeerina kunda attanayssafe saloynne sa7ay aadhdhanayssi kawushshe gidana.
Luke16:18 «Ba machcho anjji yeddidi hara macca ekkiza asi wurikka laymatees; ba azinappe anjjetta bidaaro ekkidayssika laymatees.
Luke16:19 «Qasseka Yesusi isttas
Luke16:20 He addeza pengen kumeththa bollay madunth xalla gidida issi Alazaare geetettiza manqo adde dizayssi ichchi dees.
Luke16:21 Izikka he dure addeza keeththan asay kath mishin maaddafe gaden wodhdhiza suuppa maxi maanaas amottees; kanatikka iza madunththaa laacceettes.
Luke16:22 «He manqo addezi hayqqiin Salo Kiitanchchati Abrahaame ki7o ekki bida; qasse dure addezikka hayqqidi moogettides.
Luke16:23 Izi Si7oolen waayettishe dhoqqu giidi haahon Abrahaame xeellides; Alazaarekka ba ki7on oykki dishin be7ides.
Luke16:24 «Dure addezi
Luke16:25 «Gido attiin Abrahaamey
