Acts21:26 Hessafe guye Phawuloosi he oyddu asata banara ekkidi wonteththa gallas isttara bana geeshshides; istti geeyza gallassati aappun gallassikonne issaade issaade gishshas imettiza miish immiza wodey aydekko erisanaas Xoossa Keeththe gelides.
Acts21:27 Laappun gallas kumana matishin Iisiya dereppe yida Ayhuda asay Phawuloosa Xoossa Keeththan be7idi deraa iza bolla denththeththidi iza oykkida.
Acts21:28 «Isra7eele asatoo! Nuna maaddite! Nu asaanne nu wogaa hayssa nu dizasoza cayishenne derey dizason ubbaan asaa tamaarsizayssi hayssi izakko! Hessika gidenna giidi Ayzaabeta Xoossa Keeth gelththidi hayssa geeshshasohoza tunisides» gishe waassida.
Acts21:29 Istti hessa gida gaasoykka hayssafe kase Efesoone yeleta Xirofimoosa izara issife katama giddon be7ida gishshas iza Phawuloosi Xoossa Keeththe ekki gelida misatida gishshassa.
Acts21:30 Kumeththa katamay ba giddon shirotides; derey wuri issife woxxi koyidi Phawuloosa oykki ekki Xoossa Keeththa gibbefe gooshechchi kessides; Xoossa Keeththa pengeti heerakka gordettida.
Acts21:31 Asay Phawuloosa wodhana koyishin
Acts21:32 Hessa gishshas izi wottadaratanne mato halaqata kaaleththidi eeson woxxishe asay dizaso bides; asay olanchchata azazizayssa be7idi Phawuloosa bukaa aggides.
Acts21:33 Mato halaqazi izakko shiiqidi Phawuloosa oykkidi nam7u sansalatan qashettana mala azazidi izi oonakkonne ay ooththidaakko eranaas iza oychchides.
Acts21:34 Dereykka ba giddon baggay hessa
Acts21:35 Phawuloosi pude dhoqqaso gakkishin derey daro hanqon iza bolla meto gaththanaas koyida gishshas wottadarati iza hashen tookki efida.
Acts21:36 Dereykka
Acts21:37 Wottadarati Phawuloosa ba dizaso gelththana matishin Phawuloosi wottadarata azazizayssa
Acts21:38 Histtiin ha7i mata wode dere giddon meto denththeththada shemppo wodhida oyddu shii asaa ekkada bazzo baqatida Gibxe addezi nena diikkii?» gides.
Acts21:39 Phawuloosikka
Acts21:40 Izi haasayana mala ero giin Phawuloosi dhoqqasohon eqqidi asay co7u gaana mala ba kushera malatides; asay co7u giin Isra7eeleta qaalara
Acts22:1 «Ta ishatoo! Ta aawatoo! Ta bolla wordo woththidayssas ta inttes immiza zaaro siyite!»
Acts22:2 Izi Ayhudata qaalara haasayshin siyidi kaseppe asay co7u gides; Phawuloosikka haasayaa gujjidi
Acts22:3 «Tani Kilqiya giddon diza Xarseese kataman yelettida Ayhuda asa; tani dicciday gidikko hannin Yerusalaamena; ta nu aawata wogaa wursa Gamalyaaleppe lo7eththa tamaaradissenne intte hach ooththizayssaththo Xoossas suure wozinappe ooththashe de7adis.
Acts22:4 Hayssa ha ogeza kaalliza asata ubbaa wodhana gakkanaas goodaththiza asakkoshin; maccassatanne addeta qachcha qachcha qasho keeth yeddizaadekoshin.
Acts22:5 Hayssi wuri tumu gididayssa qeeseta halaqatinne dere cimatikka wuri taas markkattana; haray attoshin Damasqon diza ammaniza asaa qachcha Yerusalaame ehada qaxxayssanaas Damasqon dizaytas xaafettida dabdaabe qeeseta halaqatappenne dere cimatappe ekkadis.
Acts22:6 «Tani Damasqo bishininne katamaa gelana matishin seeta gallas ta qoppontta dishin saloppe wolqqama poo7oy tana yuuyi aadhdhi poo7ides.
Acts22:7 He wode tani biitta bolla kundada
Acts22:8 Tanikka
Acts22:9 Tanara issife diza asati poo7oza be7ida attiin izi tanara haasayshin qaalaa siyibeettenna.
Acts22:10 Tanikka
Acts22:11 Poo7oza xolqeteththa daroppe dendidayssan ta xeellanaas dandayabeekke; tanara diza asati ta kushe oykki goochchidi tana Damasqo gaththida.
Acts22:12 «Hanaaniya geetettiza issaadey heen dees; Hanaaniyay Damasqon diza Ayhudata achchan daro galatettidayssanne wogaa bonchchiza asa.
Acts22:13 Izi ta ach shiiqi eqqidi
Acts22:14 Izikka tana
Acts22:15 Izi hessa ooththiday ne be7idayssanne siyidayssa asa ubbaa sinththan izas ne markkattanaassa.
Acts22:16 Histtiin ha7i aazas gam7ay? Dendada iza sunth xeygada xammaqetta; ne nagarappeka meecetta› gides.
Acts22:17 Hessafe guye ta Yerusalaame simmada Xoossa keeththan woossishin ajjuutay taas beettides.
Acts22:18 Godaykka taas qonccidi
Acts22:19 Tanikka izas
Acts22:20 Ne gishshas markkattiza Isttifaanose asay wodhiza wode tanikka he wodhiza asata achchan eqqada istti wodhizayssa tanikka dosadissenne wodhizayta may7oka naagadis› gides.
Acts22:21 Godaykka
Acts22:22 Asay hinno gakkanaas Phawuloosa haasaya wozinappe lo7eththi siyishe aggidi ba qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Acts22:23 Asay waassishe ba may7o qaari qaari wuxxishenne biittaa pude salo dharccides.
Acts22:24 Mato halaqazi hessa be7idi Phawuloosa wottadarati dizaso gelththana mala azazides; dereykka iza bolla aazas hessa mala waassizaakko erana mala iza garafidi paaxisana mala azazides.
Acts22:25 Gido attiin dafon waaxi qachchidi iza garafana giigettishin Phawuloosi ba achchan eqqida issi mato halaqaas
Acts22:26 Mato halaqay hessa siyida mala halaqata azazizayssako biidi
Acts22:27 Hessa gishshas halaqata azazizayssi Phawuloosakko shiiqidi
Acts22:28 Azazizayssika
Acts22:29 Hessa gishshas iza pilggi xeellanaas giigettida asati heerakka iza achchafe haakkida; azazizayssika izi Oroome as sansalatan qachchidayssa yuushshi qoppidi babbides.
Acts22:30 Wonteththa gallas azazizayssi Ayhudati Phawuloosa mootiza ayfe yo7oy aazakko erana koyides; qeeseta halaqatinne Ayhudata shango duulata asay wuri issaadeyka attontta kumeth shiiqana mala azazides; Phawuloosakka qashoppe birshidi shiiqida asaa sinth shiishshi essides.
Acts23:1 Phawuloosi duulata asaa tishshi histti xeellidi
Acts23:2 Qeeseta halaqa Hanaaniyay qasse Phawuloosa doonan shocana mala iza achchan eqqidayta azazides.
Acts23:3 Heerakka Phawuloosi Hanaaniya
Acts23:4 He wode heen diza asay Phawuloosa
Acts23:5 Phawuloosikka isttas
Acts23:6 Phawuloosi heen diza asaappe baggay Saduqaaweta
Acts23:7 Phawuloosi hessa yootida mala Farsaaweta giddoninne Saduqaaweta giddonkka ooshshi dendiin duulatay nam7u kezi shaaketti wodhdhides.
Acts23:8 Gaasoykka Saduqaaweti
Acts23:9 He wode daro shiroy asaa giddon hanides; Farsaaweta baggata gidida issi issi Muse wogaa tamaarzayti dendidi
Acts23:10 Palamay minni minni bida gishshas asay Phawuloosa tarshereththontta mala babbidi halaqata azazizayssi
Acts23:11 Wonteththa gallas leela giddoth Goday Phawuloosa achchan eqqidi
Acts23:12 Gadey wontiin Ayhuda asati shiiqettidi
Acts23:13 Hessa he maqqozan issife gidida asaa qooday oyddu tammaafe bollara dees.
Acts23:14 Isttika qeeseta halaqataakkonne dere cimataakko biidi isttas
Acts23:15 Hessa gidida gishshas intte dere cimatara zorettidi iza keehi pilggi xeellizaa misatidi istti inttes Phawuloosa ehana mala azazizayssa oychchite; nunikka izi haa hanno gakkanaappe kasetidi iza wodhana giigettidos» gida.
Acts23:16 Gido attiin issi Phawuloosas michchi nay hessa istta maqqoza siyida gishshas wottadarati dizaso bi gelidi yo7oza Phawuloosas yootides.
Acts23:17 Phawuloosikka Mato halaqatappe issaa baakko xeygidi
Acts23:18 Mato halaqay naaza waanna azazizayssako ekki gelidi
Acts23:19 Azazizayssika naaza kushe oykki ekkidi haraso pooqqidi
Acts23:20 Naazikka
Acts23:21 Gido attiin ne isttas ero gooppa; gaasoykka
Acts23:22 Azazizayssika
Acts23:23 Hessafe guye wottadarata azazizayssi mato halaqatappe nam7ata xeygidi
Acts23:24 Phawuloosasikka para giigsidi dere haariza Filkisekko lo7on gakkana mala ooththite» gides.
Acts23:25 Dabdaabe hizgi xaafides;
Acts23:26 «Dere haariza bonchcho Filkises
Acts23:27 Hayssa addeza Ayhuda asati oykki wodhana gishin izi Oroome as gididayssa ta gakka erida gishshas wottadaratara gakkada ashshadis.
Acts23:28 Istti iza aazas mootizaakko ta erana koyada dere duulataakko shiishshadis.
Acts23:29 Istti iza bolla shiishshida mootoy ba wogaa gishshas gididayssa eradis; gido attiin iza hayqos woykko qashos gaththiza miishshi deenna.
Acts23:30 Hayssa addeza wodhanaas asay maqettidayssa ta siyida mala heerakka neekko yeddadis; mootizaytikka heen ne sinththan ba mooto shiishshana mala isttas yootadis» gides.
Acts23:31 Hessa gishshas wottadarati ba azazettida mala Phawuloosa qammara efidi Antiphaxiroose geetettizaso gaththida.
Acts23:32 Wonteththa gallas toganchchati Phawuloosara baana mala ooththidi istti qasse guye soo simmida.
Acts23:33 Toganchchati Qisaariya gakkidi dabdaabeza dere haarizayssas immidi Phawuloosa iza sinth shiishshida.
Acts23:34 Dere haarizayssi dabdaabeza nababidinne Phawuloosa
Acts23:35 «Nena mootizayti yishin ta ne yo7o siyana» gides; Herdoosa gibbe gaaththan izi naagettana mala azazides.
Acts24:1 Ichchashu gallassafe guye qeeseta halaqa Hanaaniyay issi issi cimataranne Xarxuloosa geetettiza xabaqaara Qisaariya bides; isttika dere ayssiza Filkisekko shiiqidi Phawuloosa mootida.
Acts24:2 Phawuloosi xeygetti shiiqiin Xarxuloosi iza
Acts24:3 «Hessa ne lo7o oosoza nu awan gidiin aydekka dhoqqu gida bonchchoranne galatara ekkoos.
Acts24:4 Ta ha7i nena gam7isonttanne daaburssontta qaanththara nees yootizayssa kiyateththan nu gizayssa ne siyana mala woossoos.
Acts24:5 «Hayssi addezi nuus iita harge gidides; alamen diza Ayhudata ubbaa bolla meto medhdhees; Naaziraawe geetettiza wordo asata kaaleththiza waannay iza.
Acts24:6 Izi Xoossa Keeththe tunisana gishin nu iza oykkidos. [Nu wogaa mala nu iza bolla pirdana qoppidos;
Acts24:7 gido attiin wottadarata halaqata azazizayssi Lusiyoosi gakkidi nu kusheppe iza wolqqara woththi ekkides.
Acts24:8 Iza mootiza asaykka neekko yaana mala azazides.] Hayssi nu iza bolla shiishshida mootozi wuri tumu gididayssa neni ne baggara iza oychcha gakkanaas dandayaasa» gi mootides.
Acts24:9 Hinko Ayhuda asatikka
Acts24:10 Dere ayssiza Filkisey Phawuloosi haasayana mala ba kushera malati bessides; Phawuloosikka
Acts24:11 Ta Xoossas goynnanaas Yerusalaame biin hach tammanne nam7u gallassafe daronttayssa neni ne baggara eranaas dandayaasa.
Acts24:12 Xoossa Keeththan gidiin Ayhudata Woosa Keeththan woykko katama giddon ta oonarakka palamettishin woykko dere giddon meto medhdhishin tana demmibeettenna.
Acts24:13 Ha7i ta bolla istti shiishshida mootozas ay markkaka shiishshanaas dandayettenna.
Acts24:14 «Gido attiin ta nees qonccisana koyzay istti wordo giza Godaa ogera nu aawantta Xoossaas goynnayssinne Muse wogaaninne nabeta maxaafan xaafettidayssaka ubbaa ammanays.
Acts24:15 Isttika ufays ooththiza mala tanikka nagaranchchatinne xilloti hayqoppe dendanayssa Xoossan ammanettays.
Acts24:16 Hessa gishshas Xoossa sinththaninne asa sinththan sidhey baynda hanoy taas daana mala ubba wode minnays.
Acts24:17 «Ta Yerusalaameppe keziin taas daro layth gididaappe guye ta dere asaas maado miishshenne Xoossas imettiza miishshe ekka yadis.
Acts24:18 Tana istti Xoossa Keeththan demmiday ta hessa gaththishinna; he wode ta geeyza wogaa polishin tanara daro asi deenna; ooshshinne shiroykka deenna.
Acts24:19 Gido attiin Iisiyappe yida issi issi Ayhuda asati deettes; isttaskka tana mootos gaththizaazi dizaa gidikko ne sinththan tana mootetto.
Acts24:20 Hessafe guye tani duulataa sinth shiiqikko ta ooththida qohoy diikko he asati yootetto.
Acts24:21 Tana hayssas gaththida gaasoykka ta istta giddon eqqada
Acts24:22 Filkisey Godaa oge lo7eththi eriza gishshas
Acts24:23 Phawuloosa naagiza mato halaqay
Acts24:24 Guuththa wodeppe kaallidi Filkisey Ayhuda as gidida ba machcheyo Durissillara yides; Phawuloosakka xeygidi Yesus Kirstoosan ammano gishshas izi yootishin siyides.
Acts24:25 Phawuloosi xilloteththa gishshas
Acts24:26 Filkisey Phawuloosappe gubbo ekkanaas ufays ooththi naagida gishshas daro wode gakkanaas xeygi xeygi haasayssides.
Acts24:27 Nam7u layththafe guye Phorqiyoosa Fisxoosi Filkise sohon shuumettides; Filkisey Ayhudata ufayssanaas koyidi Phawuloosa qashoson aggaagides.
Acts25:1 Fisxoosi ba ayssiza dere Qisaariya gelidi heedzdzu gallas aqettidi heeppe Yerusalaame bides.
Acts25:2 Heen diza qeeseta halaqatinne issi issi Ayhudata giddofe gita gita asati Phawuloosa bolla ba mooto shiishshida; «Phawuloosa haa Yerusalaame ehidi
Acts25:3 
Acts25:4 Gido attiin Fisxoosi
Acts25:5 Intte giddofe daannateththi dizayti tanara Qisaariya betto; Phawuloosi ooththida qohoy dizaa gidikko heen mootetto» gides.
Acts25:6 Fisxoosi osppun woykko tammu gallassafe darontta wode isttara gam7idaappe guye Qisaariya bides; hee gakkida mala wonteththa gallas pirda wombora bolla uttidi Phawuloosa baakko shiishshana mala azazides.
Acts25:7 Phawuloosi iza sinth shiiqiin Yerusalaameppe yida Ayhudati Phawuloosa giddoththidi markkay baynda daro deexo mooto iza bolla shiishshida.
Acts25:8 Phawuloosikka
Acts25:9 Gido attiin Fisxoosi Ayhudata ufayssanaas koyidi Phawuloosa
Acts25:10 Phawuloosi qasse izas
Acts25:11 Ta qohidaa gidikko woykko tana hayqos gaththiza qoho ta ooththidaa gidikko ta hayqoppe attana giikke; gido attiin istti shiishshiza mootoy hada gidikko oonikka tana isttas aaththi immanaas dandayenna; tanikka ta yo7oy Qeesaare sinth shiiqana mala
Acts25:12 He wode Fisxoosi bana zorizaytara haasayettidi
Acts25:13 Guuththa gallassatappe guye kawo Agirphaynne Barniqey Fisxoosa
Acts25:14 Istti heen daro gallas uttida gishshas Fisxoosi Phawuloosa yo7oza Kawo Agirphas
Acts25:15 Ta Yerusalaamen diza wode qeeseta halaqatinne Ayhudata cimati ha addeza yo7o taakko ehidi ta iza bolla pirdana mala oychchida.
Acts25:16 Ta qasse
Acts25:17 «Hessa gishshas iza mootizayti shiiqettidi yida mala heerakka wonteththa gallas pirda womboran uttada Phawuloosa ta sinth shiishshana mala azazadis.
Acts25:18 Iza mootizayti iza achchan eqqida wode istti iza bolla shiishshida mootoy ta baggara izi iita ooththontta aggenna gaada qoppida mala gidibeenna.
Acts25:19 Gido attiin istti izara mootettizay ba ammano gishshassinne Phawuloosi hayqqidayssa
Acts25:20 Tanikka hessa mala yo7o qora xeellanaas tana metida gishshas Phawuloosa
Acts25:21 Histtiin izi yo7ozi Oroome kawo sinththan beyettana mala koyidi
Acts25:22 Agirphay Fisxoosa
Acts25:23 Hessa gishshas wonteththa gallas Agirphaynne Barniqey kawoti may7iza may7o may7idinne daro bonchchora wottadarata halaqataranne he kataman diza gita asatan azhabetti yiidi pirda keeth gelida; hessafe guye Fisxoosi Phawuloosa xeygisides.
Acts25:24 Fisxoosi
Acts25:25 Tahi ta baggara iza hayqos gaththiza issi balakka iza bolla demmabeekke; izi
Acts25:26 «Gido attiin iza gishshas tani ta godaas xaafana giza erettida yo7oy deenna; hessa gishshas iza issi issi paace oyshata oychchiko taas xaafanayssi daanakkonne gaada intteko
Acts25:27 Gaasoykka qasho asi pude bollatiza dhoqqa daannako bishin izi mootettiza yo7o qonccisontta agoy asa eeya kessizayssi taas beettides» gides.
Acts26:1 Agirphay Phawuloosa
Acts26:2 «Kawo Agirphaa! Tana Ayhudati mootiza yo7o ubbaas hach ta ne sinththan tana maaddana zaaro immiza gishshas tana daro ufayssees.
Acts26:3 Gaasoykka ne Ayhudata wogaanne istta palama ubbaa lo7eththa eraasa; hessa gishshas ne ta gizaa ubbaa dandayada siyana mala ta nena woossays.
Acts26:4 «Tani guuththa naateththa wodeppe doommada waana de7idaakko Ayhuda asati ereettes; koyroppe ha7i gakkanaas tani ta dere asaa giddoninne Yerusalaamen ta de7ida duus asay erees.
Acts26:5 Qasseka istti markkattana koykko nu ammano gishshas ta keeha minththa wogaa naagiza Farsaawe bagga gidada gam7idaade gididayssa istti koyroppe denththidi ereettes.
Acts26:6 Ha7i qasse pirdas tana hayssan essiday Xoossi kase nu aawatas immida caaqo qaalaa ufayssa gishshassa.
Acts26:7 Ha ufayssaako gakkanaas nu zarkketi tammanne nam7ati gallassinne qamma Xoos goynnishe naagida; kawo inttes hoola! Ayhudati tana mootizay ha yo7oza gishshassa.
Acts26:8 Xoossi hayqqidayta denththanayssi waanidi Ayhuda gidida intte achchan ammanettibeennee?
Acts26:9 «Tanikka ta baggara Naazirete Yesusa sunththas eqettanaas bessees gaada qoppadis shin;
Acts26:10 tani Yerusalaamen ooththidaykka hessakoshin; qeeseta halaqatappe ta ekkida godateththara ammanizaytappe darota qasho keeththan yegisadis; istta wodhishin wodhizaytara issife days.
Acts26:11 Daro wode Ayhudata Woosa Keeththati dizason awanka istti qaxxayettana malanne ba ammano kaddana mala ooththadis; istta bolla daro hanqettadakka Isra7eeleppe karen diza hara katamatakka baada ammanizayta gooddadis.
Acts26:12 «Hayssa ha yo7ozas qeeseta halaqatappe kumeththa godateththinne azazo ekkada Damasqo geetettizaso ta bishin
Acts26:13 Kawo inttes hoola! Buro ta ogen dishin gadey seeta gallas gidishin arshe poo7oppe aadhdhiza poo7o beyadis; he poo7oy tananne tanara biza asata yuuyi aadhdhidi saloppe poo7ides.
Acts26:14 Nu wurikka biitta bolla kundi dishin Ayhudata qaalara
Acts26:15 «Tanikka
Acts26:16 Ha7i dendada ne tohon eqqa; ta nees qoncciday ne tana ha7i be7idayssaninne sinththafe ta nena bessanayssan ne taas markkattizaade gidana mala ta nena shuumana koyadis.
Acts26:17 Isra7eele asaa kusheppenne ta nena isttako kiittiza Ayzaabeta kusheppeka ashshana.
Acts26:18 Ne istta ayfe doyana malanne dhumappe poo7on kessana mala qasseka Xala7es haarettizasoppe Xoossako ne zaarana mala ooththana; isttika tana ammanida gishshas ba nagarappe maarettana; qasse doorettidayta giddon istti xinxxo demmana› gides.
Acts26:19 «Hessa gishshas kawo Agirphaa! Saloppe taas imettida ajjuutaas ta azazettadis.
Acts26:20 Gido attiin ta kasetada Damasqon diza asaa kaaleththada Yerusalaameninne Yuhuda dere ubbaan dizayta qasseka Ayzaabetikka nagara ogeppe Xoossako simmidi maarettana mala erisadis; istti nagarappe simmidayssa bessizaaz ooththana mala ta isttas yootadis.
Acts26:21 Hessa gaason Ayhudati tani Xoossa Keeththan dishin tana oykkidi wodhana koyida.
Acts26:22 Hach gakkanaaska taas Xoossafe maadoy pacci erenna; hessa gishshas guuththaska gitaska markkattashe hayssan eqqadis; nabetinne Musey kasetidi hayssa malay hanana gidayssa yootoppe attiin ta hara aykkoka yootabeekke.
Acts26:23 Isttika yootidayssi
Acts26:24 Phawuloosi hessa yootishin Fisxoosi
Acts26:25 Phawuloosi gidikko izas
Acts26:26 Ta iza sinththan qonccera yootida kawoy hayssa yo7oza erees; hayssika qotara oosettonttayssa gidida gishshas kawoy eranayssa ta ammanettays.
Acts26:27 Kawo Agirphaa! Nabeta ammanaasa gidikkii? Ne ammanizayssa ta erays» gi zaarides.
Acts26:28 Agirphayka Phawuloosa
Acts26:29 Phawuloosikka izas zaaridi
Acts26:30 Hessafe guye kawoy
Acts26:31 Istti heeppe kezi bishe ba giddon
Acts26:32 Agirphayka Fisxoosa
Acts27:1 Nuni Xaalaane dere markaben baana mala geetetti qashettida gishshas Phawuloosanne hara qasho asatakka kawo Awugisxoossa wottadaratappe gidida Yuuliyoosa geetettiza mato halaqaas aaththi immida.
Acts27:2 Iisiya abba achchan diza dereta biza markaben gelidi bidos. Tasolonqen diza issi Maqidooniya as Arisxirokoosa geetettizayssi nunara dees.
Acts27:3 Wonteththa gallas Sidoona geetettizaso gakkidos; Yuuliyoosi Phawuloosas lo7o gidida gishshas Phawuloosi ba laggetakko biidi asay izas koshshiza maado ooththana mala piqaade immides.
Acts27:4 Heeppe dendi nu bishin sinththa baggara carkoy nu bolla carkiza gishshas abba giddon diza Qophiroose deren geemettidi sinththe bidos.
Acts27:5 Kilqiya geetettizasonne Phinfiliya geetettiza dere achchan diza abbaa pinnidi Looqiya deren diza Muura geetettiza katama gakkidos.
Acts27:6 Heen mato halaqay Xaalaane dere biza Iskindiriya dere markabe demmidi nuna izan gelththides.
Acts27:7 Daro gallas loddu gi biidi daro waayettidi Qandoose geetettiza katamaa ach gakkidos; carkoyka nu sinth bontta mala diggiin Salmmoona achchara aadhdhidi Qarxeese geetettiza abbaa giddon diza deren geemettidi bidos.
Acts27:8 Daro waayettidi lanqe lanqe oykki nu aadhdhidaappe guye Laasiya geetettiza katama achchan diza
Acts27:9 Nu biza oge bolla daro daaburan xooma wodey aadhdhida gishshas ha7i abba bollara baanaas daro meto gidida gishshas Phawuloosi banara diza asay naagettana mala hizgides;
Acts27:10 «Asoo! Hayssafe nu kaallidi baana buussay daro metora dizayssi taas beettees; markabezan diza caanaza bollanne markabeza bolla xalala gidontta asa shemppo bollaka gita qohoy gakkana.»
Acts27:11 Mato halaqay qasse Phawuloosa zoreppe bollara markabeza laaggiza waannazinne markabeza goday gizayssa siyides.
Acts27:12 He markabey eqqizasoy balgoy aadhdhana gakkanaas markabes lo7o shemposo gidontta gishshas dariza bagga asay
Acts27:13 Dugeha baggara guuththa carkoy carkishin be7idi istti qoppida mala hananaa misatiin baana kezida; markabey eqqizasoppe baana dendidi Qarxeese achchara lanqe lanqe oykkidi aadhdhi bida.
Acts27:14 Gido attiin guuththa wodeppe guye
Acts27:15 Markabeza carkoy sugiin carkaara eqettanaas dandayontta ixxiin nu co7u giidi carkoy efizaso bidos.
Acts27:16 Qeedda geetettiza abba giddon diza dere dizaarin geemettidi nu bishin daro waayettidi markabeza qeeri wogoloyin oykkidi essanaas dandaydos.
Acts27:17 Markabeza laaggizayti qeeri wogoloyo markabezaakko goochchi kessidi markabeza wodorora xaaxida; markabezikka Sirtise geetettiza abba acey dari dizason kundontta mala babbidi iza bolla diza sharaa woththidi carkon laagetti bida.
Acts27:18 Gote carkoy minni bida gishshas wonteththa gallas markabezan caanettida miishshata issaa issaa abba giddo yegeth oykkida.
Acts27:19 Heedzdzanththo gallas markabezas koshshiza miishshatakka ba kushera kessi kessi yeggida.
Acts27:20 Daro wode gakkanaas arsheka
Acts27:21 Asay kath montta daro gallas uttides; hessa gishshas Phawuloosi asaa giddon eqqidi
Acts27:22 Ha7ikka markabezi xalla qohettana attiin inttefe issaade shemppoyka dhayenna; hessa gishshas aykkoy baa; babbofte gaada tani inttena zorays.
Acts27:23 Qamma omars ta izas gidida ta goynniza Xoossay kiittida kiitanchchay ta achchan eqqidi
Acts27:24 ‹Phawuloosaa! Babbofa! Ne Qeesaare sinththan eqqana bessees; hekko nenara issife bizayta wursi Xoossi ne gishshas hayqoppe ashshana› giidi taas yootides.
Acts27:25 Hessa gishshas intteno ha asatoo aykkoy baa; Xoossi taas hayssa yootidayssa polanayssa ta ammanays.
Acts27:26 Gidikkoka hayssi gote carkozi gede issi abba giddon diza dere ach efidi nuna yeggana» gides.
Acts27:27 Tammanne oydanththo qamma Andirya Abba giddon carkoy nuna waayisishin bishe leela giddoth markabeza laaggizaytas abbaafe biitta bolla gakkidaa misatides.
Acts27:28 Hessa gishshas abbaa ciimmateth eranaas abbaan yeggi xeelliza wodoro istti yeggi xeellishin abbaa ciimmateththi oyddu tammu metire keena gidi beettides; gam7ishe ha7ikka yeggiin heedzdzu tammu metire keena ciimma gididayssa demmida.
Acts27:29 Nu diza markabey abbaa gaxan diza zaalla shuchchara icetontta mala babbidi markabezappe guye baggara markabezi qaaxxontta mala naagiza dhishke duge abbaa giddo yeggida; hessafe guye isttas qammay wonttana mala woosa oykkida.
Acts27:30 Markabeza laaggizayti markabezappe kezidi baqatana koyida gishshas markabezappe sinththa baggara markabe naagiza dhishke yeggizaa misatidi markabeza bolla diza qeeri wogoloyo duge abbaa giddo yeggida.
Acts27:31 He wode Phawuloosi mato halaqaanne wottadarata
Acts27:32 Hessa gishshas wottadarati wogoloyo oykkida wodoroza qanxxi yeggiin iza abbaa bolla tookettana mala yeddi aggida.
Acts27:33 Gadey wonttana gishin wurikka kath maana mala Phawuloosi istta
Acts27:34 Hessa gishshas intte kath maana mala ta inttena woossays; intte miikko minnana; mulekka aykko qohoykka intte bolla gakkenna» gi woossides.
Acts27:35 Izi hessa gidaappe guye kath ekkidi Xoos galatidi ubba asaa sinththan kath muus oykkides.
Acts27:36 He wode wurikka minettidi kath mida.
Acts27:37 Markabeza giddon diza asay wuri nam7u xeetanne laappun tammanne usuppuna.
Acts27:38 Wurikka mi kaallidaappe guye markabaan caanettida gistteza duge abbaa giddo yeggidi markabeza deexo kawushshida.
Acts27:39 Gadey wontiin ba dizaso eribeettenna; gido attiin acey dizaso abba kurqunthu demmida; isttas dandayettizaakko markabeza hee sugi shiishshana qoppida.
Acts27:40 Markabeza oykkiza dhishke qanxxidi abba giddo yeggida; he wode markabe laggeza miishshaa oykkida wodorota birshida. Ha baggara diza sharaa carko bagga dhoqqu histtidi kezana abba gaxa bida.
Acts27:41 Gido attiin markabezi daro acey koretti uttidayssara icettidi duge gufannides; sinththa bolla duge gufanni dhishkettidi qaaxxonttayssa gidides; qasse abba dambalay daroppe dendidayssan guye baggara meqereteth oykkides.
Acts27:42 Qasho asaappe issaadeyka abbaan wodhdhidi kessi ekkontta mala wottadarati wodhana qoppida.
Acts27:43 Mato halaqay qasse Phawuloosa ashshanaas koyida gishshas istta qofaa ekkana koyibeenna; gido attiin haaththe wadhdhi erizayti markabezappe duge abbaan guppi guppi wodhdhidi biitta bolla kezana mala azazides.
Acts27:44 Hankko attidayti sanqqataninne markabe meqotan abbaa pinnana mala azazides; hessaththo hanidi wurikka saron abbaa giddofe biittaa bolla gakkida.
Acts28:1 Nu biittay dizaso saroteththan gakkidaappe guye nu gakkida abbaa giddon diza derey Melaaxiya geetettiza dere gididaaro eridos.
Acts28:2 He dereyin diza asay daro malalisiza kiyateth nuus ooththides; he wode iray bukkida gishshassinne meego gidida gishshas tama eeththidi nuna mokki ekkida.
Acts28:3 Phawuloosi afira geetettiza mith shiishshidi taman gujjiin tama seelappe dendidayssan shooshshi kezidi iza kushe bolla xaaxettides.
Acts28:4 Malta asay shooshshi Phawuloosa kushe bolla xaaxettidayssa be7idi
Acts28:5 Phawuloosi qasse shooshshaa duge taman qoqofi yeggidi aykkoka hanibeenna.
Acts28:6 Asaykka
Acts28:7 He nu dizaso matan abbaa giddon diza dereyo ayssiza Pupulyoosa geetettizaades gadey dees; he addezi nuna mokki ekkidi bason heedzdzu gallas gakkanaas lo7eththi imattides.
Acts28:8 Heen Pupulyoosa aawa miishshaynne guso hargey sakkiin ichchidi dees; Phawuloosi izakko gelidi izas woossidessinne iza bolla ba kushe woththidi paththides.
Acts28:9 Hessi hessaththo handaappe guye he dereyin diza hara harganchchati yiidi paxida.
Acts28:10 Asaykka nuus daro miish ehidi nuna bonchchizayssa nuna bessides; nuni markaben baana dendiin nuus koshshizayssa markaben ubbaa caanida.
Acts28:11 Nu Milixinen heedzdzu agina gam7idaappe guye balgoy aadhdhana gakkanaas abba giddon diza dereyin gam7idi Iskindiriyappe yiza markaben gelidi baana dendidos; he markabeza bolla Diyosiqoroosa geetettiza nam7u mentte eeqata misley dees.
Acts28:12 Sirakuuse geetettiza katama gakkidi heen heedzdzu gallas gam7idos.
Acts28:13 Heeppe abbaa bollara biidi Eregiyoome geetettiza katama gakkidos; heen issi gallas aqidi duge baggara yiza carkoy carkida gishshas nam7anththo gallas Puttiyoloose geetettizaso bidos.
Acts28:14 Heen ammanizayta demmidi isttara nu laappun gallas gakkanaas uttana mala nuna woossida; heeppe qasse Oroome bidos.
Acts28:15 Oroomen diza ammaniza asay nu gishshas siyidi Apiyoose geetettiza giyanne «Heedzdzu Aqosota» geetettizaso gakkanaas nuna mokkana yida; Phawuloosaykka istta be7idi Xoos galatidessinne minettides.
Acts28:16 Nuni Oroome gelida wode Phawuloosa naaganaas issi wottadaray izas imettiin Phawuloosi barkka daana mala izas Piqaadey imettides.
Acts28:17 Heedzdzu gallassafe guye Phawuloosi Oroomen diza Ayhudatappe gita asata baakko xeygisides; isttika izakko shiiqiin
Acts28:18 Oroome asati tana qori oychchidaappe guye tana hayqos gaththiza miish demmontta aggida gishshas birshi yeddana koyida.
Acts28:19 Gido attiin Ayhuda asay ta bolla issi wosoy baynda yeddetontta mala eqettiin ta yo7oy Qeesaare sinth shiiqidi beetto gaanaas taas gidde gidides; gido attiin tani ta dereta mootiza gaasoykka taas deenna.
Acts28:20 Ta qasse ha7i inttena xeygisiday inttena beyanaassinne hanno inttes yootanaassa; hayssa sansalatan tani qashettiday Isra7eele naytas imettida ufayssaa gaasonna» gides.
Acts28:21 Isttika izas
Acts28:22 Hayssa ne kaalliza ammanoza gishshas awanka asay iita haasayzayssa nu eroos; hessa gishshas ne qofay aazakko nu siyana koyoos» gi zaarida.
Acts28:23 Bare izas immidi hara gallas kushe kumidi izi diza keeththe yida; izikka malladoppe omars gakkanaas Xoossa Kawoteththaa gishshas markkateththan ba qofaa isttas qonccisides. Muse wogappenne nabeta maxaafatappe xaqqasi xaqqasi Yesusa gishshas isttas qonccisi yootides.
Acts28:24 Isttafe issi issi asati izi yootida qaalaa ammanida; baggayti qasse ammanibeettenna.
Acts28:25 Isttika ba giddon issoy issaara qofan gaaggontta shaakettida; Phawuloosi wurseththan yootishe
Acts28:26 Izi yootida qaalay
Acts28:27 Gaasoykka he asata wozinay muumides; istta hayththayka tullides; istta ayfey qooqides. Hessaththo hanonttaako istti ba ayfera be7idi
Acts28:28 «Histtiko Xoossi as ashshiza kiitay Ayzaabetaska kiitettidayssa intte erite; isttika ero giidi ekkeettes» gides.
Acts28:29 Phawuloosi hessa yootidaappe guye Ayhuda asati ba giddon daro palamettishe kezi bida.
Acts28:30 Phawuloosi kiratida keeththaan nam7u layth kumeth de7ides; baakko yiza as ubbaa mokki ekkides.
Acts28:31 Xoossa kawoteth sabbakon Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas oonikka iza diggontta xalateththara asaa tamaarsides.
Romans1:1 Yesus Kirstoosa ayllenne Hawaare gidanaas xeygettida Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootanaas Phawuloosappe kiitettida kiita.
Romans1:2 He mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas kase nabeta baggara Geeshsha Maxaafatan ufayssi imettides.
Romans1:3 Mishiraachcho qaalaykka ba naaza gishshas izi asho baggara Dawite zereththafe gididayssa yootiza gishshassa.
Romans1:4 Hessaththoka nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi ba geeshshateththa Ayanan hayqoppe dendidayssi izi Xoossa naa gididayssi gita wolqqan qonccides.
Romans1:5 Kirstoosa sunththaa gishshas ammanontta derey ammanana malanne azazettana mala iza baggara nuni hawaarateththas gaththiza kiyateth ekkidos.
Romans1:6 Intteka Yesus Kirstoosayta gidana mala xeygettidaytara deeta.
Romans1:7 Xoossan dosettidaytanne geeshshata gidanaas xeygettida Oroome biittan diza inttes ubbaas nu Aawaa Xoossaafenne nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido.
Romans1:8 Intte ammanoy kumeththa alamen siyettida gishshassinne intte gishshas ta Godaa Xoossa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara galatays.
Romans1:9 Ta intte gishshas ubba wode ay mala qoppizaakkonne Xoossa naa mishiraachcho sabbakon ta kumeththa wozinappe izas ooththiza Xoossay taas markka.
Romans1:10 Tani ta woosan ubba wode inttena qoppays; ha7i qasse wurseththan Xoossa shene gidikko ta intteko baana mala Xoossi taas oge doyana mala woossays.
Romans1:11 Intte minnana mala maaddiza Ayana imota ta intte gishshassinne inttena ayfera beyanaas laamotays.
Romans1:12 Hessika intteninne tani issoy issaara ammanon minettanaassa.
Romans1:13 Ta ishatoo! Harason ammanonttayta matan taas hanida mala intte matankka taas ooso ayfey beettana mala daro wode qoppadis shin hanno gakkanaas ta digettada dizayssa intte erana mala koyays.
Romans1:14 Tamaardaytas gidiin tamaaronttaytaska
Romans1:15 Inttes Oroomen dizaytaska tani mishiraachcho qaala yootanaas ta amottizay hessassa.
Romans1:16 Ammanizayti wuri attana mala Xoossa wolqqa gidida gishshas tani mishiraachcho qaalan yeellatikke; hessika koyro Ayhudatas kaallidi Ayzaabetassa.
Romans1:17 «Xilloy Xoossa ammanon dees» geetettidi kase xaafettida mala Xoossa xilloteththi mishiraachcho qaalan qoncciina; he xilloteththay koyroppe wurseth gakkanaas ammanon hanana.
Romans1:18 Tumaa ba iitateththaninne makkallan tucci oykkizayta iitateththaa bollanne istta makkallateththaa ubbaa bolla Xoossa hanqoy saloppe qonccana.
Romans1:19 Istti eranaas bessizaaz Xoossi ubbaa isttas qonccisida gishshas istti Xoos eranaas qoncce gidides.
Romans1:20 Alamey medhettoosofe haa simmiin asa ayfen beetti erontta Xoossa hanoteththi hessika izas diza mernaa wolqqaynne Xoossateththay izi medhdhida medheteththaan qonccen beettees; hessa gishshas asay shiishshana gaasoykka deenna.
Romans1:21 Istti Xoos erikkoka iza Xoossateththaa mala iza bonchchibeettenanne galatibeettenna; gido attiin istta qofay mela go7ay bayndaaz gididessinne yuushshi qoppontta mala istta wozinay dhumides.
Romans1:22 Istti bana
Romans1:23 Mernaa Xoossa bonchcho hayqqiza asaninne kafotan; mehetaninne biitta bolla gooshettiza medheteththatan misatissidi laammida.
Romans1:24 Hessa gishshas Xoossi istta ba giddon issoy issaara barkka ba asateththaan tuna ooso ooththana mala geeshshateththi baynda laymateththas aaththi immides.
Romans1:25 Istti Xoossa tumateth wordon laammida; medhdhida Xoossaa aggidi medheteththas goynnidanne isttas ooththida; medhdhida Xoossi izi mernaas galatettidayssa. Amiin.
Romans1:26 Hessa gaason Xoossi istta yeellachchiza amoteththas aaththi immides; istta maccassati kase losettida gaytoteththa wogaa losey baynda wogan laammida.
Romans1:27 Hessaththoka attuma asay baas bessiza maccassatara zin7anayssa aggidi addey addera zin7anaas amon xuugettidi maccassatara zin7iza mala addey addera zin7idi pala miish ooththida; heytantti barkka ba ooththida iita oosozas bessiza qixaate ba bolla ehida.
Romans1:28 Qasseka istti ba qofara Xoos eroy nuna maaddenna gida gishshas istti ooththanaas bessonttayssa ooththana mala Xoossi istta go7ontta qofas aaththi immides.
Romans1:29 Ubba baggara makkallanne iitateth
Romans1:30 Asa sunth moorizayta
Romans1:31 yuushshi qopponttayta
Romans1:32 «Hessa ooththizayti wurikka hayqqanaas bessees» giza Xoossa wogaa istti erishe heytantta baas ooso xalala gidontta hessaththo ooththizaytakka minththeththeettes.
Romans2:1 Hessa gishshas nenoo hara bolla pirdizaysso neni ta hanni gaason ooththadis giza gaasoykka nees deenna; ne hara asa bolla pirdizayssan nerkka nees kunane ekkaasa; gaasoykka hara asa bolla ne pirdizayssa nekka zaarada iza ooththiza gishshassa.
Romans2:2 Hayta malaata ooththiza asata bolla Xoossa pirday likke gididayssa nu eroos.
Romans2:3 Hessa gishshas ne asa bolla pirdashe he ne pirdizayssa zaara ooththizaade gidikko ne Xoossa pirdafe kessa ekka attana nees misatizee?
Romans2:4 Woykko Xoossa kiyateththi nena maaroteththaako kaaleththizayssa shaakka erontta dashe iza gita kiyateththaanne iza dandaya dureteththaa ne leqqay?
Romans2:5 Gido attiin neni ne wozina muumeteththaninne maaroteth koyontta ne wozina gaason Xoossaa tuma pirday qoncciza wode Xoossa hanqo gallassas ne bolla daro hanqo shiishshaasa.
Romans2:6 Xoossi issaas issaas iza ooso mala immana.
Romans2:7 Lo7o ooso aggontta ooththidi bonchcho sabanne mernaa de7o koyzaytas mernaa de7o immana.
Romans2:8 Gido attiin barkka bana dosizaytassinne tumaa aggaagidi iita kaallizayta bolla pirdaynne hanqoy gakkana.
Romans2:9 Iita ooththiza ay asa bollaka koyro Ayhuda asa bolla
Romans2:10 Gidikkoka lo7o ooththizaades oonaska Ayhuda asas gidiin Ayzaabetas sabay
Romans2:11 Xoossi oonakka shaakki maaddenna.
Romans2:12 Kase wogay eqqontta wode nagara ooththida asay wurikka wogay baynda dhayana; wogay eqqi simmiin nagara ooththidayti wogan oykettidi pirdettana.
Romans2:13 Ays giikko Xoossa achchan xillo geetettizayti eqqida wogaas azazettizaytappe attiin wogaa sis siyizayta xalla gidettenna.
Romans2:14 Wogay baynda Ayzaabeti wogay yootizayssa coo mela hanoteththafe eridi ooththishin isttas wogay baynda aggikokka isttas medheteththa wogay diza gishshas istti ba ooththanayssa ereettes.
Romans2:15 Istta wozinay isttas markkattiza gishshassinne istta qofay istta mootiza gishshas qasseka istta maaddiza gishshas wogay yootizay istta wozinan xaafettidayssa ereettes.
Romans2:16 Hessika ta Mishiraachcho qaalan tamaarsiza mala Xoossi asa wozinan qotettidayssa Kirstoosa baggara pirdiza gallassan qonccisana.
Romans2:17 Ne nena Ayhuda as giikko wogan ammanettaasanne nees Xoossara diza issifeteththaan ceeqettaasa.
Romans2:18 Wogaa kaalliza gishshas Xoossa shene erada kumeth gidizaaz shaakka eridaa gidikko
Romans2:19 ne qooqeta kaaleththizaade; dhuman dizaytas poo7o gididayssa ne ammanettidaade gidikko
Romans2:20 wogaappe ne demmida erateththaninne tumateththan hankko eronttayta zorizaade
Romans2:21 neni harata tamaarso aggada ne hu7es aazas tamaarkkii? Neni hara as kaysotoppa ga sabbakashe nees kaysotay?
Romans2:22 Neni hara asi laymatontta mala yootashe nees laymatay? Nees eeqa ixxaasa shin Xoossa Keeththa miishshaa bonqqay?
Romans2:23 Neni wogaan ceeqettaasa shin wogaa ne baggara ooththontta aggada Xoossa kawushshay?
Romans2:24 Hessika
Romans2:25 Ne wogaa naaga polizaade gidikko qaxxaras go7ay dees; ne wogaa ooththonttaade gidikko qasse ne qaxxaray coo hada.
Romans2:26 Qaxxarettontta dishe wogay gizayssa polikko qaxxarettidaadera gina qoodettennee?
Romans2:27 Nees xaafettida wogaynne qaxxaray nees diikko diza wogaa ne naagonttaade gidikko hankko qaxxarettontta dishe wogaas azazettiday ne bolla pirdana.
Romans2:28 Issaadey coo mela sunththas asa ayfen ta Ayhuda as gidana giikko izi Ayhuda as gidenna; tumappe qaxxereteththi coo karera asho ayfen beettiza qaxxara gidenna.
Romans2:29 Gidikkoka issi asi Ayhuda as gidanaas dandayzay izas gaaththa baggay Ayhuda as gidishinna. Qaxxaraykka qaxxara gidizay xaafettida woga xalala gidontta Ayanan wozinappe gidida qaxxara gidikkoko! Hessa mala asi galata asappe gidontta Xoossafe demmees.
Romans3:1 Histtiko Ayhuda as gideththas aaza go7ay dizee? Qaxxaray ay go7izee?
Romans3:2 Awarakka gidiin go7ay daro; harappe koyro Xoossa qaalay hadara Ayhudatas imettides.
Romans3:3 Isttafe issotas issotas ammanoy baynda aggiko Xoossan ammaneteth diggizee?
Romans3:4 Mulekka diggenna! Asi wurikka wordanchcha
Romans3:5 Nu makkalla oosoy Xoossa xilloteth qonccen bessizayssa gidikko histtiin nu ay gaanee? Coo asa woga mala palamettanaas Xoossi ba hanqo nu bolla ehizayssi nuus bessenna gaaneyee? Hessaka ta gizay asaththo qofanna.
Romans3:6 Tumappe hessaththo hanenna; hessaththo hanizaa gidikko Xoossi alame bolla wostti pirdandee?
Romans3:7 «Ta wordoteththi Xoossa tumateth qonccisizayssan iza bonchcho gede gujjizaa gidikko histtiin ha7i gakkanaas wostti ta bolla nagaranchcha mala pirdettizee?» giidi palamettana asi daana dandayees.
Romans3:8 Hessa guussi
Romans3:9 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Nuni isttafe aadhdhizonii? Mulekka aadhdhoko. Ayhudata gidikkoka
Romans3:10 «Xilloy oonikka deenna; issaadeyka deenna.
Romans3:11 Yuushshi qoppizaadey baa; Xoos koyzay issaadeyka baa.
Romans3:12 Wurikka balettidanne issi bolla go7onttayta gidida. Lo7o ooththizay oonikka baa; issaadeyka deenna.
Romans3:13 Istta doonay doya diza duufo mala; istta doonay ubba wode baleththo haasayees; istta metershay shooshsha marzera dees.
Romans3:14 Istta doonan qanggeththinne camo miishshi kumides.
Romans3:15 Istta tohoy suuth gussanaas eesotees.
Romans3:16 Istta ogen dhayoynne laafateththi dees.
Romans3:17 Istti saroteththa oge erettenna.
Romans3:18 Istta ayfeson Xoossas yashshateththi baa» geetetti xaafettida mala.
Romans3:19 Hessa gishshas doonay wurikka gordettana mala derey kumeth Xoossas zaaro immana mala wogay gizay wurikka wogappe giddora dizaytas gididayssa nu eroos.
Romans3:20 Hessa gishshas wogay nagaray aazakko erisees attiin wogaa naagon oonikka iza achchan xillo geetettanaas dandayenna.
Romans3:21 Ha7i qasse kase nabeti izas markkattidayssi wogaappe karera gidida Xoossa xilloteththi qonccides.
Romans3:22 Hessi Xoossa xilloteththi Yesus Kirstoosa ammanon dummateththi baynda beettiza xilloteththa.
Romans3:23 Gaasoykka asi wurikka nagara ooththides; Xoossa bonchchoyka asa naas paccides.
Romans3:24 Asay Yesus Kirstoosi asa naa gishshas ooththida kiyateththafe dendidayssan coo mela xillides.
Romans3:25 Iza suuththan gidida ammanon nagarappe maarettana yarsho histtidi Xoossi Yesusa shiishshides; izi hessa ooththiday kasetidi polettida nagara qaxxayontta dandayan aadhdhida ba xilloteth bessanaassa.
Romans3:26 Izi hessa ha wodezan ooththiday ba xilloteththaa; hessika ba baggara xillo gidida Yesus Kirstoosan ammanizaade xillisizayssa bessanaassa.
Romans3:27 Histtiin nuni izan ceeqettiza miishshi aazi dizee? Aykko miishshankka ceeqettoko; nu ceeqettana gaasoykka aazee? Wogaa naagiza gishee? Gidenna; ammanonna.
Romans3:28 Ay asikka ammanon attiin wogaa naagon attonttayssa nu geeshshi yootoos.
Romans3:29 Xoossi Ayhudatas xallaa? Ayzaabetaska Xoos gidennee? Ee Ayzaabetaska izi Xoossa.
Romans3:30 Qaxxarettidayssa ammanon qasse qaxxarettonttayssaka he ammanonkka xillisizaykka izi issi Xoossaa xalla.
Romans3:31 Histtiin hessi hessa gidikko ammano gaason wogaa go7ay baynda miish ooththinoo? Mulekka hessaththo hanenna; Wogaa nu minththana attiin.
Romans4:1 Hessa gishshas qasse nu Abrahaamey hayssafe ay go7a demmides giinoo?
Romans4:2 Abrahaamey ba ooson xillidaakko izi ceeqettanaazi izas deesikoshin; izi Xoossa sinththan ceeqettanaas dandayenna.
Romans4:3 Geeshsha Maxaafay
Romans4:4 Issaadey ooso ooththiko izi ekkiza miishshay izas coo kiyateth imettizaaz gidontta izaades ooso waaga gidees.
Romans4:5 Gido attiin ooso ooththontta nagaranchcha asi xillo kessiza Xoossan ammanizaades iza ammanoy izas xilloteththan taybettees.
Romans4:6 Dawitikka xilloteththi izaades qoodettizay lo7o ooson gidontta asa gishshas
Romans4:7 «Isttas istta bala oosoy atto geetettidaytinne nagarappe maarettidayti anjjettidayta!
Romans4:8 Iza nagaraa Goday mulekka qoodonttaadey izi anjjettidayssa!» gides.
Romans4:9 Ha anjjozi qaxxarettidaytas xalalayee? Woykko qaxxarettonttaytassaraa? «Kase koyro nu aawaa Abrahaame ammanoy izas xilloteththan qoodettides» gidos.
Romans4:10 Histtiin waani izas hessaththo qoodettidee? Izi qaxxarettidaappe guyee? Woykko qaxxarettanaappe kasee? Izas xilloteththan qoodettiday izi qaxxarettanaappe sinththana.
Romans4:11 Izi kase qaxxarettanaappe kase demmida xilloteththay qaxxaras malata gidana mala xilloteththas maatame ekkides. Hessa gishshas qaxxarettontta ammanizaytas xilloteththan qoodettana mala ubbatas izi aawa.
Romans4:12 Izi qaxxarettidaytaska aawa; qaxxarettidaytas xalala gidontta nu aawaa Abrahaamey kase qaxxarettanaappe sinththe izas diza ammano geedo kaallizaytas ubbaassa.
Romans4:13 Izi alame laattizaade gidana mala Abrahaameynne iza zereththati ufayssa qaala ekkiday woga baggara gidontta ammanon gidida xilloteththana.
Romans4:14 Woga naagizayti laattizayta gidikko ammanos go7ay deenna; hidotaykka coo hada gidanashin;
Romans4:15 wogay hanqo kaaleththees; wogay bayndason woga menththoy deenna.
Romans4:16 Hessa gishshas hidotay ammanon yides; hessika iza hidotay iza kiyateththan gidana malanne Abrahaame zereth ubbaas ammanettizayssa gidana mala hanides; hessika wogan izayta gididaytas xalala gidontta ammanon Abrahaame nayta gididaytas ubbatassa; izikka nuus ubbaasikka aawa.
Romans4:17 Hessika
Romans4:18 Kase izas
Romans4:19 Abrahaames yelettiin 100 layth gidishin Abrahaamey ba asateththay hayqeththa mala gididayssanne Saaras yelo wodey aadhdhi bidayssa erishekka ammanon leppibeenna.
Romans4:20 Gede gujjidi ammanon minnidi Xoossas bonchcho immides attiin Xoossi gida qaalaa sidhibeenna.
Romans4:21 Xoossi izas immida hidotay polettanayssa kumeththa wozinappe ammanides.
Romans4:22 Hessa gishshas izas xilloteththan qoodettides.
Romans4:23 «Izas xilloteththan qoodettides» giza qaalay xaafettiday izas xalala gidenna.
Romans4:24 Gido attiin Xoossi nu xilloteththaa iza baggara taybiza nu Godaa Yesusa hayqoppe denththidayssan ammaniza nuussarakko.
Romans4:25 Izi nu nagara gishshas hayqqanaas aadhdhi imettides; izi nuna xillisanaas hayqoppe dendides.
Romans5:1 Histtiko nuni ammanon xillida gishshas nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuus Xoossara saroteththi dees.
Romans5:2 Hayssa ha ammanozan minni diza kiyateththan nuni geliday iza baggara gidida gishshas ufayssan Xoossa bonchcho gishetti ekkizayta gidida gishshas nu ufayettoos.
Romans5:3 Hayssan xalala gidontta nuna gakkiza waayenkka ufayettoos. Gaasoykka waayey dandayan gaththizayssa nu eroos.
Romans5:4 Dandayay paacen minoteth immees; paacen minoteththi hidota immees.
Romans5:5 He hidotay qasse nuna yeellachchenna. Xoossi nuus immida Xillo Ayanan ba siiqo nu wozinan gussida gishshas he hidotay nuna yeellan gaththenna.
Romans5:6 Nu daaburanchchata gidi dishin Xoossa wodey gakkida mala Kirstoosi nu nagara gishshas hayqqides.
Romans5:7 Xillo asa gishshas hayqqana asi beettanayssi daro metees. Lo7o asa gishshas hayqqanaas xalana asi oonee erizay beettana dandayees.
Romans5:8 Gido attiin nu buro nagaranchcha gidi dishin Kirstoosi nu gishshas hayqqides; hessika Xoossi nuna siiqiza ba siiqo hessan bessees.
Romans5:9 Nuni iza suuththan geeyidayta gidikko harappeka iza baggara Xoossa hanqofe attana.
Romans5:10 Nu Xoossas morkketa gidi dishin iza naaza hayqon izara giigidayta gidikko nu izara giigidaappe guye iza naaza de7o baggara nuni paxidayssi waani keehi darennee!
Romans5:11 Hessa xalala gidenna; qasseka nuni ha7i izara giiga demmida nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara Xoossankka ufays ooththoos.
Romans5:12 Hessa gishshas nagaray issaade gaason duge ha alameza yida mala hayqoykka nagara gaason yides; hayqoykka hessa baggara asa ubbaakko yides; hessas gaasoykka asi wurikka iza baggara nagara ooththida gishshassa.
Romans5:13 Wogay imettanaappe kase nagaray biitta bolla dees shin wogay bayndason nagaray nagara gidenna.
Romans5:14 Gido attiin Addaameppe haa simmiin Muse wode gakkanaas diza woden Addaame mala woga menththidi nagara ooththonttayta bollaka hayqoy kawotides; Addaamey buro yaana Kirstoosas leemiso.
Romans5:15 Gidikkoka iza kiyateththa imotay asa qoho mala gidenna; issaadey mooridayssan daro asay hayqqikokka Xoossa kiyateththaninne issi as Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththan yida imotay darotas keehi dari imettides.
Romans5:16 Qasseka Xoossa imotay issaade baggara yida nagarappe beettida ayfe mala gidenna; gaasoykka iza pirday issaade nagara kaallidi pirda ekki yides; iza imotay qasse daro qoho gaason xilloteth ehides. Hayqoy issaade baggara kawotidayssa gidikko daro tirpa gidida Xoossa kiyateththinne xilloteththa imota ekkidayti issaade baggara hessika Yesus Kirstoosa baggara xoonidi de7on daana.
Romans5:17 
Romans5:18 Histtiko issaade qoho gaason pirday asa ubbaa bolla gakkida mala hessaththoka issaade xilloteththa ooson as ubbaas de7o immiza xilloteththi beettides.
Romans5:19 Issaadey azazettontta ixxida gishshas daro asay nagaranchcha gidida mala issaade azazeteththan qasse daroti xillana.
Romans5:20 Wogay yiin mooroy darides; gido attiin nagaray daroyssafe bollara Xoossa kiyateththi keehi darides.
Romans5:21 Hessika haniday nagaray hayqo bolla kawotidayssa mala Yesus Kirstoosa baggara qasse mernaa de7oy beettana mala iza kiyateththi xilloteththan kawotanaassa.
Romans6:1 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Xoossa kiyateththi darana mala nagara gujji ooththinoo?
Romans6:2 Mulekka gidenna; nuni nagaras hayqqidos; histtiin hayssafe guye nu waani nagaran daanee?
Romans6:3 Nuni Yesus Kirstoosara issino gidana mala xammaqettidayti iza hayqon nu issife gidanaas xammaqettidayssa hayssa intte erekketii?
Romans6:4 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosi ba Aawaa bonchchon hayqoppe dendida mala nunikka hessaththo ooraththa de7on daanaas xinqatan hayqqidi izara moogettidos.
Romans6:5 Nuni hessa mala hayqon izara issino gidikko qasse denththankka izara issino gidoos.
Romans6:6 Hayssafe guye nuni nagaras aylle gidontta mala nagara asateththay kichchana mala kase nu ceega asateththay izara issife kaqettidayssa nu eroos.
Romans6:7 Gaasoykka hayqqida asi nagarappe shempides.
Romans6:8 Nuni Kirstoosara hayqqidayta gidikko nu izara issife daanayssa ammanoos.
Romans6:9 Kirstoosi hayqoppe dendida gishshas nam7anththo izi hayqqonttayssanne iza bolla hayqos wolqqay bayndayssa nu eroos.
Romans6:10 Izi hayqqida wode issito ubbaa nagara gishshas hayqqides; gido attiin Xoossas paxa duus dees.
Romans6:11 Hessaththoka intte nagaras hayqqidi Xoossas Yesus Kirstoosa baggara paxa dizayssa erite.
Romans6:12 Hessa gishshas iita ooththana koyza iita asho qofa koyidi hayqqida intte asateththaa bolla nagaray kawotana mala ooththofte.
Romans6:13 Intte asateththaa iita ooso ooththiza miish ooththi nagaras haarisopite; hessa mala ooththanaappe hayqoppe gede de7on pinnida asata mala inttena Xoossas haarisite; intte asateththaa xilloteththa miishsha mala Xoossas haarisite.
Romans6:14 Intte Xoossa kiyateththa garsan deeta attiin woga garsan dontta gishshas inttena nagaray haarenna.
Romans6:15 Histtiin ay ooththinoo? Woga garsan gidontta nuni Xoossa kiyateththa garsan diza gishshas nagara ooththinoo? Mulekka ooththanaas bessenna.
Romans6:16 Intte inttena aylle mala shiishshiza wode intte azazettizaades aylle gididayssa ereeta; hessaththoka gede hayqokko efiza nagaras woykko xilloteththako gaththiza azazeteththas intte aylle gididayssa erekketii?
Romans6:17 Intte kase nagaras aylleta gidikko inttes imettida timirtezas intte wozinappe azazettida gishshas Xoossi galatetto.
Romans6:18 Intte nagarappe wozzettidi xilloteththas aylle gidideta.
Romans6:19 Hayssa tani asa qaalan inttes qonccen yootizay intte yeleteththan daaburanchcha gidida gishshassa. Intte kase wode intte asateththaa aylleteththasinne kaseppe aadhdhi iitana mala ooththi immida mala ha7i qasse geeshshateththaako efiza xilloteththas aylle histti haarisite.
Romans6:20 Intte kase nagaras aylletidi diza wode intte xilloteththaafe mela attideta shin;
Romans6:21 ha7i qasse intte yeellatiza miishshatappe he wode ay go7a demmidetii? Hessa he hanozas go7ay hayqo.
Romans6:22 Ha7i qasse intte nagarappe wozzettidi Xoossa aylleta gidideta; hessika inttena geeshshateththaako kaaleththees; wurseththayka mernaa de7o.
Romans6:23 Nagara waagay hayqo; gido attiin Xoossa imotay gidikko Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara mernaa de7o.
Romans7:1 Ta ishatoo! Tani woga eriza asatas yootays; wogay shemppora paxa diza asaa xalala haarizayssa intte erekketii?
Romans7:2 Issi maccassi azina gelikko ba azinara iza wogan qashettizay azinay paxa diza wode gakkanaassa; azinay hayqqiko iza machcho gidiza wogaappe anjjettawus.
Romans7:3 Gido attiin azinay paxa dishin iza hara azina gelikko layma geetettawus; azinay hayqqiko qasse hara as gelikko kase azinaa wogaappe anjjettadus attiin
Romans7:4 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intteka Yesus Kirstoosa asateththa baggara wogas hayqqideta; intte hayqoppe dendida Kirstoosa bagga gidiin nuni Xoossas ayfe ayfanaassa.
Romans7:5 Nagaranchcha medheteththa shenen nu diza wode hayqos gaththiza ayfe nu ayfana mala wogay denththeththida nagara amoy nu bolla ooththides.
Romans7:6 Ha7i gidikko kase nuna waaxi qachchida wogaas hayqqida gishshas he wogaappe wozzettidos; hessika kase ceega wogaan xaafettidayssan gidontta dishe ooraththa Ayana ogen nuni ooththanaassa.
Romans7:7 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Ba hu7es wogay nagaraa? Mulekka gidenna. Woga baggara gidonttaakko nagaray aazakko nu erokko shin; wogay «Amottofa!» gonttaako amoy aazakko tumappe ta erikke.
Romans7:8 Nagaray qasse wogappe kezida azazoy bessida ogen go7ettidi ta giddon dumma dumma iita amo denththeththides; wogay yaanaappe kase nagaray hayqqidaaza.
Romans7:9 Wogay baynda kase tani paxa dayssishin wogay yiin qasse nagaray paxa gidides; ta gidikko hayqqadis.
Romans7:10 As ashshana qofettida azazoykka hayqo ekki yidayssa eradis.
Romans7:11 Nagaray woga baggara beettida gaason go7ettidi tana baleththidessinne azazon wodhides.
Romans7:12 Hessa gishshas wogay ba baggara geeshsha; azazoykka geeshsha; xillonne lo7o.
Romans7:13 Gido attiin lo7os hanidayssi taas hayqos gididee? Mulekka gidenna; gido attiin nagaray ba nagarateththan erettana mala lo7o gidida hano baggara ta bolla hayqo ehides; hessika nagaray azazo baggara kaseppe aaththi nagara darssides.
Romans7:14 Wogay Ayana yo7o gididayssa nu eroos; ta qasse nagaras aylle mala bayzettida asa.
Romans7:15 Tani ta ooththizayssa erikke; ta ooththana koyzayssa ooththa erikke shin ta ixxiza miish ooththays.
Romans7:16 Ta ooththana koyontta miish ooththizaa gidikko wogay lo7o gididayssa ta markkattays.
Romans7:17 Hessa ooththizay tana gidontta ta gaaththan diza nagaray ooththees.
Romans7:18 Tanan hessika nagaranchcha gidida ta medheteththa giddon aykko lo7o miishshi bayndayssa ta erays; lo7o ooththanaas taas amoteththi dees shin pola ooththa erikke.
Romans7:19 Ta ooththizay ooththana gaada koyza lo7o ooso gidenna; gido attiin ta ooththana koyontta iita ooso ooththays.
Romans7:20 Tani ooththanaas koyonttayssa ooththizaa gidikko hessa ooththizay tana gidontta ta giddon diza nagara.
Romans7:21 Hessa gishshas hayssi wogay ooson dizayssi taas gelides. Hessika tani lo7o ooththana koyaysishin iita ooththays.
Romans7:22 Tani ta gaaththara Xoossa wogaan ufayettays.
Romans7:23 Gido attiin ta asateththa giddon ooththiza nagara wogay tana qachchi oykkidi ta qofa wogaara olettiza hara wogay ta asateththa giddon ooththishin beyays.
Romans7:24 Ta ay mala laafa asee! Hayssa hayqos imettida asateththafe tana ashshanay oonee?
Romans7:25 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara galatay Xoossas gido. Histtiko tani ta baggara ta qofan Xoossa wogaas aylle gidashe tani ta medheteththa wogan nagara wogas aylle.
Romans8:1 Hessa gishshas Yesus Kirstoosa ammanizayta bolla pirday deenna.
Romans8:2 Gaasoykka de7o Ayana wogay Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nagarappe istta geeshshida gishshassa.
Romans8:3 Nagaranchcha ashoppe dendidayssan wogay polanaas dandayonttayssa Xoossi ba naaza nagaranchcha asa leemison nagaras yarshettana mala yeddidi polides; histtidi nagara iza ashon pirdides.
Romans8:4 Hessika nuni ashon gidontta Ayanan simerettiza nuuppe wogay koyza xilloteththaa polanaassa.
Romans8:5 Asho shene mala daana koyza asata wozinay ashoy koyza miishshan shempees; Ayana shene mala dizayti qasse ba wozina Ayanay koyza miishsha bolla woththeettes.
Romans8:6 Ashos xalla qofay hayqo gidishin Ayana yo7os qofay gidikko de7onne saroteththa.
Romans8:7 Nagaras haarettiza wozinay Xoossara ooshsha; gaasoykka izi Xoossa wogas haarettennanne haarettanaas dandayenna.
Romans8:8 Asho shene mala diza asatikka Xoos ufayssanaas dandayettenna.
Romans8:9 Intte qasse Xoossa Ayanay inttenan dizaa gidikko ashon gidontta Ayanan deeta; Kirstoosa Ayanay iza bolla bayndaadey Kirstoosas gidenna.
Romans8:10 Kirstoosi intte giddon diikko qasse intte asateththay nagara gaason hayqeth gidikkoka intte Ayanay qasse xilloteththa gaason de7on dees.
Romans8:11 Yesusa hayqoppe denththida iza Ayanay intte bolla dizaa gidikko Kirstoosa hayqoppe denththidayssi intte giddon diza iza ayanay hayqqanaas diza intte asateththas de7o immana.
Romans8:12 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Hessika hananay dosan gidennashin nuni asho shene mala daanaas ashos gidokko.
Romans8:13 Asho shene mala dizaa gidikko intte hayqqana; asho ooso iitaza intte Ayanan wodhikko intte de7on daana.
Romans8:14 Xoossa Ayanan kaallizayti istti Xoossa nayta.
Romans8:15 Intte ekkida Ayanay zaaridi inttena aylleteththan haariza ayana gidontta «Nu Aawawu» gi xeygisiza naateteththa Ayana ekkideta.
Romans8:16 Nuni Xoossa nayta gididayssa he Ayanay ba baggara nu ayanara issife nuus markkattees.
Romans8:17 Nuni Xoossa nayta gidikko iza laattizayta. Nu Kirstoosa bonchchoza laattizayta gidana mala addafekka izara iza metoza gishettizayta gidikko nu Xoos laattizayta; Kirstoosarakka issife laattizayta.
Romans8:18 Ha7i nu ekkiza waayey buro nuus sinththan giigi uttida bonchchozara gaththi xeellishin aykkoka gidenna gays.
Romans8:19 Medheteththi wurikka Xoossa nayti qonccanayssa laamoteththan naagon dees.
Romans8:20 Medheteththi wurikka mela hada gidana mala pirdettides; hessika ba dooron gidontta sinththafes haarettana mala izi ba shene mala haarisida gishshassa.
Romans8:21 Hessika medheteththi wurikka dhayssa aylleteththafe wozzettidi Xoossa naytas gidida bonchchettida shene mala dizaso gakkanaassa.
Romans8:22 Ha7i gakkanaas medheteththi wurikka daro waayen miixattishe dizayssa nu eroos.
Romans8:23 Iza xalala gidontta koyro Xillo Ayana imota demmida nunikka nu asateththay attana; nu iza naa gidanayssaka laamotishenne wozinara miixattishe doos.
Romans8:24 Hayssa ha hidotan xalla attidos; hidotay ayfen beettiza miish gidikko buroppe naagana koshshenna; ha7i ba ayfen be7iza miishshi buroppes naagizay oonee?
Romans8:25 Gido attiin nuni buro nu ayfen be7ontta miish hidotan naagizaaz gidikko saletay baynda naagoos.
Romans8:26 Hessaththoka qasse nu daaburshin Ayanay nuna maaddees; nuni woosa wostti woossanaakko erontta gishshas Ayanay nuni qaalan qonccisanaas dandayettontta qaalara nuus woossees.
Romans8:27 Nu wozina paacci eriza Ayanay izi Ayana qofaa erees; gaasoykka Ayanay Xoossa shene mala ammaniza asaas nuus woossees.
Romans8:28 Xoossi bana dosizaytassinne iza shene mala xeygettidaytas ubbaas ooththiza miish ubbaaka lo7os ooththizayssa nu eroos.
Romans8:29 Xoossi kaseppe ba erizayta istti iza naaza misatana mala kasekka doori woththides; hessika daro ba ishata giddofe izi bayra gidanaassa.
Romans8:30 Kase koyroppe ba dooridayta istta xeygides; qasseka xeygidayta xillisides; ba xillisidaytakka bonchchides.
Romans8:31 Histtiin hessa nu ay giinoo? Xoossi nunara gidikko nunara eqettanaas dandayzay oonee?
Romans8:32 Ba naazas mishettontta nu gishshas aaththi immiday iza; histtiin ubba miish nuus izara kiyateththan wursi aazas immennee?
Romans8:33 Xoossi dooridayta mootizay oonee? Xillisizay Xoossa.
Romans8:34 Histtiin pirdizay oonee? Hayqqidi hayqoppe dendidi Xoossa ushachchan uttida Yesus Kirstoosi nu gishshas gaannatees.
Romans8:35 Nuna Kirstoosa siiqoppe shaakkanay oonee? Metoyee? Waayee? Woykko goodeteththee? Woykko gafaa? Woykko kalloteththee? Woykko qoppontta gakkiza metoyee? Mashshaa?
Romans8:36 Hessika kase
Romans8:37 Nuna aazikka izappe shaakkenna; hayssa ubbaan nuna siiqidayssan xoonizaytappeka nu aadhdhoos.
Romans8:38 Hessa gishshas hayqo gidiin
Romans8:39 dhoqqa gidiin woykko ziqqa gidiin
Romans9:1 Ta Yesusa sunththan tumu gays; wordotikke; ta wozinaykka Xillo Ayana baggara taas markkattees.
Romans9:2 Taas wozinappe kichchontta gita qofaynne mishay dees.
Romans9:3 Ta dabbota gishshas ta qanggetadanne Kirstoosappe shaaketta wora wodhdhidaakko dosays.
Romans9:4 Isttika Isra7eele nayta; istti Xoossa naa gidana mala Xoossa bonchchoynne caaqo qaalay
Romans9:5 Kase Aawatikka istta bagga; Kirstoosi istta zereththa zarkken qoodettees; izikka ubbaafe bolla gidida mernaas galatettida Xoossaa. Amiin.
Romans9:6 Gido attiin hessa guussi Xoossa qaalay attides guus gidenna; Isra7eeleppe yelettiday wuri Isra7eele as gidenna.
Romans9:7 Abrahaameppe yelettidayti izappe yelettida gishshas wurikka iza nayta gidettennashin
Romans9:8 Hessa guussika Xoossa naa geetettidayti istti ashon yelidayta gidettenna; gido attiin naa gidanayti hidota qaalaan yootetti uttidayta.
Romans9:9 «Yiza layth hanni wode ta haa simmana; Saaraykka nees attuma naa yelana» geetettidi izas hidota qaalay imettides.
Romans9:10 Hessa xalalakka gidenna; Irbiqa nayti issaade naakko! Izikka nu aawaa Yisaaqa.
Romans9:11 Mentteti yelettidi buro iita woykko lo7o ooththontta dishin Xoossa qofay minnana mala
Romans9:12 ooson gidontta xeygidayssafe gidida gishshas
Romans9:13 Hessika
Romans9:14 Histtiin nu ha7i ay giinoo? Xoossi bessontta ogera maaddi erizee? Mulekka maaddi erenna.
Romans9:15 Xoossi Muses
Romans9:16 Hessa gishshas asi koyida mala gidontta woykko asa daaburan gidontta Xoossi maarida mala hanees.
Romans9:17 Geeshsha Maxaafay Paaroone
Romans9:18 Hessa gishshas Xoossi maarana koyzaade maarees; iza wozina muumisana koyzaade wozina muumisees.
Romans9:19 Inttefe issaadey
Romans9:20 Gido attiin Xoossas zaaro imos ne oonee? «Oosettida miish zaaridi ooththidayssa ne tana aazas hayssaththo ooththadii?» gi erizee?
Romans9:21 Urqqa medhdhizaadey he urqqaafe baggaa bonchchos
Romans9:22 Xoossika ba hanqo bessanaassinne ba wolqqa erisanaas koyidi iza hanqo qonccisizayta
Romans9:23 Koyro bonchchos giigsida iza maaroteth bessizaytas iza bonchcho dureteththi erettana mala izi ooththanaassa.
Romans9:24 Xeygidaadey Ayhudata baggafe xalala gidontta Ayzaabeta baggafe gidida nunakka ashshontta xeygides.
Romans9:25 Hose7e maxaafan
Romans9:26 Qasseka
Romans9:27 Isayaasikka Isra7eele nayta gishshas
Romans9:28 Goday ba pirdaa biitta bolla elle pirdana» gi yootides.
Romans9:29 Hessika
Romans9:30 Histtiin nu ay giinoo? Ammanon beettida xilloteth demmanaas Ayzaabey daaburontta demmides.
Romans9:31 Gido attiin xilloteththa woga kaalliza Isra7eele nayti demmibeettenna.
Romans9:32 Hessi aazas hessaththo hanidee? Istti ammanon gidontta ooson demmana kaallida gishshassa; isttika dhuphe shuchchan dhuphettida.
Romans9:33 Hessika
Romans10:1 Ta ishatoo! Isra7eele nayta gishshas ta amoynne ta Xoos woossizay istti dhayontta attanaassa.
Romans10:2 Istti Xoossa yo7os mishettizayta gididayssa ta istta gishshas markkattana dandayays; istta misheteththi gidikko erateththan gidenna.
Romans10:3 Xoossi as xillisiza oge erontta aggidi ba xilloteththa oge kaallida attiin Xoossa xilloteththa oge kaallibeettenna.
Romans10:4 Ammaniza asaa ubbaa xillisanaas Kirstoosi woga ubbaa polides.
Romans10:5 Musey woga baggara beettiza xilloteththaa gishshas erisishe
Romans10:6 Ammanon beettiza xilloteththi qasse
Romans10:7 Woykko
Romans10:8 Gido attiin qaalay ay gizee? «Qaalay ne achchan dees.» Ne doonaninne ne wozinan dees
Romans10:9 Neni ne doonara
Romans10:10 Neni xillanay wozinan ammanikko; ne attanay ne doonara markkattiina.
Romans10:11 Geeshsha Maxaafay giza mala
Romans10:12 Ayhudata giddoninne Ayzaabeta giddon dummateththi deenna; issi Goday ubbaasikka Godaa; iza woossizayta gujji anjjees.
Romans10:13 «Godaa sunth xeygizayti wurikka attana» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides.
Romans10:14 Histtiin iza ammanonttayti iza wozgi xeyganee? Qasse iza gishshas siyontta dishe wostti ammananee? Sabaakey baynda dishin wostti siyanee?
Romans10:15 Kiitettontta wostti sabbakandettoo? Hessika
Romans10:16 Gido attiin siyidayti wurikka Mishiraachcho qaalaa ekkibeettenna; Isayaasi
Romans10:17 Hessa gishshas ammanoy beettizay yootiza qaala siyeththana; yootettiza qaalaykka Kirstoosa gishshas yootiza qaalaappe.
Romans10:18 Gido attiin asay siyibeenneeshaa? gaada ta oychchays; tumappe asay siyides; Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala
Romans10:19 Ta qasseka oychchays; Isra7eele nayti qaalaa eribeetteneeshaa? Koyro Musey isttas
Romans10:20 Isayaasikka xalateththan
Romans10:21 Isra7eele gishshas qasse
Romans11:1 Histtiin Xoossi ba dereta yeggi aggidee? Gaada ta oychchays; mulekka aggibeenna; tanikka ta baggara Biniyaame zarkke
Romans11:2 Xoossi koyroppe ba erida dereza yeggibeenna; Eelaasi Isra7eele nayta bolla mooto Xoossaako wostti shiishshidaakko Geeshsha Maxaafay iza gishshas ay gizaakko intte erekketii?
Romans11:3 «Godoo! Istti ne nabeta wodhida; nees yarshizasohotakka laallida; qasse tani tarkka attadis; tanakka wodhana geettes» gides.
Romans11:4 Xoossi izas
Romans11:5 Hessa malakka ha7i ha wodezankka Xoossa kiyateththan Isra7eele asaappe dooretti attida guuththati deettes.
Romans11:6 Histtiin hessi Xoossa kiyateththan attiin asa ooson gidenna; asa ooson gididaakko Xoossa kiyateththi kiyateth gidenna.
Romans11:7 Histtiin ay gaanee? Isra7eele nayti lo7eththi koyidayssa demmibeettenna; Xoossan doorettidayti gidikko demmida; hankko attidayta wozinay muumides.
Romans11:8 Kase
Romans11:9 Dawitikka
Romans11:10 Istta ayfey xeellofo; goozetto; istta zokkoy mernaas kuunno» gides.
Romans11:11 Ane qasse ta zaara oychchays; Isra7eele asay kundeththaafe nam7anththo dendennee? Dendana. Harappeka Isra7eele nayta qanaatissana gishshas istta mooro gaason atoteththi Ayzaabetas gakkides.
Romans11:12 Gido attiin qasse istta mooroy Ayzaabetas anjjo gidides. Istta kundeththika qasse Ayzaabetas anjjo gidikko istti simmi attidaakko ay mala gita anjjo gidandeeshin!
Romans11:13 Ayzaabetoo! Ta inttes yootays; ta Ayzaabetas kiitettidaade gidida gishshas ta oosoza minna polana.
Romans11:14 Hessika ta bagga asati amosana mala denththeththada isttafe guuththa asata ashshanaas ufays ooththays.
Romans11:15 Xoossi istta aggida Ayzaabeti Xoossara giigikko Xoossi Isra7eele nayta zaaridi ekkiza wode inttes aazi hanana misatizee? Hessa guussi
Romans11:16 Koyro bukeesoy lo7o gidikko hankko izappe oosettizayssi wurikka lo7o gidees; hessaththoka issi miththa xaphoy lo7o gidikko hankko iza bolla diza haggatikka lo7o gideettes.
Romans11:17 Keeththa matan diza wogara miththa haggata malati intte meqqi wodhdhiin hankko woran diza wogara miththata misatiza Ayzaabeti intte kichchoosan gididi intte haaronne intte anjjo shaakki ekkizaadentta gidikko
Romans11:18 heyta he meqqi wodhdhida haggata bolla otorettofa; intte istta bolla otorettiko qasse hanno wozinan woththite; he miththaa tookkiday nena gidakka; miththay nena tookkides attiin.
Romans11:19 Histtiko
Romans11:20 Tumu gidetashin istti meqqiday ammano paceppe dendidayssanna. Intte qasse ammanon eqqideta; babbite attiin otorettofte.
Romans11:21 Xoossi koyroppe diza haggatas mishettonttaade gidikko intteska mishettenna.
Romans11:22 Hessa gishshas Xoossa kiyateththinne iza menxe iitateththaa ane xeella; iza menxe iitateththi kundidayta bolla; iza kiyateththi qasse intte iza qadheteththa garsan diza wode gakkanaas xalala; hessi baynda aggiko intteka qanxxettana.
Romans11:23 Istti ammanontta minni eqqidasoppe simmiko kase ba dizaso simmi gelana; Xoossika istta zarsi gelththana dandayees.
Romans11:24 Intte bazzo wogara miththafe qanxxetti kase intte medheteththafe gidontta lo7o miththan intte gelana dandaykko koyroppe ba medheteththa haggata gididayti heyti kase iza bolla diza wogara miththaan simmi geloy isttas waani hanennee?
Romans11:25 Ta ishatoo! Intte cincca as gididayssa inttes misatontta mala hayssa giddo xuura yo7oza intte erontta attana mala ta koykke. Hessika Ayzaabetappe xeygettidayti wuri ammanana gakkanaas Isra7eele nayta wozinay muumides.
Romans11:26 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele nayti wurikka attana. «Ashshizaadey Xiyooneppe yaana; Yaaqoobeppeka iitateth diggana.
Romans11:27 Tani istta nagara wursa dhayssidaappe guye ta isttara caaqon geliza qaalay hessa» geetettidi kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala hanides.
Romans11:28 Inttes Ayzaabetas Mishiraachcho qaalay gakkana mala Isra7eele nayti Xoossan ixettida as gidida; gidikkoka kase dooroza mala gidikko ba aawata baggara istti dosettidayta.
Romans11:29 Xoossi dooridaappenne ba kiyateth immidaappe guye ba ooththida miishshan simmidi modhettenna.
Romans11:30 Intteka kase azazettonttaytakko! Istti azazettontta ixxiin ha7i inttena maaridayssaththo;
Romans11:31 Xoossi inttena maarida gaason isttika maarettana mala ha7i azazettonttayta gidida.
Romans11:32 Xoossi wursika maaranaas asi wurikka azazettontta mala gordides.
Romans11:33 Xoossa dureteththi
Romans11:34 «Godaa wozina eriday oonee? Izas zore immiday oonee?
Romans11:35 Xoossi zaari immana mala izas tal7e immiday oonee?» geetetti xaafettida mala.
Romans11:36 Wurikka izappe
Romans12:1 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte asateththaa geeshshinne Xoos ufayssiza de7o yarsho ooththidi intte shiishshana mala ta inttena Xoossa qadhetan woossays; hessika wozinama asa mala intte Xoossas ooththiza ooso.
Romans12:2 Lo7o
Romans12:3 Inttes Xoossi immida ammano mala intterkka inttena paacci xeellite attiin ha7i dizayssafe bollara inttena dhoqqisi xeellontta mala tani taas imettida Xoossa kiyateththan inttena issaa issaa zorays.
Romans12:4 Nuuppe issi issi asas issi asateththa bolla daro billiteti diza mala heytikka he billiteti issi mala ooso ooththonttayssaththo
Romans12:5 hessaththoka nuni darota gidi uttidi Kirstoosan issi asho; nuni issoy issaas asho.
Romans12:6 Nuus imettida imota mala dumma dumma imotay dees; issaades buroppe hananaaz yooto gidikko izaades imettida ammano mala yooto.
Romans12:7 Ooththi maaddizaadey ooththi maaddo; tamaarsizaadeyka tamaarso.
Romans12:8 Zorizaadey gidikko zoro; bayndaytas immizaadey gujji immo; ayssizaadey minni aysso; maarizaadeyka ufayssan maaro.
Romans12:9 Intte siiqoteththi qoodheppe qommon gidoppo; iita gididayssa wursika ixxite. Lo7o gididayssara issife oykettite.
Romans12:10 Intte intte garsan issoy issaara ishata mala lo7eththi siiqettite; issoy issaa baappe aaththi bonchchizayta gidite.
Romans12:11 Godaas ooththana Ayanan xuugettizayta gidite attiin hessa he minoteththaafe guye goopite.
Romans12:12 Hidotan ufayettizayta gidite; meto dandayte; woosan minnite.
Romans12:13 Ammanishe waayettizaytas inttes dizayssafe shaakki immite; imath mokkite.
Romans12:14 Inttena qanggizayta anjjite attiin qanggofte.
Romans12:15 Ufayettizaytara ufayettite; muuzottizaytara muuzottite.
Romans12:16 Intte intte garsan doseteththan diite; manqotara issifeteththan daanaas koyite attiin otorettoftenne ceeqettofte.
Romans12:17 Oonaska iita gishshas iita zaaropite; as ubbaa achchan lo7o miish ooththanaas minnite.
Romans12:18 Inttes dandayettiko intte intte baggara as ubbaara saron diite.
Romans12:19 Ta siiqotoo! Intte halo Xoossi kesso attiin intterkka halo kessofte. «Halo kessanay tana gees Goday» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides.
Romans12:20 Halo kessanaappe
Romans12:21 Iita lo7o ooson xoona attiin iitan xoonettofa.
Romans13:1 Ay asikka bana ayssiza daannatas haarettanaas bessees; Xoossafe imettontta dishin daannateththi deenna; ha7i diza daannati Xoossafe daannatidayta.
Romans13:2 Hessa gishshas daanna bolla makkalliday Xoossa wogaa bolla makkallees. He makkallizaytikka ba bolla pirda eheettes.
Romans13:3 Dere ayssizayti iita ooththizayta babiseettes attiin lo7o ooththizayta babisettenna. Neni dere ayssizaades babbontta aggana koyay? Histtiko lo7o ooththa; izikka nena galatana.
Romans13:4 Izi nees lo7o ooththanaas Xoossa oosanchcha; gido attiin ne iita ooththidaa gidikko izas babba; gaasoykka izi mashsha coo mela gixxibeenna; izi iita ooththizaade qaxxayanaas Xoossa oosanchcha.
Romans13:5 Hessa gishshas iza qixaates babo xalala gidontta ne qofankka daannatizaades azazettanaas bessees.
Romans13:6 Intte giira immizay hessassa; ayssizayta he oosoza bolla Xoossi woththides.
Romans13:7 Isttafe issaas issaas bessizayssa immite; giira immana bessizaytas giira immite; qaraxa qanxxanaas bessizaytas qaraxa qanxxite; babbanaas bessizaytas babbite; bonchchanaas bessizayta bonchchite.
Romans13:8 Intte garsan issoy issaara siiqeteththafe attiin oona bollaka acoy dooppo; as siiqiza asi izi wogaa polides.
Romans13:9 «Laymatoppa; wodhoppa; amottofa» gizaytinne hara azazoti diikkoka
Romans13:10 Siiqoy asa bolla iita ooththenna; hessa gishshas siiqoy woga ubbaas kuushsha.
Romans13:11 Hayssa wodeza caddi xeellidi hessa ooththite; ha7i hanna intte dhiskofe dendiza wode; nu kase ammanoosofe haa simmiin ha7i nuus attiza wodey matides.
Romans13:12 Qammay aadhdhiin wonttana gees; hessa gishshas ane nu dhuma ooso wora yeggidi poo7o ola miish may7oos.
Romans13:13 Gallassara hemettiza mala ane wogara hemettoos; magulsaninne maththon gidoppo; layma amoninne layman gidoppo; qanaateteththaninne palaman gidoppo.
Romans13:14 Hessa aggidi Yesus Kirstoosa may7ite; asho amo polanaas qoppofte.
Romans14:1 Intte garsan ammanon buro minnonttaade shiishshi ekkite attiin iza qofaa bolla pirdofte.
Romans14:2 Issi issi asi beettidayssa wursi maanaas ammanoy dees; qasse ammanon minnonttaadey atakilte xalala mees.
Romans14:3 Beettidayssa ubbaa mizaadey wursi monttaade kadhoppa; monttaadey qasse mizaade bolla pirdofo; Xoossi ubbaaka ekkides.
Romans14:4 Hankko ooththizaade bolla pirdizaadey ne oonee? Izaadey kundiko woykko eqqikokka Godaassa; Goday iza essanaas dandayza gishshas izi eqqandes.
Romans14:5 Issaadey
Romans14:6 Issi gallas hara gallassafe dummasi qoppizaadey izi hessa ooththizay Godaa bonchchos gidikko mizaadeyka Godaa bonchchos giidi mees. Histtidi Xoos galatees. Monttaadeyka Godaa bonchchos giidi muus aggeessinne Xoossas galata immees.
Romans14:7 Nuuppe oonikka baas dizaadeynne baappe baas hayqqizaadey deenna.
Romans14:8 Nu diikkoka Godaas doos; hayqqikokka Godaas hayqqoos; hessa gishshas diikkoka woykko hayqqiko nuni Godaassa.
Romans14:9 Hessa gishshas hayqqidaytassinne paxa dizaytas Godaa gidanaas Kirstoosi hayqqidi hayqoppe paxi dendides.
Romans14:10 Histtiin ne aazas ne ishaa bolla pirday? Aazas ne ishaa leqqay? Nu wurikka Xoossa pirda wombora sinth shiiqana doos.
Romans14:11 «Ta paxa days; gulbatey wurikka taas gulbatana. Inxarsi wuri Xoossas markkattana» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides.
Romans14:12 Hessa gishshas nuni issi issi asi Xoossa sinth shiiqidi nu ooso gishshas izas zaaro immana.
Romans14:13 Hessa gishshas nuni nu garsan issoy issaa bolla pirdanaappe ane naagettoos; hessa aggidi nu ishaas dhuphe gidizayssa woykko iza oykkiza narxa woththontta mala ane nu naagettoos.
Romans14:14 Tani Godaa Yesusan ammanada miza kaththan tunay bayndayssa eradis; gido attiin issaadey issi miish tuna gi qoppiko he miishshay izaades tuna.
Romans14:15 Neni ne ishaas miza kaththa gaason dhuphe gidikko siiqon simerettabeekka; Kirstoosi iza gishshas hayqqida ne ishaa ne miza kaththa gaason wodhoppa.
Romans14:16 Intte lo7o giidi qoppiza miishshi iita geetettana mala ooththofte.
Romans14:17 Xoossa kawoteththi Xillo Ayanan beettida xilloteth
Romans14:18 Hayssaththo Kirstoosas ooththizaadey Xoos ufaysseessinne asa achchanka galatettees.
Romans14:19 Hessa gishshas saroteththi beettiza ogenne nuni nu garsan lo7anaas bessiza oge ane koyoos.
Romans14:20 Nuni miza kaththa gaason Xoossa ooso ane moorokko; kaththi wurikka geeshsha; gido attiin hara asas dhuphe gidiza kath muussi bala ooso.
Romans14:21 Ne ishaas dhuphe gidizaaz gidikko ashokka maanaappenne woyne cajje uyanaappe woykko ay miishshika ne ooththontta aggiko lo7o.
Romans14:22 Hessa gishshas haytantta misatiza miishshatas nees diza ammanoy ne giddoninne Xoossa giddon de7o. «Hayssi likkeko» giidi ammanon ekkida miishshan barkka ba bolla pirdonttaadey izaadey anjjettidaade.
Romans14:23 Gido attiin wozinara sidhishe miikko izi ammanon montta gishshas iza bolla pirdettides; ammanon ooththonttaazi wurikka nagara.
Romans15:1 Nuni ammanon minnidayti hankko ammanon minnonttayta meto tookkanaas bessees attiin nu xalla ufayettizayta gidanaas bessenna.
Romans15:2 Nuni wurikka hara asi ba ammanon minnana mala iza go7izaazinne ufayssiza miish ane ooththoos.
Romans15:3 Kirstoosi bana ufayssibeenna; harappeka
Romans15:4 Nuni Geeshsha Maxaafatappe demmiza dandayaynne minoteththi nuus daana mala koyroppe xaafettidayssi wurikka nu izappe nuus timirte demmana mala xaafettides.
Romans15:5 Minoteththinne dandaya immiza Xoossi intte Yesus Kirstoosa kaallishin inttes intte giddon Ayana issifeteth immo.
Romans15:6 Hessika intte issi wozinaninne issi doona gididi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aawaa Xoossa bonchchanaassa.
Romans15:7 Hessa gishshas Xoossi inttena Xoossa bonchchon mokki ekkida mala intteka issoy issaa ufayssan mokki ekkite.
Romans15:8 Kase aawatas imettida hidota qaalaa polanaas Xoossa tumateththi erettana mala Kirstoosi Ayhudatas ooththizaade gididayssa ta inttes yootays.
Romans15:9 Hessaththoka Ayzaabeti iza maaroteththaa gishshas Xoos galatana mala; hessika
Romans15:10 Qasseka
Romans15:11 Nam7anththoka
Romans15:12 Hessaththo Isayaasan
Romans15:13 Intte izan ammaniza gishshas hidota Xoossi inttenan ufayssinne saroteth kunththo; hessika Xillo Ayana wolqqa hidotay inttes daranaassa.
Romans15:14 Ta ishatoo! Intte lo7eteththan
Romans15:15 Ta Xoossafe ekkida imotaa gina qasseka inttena qofsanaas issi issi yo7ota xalateththan inttes xaafadis.
Romans15:16 Hessa he kiyateththi imettiday tani Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaa hankko deretas yootana malassa; qasseka qeese mala gidida Yesus Kirstoosas ooththanaassa; hessa gishshas hankko dere asay Xillo Ayanan dummatidi Xoos ufayssiza yarsho gididi shiiqana mala ooththays.
Romans15:17 Hessa tani Xoossas ooththiza gishshas Yesus Kirstoosan ceeqettays.
Romans15:18 Ta yootidayssaninne ta ooththidayssan hankko dere asay Xoossas azazettana mala Kirstoosi tanan gididi ooththidaazappe attiin hara haasayana xalikke.
Romans15:19 Hessika haniday Xillo Ayana wolqqan malaatata baggara hanides; hessa malankka Yerusalaameppe Ilwaqoore gakkanaas ta Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakadis.
Romans15:20 Hara asi kase ooththidason ta gelontta mala gaada kase Kirstoosa sunththi xeygetti eronttason Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakanayssi taas amo.
Romans15:21 Harappeka
Romans15:22 Hessa gaason ta intteko bontta mala daro wode digettadis.
Romans15:23 Ha7i qasse taas haan oosoy baynda gishshas daro layththatappe haa simmiin inttena beyanaas ta daro laamotadis.
Romans15:24 Hayssa ta qofaa tani Ispeene biza wode polanaas qoppays; heera aadhdhashe inttena beyanaassinne inttenara guuththa wode gam7ada laamota aaththida mala intte tana maaddana gaada hidota ooththays.
Romans15:25 Ha7i qasse ammanizaytas imettiza maado miish ekkada Yerusalaame bays.
Romans15:26 Gaasoykka Maqidooniyaninne Akayan diza manqota maaddana Xoossa derey dendides.
Romans15:27 Hayssa ha maadoza istti ba dosan immiday istti ooththanaas bessiza gishshassa; Ayzaabeti Ayhudatara issife Ayana anjjo ekkizayta gidikko isttika baas diza biittaa anjjon Ayhudata maaddanaas bessees.
Romans15:28 Hessa gishshas hayssa shiiqida maado miishshaa Yerusalaamen immidaappe guye intte achchara ta Ispeene baana.
Romans15:29 Ta hee intteko bashe inttes Kirstoosa anjjo kunththa ekka baanayssa ta erays.
Romans15:30 Ta ishatoo! Tani Xoossa woosan baaxetiza mala intteka tanara baaxetana mala ta inttena Godaa Yesus Kirstoosaninne Xillo Ayana siiqon woossays.
Romans15:31 Tani Yuhudan diza ammanontta asaa kusheppe attana malanne Yerusalaamen diza ta oosoykka heen ammanizayta achchan ekettana mala taas woossite.
Romans15:32 Hessika Xoossa shene mala hee intteko ta ufayssara baana malanne inttenara issife shempanaassa.
Romans15:33 Saroteththa Goday inttenara ubbatara gido. Amiin.
Romans16:1 Kinkira7oose Woosa Keeththan ooththiza ammanettida michcheyo Pebeeno inttes hadara gays.
Romans16:2 Ammaniza asas bessiza moko intte izo Godaa sunththan mokki ekkana malanne iza inttefe koyza ay miishshankka intte izo maaddana mala ta inttena qofsays.
Romans16:3 Kase tanara Godaa Yesus Kirstoosas issife ooththida Phirsiqillassinne Aqilas ta saroka gaththite.
Romans16:4 Istti ta gishshas hayqqana gakkanaas bana aaththi immida; tana xalala gidontta Ayzaabetappe ammanidaytikka istta galateettes.
Romans16:5 Istta keeththan diza ammaniza asaakka saro giite; Iisiyappe koyro Kirstoosan ammanida ta siiqoza Ephenexoose saro giite.
Romans16:6 Inttes daro daaburdaaro Maaramo saro giite.
Romans16:7 Tanara issife qashettida Andiraqonenne Yuniyaase saro giite; heytantti Hawaareta garsan lo7o sunththara dizaytanne Kirstoosa taappe kase ammanidayta.
Romans16:8 Tani Godaa baggara daro siiqiza Philyaxone saro giite.
Romans16:9 Kirstoosa ooso tanara issife ooththiza Irobanoonenne ta siiqiza Senxakekka saro giite.
Romans16:10 Kirstoosan iza ammanoy paacettidi galatettida Exesseneesses ta saroka gaththite; Arsixabaloso asaasikka ta saroka gaththite.
Romans16:11 Ta dabbo Herodiyaana saro giite; Godaan diza Niriqaasoso asaa saro giite.
Romans16:12 Godaan gididi minoteththan ooththiza maccassata Tirofimoononne Xirofimoono saro giite; Godaas ooson daro daaburdaaris Kirstoosan tani izo siiqiza Xarsidis ta saroka gaththite.
Romans16:13 Godaan doorettida Erufoones
Romans16:14 Asqeroones
Romans16:15 Filegoones
Romans16:16 Issoy issaa yeeri yeeri ekkidi sarokettite; Kirstoosan ammaniza Woosa Keeththaa asay wurikka inttena saro gees.
Romans16:17 Ta ishatoo! Asa garsan shaaketeth medhdhizaytappenne intte tamaarda timirtaa ekkontta ixon inttes dhuphe gidiza asatappe intte naagettite.
Romans16:18 Heytantta mala asati Yesus Kirstoosas ooththizayta gidontta ba qanththa kaththa gishshas ooththizayta; shugo qaalara haasayaninne wozina kiya asata baleththeettes.
Romans16:19 Intte mishiraachcho qaalas azazettizayta gididayssa asi wuri siyides; hessika tana daro ufayssides; gidikkoka intte lo7o hanos cinccata qasse iita oosos eeyata gidana mala ta koyays.
Romans16:20 Saroteththa Goday Xala7e eeson intte toho gars aaththi dincereththana. Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
Romans16:21 Tanara issife ooththiza Ximtoosi qasseka ta dabbo Luqiyoosi
Romans16:22 Hayssa kiitaa xaafiday tani Xerixiyoosi inttena Godaa sunththan saro gays.
Romans16:23 Taninne hayssan diza kumeththa Woosa Keeththa asay mokki ekkiza Gayiyoosikka inttena saro gees; katama miishshaa oykkiza Erisxoosinne nu isha Qo7axiroosi inttena saro geettes.
Romans16:24 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththi inttenara ubbatara gido. Amiin.
Romans16:25 Tani yootiza Mishiraachcho qaalay Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas yootettiza kiitaynne beni wodeppe doommidi qotan gam7idi ha7i qasse qonccida tuma xuura baggara izi inttena ammanon essanaas dandayees.
Romans16:26 Ha7i qasse hayssi tumay qonccides; mernaa Xoossa azazon wurikka ammanidi azazettana mala nabeta maxaafa baggara dereti wurikka iza erana mala hanides.
Romans16:27 Izi xalala era gidida Godaas Yesus Kirstoosa baggara mernaa bonchchoy izas gido! Amiin.
1Corinthians1:1 Xoossa shenen Yesus Kirstoosas kiitettanaas xeygettida Phawuloosappenne nu ishaa Sostineeseppe
1Corinthians1:2 Qorontoosen diza Xoossa Woosa Keeththaas
1Corinthians1:3 nu Aawa Xoossafenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroy inttes gido.
1Corinthians1:4 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara inttes imettida Xoossa kiyateththaa gishshas ubba wode intte gishshassika tani Xoossaa galatays.
1Corinthians1:5 Gaasoykka ay yo7onkka
1Corinthians1:6 Kirstoosa gishshas nu inttes markkattidayssi intte achchan minnides.
1Corinthians1:7 Hessa gishshas intte Yesus Kirstoosi qonccana gallas naagishin Ayana imotatappe aykkoyka inttes paccenna.
