1Corinthians1:8 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi nam7anththo yaana gallassan intte intte bolla borey baynda beettana mala wurseth gakkanaas izi inttena lo7eththi naagana.
1Corinthians1:9 Izi ba naaza nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa issifeteththaako inttena xeygida Xoossi izi ammanettida Xoossa.
1Corinthians1:10 Ta ishatoo! Intte garsan shaaketeththi dontta mala inttes issi wozinaynne issi qofay daana malanne intte intte garsan issino gidana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan ta inttena woossays.
1Corinthians1:11 Ta ishatoo! Intte garsan palamay dizayssa ta Qaalo7e soo asaappe siyadis.
1Corinthians1:12 Yo7ozikka hayssa mala; intte garsan issi issi asati
1Corinthians1:13 Histtiko Kirstoosi shaaketti wodhdhidee? Intte gishshas Phawuloosi kaqettidee? Woykko Phawuloosa sunththan xammaqettidetii?
1Corinthians1:14 Intte giddofe Qerisphoosappenne Gayiyoosappe attiin hara oonakka ta xammaqontta gishshas Xoossaa galatays.
1Corinthians1:15 Hessa gishshas oonikka
1Corinthians1:16 Tumukka Isttifaanose soo asaa xammaqadis; heytappe hara ta xammaqidaakko ta erizaadey deenna.
1Corinthians1:17 Kirstoosi tana kiittiday Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootanaas attiin xammaqanaas gidenna; Kirstoosa masqaley hada gidontta mala tani asappe gidida cinccateththan sabbakikke.
1Corinthians1:18 Masqaleza kiitay dhayana dizaytas eeyateththa; gido attiin attana diza nuus gidikko Xoossa wolqqa.
1Corinthians1:19 «Cinccata cinccateth ta isttafe dhayssana; eranchchata erateththaa ta hada ooththana» geetetti Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides.
1Corinthians1:20 Cinccay awan dizee? Tamaarda eray awan dizee? Hayssa wodeza pilggi erizay awan dizee? Xoossi ha alameza erateth eeyateth ooththibeennee?
1Corinthians1:21 Xoossa erateththafe dendidayssan alamey ba erateththan Xoos eroy xooniin sabbako eeyateththan ammanizayta ashshanaas Xoossa shene gidides.
1Corinthians1:22 Ay wodekka Ayhudati dumma malaata koyeettes; Girike asati qasse erateth koyeettes.
1Corinthians1:23 Nuni gidikko kaqettida Kirstoosa sabbakoos; hessika Ayhudatas dhuphe; Ayzaabetas qasse eeyateththa.
1Corinthians1:24 Xoossi xeygidaytas istti Ayhudata gidiin woykko Girike dere as gidikkoka Kirstoosi Xoossa wolqqanne Xoossa erateththa.
1Corinthians1:25 Gaasoykka asa erappe Xoossa eeyateththi aadhdhida erateththa; asa minoteththafe Xoossa laafateththi aadhdhees.
1Corinthians1:26 Ta ishatoo! Kase intte xeygettiza wode intte ay mala asakko ane qopite; asa qofa mala gidikko inttefe darizayti erata gidekketa. Inttefe daroti wolqqay bayndayta; darotikka gita keeththa asappe yelettibeekketa.
1Corinthians1:27 Gido attiin Xoossi erata yeellachchanaas deraappe eeyata doorides; Xoossi minota yeellachchanaas alamezappe daaburanchchata doorides.
1Corinthians1:28 Xoossi hankko ammanontta asaa achchan deettes geetetti erettiza miishshata baynda miishsha mala ooththana hayssa alamezan leqettidaytanne kawuyidayta laafata doorides.
1Corinthians1:29 Hessaka izi ooththiday oonikka iza sinththan ceeqettontta malassa.
1Corinthians1:30 Inttena qasse Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosara issifeteththi daana mala ooththides; hessa gishshas Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosa nu erateth
1Corinthians1:31 Hessa gishshas kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala
1Corinthians2:1 Ta ishatoo! Ta intteko Xoossa xuura qonccisana biday taas doona qarateththi woykko era daroy diza gishshas gidenna.
1Corinthians2:2 Ta intte giddon diza wode kaqettida Yesus Kirstoosappe attiin hara erontta mala ta baggara murttadis.
1Corinthians2:3 Ta intteko daro daaburan
1Corinthians2:4 Ta qaalaynne sabbakoykka Ayana wolqqa qoncciseththanpe attiin cimoninne era daron gidenna.
1Corinthians2:5 Hessika intte ammanoy Xoossa wolqqanppe attiin asa cinccateththa bolla xaphontta mala hanides.
1Corinthians2:6 Nu kaha kunththida asata achchan era haasaya haasayoos; gido attiin hayssa ha alameza erateth gidenna; woykko dhayana diza ha alameza haarizayta erateth gidenna.
1Corinthians2:7 Gido attiin nu haasayzay kase qotetti diza Xoossa xuura erateththa; he erateththay Xoossi daro wodeppe kase nuna bonchchos kasetidi giigsi woththidayssa.
1Corinthians2:8 Ha alameza haarizaytappe oonikka ha erateththaa eribeenna; eridaakko istti bonchcho Godaa kaqqettenna.
1Corinthians2:9 Gido attiin Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians2:10 Xoossi gidikko hessa ba Ayana baggara nuus qonccisides; Ayanaykka Xoossas diza ciimma yo7o ashshontta ubbaa pilggi xeellees.
1Corinthians2:11 Asa garsan izaades diza ayanappe attiin izaade wozina erizay oonee? Hessaththoka Xoossa Ayanappe attiin Xoossa qofaa erizay oonikka deenna.
1Corinthians2:12 Xoossafe nuus imettidayssa nuni erana mala Xoossa Ayanay nuus imettides attiin nuni hayssa ha alameza ayana ekkibeekko.
1Corinthians2:13 Nu yootizay hayssa; nuni asappe tamaarda qaala gidontta Ayanappe tamaarda qaala haasayoos; Ayana tumateththaaka nu qonccisizay Ayana qaalanna.
1Corinthians2:14 Xoossa Ayanay izan baynda asi Xoossa Ayanappe gididaaz ekkanaas dandayenna; gaasoykka hessa mala yo7oy izas eeyateththa; izi baas Ayanan paacettizaade gidida gishshas izi eranaas dandayenna.
1Corinthians2:15 Xoossa Ayanay izan dizaadey qasse ubbaaka paaccees attiin baas oonankka paacettenna.
1Corinthians2:16 Hessika
1Corinthians3:1 Ta ishatoo! Ta inttena intte Kirstoosan buro guuththa nayta malanne buro ammanoy gelontta asa malappe attiin Ayanan kumida asa mala gaada inttes haasayanaas dandayabeekke.
1Corinthians3:2 Intte buro minnontta gishshas ta inttena maath paahadis attiin buro mino kath mizabeekke; ha7ikka gidikko intte burokko!
1Corinthians3:3 Intte ha7ikka buro ammanon minnonttayta gidida gishshas intte giddon qanaateteththinne palamay dees; histtiin intte buro ammanon minnontta asa mala gidekketii? Intte oosoy coo mela asi ooththizayssa mala gidennee?
1Corinthians3:4 Gaasoykka intte garsafe issoy
1Corinthians3:5 Ero! Gido attiin Aphiloosi aazee? Phawuloosikka aazee? Istti Goday isttas issaas issaas immida mala ooththiza oosanchchata; intteka istta baggara ammanideta.
1Corinthians3:6 Ta tokkadis; Aphiloosi haaththe ushshides; dichchiday gidikko Xoossa.
1Corinthians3:7 Hessa gishshas dichchizay Xoos attiin tokkizaadeyka
1Corinthians3:8 Tokkizaade gidiin woykko ushshizaade gidiin istti issino; isttafe issaadey issaadey ba ooso mala woyto ekkana.
1Corinthians3:9 Gaasoykka nu Xoossara issife ooththizayta; intteka Xoossa goshsha gadenne Xoossa Keeththata.
1Corinthians3:10 Xoossafe taas imettida imoteththaa gina Keeththe keexxiza hiilla mala keeththay eqqanaas lo7eththa giigsadis; iza bolla hara asi keeth keexxana; gido attiin keeth keexxizaadey wostti keexxanaakko naagettanaas bessees.
1Corinthians3:11 Gaasoykka keeththay keexeteth oykettidaappe guye hara woththi qasse keexxana dandayzaadey oonikka baa; hessika keeththaas yochchay Yesus Kirstoosa.
1Corinthians3:12 Oonikka keeththay koyro keexettidayssa bolla worqqan woykko biran bonchchettida shuchchan woykko miththaninne maatan woykko maqan keexxiko
1Corinthians3:13 issaade issaade oosoy ay malakko pirda gallas qonccana; gaasoykka he gallas issaade issaade oosoy ay malakko taman paacetti erettana.
1Corinthians3:14 Oonikka keexxida keeththi minni eqqizaa gidikko hessaadey ba woyto ekkana.
1Corinthians3:15 Iza oosoy xuugettidaadey gidikko woytoy izas deennashin izaadey ba hu7es attana; gido attiin izaade ateththi tamappe asi waaydi attiza ateththa mala gidana.
1Corinthians3:16 Intte intte hu7es Xoossa Keeththe gididayssanne Xoossa Ayanay intte giddon dizayssa erekketii?
1Corinthians3:17 Oonikka Xoossa Keeththe laalliko Xoossi izaade laallana; Xoossa Keeththi geeshsha; hessika inttenakko!
1Corinthians3:18 Oonikka barkka bana baleththofo; inttefe oonikka hayssa ha alamezan bana eranchcha mala qoppiko izaadey eranchcha gidana mala bana barkka eeya mala qoodo.
1Corinthians3:19 Hayssa ha dereza erateththi Xoossa achchan eeyateththa; kase Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians3:20 Qasseka harason
1Corinthians3:21 Hessa gishshas wurikka inttes gidida gishshas oonikka asan ceeqettofo.
1Corinthians3:22 Phawuloosa gidiin
1Corinthians3:23 Intteka Kirstoosayta; Kirstoosikka Xoossayssa.
1Corinthians4:1 Hessa gidida gishshas asi wurikka nuna Kirstoosa oosanchchata malanne Xoossa xuura qonccisanaas hadara ekkida asa mala qoodanaas bessees.
1Corinthians4:2 Hadara ekkidaytikka ammanettidayta gidanaas bessees.
1Corinthians4:3 Ta bolla intte pirdinkka woykko duulata asay pirdinkka ta baggara taas aykkoy baa; haray attoshin tarkka ta bolla pirdike.
1Corinthians4:4 «Ta eriza mala tani ta wozinara sidhiza miishshi baa; gido attiin hessa guussi ta bolla mooroy baa» guus gidenna. Buro ta bolla pirdanay Godaa.
1Corinthians4:5 Hessa gishshas pirdana wodey gakkontta haara ay yo7okka pirdofte; Goday yaana gakkanaas naagite; izi dhuma giddon qotettidayssa buro qoncce kessana. Asa wozina giddon diza qofaakka qoncce kessana; he wode issi issi asi baas bessiza galata Xoossa achchafe ekkana.
1Corinthians4:6 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Ta inttena go7ana mala ha yo7ozan tananne Aphiloosa inttes leemiso shiishshadis; ta hayssa ooththiday
1Corinthians4:7 Neni aazan aadhdhay? Neni harappe ekkontta attida miishshi aazee? Histtiin ne wursaka ekkiday hara asappe gidikko hara asappe ekkontta asa mala aazas ceeqettay?
1Corinthians4:8 Ha7i gidikko inttes koshshizaaz intte ubbaa demmidetanne duretideta; nuuppeka shaakettidi kawotideta; intte tumukka kawotidaakko nunikka inttenara kawotanakko shin.
1Corinthians4:9 Gaasoykka Xoossi nuna Hawaareta nu bolla hayqo pirday pirdettida asata mala asa ubbaafe wurseth ooththidaaz taas misatees; hessa gishshas alames
1Corinthians4:10 Nu Kirstoosa gishshas eeyata gididos; intte qasse Kirstoosan eranchchata; nuni daaburanchchata; intte gidikko minota; intte bonchchettidayta; nuni gidikko kawushshata.
1Corinthians4:11 Hanno gakkanaas nu gafoos; saamettoos; kallottoos; bukettoos; aqizasoy dhayiin waayettoos.
1Corinthians4:12 Nu kushera ooththi daaburi aqoos; nuna qanggishin nu qasse anjjoos; nuna gooddishin nu dandayoos.
1Corinthians4:13 Nu sunth istti moorishin nu qasse lo7o zaaroos; hanno gakkanaas nuni biittafe pitettida buura gididos.
1Corinthians4:14 Ta hayssa inttes xaafizay inttena ta dosiza ta nayta mala zoranaas gaada attiin inttena yeellachchanaas gidenna.
1Corinthians4:15 Inttena Kirstoosan dichchiza daro asati diikkoka inttes daro Aawati deettenna; tani qasse Yesus Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalan inttena yeladis.
1Corinthians4:16 Hessa gishshas intte tana misatana mala ta inttena woossays.
1Corinthians4:17 Godaan daro dosettidayssanne ammanettida ta naa Ximtoosa ta intteko kiittiday hessa gaasonna. Izikka dumma dummason diza Woosa Keeththa asaa wursi ta tamaarsida timirtezara gaaggizayssa Yesus Kirstoosan diza de7o oge gishshas inttena izi qofsana.
1Corinthians4:18 Inttefe issi issi asati ta nam7anththo inttena beyanaas bonttaaz isttas misatiin otorettida.
1Corinthians4:19 Gido attiin Godaa shene gidikko matara ta intteko baana; hee baada he otoranchchati haasayzaaz xalala gidontta isttas aaza wolqqay dizaakko beyana koyays.
1Corinthians4:20 Gaasoykka Xoossa kawoteththi coo doona xalala gidontta doonappe bollara Xoossa wolqqa.
1Corinthians4:21 Ero! Intte koyzay awayssee? Durqqa ekka booyee? Woykko siiqoranne ashketeththa Ayanara booyee?
1Corinthians5:1 Intte garsan yeellachchiza laymay dizayssi woretees; hessa mala tunateththi ammanontta dereta achchanka deenna; ba aawa machcho ekkida asi inttekon dees.
1Corinthians5:2 Histtiin hessa mala yeellachchiza miishshi intte giddon dishin aazas otoreteetii? Hessafe he yo7ozan intte muuzottanaas inttes bessennee? Hessa mala ooththidaade intte garsafe diggite.
1Corinthians5:3 Ta inttenara ashon issife dontta aggikokka ayanan qasse inttenara days; ta ha7i inttenara diza mala hessa ooththidaade bolla pirdadis.
1Corinthians5:4 Intte shiiqizason ta inttenara diza gishshas Godaa Yesusa sunththaninne intte giddon diza nu Godaa Yesusa wolqqan he mooranchchaza ashoy dhayiin iza shemppoy Godaa gallassan attana mala hessa mala asi Xala7es aadhdhi imetto.
1Corinthians5:5 
1Corinthians5:6 Intte ceeqettizayssi lo7os gidenna; guuththa irshoy daro bukeeso denththeththizaa erekketii?
1Corinthians5:7 Intte ha7i irshoy baynda ooraththa bukeeso gidana mala kase caala irshoza intte giddofe diggite; nu Paaziga dors gidida Kirstoosi nuus yarshettides.
1Corinthians5:8 Hessa gishshas ane nuni Paaziga ba7aaleza qohoynne iitateththi izan kumida kase caala irsho bolla gidontta irshoy baynda ukeththan suureteththaninne tuman bonchchoos.
1Corinthians5:9 Inttes laymatiza asatara issifeteththi dontta mala ta inttes kase dabdaabe xaafadiskoshin.
1Corinthians5:10 Intte ammanoos gishe laymatiza asaara gidontta woykko coo gaphigaphizaytara
1Corinthians5:11 
1Corinthians5:12 Hankko ammanontta asaa bolla pirdanaas tana aazi gaththizee? Woosa keeththan dizayta bolla intte pirdeketii?
1Corinthians5:13 Woosa keeththafe karera dizayta bolla gidikko Xoossi pirdana
1Corinthians6:1 Intte garsafe issaades hara ammanizaadera yo7oy diikko he yo7oza ammanizayta ach shiishshanayssa wostti ammanontta asa sinththan pirdettana shiishshizee?
1Corinthians6:2 Ammaniza asay ammanontta asaa bolla pirdanayssa intte erekketii? Intte buro alame bolla pirdandeta; gidikkoka hessa guuththa yo7o bolla pirdanaas dandayekketii?
1Corinthians6:3 Hayssa biittaa bolla diza pirday attoshin intte buro kiitanchchata bolla pirdanayssa erekketii?
1Corinthians6:4 Intte intte garsan ooyettiko ammanizayta maabarappe karen dizaytaninne kadhettida asata sinththan wostti intte yo7o shiishsheetii?
1Corinthians6:5 Ta hessa inttes gizay inttena yeellachchanaassa; intte garsan ammanizayta giigsanaas dandayza wozinama asi deennee?
1Corinthians6:6 Gido attiin ammanizaadey hara ammanizaade mootanaas alame pirda keeththe baanaas bessizee?
1Corinthians6:7 Intte garsan issoy issaa mootoy intte kundeththaas malata bessees. Intte qohanaappe qohettiko lo7ennee? Qasseka intte as baleththanaappe inttena asi baleththiko lo7ennee?
1Corinthians6:8 Intte haa qohettanaappe gede qoheetanne baleththeeta; hessika intte ishata
1Corinthians6:9 Makkallanchchati Xoossa kawoteth gelonttayssa erekketii? Hessa mala yo7on balettofte. Laymatana qaaqqatizayti
1Corinthians6:10 woykko kaysoti
1Corinthians6:11 Inttefe issi issi asati heytantta mala shin ha7i qasse Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththaninne nu Xoossaa Ayanan meecettideta; dummatidetanne xillideta.
1Corinthians6:12 Haray wurikka taas imettides; Gido attiin wurikka go7izaaz gidenna. Wurikka taas imettides gido attiin ay miishshika tana haarenna.
1Corinthians6:13 Qasse Kaththi ulossa; uloykka kaththassa; gido attiin Xoossi nam7aakka dhayssana; asateththi Godaassafe attiin laymas gidenna; Godaykka asateththassa.
1Corinthians6:14 Xoossi Godaa hayqoppe denththida mala nunakka qasse izi ba wolqqan hayqoppe denththana.
1Corinthians6:15 Intte asateththay Kirstoosa asateththa billite gididayssa intte erekketii? Histtiin ta Kirstoosa asateththaafe issaa layman aqiza asatara issino histtoo? Mulekka bessenna.
1Corinthians6:16 Woykko laymatizaarira aqizaadey izira issi asho gidizayssa intte erekketii? «Nam7ay issi asho gideettes» geetettides.
1Corinthians6:17 Gido attiin Godaara issino gidizaadey izara issi Ayana gidees.
1Corinthians6:18 Laymappe haakkite; asi ooththiza hara nagaray wuri izaade ashoppe karera hanees; layma laymatizaadey gidikko barkka ba asateththaa bolla nagara ooththees.
1Corinthians6:19 Intte asateththay intte gaaththan diza Xillo Ayanas duussaso gididayssa intte erekketii? He Ayanaykka intte Xoossafe ekkidayssa; intteka inttes gidekketa.
1Corinthians6:20 Intte miishshan shamettideta; hessa gishshas intte intte asateththan Xoos bonchchite.
1Corinthians7:1 Intte taas xaafida mala asi maccassako gakkontta aggizaakko lo7okko! Gido attiin laymappe naagettanaas attumasaas issaas issaas machcha du. Maccassaska issineys issineys azinay do.
1Corinthians7:2 
1Corinthians7:3 Azinay ba machcheys koshshizaaz ubbaa ooththo; machchaka ba azinaas koshshizaaz wursa ooththu.
1Corinthians7:4 Machchi asateththi izis xalala gidontta azinaassara koththa; hessaththoka azinaa asateththi izas xalala gidontta machcheyssara koththa.
1Corinthians7:5 Nam7ay dosan woosas giidi zoren gido giidi qachchida gallassatappe attiin hara gallas issoy issaas akkay gooppetto; hessa gaason inttes inttena haaroy xooniin Xala7ey inttena paaccontta mala nam7ay issife aqite.
1Corinthians7:6 Ta hessa gizay coo azazo mala gidontta zore zorays.
1Corinthians7:7 Asi wuri ta mala machcho ekkontta dizaakko ta dosays; gido attiin issi issi asaas Xoossafe imettida dumma dumma imotay dees; issaas issi qommo imotay dees; hankkoyssas qasse hara qommo imotay dees.
1Corinthians7:8 Buro ekkonttaytanne gelonttayta gishshas qasseka azinay hayqqida maccassata gishshas ta gizay istti gelonttanne ekkontta ta mala dizaakko isttas lo7o gays.
1Corinthians7:9 Gido attiin istti bana naaganaas dandayonttayta gidikko gelettonne ekketto; coo amon xuugetanaappe ekoynne geloy lo7o.
1Corinthians7:10 Ekkidaytassinne gelidaytas ta immiza azazoy hayssa; hessika Godaa azazoppe attiin ta azazo gidenna; azina gelida maccassaya ba azinappe shaakettufu.
1Corinthians7:11 Shaakettizaa gidikko hara azina gelontta uttu; akkay giikko ba azinara giigu; azinaykka ba machcho anjji yeddofo.
1Corinthians7:12 Hankko asaas qasse ta hizgays; hessa gizaykka tana attiin Godaa gidenna; ammanontta machcha diza ammanizaadey machcheya izara daana dosikko izi izo anjji yeddanaas bessenna.
1Corinthians7:13 Ammanontta azinay diza ammaniza maccassaya he ammanontta azinay izira daanaas koykko iza izappe anjjetta baanaas bessenna.
1Corinthians7:14 Gaasoykka ammanontta azinay ammaniza ba machcheyin anjjettees; ammanontta maccassayakka ammaniza ba azinaan anjjettawus; hessaththo hanontta aggiko intte yelida nayti tunata gidanashin ha7i qasse anjjettidayta.
1Corinthians7:15 Gido attiin nam7atappe issoy ammanonttaadey shaakettana koykko shaaketto; adde gidiin macca gidiin ammanizaadey hessa mala wogaan qashettenna; Xoossi nuna saron daana mala xeygides.
1Corinthians7:16 Hanne neni ne azinaa ashshanaakko ay eray? Woykko haysso neni ne machcho ashshanaakko ay eray?
1Corinthians7:17 Coo issi issi asi Xoossi xeygida malanne Goday woththida mala de7o; woosa keeththatas ta woththiza wogay hessa.
1Corinthians7:18 Issaadey ammananaappe kase qaxxarettida gidikko qaxxarettontta asa mala hanoppo. Qasse qaxxarettontta dishe ammanidaadeyka qaxxarettofo.
1Corinthians7:19 Qaxxarettiin qaxxarettontta aggiin nam7aanka go7ay deenna; waanna ayfe yo7oy Xoossa azazo polo.
1Corinthians7:20 Issi issi asi ba xeygettida xeygeteththan minni de7o.
1Corinthians7:21 Ammaniza wode ne ayllee? Ne hessas daro metotoppa; wozzettana dandaykko wozzeta; gaasoykka aylle gidi dishe Godaa ammanidaadey izi Godaa goqa; hessaththoka ammaniza wode goqa gididaadey izi Kirstoosas aylle.
1Corinthians7:22 
1Corinthians7:23 Intte miishshan shamettideta; hessa gishshas asa aylle gidopite.
1Corinthians7:24 Ta ishatoo! Inttefe issi issi asi ba xeygettida mala Xoossara minni de7o.
1Corinthians7:25 Geela7otanne panththata gishshas taas Godaappe imettida azazoy deenna; gido attiin Godaa maaroteththafe dendidayssan ta inttes ammanettidaade gidada inttena zorays.
1Corinthians7:26 Hayssa ha7i wode meto gaason intte ha7i diza mala dizaakko taas lo7o misatees.
1Corinthians7:27 Ne machcho ekkidaade gidikko anjja yeddanaas koyoppa; machcho ekkonttaade gidikko machcho ekkanaas koyoppa.
1Corinthians7:28 Machcho ekkikokka nagara gidenna. Geela7oyakka gelikko nagara gidenna; gido attiin ekkiza asatanne gelizayta bolla hayssa alamezan istta daro metoy gakkana; ta qasse hessi intte bolla gakkontta agganayssa dosays.
1Corinthians7:29 Ta ishatoo! Ta qofay hayssa mala; wodezi qaanth gidida gishshas machcha dizaadey machcha bayndaade mala de7o.
1Corinthians7:30 Yeekkizayti yeekkontta asa mala
1Corinthians7:31 Hayssa alameza miishshan go7ettizayti ubbay go7ettontta asa mala gidi detto. Gaasoykka hayssa alameza hanoy aadhdhanaas dees.
1Corinthians7:32 Intte hirgay baynda daana mala ta koyays; machchonttaadey Godaa ufayssanaas Godaa gishshas qoppees.
1Corinthians7:33 Machchidaadey qasse ba machchiyo ufayssanaas hayssa alameza miish qoppees.
1Corinthians7:34 Hayssan iza qofay nam7u kezi shaakettees; gelontta maccassaya woykko geela7oya Godaaz xalla qoppawus; izis gita qofaykka ashonkka
1Corinthians7:35 Ta hessa gizay inttes lo7anaaz qoppadappe attiin inttena daro qofan yegganaas gidenna; taas diza gita qofay intte wozinay shaaketti nam7u kezontta intte Godaan minnidi wogara de7anaassa.
1Corinthians7:36 Issaadey ba oychchida geela7oyo wogara oykkontta aggiko izi wodeykka cimmi cimmi biikko ekkana koykko ba koyida mala ekko; ekkikonne gelikko lo7o; nagara gidenna.
1Corinthians7:37 Gido attiin hayssa ha yo7ozan iza wozinay qaaxxontta bana haaridi geela7oyo ekkike giidi murttida asi lo7o ooththides.
1Corinthians7:38 Hessa gishshas geela7oyo ekkidaadey lo7o ooththides; ekkonttaadeyka aadheththa lo7o ooththides.
1Corinthians7:39 Issi maccassi azinay paxa diza wode kumeththan ba azinara qashettadus; azinazi hayqqiko ba koyida as gelana dandayawus; iza gelanaadey ammanizaade gido attiin gelu.
1Corinthians7:40 Ta qofa mala gidikko iza gelontta dizaakko daro ufayssan de7andus; taaska tanan Xoossa Ayanay dizaa misatees.
1Corinthians8:1 Eeqas shukettida asho gishshas intte taas xaafidayssa mala gidikko tumukka nu wurikka eriza miishshi dees; eroy otorisees; siiqoy gidikko go7ees.
1Corinthians8:2 Ta erays giza asi eranaas bessiza mala buro eribeenna.
1Corinthians8:3 Xoos siiqizaadey gidikko izi Xoossa achchan erettidaade.
1Corinthians8:4 Hessa gishshas eeqas yarshettida asho muussa gishshas ta inttes gizay hayssa alamezan eeqay hada gididayssanne issi Xoossaafe attiin hara Xoossi bayndayssa nu eroos.
1Corinthians8:5 Aydekka gidikko daro eeqatinne daro godati deettes shin salon gidiin sa7a bolla Xoos geetettiza daro eeqati diikkoka nuus gidikko haniday wurikka izan hanides. Nunikka izas gidida issi Xoossi Aaway dees; qasseka hanidaazi wurikka izan haniday nunikka izan hanida issi Goday Yesus Kirstoosi xalala nuus dees.
1Corinthians8:6 
1Corinthians8:7 Gido attiin hessa asi wuri erenna; issi issi asati hanno gakkanaas eeqa goyno dosida gishshas hessa mala asho mishe addaka eeqas shukettidayssa qoppeetes; isttas qofay laafa gidida gishshas istti tuneettes.
1Corinthians8:8 Gido attiin kaththi nuna Xoossa ach gaththenna; nu montta aggikokka nuus paccizay deenna; nu miikkoka nuus wodhey deenna.
1Corinthians8:9 Gido attiin intte metoy baa guussan ooththizayssi ammanon minnontta asaas dhuphe gidontta mala naagettite.
1Corinthians8:10 Nees hessa misatiza erateththi diza gishshas hinko ammanon minnonttaadey eeqa keeththan ne mizayssa be7idi eeqas shukettidayssa maanaas xalennee?
1Corinthians8:11 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosi iza gishshas hayqqida he ammanon minnontta ishay ne erateththa gaason dhayees guussa.
1Corinthians8:12 Hessaththoka intte intte ishata qohoninne istta laafa qofaa madunththon Kirstoosa qoheeta.
1Corinthians8:13 Hessa gishshas ta miza miishshi ta ishaa dhuphizaaz gidikko ta ishaa ta dhupheththontta mala mulekka asho miikke.
1Corinthians9:1 Tani goqa as gidikkinaa? Ta Hawaare gidikkinaa? Nu Godaa Yesusa tani ta ayfera beyabeekkinaa? Intteka Godaan ta ooson beettida ayfe gidekketii?
1Corinthians9:2 Haratas ta Hawaare gidontta aggikokka ta inttes tumappe Hawaare; gaasoykka Godaan ta Hawaareteththaa bessiza maatamey inttena.
1Corinthians9:3 Tana paaccizaytas ta immiza zaaroy hessa.
1Corinthians9:4 Ero! Maanaassinne uyanaas nuus bessennee?
1Corinthians9:5 Hara Hawaareta mala Godaa ishata malanne keefantta mala nunikka ammaniza nu machcheta ekki yuuyana dandayokkonii?
1Corinthians9:6 Woykko waayetti daaburdi daanaas bessizay tananne Barnabaasa xallaa?
1Corinthians9:7 Ero! Ba miishshara wottadarateth ooththizay oonee? Woyne mith tokkidi he tokkida miththaa ayfe monttay oonee? Mehe heemmishe ba heemmiza meheza maath uyonttay oonee?
1Corinthians9:8 Ta hayssa gizay coo asa qofa mala xallaa? Muse wogay hessaththo geennee?
1Corinthians9:9 Muse wogaa garsan
1Corinthians9:10 Izi hessa giday tumappe nu gishshas gidennee? Hessi xaafettiday addafe nu gishshassa; goshshanchchaynne qasseka bukkizayssi ba ooso ayfeppe bana gakkizayssa ekkanaas hidota ooththees.
1Corinthians9:11 Nu intte giddon Ayana zereth zeridayti ashos gidizaaz maxikko hessi gita miishshee?
1Corinthians9:12 Hara asati inttefe hessa mala go7a ekkanaas dandaykko nu qasse hessafe daro demmanaas bessennee? Gido attiin nuni nuus bessiza mala go7ettibeekko; harappeka nu Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaas dhuphe gidontta mala hanizaaz ubbaaka dandayoos.
1Corinthians9:13 Xoossa Keeththan ooththizayti ba maanayssa Xoossa keeththafe ekkizayssa mala yarshoson ooththizaytikka he ba yarshizayssafe mizayssa intte erekketii?
1Corinthians9:14 Hessaththoka Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakizayti baas koshshizayssa Mishiraachcho qaalaa ooththizasoppe ekkana mala Goday woga woththides.
1Corinthians9:15 Tani gidikko hessa ubbaafekka aykkoka go7ettabeekke; ha7ikka ta inttes hayssa xaafizay heytantta mala miish taas ooththetto gaada gidenna. Ays giikko oonikka tani ta Godaan ceeqettizaaro taappe woththi ekkanaappe taas hayqoy lo7o.
1Corinthians9:16 Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakidayssi tana ceeqissenna; ta sabbakizay dosan gidontta wolqqara tana gakkida gishshassa; ta Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakontta aggiko taas aayye ana!
1Corinthians9:17 Mishiraachcho qaalaa tani ta dosan sabbakikko taas woytoy dees; tani ta dosan gidontta wolqqara ooththizayssa gidikko hadara polana mala ooso xalala gidana.
1Corinthians9:18 Histtiin taas aaza woytoy dizee? Taas woytoy daanay Mishiraachcho qaalaa sabbakashe taas bessizayta ta go7ettontta aggikokko.
1Corinthians9:19 Ta goqappe attiin oonaska aylle gidikke; gido attiin darota Godaakko zaarana gishshas asa ubbaas aylle mala gidadis.
1Corinthians9:20 Ayhudata ashshanaas Ayhudatara istta misatadis; tani ta baggara Muse wogaappe garsara gidontta dashe Muse wogaappe garsara dizayta ashshanaas istta misatadis.
1Corinthians9:21 Tani ta baggara Xoossa wogay dizaadenne Kirstoosa wogaas haarettizaade gidikkoka wogay bayndayta ashshanaas istta mala wogay bayndaade gidadis.
1Corinthians9:22 Daaburanchchata ashshanaas gaada tanikka daaburanchchatara istta mala daaburanchcha gidadis; taas dandayettida mala ubbaan issi issi asata ashshanaas asa ubbaara istti hanizaaz hanadis.
1Corinthians9:23 Ta hayssa wursa ooththizay Mishiraachcho qaalaa anjjo isttara gishettanaas Mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas ooththadis.
1Corinthians9:24 Gaadde woth woxxizayti daro shin xoonidi woyto demmizay issaade xalala gididayssa intte erekketii? Hessa gishshas woyto ekkanaas woxxizaade mala intteka woxxite.
1Corinthians9:25 Gaadden woxxi aadhdhanaas giigettizaadey oonikka hano ubbaan barkka bana naagees. Heytantti aadhdhananne dhayana akilile ekkanaas daabureettes shin nu qasse mernaas dhayontta akilile demmanaas daaburoos.
1Corinthians9:26 Hessa gishshas ta qasse poloy baynda coo mela woxxizaade mala woxxike; qasseka carkora baaxetizaade mala coo mela gaden baaxetikke.
1Corinthians9:27 Ta qasse haratas sabbaka pe7ada taas kunda attontta mala ta asateth shiishsha oykkada haarays.
1Corinthians10:1 Ta ishatoo! Kase nu Aawati shaaray isttafe bollara gididi kaaleththidayssa malanne istti wurikka zo7o abba pinnidayssa ta inttena qofsanaas koyays.
1Corinthians10:2 Istti Musera gidanaas giidi shaaraninne abban xammaqettida.
1Corinthians10:3 Wurikka issi ayana quma mida.
1Corinthians10:4 Wurikka issi ayana ushshu uyida; istti uyidaykka bana kaalliza ayana zaallafe pulttidayssafe; he zaallayka Kirstoosa.
1Corinthians10:5 Gido attiin Xoossi darotan ufayettibeenna; hessa gishshas istta ahay bazzon kundi attides.
1Corinthians10:6 Istti iita miish amottidayssaththo nunikka amottontta mala istta hanoy nu naagettana mala nuus leemiso gidides.
1Corinthians10:7 «Derey maanaassinne uyanaas uttides; yexxanaaska dendides» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala istta garsafe issi issi asati ooththoyssaththo intteka eeqa goynnizayta gidopite.
1Corinthians10:8 Istta garsafe issi issi asati laymatidi issi gallas 23
1Corinthians10:9 Istta garsafe issi issi asati Godaa paaccidi shooshshan duketti hayqqi dhaydayssa mala nunikka ane Godaa paaccoko.
1Corinthians10:10 Istta garsafe issi issi asati zuuzumidi dhayssiza bosha kiitanchchan dhaydayssaththo intteka dhayontta mala zuuzumopite.
1Corinthians10:11 Hessi wuri nuus leemiso gidana mala istta bolla gakkides; wode wurseththan diza nuus timirte gidana mala nuus xaafettides.
1Corinthians10:12 Hessa gishshas ta minna eqqa days gizaadey diikko kundontta mala baas naagetto.
1Corinthians10:13 Asa bolla gakkida paaceppe hara aadhdhiza paacey intte bolla gakkibeenna; Xoossi ammanettiza Xoos gidida gishshas intte dandayontta intte wolqqafe bollara intte paacettenna mala izi inttena aggaagenna; gido attiin intte paacettiza wode he paaceza intte dandayana mala wolqqa immidi paaceppe intte kessi ekkana oge izi inttes giigsana.
1Corinthians10:14 Hessa gishshas ta siiqotoo! Eeqas goynnofte; izappe haakkite.
1Corinthians10:15 Ta inttes hayssa gizay wozinama gidida gishshassa; hessa gishshas ta yootizayssa ane intte intterkka pirdite.
1Corinthians10:16 Nuni Xoossa galatidi ekkiza ushshay Kirstoosa suuththara gaagoteththi dizayssa gidennee? Hessaththoka nu baththi baththi gishetti miza ukeththay Kirstoosa ashora gaagoteththi dizayssa gidennee?
1Corinthians10:17 Ukeththay issino gidida mala nunikka daro gidi uttidi wurikka issi asho; nu wurikka issi ukeththaza gishetti moos.
1Corinthians10:18 Ane intte Isra7eele nayti ooththidayssa qopite; shiiqiza yarshozappe mizaytas yarshoy shiiqizasora gaagoteththi deennee?
1Corinthians10:19 Histtiin eeqas yarshettida yarsho gidiin woykko eeqay ba baggara go7ara dees gazinaa?
1Corinthians10:20 Gidenna! Ammanontta asay shiishshiza yarshoy Xoossas gidontta Xala7essa; inttes Xala7era issifeteththi daana mala ta koykke.
1Corinthians10:21 Xala7e ushshinne Godaa ushshu intte issife gaththi uyana dandayekketa; Godaa maaddafenne Xala7e maaddafe gaththi maana dandayekketa.
1Corinthians10:22 Nuni Godaa hanqeththinoo? Nu izappe minnizonii?
1Corinthians10:23 Wurikka taas imettides shin wurikka tana go7izaaz gidenna; wurikka taassa shin wurikka tana maaddenna.
1Corinthians10:24 Asi wurikka ba lagge go7anaaz gaththi xeello attiin bana go7anaaz xalala koyoppo.
1Corinthians10:25 Giyan bayzettiza asho ubbaa sidhey baynda miite.
1Corinthians10:26 Biittaynne biitta bolla dizay wurikka Godayssa.
1Corinthians10:27 Ammanontta asi inttena baso xeygidi shiishshida kath wursi aykkoka sidhontta miite.
1Corinthians10:28 Gido attiin issaadey
1Corinthians10:29 Ta inttes hessa gizay he yootidaade qofaa gishshas gadis attiin intte qofaa gishshas gabeekke; ta xillo gida dishin aazas hara asa qofaa gaason ta bolla pirdettizee?
1Corinthians10:30 Ta Xoos galatada mizaade gida uttada aazas hara asan pirdettoo?
1Corinthians10:31 Histtiko intte ay miikkoka
1Corinthians10:32 Ayhuda asaas gidiin Ayzaabetas gidiin woykko Xoossa Woosa Keeththas oonaska dhuphe gidopite.
1Corinthians10:33 Ta as wursaka ay ogerakka ufayssana koyza mala intteka hessaththo ooththite; daroti attana mala ta tana go7izaaz gidontta istta go7izaaz koyays.
1Corinthians11:1 Tani Kirstoosa leemiso kaalliza mala intteka ta leemiso kaallite.
1Corinthians11:2 Intte taas wursi qoppiza gishshassinne taappe ekkida timirteza lo7eththi oykkida gishshas ta inttena galatays.
1Corinthians11:3 Gido attiin ta intte erana mala koyzay attumasaas ubbaas hu7ey Kirstoosa gididayssa mala attumasay maccas ubbaas hu7e; qasse Xoossi Kirstoosas hu7e.
1Corinthians11:4 Ba hu7e gullunttidi Xoos woossizaadey woykko qaala yootizaadey oonikka barkka bana kawushshees.
1Corinthians11:5 Ba hu7e goozontta woossiza maccassaya woykko tinbite qaala yootiza ay maccasika barkka bana kawushshawus; hessi iza ba hu7e bulisidaadera gina.
1Corinthians11:6 Maccassi ba hu7e goozontta aggiko meedettu woykko qanxxisu; izis hu7e meedeteththi woykko qanxxiseththi yeellachchizaaz gidikko goozu.
1Corinthians11:7 Addey ba hu7e gullunttanaas bessenna; attumasi Xoossa leemisonne Xoossa bonchcho; maccassi gidikko addes bonchcho.
1Corinthians11:8 Gaasoykka maccassi addefe medhettadus attiin attumasi maccassafe medhettibeenna.
1Corinthians11:9 Qasseka maccassi addes medhettadus attiin addey maccassas medhettibeenna.
1Corinthians11:10 Hessa gishshas kiitanchchati beyanaas naagiza maccassas imettida maata bessiza goosse ba hu7en goozu.
1Corinthians11:11 Godaa achchan gidikko maccassi addey baynda
1Corinthians11:12 Maccassi addefe beettidayssaththo addeyka maccassafe yelettees; gido attiin nam7ayka Xoossafe beettida.
1Corinthians11:13 Maccassi ba hu7e goozontta Xoos woossanaas bessizaakko ane intte pirdite.
1Corinthians11:14 Attumasi ba hu7e adussi dichchiko borso gididayssa inttena medheteththa hanoteththi erisuwee?
1Corinthians11:15 Maccay gidikko ba hu7e binana dichchiko hessi izis bonchcho gidennee? Izis adussa hu7e binanay imettiday izis seelo gidanaassa.
1Corinthians11:16 Hessa gishshas oonikka hayssa ha yo7ozan palamettana koykko nuus gidiinkka Xoossa Woosa Keeththatas hayssafe hara wogay deenna.
1Corinthians11:17 Intte issi soo shiiqettiza wode qohos attiin go7as gidontta gishshas ta hayssa azazoza inttes aaththizay inttena galatashe gidenna.
1Corinthians11:18 Intte Woosa Keeththan shiiqiza wode intte garsan shaaketeththi dizayssa ta kaseta siyadis; ta siyoyssafe baggay tumu gidanayssa ta ammanays.
1Corinthians11:19 Intte giddofe tumanchchati shaaketti erettana mala hessa mala shaakoy intte giddon daanayssi dosa gidenna.
1Corinthians11:20 Intte issife shiiqettidi mizay Godaa kawo gidenna.
1Corinthians11:21 Intte shiiqettidi issoy issaa naagontta dishe kath meeta; inttefe issaadey gafan dishin hankkoyssi qasse maththottees.
1Corinthians11:22 Histtiin inttes uyanasoynne maanasoy baawee? Woykko Xoossa Keeththe leqqidi aykkoyka bayndayta yeellachcheetii? Histtiin ta inttena ay goo? Hayssa ha hanozas inttena galatoo? Mulekka galatikke.
1Corinthians11:23 Tani Godaappe ekkidayssa inttes aaththadis; hessika Godaa Yesusi aadhdhi imettida omars uketh denththidinne Xoos galati baththidi
1Corinthians11:24 
1Corinthians11:25 Hessaththoka kawoppe guye ushshaa denththidi
1Corinthians11:26 Hayssa ukeththaa intte miza wodenne hayssa ushshaaka uyiza ubba wode Goday yaana gakkanaas intte iza hayqo yootana.
1Corinthians11:27 Hessa gishshas oonikka bessontta dishin hayssa ukeththaa miikko woykko Godaa ushshaa uyikko izaadey Godaa ashonne iza suuththaa kawushshida gishshas izi oyshettana.
1Corinthians11:28 Oonikka hayssa ha ukeththaa maanaappenne ushshaafe uyanaappe kaseti barkka bana paacco.
1Corinthians11:29 Gaasoykka oonikka Godaa asho baas gelontta dishin miikkonne Godaa ushshaa uyikko izaadey barkka ba bolla pirda ehees.
1Corinthians11:30 Intte garsan daro asay daaburdaynne sakettiday qasseka baggay hayqqiday hessa gaasonna.
1Corinthians11:31 Nuni nurkka nu bolla pirdizaakko izi nu bolla pirdenna.
1Corinthians11:32 Gido attiin Goday pirdiza wode nu hankko ammanontta asaara pirdettontta mala izi nuna kaseti murees.
1Corinthians11:33 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte maana shiiqiza wode issoy issaara naagettite.
1Corinthians11:34 Intte shiiqiza shiiqoy pirdas gidontta mala inttefe oonikka gafidaadey diikko kasetidi ba soon mo; hankko attidayssa tani hara wode hee intteko baada woga woththana.
1Corinthians12:1 Ta ishatoo! Ayanay immiza imota gishshas intte issi miish erana mala ta koyays.
1Corinthians12:2 Intte ammananaappe kase coo mela yaanne haa guussan intte erontta kaallidi doona duude gidida eeqatakko bidayssa intteka ereeta.
1Corinthians12:3 Hessa gishshas oonikka Xoossa Ayanan haasayshe
1Corinthians12:4 Asas imoteththi dumma dumma gidishin Ayanay gidikko issino.
1Corinthians12:5 Oosoykka dumma dumma gidishin Goday gidikko issino.
1Corinthians12:6 Dumma dumma ooso ogeti diikkoka wursika ooththizay issi Xoossaa.
1Corinthians12:7 Gido attiin Xillo Ayana qoncciso imotay issaades imettizay issife go7ettanaassa.
1Corinthians12:8 Issaades hiillan haasayana erateththi imettees; hara asas qasse he Ayanankka erateththa qaalan haasayana qaalay imettees.
1Corinthians12:9 Issaades he Ayanan ammanoy imettees; hara asas qasse he Ayanankka hargizayta paththiza imotay imettees.
1Corinthians12:10 Issaades malalisiza ooso ooththiza imotay
1Corinthians12:11 Heyti wurikka he issi Ayanay immiza imota gidishin issi issi asas ba koyida mala immees.
1Corinthians12:12 Issi asateththa bolla daro billiteti diikkoka asateththay issino; gido attiin billiteti daro gidikkoka asateththay issino xalla; Kirstoosikka hessa mala.
1Corinthians12:13 Ayhuda asata gidiinkka Girike asata gidiinkka
1Corinthians12:14 Asateththi medhettiday daro billitetappe attiin issi billitefe xalala gidenna.
1Corinthians12:15 Tohoy
1Corinthians12:16 Hayththi
1Corinthians12:17 Asateththi wurikka ayfe xalla gididaakko aazan siyanee? Asateththi wurikka hayth xalla gididaakko aazan singanee?
1Corinthians12:18 Gido attiin Xoossi issaa issaa ba koyida mala asateththaa giddon daanaas bessizason woththides.
1Corinthians12:19 Billitey wurikka issino gididaakko kumeththa asateththi awappe beettanee?
1Corinthians12:20 Hessa gishshas billiteti daro shin asateththi gidikko issino xalla.
1Corinthians12:21 Ayfey kushe
1Corinthians12:22 Haray attoshin ubbaafe laafa misatiza billiteti daro koshshizayta.
1Corinthians12:23 Nuni laafa gi leqqiza billiteta hankkoytappe aaththi bonchchoos; qasseka nu isttan yeellatiza billiteta harappe aaththi naagoos.
1Corinthians12:24 Nu isttan yeellatontta billitetas gidikko hessa mala bonchcho koshshenna; Xoossi gidikko asateththa billiteta issi bolla oyseththidi bonchchoy paaccizaytas aadheththa bonchcho immides.
1Corinthians12:25 Izi hessa ooththiday asateththa billiteta garsan shaaketeththi dontta istti ba garsan issoy issaa banara gina gi qoppanaassa.
1Corinthians12:26 Issi billitey sakettiko hankko billiteti wurikka izara issife saketteettes; issi billitey bonchchettiko billiteti wurikka issife ufayetteettes.
1Corinthians12:27 Histtiko intte wurikka Kirstoosa asateth; intte issoy issoy iza asateththa billiteta.
1Corinthians12:28 Xoossi Woosa Keeththa giddon koyro Hawaareta
1Corinthians12:29 Wurikka hawaaretee? Wurikka nabetee? Wurikka astamaaretee? Wurikka malalisiza miish ooththizoo?
1Corinthians12:30 Ubbaasikka hargizayta paththiza imotay dizee? Asi wurikka dumma qaalan haasayzee? Dumma qaalan haasayettoyssa asi wuri birshizee?
1Corinthians12:31 Gido attiin intte wurikka ubbaafe aadhdhiza imota lo7eththi koyite. Qasseka hara ubbaafe aadhdhiza oge ta inttena bessana.
1Corinthians13:1 Ta asa qaalaninne salo kiitanchchata qaalan haasaykkoka taas siiqoy baynda aggiko coo mela birata giirissa mala woykko daala giirissa mala.
1Corinthians13:2 Tinbite haasayza imotay taas diikkoka
1Corinthians13:3 Taas dizaaz wursa manqotas ta immikokka
1Corinthians13:4 Siiqoy dandaya
1Corinthians13:5 bessonttaaz ooththenna; ba go7a xalla xeellenna; qoho qoodan yeggenna.
1Corinthians13:6 Siiqoy tumanppe attiin makkallan ufayettenna.
1Corinthians13:7 Siiqoy ubba wode dandayees; ubba wodekka ammanees; ufays ooththeessinne minni eqqees.
1Corinthians13:8 Siiqoy mulekka kundenna; tinbitey gidikko attana; hara qaalan haasayaykka attana; erateththika shaarettana.
1Corinthians13:9 Gaasoykka nu erizay ubbaa gidontta shaakki eroos; tinbite haasaya gidikkoka bagga haasayoos.
1Corinthians13:10 Gido attiin wurseththi gakkiza wode kumeth gidontta imotay he wode shaarettana.
1Corinthians13:11 Ta guuththa naateteththan dashe naa mala haasayayssinne naa mala qoppays; naa malakka yuushsha qoppays; kaha kunththidaappe guye kase naateththan hanizayssa wursaka yegga aggadis.
1Corinthians13:12 Nuni ha7i be7izayssi haaththan xeelliza mala coo bozhi bozhees shin he wode gidikko nu iza ayfeso lo7eththi beyana; ta ha7i kumeth gidontta bagga xalala erays; he wode gidikko tani ta hu7es erettidayssa mala erana.
1Corinthians13:13 Hessa gishshas ammanoy
1Corinthians14:1 Siiqo kaallite; ayana imotata harappeka tinbite haasayza imotata lo7eththi koyite.
1Corinthians14:2 Hara qaalan haasayzaadey Xoossas attiin asas haasayenna; xuura gidida yo7o Ayanan haasayza gishshas izi gizay asas gelenna.
1Corinthians14:3 Tinbite haasayzaadey as minththeththanaas
1Corinthians14:4 Hara qaalan haasayzaadey qasse barkka bana minththeththees; tinbite haasayzaadey gidikko Woosa Keeththaa go7ees.
1Corinthians14:5 Intte wurikka hara qaalan haasayzaakko ta dosays shin hessafekka bollara intte tinbite qaalan haasayzaakko ta dosays; Woosa keeththay minnana mala hara qaalara haasayzaadey ba haasayzayssa birshontta izi hara qaalara haasayzayssafe tinbite haasayzaadey aadhdhees.
1Corinthians14:6 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Ta intteko biza wode ta inttes qoncciseththan woykko erateththan woykko tinbiten
1Corinthians14:7 Hessi coo susul7e malanne diiththa mala shemppoy baynda istta giirissas dummateththi shaaketti erettontta aggiko iza wostti eranee?
1Corinthians14:8 Qasseka xurumbay aazas punettizaakko woykko zayey aazas zayettizaakko shaakki erettontta ogera punettiko ooni olas giigettanee?
1Corinthians14:9 Intteka hessa mala; intte doonappe erettiza qaalay kezontta aggiko intte gizayssa ooni eranee? Coo mela carkon dhayana.
1Corinthians14:10 Alame bolla daro dumma dumma qaalay dees shin birsheththi baynda qaalay baa.
1Corinthians14:11 Hessa gishshas issaadey haasayza qaalaa birsheth ta erontta aggiko haasayzaades tani imath gidays; izaadeyka taas imath gidees.
1Corinthians14:12 Intteka hessa mala Ayanan imoteththata demmanaas koyza gishshas Woosa Keeththa go7iza imotata demmanaas lo7eththi koyite.
1Corinthians14:13 Hessa gishshas hara qaalan haasayza asi ba haasaydayssa birsheth erana mala baas woosso.
1Corinthians14:14 Tani hara qaalara woossiza wode ta Ayanan woossays attiin ta izappe aykkoka erikke.
1Corinthians14:15 Histtiin ta ay ooththana mala taas bessizee? Tani ta Ayanankka woossana; wozinan woththadakka woossana; ta Ayanankka yexxana. Wozinarakka yexxana.
1Corinthians14:16 Hessaththo gidontta aggiko ne Xoos Ayanan galatiza wode hessa erontta issi imaththa asi ne galata woosaa wostti
1Corinthians14:17 Ne bessiza mala galatanaas dandayaasa; hankkoyssi gidikko izan go7ettenna.
1Corinthians14:18 Tani inttefe bollara hara qaalan haasayza gishshas Xoos galatays.
1Corinthians14:19 Gido attiin Woosa Keeththan erettontta daro shii qaalata haasayanaappe hara asata tamaarsanaas asay eriza ichchash qaalan haasayana dosays.
1Corinthians14:20 Ta ishatoo! Intte intte qofan guuththa nayta mala gidopite; iita oosos gidikko guuththa nayta mala gidite; qofan gidikko kaha kunththida asata gidite.
1Corinthians14:21 Kase wogaankka
1Corinthians14:22 Hessa gishshas hara qaalan haasayay ammanontta asaas malata gidees attiin ammanizaytas malata gidenna; tinbitey gidikko ammanizaytas attiin ammanonttaytas gidenna.
1Corinthians14:23 Histtiko Woosa Keeththan ammaniza asay issife shiiqidason wurikka erontta hara qaalan haasayshin hessa erontta asati woykko ammanontta asay shiiqidi haasayzaaso gelikko
1Corinthians14:24 Gido attiin asay wuri tinbite qaala haasayettishin imaththi woykko ammanonttaadey gelikko ba siyidayssa ubbaa erananne he qaalan pirdettana.
1Corinthians14:25 Izaadey ba wozinan qotti woththidaazi wuri qonccananne izikka ba baggara
1Corinthians14:26 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Histtiin ay giinoo? Intte issife shiiqiza wode inttefe issi issi asas mazamure qasse issi issi asas timirtey dees; issi issi asas qonccontta xuura miishshata qonccisiza imotay dees; hara asas dumma qaalan haasayana imotay dees; haras qasse he qaalaa birshiza imotay dees; hessi he imotay wurikka ammanizayta go7anaas bessees.
1Corinthians14:27 Hara qaalara haasayzay diikko nam7u as woykko dari darikko heedzdzu gididi taran taran yootetto; hara asi qasse birsho.
1Corinthians14:28 Birshizaadey baynda aggiko shiiqida asaa giddon co7u giidi baas xallanne Xoossas xalla yooto.
1Corinthians14:29 Tinbite haasaya imotay diza nabeti nam7ati woykko heedzdzati tinbite haasayetto; hankko asay yootettidayssa lo7eththi paacco.
1Corinthians14:30 Uttida asaa garsafe issaadey issi miishshi qoncciko koyro haasayzayssi co7u go.
1Corinthians14:31 Intte garsafe issi issi asi taamarana malanne minettana mala intte wurikka taran taran tinbite yootanaas dandayeeta.
1Corinthians14:32 Nabeta ayanay nabetas azazettees; gaasoykka Xoossi saroteththa Xoossafe attiin wocama Xoos gidenna; ammanizayta Woosa Keeth ubbasonkka hessa mala.
1Corinthians14:33 
1Corinthians14:34 Ammaniza asay goynos shiiqizason maccassati co7u getto; Muse wogay kase gida mala istti azazetteto attiin shiiqoson istti haasayana mala isttas imettibeenna.
1Corinthians14:35 Maccassati eranaas koyza issi issi yo7oti diikko ba keeththan ba azinata oychchetto; gaasoykka maccassi shiiqoson haasayay yeellachchizaaza.
1Corinthians14:36 Xoossa qaalay inttefe kezidee? Woykko intteko xalla gakkidee?
1Corinthians14:37 Oonikka bana
1Corinthians14:38 Hayssa erontta asi diikko izi ba hu7es erettenna.
1Corinthians14:39 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Buro tinbite haasayanaas lo7eththi koyite; dumma dumma qaalan haasayakka diggofte.
1Corinthians14:40 Gidikkoka wurikka maararanne wogara gido.
1Corinthians15:1 Ha7ikka ta ishatoo! Ta inttena sabbakiin intte ekkidi izan minni eqqida Mishiraachcho qaalaa ha7i qofsana koyays.
1Corinthians15:2 Ta inttes sabbakida qaalaa intte lo7eththi oykkiko he Mishiraachcho qaalaan intte attana; hessa mala gidontta aggiko intte ammanoy hada.
1Corinthians15:3 Tani taas ekkidayssanne ubbaafe aadhdhizayssa inttes aaththa immadis; Geeshsha Maxaafati gizayssa mala Kirstoosi nu nagara gishshas hayqqides.
1Corinthians15:4 Moogettides; Geeshsha Maxaafatan xaafettidayssa mala heedzdzanththo gallas hayqoppe dendides.
1Corinthians15:5 Hessafe kaallidi Phexroosas beettides; qasseka Yesusa kaalliza tammanne nam7atas beettides.
1Corinthians15:6 Hessafe guye ichchashu xeetuppe bollara diza ammanizaytas issito beettides; iza be7ida asaappe dariza baggay paxa dees; baggay qasse hayqqides.
1Corinthians15:7 Hessafe guye Yaaqoobes beettides; kaallidikka kumeththa Hawaaretas beettides.
1Corinthians15:8 Tani Hawaareta ubbaafe laafanne kase Xoossa Woosa Keeththe gooddida gishshas Hawaare geetettanaas bessonttaadeko shin as ubbaafe awucaya misatiza taaska beettides.
1Corinthians15:9 
1Corinthians15:10 Gido attiin Xoossa kiyateththan ha7i ta hananayssa hanadis; taaska imettida Xoossa kiyateththi hada gidibeenna; tani oonappeka bollara daro minna ooththadis. Gido attiin hessa ooththiday tana gidontta Xoossa aadho kiyateth.
1Corinthians15:11 Hessa gishshas tana gidiin isttaka gidiin nu wurikka sabbakizay hessa; intteka ammaniday hessa.
1Corinthians15:12 Kirstoosi hayqoppe dendidayssa nu tamaarsiko histtiin intte garsafe issi issi asati waanidi hayqoppe dendoy baa gizoo?
1Corinthians15:13 Hayqqida asas denththi donttaa gidikko Kirstoosikka dendibeenna guussakaa?
1Corinthians15:14 Kirstoosikka hayqoppe dendonttaa gidikko nu sabbakos go7ay baa; intte ammanoykka hada.
1Corinthians15:15 Hessafekka bollara
1Corinthians15:16 Gaasoykka hayqqidayti dendonttaaz gidikko Kirstoosikka hayqoppe dendibeenna.
1Corinthians15:17 Kirstoosi hayqoppe dendonttaa gidikko intte ammanoy hada; intteka hanno gakkanaas intte intte nagarara deeta guussa.
1Corinthians15:18 Hanoy hessa mala gidikko Kirstoosa ammanidi hayqqidayti wurikka dhayda guussa.
1Corinthians15:19 Nuni Kirstoosan ufays ooththizay hanno biittay bolla duussas xalla gidikko nu asaa ubbaafe laafata.
1Corinthians15:20 Gido attiin Kirstoosi hayqqidaytas ubbaas bayra gididi hayqoppe tumu dendides.
1Corinthians15:21 Hayqoy issi as Addaame baggara yida mala hayqqidayta denththi Kirstoosa baggarakko.
1Corinthians15:22 Asi wurikka Addaame baggara hayqqida mala hessaththoka asi wurikka Kirstoosa baggara hayqoppe dendana.
1Corinthians15:23 Gido attiin wurikka ba tarara tarara dendana; koyro bayra gidida Kirstoosi dendides; izappe kaallidi izi yiza wode Kirstoosas gidizayti dendana.
1Corinthians15:24 Hessafe guye haarettiza dereta godateththinne wolqqamata wursi dhayssidaappe guye kawota Xoossa Aawaas aaththi immiza wode he wode wurseth gidana.
1Corinthians15:25 Izi ba morkke wursika ba toho gars aaththana gakkanaas izi kawotanaas bessees.
1Corinthians15:26 Buro wurseththan xoonetti dhayana morkkey hayqo.
1Corinthians15:27 «Xoossi wursika iza godateththafe garsan woththides» gizaazi Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides; gido attiin
1Corinthians15:28 Wurikka izas haarettidayssafe guye Xoossi ubbaafe bolla gidana mala Xoossa nay qasse ubbaa baas haarisidayssas Xoossa Aawaas haarettana.
1Corinthians15:29 Hayqoppe denththi dontta aggiko histtiin hayqqida asaa gishshas giidi xammaqettiza ubbaas go7ay aazee? Hayqqidayti mulekka dendonttaa gidikko histtiin asay istta gishshas aazas xammaqettizee?
1Corinthians15:30 Nu qasse ubba wode iita metos aadhdhi imettizay aazassee?
1Corinthians15:31 Ta ishatoo! Hach hach hayqoy tanara gaaggees; hessaka nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa gaason intte bolla diza ammaneteth ta inttes qonccisays.
1Corinthians15:32 Tani Efesoonen do7a misatiza asatara baaxetidayssi asi beyana mala xalala gidikko taas izan aaza wodhey dizee? Hayqqidaytas denththi dontta aggiko
1Corinthians15:33 Intte balettofte! Iita laggeteththi lo7o amalera dizayta moorees.
1Corinthians15:34 Wozinama gidite; nagara ooththofte; Xoos eronttayti issi issi asati intte garsan diza gishshas ta hessa inttena yeellachchanaas gays.
1Corinthians15:35 «Hayqqidayti waani dendanee? Ay mala ashora dendanee?» gizaadey daana dandayees.
1Corinthians15:36 Nenoo eeyazoo! Ne zeriza zereththay hayqqontta dishe caarenna.
1Corinthians15:37 Neni zeriza kaththa modheya gistte woykko hara kaththa ayfe gidikkoka guyeppe ne ekkanaara ha7i ne zerooro gidukku.
1Corinthians15:38 Xoossi qasse ba koyida mala he zereththaas iza mala medho immees; zereththaa qommotas issaas issaas iza misatiza asateth immees.
1Corinthians15:39 Ashoy wurikka issi mala gidenna; asa ashoy issaa gidishin mehe ashoy qasse hara; kafo ashoy hara; mole ashoykka hara qommo.
1Corinthians15:40 Hessa malakka salon dizaytaska istta misatiza medhoy dees; biitta bolla dizaytaska istta misatiza medhoy dees; gido attiin saloyta bonchchoy issi mala; biitta bolla dizayta medho bonchchoyka dumma.
1Corinthians15:41 Arshe bonchchoy issino; gido attiin agina bonchchoy qasse dumma; xoolintteta bonchchoyka hara; issi xoolintte bonchchoy hara xoolintte bonchchofe dummatees.
1Corinthians15:42 Hayqqida asa denththika hessa mala; wooqqiza medhoy zerettiin wooqqontta medhoy dendana.
1Corinthians15:43 Kawushshateththan zerettana shin bonchchon dendana; daabursan zerettana shin wolqqama gididi dendana.
1Corinthians15:44 Medheteththa asateththi zerettana shin Ayana asateththi dendana; medheteththa asateththi diikko qasseka Ayana asateththika dees.
1Corinthians15:45 Hessa gishshas
1Corinthians15:46 Gido attiin koyro yiday Ayanayssa gidontta medheteththayssa; Ayanayssi qasse guyeppe yidayssa.
1Corinthians15:47 Koyro yida Addaamey biittafe medhettida gishshas izi biittafe. Nam7anththo yidayssi saloppe.
1Corinthians15:48 Biittafe gididayti istti biittafe medhettidayssa mala. Saloppe gididayti saloppe yidayssa mala.
1Corinthians15:49 Nuni biitta asa medha may7oyssaththoka saloyssa medhakka may7ana.
1Corinthians15:50 Ta ishatoo! Ta hayssa inttes yootays ashoynne suuththi Xoossa kawoteth laattettenna; dhayanayssi dhayonttayssa laattenna.
1Corinthians15:51 Ane ta inttes issi xuura yo7o yootays; nuni wurikka hayqqoko; gido attiin nu wurikka laamettana.
1Corinthians15:52 Hessika hananay nu qoppontta dishin wurseththa xurumbay punettiza wode qiphida ayfey xeelliza mala issito hanana; xurumbay punettana; hayqqida asay wooqqonttayta gididi dendana; nunikka laamettana.
1Corinthians15:53 Dhayzayssi dhayonttayssa may7anaas
1Corinthians15:54 Dhayzay dhayonttaaz
1Corinthians15:55 Hessaththoka
1Corinthians15:56 Hayqoy izara dukkiza wolqqay nagara; nagara wolqqay woga.
1Corinthians15:57 Gido attiin Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuus xoono immiza Xoossas galatay gido.
1Corinthians15:58 Hessa gishshas ta siiqo ishatoo! Minni eqqite; ay miishshankka yark yarkofte; Godaa oosos intte daaburza daabursay hada gidonttayssa eridi ubba wode pacey baynda Godaas ooththanaas minettite.
1Corinthians16:1 Ha7i qasse ammanizaytas miishsha keso gishshas Galatiyan diza Woosa Keeththatas tani immida azazo mala intteka ooththite.
1Corinthians16:2 Miishshay kezanay buro ta hee biin gidontta mala inttefe issi issi asi baas diza mala saaminttan saaminttan wogga gallas kessi woththo.
1Corinthians16:3 Ta hee biza wode intte doorida asatas ta moyzo dabdaabe xaafa immada
1Corinthians16:4 Ta isttara baanaas koshshizaaz gidikko tanara bandettes.
1Corinthians16:5 Tani bashe Maqidooniyara aadhdha buussi taas attontta gishshas ta Maqidooniya gakkada heera intteko baana.
1Corinthians16:6 Ta awakka bishin tana ogey waayisontta mala intte tana maaddana mala bashe ta intte achchan gam7ontta aggike. Oonee erizay balgoy aadhdhana gakkanaas ta intte achchan balgoza aaththontta waaya aggana.
1Corinthians16:7 Ta intte achchan daro wode gam7anaas koyza gishshas inttena coo ogera aadhdha bashe beyanaas koykke; Godaa shene gidikko intte achchan adussa wode gam7anaas koyays.
1Corinthians16:8 Gido attiin Phenxeqoste geetettiza ba7aale gallas gakkanaas ta Efesoonen gam7ana.
1Corinthians16:9 Ta heen gam7ana gaasoykka taas heen gita ooso pengey doyettides shin tanara eqettizayti daroti deettes.
1Corinthians16:10 Ximtoosi intteko biikko izi ta mala Godaa oosanchcha gidida gishshas izi baboy baynda daana mala intte iza maaddite.
1Corinthians16:11 Hessa gishshas oonikka iza kadhoppo; izi taakko saron simmana mala intte iza maaddite; nunikka hara ammanizaytara iza yuussaa naagon doos.
1Corinthians16:12 Nu isha Aphiloosi hara ammanizaytara intteko baana mala keeha woossadis shin izi qasse ha7i intteko baanaas koyibeenna; gido attiin baana ogey izas giigshin izi intteko baana.
1Corinthians16:13 Beeggite! Ammanon minni eqqite; minnite; goobite.
1Corinthians16:14 Intte ooththizaaz wursika siiqon ooththite.
1Corinthians16:15 Ta ishatoo! Akaya biittan koyro ammaniday Isttifaanoseso asaa gididayssanne ammaniza asaa maaddanaas istti bana aaththi immidayssa intteka ereeta.
1Corinthians16:16 Istta misatiza asatassinne isttara issife daaburza asatas ubbaas azazettana mala ta inttena woossays.
1Corinthians16:17 Isttifaanosi
1Corinthians16:18 Ta wozinanne intte wozina wursi shempisida; hessa gishshas hessantta mala asata mule balopite.
1Corinthians16:19 Iisiya biittan diza Woosa Keeththati inttena saro geettes; Aqilaynne Phirsiqillayka istta soon shiiqiza ammaniza asay Godaa sunththan bonchcho sarota inttes shiishsheettes.
1Corinthians16:20 Haan ammanizayti wurikka inttena saro geettes; intte intte giddon issoy issaara siiqo yeereteth yeerettite.
1Corinthians16:21 Hayssa sarokaa ta kushera xaafiday tana Phawuloosa.
1Corinthians16:22 Godaa dosonttaadey diikko izi qanggettidaade gido! Godoo haa ya!
1Corinthians16:23 Godaa Yesusa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
1Corinthians16:24 Ta siiqoy Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara inttes ubbaas gido! Amiin.
2Corinthians1:1 Xoossa shene mala Yesus Kirstoosas kiitettida Phawuloosappenne nu isha Ximtoosappe Qorontoosen diza Xoossa Woosa Keeththeys qasseka Akaya biittan ammaniza kumeththa asaas
2Corinthians1:2 Nu Aawaa Xoossaafenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroy inttes gido.
2Corinthians1:3 Maariza Aawassinne wursika minththeththiza nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aawaa Xoossaas galatay gido.
2Corinthians1:4 Nunikka nu baggara Xoossafe demmida minoteththan metotetizayta minththeththanaas dandayana mala nu meton izi nuna minththeththees.
2Corinthians1:5 Kirstoosa waayey nu bolla daridayssa mala nuuska Kirstoosa baggara minththeththoy darees.
2Corinthians1:6 Nu meton intte atoteththinne minoteth demmeeta; nuni metotishin qasse intteka kase ekkida metoza mala gencci ekkidi minettandeta.
2Corinthians1:7 Nu meto intte nunara shaakki ekkida mala nunarakka intte minettanayssa nuni eriza gishshas nuus intte bolla diza ufayssi gita.
2Corinthians1:8 Ta ishatoo! Iisiya biittan nu bolla gakkida metoza gishshas intte erana mala nu koyoos; he nu bolla gakkida metozi nu tookkanaappe deexo gidida gishshas hayqqontta paxa daana giidi qoppibeekko.
2Corinthians1:9 Addafekka nu bolla hayqo pirday pirdettida misatides; hessi wurikka nu bolla gakkida gaasoykka nuni hayqqidayta denththiza Xoossan ammanettanaassafe attiin nu wolqqan ammanettontta mala hanides.
2Corinthians1:10 Izi nuna hessa mala qoppontta hayqoppe ashshides; ha7ikka wodeppeka izi nuna ashshanayssa nu ammanettoos.
2Corinthians1:11 Intteka intte woosan nuna maaddite; daro asaa woosan nuus imettida imotassinne nu gishshas daroti Xoossaa galateettes.
2Corinthians1:12 Histtiko nu ceeqeteththi hayssa mala; ha alamezan harappeka inttessara nuussara diza gaytoteththan Xoossafe gidida geeshshateththaninne suureteththan nu de7idayssa nu wozinay nuus markkattees; hessika asa cinccateththan gidontta Xoossa kiyateththanna.
2Corinthians1:13 Intte nababidi eranaas dandayontta miish nu inttes xaafokko; intte wursika nababidi eranayssa nu eroos.
2Corinthians1:14 Intte nunan ceeqettizayssa mala nunikka inttenan ceeqettizayssa ha7i wursi erontta aggikokka Godaa Yesusi simmi yiza gallas wursika erana.
2Corinthians1:15 Tani hayssa shaakka eriza gishshas nam7uto intte go7ettana mala koyro inttena beyana qoppadis.
2Corinthians1:16 Hessika ta kase Maqidooniya bashe inttena beyada Maqidooniyappeka simmashe intte achchara aadhdhada ta Yuhuda bishin intte tana maaddana mala qoppadiskoshin.
2Corinthians1:17 Hayssi ta qofay inttes ta lo7eththa qoppontta qofa misatizee? Woykko Ayzaabetas lose gididayssaththo tanikka issito
2Corinthians1:18 Xoossi ammanettida Xoos gidida mala nu inttes yootiza qaalaykka
2Corinthians1:19 Gaasoykka tana gidiin woykko Silwaanoosanne Ximtoosa gidiin nu inttes sabbakida Xoossa Naa Yesus Kirstoosi
2Corinthians1:20 Xoossafe imettida hidotati wurikka
2Corinthians1:21 Hessa gishshas intteka nunikka Kirstoosan minni eqqana malanne ba oosos dooriday Xoossa.
2Corinthians1:22 Nu izayta gididayssa erisanaas ba maatame nu bolla shocidaynne nuni sinththafe demmana miishshas Ayana waaseteth nu wozinan woththiday iza.
2Corinthians1:23 Tani Qorontoose simmada intteko bontta aggiday inttena mishisikke gaadakko; qasse hessi tumu gidontta wordo gidikko Xoossi ta bolla markkatto.
2Corinthians1:24 Intte ammanon eqqida gishshas inttena ufayssanaas nu inttenara ooththana attiin intte ammano bolla godatanaas gidenna.
2Corinthians2:1 Ta inttena mishisanaas koyontta gishshas qasseka intteko biikke gaada qofa qachchadis.
2Corinthians2:2 Ta inttena mishisidaaz gidikkoka mishettida inttefe aadhdhi ufayssizay taas haray ooni dizee?
2Corinthians2:3 Ta kase inttes xaafiday ta intteko biza wode tana ufayssanaas bessiza asati tana mishisoppetto gaada xaafadis; gaasoykka ta ufayettiko inttes ubbaasikka ufays gidanayssa ta ammanays.
2Corinthians2:4 Ta inttes hessaththo xaafishin ta wozinan daro miishshaynne daro qofay kumi dishin daro afunxxashe xaafadis; hessaka ta ooththiday ta inttena daro siiqizayssa intte erana mala gaada attiin inttena mishisanaas gidenna.
2Corinthians2:5 Oonikka ase qohidaa gidikko gujechcho gidontta mala qohidaadey tana xalla gidontta guuththara gidikkoka inttenakka ubbaa qohides.
2Corinthians2:6 Hessa mala asas daro asay iza bolla woththida qixaatey izaades gidana.
2Corinthians2:7 Hessaaddey keehi muuzottidi hidota qanxxontta mala intte hessaades atto giidi iza minththeththanaas bessees.
2Corinthians2:8 Hessaththoka intte iza siiqizayssa zaareththidi iza bessana mala ta inttena woossays.
2Corinthians2:9 Ta hayssa inttes xaafiday intte inttena gakkiza paace xoonidi ubbaan intte azazettizaakko eranaassa.
2Corinthians2:10 Intte atto gizaades tanikka atto gays; qasse ta tumappe atto gaanaazi dizaa gidikko Kirstoosa sinththan ta atto gizay intte gishshas gaadakko.
2Corinthians2:11 Ta hessaththo ooththizay Xala7ey geliza xoo7e demmontta mala gaadakko! Nuni iza gene qofaa balokko.
2Corinthians2:12 Tani Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootanaas Xiro7aada bida wode Goday taas ooso oge doydes.
2Corinthians2:13 Gido attiin tani ta ishaa Titoosa heen demmontta aggida gishshas
2Corinthians2:14 Gido attiin Kirstoosa baggara ubba wode nuna xoono ogen kaaleththi yuushshizanne ba lo7o erateththaa nu baggara ubbason qonccisiza Godaas galatay gakko.
2Corinthians2:15 Gaasoykka nuni dhayanaytassinne attanaytas giddon Kirstoosa baggara Xoossas shiiqida sawo tunnu giza exaane mala.
2Corinthians2:16 Dhayanaytas nuni wodhiza xinqqo; attanaytas qasse hayqoppe de7oso efiza de7o sawo; histtiin hayssas bessizaadey oonee?
2Corinthians2:17 Nuni Wodhe demmanaas giidi Xoossa qaala shaqace mala walakereththidi bayziza daro asata mala gidokko; gido attiin Xoossafe kiitettida suure asa mala gididi Kirstoosan Xoossa sinththan suure yootoos.
2Corinthians3:1 Nuni ha7i nurkka nuna zaaridi galatinoo? Woykko hara asata mala inttes gidiin woykko inttefe haa nuus xaafettida galata dabdaabe koshshizeeshaa?
2Corinthians3:2 Intte qasse asi wuri erizaynne nababettiza nu wozina garsan xaafettida dabdaabeta.
2Corinthians3:3 Intte qalamen xaafettidayta gidontta de7o Xoossaa Ayanan xaafettidayta; qasseka shuchcha bolla woocetti xaafettidayta gidontta asa wozinan xaafettidaytanne intte nunan go7ettida Kirstoosas qoncce dabdaabeta.
2Corinthians3:4 Kirstoosa baggara nuus Xoossa bolla diza ammanoy hessa misatees.
2Corinthians3:5 Nuna hessas gaththiday Xoossafe attiin nuni nu wolqqan ooththidos giza miishshi issoyka deenna.
2Corinthians3:6 Hessika pidalen xaafettida wogan gidontta Ayanan xaafida ooraththa caaqo qaala oosanchchata nu gidana mala ooththides; gaasoykka pidalen xaafettida wogay wodhees; Ayanay gidikko de7o immees.
2Corinthians3:7 Hessa gishshas Isra7eele nayti iza ayfeson diza bonchcho gaasoteththan Muse ayfeso tishshi histti xeeloy istta xoonana gakkanaas hessi guyeppe dhayanayssinne shuchcha bolla woocetti xaafettidi hayqo gididayssi bonchchon qonccizayssa gidikko
2Corinthians3:8 histtiin Ayana oosos waanidi hessafe aadhdhiza bonchchoy deennee?
2Corinthians3:9 Asi izan pirdettiza oosoy hessa mala bonchchettizayssa gidikko asi izan xilliza oosoy hessafe keehi aadhdhiza bonchchoy izas waani deennee?
2Corinthians3:10 Hayssafe kase bonchchettidayssi hara izappe aadhdhiza bonchchoy dizayssara giigsishin bonchchoy bayndayssa gidides.
2Corinthians3:11 Dhumi dhumi bizayssas hessa mala bonchchoy diikko mernaas minni eqqi daanayssas hessafe keehi aadhdhiza bonchchoy waani deennee?
2Corinthians3:12 Hessa gishshas hessa mala hidotay nuus diza gishshas nuni xalateththan haasayoos.
2Corinthians3:13 Isra7eele nayti Muse ayfesoy xolqizayssa aggi aggi bishin istti wurseththaa be7ontta mala izi ba ayfeso goozida Muse mala gidokko.
2Corinthians3:14 Gido attiin kase gal7a caaqo qaalay nababettishin he wode goossazi hach gakkanaas kichchontta gishshas istta wozinay doccida mala dees; he goossay ha7ikka kichchibeenna; izikka kichchanay Kirstoosan xalla.
2Corinthians3:15 Hach gakkanaaska Muse maxaafati nababettiza wode he wode goossay ha7ikka istta wozina goozi oykkees.
2Corinthians3:16 Gido attiin issaadey Godaakko simmiza wode goossazi qaaretti kichchees.
2Corinthians3:17 Goday Ayana. Godaa Ayanay dizason aylleteththi deenna.
2Corinthians3:18 Nunikka Godaa bonchcho mastoote mala xolqettishe iza misatanaas ha bonchchofe hara bonchchon laamettana; hessika Ayana gidida Godaappe.
2Corinthians4:1 Xoossa maaroteththa daroppe dendidayssan hayssi ha oosozi nuus diza gishshas nuni hidota qanxxoko.
2Corinthians4:2 Gido attiin geemara haniza yeellasiza yo7ota nu aggidos; as baleththoko; Xoossa qaalaa wordora walakkoko; hessa histtanaappe tumu yo7ota qonccera yootishe asi wurikka nu gizayssa ekkana mala nunateththaa Xoossa sinth shiishshoos.
2Corinthians4:3 Nu Mishiraachcho qaalay gordettikokka izi gordettiday dhayanaytassa.
2Corinthians4:4 Xoossa leemiso gidida Kirstoosa bonchcho Mishiraachcho qaalaa poo7oza ha alame asay be7ontta mala hayssa ha alameza xoossi ammanontta asaa wozina muumisides.
2Corinthians4:5 Nuni Yesus Kirstoosi Godaa gididayssa sabbakoos attiin nuna sabbakokko; nunikka nu baggara Yesusa gishshas inttes ooththizaadentta gididos.
2Corinthians4:6 Kirstoosa sinththan Xoossi ba bonchcho erateththa poo7o nuus immanaas
2Corinthians4:7 Gido attiin hayssi gita wolqqay nuus Xoossafe imettides attiin nuuppe gidonttayssa bessana mala hayssi bonchcho miishshay nunan oto misatizayta giddon dees.
2Corinthians4:8 Awa baggarakka nuna sugikkoka nuni tinth gi meqqoko; nuus yo7oy tippi giikkoka hidota qanxxoko.
2Corinthians4:9 Nu goodettikkoka wora wodhdhi attoko; istti nuna shoci genderisikokka nu dhayokko.
2Corinthians4:10 Yesusa de7oy nu asateththaan qonccana mala nuni iza hayqo ubba wode tookki yuuyoos.
2Corinthians4:11 Yesusa de7oy hayqqiza nu asateththaan qonccana mala paxa diza nuni ubba wodekka Yesusa gishshas hayqos aadhdhi imettoos.
2Corinthians4:12 Hessa gishshas nu hayqos aadhdhi imettishin intte qasse de7on gakkeeta.
2Corinthians4:13 Kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettida mala
2Corinthians4:14 Gaasoykka Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa hayqoppe denththidayssi nunakka izara issife denththidi inttenara ba sinth shiishshanayssa nu eroos.
2Corinthians4:15 Daro asaa gakkishe diza kiyateththi Xoossa bonchchos galata bolla galata gujjana mala hayssi wurikka inttena go7anaas hanides.
2Corinthians4:16 Hessa gishshas nu hidota qanxxoko; nuus kare bagga asateththay dhayi dhayi biikkoka nuus gaaththa bagga asateththay gallas gallas ooraxi ooraxi bees.
2Corinthians4:17 Hessas ha7i guuththa wodes nuna gakkiza waayey izara giiganaas dandayontta mernaas gidiza bonchchon nuna gaththana.
2Corinthians4:18 Hessa gishshas nu tishshi histti xeellizay ha7i ayfen beettiza miishsha bolla gidontta ha7i ayfen beettontta miishsha bolla dees; ha7i beettizayssi izi ha7is xalla; ha7i ayfen beettonttayssi gidikko izi mernaassa.
2Corinthians5:1 Nuni izan biittaa bolla diza dunkaaney laalettikokka asa kushen gidontta Xoossa kushen oosettida mernaa keeththi nuus salon dizayssa nu eroos.
2Corinthians5:2 He wodey gakkanaas nu keeththaa saloyssa may7anaas nu laamoti naagoos.
2Corinthians5:3 Tumappe hessa nu may7idaappe guye kallottoko.
2Corinthians5:4 Nuni hayssa ha dunkaanezan diza wode ubbaan izi deexxiza gishshas daabura piidhi goos; hessas gaasoykka hayqqizayssi de7on laamettana mala nuni salon daana sohoza may7ana attiin nuuppe qaarettana mala nu koyokko.
2Corinthians5:5 Hessas nuna giigsiday Xoossa; buro yaanayssas waase gidana mala nuus ba Ayana immiday iza.
2Corinthians5:6 Nuni ashon diza wode Godaappe haakki dizayssa erikkoka izan ammanettidi doos.
2Corinthians5:7 Nuni diza duussay Godaan ammanidi attiin ayfen be7on gidenna.
2Corinthians5:8 Nuni ashoppe shaakettidi Godaara duus dooranayssa ta sidhontta yootays.
2Corinthians5:9 Hessa gishshas nuni ashon diikko woykko ashoppe shaakettikokka nuus waanna qofay Godaa ufaysso.
2Corinthians5:10 Nuni wurikka Kirstoosa pirda wombora sinth shiiqanayssi attenna; nuuppe issoy issoy biitta bolla ba ooththiday iita gidiin woykko lo7o gidiin ba ooso mala bessiza waaga baas ekkana.
2Corinthians5:11 Hessa gishshas Godaas yashsha guussi ay guussakonne nu eriza gishshas asay nu yootizayssa ero gi ekkana mala ooththanaas daaburoos; nuni oonanttako Xoossa achchan qoncce; qasseka intte wozinankka qoncce gididayssa ta ammanays.
2Corinthians5:12 Ta hessa gizay nuna intte sinththan galatanaas gidontta dishin intte nunan ceeqettana mala attiin wozinappe gidontta ayfen beettiza miishshan ceeqettizaytas intte zaaro immanaas dandayana mala gaada gays.
2Corinthians5:13 Nu goosh gidikko Xoossa gishshas giidi gooyidos; erata gidikkoka inttes giidikko!
2Corinthians5:14 Kirstoosi ubbaas issito hayqqoyssanne haray wurikka izara issife hayqqidayssa nu erida gishshas Kirstoosa siiqoy nuna wolqqara oosisees.
2Corinthians5:15 Shemppora paxa dizayti wurikka he hayqqidayssassinne hayqoppe dendidayssas daana malappe attiin hayssafe guye istti baas dontta mala Kirstoosi ubbaas hayqqides.
2Corinthians5:16 Hessa gishshas hayssafe guye nuni ay asikka asho ayfen xeelloko; nuni hayssafe kase Kirstoosa asho ayfen xeellidaa gidikkoka hayssafe guye hessaththo xeelloko.
2Corinthians5:17 Hessa gishshas oonikka Kirstoosa bagga gidikko izi ooraththa medheteththa; kase ceega medheteththi aadhdhides; izi kichchoosan hara ooraththa medheteththi gelides.
2Corinthians5:18 Hessi wuri haniday izi nuna banara Kirstoosa baggara maqayinththidinne maqayinththo ooso nuus immida Xoossanna.
2Corinthians5:19 Hessika Xoossi Kirstoosa baggara hankko alame asaa wursika banara maqayinththides guussa; istta qohozakka qoodibeenna; nuni as Godaara maqayinththana qaala nuuska immides.
2Corinthians5:20 Xoossi nu baggara as xeygiza gishshas nuni qasse Kirstoosa ogaththata; hessa gishshas
2Corinthians5:21 Nuni Kirstoosa baggara Xoossa xilloteth gishetti ekkizayta gidana mala Xoossi iza bolla nagaray baynda Kirstoosa izi nu nagara tookkana mala ooththides.
2Corinthians6:1 Nuni Xoossara ooththizayta gidida mala intte ekkida Xoossa kiyateththaa coo mela ashshofte gishe nu inttena woossoos.
2Corinthians6:2 Xoossi
2Corinthians6:3 Nu oosoy leqettontta mala ay wodekka oonaska nuni dhuphe gidokko.
2Corinthians6:4 Hessafe aaththidi waayenne meto un7oka dandayan Xoossas ooththiza asata mala ay ogerakka nunateththaa aaththi immoos.
2Corinthians6:5 Nuni Xoossas ooththizayta gididayssa bessizay garafeteththan
2Corinthians6:6 Hessaththoka geeshshateththan
2Corinthians6:7 tuma qaalaninne Xoossa wolqqanna; nu Izan gede oli xooniza ola miishshinne kametti attiza gondalley xilloteththa.
2Corinthians6:8 Bonchchos gidiin woykko kawushshas
2Corinthians6:9 Nuni erettidayta shin erettonttayta gididos; istti hayqqidaytakko gishin nuni paxa doos; asay nuna bukki bukkiinkka nu hayqqibeekko.
2Corinthians6:10 Muuzoy nuna gakkikokka ubba wode ufayettoos; nuni manqoko shin daro manqota dure kessoos; nuus aykkoyka bayndayta shin wurikka nuus dees.
2Corinthians6:11 Intteno Qorontoosen dizaytoo! Ta kase inttes qonccen yootadis; nuni nu wozina inttena ubbaa bessidos.
2Corinthians6:12 Intte qasse nuna intte siiqo bessanaas uuzettideta attiin nu inttena nu siiqo bessanaas uuzettibeekko.
2Corinthians6:13 Aaway ba naas yootiza mala tanikka inttes ane yootays; nuni nu wozina keehi doydi nu qofaa inttes qonccisoyssaththo intteka nuus hessaththo qonccisite.
2Corinthians6:14 Ammanontta asara giigay baynda issifeteththan oykettofte; xilloteththinne nagaray waani issifettanaas dandayzee? Poo7oynne dhumay issife waani daana dandayzee?
2Corinthians6:15 Kirstoosinne Daabulosi waani gaagganaas dandayzoo? Ammanizaadey ammanonttaadera aazan laggetanaas dandayzee?
2Corinthians6:16 Xoossa Woosa Keeththas eeqatara aaza gaagoy dizee? Xoossika
2Corinthians6:17 Goday
2Corinthians6:18 Ta inttes Aawa gidana; intteka taas attuma naytanne macca nayta gidandeta» gees Ubbaa dandayza Goday.
2Corinthians7:1 Hessa gishshas ta siiqotoo! Hayssi hidotay nuus imettida gishshas ashonne ayana tunisiza ay miishshafekka ane nuna geeshshoos; Xoossas yashshan nu geeshshateththaa ane kumeth histtoos.
2Corinthians7:2 Intte nuna ufayssan mokki ekkite; nuni oonakka qohibeekko; oonakka naaqqibeekko; oona go7akka nuus baleththi ekkibeekko.
2Corinthians7:3 Tani hessaththo gizay intte bolla pirdanaas gidenna; hayssafe kase ta inttes yootida mala intte nu wozinan deeta; hessa gishshas hayqonkka gidiin paxanka ubba wode nu inttefe shaakettoko.
2Corinthians7:4 Taas intte bolla diza ammanoynne ceeqeteththi daro gita; ta inttenan minettays; nuna gakkiza meto ubbaan tani keeha ufayettays.
2Corinthians7:5 Nuni Maqidooniya gakkida wodekka dumma dumma baggara metoy nuna gakkides attiin nuni aykkoka shempo demmibeekko; nuus soora hirgay
2Corinthians7:6 Gido attiin muuzottidayta minththeththiza Goday Titoosa yuussan nuna minththeththides.
2Corinthians7:7 Nuni minettiday iza yuussan xalla gidontta dishin intte iza minththeththidayssa nu gujji siyida gishshassa; intte tana laamotidayssa taas qadhettizayssa qoppizayssaka izi nuus yootiin siyada tani daro ufayettadis.
2Corinthians7:8 Tani hayssafe kase inttes xaafida kiitay inttena mishisidaa gidikkoka he kiita xaafida gishshas tani hessaththo aazas xaafadinaa gaada modhettike; modhettikokka ta modhettanay guuththa wodes intte tana mishisida gishshassa.
2Corinthians7:9 Ha7i gidikko ta ufayettays; tani ufayettida gaasoykka tani inttena mishisida gishshas gidontta intte he mishaappe dendidayssan maaroteththan gelidi laamettida gishshassa; hessa gishshas intte mishettikokka Xoossa shene mala gidida gishshas nuni inttena aykkoka qohibeekko guussa.
2Corinthians7:10 Xoossa shene mala gidida muuzoteththi gede maaretti attanaaso gaththees; hessaska modheteththi deenna; wozinappe gidontta muuzoteththi gidikko hayqon gaththees.
2Corinthians7:11 Hayssi intte muuzoteththi Xoossa shene mala gidida gishshas hessi ay mala minoteththan
2Corinthians7:12 Hessa gishshas ta inttes xaafidayssi intte nuus ay mala ammanettizaytakko intte inttena Xoossa sinththan beyana malappe attiin qohidaade gishshassinne qohettidaade gishshas gaada gidenna.
2Corinthians7:13 Nuni minettidayssafe bollara Titoosi demmida ufayssaan daro ufayettidos; nuni ufayettidaykka intte wurikka Titoosa minththeththida gishshassinne iza wozina shempisida gishshassa.
2Corinthians7:14 Tani inttenan ceeqettizayssa kase Titoosas yoota woththadis; intteka tana yeellasibeekketa; ubba wode ta inttes tuma xalala yootashe days; hessika nuni intte gishshas Titoosas yootida yo7oy tumu giidi ammanettides.
2Corinthians7:15 Intte wurikka azazettizayta gididayssa
2Corinthians7:16 Tanikka ubba baggara inttenan ammanettanaas dandayda gishshas ta daro ufayettadis.
2Corinthians8:1 Ta ishatoo! Xoossi Maqidooniyan diza ammaniza asaas immida kiyateththaa intte erana mala ta koyays.
2Corinthians8:2 Istti daro metoti dishe daro ufayettida; keehi manqota gidikkoka daro kiyattida.
2Corinthians8:3 Istti baas dandayettizayssa malanne baas dandayettizayssafekka aaththi immidayssa ta istta gishshas markkattays.
2Corinthians8:4 Yuhudan diza ammanizaytas maado immanaas digettontta mala nuna keehi woossida.
2Corinthians8:5 Istti nuni qoppidayssafe bollara aaththi ooththida; istti koyro bana Godaas immida; zaaridikka Xoossa shene mala banakka nuus immida.
2Corinthians8:6 Hayssa oosoza koyro Titoosi doommida gishshas ha7ikka hayssa maado imoza izi polana mala nu iza woossidos.
2Corinthians8:7 Intte ammanon
2Corinthians8:8 Ta hessa gizay inttena coo mela azazanaas gidenna; gido attiin hankko hara asay minni immizayssa inttenara gaththa beyishin intte siiqoy tumu gididayssa shaakka eranaassa.
2Corinthians8:9 Intte nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateth ereeta.
2Corinthians8:10 Hayssa ha hanozan taas lo7o gidi beettida zore ta inttes immays; zilayth intte imo xalla gidontta dishin immanaas koyroppe qoppiday inttena.
2Corinthians8:11 Hessa gishshas intte immanaas koyidayssi polettana mala inttes diza mala kase intte qoppidayssa ha7i ooththite.
2Corinthians8:12 Asi immanaas wozinappe koykko izaadey kiyateththan immizayssi ekettizay asi baas dizaari mala immiko attiin baas bayndayssafe immishin gidenna.
2Corinthians8:13 Ta hayssaththo gizay intte wurikka gina gidana mala attiin intte imon waayettishin harati shempana mala gaada gidenna.
2Corinthians8:14 Intte waayettishin istta miishshay intte meto ashshana mala ha7i qasse intte miishshay istta meto ashsho; hessa malan intte giddon ginateththi daana.
2Corinthians8:15 Hessika
2Corinthians8:16 Tani inttes qoppizayssa mala Titoosaykka inttes wozinappe qoppana mala ooththida Goday galatetto.
2Corinthians8:17 Titoosi intteko bizay barkka ba qofan ufayssanppe attiin nuni iza woossida gishshas xalla gidenna.
2Corinthians8:18 Mishiraachcho qaala ooson Woosa Keeththatan ubbaan dosettida ishaza nu izara gaththi yeddoos.
2Corinthians8:19 Hessafekka bollara hayssi nu ishay nuni hayssa lo7o oosoza Godaa bonchchos ooththishininne nuni ooththanaas koyzayssa izas qonccisishin izi nunara biidi ooththanaas Woosa Keeththati dooridaade.
2Corinthians8:20 Hayssa kiyateth imettida miishshaza nuni oykkishin nu bolla aykko boroykka gakkontta mala nuni naagettoos.
2Corinthians8:21 Gaasoykka nuus waanna qofay Godaa sinththan xalla gidontta asa sinththankka lo7o ooththanaassa.
2Corinthians8:22 Daro wode daro miishshan paacettidi mino gidida nu ishaa Titoosara nu iza yeddiday hessassa; izas intte bolla diza ammanoy daro gita gidida gishshas izi ha7i inttena maaddanaas kaseppe aaththi koyees.
2Corinthians8:23 Intte Titoosa gishshas eranaas koykko izi inttena maaddanaas tanara ooththizaade; izara issife biza hankko ishati qasse Woosa Keeththati ba gishshas yeddida Kirstoosa bonchchos eqqidayta.
2Corinthians8:24 Hessa gishshas intte isttas intte siiqo bessite; intte hessaththo histtiko intte siiqoynne nu inttenan ceeqettiza ceeqeteththi coo hada gidonttayssa intte Woosa Keeththatas bessandeta.
2Corinthians9:1 Yuhudan diza ammanizaytas kessiza miishsha gishshas ta inttes xaafanaas koshshenna.
2Corinthians9:2 Inttes Akayan diza asaas maaddana lo7o qofay dizayssa ta erada
2Corinthians9:3 Hayssa ha hanozan nu inttenan ceeqettizayssi coo hada gidontta mala hayta nu ishata ta kiittadis; intteka ta kase inttes gida mala naagetti uttite.
2Corinthians9:4 Maqidooniya asati tanara intteko bishin intte giigettontta dizayssa be7ikko inttenan ceeqettizayssan nuni yeellatana; intte qasse daro yeellatana.
2Corinthians9:5 Hessa gishshas intte kase immana gidayssa kasetidi giigsana mala inttena qofsays; ays giikko hayti ishati taappe kasetidi intteko gakkana mala koshshizayssi taas beettides; hessaththoka tani biza wode intte immanayssi giigi uttidaaz gidana; intteka immanayssi wolqqara gidontta dosan gididayssa bessana.
2Corinthians9:6 «Guuth zerida asi guuth shiishshana; daro zeridaadey qasse daro kath shiishshana» giza qaalaa yuushshi qopite.
2Corinthians9:7 Xoossi dosizay ba dosan immizaade gidida gishshas issi issi asi immanaas ba wozinan qoppidaaro ufayssan immo attiin modhettishe coo wolqqara immofo.
2Corinthians9:8 Ubba wode haniza ubbaan intte inttes gidi palahidi hara lo7o oosos gidana mala Xoossi inttes ba anjjo gujji immanaas dandayees.
2Corinthians9:9 Hessika
2Corinthians9:10 Zerizaades zereththi
2Corinthians9:11 Intte kiyateththan immoyssi nu baggara istta gakkiza asati Xoos galatana mala intte ubba wode kiyateth immana mala Xoossi inttena ubbasora duresana.
2Corinthians9:12 Hayssi intte immiza kiyateththa oosoy ammanizayta meto maadoppe bollara asay Xoossaa darssi galatana mala ooththees.
2Corinthians9:13 Hayssi intte kiyateththa oosozi intte Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaan ammanidi ammanettidayta gididayssa
2Corinthians9:14 Istti qasse Xoossi inttes immida gita kiyateththaa gaason inttena siiqiza gishshas inttes woossana.
2Corinthians9:15 Asa qaalan qoncciseththafe bolla gidida Xoossa imoteththaa gishshas Xoossi galatetto.
2Corinthians10:1 Tani Phawuloosi inttenara dashe ashke geetettadis shin ta inttefe shaakettishin qasse intte bolla xalidaade geetettida tani Phawuloosi Kirstoosa ashketeththaninne iza lo7eteththan inttena woossays.
2Corinthians10:2 Tani inttena woossizay ta intteko hee biza wode intte tana xalateththan haasayssontta aggana malassa. Nuni asho qofan simerettiza mala nuna xeelliza issi issi asata sinththan tani xalateththan haasayanaas koyays.
2Corinthians10:3 Nuni dizay hayssa alameza bolla gidikkoka nu olettizay ha alameza asa ola mala gidenna.
2Corinthians10:4 Nu ola miishshayka ola miixa laallanaas dandayza Xoossa wolqqay dizayssa attiin hayssa alameza ola toora gidenna.
2Corinthians10:5 Xoos erontta mala dhuphe gidi dendiza palamanne otoreteth nu laalloos; asa qofa ubbaa di7i ekkidi Kirstoosas azazettana mala ooththoos.
2Corinthians10:6 Intte azazeteththi polettiza wode azazettontta ay miishsheka qaxxayanaas nuni giigetti uttidos.
2Corinthians10:7 Intte xeellizay kare baggara beettizaaz xalla; oonikka tani Kirstoosasko gi ammanettiko zaareththi qoppo; nunikka iza malakka Kirstoosayta gididayssa izaadey wozinan woththo.
2Corinthians10:8 Goday nuus immida maataa gishshas tani izan ceeqqikokka yeellatikke; hessi maatay taas imettiday nuni inttena minththanaas attiin laallanaas gidenna.
2Corinthians10:9 Tani ha kiitaan inttena babisos ooththizaa misatoppo.
2Corinthians10:10 Oonee erizay issi issi asati
