1Thessalonians4:2 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa wolqqan nu inttes ay azazo immidaakko intte ereeta.
1Thessalonians4:3 Xoossa sheney intte laymappe haakkidi dummatanaassa.
1Thessalonians4:4 Qasse issi issi asay ba machcho geeshshateththaninne bonchchon ayso bessizayssa shaakki ero.
1Thessalonians4:5 Hessika Xoos ammanontta Ayzaabeta mala layma qaaqqateththan gidoppo.
1Thessalonians4:6 Hessa malan oonikka balettidi ba ishaa baleththofo; gaasoykka hayssafe kase nu inttes yootida malanne naagettanaas akeekissida mala Goday heytantta mala nagara ooththiza ubbata bolla ba hanqo ehana.
1Thessalonians4:7 Xoossi nuna geeshshateththas xeygides attiin tunateththas xeygibeenna.
1Thessalonians4:8 Hessa gishshas hayssa ha zoreza kadhidi ekkonttaadey Xillo Ayana izas immida Xoossaa kadhees attiin as kadhizaade gidenna.
1Thessalonians4:9 Ishata siiqoteththa gishshas inttes oonikka xaafanaas koshshenna; gaasoykka intte intte giddon siiqettana mala intte intte baggara Xoossafe tamaardeta.
1Thessalonians4:10 Kumeththa Maqidooniyan diza ammaniza asaa intte ubbaa siiqizayssi erettidayssa; gido attiin nu ishatoo! Sinththa baggan intte hayssafe aaththi siiqettana mala nu inttena zoroos.
1Thessalonians4:11 Nu hayssafe kase inttena azazida mala intte intte kushera ooththite; woppu gi diite; inttes gidizayssa lo7eththi xeellite.
1Thessalonians4:12 Hessika gallas gallas intte duussay hankko ammanontta asaa achchan inttena bonchchisana malanne intte ay asaska tooho gidontta malassa.
1Thessalonians4:13 Ta ishatoo! Intte ashon hayqqidayta gishshas tumaa erana mala nu koyokko; qasseka hidotay baynda hara asata mala intte kayottana mala nu koyokko.
1Thessalonians4:14 Yesusi hayqqidi dendidayssa nu ammanizaa gidikko Yesusa ammanidayta Xoossi Yesusara hessaththoka zaari haa yeddana.
1Thessalonians4:15 Nu Godaa qaalan inttes gizay hayssa; nuni hayqqontta paxa dizaytinne Goday yaana gakkanaas gam7anayti kase hayqqidaytappe sinththatokko.
1Thessalonians4:16 Goday ba hu7era gita azazon kiitanchchata halaqa giirissara Xoossa xurumba giirissan saloppe wodhdhana; kase Kirstoosa ammanidi hayqqidayti istti kaseti dendana.
1Thessalonians4:17 Hessafe guye nuni qasse paxa dizayti Godaa carko bolla gaagganaas isttara issife shaarara dendana; hessaththoka nu mernaas Godaara daana.
1Thessalonians4:18 Hessa gishshas ha qaalaan issoy issaara minettite.
1Thessalonians5:1 Ta ishatoo! Hessi hanana wodeza gishshas nu inttes xaafanaas koshshenna.
1Thessalonians5:2 Kaysoy qamman yiza mala Godaa gallassika hessa mala yaanayssa intte intte baggara lo7eththi ereeta.
1Thessalonians5:3 Asay
1Thessalonians5:4 Intteno ishatoo! He gallassay kayso mala inttena daganththanaas intte dhuman deekketa.
1Thessalonians5:5 Intte wurikka poo7o nayta; nuni dhuma woykko qamma baggata gidokko.
1Thessalonians5:6 Histtiko ane beeggoos; ane nurkka nuna haaroos attiin hankko dhiskiza asaa mala nunikka ane dhiskokko.
1Thessalonians5:7 Dhiskizayti qammara dhiskeettes; maththottizaytikka qammara maththotteettes.
1Thessalonians5:8 Nuni gidikko gallassa asata gidida gishshas ammanonne siiqo
1Thessalonians5:9 Xoossi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara atoteth demmana mala attiin nuna hanqos xeygibeenna.
1Thessalonians5:10 Nu hayqqikokka woykko paxa diikkoka izara daana mala izi nu gishshas hayqqides.
1Thessalonians5:11 Hessa gishshas tumappe intte ha7i ooththizayssa malakka issoy issaara minettitenne minththeththite.
1Thessalonians5:12 Histtiko ta ishatoo! Intte giddon minni ooththizayta Godaan inttefe bollara diza halaqatanne inttena zorizayta intte bonchchana mala nu inttena woossoos.
1Thessalonians5:13 Istta ooso gishshassika istta siiqora lo7eththi bonchchite; intte intte giddon saron diite.
1Thessalonians5:14 Ta ishatoo! Nu inttena
1Thessalonians5:15 Oonaska iita gishshas iita zaarontta mala naagettite; gido attiin intte intte giddon gidiin hara asara gidiin ubba wode lo7o gidizayssa ooththanaas baaxetite.
1Thessalonians5:16 Ubba wode ufayettite.
1Thessalonians5:17 Qanxxontta woossite.
1Thessalonians5:18 Ay hanonkka galatite; Xoossa sheney inttes Yesus Kirstoosa baggara hessa.
1Thessalonians5:19 Xillo Ayana tama toyssofte.
1Thessalonians5:20 Tinbite qaala kadhopite.
1Thessalonians5:21 Wursika paacci xeellite; lo7o gididaaz oykkite.
1Thessalonians5:22 Iita gidida ay miishshafekka haakkite.
1Thessalonians5:23 Saroteththa Goday izi ubba miishshan inttena dummaso; intte ayanay
1Thessalonians5:24 Inttena xeygidayssi ammanettidaade gidida gishshas izi hessa ooththana.
1Thessalonians5:25 Nu ishatoo! Nu gishshassika woossite.
1Thessalonians5:26 Ammanizayta ubbaa geeshsha yeereteththan sarokkite.
1Thessalonians5:27 Ha kiitay ammanizaytas ubbaas nababettana mala Godaa sunththan hadara gays.
1Thessalonians5:28 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara gido.
2Thessalonians1:1 Phawuloosappe
2Thessalonians1:2 Xoossaa Aawappenne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido.
2Thessalonians1:3 Ta ishatoo! Intte ammanoy wodeppe woden dicci dicci biza gishshassinne intte siiqoykka kaseppe gujetti gujetti biza gishshas nu intte gishshas Xoossa lo7eththi galatanaas bessees.
2Thessalonians1:4 Hessa gishshas intte bolla gakkida goodeteththaninne meto ubbaan intte minnida gishshas nuni nu baggara intte dandayaa gishshassinne intte ammano gishshas ammaniza asa ubbaa achchan ceeqettoos.
2Thessalonians1:5 Hessi wurikka Xoossa pirday suure gididayssa bessees; hessa gaason waaye be7iza intte Xoossa Kawoteththas bessizayta gidi beettideta.
2Thessalonians1:6 Xoossi xillo gidida gishshas inttena waayisizayta izi waayisana.
2Thessalonians1:7 Waaye ekkida inttessinne nuus shempo immana; hessika Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi wolqqama salo Xoossa kiitanchchatara salo bolla qoncciza wode hanana.
2Thessalonians1:8 He wode Xoos erontta asatanne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Mishiraachcho qaalaas azazettontta asata bolla izi ba halo kessana.
2Thessalonians1:9 Isttika Godaa sinththafenne iza bonchcho wolqqaa achchafe kichchidi mernaas dhayon qaxxayettana.
2Thessalonians1:10 Istti qaxxayettanay izi geeshshata achchan bonchchettanaassinne ammanizayti wuri izan malalettana mala izi yiza gallassan hanana; intteka he ammaniza asaara daana; gaasoykka nu inttes markkattidayssa intte ammanida gishshassa.
2Thessalonians1:11 Nu hessa qoppishe nu Xoossi inttena ba xeyssaas gidizayta histti qoodana mala intte lo7o ooththanaas amottiza amozanne ammanon intte ooththida oosoza ubbaa izi inttes ba wolqqan polana mala nu inttes ubba wode woossoos.
2Thessalonians1:12 Qasseka nu Godaa Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththaa mala Yesus Kirstoosa sunththi intte achchan bonchchettana malanne intteka izan bonchchettana mala nu inttes woossoos.
2Thessalonians2:1 Ta ishatoo! Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa yuussaa gishshassinne nu izakko baana buussaa gishshas nu inttena qofsoos.
2Thessalonians2:2 Ayanay qonccisides woykko qaalay gees giidi woykko nuuppe inttes kiitettida kiitaa mala
2Thessalonians2:3 Oonikka ay hanonkka inttena baleththofo. Daro asay ammano kaddanaappe sinththe dhayanaas bessiza issi makkalla asi qonccontta dishin he gallassay gakkenna.
2Thessalonians2:4 Izikka Xoos geetetti goynnettiza eeqa xoossata ubbaafe bollara bana dhoqqu dhoqqu histtizaadenne Xoossara eqettizaade; izikka Xoossa Keeththan uttidi bana
2Thessalonians2:5 Ta inttenara diza wode hayta ha yo7ota inttes ta yootidayssi inttes qofettizeesha?
2Thessalonians2:6 Izi ba woden qonccana gakkanaas ha7i izi qonccontta mala aazi diggizaakko intte ereeta.
2Thessalonians2:7 Makkallanchcha xuuray haray attoshin ha7ikka ooso bolla dees; gido attiin hayssi hananay izi ha7i ooththontta mala iza diggizaadey iza ogeppe kichchana gakkanaas xalla.
2Thessalonians2:8 Hessafekka kaallidi Godaa Yesusi ba doona peenoninne ba bonchcho yuussaan dhayssana; makkallanchchay qonccana.
2Thessalonians2:9 He makkallanchcha yuussi Xala7e wolqqan hessika as baleththiza malaatataninne malalisiza miishshatan hanana.
2Thessalonians2:10 Hessaththoka ekki attontta mala tumaa ixxidi dhayza asata baleththanaas dumma dumma iita oosoy yaana.
2Thessalonians2:11 Hessa gaason istti wordo yo7o ammanana mala Xoossi istta bolla bala ooso kiittana.
2Thessalonians2:12 Hessi hananay tumaa ammanontta ixxidi wordo yo7on ufayettizayti wuri pirdettanaassa.
2Thessalonians2:13 Godaan dosettida ta ishatoo! Nu gidikko ubba wode intte gishshas Xoos galatanaas nuus bessees; gaasoykka Xoossi inttena koyroppe oykkidi intte Xillo Ayanan dummatidaytanne tumu ammanidi intte attana mala inttena doorides.
2Thessalonians2:14 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi bonchcho gishettizayta intte gidana mala nu yootida mishiraachcho qaalaa baggara inttena xeygides.
2Thessalonians2:15 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Intte minni eqqite; nuni nu doonan gidiin woykko kiitan woykko nu inttes aaththi yeddida timirteza lo7eththi oykkite.
2Thessalonians2:16 Izi nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi qasse nuna siiqidaynne ba kiyateththan mernaa minththeththonne lo7o hidota izi nuus immida nu Aawaa Xoossay
2Thessalonians2:17 izi intte wozina lo7o oosoninne qaalan minththo.
2Thessalonians3:1 Wurseththan ta ishatoo! Qasseka Godaa qaalay intte achchan hanoyssaththoka eleli ubbaso gakkana malanne bonchchettana mala nuus woossite.
2Thessalonians3:2 Qasseka asi wuri ammanizayssa gidontta gishshas makkallanchchatappenne iita asatappe nu attana mala nuus woossite.
2Thessalonians3:3 Goday gidikko ammanettidayssa; izikka inttena minththana; Xala7eppeka inttena naagana.
2Thessalonians3:4 Nu inttena azazidayssa intte ha7i ooththideta shin sinththafekka intte ooththanayssa nuni Godaan ammanettoos.
2Thessalonians3:5 Goday intte wozina Xoossa siiqookkonne Kirstoosa dandayaakko kaaleththo.
2Thessalonians3:6 Ta ishatoo! Ooso ooththontta asaappenne intte nuuppe ekkida timirteza mala dontta ammanizaytappe intte haakkana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan inttena nu azazoos.
2Thessalonians3:7 Intte nu leemiso wostti kaallanaakko intte intte baggara ereeta; nu inttenara diza wode ooso ooththontta coo de7ibeekko.
2Thessalonians3:8 Qasseka oona sooppeka kath coo mela mibeekko; qasse inttefe oonaska nu tooho gidontta mala qammanne gallas daaburan ooththi midos.
2Thessalonians3:9 Nu hessa ooththiday intte nuna kaallana mala inttes lo7o leemiso gidana giidippe attiin nuus koshshizayssa inttefe ekkanayssa nuna diggiza wogay diin gidenna.
2Thessalonians3:10 Nu inttenara diza wode
2Thessalonians3:11 Intte giddon issi issi asati ooso ooththonttayssa nu siyidos; heytantti ooso ooththontta mela asa yo7on geliza asata.
2Thessalonians3:12 Heyta mala asati ba ooso co7u gi ooththana malanne ba kath maana mala Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa sunththan nu istta azazoossinne zoroos.
2Thessalonians3:13 Intte gidikko ta ishatoo! Lo7o ooso ooththanaappe mulekka azallofte.
2Thessalonians3:14 Hayssa nu kiittida qaalaas azazettonttay oonikka diikko hessa misatizaade lo7eththi kaallitenne izi ba ooson yeellatana mala izara gaaggofte.
2Thessalonians3:15 Gido attiin iza intte isha mala hanqite attiin morkke mala xeellofte.
2Thessalonians3:16 Saroteththaa Goday izi ba baggara yo7o ubbaan inttes saroteth immo; Goday inttenara ubbaara gido.
2Thessalonians3:17 Hayssa sarokaa tani ta kushera inttes xaafiday tana Phawuloosa. Ta kiitaas dumma malatay hayssa; izikka hayssa tani ta kushen xaafoyssa.
2Thessalonians3:18 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa aadho kiyateththi inttenara ubbaara gido.
1Timothy1:1 Nuna ashshida Xoossaan
1Timothy1:2 Ammanon taas tumu naa gidida Ximtoosas Xoossaa nu Aawappe nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththi
1Timothy1:3 Tani Maqidooniya bashe nena hadara gida mala hayssafe sinththan issi issi asati wordo timirte tamaarsontta mala ne azazanaas Efesoonen daashsha.
1Timothy1:4 Qasseka asay yootiin wurontta beni wode haysi7en ba wode wursontta mala azaza; heyta mala yo7oy palama denththeththees attiin ammanon oosettiza Xoossa oosos aykkoka go7enna.
1Timothy1:5 Ha azazozas waanna ayfe yo7oy gidikko geeshsha wozinappe lo7o qofara hessaththoka tumu ammanoppe beettiza siiqo.
1Timothy1:6 Issi issi asay haytappe pooqqi eqqidi go7ay baynda yo7otakko simmides.
1Timothy1:7 Wogaa tamaarsizayta gidana mala koyeettes; gidikkoka istti ba yootizayssa woykko keehi mootettiza yo7oza lo7eththi erettenna.
1Timothy1:8 Gido attiin asi maaran go7ettizaakko wogay lo7o gididayssa nu eroos.
1Timothy1:9 Qasseka wogay imettiday xillo asas gidontta wogaa yedhdhi aadhdhizaytas
1Timothy1:10 Hessaththoka laymatizaytas
1Timothy1:11 He lo7o timirtey anjjettida Xoossi taas hadara immida bonchcho mishiraachcho qaalara gaaggizayssa.
1Timothy1:12 Tana ba oosos shuumidinne ammanettizaade histti ekkidinne taas minoteth immida nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ta galatays.
1Timothy1:13 Hayssafe kase ta ay mala as cayizaadenne goodeththizaade
1Timothy1:14 Yesus Kirstoosappe gidida ammanoranne siiqora nu Godaa kiyateththi taas keehi darides.
1Timothy1:15 Yesus Kirstoosi nagaranchchata ashshanaas duge hayssa ha alame yides giza qaalay tumanne asi wurikka ekkanaas bessizayssa. Nagaranchchatappeka aadhdhiza nagaranchchay tana.
1Timothy1:16 Gido attiin ta maarettidaykka Yesus Kirstoosi zaway baynda ba dandayaa
1Timothy1:17 Hessa gishshas mernaas hayqqi erontta
1Timothy1:18 Ta naa Ximtoosaa! Ne gishshas kasetidi yootettida mala hayssa azazoza ta nees immadis; hessika ne he qaalaa kaallashe lo7o baaxe baaxetanaassa.
1Timothy1:19 Ammanoynne lo7o qofay nees de7o; issi issi asati ba lo7o qofaa yedhdhi aadhdhidi abba bolla metoy iza bolla gakkiin waayettiza markabe mala ba ammano dhayssida.
1Timothy1:20 Istta giddon Xoossa cash aggidi taamarana mala tani Xala7es aaththa immidayti Hemenewoosinne Iskindiroosi deettes.
1Timothy2:1 Hessa gishshas ubbaafe koyro hara asas shoobeththa woosa
1Timothy2:2 Hessika Tumu Ayana duussaninne geeshshateth ubbaan nuni saroteththaninne wogan daana malassa.
1Timothy2:3 Hayssi nuna ashshiza Xoossaa achchan lo7onne ufayssizaaza.
1Timothy2:4 Izi asi wuri attana malanne tumaa erana mala koyees.
1Timothy2:5 Issi Xoossi xalla dees; qasseka Xoossassinne asas giddon issi giigsiza gaannay dees; izikka as gidida Yesus Kirstoosa.
1Timothy2:6 Izi bana asa ubbaas aaththi immides; hessika heerakka wodey aadhdhontta izas markkattides.
1Timothy2:7 Tanikka hayssas mishiraachcho qaala yootanaas kiitettidaade; qasseka deretas tumu ammano astamaare gidada shuumettadis; hessaka ta wordotontta tumu yootanaassa.
1Timothy2:8 Hessa gishshas attuma asay ubbason hanqoy bayndanne palamay baynda ba geeshsha kusheta pude dhoqqu histtidi woossana mala ta koyays.
1Timothy2:9 Hessaththoka maccassati bonchchora bana shiishshi ekkidi bessiza may7o may7etto attiin ba hu7e daddi ekkidi woykko al7o may7o
1Timothy2:10 Gido attiin Xoos woossoos giza maccassati isttas ooththana bessiza lo7o ooson lo7etto.
1Timothy2:11 Maccassi co7u gaada kumeththara azazeteth tamaaru.
1Timothy2:12 Maccassi co7u gaanaappe attiin iza tamaarsana mala woykko adde bolla godatana mala ta koykke.
1Timothy2:13 Gaasoykka koyro Addaamey medhettides; kaallada Hewaana medhettadus.
1Timothy2:14 Qasseka koyro balettiday Addaame gidenna; balettada Xoossa wogaappe aadhdhiday maccassayo.
1Timothy2:15 Gidikkoka maccassi ammanoninne siiqon geeshshateththan barkka bana haaron minniko naa yelon attana.
1Timothy3:1 «Oonikka Woosa Keeththa cima gidana koykko lo7o ooso amottees» giza qaalay tuma.
1Timothy3:2 Hessa gidikko Woosa Keeththe kaaleththizaadey borey bayndaade
1Timothy3:3 maththottonttaade
1Timothy3:4 Ba nayta azazettizaytanne as bonchchizayta histti dichchidi ba keeththa asaa wogara ayssizaade gidanaas bessees.
1Timothy3:5 Issaadey ba keeththa asaa wogara ayso erontta aggiko Xoossa Woosa Keeththe wostti naagana dandayzee?
1Timothy3:6 Otoreteththan puuridi Xala7ey kundida pirdan izi kundontta mala oorath ammanizaade gidoppo.
1Timothy3:7 Qasseka iza sunththan boretontta malanne Xala7e narxan izi gelontta mala ammanontta asaa achchan lo7o markkateththi daanaas koshshees.
1Timothy3:8 Daaqonetikka hessaththo bonchchettidaytanne ba gida qaalaa laammi laammi yeggonttayta
1Timothy3:9 Ammano xuura
1Timothy3:10 Haytantika koyrotti paacettetto; issi iitay istta bolla beettontta aggiko hessafe guye daaqoneteththan ooththetto.
1Timothy3:11 Macca daaqonetikka bonchchettidayta
1Timothy3:12 Daaqoneti issi machchi azina gidanaas bessees; qasseka ba naytanne ba keeththa asaa wogara ayssizayta gidanaas bessees.
1Timothy3:13 Wogara ooththidayti baas gita bonchchonne Yesus Kirstoosan isttas diza ammanon daro xalateth demmana.
1Timothy3:14 Ta neekko elle baana koykkoka hayta azazota nees xaafays.
1Timothy3:15 Ta hanno nees xaafizay ta gam7izaa gidikkoka asay Xoossa Keeththan waani daanaakko ne erana mala gaadakko! Keeththay de7o Xoossaa Woosa Keeththa; hessika tumu tuussinne xapho.
1Timothy3:16 Tumu Ayana duussa xuuray sidhey baynda gita; izikka
1Timothy4:1 Wode wurseththa bolla issi issi asay ammano aggidi baleththiza ayanatanne iita ayana timirte kaallanayssa Xillo Ayanay qonccera yootees.
1Timothy4:2 Hessa mala timirtey istta qofay bonqo biratan xuugettida mala geellateththan doccida qoodheppe qommon haniza wordanchcha asatappe yaana.
1Timothy4:3 He asati asay ekkontta malanne gelontta mala diggana; ammanizaytinne tumaa shaakki eriza asay Xoossi medhdhida kath galatarakka ekkizayti montta mala diggananne azazana.
1Timothy4:4 Xoossi medhdhiday wurikka lo7o; asi galatara ekkiko wora wodhdhizay issinakka deenna.
1Timothy4:5 Wurikka Xoossa qaalaninne woosan geeyana.
1Timothy4:6 Hayssa ha azazoza ammaniza asaa ne qofsikko
1Timothy4:7 Xoos bonchchisontta go7ay baynda haysi7eppenne cima maccassata haysi7eppe haakkada tuma ayana oosos ne asateth giigsa.
1Timothy4:8 Asateththaa asho ogen dosisoy guuththa wodes go7ees shin Tumu Ayana duussas bana tamaarsoy gidikko hayssa ha alamezassinne buro yaana duussaas hidotay diza gishshas ubbaas go7ees.
1Timothy4:9 Hayssi ha qaalay ammanettidayssanne ubbay ekkanaas bessiza qaala.
1Timothy4:10 Nu hessas giidi dafettoossinne daaburoos; hessika asa ubbaas harappeka ammanizaytas ashshiza de7o Xoossaan nu hidota ooththiza gishshassa.
1Timothy4:11 Hayta yo7ota azazanne tamaarsa.
1Timothy4:12 Ne yelagateththaa oonikka leqqofo; gido attiin neni haasayan
1Timothy4:13 Ta hee baana gakkanaas qaalaa nababanaas
1Timothy4:14 Cimati ne bolla ba kushe woththi woossishin
1Timothy4:15 Asi wuri ne dichchaa beyana mala ha yo7ota lo7eththa minththada dandayan pola.
1Timothy4:16 Ne duussaa gishshassinne ne tamaarsiza timirtezas naagetta; haytan minna; ne hessa ooththiko nenanne ne gizayssa siyizayta ashshana.
1Timothy5:1 Cima asaa ne Aawaa mala bonchchora zora attiin dom7ofa; naateththa attuma nayta ne ishata mala xeella.
1Timothy5:2 Hessaththoka cima maccassata ne aayi mala
1Timothy5:3 Addafe metotettida am7eta lo7eththa naaga.
1Timothy5:4 Issi am7eys nay woykko naa nay dizaa gidikko he nayti baso asata maaddanaassinne bana yelidaytas kase istti ooththidayssa kushe zaaron harappe kasetidi ba ammano ooson bessanaassinne tamaaranaas bessees; hessika Xoos ufayssizayssa.
1Timothy5:5 Qasse tumappe maadoy baynda barkka diza am7eya Xoos xalla xeellawus; woosassinne Xoossafe maado demmanaas gallassinne qamma minettawus.
1Timothy5:6 Ha biittaa lo7o duus xalla koyza am7eya gidikko iza paxa dashe hayqqidaaro.
1Timothy5:7 Oona bollaka wosoy dontta mala hayssa azazoza asas aaththa.
1Timothy5:8 Issi asi ba dabbota harappeka baso asaa maaddonttayssa gidikko izi ammano kaddidaadenne ammanontta asappeka aadhdhi iita asa.
1Timothy5:9 Izis layththay usuppun tammu layththafe garsan diza am7ey sunth am7eta mazgaban xaafoppa; qasseka iza kase issaade xalla gelidaaro gidanaas bessees.
1Timothy5:10 Nayta dichoninne imaththa mokon
1Timothy5:11 Naateththa am7eta gidikko hessa mala mazgaban xaafoppa; gaasoykka isttas diza azinara daana amoy istti Kirstoosas ooththana gi gelida qaalaappe bollara aadhdhiza wode adde gelana koyeettes.
1Timothy5:12 Istti kase caaqqida qaalaa miza gishshas he yo7ozan ba bolla pirda eheettes.
1Timothy5:13 Hessafekka ooso ooththanaappe yuuyi yuuyi asa keeththe gelana doseettes; ooso ixo xalla gidontta haasayanaas bessonttayssa haasayshe zigirzaytanne koshshontta asa yo7o giddo coo woxxi gelizayta gideettes.
1Timothy5:14 Hessa gishshas azinati hayqqida naateththa maccassati adde gelana mala
1Timothy5:15 Addaka hayssafe kase issi issi asati Xala7e kaallana guye sher7i gida.
1Timothy5:16 Ammaniza maccassi oonikka baso asaa giddon am7eti dizaa gidikko Woosa Keeththi tumu am7eta xalla maaddana mala izakka ba baggara ba am7eta maaddu attiin Woosa Keeththas tooho gidana mala aggufu.
1Timothy5:17 Woosa keeththaa lo7eththi ayssizayti harappeka sabbakoninne tamaarson minniza cimati gidikko dakko maado maadettanaas bessees.
1Timothy5:18 Maxaafan
1Timothy5:19 Nam7u markkay woykko heedzdzu markkay markkattontta dishin cima bolla shiiqiza mooto ekkofa.
1Timothy5:20 Harati be7idi naagettana mala nagara ooththizayta asa ubbaa sinththan hanqa.
1Timothy5:21 Xoossaninne Yesus Kirstoosan doorettida kiitanchchata sinththan hayta azazota oonakka maaddontta ne naagana malanne issi miishshika ta goorippe ziqqi dhoqqu histtontta mala ta nena hadara gays.
1Timothy5:22 Xoossa oosos dooranaas
1Timothy5:23 Nena qanththan sakkizayssassinne ubba wode sakkiza sakoza gishshas woyne cajjefe guuth gujjada uya attiin hayssafe guye haaththe xalla uyoppa.
1Timothy5:24 Issi issi asaa nagaray pirday yaanaappe kasetidi qonccees; baggayta nagaray gidikko pirdafe guye qonccees.
1Timothy5:25 Lo7o oosoykka hessa mala qoncce; qoncconttay diikkoka qotetti attenna.
1Timothy6:1 Xoossa sunththinne iza timirtey cayettontta mala aylleteththa qambara giddon dizayti wuri ba godaas kumeththa bonchchoy bessizayssa eretto.
1Timothy6:2 Ammaniza godati diza ammaniza ashkarati godati isttas ishata gidida gishshas godatas bessiza bonchcho immetto; harappeka istta ooson maadettiza ammaniza godati isttas dosettidayta gidida gishshas nekka haytantta mala yo7ota tamaarsanaassinne zoranaas bessees.
1Timothy6:3 Oonikka wordo timirte tamaarsiko Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa lo7o qaalanne Ayana tumateththaa minththiza timirtera gaaggonttayssa gidikko
1Timothy6:4 hessaadey otoreteththan kumidessinne aykkoka yuushshi qoppenna; issi issi qaalata gishshas palamettanaassinne ooyetanaas iita amoy izan dees; heytikka qanaateteth
1Timothy6:5 Tumay isttafe eketti gidiin Ayana ooson wodhe demmana misatiza asatanne qofa pace asata giddon gooshettidi duuxxontta oosh eheettes.
1Timothy6:6 Gido attiin Tumu Ayana as gideththi nuus dizayssan woppu giidi duussara gita wodhe.
1Timothy6:7 Gaasoykka nu hayssa ha alameza yishe aykkoka ekki yibeekko; bishekka qasse aykkoka ekki bookko.
1Timothy6:8 Gido attiin nuus maanayssinne nu may7anayssi diikko gidana.
1Timothy6:9 Dure gidanaas koyzayti gidikko gede paaceninne narxan gelidi oykettizayssa mala daro hadaninne iita amon un7etteettes.
1Timothy6:10 Gaasoykka miishsha siiqoy iitateth ubbaas xapho; issi issi asati dure gidana giidi amottida amoppe dendidayssan ammano ogeppe balettidi haraso bidanne barkka bana daro meto giddo gelththida.
1Timothy6:11 Nenoo Xoossa asoo! Ne hessa ubbaafe baqata; xilloteth
1Timothy6:12 Ammano baaxe lo7eththa baaxeta; daro markkatta sinththan lo7o ammaneteththan ne markkattidayssanne ne izas xeygettida mernaa de7oza lo7eththa oykka.
1Timothy6:13 Ubbaasikka de7o immiza Xoossaa achchan hessaththoka Phanxoosa Philaxoosa sinththan tumaa markkattida Yesus Kirstoosa sinththan ta nena hadara gizay
1Timothy6:14 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi qonccana gakkanaas nees imettida oosoza wosoy baynda ne polana mala bessees.
1Timothy6:15 He qoncceththi anjjettidayssi barkka ubbaa haarizayssinne kawota kawoy
1Timothy6:16 Izi xalla hayqqonttayssa; oonikka shiiqanaas dandayontta poo7o giddon dees; iza be7ida asi oonikka baa; beyana dandayzaadeyka deenna; izas wolqqaynne bonchchoy mernaappe mernaas gido. Amiin.
1Timothy6:17 Hayssa ha alamezan duretidayti otorettontta mala azaza; nu ufayettana mala wursika darssi tirfisidi nuus immiza Xoossaan attiin ammanththontta miishshaan ammanettontta mala asaas yoota.
1Timothy6:18 Lo7o ooththana malanne lo7o ooson dureta gidana mala
1Timothy6:19 Hessaththoka tumu gidida de7o demmana mala buroppe yaana wodes asay mino xapho gidiza haaro baas shiishshana.
1Timothy6:20 Ximtoosaa! Ne hadara ekkidayssa wursa naaga; Xoossaa bonchchisontta hada doona lom7ulom7afenne wordo erateth geetettiza asi baappe medhdhi kessida timirtefe haakka.
1Timothy6:21 Nuus hessa mala erateththi dees giza issi issi asati hessaththo ooson ammano ogeppe balettida; Xoossa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
2Timothy1:1 Yesus Kirstoosara issifeteththan diza de7o hidota qaala gishshas yootana mala Xoossa shenen Yesus Kirstoosa Hawaare gidida Phawuloosappe
2Timothy1:2 dosettida ta naa Ximtoosas kiyateththi
2Timothy1:3 Pacey baynda gallassinne qamma ne gishshas woosan qofsashe kase Aawati ooththida mala geeshsha wozinara ta goynniza Xoossaa ta galatays.
2Timothy1:4 Kase ne afunththaa qoppa ekkada ta nena beyada ufayettana laamotays.
2Timothy1:5 Qoodheppe qommon gidontta ne ammanoza ta qoppays; he ammanoykka koyro ne aayey aayin Loydininne qasseka ne aayeyin Ewonqen dees; ha7i qasse ne bolla dizayssaka ta eradis.
2Timothy1:6 Hessa gishshas tani ta kushe ne bolla woththiin ne ekkidayssa ne bolla diza Xoossa imotaa ne denththeththana mala ta nena qofsays.
2Timothy1:7 Xoossi nuus nuni nu hu7e haaranaas Xoossa wolqqa eranaassinne siiqettana Ayana immides attiin babo ayana immibeenna.
2Timothy1:8 Hessa gishshas Godaa gishshas markkattanaas woykko Godaa gishshas qashettida tanan yeellatoppa; gido attiin Xoossa wolqqara mishiraachcho qaalaa gishshas ne tanara meto ekka.
2Timothy1:9 Nu aykkoka ooththida gishshas gidontta dishin ba qofaa malanne ba kiyateththaa mala nuna ashshidessinne nuna baas dummasidi xeygides. He iza kiyateththi mernaa wodeppe kase Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nuus imettides.
2Timothy1:10 Ha7i qasse izi hayqo ubbaa dhayssidi mishiraachcho qaalaa baggara nuna poo7on kessida nu dhale Yesus Kirstoosa yuussaan qonccides.
2Timothy1:11 Tanikka hayssa ha mishiraachcho qaalaa yootizaade
2Timothy1:12 Tani meto be7izaykka hessa gishshassa; gidikkoka ta oona ammanizaakko tani ta ammanizaade shaakka eriza gishshas izan yeellatikke. Ta izas immida hadaraa he gallassiya gakkanaas izi naaganaas dandayzayssa ta shaakka eradis.
2Timothy1:13 Ne taappe siyida timirteza Yesus Kirstoosara issifeteththan diza ammanoninne siiqon leemiso histta oykka.
2Timothy1:14 Nees imettida lo7o hadaraa nunan diza Xillo Ayanan naaga.
2Timothy1:15 Iisiya awuraajja giddon dizayti wurikka tana aggidayssa ne eraasa; Filgoosinne Hermogeneesi tana aggida asaara deettes.
2Timothy1:16 Henesifoore soo asaa Goday maaro; ays giikko izi tana daro wode minththeththidessinne tani sansalatan qashetta dishin tana be7idi yeellatibeenna.
2Timothy1:17 Harappeka izi Oroome yida wode tana koyi koyidi demmides.
2Timothy1:18 Wurseththa pirda gallas Goday iza pirdafe ashsho; izi tana Efesoonen ay mala maaddidaakko ne lo7eththa eraasa.
2Timothy2:1 Hessa gishshas ta naazoo neni Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththan minna.
2Timothy2:2 Daro markkatta sinththan ne taappe siyidayssa harata tamaarsanaas dandayzaytassinne ammanettida asatas hadara imma.
2Timothy2:3 Yesus Kirstoosas ammanettida lo7o wottadara mala tanara meto ekka.
2Timothy2:4 Wottadarateththan ooththizaadey ba halaqaa ufayssanaas dafettees attiin hara bana qaxeththiza ooson geli erenna.
2Timothy2:5 Hessaththoka gaadde woxxizaadey woththa woga naagontta woxxiko xoono akilile ekkenna.
2Timothy2:6 Gooba goshshanchchay ba goyi kessida kaththa xeera mizaade gidanaas bessees.
2Timothy2:7 Ta nees gizayssa ne wozinan woththa siyikko Goday nees yo7o ubbaan akeeka immana.
2Timothy2:8 Hayqoppe dendida Dawite zereth gidida Yesus Kirstoosa qoppa; ta yootiza mishiraachcho qaalaykka hessa.
2Timothy2:9 Hessa gaason iita ooththida asa mala qashettana gakkanaas waaye beyays; gido attiin Xoossa qaalay qashettenna.
2Timothy2:10 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosa baggara diza atoteththinne mernaa bonchcho demmana doorettidayta gishshas gaada wursaka dandayadis.
2Timothy2:11 «Nu izara issife hayqqiko nu izara de7on daana.
2Timothy2:12 Dandayan minniko nu izara kawotana. Nu iza kaddiko izikka nuna kaddana.
2Timothy2:13 Nu izas ammanettonttayta gidikko izi mernaas ammanettida mala daana. Izi barkka bana kaddana dandayenna» geetettida qaalay ammanettidayssa.
2Timothy2:14 Hayta ha yo7ota gishshas asaa qofso aggofa; asay ba giddon issoy issaara qaalaa gaason palamettontta mala Xoossa sunththan zora; hessa mala yo7oy siyizayta moorees.
2Timothy2:15 Tumu Xoossaa qaala yootizaade
2Timothy2:16 Coo mela doona lallabeteththafe haakka; hessa mala yo7on waaxettida asati Xoossafe haakki haakki beettes.
2Timothy2:17 Istta timirtey sakkidi paxontta gede gujji gujji daaketti biza madunththa mala; Hemenewoosinne Qasse Filxoosa geetettizayti hessa mala timirte tamaarzayta giddon deettes.
2Timothy2:18 Heyti tumateththafe haakkidi coo mela waayeettes; isttika
2Timothy2:19 Gido attiin
2Timothy2:20 Issi gita keeththan worqqafenne birappe xalla gidontta miththafenne urqqafe oosettidayti dizayssaththo heytanttafekka baggayti bonchcho oosos
2Timothy2:21 Hessa gishshas oonikka hayta ta gida iita yo7otappe bana geeshshiko; hessaadey bonchcho oosos gidizaadenne anjjettidaade; Godaa go7izaadenne lo7o oosos giigettidaade gidana.
2Timothy2:22 Panththateththa iita amoteththafe baqata; geeshsha wozinara Godaa xeygiza asatara xilloteth
2Timothy2:23 Go7aynne hidotay baynda eeyata palamappe haakka; gaasoykka hessantta malay oosh kaaleththizayssa ne eraasa.
2Timothy2:24 Godaa oosanchchay asara ooyettanaas bessenna; hessafe bollara asa ubbaa achchan kiya
2Timothy2:25 Izi banara eqettiza asata ashketeththara oykkizaade gidanaas bessees; oonee erizay istti tumaa erana mala Xoossi isttas maarettanaas wode immana dandayees.
2Timothy2:26 Hessika istti yuushshi qoppi simmidi iza shene kunththana mala istta di7i efida Xala7e narxafe istti kessi ekkana.
2Timothy3:1 Gido attiin wode wurseththan as metiza wodey yaanayssa ne era.
2Timothy3:2 Asay bana dosizaade gidana; miish siiqizayta
2Timothy3:3 siiqoy bayndayta
2Timothy3:4 kaddizayta
2Timothy3:5 Ammaniza as misatana shin ammanos diza wolqqaa kaddana; heyta malatappe ne haakka.
2Timothy3:6 Heytantti issi issi keeththe kalxi gelidi daro deexo nagaraninne dumma dumma iita amoteththa gars gelidi yaanne haa qaaxxiza ammanon laafa maccassata qaxi oykkeettes.
2Timothy3:7 Heyta mala maccassati ubba wode tamaareettes shin tumaa erettenna.
2Timothy3:8 Iyaneessinne Iyanbaraasi Muse bolla dendida mala haytikka istta qofay moorettiin baas ammanoppe kundida gishshas tumateth ixxeettes.
2Timothy3:9 Gido attiin istta qofay kumenna; gaasoykka Iyaneesanne Iyanbaraasa eeyateththi asaas qonccida malakka hayta hanoykka ubbaas qonccana.
2Timothy3:10 Ne gidikko ta timirteza
2Timothy3:11 Ta goodeteththaanne ta waayeza Anxokiyan
2Timothy3:12 Tumappe Yesus Kirstoosa geeshsha wozinappe ammani daana gizayti wurikka goodettizayta gidana.
2Timothy3:13 Iita gidida baleththiza asati baas balettidi asaa baleththishe iitateththaa bolla iitateth gujji gujji baana.
2Timothy3:14 Ne gidikko kase ne tamaarada erida ogen minna; hessa oonappe tamaardaakko ne eraasa.
2Timothy3:15 Ne guuththa naateththafe ha7i gakkanaas Yesus Kirstoosa ammanon atoteththi beettiza timirte immiza Geeshsha Maxaafata lo7eththa eradasa.
2Timothy3:16 Geeshsha Maxaafati wurikka Xoossa Ayanay kaaleththiin xaafettidayta; isttika as tamaarsanaas
2Timothy3:17 Hessika Xoossa asi lo7o ooso ubbaas bessizaade gidana malassa.
2Timothy4:1 Xoossa sinththaninne hessaththoka paxa dizayta bollanne hayqqidayta bolla pirdanaas diza Yesus Kirstoosa sinththan iza qoncceththaanne iza kawoteththaa qofara hayssa nees hadara gays.
2Timothy4:2 Qaalaa sabbaka; nees giigiin woykko giigontta aggiin neni ne baggara giigetta utta; daro dandayara tamaarson asaa suurisa; hanqanne zora.
2Timothy4:3 Gaasoykka asay wuri suure gidida timirte ekkontta ixxana wodey yaana; hessafe bollara asay ba amora gaaggizayssa istta hayththi siyana koyzayssa xalla isttas yootana mala bana tamaarsana daro astamaareta ba ach shiishshana.
2Timothy4:4 Tumaa siyanaappe ba hayth haraso zaaridi haysi7e bagga simmana.
2Timothy4:5 Neni gidikko haniza yo7o ubbaan loddu ga; meto dandaya; mishiraachcho qaalaa yooto nees ooso histta; ne oosozakka pola.
2Timothy4:6 Ta qasse yarshettanaas mata uttadis; hayssa ha alamezappe shaaketta buussa wodey taas gakkides.
2Timothy4:7 Lo7o baaxe ta baaxetadis; ta woxxana woth wursadis; ammanokka naagadis.
2Timothy4:8 Sinththafe taas akililey giigi uttides; hessika xilloteththa; hessaka tumu pirdiza Goday he gallas taas immana; hessika taas xalla gidontta iza yuussaa laamotizaytas ubbaasikka immana.
2Timothy4:9 Taakko elela yaanaas nees dandayettida mala ooththa.
2Timothy4:10 Deemaasi hayssa alameza siiqidi tana yeggi aggidi Tasolonqe bides. Qarqisi Galatiya bides; Titoosi gede Dalmaaxiya bides.
2Timothy4:11 Luqaasi xalla tanara dees; Marqoosi tana ooson maaddiza gishshas iza nenara ekka ya.
2Timothy4:12 Tiqiqoosa Efesoone yeddadis.
2Timothy4:13 Ne haa yashe ta Xiro7aadan Karpuse achchan woththida ta Maaqanne maxaafata harappeka galban xaafettida maxaafata taas ekka ya.
2Timothy4:14 Xarqimala qoxxiza Iskindiroosi ta bolla daro qoho gaththides shin Goday izas iza ooso mala immana.
2Timothy4:15 Izi nu yootiza qaalaa keehi ixxides; nekka izappe naagetta.
2Timothy4:16 Tana mootiza yo7ozas koyro tana ashshana markka ta shiishshiin oonikka tana maaddana yibeenna; gido attiin wurikka tana yeggidi bida. Hessaka istta bolla Xoossi qoho histti qoodoppo.
2Timothy4:17 Gido attiin qaalaa kiitay ta baggara kumeth yootettana malanne dere asay wuri siyana mala Goday ta achchan eqqidi tana minththides; Gaammo doonappeka tana ashshides.
2Timothy4:18 Goday iita yo7o ubbaafe tana ashshana; gede ba salo kawoteththas tana sarora gaththana; izas mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas bonchchoy gido. Amiin.
2Timothy4:19 Phirsiqillas
2Timothy4:20 Erisxoosi Qorontoosen attides; Xirofomoosi sakettida gishshas iza ta Miliixen aggadis.
2Timothy4:21 Balgoy gakkanaappe sinththetada taakko haa gakkanaas nees dandayettida mala ooththa. Ewuguloosi
2Timothy4:22 Goday nenara gido; Godaa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
Titus1:1 Xoossas doorettidayta ammanoninne Tumu Ayanan kaaleththiza tumaa erateththan dichchana mala Xoossa ayllenne Yesus Kirstoosa Hawaare gidida Phawuloosappe
Titus1:2 iza ammanoynne erateththay kaseppe oykkidi wordotontta Goday daro wodeppe kase ba immida mernaa de7o hidota mala.
Titus1:3 Izi kase gida wodey gakkida mala nuna ashshida Xoossaa azazon taas sabbakanaas imettida hara baggara Xoossi ba qaalaa qonccisides.
Titus1:4 Nuus koththe gidida ammano issifeteththaan
Titus1:5 Ta nena Qarxeesen aggiday buroppe giigana bessiza daro miishshi diza gishshas ne giigsanaassinne ta nena azazida mala katamay dizason Woosa Keeththa cimata ne dooranaassa.
Titus1:6 Cimateththan doorettanayti istta bolla wosoy bayndayta
Titus1:7 Woosa keeththa cimay Xoossas ooththana hadara ekkidaade gidida mala iza bolla wosoy bayndaade gidanaas bessees; hessika ceeqettizaade
Titus1:8 Hessafe bollara izi imath mokkizaade
Titus1:9 Hara asata lo7o timirten minththeththizaadenne he lo7o timirteza ixxizayta hanqanaas ba tamaarda mala qaalaan minnizaade gidanaas bessees.
Titus1:10 Waayisizaytinne doonan xalla baleththizayti daroti deettes; harappeka heyti qaxxarettida Ayhuda asatappe ammanida asata baggata.
Titus1:11 Heytantta co7u histteth bessees; gaasoykka istti bessontta ogera baas go7a demmanaas bessontta timirte tamaarson keeththa asaa wursi mooron deettes.
Titus1:12 Istta nabetappe issaadey istta gishshas haasayshe
Titus1:13 He markkateththay tuma; hessa gishshas ne istta lo7eththa hanqetta; gaasoykka isttas tumu ammanoy daana malanne
Titus1:14 Ayhudata haysi7e woykko tumu yo7oppe haakkida asata azazo istti siyontta malassa.
Titus1:15 Geeshshatas miishshi wurikka geeshsha shin tunatassinne ammanonttaytas gidikko wurikka tuna; harappeka istta qofay wurikka tunides.
Titus1:16 Istti bana nuni Xoos eroos geettes shin ba hanoteththaan gidikko kaddeettes; istti harassizayta
Titus2:1 Neni gidikko asaa tumu gididaaz tamaarsa.
Titus2:2 Cima asay wozinama
Titus2:3 Hessaththoka cima maccassati ba diza duussan bonchchora dizaytanne lo7o hanoteth asa tamaarsizayta gidetto attiin asa sunth iissizayta woykko woyne cajje ushsha suuken waaxettidayta gidontta mala istta tamaarsa.
Titus2:4 Hessaththo ooththiko naateththa maccassati ba azinatanne ba nayta dosana mala tamaarsanaas dandayeettes.
Titus2:5 Xoossa qaalay oona achchanka cayettontta mala istti barkka bana haarizaytanne geeshshata
Titus2:6 Hessaththoka yelaga attumasay barkka bana haarana mala ne istta zora.
Titus2:7 Ay hanonkka ne asas lo7o leemiso gida; neni asaa tamaarsiza timirteza nenikka wozinappe tamaarsizaadenne naagizaade gida.
Titus2:8 Nu gishshas iita haasayza asay haasayanaas iita demmontta aggidi yeellatana mala ne haasayza haasaya giddon borso yo7oy dooppo.
Titus2:9 Aylleti aazankka ba godatas haarettana malanne ufayssana mala; qasseka awute zaarontta mala tamaarsa.
Titus2:10 Hanizaazan ubbaan nuna ashshida Xoossa timirtey dosettana mala istti lo7o markkateth bessana mala ba godata miish kaysotoppetto.
Titus2:11 Asas izappe maaroy beettiza Xoossa kiyateththi asa ubbaas qonccides.
Titus2:12 He kiyateththika nuni nagaran duussinne ha alame amoteththaa kaddidi hayssa ha wodezan nurkka nuna haaridinne xilloteththan Tumu Ayana duus daanayssa nuna tamaarssees.
Titus2:13 Hessika nuus anjjettida hidota gidida wogga Xoossaanne nuna ashshida Yesus Kirstoosa bonchchoy qonccanayssa naaganaassa.
Titus2:14 Izikka nuna iitateththaafe wozzanaassinne lo7o ooththanaas minniza ba dere baas dooranaas bana nuus aaththi immides.
Titus2:15 Hessa gishshas ne tamaarsanayti heytantta; hessaka ne kumeththa godateththara zoranne hanqa; nena oonikka leqqofo.
Titus3:1 Asay dere ayssizaytas haarettana malanne lo7o gidida miish wursi ooththanaas giiga gidana mala asaa qofsa.
Titus3:2 Qasseka oonikka asa bolla iita haasayontta malanne lo7o asa gidana mala asa ubbaas kumeththa wozinappe ba ashketeth bessana mala ubbaa qofsa.
Titus3:3 Nunikka kase qofay bayndayta
Titus3:4 Gido attiin nuna ashshida Xoossaa kiyateththinne iza siiqoy qonccida wode nu ooththida Xilloteththaan gidontta dishin iza maaroteththa daron attidos; izi nuna ashshiday nam7anththo yeleteth gidida meechchaninne Xillo Ayanan ooraxeteththanna.
Titus3:5 
Titus3:6 Hessaka Xillo Ayanay nu bolla nu Godaa Xoossi nuna ashshida Yesus Kirstoosa baggara darssi gussides.
Titus3:7 Hessika nu iza kiyateththan xillidi mernaa de7o hidota oykkidi laattizayta gidanaassa.
Titus3:8 Hessika ammanettida qaala; Xoossaa ammanizayti lo7o oosos bana aaththi immana mala hayssa wursa ne lo7eththa yootana mala ta koyays; hessika lo7onne ay asikka koyzaaza.
Titus3:9 Qasseka hada palamappenne asay ba qommo qoodizaazappe
Titus3:10 Asa giddon shaaketeth medhdhiza asi issito nam7uto ne zoriin ekkontta ixxiko izaadera nees issifeteththi dooppo.
Titus3:11 Hessa mala asi balettida nagaranchcha asa; izaadey barkka ba bolla pirdidayssa ne era.
Titus3:12 Arximoone woykko Tiqiqoosa ta neekko kiittiko ne taakko Niqopholiyoone yaanaas nees dandayettizaaz wursa ooththa; tani ha layththa balgo heen aaththana gaada qachchadis.
Titus3:13 Woga eriza Zeemaasinne Aphiloosi bishin isttas koshshizaaz wursa kunththa maadda.
Titus3:14 Nu baggatas hachchis hachchis istta koshshizaaz istti demmana malanne istta deeththay go7ay bayndaaz gidontta mala istti lo7o ooso ooththi minnana mala tamaaranaas koshshees.
Titus3:15 Tanara dizayti inttena saro geettes; ammano gaason nuna siiqizayta ubbaa saro giite; Xoossa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
Philemon1:1 Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas qashettida taappe Phawuloosappenne nu ishaa Ximtoosappe nu siiqo ishaa gididi nunara issife ooththiza Pilmoonas
Philemon1:2 ne keeththan shiiqiza ammaniza asaassinne nu michcheyo Ampibyas qasseka nunara issife Kirstoosa wottadara gidida Arkiphaases
Philemon1:3 Nu Aawaa Xoossaafe nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththinne saroteththi inttes gido.
Philemon1:4 Tani ta woosan nena qoppashe ubba wode Xoossaa galatays.
Philemon1:5 Gaasoykka ne Xoossa asaa siiqizayssanne Godaa Yesus Kirstoosan ne ammanizayssa ta siyadis.
Philemon1:6 Nuni Kirstoosas gididayssanne nuus diza lo7o yo7oy wuri qonccen erettana mala nenikka ne ammano hara asas bessana mala ta nees minna woossays.
Philemon1:7 Ta ishazoo! Ne hanon Xoossa asaa wozinay ooraxida gishshas ne siiqoy ta wozina keehi minththides.
Philemon1:8 Hessa gishshas ne ooththanaas bessizayssa ooththana mala nena azazanaas taas Kirstoosan xalateththi deesikoshin.
Philemon1:9 Gidikkoka ta nena azazanaappe siiqora woossays; gaasoykka tani Yesus Kirstoosa gishshas qashettada qasho keeththan diza Phawuloosa.
Philemon1:10 Ta nena woossizay tani qasho keeththan dashe Yesus Kirstoosan yelida naa Anasmoosa gishshassa.
Philemon1:11 Anasmoosi hayssafe kase nena go7ibeenna shin ha7i gidikko izi nenakka tanakka go7izaade.
Philemon1:12 Ta ha7i iza neekko zaara yeddadis; tani neekko yeddizay iza gidontta ta wozina neekko zaara yeddiza mala qoodays.
Philemon1:13 Mishiraachcho qaalaa gaason ta haan qashetta dishin ne tana ooththa maaddanayssa izi tanara de7idaakko tana ufayssees.
Philemon1:14 Gido attiin ne lo7o oosoy ne dosanpe attiin wolqqara gidontta mala gaada nena oychchontta aykkoka ooththana koyabeekke.
Philemon1:15 Anasmoosi hanno gakkanaas neeppe guuththa wode shaakettikokka oonee erizay hayssafe guye ubba wode nenara daana dandayees.
Philemon1:16 Hayssafe guye izi nenara daanay aylle mala gidontta ayllefe aadhdhi nees asho isha mala gidana; izi taas dosettida isha; gido attiin izi nena ooththi go7ana as gidida gishshassinne izi nees Kirstoosa baggara isha gidida gishshas nees keehi dosettidaade gidana.
Philemon1:17 Nuus diza issifeteththaa gaason ne tana nees isha mala qoodizaa gidikko tana ne mokka ekkiza mala izakka mokka ekka.
Philemon1:18 Izi ne bolla gaththida qohoy diikko woykko ne acoy iza bolla diikko iza acoza ta bolla qooda.
Philemon1:19 Hekko ta Phawuloosi
Philemon1:20 Hi7a ta ishazoo! Hessa lo7o ooso ne taas ooththana mala Godaa sunththan Kirstoosa gishshas gaada ne ta wozina shempisana mala ta nena woossays.
Philemon1:21 Ta nees hayssa xaafiday ne taas azazettanayssa ammanadakko! Ta nena oychchidayssafe ne aaththa ooththanayssa ta erays.
Philemon1:22 Xoossi intte woosaa siyidi ta intteko baana mala taas hidotay diza gishshas ta baada inttekon shempanaaso hayyana taas giigsa.
Philemon1:23 Yesus Kirstoosa gaason tanara qashettida Ephafiray nena saro gees.
Philemon1:24 Hessaththoka tanara ooththizayti Marqoosi Arsixirokoosi
Philemon1:25 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththi inttenara gido.
Hebrews1:1 Beni wodeppe oykkidi Xoossi dumma dumma ogera nabeta baggara kase nu Aawatas daro wode yootides.
Hebrews1:2 Qasse hayssa wurseththa wode bolla wursi laatissidaadenne ha alameza medhdhida ba naaza baggara nuus yootides.
Hebrews1:3 Izikka Xoossa bonchcho bessizaadenne Xoossa Xoossateththaas lo7o leemiso gididi ba wolqqama qaalan wursika shiishshi oykkides; izi asaa nagarappe geeshshidaappe guye salon bonchcho Xoossaa ushachchan uttides.
Hebrews1:4 Hessa gishshas izas imettida sunththay kiitanchchata sunththaafe aadhdhizayssa mala izikka kiitanchchatappe keehi aadhdhees.
Hebrews1:5 Xoossi kiitanchchafe
Hebrews1:6 Qasseka Xoossi ba bayra Naaza duge ha biittaa bolla yeddishe
Hebrews1:7 Kiitanchchata gishshas haasayshe qasse
Hebrews1:8 Naaza gishshas qasse
Hebrews1:9 Neni xilloteth dosadasa; makkallaka ixxaasa; hessa gishshas Xoossi ne Goday nena ne laggetappe bolla kessides; nena ufayssa zayte tiydes» gees.
Hebrews1:10 Qasse
Hebrews1:11 Istti dhayana; neni gidikko minna daana; istti wurikka may7o mala gal7ana.
Hebrews1:12 Neni istta may7o mala qalam7ana; isttika may7o mala laamettana; ne gidikko aydekka neni nena; ne duussas wurseththi deenna» gees.
Hebrews1:13 Xoossi kiitanchchatappe
Hebrews1:14 Kiitanchchati wurikka atoteth laattana asata ooththanaas Xoossafe kiitettiza oosanchcha Ayana gidettennee?
Hebrews2:1 Hessa gishshas nuni siyida qaalaappe balettidi kundontta mala nu siyida qaalaa lo7eththi naaganaas bessees.
Hebrews2:2 Aazas giikko kase kiitanchchata baggara yootettida qaalay tumu gidida he qaalaa yedhdhi aadhdhiday baas bessiza qixaate ekkees.
Hebrews2:3 Nu qasse hessa mala gita maaroteth coo leppi histtiko waani attanee? Hayssi maaroteththay koyro Godaa baggara nuus yootettides; izappe siyidaytikka nuus geeshshi yootida.
Hebrews2:4 Xoossi qasseka malaatata
Hebrews2:5 Xoossi hayssa nu iza gishshas haasayza buro yaana alameza kiitanchchas haarisibeenna.
Hebrews2:6 Gido attiin Geeshsha Maxaafay harason
Hebrews2:7 Ne iza kiitanchchatappe guuththara guuththadasa. Bonchcho zawudenne galata iza hu7en woththadasa. Neni iza ne kushe oosota bolla shuumadasa.
Hebrews2:8 Ne wursaka iza toho garsan haarisadasa; Xoossi ubbaaka izappe garsara izas haarisishin attiday ay miishshika deenna. Gido attiin ha7i qasse wurikka izas haarettishin nu beyibeekko» gides.
Hebrews2:9 Gido attiin Xoossa kiyateththan asa ubbaa gishshas hayqqanaas kiitanchchatappe guuththa wode guuxxida Yesusi waaye hayqo hayqqidi ha7i bonchchonne galata zawude ba hu7en woththidayssa nu beyoos.
Hebrews2:10 Hanizay wurikka izappe izas medhettida Xoossi daro nayta bonchchos efanaas istta maaroteththas hu7e gidida Yesusi waayen polanaas koshshizaaz gidides.
Hebrews2:11 As geeshshizaynne izan geeyza asay heyti issi keeththa asata. Hessa gishshas Yesusi istta
Hebrews2:12 «Tani ne sunththan ta ishatas yootana shiiqida dereza sinththan nena galatiza mazamure ta yexxana.»
Hebrews2:13 Hessaththoka
Hebrews2:14 Naytas ashoynne suuththi diza mala izikka istta mala asa; hessika hayqo bolla izas wolqqay diza daabulosa izi ba hayqo wolqqan zaaranaassa.
Hebrews2:15 Hessaththoka ba diza wode ubbaan hayqos babon haaretti qashettidayta hayqoppe wozzanaassa.
Hebrews2:16 Izi haa yiday kiitanchchata maaddanaas gidontta Abrahaame zereththata maaddanaas yides.
Hebrews2:17 Hessa gishshas ubba baggara izi ba ishata misatanaas bessizaade gidides; izi hessa ooththiday maarizaadenne ammanettida waanna qeese halaqa gididi Xoossas ooththanaassinne dereza nagarappe maaranaassa.
Hebrews2:18 Izi ba hu7en paacettidi meto ekkida gishshas paacettizayta maaddanaas dandayees.
Hebrews3:1 Hessa gishshas saloppe xeyssi inttena gakkiin ammaniza nu ishatoo! Nu ammanos Hawaarenne qeeseta halaqa gidida Yesusa qopite.
Hebrews3:2 Musey Xoossa Keeth ubbaa bolla ammanettidaade gidida mala Yesusikka bana shuumidaades ammanettidaade.
Hebrews3:3 Keeththe keexxidaades keeththaafe bollara bonchchoy diza mala Yesusaska Museppe aadhdhiza bonchchoy bessizaade gidanaas bessees.
Hebrews3:4 Keeththe ubbaasikka keexxidaadey dees; gido attiin wursika ooththiday Xoossa.
Hebrews3:5 Musey tinbite markkattishe Xoossa Keeth ubba bolla issi ammanettida oosanchcha mala gidi de7ides.
Hebrews3:6 Kirstoosi gidikko Xoossa Keeththaa bolla ammanettida naa mala. Nunikka iza bolla ammanettiza ufayssaynne ceeqettiza hidotaa lo7eththi oykkiko nu izas duussa keeththa.
Hebrews3:7 Hessa gishshas Xillo Ayanay giza mala
Hebrews3:8 bazzo biittan intte tana paaccida wode makkallidayssaththo intte wozina muumisopite.
Hebrews3:9 Intte aawati kase heen tana paaccidanne tanara eqettida. Ta ooththidayssa wursi oyddu tammu layth gakkanaas be7ida.
Hebrews3:10 He wode yeletata bolla ta hanqettin istta wozinay ubba wode balettees; istti ta oge eribeettenna.
Hebrews3:11 Qasse
Hebrews3:12 Ta ishatoo! Inttefe oonikka de7o Xoossaafe haraso inttena haassiza iitanne ammanontta wozinay dontta mala naagettite.
Hebrews3:13 Harappeka intte garsafe oonikka nagaran balettidi ba wozina muumisontta mala
Hebrews3:14 Nuus kase koyroppe diza ammano nuni wurseth gakkanaas lo7eththi minththi oykkiko nuni Kirstoosara issife laattana.
Hebrews3:15 Hessika
Hebrews3:16 Siyidi makkallidayti istti oonanttee? Musey Gibxeppe kaaleththi kessidayta ubbata gidettennee?
Hebrews3:17 Xoossi istta bolla oyddu tammu layth hanqettidayti istti oonanttee? Nagara ooththiin istta ahay bazzo biittan kundi attidayta gidettennee?
Hebrews3:18 Izas azazettontta ixxidaytappe attiin iza shemposo gelontta mala izi caaqqi diggiday haray oonanttee?
Hebrews3:19 Hessa gishshas istti gelontta attiday ammanoy baynda gishshas gididayssa nu eroos.
Hebrews4:1 Gede shemposo gelanaas imettida hidotay ha7ikka naagetti diza gishshas intte giddofe oonikka hessas bessonttaade gidontta mala ane naagettoos.
Hebrews4:2 Heytanttas sabbakettida mala nuuska mishiraachcho qaalay sabbakettides; gidikkoka siyida asatara siyida qaalay isttara ammanon walakettontta aggida gishshas istta go7ibeenna.
Hebrews4:3 Nu qasse ammanizayti he shemposoza gelana. Xoossi
Hebrews4:4 Issi sohon laappunththa gallassa gishshas
Hebrews4:5 Qasseka he sozan
Hebrews4:6 Iza shemposo buro gelana issi issi asati deettes; kase isttas mishiraachcho qaalay sabbakettidayti azazettontta ixxida gishshas iza shemposo istti gelibeettenna.
Hebrews4:7 Hessa gishshas Xoossi
Hebrews4:8 Iyaasoy isttas shempo immidaakko Xoossi hara gallas giidi yootennakoshin.
Hebrews4:9 Hessa gishshas Sambata gallas shempoy Xoossa deres ha7ikka dees.
Hebrews4:10 Gaasoykka Xoossa shemposo gelizay wuri Xoossi ooththi shempida mala izikka ba oosoppe shempana.
Hebrews4:11 Hessa gishshas oonikka heytantta mala azazettontta ixxidayssa leemiso kaallidi kundontta mala he shemposoyo gelanaas ane minnoos.
Hebrews4:12 Xoossa qaalay paxa dizayssanne ooththiza qaala; nam7u bagga qara mashshafekka aadhdhi qara; shempponne ayana
Hebrews4:13 Xoossa ayfeppe geemettida medhetay mulekka deenna; nu izas nu gishshas zaaro immanaas bessiza iza sinththan hanoy wurikka kallo qonccen beettana.
Hebrews4:14 Hessa gishshas pude salo bida qeeseta halaqa Xoossa Naa Yesusi nuus diza gishshas ane nuni nu ammano ane minththi oykkoos.
Hebrews4:15 Nu daaburshin nuus qadhettana dandayza qeeseta halaqay nuus dees; izi nu mala ubba miishshan paacettides; gidikkoka izi aykko nagarakka ooththibeenna.
Hebrews4:16 Hessa gishshas nuni maaroteth ekkanaassinne nuna koshshiza wode nuna maaddiza iza kiyateth nu demmana mala gede iza maaroteththa algaakko ane ammanon shiiqos.
Hebrews5:1 Qeeseta halaqa gidi shuumettizaadey daro asaa giddofe dooretteessinne asa gishshas gididi imotanne nagara gishshas yarsho shiishshanaas doorettees.
Hebrews5:2 Izikka ba baggara daaburanchcha gidida gishshas erontta asatassinne oge balidaytas qadhettana dandayees.
Hebrews5:3 Izi ba nagara gishshassinne hara asata nagara gishshas yarsho shiishshanaas izas bessizay hessa gishshassa.
Hebrews5:4 Aarooney xeygettidayssaththo izi Xoossi xeygidaade gidanaas bessees attiin hessa he bonchchoza barkka baas ekkizaadey deenna.
Hebrews5:5 Hessaththoka Kirstoosi qeeseta halaqa gidana bonchcho barkka baas ekkibeenna; gido attiin
Hebrews5:6 Hessaththoka harason «Malkexeedeqe shuumeta mala neni mernaas qeeseta halaqa» gees.
Hebrews5:7 Yesusi hayssa biittaa bolla diza wode iza hayqoppe ashshana dandayzayssako afunxxishe qaala dhoqqu histti woossides. Addafe ashketeththara izi azazettida gishshas iza woosaakka Xoossi siyides.
Hebrews5:8 Izi Xoossa Naa gidikkoka ba ekkida waayezappe azazeteth tamaardes.
Hebrews5:9 Hessa baggara pacey bayndaade gidi beettidayssafe guye baas azazettizaytas ubbaas mernaa atoteththas gaaso gidides.
Hebrews5:10 Malkexeedeqe shuumeteththaa mala qeeseta halaqa geetetti Xoossan shuumettides.
Hebrews5:11 Hessa gishshas nu haasayana miishshi buro daroy dees; gido attiin intte dotta7ata gidida gishshas inttena erisoy meto.
Hebrews5:12 Intte hanni wode astamaare gidanaas bessishin Xoossa qaalaa buro koyroppe denththidi inttena tamaarsiza as inttes koshshees. Inttes mino kath gidontta maath koshshees.
Hebrews5:13 Maath paahettizay qii guuththa naa gidiza gishshas lo7onne iita shaakkiza timirte shaakki erenna.
Hebrews5:14 Mino kaththi gidikko lo7onne iita shaakki eranaas dandayza wozina kunththida asatassa.
Hebrews6:1 Hessa gishshas koyroppe Kirstoosa gishshas imettida timirteza aggidi ane gede mino timirtekko boos. Hayqqida oosoppe maaroteththan gelo gishshassinne Xoossan ammano gishshas ane izan buro wodhdhi maadhdhoko.
Hebrews6:2 Hessaththoka xinqata gishshassinne kushe asa bolla wotho gishshas qasseka hayqqidayta denththaa gishshassinne mernaa pirda gishshas buro woththi doommoko.
Hebrews6:3 Xoossa shene gidikko nu hessaththo ooththana.
Hebrews6:4 Ba ammano kaddida asata istta maaroteththan wostti zoranee? He asati poo7oy isttas issito poo7idayta salo imoteththaa ekki be7idayta
Hebrews6:5 Xoossaa lo7o qaalanne buro yaana alameza wolqqa ekki be7idayta
Hebrews6:6 zaari kaddidayta
Hebrews6:7 Ubba wode ira uyiza biittaya qasseka iza goyizaades ayfe immiza biittaya Xoossa achchan anjjettadus.
Hebrews6:8 Gido attiin agunththinne odoroy mokkiza biittaya go7ay bayndaaro gidana; he biittays qanggeteththi matan dees; izi wurseththi taman xuugeteth gidana.
Hebrews6:9 Ta ishatoo! Nuni hessaththo haasaykkoka inttes intte atoteththara oykettida lo7o miishshi dizayssa nu sidhokko.
Hebrews6:10 Kase gidiin woykko ha7i gidiinkka intte ammanizayta maaddidayssanne iza sunththaa gishshas intte bessida siiqoteththaa balanaas Xoossi makkallanchcha gidenna.
Hebrews6:11 Inttes imettida hidotay polettana gakkanaas inttefe issi issi asi hessa mala ooso wurseth gakkanaas genccidi ooththana mala nu amottoos.
Hebrews6:12 Ammanoninne dandayan intte iza hidota qaalaa laattizayta misatanaappe attiin dotta7ata gidanayssa nu koyokko.
Hebrews6:13 Xoossi Abrahaames hidota immida wode caaqqishe hara izappe aadhdhizaadey baynda gishshas barkka banan
Hebrews6:14 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahaameykka gencci naagidaappe kaallidi izas imettida hidota demmides.
Hebrews6:16 Asay caaqo caaqqishe baappe dhoqqan caaqqees; Caaqozikka geetettidayssi polettana mala minththiza gishshas caaqqidayta giddon palamay dendiko kase caaqo qaalay diggees.
Hebrews6:17 Xoossi laamettontta ba qofaa hidota qaalaa laattanaytas qonccisana mala koyida gishshas caaqo qaalan minththides.
Hebrews6:18 Xoossi ay wodekka wordotanaas dandayenna; izi laamettontta nam7u miishshatan nu sinththan diza hidotaa oykkanaas izakko shiiqida nuni gita minoteth demmana mala ooththides.
Hebrews6:19 Nunikka shempo teqe gidida minonne ammanththiza hidota demmidos; he hidotaykka magalashazappe guye baggara diza gede Xoossa Keeththaa gido gelees.
Hebrews6:20 He soozikka nu gishshas Yesusi kaseti gelidaso; izikka Malkexeedeqe shuumeteththaa mala mernaas qeeseta halaqa gidides.
Hebrews7:1 Hessi Malkexeedeqey Saaleme kawonne Xoossa qeese; izikka Abrahaamey kawota oli xoonidi simmishin demmidi Abrahaame anjjides.
Hebrews7:2 Abrahaameykka baas diza ubbaafe tammu kusheppe issi kushe izas immides. Koyro iza sunththaas birsheththi
Hebrews7:3 Izas aayakka
Hebrews7:4 Ane intte izi ay mala gitakko qopite
Hebrews7:5 Isttas qeeseteththi imettida Lewe nayti istta ishati Abrahaame zereththata gidikkoka deraappe hessika ba ishatappe tammaafe issaa ekkana mala isttas wogan azazettides.
Hebrews7:6 Hayssa ha addeza zereththi Lewe zereth gidenna; gido attiin izi Abrahaameppe tammaafe issaa ekkides; kase izas hidota qaalay imettida Abrahaame anjjides.
Hebrews7:7 Bayray kaalo anjjizayssi woga.
Hebrews7:8 Issi baggara tammaafe issaa ekkizayti hayqqizayta; hara baggara qasse tammaafe issaa ekkizaadey hayqqontta paxa diza mala izas markkattidaadey Malkexeedeqe.
Hebrews7:9 Haray attoshin Leweykka Abrahaame baggara tammaafe issaa kessides gaanaas dandayettees.
Hebrews7:10 Gaasoykka Malkexeedeqey Abrahaamera gaaggiza wode Lewey buro ba aawaa Abrahaameppe yelettibeenna.
Hebrews7:11 Pacey baynda poloy beettidaynne wogay derezas imettiday Lewe qeeseteththaa mala gididaakko Aaroone mala gidontta Malkexeedeqe shuumeteththaa malay hara qeesey yaanaas aazas koshshidee?
Hebrews7:12 Qeeseteththa zarkkey laamettiza wode wogaykka laamettanayssi attontta miishsha.
Hebrews7:13 Hessi wurikka izas yootettida qeesey izi hara zereththa; iza zereththaafe oonikka yarshoson ooththi erizaadey baa.
Hebrews7:14 Nu Goday Yuhuda baggafe yidayssi tuma; Musey qeeseta gishshas yootishe ha zereththaa gishshas yootidayssi issi miishshika deenna.
Hebrews7:15 Malkexeedeqe malay hara qeesey dendiko nu kase yootida yo7oy daro qoncce gidenna.
Hebrews7:16 Izi qeese gididay dhayontta de7o wolqqan attiin zereththafe yida wogaappe gidenna.
Hebrews7:17 Izas
Hebrews7:18 Kase azazoy laafanne go7onttayssa gidida gishshas attides.
Hebrews7:19 Wogay oonakka geeshshanaas dandayontta gishshas nuni Xoossa ach shiiqanaas izappe aadhdhiza hara hidotay nuus imettides.
Hebrews7:20 Hessika caaqoy baynda hanibeenna; hankko qeese gididayti caaqoy bayndayta.
Hebrews7:21 Izi gidikko qeeseteththaa caaqon ekkides. Gaasoykka Xoossi iza gishshas
Hebrews7:22 Hessa mala caaqoppe dendidayssan Yesusi hessafe aadhdhiza caaqo qaalas waase gidides.
Hebrews7:23 Kase qeeseti ba ooson sinththe gujjontta mala hayqoy istta diggida gishshas qooday isttas daro.
Hebrews7:24 Yesusi gidikko mernaas dizaade gidida gishshas iza qeeseteththi shaarettontta qeeseteththa.
Hebrews7:25 Hessa gishshas izi istta giigsana gaannatishe ubba wode hayqqontta paxa eqqi diza gishshas iza baggara Xoossaako yizayta ubbaa ashshanaas dandayees.
Hebrews7:26 Hessa gishshas nuus koshshiza qeeseta halaqay hessa mala geeshshinne wosoy iza bolla baynda xillonne nagaranchchatappe shaakettidi salotappe bollara bonchchettida qeeseta halaqa.
Hebrews7:27 Izi hankko qeeseta halaqata mala koyro ba nagaraa gishshas qasseka hankko dereza nagaraa gishshas gallas gallas yarsho shiishshanaas iza koshshenna; izi bana aaththi immida wode asa nagara gishshas issito sinththa baggassara yarsho wursi polides.
Hebrews7:28 Wogay daaburanchcha asata qeesetas waanna halaqa histti shuumees. Wogappe kaallidi yida caaqo qaalay gidikko mernaas iza bolla wosoy baynda naaza shuumides.
Hebrews8:1 Hessa gishshas nu ha7i ooththana waanna yo7oy hayssa; hayssa mala salo bolla Xoossa bonchcho alga ushachchan uttida qeeseta halaqay nuus dees.
Hebrews8:2 Izi asi tokkida dunkaane giddon ooththizaade gidontta Godaa Xoossay tokkida tumu dunkaanen geeshshasohon ooththizaade.
Hebrews8:3 Qeeseta halaqay shuumettizay asay Xoossas immizayssa Xoossas shiishshanaassinne yarsho yarshanaassa; hessa gishshas hayssi ha qeeseta halaqaykka Xoossas shiishshanaas issi shiishshiza miish izas koshshees.
Hebrews8:4 Izi biitta bolla dizaakko qeese gidenna; aazas giikko wogay giza mala yarsho shiishshiza hara qeeseti deettes.
Hebrews8:5 Istti kase salon diza Xoossa Keeththays leemisonne eesho; Musey dunkaaneza ooththana gishin
Hebrews8:6 Gido attiin Yesusi giddo geli gaannatizay caaqo qaalay kaseyssafe aadhdhizayssa mala izi ekkida oosoykka kaseyta oosoppe aadhdhees; hessika kaseyssafe lo7iza hidota qaalanna.
Hebrews8:7 Kase caaqo qaalaan pacey bayndaako nam7anththo hara caaqqanaas koshshenna.
Hebrews8:8 Gido attiin Xoossi dereza bolla pacey dizayssa demmida gishshas
Hebrews8:9 Hessika ta istta Gibxeppe kessanaas istta kushe oykkada kase istta aawatara caaqettida qaalaa mala gidenna; gaasoykka istti kase ta caaqo qaalaan eqqibeettenna; tanikka istta yedda bessadis.
Hebrews8:10 «Hessafe guye Isra7eele asaara ta caaqettana qaalay hayssa mala gees Goday. Tani ta wogaa istta wozinan woththana; istta wozina bollaka xaafana. Ta istta Xoos gidana; isttika ta dere gidana.
Hebrews8:11 Hayssafe guye asi ba guta asaa woykko ba ishaa
Hebrews8:12 Istta qohoza ta maarana. Hayssafe sinththan ta asa nagara nam7anththo zaara qoppike» gees.
Hebrews8:13 Hayssa ha caaqoza izi
Hebrews9:1 Koyro caaqo qaalazan Xoossas goynniza wogaynne biitta bolla diza Xoossa Keeththi dees.
Hebrews9:2 Kase nam7u kifilera diza dunkaaney giigetti dees; koyro kifilezan xomppe woththizasoynne xaraphpheezay qasse ukeththi dees; hessa he kifilezi dumma kifile geetettees.
Hebrews9:3 Nam7anththo kifilezi nam7anththo magalashaappe guye baggara diza kifiley ubbaafe dumma geetettees.
Hebrews9:4 Hessa giddon worqqafe oosettida exaane cuwasiza qeeri shel7e malaynne worqqan meeshettida caaqo qaala taabotay dees; he taabotaykka iza giddon mannay diza worqqa leematey
Hebrews9:5 He taabotaza bolla diza nagarappe maaroteththa kamaza bolla ba qefera kammiza bonchcho kirubeti deettes; ha7i qasse nu heytantta issaa issaa gishshas shaakki shaakki haasayanaas dandayokko.
Hebrews9:6 Wurikka hessaththo giigettidaappe guye qeeseti ba ooso polanaas dunkaanaas koyro kifile geleettes.
Hebrews9:7 Gidikkoka ubbaafe giddotiza kifile qeeseta halaqay xalla gelees; hessika layththan issito xalla gidishin izi ba nagara gishshassinne derey erontta ooththida nagaraa gishshas shiishshiza yarsho suuth oykkontta mulekka gelenna.
Hebrews9:8 Koyro dunkaanezi kase diza wode gede ubbaafe dumma geetettizaso efiza ogey he wode qoncce gidonttayssa Xillo Ayanay bessees.
Hebrews9:9 Hessika hayssa ha wodezas leemiso gidishin kase shiiqiza yarshotinne coo imettiza imotati immizayta wozina shempisanaassinne mule geeshshanaas dandaybeettenna.
Hebrews9:10 Heytantti wurikka ooraththa wogay yaana gakkanaas coo mela doona haasaya mala; qasseka istti muussa gishshassinne ushsha gishshas qasseka dumma dumma geesho wogata xalla.
Hebrews9:11 Gidikkoka Kirstoosi buroppe yaanaas diza lo7o miishshatas qeeseta halaqa gididi qonccides; izi izan gelida dunkaanezi gitanne geeshsha; he dunkaanezi asa kushen oosettonttayssanne hayssa ha medheteththaafe gidenna.
Hebrews9:12 Izi he dunkaanezan gelishe deyshata suuththinne wofano boorata suuth ekki gelibeenna; gido attiin as ashshanaas mernaas ba suuth ekkidi ubbaafe dumma geetettiza kifileza hara wode nam7anththo gelontta mala wurseththa gelo gelides.
Hebrews9:13 Isttas kare bagga asateththay tunida asata bolla araciza deysha suuththinne wofano boorata suuththi hessaththoka yarshos xuugettida ussaa bidinththi istta geeshshizayssa gidikko
Hebrews9:14 mernaa Ayanan bana wosoy baynda yarsho ooththi Xoossas shiishshida Kirstoosa suuththi nuni de7o Xoossaas goynnanaas hayqeththa oosoppe nuna ay mala aaththi geeshshandee?
Hebrews9:15 Hessa gishshas xeygettidayti isttas immana geetettida mernaa laata ekkana mala Kirstoosi ooraththa caaqos gaannatizaade gidides; koyro caaqoza garsan diza wode istti ooththida nagarappe geeyana mala istta gishshas izi hayqqides.
Hebrews9:16 Bazay bazettizayssa gidikko bazidaade hayqo shaakki eranaas bessees.
Hebrews9:17 Gaasoykka bazay minnizay bazidaadey hayqqiinna. Bazidaadey paxa dishin bazay aykkoka ooththenna.
Hebrews9:18 Hessa gishshas koyro caaqo qaalay suuththi baynda minnibeenna.
Hebrews9:19 Musey ba azazo wogaa deraas yooti simmidi deyshata suuththinne wofano boorata suuth haaththara ekkidi zo7o dorsa isken ecere wurce misatiza hisophphe geetettiza miththara ekkidi ba xaafida wogaa maxaafa bollaninne dereza bolla wuxxides.
Hebrews9:20 «Intte naagana mala inttena Xoossi azazida caaqo qaala suuththay hayssa» gides.
Hebrews9:21 Hessaththoka dunkaanezanne iza giddon diza ooso miishshaa ubbaa bolla suuth wuxxides.
Hebrews9:22 Addafekka guuththa miishshati attishin hankko daro miishshay suuththan geeyanaas bessizayssa wogay azazees; suuththi gukkontta dishin maaroy baa.
Hebrews9:23 Hessa gishshas salo miishshatas leemiso gididayti haytanttan geeyanayssi attenna shin; Salon diza miishshati gidikko hayssafekka aadhdhiza yarshon geeyanaas bessees.
Hebrews9:24 Kirstoosi tumu dunkaaneys leemisonne asa kushen oosettida Xoossa Keeththe gelibeenna; gido attiin ha7i nu gishshas Xoossa sinththan beettanaas pude salo gelides.
Hebrews9:25 Qeeseta halaqay ba suuth gidontta suuth ekkidi layththan layththan ubbaafe dumma kifile gelizayssaththo Kirstoosi bana yarshanaas pude salo shiretti shiretti gelibeenna.
Hebrews9:26 Hessa mala gidizaakko Kirstoosi alamey medhettoosoppe haa simmiin daro wode meto ekkanaas bessees; ha7i qasse wode wurseththan bana yarshidi nagara digganaas wurseththas issito qonccides.
Hebrews9:27 Hessaththoka asi issito hayqqees; hessafe kaallidi pirda sinththan eqqanaas giigi uttides.
Hebrews9:28 Kirstoosi daro asa nagara digganaas issito yarshettides; nam7anththoka izi qonccana; hessi iza naagizaytas atoteth ekki yaanaas attiin nam7anththo zaari nagara tookkanaas gidenna.
Hebrews10:1 Muse wogay buro sinththara yaana lo7o hanotas eeshoppe attiin tumu adda medhay izas deenna; hessa gishshas layththan layththan pacey baynda shiri shiri shiishshiza yarshoy Xoos goynnanaas shiiqiza asaa geeshshanaas mulekka dandaybeenna.
Hebrews10:2 As mulera geeshshana dandayzayssa gididaakko istti yarsho yarshanayssa aggettenee? Qasseka Xoos goynnana shiiqiza asay issito geeyzaakko ba wozinara nagaranchcha gididayssa sidhana.
Hebrews10:3 Gido attiin heyti yarshoti layththan layththan nagara zaari zaari qofseettes.
Hebrews10:4 Gaasoykka wofanotanne deyshata suuththi asappe nagara digganaas dandayenna.
Hebrews10:5 Hessa gishshas Kirstoosi hayssa ha alameza yiidi
Hebrews10:6 Taman xuugettiza yarshonne nagara gishshas shiiqiza yarshon ufayettabeekka» gides.
Hebrews10:7 He wode tani
Hebrews10:8 Muse wogay hessi hessaththo hanana mala azazikkoka izi qasse koyro
Hebrews10:9 Kaaleththidikka
Hebrews10:10 Hayssan
Hebrews10:11 Qeesey hach hach eqqidi ba ooso polees; as nagarappe geeshshanaas dandayonttayta wontiin wontiin shiishshees.
Hebrews10:12 Kirstoosi gidikko yarsho issito mernaas gidanayssa shiishshidi Aawaa ushachchan uttides.
Hebrews10:13 He gallassafe simmiin iza morkketi iza toho garsan yedhettana gakkanaas naagon dees.
Hebrews10:14 Gaasoykka issito shiishshida yarshon geeyana asata mernaas geeshshides.
Hebrews10:15 Hessa he hanoza gishshas Xillo Ayanaykka nuus markkattees. Goday koyro
Hebrews10:16 «Hessafe guye ta isttara gelana caaqo qaalay hayssa. Ta wogaa ta istta wozinan woththana; istta wozinan ta xaafana» gees.
Hebrews10:17 Qasseka
Hebrews10:18 Heytantti wurikka atto geetettidaappe guye nam7anththo nagaras shiiqana hara yarshoy deenna.
Hebrews10:19 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Nuni Yesus Kirstoosa suuththaa baggara gede ubbaafe dumma geesh geetettizasoyo gelanaas xalateth demmidos.
Hebrews10:20 Hessika magalasha baggara; izi ba asho baggara nuus doyda ooraththinne de7o gidida ogenna.
Hebrews10:21 Xoossa Keeththa bolla shuumettida qeeseta halaqay nuus diza gishshas
Hebrews10:22 nuni nu iita qofaappe geeyanaas nu wozina aracettidi nu asateththaaka xillo haaththan meecettidi tumu wozinappenne kumeththa ammanon Xoossaako ane shiiqoos.
Hebrews10:23 Nuus hidota qaalaa immidaadey ammanettizaade gidida gishshas nuni ammanidi iza gishshas markkattiza hidotappe yaanne haa gontta ane lo7eththi oykkoos.
Hebrews10:24 Siiqoninne lo7o ooson nu minni daana mala ane issoy issaa qofsoos.
Hebrews10:25 Ane nu ubba gallas issoy issaara gakki gakki issoy issaa minththeththoos attiin issi issi asati shiiqo aggida mala ane nuni shiiqoza aggoko; harappeka Godaa Yesusi matattidayssa qoppishe kaseppe minni shiiqite.
Hebrews10:26 Nuni tumaa shaakki eridi ekkidayssafe guye erishe nagara ooththiko hayssafe guye nagara gishshas shiiqanaas hara yarshoy deenna.
Hebrews10:27 Haray buro hanana daro babisiza pirday Xoossa morkketa xuuggana naagiza mino tamay xalla dees.
Hebrews10:28 Muse wogaa kadhida asi nam7u woykko heedzdzu markkati markkattiko maaroy baynda hayqon qaxxayettees.
Hebrews10:29 Histtiin Xoossa naa kadhida asi izan geeyida caaqo suuththaa hiraysso miishsha mala qoodidaadessinne iza kiyateththaa Ayana iiseththidaades ay mala hessafe aadhdhiza pirday izas bessizaa inttes misatizee?
Hebrews10:30 «Tani izas halo kessana; izaade ooso mala izaades ta zaarana» gidayssa nu eroos. Qasseka
Hebrews10:31 De7o Xoossaa kushen kundeththi daro babisees.
Hebrews10:32 Inttes issito poo7oy poo7idaappe guye meto wode daro baaxen intte kase minni eqqida beni wodeza yuushshi qopite.
Hebrews10:33 Issi issi wode intte dere duulata sinththan cashshassinne goodeteththas aadhdhi imettideta; qasse hara wodekka hessa mala waayey istta bolla gakkida asatara intteka issife waaye beyideta.
Hebrews10:34 Intte inttes harappe aadhdhiza mernaas daana haaroy dizayssa eriza gishshas qashettidaytas mishettidetanne intte haaroy bonqqettishin ufayssan dandaydeta.
Hebrews10:35 Hessa gishshas gita waagay diza kase intte ammaneteththaa aggofte.
Hebrews10:36 Intte Xoossa shene polidi izi inttes immida ufayssa qaalaa ekkanaas minni eqqanaas inttena koshshees.
Hebrews10:37 Gaasoykka guuththa wodeppe kaallidi
Hebrews10:38 xillo asi gidikko ammanon de7o demmana; guye undudizaadey diikko ta shemppoya izaade bolla ufayettuku.
Hebrews10:39 «Nuni gidikko ammanidi attidayta bagga attiin gede guye undudi dhayzayta bagga gidokko» gides.
Hebrews11:1 Ammano geeththi issi miishshe hanana giidi nu sidhontta dishe be7ontta miishsheka be7ida mala ero gi eko.
Hebrews11:2 Kase Aawati galatettiday hessa mala ammanonna.
Hebrews11:3 Hayssi ha alamey Xoossa qaalan medhettidayssa nuni ammanon eroos; hessaththoka ayfen beettizayssi medhettiday beettiza miishshafe gidonttayssa nuni eroos.
Hebrews11:4 Aabeeli Xoossas Qayeele yarshofe aadhdhiza yarsho ammanon shiishshides; Xoossi iza yarshoza gishshas haasayshe izi ammanon geesh gididayssa markkattides; izi hayqqiinka iza ammanoy ha7i gakkanaas haasayettees.
Hebrews11:5 Heenookey hayqo be7ontta mala hayssa alamezappe ammanon ekettides; Xoossi iza ekkida gishshas izi beettibeenna; ekettanaappe kasetidi izi Xoossaa ufayssidayssi yootettida gishshas izi ekettides.
Hebrews11:6 Qasseka ammanoy baynda dishin Xoossaa ufayssanaas mulekka dandayettenna; gaasoykka Xoossaako shiiqizaadey wurikka Xoossi gizayssanne wozinappe iza koyzaytas izi waaga immanayssa ammananaas bessees.
Hebrews11:7 Nohes Xoossi buro Nohey ba ayfen be7ontta miishshaa gishshas naagettana mala yootiin Nohey Xoossas babbidi baso asa ashshanaas ammanon markabe keexxidi alame asaa pirdisides; ammanon beettiza xilloteth laattizaade gidides.
Hebrews11:8 Abrahaamey baas laata biitta ekkanaas xeygettida wode ammanon azazettides; awa bizaakko erontta aggikokka ero giidi bides.
Hebrews11:9 Allaga biittaan bete asa mala buro nees imettana geetettida biittaan ammanon uttides; izas imettida hidota qaalaa izara issife laattana Yisaaqa malanne Yaaqoobe mala dunkaanen de7ides.
Hebrews11:10 Gaasoykka minna dizaaro Xoossi izo qoppi medhdhida katamayo ekkana naagides.
Hebrews11:11 Abrahaames wodey gede bidaade gidikkoka Saaraykka yelontta maynne gidikkoka hidota isttas immidaadey ammanettidaade histti xeellidi ammanon naa aawaa gidanaas gakkides.
Hebrews11:12 Hessa gishshas hayssa hayqqida asa mala qoodettida issi Abrahaameppe salo xoolintte malanne abba ace mala qooday baynda daro zereththay beettides.
Hebrews11:13 Heyti wurikka isttas imettida hidota qaalaa demmontta ba ammanon naagida mala hayqqida; gidikkoka istti hayssa biittaa bolla imaththenne bete as gididayssa erida gishshas haahon dishe be7idi kushen aaththida mala ufayssan ekkida.
Hebrews11:14 Hessa mala giza asati istta derey awakkonne ba dere naagizayssa qonccen besseettes.
Hebrews11:15 Istti ba yeggi kezida dere zaari qoppizaakko guye simmi baana dandayeettes.
Hebrews11:16 Ha7i hessafe aadhdhiza pude salon diza dere laamoteettes; hessa gishshas Xoossi isttas salon katama giigsida gishshas
Hebrews11:17 Xoossi Abrahaamey ba naaza Yisaaqa shukkana mala paacciin Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yarshanaas ammanon shiishshides; Xoossi izas immana gidayssa izikka ba naa issineza shukkanaas giigettides.
Hebrews11:18 Hessika Xoossi izas «Ne zereththi Yisaaqa baggara xeygettana» gidayssa mala.
Hebrews11:19 Xoossi hayqqidaade denththanaas dandayzayssa Abrahaamey ammanida gishshas Yisaaqakka hayqoppe dendida asa mala nam7anththo demmides.
Hebrews11:20 Yisaaqay buroppe hananayssa qoppi ekkidi Yaaqoobenne Eesawe ammanon anjjides.
Hebrews11:21 Yaaqoobey hayqqana gishshas Yooseefe nayta issaa issaa ammanon anjjidaynne ba guufe bolla dartti eqqidi goynniday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:22 Yooseefey hayqqana gishshas Isra7eele asay Gibxeppe kezanayssa izi yootidaynne ba meqeththaa gishshas istti ay ooththanaakko istta azaziday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:23 Musey yelettiin izas malay lo7o gididayssa be7idi iza yelidayti iza heedzdzu agina gakkanaas kawoza azazo babbontta qottiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:24 Musey dicci gakkidi
Hebrews11:25 Guuththa wodes nagaran beettiza ufayssafe aaththidi Xoossa asaara meto beyanaas doorides.
Hebrews11:26 Gibxe deren diza haaroppe bollara Kirstoosa gishshas waaye ekoy daro aadhdhiza haaro gididayssa yuushshi qoppides; gaasoykka izi sinththafe ekkanayssa buro haahon be7ida gishshassa.
Hebrews11:27 Kawoza hanqos babbontta ammanon Gibxe yeggi kezides; buro beettonttayssa be7iza mala qoppidi he qofaan minni eqqides.
Hebrews11:28 Bayrata ubbaa wodhizayssi Isra7eeleta bayra nayta wodhontta mala ammanon Paaziganne suuththa wuxeththa woga woththides.
Hebrews11:29 Isra7eele asay mela biitta bolla hemettiza mala Zo7o abbaa giddora ammanon pinnides; Gibxe asay qasse isttaththo hanana gishe abbaan mitettides.
Hebrews11:30 Isra7eele asay Iyarkko gimbeza laappun qamma yuuyi yuuyi aadhdhidaappe guye gimbeza ammanon laallides.
Hebrews11:31 Layman aqiza Era7aaba dere xomosana yidayta saron mokka ekkida gishshas hankko azazettontta asaara dhayontta ammanon attadus.
Hebrews11:32 Hayssafe aadheth hara ay gaanee? Geedoone gishshas
Hebrews11:33 Heytantti ammanon kawota xoonida; suure pirda pirdida; baas imettida hidota qaalaa ekkida; gaammota doona gordida;
Hebrews11:34 tama wolqqa toyssida; qara mashshafe kessi ekki attida; daaburappe minnida; olason goobata gidida; allaga asaa ola gooddida;
Hebrews11:35 maccassatas hayqqidayti paxida; baggayti qasse hessafe aadhdhiza hayqoppe denth demmanaas giidi hayqoppe ateth leqqidi hayqos bana aaththi immida; waayeppe attanaas koyibeettenna.
Hebrews11:36 Issi issi asati asan kaa7ettida; garafettida; baggayti qasse qasho keeth gelida.
Hebrews11:37 Shuchchan cadettida; magaazenkka nam7u kezi phalqettida; mashshan shuketti hayqqida; goodettishenne daaburshe dorsa itenne deysha ite may7idi waayettida.
Hebrews11:38 Ha alamey isttas bessonttayssa gidida gishshas bazzoninne gezzen gongoloninne olla giddon waayettida.
Hebrews11:39 Heytantta ubbata ammano gishshas markkattikokka isttafe oonikka imettana geetettida hidota qaalaa gakki ekkidaadey deenna.
Hebrews11:40 Xoossi nuus hessafe aadhdhizaaz giigsida gishshas nu baynda istti xalla kumeth gidana dandaybeettenna.
Hebrews12:1 Hessa gishshas shaara mala nuna yuuyi aadhdhida daro markkati nuus dishin nuna deexxiza toohonne qasse nuna qachchi oykkiza nagara wursi nuuppe wora yeggidi nu sinththan diza woththaa genccaninne dandayan ane woxxoos.
Hebrews12:2 Nu ammaniza ammanozas koyronne polo gidida Yesusa ane xeelloos; izi ba sinththan diza ufayssaa gishshas masqale bolla hayqo dandaydi masqale bolla bana gakkana kawushshateththaa leqqidi Xoossa algaas ushachchan uttides.
Hebrews12:3 Histtiko intte daaburdi hidota qanxxontta mala hessaththoka nagaranchchatappe kase iza bolla gakkida hessa mala eqeteth dandayda Yesusa qopite.
Hebrews12:4 Suuththi gukkana gakkanaas nagarara intte buro eqettibeekketa.
Hebrews12:5 Intte Xoossa nayta gidi uttidi qaalay gizayssa balideta; «Ta naazoo Xoossa seera kawushshan xeellofa; nena izi seeriza wode hidota qanxxofa.
Hebrews12:6 Gaasoykka Goday ba dosizaade hanqees; izi ba dosizaade seerees; izi ba naa mala xeellizaade qaxxayees» gides.
Hebrews12:7 Xoossi inttena ba naa mala qoodiza gishshas hanqo dandayte; aaway hanqontta nay oonee?
Hebrews12:8 Nay wuri seeran dicciza mala intte diccontta aggiko intte karen yelettida naa attiin soo naa gidekketa.
Hebrews12:9 Hessa ubbaafe bollara hayssa biitta bolla nuna hanqi dichchida asho aawati deettes; nunikka istta bonchchoos; histtiin de7on deyanaas nuus Ayana Aawaa gididayssas aazas hessafe aaththi azazettokonii?
Hebrews12:10 Nu aawati nuna baas lo7o misati beettida mala guuththa wodes qaxxayeettes; Xoossi gidikko nuni iza geeshshateththaa izappe demmana mala nuna go7anaas qaxxayees.
Hebrews12:11 Qixaatey wurikka ha7is ufayssontta iita misatees shin guyeppe qasse dosi ekkida asatas saroteththi izan kumida xilloteththa ayfen gaththees.
Hebrews12:12 Hessa gishshas daaburda intte qesenne intte gulbate minththite.
Hebrews12:13 Wobbey paxana mala attiin kaseppe aaththi wobbontta mala intte tohos lo7o oge giigsite.
Hebrews12:14 Asi ubbara saro daana mala inttes dandayettizayssa ubbaa ooththite; geeyana mala koyite; geeshshateththi baynda Godaa beyanaas dandayettenna.
Hebrews12:15 Inttefe issaadeska Xoossa kiyateththi paccontta mala qasseka camo ayfe ayfiza miththi mokkidi meto medhdhontta malanne darota moorontta mala naagettite.
Hebrews12:16 Issito maana kaththas ba bayrateth bayzida Eesawe mala inttefe oonikka laymatizaade woykko Xoos bonchchonttaade gidi beettontta mala naagettite.
Hebrews12:17 Eesawey guyeppe kase ba anjjoza laattanaas zaari koyiin izas imettontta digettidayssa intte ereeta; izi bana gakkiza anjjozaska daro yeekkishe koyidikka zaari demmanaas dandaybeenna.
Hebrews12:18 Kushen bochchiko boshettiza tamay iza bolla eexxiza Siina zumaakko
Hebrews12:19 Intte zaye giirissaako woykko hayththan siyettiza qaala giirissaako gakkibeekketa; hessa siyida asatikka hara qaala gujjontta mala woossida.
Hebrews12:20 Hessas gaasoykka
Hebrews12:21 He wode heen hanizayssi wurikka daro babisizayssa gidida gishshas Museykka
Hebrews12:22 Intte qasse ha Xiyoone zumaa bolla
Hebrews12:23 Istta sunththi salon xaafettida bayrata maabarankko; ubbaas daanna gidida Xoossaako istta bolla wosoy baynda xillo asata shemppoy dizaso matideta.
Hebrews12:24 Ooraththa caaqon maqayinththizay Yesusaakko; hessaththoka Aabeeli shiishshida suuththaafe aadhdhiza caaqo qaala yootiza aracettida suuththaako gakkideta.
Hebrews12:25 Inttes yootizayssa intte akkay gontta mala naagettite; heytantti Xoossi biitta bolla diza asa baggara isttas yootizayssa ekkontta ixxidi izappe attanaas dandayontta aggiko nuni saloppe yidayssi nuus yootishin ekkontta ixxiko nu izappe waani attanee?
Hebrews12:26 He wode qaala giirissan biitta qaaththides; «Ha7i qasse biitta xalla gidontta tani salokka qasseka ta zaarada issito qaaththana» giza qaala yooti woththides.
Hebrews12:27 Hayssi
Hebrews12:28 Hessa gishshas nuni mulekka qaaxxontta kawoteth laattana gishshas ane Xoos galatoos; qasseka iza ufayssiza ogera bonchchoossinne yashshateththan ane izas goynnoos.
Hebrews12:29 Nu Xoossay xuuggiza tama mala.
Hebrews13:1 Intte intte giddon ishata mala dosettite.
Hebrews13:2 Imaththa moko balopite; issi issi asati hessaththo ooththishe erontta kiitanchchata imaththateth mokki ekkida.
Hebrews13:3 Qasho keeththan dizaytara intteka qashettida mala isttas qopite; hessaththoka asa kushen waayettizaytara intteka waayettiza mala isttas qopite.
Hebrews13:4 Ekoy geloy ubba asaa achchan bonchchetto; intte hiiththi geesh gido; gaasoykka layma amoy dizayta bollanne laymatizayta bolla Xoossi pirdana.
Hebrews13:5 Miishsha siiqoppe naagettite; inttes dizayssi gidana; hessas gaasoykka Xoossi
Hebrews13:6 Hessa gishshas kumeththa wozinappe nuni
Hebrews13:7 Inttes Xoossa qaala koyroppe yooti kaaleththizayta balopite; istta duussan beettiza lo7o ayfey dizayssa yuushshi qopite; intteka ammanon istta misatite.
Hebrews13:8 Yesus Kirstoosi hachchika wontoka mernaaskka izi izakko!
Hebrews13:9 Dumma dumma imaththa timirte ekkofte; nu wozinay minni eqqizay Xoossa kiyateththan attiin kaththa wogaa naagon gidenna; he woga naagizaytikka izan go7ettibeettenna.
Hebrews13:10 Nuus yarshosoy dees; gidikkoka dunkaaneza giddon ooththiza qeeseti he yarshosoza bolla diza kaththaafe ekki montta mala digettida.
Hebrews13:11 Qeeseta halaqay nagara teqqiza mehe suuth ekkidi ubbaafe dumma geetettiza kifile gelees; meheta ashoy gidikko katamappe karen xuugettees.
Hebrews13:12 Hessaththoka Yesusi ba suuththaa baggara asaa geeshshanaas katama pengefe karen meto be7ides.
Hebrews13:13 Hessa gishshas nunikka izi tookkidi kawushshateththaa tookkidi nu dizasoppe gede izakko kare ane kezoos.
Hebrews13:14 Gaasoykka hayssan eqqi daana katamay nuus deenna; gido attiin buro sinththafe yaana katamayo naagoos.
Hebrews13:15 Hessa gishshas ubba wode galata yarsho hessika iza sunththaas markkattiza nu doonappe beettiza ayfe gididaaz Yesusa baggara Xoossas ane shiishshoos.
Hebrews13:16 Qasseka lo7o oosonne inttes dizayssafe haratas imo balopite; Xoossi heytantta mala yarshon ufayettees.
Hebrews13:17 Inttena kaaleththizaytas azazettitenne haarettite; hessas gaasoykka intte gishshas istta alaafeteththan daro oychchiza gudday diza gishshas intte shemppo gishshas daro baaxeteettes; hessa gishshas istti ba ooththiza oosoza lancettishe gidontta ufayssan ooththana mala intte isttas azazettite. Intte hessaththo histtontta aggiko inttes lo7enna.
