Hebrews13:18 Nuuska woossite; Ubbasorakka lo7o duus daanaas laamotiza lo7o qofay nuus dizayssa nu sidhokko.
Hebrews13:19 Harappeka ta intteko ellen simma baana mala taas intte woossana mala hadara gays.
Hebrews13:20 Dorsata heenththanchchay wogga Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ba mernaa caaqo qaala suuththan iza hayqoppe denththida saroteththa Xoossi
Hebrews13:21 intte iza shene polana mala lo7eteththan inttena gixiso; Xoossa ufayssizayssa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara nunan ooththo; izas mernaappe mernaas bonchchoy gido. Amiin.
Hebrews13:22 Ta ishatoo! Inttes xaafida zore qaalay guuth gidida gishshas intte hanqettontta mala ta inttena hadara gays.
Hebrews13:23 Nu ishaa Ximtoosi birshettidayssa intte erana mala ta koyays; izi eeson taakko yiikko ta izara hee baada inttena heen beyana.
Hebrews13:24 Inttena kaaleththizayta ubbatassinne ammaniza asaa ubbaas ta saroka yootite. Ixaaliyan diza ammaniza asaykka inttena saro gees.
Hebrews13:25 Xoossa kiyateththi inttenara gido. Amiin.
James1:1 Xoossa oosanchchanne Yesus Kirstoosa oosanchcha gidida Yaaqoobeppe biitta bolla laalettida tammanne nam7u kochchatas saroteththi inttes gido.
James1:2 Ta ishatoo! Intte bolla dumma dumma waayey gakkiko hessa wursi ufayssan qoodite.
James1:3 Gaasoykka intte ammano paaceteththi inttes dandaya immizayssa intte ereeta.
James1:4 Intte dandayan minni eqqanayssi inttes issi miishshika paccontta kumeththa asinne wosoy bayndayta gidana mala ooththo.
James1:5 Intte giddofe oonaska erateththi pacciko oonakka leqqontta ba kiyateththaara ubbaas immiza Xoossaa woosso; izaadeska imettana.
James1:6 Gido attiin sidhey baynda ammanon woosso; gaasoykka sidhizaadey abba qaaththiza dambala carko mala.
James1:7 Hessaadey Godaappe aykkoka demmana giidi qoppofo.
James1:8 Hessaadey nam7u qofan oykettidi ba biza oge bolla yaanne haa giza asa mala.
James1:9 Kase ziqqa duussan dizaade Xoossi dhoqqu histtana gishshas ufayetto.
James1:10 Asa dureteththi maata ciishsha mala qokkana gishshas duussan dhoqqu gidaadey Xoossi iza ziqqi histtiko ufayetto.
James1:11 Arshey xuuggidi maata shullisees; maata ciishshayka shullees; iza lo7eteththika dhayees; hessaththoka durey hach hach daabursan dishin iza dureteththi dhayees.
James1:12 Paacen minni eqqidaadey izi anjjettidaade; gaasoykka izi paacera eqettishin Xoossi bana dosizaytas immida hidota de7o akilile izi ekkana.
James1:13 Oonikka paacettizaa gidikko tana Xoossi paaccees gooppo; gaasoykka Xoossi ase iitan paaccenna; izi oonakka paacci erenna.
James1:14 Gido attiin issi issi asi paacettizay barkka ba iita amo kaallishenne balettishe paacettees.
James1:15 Amoy qanththatidi nagara yelees; nagaraykka diccidaappe guye hayqo yelees.
James1:16 Ta siiqo ishatoo! Intte balettofte.
James1:17 Lo7o imoteththinne kumeththa anjjoy wuri bolla salo poo7ota Aawappe wodhdheettes; iza achchan yaanne haa yuuyiza eeshoykka deenna.
James1:18 Nu iza medheteththaas koyro bayrata gidana mala ba sheneninne ba tuma qaalaan nuna yelides.
James1:19 Dosettida ta ishatoo! Hayssa yuushshi qopite; asi wurikka siyanaas eesoto; haasayassinne hanqos eesotoppo.
James1:20 Asa hanqoy Xoossa xilloteth ooththenna.
James1:21 Hessa gishshas tunateththinne dalgida iitateththi inttefe kessi yeggidi intte shemppo ashshanaas dandayza intte giddon tokettida qaalaa ashketeththara ekkite.
James1:22 Qaalay gizayssa ooththite attiin mela sis xalla siyizaadentta gididi intterkka inttena baleththofte.
James1:23 Qaalaa siyishe siyida qaalay gizayssa ooththonttaadey ba ayfeso mastootera xeelliza asa mala.
James1:24 Bana xeelli be7idi bees; izi ay misatizaakko heerakka balettichchees.
James1:25 Gido attiin bana geeshshiza lo7o wogaa xeelli be7idi izan minnizaadey ba siyidayssa ooththizaadeynne balonttaadey izi ba ooson anjjettidaade gidana.
James1:26 Ba doona naagontta barkka ba wozina baleththishe ta ammanays gizaadey barkka bana baleththees; iza ammanoykka hada ammano.
James1:27 Xoossaa Aawaa sinththan iitateththi baynda lo7o ammanoy aayanne aaway hayqqida nayta
James2:1 Ta ishatoo! Intte bonchchettida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa ammanizayta gidida mala ase bessontta ogera maaddofte.
James2:2 Worqqa yiich biradhdhen aaththidi lo7o may7o may7ida asi intte shiiqizaso yiikko hessaththoka qita may7o may7idaadey he shiiqizasoza yiikko qasseka hara qita may7o may7ida manqo asi gelikko lo7o may7idayssa dumma bonchcho bonchchidi
James2:3 
James2:4 intte intte giddon bessontta maado ooththeeta gidekketii? Qasseka intte iita qofan oykettida iita pirda pirdizayta gidekketii?
James2:5 Ta siiqo ishatoo! Ane siyite; istti ammanon dureta gidana mala Xoossi bana dosizaytas hidota isttas immida kawoteththaa istti laattana mala hayssa ha alamezan diza manqota dooribeennee?
James2:6 Intte qasse manqota kawushsheeta; inttena waayisizay dureta gidettennee? Inttena pirdaso goochchizay istta gidettennee?
James2:7 Inttenan xeygettida bonchcho Xoossaa sunth zigirzayti istta gidettennee?
James2:8 Geeshsha Maxaafan
James2:9 Intte bessontta maado maaddiko nagara ooththeeta; wogaa sinththankka intte woga yedhdhidaade gidi qoodettana.
James2:10 Gaasoykka wogaa ubbaa polizaadey qasseka wogappe issineyn dhuphettiza asi ubbaaka mooridaade mala qoodettees.
James2:11 «Laymatoppa» gidaadey izikka zaaridi
James2:12 Intte haasaya haasayshe woykko issi miish ooththishe inttena xillisiza asa mala gidite.
James2:13 Gaasoykka maaronttay wurikka maaroy baynda pirdettana; maaroy pirda Xoonees.
James2:14 Ta ishatoo! Issi asi taas ammanoy dees giikko qasse ooson bessonttaade gidikko iza ay maaddanee? Hessa mala ammanoy iza ashshanee?
James2:15 Ane qopite; issi ishay woykko issi michchiya may7oy woykko mizayssi baynda aggiko inttefe issaadey
James2:16 
James2:17 Hessaththoka oosoy baynda ammanoykka baas hayqqidayssa.
James2:18 Gido attiin issaadey
James2:19 ne
James2:20 Nenoo eeyazoo! Oosoy baynda ammanos go7ay bayndayssa eranaas markka koyay?
James2:21 Nu aawaa Abrahaamey ba naa Yisaaqa yarshizasoza bolla shiishshida wode ooson xillibeennee?
James2:22 Hessan ba ammanoza oosora gaththi ooththizayssa ne beyaasa; ammanoykka ooson polettides.
James2:23 «Abrahaamey Xoos ammanides; he ammanoy izas xilloteththan qoodettides» giza maxaafaa qaalay polettides; izikka Xoossi dosidaade geetettides.
James2:24 Hessa gishshas asi ammanon xalla gidontta oosonkka xillizayssa intte beyeeta.
James2:25 Hessaththoka layman diza Era7aaba kiitetti bida asata mokka ekkada hara ogera moyza yeddida gishshas ba ooson xillabeekkee?
James2:26 Shemppofe shaakettida ashoy hayqeth gidida mala oosoppeka shaakettida ammanoy hayqeththa.
James3:1 Ta ishatoo! Inttefe daroti astamaareta gidoppetto; gaasoykka nu astamaare gididayti aadheththa pirda ekkanayssa intte ereeta.
James3:2 Nu wurikka daro miishshan dhuphettoos. Haasayan dhuphettonttaadey diikko izi ba asateth lo7eththi naaganaas dandayza kumeththa asa.
James3:3 Nuni parata azazanaas bixala barsidi nu koyida mala istta azazoos.
James3:4 Woykko ane markabeta xeellite; istti ay gitatanne carkon sugetti bizayta gidikkoka markabe laaggizaadey qeeri laafa laaggiza miishshara ba koyzaso efees.
James3:5 Hessaththoka asateththa garsan inxarsi guuth gida uttada gita wolqqama otoro otorettawus; qeeri tamay gita wora wostti xuuggi dhayssizaakko ane yuushshi qopite.
James3:6 Inxarsika ba baggara tama mala; qasse nu asateththaa giddon diza iita alame. Asateththaa wursa tunisawussinne asateththaa bolla tama gujjawus; baaska gaanname taman xuugettana.
James3:7 Mehe
James3:8 Gido attiin inxars haaranaas dandaydaadey oonikka deenna; wodhiza marzey izin kumidaaronne iza shempa ekkontta iita miishsha.
James3:9 Nuni nu inxarsayra Godaanne Aawaa anjjoos; izinkka Xoossa leemison medhettida asa nayta zaaridi qanggoos.
James3:10 Anjjoynne qanggeththi issi doonara kezees. Ta ishatoo! Hessi hessaththo hananaas bessenna.
James3:11 Issi pultto ollafe mal7o haaththinne camo haaththi pultti erizee?
James3:12 Ta ishatoo! Balase geetettiza miththi wogara ayfe woykko woyne miththi balase miththa ayfe ayfanaas dandayzee? Hessaththoka cammiza haaththafe mal7iza haaththi beettana dandayenna.
James3:13 Intte garsafe akeekara diza era asi oonee? Eray dizaa gidikko ane ba ooso ashketeththaninne aadho erateththara ba lo7o duussan besso.
James3:14 Qasse camonne qanaatey
James3:15 Hinni mala erateththaya saloppe gidikku; hinna qasse biittafe
James3:16 Qanaateynne barkka bana siiqoy dizason waasoynne iita oosoy wuri dees.
James3:17 Saloppe gidida erateththaya gidikko koyro geeshsha; guyeppeka saroteth dosizaaro
James3:18 Saroteth dosiza asati saroteth zeridi xilloteththa ayfe maxeettes.
James4:1 Intte giddon diza olaynne ooshshi awappe yidee? Intte wozinan diza amoteththaafe dendida ola gidennee?
James4:2 Intte amotteeta shin demmeketa; intte as wodheetanne keehi amotteeta shin demmana dandayekketa; intte intte garsan ooyettiza gishshassanne olettiza gishshas qasse woossontta gishshas inttes imettenna.
James4:3 Intte intte asho ufayssanaas iita qofan woossiza gishshas woossidayssa intte ekkeketa.
James4:4 Intteno laymatizaytoo! Alamera siiqeteththi Xoossara morkketeth gididayssa erekketii? Hessa gishshas hayssa alamezara siiqeteth koyzay wurikka Xoossas morkke.
James4:5 Woykko Geeshsha Maxaafa giddon
James4:6 Gido attiin izi ba kiyateth nuus gujji immees; Maxaafaykka
James4:7 Hessa gishshas inttena Xoossas haarisite; Daabulosara eqettite; izi inttefe baqatana.
James4:8 Xoossako shiiqite; izikka intteko shiiqana; intteno nagaranchchatoo! Intte intte kushe geeshshite; intteno nam7u qofan qaaxxizaytoo! Intte intte wozina geeshshite.
James4:9 Darssi qopite; muuzottite; yeekkite; intte miichchay yeehon
James4:10 Godaa sinththan intte inttena kawushshite; izi inttena dhoqqu dhoqqu histtana.
James4:11 Ta ishatoo! Intte intte garsan issoy issaa mootopite; ba ishaa mootizaadeynne ba ishaa bolla pirdizaadey wogaa bolla iita haasayeessinne wogaa bolla pirdees; histtiko neni wogaa bolla pirdizaade attiin wogaa naagizaade gidakka.
James4:12 Woga woththidaadeynne pirdizaadey issaade xalla; izikka dhayssanaassinne ashshanaas dandayzaade; gido attiin ne lagge bolla pirdizaadey ne oonee?
James4:13 «Intte hach woykko wonto hanno ha katamayo woykko hinno he katamayo nu baana; histtidi heen izin issi layth uttananne zal7i wodhisana» gizaytoo! Ane haa siyite.
James4:14 Wonto hananayssa intte erekketa; intte shemppoy iza aazee? Intte guuththa wode ayfen beettidi dhayza haaththa pentta mala.
James4:15 Hessa gaanaappe
James4:16 Ha7i gidikko intte otoreteththan ceeqetteeta; hessa mala otoreteththi wurikka iita.
James4:17 Hessa gishshas lo7o gidizayssa ooththanaas bessizayssa erishe ooththonttaades nagara gidana.
James5:1 Histtiko intteno dure asatoo! Ane siyite. Buro intte bolla gakkana metoza gishshas yeekkite; «Wu! Wuy» gi waassite.
James5:2 Intte haaroy buuqqides; intte may7oka bilay mides.
James5:3 Intte worqqaynne intte biray shiydes; he shiydayssika intte bolla markkatteessinne intte asho tama mala xuuggees; wode wurseththas miishshe intte shiishshideta.
James5:4 Intte intte wozinan woththite; intte kath maxishe peydaytas istta wolqqa waagaa intte qanxxontta aggida gishshas intte bolla waassishe intte achchan deettes. Kath maxizayta waasoy ubba dandayza Godaa hayththan gakkides.
James5:5 Intte biitta bolla ishaloninne al7eteththan de7ideta; intte wozina shukas dhiikkida mehe mala modhdhisideta.
James5:6 Intte inttenara eqettontta xillo asata bolla wordo woththidi wodhideta.
James5:7 Hessa gishshas ta ishatoo! Goday haa yaana gakkanaas dandayte; goshshe goyizaadey biittay lo7o kaththi kaxxana gakkanaas waani dandayzaakko koyro iranne wurseththa ira izi wostti naagizaakko ane akeekite.
James5:8 Intteka hessaththo dandayte; intte wozina minththite; gaasoykka Godaa yuussa gallassi matides.
James5:9 Ta ishatoo! Intte intte giddon zigirettofte; intte zigirettiko intte bolla pirdettana; pirdanaadey hekko intte penge bolla eqqides.
James5:10 Ta ishatoo! Godaa sunththan inttes yootida nabeta waayeteththinne istta dandayaa inttes leemiso histti xeellite.
James5:11 Dandayan genccida asata nu istta
James5:12 Harappeka ta ishatoo! Salon gidiin woykko sa7an gidiin woykko ay miishshankka caaqqofte; «Ee» gaanaas bessiza miish gidikko
James5:13 Intte garsan metotiza asi dizee? Dizaa gidikko izi woosso. Ufayettizaadey dizee? Dizaa gidikko ufayssa mazamure yexxo.
James5:14 Intte giddon sakettiza asi dizee? Diikko Woosa Keeththa cimata xeygo; isttika Godaa sunththan zayte iza bolla tiydi izas woossetto.
James5:15 Ammanon woossida woosay hargidaade paththana; Godaykka iza denththana; izi nagara ooththidaade gidikkoka Xoossi iza maarana.
James5:16 Hessa gishshas intteka intte garsan issoy issaara intte nagara paaxettite; paxana mala issoy issaas woossite; xillo asa woosay wolqqara dees; wolqqama oosokka ooththees.
James5:17 Eelaasi nu malakka asa; izi iray bukkontta mala minththi woossiin biitta bolla heedzdzu layththinne bagga gakkanaas iray bukkibeenna.
James5:18 Qasseka zaari woossiin iray saloppe biitta bolla bukkides; biittayka kath immides.
James5:19 Ta ishatoo! Inttefe issaadey tumappe balettiin hara asi iza zaarikko hessa wozinan woththite; nagaranchcha izi balettida ogeppe zaaridaadey hessaade shemppo hayqoppe ashsheessinne izaade nagara darozakka kammees.
James5:20 
1Peter1:1 Yesus Kirstoosa Hawaare gidida Phexroosappe
1Peter1:2 Aaway Xoossi kase inttena erida mala doorettidaytas
1Peter1:3 Yesus Kirstoosi hayqoppe dendida gishshas nuus de7o gidida hidota immidayssi ba gita maaroteththan nuna baas ooraththa nayta histtida nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Aaway Xoossi galatetto.
1Peter1:4 Izi dhayontta
1Peter1:5 Intteka wurseththa gallassan buro qonccana atoteththaas ammano gaason Xoossa wolqqan naagettideta.
1Peter1:6 Ha7i guuththa wodes dumma dumma paacetti inttena waayisikkoka intte hessan ufayettite.
1Peter1:7 Hessi he paacezi intte bolla gakkizay intte ammanozi tumu gididayssa qonccisanaassa. Dhayana worqqayka taman paacettees; worqqafe aadhdhi bonchcho gidida intte ammanoykka hessaththo paacettanaas bessees. Hessi paacettida intte ammanoy Yesus Kirstoosi qoncciza gallas galatas
1Peter1:8 Intte Yesus Kirstoosa ayfera be7ontta aggikokka intte iza doseeta; ha7ikka intte iza be7ontta aggikokka iza ammaneeta; coo qaalan qonccisana dandayontta gita bonchcho ufays intte ufayetteeta.
1Peter1:9 Intte naagiza intte shemppoys atoteth intte ammanon demmideta.
1Peter1:10 He atoteththaza gishshas inttes imettana kiyateththaas kase nabeti lo7eththi wozinappe pilggi xeellida.
1Peter1:11 Kase isttan diza Kirstoosa Ayanay Xoossafe tiyettidayssa bolla gakkana waayezanne he waayezappe guye izi demmana bonchchoza gishshas kase baas woththides; istti qasse hessi wurikka ayde waani hananaakko yuushshi qoppida.
1Peter1:12 He kase nabeti inttes ooththida attiin istti baas ooththonttayssi isttas qonccen erettides. Istti inttes ooththiday bolla saloppe kiitettida Xillo Ayana baggara ha7i inttes Mishiraachcho qaala yootida asati inttes yootidayssa qonccisanaassa; hessa he qaalaa kiitanchchatikka beyanaas amottida.
1Peter1:13 Hessa gishshas intte intte wozina suurisidi oosos giigettite; wogara de7ite. Yesus Kirstoosi qoncciza wode intte iza kiyateththaa demmanaas inttes kumeththa hidotay de7o.
1Peter1:14 Intte azazettiza nayta gididi erontta dishe intte kase izan diza iita qofaa kaallofte.
1Peter1:15 Inttena xeygida Xoossay dumma gidida mala intteka intte duussan ubbaan dummatite.
1Peter1:16 Gaasoykka
1Peter1:17 Oonakka dumma shaakki maaddontta issaas issaas izaade ooso mala pirdiza Xoossaa
1Peter1:18 Intte kase intte aawatappe laattida hada duussaafe wozzettiday dhayza biran woykko worqqan gidonttayssa intte ereeta.
1Peter1:19 Gido attiin intte wozzettiday iitaynne wosoy iza bolla baynda geeshsha dorsa mala gidida Kirstoosa bonchcho suuththankko.
1Peter1:20 Izi erettiday hayssi alamezi medhettanaappe kase gidishin ha7i qasse wurseththa woden inttes qonccides.
1Peter1:21 Inttes ammanoynne intte hidotay Xoossan gidana mala Yesus Kirstoosa baggara iza hayqoppe denththidi izas bonchcho immida Xoossaan intte ammanetteeta.
1Peter1:22 Intte ammanizayta suure wozinappe siiqana mala tumaas azazeteththan intte intte asateth geeshshideta; hessa gishshas intte intte giddon issoy issaara lo7eththi siiqettite.
1Peter1:23 Intte nam7anththo yelettiday mernaas minni diza dhayontta de7o Xoossa qaalan dhayontta zereththafe attiin dhayza zereththafe gidenna.
1Peter1:24 Geeshsha Maxaafay giza mala
1Peter1:25 Godaa qaalay gidikko mernaas eqqi dees.» Inttes sabbakettida Mishiraachcho qaalaykka hessa.
1Peter2:1 Hessa gishshas iitateth wursi
1Peter2:2 Ha7i yelettida guuththa nayti maath amottizayssa mala intteka attanaas
1Peter2:3 Intte laamotanaas bessizay Goday kiya gididayssa shaakki erikko.
1Peter2:4 Hessa gishshas gede de7o shuch gidida Yesusaakko shiiqite; he shuchchay asay leqqi aggidayssa shin Xoossa achchan gidikko doorettidayssanne bonchcho waagay dizayssa.
1Peter2:5 Intte Godaa Yesusaakko shiiqanaykka de7o shuchchaa mala Xillo Ayana duussaso gidana mala oosetteeta; hessaththoka intte Yesus Kirstoosa baggara ufayssiza Ayana yarsho Xoossas shiishshanaas geeshsha qeeseta gidandeta.
1Peter2:6 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Peter2:7 Hessa gishshas inttes ammanizaytas he shuchchay bonchcho shuchchiko; hinko izan ammanonttaytas gidikko
1Peter2:8 Qasseka
1Peter2:9 Intte gidikko dhumappe gede daro malalisiza iza poo7okko xeygida malalisiza Xoossaa ooso awajjanaas doorettida yeletata
1Peter2:10 Intte kase Xoossa dere gidekketa; ha7i gidikko intte Xoossa dereta; intte kase Xoossi inttes qadhettontta derekko shin ha7i gidikko inttes qadhettides.
1Peter2:11 Ta siiqotoo! Intte hayssa alameza bolla imaththenne bete as gidida gishshas shemppora olettiza asho amoteththatappe haakkana mala ta inttena hadara gays.
1Peter2:12 Oonee erizay
1Peter2:13 Intte Godaa Yesusa gishshas giidi dere ayssizaytas azazettite. Kawoy qasse ubbaafe bollara diza gishshas kawosikka azazettite.
1Peter2:14 Dere ayssizaytas azazettite; istti iita ooththizayta qaxxayanaassinne lo7o ooththizayta galatanaas Kawoppe kiitettizayta.
1Peter2:15 Intte lo7o ooson hankko eray baynda eeyateththan haasayzayta co7u histtana mala hessika Xoossa shene.
1Peter2:16 Intte Xoossas ooththiza asata mala gididi hirgay baynda de7ite attiin intte intte shene mala diza duussaa iitateththaa kammiza miish histtofte.
1Peter2:17 As ubbaaka bonchchite; ammanizayta siiqite; Xoossas babbite; kawo bonchchite.
1Peter2:18 Intteno Asas ooththi aqizaytoo! Inttena oosisiza godatas bonchchon azazettite; intte azazettanay lo7otassinne ashketas xalla gidontta hankko iitatassarakko!
1Peter2:19 Asi galatettizay coo qohettishe; hessika Xoossa gishshas giidi dandayana.
1Peter2:20 Intte iita ooththida gishshas qaxxayettishe dandaykko inttes aaza galatay daanee? Intte lo7o ooththidi waaye ekkishe dandaykko intte Xoossafe galata ekkandeta.
1Peter2:21 Intte xeygettidaykka hessassa; intte iza leemiso kaallana mala Kirstoosi intte gishshas waaye ekkidi inttes leemiso gidides.
1Peter2:22 Izi aykko nagarakka ooththibeenna; iza doonan geney beettibeenna.
1Peter2:23 Asay iza cayishin izi zaari cayibeenna. Waayettishe bana tumu pirdiza Godaas hadara aaththi immides attiin halo kessana mandibeenna.
1Peter2:24 Nuni nagarappe shaakettidi xilloteththan daana mala izi barkka ba ashon nu nagaraa masqale bolla tookkides; intte iza madunththaan paxideta.
1Peter2:25 Intte dhayda dorsata mala toylattideta; ha7i gidikko intte shemppo heemmizayssakonne naagizayssako simmideta.
1Peter3:1 Hessaththoka machchetoo! Intte intte azinatas azazettite. Hessaththo issi issi azinati Xoossa qaalaa ammanonttayta gidikkoka coo mela ba machcheta lo7eteththaan xalla simmontta aggettenna.
1Peter3:2 Istti simmana dandayzay intte geeshshateththaanne intte ase bonchchiza duus dizayssa be7idikko.
1Peter3:3 Intte lo7eteththi coo mela hu7e daththaninne worqqan geexeteththan
1Peter3:4 Intte lo7eteththi Xoossa sinththan waagara diza keehi bonchchettidaazinne dhayontta geexen
1Peter3:5 Beni wode ba hidota Xoossan ooththida geeshsha maccassati geexettiday hayssa malanna; istti ba azinatas azazettida.
1Peter3:6 Istti azazettidaykka Saaray Abrahaame
1Peter3:7 Azinatoo! Intte intte machchetara akeekan issife de7ite; istti inttefe daaburanchcha medheteth gidida gishshassinne qasseka Xoossi coo kiyateththan immiza de7o istti inttenara issife laattanayssa gishshas intte istta bonchchite; intte hessaththo ooththiko intte woosaa dhuphiza miishshi deenna.
1Peter3:8 Hessafe asa baggara qasse intte issoy issaara siiqon diite; hara asa bolla gakkiza meto intte meto mala xeellite; intte intte garsan ishantta mala siiqettite; ashketanne kiyata gidite.
1Peter3:9 Anjjite attiin isttas iita cashshas cash zaaropite; intte xeygettiday hessaththo ooththidi anjjo laattanaassa.
1Peter3:10 Geeshsha Maxaafay giza mala
1Peter3:11 Iita yo7oppe haakko
1Peter3:12 Godaa ayfeti xillota bagga xeelleettes; iza hayththatikka istta woosaa siyanaas doya deettes; hinko iita ooththizayta gidikko Goday ba hanqo ayfeso bessana» gides.
1Peter3:13 Intte lo7o ooththanaas minettiko intte bolla iita miish gaththanay oonee?
1Peter3:14 Intte lo7o ooththida gishshas waaye be7ikkoka intte anjjo ekkana; asay intte bolla iita ooththanaas mandettizayssas babboftenne daro qoppofte.
1Peter3:15 Godaa Kirstoosa intte wozinan bonchchitenne iza intte de7os Godaa histtite; inttes diza hidota gishshas inttena oychchizaytas ubbaas zaaro immanaas ubba wode giigetti uttite.
1Peter3:16 Intte isttas immana zaaroy qasse ashketeththaninne bonchchon gido; intte Kirstoosayta gidida gishshas inttes diza lo7o amaleza gishshas iita haasayza asay ba iita haasayan yeellatana mala inttes lo7o qofay de7o.
1Peter3:17 Xoossa shene gidikko intte iita ooso ooththidi waayettanayssafe lo7o ooso ooththidi waayettiko lo7o.
1Peter3:18 Kirstoosikka nuna Xoossaako shiishshanaas izi ba hu7es Xillokoshin hankko Xillo gidontta nu nagara gishshas nam7anththettontta mala issito waayettidi hayqqides. Izi ashon hayqqides; Ayanan gidikko paxides.
1Peter3:19 He ayanaan qasho keeththan diza shemppotaakko biidi isttas Mishiraachcho qaalaa yootides.
1Peter3:20 Heyti heen woyne keeththan diza shemppoti kase Nohe wode markabezi oosetti giigshin istti simmana mala Xoossi dandayan naagishin nuni nees azazettoko gidayta. He markabezan geliin haaththafe attidayta qooday osppun gidida guuththa asata xalla.
1Peter3:21 Hessi he haaththi ha7i qasse intte izan attiza xinqata leemiso; hayssi xinqatay qita bolla geeyanaas meeceteththi gidontta geeshsha qofaa ekkanaas Xoossaako shiishshiza woosa. Izi inttena ashshanaykka Yesus Kirstoosa denththaa baggara.
1Peter3:22 Izi pude salo biidi ha7i Xoossa achchan dees; kiitanchchatinne godateththi isttas diza wolqqamatikka izas haarettida.
1Peter4:1 Kirstoosi ba ashon waaye ekkida gishshas intteka ola olettiza miishshe gixxida asa mala hayssa ha qofaan minnidi giigettite; ba ashon waaye be7ida asi nagara ooso aggides.
1Peter4:2 Hessafe guye ba diza wode ubbaan izi daanay iita asho amoteth ooson gidontta dishe Xoossa shene polonna.
1Peter4:3 Hinko Xoos erontta asay ooththizayssa mala intte coo mela yeda duussan asho amon
1Peter4:4 Ha7i gidikko intte ha yo7ozan isttara wogay baynda qiixi qiixontta gishshas istti malaletteetessinne inttena cayeettes.
1Peter4:5 Gido attiin hayqqidayta bollanne paxa dizayta bolla pirdanaas giigi uttidayssas istti zaaro immana.
1Peter4:6 Hayqqidaytassara Mishiraachcho qaalay yootettiday hessa gishshassa; hessaththoka ay asa bollaka pirdiza mala istta asho bolla pirdana; istta shemppoy gidikko Xoossi diza mala de7on deyana.
1Peter4:7 Hessa gishshas wode wurseththi matides; intte minni woossanaas dandayana mala wogara diitenne woppu gida qofay inttes de7o.
1Peter4:8 Siiqoy daro nagara kammiza gishshas harappe bollara intte intte garsan lo7eththi siiqettite.
1Peter4:9 Zuuzunththi baynda issoy issaa imaththateth mokki ekkite.
1Peter4:10 Dumma dumma gidida Xoossa kiyateththa imotata ammaneteththan oykkidi inttefe issi issi asi baas imettida Xoossa kiyateththa imotan hara as maaddo.
1Peter4:11 Tamaarsizaadey Xoossa qaala tamaarsiza mala tamaarso; haggazizaadey Xoossi izas immiza wolqqan haggazo; hessa malan Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosa baggara haniza ubbaan galatettana; bonchchoynne godateththi mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas izas gido. Amiin!
1Peter4:12 Ta siiqotoo! Intte tama mala paacciza meto giddon geliza wode hessa malay kase baynda ooraththa miishshi gakkidaaz inttes misatiin malalettofte.
1Peter4:13 Hessafe bollara Kirstoosa bonchchoy qoncciza wode intte keehi ufayettana mala intte izara iza waayeza ekkizayta gidida mala ufayettite.
1Peter4:14 Intte Kirstoosa sunththaa gishshas cayettiko bonchcho Ayanay hessika Xoossa Ayanay intte bolla shempiza gishshas ufayettite.
1Peter4:15 Inttefe oona bollaka metoy gakkiko hessaadey shempo wodhida asa mala
1Peter4:16 Izi ammanizaade gidida gishshas iza bolla gakkiza metoy diikko qasse Kirstoosa sunththan izi Xoossaa galato attiin yeellatoppo.
1Peter4:17 Pirday doomettanaas wodey matides; he pirday doomettanay koyro Xoossa asaa bollako! Histtiin pirday nunan doommiko Xoossa Mishiraachcho qaalaas azazettontta ixxida asaa wurseththi ay gidanee?
1Peter4:18 Geeshsha Maxaafay
1Peter4:19 Hessa gishshas Xoossa shene mala waayettiza asati banateththaa ubbaa ammanettida bana medhdhidayssas hadara immidi lo7o ooso ooththontta aggofetto.
1Peter5:1 Hessa gishshas tanikka isttara issife Woosa Keeththas cimanne Kirstoosa waayezas markka gidida tani qasseka buroppe qonccana bonchchoza gishettanaas diza tani inttenara diza Woosa Keeththa cimata zorays.
1Peter5:2 Inttes hadara imettida Xoossaa wude naagite; iza wudeza wolqqara gidontta Xoossi koyza ogera dosan heemmite; miishshas yiiqeteththan gidontta haggazanaas wozinappe koshshan gido.
1Peter5:3 Hessaththoka intte alaafeteththaa garsan dizayta yedhdhi haaron gidontta wudezas lo7o leemiso beson gido.
1Peter5:4 Intte hessaththo ooththiko hankko waanna heemmizayssi qoncciza wode intte moorettontta bonchcho akilile ekkana.
1Peter5:5 Hessaththoka intteno naateththatoo! Intte cimatas azazettite; intte wurikka ashketeth afala mala may7idi issoy issaas ooththite. «Xoossi otorizayta ixxees; ashketas qasse ba kiyateth immees» geetetti kase Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafettides.
1Peter5:6 Hessa gishshas Xoossi ba woden dhoqqu histtana mala mino Xoossaa kusheppe garsara inttena ziqqi histtite.
1Peter5:7 Izi inttes qoppiza gishshas inttena metiza qofaa wursi iza bolla yeggite.
1Peter5:8 Wogara de7ite! Beeggite! Intte morkke Daabulosi baas mittana miish koyishe xaaggiza gaammo mala intte yuushon harbuqees.
1Peter5:9 Alame kumeththaan diza intte ishati hessa mala meto ekkana dizayssa intte eridi ammanon minni eqqidi izara eqettite.
1Peter5:10 Intte guuththa wodes waayettidayssafe guye inttena Kirstoosa baggara mernaa bonchchos xeygida kiyateth ubbaas Goday izi barkka inttena gakkida waayezappe ashshana
1Peter5:11 Bonchchoynne wolqqay mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas izas gido. Amiin.
1Peter5:12 Tani izan ammanettida isha ga qoppiza Silwaanoosa baggara hayssa kiitaza qaanththara inttes xaafadis; ta hessa xaafiday inttena zoranaassinne hayssi tumu Xoossa kiyateth gididayssa inttes qonccisanaas gaadakko; hessa gishshas intte hayssan Xoossa kiyateththan minni eqqite.
1Peter5:13 Intte mala doorettidaara Baabiloonen diza michcho gidida Woosa Keeththaya inttes saroka shiishshawus. Ta naa Marqoosikka inttena sarokkees.
1Peter5:14 Ammano siiqoteththan intte issoy issaa yeeri yeeri ekkidi sarokettite. Inttes Kirstoosaytas ubbaas saroy gido.
2Peter1:1 Yesus Kirstoosa oosanchchanne izan Hawaare Simoona gidida Phexroosappe
2Peter1:2 Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesusa eron kiyateththinne saroy inttes gido.
2Peter1:3 Ba bonchchoninne ba kiyateththan nuna xeygidayssa nuni iza erida gishshas iza Xoossateththaa wolqqay de7ossinne Xoos goynnanaas nuus koshshizaaz ubbaa immides.
2Peter1:4 Ba bonchchoninne ba kiyateththan bonchcho wogay dizayssanne keehi gita gidida iza hidotaa nuni demmidos; heytantta baggara intte iita amo gaason hayssa ha alamezan diza dhayoppe kessi ekkidi Xoossateththa hanozappe izara gishettizaadentta gidideta.
2Peter1:5 Hessa gaason hayssafe kaalliza miishshati inttes gujettana mala ane minnite. Ammano bolla kiyateth
2Peter1:6 erateththa bolla bana haaro
2Peter1:7 Xoossas goyno bolla ishanttara doseteth
2Peter1:8 Hayti inttes dari dizaaz gidikko heyti inttena intte Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa eron go7aynne ayfey bayndayta gidontta mala naagana.
2Peter1:9 Hayti ha miishshati baynda asi gidikko haahon diza miish demmontta qooqe asa mala; hessaadey kase aadhdhida ba nagarappe geeyidayssaka balettides.
2Peter1:10 Ta ishatoo! Hessa gishshas intte xeygettidayssanne doorettidayssa shaakki eranaas keehi amottizayta gidite; intte hessaththo ooththiko mulekka dhuphetteketa.
2Peter1:11 Intte hessaththo hankko mernaappe mernaas diza nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa kawoteththan gelanaas inttes kumeththa maatay imettana.
2Peter1:12 Intte hayta ha yo7ota eridinne intte erida tumaan minni de7ikkoka heyta tani inttena qofsanaappe guye giikke.
2Peter1:13 Tani paxa diza wode ubbaan inttena ubba wode denththeththanayssi bessizaaz misatidi taas beettees.
2Peter1:14 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi taas qonccisida mala tani hayssa alamezappe elelada hayqqanayssa ta erays.
2Peter1:15 Tani ha7i minettizay ta hayqqada inttefe shaakettidaappe guye intte hayta ha yo7ota ubba wode qoppana malassa.
2Peter1:16 Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa wolqqafe izas yuussa gishshas nu inttes yootida wode nuni nu ayfera iza bonchchoza be7idi markkattoos attiin asi coo mela medhdhi ekkidi gene haasayza haysi7e mala gidenna.
2Peter1:17 «Tani izan ufayettizaadey ta dosiza ta naazi hayssa» giza qaala giirissay gita bonchchora izas yida wode izi Xoossaa Aawappe bonchchonne gitateth ekkides.
2Peter1:18 Nuni izara anjjettida zumaa bolla dishe hayssa saloppe ha yida giirissaa nuni nu hayththan siyidos.
2Peter1:19 Hessi wurikka kase nabeti yootidayssi tumu gididayssa lo7eththi qonccisees; hessa gishshas intte dhumason diza xomppes lo7eththi naagettizayssa mala kase nabeti yootidayssa lo7eththi naagettite. Intte hessaththo ooththanay gadey wonttanaas
2Peter1:20 Intte harappe aaththi qoppanaas bessizay Geeshsha Maxaafan diza tinbite qaalaan yootettida ay miishshika oonikka baas misatida mala birshanaas bessenna.
2Peter1:21 Ay tinbiteykka asa shene mala mulekka yibeenna; gido attiin tinbitey wurikka Xillo Ayanay kaaleththiin iza kaallida asati Xoossafe ekkidi yootidaaza.
2Peter2:1 Gido attiin beni wode wordo nabeti dere giddon dizayssa mala hessaththoka ha7i intte giddon wordo astamaareti de7andettes; heytantti asa dhayssiza wordo timirte qotara diccana mala ooththeettes; bana ashshida Godaakka kaddidi bana eeson dhayssizaaz ba bolla eheettes.
2Peter2:2 Hessa gaason daro asay yeellachchiza istta ogeza kaallees; he istta oosoza gaason tumaa ogey cayettees.
2Peter2:3 Heyti wordo astamaareti miishshas gaphigaphiza gishshas barkka medhdhi ekkida yo7o yooti yootidi inttes dizaaz baas bonqqi ekkeettes; beni beniisoppe pirday isttas giigetti uttides; addafe istta dhayoy naagees.
2Peter2:4 Haray attoshin nagara ooththida kiitanchchatas Xoossi mishettontta istti ciimma gidida dhuma olla giddon de7idi pirda gallas gakkanaas naagettana mala gede gaannamen yeggides.
2Peter2:5 Hessaththoka xilloteththa gishshas sabaake gidida Nohe hankko laappun asatara ashshidi Xoossas goynnontta asati diza alameza bolla dhayssiza haaththe ehishe qadhettidi kase he wode alameza maaribeenna.
2Peter2:6 Qasseka Xoos goynnonttayta qaxxayanaas ubbaas leemiso gidana mala Sodoomeynne Gamoora katamati bidinth gidana gakkanaassinne xuugetti dhayana gakkanaas istta bolla pirdides.
2Peter2:7 Wogay baynda yeellachchiza ooso ooththiza asata ooson ubba wode so77u gishe diza xillo Looxe gidikko ashshi ekkides.
2Peter2:8 He xillo addezi istta giddon dishin gallas gallas izi be7izayssaninne siyizayssan he wogay baynda asata oosozan iza shemppoya waayettadus.
2Peter2:9 Histtiin hessi wurikka hessa mala gidikko Goday baas goynnishe diza asata paaceppe ashshanayssanne nagaranchchatakka wostti qaxxayanaakkonne pirda gallassas wostti istta naagidi gaththanaakko hessa izi erees guussa.
2Peter2:10 Harappeka heyti tuna gidida ba asho amo kaallizaytanne Xoossa Godateth kadhizayta pirda gallassas naagi woththides. Heyti wordo astamaareti istti xalatanne otoranchchata gidida gishshas salo bolla isttas godateththi dizayta cayishe babbettenna.
2Peter2:11 Kiitanchchati isttafe bollara wolqqaynne godateththi dizayta gidikkoka Godaa sinththan istta bolla kadhe qaala kessi mootettenna.
2Peter2:12 Heyti wordo astamaareti gidikko baas erettontta ixxida miish ubbaa cash cayeettes; heytantti narxan oykettanaassinne hayqqanaas yelettida; coo mela ba shenen dizaytanne qofay baynda do7ata mala; do7ati coo mela dhayzayssaththo isttika mulera dhayana.
2Peter2:13 Qoho ooso ooththida gishshas istti mulera ba ooso waaga ekkana; istta ufayssi seeta gallas maththoteththinne wogay baynda buraqo; istti hessa mala wogay baynda gufan inttenara issife xeygettiza wode as baleththiza ba asho oosozan istti iitanne yeellachchizayta.
2Peter2:14 Isttas nagara oosoppe naagettontta amottiza ayfey dees; isttas nagara ooso siiqiza amoteththi ay wodekka simmenna. Ammanon buro minni eqqontta asata baleththeettes; miishshas gaphigapheettes; istti qanggettidayta.
2Peter2:15 Istti suure ogeza aggidi dhayda; iita ooso ooththidi demmiza miish siiqida Bi7oore naa Bala7aame oge biidi balettida.
2Peter2:16 Bala7aamey gidikko ba ooththida nagara gishshas seerettides shin haasaya erontta hareya asa qaalan izas haasayada he nabeza balaappe seera zaaradus.
2Peter2:17 Heyti he asati haaththi baynda pulttota; gote carkon biza shaara mala; istta sakkanna dhumay naagees.
2Peter2:18 Kase bala garsan diza asata giddofe kessi ekki yiidi daro gam7ontta asata; hada gidida otoro qaala haasayan
2Peter2:19 «Intte wozzettana» gishe inttes ufays immeettes; xoonettida asi bana xoonidaades aylle gidi haarettizayssaththo isttika baas nagaras aylle.
2Peter2:20 Nu Godaanne nuna ashshida Yesus Kirstoosa eridi ha alameza tunateththaafe kessi ekkidaappe guye qasseka guye simmidi he kase tunateththaan xoonettidi gelikko isttas kaseyssafe guyeyssi aadho iita gidana.
2Peter2:21 Istti xilloteththa oge shaakki eridaappe guye isttas imettida geeshsha azazozappe guye simmanaappe istti kase he xilloteththa ogeza erontta aggidaakko isttas lo7okkoshin.
2Peter2:22 «Kanay ba cooyida cooshshaa maanaas guye simmees.» Hessaththoka
2Peter3:1 Ta siiqotoo! Tani inttes xaafishin hayssi nam7anththo kiita; tani inttes nam7u kiitatakka xaafiday hayta ha yo7ota akeeki ekkidi intte suure qofa qoppana mala inttena beegoththanaassa.
2Peter3:2 Hayssafe kase geeshsha nabeti yootida qaalanne qasse Hawaareta baggara intte demmida nu Godaanne nuna ashshidayssa azazo intte yuushshi qoppana mala ta koyays.
2Peter3:3 Hara ubbaafe kasetidi hayssa yuushshi qopite; wurseththa gallassatan qidhizaytinne ba iita amo kaallishe as kadhizayti yaana.
2Peter3:4 Istti
2Peter3:5 Heyti he asati kase daro wodeppe kase saloy Xoossa qaalan medhettoyssanne biittayka haaththafenne haaththan dizayssa erishe kaddeettes.
2Peter3:6 He wode diza alamezi haaththan mitetti dhaydes.
2Peter3:7 Hessaththoka ha7i diza saloynne biittay nagaranchchati dhayana diza pirda gallas gakkanaas tamas giigi uttida.
2Peter3:8 Ta siiqotoo! Intte gidikko Godaa achchan issi gallassi shii layththa mala; qasseka shii layththi issi gallassa mala gididayssa hessa he hanoza balopite.
2Peter3:9 Issi issi asatas misatiza mala Goday ba yootida hidota qaalaa polanaas gam7ennakoshin asi wurikka maarettana malanne ay asikka dhayontta mala koyidi izi intte gishshas takkees.
2Peter3:10 Godaa gallassay qasse kayso yeeththa mala qoppontta dishin gakki wodhdhana; he gallas saloti gita giirissan aadhdhana; medheteththi wurikka taman xuugetti dhayana; biittaynne iza bolla dizaazi wurikka xuugettana.
2Peter3:11 Hessa gishshas heyti wurikka hessaththo dhayanaaz gidikko histtiin intte geeshshateththan Xoossas goynnishe daanaas inttes waani bessennee?
2Peter3:12 Hessa gishshas Xoossa gallassay yaanayssa intte laamotizaytanne izi eleli yaana mala ooththizayta gidite. He gallas saloy taman xuugetti dhayana; medheteththatikka tama seelan seerana.
2Peter3:13 Gido attiin nuni izi nuus immida hidotaa mala xilloteththa oosoy oosettizaso ooraththa salonne ooraththa biitta naagoos.
2Peter3:14 Hessa gishshas ta siiqotoo! Hessi wurikka hanana gallas intte naagishe diikko Goday inttena intte bolla borey baynda dishin saroteththan demmana mala minni diite.
2Peter3:15 Nu Godaa dandayay inttena ashshanaas gididayssa intte erite; nu siiqo ishaa Phawuloosi baas imettida erateththa mala izi inttes xaafidayssi hayssa.
2Peter3:16 Izi hayssa ha hanoza gishshas ba kiitatan ubbaan hayssaththoka xaafides; iza kiitata giddon eranaas waayisiza issi issi hanoti deettes; erateththi isttas paccidaytinne nam7u qofan yooqu gizayti hara Geeshsha Maxaafata mirqqizayssaththoka haytakka istti mirqqana; istti hessaththo ooththizay baas dhayanaassa.
2Peter3:17 Ta ishatoo! Intte qasse hessa kasetidi erida gishshas hankko makkallata balaa gaason gooshetti biidi kase intte minni dizasoppe kundontta mala naagettite.
2Peter3:18 Hessafe bollara nu Godaanne nu dhale Yesus Kirstoosa kiyateththaninne iza shaakki eron pude diccite; izas ha7ikka mernaaskka bonchchoy gido. Amiin.
1John1:1 De7o qaala gishshas koyroppe dizayssa nuni nu hayththan siyidayssanne nu ayfera be7idayssa lo7eththi xeellidayssa
1John1:2 De7oykka qonccides; nunikka nu ayfera be7idi markkattoos. Izas iza Aawaa achchan dizayssanne nuuska qonccida mernaa de7o gishshas nu inttes yootoos.
1John1:3 Intteska nunara issifeteththi daana mala nuni be7idayssanne siyidayssa inttes yootoos; nu issifeteththayka Aawaranne iza Naa Yesus Kirstoosara.
1John1:4 Nu ufayssay kumeth gidana mala nu hayssa inttes xaafoos.
1John1:5 Nu izappe siyidi inttes yootiza kiitay
1John1:6 «Nu dhuman simerettishe izara nuus issifeteththi dees» giikko wordotoos attiin tuman dookko.
1John1:7 Gido attiin izi poo7on diza mala nunikka poo7on simerettiko nu garsan nuus issifeteththi dees; iza naa Yesus Kirstoosa suuththi nuna nagara ubbaafe geeshshees.
1John1:8 Nuni nunan nagaray baa giikko nurkka nuna baleththoos; tumaykka nunan deenna.
1John1:9 Nuni nu nagaraa paaxikko izi nu nagaraa atto gaanaassinne nu qohoppe nuna wursi geeshshanaas izi ammanettidaadenne xillo.
1John1:10 Nuni nagara ooththibeekko giikko iza nu wordanchcha kessoossinne iza qaalaykka nunan deenna.
1John2:1 Ta naytoo! Ta inttes hayssa xaafizay intte nagara ooththontta malassa; gido attiin oonikka nagara ooththiko Aawaa achchan nuus xabaqay dees; izikka xilloza Yesus Kirstoosa.
1John2:2 Izi nu nagaray atto geetettana mala oge giigsizaade; hessika nuna xalla gidontta kumeththa alame asassara attiin nuus xalla gidenna.
1John2:3 Nu iza azazota polikko nu iza eridayssa hessan eroos.
1John2:4 «Ta iza erays» gishe iza azazo polonttaade gidikko hessaadey wordo asa attiin tumay izaaden deenna.
1John2:5 Qasse oonikka iza qaalaa naagikko tumu Xoossa siiqoy izaaden polettides; nuni izan dizayssa nu erizay hessanna.
1John2:6 Ta izan days giza asi oonikka Yesusi simerettida mala simerettanaas bessees.
1John2:7 Ta siiqotoo! Ta inttes xaafizayssi kase inttes dizaaro inttekon gam7ida azazoyo attiin hara ooraththa azazo gidenna; gam7ida azazoya kase intte siyida qaalayo.
1John2:8 Hara baggara ta inttes xaafizay Kirstoosa achchaninne intte achchan tumu gidida ooraththa azazo; gaasoykka dhumay aadhdhiin tumu poo7oy poo7isishe dees.
1John2:9 Poo7on days gishe ba ishaa ixxizaadey ha7ikka dhuman dees.
1John2:10 Ba ishaa siiqizaadey poo7on dees; hessaades dhuphe gidiza miishshi deenna.
1John2:11 Gido attiin ba ishaa ixxizaadey gidikko dhuma giddon dees; dhuman simerettees; dhumay iza qooqisida gishshas izi awa bizaakkonne ba bizaso erenna.
1John2:12 Ta naytoo! Intte nagaray Yesus Kirstoosappe dendidayssan atto geetettida gishshas ta inttes xaafays.
1John2:13 Aawatoo! Kase koyroppe dizayssa intte eriza gishshas ta inttes xaafays; naateththatoo! Intte Xala7e xoonida gishshas ta inttes xaafays.
1John2:14 Naateththa naytoo! Intte Aawaa erida gishshas ta inttes xaafays; aawatoo! Koyroppe dizayssa iza intte erida gishshas ta inttes xaafays. Naateththatoo! Intte minota gidida gishshassinne Xoossa qaalay inttenan diza gishshas intte Xala7e xoonida gishshas ta inttes xaafays.
1John2:15 Hayssa alameza woykko ha alamezan diza ay miishsheka dosopite; oonikka ha alameza dosikko Aawaa siiqoy izaade achchan deenna.
1John2:16 Gaasoykka ha alamezan dizay wuri asho amoteth
1John2:17 Alameynne alamen diza amoteththi aadhdhana; Xoossa shene polizayti gidikko mernaas daana.
1John2:18 Naytoo! Hayssi wurseththa saate; intte siyida mala Kirstoosara eqettizaadey yaana; ha7ikka Kirstoosara eqettiza daroti yida. Hayssi wurseththa saate gididayssa nu hayssan eroos.
1John2:19 Istti nu giddofe kezida; gido attiin istti kasekka nu bagga gidettenna; istti nu bagga gididaakko nunara minni eqqana; gido attiin istti wuri nu bagga gidonttayssi erettana mala nuuppe shaakettida.
1John2:20 Inttena qasse Kirstoosi Xillo Ayanan tiydes; hessa gishshas intte wurikka tumaa ereeta.
1John2:21 Ta inttes xaafizay intte tumaa erontta gishshas gidenna; gido attiin intte tumaa eriza gishshassinne tumaa garsafe aykko wordoyka beettonttayssa intte eriza gishshassa.
1John2:22 Yesusa izi Kirstoosa gidenna gi kaddizaadefe hara wordanchchay oonee? Hessaadey Aawaanne Naaza kaddizayssi Kirstoosara eqettizaade.
1John2:23 Naaza kaddizaades oonaska Aaway deenna; Naaza ekkizaades ubbaas izas Aaway dees.
1John2:24 Intte koyro siyida qaalaya inttenan du; intte koyro siyidaara inttenan diikko intteka Naazaninne Aawaan daana.
1John2:25 Mernaa de7oy izi nuus immana gida hidota qaala.
1John2:26 Inttena baleththiza asata gishshas hayssa inttes xaafadis.
1John2:27 Intte qasse izappe ekkida Xillo Ayanay inttenan diza gishshas haray oonikka inttena tamaarsanaas bessenna; izi inttena tamaarsanayssi tuma attiin wordo gidenna; hessa gishshas Xillo Ayanay inttena tamaarsida mala Kirstoosan de7ite.
1John2:28 Ha7i ta naytoo! Izi qoncciza wode nuus xalateththi daana mala izi yiza wodekka nu iza sinththan yeellatontta mala intte izan de7ite.
1John2:29 Izi xillo gididayssa intte erizaa gidikko xillo ooththizay wuri izappe yelettidayssa intte ereeta.
1John3:1 Nuni Xoossa nayta geetettana mala Aaway darssi siiqida iza siiqoy nuus ay mala gitakkonne ane be7ite! Tumukka nu iza nayta; alamey nuna erontta aggiday iza erontta aggida gishshassa.
1John3:2 Ta ishatoo! Nuni ha7i Xoossa nayta; buro nu ay hananaakko ha7i qonccibeenna; Kirstoosi qoncciza wode nu iza beyanayssanne izakka misatanayssa nu eroos.
1John3:3 Hayssa izan hidota ooththizay wuri izi geesh gidida mala bana geeshshees.
1John3:4 Nagara ooththizay wurikka makkalla ooththees; nagaraykka makkalla.
1John3:5 Izi nagara dhayssanaas qonccidayssa intte ereeta; izan nagaray baawa.
1John3:6 Izan diza asi oonikka nagara ooththenna; nagara ooththizaadey oonikka gidikko iza beyibeenna woykko eribeenna.
1John3:7 Ta naytoo! Inttena oonikka baleththontta mala naagettite; izi xillo gidida mala xillo ooththizaadeyka xillo.
1John3:8 Nagara ooththizay Xala7eppe; gaasoykka Xala7ey koyroppeka nagara ooththizaade; Xoossa nay qonccidaykka Xala7e ooso laallanaassa.
1John3:9 Xoossafe yelettiday wuri nagara ooththenna; Xoossa zereththi izan diza gishshassinne izi Xoossafe yelettida gishshas nagara ooththana dandayenna.
1John3:10 Xoossa naytinne Xala7e nayti shaaketti erettizay hessanna; Xillo ooththonttaynne ba ishaa siiqonttay wuri Xoossafe gidenna.
1John3:11 Intte koyro siyidaara
1John3:12 Iita bagga gididi ba ishaa wodhida Qayeele mala gidopite; izi aazas wodhidee? Gaasoykka iza oosoy iita; ishaa oosoy lo7o gidida gishshassa.
1John3:13 Ta ishatoo! Inttena alame asay ixxiko malalettofte.
1John3:14 Nuni nu ishata dosiza gishshas hayqoppe de7on pinnidayssa nu eroos; siiqoy bayndaadey wuri hayqo giddon dees.
1John3:15 Ba ishaa ixxizaadey shemppo wodhida asa mala; shemppo wodhidaades mernaa de7oy bayndayssa intte ereeta.
1John3:16 Yesus Kirstoosi ba shemppo nu gishshas aaththi immida gishshas siiqoy aazakko nu hessan eroos; nunikka nu shemppo nu ishata gishshas aaththi immanaas bessees.
1John3:17 Miishshi dizaadey oonikka ba ishay waayettishin be7idi izas mishettontta aggiko Xoossa siiqoy izan waani daanee?
1John3:18 Ta naytoo! Tumu oosonppe attiin coo doonaninne qaalan xalla siiqeteth ane aggoos.
1John3:19 Nuni tumu bagga gididayssa hayssan eroossinne nu wozinakka iza sinththan shempisoos.
1John3:20 Hessika nu wozinay nu bolla pirdiza miishshan ubbaan Xoossi nu wozina qofaappe bollara gidida gishshas izi ubbaa erees.
1John3:21 Ta ishatoo! Nu wozinay nu bolla pirdontta aggiko nuna Xoossa sinththan yashissana miishshi deenna.
1John3:22 Nuni azazota naagiza gishshassinne iza ufayssizaaz ooththiza gishshas nu iza woossizaaz wursi nu izappe ekkana.
1John3:23 Iza azazoykka nu iza Naaza Yesus Kirstoosa ammananassinne izi nuna azazida mala nuni nu giddon dosettana malassa.
1John3:24 Iza azazota naagizayti wuri izan deettes; izikka isttan dees; izi nunan dizayssa nu izi nuus immida Ayanan eroos.
1John4:1 Ta ishatoo! Ayana wursi ammanopite; gido attiin ayanati Xoossafekkonne paacci xeellite; gaasoykka daro wordo nabeti biitta bolla laalettida.
1John4:2 Intte Xoossa Ayana erana ogey
1John4:3 «Yesus Kirstoosi asa asho may7idi yides» gontta ayanay Xoossafe gidenna; kase izi yaana gishin intte siyida Kirstoosara eqettiza ayanay hessa; ha7ikka izi alame bolla dees.
1John4:4 Ta naytoo! Intte Xoossayta; Intte istta xoonideta; gaasoykka inttenan dizay alamen dizayssafe aadhdhees.
1John4:5 Istti alame baggako; hessa gishshas istti haasayzay wuri alameppe kezizayssa; alame asay istti gizayssa siyees.
1John4:6 Nuni gidikko Xoossa bagga; Xoos erizay nu gizayssa siyanashin Xoossa bagga gidonttaadey gidikko nu gizayssa siyenna. Tumu Ayananne wordo ayana nu shaakki erizay hayssanna.
1John4:7 Ta ishatoo! Siiqoy Xoossafe gidida gishshas nuni ane siiqettoos; as siiqiza asi wuri Xoossafe yelettidaadenne Xoos erizaade.
1John4:8 As siiqontta asi Xoos erenna; gaasoykka Xoossi siiqo.
1John4:9 Xoossay nu giddon ba siiqo qonccisiday nu iza baggara de7o demmana mala ba naa issineza haa duge ha alamezan yeddidayssana.
1John4:10 Nuni Xoos siiqibeekko shin izi nuna siiqides; nu nagaraa dhayssana mala ba naaza yeddides; siiqo guussika hessa.
1John4:11 Ta ishatoo! Xoossi nuna hayssaththo siiqikko nunikka nu giddon siiqettanaas bessees.
1John4:12 Xoos be7ida asi oonikka baa; nuni nu giddon siiqettizaa gidikko Xoossi nunan daana; iza siiqoykka nunan polettana.
1John4:13 Izi nuus ba Ayana immida gishshas nu izan dizayssanne izikka nunan dizayssa nu hessan eroos.
1John4:14 Aaway ba naaza hayssa ha alame asaa ashshanaas yeddidayssa nu be7idossinne iza gishshas markkattoos.
1John4:15 Yesusi Xoossa naa gididayssa ammanidi markkattiza ubbaan Xoossi deessinne izaadeyka Xoossan dees.
1John4:16 Hessa gishshas Xoossi nuna siiqiza siiqo nu eroos; nu iza siiqon ammanettoos; Xoossi siiqo; siiqon dizaadey Xoossan dees; Xoossika hessaaden dees.
1John4:17 Nuni hayssa biittaa bolla de7izay Kirstoosi de7ida mala gidida gishshas nuus pirda gallas baboy deenna; hessankka siiqoy nunan kumeth gidees.
1John4:18 Siiqo giddon baboy baa; tumu siiqoy gidikko babo kessi wora yeggees; baboy qixaatera issife oyketti dees; babbizaade siiqoy kumeth gidenna.
1John4:19 Izi kasetidi nuna siiqida gishshas nunikka iza siiqoos.
1John4:20 Oonikka Xoos siiqays gishe ba ishaa ixxiko hessaadey wordanchcha; ba ayfera be7iza ba ishaa siiqontta asi ba ayfen be7ontta Xoossaa siiqanaas dandayenna.
1John4:21 «Xoos siiqiza asi wurikka ba ishaa siiqanaas bessees» giza ha azazoza izi nuus immides.
1John5:1 Yesusi izi Kirstoosa gididayssa ammanizay wuri Xoossafe yelettides. Aawaa dosizay wuri naazakka izaththo dosees.
1John5:2 Nuni Xoos dosikkonne iza azazo naagikko nuni Xoossa nayta siiqizayssa hessan eroos.
1John5:3 Xoossa doso guussi iza azazo naago; iza azazoti deexo gidettenna.
1John5:4 Gaasoykka Xoossafe yelettiday wuri alame xoonees; alame xoonizaykka nu ammano.
1John5:5 Yesusi Xoossa naa gididayssa ammanizaadefe attiin alame xoonizay haray oonee?
1John5:6 Haaththaninne suuththan yiday hayssa Yesus Kirstoosa; izi haaththaninne suuththan yides attiin haaththan xalla yibeenna; hessaka iza gishshas markkattizay Ayana; he Ayanay tumu ayana.
1John5:7 Hessa gishshas izas heedzdzu markkati deettes.
1John5:8 Heytikka ayana
1John5:9 Nu asa markkateth ammanikko Xoossa markkateththi hessafe aadhdhees; hessika izi ba naaza gishshas immida Xoossa markkateththa.
1John5:10 Xoossa Naan ammaniza ubbaa wozinan iza gishshas markkateththi dees; Xoos ammanonttay wurikka Xoossi ba Naaza gishshas immida markkateththaa ammanontta gishshas iza wordosees.
1John5:11 Iza markkateththika Xoossi mernaa de7o nuus immides; he de7oykka iza Naazan dees gizayssa.
1John5:12 Naazi dizaades de7oy dees; Xoossa Nay bayndaades de7oy deenna.
1John5:13 Inttes Xoossa Naan ammanizaytas mernaa de7oy dizayssa intte erana mala ta hayssa inttes xaafays.
1John5:14 Nu Xoossa sinth shiiqanaas nuus diza xalateththi hayssa; nu ay miishshika iza shene mala woossiko izi nu woosaa siyana.
1John5:15 Nu iza woossiza miish izi ubbaa siyizayssa nu erizaa gidikko nu woossida miishshaa ubbaa ekkanayssa nu eroos.
1John5:16 Oonikka ba ishay bana hayqos gaththontta nagara ooththishin beyikko izas woosso; Xoossika hayqos gaththontta nagara ooththidaytas de7o immana; hayqos gaththiza nagaraykka dees; hayqos gaththiza nagara gishshas woosso giikke.
1John5:17 Makkallay wurikka nagara; hayqos gaththontta nagaraykka dees.
1John5:18 Xoossafe yelettiday wuri nagara ooththenna; gaasoykka Xoossa Nay iza naagizayssanne iitay iza bochchonttayssa nu eroos.
1John5:19 Nuni Xoossafe gididayssanne alamey kumeth iita asa kushen dizayssa nu eroos.
1John5:20 Xoossa Nay yidayssanne nuni tuma Xoossaa erana mala akeeka izi nuus immidayssa nu eroos; nunikka tumu gidida iza Naaza Yesus Kirstoosan doos; Izikka tumu Xoossanne mernaa de7o.
1John5:21 Naytoo! Inttenateththaa eeqatappe naagite.
2John1:1 Taappe cimazappe
2John1:2 Gaasoykka hayssi tumay ha7ikka nu giddon dizayssanne sinththafekka mernaas daanayssa.
2John1:3 Xoossaa Aawappenne iza Naa Yesus Kirstoosappe kiyateththi
2John1:4 Ne naytappe baggayti Aawappe nuus imettida azazoza mala tumaan minni dizayta ta be7ida gishshas daro ufayettadis.
2John1:5 Ha7ikka godatteyee! Kaseppeka dizaaro attiin ta nees hara ooraththa azazo xaafikke; hessika nuni nu giddon siiqettanayssa.
2John1:6 He siiqoykka nu iza azazoza mala daanayssa; azazozikka intte koyro siyida mala siiqon daanaassa.
2John1:7 Yesus Kirstoosi asa asho may7idi yibeenna giza ammanontta daro baleththizayti alame bolla laalettida; heyta malay ay asikka as baleththizaadenne Kirstoosara eqettizaade.
2John1:8 Intte gidikko intte daabura waagaappe mela attontta malanne kumeththa woyto ekkana mala intte hu7es naagettite.
2John1:9 Kirstoosa timirte mala dontta asinne iza timirtefe balettidi kare keziza asan oonankka Xoossi deenna; Kirstoosa timirten dizaadey gidikko izas Aawaynne Aawaa Nay deettes.
2John1:10 Oonikka intteko yishe hessa he timirteza ekki yontta as mokki ekkoftenne saroka goopite.
2John1:11 Mokki ekkidi baso gelththizaadey hessaade ooson izara issino gidees.
2John1:12 Ta inttes xaafanaas koyza daro miishshi deessishin waraqataninne qalamen xaafana mala koykke; gidikkoka nu ufayssay kumeth gidana mala ta intteko baada intte sinththan inttenara haasayanaas hidota ooththays.
2John1:13 Doorettida ne michchey nayti nena saro geettes.
3John1:1 Taappe cimazappe
3John1:2 Ta ishazoo! Ne shemppoy lo7on diza mala ne asateththay lo7o daana malanne ne ooththizaazi wurikka nees giiga gidana mala ta nees woossays.
3John1:3 Neni tumaas ammanettidaade gidida mala qasseka ne hanoy wuri tumu gididayssa issi issi ammaniza asati taakko yiidi ne gishshas yootiin siyada ta daro ufayettadis.
3John1:4 Gaasoykka ta nayti lo7oninne tuman simerettishin sissafe aadhdhiza hara ufayssi taas deenna.
3John1:5 Ta ishazoo! Istti nees imath gidikkoka neni ne ishatas ooththida miishshe ubbaan ammanettadasa.
3John1:6 Ne bolla ay mala siiqoy dizaakko istti ne gishshas Woosa Keeththa asaa sinththan markkattida; istti biza ogen Xoos ufayssiza hanon ne istta maaddiko lo7o ooththaasa.
3John1:7 Ays giikko istti Xoossaa ammanonttaytappe aykkoka ekkontta Kirstoosa sunththaa gishshas mela kezida.
3John1:8 Hessa gishshas nu issife tumaas ooththana mala heytantta malata mokki ekkanaas bessees.
3John1:9 Tani Woosa keeththas hayssafe kase xaafadis; gido attiin kaaleththizaade gidana koyza Diyoxiraxoosi nuni gizaaz ekkenna.
3John1:10 Hessa gishshas ta hee biikko izi ba iita qaalaan nu sunth mooranaas ooththidayssa ta inttes qonccisana; hessika izas gidontta ixxiin ammaniza asaa mokki ekkenna; mokki ekkana koyzaytakka diggeessinne Woosa Keeththafe kessi gooddees.
3John1:11 Ta ishazoo! Lo7ota misata attiin iita asata misatoppa; lo7o ooththizaadey wurikka Xoossa asa; iita ooththizaadey gidikko Xoos beyibeenna.
3John1:12 Dimexiroosas asi wuri lo7o markkattees; tumaykka izas markkattawus; nunikka izas markkattoos; intteka nu markkay tumu gididayssa ereeta.
3John1:13 Ta nees xaafana buro daro yo7oy dees shin waraqatan xaafanaas koykke.
3John1:14 Ta nena mata wode beyanaas hidota ooththays; he wode nu issife utti haasayana.
3John1:15 Ane saron da; ne laggeti nena saro saro geettes; ta laggeta sunththan sunththan xeygada saro ga.
Jude1:1 Yesus Kirstoosas ooththiza Yaaqoobe isha Yuhudappe
Jude1:2 maaroteththi
Jude1:3 Ta siiqotoo! Nu issife attida atoteththaa gishshas ta inttes xaafanaas daro koyadisishin ha7i qasse nam7anththontta issito Xoossi asas immida ammano gishshas intte daro baaxetana mala ta inttena zorays. Ta inttes xaafanaas taas tooho gidides.
Jude1:4 Istta bolla pirdettanayssi daro wodeppe kase istta gishshas xaafettida asati intteko kalxi gelida; heytantti Xoos eronttayta; nu Godaa kiyateththaa coo mela laammizaytanne Xoossaa goynnonttayta. Izi barkka nuna haarizayssanne nuus Godaa gidida Yesus Kirstoosakka kaddeettes.
Jude1:5 Intte hessa ubbaaka kaseti erikkoka Goday ba dereza Gibxeppe kessidi ashshidayssanne hankko ammanonttayta guyeppe dhayssidayssa ta inttena akeekissana koyays.
Jude1:6 Hessaththoka ba bonchcho naagontta ixxidi ba dizaso yeddida kiitanchchata intte yuushshi qopite; Xoossi istta gita pirdaa gallas gakkanaas mernaa qashos girdi gida dhuman naagi woththides.
Jude1:7 Hessaththoka Sodoomeynne Gamooray qasseka istta heeran diza katamatikka laymatidanne salo medheteththatara laymatanaas amottida; hessa gishshas istti mernaa taman xuugetanaytas leemiso gidida.
Jude1:8 Hessaththoka he asati barkka ba agumo kaallidi barkka ba asho tuniseettes; baappe bollara dizaytas azazettettenna; istti salon bonchchora dizaytakka cayeettes.
Jude1:9 Haray attoshin salo kiitanchchata halaqay Mikaaley Muse asho gishshas izara palamettishe
Jude1:10 Hayti asati gidikko isttas erettontta ixxida miish ubbaa cash cayeettes; aykkoka erontta meheta mala coo mela qoppi ekkida miishshi isttas diikko istti hessan dhayana.
Jude1:11 Istti Qayeele ogen bida gishshas miishshas giidi Bala7aame mala balan kundida; qasse Qoorey eqettida mala isttika eqettidi dhayda gishshas isttas aayye ana!
Jude1:12 Hayti ha asati yeellay baynda layma hanora issi bolla intte diggisason beettiza wode inttes dhuphe gideettes; istti baas xalla qoppeettes; istti carkon biza iray baynda shaara mala; ayfey ayfiza woden ayfey baynda xaphoppe dhoqallettidi nam7uto melida miththa mala.
Jude1:13 Istti yeellachchiza ba oosoza wolqqama abba dambala mala goppontto coppu histtizayta; girdi gida dhumay istta mernaas naagizayssanne coo mela waayettiza xoolintteta malakko!
Jude1:14 Addaameppe haa simmiin laappunththo yeleta gidida Heenookey
Jude1:15 Heyti Xoossas goynnontta asati ooththida iita ooso gaason istta izi qaxxayana; addafekka Xoossi heyta baas goynnontta nagaranchchata bolla istti haasayda iita miishshata gishshas izi istta bolla pirdana» gides.
Jude1:16 Heyti he asati ubba wode zuuzumettizaytanne ay miishshankka ufayetti eronttayta; istti ba iita amo kaallizayta; istta doonan otoreteththa qaalay kumides; baas ba go7a koyishe as aadasheettes.
Jude1:17 Intteno ta siiqotoo! Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa Hawaareti hayssafe kase yootida qaalaa akeekite.
Jude1:18 Istti
Jude1:19 Heyti as issaa issaafe shaakkizayta; asho amoteth kaallizaytanne isttan Xillo Ayanay bayndayta.
Jude1:20 Ta ishatoo! Intte gidikko ubbaafe bollara intte geeshsha ammanon minni eqqite; Xillo Ayanankka minni woossite.
Jude1:21 Nu Godaa Yesus Kirstoosi ba maaroteththan inttena mernaa de7on gaththanayssa naagettishe inttenateththaa Xoossaa siiqon naagite.
Jude1:22 Sidhishe diza asatas mishettite.
Jude1:23 Issi issi asata tamappe kessi ekki ashshite; haratas yashshateththan mishettite shin nagaran tunida istta asateth bochchida may7oka ubbaa ixxite.
Jude1:24 Inttena kundeththafe ashshanaassinne inttena wosoy bayndayta histtidi ufayssan ba bonchcho sinth shiishshanaas dandayzayssas
Jude1:25 izi xalla nuus Xoossanne dhale gidida Godaa Yesus Kirstoosa baggara benippe doommidi ha7i gakkanaassinne mernaaskka bonchchoynne gitateththi
Revelation1:1 Hayssi ajjuutazi mata wode biitta bolla hananayssa baas ooththizayta bessana mala Xoossi Yesus Kirstoosas immidayssa. Yesus Kirstoosikka ba kiitanchcha kiittidi ba oosanchchaza Yohannisas hayssa ajjuutaza qonccisides.
Revelation1:2 Yohannisikka Xoossa qaalaa gishshassinne Yesus Kirstoosi tamaarsida tumaa gishshas qasseka izi ba ayfen be7idayssaka ubbaa markkattides.
Revelation1:3 Hayssi wurikka hananay mata woden gidida gishshas hayssa tinbite qaalaa nababiza asi anjjettidaade. Hessaththoka tinbite qaalaa siyizaytinne ha tinbite qaalaa xaafettidayssa poli ooththizayti istti anjjettidayta.
Revelation1:4 Iisiyan diza laappun Woosa Keeththatas kasekka dizayssafe
Revelation1:5 
Revelation1:6 Nuni Yesus Kirstoosa aawaa Xoossaas ooththana mala nuna izi kawotanne qeeseta kessida Yesus Kirstoosas bonchchoynne wolqqay mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas izas gido! Amiin.
Revelation1:7 Hekko izi saloppe shaarara gita bonchchora yaana; kase iza caddi wodhidaytikka issoyka attontta wuri iza beyana; biitta bolla diza dereykka wuri iza gishshas yeekkana. Hayssi ha yo7ozi tumukko! Amiin.
Revelation1:8 Kasekka
Revelation1:9 Tani Yesusa waayeza iza kawoteththaa qasseka iza dandayan inttenara issife gidida ta intte ishay Yohannisi Xoossa qaalaninne Yesusas markkattida gishshas qashettada Fiiximo geetettiza abba giddon diza dere daarin days.
Revelation1:10 Tani Godaa gallas Xillo Ayanan dhisko mala coo liphiphi gishin dinke giirissa malay gita giirissi taappe guyera
Revelation1:11 «Neni be7izayssa waraqatan xaafada laappun Woosa Keeththatas heytikka Efesoones
Revelation1:12 Hessa taas ooni yootidaakko erana gaada ta guye simma xeelliza wode xomppe istta bolla woththiza worqqafe oosettida laappun ballata beyadis.
Revelation1:13 He istta bolla xomppe woththiza laappun ballata giddon asa naa misatizaade demmadis. Izikka hirki toho qirphe gakkiza adussa may7o may7ides; tira bollaka worqqa may7o may7ides.
Revelation1:14 Iza hu7eynne iza hu7e binanay qasse booththa shach misatiza booththa suufe geetettiza kaththa mala; iza ayfetikka tama laco misateettes.
Revelation1:15 Iza tohoti tama bonqon qoxetti kezida xarqimala misateettes; iza qaalaykka wolqqama piissa haaththa giirissa mala giirees.
Revelation1:16 Izi ba ushachcha kushen laappun xoolintteta oykki uttides; iza doonappe nam7u baggara qara mashshay kezees; iza ayfesoy arshe mala xolqettees.
Revelation1:17 Tani hessa beyada hayqqida as misatada iza toho garsan kundadis; izi qasse ta bolla ba ushachcha kushe woththidi
Revelation1:18 Tani paxa days. Kase hayqqadiskoshin hekko tani hayssafe mernaas paxa daana; hayqo bollanne Si7oole bolla tani Godaa.
Revelation1:19 Hessa gishshas neni be7idayssa ha7i dizayssanne guyeppe hananayssa xaafa.
Revelation1:20 Neni ta ushachcha kushen be7ida laappun xoolinttetanne xomppe istta bolla woththiza worqqafe oosettida laappun ballata xuuray hekko hayssa; laappun xoolintteti laappun Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchata; xomppe istta bolla woththiza laappun worqqa ballati laappun Woosa Keeththata» gides.
Revelation2:1 «Efesoone Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation2:2 Tani ne oosoza
Revelation2:3 Neni dandayan minna eqqidayssanne ta sunththaa gishshas salettontta ne waaye be7idayssa ta erays.
Revelation2:4 Gidikkoka ta nena kadhiza issi miishshi dees; hessika neni kase ne siiqoza aggadasa.
Revelation2:5 Neni kase ay mala dhoqqasohon dashe ha7i qasse ne waana kundidaakko ane yuushsha qoppada maaroteththan simma gela. Ne kase ooththiza beni ne oosoza zaara ooththa; ne hessa wursa zaara ooththontta ixxiko ta neekko yaana; neni maaroteththan gelontta ixxiko neni xomppe iza bolla woththiza ballaa izi dizasoppe ta denththaychchana.
Revelation2:6 Gido attiin ta nena galatiza issi miishshi dees; hessika tani ixxiza Niqola bagga asaa ooso nekka ixxadasa.
Revelation2:7 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizay wurikka siyo! ‹Xoonidaadey Xoossa Gannate giddon diza de7o miththa ayfe maana mala ta ooththana.›
Revelation2:8 «Samerneese Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation2:9 Tani ne waayezanne ne manqoteththaa erays; gidikkoka neni durekko. Ayhuda gidontta dishe bana nuni Ayhudakko giza Xala7e maabara gididayti heyti ne sunth mooroyssa ta erays.
Revelation2:10 Buro sinththafe ne bolla gakkana metos babbofa; intte paacettana mala inttefe issi issi asata daabulosi qasho keeth gelththana. Tammu gallas gakkanaas intte waaye beyanashin ne hayqqana gakkanaas ammanettidaade gida; tani nees mernaa de7o akilile histta immana.
Revelation2:11 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizay siyo! xoonidaadey nam7anththo hayqon qohettenna» gaada xaafa gides.
Revelation2:12 Phergamoone Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation2:13 Neni Xala7e algay dizason dizayssa tani erays; gido attiin neni ta sunththaa lo7eththa oykkadasa; ne tana ammanizayssa aggabeekka; taas ammanettida markka gidida Antiphaasi Xala7ey diza intte kataman asa kushen hayqqida wodekka ne tana ammano aggabeekka.
Revelation2:14 Gidikkoka ta nena kadhiza issi miishshi ne bolla dees; hessika Bala7aame timirte oykkida issi issi asati intte giddon deettes; hessi Bala7aamey Isra7eele asay eeqas yarshettida kath miidinne layma laymatidi dhuphettana mala Baalaaqe zoridaade.
Revelation2:15 Hessaththoka Niqola bagga asata timirte oykkida asatikka intte giddon deettes.
Revelation2:16 Hessa gishshas maaroteththan gela; akkay giikko tani eeson neekko baada nena ta doonappe keziza mashsha misatiza qaalara olana.
Revelation2:17 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizaadey siyo! Xoonidaades tani qotan diza mannafe iza immana; izi taas gididayssa bessanaas iza bolla ooraththa sunththi xaafettida booththa shuch izas ta immana; hessaka ekkidaadefe attiin hara asi oonikka erenna.
Revelation2:18 «Tiyaxiroone Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas: hayssi tama laco misatiza ayfeti dizaadefenne bonqqida taman geli qoxetti kezida xarqimala misatiza tohoti dizaadefe Xoossa naappe kiitettidayssa.
Revelation2:19 Tani ne oosonne ne siiqo
Revelation2:20 Gido attiin ta nena kadhiza issi miishshi dees; hessika bana
Revelation2:21 Iza maaroteththan gelana mala ta izis wode immadisishin iza gidikko ba laymateththaafe simmanaas koyabeekku.
Revelation2:22 Hessa gishshas ta izo waaye alga bolla yeggana; izira ooththida asati ba iita oosoppe maaroteththan simmontta ixxiko izira issife laymatida ubbata bolla gita meto ta ehana.
Revelation2:23 Tani izi nayta hayqon qaxxayana; asa qofanne asa amo shaakka erizay tana gididayssa woosa keeththati wuri erana; tani inttes issaas issaas izaade ooso mala immana.
Revelation2:24 «Tiyaxiroonen dizaytas inttessinne hayssa iita timirteza tamaaronttaytas ubbaas hessaththoka issi issi
Revelation2:25 Gidikkoka ta hee baana gakkanaas inttes dizaaz wursi minththi oykkite.
Revelation2:26 Xoonidaadessinne ta ooson wurseth gakkanaas minnizaades Ayzaabeta bolla ta godateth immana.
Revelation2:27 Istta izi birata guufen haarana; urqqafe medhettida miishsha mala izi istta bukki liiqisana. Hessi he godateththika tani ta Aawappe ekkida godateththaa mala.
Revelation2:28 Ta izas wontta bolla keziza xoolintteza immana.
Revelation2:29 Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizay wuri siyo!» gaada xaafa gides.
Revelation3:1 Sardeese Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation3:2 Beegga! Hayqqana matidaaronne nees wurashe guuth attida wolqqayo zaara minththa; tani ta Godaa sinththan ne oosoy kumeth gidiin beyabeekke.
Revelation3:3 Hessa gishshas neni ay mala timirte ekkidaakko ne siyoyssa yuushsha qoppanne naaga. Maaroteththanka gela; neni beeggontta aggiko ta kayso mala ne qoppontta puttu gaana; ta ay saaten neekko yaanaakko ne erakka.
Revelation3:4 Gido attiin ba may7o tunisonttayti Sardeesen guuththa asati nenara deettes; heyti booththa may7o may7anayssi isttas bessiza gishshas istti booththa may7o may7idi tanara baana.
Revelation3:5 Xoonidaadey isttaththoka booththa may7o may7ana; izaade sunth tani ta Aawaa sinththaninne kiitanchchata sinththan erisana. De7on dizayta sunththi xaafettida de7o mazgabaappe quccike.
Revelation3:6 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizay wuri siyo!
Revelation3:7 «Filadelfiya Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation3:8 Tani ne ooso erays; hekko oonikka gordanaas dandayontta doya penge ta ne sinththan woththadis; ne wolqqay guuth gididayssa ta erays; gidikkoka ne ta qaalaa naagadasa; ta sunththaaka ne kaddabeekka.
Revelation3:9 Hessa gishshas baas Ayhuda gidontta dishe bana Ayhuda gizayti heyti Xala7e maabarappe gidida wordoti yiidi ne toho bolla kundana mala ta ooththana; tani nena siiqidayssa istti erana mala ta ooththana.
Revelation3:10 Neni dandayzaade gida gaada ta nees yootoo qaalaa ne naagida gishshas takka buro biitta bolla diza asaa paaccanaas kumeththa alame bolla yaana waaye gallassafe ta nena naagana.
Revelation3:11 Hekko ta eeson yaana; ne akilile oonikka ekkontta mala nees dizaaz lo7eththa oykka.
Revelation3:12 Xoonidaade tani ta Godaa Xoossaa Keeththan tuus ooththana; izi heeppe mulekka kezenna. Ta Godaa sunththinne ta Godaa katamaza sunththika ta iza bolla xaafana. Hanna katamaya saloppe ta Godaa achchafe wodhdhana ooraththa Yerusalaame; tanikka ta ooraththa sunththaa izaade bolla xaafana.
Revelation3:13 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas yootizayssa hayth dizay wuri siyo!
Revelation3:14 «Lodoqiya Woosa Keeththa kiitanchchaas
Revelation3:15 Tani ne ooso erays; neni irxxa woykko misha gidakka; neni irxxa woykko misha gididaakko lo7okkoshin.
Revelation3:16 Irxxa woykko misha gidontta ne coo donbola gidida gishshas ta nena ta doonappe kessa cuttana gays.
Revelation3:17 ‹Tani durekko; taas daro haaroy dees; taas aykkoyka paccibeenna› gaasa shin neni gilqa; aykkoy baynda hiyeesa; manqo; qooqenne kallo dizaade gididayssa erabeekka.
Revelation3:18 Dure gidana ne koykko taappe taman paacettida worqqa shammana mala neni ne kalloteththaa yeellateth kammanaas booththa may7o may7ana malanne xeellanaaska dandayana mala ayfe dhale shammada ne tiyettana mala ta nena zorays.
Revelation3:19 Tani ta dosizayta wursa hanqayssinne qaxxayays; hessa gishshas neni minna; maaroteththanka gela.
Revelation3:20 Hekko! Tani pengen eqqada xeygays; oonikka ta qaalaa siyidi ba pengeza taas doykko ta izakko gelada izaadera maana; izaadeyka tanara maana.
Revelation3:21 Tani xoonada ta Aawara iza algan uttidayssaththo xoonidaadey tanara issife ta algan uttana mala ooththana.
Revelation3:22 «Ayanay Woosa Keeththatas gizayssa hayththi dizay wuri siyo!» gaada xaafa gides.
Revelation4:1 Hessafe guye tani salon doya diza penge beyadis; tani koyro siyiday dinke giirissa mala giirissi
Revelation4:2 Tani heerakka Ayanan liphiphi gaada salon diza alga beyadis; he algaza bollaka issaadey uttides.
Revelation4:3 He algaa bolla uttidayssa medhay iyasphidenne sardiyoone inqqu misatiza algaza yuuyi aadhdhidi Margide geetettiza inqqu misatiza zuullay dees.
Revelation4:4 Hessaththoka he algaza yuuyi aadhdhida nam7u tammanne oyddu algati deettes; he algata bolla qasse booththa may7o may7idi ba hu7e bolla worqqa akilile woththida nam7u tammanne oyddu cimati uttida.
Revelation4:5 He algaafe wolqqanththinne daada giirissi kezees; he algaa sinththan poo7iza laappun xomppeti deettes; heytikka Xoossa Ayana laappunata.
Revelation4:6 He algaa sinththan geesh milixi gida xolqiza mastoote misatiza abbay dees; iza giddon algaa yuushon daro ayfera diza oyddu do7ati deettes.
Revelation4:7 Koyro do7azi gaammo misatees; nam7anththozi boora misatees; heedzdzanththoza ayfesoy asa ayfeso misatees; oydanththozi piradhdhiza golle kafo misatees.
Revelation4:8 He oyddu do7ati issoy issoy usuppun qefera deettes; qefeta yuushoninne qefeta giddon ayfey kumides; istti qammanne gallas
Revelation4:9 «He do7ati algaa bolla uttidayssassinne mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas dizayssas gitateth
Revelation4:10 nam7u tammanne oyddu cimati mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas diza ba algaa bolla uttidayssa sinththan gufannidi izas goynneettes; ba akililetakka he algaza sinththan woththidi
Revelation4:11 «Nu Godaa Xoossoo! Neni ubbaa medhdhida gishshas medheteththi wurikka medhettidaynne shemppora dizay ne shenen gidida gishshas gitateththi
Revelation5:1 He algaa bolla uttidayssa ushachcha kushe qaa7a garsaninne bolla baggara xaafetti uttida laappun maatamen gordettida issi xaaxetti uttida maxaafa beyadis.
Revelation5:2 Issi mino kiitanchcha dayssi gita qaalara
Revelation5:3 Gido attiin salonkka gidiin woykko sa7a bolla woykko biittafe garsa baggankka he xaaththa maxaafaa doydi iza giddon dizayssa xeellanaas dandayda asi oonikka beettibeenna.
Revelation5:4 Tanikka he xaaththa maxaafaa birshidi iza giddo xeellanaas bessizaadey beettontta aggida gishshas keeha yeekkadis.
Revelation5:5 He wode cimatappe issaadey taas
Revelation5:6 Hessafe guye algaa bollan oyddu do7ata giddon cimata giddonkka shukettida dors misatizayssi eqqidayssa ta beyadis; he dorsazas laappun kaceynne laappun ayfey dees; he ayfetikka kumeththa alame kiitettida Xoossa Ayana laappunata.
Revelation5:7 He dorsay yiidi algaa bolla uttidayssafe
Revelation5:8 Xaaththa maxaafaza ekkida mala oyddu do7atinne nam7u tammanne oyddu cimati he dorsaa sinththan ba liiphen gufannida. Isttika issoy issoy ba kushen diith misatiza miish oykkida; hessaththoka geeshshata woosa gidida exaaney izan kumida worqqa xaaro ba kushen oykki deettes.
Revelation5:9 Ooraththa mazamure hizgi yexxida; «Neni as dumma dumma kochchafe
Revelation5:10 Ne istta nu Godaa Xoossaas kawotanne qeeseta histtadasa; isttika biitta bolla kawotana.»
Revelation5:11 Tani gede zaara xeellashe he algaza
Revelation5:12 Istti daro gita qaalan
Revelation5:13 Salonkka sa7a bollaka
Revelation5:14 Oyddu do7atikka
Revelation6:1 Hessafe guye he dorsay laappun maatametappe koyro maatameza doyshin ta beyadis; he oyddu do7atappe issoy dada gugunththa mala qaalara
Revelation6:2 Qasseka booththa para beyadis; he paraza bolla ba kushen wondafe oykkidaadey dees; izas akilileykka imettides; izikka xoonizaade gididi xooni xooni baanaas kezides.
Revelation6:3 He dorsay nam7anththo maatameza doyda mala nam7anththo do7azi
Revelation6:4 Qasseka hara xeeqa zo7o paray kezides; he paraa toggidaadey biitta bollafe saroteth dhayssana malanne asay ba garsan issoy issaa wursana mala oosisanaas izas godateththinne gita mashshay imettides.
Revelation6:5 Dorsazi heedzdzanththo maatameza doyiin heedzdzanththo do7azi
Revelation6:6 Oyddu do7ata giddofe yidaa misatiza qaala siyadis; he giirissayka
Revelation6:7 He dorsay oydanththo maatameza doyiin oydanththo do7aza qaalay
Revelation6:8 Qasseka Cololo para beyadis; paraa toggidayssa sunththi hayqo geetettees; iza qasse duufoy kaallees; hayqoynne Duufoy biittafe sayso olan
Revelation6:9 Ichchashanththo maatameza izi doyiin Xoossa qaalaa gishshassinne ba markkattida markkateththaa gishshas hayqqidayta shemppota yarsho yarshizasoza garsan beyadis.
Revelation6:10 Istti dhoqqa qaalan
Revelation6:11 Isttas issaas issaas booththa may7oy imettides; istta malatikka buro hayqqana; istta mala oosanchcha gidida istta laggetinne istta ishata qooday kumana gakkanaas istti guuththa wodes shempi takkana mala isttas yootettides.
Revelation6:12 Hessafe guye he dorsay usuppunththo maatameza doyiin tani izakko xeelladis; hekko biittay wolqqama qaath qaaxxides; arshey asi kayos may7iza kareththa may7o mala karexxides; aginaykka kumeththara suuththa mala zo7adus.
Revelation6:13 Wolqqama assura carkoy carkidi miththa ayfe qoqofiza mala saloppe xoolinttey qoqofettides.
Revelation6:14 Saloykka waraqata mala xaaxetti kichchides; zumatinne abba giddon diza gadeti wurikka ba dizasoppe dhayda.
Revelation6:15 Biitta bolla diza kawoti biitta haarizayti
Revelation6:16 Zumatanne zaallatakka
Revelation6:17 Wolqqama hanqo gallassay gakkides; iza oonee dandayanay?» gida.
Revelation7:1 Hessafe guye oyddu kiitanchchata biitta bolla oyddu baggara eqqidayta beyadis; isttika biitta bolla gidiin woykko abba bolla woykko miththa bolla ay carkoyka carkontta mala oyddu baggara yiza bosha carko wursi oykkida.
Revelation7:2 De7o Xoossaa maatame oykkida hara kiitanchchay arshey mokkiza baggara haa yishin ta beyadis; biittanne abba qohanaas isttas godateththi imettida oyddu kiitanchchati ba qaalaa dhoqqu histtidi
Revelation7:3 «Nuni nu Godaa oosanchchata liiphe bolla maatame woththana gakkanaas biitta bolla gidiin woykko abba giddon dizayta gidiin woykko Miththata gidiinkka heytantta qohopite» gi waassides.
Revelation7:4 Tanikka maatamey istta bolla wodhdhidayta qoodaa siyadis; Isra7eele asaa kochcha ubbaafe maatamey istta bolla shocettidayta qooday xeetanne oyddu tammanne oyddu shii asa.
Revelation7:5 Yuhuda qommofe tammanne nam7u shii
Revelation7:6 Aaseere qommofe tammanne nam7u shii
Revelation7:7 Simoona qommofe tammanne nam7u shii
Revelation7:8 Zaabiloone qommofe tammanne nam7u shii
Revelation7:9 Hessafe guye ta xeellishin qooday baynda daro derey dizayssa beyadis; heytanttika dereppe
Revelation7:10 Qaala dhoqqu histtidi
Revelation7:11 Iza kiitanchchati wurikka iza algaas
Revelation7:12 «Amiin! Sabay
Revelation7:13 Cimata giddofe issaadey taakko simmidi tana
Revelation7:14 Tanikka
Revelation7:15 Hessa gishshas Xoossa algaa sinththan de7idi qammanne gallas iza keeththan izas ooththeettes; algaa bolla uttidayssi ba bonchchora beettidi isttas kuwaso gidana.
Revelation7:16 Hayssafe guye istti gafettenna; saamottettenna; arshe seelaykka istta bochchennanne hombeyka istta hombenna.
Revelation7:17 Algazas giddo addan uttida dorsay istta heemmizaade gidana; isttaka gede de7o haaththa pulttoy dizaso kaaleththana; Xoossi istta ayfeppe afunththaa quccana» gides.
Revelation8:1 Dorsay laappunththo maatameza doyiin bagga saate gidizayssa keena saloy co7u gides.
Revelation8:2 Xoossa sinththan eqqiza laappun kiitanchchata tani beyadis; he asataskka laappun dinkey imettides.
Revelation8:3 Exaane izan cuwasiza worqqafe oosettidayssa oykkida kiitanchchay yiidi yarsho izan yarshizasoza achchan eqqides. Algaa sinththan diza worqqafe oosettida yarsho iza bolla yarshizayssa bolla geeshshata woosara issife shiishshiza daro exaaney izas imettides.
Revelation8:4 He exaaneza cuway Xoossas dummatida asata woosas he kiitanchchaza kusheppe pude Xoossa sinth kezides.
Revelation8:5 Hessafe guye kiitanchchazi exaane izan cuwasizayssa oykkidi yarsho yarshizasozappe tama ekki izan kunththidi duge biitta bolla yeggides; daday dadattides; giirissi giirides; wolqqanththi wolqqamides; biittayka qaaxxides.
Revelation8:6 Laappun zaye oykkida laappun kiitanchchati ba zaye punnanaas giigettida.
Revelation8:7 Koyro kiitanchchazi ba zayeza punnides; shachchinne suuththi walakettida tamay medhettidi duge biitta bolla yegettides; biittafe cigoy xuugettides; miththafekka cigoy xuugettides; cilila maataykka wuri xuugettides.
Revelation8:8 Nam7anththo kiitanchchayka ba zayeza punnides; issi gita zuma misatiza miishshi eexxishe duge abba giddo yegettides; abbaas cigoy suuth gidides.
Revelation8:9 Abbaa giddon shemppora diza medheteththaafe cigoy wuri hayqqides; markabetappeka cigoy kumeth dhaydes.
Revelation8:10 Heedzdzanththo kiitanchchazi ba zayeza punnides; xomppe mala eexxiza issi gita xoolinttey saloppe duge kundides; izi kundiday shaafata cigo bollanne haaththa pulttota cigo bolla.
Revelation8:11 He xoolintteza sunththay camo geetettees; haaththaas cigoy camo gidides; he camo haaththaa gaason daro derey hayqqides.
Revelation8:12 Oydanththo kiitanchchay ba zayeza punnides; arshes cigoy
Revelation8:13 Ta qasse zaara xeellishin issi golley salo bolla piradhdhishe gita qaalan
Revelation9:1 Ichchashanththo kiitanchchay ba zayeza punnides; ta qasse saloppe kase duge biitta bolla kundida xoolintteza beyadis; izas qasse ciimma olla doyza qulpey imettides.
Revelation9:2 Izikka he ciimma ollaza doydes; he ciimma ollaafe wolqqama tama cuwa mala cuway kezides; he ollaafe kezida cuwaza gaason arsheynne saloy dhumides.
Revelation9:3 He cuwaappe biitta bolla booley kezides; biitta bolla diza masimasotas diza wolqqaa mala wolqqay isttas imettides.
Revelation9:4 Biitta bolla diza maata gidiin woykko ay miishshika hara cilila miish montta mala woykko ay miththika qohontta mala isttas yootettides; istti qohana bessizay qasse liiphe bolla Xoossa maatamey baynda asata xalla gidanaassa.
Revelation9:5 Isttaka ichchashu agina gakkanaas waaye xalla waayisana attiin wodho wodhana mala piqaadey isttas imettibeenna; he booleti asa bolla gaththiza waayezi masimasoy as dukkiko as seelliza seela mala.
Revelation9:6 He gallassatan asay hayqqana koyana shin hayqo demmettenna; hayqqanaas amottana shin hayqoy isttafe baqatana.
Revelation9:7 Booleti qasse olas giigettida parata misateettes; isttas hu7e bolla worqqa akilile misatiza miishshi dees; istta ayfesoy asa ayfeso misatees.
Revelation9:8 Istta hu7e iskey maccassa hu7e iske misatees; istta achchey qasse gaammo ach misatees.
Revelation9:9 Biratappe oosettida xurure geetettiza may7o mala tira bolla may7iza may7oy isttas dees; istta qefey giiriza giirissay olas togettiza daro paranne para-gaareta giirissa mala giirees.
Revelation9:10 Isttas masimaso goyna malaynne dukkizasoy dees; isttas goyna giddon ichchashu agina gakkanaas as qohiza wolqqay dees.
Revelation9:11 Kawoykka isttas dees; he izikka ciimma olla kiitanchchaza; iza sunththayka Ibraaweta qaalara
Revelation9:12 Koyro hirgiso waasoy aadhdhides; hessafe qasse hara nam7u waasoy buro yaana.
Revelation9:13 Usuppunththo kiitanchchayka ba zayeza punnides. Hekko! Xoossa sinththan diza worqqafe oosettida yarsho yarshizasozan diza kaceta giddofe giiris siyadis.
Revelation9:14 He giirissayka dinke oykkida usuppunththa kiitanchchazaththo
Revelation9:15 Hayssa ha saatezassinne ha gallassaas
Revelation9:16 He paran oliza asata corateththay xeetatan qoodettiza miloone gididayssa tani siyadis.
Revelation9:17 Paratinne he parata toggida asata tani ajjuutan be7idayti hayssafe kaallizayssa malakko! Isttas tira bolla diza xururezi tama bonqo mala zo7o; salo mala kareththinne galal7o misatees. Parata hu7ey gaammo hu7e misatees; istta doonappe tamaynne cuway diine geetettiza miishshi kezees.
Revelation9:18 Istti ba doonappe kessida tamay cuwaynne diiney ha heedzdzu boshatan asa zereththafe cigoy hayqqides.
Revelation9:19 He parata wolqqay isttas doona giddoninne goyna bolla dees; istta goynay shoosh misatees; izas shooshsha hu7eykka dees; istti ase hessan qoheettes.

Revelation11:3 Ta markka nam7ati kayo may7o may7idi 1

Revelation11:5 Oonikka istta qohanaas koykko istta doonappe tamay kezidi istta morkketa xuuggana; istta qohana koyzaadenti wuri hayqqanay hessa malankko.
Revelation11:6 Istti tinbite yootiza he gallassatan iray bukkontta mala salo gordanaas maatay isttas dees. Hessaththoka haaththata suuththan laammanaas koykkoka hara ay mala boshankka biitta shocanaas wolqqay isttas dees.

Revelation12:1 Hessafe guye gita malalisiza malatay salo bolla beettides; issi maccassaya arshe may7ada

Revelation12:4 Izi ba goynara salo xoolinttetappe cigo gidizayta saloppe duge biittan yeggides; he maccassaya yelishin iza yeliza naaza mittanaas qoppidi dawezi he yelanaas matida maccassays sinththan eqqides.
