Revelation12:12 Hessa gishshas salotinne istta giddon dizayti intte wurikka ufayettite; izas guuththa wodey attidayssa erida gishshas daabulosi gita hanqora duge intteko wodhdhida gishshas biittassinne abbas Aayye ana! Aayye ana!»
Revelation12:13 Dawezi duge biitta bolla yegettidayssa be7idi attuma naa yelida maccassayo goodereththides.
Revelation12:14 Maccassayakka baas giigetti dizaso piradhdhada duge bazzo baana mala izis gita golle qefe misatiza nam7u qefeti imettida; iza heen daweza sinththafe haakkada heedzdzu layththinne bagga gakkanaas lo7o bonchchon naagettadus.

Revelation13:1 Hessafe guye issi do7ay abbafe kezishin beyadis; izas tammu kaceynne laappun hu7ey dees; kaceta bolla tammu zawudeti deettes; hu7eta bolla cashsha sunththati deettes.
Revelation13:2 Ta be7ida do7azi maahe misatees; iza tohoy do7a zardo toho misatees; iza doonay qasse gaammo doona misatees; dawezi ba wolqqaa
Revelation13:3 He do7aza hu7etappe issaa bolla wodhiza madunththi dizayssa ta beyadis shin iza hayqos gaththiza madunththazi paxides; kumeththa alamey malalettidi he do7aza kaallides.
Revelation13:4 He do7azas godateththi imettida gishshas asay wurikka he dawezas goynnides. «Hayssa do7aza misatizay oonee? Izara olettanaas dandayzay oonee?» gishe izas goynnides.
Revelation13:5 Izas otoreteththinne cashsha qaala haasayza doonay imettides; izi oyddu tammanne nam7u agina gakkanaas godateththan ooththana mala izas imettides.

Revelation13:7 Izi geeshshata olana malanne xoonana mala izas godateththi imettides; dumma dumma qommotanne zarkketa

Revelation13:9 Hayththi dizay siyo!
Revelation13:10 «Di7ettanaas dizaadey di7ettana; mashshan hayqqanaas dizaadey mashshan hayqqana;» hessa gidida gishshas ammanizayta dandayaynne istta ammaneteth koshshizay hannina.
Revelation13:11 Qasseka hara do7ay biittafe kezishin beyadis; izas dorsa kace mala nam7u kacey dees; izi daweththo haasayees.
Revelation13:12 Izi kase koyro do7aza olla gelidi he kaseyssa godateththan ooththees. Biittayanne biittay bolla dizayti wurikka kase koyro do7azas goynnana mala ooththides; he do7azi qasse kase iza hayqos gaththiza madunththay paxida koyro do7aza.
Revelation13:13 Hessi nam7anththo do7azi qasse asa sinththan tama saloppe duge yeggana gakkanaas gita malaatata ooththides.
Revelation13:14 Izi koyro do7aza sinththan malaata ooththana mala izas imettida malaata gaason biitta bolla diza asaa izi baleththides; mashshan madunxidi paxida do7aza bonchchos misle ooththana mala biitta bolla diza asaa wursi izi azazana.
Revelation13:15 Nam7anththo do7azi koyro do7aza mislezas shemppo immana mala izas godateththi imettides; de7o shemppo immanaas izas godateththi imettida mislezi haasayana malanne izas hokki goynnonttaade izi wursika wodhana malassa.

Revelation17:1 Laappun xuu7ata ba kushen oykkida laappun kiitanchchatappe issoy haa taakko yiidi taas
Revelation17:2 Biitta bolla diza kawoti wurikka izira laymatida; biitta bolla diza asaykka izi laymateththa woyne cajjen maththottides» gides.
Revelation17:3 Hessafe guye kiitanchchazi tana Ayanan duge bazzo biitta efides; iza asateththazi kumeth cashsha sunththan xaafettida laappun hu7etinne tammu kaceti diza issi zo7o do7aza bolla uttida issi maccassayo beyadis.
Revelation17:4 He maccassaya galal7o mala may7onne zo7o may7o may7adus; worqqan
Revelation17:5 Izi liiphe bolla
Revelation17:6 Hinna he maccassaya geeshshata suuththaninne Yesusa sunththan hayqqida asaa suuththan maththottidaaro tani beyadis; ta izo beyada daro malalettadis.
Revelation17:7 Gido attiin kiitanchchazi gidikko tana
Revelation17:8 Ne be7ida do7azi kasekka dizayssako shin ha7i deenna. Izi guyeppe ciimma olla giddofe kezananne gede dhayoso baana; alamey medhettoosoppe istta sunththi de7o maxaafan xaafettontta biitta bolla diza asay he do7azi kasekka dizayssa ha7i qasse donttayssa guyeppe yaanayssa gididayssa be7idi malalettana.
Revelation17:9 «Yuushshi qoppiza era asi koyettizay hannina; laappun hu7eti he maccassaya istta bolla uttida laappun zumata; heytikka laappun kawotakko.
Revelation17:10 He laappun kawotappe ichchashati kundida; issoy ha7i dees. Hankkoyssi buro yibeenna; izi yiidi guuththa wode takkanaas bessees.
Revelation17:11 Osppunththo kawozi kase dizaade shin ha7i gidikko baynda do7akko; izi laappunatappe issaa; izikka gede dhayoso baana.
Revelation17:12 «Ne be7ida tammu kaceti buro kawotontta tammu kawota; gidikkoka istti he do7azara issife issi saates do7azara kawotanaas kawoteththa wolqqa demmana.
Revelation17:13 He tammu kawotas issi qofay de7ana; istti ba wolqqanne ba godateth he do7azas aaththi immana.
Revelation17:14 Istti dorsaza bolla ola denththana shin dorsazi godatas Godaanne kawotas kawo gidida gishshas izi istta xoonana; izara dizayti xeygettidayta
Revelation17:15 He kiitanchchazikka taas
Revelation17:16 He do7azinne ne be7ida tammu kaceti he layma maccassayo ixxeettes; istti izo dhayoso gaththana; kallo mela ashshana; istti izi asho maananne izo tamankka xuuggana.
Revelation17:17 Ba qofaa polanaas hayssaththo ooththana mala hessa he qofaa istta wozinan woththiday Xoossa; hessa gishshas Xoossa qaalay polettana gakkanaas istti qofan issino gidana; ba kawoteththa godateththaaka he do7azas aaththi immana.
Revelation17:18 Ne be7ida maccassaya biitta kawotappe bollara kawotana diza wogga gita katamayo» gides.
Revelation18:1 Hessafe guye godateththi izas diza hara kiitanchchay saloppe duge wodhdhishin beyadis; iza bonchcho poo7oppe dendidayssan biittayka poo7ides.
Revelation18:2 Izi dhoqqa qaalan
Revelation18:3 Dere asaa wursa maththosiza ba laymateththa woyne cajjeza ushshadus; biitta bolla diza kawoti izira laymatida; biitta bolla diza zal7anchchati izis diza ishalo duussaafe dendidayssan daro duretida» gi waassides.
Revelation18:4 Qasseka hara qaalay saloppe
Revelation18:5 Izi nagaray doorettidi pude salo gakkides; Xoossika izi mooroza akeekides.
Revelation18:6 Iza immidaari gina izis kushe zaarite; izi ooso gishshas izis nam7u kushe ciggite; izis nam7u kushe iziyssafe aaththi walakkite.
Revelation18:7 Iza baas
Revelation18:8 Hessa gishshas izi bolla boshay wurikka issi gallas gakkana; hayqoy
Revelation18:9 Izira laymatishe ishalo duus de7ida ha biittaa kawoti iza xuugettishin cuwattiza cuwa be7idi izi gishshas waassidi yeekkana.
Revelation18:10 Izi waayezas babbida gishshas haahon eqqidi
Revelation18:11 Hayssafe guye istta markaben caanettidayssa shammiza asi baynda gishshas biitta bolla diza zal7anchchati izis yeekkananne kayottana.
Revelation18:12 Istta markaben caanettiday worqqa
Revelation18:13 qarafa
Revelation18:14 Zal7anchchati
Revelation18:15 Heytantta wursi shammi shammidi duretida; zal7anchchati izi bolla gakkida waayezas babbidi haahon eqqana; yeekkishenne muuzottishe
Revelation18:16 «Kase lee7e may7onne galal7o may7o qasseka zo7o may7o may7izaaris
Revelation18:17 Hessa mala haaroy issi saate garsan dhaydes» gaana. Markabe azazizayti wuri markaben bizayti wuri markabe giddon ooththizayti wurikka abba giddon zal7anchchati wurikka haahon eqqana.
Revelation18:18 Iza xuugettishin cuwattiza cuwaza be7idi
Revelation18:19 Ba hu7en gudulla qolidi yeekkishenne muuzottishe
Revelation18:20 Salozoo! Izi gaason ne ufayetta; Xoossi intte gishshas izi bolla pirdida gishshas intte geeshshati
Revelation18:21 Hessafe guye issi mino kiitanchchay wolqqama woxa shuch misatiza issi shuch denththidi
Revelation18:22 Diith misatiza bagana geetettizayssa shocizaytanne mazamure yexxizayta yeththa susul7e susul7iza asaynne dinke punnizayta giirissi nam7anththo nenan siyettenna; kushe hiillateththi diza ay asikka hayssafe guye nenan beettenna; woxa giirissi hayssafe guye nenan siyettenna.
Revelation18:23 Tama poo7oy hayssafe guye nenan poo7enna; addenne macca mishira qaalay hayssafe guye nenan seetettenna; ne zal7anchchati kase alamen erettidayta; neni qasse asaa wursa muurennon baleththadasa.
Revelation18:24 «Izi giddon nabeta sunththi
Revelation19:1 Hessafe guye daro asa qaala giiris misatiza gita qaala giirissi saloppe
Revelation19:2 Iza pirday tumanne adda; iza biittaa ba laymateththan tunisida wogga gita laymayo izi ba pirdan qaxxaydes; izo qaxxaydi ba oosanchchata suuththaa halo kessides» gishin ta siyadis.
Revelation19:3 Qasseka
Revelation19:4 Nam7u tammanne oyddu cimatinne oyddu do7ati alga bolla uttida Xoossaas gufannidi
Revelation19:5 Hessafe guye
Revelation19:6 Daro asa qaala giiris misatizay
Revelation19:7 Dorsaza sarge gallassi gakkida gishshassinne iza mishiraya giigetta uttida gishshas haa yiite; ane ufayettoos! Ane ufayssan iza bonchchoos.
Revelation19:8 Iza xolqettiza geeshsha lo7o may7o may7ana mala izis imettides» gishin siyadis; he lee7e may7ozi geeshshata xilloteththa ooso.
Revelation19:9 Hessafe kiitanchchazi tana
Revelation19:10 Tanikka he kiitanchchazas goynnanaas iza toho bolla ta gufannadis shin izi tana
Revelation19:11 Hessafe guye saloy doyettidayssa ta beyadis; qasseka booththa parakka beyadis; he paraza toggidayssi ammanettidaadenne tumanchcha geetettizaade; izi qasse tuma pirdeessinne olettees.
Revelation19:12 Iza ayfeti tama laco misateettes; iza hu7e bolla daro zawudeti deettes; izappe attiin hara asi oonikka erontta sunththi iza bolla xaafeti uttides.
Revelation19:13 Izi suuththan maadhettida may7o may7ides; iza sunththay
Revelation19:14 Booththa parata toggidi booththinne geesh gidida lo7o may7o may7ida salo olanchchati iza kaallida.
Revelation19:15 Ayzaabeta izara qanxxiza qara mashshay iza doonappe kezees; izi istta birata guufera haarana; izi wursika dandayza Xoossaa mino hanqo qonccisiza woyne cajje yedhdhizason istta yedhdhana.
Revelation19:16 Iza may7o bollanne iza wodira bolla
Revelation19:17 Hessafe guye arshe bolla eqqida issi kiitanchcha beyadis; izi salo bolla piradhdhiza kafotas
Revelation19:18 Kawota asho
Revelation19:19 Hessaththoka do7azinne biitta kawoti istta ola asaykka booththa para toggidayssaranne iza ola asaara olettanaas shiiqidayta beyadis.
Revelation19:20 Gido attiin he do7azi oykettides; kase izara daro malaata ooththida wordo nabezikka izara oykettides; izi he do7aza malatay istta bolla dizaytanne he do7aza mislezas goynnidaytanne gita malaatata ooththi ooththidi istta baleththishe gam7ides; heyti nam7ati diine geetettiza eexxiza tama abban hayqqontta paxa dishe yegettida.
Revelation19:21 Hankko attidayti qasse booththa para toggidayssa doonappe kezida mashshan hayqqida; kafotikka wuri istta ashoza mi kallida.
Revelation20:1 Hessafe guye ciimma ollaza doyza qulpenne gita sansalata ba kushen oykkida kiitanchchay saloppe duge wodhdhishin ta beyadis.
Revelation20:2 He daweza oykkidi shii layth qachchides; hessi dawezi Daabulosa woykko Xala7e geetettiza kase beni shooshshaza.
Revelation20:3 Shii layth gakkanaas izi kawoteththata baleththontta mala he kiitanchchazi daweza duge ciimma ollan yeggides; iza bolla gordidi maatame woththides; izi hessafe guuththa wodes birshettanaas bessees.
Revelation20:4 Hessafe guye tani algata beyadis; he algata bolla pirda pirdanaas godateththi isttas imettidayti uttidayta beyadis; qasseka Yesusa gishshas istti markkattida gishshassinne Xoossa qaalaa gishshas istta qoodhey qanxxettida asata shemppoka beyadis; heytantti do7azassinne iza mislezas goynnibeettenna; iza malataakka ba liiphe bolla gidiin ba kushe bolla woththonttayta; istti hayqoppe dendida Kirstoosara issife shii layth kawotida.
Revelation20:5 Hankko attida hayqeththati shii layththay polettana gakkanaas hayqoppe dendibeettenna; hessika hayqoppe koyro denththa.
Revelation20:6 Koyro denththan dizayti heyti anjjettidaytanne geeshshata. Istta bolla nam7anththo hayqos wolqqay deenna; istti Xoossa qeesetanne Kirstoosa qeeseta gidana; istti Kirstoosara shii layth kawotana.
Revelation20:7 He shii layththay polettida mala Xala7ey ba qashettidasoppe birshettana.
Revelation20:8 Alame bolla dizayti heytikka Googenne Maagooge geetettizayta baleththanaassinne istta olas ekki baanaas kezana; heytantta qooday abba achchan diza ace mala.
Revelation20:9 Istti kumeththa biittaa bolla laalettidi geeshshati dizasoyo dosettida katamayo giddoththida shin saloppe wodhdhida tamay istta dippi histti xuuggides.
Revelation20:10 Kase istta baleththida Daabulosi he do7azinne wordo nabezi dizasoy diinen eexxiza tama abba giddon yegettida; istti heen qammanne gallas mernaappe mernaa gakkanaas xuugettana.
Revelation20:11 Hessafe guye issi gita booththa alganne he algaa bolla uttidayssa beyadis; biittaynne saloy iza sinththafe baqatida shin istti biidi gelanasoy beettibeenna.
Revelation20:12 He algaza sinththan hayqqida cimatanne naateththata beyadis; maxaafatikka doyettida; hara de7o maxaafaykka doyettides; hayqqidaytikka maxaafatan kase xaafetti diza ba ooso ooso mala pirda ekkida.
Revelation20:13 Abbayka ba garsan diza hayqeththata immides; hayqoynne Duufoy qasse kase hayqqidi ba giddon dizayta immida; issi issi asi ba ooso ooso mala pirda ekkides.
Revelation20:14 Hayqoynne Duufoy tama abba giddo yegettida; he tama abbazi nam7anththo hayqo.
Revelation20:15 Iza sunththi de7o maxaafan xaafettonttaadey wurikka tama abbaan yegettides.
Revelation21:1 Hessafe guye tani ooraththa salonne ooraththa sa7a beyadis; kase saloynne kase sa7ay aadhdhi bida; hayssafe guye abbayka deenna.
Revelation21:2 Geeshsha katamaya ooraththa Yerusalaamey ba azinas giigettida mishira mala lo7a giigettada salo Xoossaa achchafe wodhdhishin tani beyadis.
Revelation21:3 Algazappe
Revelation21:4 Izi istta ayfeppe afunth ubbaa quccana; kase wogay aadhdhida gishshas hayqoy woykko muuzoteththi woykko yeehoy woykko waayey hayssafe guye deenna» giza gita qaalay kezishin tani siyadis.
Revelation21:5 He algaa bolla uttidayssika
Revelation21:6 Hessafe guye taas
Revelation21:7 Xoonidaadey hayssa laattana; tanikka izaades Xoos gidana; izikka taas naa gidana.
Revelation21:8 Gido attiin hankko baboti
Revelation21:9 Wurseththan laappun boshati isttan kumida laappun xuu7ata oykkida laappun kiitanchchatappe issoy taakko yiidi tana
Revelation21:10 Izi tana Ayanan issi gita dhoqqa zuma bolla kessidi geeshsha katamaya ooraththa Yerusalaamey Xoossa achchafe saloppe wodhdhizaaro bessides.
Revelation21:11 Izakka Xoossa bonchchon poo7isawus; izi poo7oza lo7eteththi qasse keehi bonchchettiza shuchcha malanne birille mala geeshshinne Iyasphide geetettiza inqqu mala.
Revelation21:12 Izis tammanne nam7u pengetara diza gita adussa gimbey dees; he tammanne nam7u pengetan tammanne nam7u kiitanchchati eqqidi naageettes; he pengeta bolla tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochchata sunththi xaafeti dees.
Revelation21:13 Arshey mokkiza baggara heedzdzu pengey dees; pudeha baggara heedzdzu pengey dees; dugeha baggara heedzdzu pengey dees arshey wulliza baggara heedzdzu pengey dees.
Revelation21:14 He katamay gimbes tammanne nam7u waanna yochchati deettes; he yochchata bolla tammanne nam7u Dorsaza Hawaareta sunththi xaafeti uttides.
Revelation21:15 Hessa taas yootida kiitanchchazas he katamayonne izi pengeta qasseka he gimbeza izara wadhdhiza worqqa zangey dees.
Revelation21:16 He katamay adussateththinne aahoteththi oyddu baggarakka issi gina; he kiitanchchazikka katamayo ba izara wadhdhiza wadha zangezara wadhdhiin adussateththay tammanne nam7u shii kilo metire mala gidides; izi dhoqqateththinne aahoteththika izi adussateththaa gina gidides.
Revelation21:17 Kiitanchchazi gimbeza wadhdhides; he kiitanchchazi izara wadhdhiza miishshazi erettida wadha miishshazi xeetanne oyddu tammanne oyddu metire mala gidides.
Revelation21:18 He gimbezi gimbettiday Iyasphide geetettiza shuchchanna; he katamayakka mastoote mala geeya uttida geeshsha worqqafe oosettadus.
Revelation21:19 He katamayssi yochcha shuchchay dumma dumma al7o shuchchan lo7i giigides; koyro yochchazi Iyasphide
Revelation21:20 ichchashanththozi Sardonkise
Revelation21:21 He tammanne nam7u pengetikka tammanne nam7u inqquta; pengeti wurikka issoy issoy issi inqqufe oosettida he katamay giddo ogey mastoote mala haa zaari bessiza muuruta worqqafe oosettides.
Revelation21:22 Ubbaa Dandayza Godaa Xoossinne Dorsazi izis Xoossa Keeththe gidida gishshas he katamay giddon hara Xoossa Keeth beyabeekke.
Revelation21:23 Xoossa bonchchoy izis poo7iza gishshassinne Dorsazi izi poo7o gidida gishshas he katamays arshey woykko aginay poo7isanaas koshshenna.
Revelation21:24 Dereti izi poo7ozan simerettana; biitta kawoti wurikka ba bonchcho izis ehana.
Revelation21:25 He katamayn qammay baynda gishshas izi pengeti ay wodekka gordettettenna.
Revelation21:26 Hara kawota gitateththinne bonchchoy izis yaana.
Revelation21:27 Harassiza miishshi mulekka gede izin gelenna; tunateth ooththizaytinne wordo haasayzayti mulekka hee izikko gelettenna; hee izin gelanayta sunththi kase he dorsaza de7o maxaafan xaafettidayta xalla.
Revelation22:1 Hessafe guye he kiitanchchazi Xoossa algafenne Dorsaza algaafe keziza mastoote mala xillo qizhzhi gida de7o haaththa shaafa tana bessides.
Revelation22:2 He shaafazi he katamays waanna ogeza giddo addan shaakki yeggidi aadhdhi bees; he shaafazas hadirsa baggaranne ushachcha baggara aginan aginan pacey baynda layththan tammanne nam7u agina kumeth ayfiza de7o miththi dees; he miththaa hayththay dere paththees.
Revelation22:3 Hessafe guye qanggeththi mulekka deenna; Xoossa algaynne Dorsaza algay he katamayn daana; iza oosanchchati izas goynnana.
Revelation22:4 Istti iza ayfeso beyana; iza sunththi istta liiphe bolla daana.
Revelation22:5 Hessafe guye qamay deenna; Godaa Xoossi isttas poo7iza gishshas tama poo7oy woykko arshe poo7oy isttas koshshenna; istti mernaappe mernaas kawotana.
Revelation22:6 Hessafe guye kiitanchchazi taas
Revelation22:7 Yesusikka
Revelation22:8 Hayta ha yo7ota siyidaynne be7iday tana Yohannisa; tani hayta ha yo7ota siyida wodenne be7ida wode hayta ha yo7ota tana bessida kiitanchchaza sinththan izas goynnanaas hokkada iza toho bolla kundadis.
Revelation22:9 He kiitanchchazi qasse
Revelation22:10 Qasseka
Revelation22:11 Hayssafe guye makkallizay gujji makkallo
Revelation22:12 «Hekko! Ta eeson yaana! Issaades issaades iza ooso mala ta izas izas immana waaga tani ta kushen oykka uttadis.
Revelation22:13 Alfaynne Oomegay
Revelation22:14 He de7o miththa ayfe maanaassinne he katamayo izi pengera gelanaas bessizayti ba may7o meeccidayti anjjettidayta.
Revelation22:15 Kana mala coo hoththu hoththizayti
Revelation22:16 «Tani Yesusi hayssa inttes markkattana mala ta kiitanchchaza Woosa Keeththatas yeddadis; taas yeleta zarkkeynne qommoy kase Dawitekko; tani poo7isiza wontta xoolintte.»
Revelation22:17 Xillo Ayanaynne iza mishiraya
Revelation22:18 Hekko tani hayssa maxaafazan xaafettida tinbite qaalaa siyizayti naagettana mala yootays. Oonikka hayssa ha qaalaa bolla aykkoka gujjiko hayssa ha maxaafazan xaafettida boshata Xoossi iza bolla gujjana.
Revelation22:19 Oonikka hayssa tinbite maxaafaan xaafettida qaalatappe issinokka pacisikko hayssa ha maxaafazan yootettida de7o miththa ayfeppenne geeshsha katamayppe Xoossi iza gishaza pacisana.
Revelation22:20 Haytantta ta markkattizayssi
